.spcol-t{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px;padding-bottom:5px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.spi{background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:9px 10px;margin-bottom:6px;border-left:3px solid var(--accent-purple);}
.spi-t{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;}.spi-m{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:10px;display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;}
.spi-sp{background:var(--accent-purple);color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:7px;font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.toast{position:fixed;bottom:18px;right:18px;padding:11px 18px;border-radius:var(--r);font-size:13px;font-weight:500;z-index:10000;transform:translateY(80px);opacity:0;transition:all .3s;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}.toast.show{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1;}.toast.ok{background:var(--accent-green);color:#fff;}.toast.err{background:var(--accent-red);color:#fff;}
@media(max-width:900px){.spcols{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}.pg{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.sr{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}}
/* ═══ Team page — cloned from index.html ═══ */
html{--text:var(--text-primary);--text2:var(--text-secondary);--text3:var(--text-muted);--blue:var(--accent-blue);--blue-bg:rgba(45,126,247,.15);--green:var(--accent-green);--green-bg:rgba(63,185,80,.15);--orange:var(--accent-orange);--orange-bg:rgba(240,136,62,.15);--red:var(--accent-red);--red-bg:rgba(248,81,73,.15);--purple:var(--accent-purple);--purple-bg:rgba(165,180,252,.15);--yellow:var(--accent-yellow);--yellow-bg:rgba(210,153,34,.15);--border2:#21262d;--font:var(--font-body);--mono:var(--font-mono);}
.loading-spinner{display:inline-block;width:16px;height:16px;border:2px solid var(--border);border-top-color:var(--blue);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:6px;}@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
.team-page{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:100%;}
.team-header{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);flex-shrink:0;}
.team-header-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
.page-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.lvl-badge{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.lvl-num{font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--blue);}
.search-bar{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 14px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;margin-bottom:10px;transition:border-color .15s;}
.search-bar:focus{border-color:var(--blue);}.search-bar::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.filter-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.filter-chip{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);transition:all .15s;}
.filter-chip:hover,.filter-chip.active{border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--text);background:var(--blue-bg);}
.table-wrap{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
.data-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}
.data-table th{padding:6px 8px;text-align:left;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:2;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;position:relative;}
.data-table td{padding:5px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);vertical-align:middle;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.data-table th.tm-th-resizable::after{content:'';position:absolute;right:0;top:25%;height:50%;width:3px;cursor:col-resize;background:transparent;}
.data-table th.tm-th-resizable:hover::after{background:var(--blue);border-radius:2px;}
.data-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);}
.avatar{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
.fte-code{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);}
.silo-badge{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;}
.nivel-badge{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.n1{background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);color:#f85149;}.n2{background:rgba(139,148,158,.15);color:#8b949e;}.n3{background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);}.n4{background:var(--purple-bg);color:var(--purple);}
.skills-bar-wrap{background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;height:6px;width:80px;overflow:hidden;display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:6px;}
.skills-bar{height:100%;border-radius:3px;}
.skill-tag{display:inline-block;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 6px;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;margin:1px;color:var(--text2);}
.skill-more{font-size:10px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:600;}
.btn-add-new{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#238636,#2ea043);border:1px solid #2ea043;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:6px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;transition:all .18s;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(35,134,54,.25);}.btn-add-new:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(35,134,54,.4);}
.fm-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.82);z-index:2000;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(6px);}.fm-overlay.open{display:flex;}
.fm-box{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;width:740px;max-width:97vw;max-height:94vh;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:0 28px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.7);}
.fm-header{padding:18px 24px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;}
.fm-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.fm-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text2);font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;transition:all .15s;}.fm-close:hover{color:var(--red);background:var(--red-bg);}
.fm-steps{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;padding:12px 32px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg3);gap:0;}
.fm-step-dot{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;position:relative;}
.fm-step-dot:not(:last-child)::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:11px;left:calc(50% + 12px);right:calc(-50% + 12px);height:2px;background:var(--border);}
.fm-step-dot.done:not(:last-child)::after{background:var(--green);}
.fsd-circle{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);position:relative;z-index:1;transition:all .3s;}
.fsd-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.4px;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;transition:color .3s;}
.fm-step-dot.active .fsd-circle{border-color:var(--blue);background:var(--blue);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(45,126,247,.25);}
.fm-step-dot.active .fsd-label{color:var(--blue);}
.fm-step-dot.done .fsd-circle{border-color:var(--green);background:var(--green);color:#fff;}
.fm-step-dot.done .fsd-label{color:var(--green);}
.fm-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px 24px;}
.fm-footer{padding:14px 24px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg3);}
.fm-step{display:none;animation:fm-fadein .2s ease;}.fm-step.active{display:block;}
@keyframes fm-fadein{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
.fm-field{margin-bottom:18px;}
.fm-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.fm-input{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:border-color .15s;font-family:var(--font);}.fm-input:focus{border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(45,126,247,.15);}.fm-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.fm-select{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
.fm-section-sep{height:1px;background:var(--border2);margin:18px 0;}
.nivel-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin:6px 0;}
.nivel-card{border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:var(--bg3);}.nivel-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}.nivel-card.sel{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.35);}
.nc-badge{font-size:22px;font-weight:900;font-family:var(--font-mono);margin-bottom:4px;}
.nc-desc{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:5px;line-height:1.3;}
.silo-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin:6px 0;}
.silo-card{border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:var(--bg3);}.silo-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);}.silo-card.sel{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.sc-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:5px;}.sc-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;}
.skill-cat-block{margin-bottom:14px;}
.skill-cat-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.skill-cat-line{height:2px;flex:1;border-radius:1px;opacity:.35;}
.skill-cat-cnt{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;opacity:.7;font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.skill-chips-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;}
.sk-chip{border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;background:var(--bg-primary);color:var(--text2);user-select:none;}.sk-chip:hover{color:var(--text);transform:scale(1.03);}.sk-chip.sel{font-weight:700;transform:scale(1.03);}
.preview-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg3) 0%,var(--bg2) 100%);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;margin:4px 0 14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.pc-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.pc-avatar{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:19px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.pc-name{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;}
.pc-meta{display:flex;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;}
.pc-skills-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:7px;}
.pc-skills-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:3px;}
.btn-fm-next{background:var(--blue);border:1px solid #4090ff;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:9px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:all .15s;}.btn-fm-next:hover{background:#4090ff;transform:translateY(-1px);}
.btn-fm-back{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}.btn-fm-back:hover{border-color:var(--text);color:var(--text);}
.btn-fm-submit{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#238636,#2ea043);border:1px solid #3fb950;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:9px 22px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:all .18s;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(35,134,54,.3);}.btn-fm-submit:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(35,134,54,.45);}.btn-fm-submit:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none;box-shadow:none;}
.fm-skill-counter{background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.3);border-radius:20px;padding:2px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.silo-redes{background:rgba(6,182,212,.15);color:#06b6d4}.silo-bbdd{background:rgba(168,85,247,.15);color:#a855f7}
.silo-unix{background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);color:#22c55e}.silo-seg{background:rgba(239,68,68,.15);color:#ef4444}
.silo-win{background:rgba(59,130,246,.15);color:#3b82f6}.silo-backend{background:rgba(249,115,22,.15);color:#f97316}
.silo-frontend{background:rgba(236,72,153,.15);color:#ec4899}.silo-soporte{background:rgba(139,143,152,.15);color:#8b8f98}
/* ═══ Scrum Tab ═══ */
.scrum-page{display:flex;gap:16px;min-height:0;}
.scrum-main{flex:1;min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;}
.scrum-sidebar{width:280px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
.sprint-timeline{display:flex;gap:6px;overflow-x:auto;padding:4px 0;}
.sprint-block{padding:6px 10px;border-radius:8px;min-width:70px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;flex-shrink:0;}
.sprint-block:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);}
.sprint-block.active{border:2px solid var(--accent-purple);background:rgba(188,140,255,.06);}
.sprint-block.done{border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.3);background:rgba(34,197,94,.06);}
.sprint-block.future{border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-card);opacity:.6;}
.sprint-header{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:14px 16px;}
.sprint-progress{height:8px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;margin-top:8px;}
.backlog-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}
.backlog-table th{padding:6px 8px;text-align:left;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:1;}
.backlog-table td{padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11px;vertical-align:middle;}
.backlog-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(188,140,255,.04);cursor:pointer;}
.tipo-badge{padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;}
.estado-badge{padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;}
.sb-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:12px;text-align:center;}
.sb-val{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:22px;font-weight:800;}
.sb-lbl{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;}
.ceremony-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.ceremony-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.ceremony-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
/* ═══ Gantt Tab ═══ */
.gantt-fecha-panel{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:18px 20px;margin-bottom:14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.gantt-fecha-big{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:32px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:1px;}
.gantt-fecha-old{font-size:16px;color:var(--text-muted);text-decoration:line-through;font-family:var(--font-mono);margin-right:12px;}
.gantt-progress-bar{height:10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:5px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;margin:12px 0 8px;}
.gantt-progress-fill{height:100%;border-radius:5px;transition:width .3s;}
.gantt-today-marker{position:absolute;top:-3px;width:2px;height:16px;background:var(--accent-red);z-index:1;}
.gantt-chart{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:16px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.gantt-row{display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:5px;height:22px;}
.gantt-label{width:120px;font-size:11px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;}
.gantt-bars{flex:1;position:relative;height:22px;}
.gantt-bar-base{position:absolute;height:10px;top:6px;border:1px dashed;border-radius:3px;opacity:.35;}
.gantt-bar-real{position:absolute;height:10px;top:6px;border-radius:3px;opacity:.85;}
.gantt-delay-tag{position:absolute;top:0;font-size:8px;color:var(--accent-red);font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;}
.gantt-today-line{position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;width:1px;background:var(--accent-red);opacity:.5;z-index:1;}
.gantt-legend{display:flex;gap:16px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:10px;padding-left:120px;}
.gantt-legend-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.gantt-legend-box{width:12px;height:8px;border-radius:2px;display:inline-block;}
.timeline-entry{position:relative;margin-bottom:18px;padding-left:28px;}
.timeline-line{position:absolute;left:8px;top:14px;bottom:-18px;width:2px;background:var(--border);}
.timeline-dot{position:absolute;left:3px;top:5px;width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--bg-primary);}
.timeline-dot.dashed{border:2px dashed var(--text-muted);background:transparent;}
/* Proyecto detail tab */
.proj-subtab{padding:5px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-secondary);white-space:nowrap;transition:all .15s;}
.proj-subtab:hover{border-color:var(--accent-purple);color:var(--text-primary);}
.proj-subtab.active{background:var(--accent-purple);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent-purple);}
.edt-fase{background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:8px;overflow:hidden;}
.edt-fase-head{padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.edt-fase-head:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);}
.edt-fase-body{display:none;padding:0 14px 10px;}.edt-fase.open .edt-fase-body{display:block;}
.edt-paquete{margin-bottom:6px;}
.edt-tarea{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:5px 8px;border-radius:4px;margin:2px 0;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;transition:background .15s;}
.edt-tarea:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);}
.risk-matrix{display:grid;grid-template-columns:30px repeat(5,1fr);grid-template-rows:repeat(5,40px) 20px;gap:2px;margin:10px 0;}
.risk-cell{border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:2px;}
.risk-label{font-size:8px;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:600;}
.sh-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;}
.sh-quadrant{border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;min-height:100px;}
.sh-person{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 0;font-size:11px;}
.gate-card{background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.notif-bell{position:relative;cursor:pointer;padding:4px 6px;border-radius:6px;transition:background .2s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;}
.notif-bell:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);}
.notif-bell svg{width:18px;height:18px;stroke:var(--text-secondary,#8b8f98);fill:none;stroke-width:1.8;}
.notif-badge{position:absolute;top:0;right:0;min-width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:7px;background:#ef4444;color:#fff;font-size:8px;font-weight:800;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0 3px;line-height:1;}
.notif-badge.show{display:flex;}
.notif-panel{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 8px);right:0;width:320px;max-height:380px;background:var(--bg-card,#1e2128);border:1px solid var(--border,#333840);border-radius:10px;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5);z-index:9100;display:none;overflow:hidden;}
.notif-panel.open{display:block;}
.notif-panel-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:10px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border,#333840);background:var(--bg-elevated,#252830);}
.notif-panel-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;}.notif-mark-all{font-size:9px;color:var(--accent-blue,#58a6ff);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;}
.notif-list{max-height:320px;overflow-y:auto;}
.notif-item{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;}
.notif-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);}
.notif-item.unread{background:rgba(88,166,255,.05);border-left:3px solid var(--accent-blue,#58a6ff);}
.notif-ico{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:13px;}
.notif-ico.asignacion{background:rgba(34,197,94,.12);}.notif-ico.estado{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);}.notif-ico.alerta{background:rgba(234,179,8,.12);}.notif-ico.urgente{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);}.notif-ico.info{background:rgba(139,92,246,.12);}
.notif-body{flex:1;min-width:0;}.notif-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.notif-msg{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary,#8b8f98);margin-top:1px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;}
.notif-time{font-size:8px;color:var(--text-muted,#6b7280);margin-top:2px;font-family:var(--font-mono,monospace);}
.notif-empty{padding:24px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted,#6b7280);font-size:11px;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="login-overlay"><div class="lc">
  <div class="lc-badge">GOB. BUILD</div>
  <h1>Cognitive PMO</h1><div class="sub">Panel del Coordinador de Proyectos &middot; PMO</div>
  <div class="lerr" id="lerr">Credenciales incorrectas</div>
  <input type="email" id="le" placeholder="Email" autocomplete="email">
  <input type="password" id="lp" placeholder="Contrase&ntilde;a" autocomplete="current-password">
  <button onclick="doLogin()">Acceder</button>
</div></div>

<div id="app" style="display:none;">
<div class="hdr"><div class="hdr-l">
  <div class="hdr-logo"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.15)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.4)" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="13" y="14" width="14" height="12" rx="2" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.3" fill="none"/><path d="M13 18h14M18 14v12M24 14v12" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1" opacity=".6"/></svg></div>
  <div><div class="hdr-t">Gobernanza BUILD</div><div class="hdr-s">Coordinaci&oacute;n de Proyectos &middot; PMO</div></div>
</div><div class="hdr-r">
  <div class="notif-bell" id="notif-bell" onclick="toggleNotifPanel(event)">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg>
    <span class="notif-badge" id="notif-badge">0</span>
    <div class="notif-panel" id="notif-panel">
      <div class="notif-panel-header"><span class="notif-panel-title">Notificaciones</span><span class="notif-mark-all" onclick="notifMarkAll(event)">Marcar todo le&iacute;do</span></div>
      <div class="notif-list" id="notif-list"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="thm"><span>&#9790;</span><div class="thm-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()"></div><span>&#9728;</span></div>
  <div class="pdot"></div><div class="hdr-u"><strong id="un">Coordinador</strong><span id="ur">Gobernanza BUILD</span></div>
  <button class="btn-out" onclick="doLogout()">Salir</button>
</div></div>

<div class="tabs">
  <button class="tb a" data-t="proyectos" onclick="sw('proyectos')"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(188,140,255,.12)" stroke="var(--accent-purple)" stroke-width="1.2"/><path d="M15 17l5-5 5 5M15 23l5 5 5-5" stroke="var(--accent-purple)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>PMO</button>
  <button class="tb" data-t="tecnicos" onclick="sw('tecnicos')"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(88,166,255,.12)" stroke="var(--accent-blue)" stroke-width="1.2"/><circle cx="16" cy="16" r="3.5" stroke="var(--accent-blue)" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none"/><circle cx="26" cy="16" r="3.5" stroke="var(--accent-blue)" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none"/></svg>T&eacute;cnicos</button>
  <button class="tb" data-t="scrum" onclick="sw('scrum')"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(247,120,186,.12)" stroke="var(--accent-pink)" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="10" y="13" width="20" height="3" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-pink)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><rect x="10" y="19" width="14" height="3" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-pink)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><rect x="10" y="25" width="8" height="3" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-pink)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/></svg>Scrum Board</button>
  <button class="tb" data-t="gantt" onclick="sw('gantt')"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(57,210,192,.12)" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="10" y="12" width="14" height="3" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><rect x="14" y="18" width="12" height="3" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><rect x="12" y="24" width="16" height="3" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/></svg>Gantt</button>
  <button class="tb" data-t="proyecto" onclick="sw('proyecto')"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(188,140,255,.12)" stroke="var(--accent-purple)" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="12" y="12" width="16" height="16" rx="2" stroke="var(--accent-purple)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><path d="M16 17h8M16 21h6M16 25h4" stroke="var(--accent-purple)" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>Detalle Proyecto</button>
  <button class="tb" data-t="cab" onclick="sw('cab')"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(57,210,192,.12)" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="11" y="14" width="18" height="14" rx="2" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><path d="M15 10v6M25 10v6M11 20h18" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>Calendario CAB</button>
</div>

<div class="cnt">
  <!-- CAB Alerts Banner BUILD -->
  <div id="cab-alerts-build" style="display:none;margin-bottom:12px;"></div>
  <!-- TAB 1: PROYECTOS con formulario BUILD real -->
  <div class="tp a" id="p-proyectos">
    <div class="sr" id="ps"></div>
    <div class="build-panel">
      <div class="build-header">
        <div class="build-header-title">
          <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--accent-purple)" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M2 20h20M5 20V10l7-7 7 7v10"/><rect x="9" y="14" width="6" height="6"/></svg>
          Solicitud de proyecto
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Desde negocio &rarr; PMO eval&uacute;a con 9 agentes IA</div>
      </div>
      <div class="build-body">
        <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
          <label class="bf-label">Nombre del proyecto <span style="color:var(--accent-red);font-size:12px;">*</span></label>
          <input type="text" id="bf-nombre" class="bf-input" placeholder="Ej: Migracion infraestructura RHEL9, Plataforma OpenShift, Modernizacion core banking...">
        </div>
        <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
          <label class="bf-label">Que necesita negocio y por que <span style="color:var(--accent-red);font-size:12px;">*</span></label>
          <textarea id="bf-resumen" rows="3" class="bf-textarea" placeholder="Describe que se quiere conseguir, cual es el problema de negocio, que beneficios espera la organizacion..."></textarea>
        </div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
          <div>
            <label class="bf-label">Presupuesto propuesto</label>
            <input type="text" inputmode="numeric" id="bf-presupuesto" class="bf-input" placeholder="Ej: 650000">
            <div class="bf-hint">Propuesta de negocio &middot; Opcional</div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <label class="bf-label">Fecha fin deseada</label>
            <input type="date" id="bf-fecha-fin" class="bf-input" onchange="buildCalcSemanas()">
            <div class="bf-hint" id="bf-semanas-calc">Propuesta de negocio &middot; Opcional</div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <label class="bf-label">Prioridad estrat&eacute;gica</label>
            <select id="bf-prioridad" class="bf-input" onchange="buildUpdatePrioInfo()">
              <option value="">-- Sin definir --</option><option value="Alta">Alta</option><option value="Media">Media</option><option value="Baja">Baja</option>
            </select>
            <div class="bf-hint" id="bf-prio-info">Define rigidez del plazo/coste</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-bottom:14px;">
          <label class="bf-label">Justificaci&oacute;n / contexto adicional</label>
          <textarea id="bf-justificacion" rows="2" class="bf-textarea" placeholder="Problema de negocio, riesgo de cumplimiento, obsolescencia tecnol&oacute;gica, presi&oacute;n competitiva... (opcional)"></textarea>
        </div>
        <div class="bf-info-box">
          <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#a78bfa;margin-bottom:4px;">Los agentes IA generar&aacute;n autom&aacute;ticamente:</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.6;">Acta de constituci&oacute;n &middot; Alcance y exclusiones &middot; EDT/WBS con tareas y skills &middot; Subtareas t&eacute;cnicas &middot; An&aacute;lisis de riesgos &middot; Mapa de stakeholders &middot; PM candidatos y equipo &middot; Presupuesto real vs propuesto &middot; Gantt y ruta cr&iacute;tica &middot; Quality gates</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;">Todo revisable y editable en las 4 pausas de gobernanza.</div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
          <button onclick="buildSubmitAndPipeline()" id="build-exec-btn" class="btn-build-exec">
            <span>&#9654;</span> Ejecutar Pipeline IA (9 agentes)
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Agent cascade BUILD — identical to index.html -->
    <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:12px 16px;margin-bottom:14px;overflow-x:auto;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M14.7 6.3a1 1 0 0 0 0 1.4l1.6 1.6a1 1 0 0 0 1.4 0l3.77-3.77a6 6 0 0 1-7.94 7.94l-6.91 6.91a2.12 2.12 0 0 1-3-3l6.91-6.91a6 6 0 0 1 7.94-7.94l-3.76 3.76z"/></svg>
        <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Cascada BUILD v2.0 &mdash; 10 Agentes IA + 4 Pausas Gobernanza</span>
        <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--font-mono);">READY</span>
      </div>
      <div onclick="openBuildFullscreenGov()" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0;overflow-x:auto;padding:4px 0;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;" title="Click para ver detalle de agentes y tools">
        <span style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;padding:4px 8px;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;">PMBOK Input</span>
        <svg width="20" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="14" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="14,2 20,5 14,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 8px;border:2px solid #10b98140;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg2);flex-shrink:0;border-left:3px solid #10b981;"><div style="width:26px;height:26px;flex-shrink:0;color:#10b981;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M30 75 H70 L50 30 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="50" cy="20" r="5" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M40 55 H60 M45 45 H55" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/></svg></div><div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#e4e5e9;">AG-005 Estratega</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">EDT/WBS &middot; PMBOK 7</div></div></div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;padding:0 2px;"><div style="width:0;height:14px;border-left:2px dashed rgba(234,179,8,0.5);"></div><span style="font-size:6px;font-weight:700;color:#eab308;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.1);padding:1px 4px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;">&#9208;1</span><div style="width:0;height:14px;border-left:2px dashed rgba(234,179,8,0.5);"></div></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 8px;border:2px solid #d946ef40;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg2);flex-shrink:0;border-left:3px solid #d946ef;"><div style="width:26px;height:26px;flex-shrink:0;color:#d946ef;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="25" y="30" width="15" height="15" rx="2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M40 37 H50" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/><rect x="50" y="25" width="20" height="20" rx="3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/></svg></div><div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#e4e5e9;">AG-013 Decomposer</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">Subtareas &middot; CMDB</div></div></div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;padding:0 2px;"><div style="width:0;height:14px;border-left:2px dashed rgba(234,179,8,0.5);"></div><span style="font-size:6px;font-weight:700;color:#eab308;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.1);padding:1px 4px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;">&#9208;2</span><div style="width:0;height:14px;border-left:2px dashed rgba(234,179,8,0.5);"></div></div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:4px 6px;border:2px solid #eab30840;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg2);border-left:3px solid #eab308;"><div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;color:#eab308;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="55" width="8" height="20" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="42" y="45" width="8" height="30" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="54" y="35" width="8" height="40" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/></svg></div><div><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#e4e5e9;">AG-014 Risk</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;">Riesgos</div></div></div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:4px 6px;border:2px solid #ec489940;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg2);border-left:3px solid #ec4899;"><div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;color:#ec4899;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="35" cy="50" r="8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="65" cy="50" r="8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M45 50 H55" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/></svg></div><div><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#e4e5e9;">AG-015 Stakeholder</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;">Stakeholders</div></div></div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:4px 6px;border:2px solid #2dd4bf40;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg2);border-left:3px solid #2dd4bf;"><div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;color:#2dd4bf;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="32" width="40" height="35" rx="4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><line x1="30" y1="45" x2="70" y2="45" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="42" y1="32" x2="42" y2="45" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="58" y1="32" x2="58" y2="45" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/></svg></div><div><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#e4e5e9;">AG-011 CAB</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;">Cambios &middot; CMDB</div></div></div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;padding:0 2px;"><div style="width:0;height:14px;border-left:2px dashed rgba(234,179,8,0.5);"></div><span style="font-size:6px;font-weight:700;color:#eab308;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.1);padding:1px 4px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;">&#9208;3</span><div style="width:0;height:14px;border-left:2px dashed rgba(234,179,8,0.5);"></div></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 8px;border:2px solid #eab30840;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg2);flex-shrink:0;border-left:3px solid #eab308;"><div style="width:26px;height:26px;flex-shrink:0;color:#eab308;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="30" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="50" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="55" y="30" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="55" y="50" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/></svg></div><div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#e4e5e9;">AG-006 Resource</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">PM &middot; Equipo</div></div></div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;padding:0 2px;"><div style="width:0;height:14px;border-left:2px dashed rgba(234,179,8,0.5);"></div><span style="font-size:6px;font-weight:700;color:#eab308;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.1);padding:1px 4px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;">&#9208;4</span><div style="width:0;height:14px;border-left:2px dashed rgba(234,179,8,0.5);"></div></div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:4px 6px;border:2px solid #10b98140;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg2);border-left:3px solid #10b981;"><div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;color:#10b981;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="35" rx="20" ry="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M30 35 V65 A20 10 0 0 0 70 65 V35" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/></svg></div><div><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#e4e5e9;">AG-016 Cost</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;">BAC &middot; ROI</div></div></div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:4px 6px;border:2px solid #ec489940;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg2);border-left:3px solid #ec4899;"><div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;color:#ec4899;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="35" width="40" height="8" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="50" width="25" height="8" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="65" width="55" height="8" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/></svg></div><div><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#e4e5e9;">AG-007 Planificador</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;">Gantt &middot; CPM</div></div></div>
        </div>
        <svg width="20" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="14" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="14,2 20,5 14,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 8px;border:2px solid #8b5cf640;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg2);flex-shrink:0;border-left:3px solid #8b5cf6;"><div style="width:26px;height:26px;flex-shrink:0;color:#8b5cf6;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="35" y="45" width="30" height="25" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M40 45 V35 A10 10 0 0 1 60 35 V45" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/></svg></div><div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#e4e5e9;">AG-017 Quality</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">Gates &middot; DoD</div></div></div>
        <svg width="20" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="14" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="14,2 20,5 14,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
        <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#22c55e;padding:4px 10px;border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3);border-radius:6px;background:rgba(34,197,94,0.06);white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;">&check; Output</span>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:2px dashed rgba(16,185,129,0.2);">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;opacity:0.6;">
          <div style="width:28px;height:28px;flex-shrink:0;color:#10b981;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="50" cy="40" r="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M30 65 C30 55 40 50 50 50 C60 50 70 55 70 65 V70 H30 V65 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/></svg></div>
          <div><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:#10b981;">AG-018 Governance Advisor</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;">Disponible durante las 4 pausas de gobernanza</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Projects grid -->
    <div class="pg" id="pgrid"><div style="grid-column:1/-1;padding:35px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Cargando...</div></div>
  </div>

  <!-- TAB 2: TÉCNICOS (full team page — cloned from index.html) -->
  <div class="tp" id="p-tecnicos">
  <div class="team-page">
    <div class="team-header" style="padding:10px 20px 8px;">
      <div class="team-header-top" style="margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div class="page-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="flex-shrink:0"><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="3.5"/><path d="M2 21v-1.5A5.5 5.5 0 0 1 7.5 14h3A5.5 5.5 0 0 1 16 19.5V21"/><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="2.5" opacity=".6"/><path d="M20 13.5h1.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 25 17v1" opacity=".6"/></svg> Directorio de Equipo <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;" id="team-count">0 t&eacute;cnicos</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <button onclick="toggleTeamDashboard()" style="background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.3);color:var(--blue);border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">
            <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;"><path d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2"/></svg>Dashboard
          </button>
          <button class="btn-add-new" onclick="openTeamForm()" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;">
            <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:2px;"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>
            T&eacute;cnico
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="team-dashboard" style="display:none;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;" id="team-estado-badges"></div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 2fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
            <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Ocupaci&oacute;n Global</div>
            <div style="position:relative;width:80px;height:50px;margin:0 auto;">
              <canvas id="team-gauge" width="80" height="50"></canvas>
              <div style="position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;text-align:center;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:800;" id="team-gauge-pct">0%</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-around;margin-top:6px;font-size:9px;">
              <span style="color:var(--orange);">Ocup: <strong id="td-ocupados">0</strong></span>
              <span style="color:var(--green);">Disp: <strong id="td-disponibles">0</strong></span>
              <span style="color:var(--text3);">Otros: <strong id="td-otros">0</strong></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
            <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Carga RUN vs BUILD</div>
            <div style="position:relative;width:80px;height:50px;margin:0 auto;">
              <canvas id="team-runbuild-gauge" width="80" height="50"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-around;margin-top:6px;font-size:9px;">
              <span style="color:var(--blue);"><strong id="td-pct-run">0%</strong> RUN</span>
              <span style="color:var(--green);"><strong id="td-pct-build">0%</strong> BUILD</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px;">
              <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">Ocupaci&oacute;n por Silo</div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;">
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N1 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n1">0</span></div>
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N2 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n2">0</span></div>
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N3 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n3">0</span></div>
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N4 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n4">0</span></div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div id="team-silo-bars"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;" onclick="toggleTeamDashboard()">&blacktriangle; Minimizar dashboard</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;">
        <input class="search-bar" placeholder="Buscar por nombre, FTE, proyecto..." oninput="filterTeam(this.value)" style="margin-bottom:0;flex:1;">
        <div class="filter-row" style="flex-wrap:nowrap;">
          <div class="filter-chip active" onclick="filterSilo('Todos',this)">Todos</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Frontend',this)">Front</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Soporte',this)">Sop</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Redes',this)">Redes</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Windows',this)">Win</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Backend',this)">Back</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('QA',this)">QA</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('DevOps',this)">DevOps</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Seguridad',this)">Sec</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('BBDD',this)">BBDD</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
      <table class="data-table" id="team-table" style="table-layout:fixed;">
        <thead><tr id="team-thead-row">
          <th style="width:160px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="nombre">Nombre</th>
          <th style="width:60px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="fte">FTE</th>
          <th style="width:65px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="silo">Silo</th>
          <th style="width:38px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="nivel">Nivel</th>
          <th style="width:55px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="skills">Skills</th>
          <th style="width:38px;text-align:center;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="tareas">Tareas</th>
          <th style="width:100px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="vinculacion">Vinculaci&oacute;n</th>
          <th style="width:75px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="carga">Carga</th>
          <th style="width:70px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="estado">Estado</th>
          <th style="width:140px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="email">Email</th>
          <th style="width:90px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="telefono">Tel&eacute;fono</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody id="team-tbody"><tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--text2);"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Cargando equipo...</td></tr></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
    <div id="team-disponibles-panel" style="display:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);padding:10px 20px;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--green)" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>
          T&eacute;cnicos Disponibles por Silo
        </div>
        <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;" onclick="document.getElementById('team-disponibles-panel').style.display='none'">&times; Cerrar</span>
      </div>
      <div id="team-disponibles-grid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);padding:4px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-shrink:0;">
      <button onclick="toggleDisponibles()" style="background:var(--green-bg);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.3);color:var(--green);border-radius:5px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">&bull; Disponibles por Silo</button>
      <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);" id="team-footer-info"></span>
    </div>
  </div>
  </div>

  <!-- TAB 3: SCRUM -->
  <div class="tp" id="p-scrum">
    <!-- Project selector -->
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <label style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);">Proyecto:</label>
      <select id="gb-project-selector" onchange="loadProjectScrum(this.value)" style="padding:6px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:12px;min-width:220px;outline:none;font-family:var(--font-body);">
        <option value="">Seleccionar proyecto...</option>
      </select>
      <span id="gb-sprint-badge" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--accent-purple);font-weight:600;display:none;"></span>
      <span id="gb-velocity-badge" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--font-mono);display:none;"></span>
    </div>
    <div class="scrum-page">
      <!-- MAIN -->
      <div class="scrum-main">
        <div id="scrum-timeline-wrap" style="display:none;">
          <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Sprint Timeline</div>
          <div class="sprint-timeline" id="sprint-timeline"></div>
        </div>
        <div id="sprint-header-wrap" style="display:none;"></div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);overflow:hidden;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;">
          <div style="padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;">
            <span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;" id="backlog-title">Sprint Backlog</span>
            <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--font-mono);" id="backlog-count">0 items</span>
          </div>
          <div style="flex:1;overflow-y:auto;" id="backlog-body">
            <div style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:12px;">Selecciona un proyecto para ver los sprints</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- SIDEBAR -->
      <div class="scrum-sidebar">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;" id="scrum-kpis">
          <div class="sb-card"><div class="sb-val" style="color:var(--accent-purple);">0</div><div class="sb-lbl">Story Points</div></div>
          <div class="sb-card"><div class="sb-val" style="color:var(--accent-green);">0</div><div class="sb-lbl">Completados</div></div>
          <div class="sb-card"><div class="sb-val" style="color:var(--accent-blue);">0</div><div class="sb-lbl">Items</div></div>
          <div class="sb-card"><div class="sb-val" style="color:var(--accent-pink);">0</div><div class="sb-lbl">Equipo</div></div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Burndown Chart <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(59,130,246,0.15);color:#3b82f6;font-size:9px;cursor:help;" title="Muestra pts restantes vs ritmo ideal. Si la l&iacute;nea real est&aacute; por encima, el equipo va retrasado.">?</span></div>
          <div style="height:160px;position:relative;"><canvas id="burndown-chart"></canvas></div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Velocity <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(59,130,246,0.15);color:#3b82f6;font-size:9px;cursor:help;" title="Pts completados por sprint. Predice capacidad futura. Velocity estable = equipo maduro.">?</span></div>
          <div style="height:140px;position:relative;"><canvas id="velocity-chart"></canvas></div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Ceremonias Scrum</div>
          <div id="scrum-ceremonies">
            <div class="ceremony-item"><div class="ceremony-dot" style="background:var(--accent-blue);"></div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">Daily Standup</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">Diario 9:15 (15min)</div></div></div>
            <div class="ceremony-item"><div class="ceremony-dot" style="background:var(--accent-purple);"></div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">Sprint Planning</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">Lunes S1 (2h)</div></div></div>
            <div class="ceremony-item"><div class="ceremony-dot" style="background:var(--accent-green);"></div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">Sprint Review</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">Viernes S2 (1h)</div></div></div>
            <div class="ceremony-item"><div class="ceremony-dot" style="background:var(--accent-orange);"></div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">Retrospectiva</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">Viernes S2 (1h)</div></div></div>
            <div class="ceremony-item"><div class="ceremony-dot" style="background:var(--accent-pink);"></div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">Backlog Grooming</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">Mi&eacute;rcoles S2 (1h)</div></div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- TAB 4: GANTT -->
  <div class="tp" id="p-gantt">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;">
      <label style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);">Proyecto:</label>
      <select id="gb-gantt-proj" onchange="SELECTED_PROJECT=this.value;document.getElementById('gb-project-selector').value=this.value;loadGanttView(this.value)" style="padding:6px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:12px;min-width:220px;outline:none;font-family:var(--font-body);"></select>
    </div>
    <!-- Fecha fin panel -->
    <div class="gantt-fecha-panel" id="gantt-fecha-panel">
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Fecha fin proyecto</div>
      <div id="gantt-fechas-display" style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <span class="gantt-fecha-big" style="color:var(--text-muted);">Selecciona un proyecto</span>
      </div>
      <div class="gantt-progress-bar" id="gantt-main-progress"><div class="gantt-progress-fill" style="width:0%;background:var(--accent-green);"></div></div>
      <div id="gantt-fecha-meta" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;"></div>
    </div>
    <!-- Gantt chart -->
    <div class="gantt-chart" id="gantt-chart-wrap">
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;">Gantt de Sprints &mdash; Baseline vs Real</div>
      <div id="gb-gantt-months" style="display:flex;padding-left:120px;margin-bottom:4px;"></div>
      <div style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:8px;margin-left:120px;"></div>
      <div id="gb-gantt-chart"></div>
      <div class="gantt-legend" id="gb-gantt-legend"></div>
    </div>
    <!-- Historial -->
    <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:16px;">
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;">Hist&oacute;rico de cambios de fecha fin</div>
      <div id="gb-historial"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="tp" id="p-proyecto">
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;">
    <label style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);">Proyecto:</label>
    <select id="gb-proj-detail" onchange="loadProjectDetail(this.value)" style="padding:6px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:12px;min-width:220px;outline:none;"></select>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;" id="proj-kpis"></div>
  <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:12px;overflow-x:auto;" id="proj-subtabs"></div>
  <div id="proj-content" style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:16px;min-height:300px;">
    <div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Selecciona un proyecto</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TAB 6: CALENDARIO CAB -->
<div class="tp" id="p-cab">
  <!-- Sub-nav CAB -->
  <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <button class="btn-sm cab-sub a" data-cab="cal" onclick="swCAB('cal')" style="padding:6px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">Periodos de Exclusi&oacute;n</button>
    <button class="btn-sm cab-sub" data-cab="props" onclick="swCAB('props')" style="padding:6px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">Propuestas CAB</button>
    <button class="btn-sm cab-sub" data-cab="ventanas" onclick="swCAB('ventanas')" style="padding:6px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">Ventanas Activas</button>
    <button class="btn-sm cab-sub" data-cab="alertas" onclick="swCAB('alertas')" style="padding:6px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">Alertas CAB</button>
    <div style="flex:1;"></div>
    <button onclick="generarPropuestaCAB()" style="padding:6px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:var(--accent-cyan);color:#000;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;">&#9889; Generar Propuesta</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Icono animado AG-011 -->
  <div id="cab-agent-visual" style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px;display:none;">
    <svg width="340" height="120" viewBox="0 0 340 120">
      <g id="cab-hex-director" style="opacity:0.3;transition:opacity 0.5s;">
        <polygon points="170,8 200,24 200,56 170,72 140,56 140,24" fill="none" stroke="#7c3aed" stroke-width="2" id="cab-hex-dir-shape"/>
        <text x="170" y="38" text-anchor="middle" fill="#7c3aed" font-size="10" font-weight="600">AG-011</text>
        <text x="170" y="52" text-anchor="middle" fill="#aaa" font-size="8">DIRECTOR</text>
      </g>
      <g id="cab-hex-w1" style="opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s;"><polygon points="30,78 48,88 48,108 30,118 12,108 12,88" fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="30" y="102" text-anchor="middle" fill="#06b6d4" font-size="8">W1</text></g>
      <g id="cab-hex-w2" style="opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s;"><polygon points="80,78 98,88 98,108 80,118 62,108 62,88" fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="80" y="102" text-anchor="middle" fill="#06b6d4" font-size="8">W2</text></g>
      <g id="cab-hex-w3" style="opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s;"><polygon points="130,78 148,88 148,108 130,118 112,108 112,88" fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="130" y="102" text-anchor="middle" fill="#06b6d4" font-size="8">W3</text></g>
      <g id="cab-hex-w4" style="opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s;"><polygon points="210,78 228,88 228,108 210,118 192,108 192,88" fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="210" y="102" text-anchor="middle" fill="#06b6d4" font-size="8">W4</text></g>
      <g id="cab-hex-w5" style="opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s;"><polygon points="260,78 278,88 278,108 260,118 242,108 242,88" fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="260" y="102" text-anchor="middle" fill="#06b6d4" font-size="8">W5</text></g>
      <g id="cab-hex-w6" style="opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s;"><polygon points="310,78 328,88 328,108 310,118 292,108 292,88" fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="310" y="102" text-anchor="middle" fill="#06b6d4" font-size="8">W6</text></g>
      <g id="cab-hex-merger" style="opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.5s;">
        <polygon points="170,48 200,64 200,96 170,112 140,96 140,64" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="2"/>
        <text x="170" y="82" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f59e0b" font-size="8" font-weight="600">MERGER</text>
      </g>
    </svg>
  </div>

  <!-- Sub-panel: Periodos (Vista Anual 12 meses) -->
  <div class="cab-panel a" id="cab-cal">
    <!-- Filtro año + leyenda -->
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;">
      <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;">
        <button class="cab-yr-btn" onclick="cabSetYear(2024)" style="padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--accent-purple);color:#fff;border:none;">2024</button>
        <button class="cab-yr-btn" onclick="cabSetYear(2025)" style="padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);">2025</button>
        <button class="cab-yr-btn" onclick="cabSetYear(2026)" style="padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);">2026</button>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);">
        <span><span style="display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;background:#ef4444;border-radius:2px;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;opacity:0.6;"></span>Exclusi&oacute;n</span>
        <span><span style="display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;background:#f59e0b;border-radius:2px;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;opacity:0.6;"></span>Precauci&oacute;n</span>
        <span><span style="display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;background:#10b981;border-radius:2px;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;opacity:0.6;"></span>Ventana CAB</span>
        <span><span style="display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;border:1px solid var(--text-muted);border-radius:2px;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;"></span>Libre</span>
      </div>
      <button onclick="cabOpenPeriodModal('create')" style="padding:4px 12px;background:var(--accent-cyan);color:#000;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">+ Nuevo Freeze</button>
    </div>
    <!-- Grid anual + sidebar -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 220px;gap:12px;">
      <div id="cab-annual-grid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;"></div>
      <div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:8px;">Periodos <span id="cab-yr-label">2024</span></div>
          <div id="cab-period-sidebar"></div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:6px;">Resumen anual</div>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3px;font-size:11px;">
            <span style="color:var(--text-muted);">D&iacute;as exclusi&oacute;n:</span><span id="cab-stat-excl" style="font-weight:600;color:#ef4444;">0</span>
            <span style="color:var(--text-muted);">D&iacute;as precauci&oacute;n:</span><span id="cab-stat-warn" style="font-weight:600;color:#f59e0b;">0</span>
            <span style="color:var(--text-muted);">D&iacute;as ventana CAB:</span><span id="cab-stat-cab" style="font-weight:600;color:#10b981;">0</span>
            <span style="color:var(--text-muted);">D&iacute;as libres:</span><span id="cab-stat-free" style="font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">0</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid rgba(6,182,212,0.3);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.6;">
          <div style="font-weight:600;color:var(--accent-cyan);margin-bottom:4px;">C&oacute;mo funciona</div>
          <span style="color:#ef4444;">Rojo</span><span style="color:var(--text-muted);"> = alta carga, NO tocar.</span><br>
          <span style="color:#f59e0b;">&Aacute;mbar</span><span style="color:var(--text-muted);"> = carga media, precauci&oacute;n.</span><br>
          <span style="color:#10b981;">Verde</span><span style="color:var(--text-muted);"> = ventana CAB (fines de semana). AG-011 propone aqu&iacute;.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Panel detalle del día (click) -->
    <div id="cab-day-detail" style="display:none;margin-top:10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Sub-panel: Propuestas -->
  <div class="cab-panel" id="cab-props" style="display:none;">
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(340px,1fr));gap:12px;" id="cab-propuestas-grid"></div>
    <div id="cab-propuesta-detail" style="display:none;margin-top:16px;"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Sub-panel: Ventanas Activas -->
  <div class="cab-panel" id="cab-ventanas" style="display:none;">
    <div class="table-wrap" style="max-height:500px;overflow-y:auto;">
      <table class="data-table" id="cab-ventanas-table" style="table-layout:fixed;">
        <thead><tr>
          <th style="width:60px">Activo</th><th style="width:50px">Criticidad</th>
          <th style="width:80px">D&iacute;as</th><th style="width:50px">Horario</th>
          <th style="width:50px">Riesgo</th><th style="width:40px">Score</th>
          <th style="width:60px">V&aacute;lido hasta</th><th style="width:50px">Estado</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody id="cab-ventanas-body"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Sub-panel: Alertas -->
  <div class="cab-panel" id="cab-alertas" style="display:none;">
    <div id="cab-alertas-list" style="display:grid;gap:10px;"></div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>

<!-- Modal Crear/Editar Periodo de Exclusión -->
<div id="cab-period-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:1000;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;">
<div style="max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;position:relative;">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">
    <div>
      <p id="cab-pm-title" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;margin:0;color:var(--text-primary);">Nuevo periodo de exclusion (Change Freeze)</p>
      <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:2px 0 0;">ITIL 4 Change Enablement</p>
    </div>
    <button onclick="cabClosePeriodModal()" style="padding:4px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">&#10005;</button>
  </div>
  <input type="hidden" id="cab-pm-id" value="">
  <input type="hidden" id="cab-pm-mode" value="create">
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
    <div>
      <label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Nombre del periodo</label>
      <input type="text" id="cab-pm-nombre" placeholder="CIERRE_FISCAL_2025" style="width:100%;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;">
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;font-style:italic;">MAYUSCULAS_CON_GUIONES</div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Nivel de impacto</label>
      <select id="cab-pm-impacto" style="width:100%;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;">
        <option value="ALTO">ALTO &mdash; Change Freeze total</option>
        <option value="MEDIO">MEDIO &mdash; Cambios con aprobacion CAB</option>
        <option value="BAJO">BAJO &mdash; Cambios rutinarios permitidos</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
    <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Fecha inicio</label><input type="date" id="cab-pm-inicio" style="width:100%;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;"></div>
    <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Fecha fin</label><input type="date" id="cab-pm-fin" style="width:100%;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;"></div>
    <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Carga pico (%)</label><input type="number" id="cab-pm-pico" min="0" max="100" value="80" style="width:100%;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;"></div>
  </div>
  <div style="margin-bottom:12px;"><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Justificacion (ITIL)</label><textarea id="cab-pm-notas" placeholder="Cierre contable anual..." style="width:100%;height:50px;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;resize:vertical;"></textarea></div>
  <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:12px;margin-bottom:12px;">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;">
      <p style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0;">Activos afectados</p>
      <span id="cab-pm-sel-count" style="background:rgba(59,130,246,0.15);color:#3b82f6;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;">0 seleccionados</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:8px;">
      <button onclick="cabPmQuick('all')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);">Todos</button>
      <button onclick="cabPmQuick('pro')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);">PRODUCCION</button>
      <button onclick="cabPmQuick('pre')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);">PREPRODUCCION</button>
      <button onclick="cabPmQuick('criticos')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);">Solo CRITICOS</button>
      <button onclick="cabPmQuick('crit+alta')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);">CRITICOS+ALTOS</button>
      <button onclick="cabPmQuick('infra')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);">Infraestructura</button>
      <button onclick="cabPmQuick('app')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);">Aplicaciones</button>
      <button onclick="cabPmQuick('red')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);">Red</button>
      <button onclick="cabPmQuick('seg')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);">Seguridad</button>
      <button onclick="cabPmQuick('clear')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid var(--border);">Limpiar</button>
    </div>
    <input type="text" id="cab-pm-search" placeholder="Buscar activo..." oninput="cabPmFilterAssets(this.value)" style="width:100%;padding:6px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;margin-bottom:6px;">
    <div id="cab-pm-assets" style="max-height:250px;overflow-y:auto;"></div>
  </div>
  <div id="cab-pm-impact" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;">
    <div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div id="cab-pm-i-crit" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:#ef4444;">0</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Criticos</div></div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div id="cab-pm-i-alta" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:#f59e0b;">0</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Altos</div></div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div id="cab-pm-i-media" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:#06b6d4;">0</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Medios</div></div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div id="cab-pm-i-total" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">0</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Total</div></div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:12px;">
    <button id="cab-pm-delete-btn" onclick="cabDeletePeriod()" style="display:none;padding:6px 14px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Eliminar periodo</button>
    <div style="margin-left:auto;display:flex;gap:8px;">
      <button onclick="cabClosePeriodModal()" style="padding:6px 14px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>
