      <button onclick="cabSavePeriod()" style="padding:6px 18px;background:var(--accent-cyan);color:#000;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;" id="cab-pm-save-btn">Crear Change Freeze</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Modal Detalle Propuesta CAB -->
<div id="cab-proposal-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:1001;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;">
<div style="max-width:740px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;position:relative;">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:14px;">
    <div><p id="cab-prop-title" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;margin:0;color:var(--text-primary);"></p><p id="cab-prop-subtitle" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:2px 0 0;"></p></div>
    <button onclick="cabClosePropModal()" style="padding:4px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">&#10005;</button>
  </div>
  <div id="cab-prop-kpis" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;"></div>
  <div id="cab-prop-tabs" style="display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:10px;"></div>
  <div id="cab-prop-content" style="max-height:50vh;overflow-y:auto;"></div>
  <div id="cab-prop-actions" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);"></div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Modal Detalle Ventana CAB -->
<div id="cab-window-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:1002;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;">
<div style="max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:14px;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
      <div id="cab-wm-icon" style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:600;font-size:11px;"></div>
      <div><p id="cab-wm-title" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;margin:0;color:var(--text-primary);"></p><p id="cab-wm-subtitle" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:2px 0 0;"></p></div>
    </div>
    <button onclick="cabCloseWindowModal()" style="padding:4px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">&#10005;</button>
  </div>
  <div id="cab-wm-content"></div>
  <div id="cab-wm-actions" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);"></div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Modal Detalle Alerta CAB -->
<div id="cab-alert-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:1003;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;">
<div style="max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;">
  <div id="cab-am-header"></div>
  <div id="cab-am-context"></div>
  <div id="cab-am-actions-section"></div>
  <div id="cab-am-timeline"></div>
  <div id="cab-am-status-section"></div>
  <div id="cab-am-footer" style="margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);"></div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Pipeline opens in new tab (no iframe) -->

<!-- ══════════════════ MODAL: SPRINT ITEM ══════════════════ -->
<div class="fm-overlay" id="fm-sprint-item" onclick="if(event.target===this)fmClose('fm-sprint-item')">
  <div class="fm-box" style="width:580px;">
    <div style="padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
      <span id="si-tipo-badge" class="tipo-badge">TASK</span>
      <span style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;" id="si-modal-title">Editar Item</span>
      <span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-left:auto;" id="si-key"></span>
      <button onclick="fmClose('fm-sprint-item')" style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;">&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:16px 18px;overflow-y:auto;max-height:65vh;">
      <input type="hidden" id="si-edit-id">
      <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
        <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">T&iacute;tulo</label>
        <input class="sap-input" id="si-titulo" placeholder="T&iacute;tulo del item">
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div>
          <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Estado</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="si-estado"><option value="TODO">TODO</option><option value="IN_PROGRESS">IN PROGRESS</option><option value="REVIEW">REVIEW</option><option value="DONE">DONE</option></select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Story Points</label>
          <input class="sap-input" id="si-pts" type="number" min="0" step="1" value="0" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div>
          <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">T&eacute;cnico</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="si-tecnico"><option value="">Sin asignar</option></select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Prioridad</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="si-prioridad"><option value="Alta">Alta</option><option value="Media" selected>Media</option><option value="Baja">Baja</option></select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
        <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Bloqueador</label>
        <input class="sap-input" id="si-bloqueador" placeholder="Ej: Esperando API externa...">
      </div>
      <div id="si-subtareas-wrap" style="display:none;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Subtareas</label>
        <div id="si-subtareas-list"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:12px 18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;">
      <button class="btn-fm-back" onclick="fmClose('fm-sprint-item')">Cancelar</button>
      <button class="btn-fm-submit" onclick="saveSprintItem()">Guardar Cambios</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════ MODAL: NUEVO TÉCNICO ══════════════════ -->
<div class="fm-overlay" id="fm-team">
  <div class="fm-box">
    <div class="fm-header">
      <div class="fm-title">
        <span id="tm-icon" style="font-size:22px;">&#129489;&#8205;&#128187;</span>
        <div>
          <div id="tm-title">Nuevo T&eacute;cnico</div>
          <div id="tm-sub" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;margin-top:1px;">Registrar miembro en el equipo PMO</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button class="fm-close" onclick="fmClose('fm-team')">&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-steps">
      <div class="fm-step-dot active" id="ts-dot-1"><div class="fsd-circle">1</div><div class="fsd-label">Identidad</div></div>
      <div class="fm-step-dot" id="ts-dot-2"><div class="fsd-circle">2</div><div class="fsd-label">Skills</div></div>
      <div class="fm-step-dot" id="ts-dot-3"><div class="fsd-circle">3</div><div class="fsd-label">Confirmar</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-body">
      <div class="fm-step active" id="ts-1">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:4px;">
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0">
            <div class="fm-label">&#129682; ID T&eacute;cnico</div>
            <input class="fm-input" id="t-id" placeholder="FTE-151" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);letter-spacing:.5px;" autocomplete="off">
          </div>
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0">
            <div class="fm-label">&#128202; Estado Inicial</div>
            <select class="fm-select" id="t-estado">
              <option value="DISPONIBLE">&#128994; DISPONIBLE</option>
              <option value="OCUPADO">&#128993; OCUPADO</option>
              <option value="GUARDIA">&#128309; GUARDIA</option>
              <option value="BAJA">&#128308; BAJA</option>
              <option value="VACACIONES">&#9898; VACACIONES</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-section-sep"></div>
        <div class="fm-field">
          <div class="fm-label">&#128100; Nombre Completo</div>
          <input class="fm-input" id="t-nombre" placeholder="Ej: Carmen Garc&iacute;a Mart&iacute;nez">
        </div>
        <div class="fm-field">
          <div class="fm-label">&#127919; Nivel Profesional</div>
          <div class="nivel-grid">
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N1',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:#f85149;">N1</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">J&uacute;nior</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">0&ndash;1 a&ntilde;o<br>formaci&oacute;n b&aacute;sica</div>
            </div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N2',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:var(--blue);">N2</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">T&eacute;cnico</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">1&ndash;3 a&ntilde;os<br>autonom&iacute;a operativa</div>
            </div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N3',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:#a5b4fc;">N3</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">Senior</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">3&ndash;7 a&ntilde;os<br>resuelve sin escalar</div>
            </div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N4',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:#f59e0b;">N4</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">Experto</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">7+ a&ntilde;os<br>referente t&eacute;cnico</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-field" style="margin-bottom:0">
          <div class="fm-label">&#127970; Silo de Especialidad</div>
          <div class="silo-grid">
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Frontend',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#127912;</div><div class="sc-name">Frontend</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Backend',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#9881;&#65039;</div><div class="sc-name">Backend</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Redes',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#127760;</div><div class="sc-name">Redes</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Windows',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#129695;</div><div class="sc-name">Windows</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('BBDD',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#128452;&#65039;</div><div class="sc-name">BBDD</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Seguridad',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#128274;</div><div class="sc-name">Seguridad</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('DevOps',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#128640;</div><div class="sc-name">DevOps</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('QA',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#129514;</div><div class="sc-name">QA</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Soporte',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#127915;</div><div class="sc-name">Soporte</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fm-step" id="ts-2">
        <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px;">Selecciona las skills del t&eacute;cnico. Cuantas m&aacute;s, mejor puntuaci&oacute;n de matching con incidencias.</div>
        <div id="ts-2-content"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="fm-step" id="ts-3">
        <div id="ts-3-preview"></div>
        <div id="ts-tasks-panel" style="display:none;margin-top:14px;">
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M9 3v18"/><path d="M15 3v18"/></svg>
            Tareas Kanban Asignadas
            <span id="ts-tasks-count" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;"></span>
          </div>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <div style="background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.2);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;text-align:center;">
              <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue);" id="ts-pct-run">0%</div>
              <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">% RUN</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background:var(--green-bg);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.2);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;text-align:center;">
              <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--green);" id="ts-pct-build">0%</div>
              <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">% BUILD</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="ts-tasks-list" style="max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-footer">
      <button class="btn-fm-back" id="ts-back-btn" onclick="tsBack()" style="display:none">&larr; Atr&aacute;s</button>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
        <span class="fm-skill-counter" id="ts-skill-count" style="display:none">0 skills</span>
        <button class="btn-fm-next" id="ts-next-btn" onclick="tsNext()">Siguiente &rarr;</button>
        <button class="btn-fm-submit" id="ts-submit-btn" onclick="tsSubmit()" style="display:none">&#9989; A&ntilde;adir al Equipo</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="tst"></div>

<script>
// LEGACY P95-F7: redirect de enlaces antiguos #projects/#kanban → /gov-kanban-global.html
if(location.hash==='#projects'||location.hash==='#kanban'){location.href='/gov-kanban-global.html';}
var AB=window.location.origin,TK=localStorage.getItem('cpm_token')||'';
function toggleTheme(){var h=document.documentElement,n=h.getAttribute('data-theme')==='dark'?'light':'dark';h.setAttribute('data-theme',n);localStorage.setItem('cpm_theme',n);}
(function(){var t=localStorage.getItem('cpm_theme');if(t)document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme',t);})();
function af(u,o){o=o||{};o.headers=o.headers||{};if(TK)o.headers['Authorization']='Bearer '+TK;if(o.body&&typeof o.body==='string')o.headers['Content-Type']='application/json';return fetch(AB+u,o).then(function(r){return r.text().then(function(t){try{return JSON.parse(t);}catch(e){return t;}});});}
function doLogin(){var e=document.getElementById('le').value,p=document.getElementById('lp').value;fetch(AB+'/auth/login',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email:e,password:p})}).then(function(r){return r.text().then(function(t){try{return JSON.parse(t);}catch(x){return{};}});}).then(function(d){if(d.token){TK=d.token;localStorage.setItem('cpm_token',d.token);var u=d.user||d;document.getElementById('login-overlay').style.display='none';document.getElementById('app').style.display='block';document.getElementById('un').textContent=u.nombre_completo||e;document.getElementById('ur').textContent=u.rol||'Coordinador BUILD';init();}else{document.getElementById('lerr').style.display='block';}}).catch(function(){document.getElementById('lerr').style.display='block';});}
function doLogout(){localStorage.removeItem('cpm_token');localStorage.removeItem('pmo_token');localStorage.removeItem('pmo_user');localStorage.removeItem('pmo_permisos');localStorage.removeItem('pmo_role');TK='';window.location.href='/';}
// ── Notificaciones ──
function toggleNotifPanel(e){e.stopPropagation();var p=document.getElementById('notif-panel');p.classList.toggle('open');if(p.classList.contains('open'))loadNotif();}
function loadNotif(){if(!TK)return;af('/api/notificaciones').then(function(d){if(!Array.isArray(d))return;var u=d.filter(function(n){return!n.leida;}).length;var b=document.getElementById('notif-badge');if(b){b.textContent=u;b.className='notif-badge'+(u>0?' show':'');}var el=document.getElementById('notif-list');if(!el)return;if(!d.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="notif-empty">Sin notificaciones</div>';return;}var ic={asignacion:'\u2705',estado:'\u{1F504}',alerta:'\u26A0\uFE0F',urgente:'\u{1F6A8}',info:'\u{1F4AC}'};el.innerHTML=d.map(function(n){var ago=nAgo(n.created_at),cls=n.leida?'':' unread',t=n.tipo||'info';return'<div class="notif-item'+cls+'" onclick="nClick(event,'+n.id+')"><div class="notif-ico '+t+'">'+(ic[t]||'\u{1F4AC}')+'</div><div class="notif-body"><div class="notif-title">'+nEsc(n.titulo)+'</div><div class="notif-msg">'+nEsc(n.mensaje||'')+'</div><div class="notif-time">'+ago+'</div></div></div>';}).join('');}).catch(function(){});}
function nEsc(s){var d=document.createElement('div');d.textContent=s;return d.innerHTML;}
function nAgo(dt){if(!dt)return'';var d=new Date(dt+(dt.indexOf('Z')<0&&dt.indexOf('+')<0?'Z':''));var s=Math.floor((Date.now()-d.getTime())/1000);if(s<60)return'ahora';if(s<3600)return Math.floor(s/60)+'m';if(s<86400)return Math.floor(s/3600)+'h';return Math.floor(s/86400)+'d';}
function nClick(e,id){e.stopPropagation();af('/api/notificaciones/'+id+'/leer',{method:'PUT'}).then(function(){loadNotif();}).catch(function(){});}
function notifMarkAll(e){e.stopPropagation();af('/api/notificaciones/leer-todas',{method:'PUT'}).then(function(){loadNotif();}).catch(function(){});}
setInterval(function(){if(TK)loadNotif();},30000);
document.addEventListener('click',function(e){var p=document.getElementById('notif-panel');if(p&&p.classList.contains('open')&&!e.target.closest('.notif-bell'))p.classList.remove('open');});
if(TK){af('/health').then(function(d){if(d&&d.status==='ok'){document.getElementById('login-overlay').style.display='none';document.getElementById('app').style.display='block';init();loadNotif();}}).catch(function(){});}
document.getElementById('lp').addEventListener('keypress',function(e){if(e.key==='Enter')doLogin();});
function sw(n){document.querySelectorAll('.tb').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('a');});document.querySelector('.tb[data-t="'+n+'"]').classList.add('a');document.querySelectorAll('.tp').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('a');});document.getElementById('p-'+n).classList.add('a');if(n==='tecnicos'&&ALL_TEAM.length===0)loadTeam();if(n==='scrum'&&!SELECTED_PROJECT)autoSelectProject();if(n==='gantt'){syncGanttSelector();if(SELECTED_PROJECT)loadGanttView(SELECTED_PROJECT);else autoSelectProject();}if(n==='proyecto'){syncProjSelector();if(SELECTED_PROJECT)loadProjectDetail(SELECTED_PROJECT);}if(n==='cab'){loadCABData();}}
function toast(m,t){var e=document.getElementById('tst');e.textContent=m;e.className='toast '+(t||'ok')+' show';setTimeout(function(){e.classList.remove('show');},3000);}
function init(){loadProy();loadTeam();populateProjectSelector();loadCABBuildAlerts();}

// ═══ BUILD FORM — exact logic from mother ═══
function buildCalcSemanas(){
  var fechaEl=document.getElementById('bf-fecha-fin');
  var infoEl=document.getElementById('bf-semanas-calc');
  if(!fechaEl||!fechaEl.value||!infoEl)return;
  var hoy=new Date();var fin=new Date(fechaEl.value);
  var diffMs=fin.getTime()-hoy.getTime();
  var semanas=Math.ceil(diffMs/(7*24*60*60*1000));
  if(semanas<=0){infoEl.textContent='Fecha en el pasado';infoEl.style.color='var(--accent-red)';}
  else{infoEl.textContent='\u2248 '+semanas+' semanas desde hoy';infoEl.style.color='var(--accent-green)';}
}

function buildUpdatePrioInfo(){
  var prioEl=document.getElementById('bf-prioridad');
  var infoEl=document.getElementById('bf-prio-info');
  if(!prioEl||!infoEl)return;
  var val=prioEl.value;
  if(val==='Alta'){infoEl.innerHTML='<span style="color:var(--accent-red);">Agentes intentan cumplir plazo y presupuesto propuestos</span>';}
  else if(val==='Media'){infoEl.innerHTML='<span style="color:var(--accent-yellow);">Planificacion realista, desviacion es informativa</span>';}
  else if(val==='Baja'){infoEl.innerHTML='<span style="color:var(--accent-green);">Planificacion optima, propuesta es solo referencia</span>';}
  else{infoEl.textContent='Los agentes decidiran segun el contexto';}
}

function buildSubmitAndPipeline(){
  var nombreEl=document.getElementById('bf-nombre');
  var nombre=nombreEl?nombreEl.value.trim():'';
  if(!nombre){if(nombreEl)nombreEl.focus();toast('El nombre del proyecto es obligatorio','err');return;}
  var resumenEl=document.getElementById('bf-resumen');
  var resumen=resumenEl?resumenEl.value.trim():'';
  if(!resumen){if(resumenEl)resumenEl.focus();toast('Describe que necesita negocio','err');return;}
  var data=nombre+' | '+resumen;
  openPipeline('build',data);
}

// ═══ Pipeline iframe ═══
function openPipeline(mode,data){
  localStorage.setItem('cpm_pipeline_mode',mode);
  localStorage.setItem('cpm_pipeline_data',data||'');
  localStorage.setItem('cpm_return_to','gov-build');
  var token=localStorage.getItem('cpm_token')||TK;
  window.location.href='/index.html?token='+encodeURIComponent(token)+'#auto-'+mode;
}
function closePipeline(){}

// ═══ Projects ═══
function loadProy(){af('/cartera/proyectos').then(function(d){var i=Array.isArray(d)?d:(d.proyectos||[]);
// Count by estado
var counts={};i.forEach(function(p){var e=(p.estado||'pendiente').toLowerCase();counts[e]=(counts[e]||0)+1;});
var total=i.length;var ejecucion=counts['en ejecucion']||counts['en ejecución']||0;var pendiente=counts['pendiente']||counts['en analisis']||counts['en análisis']||0;var revision=counts['en revision']||counts['en revisión']||0;var cerrado=(counts['cerrado']||0)+(counts['completado']||0);var standby=counts['standby']||counts['en pausa']||0;
// KPI cards
document.getElementById('ps').innerHTML='<div class="sc pur"><div class="sl">Total</div><div class="sv" style="color:var(--accent-purple)">'+total+'</div></div><div class="sc grn"><div class="sl">Ejecuci\u00f3n</div><div class="sv" style="color:var(--accent-green)">'+(ejecucion+revision)+'</div></div><div class="sc org"><div class="sl">Pendientes</div><div class="sv" style="color:var(--accent-orange)">'+pendiente+'</div></div><div class="sc blu"><div class="sl">Cerrados</div><div class="sv" style="color:var(--accent-blue)">'+cerrado+'</div></div>';
if(!i.length){document.getElementById('pgrid').innerHTML='<div style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Sin proyectos</div>';return;}
// Dashboard
document.getElementById('pgrid').style.display='block';
var h='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px;">';
// Donut by estado
var estadoData=[{l:'Ejecuci\u00f3n',n:ejecucion+revision,c:'#22c55e'},{l:'Pendiente',n:pendiente,c:'#eab308'},{l:'Cerrado',n:cerrado,c:'#3b82f6'},{l:'Standby',n:standby,c:'#8b949e'},{l:'Otros',n:total-ejecucion-revision-pendiente-cerrado-standby,c:'#6e7681'}].filter(function(d){return d.n>0;});
var gradient='conic-gradient(';var cumul=0;
estadoData.forEach(function(d,di){var pct=Math.round(d.n/Math.max(1,total)*100);gradient+=d.c+' '+cumul+'% '+(cumul+pct)+'%';cumul+=pct;if(di<estadoData.length-1)gradient+=', ';});
gradient+=')';
h+='<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:14px;">';
h+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Distribuci\u00f3n por Estado</div>';
h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;justify-content:center;">';
h+='<div style="width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:50%;background:'+gradient+';position:relative;flex-shrink:0;"><div style="position:absolute;top:22%;left:22%;width:56%;height:56%;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg-card);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;"><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:var(--text-primary);">'+total+'</span></div></div>';
h+='<div style="flex:1;">';
estadoData.forEach(function(d){var pct=Math.round(d.n/Math.max(1,total)*100);h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:3px;"><div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:2px;background:'+d.c+';flex-shrink:0;"></div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-primary);flex:1;">'+d.l+'</span><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+d.n+' ('+pct+'%)</span></div>';});
h+='</div></div></div>';
// Donut by prioridad
var prioData={};i.forEach(function(p){var pr=(p.prioridad||p.prioridad_estrategica||'Media');prioData[pr]=(prioData[pr]||0)+1;});
var prioArr=[{l:'Cr\u00edtica',c:'#ef4444'},{l:'Alta',c:'#f97316'},{l:'Media',c:'#eab308'},{l:'Baja',c:'#22c55e'}].map(function(p){return{l:p.l,n:prioData[p.l]||0,c:p.c};}).filter(function(d){return d.n>0;});
var gradient2='conic-gradient(';var cumul2=0;
if(prioArr.length){prioArr.forEach(function(d,di){var pct=Math.round(d.n/Math.max(1,total)*100);gradient2+=d.c+' '+cumul2+'% '+(cumul2+pct)+'%';cumul2+=pct;if(di<prioArr.length-1)gradient2+=', ';});gradient2+=')';}else{gradient2='conic-gradient(#6e7681 0% 100%)';}
h+='<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:14px;">';
h+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Distribuci\u00f3n por Prioridad</div>';
h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;justify-content:center;">';
h+='<div style="width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:50%;background:'+gradient2+';position:relative;flex-shrink:0;"><div style="position:absolute;top:22%;left:22%;width:56%;height:56%;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg-card);"></div></div>';
h+='<div style="flex:1;">';
prioArr.forEach(function(d){var pct=Math.round(d.n/Math.max(1,total)*100);h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:3px;"><div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:2px;background:'+d.c+';flex-shrink:0;"></div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-primary);flex:1;">'+d.l+'</span><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+d.n+' ('+pct+'%)</span></div>';});
h+='</div></div></div></div>';
// Active projects table
var active=i.filter(function(p){var e=(p.estado||'').toLowerCase();return e.indexOf('ejecu')>=0||e.indexOf('revisi')>=0||e.indexOf('anali')>=0;}).slice(0,8);
if(active.length){
h+='<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);overflow:hidden;">';
h+='<div style="padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Proyectos en Ejecuci\u00f3n ('+active.length+')</div>';
h+='<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;"><thead><tr><th style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:left;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);">ID</th><th style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:left;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);">Nombre</th><th style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:left;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);">Estado</th><th style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:left;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);">PM</th><th style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:right;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);">Progreso</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
active.forEach(function(p){var prog=p.progreso||p.porcentaje_completado||0;
h+='<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);"><td style="padding:6px 10px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+(p.id_proyecto||'')+'</td><td style="padding:6px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-primary);">'+(p.nombre||p.nombre_proyecto||'').substring(0,40)+'</td><td style="padding:6px 10px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">'+(p.estado||'')+'</td><td style="padding:6px 10px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">'+(p.pm_asignado||p.id_pm||'Sin PM')+'</td><td style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:right;"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;justify-content:flex-end;"><div style="width:50px;height:5px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+prog+'%;height:100%;background:var(--accent-purple);border-radius:3px;"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+prog+'%</span></div></td></tr>';});
h+='</tbody></table></div>';}
document.getElementById('pgrid').innerHTML=h;}).catch(function(){document.getElementById('pgrid').innerHTML='<div style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Error</div>';});}

// ═══ TEAM (full — cloned from index.html) ═══
var AV_COLORS=['#2d7ef7','#3fb950','#f0883e','#ef4444','#a5b4fc','#d29922','#f778ba','#39c5cf'];
var SILO_COLORS={Frontend:'#2d7ef7',Soporte:'#f0883e',Redes:'#39c5cf',Windows:'#3fb950',Backend:'#a5b4fc',QA:'#d29922',DevOps:'#f778ba',Seguridad:'#ef4444',BBDD:'#f0883e'};
var SLC={Frontend:'#3b82f6',Backend:'#8b5cf6',Redes:'#6366f1',Windows:'#0ea5e9',BBDD:'#eab308',Seguridad:'#ef4444',DevOps:'#84cc16',QA:'#06b6d4',Soporte:'#fb923c'};
var ALL_TEAM=[],_teamTaskMap={},_teamDashVisible=false,currentTeamFilter='',currentTeamSilo='Todos';
var _tStep=1,_tNivel='',_tSilo='',_tSkills=[],_tEditMode=false,_tEditId='';
var SKILL_CATS=[
  {cat:'Git',icon:'\u2442',color:'#f97316',skills:['Git: Clonar repositorios','Git: Crear ramas','Git: Commits descriptivos','Git: Resolver conflictos','Git: Pull Requests','Git: Rebase b\u00e1sico']},
  {cat:'Frontend \u2014 HTML / CSS / JS',icon:'\ud83c\udfa8',color:'#3b82f6',skills:['HTML: Sem\u00e1ntica b\u00e1sica','CSS: Flexbox','CSS: Grid Layout','CSS: Media Queries','JS: Manipulaci\u00f3n DOM','JS: Fetch / Axios','JS: Array Methods','JS: Async / Await','JS: Debugging']},
  {cat:'API / Backend',icon:'\u2699',color:'#8b5cf6',skills:['API: C\u00f3digos HTTP','API: Testing con Postman','API: Auth JWT','Backend: Crear Endpoint REST','Backend: Validar Inputs','Backend: Conexi\u00f3n a DB','Backend: Logging errores']},
  {cat:'Testing / QA',icon:'\ud83e\uddea',color:'#06b6d4',skills:['Testing: Escribir Test Unitario','Testing: Ejecutar Test Suite']},
  {cat:'Linux / Sistema',icon:'\ud83d\udc27',color:'#10b981',skills:['Linux: Navegaci\u00f3n','Linux: Ver contenido','Linux: B\u00fasqueda (grep)','Linux: Permisos','Linux: Procesos','Linux: Tareas (Crontab)']},
  {cat:'Active Directory',icon:'\ud83c\udfe2',color:'#0ea5e9',skills:['AD: Crear Usuario','AD: Reset Password','AD: Deshabilitar Usuario','AD: Grupos Seguridad','AD: Sincronizaci\u00f3n']},
  {cat:'Redes / VPN',icon:'\ud83c\udf10',color:'#6366f1',skills:['Redes: IP/Gateway','Redes: Ping','Redes: Tracert','Redes: Netstat','Redes: Flush DNS','Redes: DNS Registros','Redes: DHCP Reserva','Redes: Port Security','Redes: BGP','VPN: Configurar Cliente']},
  {cat:'SQL / BBDD',icon:'\ud83d\uddc4',color:'#eab308',skills:['SQL: Select Simple','SQL: Where','SQL: Inner Join','SQL: Left Join','SQL: Insert Into','SQL: Update','SQL: Delete','SQL: Backup DB','SQL: Restore DB','SQL: Create Table','SQL: Alter Table']},
  {cat:'Cloud / Docker',icon:'\u2601',color:'#14b8a6',skills:['Cloud: VM Start/Stop','Cloud: Crear Bucket','Cloud: Security Groups','Docker: Run Container','Docker: Logs','Docker: Exec']},
  {cat:'Windows OS',icon:'\ud83e\ude9f',color:'#64748b',skills:['Windows: Unir a Dominio','Windows: Visor Eventos']},
  {cat:'Seguridad',icon:'\ud83d\udd12',color:'#ef4444',skills:['Seguridad: Configurar MFA','Seguridad: Phishing ID','Seguridad: Revisar Logs Acceso','Seguridad: Agente Antivirus','Seguridad: Bloqueo IP Firewall','Seguridad: Permisos Carpetas']},
  {cat:'DevOps / K8s / CI-CD',icon:'\ud83d\ude80',color:'#84cc16',skills:['CI/CD: Pipeline b\u00e1sico','CI/CD: Rollback','Kubernetes: Ver Pods','Kubernetes: Describir Recurso','Monitoring: Dashboard Grafana','Monitoring: Configurar Alertas']},
  {cat:'Hardware',icon:'\ud83d\udd27',color:'#a8a29e',skills:['Hardware: Cambiar Disco','Hardware: Impresora en Red','Hardware: Limpieza Interna','Hardware: Inventario Activos','Hardware: Diagn\u00f3stico Fuente']},
  {cat:'Storage / SAP',icon:'\ud83d\udcbe',color:'#d97706',skills:['Storage: Mapa de Rutas','Storage: Asignaci\u00f3n LUN','Storage: Snapshot','SAP: Transacci\u00f3n b\u00e1sica']},
  {cat:'Soporte / Tickets',icon:'\ud83c\udfab',color:'#fb923c',skills:['Ticket: Registro Incidencia','Ticket: Priorizaci\u00f3n','Ticket: Escalado Nivel','Ticket: Resoluci\u00f3n y Cierre','Ticket: Comunicaci\u00f3n Usuario','Doc: Escribir Documentaci\u00f3n']},
];

function escHtml(t){if(!t)return'';return String(t).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');}
function hashCode(str){var h=0;for(var i=0;i<str.length;i++){h=(Math.imul(31,h)+str.charCodeAt(i))|0;}return h;}
function fmOpen(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.add('open');document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}
function fmClose(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow='';}
document.getElementById('fm-team').addEventListener('click',function(e){if(e.target.id==='fm-team')fmClose('fm-team');});

function toggleTeamDashboard(){
  _teamDashVisible=!_teamDashVisible;
  document.getElementById('team-dashboard').style.display=_teamDashVisible?'block':'none';
  if(_teamDashVisible&&ALL_TEAM.length)renderTeamDashboard();
}

function _drawGauge(canvasId,pct,colorHi,colorMid,colorLo){
  var c=document.getElementById(canvasId);if(!c)return;
  var ctx=c.getContext('2d'),w=c.width,h=c.height;
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
  var cx=w/2,cy=h-2,r=Math.min(w/2,h)-4,lw=8;
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,0);ctx.strokeStyle='#30363d';ctx.lineWidth=lw;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.stroke();
  if(pct>0){
    var angle=-Math.PI+(Math.PI*Math.min(100,pct)/100);
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,angle);
    ctx.strokeStyle=pct>70?(colorHi||'#f85149'):pct>40?(colorMid||'#f0883e'):(colorLo||'#3fb950');
    ctx.lineWidth=lw;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.stroke();
  }
}

function renderTeamDashboard(){
  var t=ALL_TEAM,estados={};
  t.forEach(function(x){estados[x.estado]=(estados[x.estado]||0)+1;});
  var ocupados=estados['OCUPADO']||0,disponibles=estados['DISPONIBLE']||0;
  var guardia=estados['GUARDIA']||0,baja=estados['BAJA']||0,vacaciones=estados['VACACIONES']||0;
  var otros=guardia+baja+vacaciones;
  var pctOcup=t.length>0?Math.round(ocupados/t.length*100):0;
  var eColors={DISPONIBLE:'var(--green)',OCUPADO:'var(--orange)',GUARDIA:'var(--blue)',BAJA:'var(--red)',VACACIONES:'#8b949e'};
  var eIcons={DISPONIBLE:'\u25cf',OCUPADO:'\u25cf',GUARDIA:'\u25d0',BAJA:'\u2715',VACACIONES:'\u25cc'};
  document.getElementById('team-estado-badges').innerHTML=['DISPONIBLE','OCUPADO','GUARDIA','BAJA','VACACIONES'].map(function(k){
    var v=estados[k]||0;
    return '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:'+eColors[k]+';">'+v+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:3px;"><span style="color:'+eColors[k]+';">'+eIcons[k]+'</span> '+k+'</div></div>';
  }).join('');
  document.getElementById('td-ocupados').textContent=ocupados;
  document.getElementById('td-disponibles').textContent=disponibles;
  document.getElementById('td-otros').textContent=otros;
  document.getElementById('team-gauge-pct').textContent=pctOcup+'%';
  document.getElementById('team-gauge-pct').style.color=pctOcup>70?'#f85149':pctOcup>40?'#f0883e':'#3fb950';
  _drawGauge('team-gauge',pctOcup);
  var allActive=t.reduce(function(s,x){return s+(x.activeTasks||[]).length;},0);
  var allRun=t.reduce(function(s,x){return s+(x.activeTasks||[]).filter(function(tk){return tk.tipo==='RUN';}).length;},0);
  var allBuild=allActive-allRun;
  var pctRun=allActive>0?Math.round(allRun/allActive*100):0;
  var pctBuild=allActive>0?Math.round(allBuild/allActive*100):0;
  document.getElementById('td-pct-run').textContent=pctRun+'%';
  document.getElementById('td-pct-build').textContent=pctBuild+'%';
  var c2=document.getElementById('team-runbuild-gauge');
  if(c2){var ctx=c2.getContext('2d'),w=c2.width,h2=c2.height;ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h2);var cx=w/2,cy=h2-2,r=Math.min(w/2,h2)-4,lw=8;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,0);ctx.strokeStyle='#30363d';ctx.lineWidth=lw;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.stroke();if(allActive>0){var runAngle=-Math.PI+(Math.PI*pctRun/100);ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,runAngle);ctx.strokeStyle='#2d7ef7';ctx.lineWidth=lw;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,runAngle,0);ctx.strokeStyle='#3fb950';ctx.lineWidth=lw;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.stroke();}}
  var silos={};t.forEach(function(x){if(!silos[x.silo])silos[x.silo]={total:0,ocupados:0,tareas:0};silos[x.silo].total++;if(x.estado==='OCUPADO')silos[x.silo].ocupados++;silos[x.silo].tareas+=x.totalActiveTasks||0;});
  var SC=SILO_COLORS||{};
  document.getElementById('team-silo-bars').innerHTML=Object.entries(silos).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].total-a[1].total;}).map(function(e){var silo=e[0],d=e[1];var pct=d.total>0?Math.round(d.ocupados/d.total*100):0;var col=SC[silo]||'#8b949e';return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:2px;"><span style="width:50px;font-size:9px;color:'+col+';text-align:right;font-weight:600;">'+silo+'</span><div style="flex:1;height:7px;background:var(--bg-primary);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+pct+'%;height:100%;background:'+col+';border-radius:4px;transition:width .3s;"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:8px;width:35px;color:'+(pct>70?'var(--red)':pct>40?'var(--orange)':'var(--green)')+';">'+d.ocupados+'/'+d.total+'</span><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);">'+d.tareas+'t</span></div>';}).join('');
  var n1=t.filter(function(x){return x.nivel==='N1';}).length,n2=t.filter(function(x){return x.nivel==='N2';}).length;
  var n3=t.filter(function(x){return x.nivel==='N3';}).length,n4=t.filter(function(x){return x.nivel==='N4';}).length;
  document.getElementById('cnt-n1').textContent=n1;document.getElementById('cnt-n2').textContent=n2;
  document.getElementById('cnt-n3').textContent=n3;document.getElementById('cnt-n4').textContent=n4;
}

function toggleDisponibles(){
  var panel=document.getElementById('team-disponibles-panel');
  panel.style.display=panel.style.display==='none'?'block':'none';
  if(panel.style.display!=='none')renderDisponibles();
}

function renderDisponibles(){
  var silos={};ALL_TEAM.forEach(function(t){if(!silos[t.silo])silos[t.silo]=[];if(t.estado==='DISPONIBLE')silos[t.silo].push(t);});
  var SC=SILO_COLORS||{};
  document.getElementById('team-disponibles-grid').innerHTML=Object.entries(silos).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].length-a[1].length;}).map(function(e){var silo=e[0],arr=e[1];var col=SC[silo]||'#8b949e';return '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;border-left:3px solid '+col+';"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:'+col+';margin-bottom:4px;">'+silo+' <span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--green);">('+arr.length+')</span></div>'+(arr.length===0?'<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Sin disponibles</div>':arr.slice(0,5).map(function(t){return '<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);padding:1px 0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;"><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text3);margin-right:3px;">'+t.fte+'</span>'+t.name.split(' ').slice(0,2).join(' ')+' <span class="nivel-badge '+t.nivel.toLowerCase()+'" style="font-size:8px;padding:0 4px;margin-left:2px;">'+t.nivel+'</span></div>';}).join('')+(arr.length>5?'<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">+'+((arr.length-5))+' m\u00e1s</div>':''))+'</div>';}).join('');
}

// Column resize + drag reorder
(function initTeamColInteraction(){
  var resizing=null,startX=0,startW=0,dragTh=null;
  document.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){var th=e.target.closest('th.tm-th-resizable');if(!th)return;var rect=th.getBoundingClientRect();if(e.clientX>rect.right-6){resizing=th;startX=e.clientX;startW=th.offsetWidth;e.preventDefault();}});
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){if(!resizing)return;var w=Math.max(30,startW+e.clientX-startX);resizing.style.width=w+'px';});
  document.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){resizing=null;});
  var row=document.getElementById('team-thead-row');
  if(row){
    row.addEventListener('dragstart',function(e){dragTh=e.target.closest('th');if(dragTh){e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move';dragTh.style.opacity='.4';}});
    row.addEventListener('dragover',function(e){e.preventDefault();e.dataTransfer.dropEffect='move';});
    row.addEventListener('drop',function(e){e.preventDefault();var target=e.target.closest('th');if(dragTh&&target&&dragTh!==target){var ths=[].slice.call(row.children);var fromIdx=ths.indexOf(dragTh);var toIdx=ths.indexOf(target);if(fromIdx<toIdx)target.after(dragTh);else target.before(dragTh);document.querySelectorAll('#team-tbody tr').forEach(function(tr){var cells=[].slice.call(tr.children);if(cells[fromIdx]&&cells[toIdx]){if(fromIdx<toIdx)cells[toIdx].after(cells[fromIdx]);else cells[toIdx].before(cells[fromIdx]);}});}});
    row.addEventListener('dragend',function(){if(dragTh)dragTh.style.opacity='';dragTh=null;});
  }
})();

async function loadTeam(){
  var tbody=document.getElementById('team-tbody');
  tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--text2);"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Cargando equipo...</td></tr>';
  try{
    var results=await Promise.all([af('/team/tecnicos'),af('/kanban/tareas')]);
    var data=Array.isArray(results[0])?results[0]:(results[0].tecnicos||[]);
    var tasks=Array.isArray(results[1])?results[1]:(results[1].tareas||[]);
    _teamTaskMap={};
    tasks.forEach(function(tk){if(!tk.id_tecnico)return;if(!_teamTaskMap[tk.id_tecnico])_teamTaskMap[tk.id_tecnico]=[];_teamTaskMap[tk.id_tecnico].push(tk);});
    var parseJ=function(v){if(Array.isArray(v))return v;try{return JSON.parse(v)||[];}catch(e){return[];}};
    ALL_TEAM=data.map(function(t){
      var fte=t.id_recurso||t.id_tecnico;
      var myTasks=_teamTaskMap[fte]||[];
      var activeTasks=myTasks.filter(function(tk){return tk.columna!=='Completado';});
      var runTasks=activeTasks.filter(function(tk){return tk.tipo==='RUN';});
      var totalActive=activeTasks.length;
      var pctRun=totalActive>0?Math.round(runTasks.length/totalActive*100):0;
      var pctBuild=totalActive>0?100-pctRun:0;
      return{name:t.nombre,fte:fte,silo:t.silo_especialidad||'Frontend',nivel:t.nivel||'N2',skills:t.total_skills||0,tags:parseJ(t.skills_json||t.tags),estado:t.estado_run||'DISPONIBLE',skillPrincipal:t.skill_principal||'',color:AV_COLORS[Math.abs(hashCode(t.nombre))%AV_COLORS.length],email:t.email||'',telefono:t.telefono||'',activeTasks:activeTasks,totalActiveTasks:totalActive,pctRun:pctRun,pctBuild:pctBuild};
    });
    document.getElementById('team-count').textContent=ALL_TEAM.length+' t\u00e9cnicos';
    renderTeam(ALL_TEAM);
    if(_teamDashVisible)renderTeamDashboard();
    var ocu=ALL_TEAM.filter(function(t){return t.estado==='OCUPADO';}).length;
    var dis=ALL_TEAM.filter(function(t){return t.estado==='DISPONIBLE';}).length;
    document.getElementById('team-footer-info').textContent=ocu+' ocupados \u00b7 '+dis+' disponibles \u00b7 '+ALL_TEAM.reduce(function(s,t){return s+t.totalActiveTasks;},0)+' tareas activas';
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('Team fetch failed:',e.message);
    tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:var(--text2);">Sin conexi\u00f3n al servidor</td></tr>';
    ALL_TEAM=[];renderTeam([]);
  }
}

function renderTeam(data){
  var tbody=document.getElementById('team-tbody');
  if(!data.length){tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:var(--text2);">Sin resultados</td></tr>';return;}
  tbody.innerHTML=data.map(function(t){
    var initials=t.name.split(' ').slice(0,2).map(function(n){return n[0];}).join('');
    var barW=Math.min(100,Math.round(t.skills));
    var barColor=barW>60?'var(--green)':barW>40?'var(--yellow)':'var(--text3)';
    var siloColor=SILO_COLORS[t.silo]||'#8b949e';
    var nClass=(t.nivel||'n2').toLowerCase();
    var eColors={DISPONIBLE:'var(--green)',OCUPADO:'var(--orange)',GUARDIA:'var(--blue)',BAJA:'var(--red)',VACACIONES:'#8b949e'};
    var eIcons={DISPONIBLE:'\u25cf',OCUPADO:'\u25cf',GUARDIA:'\u25d0',BAJA:'\u2715',VACACIONES:'\u25cc'};
    var estadoColor=eColors[t.estado]||'var(--text2)';
    var tc=t.totalActiveTasks||0;
    var tcColor=tc===0?'var(--text3)':tc>3?'var(--red)':tc>1?'var(--orange)':'var(--green)';
    var links=[];(t.activeTasks||[]).forEach(function(tk){if(tk.id_proyecto&&!links.find(function(l){return l.id===tk.id_proyecto;}))links.push({id:tk.id_proyecto,t:'B'});if(tk.id_incidencia&&!links.find(function(l){return l.id===tk.id_incidencia;}))links.push({id:tk.id_incidencia,t:'R'});});
    var linksHtml=links.length?links.slice(0,2).map(function(l){return '<span style="font-size:8px;padding:0 3px;border-radius:2px;background:'+(l.t==='R'?'var(--blue-bg)':'var(--green-bg)')+';color:'+(l.t==='R'?'var(--blue)':'var(--green)')+';">'+l.id+'</span>';}).join(' ')+(links.length>2?'<span style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);">+'+(links.length-2)+'</span>':''):'<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">\u2014</span>';
    var cargaHtml;
    if(tc>0){var r=t.pctRun,b=t.pctBuild;cargaHtml='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><div style="width:28px;height:14px;border-radius:7px;background:var(--bg-primary);display:flex;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);"><div style="width:'+r+'%;background:var(--blue);"></div><div style="width:'+b+'%;background:var(--green);"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);">'+r+'/'+b+'</span></div>';}else{cargaHtml='<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">\u2014</span>';}
    return '<tr style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="openTeamEdit(\''+escHtml(t.fte)+'\')" title="Click para editar"><td><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;"><div class="avatar" style="background:'+t.color+';width:24px;height:24px;font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(initials)+'</div><span style="font-weight:500;font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">'+escHtml(t.name)+'</span></div></td><td><span class="fte-code" style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(t.fte)+'</span></td><td><span class="silo-badge" style="background:'+siloColor+'22;color:'+siloColor+';font-size:10px;padding:1px 5px;">'+escHtml(t.silo)+'</span></td><td><span class="nivel-badge '+nClass+'" style="font-size:10px;padding:1px 5px;">'+escHtml(t.nivel)+'</span></td><td><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;"><div class="skills-bar-wrap" style="width:40px;"><div class="skills-bar" style="width:'+barW+'%;background:'+barColor+';"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">'+barW+'</span></div></td><td style="text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:'+tcColor+';">'+(tc||'\u2014')+'</span></td><td>'+linksHtml+'</td><td>'+cargaHtml+'</td><td><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:'+estadoColor+';">'+(eIcons[t.estado]||'\u25cf')+' '+escHtml(t.estado)+'</span></td><td style="white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;"><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">'+escHtml(t.email||'')+'</span></td><td><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--font-mono);">'+escHtml(t.telefono||'')+'</span></td></tr>';
  }).join('');
}

function filterTeam(val){currentTeamFilter=val;applyTeamFilters();}
function filterSilo(silo,el){document.querySelectorAll('.filter-chip').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('active');});el.classList.add('active');currentTeamSilo=silo;applyTeamFilters();}
function applyTeamFilters(){
  var data=ALL_TEAM;
  if(currentTeamSilo!=='Todos')data=data.filter(function(t){return t.silo===currentTeamSilo;});
  if(currentTeamFilter)data=data.filter(function(t){return t.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(currentTeamFilter.toLowerCase())>=0||t.fte.toLowerCase().indexOf(currentTeamFilter.toLowerCase())>=0;});
  document.getElementById('team-count').textContent=data.length+' de '+ALL_TEAM.length+' t\u00e9cnicos';
  renderTeam(data);
}

function showTecnicoDetailModal(tecnico){
  var overlay=document.createElement('div');overlay.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick=function(e){if(e.target===overlay)overlay.remove();};
  var modal=document.createElement('div');modal.style.cssText='background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;max-width:550px;width:95%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;';
  var ini=(tecnico.nombre||'XX').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]||'';}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
  var sc2={'Linux':'#f97316','Windows':'#3b82f6','BBDD':'#eab308','Redes':'#22c55e','Seguridad':'#ef4444','Backend':'#a855f7','DevOps':'#06b6d4','Frontend':'#ec4899','QA':'#ec4899','Soporte':'#8b8f98'};
  var siloColor=sc2[tecnico.silo_especialidad||tecnico.silo||'']||'#8b8f98';
  var html='<div style="padding:20px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center;"><div style="width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:'+siloColor+'30;border:2px solid '+siloColor+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:'+siloColor+';">'+ini+'</div><div style="flex:1;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(tecnico.nombre||'')+'</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(tecnico.id_recurso||'')+' \u00b7 '+(tecnico.nivel||'N2')+' \u00b7 '+(tecnico.silo_especialidad||tecnico.silo||'')+'</div></div><div class="modal-close" style="cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:20px;padding:4px 8px;">\u2715</div></div>';
  html+='<div style="padding:16px 24px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;">';
  var cargaColor=(tecnico.carga_actual||0)>30?'#ef4444':(tecnico.carga_actual||0)>15?'#eab308':'#22c55e';
  html+='<div style="text-align:center;background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:'+cargaColor+';">'+(tecnico.carga_actual||0)+'h</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Carga actual</div></div>';
  html+='<div style="text-align:center;background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#22c55e;">'+(tecnico.scoring||0)+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Scoring</div></div>';
  html+='<div style="text-align:center;background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#3b82f6;">'+(tecnico.horas_asignadas||0)+'h</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Asignadas</div></div></div>';
  var estado=tecnico.estado_run||'DISPONIBLE';var estColor=estado==='DISPONIBLE'?'#22c55e':estado==='OCUPADO'?'#eab308':'#ef4444';
  html+='<div style="padding:0 24px 12px;"><div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;">Estado: <span style="color:'+estColor+';font-weight:600;">'+estado+'</span></div>';
  if(tecnico.email)html+='<div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:4px;">\ud83d\udce7 '+tecnico.email+'</div>';
  html+='</div>';
  var skills=tecnico.skills_json||[];if(typeof skills==='string')try{skills=JSON.parse(skills);}catch(e){skills=[];}
  if(skills.length>0){html+='<div style="padding:0 24px 16px;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Skills t\u00e9cnicas</div><div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';skills.forEach(function(s){var name=typeof s==='string'?s:(s.nombre_skill||s.skill||s.nombre||'');if(name)html+='<span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:'+siloColor+'15;color:'+siloColor+';border:1px solid '+siloColor+'30;">'+name+'</span>';});html+='</div></div>';}
  html+='<div style="padding:0 24px 20px;text-align:right;"><button class="modal-close" style="padding:10px 24px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:#3b82f6;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">Cerrar</button></div>';
  modal.innerHTML=html;modal.querySelectorAll('.modal-close').forEach(function(el){el.onclick=function(){overlay.remove();};});
  overlay.appendChild(modal);document.body.appendChild(overlay);
}

function openTeamForm(){
  _tEditMode=false;_tEditId='';_tStep=1;_tNivel='';_tSilo='';_tSkills=[];
  var nextNum=Math.max.apply(null,ALL_TEAM.map(function(t){return parseInt((t.fte||'FTE-0').replace('FTE-',''))||0;}).concat([150]))+1;
  document.getElementById('t-id').value='FTE-'+nextNum;document.getElementById('t-id').readOnly=false;document.getElementById('t-id').style.opacity='';
  document.getElementById('t-nombre').value='';document.getElementById('t-estado').value='DISPONIBLE';
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('sel');c.style.cssText='';});
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('sel');c.style.cssText='';});
  document.getElementById('tm-icon').textContent='\ud83e\uddd1\u200d\ud83d\udcbb';document.getElementById('tm-title').textContent='Nuevo T\u00e9cnico';
  document.getElementById('tm-sub').textContent='Registrar miembro en el equipo PMO';
  document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn').innerHTML='\u2705 A\u00f1adir al Equipo';
  tsSetStep(1);fmOpen('fm-team');
}

function openTeamEdit(fte){
  var t=ALL_TEAM.find(function(x){return x.fte===fte;});
  if(!t){toast('T\u00e9cnico no encontrado','err');return;}
  _tEditMode=true;_tEditId=fte;_tStep=1;_tNivel=t.nivel||'';_tSilo=t.silo||'';_tSkills=[].concat(t.tags||[]);
  document.getElementById('tm-icon').textContent='\u270f\ufe0f';document.getElementById('tm-title').textContent='Editar T\u00e9cnico';
  document.getElementById('tm-sub').textContent=t.name+' \u2014 '+fte;
  document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn').innerHTML='\ud83d\udcbe Guardar Cambios';
  var idEl=document.getElementById('t-id');idEl.value=fte;idEl.readOnly=true;idEl.style.opacity='.55';
  document.getElementById('t-nombre').value=t.name;document.getElementById('t-estado').value=t.estado||'DISPONIBLE';
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('sel');c.style.cssText='';});
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('sel');c.style.cssText='';});
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(function(el){var badge=el.querySelector('.nc-badge');if(badge&&badge.textContent.trim()===_tNivel)selNivel(_tNivel,el);});
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(function(el){var name=el.querySelector('.sc-name');if(name&&name.textContent.trim()===_tSilo)selSilo(_tSilo,el);});
  tsSetStep(1);fmOpen('fm-team');
}

function tsSetStep(s){
  _tStep=s;
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .fm-step').forEach(function(el){el.classList.remove('active');});
  document.getElementById('ts-'+s).classList.add('active');
  [1,2,3].forEach(function(i){var d=document.getElementById('ts-dot-'+i);d.classList.remove('active','done');if(i<s)d.classList.add('done');else if(i===s)d.classList.add('active');});
  document.getElementById('ts-back-btn').style.display=s>1?'':'none';
  document.getElementById('ts-next-btn').style.display=s<3?'flex':'none';
  document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn').style.display=s===3?'flex':'none';
  document.getElementById('ts-skill-count').style.display=s===2?'':'none';
  if(s===2){renderSkillMatrix('ts-2-content',_tSkills,'ts');updateTsCount();}
  if(s===3){renderTeamPreview();}
}

function tsNext(){
  if(_tStep===1){
    if(!document.getElementById('t-id').value.trim()){toast('Escribe el ID del t\u00e9cnico','err');return;}
    if(!document.getElementById('t-nombre').value.trim()){toast('Escribe el nombre completo','err');return;}
    if(!_tNivel){toast('Selecciona el nivel profesional','err');return;}
    if(!_tSilo){toast('Selecciona el silo de especialidad','err');return;}
  }
  if(_tStep<3)tsSetStep(_tStep+1);
}
function tsBack(){if(_tStep>1)tsSetStep(_tStep-1);}

function selNivel(n,el){
  _tNivel=n;var colors={N1:'#f85149',N2:'#2d7ef7',N3:'#a5b4fc',N4:'#f59e0b'};var c=colors[n];
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(function(e){e.classList.remove('sel');e.style.borderColor='';e.style.background='';});
  el.classList.add('sel');el.style.borderColor=c;el.style.background=c+'20';
}
function selSilo(s,el){
  _tSilo=s;var c=SLC[s]||'#2d7ef7';
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(function(e){e.classList.remove('sel');e.style.borderColor='';e.style.background='';});
  el.classList.add('sel');el.style.borderColor=c;el.style.background=c+'20';
}
function updateTsCount(){document.getElementById('ts-skill-count').textContent=_tSkills.length+' skills seleccionadas';}

function renderSkillMatrix(containerId,selected,prefix){
  document.getElementById(containerId).innerHTML=SKILL_CATS.map(function(cat){
    var selCount=cat.skills.filter(function(s){return selected.indexOf(s)>=0;}).length;
    return '<div class="skill-cat-block"><div class="skill-cat-head" style="color:'+cat.color+'"><span style="font-size:14px">'+cat.icon+'</span><span>'+cat.cat+'</span><div class="skill-cat-line" style="background:'+cat.color+'"></div><span class="skill-cat-cnt" style="color:'+cat.color+'">'+selCount+'/'+cat.skills.length+'</span></div><div class="skill-chips-grid">'+cat.skills.map(function(sk){
      var isSel=selected.indexOf(sk)>=0;var label=sk.split(': ')[1]||sk;
      return '<div class="sk-chip'+(isSel?' sel':'')+'" style="'+(isSel?'border-color:'+cat.color+';background:'+cat.color+';color:#fff;':'')+'" onclick="toggleSkill(\''+sk.replace(/'/g,"\\'")+'\',\''+cat.color+'\',\''+prefix+'\',this)">'+escHtml(label)+'</div>';
    }).join('')+'</div></div>';
  }).join('');
}

function toggleSkill(sk,color,prefix,el){
  var arr=_tSkills;var idx=arr.indexOf(sk);
  if(idx>=0){arr.splice(idx,1);el.classList.remove('sel');el.style.borderColor='';el.style.background='';el.style.color='';}
  else{arr.push(sk);el.classList.add('sel');el.style.borderColor=color;el.style.background=color;el.style.color='#fff';}
  var catEl=el.closest('.skill-cat-block');
  if(catEl){var catCnt=catEl.querySelector('.skill-cat-cnt');if(catCnt){var chips=catEl.querySelectorAll('.sk-chip.sel');catCnt.textContent=chips.length+'/'+catEl.querySelectorAll('.sk-chip').length;}}
  document.getElementById('ts-skill-count').textContent=_tSkills.length+' skills seleccionadas';
}

function getSkillColor(sk){for(var i=0;i<SKILL_CATS.length;i++){if(SKILL_CATS[i].skills.indexOf(sk)>=0)return SKILL_CATS[i].color;}return'#8b949e';}

function renderTeamPreview(){
  var nombre=document.getElementById('t-nombre').value.trim();
  var id=document.getElementById('t-id').value.trim();
  var estado=document.getElementById('t-estado').value;
  var col=SLC[_tSilo]||'#8b949e';
  var nColors={N1:'#f85149',N2:'#2d7ef7',N3:'#a5b4fc',N4:'#f59e0b'};
  var nc=nColors[_tNivel]||'#8b949e';
  var initials=(nombre.split(' ').slice(0,2).map(function(n){return n[0]||'';}).join('')).toUpperCase()||'?';
  var skHtml=_tSkills.length
    ?_tSkills.slice(0,14).map(function(s){return '<span class="skill-tag" style="border-color:'+getSkillColor(s)+'44;color:'+getSkillColor(s)+'">'+escHtml(s.split(': ')[1]||s)+'</span>';}).join('')+(_tSkills.length>14?'<span class="skill-more">+'+(_tSkills.length-14)+' m\u00e1s</span>':'')
    :'<span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;font-style:italic;">Sin skills \u2014 puedes a\u00f1adirlas despu\u00e9s</span>';
  document.getElementById('ts-3-preview').innerHTML='<div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px;">Revisa los datos antes de confirmar.</div><div class="preview-card" style="border-color:'+col+'44;"><div style="position:absolute;top:-30px;right:-30px;width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:50%;background:'+col+';opacity:.05;pointer-events:none;"></div><div class="pc-top"><div class="pc-avatar" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,'+col+','+col+'99);">'+escHtml(initials)+'</div><div style="flex:1"><div class="pc-name">'+escHtml(nombre||'Sin nombre')+'</div><div class="pc-id">'+escHtml(id)+'</div></div><div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:5px;"><span class="nivel-badge '+_tNivel.toLowerCase()+'">'+_tNivel+'</span><span class="silo-badge" style="background:'+col+'22;color:'+col+';">'+_tSilo+'</span></div></div><div class="pc-meta"><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);">\u25cf '+estado+'</span><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);font-family:var(--font-mono);">'+_tSkills.length+' skills</span></div><div class="pc-skills-title">Skills asignadas</div><div class="pc-skills-wrap">'+skHtml+'</div></div>';
  var tasksPanel=document.getElementById('ts-tasks-panel');
  if(_tEditMode&&_tEditId){
    var myTasks=_teamTaskMap[_tEditId]||[];
    var active=myTasks.filter(function(tk){return tk.columna!=='Completado';});
    var completed=myTasks.filter(function(tk){return tk.columna==='Completado';});
    var runActive=active.filter(function(tk){return tk.tipo==='RUN';}).length;
    var buildActive=active.filter(function(tk){return tk.tipo==='BUILD';}).length;
    var totalActive=active.length;
    tasksPanel.style.display='block';
    document.getElementById('ts-tasks-count').textContent='('+active.length+' activas, '+completed.length+' completadas)';
    document.getElementById('ts-pct-run').textContent=totalActive>0?Math.round(runActive/totalActive*100)+'%':'0%';
    document.getElementById('ts-pct-build').textContent=totalActive>0?Math.round(buildActive/totalActive*100)+'%':'0%';
    var list=document.getElementById('ts-tasks-list');
    if(myTasks.length===0){list.innerHTML='<div style="text-align:center;padding:10px;color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;">Sin tareas asignadas</div>';}
    else{list.innerHTML=myTasks.map(function(tk){var isRun=tk.tipo==='RUN';var isDone=tk.columna==='Completado';var link=tk.id_proyecto||tk.id_incidencia||'';var colIcon={'Backlog':'\ud83d\udccb','An\u00e1lisis':'\ud83d\udd0d','En Progreso':'\u26a1','Code Review':'\ud83d\udc41','Testing':'\ud83e\uddea','Despliegue':'\ud83d\ude80','Bloqueado':'\ud83d\udeab','Completado':'\u2705'};return '<div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;'+(isDone?'opacity:.5;':'')+'border-left:3px solid '+(isRun?'var(--blue)':'var(--green)')+';"><span style="font-size:11px;">'+(colIcon[tk.columna]||'\ud83d\udccb')+'</span><div style="flex:1;min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">'+escHtml(tk.titulo)+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);display:flex;gap:6px;"><span style="color:'+(isRun?'var(--blue)':'var(--green)')+';">'+tk.tipo+'</span><span>'+tk.columna+'</span>'+(link?'<span style="color:var(--purple);">'+link+'</span>':'')+(tk.horas_estimadas?'<span>\u23f1 '+tk.horas_estimadas+'h</span>':'')+'</div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">'+tk.id+'</span></div>';}).join('');}
  }else{tasksPanel.style.display='none';}
}

async function tsSubmit(){
  var btn=document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn');var originalHtml=btn.innerHTML;
  btn.disabled=true;btn.innerHTML='Guardando...';
  var nombre=document.getElementById('t-nombre').value.trim();
  var payload={id_recurso:document.getElementById('t-id').value.trim(),nombre:nombre,nivel:_tNivel,silo_especialidad:_tSilo,skills_json:_tSkills,skill_principal:_tSkills[0]||null,estado_run:document.getElementById('t-estado').value};
  try{
    var url=_tEditMode?'/team/tecnicos/'+encodeURIComponent(_tEditId):'/team/tecnicos';
    var method=_tEditMode?'PUT':'POST';
    await af(url,{method:method,body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    toast(_tEditMode?nombre+' actualizado':nombre+' a\u00f1adido al equipo');
    fmClose('fm-team');ALL_TEAM=[];loadTeam();
  }catch(e){toast('Error: '+e.message,'err');btn.disabled=false;btn.innerHTML=originalHtml;}
}

// ═══ SCRUM (full — real sprint system) ═══
var SELECTED_PROJECT=null,ALL_SPRINTS=[],ALL_SPRINT_ITEMS=[],CURRENT_SPRINT=1;
var _burndownChart=null,_velocityChart=null;
function helpTip(text){return '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(59,130,246,0.15);color:#3b82f6;font-size:9px;cursor:help;margin-left:4px;" title="'+escHtml(text)+'">?</span>';}
var TIPO_COLORS={STORY:{bg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.15)',color:'#3b82f6'},TASK:{bg:'rgba(34,197,94,0.15)',color:'#22c55e'},BUG:{bg:'rgba(239,68,68,0.15)',color:'#ef4444'},SPIKE:{bg:'rgba(168,85,247,0.15)',color:'#a855f7'}};
var ESTADO_COLORS={TODO:{bg:'rgba(139,143,152,0.15)',color:'#8b8f98'},IN_PROGRESS:{bg:'rgba(234,179,8,0.15)',color:'#eab308'},REVIEW:{bg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.15)',color:'#3b82f6'},DONE:{bg:'rgba(34,197,94,0.15)',color:'#22c55e'}};

async function populateProjectSelector(){
  var sel=document.getElementById('gb-project-selector');if(!sel)return;
  try{
    var results=await Promise.all([
      af('/cartera/proyectos').catch(function(){return[];}),
      af('/build/live').catch(function(){return[];}),
      af('/pipeline/sessions').catch(function(){return[];})
    ]);
    var cartera=Array.isArray(results[0])?results[0]:(results[0].proyectos||[]);
    var live=Array.isArray(results[1])?results[1]:(results[1].proyectos||[]);
    var sessions=Array.isArray(results[2])?results[2]:(results[2].sessions||[]);
    // Pipeline sessions that completed BUILD (have sprints/subtasks)
    var psSessions=sessions.filter(function(s){return s.estado==='COMPLETADO'||s.agentes_completados;});
    // Combine: pipeline sessions first (they have rich data), then live, then cartera
    var seen={};var combined=[];
    psSessions.forEach(function(s){var pid=s.id;if(!seen[pid]){seen[pid]=true;combined.push({id:pid,nombre:s.nombre_proyecto||pid,active:true,source:'pipeline'});}});
    live.forEach(function(p){var pid=p.id_proyecto||p.id;if(!seen[pid]){seen[pid]=true;combined.push({id:pid,nombre:p.nombre||p.nombre_proyecto||pid,active:true,source:'live'});}});
    cartera.forEach(function(p){var pid=p.id_proyecto||p.id;if(!seen[pid]){seen[pid]=true;combined.push({id:pid,nombre:p.nombre||p.nombre_proyecto||pid,active:false,source:'cartera'});}});
    sel.innerHTML='<option value="">Seleccionar proyecto...</option>';
    combined.forEach(function(p){
      var o=document.createElement('option');o.value=p.id;
      var prefix=p.source==='pipeline'?'\u25cf ':p.source==='live'?'\u25cb ':'';
      o.textContent=prefix+p.id+' \u2014 '+(p.nombre||'').substring(0,45);
      sel.appendChild(o);
    });
  }catch(e){console.warn('Project selector error:',e);}
}

function autoSelectProject(){
  var sel=document.getElementById('gb-project-selector');
  if(sel&&sel.options.length>1&&!sel.value){
    // Prefer pipeline sessions (PS-) which have rich data with sprints
    var psOpt=null;
    for(var i=1;i<sel.options.length;i++){if(sel.options[i].value.indexOf('PS-')===0){psOpt=sel.options[i];break;}}
    if(psOpt){sel.value=psOpt.value;loadProjectScrum(psOpt.value);}
    else if(sel.options.length>1){sel.selectedIndex=1;loadProjectScrum(sel.value);}
  }
}

async function loadProjectScrum(pid){
  if(!pid){SELECTED_PROJECT=null;return;}
  SELECTED_PROJECT=pid;
  try{
    var sprints=await af('/build/sprints/'+pid);
    ALL_SPRINTS=Array.isArray(sprints)?sprints:(sprints.sprints||[]);
    ALL_SPRINTS.sort(function(a,b){return(a.sprint_number||0)-(b.sprint_number||0);});
    if(!ALL_SPRINTS.length){
      document.getElementById('scrum-timeline-wrap').style.display='none';
      document.getElementById('sprint-header-wrap').style.display='none';
      document.getElementById('backlog-body').innerHTML='<div style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Sin sprints para este proyecto</div>';
      return;
    }
    // Find active sprint
    var activeSp=ALL_SPRINTS.find(function(s){return s.estado==='ACTIVO'||s.estado==='EN_PROGRESO';});
    CURRENT_SPRINT=activeSp?activeSp.sprint_number:ALL_SPRINTS[ALL_SPRINTS.length-1].sprint_number;
    // Badges
    var badge=document.getElementById('gb-sprint-badge');
    badge.style.display='inline';badge.textContent='Sprint '+CURRENT_SPRINT+' activo';
    var avgVel=ALL_SPRINTS.reduce(function(s,sp){return s+(sp.velocity||sp.story_points_completados||0);},0)/Math.max(1,ALL_SPRINTS.filter(function(s){return s.estado==='COMPLETADO';}).length||1);
    var velBadge=document.getElementById('gb-velocity-badge');
    velBadge.style.display='inline';velBadge.textContent='Velocity media: '+Math.round(avgVel)+' pts';
    renderSprintTimeline();
    loadSprintItems(CURRENT_SPRINT);
    renderVelocityChart();
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('Sprint load error:',e);
    document.getElementById('backlog-body').innerHTML='<div style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Error cargando sprints</div>';
  }
}

function renderSprintTimeline(){
  var wrap=document.getElementById('scrum-timeline-wrap');wrap.style.display='block';
  var tl=document.getElementById('sprint-timeline');
  tl.innerHTML=ALL_SPRINTS.map(function(sp,idx){
    var isActive=sp.estado==='ACTIVO'||sp.estado==='EN_PROGRESO';
    var isDone=sp.estado==='COMPLETADO';
    var cls=isActive?'active':isDone?'done':'future';
    var color=isDone?'#22c55e':isActive?'var(--accent-purple)':'#8b8f98';
    var dateStr=sp.fecha_inicio?new Date(sp.fecha_inicio).toLocaleDateString('es',{day:'numeric',month:'short'}):'';
    return '<div class="sprint-block '+cls+'" onclick="loadSprintItems('+sp.sprint_number+');highlightSprint('+idx+')">'
      +'<div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:'+color+';">S'+sp.sprint_number+'</div>'
      +'<div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(sp.story_points_planificados||0)+' pts</div>'
      +'<div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;">'+dateStr+'</div>'
      +'</div>';
  }).join('');
  // Highlight current
  var blocks=tl.querySelectorAll('.sprint-block');
  var activeIdx=ALL_SPRINTS.findIndex(function(s){return s.sprint_number===CURRENT_SPRINT;});
  if(activeIdx>=0&&blocks[activeIdx])blocks[activeIdx].scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',inline:'center'});
}

function highlightSprint(idx){
  document.querySelectorAll('.sprint-block').forEach(function(b,i){
    b.style.outline=i===idx?'2px solid var(--accent-purple)':'none';
  });
}

async function loadSprintItems(spNum){
  CURRENT_SPRINT=spNum;
  var sp=ALL_SPRINTS.find(function(s){return s.sprint_number===spNum;});
  // Header
  var hw=document.getElementById('sprint-header-wrap');hw.style.display='block';
  var planned=sp?sp.story_points_planificados||0:0;
  var completed=sp?sp.story_points_completados||0:0;
  var pctDone=planned>0?Math.round(completed/planned*100):0;
  hw.innerHTML='<div class="sprint-header"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">'
    +'<div><span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;">Sprint '+spNum+'</span>'
    +(sp&&sp.nombre?' <span style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:12px;">\u2014 '+escHtml(sp.nombre)+'</span>':'')
    +'</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+completed+'/'+planned+' pts ('+pctDone+'%)</div></div>'
    +(sp&&sp.sprint_goal?'<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:4px;">'+escHtml(sp.sprint_goal)+'</div>':'')
    +'<div class="sprint-progress"><div style="width:'+pctDone+'%;background:var(--accent-green);transition:width .3s;"></div></div></div>';
  // Load items
  try{
    var data=await af('/build/sprint-items/'+SELECTED_PROJECT+'?sprint_number='+spNum);
    ALL_SPRINT_ITEMS=Array.isArray(data)?data:(data.items||[]);
    renderBacklogTable(ALL_SPRINT_ITEMS);
    renderScrumKPIs(ALL_SPRINT_ITEMS,sp);
    renderBurndownChart(sp);
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('Sprint items error:',e);
    document.getElementById('backlog-body').innerHTML='<div style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Error cargando items</div>';
  }
}

function renderBacklogTable(items){
  var body=document.getElementById('backlog-body');
  document.getElementById('backlog-title').textContent='Sprint '+CURRENT_SPRINT+' Backlog';
  document.getElementById('backlog-count').textContent=items.length+' items';
  if(!items.length){body.innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:12px;">Sin items en este sprint</div>';return;}
  var sp=ALL_SPRINTS.find(function(s){return s.sprint_number===CURRENT_SPRINT;});
  var spGoal=sp?sp.sprint_goal:'';
  var planned=sp?sp.story_points_planificados||0:items.reduce(function(s,i){return s+(i.story_points||0);},0);
  var done=items.filter(function(i){return i.estado==='DONE';}).reduce(function(s,i){return s+(i.story_points||0);},0);
  var spPct=planned>0?Math.round(done/planned*100):0;
  var tecSet={};items.forEach(function(i){if(i.id_tecnico)tecSet[i.id_tecnico]=true;});
  var html='<div style="padding:8px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);">';
  if(spGoal)html+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:4px;">Meta: <span style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(spGoal)+'</span></div>';
  html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">';
  html+='<span>'+planned+' pts plan.</span><span>'+items.length+' items</span><span>'+Object.keys(tecSet).length+' t\u00e9cnicos</span>';
  html+='<div style="flex:1;height:6px;background:var(--bg-primary);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+spPct+'%;height:100%;background:var(--accent-green);border-radius:3px;"></div></div>';
  html+='<span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:'+(spPct>50?'var(--accent-green)':'var(--text-muted)')+';">'+spPct+'%</span>';
  html+='</div></div>';
  html+='<table class="backlog-table"><thead><tr><th>Key</th><th>Tipo</th><th>T\u00edtulo</th><th>Silo</th><th>T\u00e9cnico</th><th style="text-align:center;">Pts</th><th>Estado</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
  items.forEach(function(it){
    var tc=TIPO_COLORS[it.tipo]||TIPO_COLORS.TASK;
    var ec=ESTADO_COLORS[it.estado]||ESTADO_COLORS.TODO;
    var siloColor=SILO_COLORS[it.silo]||SLC[it.silo]||'#8b949e';
    var tecName=it.nombre_tecnico||'';
    if(!tecName&&it.id_tecnico){var tec=ALL_TEAM.find(function(x){return x.fte===it.id_tecnico;});if(tec)tecName=tec.name;}
    var initials=tecName?tecName.split(' ').slice(0,2).map(function(n){return n[0]||'';}).join('').toUpperCase():'';
    var avColor=tecName?AV_COLORS[Math.abs(hashCode(tecName))%AV_COLORS.length]:'#484f58';
    var estadoLabel={'TODO':'TODO','IN_PROGRESS':'IN PROG','REVIEW':'REVIEW','DONE':'DONE'}[it.estado]||it.estado;

    html+='<tr onclick="openSprintItemEdit(\''+it.id+'\')">';
    html+='<td style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+escHtml(it.item_key||'')+'</td>';
    html+='<td><span class="tipo-badge" style="background:'+tc.bg+';color:'+tc.color+';">'+escHtml(it.tipo||'TASK')+'</span></td>';
    html+='<td style="font-weight:500;max-width:200px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">'+escHtml(it.titulo)+'</td>';
    html+='<td><span style="padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;background:'+siloColor+'22;color:'+siloColor+';">'+escHtml(it.silo||'')+'</span></td>';
    html+='<td>'+(tecName?'<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><div class="avatar" style="background:'+avColor+';width:18px;height:18px;font-size:8px;">'+escHtml(initials)+'</div><span style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(tecName.split(' ')[0])+'</span></div>':'<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u2014</span>')+'</td>';
    html+='<td style="text-align:center;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:700;">'+(it.story_points||0)+'</td>';
    html+='<td><span class="estado-badge" style="background:'+ec.bg+';color:'+ec.color+';">'+estadoLabel+'</span></td>';
    html+='</tr>';
    var detail='';
    if(it.descripcion)detail+=escHtml(it.descripcion).substring(0,80)+'... ';
    if(it.horas_estimadas)detail+=it.horas_estimadas+'h est. ';
    if(it.bloqueador)detail+='\u26a0 '+escHtml(it.bloqueador).substring(0,40)+' ';
    if(it.subtareas_total>0)detail+='\ud83d\udccb '+it.subtareas_completadas+'/'+it.subtareas_total+' sub';
    if(detail)html+='<tr><td colspan="7" style="padding:0 10px 6px 30px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">'+detail+'</td></tr>';
  });
  html+='</tbody></table>';
  body.innerHTML=html;
}

function renderScrumKPIs(items,sprint){
  var totalPts=items.reduce(function(s,i){return s+(i.story_points||0);},0);
  var donePts=items.filter(function(i){return i.estado==='DONE';}).reduce(function(s,i){return s+(i.story_points||0);},0);
  var totalItems=items.length;
  var tecnicos={};items.forEach(function(i){if(i.id_tecnico)tecnicos[i.id_tecnico]=true;});
  var numTec=Object.keys(tecnicos).length;
  document.getElementById('scrum-kpis').innerHTML=
