    '<div class="sb-card"><div class="sb-val" style="color:var(--accent-purple);">'+totalPts+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Story Points'+helpTip('Los Story Points miden complejidad relativa, no horas. Fibonacci: 1,2,3,5,8,13.')+'</div></div>'
    +'<div class="sb-card"><div class="sb-val" style="color:var(--accent-green);">'+donePts+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Completados'+helpTip('Pts completados vs planificados. Si <80% consistente, el equipo sobreestima.')+'</div></div>'
    +'<div class="sb-card"><div class="sb-val" style="color:var(--accent-blue);">'+totalItems+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Items</div></div>'
    +'<div class="sb-card"><div class="sb-val" style="color:var(--accent-pink);">'+numTec+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Equipo</div></div>';
}

function renderBurndownChart(sprint){
  var canvas=document.getElementById('burndown-chart');if(!canvas)return;
  if(_burndownChart){_burndownChart.destroy();_burndownChart=null;}
  var totalPts=sprint?sprint.story_points_planificados||0:0;
  var bd=[];try{bd=typeof sprint.burndown_data==='string'?JSON.parse(sprint.burndown_data||'[]'):sprint.burndown_data||[];}catch(e){bd=[];}
  // Generate synthetic burndown if empty
  if(!bd.length&&totalPts>0){
    var nDays=10;
    var donePts=sprint.story_points_completados||0;
    for(var d=0;d<=nDays;d++){
      var ideal=Math.round(totalPts*(1-d/nDays));
      var actual=d===0?totalPts:d===nDays?totalPts-donePts:Math.round(totalPts-donePts*(d/nDays)+(Math.random()*3-1));
      bd.push({dia:d+1,restante:Math.max(0,actual)});
    }
  }
  if(!bd.length){canvas.parentElement.innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100%;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:11px;">Sin datos burndown</div>';return;}
  var labels=bd.map(function(d){return'D'+d.dia;});
  var idealData=bd.map(function(d,i){return Math.round(totalPts*(1-i/(bd.length-1)));});
  var actualData=bd.map(function(d){return d.restante;});
  _burndownChart=new Chart(canvas,{type:'line',data:{labels:labels,datasets:[
    {label:'Ideal',data:idealData,borderColor:'#8b8f98',borderDash:[5,5],borderWidth:1,pointRadius:0,fill:false},
    {label:'Actual',data:actualData,borderColor:'var(--accent-purple)',borderWidth:2,pointRadius:3,pointBackgroundColor:'#bc8cff',fill:false,tension:0.3}
  ]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'},ticks:{color:'#8b949e',font:{size:9}}},y:{grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'},ticks:{color:'#8b949e',font:{size:9}},beginAtZero:true}}}});
}

function renderVelocityChart(){
  var canvas=document.getElementById('velocity-chart');if(!canvas)return;
  if(_velocityChart){_velocityChart.destroy();_velocityChart=null;}
  if(!ALL_SPRINTS.length)return;
  var labels=ALL_SPRINTS.map(function(sp){return'S'+sp.sprint_number;});
  var data=ALL_SPRINTS.map(function(sp){return sp.story_points_completados||sp.velocity||0;});
  var colors=ALL_SPRINTS.map(function(sp){
    return(sp.estado==='ACTIVO'||sp.estado==='EN_PROGRESO')?'rgba(188,140,255,0.7)':'rgba(63,185,80,0.7)';
  });
  var borderColors=ALL_SPRINTS.map(function(sp){
    return(sp.estado==='ACTIVO'||sp.estado==='EN_PROGRESO')?'#bc8cff':'#3fb950';
  });
  _velocityChart=new Chart(canvas,{type:'bar',data:{labels:labels,datasets:[{
    label:'Velocity',data:data,backgroundColor:colors,borderColor:borderColors,borderWidth:1,borderRadius:4
  }]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:'#8b949e',font:{size:9}}},y:{grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'},ticks:{color:'#8b949e',font:{size:9}},beginAtZero:true}}}});
}

// ═══ Sprint Item Modal ═══
function openSprintItemEdit(itemId){
  var it=ALL_SPRINT_ITEMS.find(function(x){return x.id===itemId;});
  if(!it)return;
  var tc=TIPO_COLORS[it.tipo]||TIPO_COLORS.TASK;
  document.getElementById('si-tipo-badge').textContent=it.tipo||'TASK';
  document.getElementById('si-tipo-badge').style.cssText='padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;background:'+tc.bg+';color:'+tc.color;
  document.getElementById('si-modal-title').textContent=escHtml(it.titulo);
  document.getElementById('si-key').textContent=it.item_key||'';
  document.getElementById('si-edit-id').value=it.id;
  document.getElementById('si-titulo').value=it.titulo||'';
  document.getElementById('si-estado').value=it.estado||'TODO';
  document.getElementById('si-pts').value=it.story_points||0;
  document.getElementById('si-prioridad').value=it.prioridad||'Media';
  document.getElementById('si-bloqueador').value=it.bloqueador||'';
  // Populate tecnico dropdown
  var tecSel=document.getElementById('si-tecnico');
  if(tecSel.options.length<=1&&ALL_TEAM.length){
    ALL_TEAM.forEach(function(t){var o=document.createElement('option');o.value=t.fte;o.textContent=t.fte+' \u2014 '+t.name;tecSel.appendChild(o);});
  }
  tecSel.value=it.id_tecnico||'';
  // Subtareas
  var subWrap=document.getElementById('si-subtareas-wrap');
  if(it.subtareas_total>0){
    subWrap.style.display='block';
    document.getElementById('si-subtareas-list').innerHTML='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">'+it.subtareas_completadas+'/'+it.subtareas_total+' completadas</div>';
  }else{subWrap.style.display='none';}
  fmOpen('fm-sprint-item');
}

async function saveSprintItem(){
  var itemId=document.getElementById('si-edit-id').value;
  if(!itemId)return;
  var payload={
    titulo:document.getElementById('si-titulo').value.trim(),
    estado:document.getElementById('si-estado').value,
    story_points:parseInt(document.getElementById('si-pts').value)||0,
    id_tecnico:document.getElementById('si-tecnico').value||null,
    prioridad:document.getElementById('si-prioridad').value,
    bloqueador:document.getElementById('si-bloqueador').value.trim()||null
  };
  try{
    await af('/build/sprint-items/'+itemId,{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    toast('Item actualizado');
    fmClose('fm-sprint-item');
    loadSprintItems(CURRENT_SPRINT);
  }catch(e){toast('Error: '+e.message,'err');}
}

// ═══ GANTT TAB ═══
var _ganttLoaded=false;

function syncGanttSelector(){
  var sel=document.getElementById('gb-gantt-proj');
  var srcSel=document.getElementById('gb-project-selector');
  if(sel&&srcSel&&sel.options.length<=1){
    sel.innerHTML=srcSel.innerHTML;
    if(SELECTED_PROJECT)sel.value=SELECTED_PROJECT;
  }
}

function daysBetween(d1,d2){return Math.ceil((new Date(d2)-new Date(d1))/(86400000));}
function fmtDateShort(d){if(!d)return'\u2014';var dt=new Date(d);return dt.toLocaleDateString('es',{day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'});}

async function loadGanttView(pid){
  if(!pid)return;
  SELECTED_PROJECT=pid;
  _ganttLoaded=true;
  try{
    var sprints=await af('/build/sprints/'+pid);
    var spArr=Array.isArray(sprints)?sprints:(sprints.sprints||[]);
    spArr.sort(function(a,b){return(a.sprint_number||0)-(b.sprint_number||0);});
    // Get governance transactions (may be empty)
    var txs=[];
    try{var txData=await af('/dev/sql',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({sql:"SELECT * FROM gobernanza_transacciones WHERE id_proyecto='"+pid+"' ORDER BY timestamp_ejecucion"})});txs=Array.isArray(txData)?txData:(txData.rows||txData.data||[]);}catch(e){}
    // Get project progress
    var progPct=0;
    try{var liveData=await af('/build/live');var liveArr=Array.isArray(liveData)?liveData:(liveData.proyectos||[]);var proj=liveArr.find(function(p){return(p.id_proyecto||p.id)===pid;});if(proj)progPct=proj.progreso_pct||0;}catch(e){}
    if(!spArr.length){
      document.getElementById('gantt-fechas-display').innerHTML='<span class="gantt-fecha-big" style="color:var(--text-muted);">Sin sprints</span>';
      document.getElementById('gb-gantt-chart').innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Sin datos de sprints para este proyecto</div>';
      document.getElementById('gb-historial').innerHTML='';
      return;
    }
    renderFechaPanel(spArr,txs,progPct);
    renderGanttChart(spArr,txs);
    renderHistorial(spArr,txs);
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('Gantt error:',e);
    document.getElementById('gantt-fechas-display').innerHTML='<span style="color:var(--accent-red);">Error cargando datos</span>';
  }
}

function renderFechaPanel(sprints,txs,progPct){
  var firstSp=sprints[0];
  var lastSp=sprints[sprints.length-1];
  // Compute dates from created_at + sprint duration (2 weeks each)
  var startDate=new Date(firstSp.created_at||firstSp.fecha_inicio||Date.now());
  var baselineEnd=new Date(startDate);baselineEnd.setDate(baselineEnd.getDate()+sprints.length*14);
  // Calculate delay from governance txs
  var diasRetraso=0;
  var fechasPrevias=[];
  txs.forEach(function(tx){
    var ctx=tx.datos_contexto;if(typeof ctx==='string')try{ctx=JSON.parse(ctx);}catch(e){ctx={};}
    var dias=parseInt((ctx&&ctx.dias_retraso)||7);
    fechasPrevias.push(new Date(baselineEnd.getTime()+diasRetraso*86400000));
    diasRetraso+=dias;
  });
  var actualEnd=new Date(baselineEnd.getTime()+diasRetraso*86400000);
  var hayRetraso=diasRetraso>0;
  var fechaColor=hayRetraso?'var(--accent-red)':'var(--accent-green)';
  // Render
  var html='';
  // Previous dates (struck through)
  if(fechasPrevias.length>0){
    html+='<span class="gantt-fecha-old">'+fmtDateShort(baselineEnd)+'</span>';
    fechasPrevias.forEach(function(f,i){
      if(i<fechasPrevias.length-1)html+='<span class="gantt-fecha-old">'+fmtDateShort(f)+'</span>';
    });
  }
  html+='<span class="gantt-fecha-big" style="color:'+fechaColor+';">'+fmtDateShort(actualEnd)+'</span>';
  document.getElementById('gantt-fechas-display').innerHTML=html;
  // Progress bar
  var totalDays=daysBetween(startDate,actualEnd);
  var elapsedDays=daysBetween(startDate,new Date());
  var elapsedPct=Math.min(100,Math.max(0,Math.round(elapsedDays/Math.max(1,totalDays)*100)));
  var baselinePct=diasRetraso>0?Math.round(daysBetween(startDate,baselineEnd)/Math.max(1,totalDays)*100):100;
  document.getElementById('gantt-main-progress').innerHTML='<div class="gantt-progress-fill" style="width:'+Math.max(progPct,elapsedPct)+'%;background:'+(hayRetraso?'var(--accent-orange)':'var(--accent-green)')+';"></div>'
    +(diasRetraso>0?'<div style="position:absolute;left:'+baselinePct+'%;top:-2px;bottom:-2px;width:2px;background:var(--accent-green);opacity:.5;" title="Baseline"></div>':'')
    +'<div class="gantt-today-marker" style="left:'+elapsedPct+'%;" title="Hoy"></div>';
  // Meta
  var metaHtml='<span>Inicio: <strong>'+fmtDateShort(startDate)+'</strong></span>';
  metaHtml+='<span>Baseline: <strong>'+fmtDateShort(baselineEnd)+'</strong></span>';
  metaHtml+='<span>Actual: <strong style="color:'+fechaColor+';">'+fmtDateShort(actualEnd)+(hayRetraso?' (+'+diasRetraso+' d\u00edas)':'')+'</strong></span>';
  if(!hayRetraso)metaHtml+='<span style="color:var(--accent-green);font-weight:600;">\u2713 Proyecto en fecha</span>';
  else metaHtml+='<span style="color:var(--accent-red);">'+txs.length+' replanificaci\u00f3n'+(txs.length>1?'es':'')+'</span>';
  document.getElementById('gantt-fecha-meta').innerHTML=metaHtml;
}

function renderGanttChart(sprints,txs){
  var firstSp=sprints[0];
  var startDate=new Date(firstSp.created_at||firstSp.fecha_inicio||Date.now());
  var totalDays=sprints.length*14+60;
  var endDate=new Date(startDate);endDate.setDate(endDate.getDate()+totalDays);
  // Months header
  var monthsEl=document.getElementById('gb-gantt-months');
  var months=[];var cur=new Date(startDate.getFullYear(),startDate.getMonth(),1);
  while(cur<endDate){var next=new Date(cur);next.setMonth(next.getMonth()+1);var mDays=daysBetween(cur<startDate?startDate:cur,next>endDate?endDate:next);var mPct=Math.max(0,mDays/totalDays*100);months.push({name:cur.toLocaleDateString('es',{month:'short'}),pct:mPct});cur=next;}
  monthsEl.innerHTML=months.map(function(m){return'<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);flex:0 0 '+m.pct+'%;text-align:center;">'+m.name+'</span>';}).join('');
  // Compute delay per sprint
  var diasRetrasoAcum=0;
  var retrasoPorSprint={};
  txs.forEach(function(tx){
    var ctx=tx.datos_contexto;if(typeof ctx==='string')try{ctx=JSON.parse(ctx);}catch(e){ctx={};}
    var dias=parseInt((ctx&&ctx.dias_retraso)||7);
    var spNum=parseInt((ctx&&ctx.sprint_afectado)||0);
    diasRetrasoAcum+=dias;
    for(var i=spNum||1;i<=sprints.length;i++)retrasoPorSprint[i]=(retrasoPorSprint[i]||0)+dias;
  });
  // Render rows
  var chart=document.getElementById('gb-gantt-chart');
  chart.innerHTML=sprints.map(function(sp,idx){
    var baseStart=idx*14;
    // Calculate sprint state from timeline position
    var spStartDay=idx*14;
    var spEndDay=spStartDay+14;
    var todayDay=daysBetween(startDate,new Date());
    var isDone=sp.estado==='COMPLETADO'||(todayDay>spEndDay);
    var isActive=!isDone&&(todayDay>=spStartDay&&todayDay<=spEndDay);
    var labelColor=isDone?'#22c55e':isActive?'var(--accent-purple)':'var(--text-muted)';
    var barColor=isDone?'#22c55e':isActive?'var(--accent-purple)':'var(--border)';
    var baseDur=14;
    var baseLeft=baseStart/totalDays*100;
    var baseWidth=baseDur/totalDays*100;
    var retraso=retrasoPorSprint[sp.sprint_number]||0;
    var realStart=baseStart+retraso;
    var realLeft=realStart/totalDays*100;
    var today=daysBetween(startDate,new Date());
    var todayInSprint=isActive&&today>=realStart&&today<=realStart+baseDur;
    var todayLeft=today/totalDays*100;

    var rowHtml='<div class="gantt-row">';
    rowHtml+='<div class="gantt-label"><span style="font-weight:600;color:'+labelColor+';">S'+sp.sprint_number+'</span><span style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:10px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">'+escHtml((sp.nombre||'').substring(0,14))+'</span></div>';
    rowHtml+='<div class="gantt-bars">';
    rowHtml+='<div class="gantt-bar-base" style="left:'+baseLeft+'%;width:'+baseWidth+'%;border-color:'+labelColor+';"></div>';
    rowHtml+='<div class="gantt-bar-real" style="left:'+realLeft+'%;width:'+baseWidth+'%;background:'+barColor+';'+((!isDone&&!isActive)?'border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);':'')+'"></div>';
    if(retraso>0)rowHtml+='<div class="gantt-delay-tag" style="left:'+(baseLeft+baseWidth)+'%;">+'+retraso+'d</div>';
    if(todayInSprint)rowHtml+='<div class="gantt-today-line" style="left:'+todayLeft+'%;"></div>';
    rowHtml+='</div></div>';
    return rowHtml;
  }).join('');
  // Today line global
  var today=daysBetween(startDate,new Date());
  if(today>0&&today<totalDays){
    chart.innerHTML+='<div style="position:relative;height:0;"><div style="position:absolute;left:calc(120px + '+(today/totalDays*100)+'%);top:-'+(sprints.length*27+10)+'px;font-size:8px;color:var(--accent-red);font-weight:600;background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);padding:0 4px;border-radius:2px;">HOY</div></div>';
  }
  // Legend
  document.getElementById('gb-gantt-legend').innerHTML='<span class="gantt-legend-item"><span class="gantt-legend-box" style="border:1px dashed var(--text-muted);opacity:.4;"></span>Baseline</span>'
    +'<span class="gantt-legend-item"><span class="gantt-legend-box" style="background:#22c55e;"></span>Completado</span>'
    +'<span class="gantt-legend-item"><span class="gantt-legend-box" style="background:var(--accent-purple);"></span>En curso</span>'
    +'<span class="gantt-legend-item"><span class="gantt-legend-box" style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);"></span>Pendiente</span>'
    +'<span class="gantt-legend-item"><span style="color:var(--accent-red);font-weight:600;font-size:9px;">+Xd</span>Retraso</span>';
}

function renderHistorial(sprints,txs){
  var container=document.getElementById('gb-historial');
  container.innerHTML='';
  var firstSp=sprints[0];
  var startDate=new Date(firstSp.created_at||firstSp.fecha_inicio||Date.now());
  var baselineEnd=new Date(startDate);baselineEnd.setDate(baselineEnd.getDate()+sprints.length*14);
  // Baseline entry (always)
  container.innerHTML+='<div class="timeline-entry"><div class="timeline-line"></div><div class="timeline-dot" style="background:#22c55e;"></div><div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">Baseline original: '+fmtDateShort(baselineEnd)+'</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;">'+fmtDateShort(startDate)+' \u2014 AG-007 Planificador gener\u00f3 cronograma inicial</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+sprints.length+' sprints \u00d7 2 semanas = '+(sprints.length*2)+' semanas</div></div></div>';
  if(txs.length===0){
    container.innerHTML+='<div class="timeline-entry"><div class="timeline-dot dashed"></div><div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--accent-green);">\u2713 Sin replanificaciones \u2014 proyecto en fecha original</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;">No hay incidencias P1 que hayan afectado al cronograma</div></div></div>';
  }else{
    var diasAcum=0;
    txs.forEach(function(tx){
      var ctx=tx.datos_contexto;if(typeof ctx==='string')try{ctx=JSON.parse(ctx);}catch(e){ctx={};}
      var dias=parseInt((ctx&&ctx.dias_retraso)||7);
      diasAcum+=dias;
      var newDate=new Date(baselineEnd);newDate.setDate(newDate.getDate()+diasAcum);
      var color=diasAcum>20?'#f85149':diasAcum>10?'#ef9f27':'#eab308';
      container.innerHTML+='<div class="timeline-entry"><div class="timeline-line"></div><div class="timeline-dot" style="background:'+color+';"></div><div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">Replanificaci\u00f3n: '+fmtDateShort(newDate)+' (+'+dias+' d\u00edas, total +'+diasAcum+')</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;">'+fmtDateShort(tx.timestamp_ejecucion)+' \u2014 '+(tx.tipo_accion||'Replanificaci\u00f3n')+' \u2014 '+(tx.motivo||'Reasignaci\u00f3n por incidencia P1')+'</div>'+(ctx&&ctx.fte_afectado?'<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);">FTE: '+ctx.fte_afectado+'</div>':'')+'</div></div>';
    });
  }
  // Next review
  var activeSp=sprints.find(function(s){return s.estado==='ACTIVO'||s.estado==='EN_PROGRESO';});
  var nextSpNum=activeSp?(activeSp.sprint_number+1):1;
  container.innerHTML+='<div class="timeline-entry" style="margin-bottom:0;"><div class="timeline-dot dashed"></div><div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);">Pr\u00f3xima revisi\u00f3n: Sprint Planning S'+nextSpNum+'</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;">AG-007 recalcular\u00e1 si hay m\u00e1s incidencias P1</div></div></div>';
}
// ═══ PROYECTO DETAIL TAB ═══
var PROJECT_DATA=null;var PROJ_SUBTAB='edt';var FASE_COLORS=['#3b82f6','#a855f7','#22c55e','#eab308','#ec4899','#06b6d4','#f97316','#8b5cf6'];
function syncProjSelector(){var sel=document.getElementById('gb-proj-detail');var src=document.getElementById('gb-project-selector');if(sel&&src&&sel.options.length<=1){sel.innerHTML=src.innerHTML;if(SELECTED_PROJECT)sel.value=SELECTED_PROJECT;}}
async function loadProjectDetail(pid){if(!pid)return;SELECTED_PROJECT=pid;document.getElementById('proj-content').innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);"><span class="loading-spinner"></span> Cargando...</div>';try{var results=await Promise.all([af('/pipeline/sessions/'+pid).catch(function(){return{};}),af('/build/subtasks/'+pid).catch(function(){return[];}),af('/build/risks/'+pid).catch(function(){return[];}),af('/build/stakeholders/'+pid).catch(function(){return[];}),af('/build/sprints/'+pid).catch(function(){return[];})]);var session=results[0]||{};var pd=session.pipeline_data||{};if(typeof pd==='string')try{pd=JSON.parse(pd);}catch(e){pd={};}var subtasks=Array.isArray(results[1])?results[1]:(results[1].subtasks||results[1].items||[]);var risks=Array.isArray(results[2])?results[2]:(results[2].risks||[]);var stakeholders=Array.isArray(results[3])?results[3]:(results[3].stakeholders||[]);var sprints=Array.isArray(results[4])?results[4]:(results[4].sprints||[]);PROJECT_DATA={pd:pd,edt:(pd.edtResult&&pd.edtResult.edt)||{},acta:(pd.edtResult&&pd.edtResult.acta_constitucion)||{},alcance:(pd.edtResult&&pd.edtResult.alcance)||{},cost:pd.costResult||{},risks:risks,stakeholders:stakeholders,subtasks:subtasks,sprints:sprints,pm:pd.selectedPM||{},quality:pd.qualityResult||{},stakeholdersPD:(pd.stakeholdersResult&&pd.stakeholdersResult.stakeholders)||stakeholders,comms:(pd.stakeholdersResult&&pd.stakeholdersResult.plan_comunicaciones)||[],session:session||{}};renderProjKPIs();renderProjSubtabs();showProjSubtab('edt');}catch(e){console.warn('Project detail error:',e);document.getElementById('proj-content').innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Error cargando datos</div>';}}
function renderProjKPIs(){var d=PROJECT_DATA;var estado=d.session.estado||'EN_PROGRESO';var bac=(d.cost.presupuesto&&d.cost.presupuesto.bac_total)||0;var nFases=(d.edt.fases||[]).length;var nRisks=d.risks.length;var pm=d.pm.nombre||d.pm.name||'Sin asignar';document.getElementById('proj-kpis').innerHTML=[{v:estado,l:'Estado',c:estado==='COMPLETADO'?'var(--accent-green)':'var(--accent-purple)'},{v:nFases+' fases',l:'EDT/WBS',c:'var(--accent-blue)'},{v:bac?(bac>=1000?Math.round(bac/1000)+'K\u20ac':bac+'\u20ac'):'N/A',l:'BAC Total',c:'var(--accent-green)'},{v:nRisks,l:'Riesgos',c:nRisks>8?'var(--accent-red)':'var(--accent-orange)'},{v:pm.split(' ')[0],l:'PM Asignado',c:'var(--accent-cyan)'}].map(function(k){return'<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:10px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:'+k.c+';">'+k.v+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">'+k.l+'</div></div>';}).join('');}
function renderProjSubtabs(){var tabs=[{id:'edt',label:'EDT/WBS'},{id:'acta',label:'Acta+Alcance'},{id:'risks',label:'Riesgos'},{id:'stakeholders',label:'Stakeholders'},{id:'cab',label:'Calendario CAB'},{id:'budget',label:'Presupuesto'},{id:'gates',label:'Quality Gates'}];document.getElementById('proj-subtabs').innerHTML=tabs.map(function(t){return'<div class="proj-subtab'+(t.id===PROJ_SUBTAB?' active':'')+'" onclick="showProjSubtab(\''+t.id+'\')">'+t.label+'</div>';}).join('');}
function showProjSubtab(id){PROJ_SUBTAB=id;renderProjSubtabs();var content=document.getElementById('proj-content');if(!PROJECT_DATA){content.innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Sin datos</div>';return;}switch(id){case'edt':renderEdtTab(content);break;case'acta':renderActaTab(content);break;case'risks':renderRisksTab(content);break;case'stakeholders':renderStakeholdersTab(content);break;case'cab':renderCabSubtab(content);break;case'budget':renderBudgetTab(content);break;case'gates':renderGatesTab(content);break;default:content.innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Sub-tab no implementado</div>';}}
function renderEdtTab(el){
  var fases=(PROJECT_DATA.edt.fases||[]);
  if(!fases.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Sin datos EDT</div>';return;}
  var allSubs=PROJECT_DATA.subtasks||[];
  var totalHoras=fases.reduce(function(s,f){return s+(f.horas||0);},0);
  var totalTareas=fases.reduce(function(s,f){return s+(f.paquetes||[]).reduce(function(s2,p){return s2+(p.tareas||[]).length;},0);},0);
  var totalPaq=fases.reduce(function(s,f){return s+(f.paquetes||[]).length;},0);
  var techs={};allSubs.forEach(function(st){if(st.tecnologia)techs[st.tecnologia]=(techs[st.tecnologia]||0)+1;});
  var html='<div style="display:flex;gap:16px;">';
  html+='<div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">';
  fases.forEach(function(fase,fi){
    var color=FASE_COLORS[fi%FASE_COLORS.length];
    var paquetes=fase.paquetes||[];
    html+='<div class="edt-fase" id="edt-fase-'+fi+'">';
    html+='<div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\'edt-fase-'+fi+'\')" style="border-left:3px solid '+color+';">';
    html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:'+color+';">'+escHtml(fase.nombre)+'</span></div>';
    html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+(fase.horas||0)+'h</span><span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+paquetes.length+' paq</span><span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div>';
    html+='</div>';
    html+='<div class="edt-fase-body">';
    paquetes.forEach(function(paq){
      html+='<div class="edt-paquete" style="border-left:2px solid '+color+'44;padding-left:10px;margin-bottom:8px;">';
      html+='<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:4px;">'+escHtml(paq.nombre)+'</div>';
      (paq.tareas||[]).forEach(function(t,ti){
        var tareaId=t.id_tarea||t.id||('T'+(fi+1)+'.'+(ti+1));
        var subs=allSubs.filter(function(st){return st.id_tarea_padre===tareaId;});
        var hasSubs=subs.length>0;
        var tid='tarea-'+fi+'-'+tareaId.replace(/\./g,'-');
        html+='<div class="edt-fase" id="'+tid+'" style="border:none;margin:0;background:transparent;">';
        html+='<div class="edt-fase-head" '+(hasSubs?'onclick="_coll(\''+tid+'\')"':'')+' style="padding:3px 0;">';
        html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex:1;min-width:0;">';
        html+='<div style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:'+color+';flex-shrink:0;"></div>';
        html+='<span style="flex:1;min-width:0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(t.nombre||t.titulo)+'</span>';
        if(t.skill)html+='<span style="font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-muted);flex-shrink:0;">'+escHtml(t.skill.split(": ")[1]||t.skill)+'</span>';
        html+='<span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);flex-shrink:0;">'+(t.horas||0)+'h</span>';
        if(hasSubs)html+='<span style="font-size:9px;color:#d946ef;flex-shrink:0;">'+subs.length+' sub</span>';
        html+='</div>';
        if(hasSubs)html+='<span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span>';
        html+='</div>';
        if(hasSubs){
          html+='<div class="edt-fase-body" style="padding:4px 0 4px 20px;">';
          subs.forEach(function(st,si){
            var quality='green';
            if(!st.criterio_exito||(st.criterio_exito||'').length<10)quality='yellow';
            if(!st.descripcion_tecnica||(st.descripcion_tecnica||'').length<20)quality='yellow';
            if((st.horas_estimadas||0)>20||(st.story_points||0)>8)quality='red';
            var qColor=quality==='green'?'#22c55e':quality==='yellow'?'#eab308':'#ef4444';
            html+='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid #d946ef;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;">';
            html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;">';
            html+='<div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:'+qColor+';flex-shrink:0;"></div>';
            html+='<span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">'+(si+1)+'. '+escHtml(st.titulo||'Subtarea')+'</span>';
            html+='<span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-left:auto;">'+(st.horas_estimadas||0)+'h</span>';
            if(st.story_points)html+='<span style="font-size:9px;color:#eab308;margin-left:4px;">'+st.story_points+' pts</span>';
            html+='</div>';
            if(st.descripcion_tecnica)html+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:4px;">'+escHtml(st.descripcion_tecnica)+'</div>';
            html+='<div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
            if(st.tecnologia)html+='<span style="font-size:8px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(217,70,239,0.1);color:#d946ef;border:1px solid rgba(217,70,239,0.2);">'+escHtml(st.tecnologia)+'</span>';
            if(st.componente)html+='<span style="font-size:8px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(6,182,212,0.1);color:#06b6d4;">'+escHtml(st.componente)+'</span>';
            if(st.integracion_con)html+='<span style="font-size:8px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(249,115,22,0.1);color:#f97316;">\u2192 '+escHtml(st.integracion_con)+'</span>';
            if(st.skill_requerido)html+='<span style="font-size:8px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-muted);">'+escHtml(st.skill_requerido)+'</span>';
            html+='</div>';
            if(st.criterio_exito)html+='<div style="font-size:9px;color:#22c55e;margin-top:3px;">\u2713 '+escHtml(st.criterio_exito)+'</div>';
            html+='</div>';
          });
          html+='</div>';
        }
        html+='</div>';
      });
      html+='</div>';
    });
    html+='</div></div>';
  });
  html+='</div>';
  html+='<div style="width:200px;flex-shrink:0;">';
  html+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;">';
  html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:8px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:18px;color:var(--accent-blue);">'+fases.length+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Fases</div></div>';
  html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:8px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:18px;color:var(--accent-purple);">'+totalPaq+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Paquetes</div></div>';
  html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:8px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:18px;color:var(--accent-green);">'+totalTareas+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Tareas</div></div>';
  html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:8px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:18px;color:var(--accent-orange);">'+totalHoras+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Horas</div></div>';
  html+='</div>';
  html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:8px;margin-bottom:6px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:18px;color:#d946ef;">'+allSubs.length+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Subtareas AG-013</div></div>';
  if(Object.keys(techs).length){
    html+='<div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Tecnolog\u00edas detectadas</div>';
    Object.entries(techs).sort(function(a,b){return b[1]-a[1];}).slice(0,8).forEach(function(e){
      html+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;padding:2px 0;"><span style="color:#d946ef;">'+escHtml(e[0])+'</span><span style="color:var(--text-muted);">'+e[1]+'</span></div>';
    });
  }
  html+='</div></div>';
  el.innerHTML=html;
}
function _coll(id){var e=document.getElementById(id);if(e)e.classList.toggle('open');}
function renderActaTab(el){var acta=PROJECT_DATA.acta;var alc=PROJECT_DATA.alcance;var html='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;">';
html+='<div>';
html+='<div class="edt-fase" id="acta-section"><div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\'acta-section\')" style="border-left:3px solid #eab308;"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;"><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Acta de Constituci\u00f3n</span><span style="font-size:9px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,.1);color:#eab308;">IA</span></div><span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div><div class="edt-fase-body">';
var actaFields=[{k:'descripcion_alto_nivel',l:'Descripci\u00f3n'},{k:'objetivos_smart',l:'Objetivos SMART'},{k:'entregables',l:'Entregables'},{k:'sponsor',l:'Sponsor'},{k:'criterios_exito',l:'Criterios de \u00c9xito'}];
actaFields.forEach(function(f){var val=acta[f.k];if(Array.isArray(val))val=val.join('\n');html+='<div style="margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;">'+f.l+'</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-primary);background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:120px;overflow-y:auto;">'+escHtml(val||'Sin datos')+'</div></div>';});
if(acta.hitos&&acta.hitos.length){html+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Hitos</div>';acta.hitos.forEach(function(h,i){var c=FASE_COLORS[i%FASE_COLORS.length];html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 0;"><span style="width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:'+c+'22;color:'+c+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;">'+(i+1)+'</span><span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(typeof h==='string'?h:h.nombre||h.descripcion||JSON.stringify(h))+'</span></div>';});}
html+='</div></div>';
html+='</div>';
html+='<div>';
html+='<div class="edt-fase" id="alcance-section"><div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\'alcance-section\')" style="border-left:3px solid #3b82f6;"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;"><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Alcance</span><span style="font-size:9px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,.1);color:#eab308;">IA</span></div><span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div><div class="edt-fase-body">';
var alcFields=[{k:'alcance_producto',l:'Alcance del Producto'},{k:'exclusiones',l:'Exclusiones'},{k:'restricciones',l:'Restricciones'},{k:'asunciones',l:'Asunciones'}];
alcFields.forEach(function(f){var val=alc[f.k];if(Array.isArray(val))val=val.join('\n');html+='<div style="margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;">'+f.l+'</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-primary);background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:120px;overflow-y:auto;">'+escHtml(val||'Sin datos')+'</div></div>';});
html+='</div></div>';
html+='</div></div>';el.innerHTML=html;}
function renderRisksTab(el){var risks=PROJECT_DATA.risks;if(!risks.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Sin riesgos registrados</div>';return;}
var html='<div style="display:flex;gap:16px;"><div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">';
html+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Matriz Probabilidad \u00d7 Impacto</div>';
html+='<div class="risk-matrix">';
for(var y=5;y>=1;y--){html+='<div class="risk-label">'+y+'</div>';for(var x=1;x<=5;x++){var score=y*x;var bg=score>=15?'rgba(248,81,73,.2)':score>=10?'rgba(239,159,39,.2)':score>=5?'rgba(234,179,8,.15)':'rgba(63,185,80,.1)';var cellRisks=risks.filter(function(r){return r.probabilidad===y&&r.impacto===x;});html+='<div class="risk-cell" style="background:'+bg+';">';cellRisks.forEach(function(r){var idx=risks.indexOf(r);var sc2=r.probabilidad*r.impacto;var c2=sc2>=15?'#f85149':sc2>=10?'#ef9f27':sc2>=5?'#eab308':'#22c55e';html+='<span style="background:'+c2+';color:#fff;padding:0 3px;border-radius:2px;font-size:8px;cursor:pointer;" title="'+escHtml(r.descripcion||'').substring(0,60)+'" onclick="_coll(\'risk-'+idx+'\');document.getElementById(\'risk-'+idx+'\').scrollIntoView({behavior:\'smooth\'});">R'+(idx+1)+'</span>';});html+='</div>';}}
html+='<div></div>';for(var x2=1;x2<=5;x2++)html+='<div class="risk-label">'+x2+'</div>';
html+='</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;">X: Impacto | Y: Probabilidad</div>';
html+='<div style="margin-top:12px;">';
risks.forEach(function(r,i){var score=r.score||(r.probabilidad*r.impacto);var c=score>=15?'#f85149':score>=10?'#ef9f27':score>=5?'#eab308':'#22c55e';var rbg=score>=15?'rgba(248,81,73,.08)':score>=10?'rgba(239,159,39,.08)':score>=5?'rgba(234,179,8,.06)':'rgba(63,185,80,.06)';
html+='<div class="edt-fase" id="risk-'+i+'" style="background:'+rbg+';border-left:3px solid '+c+';">';
html+='<div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\'risk-'+i+'\')">';
html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><span style="background:'+c+';color:#fff;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);">'+score+'</span><span style="font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);">'+escHtml(r.categoria||'')+'</span><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(r.descripcion||'').substring(0,70)+'</span></div>';
html+='<span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div>';
html+='<div class="edt-fase-body" style="padding:8px 14px;">';
html+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:6px;">'+escHtml(r.descripcion||'')+'</div>';
html+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;font-size:10px;">';
html+='<div style="color:var(--text-secondary);">Probabilidad: <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+r.probabilidad+'/5</strong></div>';
html+='<div style="color:var(--text-secondary);">Impacto: <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+r.impacto+'/5</strong></div>';
if(r.responsable)html+='<div style="color:var(--text-secondary);">Responsable: <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(r.responsable)+'</strong></div>';
if(r.trigger_evento)html+='<div style="color:var(--text-secondary);">Trigger: <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(r.trigger_evento)+'</strong></div>';
html+='</div>';
if(r.plan_mitigacion)html+='<div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:10px;padding:6px 8px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:4px;border-left:2px solid var(--accent-green);"><strong style="color:var(--accent-green);">Mitigaci\u00f3n:</strong> <span style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(r.plan_mitigacion)+'</span></div>';
if(r.plan_contingencia)html+='<div style="margin-top:4px;font-size:10px;padding:6px 8px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:4px;border-left:2px solid var(--accent-orange);"><strong style="color:var(--accent-orange);">Contingencia:</strong> <span style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(r.plan_contingencia)+'</span></div>';
html+='<div style="margin-top:6px;text-align:right;"><button onclick="event.stopPropagation();showRiskModal('+i+')" style="font-size:10px;padding:3px 10px;background:var(--bg-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;color:var(--accent-blue);cursor:pointer;">Editar</button></div>';
html+='</div></div>';});
html+='</div></div>';
html+='<div style="width:180px;flex-shrink:0;">';var high=risks.filter(function(r){return(r.score||r.probabilidad*r.impacto)>=15;}).length;var med=risks.filter(function(r){var s=r.score||r.probabilidad*r.impacto;return s>=10&&s<15;}).length;var low=risks.length-high-med;
html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:8px;margin-bottom:6px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:18px;color:var(--accent-red);">'+high+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Cr\u00edticos (\u226515)</div></div>';
html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:8px;margin-bottom:6px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:18px;color:var(--accent-orange);">'+med+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Altos (10-14)</div></div>';
html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:8px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:18px;color:var(--accent-green);">'+low+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Bajos (&lt;10)</div></div>';
html+='</div></div>';el.innerHTML=html;}
function showRiskModal(riskIdx){
  var r=PROJECT_DATA.risks[riskIdx];if(!r)return;
  var ov=document.createElement('div');ov.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  ov.onclick=function(e){if(e.target===ov)ov.remove();};
  var score=r.score||(r.probabilidad*r.impacto);var c=score>=15?'#f85149':score>=10?'#ef9f27':score>=5?'#eab308':'#22c55e';
  var m=document.createElement('div');m.style.cssText='background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;width:520px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;border-top:3px solid '+c+';';
  m.innerHTML='<div style="padding:16px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><span style="background:'+c+';color:#fff;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:700;">'+score+'</span><span style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">R'+(riskIdx+1)+' \u2014 '+escHtml(r.categoria||'')+'</span><button onclick="this.closest(\'div[style*=fixed]\').remove()" style="margin-left:auto;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;">\u00d7</button></div>'
  +'<div style="padding:16px 18px;">'
  +'<div style="margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;">Descripci\u00f3n</div><textarea id="rm-desc" style="width:100%;min-height:60px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:11px;resize:vertical;">'+escHtml(r.descripcion||'')+'</textarea></div>'
  +'<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;">'
  +'<div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;">Probabilidad</div><select id="rm-prob" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);"><option value="1"'+(r.probabilidad===1?' selected':'')+'>1</option><option value="2"'+(r.probabilidad===2?' selected':'')+'>2</option><option value="3"'+(r.probabilidad===3?' selected':'')+'>3</option><option value="4"'+(r.probabilidad===4?' selected':'')+'>4</option><option value="5"'+(r.probabilidad===5?' selected':'')+'>5</option></select></div>'
  +'<div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;">Impacto</div><select id="rm-imp" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);"><option value="1"'+(r.impacto===1?' selected':'')+'>1</option><option value="2"'+(r.impacto===2?' selected':'')+'>2</option><option value="3"'+(r.impacto===3?' selected':'')+'>3</option><option value="4"'+(r.impacto===4?' selected':'')+'>4</option><option value="5"'+(r.impacto===5?' selected':'')+'>5</option></select></div>'
  +'<div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;">Categor\u00eda</div><select id="rm-cat" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);"><option'+(r.categoria==='T\u00e9cnico'?' selected':'')+'>T\u00e9cnico</option><option'+(r.categoria==='Recursos'?' selected':'')+'>Recursos</option><option'+(r.categoria==='Externo'?' selected':'')+'>Externo</option><option'+(r.categoria==='Regulatorio'?' selected':'')+'>Regulatorio</option><option'+(r.categoria==='Organizativo'?' selected':'')+'>Organizativo</option></select></div></div>'
  +'<div style="margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;">Plan mitigaci\u00f3n</div><textarea id="rm-mit" style="width:100%;min-height:50px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:11px;resize:vertical;">'+escHtml(r.plan_mitigacion||'')+'</textarea></div>'
  +'<div style="margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;">Plan contingencia</div><textarea id="rm-cont" style="width:100%;min-height:50px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:11px;resize:vertical;">'+escHtml(r.plan_contingencia||'')+'</textarea></div>'
  +'<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;">'
  +'<div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;">Responsable</div><input id="rm-resp" value="'+escHtml(r.responsable||'')+'" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:11px;"></div>'
  +'<div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px;">Trigger</div><input id="rm-trig" value="'+escHtml(r.trigger_evento||'')+'" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:11px;"></div></div>'
  +'</div>'
  +'<div style="padding:12px 18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;">'
  +'<button onclick="this.closest(\'div[style*=fixed]\').remove()" style="padding:8px 16px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">Cancelar</button>'
  +'<button onclick="saveRisk(\''+r.id+'\',this)" style="padding:8px 16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#238636,#2ea043);border:1px solid #3fb950;border-radius:6px;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">Guardar</button>'
  +'</div>';
  ov.appendChild(m);document.body.appendChild(ov);
}
function saveRisk(riskId,btn){
  var payload={descripcion:document.getElementById('rm-desc').value,probabilidad:parseInt(document.getElementById('rm-prob').value),impacto:parseInt(document.getElementById('rm-imp').value),categoria:document.getElementById('rm-cat').value,plan_mitigacion:document.getElementById('rm-mit').value,plan_contingencia:document.getElementById('rm-cont').value,responsable:document.getElementById('rm-resp').value,trigger_evento:document.getElementById('rm-trig').value};
  af('/build/risks/'+riskId,{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify(payload)}).then(function(){toast('Riesgo actualizado');btn.closest('div[style*=fixed]').remove();loadProjectDetail(SELECTED_PROJECT);}).catch(function(e){toast('Error: '+e.message,'err');});
}
function renderStakeholdersTab(el){var shs=PROJECT_DATA.stakeholders.length?PROJECT_DATA.stakeholders:PROJECT_DATA.stakeholdersPD;if(!shs.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Sin stakeholders</div>';return;}
var RACI_COLORS={R:{bg:'rgba(239,68,68,0.1)',color:'#ef4444'},A:{bg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.1)',color:'#3b82f6'},C:{bg:'rgba(234,179,8,0.1)',color:'#eab308'},I:{bg:'rgba(139,143,152,0.1)',color:'#8b8f98'}};
var q1=shs.filter(function(s){return s.nivel_poder>=3&&s.nivel_interes>=3;});var q2=shs.filter(function(s){return s.nivel_poder>=3&&s.nivel_interes<3;});var q3=shs.filter(function(s){return s.nivel_poder<3&&s.nivel_interes>=3;});var q4=shs.filter(function(s){return s.nivel_poder<3&&s.nivel_interes<3;});
function renderQuadrant(title,color,items){var h='<div class="sh-quadrant" style="border-color:'+color+'44;">';h+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:'+color+';text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">'+title+' ('+items.length+')</div>';
items.forEach(function(s,si){var initials=(s.nombre||'??').split(' ').slice(0,2).map(function(n){return n[0]||'';}).join('').toUpperCase();var rc=RACI_COLORS[s.rol_raci]||RACI_COLORS.I;
var uid='sh-'+s.nombre.replace(/\s/g,'')+si;
h+='<div class="edt-fase" id="'+uid+'" style="border:none;margin-bottom:2px;background:transparent;"><div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\''+uid+'\')" style="padding:4px 0;">';
h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex:1;min-width:0;"><div class="avatar" style="background:'+color+'33;color:'+color+';width:22px;height:22px;font-size:9px;">'+initials+'</div>';
h+='<div style="flex:1;min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">'+escHtml(s.nombre)+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+escHtml(s.cargo||'')+'</div></div>';
h+='<span style="padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:'+rc.bg+';color:'+rc.color+';">'+(s.rol_raci||'?')+'</span></div>';
h+='<span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div>';
h+='<div class="edt-fase-body" style="padding:4px 0 4px 28px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">';
if(s.area)h+='<div>\u00c1rea: <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(s.area)+'</strong></div>';
if(s.estrategia)h+='<div>Estrategia: <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(s.estrategia)+'</strong></div>';
if(s.frecuencia_comunicacion)h+='<div>Comunicaci\u00f3n: <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(s.frecuencia_comunicacion)+'</strong> v\u00eda '+escHtml(s.canal||'')+'</div>';
h+='<div>Poder: '+s.nivel_poder+'/5 | Inter\u00e9s: '+s.nivel_interes+'/5</div>';
h+='</div></div>';});
if(!items.length)h+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);font-style:italic;">Vac\u00edo</div>';h+='</div>';return h;}
var html='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Mapa Poder / Inter\u00e9s</div>';
html+='<div class="sh-grid">';html+=renderQuadrant('Gestionar de cerca (Alto P + Alto I)','#ef4444',q1);html+=renderQuadrant('Mantener satisfecho (Alto P + Bajo I)','#3b82f6',q2);html+=renderQuadrant('Mantener informado (Bajo P + Alto I)','#eab308',q3);html+=renderQuadrant('Monitorizar (Bajo P + Bajo I)','#8b8f98',q4);html+='</div>';
var comms=PROJECT_DATA.comms;if(comms.length){
html+='<div class="edt-fase" id="comms-section" style="margin-top:14px;"><div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\'comms-section\')" style="border-left:3px solid var(--accent-cyan);"><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">Plan de Comunicaciones ('+comms.length+')</span><span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div><div class="edt-fase-body">';
comms.forEach(function(c){var freqColor=(c.frecuencia||'').toLowerCase().indexOf('seman')>=0?'#ef4444':(c.frecuencia||'').toLowerCase().indexOf('quincen')>=0?'#eab308':'#3b82f6';
html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">';
html+='<span style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:'+freqColor+'22;color:'+freqColor+';flex-shrink:0;">'+escHtml(c.frecuencia||'')+'</span>';
html+='<span style="font-size:11px;flex:1;color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(c.evento||c.descripcion||'')+'</span>';
html+='<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+escHtml(c.audiencia||c.destinatario||'')+'</span>';
html+='<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+escHtml(c.canal||'')+'</span></div>';});
html+='</div></div>';}el.innerHTML=html;}
function renderBudgetTab(el){var cost=PROJECT_DATA.cost;var pres=cost.presupuesto||cost||{};var fin=cost.financiero||cost||{};
var bac=pres.bac_total||cost.bac_total||0;
var rrhhObj=pres.rrhh||{};var desglose=Array.isArray(rrhhObj)?rrhhObj:(rrhhObj.desglose_por_silo||[]);var totalRrhh=rrhhObj.total_rrhh||desglose.reduce(function(s,r){return s+(r.total||0);},0);
var pm=rrhhObj.pm||{};
var opex=pres.opex||{};var capex=pres.capex||{};var reservas=pres.reservas||{};
var roi=fin.roi_pct||fin.roi||0;var payback=fin.payback_meses||fin.payback||0;var tir=fin.tir_pct||fin.tir||0;var van=fin.van_eur||fin.van||0;
var roiColor=roi>50?'#22c55e':roi>0?'#eab308':'#f85149';
var payColor=payback<24?'#22c55e':payback<48?'#eab308':'#f85149';
var tirColor=tir>15?'#22c55e':tir>5?'#eab308':'#f85149';
var vanColor=van>0?'#22c55e':'#f85149';
// BAC hero
var html='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:16px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:14px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">BAC (Budget at Completion)</div><div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:38px;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent-green);">'+Number(bac).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</div></div>';
// RRHH section (expandable)
if(desglose.length){
html+='<div class="edt-fase open" id="budget-rrhh"><div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\'budget-rrhh\')" style="border-left:3px solid var(--accent-blue);"><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">RRHH por Silo ('+desglose.length+' silos \u2014 '+Number(totalRrhh).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac)</span><span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div><div class="edt-fase-body">';
html+='<table class="backlog-table"><thead><tr><th>Silo</th><th>T\u00e9cnicos</th><th>Horas</th><th>Tarifa/h</th><th style="text-align:right;">Total</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
desglose.forEach(function(r){var sc=SILO_COLORS[r.silo]||SLC[r.silo]||'#8b949e';
html+='<tr><td><span style="padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-size:10px;background:'+sc+'22;color:'+sc+';">'+escHtml(r.silo||'')+'</span></td><td style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text-primary);">'+(r.tecnicos||'-')+'</td><td style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text-primary);">'+(r.horas||0)+'</td><td style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text-primary);">'+(r.tarifa||0)+'\u20ac</td><td style="font-family:var(--font-mono);text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">'+Number(r.total||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</td></tr>';});
if(pm.nombre)html+='<tr style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);"><td><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--accent-purple);font-weight:600;">PM</span></td><td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(pm.nombre)+'</td><td style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text-primary);">'+(pm.horas||0)+'</td><td style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text-primary);">'+(pm.tarifa||0)+'\u20ac</td><td style="font-family:var(--font-mono);text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">'+Number(pm.total||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</td></tr>';
html+='<tr style="background:var(--bg-elevated);"><td colspan="4" style="font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Total RRHH</td><td style="font-family:var(--font-mono);text-align:right;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent-blue);">'+Number(totalRrhh).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</td></tr>';
html+='</tbody></table>';
var totalHrs=desglose.reduce(function(s,r){return s+(r.horas||0);},0);
var totalTecs=desglose.reduce(function(s,r){return s+(r.tecnicos||0);},0);
html+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:6px;">Total horas: '+totalHrs+' | Coste medio/hora: 85\u20ac | Equipo: '+totalTecs+' t\u00e9cnicos'+(pm.nombre?' + 1 PM':'')+'</div>';
html+='</div></div>';}
// OPEX + CAPEX (expandable, side by side)
html+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:10px;">';
html+='<div class="edt-fase open" id="budget-opex"><div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\'budget-opex\')" style="border-left:3px solid var(--accent-orange);"><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">OPEX \u2014 '+Number(opex.total_opex||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</span><span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div><div class="edt-fase-body">';
Object.entries(opex).forEach(function(e){if(e[0]==='total_opex')return;html+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:3px 0;font-size:11px;"><span style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(e[0].replace(/_/g,' '))+'</span><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text-primary);">'+Number(e[1]||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</span></div>';});
html+='</div></div>';
html+='<div class="edt-fase open" id="budget-capex"><div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\'budget-capex\')" style="border-left:3px solid var(--accent-purple);"><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">CAPEX \u2014 '+Number(capex.total_capex||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</span><span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div><div class="edt-fase-body">';
Object.entries(capex).forEach(function(e){if(e[0]==='total_capex')return;html+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:3px 0;font-size:11px;"><span style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(e[0].replace(/_/g,' '))+'</span><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text-primary);">'+Number(e[1]||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</span></div>';});
html+='</div></div></div>';
// Financial KPIs
html+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:12px;">';
html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:10px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:20px;color:'+roiColor+';">'+roi+'%</div><div class="sb-lbl">ROI</div></div>';
html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:10px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:20px;color:'+payColor+';">'+payback+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">Payback (meses)</div></div>';
html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:10px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:20px;color:'+tirColor+';">'+tir+'%</div><div class="sb-lbl">TIR</div></div>';
html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:10px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:20px;color:'+vanColor+';">'+Number(van).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</div><div class="sb-lbl">VAN</div></div>';
html+='</div>';
// Reservas (expandable)
if(reservas.contingencia_eur||reservas.gestion_eur||reservas.total_reservas){
html+='<div class="edt-fase" id="budget-reservas" style="margin-top:10px;"><div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\'budget-reservas\')" style="border-left:3px solid var(--text-muted);"><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">Reservas \u2014 '+Number(reservas.total_reservas||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</span><span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div><div class="edt-fase-body" style="font-size:11px;">';
html+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:3px 0;"><span style="color:var(--text-primary);">Contingencia ('+(reservas.contingencia_pct||10)+'%)</span><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text-primary);">'+Number(reservas.contingencia_eur||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</span></div>';
html+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:3px 0;"><span style="color:var(--text-primary);">Gesti\u00f3n ('+(reservas.gestion_pct||5)+'%)</span><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text-primary);">'+Number(reservas.gestion_eur||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</span></div>';
html+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:3px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:700;"><span style="color:var(--text-primary);">Total reservas</span><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text-primary);">'+Number(reservas.total_reservas||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac</span></div>';
html+='</div></div>';}
// Distribution bar
var totalBudget=bac||1;
var rrhhPct=Math.round(totalRrhh/totalBudget*100);
var opexPct=Math.round((opex.total_opex||0)/totalBudget*100);
var capexPct=Math.round((capex.total_capex||0)/totalBudget*100);
var resPct=Math.round((reservas.total_reservas||0)/totalBudget*100);
html+='<div style="margin-top:12px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Distribuci\u00f3n del presupuesto</div>';
[{l:'RRHH',p:rrhhPct,c:'var(--accent-blue)'},{l:'OPEX',p:opexPct,c:'var(--accent-orange)'},{l:'CAPEX',p:capexPct,c:'var(--accent-purple)'},{l:'Reservas',p:resPct,c:'var(--text-muted)'}].forEach(function(d){
  html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:3px;"><span style="width:55px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:right;">'+d.l+'</span><div style="flex:1;height:8px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+d.p+'%;height:100%;background:'+d.c+';border-radius:4px;"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text-primary);width:35px;">'+d.p+'%</span></div>';
});
// EVM Tracking placeholder
html+='<div class="edt-fase" id="budget-evm" style="margin-top:12px;"><div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\'budget-evm\')" style="border-left:3px solid var(--accent-cyan);"><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">Seguimiento EVM \u2014 Earned Value Management (PMBOK 7)</span><span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div><div class="edt-fase-body" style="padding:10px 14px;">';
html+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;">';
['BAC','PV','EV','AC','ETC'].forEach(function(k,ki){
  var val=ki===0?Number(bac).toLocaleString('es-ES')+'\u20ac':'---';
  var col=ki===0?'var(--accent-green)':'var(--text-muted)';
  html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:8px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:14px;color:'+col+';">'+val+'</div><div class="sb-lbl">'+k+'</div></div>';
});
html+='</div>';
html+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;">';
['SPI','CPI','EAC'].forEach(function(k){
  html+='<div class="sb-card" style="padding:8px;"><div class="sb-val" style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">---</div><div class="sb-lbl">'+k+'</div></div>';
});
html+='</div>';
html+='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:20px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:8px;"><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);">\ud83d\udcca Curva S \u2014 Disponible tras primer sprint cerrado</div></div>';
html+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.5;">\u2139\ufe0f El seguimiento EVM se activar\u00e1 autom\u00e1ticamente cuando el proyecto entre en fase de ejecuci\u00f3n y se cierren los primeros sprints. Los valores PV se calculan desde el baseline del BAC.</div>';
html+='</div></div>';
el.innerHTML=html;}
function renderGatesTab(el){var qr=PROJECT_DATA.quality;
// qualityResult may be a JSON string (from AG-017)
if(typeof qr==='string'){try{qr=JSON.parse(qr.replace(/^```json\s*/,'').replace(/```\s*$/,''));}catch(e){qr={};}}
var gates=qr.gates||qr.quality_gates||[];
if(typeof gates==='object'&&!Array.isArray(gates)){gates=Object.entries(gates).map(function(e){return Object.assign({id:e[0]},e[1]);});}
if(!gates.length){gates=[{fase:'G0',gate_name:'Gate Idea',estado:'PASSED'},{fase:'G1',gate_name:'Gate An\u00e1lisis',estado:'PASSED'},{fase:'G2',gate_name:'Gate Planificaci\u00f3n',estado:'IN_REVIEW'},{fase:'G3',gate_name:'Gate Ejecuci\u00f3n',estado:'PENDING'},{fase:'G4',gate_name:'Gate Validaci\u00f3n',estado:'PENDING'},{fase:'G5',gate_name:'Gate Cierre',estado:'PENDING'}];}
var stateColors={PASSED:{bg:'rgba(34,197,94,.1)',color:'#22c55e',icon:'\u2713'},IN_REVIEW:{bg:'rgba(59,130,246,.1)',color:'#3b82f6',icon:'\u25cf'},PENDING:{bg:'rgba(139,143,152,.08)',color:'#8b8f98',icon:'\u25cb'},FAILED:{bg:'rgba(248,81,73,.1)',color:'#f85149',icon:'\u2717'}};
// Summary cards
var html='<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px;overflow-x:auto;">';
gates.forEach(function(g){var sc=stateColors[g.estado]||stateColors.PENDING;var label=g.fase||g.id||'';var name=g.gate_name||g.nombre||'';
html+='<div style="flex:1;min-width:90px;background:'+sc.bg+';border:1px solid '+sc.color+'33;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">';
html+='<div style="font-size:20px;color:'+sc.color+';">'+sc.icon+'</div>';
html+='<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(label)+'</div>';
html+='<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+escHtml(name)+'</div>';
html+='<div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:'+sc.color+';margin-top:4px;">'+(g.estado||'PENDING')+'</div>';
html+='</div>';});html+='</div>';
// Detail cards (expandable)
gates.forEach(function(g,gi){var sc=stateColors[g.estado]||stateColors.PENDING;var label=g.fase||g.id||'';var name=g.gate_name||g.nombre||'';
html+='<div class="edt-fase" id="gate-'+gi+'" style="border-left:3px solid '+sc.color+';margin-bottom:6px;">';
html+='<div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="_coll(\'gate-'+gi+'\')">';
html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(label)+' \u2014 '+escHtml(name)+'</span><span style="font-size:9px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:'+sc.bg+';color:'+sc.color+';font-weight:700;">'+(g.estado||'PENDING')+'</span></div>';
html+='<span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">\u203a</span></div>';
html+='<div class="edt-fase-body" style="padding:8px 14px;">';
if(g.criterios&&g.criterios.length){html+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:4px;">Criterios</div>';g.criterios.forEach(function(c){var text=typeof c==='string'?c:(c.descripcion||c.criterio||'');html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px;padding:2px 0;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-primary);"><span style="color:var(--text-muted);">\u25a1</span>'+escHtml(text)+'</div>';});}
if(g.checklist&&g.checklist.length){html+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:6px;margin-bottom:4px;">Checklist</div>';g.checklist.forEach(function(c){var text=typeof c==='string'?c:(c.descripcion||c.criterio||'');html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px;padding:2px 0;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-primary);"><span style="color:var(--text-muted);">\u25a1</span>'+escHtml(text)+'</div>';});}
if(g.dod&&g.dod.length){html+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:6px;margin-bottom:4px;">Definition of Done</div>';g.dod.forEach(function(d){var text=typeof d==='string'?d:(d.descripcion||'');html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px;padding:2px 0;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-primary);"><span style="color:var(--text-muted);">\u25a1</span>'+escHtml(text)+'</div>';});}
if(g.responsable_qa)html+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:6px;">Responsable QA: <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(g.responsable_qa)+'</strong></div>';
if(!g.criterios&&!g.checklist&&!g.dod)html+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);font-style:italic;">Sin criterios definidos</div>';
html+='</div></div>';});
el.innerHTML=html;}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CAB — Gabinete de Cambios Automático (AG-011)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
var CAB_DATA={periodos:[],propuestas:[],ventanas:[],alertas:[]};

function swCAB(sub){
  document.querySelectorAll('.cab-sub').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('a');});
  document.querySelector('.cab-sub[data-cab="'+sub+'"]').classList.add('a');
  document.querySelectorAll('.cab-panel').forEach(function(p){p.style.display='none';p.classList.remove('a');});
  var el=document.getElementById('cab-'+sub);
  if(el){el.style.display='';el.classList.add('a');}
}

function loadCABData(){
  af('/cab/periodos').then(function(d){CAB_DATA.periodos=d||[];renderCABPeriodos();});
  af('/cab/propuestas').then(function(d){CAB_DATA.propuestas=d||[];renderCABPropuestas();});
  af('/cab/ventanas').then(function(d){CAB_DATA.ventanas=d||[];renderCABVentanas();});
  af('/cab/alertas').then(function(d){CAB_DATA.alertas=d||[];renderCABAlertas();});
}

function renderCABPeriodos(){
  // Periodos are now rendered inside the annual calendar sidebar
}

function renderCABPropuestas(){
  var g=document.getElementById('cab-propuestas-grid');if(!g)return;
  if(!CAB_DATA.propuestas.length){g.innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">No hay propuestas. Pulsa "Generar Propuesta" para crear una.</div>';return;}
  var h='';CAB_DATA.propuestas.forEach(function(p){
    var est=p.estado||'PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW';
    var col=est==='APLICADO'?'var(--accent-green)':est==='RECHAZADO'?'var(--accent-red)':est==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW'?'var(--accent-yellow)':'var(--accent-blue)';
    var estLabel=est==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW'?'Pendiente':est;
    var fg=p.fecha_generacion?p.fecha_generacion.substring(0,16).replace('T',' '):'';
    h+='<div onclick="cabOpenPropModal(\''+p.id+'\')" style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:14px;cursor:pointer;border-left:3px solid '+col+';transition:transform .15s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform=\'translateY(-2px)\'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=\'none\'">';
    h+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px;">';
    h+='<strong style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(p.periodo||'')+'</strong>';
    h+='<span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;background:'+col+';color:#000;">'+estLabel+'</span></div>';
    h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Propuesta #'+p.numero_propuesta+' &middot; '+fg+'</div>';
    if(p.revisado_por)h+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;">Revisado por: '+escHtml(p.revisado_por)+'</div>';
    h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:6px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">';
    h+='<span>Aplicados: '+(p.cambios_aplicados||0)+'</span>';
    h+='<span>Rechazados: '+(p.cambios_rechazados||0)+'</span></div>';
    h+='</div>';
  });
  g.innerHTML=h;
}

function loadCABPropuestaDetail(id){
  var det=document.getElementById('cab-propuesta-detail');if(!det)return;
  det.style.display='block';
  det.innerHTML='<div style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Cargando propuesta...</div>';
  af('/cab/propuestas/'+id).then(function(p){
    if(!p||p.error){det.innerHTML='<div style="color:var(--accent-red);">Error: '+(p?p.error:'no data')+'</div>';return;}
    var est=p.estado||'PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW';
    var propJson=p.propuesta_json;
    if(typeof propJson==='string')try{propJson=JSON.parse(propJson);}catch(e){propJson={};}
    var cambios=propJson.cambios_propuestos||propJson.propuestas||[];
    var resumen=propJson.resumen_ejecutivo||{};
    var h='<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:16px;">';
    h+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px;">';
    h+='<h3 style="margin:0;font-size:16px;color:var(--text-primary);">Propuesta: '+escHtml(p.periodo)+'</h3>';
    h+='<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">';
    if(est==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW'){
      h+='<button onclick="aprobarPropuestaCAB(\''+id+'\')" style="padding:5px 14px;border:none;border-radius:6px;background:var(--accent-green);color:#000;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;">Aprobar</button>';
      h+='<button onclick="rechazarPropuestaCAB(\''+id+'\')" style="padding:5px 14px;border:none;border-radius:6px;background:var(--accent-red);color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;">Rechazar</button>';
    }
    h+='</div></div>';
    if(resumen.total_cambios_propuestos!==undefined){
      h+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;">';
      h+='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);padding:8px;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent-cyan);">'+(resumen.total_cambios_propuestos||0)+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">Cambios</div></div>';
      h+='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);padding:8px;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent-yellow);">'+(resumen.conflictos_detectados||0)+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">Conflictos</div></div>';
      h+='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);padding:8px;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent-green);">'+(resumen.conflictos_resueltos||0)+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">Resueltos</div></div>';
      h+='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);padding:8px;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">'+(resumen.score_confianza_promedio||'-')+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">Score</div></div>';
      h+='</div>';
    }
    if(cambios.length){
      CAB_DETAIL_CAMBIOS=cambios;
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;">';
      h+='<span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);">Ventanas propuestas ('+cambios.length+')</span>';
      h+='<select onchange="filterCABTable(\'riesgo\',this.value)" style="font-size:10px;padding:3px 6px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);">';
      h+='<option value="">Todos los riesgos</option><option value="ALTO">ALTO</option><option value="MEDIO">MEDIO</option><option value="BAJO">BAJO</option></select>';
      h+='</div>';
      h+='<div class="table-wrap" style="max-height:350px;overflow-y:auto;"><table class="data-table" style="table-layout:fixed;">';
      h+='<thead><tr><th style="width:50px">Activo</th><th style="width:60px">D\u00edas</th><th style="width:50px">Horario</th><th style="width:40px">Riesgo</th><th style="width:35px">Score</th><th style="width:120px">Raz\u00f3n</th></tr></thead><tbody id="cab-detail-tbody"></tbody></table></div>';
    }
    h+='</div>';
    det.innerHTML=h;
    if(cambios.length)renderCABDetailTable(cambios);
  });
}

function renderCABVentanas(){
  var tb=document.getElementById('cab-ventanas-body');if(!tb)return;
  if(!CAB_DATA.ventanas.length){tb.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="8" style="text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);padding:20px;">No hay ventanas activas. Genera y aprueba una propuesta primero.</td></tr>';return;}
  var h='';CAB_DATA.ventanas.forEach(function(v){
    var rCol=v.riesgo_estimado==='ALTO'?'var(--accent-red)':v.riesgo_estimado==='MEDIO'?'var(--accent-yellow)':'var(--accent-green)';
    var cCol=v.criticidad==='CRITICA'?'var(--accent-red)':v.criticidad==='ALTA'?'var(--accent-yellow)':v.criticidad==='MEDIA'?'var(--accent-blue)':'var(--text-muted)';
    var vu=v.valido_hasta?v.valido_hasta.substring(0,10):'';
    h+='<tr onclick="cabOpenWindowModal(\''+v.id+'\')" style="cursor:pointer;">';
    h+='<td style="font-size:11px;" title="'+escHtml(v.nombre_ventana||'')+'">'+escHtml(v.codigo||'')+'</td>';
    h+='<td><span style="color:'+cCol+';font-weight:700;font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(v.criticidad||'')+'</span></td>';
    h+='<td style="font-size:10px;">'+(v.dias_semana||[]).join(', ')+'</td>';
    h+='<td style="font-size:10px;">'+(v.hora_inicio||'')+'-'+(v.hora_fin||'')+'</td>';
    h+='<td><span style="color:'+rCol+';font-weight:700;font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(v.riesgo_estimado||'')+'</span></td>';
    h+='<td style="font-size:11px;">'+(v.score_confianza||'-')+'</td>';
    h+='<td style="font-size:10px;">'+vu+'</td>';
    h+='<td><span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--accent-green);color:#000;font-weight:600;">'+escHtml(v.estado||'')+'</span></td>';
    h+='</tr>';
  });
  tb.innerHTML=h;
}

function renderCABAlertas(){
  var el=document.getElementById('cab-alertas-list');if(!el)return;
  if(!CAB_DATA.alertas.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">No hay alertas CAB activas</div>';return;}
  var h='';CAB_DATA.alertas.forEach(function(a){
    var sCol=a.severity==='CRITICAL'||a.severity==='HIGH'?'var(--accent-red)':a.severity==='MEDIUM'?'var(--accent-yellow)':'var(--accent-blue)';
    h+='<div onclick="cabOpenAlertModal(\''+a.id+'\')" style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:12px;border-left:3px solid '+sCol+';cursor:pointer;transition:transform .1s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform=\'translateY(-1px)\'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=\'none\'">';
    h+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:4px;">';
    h+='<strong style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(a.title||'')+'</strong>';
    h+='<span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;background:'+sCol+';color:#000;">'+escHtml(a.severity||'')+'</span></div>';
    h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">'+escHtml(a.description||'')+'</div>';
    h+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;">Tipo: '+escHtml(a.alert_type||'')+' &middot; Agente: '+escHtml(a.source_agent||'')+'</div>';
    h+='</div>';
  });
  el.innerHTML=h;
}

function generarPropuestaCAB(){
  var periodos=CAB_DATA.periodos;
  if(!periodos.length){toast('No hay periodos configurados','err');return;}
  var opts='';periodos.forEach(function(p){opts+='<option value="'+escHtml(p.nombre_periodo)+'">'+escHtml(p.nombre_periodo)+' ('+p.impacto_estimado+')</option>';});
  var sel=prompt('Periodo para generar propuesta CAB:\n'+periodos.map(function(p){return p.nombre_periodo;}).join('\n')+'\n\nEscribe el nombre exacto:');
  if(!sel)return;
  toast('Generando propuesta CAB para '+sel+'...','ok');
  af('/agents/build/cab-generator',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({periodo:sel})}).then(function(d){
    if(d&&d.job_id){
      toast('Propuesta en curso: '+d.job_id,'ok');
      monitorCABJob(d.job_id);
    }else{
      toast('Error: '+(d?d.error||JSON.stringify(d):'sin respuesta'),'err');
    }
  }).catch(function(e){toast('Error: '+e,'err');});
}

function monitorCABJob(jobId){
  var vis=document.getElementById('cab-agent-visual');
  if(vis)vis.style.display='block';
  cabAnimateReset();
  var es=new EventSource(AB+'/agents/build/cab-generator/'+jobId+'/stream');
  es.addEventListener('director_start',function(){cabAnimateDirector();});
  es.addEventListener('director_analysis',function(){});
  es.addEventListener('workers_spawning',function(){
    for(var wi=1;wi<=6;wi++){(function(idx){setTimeout(function(){cabAnimateWorker(idx);},idx*300);})(wi);}
  });
  es.addEventListener('worker_complete',function(e){
    var d;try{d=JSON.parse(e.data);}catch(x){d={};}
    if(d.worker_id)cabAnimateWorkerDone(d.worker_id);
  });
  es.addEventListener('workers_complete',function(){});
  es.addEventListener('merger_start',function(){cabAnimateMerger();});
  es.addEventListener('merger_complete',function(){});
  es.addEventListener('complete',function(){
    es.close();cabAnimateComplete();toast('Propuesta CAB generada correctamente','ok');
    setTimeout(function(){cabAnimateReset();var v=document.getElementById('cab-agent-visual');if(v)v.style.display='none';},5000);
    loadCABData();swCAB('props');
  });
