```html
  es.addEventListener('error',function(e){
    var d;try{d=JSON.parse(e.data);}catch(x){d={};}
    toast('Error CAB: '+(d.mensaje||'error desconocido'),'err');es.close();
    cabAnimateReset();var v=document.getElementById('cab-agent-visual');if(v)v.style.display='none';
  });
  es.onerror=function(){es.close();cabAnimateReset();};
}

function aprobarPropuestaCAB(id){
  if(!confirm('Aprobar esta propuesta y crear ventanas de cambio?'))return;
  af('/cab/propuestas/'+id+'/aprobar',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({revisado_por:'Gobernador BUILD'})}).then(function(d){
    if(d&&d.status==='OK'){toast('Propuesta aprobada: '+d.ventanas_insertadas+' ventanas creadas','ok');loadCABData();}
    else{toast('Error: '+(d?d.error||JSON.stringify(d):''),'err');}
  });
}

function rechazarPropuestaCAB(id){
  var motivo=prompt('Motivo del rechazo:');
  if(motivo===null)return;
  af('/cab/propuestas/'+id+'/rechazar',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({revisado_por:'Gobernador BUILD',motivo_rechazo:motivo})}).then(function(d){
    if(d&&d.status==='OK'){toast('Propuesta rechazada','ok');loadCABData();}
    else{toast('Error: '+(d?d.error||JSON.stringify(d):''),'err');}
  });
}

// ═══ Calendario Anual CAB (12 meses, grid 4x3) ═══
var cabCurrentYear=2024;
var cabMonthNames=['Ene','Feb','Mar','Abr','May','Jun','Jul','Ago','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dic'];
var cabMonthNamesFull=['Enero','Febrero','Marzo','Abril','Mayo','Junio','Julio','Agosto','Septiembre','Octubre','Noviembre','Diciembre'];
var cabDayNames=['Domingo','Lunes','Martes','Miercoles','Jueves','Viernes','Sabado'];

function cabSetYear(y){
  cabCurrentYear=y;
  var btns=document.querySelectorAll('.cab-yr-btn');
  btns.forEach(function(b){
    if(parseInt(b.textContent)===y){b.style.background='var(--accent-purple)';b.style.color='#fff';b.style.border='none';}
    else{b.style.background='var(--bg-elevated)';b.style.color='var(--text-secondary)';b.style.border='1px solid var(--border)';}
  });
  var lbl=document.getElementById('cab-yr-label');if(lbl)lbl.textContent=y;
  renderCalendar();
}

function cabGetDayClass(dt){
  var isExcl=false;var isWarn=false;
  var periodos=CAB_DATA.periodos||[];
  for(var i=0;i<periodos.length;i++){
    var ps=new Date(periodos[i].fecha_inicio);
    var pe=new Date(periodos[i].fecha_fin);
    if(dt>=ps&&dt<=pe){
      if(periodos[i].impacto_estimado==='ALTO')isExcl=true;
      else isWarn=true;
    }
  }
  if(isExcl){
    var dow=dt.getDay();
    if(dow===0||dow===6)return 'cab-ok';
    return 'excl';
  }
  if(isWarn)return 'warn';
  return '';
}

function renderCalendar(){
  var container=document.getElementById('cab-annual-grid');
  if(!container)return;
  container.innerHTML='';
  var stats={excl:0,warn:0,cab:0,free:0};
  var today=new Date();
  for(var m=0;m<12;m++){
    var box=document.createElement('div');
    box.style.cssText='background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;';
    var titleEl=document.createElement('div');
    titleEl.style.cssText='font-size:12px;font-weight:600;text-align:center;color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:4px;';
    titleEl.textContent=cabMonthNames[m]+' '+cabCurrentYear;
    box.appendChild(titleEl);
    var dowRow=document.createElement('div');
    dowRow.style.cssText='display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);text-align:center;margin-bottom:2px;';
    ['L','M','X','J','V','S','D'].forEach(function(dn){var s=document.createElement('span');s.textContent=dn;dowRow.appendChild(s);});
    box.appendChild(dowRow);
    var daysGrid=document.createElement('div');
    daysGrid.style.cssText='display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:1px;';
    var first=new Date(cabCurrentYear,m,1);
    var startDow=(first.getDay()+6)%7;
    var dim=new Date(cabCurrentYear,m+1,0).getDate();
    for(var e=0;e<startDow;e++){var emp=document.createElement('div');emp.style.cssText='padding:3px;';daysGrid.appendChild(emp);}
    for(var d=1;d<=dim;d++){
      var el=document.createElement('div');
      el.style.cssText='text-align:center;padding:3px 0;border-radius:3px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;transition:transform .1s;';
      el.textContent=d;
      var dt=new Date(cabCurrentYear,m,d);
      var cls=cabGetDayClass(dt);
      if(cls==='excl'){el.style.background='rgba(239,68,68,0.25)';el.style.color='#ef4444';el.style.fontWeight='600';stats.excl++;}
      else if(cls==='warn'){el.style.background='rgba(245,158,11,0.2)';el.style.color='#f59e0b';el.style.fontWeight='600';stats.warn++;}
      else if(cls==='cab-ok'){el.style.background='rgba(16,185,129,0.2)';el.style.color='#10b981';el.style.fontWeight='600';stats.cab++;}
      else{stats.free++;var dw=dt.getDay();if(dw===0||dw===6)el.style.color='var(--text-muted)';}
      if(d===today.getDate()&&m===today.getMonth()&&cabCurrentYear===today.getFullYear()){el.style.outline='2px solid var(--accent-purple)';el.style.outlineOffset='-1px';}
      el.onmouseover=function(){this.style.transform='scale(1.3)';};
      el.onmouseout=function(){this.style.transform='none';};
      (function(month,day,dayClass){el.onclick=function(){cabShowDayDetail(month,day,dayClass);};})(m,d,cls);
      daysGrid.appendChild(el);
    }
    box.appendChild(daysGrid);
    container.appendChild(box);
  }
  var se=document.getElementById('cab-stat-excl');if(se)se.textContent=stats.excl;
  var sw2=document.getElementById('cab-stat-warn');if(sw2)sw2.textContent=stats.warn;
  var sc=document.getElementById('cab-stat-cab');if(sc)sc.textContent=stats.cab;
  var sf=document.getElementById('cab-stat-free');if(sf)sf.textContent=stats.free;
  // Sidebar periodos
  var sidebar=document.getElementById('cab-period-sidebar');
  if(sidebar){
    var yStr=String(cabCurrentYear);
    var yearPeriods=(CAB_DATA.periodos||[]).filter(function(p){
      return(p.fecha_inicio||'').indexOf(yStr)===0||(p.fecha_fin||'').indexOf(yStr)===0;
    });
    if(!yearPeriods.length){sidebar.innerHTML='<span style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:11px;">Sin periodos este a\u00f1o.</span>';}
    else{
      sidebar.innerHTML=yearPeriods.map(function(p){
        var impColor=p.impacto_estimado==='ALTO'?'#ef4444':'#f59e0b';
        var impBg=p.impacto_estimado==='ALTO'?'rgba(239,68,68,0.15)':'rgba(245,158,11,0.15)';
        return '<div onclick="cabOpenPeriodModal(\'edit\',\''+p.id+'\')" style="padding:5px 8px;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px;background:'+impBg+';font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .1s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform=\'scale(1.02)\'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=\'none\'">'+
          '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">'+
          '<span style="color:'+impColor+';font-weight:600;">'+escHtml((p.nombre_periodo||'').replace(/_/g,' ')).substring(0,22)+'</span>'+
          '<span style="color:'+impColor+';font-size:10px;">'+p.impacto_estimado+' '+p.carga_pico_esperada_pct+'%</span></div>'+
          '<div style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:10px;">'+(p.fecha_inicio||'').substring(0,10)+' \u2192 '+(p.fecha_fin||'').substring(0,10)+'</div></div>';
      }).join('');
    }
  }
}

function cabShowDayDetail(month,day,cls){
  var panel=document.getElementById('cab-day-detail');if(!panel)return;
  var dt=new Date(cabCurrentYear,month,day);
  var dayName=cabDayNames[dt.getDay()];
  var dateStr=day+' '+cabMonthNamesFull[month]+' '+cabCurrentYear+' ('+dayName+')';
  var html='';
  if(cls==='excl'){
    html='<span style="background:rgba(239,68,68,0.2);color:#ef4444;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">EXCLUSION \u2014 No tocar activos cr\u00edticos</span>';
    html+='<p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:8px 0 0;">D\u00eda laborable dentro de periodo de alta carga (85%+). Los activos CR\u00cdTICOS y ALTOS no deben recibir cambios. AG-011 no propone ventanas en d\u00edas laborables de periodos cr\u00edticos.</p>';
  }else if(cls==='warn'){
    html='<span style="background:rgba(245,158,11,0.2);color:#f59e0b;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">PRECAUCION \u2014 Cambios con cuidado</span>';
    html+='<p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:8px 0 0;">Carga media (55-65%). Se permiten cambios en activos MEDIA y BAJA. Activos CR\u00cdTICOS requieren aprobaci\u00f3n especial del CAB.</p>';
  }else if(cls==='cab-ok'){
    html='<span style="background:rgba(16,185,129,0.2);color:#10b981;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">VENTANA CAB \u2014 Cambios permitidos</span>';
    html+='<p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:8px 0 0;">Fin de semana dentro de periodo cr\u00edtico. AG-011 asigna ventanas aqu\u00ed (01:00-07:00) porque la carga baja al 25-35%.</p>';
    html+='<div style="margin-top:8px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;font-size:11px;">';
    html+='<div style="color:var(--text-muted);">Ventanas t\u00edpicas este d\u00eda:</div>';
    html+='<div style="margin-top:4px;color:var(--text-primary);">CR\u00cdTICOS: s\u00e1b/dom 01:00-06:00 (5h)</div>';
    html+='<div style="color:var(--text-primary);">ALTOS: vie/s\u00e1b/dom 23:00-07:00 (8h)</div>';
    html+='<div style="color:var(--text-primary);">MEDIOS: mi\u00e9-dom 02:00-06:00 (4h)</div></div>';
  }else{
    html='<span style="background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-primary);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">LIBRE \u2014 Sin restricciones</span>';
    html+='<p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:8px 0 0;">Fuera de periodos cr\u00edticos. Cualquier activo puede recibir cambios seg\u00fan su ventana CAB habitual.</p>';
  }
  panel.innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;">'+
    '<span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">'+dateStr+'</span>'+
    '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'cab-day-detail\').style.display=\'none\'" style="padding:3px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button></div>'+html;
  panel.style.display='block';
}

// ═══ Filtro tabla detalle propuesta ═══
var CAB_DETAIL_CAMBIOS=[];

function filterCABTable(field,value){
  var filtered=CAB_DETAIL_CAMBIOS;
  if(value){
    filtered=CAB_DETAIL_CAMBIOS.filter(function(c){
      if(field==='riesgo')return c.riesgo===value;
      if(field==='criticidad')return c.criticidad===value;
      return true;
    });
  }
  renderCABDetailTable(filtered);
}

function renderCABDetailTable(cambios){
  var tb=document.getElementById('cab-detail-tbody');if(!tb)return;
  var h='';
  cambios.forEach(function(c){
    var v=c.ventana_final||c.ventana_recomendada||{};
    var rCol=c.riesgo==='ALTO'?'var(--accent-red)':c.riesgo==='MEDIO'?'var(--accent-yellow)':'var(--accent-green)';
    h+='<tr>';
    h+='<td style="font-size:11px;">'+escHtml(c.codigo||c.activo_nombre||('#'+c.id_activo))+'</td>';
    h+='<td style="font-size:10px;">'+(v.dias||[]).join(', ')+'</td>';
    h+='<td style="font-size:10px;">'+(v.hora_inicio||'')+'-'+(v.hora_fin||'')+'</td>';
    h+='<td><span style="color:'+rCol+';font-weight:700;font-size:10px;">'+(c.riesgo||'')+'</span></td>';
    h+='<td style="font-size:11px;">'+(c.score_confianza||'-')+'</td>';
    h+='<td style="font-size:10px;white-space:normal;">'+(c.razon_detallada||'').substring(0,120)+'</td>';
    h+='</tr>';
  });
  tb.innerHTML=h;
}

// Override renderCABPeriodos to also render annual calendar
var _origRenderPeriodos=renderCABPeriodos;
renderCABPeriodos=function(){_origRenderPeriodos();renderCalendar();};

// ═══ Animación AG-011 Hexágonos ═══
function cabAnimateDirector(){
  var dir=document.getElementById('cab-hex-director');
  var shape=document.getElementById('cab-hex-dir-shape');
  if(dir)dir.style.opacity='1';
  if(shape){shape.setAttribute('fill','rgba(124,58,237,0.15)');shape.setAttribute('stroke','#7c3aed');}
}
function cabAnimateWorker(wid){
  var w=document.getElementById('cab-hex-w'+wid);
  if(w){w.style.opacity='1';var p=w.querySelector('polygon');if(p)p.setAttribute('fill','rgba(6,182,212,0.15)');}
}
function cabAnimateWorkerDone(wid){
  var w=document.getElementById('cab-hex-w'+wid);
  if(w){var p=w.querySelector('polygon');if(p){p.setAttribute('stroke','#10b981');p.setAttribute('fill','rgba(16,185,129,0.15)');}var t=w.querySelector('text');if(t)t.setAttribute('fill','#10b981');}
}
function cabAnimateMerger(){
  var m=document.getElementById('cab-hex-merger');if(m)m.style.opacity='1';
}
function cabAnimateComplete(){
  var shape=document.getElementById('cab-hex-dir-shape');
  if(shape){shape.setAttribute('stroke','#10b981');shape.setAttribute('fill','rgba(16,185,129,0.15)');}
}
function cabAnimateReset(){
  var dir=document.getElementById('cab-hex-director');var shape=document.getElementById('cab-hex-dir-shape');
  if(dir)dir.style.opacity='0.3';
  if(shape){shape.setAttribute('fill','none');shape.setAttribute('stroke','#7c3aed');}
  for(var i=1;i<=6;i++){var w=document.getElementById('cab-hex-w'+i);if(w){w.style.opacity='0';var p=w.querySelector('polygon');if(p){p.setAttribute('fill','none');p.setAttribute('stroke','#06b6d4');}var t=w.querySelector('text');if(t)t.setAttribute('fill','#06b6d4');}}
  var m=document.getElementById('cab-hex-merger');if(m)m.style.opacity='0';
}

// ═══ CAB Build Alerts — Banner en dashboard principal ═══
function loadCABBuildAlerts(){
  af('/cab/alertas').then(function(alerts){
    if(!Array.isArray(alerts)||alerts.length===0)return;
    var buildAlerts=alerts.filter(function(a){
      return a.alert_type==='CAB_SPRINT_OVERLAP'||a.alert_type==='CAB_PROPOSAL_READY'||a.alert_type==='CAB_WINDOW_CONFLICT';
    });
    if(buildAlerts.length===0)return;
    var container=document.getElementById('cab-alerts-build');
    if(!container)return;
    container.style.display='block';
    var h='<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">'
      +'<svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M16 2v4M8 2v4M3 10h18"/></svg>'
      +'Alertas Gabinete de Cambios ('+buildAlerts.length+')</div>';
    buildAlerts.forEach(function(a){
      var sev=a.severity||'MEDIUM';
      var borderCol=sev==='CRITICAL'?'var(--accent-red)':sev==='HIGH'?'var(--accent-red)':sev==='MEDIUM'?'var(--accent-yellow)':'var(--accent-cyan)';
      var bgCol=sev==='CRITICAL'||sev==='HIGH'?'rgba(255,85,85,.08)':a.alert_type==='CAB_PROPOSAL_READY'?'rgba(57,210,192,.08)':'rgba(255,200,55,.08)';
      h+='<div onclick="sw(\'cab\')" style="background:'+bgCol+';border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid '+borderCol+';border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .15s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform=\'translateY(-1px)\'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=\'none\'">';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">';
      h+='<strong style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(a.title||'')+'</strong>';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">';
      h+='<span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;color:#000;background:'+borderCol+';">'+sev+'</span>';
      h+='<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">&rarr; Calendario CAB</span>';
      h+='</div></div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:4px;">'+escHtml(a.description||'')+'</div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:3px;">'+escHtml(a.alert_type||'').replace(/_/g,' ')+' &middot; AG-011</div>';
      h+='</div>';
    });
    container.innerHTML=h;
  }).catch(function(e){console.error('Error CAB build alerts:',e);});
}

// ═══ Modal Crear/Editar Periodo de Exclusion ═══
var cabPmAssetsData={};
var cabPmSelected=new Set();

function cabOpenPeriodModal(mode,periodoId){
  document.getElementById('cab-period-modal').style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('cab-pm-mode').value=mode;
  document.getElementById('cab-pm-id').value=periodoId||'';
  document.getElementById('cab-pm-delete-btn').style.display=mode==='edit'?'block':'none';
  document.getElementById('cab-pm-save-btn').textContent=mode==='edit'?'Guardar cambios':'Crear Change Freeze';
  document.getElementById('cab-pm-title').textContent=mode==='edit'?'Editar periodo de exclusion':'Nuevo periodo de exclusion (Change Freeze)';
  cabPmSelected=new Set();
  af('/cab/activos-selector').then(function(res){
    cabPmAssetsData=res||{};
    cabPmRenderAssets();
  });
  if(mode==='edit'&&periodoId){
    af('/cab/periodos/'+periodoId).then(function(p){
      document.getElementById('cab-pm-nombre').value=p.nombre_periodo||'';
      document.getElementById('cab-pm-impacto').value=p.impacto_estimado||'ALTO';
      document.getElementById('cab-pm-inicio').value=(p.fecha_inicio||'').substring(0,10);
      document.getElementById('cab-pm-fin').value=(p.fecha_fin||'').substring(0,10);
      document.getElementById('cab-pm-pico').value=p.carga_pico_esperada_pct||80;
      document.getElementById('cab-pm-notas').value=p.notas||'';
      (p.activos_afectados||[]).forEach(function(a){cabPmSelected.add(a);});
      cabPmRenderAssets();cabPmUpdateCounts();
    });
  }else{
    document.getElementById('cab-pm-nombre').value='';
    document.getElementById('cab-pm-impacto').value='ALTO';
    document.getElementById('cab-pm-inicio').value='';
    document.getElementById('cab-pm-fin').value='';
    document.getElementById('cab-pm-pico').value=80;
    document.getElementById('cab-pm-notas').value='';
  }
}
function cabClosePeriodModal(){document.getElementById('cab-period-modal').style.display='none';}

function cabPmRenderAssets(){
  var container=document.getElementById('cab-pm-assets');if(!container)return;
  var html='';
  var envOrder=['PRODUCCION','PREPRODUCCION','DESARROLLO','STAGING','DR','LAB'];
  envOrder.forEach(function(env){
    var envData=cabPmAssetsData[env];if(!envData||!envData.capas)return;
    html+='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px;overflow:hidden;">';
    html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 10px;cursor:pointer;" onclick="this.nextElementSibling.style.display=this.nextElementSibling.style.display===\'none\'?\'block\':\'none\'">';
    html+='<span style="font-size:10px;">&#9654;</span><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">'+env+'</span>';
    html+='<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">('+envData.total+')</span></div>';
    html+='<div style="padding:0 10px 6px;display:none;">';
    Object.keys(envData.capas).forEach(function(capa){
      html+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:4px 0 2px;">'+capa+'</div><div>';
      envData.capas[capa].forEach(function(a){
        var isSel=cabPmSelected.has(a.codigo);
        var cc=a.criticidad==='CRITICA'?'#ef4444':a.criticidad==='ALTA'?'#f59e0b':a.criticidad==='MEDIA'?'#3b82f6':'#10b981';
        html+='<span class="cab-pm-chip'+(isSel?' selected':'')+'" data-codigo="'+a.codigo+'" data-crit="'+a.criticidad+'" data-env="'+env+'" data-capa="'+capa+'" onclick="cabPmToggleChip(this)" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;margin:1px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid '+cc+';'+(isSel?'background:rgba(59,130,246,0.15);color:#3b82f6;':'color:var(--text-muted);')+'">'+escHtml(a.nombre).substring(0,25)+'</span>';
      });
      html+='</div>';
    });
    html+='</div></div>';
  });
  container.innerHTML=html;
}

function cabPmToggleChip(el){
  var id=el.getAttribute('data-codigo');
  if(cabPmSelected.has(id)){cabPmSelected.delete(id);el.style.background='';el.style.color='var(--text-muted)';}
  else{cabPmSelected.add(id);el.style.background='rgba(59,130,246,0.15)';el.style.color='#3b82f6';}
  cabPmUpdateCounts();
}

function cabPmQuick(type){
  if(type==='clear'){cabPmSelected=new Set();}
  else if(type==='all'){document.querySelectorAll('.cab-pm-chip').forEach(function(c){cabPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  else if(type==='pro'){document.querySelectorAll('.cab-pm-chip[data-env="PRODUCCION"]').forEach(function(c){cabPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  else if(type==='pre'){document.querySelectorAll('.cab-pm-chip[data-env="PREPRODUCCION"]').forEach(function(c){cabPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  else if(type==='criticos'){cabPmSelected=new Set();document.querySelectorAll('.cab-pm-chip[data-crit="CRITICA"]').forEach(function(c){cabPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  else if(type==='crit+alta'){cabPmSelected=new Set();document.querySelectorAll('.cab-pm-chip[data-crit="CRITICA"],.cab-pm-chip[data-crit="ALTA"]').forEach(function(c){cabPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  else if(type==='infra'){document.querySelectorAll('.cab-pm-chip[data-capa="INFRAESTRUCTURA"]').forEach(function(c){cabPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  else if(type==='app'){document.querySelectorAll('.cab-pm-chip[data-capa="APLICACION"]').forEach(function(c){cabPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  else if(type==='red'){document.querySelectorAll('.cab-pm-chip[data-capa="RED"]').forEach(function(c){cabPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  else if(type==='seg'){document.querySelectorAll('.cab-pm-chip[data-capa="SEGURIDAD"]').forEach(function(c){cabPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  cabPmRenderAssets();cabPmUpdateCounts();
}

function cabPmFilterAssets(q){q=q.toLowerCase();document.querySelectorAll('.cab-pm-chip').forEach(function(c){var n=(c.textContent||'').toLowerCase();var co=(c.getAttribute('data-codigo')||'').toLowerCase();c.style.display=(!q||n.indexOf(q)>=0||co.indexOf(q)>=0)?'inline-flex':'none';});}

function cabPmUpdateCounts(){
  var total=cabPmSelected.size,crit=0,alta=0,media=0;
  document.querySelectorAll('.cab-pm-chip').forEach(function(c){
    if(cabPmSelected.has(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'))){var cr=c.getAttribute('data-crit');if(cr==='CRITICA')crit++;else if(cr==='ALTA')alta++;else media++;}
  });
  var el=document.getElementById('cab-pm-sel-count');if(el)el.textContent=total+' seleccionados';
  var ic=document.getElementById('cab-pm-i-crit');if(ic)ic.textContent=crit;
  var ia=document.getElementById('cab-pm-i-alta');if(ia)ia.textContent=alta;
  var im=document.getElementById('cab-pm-i-media');if(im)im.textContent=media;
  var it=document.getElementById('cab-pm-i-total');if(it)it.textContent=total;
}

function cabSavePeriod(){
  var mode=document.getElementById('cab-pm-mode').value;
  var id=document.getElementById('cab-pm-id').value;
  var body={nombre_periodo:document.getElementById('cab-pm-nombre').value,impacto_estimado:document.getElementById('cab-pm-impacto').value,fecha_inicio:document.getElementById('cab-pm-inicio').value,fecha_fin:document.getElementById('cab-pm-fin').value,carga_pico_esperada_pct:parseInt(document.getElementById('cab-pm-pico').value)||80,notas:document.getElementById('cab-pm-notas').value,activos_afectados:Array.from(cabPmSelected)};
  if(!body.nombre_periodo||!body.fecha_inicio||!body.fecha_fin){toast('Nombre, fecha inicio y fin son obligatorios','err');return;}
  var url=mode==='edit'?'/cab/periodos/'+id:'/cab/periodos';
  var method=mode==='edit'?'PUT':'POST';
  af(url,{method:method,body:JSON.stringify(body)}).then(function(d){
    if(d.error){toast(d.error,'err');return;}
    toast(mode==='edit'?'Periodo actualizado':'Change Freeze creado','ok');
    cabClosePeriodModal();loadCABData();
  }).catch(function(e){toast('Error: '+e,'err');});
}

function cabDeletePeriod(){
  var id=document.getElementById('cab-pm-id').value;if(!id)return;
  if(!confirm('Eliminar este periodo de exclusion?'))return;
  af('/cab/periodos/'+id,{method:'DELETE'}).then(function(){
    toast('Periodo eliminado','ok');cabClosePeriodModal();loadCABData();
  }).catch(function(e){toast('Error: '+e,'err');});
}

// ═══ Modal Detalle Propuesta CAB ═══
var cabPropData=null;var cabPropId=null;

function cabOpenPropModal(propuestaId){
  cabPropId=propuestaId;
  af('/cab/propuestas/'+propuestaId).then(function(data){
    if(data.error){toast(data.error,'err');return;}
    document.getElementById('cab-proposal-modal').style.display='block';
    cabPropData=data;
    var prop=typeof data.propuesta_json==='string'?JSON.parse(data.propuesta_json):data.propuesta_json;
    cabPropData._parsed=prop;
    document.getElementById('cab-prop-title').textContent='Propuesta CAB \u2014 '+(data.periodo||'').replace(/_/g,' ')+' #'+(data.numero_propuesta||1);
    document.getElementById('cab-prop-subtitle').textContent='Generada '+(data.fecha_generacion||'').substring(0,16).replace('T',' ')+' por AG-011 \u2014 Estado: '+data.estado;
    var res=prop.resumen_ejecutivo||{};
    var kpis=[{v:res.total_cambios_propuestos||'?',l:'Cambios',c:'var(--accent-purple)'},{v:(res.score_confianza_promedio||0).toFixed?Number(res.score_confianza_promedio||0).toFixed(2):'?',l:'Score',c:'#10b981'},{v:res.conflictos_resueltos||0,l:'Conflictos',c:'#f59e0b'},{v:res.activos_bloqueados_por_incidencia||0,l:'Bloq. RUN',c:'#ef4444'},{v:res.activos_ajustados_por_sprint||0,l:'Ajust. BUILD',c:'var(--accent-cyan)'},{v:data.cambios_aplicados||0,l:'Aplicados',c:'var(--text-primary)'}];
    document.getElementById('cab-prop-kpis').innerHTML=kpis.map(function(k){return '<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:8px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:'+k.c+';">'+k.v+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+k.l+'</div></div>';}).join('');
    var cambios=prop.cambios_propuestos||[];var conflictos=prop.conflictos_y_resoluciones||[];
    var tabs=[{id:'changes',label:'Cambios ('+cambios.length+')'},{id:'conflicts',label:'Conflictos ('+conflictos.length+')'},{id:'workflow',label:'Flujo ITIL'},{id:'audit',label:'Auditoria'}];
    document.getElementById('cab-prop-tabs').innerHTML=tabs.map(function(t,i){var a=i===0;return '<button onclick="cabShowPropTab(\''+t.id+'\',this)" style="padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;'+(a?'background:var(--accent-purple);color:#fff;border:none;':'background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);')+'">'+t.label+'</button>';}).join('');
    var isEd=data.estado==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW';
    document.getElementById('cab-prop-actions').innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">'+(isEd?'<button onclick="cabRejectProp()" style="padding:5px 14px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Rechazar</button>':'')+'</div><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">'+(isEd?'<button onclick="cabApproveProp()" style="padding:5px 16px;background:#10b981;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Aprobar y aplicar</button>':'<span style="color:'+(data.estado==='APLICADO'?'#10b981':'#ef4444')+';font-weight:600;">'+data.estado+'</span>')+'</div>';
    cabShowPropTab('changes');
  });
}
function cabClosePropModal(){document.getElementById('cab-proposal-modal').style.display='none';}

function cabShowPropTab(tabId,btn){
  if(btn){btn.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(function(b){b.style.background='var(--bg-elevated)';b.style.color='var(--text-muted)';b.style.border='1px solid var(--border)';});btn.style.background='var(--accent-purple)';btn.style.color='#fff';btn.style.border='none';}
  var content=document.getElementById('cab-prop-content');if(!content||!cabPropData)return;
  var prop=cabPropData._parsed||{};
  if(tabId==='changes'){
    var cambios=prop.cambios_propuestos||[];
    content.innerHTML='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:6px;">Click en fila para editar ventana</div>'+cambios.map(function(c,idx){
      var v=c.ventana_final||c.ventana_recomendada||{};
      var cC=c.criticidad==='CRITICA'?'#ef4444':c.criticidad==='ALTA'?'#f59e0b':'#06b6d4';
      var rC=c.riesgo==='BAJO'?'#10b981':c.riesgo==='MEDIO'?'#f59e0b':'#ef4444';
      var sC=(c.score_confianza||0)>=0.85?'#10b981':(c.score_confianza||0)>=0.70?'#f59e0b':'#ef4444';
      var ctx=c.contexto_operativo||{};var tags='';
      if((ctx.incidencias_activas||[]).length)tags+='<span style="background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;">P1/P2</span> ';
      if((ctx.sprints_solapantes||[]).length)tags+='<span style="background:rgba(6,182,212,0.15);color:#06b6d4;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;">Sprint</span> ';
      if(c.editado_por_humano)tags+='<span style="background:rgba(124,58,237,0.15);color:#7c3aed;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;">Editado</span>';
      return '<div style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:6px 0;cursor:pointer;" onclick="cabToggleEditRow('+idx+')"><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 65px 140px 50px 42px 70px;gap:4px;align-items:center;font-size:12px;"><span style="color:var(--text-primary);font-weight:600;">'+(c.activo_nombre||c.id_activo)+'</span><span style="text-align:center;color:'+cC+';font-weight:600;font-size:11px;">'+(c.criticidad||'')+'</span><span style="text-align:center;font-family:monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+(v.dias||[]).join(',')+' '+(v.hora_inicio||'')+'-'+(v.hora_fin||'')+'</span><span style="text-align:center;color:'+rC+';font-weight:600;font-size:11px;">'+(c.riesgo||'')+'</span><span style="text-align:center;font-weight:600;color:'+sC+';font-size:11px;">'+Number(c.score_confianza||0).toFixed(2)+'</span><span style="text-align:center;">'+(tags||'<span style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:10px;">\u2014</span>')+'</span></div></div><div id="cab-edit-row-'+idx+'" style="display:none;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin:4px 0 8px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0 0 8px;">Editar \u2014 '+(c.activo_nombre||c.id_activo)+'</p>'+(c.razon_detallada?'<div style="background:rgba(245,158,11,0.1);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 8px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:10px;color:#f59e0b;">AG-011: '+escHtml((c.razon_detallada||'').substring(0,200))+'</div>':'')+'<div style="margin-bottom:8px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Notas</span><input type="text" placeholder="Razon del cambio manual..." style="width:100%;font-size:11px;margin-top:2px;padding:5px 8px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);" id="cab-ed-notas-'+idx+'"></div><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;justify-content:flex-end;"><button onclick="cabToggleEditRow('+idx+')" style="padding:3px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button><button onclick="cabSaveEditRow('+idx+')" style="padding:3px 10px;background:var(--accent-cyan);color:#000;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Guardar</button></div></div>';
    }).join('');
  }else if(tabId==='conflicts'){
    var conf=prop.conflictos_y_resoluciones||[];
    content.innerHTML=conf.length===0?'<p style="color:var(--text-muted);">Sin conflictos.</p>':conf.map(function(c){
      var tc=(c.tipo||'').indexOf('INCIDENCIA')>=0?'#ef4444':(c.tipo||'').indexOf('PROYECTO')>=0?'#06b6d4':'#f59e0b';
      return '<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:6px;"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;"><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:'+tc+';">'+(c.tipo||'')+'</span><span style="background:rgba(16,185,129,0.15);color:#10b981;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;">'+(c.estado||'RESUELTO')+'</span></div><p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0 0 4px;">'+(c.problema||'')+'</p><p style="font-size:12px;color:#10b981;margin:0;">Resolucion: '+(c.resolucion||'')+'</p></div>';
    }).join('');
  }else if(tabId==='workflow'){
    var est=cabPropData.estado||'PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW';
    var steps=[{n:1,l:'AG-011 genera propuesta',d:'Generada '+(cabPropData.fecha_generacion||'').substring(0,16).replace('T',' '),ok:true},{n:2,l:'Merger resuelve conflictos',d:(prop.resumen_ejecutivo||{}).conflictos_resueltos+' resueltos',ok:true},{n:3,l:'Revision Coordinador BUILD',d:est==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW'?'Pendiente':'Revisado por '+(cabPropData.revisado_por||''),ok:est!=='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW'},{n:4,l:'Aprobacion CAB Lead',d:est==='APLICADO'?'Aprobado':'Pendiente',ok:est==='APLICADO'},{n:5,l:'Aplicar a cmdb_change_windows',d:est==='APLICADO'?cabPropData.cambios_aplicados+' ventanas':'Pendiente',ok:est==='APLICADO'}];
    content.innerHTML='<p style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0 0 10px;">Flujo ITIL Change Enablement</p>'+steps.map(function(s){var dc=s.ok?'#10b981':(s.n===3&&est==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW')?'#f59e0b':'var(--border)';var tc=s.ok?'var(--text-primary)':(s.n===3&&est==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW')?'#f59e0b':'var(--text-muted)';var sl=s.ok?'Completado':(s.n===3&&est==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW')?'Pendiente':'Bloqueado';return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);"><div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:'+dc+'20;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:'+dc+';">'+s.n+'</div><div style="flex:1;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:500;margin:0;color:'+tc+';">'+s.l+'</p><p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:1px 0 0;">'+s.d+'</p></div><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:'+dc+';">'+sl+'</span></div>';}).join('');
  }else if(tabId==='audit'){
    var auditItems=[{l:'RFC',v:'RFC-2026-'+String(cabPropData.numero_propuesta||1).padStart(4,'0')},{l:'Tipo',v:'Normal Change'},{l:'Categoria',v:'CAB Review'},{l:'CIs evaluados',v:(prop.resumen_ejecutivo||{}).total_cambios_propuestos||'?'},{l:'Bloqueados RUN',v:(prop.resumen_ejecutivo||{}).activos_bloqueados_por_incidencia||0},{l:'Ajustados BUILD',v:(prop.resumen_ejecutivo||{}).activos_ajustados_por_sprint||0},{l:'Generado por',v:cabPropData.generado_por||'AG-011'},{l:'Revisado por',v:cabPropData.revisado_por||'Pendiente'},{l:'Estado',v:cabPropData.estado||'?'}];
    content.innerHTML='<p style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0 0 8px;">Registro auditoria ITIL</p>'+auditItems.map(function(a){return '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:12px;"><span style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+a.l+'</span><span style="color:var(--text-muted);">'+a.v+'</span></div>';}).join('');
  }
}

function cabToggleEditRow(idx){var el=document.getElementById('cab-edit-row-'+idx);if(el)el.style.display=el.style.display==='none'?'block':'none';}

function cabSaveEditRow(idx){
  if(!cabPropId||!cabPropData)return;
  var cambios=(cabPropData._parsed||{}).cambios_propuestos||[];var c=cambios[idx];if(!c)return;
  var body={id_activo:c.id_activo,notas:document.getElementById('cab-ed-notas-'+idx).value};
  af('/cab/propuestas/'+cabPropId+'/editar-cambio',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(body)}).then(function(d){
    if(d.error){toast(d.error,'err');return;}
    toast('Cambio guardado para '+(c.activo_nombre||c.id_activo),'ok');
    cabToggleEditRow(idx);cabOpenPropModal(cabPropId);
  });
}

function cabApproveProp(){
  if(!cabPropId)return;if(!confirm('Aprobar propuesta y crear ventanas CAB?'))return;
  af('/cab/propuestas/'+cabPropId+'/aprobar',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({revisado_por:'coordinador_build',notas:'Aprobado desde panel CAB'})}).then(function(d){
    toast('Propuesta aprobada. '+(d.ventanas_insertadas||0)+' ventanas creadas.','ok');
    cabClosePropModal();loadCABData();
  });
}

function cabRejectProp(){
  if(!cabPropId)return;var motivo=prompt('Motivo del rechazo:');if(!motivo)return;
  af('/cab/propuestas/'+cabPropId+'/rechazar',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({revisado_por:'coordinador_build',motivo_rechazo:motivo})}).then(function(){
    toast('Propuesta rechazada.','ok');cabClosePropModal();loadCABData();
  });
}

// ═══ Modal Detalle Ventana CAB ═══
var cabWmData=null;var cabWmId=null;

function cabOpenWindowModal(ventanaId){
  cabWmId=ventanaId;
  af('/cab/ventanas/'+ventanaId).then(function(data){
    if(data.error){toast(data.error,'err');return;}
    document.getElementById('cab-window-modal').style.display='block';
    cabWmData=data;
    var cC=data.criticidad==='CRITICA'?'#ef4444':data.criticidad==='ALTA'?'#f59e0b':'#06b6d4';
    document.getElementById('cab-wm-icon').style.cssText='width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:600;font-size:11px;background:'+cC+'20;color:'+cC+';';
    document.getElementById('cab-wm-icon').textContent='CI';
    document.getElementById('cab-wm-title').textContent=(data.codigo||'')+' \u2014 '+(data.activo_nombre||'');
    document.getElementById('cab-wm-subtitle').textContent=(data.capa||'')+' | '+(data.entorno||'')+' | '+data.criticidad+' | '+(data.estado_ciclo||'');
    var h='';var dias=data.dias_semana||[];var rC=(data.riesgo_estimado||'')==='BAJO'?'#10b981':(data.riesgo_estimado||'')==='MEDIO'?'#f59e0b':'#ef4444';
    var allD=['lunes','martes','miercoles','jueves','viernes','sabado','domingo'];var dM={lunes:'L',martes:'M',miercoles:'X',jueves:'J',viernes:'V',sabado:'S',domingo:'D'};
    h+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">';
    // Ventana panel
    h+='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0 0 8px;">Ventana CAB</p>';
    h+='<div style="margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">D\u00edas</span><div style="display:flex;gap:3px;margin-top:3px;">';
    allD.forEach(function(d){var ok=dias.some(function(dd){return dd.indexOf(d.substring(0,3))>=0||dd===d;});h+='<span style="padding:2px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;background:'+(ok?'rgba(16,185,129,0.15)':'var(--bg-card)')+';color:'+(ok?'#10b981':'var(--text-muted)')+';font-weight:'+(ok?'600':'400')+';">'+(dM[d]||d[0].toUpperCase())+'</span>';});
    h+='</div></div>';
    h+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;">';
    h+='<div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Horario</span><p style="margin:2px 0 0;font-weight:600;font-family:monospace;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;">'+(data.hora_inicio||'')+' \u2014 '+(data.hora_fin||'')+'</p></div>';
    h+='<div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Riesgo</span><p style="margin:2px 0 0;"><span style="padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:11px;background:'+rC+'20;color:'+rC+';font-weight:600;">'+(data.riesgo_estimado||'')+'</span></p></div>';
    h+='<div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Score</span><p style="margin:2px 0 0;font-weight:600;color:#10b981;font-size:16px;">'+Number(data.score_confianza||0).toFixed(2)+'</p></div>';
    h+='<div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Estado</span><p style="margin:2px 0 0;font-weight:600;color:'+(data.estado==='ACTIVA'?'#10b981':'#f59e0b')+';">'+(data.estado||'')+'</p></div>';
    h+='</div>';
    var tipos=data.tipos_cambio_permitidos||[];
    h+='<div style="margin-top:8px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Tipos</span><div style="display:flex;gap:3px;margin-top:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
    tipos.forEach(function(t){h+='<span style="padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;background:rgba(6,182,212,0.15);color:#06b6d4;">'+t+'</span>';});
    h+='</div></div></div>';
    // Carga semanal panel
    h+='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0 0 6px;">Carga semanal</p>';
    var hist=data.historico_reciente||[];var pd=hist.length>0?(hist[0].patron_diario||{}):{};
    var db=[{d:'Lun',k:'lunes'},{d:'Mar',k:'martes'},{d:'Mie',k:'miercoles'},{d:'Jue',k:'jueves'},{d:'Vie',k:'viernes'},{d:'Sab',k:'sabado'},{d:'Dom',k:'domingo'}];
    db.forEach(function(x){var val=pd[x.k]||Math.round(30+Math.random()*50);var bc=val>80?'#ef4444':val>60?'#f59e0b':'#10b981';var isW=dias.some(function(dd){return dd.indexOf(x.k.substring(0,3))>=0||dd===x.k;});h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;padding:2px 0;"><span style="width:22px;color:'+(isW?'#10b981':'var(--text-muted)')+';">'+x.d+'</span><div style="flex:1;height:6px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="height:100%;width:'+Math.min(val,99)+'%;background:'+bc+';border-radius:3px;"></div></div><span style="color:var(--text-muted);width:30px;text-align:right;">'+val+'%</span></div>';});
    h+='<p style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:5px 0 0;font-style:italic;">Verde = d\u00eda de ventana CAB (&lt;40%)</p></div></div>';
    // Dependencias
    var deps=data.dependencias||[];
    if(deps.length){h+='<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:10px;margin-top:10px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0 0 6px;">Dependencias ('+deps.length+')</p>';deps.forEach(function(dep){var dc=dep.criticidad==='CRITICA'?'#ef4444':dep.criticidad==='ALTA'?'#f59e0b':'#06b6d4';h+='<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;margin:2px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid '+dc+';">'+dep.codigo+' <span style="color:'+dc+';font-size:9px;">'+dep.criticidad+'</span></span>';});h+='</div>';}
    // Estado operativo
    var incs=data.incidencias_activas||[];
    h+='<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:10px;margin-top:10px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0 0 6px;">Estado operativo</p>';
    h+='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Incidencias activas</span>';
    if(!incs.length){h+='<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:11px;margin:4px 0 0;">Sin incidencias</p>';}
    else{incs.forEach(function(inc){h+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;"><span style="color:var(--text-primary);">'+inc.ticket_id+'</span><span style="color:#ef4444;font-weight:600;">'+inc.prioridad_ia+' '+inc.estado+'</span></div>';});}
    h+='</div></div>';
    // CMDB info
    h+='<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:10px;margin-top:10px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0 0 6px;">CMDB</p><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:4px;font-size:12px;">';
    [{l:'Propietario',v:data.propietario||'\u2014'},{l:'Responsable',v:data.responsable_tecnico||'\u2014'},{l:'Modelo',v:data.modelo||'\u2014'},{l:'Version',v:data.version||'\u2014'},{l:'V\u00e1lido hasta',v:(data.valido_hasta||'').substring(0,10)},{l:'Generado',v:'AG-011'}].forEach(function(f){h+='<div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+f.l+'</span><p style="margin:2px 0 0;color:var(--text-primary);">'+f.v+'</p></div>';});
    h+='</div></div>';
    document.getElementById('cab-wm-content').innerHTML=h;
    var isAct=data.estado==='ACTIVA';
    document.getElementById('cab-wm-actions').innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">'+(isAct?'<button onclick="cabPauseWindow()" style="padding:5px 12px;background:rgba(245,158,11,0.15);color:#f59e0b;border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.3);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Pausar</button>':'')+'<button onclick="cabCancelWindow()" style="padding:5px 12px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button></div><button onclick="cabCloseWindowModal()" style="padding:5px 12px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button>';
  }).catch(function(e){console.error('Error ventana:',e);document.getElementById('cab-window-modal').style.display='none';toast('Error cargando ventana','err');});
}
function cabCloseWindowModal(){document.getElementById('cab-window-modal').style.display='none';}
function cabPauseWindow(){if(!cabWmId)return;af('/cab/ventanas/'+cabWmId,{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify({estado:'PAUSADA'})}).then(function(){toast('Ventana pausada','ok');cabCloseWindowModal();loadCABData();});}
function cabCancelWindow(){if(!cabWmId||!confirm('Cancelar esta ventana?'))return;af('/cab/ventanas/'+cabWmId,{method:'DELETE'}).then(function(){toast('Ventana cancelada','ok');cabCloseWindowModal();loadCABData();});}

// ═══ Modal Detalle Alerta CAB ═══
var cabAmData=null;var cabAmId=null;

function cabOpenAlertModal(alertaId){
  cabAmId=alertaId;
  af('/cab/alertas/'+alertaId).then(function(data){
    if(data.error){toast(data.error,'err');return;}
    document.getElementById('cab-alert-modal').style.display='block';
    cabAmData=data;
    var sC=data.severity==='CRITICAL'?'#ef4444':data.severity==='HIGH'?'#f59e0b':'#06b6d4';
    var ent=typeof data.affected_entities==='string'?JSON.parse(data.affected_entities):(data.affected_entities||{});
    var trig=typeof data.trigger_condition==='string'?JSON.parse(data.trigger_condition):(data.trigger_condition||{});
    document.getElementById('cab-am-header').innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:14px;"><div><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;background:'+sC+'20;color:'+sC+';">'+data.severity+'</span><span style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;background:rgba(245,158,11,0.1);color:#f59e0b;">'+(data.alert_type||'').replace(/_/g,' ')+'</span><span style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--accent-purple);">'+(data.source_agent||'AG-011')+'</span></div><p style="font-size:15px;font-weight:600;margin:0;color:var(--text-primary);">'+(data.title||'')+'</p><p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:4px 0 0;">'+(data.description||'')+'</p></div><button onclick="cabCloseAlertModal()" style="padding:4px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">&#10005;</button></div>';
    document.getElementById('cab-am-context').innerHTML='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Activo afectado</span><p style="margin:3px 0 0;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">'+(ent.activo||ent.ci||'\u2014')+'</p></div><div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Referencia</span><p style="margin:3px 0 0;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:'+sC+';">'+(ent.incidencia||ent.proyecto||trig.periodo||'\u2014')+'</p></div></div>';
    document.getElementById('cab-am-actions-section').innerHTML='';
    document.getElementById('cab-am-timeline').innerHTML='<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:10px;margin-top:10px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0 0 8px;">Timeline</p><div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;font-size:12px;"><div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#ef4444;margin-top:5px;flex-shrink:0;"></div><div style="flex:1;color:var(--text-primary);">Creada por '+(data.source_agent||'AG-011')+'</div><span style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:10px;">'+(data.created_at||'').substring(0,16).replace('T',' ')+'</span></div>'+(data.acknowledged_at?'<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;font-size:12px;"><div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#f59e0b;margin-top:5px;flex-shrink:0;"></div><div style="flex:1;color:var(--text-primary);">Reconocida por '+(data.acknowledged_by||'')+'</div><span style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:10px;">'+(data.acknowledged_at||'').substring(0,16).replace('T',' ')+'</span></div>':'')+(data.resolved_at?'<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;font-size:12px;"><div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#10b981;margin-top:5px;flex-shrink:0;"></div><div style="flex:1;color:var(--text-primary);">Resuelta</div><span style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:10px;">'+(data.resolved_at||'').substring(0,16).replace('T',' ')+'</span></div>':'')+(data.status==='ACTIVE'?'<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;font-size:12px;"><div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border);margin-top:5px;flex-shrink:0;"></div><div style="flex:1;color:var(--text-muted);">Pendiente reconocimiento</div></div>':'')+'</div>';
    document.getElementById('cab-am-status-section').innerHTML='<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:10px;margin-top:10px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0 0 8px;">Actualizar estado</p><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;"><select id="cab-am-new-status" style="font-size:12px;width:180px;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;"><option value="ACTIVE">ACTIVE</option><option value="ACKNOWLEDGED"'+(data.status==='ACKNOWLEDGED'?' selected':'')+'>ACKNOWLEDGED</option><option value="RESOLVED"'+(data.status==='RESOLVED'?' selected':'')+'>RESOLVED</option><option value="ESCALATED">ESCALATED</option><option value="SUPPRESSED">SUPPRESSED</option></select><button onclick="cabUpdateAlert()" style="padding:5px 14px;background:var(--accent-cyan);color:#000;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Actualizar</button></div></div>';
    document.getElementById('cab-am-footer').innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">Estado: '+data.status+'</span><button onclick="cabCloseAlertModal()" style="padding:5px 12px;background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-muted);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button></div>';
  }).catch(function(e){console.error('Error alerta:',e);document.getElementById('cab-alert-modal').style.display='none';toast('Error cargando alerta','err');});
}
function cabCloseAlertModal(){document.getElementById('cab-alert-modal').style.display='none';}
function cabUpdateAlert(){
  if(!cabAmId)return;var status=document.getElementById('cab-am-new-status').value;
  af('/cab/alertas/'+cabAmId,{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify({status:status,acknowledged_by:'admin'})}).then(function(d){
    if(d&&d.error){toast(d.error,'err');return;}
    toast('Alerta actualizada a '+status,'ok');cabCloseAlertModal();loadCABData();
  });
}

// ═══ CAB Subtab en Detalle Proyecto ═══
function renderCabSubtab(el){
  el.innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--accent-cyan);">AG-011 CAB \u2014 Calendario de Ventanas de Cambio</span><span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(45,212,191,0.15);color:var(--accent-cyan);font-weight:600;">CMDB</span></div>'+
    '<div id="cab-gov-alert-banner" style="display:none;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;border-left:3px solid var(--accent-yellow);margin-bottom:12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-primary);"></div>'+
    '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 220px;gap:16px;">'+
      '<div><div id="cab-gov-calendar" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;"><div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);padding:40px;grid-column:1/-1">Cargando...</div></div>'+
        '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;">'+
          '<span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);"><span style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.3);"></span>Ventana CAB</span>'+
          '<span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);"><span style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.3);"></span>Change Freeze</span>'+
          '<span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);"><span style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(245,158,11,0.3);"></span>Precauci\u00f3n</span>'+
        '</div>'+
      '</div>'+
      '<div><div id="cab-gov-periods" style="margin-bottom:10px;"></div>'+
        '<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:6px;">Resumen CAB</div><div id="cab-gov-stats">Cargando...</div></div>'+
      '</div>'+
    '</div>';
  loadCabPause3DataGov();
}

function loadCabPause3DataGov(){
  Promise.all([af('/cab/periodos'),af('/cab/ventanas'),af('/cab/alertas')]).then(function(results){
    var periodos=results[0]||[];var ventanas=results[1]||[];var alertas=(results[2]||[]).filter(function(a){return a.status==='ACTIVE'&&(a.alert_type||'').indexOf('CAB')>=0;});
    var ban=document.getElementById('cab-gov-alert-banner');
    if(ban&&alertas.length>0){ban.style.display='block';ban.innerHTML='<strong>'+alertas.length+' alerta(s) CAB</strong> \u2014 '+alertas.slice(0,2).map(function(a){return a.title||a.alert_type;}).join(' \u00b7 ');}
    var cal=document.getElementById('cab-gov-calendar');
    if(cal){
      var year=new Date().getFullYear();var months=['Ene','Feb','Mar','Abr','May','Jun','Jul','Ago','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dic'];
      var dayNames=['domingo','lunes','martes','miercoles','jueves','viernes','sabado'];
      var h='';var today=new Date();
      for(var m=0;m<12;m++){
        h+='<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:4px;text-align:center;">'+months[m]+'</div>';
        h+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:1px;font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);text-align:center;margin-bottom:2px;">';['L','M','X','J','V','S','D'].forEach(function(d){h+='<span>'+d+'</span>';});h+='</div>';
        h+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:2px;">';
        var first=new Date(year,m,1);var startDow=(first.getDay()+6)%7;var dim=new Date(year,m+1,0).getDate();
        for(var e=0;e<startDow;e++)h+='<div style="aspect-ratio:1;"></div>';
        for(var d=1;d<=dim;d++){
          var ds=year+'-'+String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(d).padStart(2,'0');
          var dt=new Date(year,m,d);var dow=dt.getDay();
          var bg='var(--bg-card)';var fc='var(--text-muted)';
          for(var pi=0;pi<periodos.length;pi++){var p=periodos[pi];var fi=(p.fecha_inicio||'').substring(0,10);var ff=(p.fecha_fin||'').substring(0,10);
            if(ds>=fi&&ds<=ff){if(p.impacto_estimado==='ALTO'){if(dow===0||dow===6){bg='rgba(16,185,129,0.3)';fc='#10b981';}else{bg='rgba(239,68,68,0.3)';fc='#ef4444';}}else{bg='rgba(245,158,11,0.25)';fc='#f59e0b';}break;}
          }
          var isToday=d===today.getDate()&&m===today.getMonth()&&year===today.getFullYear();
          h+='<div style="aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:3px;font-size:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:'+bg+';color:'+fc+';'+(isToday?'outline:1.5px solid var(--accent-cyan);':'')+'">'+d+'</div>';
        }
        h+='</div></div>';
      }
      cal.innerHTML=h;
    }
    var perEl=document.getElementById('cab-gov-periods');
    if(perEl&&periodos.length){
      perEl.innerHTML=periodos.map(function(p){var bc=p.impacto_estimado==='ALTO'?'var(--accent-red)':p.impacto_estimado==='MEDIO'?'var(--accent-yellow)':'var(--accent-green)';return '<div style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;border-left:3px solid '+bc+';margin-bottom:6px;"><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">'+(p.nombre_periodo||'').replace(/_/g,' ')+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);font-family:monospace;margin-top:2px;">'+(p.fecha_inicio||'').substring(0,10)+' \u2014 '+(p.fecha_fin||'').substring(0,10)+'</div></div>';}).join('');
    }
    var statsEl=document.getElementById('cab-gov-stats');
    if(statsEl){var nv=(ventanas||[]).length;var np=periodos.length;var hoy=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];var nf=periodos.filter(function(p){return p.impacto_estimado==='ALTO'&&hoy>=p.fecha_inicio&&hoy<=p.fecha_fin;}).length;
      statsEl.innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);"><span style="color:var(--text-muted);">Ventanas</span><span style="font-weight:600;color:var(--accent-cyan);">'+nv+'</span></div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);"><span style="color:var(--text-muted);">Periodos</span><span style="font-weight:600;color:var(--accent-cyan);">'+np+'</span></div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);"><span style="color:var(--text-muted);">Freeze activos</span><span style="font-weight:600;color:var(--accent-red);">'+nf+'</span></div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;"><span style="color:var(--text-muted);">Alertas CAB</span><span style="font-weight:600;color:var(--accent-yellow);">'+alertas.length+'</span></div>';
    }
  });
}

// ═══ FULLSCREEN PIPELINE BUILD (gov-build) ═══
var FS_BLD_GOV=[
{id:'AG-005',nm:'Estratega EDT/WBS',sub:'Spawning 6 Workers',idc:'background:#2e1065;color:#c4b5fd',cl:'#a78bfa',spawn:true,desc:'EDT/WBS + Acta + alcance. Director\u21926 Workers\u2192Merger.',tables:[{n:'cartera_build',d:'46 proyectos.'},{n:'catalogo_incidencias',d:'Patrones \u00e1rea.'},{n:'directorio_corporativo',d:'Sponsors.'}],tools:[{nm:'decompose_pmbok',brief:'Genera EDT',desc:'Toma la descripcion del proyecto y la descompone en EDT/WBS PMBOK 7: Fases → Entregables → Paquetes de trabajo con titulo, descripcion tecnica y dependencias. {id:'AG-013',nm:'Decomposer',sub:'Subtareas CMDB · Spawning',idc:'background:#500724;color:#f9a8d4',cl:'#f472b6',spawn:true,desc:'3-5 subtareas/tarea con CMDB.',tables:[{n:'cmdb_activos',d:'250+ activos.'},{n:'cmdb_relaciones',d:'84 dependencias.'}],tools:[{nm:'decompose_subtasks',brief:'Subtareas',desc:'Para cada tarea EDT genera 3-5 subtareas: titulo, descripcion paso a paso, tecnologia (Java 17, Spring Boot, Kafka 3.5), componente, integraciones, horas, story points y skill. Devuelve criticidad, entorno, estado y capa.',tbls:['cmdb_activos'],input:'keyword',output:'Activos'},{nm:'query_cmdb_relaciones',brief:'Dependencias',desc:'Consulta 84 relaciones de dependencia: tipo (depende_de, es_componente_de, conecta_con, replica_de), origen y destino. Detecta impactos en cascada cuando una subtarea modifica un activo critico.',tbls:['cmdb_relaciones'],input:'id_activo',output:'Relaciones'}],outs:['Subtareas','CMDB vinculado','Horas','Dependencias'],stats:[{v:'6',l:'Workers',c:'#f472b6'},{v:'$0.06',l:'Coste',c:'#f472b6'}]},
{id:'AG-014',nm:'Risk',sub:'Matriz 5\u00d75 PMBOK',idc:'background:#422006;color:#fde68a',cl:'#facc15',desc:'~11 riesgos con P\u00d7I y planes.',tables:[{n:'build_risks',d:'Riesgos.'},{n:'postmortem_reports',d:'Lecciones.'}],tools:[{nm:'analyze_risks',brief:'Matriz',desc:'Genera ~11 riesgos PMBOK: Tecnico, Seguridad, RRHH, Externo, Negocio. {id:'AG-011',nm:'CAB',sub:'Ventanas CMDB · 6 Workers',idc:'background:#042f2e;color:#5eead4',cl:'#2dd4bf',spawn:true,desc:'Analiza activos, calendario, ventanas, P1/P2.',tables:[{n:'cmdb_demand_history',d:'Carga mensual.'},{n:'cmdb_change_windows',d:'40 ventanas.'},{n:'calendario_periodos_demanda',d:'6 periodos.'}],tools:[{nm:'query_calendario_periodos',brief:'Periodos',desc:'6 periodos: CIERRE_ANO_FISCAL (Oct-Dic, 90% carga), ALTA_DEMANDA_Q4, CIERRE_SEMESTRAL (Jun, 65%), BLACK_FRIDAY, MIGRACION_CORE_T24 (Mar-Abr), MANTENIMIENTO_VERANO (Ago, 40%). {id:'AG-016',nm:'Cost',sub:'BAC + ROI + EVM',idc:'background:#052e16;color:#86efac',cl:'#4ade80',desc:'Presupuesto, ROI, TIR, VAN, l\u00ednea base EVM.',tables:[{n:'presupuestos',d:'Coste/hora.'},{n:'build_sprint_items',d:'PV por sprint.'}],tools:[{nm:'calc_roi',brief:'ROI/TIR/VAN',desc:'ROI (% retorno), TIR (tasa VAN=0), VAN (valor presente flujos futuros). {id:'AG-007',nm:'Planificador',sub:'CPM + Gantt + Kanban · Spawning',idc:'background:#052e16;color:#86efac',cl:'#4ade80',spawn:true,desc:'Ruta cr\u00edtica, Gantt, sprints 2 sem, Kanban.',tables:[{n:'build_subtasks',d:'Subtareas.'},{n:'build_sprints',d:'Sprints.'},{n:'kanban_tareas',d:'Tarjetas.'}],tools:[{nm:'calc_critical_path',brief:'CPM',desc:'Metodo CPM: calcula ES, EF, LS, LF y holgura por subtarea. {id:'AG-017',nm:'Quality',sub:'Gates G0-G5',idc:'background:#500724;color:#f9a8d4',cl:'#f472b6',desc:'6 Quality Gates con DoD.',tables:[{n:'build_quality_gates',d:'Gates.'}],tools:[{nm:'define_quality_gates',brief:'G0-G5',desc:'6 gates: G0 Kick-off, G1 Requisitos, G2 Diseno, G3 Desarrollo+tests 80%, G4 Testing+UAT, G5 Go-live+rollback. ];

opacity="0.4"/>','<path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="35" rx="20" ry="10" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M30 35 V65 A20 10 0 0 0 70 65 V35" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5"/>','<path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="35" width="40" height="8" rx="2" fill="C"/><rect x="30" y="50" width="25" height="8" rx="2" fill="C"/><rect x="30" y="65" width="55" height="8" rx="2" fill="C"/>','<path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="35" y="45" width="30" height="25" rx="2" fill="C"/><path d="M40 45 V35 A10 10 0 0 1 60 35 V45" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5"/>'];
function openBuildFullscreenGov(){
  document.getElementById('fs-build-overlay-gov').style.display='block';
  var bar=document.getElementById('fs-build-bar-gov');
  if(bar&&!bar.dataset.rendered){
    bar.dataset.rendered='1';
    function nd(i){var a=FS_BLD_GOV[i];var sv=(BSvgsGov[i]||BSvgsGov[0]).replace(/C/g,a.cl);return '<div onclick="showBuildAgentGov('+i+')" id="fs-bld-gov-'+i+'" style="padding:6px 10px;border-radius:7px;border:1.5px solid '+a.cl+';background:'+a.cl+'08;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;white-space:nowrap"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 100 100" style="flex-shrink:0;display:block">'+sv+'</svg><div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#e2e8f0">'+a.id.replace('AG-0','')+'</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#94a3b8">'+a.nm.substring(0,10)+'</div></div></div>';}
    function pm(n){return '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;align-self:center"><div style="width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:#a78bfa"></div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#a78bfa;font-family:monospace;font-weight:700">P'+n+'</div></div>';}
    var h='<div style="padding:5px 10px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #64748b;font-size:9px;color:#94a3b8;align-self:center">PMBOK</div><span style="color:#334155;font-size:14px;align-self:center">\u2192</span>';
    h+=nd(0)+'<span style="color:#334155;font-size:14px;align-self:center">\u2192</span>'+pm(1)+'<span style="color:#334155;font-size:14px;align-self:center">\u2192</span>';
    h+=nd(1)+'<span style="color:#334155;font-size:14px;align-self:center">\u2192</span>'+pm(2)+'<span style="color:#334155;font-size:14px;align-self:center">\u2192</span>';
    h+='<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px">'+nd(2)+nd(3)+nd(4)+'</div>';
    h+='<span style="color:#334155;font-size:14px;align-self:center">\u2192</span>'+pm(3)+'<span style="color:#334155;font-size:14px;align-self:center">\u2192</span>';
    h+=nd(5)+'<span style="color:#334155;font-size:14px;align-self:center">\u2192</span>'+pm(4)+'<span style="color:#334155;font-size:14px;align-self:center">\u2192</span>';
    h+='<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px">'+nd(6)+nd(7)+'</div>';
    h+='<span style="color:#334155;font-size:14px;align-self:center">\u2192</span>'+nd(8)+'<span style="color:#334155;font-size:14px;align-self:center">\u2192</span><div style="padding:5px 10px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #4ade80;font-size:9px;color:#4ade80;align-self:center">\u2713 Lanzar</div>';
    bar.innerHTML=h;
  }
}

function showBuildAgentGov(idx){
  for(var j=0;j<9;j++){var nd=document.getElementById('fs-bld-gov-'+j);if(nd){nd.style.transform=j===idx?'translateY(-3px)':'none';nd.style.boxShadow=j===idx?'0 6px 20px '+FS_BLD_GOV[j].cl+'30':'none';}}
  var a=FS_BLD_GOV[idx];var next=idx<8?FS_BLD_GOV[idx+1].id:'Proyecto listo';
  var hdrSvg=(BSvgsGov[idx]||BSvgsGov[0]).replace(/C/g,a.cl);
  var h='<div style="padding:16px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid #1e293b;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px"><svg width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 100 100" style="flex-shrink:0;display:block">'+hdrSvg+'</svg><span style="font-size:10px;font-family:monospace;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-weight:700;'+a.idc+'">'+a.id+'</span><div><h2 style="font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:#e2e8f0;margin:0">'+a.nm+'</h2><div style="font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8;margin-top:2px">'+a.sub+'</div></div></div>';
  h+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr"><div style="padding:18px 22px;border-right:1px solid #1e293b">';
  h+='<div style="margin-bottom:14px"><div style="font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;color:#64748b;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;border-left:3px solid '+a.cl+';padding-left:8px">Qu\u00e9 hace</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:#cbd5e1;line-height:1.6">'+a.desc+'</div>';
  if(a.spawn)h+='<div style="background:#1e1b4b;border:1px solid #312e81;border-radius:7px;padding:8px 12px;margin-top:6px;font-size:10px;color:#c4b5fd"><strong>Spawning:</strong> Director \u2192 6 Workers \u2192 Merger</div>';
  h+='</div><div style="margin-bottom:14px"><div style="font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;border-left:3px solid #4ade80;padding-left:8px">Tools</div><div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px">';
  a.tools.forEach(function(t,ti){var tid='fsbg-'+idx+'-'+ti;h+='<div id="'+tid+'" style="background:#1e293b;border:1px solid #334155;border-radius:7px;overflow:hidden"><div onclick="var el=document.getElementById(\''+tid+'\');var bd=el.querySelector(\'[data-bd]\');var ar=el.querySelector(\'[data-arr]\');if(bd.style.display===\'block\'){bd.style.display=\'none\';ar.textContent=\'\u25b6\';}else{bd.style.display=\'block\';ar.textContent=\'\u25bc\';}" style="padding:8px 12px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px"><span data-arr style="color:#4ade80;font-size:9px;width:10px">\u25b6</span><span style="font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;font-weight:600;color:#e2e8f0">'+t.nm+'</span><span style="color:#64748b;font-size:9px;margin-left:auto">'+t.brief+'</span></div><div data-bd style="display:none;padding:10px 14px;border-top:1px solid #1e293b;background:#0f1219"><div style="font-size:11px;color:#cbd5e1;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:8px">'+t.desc+'</div><div style="display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap"><div style="flex:1;min-width:100px"><div style="font-size:8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px">Tablas</div>';t.tbls.forEach(function(tb){h+='<span style="display:inline-flex;background:#052e16;color:#4ade80;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-size:8px;font-family:monospace;margin:1px">'+tb+'</span> ';});h+='</div><div style="flex:1;min-width:100px"><div style="font-size:8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px">Input</div><code style="font-size:9px;color:#e2e8f0">'+t.input+'</code></div><div style="flex:1;min-width:100px"><div style="font-size:8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px">Output</div><span style="font-size:10px;color:#94a3b8">'+t.output+'</span></div></div></div></div>';});
  h+='</div></div><div style="display:flex;gap:8px">';a.stats.forEach(function(s){h+='<div style="background:#0f1219;border:1px solid #1e293b;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 12px;flex:1;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:'+s.c+'">'+s.v+'</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#64748b;margin-top:1px">'+s.l+'</div></div>';});h+='</div></div>';
  h+='<div style="padding:18px 22px"><div style="margin-bottom:14px"><div style="font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;border-left:3px solid #f59e0b;padding-left:8px">Tablas BD</div>';a.tables.forEach(function(t){h+='<div style="background:#0f1219;border:1px solid #1e293b;border-radius:7px;padding:8px 12px;margin-bottom:5px"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#e2e8f0;margin-bottom:2px"><span style="color:#4ade80;font-size:8px;font-family:monospace;background:#052e16;padding:1px 4px;border-radius:3px">TABLE</span> '+t.n+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#94a3b8">'+t.d+'</div></div>';});
  h+='</div><div><div style="font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;border-left:3px solid #4ade80;padding-left:8px">Output \u2192 '+next+'</div><div style="background:#064e3b20;border:1px solid #064e3b;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px"><ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0">';a.outs.forEach(function(o){h+='<li style="font-size:11px;color:#a7f3d0;padding:2px 0;display:flex;gap:5px"><span style="color:#4ade80;font-weight:700">\u2713</span>'+o+'</li>';});h+='</ul></div></div></div></div>';
  document.getElementById('fs-build-det-gov').innerHTML=h;
}

</script>
<!-- OVERLAY FULLSCREEN BUILD (gov-build) -->
<div id="fs-build-overlay-gov" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100vw;height:100vh;background:#080b12;z-index:9999;overflow-y:auto">
  <div style="position:sticky;top:0;background:#0a0e17ee;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);padding:12px 32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;z-index:10;border-bottom:1px solid #1e293b">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px"><h1 style="font-size:18px;font-weight:600;color:#4ade80;margin:0">Cascada BUILD v2.0</h1><span style="background:#052e16;color:#86efac;padding:3px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace">10 Agentes &middot; 4 Pausas &middot; 30+ Tools</span></div>
    <button onclick="document.getElementById('fs-build-overlay-gov').style.display='none'" style="background:none;border:1px solid #334155;color:#94a3b8;font-size:14px;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer">&#10005; Cerrar</button>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:16px 32px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto">
    <p style="color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:16px">Pipeline BUILD: 10 agentes IA con 4 pausas. Click en cada agente para ver tools.</p>
    <div id="fs-build-bar-gov" style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:3px;justify-content:center;padding:10px 0;margin-bottom:16px"></div>
    <div id="fs-build-det-gov" style="background:#111827;border:1px solid #1e293b;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;min-height:260px"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:260px;color:#334155;font-size:13px">&larr; Click en un agente</div></div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px dashed #1e293b"><span style="font-size:11px;color:#4ade80;font-weight:500">AG-018 Advisor</span><span style="font-size:11px;color:#475569">&middot; Disponible en las 4 pausas</span></div>
  </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
```

### FILE: frontend/gov-kanban-global.html
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Cognitive PMO · Kanban Global (redirect)</title>
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/index.html#kanban">
<script>
// LEGACY P95-F8-REDIRECT — eliminar tras 2 semanas (2026-04-21).
// El kanban global vive ahora dentro del shell principal en la tab KANBAN.
// Esta página queda como alias por compatibilidad con bookmarks/links externos.
window.location.replace('/index.html#kanban');
</script>
</head>
<body style="background:#0d1117;color:#8b949e;font-family:sans-serif;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100vh;margin:0;">
  <div style="text-align:center;">
    <p>Redirigiendo al Kanban global integrado en el shell&hellip;</p>
    <p style="font-size:11px;">Si no se redirige autom&aacute;ticamente, <a href="/index.html#kanban" style="color:#58a6ff;">haz clic aqu&iacute;</a>.</p>
  </div>
</body>
</html>
```

### FILE: frontend/gov-run.html
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es" data-theme="dark">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Cognitive PMO — Gobernanza RUN</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;600;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.js"></script>
<style>
[data-theme="dark"]{--bg-primary:#0d1117;--bg-secondary:#161b22;--bg-card:#1c2128;--bg-elevated:#21262d;--border:#30363d;--text-primary:#e6edf3;--text-secondary:#8b949e;--text-muted:#6e7681;--accent-blue:#58a6ff;--accent-green:#3fb950;--accent-red:#f85149;--accent-orange:#d29922;--accent-purple:#bc8cff;--accent-cyan:#39d2c0;--accent-yellow:#d29922;--shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);--bg2:#22262e;--bg3:#2a2e37;--mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;}
[data-theme="light"]{--bg-primary:#f6f8fa;--bg-secondary:#ffffff;--bg-card:#ffffff;--bg-elevated:#f0f3f6;--border:#d1d9e0;--text-primary:#1f2328;--text-secondary:#656d76;--text-muted:#8b949e;--accent-blue:#0969da;--accent-green:#1a7f37;--accent-red:#cf222e;--accent-orange:#9a6700;--accent-purple:#8250df;--accent-cyan:#0891b2;--accent-yellow:#9a6700;--shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);--bg2:#f0f3f6;--bg3:#e8ecf0;--mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;}
:root{--run-grd:linear-gradient(135deg,#f85149,#d29922);--font-body:'DM Sans',-apple-system,sans-serif;--font-mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;--r:8px;--rl:12px;}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
body{font-family:var(--font-body);background:var(--bg-primary);color:var(--text-primary);min-height:100vh;transition:background .3s,color .3s;}

/* Login */
#login-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg-primary);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:9999;}
.lc{background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:44px 36px;width:390px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.lc h1{font-size:21px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px;}.lc .sub{color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:13px;margin-bottom:26px;}
.lc-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:var(--run-grd);color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 11px;border-radius:20px;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:7px;}
.lc input{width:100%;padding:10px 13px;margin-bottom:12px;border-radius:var(--r);border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:14px;font-family:var(--font-body);outline:none;}.lc input:focus{border-color:var(--accent-blue);}
.lc button{width:100%;padding:11px;border:none;border-radius:var(--r);background:var(--accent-red);color:#fff;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;}.lc button:hover{opacity:.9;}
.lerr{color:var(--accent-red);font-size:12px;margin-bottom:8px;display:none;}

/* Header */
.hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:13px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-secondary);}
.hdr-l{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;}
.hdr-logo{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--run-grd);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.hdr-logo svg{width:20px;height:20px;}
.hdr-t{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;}.hdr-s{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.hdr-r{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
.hdr-u{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:right;}.hdr-u strong{color:var(--text-primary);display:block;}
.pdot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent-green);animation:p 2s ease-in-out infinite;}@keyframes p{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.4;}}
.thm{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);}
.thm-btn{width:34px;height:18px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;position:relative;}.thm-btn::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:2px;left:2px;width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--text-secondary);transition:transform .3s;}
[data-theme="light"] .thm-btn::after{transform:translateX(16px);background:var(--accent-orange);}
.btn-out{padding:5px 12px;border-radius:var(--r);border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-body);}

/* Tabs */
.tabs{display:flex;padding:0 22px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);overflow-x:auto;}
.tb{padding:11px 18px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);border:none;background:transparent;cursor:pointer;position:relative;font-family:var(--font-body);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;white-space:nowrap;}
.tb:hover{color:var(--text-primary);}.tb.a{color:var(--accent-red);}
.tb.a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-1px;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--accent-red);}
.tb svg{width:20px;height:20px;flex-shrink:0;}

.cnt{padding:18px 22px;}.tp{display:none;animation:fi .25s;}.tp.a{display:block;}@keyframes fi{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(3px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}

/* ITSM Form - matching mother */
.itsm-panel{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:16px;}
.itsm-header{padding:12px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.itsm-header-title{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;}
.itsm-body{padding:12px 14px;}
.sap-field{margin:0 0 8px;}
.sap-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.4px;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;}
```
