.sap-input,.sap-textarea{width:100%;padding:8px 10px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;font-family:var(--font-body);outline:none;transition:border .2s;}
.sap-input:focus,.sap-textarea:focus{border-color:var(--accent-blue);}
.sap-textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:52px;font-size:12px;}
.sap-input.mono{font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.mode-badge{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;letter-spacing:0.5px;}
.mode-run{background:rgba(59,130,246,.15);color:var(--accent-blue);}
.btn-exec{flex:1;padding:10px 16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#2563eb);border:none;border-radius:8px;color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;}
.btn-exec:hover{opacity:.9;}.btn-exec:disabled{opacity:.5;}
.btn-reset{padding:8px 14px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;}

/* Stats, Tables, Kanban - same as before */
.sr{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:11px;margin-bottom:18px;}
.sc{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:15px 16px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}.sc::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;}
.sc.red::before{background:var(--accent-red);}.sc.org::before{background:var(--accent-orange);}.sc.grn::before{background:var(--accent-green);}.sc.blu::before{background:var(--accent-blue);}
.sl{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:3px;}.sv{font-size:24px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.tc{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);overflow:hidden;}
.th{padding:13px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}.th h3{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;}.tcnt{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.ts{overflow-x:auto;}table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;min-width:780px;}
thead th{padding:8px 13px;text-align:left;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);white-space:nowrap;}
tbody td{padding:8px 13px;font-size:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}tbody tr:hover{background:rgba(88,166,255,.04);}tbody tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}
.badge{display:inline-block;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:11px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;}
.badge-p1{background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);color:var(--accent-red);}.badge-p2{background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);color:var(--accent-orange);}.badge-p3{background:rgba(88,166,255,.15);color:var(--accent-blue);}.badge-p4{background:rgba(139,148,158,.15);color:var(--text-secondary);}
.badge-n1{background:rgba(139,148,158,.12);color:var(--text-secondary);}.badge-n2{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);color:var(--accent-blue);}.badge-n3{background:rgba(210,153,34,.12);color:var(--accent-orange);}.badge-n4{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:var(--accent-red);}
.si{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;}.sd{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}.sd-a{background:var(--accent-green);}.sd-b{background:var(--accent-blue);}.sd-i{background:var(--accent-red);animation:p 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
.ub{width:52px;height:5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg-elevated);display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;overflow:hidden;}.uf{height:100%;border-radius:3px;}
.kb{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:11px;}
.kc{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);min-height:320px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.kch{padding:11px 13px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.kct{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;}.kcn{font-size:10px;font-family:var(--font-mono);padding:2px 6px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-radius:9px;color:var(--text-muted);}
.kcb{padding:7px;flex:1;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;max-height:460px;}
.kk{background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:9px 11px;}.kk:hover{border-color:var(--accent-blue);}
.kk-t{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px;line-height:1.3;}.kk-m{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);flex-wrap:wrap;}
.kk-sla{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:7px;background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);color:var(--accent-red);}
.toast{position:fixed;bottom:18px;right:18px;padding:11px 18px;border-radius:var(--r);font-size:13px;font-weight:500;z-index:10000;transform:translateY(80px);opacity:0;transition:all .3s;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}.toast.show{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1;}.toast.ok{background:var(--accent-green);color:#fff;}.toast.err{background:var(--accent-red);color:#fff;}
@media(max-width:900px){.kb{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}table{min-width:600px;}.sr{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}}
@media(max-width:600px){.kb{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
/* Expandable panel */
.edt-fase{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);overflow:hidden;}
.edt-fase-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;}
.edt-fase-head:hover{background:var(--bg-elevated);}
.edt-fase-body{display:none;}
.edt-fase.open .edt-fase-body{display:block;}
.edt-fase.open .edt-fase-head span:last-child{transform:rotate(90deg);}
/* ═══ Team page — cloned from index.html ═══ */
html{--text:var(--text-primary);--text2:var(--text-secondary);--text3:var(--text-muted);--blue:var(--accent-blue);--blue-bg:rgba(45,126,247,.15);--green:var(--accent-green);--green-bg:rgba(63,185,80,.15);--orange:var(--accent-orange);--orange-bg:rgba(240,136,62,.15);--red:var(--accent-red);--red-bg:rgba(248,81,73,.15);--purple:var(--accent-purple);--purple-bg:rgba(165,180,252,.15);--yellow:var(--accent-yellow);--yellow-bg:rgba(210,153,34,.15);--border2:#21262d;--font:var(--font-body);}
.loading-spinner{display:inline-block;width:16px;height:16px;border:2px solid var(--border);border-top-color:var(--blue);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:6px;}@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
.team-page{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:100%;}
.team-header{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);flex-shrink:0;}
.team-header-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
.page-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.lvl-badge{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.lvl-num{font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--blue);}
.search-bar{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 14px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;margin-bottom:10px;transition:border-color .15s;}
.search-bar:focus{border-color:var(--blue);}.search-bar::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.filter-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.filter-chip{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);transition:all .15s;}
.filter-chip:hover,.filter-chip.active{border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--text);background:var(--blue-bg);}
.table-wrap{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
.data-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}
.data-table th{padding:6px 8px;text-align:left;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:2;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;position:relative;}
.data-table td{padding:5px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);vertical-align:middle;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.data-table th.tm-th-resizable::after{content:'';position:absolute;right:0;top:25%;height:50%;width:3px;cursor:col-resize;background:transparent;}
.data-table th.tm-th-resizable:hover::after{background:var(--blue);border-radius:2px;}
.data-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);}
.avatar{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
.fte-code{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);}
.silo-badge{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;}
.nivel-badge{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.n1{background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);color:#f85149;}.n2{background:rgba(139,148,158,.15);color:#8b949e;}.n3{background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);}.n4{background:var(--purple-bg);color:var(--purple);}
.skills-bar-wrap{background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;height:6px;width:80px;overflow:hidden;display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:6px;}
.skills-bar{height:100%;border-radius:3px;}
.skill-tag{display:inline-block;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 6px;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;margin:1px;color:var(--text2);}
.skill-more{font-size:10px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:600;}
.btn-add-new{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#238636,#2ea043);border:1px solid #2ea043;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:6px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;transition:all .18s;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(35,134,54,.25);}.btn-add-new:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(35,134,54,.4);}
.fm-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.82);z-index:2000;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(6px);}.fm-overlay.open{display:flex;}
.fm-box{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;width:740px;max-width:97vw;max-height:94vh;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:0 28px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.7);}
.fm-header{padding:18px 24px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;}
.fm-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.fm-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text2);font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;transition:all .15s;}.fm-close:hover{color:var(--red);background:var(--red-bg);}
.fm-steps{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;padding:12px 32px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg3);gap:0;}
.fm-step-dot{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;position:relative;}
.fm-step-dot:not(:last-child)::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:11px;left:calc(50% + 12px);right:calc(-50% + 12px);height:2px;background:var(--border);}
.fm-step-dot.done:not(:last-child)::after{background:var(--green);}
.fsd-circle{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);position:relative;z-index:1;transition:all .3s;}
.fsd-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.4px;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;transition:color .3s;}
.fm-step-dot.active .fsd-circle{border-color:var(--blue);background:var(--blue);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(45,126,247,.25);}
.fm-step-dot.active .fsd-label{color:var(--blue);}
.fm-step-dot.done .fsd-circle{border-color:var(--green);background:var(--green);color:#fff;}
.fm-step-dot.done .fsd-label{color:var(--green);}
.fm-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px 24px;}
.fm-footer{padding:14px 24px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg3);}
.fm-step{display:none;animation:fm-fadein .2s ease;}.fm-step.active{display:block;}
@keyframes fm-fadein{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
.fm-field{margin-bottom:18px;}
.fm-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.fm-input{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:border-color .15s;font-family:var(--font);}.fm-input:focus{border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(45,126,247,.15);}.fm-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.fm-select{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
.fm-section-sep{height:1px;background:var(--border2);margin:18px 0;}
.nivel-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin:6px 0;}
.nivel-card{border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:var(--bg3);}.nivel-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}.nivel-card.sel{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.35);}
.nc-badge{font-size:22px;font-weight:900;font-family:var(--font-mono);margin-bottom:4px;}
.nc-desc{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:5px;line-height:1.3;}
.silo-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin:6px 0;}
.silo-card{border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:var(--bg3);}.silo-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);}.silo-card.sel{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.sc-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:5px;}.sc-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;}
.skill-cat-block{margin-bottom:14px;}
.skill-cat-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.skill-cat-line{height:2px;flex:1;border-radius:1px;opacity:.35;}
.skill-cat-cnt{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;opacity:.7;font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.skill-chips-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;}
.sk-chip{border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;background:var(--bg-primary);color:var(--text2);user-select:none;}.sk-chip:hover{color:var(--text);transform:scale(1.03);}.sk-chip.sel{font-weight:700;transform:scale(1.03);}
.preview-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg3) 0%,var(--bg2) 100%);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;margin:4px 0 14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.pc-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.pc-avatar{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:19px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.pc-name{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;}
.pc-meta{display:flex;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;}
.pc-skills-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:7px;}
.pc-skills-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:3px;}
.btn-fm-next{background:var(--blue);border:1px solid #4090ff;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:9px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:all .15s;}.btn-fm-next:hover{background:#4090ff;transform:translateY(-1px);}
.btn-fm-back{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}.btn-fm-back:hover{border-color:var(--text);color:var(--text);}
.btn-fm-submit{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#238636,#2ea043);border:1px solid #3fb950;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:9px 22px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:all .18s;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(35,134,54,.3);}.btn-fm-submit:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(35,134,54,.45);}.btn-fm-submit:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none;box-shadow:none;}
.fm-skill-counter{background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.3);border-radius:20px;padding:2px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.silo-redes{background:rgba(6,182,212,.15);color:#06b6d4}.silo-bbdd{background:rgba(168,85,247,.15);color:#a855f7}
.silo-unix{background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);color:#22c55e}.silo-seg{background:rgba(239,68,68,.15);color:#ef4444}
.silo-win{background:rgba(59,130,246,.15);color:#3b82f6}.silo-backend{background:rgba(249,115,22,.15);color:#f97316}
.silo-frontend{background:rgba(236,72,153,.15);color:#ec4899}.silo-soporte{background:rgba(139,143,152,.15);color:#8b8f98}
/* ═══ Kanban RUN ═══ */
.kanban-page{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.kanban-header{padding:12px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;}
.kanban-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;}
.kanban-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);}
.kanban-body{flex:1;overflow-x:auto;padding:12px;display:flex;gap:10px;}
.kanban-col{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;flex:1;min-width:190px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;max-height:100%;}
.col-header{padding:10px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;}
.col-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
.col-count{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:1px 7px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.col-bar{height:3px;margin:0 12px 4px;border-radius:2px;}
.cards-area{padding:6px;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;flex:1;min-height:50px;transition:background .15s;}
.cards-area.drag-over{background:rgba(45,126,247,.06);border-radius:6px;}
.kanban-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:9px;position:relative;cursor:grab;transition:border-color .15s,opacity .15s;}
.kanban-card:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
.kanban-card.dragging{opacity:.4;cursor:grabbing;}
.card-tags{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}
.card-prio{padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;}
.card-id{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:3px;text-align:right;}
.card-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px;line-height:1.3;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden;}
.card-silo{padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-size:8px;font-weight:600;}
.card-footer{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:4px;}
.card-user{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.card-user-av{width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
.sla-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.sla-bar-wrap{width:40px;height:4px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;}
.sla-bar{height:100%;border-radius:2px;}
.sla-txt{font-size:8px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:600;}
.col-wip{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:600;}
.col-wip.over{color:var(--accent-red);animation:wr-pulse 2s infinite;}
@keyframes wr-pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.5;}}
.add-task-btn{margin:6px;background:transparent;border:1px dashed var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:all .15s;flex-shrink:0;}
.add-task-btn:hover{border-color:var(--accent-blue);color:var(--accent-blue);}
.card-actions{display:none;position:absolute;top:4px;right:4px;gap:3px;}
.kanban-card:hover .card-actions{display:flex;}
/* ═══ Rich AG-012 Modal ═══ */
.run-modal-overlay{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;animation:fi .2s ease;}
.run-modal-content{background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;width:90%;max-width:720px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);}
.run-modal-sla-box{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.06);border-bottom:1px solid #333840;}
.run-modal-sla-countdown{font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);color:#ef4444;letter-spacing:1px;}
.run-modal-sla-meta{font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;}
.run-modal-sla-end{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#e4e5e9;}
.run-infra-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin:8px 0;}
.run-infra-item{background:#181b20;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 8px;}
.run-infra-label{font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;}.run-infra-val{font-size:11px;font-family:var(--font-mono);}
.run-infra-val.ip{color:#3b82f6}.run-infra-val.host{color:#22c55e}.run-infra-val.suggest{color:#eab308;font-style:italic}
.run-src-tag{font-size:7px;padding:1px 3px;border-radius:2px;margin-left:3px;font-weight:600;}
.run-src-cmdb{background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);color:#22c55e}.run-src-ia{background:rgba(234,179,8,.15);color:#eab308}
.run-step{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}.run-step:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.run-step-n{min-width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);color:#22c55e;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}
.run-step-t{font-weight:600;font-size:12px;}
.run-cmd{display:block;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;background:#181b20;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:4px;padding:3px 6px;margin:3px 0;color:#22c55e;}
.run-chk{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px;padding:3px 0;}
.run-chk-box{width:16px;height:16px;border:1.5px solid #333840;border-radius:3px;flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;}
.run-chk-box:hover{border-color:#22c55e}.run-chk-box.done{background:#22c55e;border-color:#22c55e;color:#fff;}
.run-chk-text{font-size:11px;}.run-chk-text.done{text-decoration:line-through;color:#8b8f98;}
.run-status-bar{display:flex;border-top:1px solid #333840;}
.run-status-btn{flex:1;padding:8px;text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;border-right:1px solid #333840;color:#8b8f98;}
.run-status-btn:last-child{border-right:none}.run-status-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);}
.run-status-btn.current{border-top:2px solid #22c55e;color:#22c55e;}
.run-cand-silo{display:inline-block;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;}
/* ═══ Incident Cards ═══ */
.inc-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;padding:10px 14px;}
.inc-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .15s;}
.inc-card:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
.inc-card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:10px 12px;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;}
.inc-card-head:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);}
.inc-prio{padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);flex-shrink:0;}
.inc-title{flex:1;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;min-width:0;}
.inc-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.inc-sla-badge{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;}
.inc-progress-wrap{width:60px;height:5px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;}
.inc-progress-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width .3s;}
.inc-arrow{font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);transition:transform .2s;flex-shrink:0;width:18px;text-align:center;}
.inc-card.open .inc-arrow{transform:rotate(90deg);}
.inc-tasks-panel{display:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-elevated);padding:10px 12px;}
.inc-card.open .inc-tasks-panel{display:block;}
.inc-task-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 10px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;background:var(--bg-card);}
.inc-task-row:hover{border-color:var(--accent-blue);background:rgba(88,166,255,.04);}
.inc-task-title{flex:1;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;min-width:0;}
.inc-task-col{font-size:9px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);font-weight:600;flex-shrink:0;}
.inc-task-sla{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;min-width:55px;text-align:right;}
.inc-task-pct{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;width:28px;text-align:right;}
.notif-bell{position:relative;cursor:pointer;padding:4px 6px;border-radius:6px;transition:background .2s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;}
.notif-bell:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);}
.notif-bell svg{width:18px;height:18px;stroke:var(--text-secondary,#8b8f98);fill:none;stroke-width:1.8;}
.notif-badge{position:absolute;top:0;right:0;min-width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:7px;background:#ef4444;color:#fff;font-size:8px;font-weight:800;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0 3px;line-height:1;}
.notif-badge.show{display:flex;}
.notif-panel{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 8px);right:0;width:320px;max-height:380px;background:var(--bg-card,#1e2128);border:1px solid var(--border,#333840);border-radius:10px;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5);z-index:9100;display:none;overflow:hidden;}
.notif-panel.open{display:block;}
.notif-panel-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:10px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border,#333840);background:var(--bg-elevated,#252830);}
.notif-panel-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;}.notif-mark-all{font-size:9px;color:var(--accent-blue,#58a6ff);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;}
.notif-list{max-height:320px;overflow-y:auto;}
.notif-item{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;}
.notif-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);}
.notif-item.unread{background:rgba(88,166,255,.05);border-left:3px solid var(--accent-blue,#58a6ff);}
.notif-ico{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:13px;}
.notif-ico.asignacion{background:rgba(34,197,94,.12);}.notif-ico.estado{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);}.notif-ico.alerta{background:rgba(234,179,8,.12);}.notif-ico.urgente{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);}.notif-ico.info{background:rgba(139,92,246,.12);}
.notif-body{flex:1;min-width:0;}.notif-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.notif-msg{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary,#8b8f98);margin-top:1px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;}
.notif-time{font-size:8px;color:var(--text-muted,#6b7280);margin-top:2px;font-family:var(--font-mono,monospace);}
.notif-empty{padding:24px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted,#6b7280);font-size:11px;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="login-overlay"><div class="lc">
  <div class="lc-badge">GOB. RUN</div>
  <h1>Cognitive PMO</h1><div class="sub">Panel del Coordinador de Operaciones</div>
  <div class="lerr" id="lerr">Credenciales incorrectas</div>
  <input type="email" id="le" placeholder="Email" autocomplete="email">
  <input type="password" id="lp" placeholder="Contrase&ntilde;a" autocomplete="current-password">
  <button onclick="doLogin()">Acceder</button>
</div></div>

<div id="app" style="display:none;">
<div class="hdr"><div class="hdr-l">
  <div class="hdr-logo"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.15)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.4)" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="20" cy="17" r="5" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><path d="M14 30c0-4 2.7-6 6-6s6 2 6 6" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
  <div><div class="hdr-t">Gobernanza RUN</div><div class="hdr-s">Coordinaci&oacute;n de Operaciones &middot; ITSM</div></div>
</div><div class="hdr-r">
  <div class="notif-bell" id="notif-bell" onclick="toggleNotifPanel(event)">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg>
    <span class="notif-badge" id="notif-badge">0</span>
    <div class="notif-panel" id="notif-panel">
      <div class="notif-panel-header"><span class="notif-panel-title">Notificaciones</span><span class="notif-mark-all" onclick="notifMarkAll(event)">Marcar todo le&iacute;do</span></div>
      <div class="notif-list" id="notif-list"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="thm"><span>&#9790;</span><div class="thm-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()"></div><span>&#9728;</span></div>
  <div class="pdot"></div><div class="hdr-u"><strong id="un">Coordinador</strong><span id="ur">Gobernanza RUN</span></div>
  <button class="btn-out" onclick="doLogout()">Salir</button>
</div></div>

<div class="tabs">
  <button class="tb a" data-t="incidencias" onclick="sw('incidencias')"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(248,81,73,.12)" stroke="var(--accent-red)" stroke-width="1.2"/><path d="M20 13v7M20 24v1" stroke="var(--accent-red)" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>Incidencias</button>
  <button class="tb" data-t="tecnicos" onclick="sw('tecnicos')"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(188,140,255,.12)" stroke="var(--accent-purple)" stroke-width="1.2"/><circle cx="16" cy="16" r="3.5" stroke="var(--accent-purple)" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none"/><circle cx="26" cy="16" r="3.5" stroke="var(--accent-purple)" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none"/></svg>T&eacute;cnicos</button>
  <!-- LEGACY P95-F7 — eliminar tras 2 semanas (2026-04-21). Reemplazado por /gov-kanban-global.html
  <button class="tb" data-t="kanban" onclick="sw('kanban')"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(57,210,192,.12)" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="10" y="12" width="5" height="16" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><rect x="17.5" y="12" width="5" height="10" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><rect x="25" y="12" width="5" height="13" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/></svg>Kanban</button>
  -->
  <button class="tb" onclick="window.location.href='/gov-kanban-global.html'" title="Kanban global RUN+BUILD"><svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M20 4L35 12V28L20 36L5 28V12L20 4Z" fill="rgba(57,210,192,.12)" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="10" y="12" width="5" height="16" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><rect x="17.5" y="12" width="5" height="10" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><rect x="25" y="12" width="5" height="13" rx="1" stroke="var(--accent-cyan)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/></svg>Kanban global &rarr;</button>
</div>

<div class="cnt">
  <!-- CAB Alerts Banner -->
  <div id="cab-alerts-run" style="display:none;margin-bottom:12px;"></div>
  <!-- TAB 1: INCIDENCIAS con formulario ITSM real -->
  <div class="tp a" id="p-incidencias">
    <div class="sr" id="is"></div>
    <div class="itsm-panel">
      <div class="itsm-header">
        <div class="itsm-header-title">
          <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--accent-blue)" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/><line x1="12" y1="18" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="9" y1="15" x2="15" y2="15"/></svg>
          Registro de Incidencia ITSM
        </div>
        <span class="mode-badge mode-run">ITIL 4</span>
      </div>
      <div class="itsm-body">
        <!-- Row 1: Catálogo + Canal -->
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:3fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;">
            <label class="sap-label">&#128203; Tipo de Incidencia (Cat&aacute;logo ITSM)</label>
            <select class="sap-input" id="itsm-catalogo" onchange="itsmCatalogoChanged()"><option value="">— Seleccionar del cat&aacute;logo —</option></select>
          </div>
          <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;">
            <label class="sap-label">&#128225; Canal de Entrada</label>
            <select class="sap-input" id="itsm-canal"><option value="Portal ITSM">Portal ITSM</option><option value="Tel&eacute;fono">Tel&eacute;fono</option><option value="Email">Email</option><option value="Chat">Chat</option><option value="Monitorizaci&oacute;n">Monitorizaci&oacute;n</option><option value="Presencial">Presencial</option></select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Row 2: Auto-populated info bar -->
        <div id="itsm-info-bar" style="display:none;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;">
            <div><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;">Complejidad</span><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;" id="itsm-complejidad">—</div></div>
            <div><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;">&Aacute;rea</span><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;" id="itsm-area-auto">—</div></div>
            <div><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;">SLA Objetivo</span><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);" id="itsm-sla-obj">—</div></div>
            <div><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;">Nivel M&iacute;nimo</span><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;" id="itsm-nivel-min">—</div></div>
            <div><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;">Skills Req.</span><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);" id="itsm-skills-count">—</div></div>
            <div style="margin-left:auto;"><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;">Prioridad Sugerida</span><div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:800;font-family:var(--font-mono);" id="itsm-prio-sugerida">—</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Row 3: Impact × Urgency Matrix -->
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">&#128165; Impacto</label><select class="sap-input" id="itsm-impacto" onchange="itsmCalcPriority()"><option value="Cr&iacute;tico">1 — Cr&iacute;tico (Organizaci&oacute;n)</option><option value="Alto">2 — Alto (Departamento)</option><option value="Medio" selected>3 — Medio (Grupo)</option><option value="Bajo">4 — Bajo (Individual)</option></select></div>
          <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">&#9201; Urgencia</label><select class="sap-input" id="itsm-urgencia" onchange="itsmCalcPriority()"><option value="Cr&iacute;tica">1 — Cr&iacute;tica (Inmediata)</option><option value="Alta">2 — Alta (&lt;2h)</option><option value="Media" selected>3 — Media (&lt;8h)</option><option value="Baja">4 — Baja (Planificable)</option></select></div>
          <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">&#127919; Prioridad Calculada</label><div id="itsm-prio-calc" style="background:var(--bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;text-align:center;color:var(--accent-yellow);">P3</div></div>
          <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">&#9200; SLA (horas)</label><input class="sap-input mono" id="itsm-sla" type="number" min="0.5" step="0.5" value="24" style="text-align:center;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);"></div>
        </div>
        <!-- Row 4: Description + Service + CI -->
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">&#128221; Descripci&oacute;n Detallada</label><textarea class="sap-textarea" id="run-input" placeholder="Describe el s&iacute;ntoma, contexto y cualquier detalle relevante..."></textarea></div>
          <div>
            <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0 0 8px;"><label class="sap-label">&#128421; Servicio Afectado</label><select class="sap-input" id="itsm-servicio"><option value="">— Seleccionar —</option><option>Banca Online</option><option>App M&oacute;vil</option><option>Bizum / Pagos</option><option>SWIFT Alliance</option><option>Red Oficinas</option><option>Cajeros ATM</option><option>Core Bancario</option><option>Email / Ofim&aacute;tica</option><option>VPN Corporativa</option><option>Base de Datos</option><option>Infraestructura</option><option>Seguridad Perimetral</option></select></div>
            <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">&#128100; Reportado por</label><input class="sap-input" id="itsm-reporter" placeholder="Nombre del reportante"></div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0 0 8px;"><label class="sap-label">&#128295; CI Afectado (CMDB)</label><select class="sap-input" id="itsm-ci"><option value="">Cargando activos CMDB...</option></select></div>
            <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">&#128188; Impacto de Negocio</label><select class="sap-input" id="itsm-impacto-neg"><option value="">— Evaluar —</option><option>P&eacute;rdida financiera directa</option><option>Interrupci&oacute;n servicio cliente</option><option>Riesgo regulatorio (BCE/CNMV)</option><option>Degradaci&oacute;n rendimiento</option><option>Impacto interno operativo</option><option>Impacto cosm&eacute;tico / menor</option></select></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Buttons -->
        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
          <button class="btn-exec" id="run-exec-btn" onclick="itsmSubmitAndPipeline()" style="flex:1;">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"/></svg>
            Registrar Incidencia + Ejecutar Pipeline IA
          </button>
          <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetForm()">&#8634; Reset</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Agent cascade RUN — identical to index.html -->
    <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:12px 16px;margin-bottom:14px;overflow-x:auto;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.8"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 8v4l3 3"/></svg>
        <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Cascada RUN &mdash; 4 Agentes IA</span>
        <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--font-mono);">READY</span>
      </div>
      <div onclick="openRunFullscreenGov()" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0;cursor:pointer;" title="Click para ver detalle de agentes y tools">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(59,130,246,.12),rgba(59,130,246,.05));border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,.25);border-radius:14px;padding:3px 10px;flex-shrink:0;">
          <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/></svg>
          <span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:#3b82f6;">ITSM Input</span>
        </div>
        <svg width="16" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="10" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="10,2 16,5 10,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
        <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;min-width:0;border-left:3px solid #3b82f6;">
          <div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;color:#3b82f6;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M35 65 L50 30 L65 65 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><circle cx="50" cy="22" r="4" fill="currentColor"/></svg></div>
          <div style="min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#3b82f6;">AG-001 Dispatcher</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text-muted);">Triaje NLP &middot; P1-P4</div></div>
        </div>
        <svg width="14" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="8" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="8,2 14,5 8,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
        <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;min-width:0;border-left:3px solid #8b5cf6;">
          <div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;color:#8b5cf6;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="35" cy="45" r="8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><circle cx="65" cy="45" r="8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M30 65 H70" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/></svg></div>
          <div style="min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#8b5cf6;">AG-002 Resources</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text-muted);">Matching &middot; 150 FTEs</div></div>
        </div>
        <svg width="14" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="8" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="8,2 14,5 8,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
        <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(249,115,22,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;min-width:0;border-left:3px solid #f97316;">
          <div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;color:#f97316;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M30 60 L50 25 L70 60 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="50" y1="40" x2="50" y2="50" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><circle cx="50" cy="55" r="2" fill="currentColor"/></svg></div>
          <div style="min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#f97316;">AG-003 Forecaster</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text-muted);">Prophet &middot; Freeze</div></div>
        </div>
        <svg width="14" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="8" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="8,2 14,5 8,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
        <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(6,182,212,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;min-width:0;border-left:3px solid #06b6d4;">
          <div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;color:#06b6d4;"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="35" y="40" width="30" height="25" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M40 40 V33 A10 10 0 0 1 60 33 V40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/></svg></div>
          <div style="min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#06b6d4;">AG-004 Gatekeeper</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text-muted);">Buffer &middot; Freeze</div></div>
        </div>
        <svg width="16" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="10" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="10,2 16,5 10,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(63,185,80,.12),rgba(63,185,80,.05));border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.25);border-radius:14px;padding:3px 10px;flex-shrink:0;">
          <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
          <span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:#22c55e;">Output</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Incidencias activas con tarjetas expandibles -->
    <div style="margin-top:14px;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 4px;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--accent-red)" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M10.29 3.86L1.82 18a2 2 0 0 0 1.71 3h16.94a2 2 0 0 0 1.71-3L13.71 3.86a2 2 0 0 0-3.42 0z"/><line x1="12" y1="9" x2="12" y2="13"/><line x1="12" y1="17" x2="12.01" y2="17"/></svg>
          Incidencias Activas
          <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);font-weight:400;" id="ic">0</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="ib" class="inc-list"><div style="padding:35px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Cargando...</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- TAB 2: TÉCNICOS (full team page — cloned from index.html) -->
  <div class="tp" id="p-tecnicos">
  <div class="team-page">
    <div class="team-header" style="padding:10px 20px 8px;">
      <div class="team-header-top" style="margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div class="page-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="flex-shrink:0"><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="3.5"/><path d="M2 21v-1.5A5.5 5.5 0 0 1 7.5 14h3A5.5 5.5 0 0 1 16 19.5V21"/><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="2.5" opacity=".6"/><path d="M20 13.5h1.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 25 17v1" opacity=".6"/></svg> Directorio de Equipo <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;" id="team-count">0 t&eacute;cnicos</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <button onclick="toggleTeamDashboard()" style="background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.3);color:var(--blue);border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">
            <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;"><path d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2"/></svg>Dashboard
          </button>
          <button class="btn-add-new" onclick="openTeamForm()" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;">
            <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:2px;"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>
            T&eacute;cnico
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="team-dashboard" style="display:none;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;" id="team-estado-badges"></div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 2fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
            <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Ocupaci&oacute;n Global</div>
            <div style="position:relative;width:80px;height:50px;margin:0 auto;">
              <canvas id="team-gauge" width="80" height="50"></canvas>
              <div style="position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;text-align:center;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:800;" id="team-gauge-pct">0%</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-around;margin-top:6px;font-size:9px;">
              <span style="color:var(--orange);">Ocup: <strong id="td-ocupados">0</strong></span>
              <span style="color:var(--green);">Disp: <strong id="td-disponibles">0</strong></span>
              <span style="color:var(--text3);">Otros: <strong id="td-otros">0</strong></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
            <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Carga RUN vs BUILD</div>
            <div style="position:relative;width:80px;height:50px;margin:0 auto;">
              <canvas id="team-runbuild-gauge" width="80" height="50"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-around;margin-top:6px;font-size:9px;">
              <span style="color:var(--blue);"><strong id="td-pct-run">0%</strong> RUN</span>
              <span style="color:var(--green);"><strong id="td-pct-build">0%</strong> BUILD</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px;">
              <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">Ocupaci&oacute;n por Silo</div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;">
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N1 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n1">0</span></div>
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N2 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n2">0</span></div>
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N3 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n3">0</span></div>
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N4 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n4">0</span></div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div id="team-silo-bars"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;" onclick="toggleTeamDashboard()">&blacktriangle; Minimizar dashboard</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;">
        <input class="search-bar" placeholder="Buscar por nombre, FTE, proyecto..." oninput="filterTeam(this.value)" style="margin-bottom:0;flex:1;">
        <div class="filter-row" style="flex-wrap:nowrap;">
          <div class="filter-chip active" onclick="filterSilo('Todos',this)">Todos</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Frontend',this)">Front</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Soporte',this)">Sop</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Redes',this)">Redes</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Windows',this)">Win</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Backend',this)">Back</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('QA',this)">QA</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('DevOps',this)">DevOps</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Seguridad',this)">Sec</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('BBDD',this)">BBDD</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
      <table class="data-table" id="team-table" style="table-layout:fixed;">
        <thead><tr id="team-thead-row">
          <th style="width:160px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="nombre">Nombre</th>
          <th style="width:60px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="fte">FTE</th>
          <th style="width:65px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="silo">Silo</th>
          <th style="width:38px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="nivel">Nivel</th>
          <th style="width:55px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="skills">Skills</th>
          <th style="width:38px;text-align:center;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="tareas">Tareas</th>
          <th style="width:100px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="vinculacion">Vinculaci&oacute;n</th>
          <th style="width:75px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="carga">Carga</th>
          <th style="width:70px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="estado">Estado</th>
          <th style="width:140px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="email">Email</th>
          <th style="width:90px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="telefono">Tel&eacute;fono</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody id="team-tbody"><tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--text2);"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Cargando equipo...</td></tr></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
    <div id="team-disponibles-panel" style="display:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);padding:10px 20px;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--green)" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>
          T&eacute;cnicos Disponibles por Silo
        </div>
        <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;" onclick="document.getElementById('team-disponibles-panel').style.display='none'">&times; Cerrar</span>
      </div>
      <div id="team-disponibles-grid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);padding:4px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-shrink:0;">
      <button onclick="toggleDisponibles()" style="background:var(--green-bg);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.3);color:var(--green);border-radius:5px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">&bull; Disponibles por Silo</button>
      <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);" id="team-footer-info"></span>
    </div>
  </div>
  </div>

  <!-- TAB 3: KANBAN OPERATIVO RUN -->
  <!-- LEGACY P95-F7 — eliminar tras 2 semanas (2026-04-21). Reemplazado por /gov-kanban-global.html
  <div class="tp" id="p-kanban">
  <div class="kanban-page">
    <div class="kanban-header">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--accent-red)" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M9 3v18"/><path d="M15 3v18"/></svg>
        <div class="kanban-title">Kanban Operativo RUN</div>
      </div>
      <div class="kanban-meta">
        <span style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 10px;font-family:var(--font-mono);" id="kb-total">0 tareas</span>
        <button class="btn-add-new" onclick="openRunTaskForm()" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:11px;">+ Nueva Tarea</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;padding:10px 20px;background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);" id="kb-kpi-header"></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:8px 20px;background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);align-items:center;">
      <input class="search-bar" placeholder="Buscar tarea, ticket, t&eacute;cnico..." oninput="filterRunKanban(this.value)" id="kb-search" style="margin-bottom:0;flex:1;padding:6px 10px;font-size:12px;">
      <select id="kb-prio-filter" onchange="filterRunKanban()" style="width:150px;padding:6px 8px;font-size:11px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);outline:none;">
        <option value="">Todas prioridades</option>
        <option value="Cr&iacute;tica">Solo P1</option>
        <option value="Alta">Solo P2</option>
        <option value="Media">P3</option>
        <option value="Baja">P4</option>
      </select>
      <select id="kanban-inc-filter" onchange="filterKanbanByIncident(this.value)" style="width:180px;padding:6px 8px;font-size:11px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);outline:none;">
        <option value="">Todas incidencias</option>
      </select>
      <span id="kanban-filter-count" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);"></span>
    </div>
    <div class="edt-fase" id="kanban-charts-panel" style="margin:0 12px 8px;border-radius:8px;">
      <div class="edt-fase-head" onclick="document.getElementById('kanban-charts-panel').classList.toggle('open');if(document.getElementById('kanban-charts-panel').classList.contains('open'))loadRunMetricsInline();" style="padding:6px 10px;">
        <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">&#128202; M&eacute;tricas de Flujo</span>
        <span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-muted);">&rsaquo;</span>
      </div>
      <div class="edt-fase-body" style="padding:10px;">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;" id="kb-kpis-inline"></div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;" id="kb-dist-inline"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kanban-body" id="kanban-body">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;color:var(--text2);gap:8px;"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Cargando tablero...</div>
    </div>
    <div id="kb-metrics-area" style="display:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);padding:14px 20px;overflow-y:auto;max-height:420px;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--accent-red)" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2"/></svg>
          M&eacute;tricas de Flujo RUN
        </div>
        <button onclick="document.getElementById('kb-metrics-area').style.display='none'" style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;">&times;</button>
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px;" id="kb-kpis"></div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Diagrama de Flujo Acumulado (CFD)</div>
          <div style="height:180px;position:relative;"><canvas id="kb-cfd-chart"></canvas></div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Control Chart (Lead Time)</div>
          <div style="height:180px;position:relative;"><canvas id="kb-control-chart"></canvas></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;" id="kb-distribution"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);padding:6px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;">
      <button onclick="toggleRunMetrics()" style="background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.3);color:var(--accent-red);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">&#128202; M&eacute;tricas &amp; Gr&aacute;ficas</button>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);" id="kb-footer-stats"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  </div>
  -->
</div>
</div>

<!-- Pipeline opens in new tab (no iframe) -->

<!-- ══════════════════ MODAL: TAREA KANBAN RUN ══════════════════ -->
<div class="fm-overlay" id="fm-kanban" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeRunTaskModal()">
  <div class="fm-box" style="width:700px;">
    <div style="padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
      <span id="kb-modal-prio-badge" class="card-prio" style="font-size:12px;">P3</span>
      <span style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;" id="kb-modal-title">Nueva Tarea RUN</span>
      <button onclick="closeRunTaskModal()" style="margin-left:auto;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;">&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:16px 18px;overflow-y:auto;max-height:72vh;">
      <input type="hidden" id="kb-edit-id">
      <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
        <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">T&iacute;tulo</label>
        <input class="sap-input" id="kb-titulo" placeholder="Descripci&oacute;n breve de la tarea...">
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div>
          <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Columna Kanban</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="kb-columna">
            <option value="Backlog">Backlog</option>
            <option value="An&aacute;lisis">An&aacute;lisis</option>
            <option value="En Progreso">En Progreso</option>
            <option value="Testing">Testing</option>
            <option value="Completado">Completado</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Prioridad</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="kb-prioridad">
            <option value="Cr&iacute;tica">Cr&iacute;tica (P1)</option>
            <option value="Alta">Alta (P2)</option>
            <option value="Media" selected>Media (P3)</option>
            <option value="Baja">Baja (P4)</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div>
          <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">T&eacute;cnico Asignado</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="kb-tecnico"><option value="">Sin asignar</option></select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Vincular Incidencia</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="kb-incidencia"><option value="">Ninguna</option></select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div>
          <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Horas Estimadas</label>
          <input class="sap-input" id="kb-horas-est" type="number" min="0" step="0.5" value="0" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);">
        </div>
        <div>
          <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Horas Reales</label>
          <input class="sap-input" id="kb-horas-real" type="number" min="0" step="0.5" value="0" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
        <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Descripci&oacute;n / Notas</label>
        <textarea class="sap-textarea" id="kb-descripcion" placeholder="Detalles de la tarea..." style="min-height:60px;"></textarea>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
        <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Bloqueador</label>
        <input class="sap-input" id="kb-bloqueador" placeholder="Ej: Esperando respuesta de proveedor...">
      </div>
      <div id="kb-itsm-block" style="display:none;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Datos ITSM (Incidencia vinculada)</div>
        <div id="kb-itsm-content" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);"></div>
      </div>
      <div id="kb-fechas-info" style="display:none;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Fechas Autom&aacute;ticas</div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;font-size:11px;">
          <div><span style="color:var(--text3);">Creaci&oacute;n:</span> <span id="kb-f-creacion" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);">--</span></div>
          <div><span style="color:var(--text3);">Inicio:</span> <span id="kb-f-ejecucion" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);">--</span></div>
          <div><span style="color:var(--text3);">Cierre:</span> <span id="kb-f-cierre" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);">--</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:12px 18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;">
      <button class="btn-fm-back" onclick="closeRunTaskModal()">Cancelar</button>
      <button class="btn-fm-submit" onclick="saveRunTask()" id="kb-save-btn">Crear Tarea</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════ MODAL: NUEVO TÉCNICO ══════════════════ -->
<div class="fm-overlay" id="fm-team">
  <div class="fm-box">
    <div class="fm-header">
      <div class="fm-title">
        <span id="tm-icon" style="font-size:22px;">&#129489;&#8205;&#128187;</span>
        <div>
          <div id="tm-title">Nuevo T&eacute;cnico</div>
          <div id="tm-sub" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;margin-top:1px;">Registrar miembro en el equipo PMO</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button class="fm-close" onclick="fmClose('fm-team')">&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-steps">
      <div class="fm-step-dot active" id="ts-dot-1"><div class="fsd-circle">1</div><div class="fsd-label">Identidad</div></div>
      <div class="fm-step-dot" id="ts-dot-2"><div class="fsd-circle">2</div><div class="fsd-label">Skills</div></div>
      <div class="fm-step-dot" id="ts-dot-3"><div class="fsd-circle">3</div><div class="fsd-label">Confirmar</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-body">
      <div class="fm-step active" id="ts-1">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:4px;">
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0">
            <div class="fm-label">&#129682; ID T&eacute;cnico</div>
            <input class="fm-input" id="t-id" placeholder="FTE-151" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);letter-spacing:.5px;" autocomplete="off">
          </div>
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0">
            <div class="fm-label">&#128202; Estado Inicial</div>
            <select class="fm-select" id="t-estado">
              <option value="DISPONIBLE">&#128994; DISPONIBLE</option>
              <option value="OCUPADO">&#128993; OCUPADO</option>
              <option value="GUARDIA">&#128309; GUARDIA</option>
              <option value="BAJA">&#128308; BAJA</option>
              <option value="VACACIONES">&#9898; VACACIONES</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-section-sep"></div>
        <div class="fm-field">
          <div class="fm-label">&#128100; Nombre Completo</div>
          <input class="fm-input" id="t-nombre" placeholder="Ej: Carmen Garc&iacute;a Mart&iacute;nez">
        </div>
        <div class="fm-field">
          <div class="fm-label">&#127919; Nivel Profesional</div>
          <div class="nivel-grid">
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N1',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:#f85149;">N1</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">J&uacute;nior</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">0&ndash;1 a&ntilde;o<br>formaci&oacute;n b&aacute;sica</div>
            </div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N2',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:var(--blue);">N2</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">T&eacute;cnico</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">1&ndash;3 a&ntilde;os<br>autonom&iacute;a operativa</div>
            </div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N3',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:#a5b4fc;">N3</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">Senior</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">3&ndash;7 a&ntilde;os<br>resuelve sin escalar</div>
            </div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N4',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:#f59e0b;">N4</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">Experto</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">7+ a&ntilde;os<br>referente t&eacute;cnico</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-field" style="margin-bottom:0">
          <div class="fm-label">&#127970; Silo de Especialidad</div>
          <div class="silo-grid">
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Frontend',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#127912;</div><div class="sc-name">Frontend</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Backend',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#9881;&#65039;</div><div class="sc-name">Backend</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Redes',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#127760;</div><div class="sc-name">Redes</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Windows',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#129695;</div><div class="sc-name">Windows</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('BBDD',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#128452;&#65039;</div><div class="sc-name">BBDD</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Seguridad',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#128274;</div><div class="sc-name">Seguridad</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('DevOps',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#128640;</div><div class="sc-name">DevOps</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('QA',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#129514;</div><div class="sc-name">QA</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Soporte',this)"><div class="sc-icon">&#127915;</div><div class="sc-name">Soporte</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fm-step" id="ts-2">
        <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px;">Selecciona las skills del t&eacute;cnico. Cuantas m&aacute;s, mejor puntuaci&oacute;n de matching con incidencias.</div>
        <div id="ts-2-content"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="fm-step" id="ts-3">
        <div id="ts-3-preview"></div>
        <div id="ts-tasks-panel" style="display:none;margin-top:14px;">
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M9 3v18"/><path d="M15 3v18"/></svg>
            Tareas Kanban Asignadas
            <span id="ts-tasks-count" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;"></span>
          </div>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <div style="background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.2);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;text-align:center;">
              <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue);" id="ts-pct-run">0%</div>
              <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">% RUN</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background:var(--green-bg);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.2);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;text-align:center;">
              <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--green);" id="ts-pct-build">0%</div>
              <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">% BUILD</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="ts-tasks-list" style="max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-footer">
      <button class="btn-fm-back" id="ts-back-btn" onclick="tsBack()" style="display:none">&larr; Atr&aacute;s</button>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
        <span class="fm-skill-counter" id="ts-skill-count" style="display:none">0 skills</span>
        <button class="btn-fm-next" id="ts-next-btn" onclick="tsNext()">Siguiente &rarr;</button>
        <button class="btn-fm-submit" id="ts-submit-btn" onclick="tsSubmit()" style="display:none">&#9989; A&ntilde;adir al Equipo</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="tst"></div>

<script>
// LEGACY P95-F7: redirect de enlaces antiguos #kanban → /gov-kanban-global.html
if(location.hash==='#kanban'){location.href='/gov-kanban-global.html';}
var AB=window.location.origin,TK=localStorage.getItem('cpm_token')||'';
var CATALOGO_DATA=[];

function toggleTheme(){var h=document.documentElement,n=h.getAttribute('data-theme')==='dark'?'light':'dark';h.setAttribute('data-theme',n);localStorage.setItem('cpm_theme',n);}
(function(){var t=localStorage.getItem('cpm_theme');if(t)document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme',t);})();

function af(u,o){o=o||{};o.headers=o.headers||{};if(TK)o.headers['Authorization']='Bearer '+TK;if(o.body&&typeof o.body==='string')o.headers['Content-Type']='application/json';return fetch(AB+u,o).then(function(r){return r.text().then(function(t){try{return JSON.parse(t);}catch(e){return t;}});});}
function doLogin(){var e=document.getElementById('le').value,p=document.getElementById('lp').value;fetch(AB+'/auth/login',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email:e,password:p})}).then(function(r){return r.text().then(function(t){try{return JSON.parse(t);}catch(x){return{};}});}).then(function(d){if(d.token){TK=d.token;localStorage.setItem('cpm_token',d.token);var u=d.user||d;document.getElementById('login-overlay').style.display='none';document.getElementById('app').style.display='block';document.getElementById('un').textContent=u.nombre_completo||e;document.getElementById('ur').textContent=u.rol||'Coordinador RUN';init();}else{document.getElementById('lerr').style.display='block';}}).catch(function(){document.getElementById('lerr').style.display='block';});}
function doLogout(){localStorage.removeItem('cpm_token');localStorage.removeItem('pmo_token');localStorage.removeItem('pmo_user');localStorage.removeItem('pmo_permisos');localStorage.removeItem('pmo_role');TK='';window.location.href='/';}
// ── Notificaciones ──
function toggleNotifPanel(e){e.stopPropagation();var p=document.getElementById('notif-panel');p.classList.toggle('open');if(p.classList.contains('open'))loadNotif();}
