function loadNotif(){if(!TK)return;af('/api/notificaciones').then(function(d){if(!Array.isArray(d))return;var u=d.filter(function(n){return!n.leida;}).length;var b=document.getElementById('notif-badge');if(b){b.textContent=u;b.className='notif-badge'+(u>0?' show':'');}var el=document.getElementById('notif-list');if(!el)return;if(!d.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="notif-empty">Sin notificaciones</div>';return;}var ic={asignacion:'\u2705',estado:'\u{1F504}',alerta:'\u26A0\uFE0F',urgente:'\u{1F6A8}',info:'\u{1F4AC}'};el.innerHTML=d.map(function(n){var ago=nAgo(n.created_at),cls=n.leida?'':' unread',t=n.tipo||'info';return'<div class="notif-item'+cls+'" onclick="nClick(event,'+n.id+')"><div class="notif-ico '+t+'">'+(ic[t]||'\u{1F4AC}')+'</div><div class="notif-body"><div class="notif-title">'+nEsc(n.titulo)+'</div><div class="notif-msg">'+nEsc(n.mensaje||'')+'</div><div class="notif-time">'+ago+'</div></div></div>';}).join('');}).catch(function(){});}
function nEsc(s){var d=document.createElement('div');d.textContent=s;return d.innerHTML;}
function nAgo(dt){if(!dt)return'';var d=new Date(dt+(dt.indexOf('Z')<0&&dt.indexOf('+')<0?'Z':''));var s=Math.floor((Date.now()-d.getTime())/1000);if(s<60)return'ahora';if(s<3600)return Math.floor(s/60)+'m';if(s<86400)return Math.floor(s/3600)+'h';return Math.floor(s/86400)+'d';}
function nClick(e,id){e.stopPropagation();af('/api/notificaciones/'+id+'/leer',{method:'PUT'}).then(function(){loadNotif();}).catch(function(){});}
function notifMarkAll(e){e.stopPropagation();af('/api/notificaciones/leer-todas',{method:'PUT'}).then(function(){loadNotif();}).catch(function(){});}
setInterval(function(){if(TK)loadNotif();},30000);
document.addEventListener('click',function(e){var p=document.getElementById('notif-panel');if(p&&p.classList.contains('open')&&!e.target.closest('.notif-bell'))p.classList.remove('open');});
if(TK){af('/health').then(function(d){if(d&&d.status==='ok'){document.getElementById('login-overlay').style.display='none';document.getElementById('app').style.display='block';init();loadNotif();}}).catch(function(){});}
document.getElementById('lp').addEventListener('keypress',function(e){if(e.key==='Enter')doLogin();});
function sw(n){
  // LEGACY P95-F7: el tab "kanban" fue retirado. Redirigir al kanban global.
  if(n==='kanban'){window.location.href='/gov-kanban-global.html';return;}
  document.querySelectorAll('.tb').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('a');});
  var btn=document.querySelector('.tb[data-t="'+n+'"]');if(btn)btn.classList.add('a');
  document.querySelectorAll('.tp').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('a');});
  var pp=document.getElementById('p-'+n);if(pp)pp.classList.add('a');
  if(n==='tecnicos'&&ALL_TEAM.length===0)loadTeam();
}
function toast(m,t){var e=document.getElementById('tst');e.textContent=m;e.className='toast '+(t||'ok')+' show';setTimeout(function(){e.classList.remove('show');},3000);}

function init(){loadCatalogo();loadCMDB();loadInc();loadTeam();/* LEGACY P95-F7: loadKanbanRun() retirado */loadCABAlerts();}

// ═══ ITSM CATALOGO — exact logic from mother ═══
function loadCatalogo(){
  af('/catalogo/incidencias').then(function(d){
    var items=Array.isArray(d)?d:(d.catalogo||[]);
    CATALOGO_DATA=items;
    var sel=document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo');
    sel.innerHTML='<option value="">— Seleccionar del cat\u00e1logo —</option>';
    var seen={};
    items.forEach(function(c){
      var nm=c.incidencia||c.nombre||'';
      if(!nm||seen[nm])return;
      seen[nm]=true;
      var o=document.createElement('option');
      o.value=c.id_catalogo||'';
      o.textContent=nm;
      o.dataset.prio=c.prioridad_sugerida||'P3';
      o.dataset.comp=c.complejidad||'';
      o.dataset.area=c.area_afectada||'';
      o.dataset.sla=c.sla_objetivo_horas||'24';
      o.dataset.nivel=c.nivel_minimo||'';
      o.dataset.skills=c.total_skills_requeridas||'';
      sel.appendChild(o);
    });
  });
}

function itsmCatalogoChanged(){
  var sel=document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo');
  var opt=sel.selectedOptions[0];
  var bar=document.getElementById('itsm-info-bar');
  if(!opt||!opt.value){bar.style.display='none';return;}
  bar.style.display='block';
  var prio=opt.dataset.prio||'P3';
  var prioColors={P1:'var(--accent-red)',P2:'var(--accent-orange)',P3:'var(--accent-yellow)',P4:'var(--accent-green)'};
  document.getElementById('itsm-complejidad').textContent=opt.dataset.comp||'\u2014';
  document.getElementById('itsm-complejidad').style.color=opt.dataset.comp==='Compleja'?'var(--accent-red)':opt.dataset.comp==='Media'?'var(--accent-yellow)':'var(--accent-green)';
  document.getElementById('itsm-area-auto').textContent=opt.dataset.area||'\u2014';
  document.getElementById('itsm-sla-obj').textContent=(opt.dataset.sla||'\u2014')+'h';
  document.getElementById('itsm-sla-obj').style.color=parseFloat(opt.dataset.sla)<=4?'var(--accent-red)':'var(--text-primary)';
  document.getElementById('itsm-nivel-min').textContent=opt.dataset.nivel||'\u2014';
  document.getElementById('itsm-skills-count').textContent=opt.dataset.skills||'\u2014';
  document.getElementById('itsm-prio-sugerida').textContent=prio;
  document.getElementById('itsm-prio-sugerida').style.color=prioColors[prio]||'var(--text-primary)';
  document.getElementById('itsm-sla').value=opt.dataset.sla||24;
  var pmap={P1:['Cr\u00edtico','Cr\u00edtica'],P2:['Alto','Alta'],P3:['Medio','Media'],P4:['Bajo','Baja']};
  var pair=pmap[prio]||['Medio','Media'];
  document.getElementById('itsm-impacto').value=pair[0];
  document.getElementById('itsm-urgencia').value=pair[1];
  itsmCalcPriority();
  var desc=document.getElementById('run-input');
  if(!desc.value.trim())desc.value=opt.textContent;
}

function itsmCalcPriority(){
  var impMap={'\u0043r\u00edtico':1,'Alto':2,'Medio':3,'Bajo':4};
  var urgMap={'\u0043r\u00edtica':1,'Alta':2,'Media':3,'Baja':4};
  var imp=impMap[document.getElementById('itsm-impacto').value]||3;
  var urg=urgMap[document.getElementById('itsm-urgencia').value]||3;
  var matrix={'1,1':'P1','1,2':'P1','1,3':'P2','1,4':'P3','2,1':'P1','2,2':'P2','2,3':'P3','2,4':'P3','3,1':'P2','3,2':'P3','3,3':'P3','3,4':'P4','4,1':'P3','4,2':'P3','4,3':'P4','4,4':'P4'};
  var prio=matrix[imp+','+urg]||'P3';
  var el=document.getElementById('itsm-prio-calc');
  el.textContent=prio;
  var colors={P1:'var(--accent-red)',P2:'var(--accent-orange)',P3:'var(--accent-yellow)',P4:'var(--accent-green)'};
  el.style.color=colors[prio];el.style.borderColor=colors[prio];
  var slaMap={P1:4,P2:8,P3:24,P4:72};
  var slaEl=document.getElementById('itsm-sla');
  if(slaEl&&!document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo').value)slaEl.value=slaMap[prio];
}

function loadCMDB(){
  af('/cmdb/activos').then(function(d){
    var items=Array.isArray(d)?d:(d.activos||d.data||[]);
    var sel=document.getElementById('itsm-ci');
    sel.innerHTML='<option value="">— Seleccionar activo CMDB —</option>';
    items.forEach(function(a){
      var o=document.createElement('option');
      o.value=a.id_activo||a.id||'';
      o.textContent=(a.nombre||a.hostname||'')+(a.tipo?' ['+a.tipo+']':'');
      sel.appendChild(o);
    });
  }).catch(function(){
    document.getElementById('itsm-ci').innerHTML='<option value="">Sin datos CMDB</option>';
  });
}

function itsmSubmitAndPipeline(){
  var desc=document.getElementById('run-input').value.trim();
  if(!desc){document.getElementById('run-input').focus();toast('Describe la incidencia','err');return;}
  var prio=document.getElementById('itsm-prio-calc').textContent||'P3';
  var catOpt=document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo').selectedOptions[0];
  var data=desc+' ['+prio+'] '+(catOpt&&catOpt.value?catOpt.textContent:'');
  // Register via API
  var payload={descripcion:desc,prioridad:prio,area_afectada:document.getElementById('itsm-area-auto').textContent||'',urgencia:document.getElementById('itsm-urgencia').value,canal:document.getElementById('itsm-canal').value,servicio:document.getElementById('itsm-servicio').value,ci_afectado:document.getElementById('itsm-ci').value,impacto_negocio:document.getElementById('itsm-impacto-neg').value,reportado_por:document.getElementById('itsm-reporter').value,sla_horas:parseFloat(document.getElementById('itsm-sla').value)||24};
  if(catOpt&&catOpt.value)payload.id_catalogo=parseInt(catOpt.value);
  af('/incidencias',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(payload)}).then(function(){
    toast('Incidencia registrada');
    loadInc();
    openPipeline('run',data);
  }).catch(function(){
    toast('Error registrando','err');
    openPipeline('run',data);
  });
}

function resetForm(){
  document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo').value='';
  document.getElementById('run-input').value='';
  document.getElementById('itsm-reporter').value='';
  document.getElementById('itsm-info-bar').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('itsm-impacto').value='Medio';
  document.getElementById('itsm-urgencia').value='Media';
  itsmCalcPriority();
}

// ═══ Pipeline iframe ═══
function openPipeline(mode,data){
  localStorage.setItem('cpm_pipeline_mode',mode);
  localStorage.setItem('cpm_pipeline_data',data||'');
  var token=localStorage.getItem('cpm_token')||TK;
  var url='/index.html?token='+encodeURIComponent(token)+'#auto-'+mode;
  window.open(url,'_blank');
  toast('Pipeline RUN lanzado en nueva pesta\u00f1a.');
  var launchTime=Date.now();var pollCount=0;
  var pollInterval=setInterval(function(){
    pollCount++;if(pollCount>60){clearInterval(pollInterval);return;}
    af('/incidencias').then(function(data2){
      var arr=Array.isArray(data2)?data2:(data2.incidencias||[]);
      var recent=arr.find(function(inc){return new Date(inc.timestamp_creacion||inc.created_at||0).getTime()>launchTime;});
      if(recent){clearInterval(pollInterval);toast('\u2705 Pipeline RUN completado: '+(recent.ticket_id||''));loadInc();ALL_RUN_TASKS=[];loadKanbanRun();}
    }).catch(function(){});
  },10000);
}
function closePipeline(){}

// ═══ Incidencias Activas (tarjetas expandibles) ═══
var _incTasks={};// incidencia→tareas map
var _incTimerInterval=null;

async function loadInc(){
  try{
    var results=await Promise.all([af('/incidencias'),af('/kanban/tareas')]);
    var incs=Array.isArray(results[0])?results[0]:(results[0].incidencias||[]);
    var allTasks=Array.isArray(results[1])?results[1]:(results[1].tareas||[]);
    var runTasks=allTasks.filter(function(t){return t.tipo==='RUN';});
    // Group tasks by incidencia
    _incTasks={};
    runTasks.forEach(function(t){if(t.id_incidencia){if(!_incTasks[t.id_incidencia])_incTasks[t.id_incidencia]=[];_incTasks[t.id_incidencia].push(t);}});
    // KPI stats
    var p1=0,p2=0,p3=0;incs.forEach(function(x){var p=x.prioridad_ia||x.prioridad||'';if(p==='P1')p1++;else if(p==='P2')p2++;else if(p==='P3')p3++;});
    document.getElementById('is').innerHTML='<div class="sc red"><div class="sl">P1 Cr\u00edticas</div><div class="sv" style="color:var(--accent-red)">'+p1+'</div></div><div class="sc org"><div class="sl">P2 Altas</div><div class="sv" style="color:var(--accent-orange)">'+p2+'</div></div><div class="sc blu"><div class="sl">P3 Medias</div><div class="sv" style="color:var(--accent-blue)">'+p3+'</div></div><div class="sc grn"><div class="sl">Total</div><div class="sv">'+incs.length+'</div></div>';
    document.getElementById('ic').textContent=incs.length+' incidencias';
    if(!incs.length){document.getElementById('ib').innerHTML='<div style="padding:35px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Sin incidencias</div>';return;}
    // Sort: P1 first, then by SLA remaining (ascending), then by date
    var prioOrder={P1:0,P2:1,P3:2,P4:3};
    incs.sort(function(a,b){
      var pa=prioOrder[a.prioridad_ia||a.prioridad]||3,pb=prioOrder[b.prioridad_ia||b.prioridad]||3;
      if(pa!==pb)return pa-pb;
      var slaA=_calcIncSlaRemaining(a),slaB=_calcIncSlaRemaining(b);
      if(slaA!==slaB)return slaA-slaB;
      return new Date(b.timestamp_creacion||0)-new Date(a.timestamp_creacion||0);
    });
    renderIncCards(incs);
    startIncTimers();
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('Inc fetch failed:',e);
    document.getElementById('ib').innerHTML='<div style="padding:35px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">Error cargando</div>';
  }
}

function _calcIncSlaRemaining(inc){
  var slaH=inc.sla_limite||inc.sla_horas||24;
  var created=new Date(inc.timestamp_creacion||inc.created_at||0).getTime();
  return(created+slaH*3600000)-Date.now();
}

function _fmtCountdown(ms){
  if(ms<=0)return'VENCIDO';
  var h=Math.floor(ms/3600000),m=Math.floor((ms%3600000)/60000),s=Math.floor((ms%60000)/1000);
  return(h<10?'0'+h:h)+':'+(m<10?'0'+m:m)+':'+(s<10?'0'+s:s);
}

function renderIncCards(incs){
  var container=document.getElementById('ib');
  container.innerHTML=incs.map(function(inc){
    var tid=inc.ticket_id||inc.id||'';
    var prio=inc.prioridad_ia||inc.prioridad||'P3';
    var pc=PRIO_COLORS[prio==='P1'?'Cr\u00edtica':prio==='P2'?'Alta':prio==='P3'?'Media':'Baja']||'#8b949e';
    var pbg=prio==='P1'?'rgba(248,81,73,.15)':prio==='P2'?'rgba(239,159,39,.15)':'rgba(139,149,158,.15)';
    var titulo=(inc.incidencia_detectada||inc.descripcion||'Incidencia').substring(0,80);
    var area=inc.area_afectada||inc.area||inc.categoria||'\u2014';
    var slaH=inc.sla_limite||inc.sla_horas||0;
    var tasks=_incTasks[tid]||[];
    var totalT=tasks.length;
    var doneT=tasks.filter(function(t){return(t.columna||'').toLowerCase().indexOf('completad')>=0;}).length;
    var pctT=totalT>0?Math.round(doneT/totalT*100):0;
    var pctColor=pctT>=75?'var(--accent-green)':pctT>=25?'var(--accent-orange)':'var(--accent-red)';
    var slaRemaining=_calcIncSlaRemaining(inc);
    var slaText=slaH?_fmtCountdown(slaRemaining):'N/A';
    var slaColor=slaRemaining<=0?'#f85149':slaRemaining<slaH*3600000*0.3?'#f0883e':'#3fb950';
    var slaBg=slaRemaining<=0?'rgba(248,81,73,.15)':'rgba(63,185,80,.08)';

    var html='<div class="inc-card" id="inc-card-'+tid+'">';
    html+='<div class="inc-card-head" onclick="toggleIncCard(\''+tid+'\')">';
    html+='<div style="width:3px;align-self:stretch;border-radius:2px;background:'+pc+';flex-shrink:0;"></div>';
    html+='<span class="inc-prio" style="background:'+pbg+';color:'+pc+';">'+prio+'</span>';
    html+='<span class="inc-title">'+escHtml(titulo)+'</span>';
    html+='<span class="inc-meta">';
    html+='<span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+escHtml(tid)+'</span>';
    if(slaH)html+='<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);">SLA:'+slaH+'h</span>';
    html+='<span style="font-size:9px;">'+escHtml(area)+'</span>';
    html+='<span class="inc-sla-badge" style="background:'+slaBg+';color:'+slaColor+';" data-inc-sla="'+tid+'">'+slaText+'</span>';
    html+='<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);">'+doneT+'/'+totalT+'</span>';
    html+='<div class="inc-progress-wrap"><div class="inc-progress-fill" style="width:'+pctT+'%;background:'+pctColor+';"></div></div>';
    html+='<span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:'+pctColor+';">'+pctT+'%</span>';
    html+='</span>';
    html+='<span class="inc-arrow">&rsaquo;</span>';
    html+='</div>';

    // Tasks panel (hidden by default)
    html+='<div class="inc-tasks-panel">';
    html+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px;">';
    html+='<span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">Tareas de resoluci\u00f3n ('+totalT+')</span>';
    html+='<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">';
    html+='<button onclick="event.stopPropagation();finalizeIncident(\''+tid+'\')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#238636,#2ea043);border:1px solid #3fb950;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Finalizar incidencia</button>';
    html+='</div></div>';
    if(tasks.length===0){
      html+='<div style="text-align:center;padding:12px;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:11px;">Sin tareas vinculadas</div>';
    }else{
      tasks.forEach(function(t){
        var desc2={};try{desc2=JSON.parse(t.descripcion||'{}');}catch(e){}
        var tSilo=desc2.silo||'';
        var tSiloColor=SILO_COLORS[tSilo]||'#8b949e';
        var tSlaMins=desc2.sla_tarea_minutos||0;
        var tCreated=new Date(t.fecha_creacion||0).getTime();
        var tDeadline=tCreated+tSlaMins*60000;
        var tRemaining=tDeadline-Date.now();
        var tSlaText=tSlaMins?_fmtCountdown(tRemaining):'';
        var tSlaColor=tRemaining<=0?'#f85149':tRemaining<tSlaMins*60000*0.3?'#f0883e':'#3fb950';
        var tCol=t.columna||'Backlog';
        var chk=desc2.checklist||[];var chkDone=0;var chkTotal=chk.length;
        var tPct=chkTotal>0?Math.round(chkDone/chkTotal*100):0;
        var tPctColor=tPct>=75?'#22c55e':tPct>=25?'#f97316':'#8b949e';

        html+='<div class="inc-task-row" style="border-left:3px solid '+tSiloColor+';" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openRunTaskEdit(\''+t.id+'\')">';
        if(tSilo)html+='<span class="card-silo" style="background:'+tSiloColor+'22;color:'+tSiloColor+';font-size:8px;flex-shrink:0;">'+escHtml(tSilo)+'</span>';
        html+='<span class="inc-task-title">'+escHtml(t.titulo)+'</span>';
        html+='<span class="inc-task-col">'+escHtml(tCol)+'</span>';
        if(tSlaMins)html+='<span class="inc-task-sla" style="color:'+tSlaColor+';" data-task-sla="'+t.id+'" data-deadline="'+tDeadline+'">'+tSlaText+'</span>';
        html+='<span class="inc-task-pct" style="color:'+tPctColor+';">'+tPct+'%</span>';
        html+='</div>';
      });
    }
    html+='</div></div>';
    return html;
  }).join('');
}

function toggleIncCard(tid){
  var card=document.getElementById('inc-card-'+tid);
  if(card)card.classList.toggle('open');
}

function startIncTimers(){
  if(_incTimerInterval)clearInterval(_incTimerInterval);
  _incTimerInterval=setInterval(function(){
    // Update incidencia SLA badges
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-inc-sla]').forEach(function(el){
      var tid=el.dataset.incSla;
      // Find the incidencia data — recalculate from DOM is not ideal, but _incTasks has the mapping
      // Instead just update task-level SLAs which are more critical
    });
    // Update task-level SLA countdowns
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-task-sla]').forEach(function(el){
      var deadline=parseInt(el.dataset.deadline)||0;
      if(!deadline)return;
      var remaining=deadline-Date.now();
      el.textContent=_fmtCountdown(remaining);
      el.style.color=remaining<=0?'#f85149':remaining<(deadline-parseInt(el.dataset.created||0))*0.3?'#f0883e':'#3fb950';
    });
  },1000);
}

async function finalizeIncident(tid){
  if(!confirm('\u00bfFinalizar incidencia '+tid+'?\nTodas las tareas se mover\u00e1n a Completado.'))return;
  var tasks=_incTasks[tid]||[];
  try{
    for(var i=0;i<tasks.length;i++){
      await af('/kanban/tareas/'+tasks[i].id+'/mover?columna=Completado',{method:'PUT'});
    }
    toast('Incidencia '+tid+' finalizada');
    ALL_RUN_TASKS=[];loadInc();loadKanbanRun();
  }catch(e){toast('Error: '+e.message,'err');}
}

// ═══ TEAM (full — cloned from index.html) ═══
var AV_COLORS=['#2d7ef7','#3fb950','#f0883e','#ef4444','#a5b4fc','#d29922','#f778ba','#39c5cf'];
var SILO_COLORS={Frontend:'#2d7ef7',Soporte:'#f0883e',Redes:'#39c5cf',Windows:'#3fb950',Backend:'#a5b4fc',QA:'#d29922',DevOps:'#f778ba',Seguridad:'#ef4444',BBDD:'#f0883e'};
var SLC={Frontend:'#3b82f6',Backend:'#8b5cf6',Redes:'#6366f1',Windows:'#0ea5e9',BBDD:'#eab308',Seguridad:'#ef4444',DevOps:'#84cc16',QA:'#06b6d4',Soporte:'#fb923c'};
var ALL_TEAM=[],_teamTaskMap={},_teamDashVisible=false,currentTeamFilter='',currentTeamSilo='Todos';
var _tStep=1,_tNivel='',_tSilo='',_tSkills=[],_tEditMode=false,_tEditId='';
var SKILL_CATS=[
  {cat:'Git',icon:'\u2442',color:'#f97316',skills:['Git: Clonar repositorios','Git: Crear ramas','Git: Commits descriptivos','Git: Resolver conflictos','Git: Pull Requests','Git: Rebase b\u00e1sico']},
  {cat:'Frontend \u2014 HTML / CSS / JS',icon:'\ud83c\udfa8',color:'#3b82f6',skills:['HTML: Sem\u00e1ntica b\u00e1sica','CSS: Flexbox','CSS: Grid Layout','CSS: Media Queries','JS: Manipulaci\u00f3n DOM','JS: Fetch / Axios','JS: Array Methods','JS: Async / Await','JS: Debugging']},
  {cat:'API / Backend',icon:'\u2699',color:'#8b5cf6',skills:['API: C\u00f3digos HTTP','API: Testing con Postman','API: Auth JWT','Backend: Crear Endpoint REST','Backend: Validar Inputs','Backend: Conexi\u00f3n a DB','Backend: Logging errores']},
  {cat:'Testing / QA',icon:'\ud83e\uddea',color:'#06b6d4',skills:['Testing: Escribir Test Unitario','Testing: Ejecutar Test Suite']},
  {cat:'Linux / Sistema',icon:'\ud83d\udc27',color:'#10b981',skills:['Linux: Navegaci\u00f3n','Linux: Ver contenido','Linux: B\u00fasqueda (grep)','Linux: Permisos','Linux: Procesos','Linux: Tareas (Crontab)']},
  {cat:'Active Directory',icon:'\ud83c\udfe2',color:'#0ea5e9',skills:['AD: Crear Usuario','AD: Reset Password','AD: Deshabilitar Usuario','AD: Grupos Seguridad','AD: Sincronizaci\u00f3n']},
  {cat:'Redes / VPN',icon:'\ud83c\udf10',color:'#6366f1',skills:['Redes: IP/Gateway','Redes: Ping','Redes: Tracert','Redes: Netstat','Redes: Flush DNS','Redes: DNS Registros','Redes: DHCP Reserva','Redes: Port Security','Redes: BGP','VPN: Configurar Cliente']},
  {cat:'SQL / BBDD',icon:'\ud83d\uddc4',color:'#eab308',skills:['SQL: Select Simple','SQL: Where','SQL: Inner Join','SQL: Left Join','SQL: Insert Into','SQL: Update','SQL: Delete','SQL: Backup DB','SQL: Restore DB','SQL: Create Table','SQL: Alter Table']},
  {cat:'Cloud / Docker',icon:'\u2601',color:'#14b8a6',skills:['Cloud: VM Start/Stop','Cloud: Crear Bucket','Cloud: Security Groups','Docker: Run Container','Docker: Logs','Docker: Exec']},
  {cat:'Windows OS',icon:'\ud83e\ude9f',color:'#64748b',skills:['Windows: Unir a Dominio','Windows: Visor Eventos']},
  {cat:'Seguridad',icon:'\ud83d\udd12',color:'#ef4444',skills:['Seguridad: Configurar MFA','Seguridad: Phishing ID','Seguridad: Revisar Logs Acceso','Seguridad: Agente Antivirus','Seguridad: Bloqueo IP Firewall','Seguridad: Permisos Carpetas']},
  {cat:'DevOps / K8s / CI-CD',icon:'\ud83d\ude80',color:'#84cc16',skills:['CI/CD: Pipeline b\u00e1sico','CI/CD: Rollback','Kubernetes: Ver Pods','Kubernetes: Describir Recurso','Monitoring: Dashboard Grafana','Monitoring: Configurar Alertas']},
  {cat:'Hardware',icon:'\ud83d\udd27',color:'#a8a29e',skills:['Hardware: Cambiar Disco','Hardware: Impresora en Red','Hardware: Limpieza Interna','Hardware: Inventario Activos','Hardware: Diagn\u00f3stico Fuente']},
  {cat:'Storage / SAP',icon:'\ud83d\udcbe',color:'#d97706',skills:['Storage: Mapa de Rutas','Storage: Asignaci\u00f3n LUN','Storage: Snapshot','SAP: Transacci\u00f3n b\u00e1sica']},
  {cat:'Soporte / Tickets',icon:'\ud83c\udfab',color:'#fb923c',skills:['Ticket: Registro Incidencia','Ticket: Priorizaci\u00f3n','Ticket: Escalado Nivel','Ticket: Resoluci\u00f3n y Cierre','Ticket: Comunicaci\u00f3n Usuario','Doc: Escribir Documentaci\u00f3n']},
];

function escHtml(t){if(!t)return'';return String(t).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');}
function hashCode(str){var h=0;for(var i=0;i<str.length;i++){h=(Math.imul(31,h)+str.charCodeAt(i))|0;}return h;}
function fmOpen(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.add('open');document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}
function fmClose(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow='';}
document.getElementById('fm-team').addEventListener('click',function(e){if(e.target.id==='fm-team')fmClose('fm-team');});

function toggleTeamDashboard(){
  _teamDashVisible=!_teamDashVisible;
  document.getElementById('team-dashboard').style.display=_teamDashVisible?'block':'none';
  if(_teamDashVisible&&ALL_TEAM.length)renderTeamDashboard();
}

function _drawGauge(canvasId,pct,colorHi,colorMid,colorLo){
  var c=document.getElementById(canvasId);if(!c)return;
  var ctx=c.getContext('2d'),w=c.width,h=c.height;
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
  var cx=w/2,cy=h-2,r=Math.min(w/2,h)-4,lw=8;
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,0);ctx.strokeStyle='#30363d';ctx.lineWidth=lw;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.stroke();
  if(pct>0){
    var angle=-Math.PI+(Math.PI*Math.min(100,pct)/100);
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,angle);
    ctx.strokeStyle=pct>70?(colorHi||'#f85149'):pct>40?(colorMid||'#f0883e'):(colorLo||'#3fb950');
    ctx.lineWidth=lw;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.stroke();
  }
}

function renderTeamDashboard(){
  var t=ALL_TEAM,estados={};
  t.forEach(function(x){estados[x.estado]=(estados[x.estado]||0)+1;});
  var ocupados=estados['OCUPADO']||0,disponibles=estados['DISPONIBLE']||0;
  var guardia=estados['GUARDIA']||0,baja=estados['BAJA']||0,vacaciones=estados['VACACIONES']||0;
  var otros=guardia+baja+vacaciones;
  var pctOcup=t.length>0?Math.round(ocupados/t.length*100):0;
  var eColors={DISPONIBLE:'var(--green)',OCUPADO:'var(--orange)',GUARDIA:'var(--blue)',BAJA:'var(--red)',VACACIONES:'#8b949e'};
  var eIcons={DISPONIBLE:'\u25cf',OCUPADO:'\u25cf',GUARDIA:'\u25d0',BAJA:'\u2715',VACACIONES:'\u25cc'};
  document.getElementById('team-estado-badges').innerHTML=['DISPONIBLE','OCUPADO','GUARDIA','BAJA','VACACIONES'].map(function(k){
    var v=estados[k]||0;
    return '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:'+eColors[k]+';">'+v+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:3px;"><span style="color:'+eColors[k]+';">'+eIcons[k]+'</span> '+k+'</div></div>';
  }).join('');
  document.getElementById('td-ocupados').textContent=ocupados;
  document.getElementById('td-disponibles').textContent=disponibles;
  document.getElementById('td-otros').textContent=otros;
  document.getElementById('team-gauge-pct').textContent=pctOcup+'%';
  document.getElementById('team-gauge-pct').style.color=pctOcup>70?'#f85149':pctOcup>40?'#f0883e':'#3fb950';
  _drawGauge('team-gauge',pctOcup);
  var allActive=t.reduce(function(s,x){return s+(x.activeTasks||[]).length;},0);
  var allRun=t.reduce(function(s,x){return s+(x.activeTasks||[]).filter(function(tk){return tk.tipo==='RUN';}).length;},0);
  var allBuild=allActive-allRun;
  var pctRun=allActive>0?Math.round(allRun/allActive*100):0;
  var pctBuild=allActive>0?Math.round(allBuild/allActive*100):0;
  document.getElementById('td-pct-run').textContent=pctRun+'%';
  document.getElementById('td-pct-build').textContent=pctBuild+'%';
  var c2=document.getElementById('team-runbuild-gauge');
  if(c2){var ctx=c2.getContext('2d'),w=c2.width,h2=c2.height;ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h2);var cx=w/2,cy=h2-2,r=Math.min(w/2,h2)-4,lw=8;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,0);ctx.strokeStyle='#30363d';ctx.lineWidth=lw;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.stroke();if(allActive>0){var runAngle=-Math.PI+(Math.PI*pctRun/100);ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,runAngle);ctx.strokeStyle='#2d7ef7';ctx.lineWidth=lw;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,runAngle,0);ctx.strokeStyle='#3fb950';ctx.lineWidth=lw;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.stroke();}}
  var silos={};t.forEach(function(x){if(!silos[x.silo])silos[x.silo]={total:0,ocupados:0,tareas:0};silos[x.silo].total++;if(x.estado==='OCUPADO')silos[x.silo].ocupados++;silos[x.silo].tareas+=x.totalActiveTasks||0;});
  var SC=SILO_COLORS||{};
  document.getElementById('team-silo-bars').innerHTML=Object.entries(silos).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].total-a[1].total;}).map(function(e){var silo=e[0],d=e[1];var pct=d.total>0?Math.round(d.ocupados/d.total*100):0;var col=SC[silo]||'#8b949e';return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:2px;"><span style="width:50px;font-size:9px;color:'+col+';text-align:right;font-weight:600;">'+silo+'</span><div style="flex:1;height:7px;background:var(--bg-primary);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+pct+'%;height:100%;background:'+col+';border-radius:4px;transition:width .3s;"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:8px;width:35px;color:'+(pct>70?'var(--red)':pct>40?'var(--orange)':'var(--green)')+';">'+d.ocupados+'/'+d.total+'</span><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);">'+d.tareas+'t</span></div>';}).join('');
  var n1=t.filter(function(x){return x.nivel==='N1';}).length,n2=t.filter(function(x){return x.nivel==='N2';}).length;
  var n3=t.filter(function(x){return x.nivel==='N3';}).length,n4=t.filter(function(x){return x.nivel==='N4';}).length;
  document.getElementById('cnt-n1').textContent=n1;document.getElementById('cnt-n2').textContent=n2;
  document.getElementById('cnt-n3').textContent=n3;document.getElementById('cnt-n4').textContent=n4;
}

function toggleDisponibles(){
  var panel=document.getElementById('team-disponibles-panel');
  panel.style.display=panel.style.display==='none'?'block':'none';
  if(panel.style.display!=='none')renderDisponibles();
}

function renderDisponibles(){
  var silos={};ALL_TEAM.forEach(function(t){if(!silos[t.silo])silos[t.silo]=[];if(t.estado==='DISPONIBLE')silos[t.silo].push(t);});
  var SC=SILO_COLORS||{};
  document.getElementById('team-disponibles-grid').innerHTML=Object.entries(silos).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].length-a[1].length;}).map(function(e){var silo=e[0],arr=e[1];var col=SC[silo]||'#8b949e';return '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;border-left:3px solid '+col+';"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:'+col+';margin-bottom:4px;">'+silo+' <span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--green);">('+arr.length+')</span></div>'+(arr.length===0?'<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Sin disponibles</div>':arr.slice(0,5).map(function(t){return '<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);padding:1px 0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;"><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:var(--text3);margin-right:3px;">'+t.fte+'</span>'+t.name.split(' ').slice(0,2).join(' ')+' <span class="nivel-badge '+t.nivel.toLowerCase()+'" style="font-size:8px;padding:0 4px;margin-left:2px;">'+t.nivel+'</span></div>';}).join('')+(arr.length>5?'<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">+'+((arr.length-5))+' m\u00e1s</div>':''))+'</div>';}).join('');
}

// Column resize + drag reorder
(function initTeamColInteraction(){
  var resizing=null,startX=0,startW=0,dragTh=null;
  document.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){var th=e.target.closest('th.tm-th-resizable');if(!th)return;var rect=th.getBoundingClientRect();if(e.clientX>rect.right-6){resizing=th;startX=e.clientX;startW=th.offsetWidth;e.preventDefault();}});
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){if(!resizing)return;var w=Math.max(30,startW+e.clientX-startX);resizing.style.width=w+'px';});
  document.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){resizing=null;});
  var row=document.getElementById('team-thead-row');
  if(row){
    row.addEventListener('dragstart',function(e){dragTh=e.target.closest('th');if(dragTh){e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move';dragTh.style.opacity='.4';}});
    row.addEventListener('dragover',function(e){e.preventDefault();e.dataTransfer.dropEffect='move';});
    row.addEventListener('drop',function(e){e.preventDefault();var target=e.target.closest('th');if(dragTh&&target&&dragTh!==target){var ths=[].slice.call(row.children);var fromIdx=ths.indexOf(dragTh);var toIdx=ths.indexOf(target);if(fromIdx<toIdx)target.after(dragTh);else target.before(dragTh);document.querySelectorAll('#team-tbody tr').forEach(function(tr){var cells=[].slice.call(tr.children);if(cells[fromIdx]&&cells[toIdx]){if(fromIdx<toIdx)cells[toIdx].after(cells[fromIdx]);else cells[toIdx].before(cells[fromIdx]);}});}});
    row.addEventListener('dragend',function(){if(dragTh)dragTh.style.opacity='';dragTh=null;});
  }
})();

async function loadTeam(){
  var tbody=document.getElementById('team-tbody');
  tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--text2);"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Cargando equipo...</td></tr>';
  try{
    var results=await Promise.all([af('/team/tecnicos'),af('/kanban/tareas')]);
    var data=Array.isArray(results[0])?results[0]:(results[0].tecnicos||[]);
    var tasks=Array.isArray(results[1])?results[1]:(results[1].tareas||[]);
    _teamTaskMap={};
    tasks.forEach(function(tk){if(!tk.id_tecnico)return;if(!_teamTaskMap[tk.id_tecnico])_teamTaskMap[tk.id_tecnico]=[];_teamTaskMap[tk.id_tecnico].push(tk);});
    var parseJ=function(v){if(Array.isArray(v))return v;try{return JSON.parse(v)||[];}catch(e){return[];}};
    ALL_TEAM=data.map(function(t){
      var fte=t.id_recurso||t.id_tecnico;
      var myTasks=_teamTaskMap[fte]||[];
      var activeTasks=myTasks.filter(function(tk){return tk.columna!=='Completado';});
      var runTasks=activeTasks.filter(function(tk){return tk.tipo==='RUN';});
      var totalActive=activeTasks.length;
      var pctRun=totalActive>0?Math.round(runTasks.length/totalActive*100):0;
      var pctBuild=totalActive>0?100-pctRun:0;
      return{name:t.nombre,fte:fte,silo:t.silo_especialidad||'Frontend',nivel:t.nivel||'N2',skills:t.total_skills||0,tags:parseJ(t.skills_json||t.tags),estado:t.estado_run||'DISPONIBLE',skillPrincipal:t.skill_principal||'',color:AV_COLORS[Math.abs(hashCode(t.nombre))%AV_COLORS.length],email:t.email||'',telefono:t.telefono||'',activeTasks:activeTasks,totalActiveTasks:totalActive,pctRun:pctRun,pctBuild:pctBuild};
    });
    document.getElementById('team-count').textContent=ALL_TEAM.length+' t\u00e9cnicos';
    renderTeam(ALL_TEAM);
    if(_teamDashVisible)renderTeamDashboard();
    var ocu=ALL_TEAM.filter(function(t){return t.estado==='OCUPADO';}).length;
    var dis=ALL_TEAM.filter(function(t){return t.estado==='DISPONIBLE';}).length;
    document.getElementById('team-footer-info').textContent=ocu+' ocupados \u00b7 '+dis+' disponibles \u00b7 '+ALL_TEAM.reduce(function(s,t){return s+t.totalActiveTasks;},0)+' tareas activas';
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('Team fetch failed:',e.message);
    tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:var(--text2);">Sin conexi\u00f3n al servidor</td></tr>';
    ALL_TEAM=[];renderTeam([]);
  }
}

function renderTeam(data){
  var tbody=document.getElementById('team-tbody');
  if(!data.length){tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:var(--text2);">Sin resultados</td></tr>';return;}
  tbody.innerHTML=data.map(function(t){
    var initials=t.name.split(' ').slice(0,2).map(function(n){return n[0];}).join('');
    var barW=Math.min(100,Math.round(t.skills));
    var barColor=barW>60?'var(--green)':barW>40?'var(--yellow)':'var(--text3)';
    var siloColor=SILO_COLORS[t.silo]||'#8b949e';
    var nClass=(t.nivel||'n2').toLowerCase();
    var eColors={DISPONIBLE:'var(--green)',OCUPADO:'var(--orange)',GUARDIA:'var(--blue)',BAJA:'var(--red)',VACACIONES:'#8b949e'};
    var eIcons={DISPONIBLE:'\u25cf',OCUPADO:'\u25cf',GUARDIA:'\u25d0',BAJA:'\u2715',VACACIONES:'\u25cc'};
    var estadoColor=eColors[t.estado]||'var(--text2)';
    var tc=t.totalActiveTasks||0;
    var tcColor=tc===0?'var(--text3)':tc>3?'var(--red)':tc>1?'var(--orange)':'var(--green)';
    var links=[];(t.activeTasks||[]).forEach(function(tk){if(tk.id_proyecto&&!links.find(function(l){return l.id===tk.id_proyecto;}))links.push({id:tk.id_proyecto,t:'B'});if(tk.id_incidencia&&!links.find(function(l){return l.id===tk.id_incidencia;}))links.push({id:tk.id_incidencia,t:'R'});});
    var linksHtml=links.length?links.slice(0,2).map(function(l){return '<span style="font-size:8px;padding:0 3px;border-radius:2px;background:'+(l.t==='R'?'var(--blue-bg)':'var(--green-bg)')+';color:'+(l.t==='R'?'var(--blue)':'var(--green)')+';">'+l.id+'</span>';}).join(' ')+(links.length>2?'<span style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);">+'+(links.length-2)+'</span>':''):'<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">\u2014</span>';
    var cargaHtml;
    if(tc>0){var r=t.pctRun,b=t.pctBuild;cargaHtml='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><div style="width:28px;height:14px;border-radius:7px;background:var(--bg-primary);display:flex;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);"><div style="width:'+r+'%;background:var(--blue);"></div><div style="width:'+b+'%;background:var(--green);"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);">'+r+'/'+b+'</span></div>';}else{cargaHtml='<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">\u2014</span>';}
    return '<tr style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="openTeamEdit(\''+escHtml(t.fte)+'\')" title="Click para editar"><td><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;"><div class="avatar" style="background:'+t.color+';width:24px;height:24px;font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(initials)+'</div><span style="font-weight:500;font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">'+escHtml(t.name)+'</span></div></td><td><span class="fte-code" style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(t.fte)+'</span></td><td><span class="silo-badge" style="background:'+siloColor+'22;color:'+siloColor+';font-size:10px;padding:1px 5px;">'+escHtml(t.silo)+'</span></td><td><span class="nivel-badge '+nClass+'" style="font-size:10px;padding:1px 5px;">'+escHtml(t.nivel)+'</span></td><td><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;"><div class="skills-bar-wrap" style="width:40px;"><div class="skills-bar" style="width:'+barW+'%;background:'+barColor+';"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">'+barW+'</span></div></td><td style="text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:'+tcColor+';">'+(tc||'\u2014')+'</span></td><td>'+linksHtml+'</td><td>'+cargaHtml+'</td><td><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:'+estadoColor+';">'+(eIcons[t.estado]||'\u25cf')+' '+escHtml(t.estado)+'</span></td><td style="white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;"><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">'+escHtml(t.email||'')+'</span></td><td><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--font-mono);">'+escHtml(t.telefono||'')+'</span></td></tr>';
  }).join('');
}

function filterTeam(val){currentTeamFilter=val;applyTeamFilters();}
function filterSilo(silo,el){document.querySelectorAll('.filter-chip').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('active');});el.classList.add('active');currentTeamSilo=silo;applyTeamFilters();}
function applyTeamFilters(){
  var data=ALL_TEAM;
  if(currentTeamSilo!=='Todos')data=data.filter(function(t){return t.silo===currentTeamSilo;});
  if(currentTeamFilter)data=data.filter(function(t){return t.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(currentTeamFilter.toLowerCase())>=0||t.fte.toLowerCase().indexOf(currentTeamFilter.toLowerCase())>=0;});
  document.getElementById('team-count').textContent=data.length+' de '+ALL_TEAM.length+' t\u00e9cnicos';
  renderTeam(data);
}

function showTecnicoDetailModal(tecnico){
  var overlay=document.createElement('div');overlay.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick=function(e){if(e.target===overlay)overlay.remove();};
  var modal=document.createElement('div');modal.style.cssText='background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;max-width:550px;width:95%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;';
  var ini=(tecnico.nombre||'XX').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]||'';}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
  var sc2={'Linux':'#f97316','Windows':'#3b82f6','BBDD':'#eab308','Redes':'#22c55e','Seguridad':'#ef4444','Backend':'#a855f7','DevOps':'#06b6d4','Frontend':'#ec4899','QA':'#ec4899','Soporte':'#8b8f98'};
  var siloColor=sc2[tecnico.silo_especialidad||tecnico.silo||'']||'#8b8f98';
  var html='<div style="padding:20px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center;"><div style="width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:'+siloColor+'30;border:2px solid '+siloColor+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:'+siloColor+';">'+ini+'</div><div style="flex:1;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(tecnico.nombre||'')+'</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(tecnico.id_recurso||'')+' \u00b7 '+(tecnico.nivel||'N2')+' \u00b7 '+(tecnico.silo_especialidad||tecnico.silo||'')+'</div></div><div class="modal-close" style="cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:20px;padding:4px 8px;">\u2715</div></div>';
  html+='<div style="padding:16px 24px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;">';
  var cargaColor=(tecnico.carga_actual||0)>30?'#ef4444':(tecnico.carga_actual||0)>15?'#eab308':'#22c55e';
  html+='<div style="text-align:center;background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:'+cargaColor+';">'+(tecnico.carga_actual||0)+'h</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Carga actual</div></div>';
  html+='<div style="text-align:center;background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#22c55e;">'+(tecnico.scoring||0)+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Scoring</div></div>';
  html+='<div style="text-align:center;background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#3b82f6;">'+(tecnico.horas_asignadas||0)+'h</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Asignadas</div></div></div>';
  var estado=tecnico.estado_run||'DISPONIBLE';var estColor=estado==='DISPONIBLE'?'#22c55e':estado==='OCUPADO'?'#eab308':'#ef4444';
  html+='<div style="padding:0 24px 12px;"><div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;">Estado: <span style="color:'+estColor+';font-weight:600;">'+estado+'</span></div>';
  if(tecnico.email)html+='<div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:4px;">\ud83d\udce7 '+tecnico.email+'</div>';
  html+='</div>';
  var skills=tecnico.skills_json||[];if(typeof skills==='string')try{skills=JSON.parse(skills);}catch(e){skills=[];}
  if(skills.length>0){html+='<div style="padding:0 24px 16px;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Skills t\u00e9cnicas</div><div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';skills.forEach(function(s){var name=typeof s==='string'?s:(s.nombre_skill||s.skill||s.nombre||'');if(name)html+='<span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:'+siloColor+'15;color:'+siloColor+';border:1px solid '+siloColor+'30;">'+name+'</span>';});html+='</div></div>';}
  html+='<div style="padding:0 24px 20px;text-align:right;"><button class="modal-close" style="padding:10px 24px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:#3b82f6;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">Cerrar</button></div>';
  modal.innerHTML=html;modal.querySelectorAll('.modal-close').forEach(function(el){el.onclick=function(){overlay.remove();};});
  overlay.appendChild(modal);document.body.appendChild(overlay);
}

function openTeamForm(){
  _tEditMode=false;_tEditId='';_tStep=1;_tNivel='';_tSilo='';_tSkills=[];
  var nextNum=Math.max.apply(null,ALL_TEAM.map(function(t){return parseInt((t.fte||'FTE-0').replace('FTE-',''))||0;}).concat([150]))+1;
  document.getElementById('t-id').value='FTE-'+nextNum;document.getElementById('t-id').readOnly=false;document.getElementById('t-id').style.opacity='';
  document.getElementById('t-nombre').value='';document.getElementById('t-estado').value='DISPONIBLE';
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('sel');c.style.cssText='';});
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('sel');c.style.cssText='';});
  document.getElementById('tm-icon').textContent='\ud83e\uddd1\u200d\ud83d\udcbb';document.getElementById('tm-title').textContent='Nuevo T\u00e9cnico';
  document.getElementById('tm-sub').textContent='Registrar miembro en el equipo PMO';
  document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn').innerHTML='\u2705 A\u00f1adir al Equipo';
  tsSetStep(1);fmOpen('fm-team');
}

function openTeamEdit(fte){
  var t=ALL_TEAM.find(function(x){return x.fte===fte;});
  if(!t){toast('T\u00e9cnico no encontrado','err');return;}
  _tEditMode=true;_tEditId=fte;_tStep=1;_tNivel=t.nivel||'';_tSilo=t.silo||'';_tSkills=[].concat(t.tags||[]);
  document.getElementById('tm-icon').textContent='\u270f\ufe0f';document.getElementById('tm-title').textContent='Editar T\u00e9cnico';
  document.getElementById('tm-sub').textContent=t.name+' \u2014 '+fte;
  document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn').innerHTML='\ud83d\udcbe Guardar Cambios';
  var idEl=document.getElementById('t-id');idEl.value=fte;idEl.readOnly=true;idEl.style.opacity='.55';
  document.getElementById('t-nombre').value=t.name;document.getElementById('t-estado').value=t.estado||'DISPONIBLE';
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('sel');c.style.cssText='';});
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('sel');c.style.cssText='';});
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(function(el){var badge=el.querySelector('.nc-badge');if(badge&&badge.textContent.trim()===_tNivel)selNivel(_tNivel,el);});
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(function(el){var name=el.querySelector('.sc-name');if(name&&name.textContent.trim()===_tSilo)selSilo(_tSilo,el);});
  tsSetStep(1);fmOpen('fm-team');
}

function tsSetStep(s){
  _tStep=s;
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .fm-step').forEach(function(el){el.classList.remove('active');});
  document.getElementById('ts-'+s).classList.add('active');
  [1,2,3].forEach(function(i){var d=document.getElementById('ts-dot-'+i);d.classList.remove('active','done');if(i<s)d.classList.add('done');else if(i===s)d.classList.add('active');});
  document.getElementById('ts-back-btn').style.display=s>1?'':'none';
  document.getElementById('ts-next-btn').style.display=s<3?'flex':'none';
  document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn').style.display=s===3?'flex':'none';
  document.getElementById('ts-skill-count').style.display=s===2?'':'none';
  if(s===2){renderSkillMatrix('ts-2-content',_tSkills,'ts');updateTsCount();}
  if(s===3){renderTeamPreview();}
}

function tsNext(){
  if(_tStep===1){
    if(!document.getElementById('t-id').value.trim()){toast('Escribe el ID del t\u00e9cnico','err');return;}
    if(!document.getElementById('t-nombre').value.trim()){toast('Escribe el nombre completo','err');return;}
    if(!_tNivel){toast('Selecciona el nivel profesional','err');return;}
    if(!_tSilo){toast('Selecciona el silo de especialidad','err');return;}
  }
  if(_tStep<3)tsSetStep(_tStep+1);
}
function tsBack(){if(_tStep>1)tsSetStep(_tStep-1);}

function selNivel(n,el){
  _tNivel=n;var colors={N1:'#f85149',N2:'#2d7ef7',N3:'#a5b4fc',N4:'#f59e0b'};var c=colors[n];
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(function(e){e.classList.remove('sel');e.style.borderColor='';e.style.background='';});
  el.classList.add('sel');el.style.borderColor=c;el.style.background=c+'20';
}
function selSilo(s,el){
  _tSilo=s;var c=SLC[s]||'#2d7ef7';
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(function(e){e.classList.remove('sel');e.style.borderColor='';e.style.background='';});
  el.classList.add('sel');el.style.borderColor=c;el.style.background=c+'20';
}
function updateTsCount(){document.getElementById('ts-skill-count').textContent=_tSkills.length+' skills seleccionadas';}

function renderSkillMatrix(containerId,selected,prefix){
  document.getElementById(containerId).innerHTML=SKILL_CATS.map(function(cat){
    var selCount=cat.skills.filter(function(s){return selected.indexOf(s)>=0;}).length;
    return '<div class="skill-cat-block"><div class="skill-cat-head" style="color:'+cat.color+'"><span style="font-size:14px">'+cat.icon+'</span><span>'+cat.cat+'</span><div class="skill-cat-line" style="background:'+cat.color+'"></div><span class="skill-cat-cnt" style="color:'+cat.color+'">'+selCount+'/'+cat.skills.length+'</span></div><div class="skill-chips-grid">'+cat.skills.map(function(sk){
      var isSel=selected.indexOf(sk)>=0;var label=sk.split(': ')[1]||sk;
      return '<div class="sk-chip'+(isSel?' sel':'')+'" style="'+(isSel?'border-color:'+cat.color+';background:'+cat.color+';color:#fff;':'')+'" onclick="toggleSkill(\''+sk.replace(/'/g,"\\'")+'\',\''+cat.color+'\',\''+prefix+'\',this)">'+escHtml(label)+'</div>';
    }).join('')+'</div></div>';
  }).join('');
}

function toggleSkill(sk,color,prefix,el){
  var arr=_tSkills;var idx=arr.indexOf(sk);
  if(idx>=0){arr.splice(idx,1);el.classList.remove('sel');el.style.borderColor='';el.style.background='';el.style.color='';}
  else{arr.push(sk);el.classList.add('sel');el.style.borderColor=color;el.style.background=color;el.style.color='#fff';}
  var catEl=el.closest('.skill-cat-block');
  if(catEl){var catCnt=catEl.querySelector('.skill-cat-cnt');if(catCnt){var chips=catEl.querySelectorAll('.sk-chip.sel');catCnt.textContent=chips.length+'/'+catEl.querySelectorAll('.sk-chip').length;}}
  document.getElementById('ts-skill-count').textContent=_tSkills.length+' skills seleccionadas';
}

function getSkillColor(sk){for(var i=0;i<SKILL_CATS.length;i++){if(SKILL_CATS[i].skills.indexOf(sk)>=0)return SKILL_CATS[i].color;}return'#8b949e';}

function renderTeamPreview(){
  var nombre=document.getElementById('t-nombre').value.trim();
  var id=document.getElementById('t-id').value.trim();
  var estado=document.getElementById('t-estado').value;
  var col=SLC[_tSilo]||'#8b949e';
  var nColors={N1:'#f85149',N2:'#2d7ef7',N3:'#a5b4fc',N4:'#f59e0b'};
  var nc=nColors[_tNivel]||'#8b949e';
  var initials=(nombre.split(' ').slice(0,2).map(function(n){return n[0]||'';}).join('')).toUpperCase()||'?';
  var skHtml=_tSkills.length
    ?_tSkills.slice(0,14).map(function(s){return '<span class="skill-tag" style="border-color:'+getSkillColor(s)+'44;color:'+getSkillColor(s)+'">'+escHtml(s.split(': ')[1]||s)+'</span>';}).join('')+(_tSkills.length>14?'<span class="skill-more">+'+(_tSkills.length-14)+' m\u00e1s</span>':'')
    :'<span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;font-style:italic;">Sin skills \u2014 puedes a\u00f1adirlas despu\u00e9s</span>';
  document.getElementById('ts-3-preview').innerHTML='<div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px;">Revisa los datos antes de confirmar.</div><div class="preview-card" style="border-color:'+col+'44;"><div style="position:absolute;top:-30px;right:-30px;width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:50%;background:'+col+';opacity:.05;pointer-events:none;"></div><div class="pc-top"><div class="pc-avatar" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,'+col+','+col+'99);">'+escHtml(initials)+'</div><div style="flex:1"><div class="pc-name">'+escHtml(nombre||'Sin nombre')+'</div><div class="pc-id">'+escHtml(id)+'</div></div><div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:5px;"><span class="nivel-badge '+_tNivel.toLowerCase()+'">'+_tNivel+'</span><span class="silo-badge" style="background:'+col+'22;color:'+col+';">'+_tSilo+'</span></div></div><div class="pc-meta"><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);">\u25cf '+estado+'</span><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);font-family:var(--font-mono);">'+_tSkills.length+' skills</span></div><div class="pc-skills-title">Skills asignadas</div><div class="pc-skills-wrap">'+skHtml+'</div></div>';
  var tasksPanel=document.getElementById('ts-tasks-panel');
  if(_tEditMode&&_tEditId){
    var myTasks=_teamTaskMap[_tEditId]||[];
    var active=myTasks.filter(function(tk){return tk.columna!=='Completado';});
    var completed=myTasks.filter(function(tk){return tk.columna==='Completado';});
    var runActive=active.filter(function(tk){return tk.tipo==='RUN';}).length;
    var buildActive=active.filter(function(tk){return tk.tipo==='BUILD';}).length;
    var totalActive=active.length;
    tasksPanel.style.display='block';
    document.getElementById('ts-tasks-count').textContent='('+active.length+' activas, '+completed.length+' completadas)';
    document.getElementById('ts-pct-run').textContent=totalActive>0?Math.round(runActive/totalActive*100)+'%':'0%';
    document.getElementById('ts-pct-build').textContent=totalActive>0?Math.round(buildActive/totalActive*100)+'%':'0%';
    var list=document.getElementById('ts-tasks-list');
    if(myTasks.length===0){list.innerHTML='<div style="text-align:center;padding:10px;color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;">Sin tareas asignadas</div>';}
    else{list.innerHTML=myTasks.map(function(tk){var isRun=tk.tipo==='RUN';var isDone=tk.columna==='Completado';var link=tk.id_proyecto||tk.id_incidencia||'';var colIcon={'Backlog':'\ud83d\udccb','An\u00e1lisis':'\ud83d\udd0d','En Progreso':'\u26a1','Code Review':'\ud83d\udc41','Testing':'\ud83e\uddea','Despliegue':'\ud83d\ude80','Bloqueado':'\ud83d\udeab','Completado':'\u2705'};return '<div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;'+(isDone?'opacity:.5;':'')+'border-left:3px solid '+(isRun?'var(--blue)':'var(--green)')+';"><span style="font-size:11px;">'+(colIcon[tk.columna]||'\ud83d\udccb')+'</span><div style="flex:1;min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">'+escHtml(tk.titulo)+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);display:flex;gap:6px;"><span style="color:'+(isRun?'var(--blue)':'var(--green)')+';">'+tk.tipo+'</span><span>'+tk.columna+'</span>'+(link?'<span style="color:var(--purple);">'+link+'</span>':'')+(tk.horas_estimadas?'<span>\u23f1 '+tk.horas_estimadas+'h</span>':'')+'</div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">'+tk.id+'</span></div>';}).join('');}
  }else{tasksPanel.style.display='none';}
}

async function tsSubmit(){
  var btn=document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn');var originalHtml=btn.innerHTML;
  btn.disabled=true;btn.innerHTML='Guardando...';
  var nombre=document.getElementById('t-nombre').value.trim();
  var payload={id_recurso:document.getElementById('t-id').value.trim(),nombre:nombre,nivel:_tNivel,silo_especialidad:_tSilo,skills_json:_tSkills,skill_principal:_tSkills[0]||null,estado_run:document.getElementById('t-estado').value};
  try{
    var url=_tEditMode?'/team/tecnicos/'+encodeURIComponent(_tEditId):'/team/tecnicos';
    var method=_tEditMode?'PUT':'POST';
    await af(url,{method:method,body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    toast(_tEditMode?nombre+' actualizado':nombre+' a\u00f1adido al equipo');
    fmClose('fm-team');ALL_TEAM=[];loadTeam();
  }catch(e){toast('Error: '+e.message,'err');btn.disabled=false;btn.innerHTML=originalHtml;}
}

// ═══ KANBAN OPERATIVO RUN (full — cloned from index.html) ═══
var RUN_COLS=['Backlog','An\u00e1lisis','En Progreso','Testing','Completado'];
var RUN_COL_META={'Backlog':{icon:'\ud83d\udccb',color:'#8b949e',wip:0},'An\u00e1lisis':{icon:'\ud83d\udd0d',color:'#2d7ef7',wip:5},'En Progreso':{icon:'\u26a1',color:'#f0883e',wip:6},'Testing':{icon:'\ud83e\uddea',color:'#a5b4fc',wip:5},'Completado':{icon:'\u2705',color:'#3fb950',wip:0}};
var PRIO_COLORS={Cr\u00edtica:'#f85149',Alta:'#ef9f27',Media:'#8b949e',Baja:'#d1d5db'};
var PRIO_BG={Cr\u00edtica:'rgba(248,81,73,.15)',Alta:'rgba(239,159,39,.15)',Media:'rgba(139,149,158,.15)',Baja:'rgba(209,213,219,.15)'};
var ALL_RUN_TASKS=[],_kbEditMode=false,_kbFilter='',_kbPrioFilter='';
var _cfdChart=null,_ctrlChart=null;

function mapCol(c){var cl=(c||'Backlog').toLowerCase();if(cl.indexOf('completad')>=0||cl==='done')return'Completado';if(cl.indexOf('testing')>=0||cl.indexOf('despliegue')>=0||cl.indexOf('review')>=0)return'Testing';if(cl.indexOf('progreso')>=0)return'En Progreso';if(cl.indexOf('an\u00e1lisis')>=0||cl.indexOf('analisis')>=0)return'An\u00e1lisis';return'Backlog';}

// LEGACY P95-F7 — loadKanbanRun convertida en stub no-op tras eliminar tab Kanban.
// Eliminar tras 2 semanas (2026-04-21). Reemplazado por /gov-kanban-global.html
async function loadKanbanRun(){
  ALL_RUN_TASKS=[];
  return;
  // legacy body (panel HTML comentado, no hay #kanban-body):
  var body=document.getElementById('kanban-body');
  if(!body)return;
  body.innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;color:var(--text2);gap:8px;"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Cargando tablero...</div>';
  try{
    var data=await af('/kanban/tareas');
    var all=Array.isArray(data)?data:(data.tareas||[]);
    ALL_RUN_TASKS=all.filter(function(t){return t.tipo==='RUN';});
    renderKanbanBoard(ALL_RUN_TASKS);populateIncidentFilter(ALL_RUN_TASKS);
    renderKpiHeader(ALL_RUN_TASKS);
    document.getElementById('kb-total').textContent=ALL_RUN_TASKS.length+' tareas RUN';
    loadRunMetrics();
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('Kanban fetch failed:',e.message);
    body.innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;color:var(--text2);">Error cargando tareas</div>';
  }
}

function renderKpiHeader(tasks){
  var abiertas=tasks.filter(function(t){return mapCol(t.columna)!=='Completado';}).length;
  var enProg=tasks.filter(function(t){return mapCol(t.columna)==='En Progreso';}).length;
  var hoy=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
  var resueltasHoy=tasks.filter(function(t){return mapCol(t.columna)==='Completado'&&t.fecha_cierre&&t.fecha_cierre.slice(0,10)===hoy;}).length;
  var slaRiesgo=tasks.filter(function(t){if(mapCol(t.columna)==='Completado'||!t.fecha_creacion)return false;try{var desc=JSON.parse(t.descripcion||'{}');var slaMins=desc.sla_tarea_minutos||0;if(!slaMins)return false;var elapsed=(Date.now()-new Date(t.fecha_creacion).getTime())/60000;return elapsed/slaMins>0.7;}catch(e){return false;}}).length;
  document.getElementById('kb-kpi-header').innerHTML='<div style="background:rgba(248,81,73,.08);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent-red);">'+abiertas+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">Abiertas</div></div>'
    +'<div style="background:rgba(210,153,34,.08);border:1px solid rgba(210,153,34,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent-orange);">'+enProg+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">En progreso</div></div>'
    +'<div style="background:rgba(248,81,73,.08);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent-red);">'+slaRiesgo+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">SLA en riesgo</div></div>'
    +'<div style="background:rgba(63,185,80,.08);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent-green);">'+resueltasHoy+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;">Resueltas hoy</div></div>';
}

function filterRunKanban(val){
  if(val!==undefined)_kbFilter=val;
  _kbPrioFilter=document.getElementById('kb-prio-filter').value;
  var data=ALL_RUN_TASKS;
  if(_kbPrioFilter)data=data.filter(function(t){return t.prioridad===_kbPrioFilter;});
  if(_kbFilter)data=data.filter(function(t){var q=_kbFilter.toLowerCase();return(t.titulo||'').toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0||(t.id||'').toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0||(t.id_tecnico||'').toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0||(t.nombre_tecnico||'').toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0;});
  renderKanbanBoard(data);
}

function renderKanbanBoard(tasks){
  var body=document.getElementById('kanban-body');
  var grouped={};RUN_COLS.forEach(function(c){grouped[c]=[];});
  tasks.forEach(function(t){var col=mapCol(t.columna);grouped[col].push(t);});
  body.innerHTML=RUN_COLS.map(function(colName){
    var meta=RUN_COL_META[colName];var items=grouped[colName];var cnt=items.length;
    var wipOver=meta.wip>0&&cnt>meta.wip;
    var wipText=meta.wip>0?'<span class="col-wip'+(wipOver?' over':'')+'">'+cnt+'/'+meta.wip+'</span>':'';
    var cards=items.map(function(t){
      var pc=PRIO_COLORS[t.prioridad]||'#8b949e';var pbg=PRIO_BG[t.prioridad]||'rgba(139,149,158,.15)';
      var prioLabel={'Cr\u00edtica':'P1','Alta':'P2','Media':'P3','Baja':'P4'}[t.prioridad]||'P3';
      var userName=t.nombre_tecnico||t.id_tecnico||'';
      var av=userName?userName.charAt(0).toUpperCase():'?';
      var avColor=userName?AV_COLORS[Math.abs(hashCode(userName))%AV_COLORS.length]:'#484f58';
      var siloHtml='';
      try{var desc=JSON.parse(t.descripcion||'{}');if(desc.silo){var sc=SILO_COLORS[desc.silo]||'#8b949e';siloHtml='<span class="card-silo" style="background:'+sc+'22;color:'+sc+';">'+desc.silo+'</span>';}}catch(e){}
      // SLA bar
      var slaHtml='';
      try{var desc2=JSON.parse(t.descripcion||'{}');var slaMins=desc2.sla_tarea_minutos||0;if(slaMins&&t.fecha_creacion){var elapsed=(Date.now()-new Date(t.fecha_creacion).getTime())/60000;var pct=Math.min(100,Math.round(elapsed/slaMins*100));var slaColor=pct<50?'var(--accent-green)':pct<75?'var(--accent-orange)':'var(--accent-red)';slaHtml='<div class="sla-wrap"><div class="sla-bar-wrap"><div class="sla-bar" style="width:'+pct+'%;background:'+slaColor+';"></div></div><span class="sla-txt" style="color:'+slaColor+';">'+pct+'%</span></div>';}}catch(e){}
      return '<div class="kanban-card" draggable="true" data-id="'+t.id+'" data-incidencia="'+(t.id_incidencia||'')+'" onclick="openRunTaskEdit(\''+t.id+'\')" ondragstart="onCardDragStart(event)" style="border-left:3px solid '+pc+';">'
        +'<div class="card-actions"><button onclick="event.stopPropagation();deleteRunTask(\''+t.id+'\',\''+escHtml((t.titulo||'').replace(/'/g,''))+'\') " style="background:'+PRIO_BG['Cr\u00edtica']+';border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.3);color:var(--accent-red);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 5px;font-size:9px;cursor:pointer;">\u2715</button></div>'
        +'<div class="card-tags"><span class="card-prio" style="background:'+pbg+';color:'+pc+';">'+prioLabel+'</span>'+siloHtml+'</div>'
        +'<div class="card-id">'+escHtml(t.id)+'</div>'
        +'<div class="card-title">'+escHtml(t.titulo)+'</div>'
        +(t.bloqueador?'<div style="background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 6px;font-size:9px;color:var(--accent-red);margin-bottom:4px;">\u26a0 '+escHtml(t.bloqueador)+'</div>':'')
        +'<div class="card-footer">'
          +(userName?'<div class="card-user"><div class="card-user-av" style="background:'+avColor+';">'+av+'</div>'+escHtml(userName.substring(0,14))+'</div>':'<div class="card-user" style="color:var(--text-muted);">Sin asignar</div>')
          +slaHtml
        +'</div>'
        +'</div>';
    }).join('');
    return '<div class="kanban-col" style="'+(wipOver?'border-color:rgba(248,81,73,.4);':'')+'">'
      +'<div class="col-header"><div class="col-title">'+meta.icon+' '+colName+'</div><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;"><span class="col-count">'+cnt+'</span>'+wipText+'</div></div>'
      +'<div class="col-bar" style="background:'+meta.color+'44;"><div style="width:'+Math.min(100,cnt*(meta.wip?100/meta.wip:10))+'%;height:100%;background:'+(wipOver?'var(--accent-red)':meta.color)+';border-radius:2px;transition:width .3s;"></div></div>'
      +'<div class="cards-area" data-col="'+colName+'" ondragover="onColDragOver(event)" ondrop="onColDrop(event)" ondragleave="onColDragLeave(event)">'+cards+'</div>'
      +'<button class="add-task-btn" onclick="openRunTaskForm(\''+colName+'\')">+ Nueva tarea</button>'
      +'</div>';
  }).join('');
  // Footer stats
  var comp=tasks.filter(function(t){return mapCol(t.columna)==='Completado';}).length;
  var blocked=tasks.filter(function(t){return t.bloqueador;}).length;
  var inProg=tasks.filter(function(t){var c=mapCol(t.columna);return c==='En Progreso'||c==='Testing'||c==='An\u00e1lisis';}).length;
  document.getElementById('kb-footer-stats').innerHTML='<span>WIP: <strong style="color:var(--accent-orange);">'+inProg+'</strong></span><span>Bloqueadas: <strong style="color:var(--accent-red);">'+blocked+'</strong></span><span>Completadas: <strong style="color:var(--accent-green);">'+comp+'</strong></span>';
}

function populateIncidentFilter(tasks){
  var sel=document.getElementById('kanban-inc-filter');if(!sel)return;
  var seen={};sel.innerHTML='<option value="">Todas incidencias</option>';
  tasks.forEach(function(t){
    var inc=t.id_incidencia;if(!inc||seen[inc])return;seen[inc]=true;
    var o=document.createElement('option');o.value=inc;o.textContent=inc;sel.appendChild(o);
  });
}

function filterKanbanByIncident(incId){
  filterRunKanban();// re-apply text+prio filters first
  if(!incId)return;
  document.querySelectorAll('.kanban-card').forEach(function(card){
    if(card.dataset.incidencia!==incId)card.style.display='none';
  });
  var visible=document.querySelectorAll('.kanban-card:not([style*="display: none"])').length;
  var el=document.getElementById('kanban-filter-count');if(el)el.textContent=visible+' tareas';
}

// Drag & drop
function onCardDragStart(e){var card=e.target.closest('.kanban-card');if(!card)return;e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain',card.dataset.id);e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move';card.classList.add('dragging');}
function onColDragOver(e){e.preventDefault();e.dataTransfer.dropEffect='move';e.currentTarget.classList.add('drag-over');}
function onColDragLeave(e){e.currentTarget.classList.remove('drag-over');}
function onColDrop(e){
  e.preventDefault();e.currentTarget.classList.remove('drag-over');
  var id=e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain');var newCol=e.currentTarget.dataset.col;
  if(!id||!newCol)return;
  document.querySelectorAll('.kanban-card.dragging').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('dragging');});
  moveRunTask(id,newCol);
}

async function moveRunTask(id,newCol){
  try{await af('/kanban/tareas/'+id+'/mover?columna='+encodeURIComponent(newCol),{method:'PUT'});toast('Tarea movida a '+newCol);loadKanbanRun();}catch(e){toast('Error: '+e.message,'err');}
}

async function deleteRunTask(id,titulo){
  if(!confirm('\u00bfEliminar tarea "'+titulo+'"?'))return;
  try{await af('/kanban/tareas/'+id,{method:'DELETE'});toast('Tarea eliminada');loadKanbanRun();}catch(e){toast('Error: '+e.message,'err');}
}

// ═══ Kanban Modal ═══
function openRunTaskForm(defaultCol){
  _kbEditMode=false;
  document.getElementById('kb-modal-title').textContent='Nueva Tarea RUN';
  document.getElementById('kb-save-btn').textContent='Crear Tarea';
  document.getElementById('kb-edit-id').value='';
  document.getElementById('kb-titulo').value='';
  document.getElementById('kb-descripcion').value='';
  document.getElementById('kb-prioridad').value='Media';
  document.getElementById('kb-columna').value=defaultCol||'Backlog';
  document.getElementById('kb-tecnico').value='';
  document.getElementById('kb-incidencia').value='';
  document.getElementById('kb-horas-est').value='0';
  document.getElementById('kb-horas-real').value='0';
  document.getElementById('kb-bloqueador').value='';
  document.getElementById('kb-fechas-info').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('kb-itsm-block').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('kb-modal-prio-badge').textContent='P3';
  document.getElementById('kb-modal-prio-badge').style.cssText='font-size:12px;background:'+PRIO_BG['Media']+';color:'+PRIO_COLORS['Media'];
  populateKbSelects();
  fmOpen('fm-kanban');
}

var _slaInterval=null;

function openRunTaskEdit(id){
  var task=ALL_RUN_TASKS.find(function(x){return x.id===id;});
  if(!task)return;
  // Parse description JSON
  var desc={};try{desc=JSON.parse(task.descripcion||'{}');}catch(e){}
  var isEnriched=desc.enriched&&(desc.instrucciones||desc.checklist||desc.contexto_cmdb);
  // If NOT enriched, fall back to basic form modal
  if(!isEnriched){openRunTaskEditBasic(task);return;}
  // ═══ RICH AG-012 MODAL ═══
  var existing=document.getElementById('run-task-modal-overlay');
  if(existing)existing.remove();
  if(_slaInterval){clearInterval(_slaInterval);_slaInterval=null;}

  var taskId=task.id;
  var cmdbItems=(desc.contexto_cmdb&&desc.contexto_cmdb.items)||[];
  var instrucciones=desc.instrucciones||[];
  var checklist=desc.checklist||[];
  var silo=desc.silo||'Soporte';
  var slaTarea=desc.sla_tarea_minutos||60;

  var overlay=document.createElement('div');overlay.className='run-modal-overlay';
  overlay.id='run-task-modal-overlay';overlay.dataset.taskId=taskId;
  overlay.onclick=function(e){if(e.target===overlay){if(_slaInterval)clearInterval(_slaInterval);overlay.remove();}};

  var modal=document.createElement('div');modal.className='run-modal-content';

  // ── HEADER ──
  var sk=(silo||'soporte').toLowerCase();
  sk=sk==='bbdd'||sk==='base de datos'?'bbdd':sk==='redes'?'redes':sk==='unix'||sk==='linux'?'unix':sk==='windows'?'win':sk==='seguridad'?'seg':sk==='backend'?'backend':sk==='frontend'?'frontend':'soporte';
  var head='<div style="padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">'
    +'<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex:1;min-width:0;">'
    +'<span style="font-weight:600;font-size:15px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">'+escHtml(task.titulo)+'</span>'
    +'<span class="run-cand-silo silo-'+sk+'">'+escHtml(silo)+'</span>'
    +'</div>'
    +'<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">'
    +'<span id="modal-pct-'+taskId+'" style="font-size:22px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono);color:#22c55e;">0%</span>'
    +'<button onclick="if(_slaInterval)clearInterval(_slaInterval);document.getElementById(\'run-task-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:none;border:1px solid #333840;color:#8b8f98;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">Cerrar</button>'
    +'</div></div>';

  // ── SLA COUNTDOWN ──
  var created=new Date(task.fecha_creacion).getTime();
  var limitMs=slaTarea*60*1000;
  var deadline=created+limitMs;
  var deadlineStr=new Date(deadline).toLocaleString('es-ES',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
  var slaHtml='<div class="run-modal-sla-box">'
    +'<div><div class="run-modal-sla-countdown" id="modal-sla-cd-'+taskId+'">--:--:--</div><div class="run-modal-sla-meta">SLA tarea restante</div></div>'
    +'<div style="flex:1;"><div class="run-modal-sla-end">L\u00edmite: '+deadlineStr+'</div>'
    +'<div class="run-modal-sla-meta">Duraci\u00f3n: '+Math.floor(slaTarea/60)+'h '+(slaTarea%60)+'min</div>'
    +'<div style="height:4px;background:#181b20;border-radius:2px;margin-top:6px;overflow:hidden;"><div id="modal-sla-bar-'+taskId+'" style="height:100%;border-radius:2px;background:#ef4444;width:0%;transition:width 1s;"></div></div>'
    +'</div></div>';

  // ── BODY ──
  var bodyHtml='<div style="padding:14px 16px;">';

  // Técnico asignado
  if(task.id_tecnico){
    var tec=ALL_TEAM.find(function(x){return x.fte===task.id_tecnico;});
    var tecName=tec?tec.name:(task.nombre_tecnico||task.id_tecnico);
    bodyHtml+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 12px;background:rgba(34,197,94,.06);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.2);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:12px;">'
      +'<div style="width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(34,197,94,.2);color:#22c55e;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;">FTE</div>'
      +'<span style="font-size:12px;">'+escHtml(task.id_tecnico)+' \u2014 '+escHtml(tecName)+' \u2014 Silo: '+escHtml(silo)+'</span>'
      +'</div>';
  }else{
    bodyHtml+='<div style="padding:8px 12px;background:rgba(139,148,158,.06);border:1px solid rgba(139,148,158,.2);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;">Sin t\u00e9cnico asignado</div>';
  }

  // Business coordination warning
  if(desc.requiere_negocio){
    bodyHtml+='<div style="background:rgba(234,179,8,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.25);border-left:3px solid #eab308;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:12px;">'
      +'<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;"><span style="font-size:14px;">\u26a0</span><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#eab308;text-transform:uppercase;">Coordinaci\u00f3n con \u00e1rea de negocio</span></div>'
      +'<div style="font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;">\u00c1rea: '+(desc.area_negocio||silo)+'</div>'
      +'</div>';
  }

  // CMDB context
  if(cmdbItems.length>0){
    bodyHtml+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 6px;">Contexto infraestructura (CMDB + IA)</div>';
    bodyHtml+='<div class="run-infra-grid">';
    cmdbItems.forEach(function(item){
      var isIp=(item.campo||'').toLowerCase().indexOf('ip')>=0;
      var isHost=(item.campo||'').toLowerCase().indexOf('serv')>=0;
      var isSuggest=item.source==='IA';
      var valClass='run-infra-val'+(isIp?' ip':'')+(isHost?' host':'')+(isSuggest?' suggest':'');
      var srcClass=item.source==='CMDB'?'run-src-tag run-src-cmdb':'run-src-tag run-src-ia';
      bodyHtml+='<div class="run-infra-item"><div class="run-infra-label">'+escHtml(item.campo)+'</div><div class="'+valClass+'">'+escHtml(item.valor)+'<span class="'+srcClass+'">'+(item.source||'IA')+'</span></div></div>';
    });
    bodyHtml+='</div>';
  }

  // Instrucciones paso a paso
  if(instrucciones.length>0){
    var stepColors=['rgba(34,197,94,.15)','rgba(59,130,246,.15)','rgba(249,115,22,.15)','rgba(168,85,247,.15)','rgba(236,72,153,.15)','rgba(6,182,212,.15)','rgba(234,179,8,.15)'];
    var stepTextColors=['#22c55e','#3b82f6','#f97316','#a855f7','#ec4899','#06b6d4','#eab308'];
    bodyHtml+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 6px;">Instrucciones paso a paso</div>';
    instrucciones.forEach(function(inst,idx){
      var bg=stepColors[idx%stepColors.length];
      var fg=stepTextColors[idx%stepTextColors.length];
      bodyHtml+='<div class="run-step">';
      bodyHtml+='<div class="run-step-n" style="background:'+bg+';color:'+fg+';">'+(idx+1)+'</div>';
      bodyHtml+='<div style="flex:1;"><div class="run-step-t">'+escHtml(inst.titulo||'')+'</div>';
      if(inst.detalle)bodyHtml+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;margin:2px 0;">'+escHtml(inst.detalle)+'</div>';
      (inst.comandos||[]).forEach(function(cmd){bodyHtml+='<code class="run-cmd">'+escHtml(cmd)+'</code>';});
      bodyHtml+='</div></div>';
    });
  }

  // Checklist
  if(checklist.length>0){
    var total=checklist.length;
    bodyHtml+='<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 6px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;"><span>Checklist</span><span id="modal-chk-'+taskId+'" style="color:#22c55e;">(0/'+total+')</span></div>';
    checklist.forEach(function(chkText,ci){
      bodyHtml+='<div class="run-chk"><div class="run-chk-box" onclick="toggleRunChk(this,\''+taskId+'\','+total+')"></div><span class="run-chk-text">'+escHtml(chkText)+'</span></div>';
    });
  }

  bodyHtml+='</div>';

  // ── STATUS BAR ──
  var colMap={'Backlog':'Backlog','An\u00e1lisis':'An\u00e1lisis','En Progreso':'En Progreso','Testing':'Testing','Completado':'Completado'};
  var currentCol=mapCol(task.columna);
  var statusHtml='<div class="run-status-bar">';
  ['Backlog','En Progreso','Testing','Completado'].forEach(function(st){
    var isCurrent=(st===currentCol||(st==='Testing'&&(currentCol==='Testing'||currentCol==='An\u00e1lisis')));
    statusHtml+='<div class="run-status-btn'+(isCurrent?' current':'')+'" onclick="moveRunTaskFromModal(\''+taskId+'\',\''+st+'\',this)">'+st+'</div>';
  });
  statusHtml+='</div>';

  modal.innerHTML=head+slaHtml+bodyHtml+statusHtml;

  // If nothing enriched at all, show notice
  if(cmdbItems.length===0&&instrucciones.length===0&&checklist.length===0){
    var bodyEl=modal.querySelector('[style*="padding:14px 16px"]');
    if(bodyEl){var w=document.createElement('div');w.style.cssText='text-align:center;padding:20px;color:#8b8f98;font-style:italic;font-size:13px;';w.textContent='AG-012 a\u00fan no ha procesado esta tarjeta.';bodyEl.insertBefore(w,bodyEl.firstChild);}
  }

  overlay.appendChild(modal);document.body.appendChild(overlay);

  // Start SLA timer
  _slaInterval=setInterval(function(){
    var now=Date.now();var remaining=deadline-now;
    var cdEl=document.getElementById('modal-sla-cd-'+taskId);
    var barEl=document.getElementById('modal-sla-bar-'+taskId);
    if(!cdEl){clearInterval(_slaInterval);return;}
    if(remaining<=0){cdEl.textContent='00:00:00';cdEl.style.color='#f85149';if(barEl)barEl.style.width='100%';clearInterval(_slaInterval);return;}
    var h=Math.floor(remaining/3600000),m=Math.floor((remaining%3600000)/60000),s=Math.floor((remaining%60000)/1000);
    cdEl.textContent=(h<10?'0'+h:h)+':'+(m<10?'0'+m:m)+':'+(s<10?'0'+s:s);
    var pct=Math.min(100,Math.round((1-remaining/limitMs)*100));
    cdEl.style.color=pct>75?'#f85149':pct>50?'#f0883e':'#3fb950';
    if(barEl){barEl.style.width=pct+'%';barEl.style.background=pct>75?'#f85149':pct>50?'#f0883e':'#3fb950';}
  },1000);
}

function toggleRunChk(box,taskId,total){
  box.classList.toggle('done');box.textContent=box.classList.contains('done')?'\u2713':'';
  var txt=box.nextElementSibling;if(txt)txt.classList.toggle('done');
  var overlay=document.getElementById('run-task-modal-overlay');
  if(!overlay)return;
  var checked=overlay.querySelectorAll('.run-chk-box.done').length;
  var p=Math.round((checked/total)*100);
  var pE=document.getElementById('modal-pct-'+taskId);if(pE){pE.textContent=p+'%';pE.style.color=p<=25?'#ef4444':p<=50?'#f97316':p<=75?'#eab308':'#22c55e';}
  var cE=document.getElementById('modal-chk-'+taskId);if(cE)cE.textContent='('+checked+'/'+total+')';
}

function moveRunTaskFromModal(taskId,newCol,btn){
  var bar=btn.parentElement;bar.querySelectorAll('.run-status-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('current');});btn.classList.add('current');
  af('/kanban/tareas/'+taskId+'/mover?columna='+encodeURIComponent(newCol),{method:'PUT'}).then(function(){
    toast('Movida a '+newCol);
    // Refresh board in background
    ALL_RUN_TASKS=[];loadKanbanRun();
  }).catch(function(e){toast('Error: '+e.message,'err');});
}

// Fallback basic form modal for non-enriched tasks
function openRunTaskEditBasic(t){
  _kbEditMode=true;
  var prioLabel={'Cr\u00edtica':'P1','Alta':'P2','Media':'P3','Baja':'P4'}[t.prioridad]||'P3';
  var pc=PRIO_COLORS[t.prioridad]||'#8b949e';var pbg=PRIO_BG[t.prioridad]||PRIO_BG['Media'];
  document.getElementById('kb-modal-title').textContent='Editar: '+t.id;
  document.getElementById('kb-modal-prio-badge').textContent=prioLabel;
  document.getElementById('kb-modal-prio-badge').style.cssText='font-size:12px;background:'+pbg+';color:'+pc;
  document.getElementById('kb-save-btn').textContent='Guardar Cambios';
