```html
  document.getElementById('kb-edit-id').value=t.id;
  document.getElementById('kb-titulo').value=t.titulo||'';
  document.getElementById('kb-descripcion').value=t.descripcion||'';
  document.getElementById('kb-prioridad').value=t.prioridad||'Media';
  document.getElementById('kb-columna').value=mapCol(t.columna);
  document.getElementById('kb-horas-est').value=t.horas_estimadas||0;
  document.getElementById('kb-horas-real').value=t.horas_reales||0;
  document.getElementById('kb-bloqueador').value=t.bloqueador||'';
  populateKbSelects();
  setTimeout(function(){
    document.getElementById('kb-tecnico').value=t.id_tecnico||'';
    document.getElementById('kb-incidencia').value=t.id_incidencia||'';
  },80);
  var fi=document.getElementById('kb-fechas-info');fi.style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('kb-f-creacion').textContent=t.fecha_creacion?new Date(t.fecha_creacion).toLocaleString('es-ES'):'--';
  document.getElementById('kb-f-ejecucion').textContent=t.fecha_inicio_ejecucion?new Date(t.fecha_inicio_ejecucion).toLocaleString('es-ES'):'Pendiente';
  document.getElementById('kb-f-cierre').textContent=t.fecha_cierre?new Date(t.fecha_cierre).toLocaleString('es-ES'):'Pendiente';
  document.getElementById('kb-itsm-block').style.display='none';
  fmOpen('fm-kanban');
}

function closeRunTaskModal(){fmClose('fm-kanban');}

async function populateKbSelects(){
  var tecSel=document.getElementById('kb-tecnico');
  if(tecSel.options.length<=1){
    try{var data=await af('/team/tecnicos');var arr=Array.isArray(data)?data:(data.tecnicos||[]);arr.forEach(function(t){var o=document.createElement('option');o.value=t.id_recurso;o.textContent=t.id_recurso+' \u2014 '+t.nombre+' ('+t.nivel+' '+t.silo_especialidad+')';tecSel.appendChild(o);});}catch(e){}
  }
  var incSel=document.getElementById('kb-incidencia');
  if(incSel.options.length<=1){
    try{var incs=await af('/incidencias');var arr2=Array.isArray(incs)?incs:(incs.incidencias||[]);arr2.slice(0,50).forEach(function(i){var o=document.createElement('option');o.value=i.ticket_id||i.id;o.textContent=(i.ticket_id||i.id)+' \u2014 '+(i.descripcion||i.tipo||'').substring(0,40);incSel.appendChild(o);});}catch(e){}
  }
}

async function saveRunTask(){
  var titulo=document.getElementById('kb-titulo').value.trim();
  if(!titulo){toast('El t\u00edtulo es obligatorio','err');return;}
  var payload={titulo:titulo,descripcion:document.getElementById('kb-descripcion').value.trim()||null,tipo:'RUN',prioridad:document.getElementById('kb-prioridad').value,columna:document.getElementById('kb-columna').value,id_tecnico:document.getElementById('kb-tecnico').value||null,id_incidencia:document.getElementById('kb-incidencia').value||null,horas_estimadas:parseFloat(document.getElementById('kb-horas-est').value)||0,horas_reales:parseFloat(document.getElementById('kb-horas-real').value)||0,bloqueador:document.getElementById('kb-bloqueador').value.trim()||null};
  var editId=document.getElementById('kb-edit-id').value;
  try{
    var url=_kbEditMode?'/kanban/tareas/'+editId:'/kanban/tareas';
    var method=_kbEditMode?'PUT':'POST';
    await af(url,{method:method,body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    toast(_kbEditMode?'Tarea actualizada':'Tarea creada');
    closeRunTaskModal();ALL_RUN_TASKS=[];loadKanbanRun();
  }catch(e){toast('Error: '+e.message,'err');}
}

// ═══ Kanban Metrics & Charts ═══
function toggleRunMetrics(){
  var area=document.getElementById('kb-metrics-area');
  area.style.display=area.style.display==='none'?'block':'none';
  if(area.style.display!=='none')loadRunMetrics();
}

async function loadRunMetrics(){
  try{
    var m=await af('/kanban/metricas');
    renderRunKPIs(m);
    renderRunCFD(m.cfd||[]);
    renderRunControlChart(m.lead_times||[]);
    renderRunDistribution(ALL_RUN_TASKS);
  }catch(e){console.warn('Metrics error:',e);}
}

async function loadRunMetricsInline(){
  try{
    var m=await af('/kanban/metricas');
    var throughput=m.throughput&&m.throughput.length?m.throughput[0].completadas:0;
    var ltColor=(m.avg_lead_time_h||0)>100?'var(--accent-red)':(m.avg_lead_time_h||0)>50?'var(--accent-orange)':'var(--accent-green)';
    var feColor=(m.flow_efficiency||0)>50?'var(--accent-green)':'var(--accent-red)';
    document.getElementById('kb-kpis-inline').innerHTML=[
      {v:m.total||0,l:'Total',c:'var(--accent-blue)'},{v:m.completadas||0,l:'Completadas',c:'var(--accent-green)'},{v:throughput,l:'Throughput',c:'var(--accent-orange)'},{v:(m.avg_lead_time_h||0)+'h',l:'Lead Time',c:ltColor},{v:(m.avg_cycle_time_h||0)+'h',l:'Cycle Time',c:'var(--accent-purple)'},{v:(m.flow_efficiency||0)+'%',l:'Flow Eff.',c:feColor}
    ].map(function(k){return'<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:'+k.c+';">'+k.v+'</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;">'+k.l+'</div></div>';}).join('');
    renderRunDistribution(ALL_RUN_TASKS);
    var distEl=document.getElementById('kb-distribution');
    var inlineDist=document.getElementById('kb-dist-inline');
    if(distEl&&inlineDist)inlineDist.innerHTML=distEl.innerHTML;
  }catch(e){}
}

function renderRunKPIs(m){
  var throughput=m.throughput&&m.throughput.length?m.throughput[0].completadas:0;
  var ltColor=(m.avg_lead_time_h||0)>100?'var(--accent-red)':(m.avg_lead_time_h||0)>50?'var(--accent-orange)':'var(--accent-green)';
  var ctColor=(m.avg_cycle_time_h||0)>80?'var(--accent-red)':(m.avg_cycle_time_h||0)>40?'var(--accent-orange)':'var(--accent-green)';
  var feColor=(m.flow_efficiency||0)>50?'var(--accent-green)':'var(--accent-red)';
  document.getElementById('kb-kpis').innerHTML=[
    {v:m.total||0,l:'Total Tareas',c:'var(--accent-blue)'},
    {v:m.completadas||0,l:'Completadas',c:'var(--accent-green)'},
    {v:throughput,l:'Throughput/Sem',c:'var(--accent-orange)'},
    {v:(m.avg_lead_time_h||0)+'h',l:'Avg Lead Time',c:ltColor},
    {v:(m.avg_cycle_time_h||0)+'h',l:'Avg Cycle Time',c:ctColor},
    {v:(m.flow_efficiency||0)+'%',l:'Flow Efficiency',c:feColor}
  ].map(function(k){return '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:'+k.c+';">'+k.v+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">'+k.l+'</div></div>';}).join('');
}

function renderRunCFD(cfd){
  var canvas=document.getElementById('kb-cfd-chart');if(!canvas)return;
  if(_cfdChart){_cfdChart.destroy();_cfdChart=null;}
  if(!cfd.length){canvas.parentElement.innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100%;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:12px;">Sin datos CFD</div>';return;}
  var labels=cfd.map(function(d){var dt=new Date(d.fecha);return dt.getDate()+'/'+(dt.getMonth()+1);});
  var datasets=[
    {label:'Backlog',data:cfd.map(function(d){return d.backlog||0;}),fill:true,backgroundColor:'rgba(139,143,152,0.3)',borderColor:'#8b8f98',borderWidth:1,pointRadius:0},
    {label:'An\u00e1lisis',data:cfd.map(function(d){return d.analisis||0;}),fill:true,backgroundColor:'rgba(45,126,247,0.3)',borderColor:'#2d7ef7',borderWidth:1,pointRadius:0},
    {label:'En Progreso',data:cfd.map(function(d){return d.en_progreso||0;}),fill:true,backgroundColor:'rgba(240,136,62,0.3)',borderColor:'#f0883e',borderWidth:1,pointRadius:0},
    {label:'Testing',data:cfd.map(function(d){return(d.testing||0)+(d.code_review||0)+(d.despliegue||0);}),fill:true,backgroundColor:'rgba(165,180,252,0.3)',borderColor:'#a5b4fc',borderWidth:1,pointRadius:0},
    {label:'Completado',data:cfd.map(function(d){return d.completado||0;}),fill:true,backgroundColor:'rgba(63,185,80,0.3)',borderColor:'#3fb950',borderWidth:1,pointRadius:0}
  ];
  _cfdChart=new Chart(canvas,{type:'line',data:{labels:labels,datasets:datasets},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{stacked:true,grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'},ticks:{color:'#8b949e',font:{size:9}}},y:{stacked:true,grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'},ticks:{color:'#8b949e',font:{size:9}}}}}});
}

function renderRunControlChart(leadTimes){
  var canvas=document.getElementById('kb-control-chart');if(!canvas)return;
  if(_ctrlChart){_ctrlChart.destroy();_ctrlChart=null;}
  if(!leadTimes.length){canvas.parentElement.innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100%;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:12px;">Sin datos Lead Time</div>';return;}
  var data=leadTimes.map(function(d){return d.lead_time_h||0;});
  var labels=leadTimes.map(function(d){return d.id||'';});
  var avg=data.reduce(function(s,v){return s+v;},0)/data.length;
  var stdDev=Math.sqrt(data.reduce(function(s,v){return s+Math.pow(v-avg,2);},0)/data.length);
  var ucl=avg+2*stdDev;
  var n=data.length;
  _ctrlChart=new Chart(canvas,{type:'line',data:{labels:labels,datasets:[
    {label:'Lead Time',data:data,borderColor:'#2d7ef7',backgroundColor:'transparent',pointBackgroundColor:data.map(function(v){return v>ucl?'#f85149':'#2d7ef7';}),pointRadius:3,tension:0.3,borderWidth:1.5},
    {label:'UCL',data:Array(n).fill(Math.round(ucl*10)/10),borderColor:'#f85149',borderDash:[5,5],pointRadius:0,borderWidth:1,fill:false},
    {label:'AVG',data:Array(n).fill(Math.round(avg*10)/10),borderColor:'#3fb950',borderDash:[5,5],pointRadius:0,borderWidth:1,fill:false}
  ]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{display:false},y:{grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'},ticks:{color:'#8b949e',font:{size:9},callback:function(v){return v+'h';}}}}}});
}

function renderRunDistribution(tasks){
  var el=document.getElementById('kb-distribution');if(!el)return;
  // By priority
  var prioCount={};tasks.forEach(function(t){var p=t.prioridad||'Media';prioCount[p]=(prioCount[p]||0)+1;});
  var maxPrio=Math.max.apply(null,Object.values(prioCount).concat([1]));
  var prioHtml='<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Por prioridad</div>';
  ['Cr\u00edtica','Alta','Media','Baja'].forEach(function(p){var cnt=prioCount[p]||0;var pct=Math.round(cnt/maxPrio*100);var c=PRIO_COLORS[p]||'#8b949e';var label={'Cr\u00edtica':'P1','Alta':'P2','Media':'P3','Baja':'P4'}[p];prioHtml+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;"><span style="width:22px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:'+c+';">'+label+'</span><div style="flex:1;height:6px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+pct+'%;height:100%;background:'+c+';border-radius:3px;"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;width:25px;text-align:right;color:var(--text2);">'+cnt+'</span></div>';});
  prioHtml+='</div>';
  // By silo (top 5)
  var siloCount={};tasks.forEach(function(t){try{var desc=JSON.parse(t.descripcion||'{}');if(desc.silo)siloCount[desc.silo]=(siloCount[desc.silo]||0)+1;}catch(e){}});
  var siloArr=Object.entries(siloCount).sort(function(a,b){return b[1]-a[1];}).slice(0,5);
  var maxSilo=siloArr.length?siloArr[0][1]:1;
  var siloHtml='<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Por silo (top 5)</div>';
  siloArr.forEach(function(e){var silo=e[0],cnt=e[1];var pct=Math.round(cnt/maxSilo*100);var c=SILO_COLORS[silo]||'#8b949e';siloHtml+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;"><span style="width:55px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:'+c+';text-align:right;">'+silo+'</span><div style="flex:1;height:6px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+pct+'%;height:100%;background:'+c+';border-radius:3px;"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;width:25px;text-align:right;color:var(--text2);">'+cnt+'</span></div>';});
  if(!siloArr.length)siloHtml+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);text-align:center;padding:10px;">Sin datos de silo</div>';
  siloHtml+='</div>';
  el.innerHTML=prioHtml+siloHtml;
}

// ═══ CAB Alerts — Alertas del Gabinete de Cambios en RUN ═══
function loadCABAlerts(){
  af('/cab/alertas').then(function(alerts){
    if(!Array.isArray(alerts)||alerts.length===0)return;
    var runAlerts=alerts.filter(function(a){
      return a.alert_type==='CAB_INCIDENT_BLOCKS_CHANGE'||a.alert_type==='CAB_WINDOW_EXPIRED'||a.alert_type==='CAB_WINDOW_CONFLICT';
    });
    if(runAlerts.length===0)return;
    var container=document.getElementById('cab-alerts-run');
    if(!container)return;
    container.style.display='block';
    var h='<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">'
      +'<svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--accent-yellow)" stroke-width="2"><path d="M10.29 3.86L1.82 18a2 2 0 001.71 3h16.94a2 2 0 001.71-3L13.71 3.86a2 2 0 00-3.42 0z"/><line x1="12" y1="9" x2="12" y2="13"/><line x1="12" y1="17" x2="12.01" y2="17"/></svg>'
      +'Alertas Gabinete de Cambios ('+runAlerts.length+')</div>';
    runAlerts.forEach(function(a){
      var sev=a.severity||'MEDIUM';
      var borderCol=sev==='CRITICAL'?'var(--accent-red)':sev==='HIGH'?'var(--accent-red)':sev==='MEDIUM'?'var(--accent-yellow)':'var(--accent-blue)';
      var bgCol=sev==='CRITICAL'||sev==='HIGH'?'rgba(255,85,85,.08)':'rgba(255,200,55,.08)';
      h+='<div style="background:'+bgCol+';border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid '+borderCol+';border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:6px;">';
      h+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">';
      h+='<strong style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-primary);">'+escHtml(a.title||'')+'</strong>';
      h+='<span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;color:#000;background:'+borderCol+';">'+sev+'</span></div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:4px;">'+escHtml(a.description||'')+'</div>';
      h+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:3px;">'+escHtml(a.alert_type||'')+' &middot; AG-011</div>';
      h+='</div>';
    });
    container.innerHTML=h;
  }).catch(function(e){console.error('Error CAB alerts:',e);});
}

// ═══ FULLSCREEN PIPELINE RUN (gov-run) ═══
var FS_RUN_GOV=[
{id:'AG-001',nm:'Dispatcher',sub:'Clasificador ITSM',idc:'background:#172554;color:#93c5fd',cl:'#3b82f6',desc:'Recibe incidencia, clasifica prioridad P1-P4, silo t\u00e9cnico, activa SLA y crea tareas Kanban.',tables:[{n:'catalogo_incidencias',d:'61 tipos con SLA y silo.'},{n:'incidencias_run',d:'Hist\u00f3rico incidencias.'},{n:'kanban_tareas',d:'Tareas operativas.'}],tools:[{nm:'query_catalogo',brief:'Busca cat\u00e1logo',desc:'Busca tipo de incidencia similar.',tbls:['catalogo_incidencias'],input:'keyword',output:'Tipos con SLA, silo'},{nm:'create_incident',brief:'Crea incidencia',desc:'Inserta en incidencias_run con SLA.',tbls:['incidencias_run'],input:'titulo, prioridad, silo',output:'INC-YYYYMMDD-XXXX'},{nm:'create_tasks',brief:'Genera Kanban',desc:'Crea tareas vinculadas.',tbls:['kanban_tareas'],input:'id_incidencia, tareas',output:'Tareas con IDs'}],outs:['Incidencia creada','Prioridad P1-P4','SLA activado','Tareas Kanban'],stats:[{v:'61',l:'Tipos',c:'#3b82f6'},{v:'1.2s',l:'Tiempo',c:'#3b82f6'},{v:'$0.004',l:'Coste',c:'#3b82f6'}]},
{id:'AG-002',nm:'Resource Manager',sub:'Matching t\u00e9cnicos',idc:'background:#451a03;color:#fcd34d',cl:'#f59e0b',desc:'Busca t\u00e9cnico \u00f3ptimo entre 150. Cruza skills, nivel N1-N4, carga y disponibilidad.',tables:[{n:'users_skills',d:'150 t\u00e9cnicos \u00d7 skills.'},{n:'directorio_corporativo',d:'Organigrama.'},{n:'kanban_tareas',d:'Carga actual.'},{n:'incidencias_run',d:'Incidencia clasificada.'}],tools:[{nm:'query_staff_by_skill',brief:'Busca por skill',desc:'Filtra por skill y nivel m\u00ednimo.',tbls:['users_skills','kanban_tareas'],input:'skill, nivel',output:'T\u00e9cnicos rankeados'},{nm:'assign_technician',brief:'Asigna t\u00e9cnico',desc:'Actualiza incidencia y tareas.',tbls:['incidencias_run','kanban_tareas'],input:'id_incidencia, id_tecnico',output:'Asignaci\u00f3n OK'},{nm:'query_directorio',brief:'Organigrama',desc:'Para escalaci\u00f3n P1.',tbls:['directorio_corporativo'],input:'keyword',output:'Directivos'}],outs:['T\u00e9cnico asignado','Score matching','Carga verificada','Se\u00f1al conflicto BUILD'],stats:[{v:'150',l:'FTEs',c:'#f59e0b'},{v:'1.5s',l:'Tiempo',c:'#f59e0b'},{v:'$0.005',l:'Coste',c:'#f59e0b'}]},
{id:'AG-004',nm:'Buffer Gatekeeper',sub:'\u00c1rbitro RUN vs BUILD',idc:'background:#450a0a;color:#fca5a5',cl:'#ef4444',desc:'Solo se activa con conflicto. Eval\u00faa pausar BUILD o buscar suplente N4. Toda decisi\u00f3n registrada como transacci\u00f3n de gobernanza.',tables:[{n:'cartera_build',d:'46 proyectos activos.'},{n:'build_sprint_items',d:'Tareas de sprint.'},{n:'users_skills',d:'Suplentes N4.'},{n:'gobernanza_transacciones',d:'Auditor\u00eda ITIL.'}],tools:[{nm:'query_build_assignments',brief:'Asignaciones BUILD',desc:'Verifica participaci\u00f3n en BUILD.',tbls:['cartera_build','build_sprint_items'],input:'id_tecnico',output:'Proyectos del t\u00e9cnico'},{nm:'find_n4_silo_fallback',brief:'Suplente N4',desc:'Busca N4 disponible.',tbls:['users_skills','kanban_tareas'],input:'silo, skill',output:'Suplente o null'},{nm:'write_governance_tx',brief:'Registra gobernanza',desc:'Transacci\u00f3n auditable.',tbls:['gobernanza_transacciones'],input:'tipo_accion, proyecto, motivo',output:'TX con ID'},{nm:'assign_technician',brief:'Reasigna',desc:'Asigna suplente N4.',tbls:['incidencias_run','kanban_tareas'],input:'id_incidencia, id_suplente',output:'Reasignaci\u00f3n OK'},{nm:'query_staff_by_skill',brief:'B\u00fasqueda ampliada',desc:'Silos adyacentes.',tbls:['users_skills'],input:'skill, silo_ampliado',output:'Alternativos'}],outs:['Decisi\u00f3n PAUSAR/SUPLENTE','T\u00e9cnico confirmado','BUILD pausado/intacto','TX gobernanza','SLA confirmado'],stats:[{v:'5',l:'Tools',c:'#ef4444'},{v:'1.8s',l:'Tiempo',c:'#ef4444'},{v:'$0.008',l:'Coste',c:'#ef4444'}]}
];

var RSvgsGov=['<path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M30 35 L45 50 V70 L55 70 V50 L70 35 Z" fill="C"/><circle cx="50" cy="30" r="5" fill="C"/><path d="M25 45 H35" stroke="C" stroke-width="3"/><path d="M65 45 H75" stroke="C" stroke-width="3"/>','<path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="35" cy="50" r="10" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="65" cy="50" r="10" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M45 50 H55" stroke="C" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="3" fill="C"/>','<path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="35" y="45" width="30" height="25" rx="2" fill="C"/><path d="M40 45 V35 A10 10 0 0 1 60 35 V45" fill="none" stroke="C" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="50" cy="57" r="3" fill="#1a1d23"/>'];
function openRunFullscreenGov(){
  document.getElementById('fs-run-overlay-gov').style.display='block';
  var bar=document.getElementById('fs-run-bar-gov');
  if(bar&&!bar.dataset.rendered){
    bar.dataset.rendered='1';
    var h='<div style="padding:8px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #64748b;font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8">ITSM Input</div>';
    FS_RUN_GOV.forEach(function(a,i){var sv=(RSvgsGov[i]||RSvgsGov[0]).replace(/C/g,a.cl);h+='<span style="color:#334155;font-size:20px">\u2192</span><div onclick="showRunAgentGov('+i+')" style="padding:10px 16px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid '+a.cl+';background:'+a.cl+'08;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;transition:all .3s" id="fs-rn-gov-'+i+'"><svg width="38" height="38" viewBox="0 0 100 100" style="flex-shrink:0;display:block">'+sv+'</svg><div><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#e2e8f0">'+a.id+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#94a3b8;font-family:monospace">'+a.nm.substring(0,12)+'</div></div></div>';});
    h+='<span style="color:#334155;font-size:20px">\u2192</span><div style="padding:8px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #4ade80;font-size:11px;color:#4ade80">\u2713 Resuelto</div>';
    bar.innerHTML=h;
  }
}

function showRunAgentGov(idx){
  for(var j=0;j<3;j++){var nd=document.getElementById('fs-rn-gov-'+j);if(nd){nd.style.transform=j===idx?'translateY(-3px)':'none';nd.style.boxShadow=j===idx?'0 8px 24px '+FS_RUN_GOV[j].cl+'30':'none';}}
  var a=FS_RUN_GOV[idx];var next=idx<2?FS_RUN_GOV[idx+1].id:'Completado';
  var hdrSvgR=(RSvgsGov[idx]||RSvgsGov[0]).replace(/C/g,a.cl);
  var h='<div style="padding:20px 28px;border-bottom:1px solid #1e293b;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px"><svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 100 100" style="flex-shrink:0;display:block">'+hdrSvgR+'</svg><span style="font-size:12px;font-family:monospace;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;'+a.idc+'">'+a.id+'</span><div><h2 style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#e2e8f0;margin:0">'+a.nm+'</h2><div style="font-size:12px;color:#94a3b8;margin-top:2px">'+a.sub+'</div></div></div>';
  h+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr"><div style="padding:22px 28px;border-right:1px solid #1e293b">';
  h+='<div style="margin-bottom:18px"><div style="font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;color:#64748b;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;border-left:3px solid '+a.cl+';padding-left:8px">Qu\u00e9 hace</div><div style="font-size:13px;color:#cbd5e1;line-height:1.7">'+a.desc+'</div></div>';
  h+='<div style="margin-bottom:18px"><div style="font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;color:#64748b;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;border-left:3px solid #4ade80;padding-left:8px">Tools \u2014 click para desplegar</div><div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px">';
  a.tools.forEach(function(t,ti){var tid='fsg-'+idx+'-'+ti;h+='<div id="'+tid+'" style="background:#1e293b;border:1px solid #334155;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden"><div onclick="var el=document.getElementById(\''+tid+'\');var bd=el.querySelector(\'[data-bd]\');var ar=el.querySelector(\'[data-arr]\');if(bd.style.display===\'block\'){bd.style.display=\'none\';el.style.borderColor=\'#334155\';ar.textContent=\'\u25b6\';}else{bd.style.display=\'block\';el.style.borderColor=\'#4ade80\';ar.textContent=\'\u25bc\';}" style="padding:9px 14px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><span data-arr style="color:#4ade80;font-size:10px;width:12px">\u25b6</span><span style="font-size:12px;font-family:monospace;font-weight:600;color:#e2e8f0">'+t.nm+'</span><span style="color:#64748b;font-size:10px;margin-left:auto">'+t.brief+'</span></div><div data-bd style="display:none;padding:12px 16px;border-top:1px solid #1e293b;background:#0f1219"><div style="font-size:12px;color:#cbd5e1;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:10px">'+t.desc+'</div><div style="display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap"><div style="flex:1;min-width:120px"><div style="font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px">Tablas</div>';t.tbls.forEach(function(tb){h+='<span style="display:inline-flex;background:#052e16;color:#4ade80;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-family:monospace;margin:1px">'+tb+'</span> ';});h+='</div><div style="flex:1;min-width:120px"><div style="font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px">Input</div><code style="font-size:10px;color:#e2e8f0">'+t.input+'</code></div><div style="flex:1;min-width:120px"><div style="font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px">Output</div><span style="font-size:10px;color:#94a3b8">'+t.output+'</span></div></div></div></div>';});
  h+='</div></div>';
  h+='<div><div style="font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;border-left:3px solid #a78bfa;padding-left:8px">M\u00e9tricas</div><div style="display:flex;gap:10px">';a.stats.forEach(function(s){h+='<div style="background:#0f1219;border:1px solid #1e293b;border-radius:7px;padding:8px 14px;flex:1;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:'+s.c+'">'+s.v+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#64748b;margin-top:2px">'+s.l+'</div></div>';});h+='</div></div></div>';
  h+='<div style="padding:22px 28px"><div style="margin-bottom:18px"><div style="font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;border-left:3px solid #f59e0b;padding-left:8px">Tablas BD</div>';a.tables.forEach(function(t){h+='<div style="background:#0f1219;border:1px solid #1e293b;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:6px"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#e2e8f0;margin-bottom:3px"><span style="color:#4ade80;font-size:9px;font-family:monospace;background:#052e16;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px">TABLE</span> '+t.n+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#94a3b8">'+t.d+'</div></div>';});
  h+='</div><div><div style="font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;border-left:3px solid #4ade80;padding-left:8px">Output \u2192 '+next+'</div><div style="background:#064e3b20;border:1px solid #064e3b;border-radius:10px;padding:14px 18px"><ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0">';a.outs.forEach(function(o){h+='<li style="font-size:12px;color:#a7f3d0;padding:3px 0;display:flex;gap:6px"><span style="color:#4ade80;font-weight:700">\u2713</span>'+o+'</li>';});h+='</ul></div></div></div></div>';
  document.getElementById('fs-run-det-gov').innerHTML=h;
}
</script>
<!-- OVERLAY FULLSCREEN PIPELINE RUN (gov-run) -->
<div id="fs-run-overlay-gov" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100vw;height:100vh;background:#080b12;z-index:9999;overflow-y:auto">
  <div style="position:sticky;top:0;background:#0a0e17ee;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);padding:14px 32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;z-index:10;border-bottom:1px solid #1e293b">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px"><h1 style="font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:#ef4444;margin:0">Pipeline RUN</h1><span style="background:#450a0a;color:#fca5a5;padding:3px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace">3 Agentes &middot; 11 Tools &middot; ~$0.02</span></div>
    <button onclick="document.getElementById('fs-run-overlay-gov').style.display='none'" style="background:none;border:1px solid #334155;color:#94a3b8;font-size:14px;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer">&#10005; Cerrar</button>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:20px 32px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto">
    <p style="color:#94a3b8;font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:20px">Pipeline RUN: 3 agentes IA gestionan incidencias ITSM. Click en cada agente para ver tools desplegables.</p>
    <div id="fs-run-bar-gov" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;justify-content:center;padding:16px 0;margin-bottom:24px"></div>
    <div id="fs-run-det-gov" style="background:#111827;border:1px solid #1e293b;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;min-height:300px"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:300px;color:#334155;font-size:14px">&larr; Click en un agente</div></div>
  </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
```

### FILE: frontend/index.html
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>COGNITIVE PMO</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
:root{
  --bg:#0d1117;--bg2:#161b22;--bg3:#1c2333;--bg4:#21262d;
  --border:#30363d;--border2:#21262d;
  --text:#e6edf3;--text2:#8b949e;--text3:#484f58;
  --blue:#2d7ef7;--blue-bg:rgba(45,126,247,.15);
  --green:#3fb950;--green-bg:rgba(63,185,80,.15);
  --orange:#f0883e;--orange-bg:rgba(240,136,62,.15);
  --red:#f85149;--red-bg:rgba(248,81,73,.15);
  --purple:#a5b4fc;--purple-bg:rgba(165,180,252,.15);
  --yellow:#d29922;--yellow-bg:rgba(210,153,34,.15);
  --pink:#f778ba;
  --cyan:#39c5cf;
  --font:'Inter',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;
  --mono:'JetBrains Mono','Fira Code',monospace;
}
/* Light Mode */
:root.light{
  --bg:#f8fafc;--bg2:#ffffff;--bg3:#f1f5f9;--bg4:#e2e8f0;
  --border:#cbd5e1;--border2:#e2e8f0;
  --text:#0f172a;--text2:#475569;--text3:#94a3b8;
  --blue:#2563eb;--blue-bg:rgba(37,99,235,.1);
  --green:#16a34a;--green-bg:rgba(22,163,74,.1);
  --orange:#ea580c;--orange-bg:rgba(234,88,12,.1);
  --red:#dc2626;--red-bg:rgba(220,38,38,.1);
  --purple:#7c3aed;--purple-bg:rgba(124,58,237,.1);
  --yellow:#ca8a04;--yellow-bg:rgba(202,138,4,.1);
  --pink:#db2777;
  --cyan:#0891b2;
}
:root.light body{background:var(--bg);}
:root.light .topbar{background:var(--bg2);border-bottom-color:var(--border);box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
:root.light .logo-icon{background:var(--blue-bg);}
:root.light .panel{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .panel-header{border-bottom-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .side-panel{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .pipeline-step{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .pipeline-step.done{border-color:rgba(22,163,74,.4);}
:root.light .kanban-col{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .kanban-card{background:var(--bg3);border-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .data-table th{background:var(--bg3);border-bottom-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .data-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(0,0,0,.02);}
:root.light .fm-overlay{background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);}
:root.light .fm-box{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);box-shadow:0 25px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.15);}
:root.light .sap-input,.light .sap-textarea,.light .fm-input,.light .fm-select{background:var(--bg3);border-color:var(--border);color:var(--text);}
:root.light .sap-input:focus,.light .sap-textarea:focus,.light .fm-input:focus{border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(37,99,235,.15);}
:root.light .skill-tag{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .preview-card{background:var(--bg3);border-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .search-bar{background:var(--bg3);border-color:var(--border);color:var(--text);}
:root.light .filter-chip{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .filter-chip:hover,.light .filter-chip.active{background:var(--blue-bg);border-color:var(--blue);}
:root.light .statusbar{background:var(--bg2);border-top-color:var(--border);}
:root.light footer{background:var(--bg2);border-top-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .wr-sidebar{background:var(--bg2);border-right-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .wr-chat-main{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .wr-chat-header{background:var(--bg3);}
:root.light .wr-chat-input-bar{background:var(--bg3);}
:root.light .wr-chat-input{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);color:var(--text);}
:root.light .ingesta-input{background:var(--bg3);border-color:var(--border);color:var(--text);}
:root.light .nivel-card{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .silo-card{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);}
:root.light .sk-chip{background:var(--bg2);border-color:var(--border);color:var(--text2);}
:root.light .nav-tab:hover{background:rgba(0,0,0,.03);}
html{width:100%;min-width:1100px;}
body{background:var(--bg);font-family:var(--font);color:var(--text);font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;height:100vh;min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;width:100%;min-width:1100px;}
.topbar{background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);height:48px;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 16px;gap:0;flex-shrink:0;position:relative;z-index:100;}
.logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-right:24px;}
.logo-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--border);border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.logo-icon svg{width:16px;height:16px;fill:var(--text);}
.logo-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;line-height:1;}
.logo-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--blue);letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:600;}
.nav-tabs{display:flex;gap:2px;flex:1;}
.nav-tab{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:0 16px;height:48px;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:all .15s;white-space:nowrap;user-select:none;}
.nav-tab[draggable="true"]{cursor:grab;}
.nav-tab.dragging{opacity:.4;}
.nav-tab:hover{color:var(--text);background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);}
.nav-tab.active{color:var(--text);border-bottom-color:var(--blue);}
.nav-tab.run.active{border-bottom-color:var(--blue);color:var(--text);}
.nav-tab.build.active{border-bottom-color:var(--green);color:var(--text);}
.nav-tab.team.active{border-bottom-color:#d97706;color:var(--text);}
.nav-tab.projects.active{border-bottom-color:var(--red);color:var(--text);}
.nav-tab.kanban.active{border-bottom-color:var(--purple);color:var(--text);}
.tab-pill{padding:1px 8px;border-radius:20px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;}
.run-pill{background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);}
.build-pill{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.team-pill{background:var(--orange-bg);color:var(--orange);}
.projects-pill{background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red);}
.kanban-pill{background:var(--purple-bg);color:var(--purple);}
.topbar-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-left:auto;}
.theme-btn{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;}
.user-card{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:4px 10px;}
.user-avatar{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--blue);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;}
.user-info{text-align:right;}
.user-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.2;}
.user-id{font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);}
/* ── LOGIN SCREEN ── */
#login-screen{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#0a0e14;background-image:url('login-bg.png');background-size:cover;background-position:center;background-repeat:no-repeat;image-rendering:-webkit-optimize-contrast;}
#login-screen .login-container{position:relative;z-index:1;}
#login-screen .login-particles{display:none;}
.login-container{width:520px;max-width:92vw;}
.login-card{background:rgba(22,27,34,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:16px;padding:40px 36px 32px;box-shadow:0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5);}
.login-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:32px;}
.login-logo svg{width:48px;height:48px;color:var(--blue);}
.login-logo-text .login-title{font-size:22px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:1px;}
.login-logo-text .login-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--blue);letter-spacing:3px;font-weight:700;text-align:center;}
.login-field{margin-bottom:18px;}
.login-field label{display:block;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:6px;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.login-field input{width:100%;padding:12px 14px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text);font-size:14px;font-family:var(--font);outline:none;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s;}
.login-field input:focus{border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(45,126,247,.15);}
.login-field input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.login-btn{width:100%;padding:12px;background:var(--blue);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s,transform .1s;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-top:6px;}
.login-btn:hover{background:#1d6ce0;transform:translateY(-1px);}
.login-btn:active{transform:translateY(0);}
.login-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none;}
.login-error{background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red);padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:14px;display:none;border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);}
.login-error.show{display:block;}
.login-footer{text-align:center;margin-top:24px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);}
/* ── Demo Tribunal Panel ── */
.demo-panel{margin-top:20px;background:rgba(22,27,34,.7);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:14px;padding:18px 16px 14px;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.4);}
.demo-title{text-align:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;}
.demo-title::before,.demo-title::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.12),transparent);}
.demo-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:8px;}
.demo-card{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .25s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.demo-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--dc-color,.2),transparent);opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s;}
.demo-card:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.15);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.demo-card:hover::before{opacity:1;}
.demo-card:active{transform:translateY(0);}
.demo-avatar{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.5px;flex-shrink:0;position:relative;z-index:1;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
.demo-info{flex:1;min-width:0;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.demo-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#e8e9ed;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.demo-role{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:600;margin-top:1px;}
.demo-dest{font-size:8px;color:var(--cyan);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.3px;margin-top:2px;opacity:.8;}
.demo-card.loading .demo-avatar{animation:demo-pulse 1s infinite;}
@keyframes demo-pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.4;}}
/* ── Notification Bell ── */
.notif-bell{position:relative;cursor:pointer;padding:6px;border-radius:8px;transition:background .2s;}
.notif-bell:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
.notif-bell svg{width:18px;height:18px;stroke:var(--text2);fill:none;stroke-width:1.8;transition:stroke .2s;}
.notif-bell:hover svg{stroke:var(--text);}
.notif-badge{position:absolute;top:2px;right:2px;min-width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:8px;background:#ef4444;color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0 4px;line-height:1;border:2px solid var(--bg);display:none;}
.notif-badge.show{display:flex;}
.notif-panel{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 8px);right:0;width:340px;max-height:420px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.4);z-index:9100;display:none;overflow:hidden;}
.notif-panel.open{display:block;}
.notif-panel-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:12px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3);}
.notif-panel-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);}
.notif-mark-all{font-size:10px;color:var(--blue);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;}
.notif-mark-all:hover{text-decoration:underline;}
.notif-list{max-height:350px;overflow-y:auto;}
.notif-item{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;}
.notif-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);}
.notif-item.unread{background:rgba(45,126,247,.04);border-left:3px solid var(--blue);}
.notif-item.unread:hover{background:rgba(45,126,247,.08);}
.notif-ico{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:14px;}
.notif-ico.asignacion{background:rgba(34,197,94,.12);color:#22c55e;}
.notif-ico.estado{background:rgba(45,126,247,.12);color:#2d7ef7;}
.notif-ico.alerta{background:rgba(234,179,8,.12);color:#eab308;}
.notif-ico.urgente{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:#f85149;}
.notif-ico.info{background:rgba(139,92,246,.12);color:#8b5cf6;}
.notif-body{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.notif-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.notif-msg{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden;}
.notif-time{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px;font-family:var(--mono);}
.notif-empty{padding:30px 14px;text-align:center;color:var(--text3);font-size:12px;}
/* ── Org Tree ── */
.otree{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0;padding:20px 10px 40px;min-width:fit-content;}
.otree-level{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:12px;position:relative;flex-wrap:nowrap;}
.otree-branch{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0;}
.otree-connector{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}
.otree-vline{width:2px;height:18px;background:rgba(88,166,255,.2);}
.otree-hline-wrap{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;position:relative;}
.otree-hline{height:2px;background:rgba(88,166,255,.2);position:absolute;top:0;}
.otree-card{min-width:136px;max-width:172px;padding:12px 10px 10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;position:relative;text-align:center;user-select:none;}
.otree-card:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.otree-card.expanded{border-color:rgba(88,166,255,.3);background:rgba(88,166,255,.04);}
.otree-card.highlight{border-color:rgba(234,179,8,.6);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(234,179,8,.25);animation:org-hl 1.5s ease-in-out 2;}
@keyframes org-hl{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(234,179,8,.25)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 5px rgba(234,179,8,.4)}}
.otree-avatar{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin:0 auto 6px;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);flex-shrink:0;}
.otree-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);line-height:1.3;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.otree-cargo{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;line-height:1.2;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden;}
.otree-badge{display:inline-block;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:.3px;}
.otree-count{position:absolute;top:-6px;right:-6px;min-width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--blue);color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0 4px;border:2px solid var(--bg2);}
.otree-children{display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0;}
.otree-children.open{display:flex;}
.otree-leaf-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;justify-content:center;max-width:900px;}
.otree-leaf{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:8px;min-width:120px;max-width:180px;font-size:10px;transition:all .15s;}
.otree-leaf:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
.otree-leaf .ol-avatar{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
.otree-leaf .ol-name{font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;flex:1;min-width:0;}
.otree-leaf .ol-nivel{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;padding:1px 4px;border-radius:3px;}
.otree-leaf .ol-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
.otree-more{padding:4px 10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:6px;font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;}
.otree-more:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);}
.otree-area-group{margin-top:16px;width:100%;}
.otree-area-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:4px;transition:background .15s;}
.otree-area-header:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);}
.otree-area-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);}
.otree-area-count{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:600;}
.otree-area-body{display:none;padding:4px 0 4px 12px;}
.otree-area-body.open{display:block;}
.login-footer a{color:var(--blue);text-decoration:none;}
.login-particles{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:-1;overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none;}
.login-particle{position:absolute;animation:floatParticle 20s infinite ease-in-out;}
.login-particle svg{width:100%;height:100%;}
@keyframes floatParticle{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) translateX(0) rotate(0deg)}25%{transform:translateY(-40px) translateX(25px) rotate(5deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-15px) translateX(-20px) rotate(-3deg)}75%{transform:translateY(-50px) translateX(15px) rotate(4deg)}}
.login-role-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin-top:10px;}
/* User menu in topbar */
.user-menu-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 12px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;position:relative;}
.user-menu-btn:hover{border-color:var(--blue);background:var(--blue-bg);}
.user-menu-avatar{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
.user-menu-info{text-align:left;}
.user-menu-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.2;max-width:160px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;}
.user-menu-role{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.2;}
.user-dropdown{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 6px);right:0;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.3);min-width:240px;z-index:9000;display:none;overflow:hidden;}
.user-dropdown.open{display:block;}
.user-dropdown-header{padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3);}
.user-dropdown-header .udh-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;}
.user-dropdown-header .udh-email{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);}
.user-dropdown-header .udh-role{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;margin-top:6px;}
.udd-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 16px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);transition:all .1s;}
.udd-item:hover{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text);}
.udd-item svg{width:14px;height:14px;flex-shrink:0;}
.udd-divider{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:4px 0;}
.udd-item.logout{color:var(--red);}
.udd-item.logout:hover{background:var(--red-bg);}
.udd-permisos-count{margin-left:auto;background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);padding:1px 7px;border-radius:10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;}
.statusbar{background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);height:36px;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 16px;gap:16px;flex-shrink:0;}
.status-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);}
.status-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;}
.status-badge{padding:1px 7px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;}
.online{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.server-info{margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);}
.server-ip{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;color:var(--cyan);}
.page{display:none;flex:1;overflow:hidden;width:100%;min-width:0;}
.page.active{display:flex;width:100%;}
.pipeline-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 300px;grid-template-rows:1fr;height:100%;overflow:hidden;width:100%;}
.pipeline-main{padding:14px;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;min-width:0;min-height:0;}
.panel{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;}
.panel-header{padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.panel-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.mode-badge{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;}
.mode-run{background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);}
.mode-build{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.ingesta-body{padding:14px;}
.ingesta-row{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;}
.ingesta-input{flex:1;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;font-family:var(--font);font-size:13px;color:var(--text);resize:none;outline:none;min-height:60px;transition:border-color .15s;}
.ingesta-input:focus{border-color:var(--blue);}
.ingesta-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.ingesta-btns{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;}
.btn-exec{background:#238636;border:1px solid #2ea043;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;white-space:nowrap;transition:background .15s;}
.btn-exec:hover{background:#2ea043;}
.btn-exec:disabled{background:var(--bg3);border-color:var(--border);color:var(--text2);cursor:not-allowed;}
.btn-reset{background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.3);color:var(--red);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:all .15s;}
.btn-reset:hover{background:rgba(248,81,73,.25);}
.pipeline-area{background:var(--bg3);border:1px dashed var(--border);border-radius:8px;margin:8px;min-height:220px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;}
.pipeline-idle{text-align:center;color:var(--text3);}
.pipeline-idle-icon{font-size:36px;margin-bottom:8px;opacity:.3;}
.pipeline-idle-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);}
.pipeline-idle-sub{font-size:12px;}
.pipeline-steps{padding:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;width:100%;}
.pipeline-step{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px 14px;}
.step-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.step-badge{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);flex-shrink:0;}
.step-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;}
.step-status{margin-left:auto;font-size:11px;padding:1px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:600;}
.status-running{background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);}
.status-done{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.status-pending{background:var(--border2);color:var(--text2);}
.step-output{font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);background:var(--bg);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;font-family:var(--mono);line-height:1.6;max-height:180px;overflow-y:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;}
.pipeline-sidebar{background:var(--bg2);border-left:1px solid var(--border);padding:16px;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}
.side-panel{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:14px;}
.side-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.no-data{text-align:center;padding:16px;color:var(--text3);font-size:12px;}
.no-data-icon{font-size:20px;margin-bottom:4px;opacity:.3;}
.sys-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);font-size:13px;}
.sys-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.sys-val{font-weight:600;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;}
.val-green{color:var(--green);}
.val-blue{color:var(--blue);}
.val-idle{color:var(--yellow);}
.task-item{padding:8px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.task-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px;}
.task-meta{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);display:flex;gap:6px;}
.hist-item{padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);font-size:12px;}
.hist-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.hist-time{color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;}
.team-page{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:100%;}
.team-header{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);flex-shrink:0;}
.team-header-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
.page-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.level-badges{display:flex;gap:8px;}
.lvl-badge{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.lvl-num{font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--blue);}
.search-bar{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 14px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;margin-bottom:10px;transition:border-color .15s;}
.search-bar:focus{border-color:var(--blue);}
.search-bar::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.filter-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.filter-chip{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);transition:all .15s;}
.filter-chip:hover,.filter-chip.active{border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--text);background:var(--blue-bg);}
.filter-select{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text);outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
.table-wrap{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
.data-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}
.data-table th{padding:6px 8px;text-align:left;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:2;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;position:relative;}
.data-table td{padding:5px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);vertical-align:middle;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.data-table th.tm-th-resizable::after{content:'';position:absolute;right:0;top:25%;height:50%;width:3px;cursor:col-resize;background:transparent;}
.data-table th.tm-th-resizable:hover::after{background:var(--blue);border-radius:2px;}
.data-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);}
.avatar{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
.fte-code{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);}
.silo-badge{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;}
.nivel-badge{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);}
.n1{background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);color:#f85149;}
.n2{background:rgba(139,148,158,.15);color:#8b949e;}
.n3{background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);}
.n4{background:var(--purple-bg);color:var(--purple);}
.skills-bar-wrap{background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;height:6px;width:80px;overflow:hidden;display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:6px;}
.skills-bar{height:100%;border-radius:3px;}
.skill-tag{display:inline-block;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 6px;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;margin:1px;color:var(--text2);}
.skill-more{font-size:10px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:600;}
.projects-page{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:100%;}
.proj-header{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);flex-shrink:0;}
.proj-header-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
.stat-chips{display:flex;gap:6px;}
.stat-chip{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;text-align:center;}
.stat-chip-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;display:block;color:var(--text);}
.stat-chip-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);}
.prio-chips{display:flex;gap:6px;}
.prio-chip{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;}
.critica{background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red);}
.alta{background:var(--orange-bg);color:var(--orange);}
.media{background:var(--yellow-bg);color:var(--yellow);}
.baja{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.estado-badge{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;}
.en-progreso{background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);}
.planificado{background:var(--yellow-bg);color:var(--yellow);}
.backlog{background:rgba(139,148,158,.15);color:#8b949e;}
.completado-b{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.proj-id{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);}
.horas-text{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;}
.horas-high{color:var(--red);}
.horas-mid{color:var(--orange);}
.horas-low{color:var(--text2);}
.kanban-page{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.kanban-header{padding:12px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;}
.kanban-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;}
.kanban-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);}
.kanban-body{flex:1;overflow-x:auto;padding:16px;display:flex;gap:12px;}
.kanban-col{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;width:220px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;max-height:100%;}
.col-header{padding:10px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;}
.col-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.col-count{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:1px 7px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);}
.col-bar{height:3px;margin:0 12px 8px;border-radius:2px;}
.cards-area{padding:8px;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;flex:1;}
.kanban-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;}
.card-tags{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.card-type{padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;}
.run-type{background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);}
.build-type{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.card-prio-critica{background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;}
.card-prio-alta{background:var(--orange-bg);color:var(--orange);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;}
.card-prio-media{background:var(--yellow-bg);color:var(--yellow);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;}
.card-prio-baja{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;}
.card-id{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:4px;}
.card-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.3;}
.card-divider{height:1px;background:var(--border2);margin:6px 0;}
.card-footer{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.card-user{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);}
.card-user-av{width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;}
.card-time{background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);color:var(--red);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 6px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--mono);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;}
.card-time.has-time{background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);color:var(--yellow);}
.card-blocker{background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:4px;padding:3px 8px;font-size:11px;color:var(--red);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-top:6px;}
.card-arrows{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:6px;}
.arrow-btn{flex:1;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:3px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:all .15s;}
.arrow-btn:hover{border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--blue);}
.add-task-btn{margin:8px;background:transparent;border:1px dashed var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:all .15s;}
.add-task-btn:hover{border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--blue);}
.col-wip{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600;}
.col-wip.over{color:var(--red);animation:wr-pulse 2s infinite;}
.kanban-card:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12);cursor:pointer;}
.kanban-card .card-actions{display:none;position:absolute;top:4px;right:4px;gap:3px;}
.kanban-card:hover .card-actions{display:flex;}
.kanban-card{position:relative;}
.typing-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:6px 0;}
.typing-dot{width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--blue);border-radius:50%;animation:bounce .7s infinite;}
.typing-dot:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.15s;}
.typing-dot:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.3s;}
@keyframes bounce{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-4px);}}
.loading-spinner{display:inline-block;width:16px;height:16px;border:2px solid var(--border);border-top-color:var(--blue);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:6px;}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
footer{background:var(--bg2);border-top:1px solid var(--border);height:32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 16px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);flex-shrink:0;}
/* ── PIPELINE ENHANCED ── */
.agent-icon{width:44px;height:44px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.pipeline-step{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .3s;}
.pipeline-step.running{border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(45,126,247,.2);}
.pipeline-step.done{border-color:rgba(63,185,80,.35);}
.step-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 14px;}
.step-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.step-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;}
.step-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px;}
.step-content{border-top:1px solid var(--border2);}
.step-desc{padding:14px;font-size:13px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--text2);}
.step-desc p{margin:0 0 8px;}
.step-desc p:last-child{margin:0;}
.step-desc h3{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin:10px 0 4px;}
.step-desc strong{color:var(--text);font-weight:600;}
.step-desc code{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px;padding:1px 5px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--cyan);}
.step-desc pre{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:10px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;overflow-x:auto;margin:8px 0;color:var(--text2);white-space:pre-wrap;}
.step-desc ul,.step-desc ol{padding-left:20px;margin:6px 0;}
.step-desc li{margin:3px 0;}
.step-desc hr{border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border2);margin:10px 0;}
.step-json-wrap{background:var(--bg3);border-top:1px solid var(--border2);}
.json-toggle-btn{width:100%;padding:8px 14px;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;text-align:left;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;letter-spacing:.3px;transition:color .15s;}
.json-toggle-btn:hover{color:var(--text2);}
.json-toggle-btn .arr{transition:transform .2s;display:inline-block;font-size:10px;}
.json-toggle-btn.open .arr{transform:rotate(90deg);}
.json-pre{display:none;padding:10px 14px;margin:0;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;color:var(--text2);max-height:280px;overflow-y:auto;border-top:1px solid var(--border2);}
.json-pre.open{display:block;}
/* ── CONFIG MODAL ── */
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.72);z-index:1000;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.modal-overlay.open{display:flex;}
.modal-box{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;width:580px;max-width:95vw;max-height:88vh;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.modal-header{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;}
.modal-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.modal-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text2);font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;line-height:1;padding:3px 7px;border-radius:4px;transition:color .15s;}
.modal-close:hover{color:var(--text);}
.modal-body{padding:16px 20px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1;}
.cf-section-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:14px 0 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.cf-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.cf-agent-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;}
.cf-input{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--cyan);outline:none;transition:border-color .15s;}
.cf-input:focus{border-color:var(--blue);}
.cf-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;}
.modal-footer{padding:12px 20px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;}
.btn-fetch{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:all .15s;}
.btn-fetch:hover{border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--text);}
.btn-save{background:#238636;border:1px solid #2ea043;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:7px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;}
.btn-save:hover{background:#2ea043;}
.fetched-list{margin-top:10px;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;}
.fetched-item{padding:8px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;}
.fetched-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.fetched-item:hover{background:var(--bg3);}
.fetched-item-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;}
.fetched-item-id{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--cyan);margin-top:2px;}
.config-btn{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:5px 10px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;transition:all .15s;}
.config-btn:hover{border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--text);}
@keyframes pulse-step{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(45,126,247,.4);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(45,126,247,.1);}}
@keyframes spawn-orbit{0%{transform:rotate(0deg) translateX(28px) rotate(0deg);}100%{transform:rotate(360deg) translateX(28px) rotate(-360deg);}}
@keyframes spawn-pulse{0%,100%{opacity:0.15;}50%{opacity:0.35;}}
.pipeline-step.running{animation:pulse-step 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;}
#toast{position:fixed;bottom:60px;right:20px;background:#238636;color:#fff;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;z-index:9999;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;pointer-events:none;}
/* ── FORM MODALS ── */
.btn-add-new{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#238636,#2ea043);border:1px solid #2ea043;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:6px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;transition:all .18s;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(35,134,54,.25);}
.btn-add-new:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(35,134,54,.4);}
.fm-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.82);z-index:2000;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(6px);}
.fm-overlay.open{display:flex;}
.fm-box{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;width:740px;max-width:97vw;max-height:94vh;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:0 28px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.7);}
.fm-header{padding:18px 24px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;}
.fm-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.fm-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text2);font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;transition:all .15s;}
.fm-close:hover{color:var(--red);background:var(--red-bg);}
.fm-steps{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;padding:12px 32px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg3);gap:0;}
.fm-step-dot{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;position:relative;}
.fm-step-dot:not(:last-child)::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:11px;left:calc(50% + 12px);right:calc(-50% + 12px);height:2px;background:var(--border);}
.fm-step-dot.done:not(:last-child)::after{background:var(--green);}
.fsd-circle{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);position:relative;z-index:1;transition:all .3s;}
.fsd-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.4px;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;transition:color .3s;}
.fm-step-dot.active .fsd-circle{border-color:var(--blue);background:var(--blue);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(45,126,247,.25);}
.fm-step-dot.active .fsd-label{color:var(--blue);}
.fm-step-dot.done .fsd-circle{border-color:var(--green);background:var(--green);color:#fff;}
.fm-step-dot.done .fsd-label{color:var(--green);}
.fm-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px 24px;}
.fm-footer{padding:14px 24px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg3);}
.fm-step{display:none;animation:fm-fadein .2s ease;}
.fm-step.active{display:block;}
@keyframes fm-fadein{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
.fm-field{margin-bottom:18px;}
.fm-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.fm-input{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:border-color .15s;font-family:var(--font);}
.fm-input:focus{border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(45,126,247,.15);}
.fm-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.fm-select{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
/* nivel */
.nivel-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin:6px 0;}
.nivel-card{border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:var(--bg3);}
.nivel-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.nivel-card.sel{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.35);}
.nc-badge{font-size:22px;font-weight:900;font-family:var(--mono);margin-bottom:4px;}
.nc-desc{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:5px;line-height:1.3;}
/* silo */
.silo-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin:6px 0;}
.silo-card{border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:var(--bg3);}
.silo-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);}
.silo-card.sel{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.sc-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:5px;}
.sc-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;}
/* skill chips */
.skill-cat-block{margin-bottom:14px;}
.skill-cat-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.skill-cat-line{height:2px;flex:1;border-radius:1px;opacity:.35;}
.skill-cat-cnt{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;opacity:.7;font-family:var(--mono);}
.skill-chips-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;}
.sk-chip{border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text2);user-select:none;}
.sk-chip:hover{color:var(--text);transform:scale(1.03);}
.sk-chip.sel{font-weight:700;transform:scale(1.03);}
/* preview */
.preview-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg3) 0%,var(--bg2) 100%);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;margin:4px 0 14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.pc-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.pc-avatar{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:19px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.pc-name{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;}
.pc-id{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:3px;}
.pc-meta{display:flex;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;}
.pc-skills-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:7px;}
.pc-skills-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:3px;}
/* prio cards */
.prio-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin:6px 0;}
.prio-card{border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:var(--bg3);}
.prio-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.prio-card.sel{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.35);}
.prio-icon{font-size:26px;margin-bottom:5px;}
.prio-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.3px;text-transform:uppercase;}
/* hours */
.hours-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:32px;font-weight:900;text-align:center;line-height:1;transition:color .3s;}
.hours-label{font-size:11px;text-align:center;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;}
.hours-slider{width:100%;-webkit-appearance:none;height:6px;border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;margin:10px 0 4px;}
.hours-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.4);}
/* btns */
.btn-fm-next{background:var(--blue);border:1px solid #4090ff;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:9px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:all .15s;}
.btn-fm-next:hover{background:#4090ff;transform:translateY(-1px);}
.btn-fm-back{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
.btn-fm-back:hover{border-color:var(--text);color:var(--text);}
.btn-fm-submit{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#238636,#2ea043);border:1px solid #3fb950;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:9px 22px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:all .18s;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(35,134,54,.3);}
.btn-fm-submit:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(35,134,54,.45);}
.btn-fm-submit:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none;box-shadow:none;}
.fm-skill-counter{background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.3);border-radius:20px;padding:2px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);font-family:var(--mono);}
.fm-section-sep{height:1px;background:var(--border2);margin:18px 0;}
/* ══════════════════ BUDGET MODULE ══════════════════ */
.nav-tab.budget.active{border-bottom-color:#10b981;}
.budget-page{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:100%;}
.budget-header{padding:14px 20px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);flex-shrink:0;}
.budget-kpi-row{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.bgt-kpi{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;flex:1;min-width:0;transition:border-color .15s;cursor:default;}
.bgt-kpi:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.14);}
.bgt-kpi-icon{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:7px;}
.bgt-kpi-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:19px;font-weight:800;line-height:1;margin-bottom:2px;}
.bgt-kpi-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:500;}
.bgt-kpi-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:1px;}
.bgt-estado{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;}
.bgt-borrador{background:rgba(139,148,158,.15);color:#8b949e;}
.bgt-revision{background:var(--yellow-bg);color:var(--yellow);}
.bgt-aprobado{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.bgt-cerrado{background:rgba(72,79,88,.3);color:#484f58;}
.bgt-rechazado{background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red);}
.budget-table-wrap{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
.bgt-amount{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;}
.bgt-actions{display:flex;gap:5px;align-items:center;}
.bgt-btn-edit{background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.3);color:var(--blue);border-radius:5px;padding:3px 8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
.bgt-btn-edit:hover{background:rgba(45,126,247,.3);}
.bgt-btn-del{background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.3);color:var(--red);border-radius:5px;padding:3px 8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
.bgt-btn-del:hover{background:rgba(248,81,73,.3);}
/* SAP Budget Form */
.fm-bgt-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.9);z-index:2500;display:none;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);padding:14px 0;}
.fm-bgt-overlay.open{display:flex;}
```
