.fm-bgt-box{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;width:1100px;max-width:98vw;height:calc(100vh - 28px);overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:0 32px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.85);}
.fm-bgt-header{padding:11px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg3);}
.fm-bgt-icon-box{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(16,185,129,.14);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.28);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.fm-bgt-id{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:1px;}
.fm-bgt-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:480px;}
.fm-bgt-estado-badge{padding:3px 9px;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin-left:8px;}
/* Live BAC bar */
.fm-bgt-bac-bar{display:flex;align-items:stretch;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg);overflow-x:auto;}
.bac-seg{flex:1;min-width:80px;padding:7px 10px;text-align:center;border-right:1px solid var(--border2);}
.bac-seg:last-child{border-right:none;background:rgba(16,185,129,.05);}
.bac-seg-label{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.6px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:2px;}
.bac-seg-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;font-weight:800;white-space:nowrap;}
.bac-seg-strip{height:2px;border-radius:1px;margin-top:3px;transition:background .3s;}
/* Layout */
.fm-bgt-layout{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
.fm-bgt-nav{width:190px;flex-shrink:0;border-right:1px solid var(--border);padding:10px 6px;overflow-y:auto;background:var(--bg3);}
.fm-bgt-nav-grp{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.7px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);padding:8px 10px 3px;margin-top:2px;}
.fm-bgt-nav-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;margin-bottom:2px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);border:1px solid transparent;}
.fm-bgt-nav-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text);}
.fm-bgt-nav-item.active{background:rgba(16,185,129,.12);color:#10b981;border-color:rgba(16,185,129,.2);}
.fm-bgt-nav-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
.fm-bgt-nav-amt{margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);}
.fm-bgt-content{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px 22px;}
.fm-bgt-section{display:none;animation:fm-fadein .18s ease;}
.fm-bgt-section.active{display:block;}
/* SAP section card */
.sap-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:14px;overflow:hidden;}
.sap-card-hdr{padding:10px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);background:var(--bg2);}
.sap-card-icon{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:5px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.sap-card-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;}
.sap-card-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-left:auto;}
.sap-card-body{padding:14px;}
.sap-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;}
.sap-grid-3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;}
.sap-grid-4{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;}
.sap-full{grid-column:1/-1;}
.sap-field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
.sap-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:.3px;text-transform:uppercase;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.sap-label .req{color:var(--red);font-size:9px;}
.sap-input{width:100%;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:all .15s;font-family:var(--font);}
.sap-input:focus{border-color:#10b981;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(16,185,129,.13);}
.sap-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.sap-input.mono{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;}
.sap-select{width:100%;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
.sap-select:focus{border-color:#10b981;outline:none;}
.sap-textarea{width:100%;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;resize:vertical;font-family:var(--font);min-height:68px;}
.sap-textarea:focus{border-color:#10b981;}
.sap-curr{position:relative;}
.sap-curr-sym{position:absolute;left:9px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);pointer-events:none;}
.sap-input.with-curr{padding-left:22px;font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;}
/* Labor display */
.labor-hero{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(16,185,129,.12),rgba(45,126,247,.07));border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.28);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;text-align:center;margin:10px 0;}
.labor-hero-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:36px;font-weight:900;color:#10b981;line-height:1;}
.labor-hero-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;}
.labor-formula{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);}
.labor-formula b{color:var(--text);font-family:var(--mono);}
/* Proveedores table */
.prov-tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;}
.prov-tbl th{padding:5px 7px;text-align:left;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);white-space:nowrap;}
.prov-tbl td{padding:3px 4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);vertical-align:middle;}
.prov-inp{width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:4px 6px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text);outline:none;}
.prov-inp:focus{border-color:#10b981;}
.prov-inp.num{font-family:var(--mono);text-align:right;}
.prov-sel{width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:4px 5px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text);outline:none;}
.prov-total{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#10b981;text-align:right;padding:3px 6px;white-space:nowrap;}
.prov-del{background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--red);border-radius:4px;padding:3px 7px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;}
.add-prov-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;background:rgba(16,185,129,.08);border:1px dashed rgba(16,185,129,.33);color:#10b981;border-radius:7px;padding:7px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;margin-top:8px;width:100%;transition:all .15s;}
.add-prov-btn:hover{background:rgba(16,185,129,.18);}
/* PMBOK Reservas */
.pmbok-info{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(16,185,129,.08),rgba(45,126,247,.06));border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.2);border-radius:9px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.pmbok-info-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#10b981;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;}
.pmbok-info-text{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.6;}
.reserva-card{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.reserva-card-name{flex:1;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;}
.reserva-card-pct{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:900;}
.reserva-card-amt{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#10b981;margin-left:auto;}
/* Resumen ejecutivo */
.resumen-breakdown{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;}
.resumen-row{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:9px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);font-size:12px;}
.resumen-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.resumen-dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;margin-right:8px;}
.resumen-label{flex:1;color:var(--text2);}
.resumen-bar-wrap{width:100px;height:4px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;margin:0 10px;flex-shrink:0;}
.resumen-bar{height:100%;border-radius:2px;}
.resumen-amt{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;min-width:100px;text-align:right;}
.resumen-pct-col{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);min-width:42px;text-align:right;}
.bac-hero{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(16,185,129,.18),rgba(45,126,247,.1));border:2px solid rgba(16,185,129,.44);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;text-align:center;margin:14px 0;}
.bac-hero-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:42px;font-weight:900;color:#10b981;line-height:1;}
.bac-hero-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:5px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;}
.bac-hero-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px;}
.pmbok-kpis{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;margin-top:14px;}
.pmbok-kpi-c{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:11px;text-align:center;}
.pmbok-kpi-v{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:800;line-height:1;margin-bottom:3px;}
.pmbok-kpi-l{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;}
.pmbok-kpi-d{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;}
/* footer */
.fm-bgt-footer{padding:10px 20px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg3);}
.fm-bgt-footer-info{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
/* ══════════════════ PMO GOVERNANCE ══════════════════ */
.nav-tab.governance.active{border-bottom-color:#f59e0b;}
.gov-page{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:100%;}
.gov-pillar{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.gov-pillar-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;cursor:pointer;}
.gov-pillar-icon{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.gov-pillar-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;}
.gov-pillar-badge{margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;}
.gov-score-bar{height:6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg);overflow:hidden;margin-top:4px;}
.gov-score-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width .3s;}
.gov-gate{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);}
.gov-gate-pending{background:var(--yellow-bg);color:var(--yellow);}
.gov-gate-approved{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.gov-gate-hold{background:var(--orange-bg);color:var(--orange);}
.gov-gate-rejected{background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red);}
.gov-gate-completed{background:rgba(139,148,158,.15);color:#8b949e;}
.nav-tab.docs.active{border-bottom-color:#0ea5e9;}
.doc-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;transition:all .15s;cursor:pointer;}
.doc-card:hover{border-color:rgba(14,165,233,.3);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.15);}
.doc-type-badge{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px;}
.doc-type-proyecto{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.doc-type-incidencia{background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);}
.doc-type-gobernanza{background:var(--purple-bg);color:var(--purple);}
.doc-type-formacion{background:var(--yellow-bg);color:var(--yellow);}
.doc-type-herramienta{background:var(--orange-bg);color:var(--orange);}
.doc-type-plantilla{background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);color:#0ea5e9;}
.doc-silo-build{border-left:3px solid var(--green);}
.doc-silo-run{border-left:3px solid var(--blue);}
.doc-silo-transversal{border-left:3px solid var(--purple);}
.doc-tag{display:inline-block;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px;padding:0 5px;font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);margin:1px;}
.nav-tab.devtools.active{border-bottom-color:#ef4444;}
.dev-page{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;height:100%;}
.dev-sidebar{width:200px;background:var(--bg2);border-right:1px solid var(--border);padding:8px;overflow-y:auto;flex-shrink:0;}
.dev-nav-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);transition:all .15s;margin-bottom:2px;}
.dev-nav-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text);}
.dev-nav-item.active{background:var(--red-bg);color:#ef4444;font-weight:600;}
.dev-content{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:14px;}
.dev-section{display:none;}
.dev-section.active{display:block;}
.dev-sql-editor{width:100%;min-height:100px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--text);resize:vertical;}
.dev-result-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px;margin-top:8px;}
.dev-result-table th{background:var(--bg3);padding:4px 8px;text-align:left;font-size:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);}
.dev-result-table td{padding:4px 8px;border:1px solid var(--border2);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;max-width:200px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;}
.dev-warn{background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.3);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.build-form-step{animation:fm-fadein .2s ease;}
.build-form-step:not(.active){display:none;}
/* ══════════════════ WAR ROOM COGNITIVO ══════════════════ */
.nav-tab.warroom.active{border-bottom-color:#a855f7;}
.wr-page{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;height:100%;}
.wr-sidebar{width:220px;background:var(--bg2);border-right:1px solid var(--border);padding:10px 8px;overflow-y:auto;flex-shrink:0;}
.wr-sidebar-title{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:8px 8px 4px;margin-top:4px;}
.wr-nav-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text2);transition:all .15s;border-left:2px solid transparent;margin-bottom:1px;}
.wr-nav-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text);}
.wr-nav-item.active{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text);border-left-color:#a855f7;font-weight:600;}
.wr-nav-icon{width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.wr-nav-badge{margin-left:auto;background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:10px;font-family:var(--mono);min-width:18px;text-align:center;}
.wr-content{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px 20px;}
.wr-section{display:none;}
.wr-section.active{display:block;}
/* KPI row */
.wr-kpi-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.wr-kpi{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;transition:border-color .15s;}
.wr-kpi:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
.wr-kpi-icon{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:6px;}
.wr-kpi-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:22px;font-weight:800;line-height:1;margin-bottom:2px;}
.wr-kpi-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px;}
/* Alert feed */
.wr-alert-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;transition:all .15s;}
.wr-alert-card:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
.wr-alert-card.crit{border-left:3px solid var(--red);animation:wr-pulse 2s infinite;}
.wr-alert-card.high{border-left:3px solid var(--orange);}
.wr-alert-card.medium{border-left:3px solid var(--yellow);}
.wr-alert-card.low{border-left:3px solid var(--green);}
@keyframes wr-pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(248,81,73,0);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 12px 2px rgba(248,81,73,.15);}}
.wr-alert-sev{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);flex-shrink:0;}
.wr-sev-critical{background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red);}
.wr-sev-high{background:var(--orange-bg);color:var(--orange);}
.wr-sev-medium{background:var(--yellow-bg);color:var(--yellow);}
.wr-sev-low{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.wr-alert-body{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.wr-alert-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
.wr-alert-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.4;}
.wr-alert-meta{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:6px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);}
.wr-alert-actions{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0;}
.wr-btn-sm{padding:4px 10px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid;transition:all .15s;}
.wr-btn-ack{background:var(--blue-bg);border-color:rgba(45,126,247,.3);color:var(--blue);}
.wr-btn-resolve{background:var(--green-bg);border-color:rgba(63,185,80,.3);color:var(--green);}
/* Chat */
.wr-chat-layout{display:flex;height:calc(100vh - 140px);gap:0;}
.wr-chat-agents{width:240px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px;overflow-y:auto;flex-shrink:0;margin-right:12px;}
.wr-agent-group{margin-bottom:10px;}
.wr-agent-group-title{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.wr-agent-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;}
.wr-agent-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 8px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);}
.wr-agent-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text);}
.wr-agent-item.active{background:var(--purple-bg);color:var(--purple);font-weight:600;}
.wr-agent-avatar{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
.wr-chat-main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;}
.wr-chat-header{padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--bg3);}
.wr-chat-header-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;}
.wr-chat-header-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);}
.wr-chat-online{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#3fb950;}
.wr-chat-messages{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
.wr-chat-bubble{max-width:80%;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:12px;font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;}
.wr-bubble-user{background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.2);align-self:flex-end;border-bottom-right-radius:4px;}
.wr-bubble-assistant{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);align-self:flex-start;border-bottom-left-radius:4px;}
.wr-bubble-meta{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px;}
.wr-chat-input-bar{padding:10px 14px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:8px;background:var(--bg3);}
.wr-chat-input{flex:1;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;font-family:var(--font);}
.wr-chat-input:focus{border-color:#a855f7;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(168,85,247,.15);}
.wr-chat-send{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#a855f7);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 18px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
.wr-chat-send:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(124,58,237,.3);}
/* Compliance cards */
.wr-compliance-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.wr-compliance-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.wr-compliance-type{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);background:var(--purple-bg);color:var(--purple);}
.wr-compliance-entity{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);}
/* Timeline */
.wr-timeline{position:relative;padding-left:24px;}
.wr-timeline::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:8px;top:0;bottom:0;width:2px;background:var(--border);}
.wr-timeline-item{position:relative;margin-bottom:14px;padding:10px 14px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;}
.wr-timeline-item::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:-20px;top:14px;width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--purple);background:var(--bg);}
.wr-timeline-time{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono);margin-bottom:4px;}
.wr-timeline-text{font-size:12px;line-height:1.4;}
/* Simulator */
.wr-sim-form{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.wr-sim-results{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.wr-sim-case{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;text-align:center;}
.wr-sim-case.best{border-color:rgba(63,185,80,.3);}
.wr-sim-case.base{border-color:rgba(210,153,34,.3);}
.wr-sim-case.worst{border-color:rgba(248,81,73,.3);}
.wr-sim-case-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.wr-sim-metric{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:3px 0;font-size:11px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);}
.wr-sim-metric-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;}
/* Metrics charts */
.wr-metric-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;}
.wr-metric-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;}
.wr-metric-card-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.wr-metric-agent-av{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
.wr-metric-vals{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin-top:8px;}
.wr-metric-v{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;line-height:1;}
.wr-metric-l{font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px;}
/* Postmortem */
.wr-pm-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.wr-pm-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.wr-pm-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;flex:1;}
.wr-pm-status{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;}
.wr-pm-draft{background:var(--yellow-bg);color:var(--yellow);}
.wr-pm-review{background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);}
.wr-pm-approved{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
/* Section title */
.wr-section-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
/* Semáforo RUN/BUILD */
.wr-semaforo{display:flex;gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.wr-sem-item{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px 18px;flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
.wr-sem-dot{width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
.wr-sem-dot.green{background:#3fb950;box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(63,185,80,.4);}
.wr-sem-dot.yellow{background:#d29922;box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(210,153,34,.4);}
.wr-sem-dot.red{background:#f85149;box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(248,81,73,.4);animation:wr-pulse 2s infinite;}
.wr-sem-label{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;}
.wr-sem-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);}
/* War Room session */
.wr-session-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
.wr-session-card:hover{border-color:rgba(168,85,247,.3);}
.wr-session-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;}
.wr-session-type{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red);}
.wr-session-active{background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);}
.wr-filter-bar{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.wr-filter-chip{padding:4px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);transition:all .15s;}
.wr-filter-chip:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.15);}
.wr-filter-chip.active{background:var(--purple-bg);border-color:rgba(168,85,247,.3);color:#a855f7;}
/* ── RUN Pipeline SSE Animations ── */
@keyframes agentPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(59,130,246,.4)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(59,130,246,0)}}
@keyframes slideInUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes typewriter{from{width:0}to{width:100%}}
.pipeline-step.sse-working{border-color:#3b82f6 !important;animation:agentPulse 1.5s infinite;}
.pipeline-step.sse-done{border-color:#3fb950 !important;background:rgba(63,185,80,.06) !important;}
.pipeline-step.sse-skipped{border-color:#484f58 !important;opacity:.5;}
.sse-task-card{animation:slideInUp .4s ease-out;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.sse-task-card .tech-placeholder{color:#f59e0b;font-size:11px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.sse-task-card .tech-assigned{color:#3fb950;font-size:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.sla-counter{background:#1a1d23;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin:12px 0;display:none;}
.sla-counter .sla-digits{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:32px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-align:center;}
.sla-counter .sla-bar{height:6px;background:#333840;border-radius:3px;margin-top:10px;overflow:hidden;}
.sla-counter .sla-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width 1s;}
.sse-log{background:#0d1117;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;line-height:1.6;margin-top:12px;display:none;}
.sse-log .log-line{display:flex;gap:8px;}.sse-log .log-ts{color:#484f58;min-width:50px;}
.sse-log .log-agent{font-weight:700;min-width:90px;}.sse-log .log-tool{color:#3fb950;}
.sse-log .log-warn{color:#f59e0b;}.sse-log .log-ok{color:#3fb950;}
.sse-kanban-mini{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:12px;}
.sse-kanban-col{background:#1a1d23;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:8px;min-height:80px;}
.sse-kanban-col-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:#484f58;margin-bottom:6px;text-align:center;}
.sse-kanban-card{background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 8px;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:10px;animation:slideInUp .3s ease-out;cursor:pointer;}
.sse-kanban-card:hover{border-color:#3b82f6;}
/* ── RUN Dashboard Visual ── */
.run-dashboard{font-family:inherit;color:#e4e5e9;}
.run-pipeline-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:12px 16px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.run-pipeline-bar .agent-pill{padding:8px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:2px solid #333840;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;transition:all .4s;white-space:nowrap;}
.run-pipeline-bar .agent-pill.waiting{opacity:.4;}
.run-pipeline-bar .agent-pill.active{border-color:#22c55e;color:#22c55e;animation:runPulse 1.5s infinite;}
.run-pipeline-bar .agent-pill.done{border-color:#22c55e;background:rgba(34,197,94,.12);color:#22c55e;}
.run-pipeline-bar .agent-pill.skipped{opacity:.3;text-decoration:line-through;}
.run-pipeline-bar .arrow-sep{color:#8b8f98;font-size:12px;}
@keyframes runPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(34,197,94,.3)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(34,197,94,.1)}}
@keyframes runSlideUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.run-sla-box{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;padding:16px 20px;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.3);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:12px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(239,68,68,.06),transparent);}
.run-sla-box.p2{border-color:rgba(234,179,8,.3);background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(234,179,8,.06),transparent);}
.run-sla-box.p3{border-color:rgba(59,130,246,.3);background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(59,130,246,.06),transparent);}
.run-sla-box.p4{border-color:rgba(34,197,94,.3);background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(34,197,94,.06),transparent);}
.run-sla-countdown{font-size:36px;font-weight:700;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;letter-spacing:2px;color:#ef4444;}
.run-sla-box.p2 .run-sla-countdown{color:#eab308;}.run-sla-box.p3 .run-sla-countdown{color:#3b82f6;}.run-sla-box.p4 .run-sla-countdown{color:#22c55e;}
.run-sla-label{font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:2px;}
.run-sla-details{flex:1;}
.run-sla-dates{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:6px;}
.run-sla-dates .start{color:#8b8f98;}.run-sla-dates .limit{font-weight:600;color:#e4e5e9;}
.run-sla-progress-track{height:6px;background:#181b20;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:4px;}
.run-sla-progress-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;background:#ef4444;transition:width 1s linear;}
.run-sla-box.p2 .run-sla-progress-fill{background:#eab308;}.run-sla-box.p3 .run-sla-progress-fill{background:#3b82f6;}.run-sla-box.p4 .run-sla-progress-fill{background:#22c55e;}
.run-sla-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;}
.run-sla-meta .pct{color:#8b8f98;}.run-sla-meta .priority{color:#ef4444;font-weight:600;}
.run-sla-box.p2 .run-sla-meta .priority{color:#eab308;}.run-sla-box.p3 .run-sla-meta .priority{color:#3b82f6;}.run-sla-box.p4 .run-sla-meta .priority{color:#22c55e;}
.run-fields{background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.run-fields-row{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;}.run-fields-row:last-child{margin-bottom:0;}
.run-field{flex:1;min-width:120px;}.run-field-label{font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:4px;}
.run-field-value{background:#181b20;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:13px;min-height:34px;}
.run-field-value.filled{border-color:rgba(34,197,94,.3);}
.badge-priority{display:inline-block;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;}
.badge-priority.p1{background:rgba(239,68,68,.2);color:#ef4444;}.badge-priority.p2{background:rgba(234,179,8,.2);color:#eab308;}
.badge-priority.p3{background:rgba(59,130,246,.2);color:#3b82f6;}.badge-priority.p4{background:rgba(34,197,94,.2);color:#22c55e;}
.run-section-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:8px;margin-top:4px;}
.run-tasks-grid{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.run-task-card{background:#181b20;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;font-size:12px;flex:1;min-width:180px;animation:runSlideUp .3s ease;}
.run-task-card .task-title{font-weight:600;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:4px;}
.run-task-card .task-hours{color:#8b8f98;font-size:11px;margin-bottom:6px;}
.run-task-card .skill-badge{display:inline-block;background:rgba(59,130,246,.15);color:#3b82f6;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;margin-right:4px;margin-bottom:4px;}
.run-task-card .tech-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
.run-task-card .tech-avatar{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}
.run-task-card .tech-avatar.ok{background:rgba(34,197,94,.2);color:#22c55e;}
.run-task-card .tech-avatar.fb{background:rgba(234,179,8,.2);color:#eab308;}
.run-task-card .tech-name{font-size:11px;color:#22c55e;}
.run-task-card .tech-searching{color:#8b8f98;font-size:11px;font-style:italic;}
.run-kanban{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.run-kanban-col{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.run-kanban-header{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;padding:5px 8px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px 6px 0 0;}
.run-kanban-body{background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 6px 6px;padding:4px;min-height:60px;}
.run-kanban-card{background:#181b20;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:4px;padding:6px 8px;font-size:10px;margin-bottom:3px;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s;animation:runSlideUp .3s ease;}
.run-kanban-card:hover{border-color:#22c55e;}
.run-kanban-card .kc-title{font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}.run-kanban-card .kc-meta{display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;}
.run-kanban-card .kc-priority{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;}
.run-kanban-card .kc-priority.p1{background:rgba(239,68,68,.2);color:#ef4444;}.run-kanban-card .kc-priority.p2{background:rgba(234,179,8,.2);color:#eab308;}
.run-kanban-card .kc-priority.p3{background:rgba(59,130,246,.2);color:#3b82f6;}.run-kanban-card .kc-priority.p4{background:rgba(34,197,94,.2);color:#22c55e;}
.run-kanban-card .kc-tech{font-size:9px;color:#22c55e;}
.run-log{background:#0d1117;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;}
.run-log-entry{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;}
.run-log-entry:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.run-log-time{color:#8b8f98;min-width:40px;font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;}
.run-log-agent{font-weight:600;min-width:56px;}
.run-log-agent.dispatcher{color:#ef6c4a;}.run-log-agent.resource{color:#3b82f6;}.run-log-agent.buffer{color:#eab308;}.run-log-agent.advisor{color:#22c55e;}
.run-log-tool{color:#22c55e;font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;}
.run-log-warn{color:#eab308;}.run-log-success{color:#22c55e;}
.build-dashboard{font-family:inherit;color:#e4e5e9;}
.build-pipeline-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:12px 16px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.build-pipeline-bar .bp{padding:7px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:2px solid #333840;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;transition:all .4s;white-space:nowrap;}
.build-pipeline-bar .bp.done{border-color:#22c55e;background:rgba(34,197,94,.12);color:#22c55e;}
.build-pipeline-bar .bp.fail{border-color:#ef4444;background:rgba(239,68,68,.12);color:#ef4444;}
.build-pipeline-bar .bp.wait{opacity:.4;}
.build-pipeline-bar .bsep{color:#8b8f98;font-size:11px;}
.build-section-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin:12px 0 8px;}
.build-summary{background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.build-summary-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px;}
.build-summary-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:8px;}
.build-summary-item{background:#181b20;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;}
.build-summary-item .bsi-label{font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:2px;}
.build-summary-item .bsi-value{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;}
.build-summary-item .bsi-value.budget{color:#22c55e;}
.build-summary-item .bsi-value.duration{color:#3b82f6;}
.build-summary-item .bsi-value.priority-alta{color:#ef4444;}
.build-summary-item .bsi-value.priority-media{color:#eab308;}
.build-team{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;}
.build-team-card{background:#181b20;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;min-width:110px;flex:1;}
.build-team-card .btc-name{font-weight:600;font-size:13px;}
.build-team-card .btc-role{color:#3b82f6;font-size:10px;margin-top:2px;}
.build-team-card .btc-level{font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:2px;}
.build-team-card .btc-level.leader{color:#eab308;}
.build-edt{background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.build-edt-stats{font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:10px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;}
.build-edt-stats strong{color:#e4e5e9;}
.build-edt-package{margin-bottom:6px;}
.build-edt-pkg-header{font-weight:600;font-size:13px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.build-edt-pkg-header .pkg-hours{font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;font-weight:400;}
.build-gantt{background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:12px;overflow-x:auto;}
.build-gantt-note{font-size:11px;color:#eab308;background:rgba(234,179,8,.06);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,.15);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.build-gantt-row{display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:3px;height:22px;}
.build-gantt-label{font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;width:140px;min-width:140px;text-align:right;padding-right:8px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;}
.build-gantt-track{flex:1;height:18px;position:relative;background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border-radius:3px;}
.build-gantt-bar{position:absolute;height:18px;border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;color:#fff;font-weight:600;}
.build-gantt-bar.crit{background:#eab308;}.build-gantt-bar.norm{background:#3b82f6;}.build-gantt-bar.parallel{background:#a78bfa;}
.build-gantt-legend{display:flex;gap:14px;margin-top:10px;font-size:10px;align-items:center;}
.build-gantt-legend .dot{display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:2px;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;}
.build-gantt-legend .saving{color:#22c55e;font-weight:600;}
.build-kanban{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.build-kanban-col{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.build-kanban-header{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;padding:5px 8px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px 6px 0 0;}
.build-kanban-body{background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 6px 6px;padding:4px;min-height:55px;}
.build-kanban-card{background:#181b20;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:4px;padding:6px 8px;font-size:10px;margin-bottom:3px;}
.build-kanban-card .bkc-title{font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}.build-kanban-card .bkc-tech{font-size:9px;color:#22c55e;}
.build-log{background:#0d1117;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;}
.pipeline-steps-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(15,23,42,0.8);border:1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.2);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.pipeline-steps-header .step-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#e8e9ed;margin-right:8px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:280px;}
.pipeline-steps-header .step-close{margin-left:auto;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);background:rgba(239,68,68,0.1);color:#ef4444;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;}
.pipeline-steps-header .step-close:hover{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.25);}
.pipeline-step-btn{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.2);background:rgba(30,41,59,0.6);color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;transition:all 0.2s;white-space:nowrap;}
.pipeline-step-btn:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,0.15);color:#c7d2fe;border-color:rgba(99,102,241,0.4);}
.pipeline-step-btn.completed{background:rgba(16,185,129,0.15);border-color:rgba(16,185,129,0.3);color:#10b981;}
.pipeline-step-btn.active{background:rgba(99,102,241,0.2);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,0.5);color:#818cf8;box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(99,102,241,0.2);}
.pipeline-step-btn.disabled{opacity:0.3;cursor:not-allowed;pointer-events:none;}
.pipeline-step-arrow{color:#4b5563;font-size:10px;margin:0 2px;}
.build-log-entry{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);font-size:12px;}
.build-log-entry:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.build-log-time{color:#8b8f98;min-width:40px;font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;}
.build-log-agent{font-weight:600;min-width:56px;}
.build-log-agent.estratega{color:#a78bfa;}.build-log-agent.resource{color:#3b82f6;}.build-log-agent.planificador{color:#eab308;}
.build-log-tool{color:#22c55e;font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;}
.build-log-warn{color:#eab308;}.build-log-error{color:#ef4444;}.build-log-success{color:#22c55e;}
.build-alert{border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.3);background:rgba(239,68,68,.06);border-radius:10px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.build-alert.warning{border-color:rgba(234,179,8,.3);background:rgba(234,179,8,.06);}
.build-alert-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#ef4444;margin-bottom:8px;}
.build-alert.warning .build-alert-title{color:#eab308;}
.build-alert-detail{font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:8px;}
/* ═══ Pipeline Animado con Iconos de Agentes ═══ */
.pipeline-animated{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:14px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:14px;overflow:hidden;}
.agent-step{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 16px;border:2px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;transition:all .5s ease;position:relative;min-width:160px;}
.agent-step .agent-icon{flex-shrink:0;transition:opacity .3s;}
.agent-step .agent-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.agent-step .agent-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#e4e5e9;}
.agent-step .agent-sub{font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;}
.agent-step .agent-status{position:absolute;top:-8px;right:-8px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;display:none;}
.agent-step.waiting{opacity:.35;border-color:#333840;}
.agent-step.active{border-color:var(--agent-color);box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(0,0,0,.3);animation:agent-glow 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
.agent-step.active .agent-sub{color:var(--agent-color);}
.agent-step.done{border-color:var(--agent-color);background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);}
.agent-step.done .agent-status{display:block;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:var(--agent-color);}
.agent-step.fail{border-color:#ef4444;background:rgba(239,68,68,.06);}
.agent-step.fail .agent-status{display:block;background:rgba(239,68,68,.2);color:#ef4444;}
@keyframes agent-glow{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,.05);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,.1);}}
.pipeline-arrow{color:#333840;font-size:18px;transition:color .5s;flex-shrink:0;}
.pipeline-arrow.active{color:#22c55e;}
.typing-dots{display:inline-flex;gap:3px;margin-left:4px;}
.typing-dots span{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--agent-color,#22c55e);animation:typing-bounce 1.4s infinite;}
.typing-dots span:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.2s;}
.typing-dots span:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.4s;}
@keyframes typing-bounce{0%,60%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}30%{transform:translateY(-4px);}}
/* ═══ Tarjetas RUN: candidatos, mini-SLA, expandibles ═══ */
.run-cand-task{background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px}
.run-cand-task-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px}
.run-cand-task-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600}
.run-cand-silo{display:inline-block;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600}
.silo-redes{background:rgba(6,182,212,.15);color:#06b6d4}.silo-bbdd{background:rgba(168,85,247,.15);color:#a855f7}
.silo-unix{background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);color:#22c55e}.silo-seg{background:rgba(239,68,68,.15);color:#ef4444}
.silo-win{background:rgba(59,130,246,.15);color:#3b82f6}.silo-backend{background:rgba(249,115,22,.15);color:#f97316}
.silo-frontend{background:rgba(236,72,153,.15);color:#ec4899}.silo-soporte{background:rgba(139,143,152,.15);color:#8b8f98}
.run-cand-mini-sla{font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;color:#ef4444}
.run-cand-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 8px;background:#181b20;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.run-cand-item:hover{border-color:#22c55e}.run-cand-item.selected{border-color:#22c55e;background:rgba(34,197,94,.08)}
.run-cand-item.recommended{border-left:3px solid #22c55e}
.run-cand-avatar{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0}
.run-cand-name{font-weight:600;font-size:12px}.run-cand-detail{color:#8b8f98;font-size:11px}
.run-cand-score{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;min-width:35px;text-align:center}
.run-task-pct{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e}
.run-infra-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin:8px 0}
.run-infra-item{background:#181b20;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 8px}
.run-infra-label{font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase}.run-infra-val{font-size:11px;font-family:monospace}
.run-infra-val.ip{color:#3b82f6}.run-infra-val.host{color:#22c55e}.run-infra-val.suggest{color:#eab308;font-style:italic}
.run-src-tag{font-size:7px;padding:1px 3px;border-radius:2px;margin-left:3px;font-weight:600}
.run-src-cmdb{background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);color:#22c55e}.run-src-ia{background:rgba(234,179,8,.15);color:#eab308}
.run-step{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}.run-step:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.run-step-n{min-width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);color:#22c55e;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0}
.run-step-t{font-weight:600;font-size:12px}
.run-cmd{display:block;font-family:monospace;font-size:10px;background:#181b20;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:4px;padding:3px 6px;margin:3px 0;color:#22c55e}
.run-chk{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px;padding:3px 0}
.run-chk-box{width:16px;height:16px;border:1.5px solid #333840;border-radius:3px;flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px}
.run-chk-box:hover{border-color:#22c55e}.run-chk-box.done{background:#22c55e;border-color:#22c55e;color:#fff}
.run-chk-text{font-size:11px}.run-chk-text.done{text-decoration:line-through;color:#8b8f98}
.run-status-bar{display:flex;border-top:1px solid #333840}
.run-status-btn{flex:1;padding:8px;text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;border-right:1px solid #333840}
.run-status-btn:last-child{border-right:none}.run-status-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.run-status-btn.current{border-top:2px solid #22c55e;color:#22c55e}
@keyframes slideDown{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.run-modal-overlay{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;animation:fadeIn 0.2s ease}
.run-modal-content{background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;width:90%;max-width:720px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;animation:slideDown 0.3s ease;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.run-sidebar-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px}
.run-inc-card{background:#22262e;border-left:3px solid #8b8f98;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.run-inc-card:hover{background:#2a2e38;transform:translateX(2px)}
.run-inc-card.active{border-color:#3b82f6;background:#2a2e38}
.run-inc-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:2px}
.run-inc-ticket{font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;font-family:monospace}
.run-inc-sla{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;letter-spacing:.5px}
.run-inc-pct{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace}
.run-inc-bar{height:3px;background:#181b20;border-radius:2px;margin-top:3px;overflow:hidden}
.run-inc-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:2px;transition:width 1s}
.inc-modal-overlay{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;animation:fadeIn .2s}
.inc-modal{background:#1e2128;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:14px;width:92%;max-width:780px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5);animation:slideDown .3s}
.inc-modal-header{padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.inc-modal-sla{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;padding:14px 18px;background:rgba(239,68,68,.04);border-bottom:1px solid #333840}
.inc-modal-sla-time{font-size:32px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;letter-spacing:1px}
.inc-modal-sla-label{font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98}
.inc-modal-fields{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:1px;background:#333840;border-bottom:1px solid #333840}
.inc-modal-field{background:#22262e;padding:8px 10px}
.inc-modal-field-label{font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase}
.inc-modal-field-value{font-size:12px;font-weight:600}
.inc-modal-tasks{padding:14px 18px;max-height:400px;overflow-y:auto}
.inc-modal-task{background:#22262e;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-left:3px solid #8b8f98;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:6px}
.inc-modal-task-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start}
.inc-modal-task-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed}
.inc-modal-task-tech{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:rgba(34,197,94,.06);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.2);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 8px;margin-top:4px}
.inc-modal-task-pct{font-size:20px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace}
.inc-modal-task-sla{font-size:9px;font-family:monospace;color:#ef4444}
.inc-modal-footer{padding:12px 18px;border-top:1px solid #333840;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end}
.inc-modal-btn{padding:8px 16px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98}
.inc-modal-btn-danger{border-color:rgba(239,68,68,.3);color:#ef4444}
.inc-modal-btn-primary{background:#22c55e;border:none;color:#fff;font-weight:600}
.inc-modal-change-panel{background:#181b20;border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,.3);border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 8px 8px;padding:8px 10px;display:none}
.run-modal-sla-box{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.06);border-bottom:1px solid #333840}
.run-modal-sla-countdown{font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#ef4444;letter-spacing:1px}
.run-modal-sla-meta{font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98}
.run-modal-sla-end{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#e4e5e9}
/* ═══ Kanban Cards Redesign ═══ */
.build-kanban-card{background:#2a2e38 !important;border:1px solid #3a3f4a !important;border-left:3px solid #8b8f98 !important;border-radius:6px !important;padding:8px 10px !important;margin-bottom:4px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.build-kanban-card:hover{border-color:#22c55e !important;background:#2f3340 !important;transform:translateY(-1px)}
.build-kanban-card .bkc-title{font-weight:600;font-size:12px;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:4px;line-height:1.3}
.build-kanban-card .bkc-meta{display:flex;gap:4px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.build-kanban-card .bkc-silo{display:inline-block;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-size:8px;font-weight:600}
.build-kanban-card .bkc-tech-assigned{font-size:9px;color:#22c55e;margin-top:3px;font-weight:500}
.build-kanban-card .bkc-sla{font-size:9px;font-family:monospace;color:#ef4444;margin-top:2px}
.build-kanban-header{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;padding:6px 8px;background:#252830 !important;border:1px solid #3a3f4a !important;border-radius:6px 6px 0 0}
.build-kanban-body{background:#1e2128 !important;border:1px solid #3a3f4a !important;border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 6px 6px;padding:4px;min-height:55px}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
/* ═══ P95 FASE 8 — KANBAN GLOBAL kg-* (scope: #kg-root) ═══ */
/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ═══════════════ TOKENS — heredados del shell (P95 FASE 11) ═══════════════ */
/* Cada --kg-* delega a la var equivalente del shell con fallback dark.
   Así el toggle :root.light del shell propaga automáticamente al kanban. */
#kg-root {
  --kg-bg:        var(--bg, #0d1117);
  --kg-bg2:       var(--bg2, #161b22);
  --kg-bg-card:   var(--bg3, #1c2128);
  --kg-bg-el:     var(--bg4, #22272e);
  --kg-bg-l3:     var(--bg4, #2d333b);
  --kg-border:    var(--border, #30363d);
  --kg-border-hi: #484f58;          /* sin equivalente directo, override en .light */
  --kg-tx:        var(--text, #e6edf3);
  --kg-tx2:       var(--text2, #8b949e);
  --kg-tx3:       var(--text3, #6e7681);
  --kg-acc-bl:    var(--blue, #58a6ff);
  --kg-acc-gn:    var(--green, #3fb950);
  --kg-acc-rd:    var(--red, #f85149);
  --kg-acc-or:    var(--orange, #d29922);
  --kg-acc-cy:    var(--cyan, #39d2c0);
  --kg-acc-pu:    var(--purple, #bc8cff);
  --kg-acc-pk:    var(--pink, #f778ba);
  --kg-acc-ye:    var(--yellow, #eab308);
  --kg-shd:       rgba(0,0,0,.3);   /* sombras dark por defecto */
  --kg-shd-lg:    rgba(0,0,0,.5);
  --kg-font:      var(--font, 'DM Sans',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Segoe UI,sans-serif);
  --kg-mono:      var(--mono, 'JetBrains Mono',Consolas,monospace);
}
/* Override: tokens sin equivalente directo en el shell para modo claro */
:root.light #kg-root {
  --kg-border-hi: #94a3b8;
  --kg-shd:       rgba(15,23,42,.08);
  --kg-shd-lg:    rgba(15,23,42,.18);
}
#kg-root * {margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
#kg-root {background:var(--kg-bg);color:var(--kg-tx);font-family:var(--kg-font);font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;height:calc(100vh - 100px);width:100%;flex:1;min-width:0;box-sizing:border-box;display:flex;flex-direction:column}

/* ═══════════════ TOPBAR ═══════════════ */















/* ═══════════════ FLOW METRICS PANEL ═══════════════ */
#kg-root .kg-flow-panel {background:var(--kg-bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--kg-border);flex-shrink:0;transition:max-height .35s ease;overflow:hidden;max-height:460px;position:relative}
#kg-root .kg-flow-panel.kg-collapsed {max-height:38px}
#kg-root .kg-flow-head {padding:9px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;user-select:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--kg-border);transition:.2s;cursor:pointer;height:38px;box-sizing:border-box}
#kg-root .kg-flow-panel.kg-collapsed .kg-flow-head {border-bottom-color:transparent}
#kg-root .kg-flow-head:hover {background:rgba(88,166,255,.04)}
#kg-root .kg-flow-head h3 {font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--kg-tx);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:0}
#kg-root .kg-flow-head h3 svg {color:var(--kg-acc-cy)}
#kg-root .kg-flow-head .kg-hint {font-size:10px;color:var(--kg-tx3);font-weight:500;text-transform:none;letter-spacing:0}
#kg-root .kg-flow-panel.kg-collapsed .kg-flow-head .kg-hint {color:var(--kg-tx2)}
#kg-root .kg-flow-toggle-btn {margin-left:auto;background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);color:var(--kg-tx2);height:22px;padding:0 10px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;transition:.15s;font-family:var(--kg-font);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px}
#kg-root .kg-flow-toggle-btn:hover {background:var(--kg-bg-l3);border-color:var(--kg-border-hi);color:var(--kg-tx)}
#kg-root .kg-flow-toggle-btn .kg-chev {display:inline-block;transition:transform .3s ease;font-size:9px}
#kg-root .kg-flow-panel.kg-collapsed .kg-flow-toggle-btn .kg-chev {transform:rotate(-180deg)}
#kg-root .kg-flow-panel:not(.kg-collapsed) .kg-flow-toggle-btn .kg-txt-open {display:none}
#kg-root .kg-flow-panel.kg-collapsed .kg-flow-toggle-btn .kg-txt-close {display:none}
#kg-root .kg-flow-panel.kg-collapsed .kg-flow-toggle-btn {background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(57,210,192,.12),rgba(88,166,255,.12));border-color:rgba(57,210,192,.4);color:var(--kg-acc-cy)}
#kg-root .kg-flow-body {padding:10px 14px 0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi-row {display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:8px}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi {background:var(--kg-bg-card);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:7px;padding:9px 12px 8px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;text-align:left}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi::before {content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:2px}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-cy::before {background:var(--kg-acc-cy)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-bl::before {background:var(--kg-acc-bl)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-gn::before {background:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-or::before {background:var(--kg-acc-or)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-pu::before {background:var(--kg-acc-pu)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-rd::before {background:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi-value {font-size:22px;font-weight:800;font-family:var(--kg-mono);line-height:1;display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:1px;margin-bottom:4px}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi-value .kg-u {font-size:11px;font-weight:700;opacity:.8}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-cy .kg-fkpi-value {color:var(--kg-acc-cy)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-bl .kg-fkpi-value {color:var(--kg-acc-bl)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-gn .kg-fkpi-value {color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-or .kg-fkpi-value {color:var(--kg-acc-or)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-pu .kg-fkpi-value {color:var(--kg-acc-pu)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi.kg-rd .kg-fkpi-value {color:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-fkpi-label {font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--kg-tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px}
#kg-root .kg-charts-row {display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1.2fr 1fr;gap:8px}
#kg-root .kg-dist-group {margin-bottom:9px}
#kg-root .kg-dist-group:last-child {margin-bottom:0}
#kg-root .kg-dist-label {font-size:9px;color:var(--kg-tx3);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;letter-spacing:.3px}
#kg-root .kg-dist-label span {margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--kg-mono);color:var(--kg-tx2);font-weight:600}
#kg-root .kg-dist-row {display:flex;height:18px;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--kg-bg-el)}
#kg-root .kg-dist-seg {display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#0d1117;font-family:var(--kg-mono);overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap}
#kg-root .kg-chart-box {background:var(--kg-bg-card);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:7px;padding:8px 10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
#kg-root .kg-chart-title {font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--kg-tx2);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
#kg-root .kg-chart-title .note {margin-left:auto;font-size:8px;font-weight:500;color:var(--kg-tx3);text-transform:none;letter-spacing:0;font-family:var(--kg-mono)}
#kg-root .kg-chart-body {flex:1;position:relative;min-height:130px;max-height:150px}
#kg-root .kg-flow-footer {display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:5px 14px;font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--kg-tx2);background:var(--kg-bg2);border-top:1px solid var(--kg-border)}
#kg-root .kg-flow-footer .kg-ff-item {display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
#kg-root .kg-flow-footer .kg-ff-item b {font-weight:800}
#kg-root .kg-flow-footer .kg-ff-item.kg-wip b {color:var(--kg-acc-pu)}
#kg-root .kg-flow-footer .kg-ff-item.kg-blk b {color:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-flow-footer .kg-ff-item.kg-done b {color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-flow-footer .kg-ff-sp {flex:1}

/* ═══════════════ KANBAN TOOLBAR ═══════════════ */
#kg-root .kg-kb-toolbar {background:var(--kg-bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--kg-border);padding:8px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;min-height:38px}
#kg-root .kg-kb-title {font-size:13px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
#kg-root .kg-kb-title svg {color:var(--kg-acc-cy)}
#kg-root .kg-kb-total {font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:10px;background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;color:var(--kg-tx2)}
#kg-root .kg-kb-filter {background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);color:var(--kg-tx);padding:5px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;font-family:var(--kg-font);outline:none;cursor:pointer}
#kg-root .kg-kb-search {flex:1;max-width:260px;background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);color:var(--kg-tx);padding:5px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;font-family:var(--kg-font);outline:none}
#kg-root .kg-kb-seg {display:flex;background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden}
#kg-root .kg-kb-seg button {background:none;border:none;color:var(--kg-tx2);padding:5px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--kg-font)}
#kg-root .kg-kb-seg button.kg-on {background:var(--kg-bg-l3);color:var(--kg-tx)}
#kg-root .kg-kb-seg button:not(:last-child) {border-right:1px solid var(--kg-border)}

/* ═══════════════ KANBAN BOARD ═══════════════ */
#kg-root .kg-kanban {flex:1;overflow-x:auto;overflow-y:hidden;display:flex;gap:10px;padding:12px 18px;background:var(--kg-bg)}
#kg-root .kg-kb-col {background:var(--kg-bg2);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:10px;flex:1 1 0;min-width:260px;min-height:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;max-height:100%}
#kg-root .kg-kb-col-h {padding:10px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--kg-border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0}
#kg-root .kg-kb-col-h h4 {font-size:11px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px}
#kg-root .kg-kb-col-h .kg-dot {width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%}
#kg-root .kg-kb-col-h .kg-kcnt {margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:10px;background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;color:var(--kg-tx2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt .kg-wip-cur {font-weight:800}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt .kg-wip-sep {color:var(--kg-tx3);opacity:.5}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt .kg-wip-lim {cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px dotted var(--kg-tx3);padding:0 1px}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt .kg-wip-lim:hover {color:var(--kg-acc-cy);border-bottom-color:var(--kg-acc-cy)}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt .kg-wip-lim.kg-wip-empty {color:var(--kg-tx3);font-style:italic}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt .kg-wip-lim-input {background:var(--kg-bg);border:1px solid var(--kg-acc-cy);color:var(--kg-tx);border-radius:3px;width:38px;padding:0 4px;font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:800;outline:none;text-align:center}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt .kg-wip-badge {font-size:8px;font-weight:800;padding:0 4px;border-radius:3px;letter-spacing:.3px}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt.kg-wip-ok {border-color:rgba(63,185,80,.4);background:rgba(63,185,80,.08)}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt.kg-wip-ok .kg-wip-cur {color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt.kg-wip-ok .kg-wip-badge {background:rgba(63,185,80,.15);color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt.kg-wip-over {border-color:rgba(248,81,73,.55);background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);animation:kg-wip-pulse 2s infinite}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt.kg-wip-over .kg-wip-cur {color:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-kcnt.kg-wip-over .kg-wip-badge {background:rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-kb-col.kg-wip-over-col {border-color:rgba(248,81,73,.55);box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(248,81,73,.2)}
@keyframes kg-wip-pulse {0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.7}}
#kg-root .kg-kb-body {flex:1 1 0;min-height:calc(100vh - 380px);overflow-y:auto;padding:8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
#kg-root .kg-kb-body::-webkit-scrollbar {width:6px}
#kg-root .kg-kb-body::-webkit-scrollbar-track {background:transparent}
#kg-root .kg-kb-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {background:var(--kg-border);border-radius:3px}

/* ═══════════════ CARD (kk) ═══════════════ */
#kg-root .kg-kk {background:var(--kg-bg-card);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 10px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;position:relative}
#kg-root .kg-kk:hover {border-color:var(--kg-border-hi);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px var(--kg-shd)}
#kg-root .kg-kk::before {content:'';position:absolute;left:-1px;top:-1px;bottom:-1px;width:3px;border-radius:3px 0 0 3px}
#kg-root .kg-kk.kg-run::before {background:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-kk.kg-build::before {background:var(--kg-acc-pu)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-top {display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;margin-bottom:5px}
#kg-root .kg-kk-type {font-size:8px;font-weight:800;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;letter-spacing:.3px}
#kg-root .kg-kk-type.kg-run {background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);color:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-type.kg-build {background:rgba(188,140,255,.15);color:var(--kg-acc-pu)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-id {font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--kg-tx3);font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;max-width:120px}
#kg-root .kg-kk-origen {margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:8px;color:var(--kg-tx3);background:var(--kg-bg-el);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;border:1px solid var(--kg-border)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-origen.kg-ag {color:var(--kg-acc-cy);border-color:rgba(57,210,192,.3)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-title {font-size:11.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--kg-tx);line-height:1.35;margin-bottom:7px;padding-right:36px}
#kg-root .kg-kk-pct {position:absolute;top:30px;right:10px;font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:800;line-height:1;background:var(--kg-bg-card);padding:1px 3px;border-radius:3px;z-index:2}
#kg-root .kg-kk-meta {display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:6px}
#kg-root .kg-kk-pri {font-size:8px;font-weight:800;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px}
#kg-root .kg-kk-pri.kg-p1 {background:rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-pri.kg-p2 {background:rgba(210,153,34,.2);color:var(--kg-acc-or)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-pri.kg-p3 {background:rgba(88,166,255,.2);color:var(--kg-acc-bl)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-pri.kg-p4 {background:rgba(139,148,158,.2);color:var(--kg-tx2)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-sla {font-size:9px;font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--kg-bg-el)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-sla.kg-ok {color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-sla.kg-warn {color:var(--kg-acc-or);background:rgba(210,153,34,.1)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-sla.kg-danger {color:var(--kg-acc-rd);background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);animation:blink 1.5s infinite}
#kg-root .kg-kk-sla.kg-done {color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-sla.kg-paused {color:var(--kg-tx2);background:var(--kg-bg-l3)}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.55}}
#kg-root .kg-kk.kg-highlight {outline:2px solid var(--kg-acc-ye);outline-offset:-1px;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(234,179,8,.25);animation:kk-pulse 1.5s ease-in-out 2}
@keyframes kk-pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(234,179,8,.25)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(234,179,8,.4)}}
#kg-root .kg-kk.kg-dragging {opacity:.4}
#kg-root .kg-kb-col.kg-over {background:var(--kg-bg-card);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px var(--kg-acc-bl)}
/* ═══════════════ MODAL FICHA ═══════════════ */
#kg-root .kg-modal-overlay {position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.65);z-index:200;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;backdrop-filter:blur(2px)}
#kg-root .kg-modal-overlay.kg-on {display:flex}
#kg-root .kg-detail-modal {background:var(--kg-bg-card);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:16px;width:94%;max-width:820px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 24px 48px var(--kg-shd-lg)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-hdr {padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--kg-border);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;position:sticky;top:0;background:var(--kg-bg-card);z-index:2}
#kg-root .kg-dm-hdr-left {flex:1}
#kg-root .kg-dm-hdr h2 {font-size:15px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;line-height:1.3}
#kg-root .kg-dm-hdr .kg-dm-id {font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--kg-tx3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
#kg-root .kg-dm-hdr .kg-dm-id .kg-dm-type {font-weight:800;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-hdr .kg-dm-id .kg-dm-type.kg-run {background:rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-hdr .kg-dm-id .kg-dm-type.kg-build {background:rgba(188,140,255,.2);color:var(--kg-acc-pu)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-close {width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);color:var(--kg-tx2);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}
#kg-root .kg-dm-close:hover {background:var(--kg-acc-rd);color:#fff}
#kg-root .kg-dm-body {padding:16px 20px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-row {display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-field label {display:block;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--kg-tx3);margin-bottom:3px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-field .kg-val {font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--kg-tx)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-field .kg-val.kg-rd {color:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-field .kg-val.kg-or {color:var(--kg-acc-or)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-field .kg-val.kg-gn {color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-field .kg-val.kg-cy {color:var(--kg-acc-cy)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-times {background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-top:4px;margin-bottom:14px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-times-h {font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--kg-tx2);margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-times-grid {display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-time-cell {background:var(--kg-bg-card);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 9px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-time-cell .kg-l {font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--kg-tx3);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-time-cell .kg-v {font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:14px;font-weight:800}
#kg-root .kg-dm-subtasks {margin-top:14px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-subtasks h4 {font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--kg-tx2);margin-bottom:8px;padding-bottom:5px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--kg-border)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-st {background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:6px;position:relative}
#kg-root .kg-dm-st-title {font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;padding-right:60px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-st-meta {display:flex;gap:5px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
#kg-root .kg-dm-st-tag {font-size:8px;font-weight:700;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-st-tag.kg-done {background:rgba(63,185,80,.15);color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-st-tag.kg-doing {background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);color:var(--kg-acc-or)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-st-tag.kg-todo {background:var(--kg-bg-l3);color:var(--kg-tx2)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-st-h {font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;position:absolute;top:8px;right:10px;color:var(--kg-tx2)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-notes {margin-top:14px;background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden}
#kg-root .kg-dm-notes-h {padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--kg-border);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--kg-tx2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-notes-body {padding:10px 14px;max-height:280px;overflow-y:auto}
#kg-root .kg-dm-note {margin-bottom:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.5;border-left:2px solid var(--kg-acc-cy);background:var(--kg-bg-card);position:relative}
#kg-root .kg-dm-note.kg-sys {border-left-color:var(--kg-acc-bl)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-note.kg-ag {border-left-color:var(--kg-acc-pu)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-note.kg-alert {border-left-color:var(--kg-acc-or)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-note .kg-note-author {font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--kg-acc-cy);margin-bottom:3px;display:block}
#kg-root .kg-dm-note.kg-sys .kg-note-author {color:var(--kg-acc-bl)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-note.kg-ag .kg-note-author {color:var(--kg-acc-pu)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-note.kg-alert .kg-note-author {color:var(--kg-acc-or)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-note .kg-note-time {font-size:8px;color:var(--kg-tx3);font-family:var(--kg-mono);position:absolute;top:8px;right:10px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-input-row {display:flex;gap:6px;padding:8px 14px;border-top:1px solid var(--kg-border)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-input-row input {flex:1;background:var(--kg-bg-card);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);color:var(--kg-tx);padding:6px 10px;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-family:var(--kg-font);outline:none}
#kg-root .kg-dm-input-row button {background:var(--kg-acc-bl);border:none;color:#fff;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}
/* Asignación cascada (FASE 10) */
#kg-root .kg-dm-assign {background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-top:4px;margin-bottom:14px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-assign-h {font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--kg-tx2);margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-assign-grid {display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr auto;gap:8px;align-items:end}
#kg-root .kg-dm-assign label {display:block;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--kg-tx3);margin-bottom:3px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-assign select {width:100%;background:var(--kg-bg-card);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);color:var(--kg-tx);padding:6px 10px;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-family:var(--kg-font);outline:none;cursor:pointer}
#kg-root .kg-dm-assign select:focus {border-color:var(--kg-acc-cy)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-assign select:disabled {opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed}
#kg-root .kg-dm-assign .kg-btn-save {background:var(--kg-acc-gn);border:none;color:#0d1117;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px;white-space:nowrap}
#kg-root .kg-dm-assign .kg-btn-save:hover {filter:brightness(1.1)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-assign .kg-btn-save:disabled {opacity:.4;cursor:not-allowed}
#kg-root .kg-dm-tec-info {grid-column:1/-1;font-size:10px;color:var(--kg-tx2);margin-top:4px;font-family:var(--kg-mono)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-tec-info b {color:var(--kg-acc-cy)}
/* Descripción */
#kg-root .kg-dm-desc {background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-desc-h {font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--kg-tx2);margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-desc-body {font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;color:var(--kg-tx);white-space:pre-wrap}
/* ── Descripción JSON estructurada (FASE 12) ── */
#kg-root .kg-desc-section {background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:10px}
#kg-root .kg-desc-section-h {font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--kg-tx2);margin-bottom:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;letter-spacing:.4px}
#kg-root .kg-desc-chips {display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}
#kg-root .kg-desc-chip {display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:var(--kg-bg-card);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:14px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:10px;color:var(--kg-tx);font-family:var(--kg-font)}
#kg-root .kg-desc-chip b {font-size:8px;color:var(--kg-tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px;font-weight:700}
#kg-root .kg-desc-chip.kg-cy {border-color:rgba(57,210,192,.3);background:rgba(57,210,192,.06)}
#kg-root .kg-desc-chip.kg-or {border-color:rgba(210,153,34,.3);background:rgba(210,153,34,.06)}
#kg-root .kg-desc-chip.kg-pu {border-color:rgba(188,140,255,.3);background:rgba(188,140,255,.06)}
/* Checklist */
#kg-root .kg-desc-checklist {list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px}
#kg-root .kg-desc-checklist li {display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;font-size:11px;color:var(--kg-tx);padding:5px 8px;background:var(--kg-bg-card);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:6px}
#kg-root .kg-desc-checklist li::before {content:'';display:inline-block;width:14px;height:14px;border:1.5px solid var(--kg-tx3);border-radius:3px;flex-shrink:0;background:transparent}
/* CMDB table */
#kg-root .kg-cmdb-table {width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px}
#kg-root .kg-cmdb-table th {text-align:left;padding:5px 8px;background:var(--kg-bg-card);font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--kg-tx3);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.3px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--kg-border)}
#kg-root .kg-cmdb-table td {padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--kg-border);color:var(--kg-tx);vertical-align:middle}
#kg-root .kg-cmdb-table tr:last-child td {border-bottom:none}
#kg-root .kg-cmdb-table td.kg-cmdb-campo {font-weight:600;color:var(--kg-tx2);width:35%}
#kg-root .kg-cmdb-table td.kg-cmdb-valor {font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:10px;word-break:break-all}
#kg-root .kg-cmdb-table td.kg-cmdb-source {width:60px;text-align:right}
/* Source badge (CMDB / IA) */
#kg-root .kg-source-badge {display:inline-block;font-size:8px;font-weight:800;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:10px;letter-spacing:.4px;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:var(--kg-mono)}
#kg-root .kg-source-badge.kg-src-cmdb {background:rgba(88,166,255,.15);color:var(--kg-acc-bl);border:1px solid rgba(88,166,255,.3)}
#kg-root .kg-source-badge.kg-src-ia {background:rgba(188,140,255,.15);color:var(--kg-acc-pu);border:1px solid rgba(188,140,255,.3)}
/* Instrucciones paso a paso */
#kg-root .kg-instr-list {display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
#kg-root .kg-instr {background:var(--kg-bg-card);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px 12px 10px;position:relative}
#kg-root .kg-instr-num {position:absolute;top:-9px;left:10px;background:var(--kg-acc-cy);color:var(--kg-bg);font-size:9px;font-weight:800;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-family:var(--kg-mono);letter-spacing:.5px}
#kg-root .kg-instr-titulo {font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--kg-tx);margin-bottom:3px;margin-top:2px}
#kg-root .kg-instr-detalle {font-size:10px;color:var(--kg-tx2);margin-bottom:7px;line-height:1.45}
#kg-root .kg-instr-cmds-h {display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px}
#kg-root .kg-instr-cmds-label {font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--kg-tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px}
#kg-root .kg-cmd {background:#0a0e14;color:#a5b4fc;font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:10px;padding:8px 11px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--kg-border);white-space:pre-wrap;margin:0;line-height:1.55;overflow-x:auto}
:root.light #kg-root .kg-cmd {background:#1e293b;color:#e2e8f0}
/* SLA countdown grande */
#kg-root .kg-dm-sla {background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(248,81,73,.08),rgba(210,153,34,.06));border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px 18px;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-sla-icon {font-size:24px;line-height:1}
#kg-root .kg-dm-sla-info {flex:1}
#kg-root .kg-dm-sla-label {font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--kg-tx3);letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:2px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-sla-value {font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:24px;font-weight:800;line-height:1}
#kg-root .kg-dm-sla-value.kg-ok {color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-sla-value.kg-warn {color:var(--kg-acc-or)}
