#kg-root .kg-dm-sla-value.kg-danger {color:var(--kg-acc-rd);animation:kg-wip-pulse 1.5s infinite}
#kg-root .kg-dm-sla-value.kg-paused {color:var(--kg-tx2)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-sla-value.kg-done {color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
/* Dependencias chips */
#kg-root .kg-dm-deps {background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-deps-h {font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--kg-tx2);margin-bottom:8px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-deps-list {display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-dep-chip {display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:4px 9px;background:rgba(234,179,8,.1);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,.3);border-radius:14px;font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--kg-acc-ye);cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
#kg-root .kg-dm-dep-chip:hover {background:rgba(234,179,8,.2);transform:translateY(-1px)}
/* Botones de acción top-right */
#kg-root .kg-dm-actions {display:flex;gap:6px;margin-right:8px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-action-btn {background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);color:var(--kg-tx2);padding:5px 11px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--kg-font);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px;transition:.15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
#kg-root .kg-dm-action-btn:hover {color:var(--kg-tx);border-color:var(--kg-border-hi)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-action-btn.kg-escalar:hover {background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);border-color:var(--kg-acc-or);color:var(--kg-acc-or)}
#kg-root .kg-dm-action-btn.kg-cerrar:hover {background:rgba(63,185,80,.15);border-color:var(--kg-acc-gn);color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
/* ═══════════════ TOAST ═══════════════ */
#kg-root .kg-toast {position:fixed;bottom:20px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--kg-bg-card);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);border-left:3px solid var(--kg-acc-gn);padding:10px 18px;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;z-index:300;box-shadow:0 8px 24px var(--kg-shd-lg);display:none}
#kg-root .kg-toast.kg-on {display:block}
#kg-root .kg-toast.kg-err {border-left-color:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-deadline {font-size:9px;font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--kg-bg-el)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-deadline.kg-ok {color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-deadline.kg-warn {color:var(--kg-acc-or);background:rgba(210,153,34,.1)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-deadline.kg-overdue {color:var(--kg-acc-rd);background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);font-weight:800;animation:blink 1.5s infinite}
#kg-root .kg-kk-ci {font-size:8px;color:var(--kg-tx3);background:var(--kg-bg-el);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;border:1px solid var(--kg-border)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-prj {font-size:8px;color:var(--kg-acc-pu);background:rgba(188,140,255,.1);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;border:1px solid rgba(188,140,255,.25);font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;max-width:120px}
#kg-root .kg-kk-dep {font-size:8px;color:var(--kg-acc-ye);background:rgba(234,179,8,.1);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,.25);font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px}
#kg-root .kg-kk-dep:hover {background:rgba(234,179,8,.2)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-tech {display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:var(--kg-bg-el);border:1px solid var(--kg-border);padding:3px 6px;border-radius:5px;margin-top:5px}
#kg-root .kg-kk-tech-av {width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:#0d1117;border:2px solid transparent;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#58a6ff,#39d2c0)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-tech-av.kg-ok {border-color:var(--kg-acc-gn)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-tech-av.kg-over {border-color:var(--kg-acc-or)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-tech-name {font-size:10px;font-weight:600;flex:1;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
#kg-root .kg-kk-tech-load {font-family:var(--kg-mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--kg-tx2)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-tech.kg-unassigned {background:rgba(248,81,73,.08);border-color:rgba(248,81,73,.3);color:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-tech.kg-unassigned .kg-kk-tech-av {background:var(--kg-bg-l3);color:var(--kg-tx3);border-color:var(--kg-acc-rd)}
#kg-root .kg-kk-bar {height:3px;background:var(--kg-bg-l3);border-radius:2px;margin-top:7px;overflow:hidden}
#kg-root .kg-kk-bar-fill {height:100%;border-radius:2px;transition:.3s}
/* ═══ END P95 FASE 8 ═══ */

</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ═══════════════ LOGIN SCREEN ═══════════════ -->
<div id="login-screen">
  <div class="login-particles" id="login-particles"></div>
  <div class="login-container">
    <div class="login-card">
      <div class="login-error" id="login-error"></div>
      <div class="login-field">
        <label data-i18n="login.user">Usuario / Email</label>
        <input type="text" id="login-email" placeholder="tu.email@cognitivepmo.com" autocomplete="username" autofocus>
      </div>
      <div class="login-field">
        <label data-i18n="login.pass">Contraseña</label>
        <input type="password" id="login-password" placeholder="••••••••" autocomplete="current-password">
      </div>
      <button class="login-btn" id="login-btn" onclick="doLogin()">
        <span data-i18n="login.btn">Iniciar Sesión</span>
      </button>
      <div style="margin-top:18px;padding:12px 14px;background:rgba(45,126,247,.08);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.15);border-radius:8px;">
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;">
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--blue)" stroke-width="1.8" style="flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12.01" y2="8"/></svg>
          <span><span data-i18n="login.help">¿Problemas para acceder? Contacta con el administrador:</span><br>
          <strong style="color:var(--text);">Jose Antonio Martinez Victoria</strong><br>
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--cyan);font-size:11px;">admin@cognitivepmo.com</span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;margin-top:18px;">
        <button onclick="setLang('es')" id="login-lang-es" style="padding:6px 16px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text);">ES Español</button>
        <button onclick="setLang('en')" id="login-lang-en" style="padding:6px 16px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text);">EN English</button>
      </div>
      <div class="login-footer">
        Cognitive PMO &mdash; <span data-i18n="login.footer">Role-Based Access Control</span><br>
        <span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:10px;">TFM &copy; 2025 &middot; Jose Antonio Martinez Victoria</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ═══ DEMO TRIBUNAL PANEL ═══ -->
    <div class="demo-panel" id="demo-panel">
      <div class="demo-title">Acceso r&aacute;pido &mdash; Demo Tribunal</div>
      <div class="demo-grid">
        <div class="demo-card" onclick="demoLogin('alejandro.vidal@cognitivepmo.com','index')" style="--dc-color:rgba(234,179,8,.15);">
          <div class="demo-avatar" style="background:rgba(234,179,8,.15);color:#eab308;border-color:rgba(234,179,8,.3);">AV</div>
          <div class="demo-info"><div class="demo-name">Alejandro Vidal</div><div class="demo-role">CEO</div><div class="demo-dest">&rarr; Vista Ejecutiva</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="demo-card" onclick="demoLogin('carmen.delgado@cognitivepmo.com','index')" style="--dc-color:rgba(139,92,246,.15);">
          <div class="demo-avatar" style="background:rgba(139,92,246,.15);color:#8b5cf6;border-color:rgba(139,92,246,.3);">CD</div>
          <div class="demo-info"><div class="demo-name">Carmen Delgado</div><div class="demo-role">CTO</div><div class="demo-dest">&rarr; Vista Ejecutiva</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="demo-card" onclick="demoLogin('patricia.lopez@cognitivepmo.com','gov-run')" style="--dc-color:rgba(248,81,73,.15);">
          <div class="demo-avatar" style="background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);color:#f85149;border-color:rgba(248,81,73,.3);">PL</div>
          <div class="demo-info"><div class="demo-name">Patricia L&oacute;pez</div><div class="demo-role">VP Operations</div><div class="demo-dest">&rarr; Gobernanza RUN</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="demo-card" onclick="demoLogin('miguelangel.ruiz@cognitivepmo.com','gov-build')" style="--dc-color:rgba(45,126,247,.15);">
          <div class="demo-avatar" style="background:rgba(45,126,247,.15);color:#2d7ef7;border-color:rgba(45,126,247,.3);">MR</div>
          <div class="demo-info"><div class="demo-name">Miguel &Aacute;. Ruiz</div><div class="demo-role">VP Engineering</div><div class="demo-dest">&rarr; Gobernanza BUILD</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="demo-card" onclick="demoLogin('pablo.rivas@cognitivepmo.com','index')" style="--dc-color:rgba(34,197,94,.15);">
          <div class="demo-avatar" style="background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);color:#22c55e;border-color:rgba(34,197,94,.3);">PR</div>
          <div class="demo-info"><div class="demo-name">Pablo Rivas</div><div class="demo-role">PMO Senior</div><div class="demo-dest">&rarr; Vista PMO</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="demo-card" onclick="demoLogin('sandra.ortega@cognitivepmo.com','tech')" style="--dc-color:rgba(57,210,192,.15);">
          <div class="demo-avatar" style="background:rgba(57,210,192,.15);color:#39d2c0;border-color:rgba(57,210,192,.3);">SO</div>
          <div class="demo-info"><div class="demo-name">Sandra Ortega</div><div class="demo-role">T&eacute;cnico Senior N3</div><div class="demo-dest">&rarr; Tech Dashboard</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="demo-card" onclick="demoLogin('adriana.suarez@cognitivepmo.com','tech')" style="--dc-color:rgba(188,140,255,.15);">
          <div class="demo-avatar" style="background:rgba(188,140,255,.15);color:#bc8cff;border-color:rgba(188,140,255,.3);">AS</div>
          <div class="demo-info"><div class="demo-name">Adriana Su&aacute;rez</div><div class="demo-role">T&eacute;cnico Junior N2</div><div class="demo-dest">&rarr; Tech Dashboard</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ CAMBIO DE CONTRASEÑA (primera vez) ═══════════════ -->
<div id="change-pass-screen" style="position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9998;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:var(--bg);">
  <div class="login-container">
    <div class="login-card">
      <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:24px;">
        <div style="width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--orange-bg);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:12px;">
          <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--orange)" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="11" width="18" height="11" rx="2" ry="2"/><path d="M7 11V7a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v4"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:800;" data-i18n="chpass.title">Cambio de Contraseña</div>
        <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:6px;" data-i18n="chpass.subtitle">Es tu primer inicio de sesión. Por seguridad, debes cambiar tu contraseña antes de continuar.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="login-error" id="chpass-error"></div>
      <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:16px;">
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;font-weight:600;" data-i18n="chpass.user">Usuario</div>
        <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;margin-top:2px;" id="chpass-user">-</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);" id="chpass-email">-</div>
      </div>
      <div class="login-field">
        <label data-i18n="chpass.new">Nueva Contraseña</label>
        <input type="password" id="chpass-new" placeholder="Mínimo 4 caracteres">
      </div>
      <div class="login-field">
        <label data-i18n="chpass.confirm">Repetir Contraseña</label>
        <input type="password" id="chpass-confirm" placeholder="Repite la nueva contraseña">
      </div>
      <button class="login-btn" id="chpass-btn" onclick="doChangeFirstPassword()" style="background:var(--orange);">
        <span data-i18n="chpass.btn">Cambiar Contraseña y Entrar</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ MAIN APP ═══════════════ -->
<div class="topbar">
  <div class="logo">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" style="width:36px;height:36px;flex-shrink:0;color:#e6edf3;" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      <rect x="30" y="30" width="40" height="9" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/>
      <rect x="30" y="46" width="25" height="9" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/>
      <rect x="30" y="62" width="55" height="9" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/>
    </svg>
    <div>
      <div class="logo-name">COGNITIVE</div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-top:2px;">
        <div style="height:1px;flex:1;background:rgba(255,255,255,.18);max-width:14px;"></div>
        <span style="font-size:10px;font-family:var(--mono);letter-spacing:3px;color:#38bdf8;font-weight:700;">PMO</span>
        <div style="height:1px;flex:1;background:rgba(255,255,255,.18);max-width:14px;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="nav-tabs">
    <div class="nav-tab run active" draggable="true" onclick="showPage('run',this)">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2"/></svg>
      RUN
    </div>
    <div class="nav-tab build" draggable="true" onclick="showPage('build',this)">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14.7 6.3a1 1 0 0 0 0 1.4l1.6 1.6a1 1 0 0 0 1.4 0l3.77-3.77a6 6 0 0 1-7.94 7.94l-6.91 6.91a2.12 2.12 0 0 1-3-3l6.91-6.91a6 6 0 0 1 7.94-7.94l-3.76 3.76z"/></svg>
      BUILD
    </div>
    <div class="nav-tab team" draggable="true" onclick="showPage('team',this)">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#d97706" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/><path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/></svg>
      <span style="color:#d97706;font-weight:600;">TEAM GOV</span>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-tab projects" draggable="true" onclick="showPage('projects',this)">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
      PROJECTS
    </div>
    <div class="nav-tab kanban" draggable="true" onclick="showPage('kanban',this)">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M9 3v18"/><path d="M15 3v18"/></svg>
      KANBAN
    </div>
    <div class="nav-tab budget" draggable="true" onclick="showPage('budget',this)">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M8 20h8M12 18v2"/><circle cx="12" cy="11" r="2"/><path d="M7 11h2M15 11h2"/></svg>
      BUDGET
    </div>
    <div class="nav-tab governance" draggable="true" onclick="showPage('governance',this)">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/><path d="M9 12l2 2 4-4"/></svg>
      <span style="color:#f59e0b;font-weight:600;">PMO GOV</span>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-tab warroom" draggable="true" onclick="showPage('warroom',this)" style="position:relative;">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2a3 3 0 0 0-3 3v4a3 3 0 0 0 6 0V5a3 3 0 0 0-3-3z"/><path d="M19 10v1a7 7 0 0 1-14 0v-1"/><path d="M12 18v4"/><path d="M8 22h8"/></svg>
      <span style="color:#a855f7;font-weight:700;">WAR ROOM</span>
      <span id="wr-alert-count" style="position:absolute;top:6px;right:4px;background:#f85149;color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;border-radius:50%;width:16px;height:16px;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:var(--mono);"></span>
    </div>
  </div>
    <div class="nav-tab docs" draggable="true" onclick="showPage('docs',this)">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M4 19.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 17H20"/><path d="M6.5 2H20v20H6.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 4 19.5v-15A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 2z"/></svg>
      <span style="color:#0ea5e9;font-weight:600;">DOCS</span>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-tab cmdb" draggable="true" onclick="showPage('cmdb',this)">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="9" ry="3"/><path d="M21 12c0 1.66-4 3-9 3s-9-1.34-9-3"/><path d="M3 5v14c0 1.66 4 3 9 3s9-1.34 9-3V5"/><path d="M21 12v0c0 1.66-4 3-9 3s-9-1.34-9-3"/></svg>
      <span style="color:#f59e0b;font-weight:600;">CMDB</span>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-tab cab" draggable="true" onclick="showPage('cab',this)">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M16 2v4M8 2v4M3 10h18"/></svg>
      <span style="color:#06b6d4;font-weight:600;">CAB</span>
    </div>
  <!-- DEV TAB anchored right -->
  <div style="margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;">
    <div class="nav-tab devtools" onclick="showPage('devtools',this)" style="border-left:1px solid var(--border);padding:0 12px;gap:4px;">
      <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 20h9"/><path d="M16.5 3.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4L16.5 3.5z"/></svg>
      <span style="color:#ef4444;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;">DEV</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="topbar-right">
    <div class="notif-bell" id="notif-bell" onclick="toggleNotifPanel(event)">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg>
      <span class="notif-badge" id="notif-badge">0</span>
      <div class="notif-panel" id="notif-panel">
        <div class="notif-panel-header"><span class="notif-panel-title">Notificaciones</span><span class="notif-mark-all" onclick="notifMarkAll(event)">Marcar todo le&iacute;do</span></div>
        <div class="notif-list" id="notif-list"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="theme-btn" onclick="toggleLang()" id="lang-toggle" title="Cambiar idioma / Change language" style="font-size:11px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.5px;">EN</div>
    <div class="theme-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()" id="theme-toggle" title="Cambiar tema claro/oscuro">🌙</div>
    <div class="user-menu-btn" id="user-menu-btn" onclick="toggleUserMenu()">
      <div class="user-menu-avatar" id="topbar-avatar" style="background:var(--blue);">?</div>
      <div class="user-menu-info">
        <div class="user-menu-name" id="topbar-username">Cargando...</div>
        <div class="user-menu-role" id="topbar-role" style="color:var(--text2);">-</div>
      </div>
      <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
      <div class="user-dropdown" id="user-dropdown">
        <div class="user-dropdown-header">
          <div class="udh-name" id="udd-name">-</div>
          <div class="udh-email" id="udd-email">-</div>
          <div class="udh-role" id="udd-role-badge">-</div>
        </div>
        <div class="udd-item" onclick="showPermisos()">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
          <span data-i18n="user.permisos">Mis Permisos</span>
          <span class="udd-permisos-count" id="udd-permisos-count">0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="udd-item" id="udd-dept">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>
          <span id="udd-dept-text" data-i18n="user.dept">Departamento</span>
        </div>
        <div class="udd-divider"></div>
        <div class="udd-item logout" onclick="doLogout()">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M9 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4"/><polyline points="16 17 21 12 16 7"/><line x1="21" y1="12" x2="9" y2="12"/></svg>
          <span data-i18n="user.logout">Cerrar Sesión</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="statusbar">
  <div class="status-item">
    <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="8" rx="2"/><rect x="2" y="14" width="20" height="8" rx="2"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="6.01" y2="6"/><line x1="6" y1="18" x2="6.01" y2="18"/></svg>
    Gateway: 8099
    <span class="status-badge online">Online</span>
  </div>
  <div class="status-item">
    <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="9" ry="3"/><path d="M21 12c0 1.66-4 3-9 3s-9-1.34-9-3"/><path d="M3 5v14c0 1.66 4 3 9 3s9-1.34 9-3V5"/></svg>
    PostgreSQL 15
    <span class="status-badge online">Online</span>
  </div>
  <div class="status-item">
    <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="22 12 18 12 15 21 9 3 6 12 2 12"/></svg>
    Agents IA: Claude
    <span class="status-badge online">Online</span>
  </div>
  <div class="server-info">
    NasJose Server
    <span class="server-ip">192.168.1.49</span>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="page active" id="page-run">
  <div class="pipeline-layout">
    <div class="pipeline-main">
      <div class="panel">
        <div class="panel-header">
          <div class="panel-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/><line x1="12" y1="18" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="9" y1="15" x2="15" y2="15"/></svg>
            Registro de Incidencia ITSM
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">
            <span class="mode-badge mode-run">ITIL 4</span>
            <span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);font-weight:600;" id="itsm-ticket-id"></span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="padding:12px 14px;">
          <!-- Row 1: Catálogo + Canal -->
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:3fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;">
              <label class="sap-label">📋 Tipo de Incidencia (Catálogo ITSM)</label>
              <select class="sap-input" id="itsm-catalogo" onchange="itsmCatalogoChanged()">
                <option value="">— Seleccionar del catálogo —</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;">
              <label class="sap-label">📡 Canal de Entrada</label>
              <select class="sap-input" id="itsm-canal">
                <option value="Portal ITSM">Portal ITSM</option>
                <option value="Teléfono">Teléfono</option>
                <option value="Email">Email</option>
                <option value="Chat">Chat</option>
                <option value="Monitorización">Monitorización</option>
                <option value="Presencial">Presencial</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Row 2: Auto-populated info bar -->
          <div id="itsm-info-bar" style="display:none;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;">
              <div><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;">Complejidad</span><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;" id="itsm-complejidad">—</div></div>
              <div><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;">Área</span><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;" id="itsm-area-auto">—</div></div>
              <div><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;">SLA Objetivo</span><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);" id="itsm-sla-obj">—</div></div>
              <div><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;">Nivel Mínimo</span><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;" id="itsm-nivel-min">—</div></div>
              <div><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;">Skills Req.</span><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);" id="itsm-skills-count">—</div></div>
              <div style="margin-left:auto;"><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;">Prioridad Sugerida</span><div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:800;font-family:var(--mono);" id="itsm-prio-sugerida">—</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Row 3: Impact × Urgency Matrix -->
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;">
              <label class="sap-label">💥 Impacto</label>
              <select class="sap-input" id="itsm-impacto" onchange="itsmCalcPriority()">
                <option value="Crítico">1 — Crítico (Organización)</option>
                <option value="Alto">2 — Alto (Departamento)</option>
                <option value="Medio" selected>3 — Medio (Grupo)</option>
                <option value="Bajo">4 — Bajo (Individual)</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;">
              <label class="sap-label">⏱ Urgencia</label>
              <select class="sap-input" id="itsm-urgencia" onchange="itsmCalcPriority()">
                <option value="Crítica">1 — Crítica (Inmediata)</option>
                <option value="Alta">2 — Alta (&lt;2h)</option>
                <option value="Media" selected>3 — Media (&lt;8h)</option>
                <option value="Baja">4 — Baja (Planificable)</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;">
              <label class="sap-label">🎯 Prioridad Calculada</label>
              <div id="itsm-prio-calc" style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;text-align:center;color:var(--yellow);">P3</div>
            </div>
            <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;">
              <label class="sap-label">⏰ SLA (horas)</label>
              <input class="sap-input mono" id="itsm-sla" type="number" min="0.5" step="0.5" value="24" style="text-align:center;font-weight:700;">
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Row 4: Description + Service + CI -->
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;">
              <label class="sap-label">📝 Descripción Detallada</label>
              <textarea class="sap-textarea" id="run-input" placeholder="Describe el síntoma, contexto y cualquier detalle relevante para el diagnóstico..." style="min-height:52px;"></textarea>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0 0 8px;">
                <label class="sap-label">🖥 Servicio Afectado</label>
                <select class="sap-input" id="itsm-servicio">
                  <option value="">— Seleccionar —</option>
                  <option value="Banca Online">Banca Online</option>
                  <option value="App Móvil">App Móvil</option>
                  <option value="Bizum">Bizum / Pagos</option>
                  <option value="SWIFT">SWIFT Alliance</option>
                  <option value="Red Oficinas">Red Oficinas</option>
                  <option value="Cajeros ATM">Cajeros ATM</option>
                  <option value="Core Bancario">Core Bancario</option>
                  <option value="Email/Ofimática">Email / Ofimática</option>
                  <option value="VPN">VPN Corporativa</option>
                  <option value="BBDD">Base de Datos</option>
                  <option value="Infraestructura">Infraestructura</option>
                  <option value="Seguridad">Seguridad Perimetral</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;">
                <label class="sap-label">👤 Reportado por</label>
                <input class="sap-input" id="itsm-reporter" placeholder="Nombre del reportante">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0 0 8px;">
                <label class="sap-label">🔧 CI Afectado (CMDB)</label>
                <select class="sap-input" id="itsm-ci" style="padding:6px 8px;"><option value="">Cargando activos CMDB...</option></select>
              </div>
              <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;">
                <label class="sap-label">💼 Impacto de Negocio</label>
                <select class="sap-input" id="itsm-impacto-neg">
                  <option value="">— Evaluar —</option>
                  <option value="Pérdida financiera directa">Pérdida financiera directa</option>
                  <option value="Interrupción servicio cliente">Interrupción servicio cliente</option>
                  <option value="Riesgo regulatorio">Riesgo regulatorio (BCE/CNMV)</option>
                  <option value="Degradación rendimiento">Degradación rendimiento</option>
                  <option value="Impacto interno operativo">Impacto interno operativo</option>
                  <option value="Impacto cosmético">Impacto cosmético / menor</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Buttons -->
          <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
            <button class="btn-exec" id="run-exec-btn" onclick="itsmSubmitAndPipeline()" style="flex:1;">
              <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;"><polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"/></svg>
              Registrar Incidencia + Ejecutar Pipeline IA
            </button>
            <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetPipeline('run')" style="white-space:nowrap;">↺ Reset</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel">
        <div class="panel-header">
          <div class="panel-title">Pipeline de Agentes IA</div>
          <button class="config-btn" onclick="showToast('Agentes IA nativos Claude — No requiere configuración')" style="opacity:.5;">⚙ Agentes IA</button>
        </div>
        <div class="pipeline-area" id="run-pipeline-area" style="border-style:solid;min-height:auto;padding:0;">
          <div id="run-pipeline-idle">
            <div style="padding:10px 14px;">
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
                <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.8"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 8v4l3 3"/></svg>
                <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">Cascada RUN — 4 Agentes IA</span>
                <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono);">READY</span>
              </div>
              <!-- Compact horizontal flow -->
              <div onclick="openRunFullscreen()" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0;cursor:pointer;" title="Click para ver detalle de agentes y tools">
                <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(59,130,246,.12),rgba(59,130,246,.05));border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,.25);border-radius:14px;padding:3px 10px;flex-shrink:0;">
                  <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/></svg>
                  <span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--blue);">ITSM Input</span>
                </div>
                <svg width="16" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="10" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="10,2 16,5 10,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
                <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;min-width:0;border-left:3px solid #3b82f6;">
                  <div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(59,130,246,.1);border-radius:5px;" id="run-flow-icon-1"></div>
                  <div style="min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#3b82f6;">AG-001 Dispatcher</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text3);">Triaje NLP · P1-P4</div></div>
                </div>
                <svg width="14" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="8" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="8,2 14,5 8,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
                <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;min-width:0;border-left:3px solid #8b5cf6;">
                  <div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(139,92,246,.1);border-radius:5px;" id="run-flow-icon-2"></div>
                  <div style="min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#8b5cf6;">AG-002 Resources</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text3);">Matching · 150 FTEs</div></div>
                </div>
                <svg width="14" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="8" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="8,2 14,5 8,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
                <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(249,115,22,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;min-width:0;border-left:3px solid #f97316;">
                  <div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(249,115,22,.1);border-radius:5px;" id="run-flow-icon-3"></div>
                  <div style="min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#f97316;">AG-003 Forecaster</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text3);">Prophet · Freeze</div></div>
                </div>
                <svg width="14" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="8" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="8,2 14,5 8,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
                <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(6,182,212,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex:1;min-width:0;border-left:3px solid #06b6d4;">
                  <div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(6,182,212,.1);border-radius:5px;" id="run-flow-icon-4"></div>
                  <div style="min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#06b6d4;">AG-004 Gatekeeper</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text3);">Buffer · Freeze</div></div>
                </div>
                <svg width="16" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="10" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="10,2 16,5 10,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>
                <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(63,185,80,.12),rgba(63,185,80,.05));border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.25);border-radius:14px;padding:3px 10px;flex-shrink:0;">
                  <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--green)" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
                  <span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green);">Output</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- SSE Real-time components (legacy - hidden, replaced by run-dashboard) -->
      <div style="margin:0 14px;display:none !important;">
        <div id="sse-sla-counter" class="sla-counter">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:4px;">
            <span id="sse-sla-start">--</span>
            <span style="font-weight:700;" id="sse-sla-label">SLA</span>
            <span id="sse-sla-end">--</span>
          </div>
          <div class="sla-digits" id="sse-sla-digits">--:--:--</div>
          <div class="sla-bar"><div class="sla-bar-fill" id="sse-sla-bar-fill" style="width:0%;background:#3fb950;"></div></div>
        </div>
        <div id="sse-tasks-area" style="display:none;margin-top:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--blue)" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M9 3v18"/></svg>
            Tareas de Resoluci&oacute;n
          </div>
          <div id="sse-tasks-list"></div>
        </div>
        <div id="sse-kanban-mini" class="sse-kanban-mini" style="display:none;">
          <div class="sse-kanban-col"><div class="sse-kanban-col-title">Backlog</div><div id="sse-kb-backlog"></div></div>
          <div class="sse-kanban-col"><div class="sse-kanban-col-title">En Progreso</div><div id="sse-kb-progress"></div></div>
          <div class="sse-kanban-col"><div class="sse-kanban-col-title">En Revisi&oacute;n</div><div id="sse-kb-review"></div></div>
          <div class="sse-kanban-col"><div class="sse-kanban-col-title">Done</div><div id="sse-kb-done"></div></div>
        </div>
        <div id="sse-log" class="sse-log"></div>
      </div>
      <!-- Buffer de Incidencias Registradas -->
      <div class="panel" style="margin:0 14px 14px;">
        <div class="panel-header" style="padding:8px 12px;">
          <div class="panel-title" style="font-size:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/></svg>
            Incidencias Registradas
            <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);" id="run-buffer-count">(0)</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="run-buffer-list" style="padding:8px;max-height:220px;overflow-y:auto;">
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;padding:8px;">Cargando incidencias...</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipeline-sidebar">
      <div class="side-panel" id="run-incidents-sidebar">
        <div class="run-sidebar-header">
          <div class="side-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin:0;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2"/></svg>Incidencias Activas</div>
          <span id="run-inc-count" style="background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;">0</span>
        </div>
        <div id="run-semaforo" style="margin-bottom:10px;">
          <div id="run-semaforo-bar" style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;border-left:4px solid #22c55e;">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px;">
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
                <div id="run-semaforo-dot" style="width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;background:#22c55e;"></div>
                <span id="run-semaforo-label" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#22c55e;">OPERATIVA NORMAL</span>
              </div>
              <span id="run-semaforo-score" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;">0</span>
            </div>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:4px;">
              <div style="background:#181b20;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 6px;text-align:center;">
                <div id="run-sem-total" style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#e8e9ed;">0</div>
                <div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Abiertas</div>
              </div>
              <div style="background:#181b20;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 6px;text-align:center;">
                <div id="run-sem-criticas" style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#ef4444;">0</div>
                <div style="font-size:7px;color:#ef4444;text-transform:uppercase;">P1/P2</div>
              </div>
              <div style="background:#181b20;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 6px;text-align:center;">
                <div id="run-sem-sla" style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#eab308;">0</div>
                <div style="font-size:7px;color:#eab308;text-transform:uppercase;">SLA &lt;1h</div>
              </div>
              <div style="background:#181b20;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 6px;text-align:center;">
                <div id="run-sem-techs" style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#3b82f6;">0%</div>
                <div style="font-size:7px;color:#3b82f6;text-transform:uppercase;">Tec. Ocup.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="run-inc-list" style="max-height:280px;overflow-y:auto;"></div>
        <div style="border-top:1px solid #333840;margin-top:6px;padding-top:6px;">
          <button onclick="loadActiveIncidents()" style="width:100%;padding:5px;background:none;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#8b8f98;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;">Actualizar</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="page" id="page-build">
  <div class="pipeline-layout">
    <div class="pipeline-main">
      <div class="panel">
        <div class="panel-header">
          <div class="panel-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M14.7 6.3a1 1 0 0 0 0 1.4l1.6 1.6a1 1 0 0 0 1.4 0l3.77-3.77a6 6 0 0 1-7.94 7.94l-6.91 6.91a2.12 2.12 0 0 1-3-3l6.91-6.91a6 6 0 0 1 7.94-7.94l-3.76 3.76z"/></svg>
            Demanda de Proyecto PMBOK 7
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">
            <span class="mode-badge mode-build">PMBOK 7</span>
            <span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);font-weight:600;" id="build-proj-id"></span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="padding:16px 20px;">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
              <span style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text1);">Solicitud de proyecto</span>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">Desde negocio → PMO evalua con 9 agentes IA</div>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
            <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:4px;">Nombre del proyecto <span style="color:var(--red);font-size:12px;">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" id="bf-nombre" placeholder="Ej: Migracion infraestructura RHEL9, Plataforma OpenShift, Modernizacion core banking..." style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text1);font-size:13px;">
          </div>
          <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
            <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:4px;">Que necesita negocio y por que <span style="color:var(--red);font-size:12px;">*</span></label>
            <textarea id="bf-resumen" rows="3" placeholder="Describe que se quiere conseguir, cual es el problema de negocio, que beneficios espera la organizacion..." style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text1);font-size:12px;resize:vertical;"></textarea>
          </div>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
            <div>
              <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:4px;">Presupuesto propuesto</label>
              <input type="text" inputmode="numeric" id="bf-presupuesto" placeholder="Ej: 650000" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text1);font-size:13px;">
              <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;">Propuesta de negocio · Opcional</div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:4px;">Fecha fin deseada</label>
              <input type="date" id="bf-fecha-fin" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text1);font-size:13px;" onchange="buildCalcSemanas()">
              <div id="bf-semanas-calc" style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;">Propuesta de negocio · Opcional</div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:4px;">Prioridad estrategica</label>
              <select id="bf-prioridad" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text1);font-size:13px;" onchange="buildUpdatePrioInfo()">
                <option value="">-- Sin definir --</option><option value="Alta">Alta</option><option value="Media">Media</option><option value="Baja">Baja</option>
              </select>
              <div id="bf-prio-info" style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;">Define rigidez del plazo/coste</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <label style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:4px;">Justificacion / contexto adicional</label>
            <textarea id="bf-justificacion" rows="2" placeholder="Problema de negocio, riesgo de cumplimiento, obsolescencia tecnologica, presion competitiva... (opcional)" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text1);font-size:12px;resize:vertical;"></textarea>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(139,92,246,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.15);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:14px;">
            <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#a78bfa;margin-bottom:4px;">Los agentes IA generaran automaticamente:</div>
            <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);line-height:1.6;">Acta de constitucion · Alcance y exclusiones · EDT/WBS con tareas y skills · Subtareas tecnicas · Analisis de riesgos · Mapa de stakeholders · PM candidatos y equipo · Presupuesto real vs propuesto · Gantt y ruta critica · Quality gates</div>
            <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px;">Todo revisable y editable en las 4 pausas de gobernanza.</div>
          </div>
          <textarea id="build-input" style="display:none;"></textarea>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
            <button onclick="buildSubmitAndPipeline()" id="build-exec-btn" style="flex:1;padding:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981,#059669);border:none;border-radius:8px;color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;">
              <span>▶</span> Ejecutar Pipeline IA (9 agentes)
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel">
        <div class="panel-header">
          <div class="panel-title">Pipeline de Agentes IA</div>
          <button class="config-btn" onclick="showToast('Agentes IA nativos Claude — No requiere configuración')" style="opacity:.5;">⚙ Agentes IA</button>
        </div>
        <div class="pipeline-area" id="build-pipeline-area" style="border-style:solid;min-height:auto;padding:0;">
          <div id="build-pipeline-idle">
            <div style="padding:10px 14px;">
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;">
                <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M14.7 6.3a1 1 0 0 0 0 1.4l1.6 1.6a1 1 0 0 0 1.4 0l3.77-3.77a6 6 0 0 1-7.94 7.94l-6.91 6.91a2.12 2.12 0 0 1-3-3l6.91-6.91a6 6 0 0 1 7.94-7.94l-3.76 3.76z"/></svg>
                <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">Cascada BUILD v2.0 — 10 Agentes IA + 4 Pausas Gobernanza</span>
                <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono);">READY</span>
              </div>
              <div id="build-cascade-idle" onclick="openBuildFullscreen()" style="cursor:pointer" title="Click para ver detalle de 10 agentes y tools"></div>
              <!-- AG-018 Advisor -->
              <div style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:2px dashed rgba(16,185,129,0.2);">
                <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;opacity:0.6;">
                  <div style="width:28px;height:28px;flex-shrink:0;color:#10b981;" id="build-cascade-018"></div>
                  <div><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:#10b981;">AG-018 Governance Advisor</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;">Disponible durante las 4 pausas de gobernanza</div></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Buffer de Proyectos Registrados -->
      <div class="panel" style="margin:0 14px 14px;">
        <div class="panel-header" style="padding:8px 12px;">
          <div class="panel-title" style="font-size:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M9 5H7a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h10a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-2"/><rect x="9" y="3" width="6" height="4" rx="2"/></svg>
            Proyectos Registrados
            <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);" id="build-buffer-count">(0)</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="build-buffer-list" style="padding:8px;max-height:180px;overflow-y:auto;">
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;padding:8px;">Sin proyectos registrados</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipeline-sidebar">
      <div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">BUILD LIVE</div>
          <span id="build-live-count" style="font-size:9px;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.15);color:#10b981;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600;">0</span>
        </div>
        <div id="build-live-list">
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;padding:16px;">Cargando...</div>
        </div>
        <button onclick="loadBuildLive()" style="width:100%;margin-top:8px;padding:6px;border-radius:6px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #333840;background:transparent;color:#8b8f98;">Actualizar</button>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#eab308;">Pipeline Sessions</div>
        </div>
        <div id="build-live-sessions">
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;padding:12px;">Cargando...</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="side-panel">
        <div class="side-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fbbf24" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" fill="#fbbf24" fill-opacity=".08"/></svg>Task Monitoring</div>
        <div class="no-data" id="build-tasks"><div class="no-data-icon">🕐</div>No hay tareas activas</div>
      </div>
      <div class="side-panel">
        <div class="side-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#22d3ee" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="23 4 23 10 17 10"/><polyline points="1 20 1 14 7 14"/><path d="M3.51 9a9 9 0 0 1 14.85-3.36L23 10M1 14l4.64 4.36A9 9 0 0 0 20.49 15"/></svg>Historial Buffer</div>
        <div class="no-data" id="build-hist"><div class="no-data-icon">🕐</div>Sin ejecuciones previas</div>
      </div>
      <div class="side-panel">
        <div class="side-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a3e635" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="18" y1="20" x2="18" y2="10"/><line x1="12" y1="20" x2="12" y2="4"/><line x1="6" y1="20" x2="6" y2="14"/></svg>Estado del Sistema</div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Agentes Activos</span><span class="sys-val val-blue">3/3</span></div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Pipeline Status</span><span class="sys-val val-idle" id="build-status-val">Idle</span></div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Técnicos Staff</span><span class="sys-val">150</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="side-panel">
        <div class="side-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#8b5cf6" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9.663 17h4.673M12 3a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v1a2 2 0 0 0 2 2H4a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V9a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z" fill="#8b5cf6" fill-opacity=".1"/><path d="M12 17v4M8 21h8"/></svg>AI Insight Explorer</div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Insights Generados</span><span class="sys-val" style="color:#8b5cf6" id="build-ai-insights">—</span></div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Confianza NLP</span><span class="sys-val" style="color:#8b5cf6" id="build-ai-conf">—</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="side-panel">
        <div class="side-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22c5.52 0 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10z" fill="#f97316" fill-opacity=".1"/><path d="M12 6v6l4 2"/></svg>SLA Risk Forecaster</div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>SLAs en Riesgo</span><span class="sys-val" style="color:#f97316" id="build-sla-risk">—</span></div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Nivel de Alerta</span><span class="sys-val" style="color:#f97316" id="build-sla-alert">—</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="side-panel">
        <div class="side-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 2l-2 2m-7.61 7.61a5.5 5.5 0 1 1-7.778 7.778 5.5 5.5 0 0 1 7.777-7.777zm0 0L15.5 7.5m0 0l3 3L22 7l-3-3m-3.5 3.5L19 4"/></svg>KEDB Conflict Resolver</div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Conflictos Activos</span><span class="sys-val" style="color:#06b6d4" id="build-kedb-conf">—</span></div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Resoluciones Prop.</span><span class="sys-val" style="color:#06b6d4" id="build-kedb-res">—</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="side-panel">
        <div class="side-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fbbf24" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2" fill="#fbbf24" fill-opacity=".1"/></svg>Resource Efficiency</div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Utilización Media</span><span class="sys-val" style="color:#fbbf24" id="build-res-util">—</span></div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Carga Óptima</span><span class="sys-val" style="color:#fbbf24" id="build-res-opt">—</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="side-panel">
        <div class="side-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 5H7a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h10a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-2" fill="#10b981" fill-opacity=".1"/><rect x="9" y="3" width="6" height="4" rx="2"/><line x1="9" y1="12" x2="15" y2="12"/><line x1="9" y1="16" x2="13" y2="16"/></svg>Buffer Audit Log</div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Entradas Hoy</span><span class="sys-val" style="color:#10b981" id="build-audit-count">—</span></div>
        <div class="sys-row"><span>Último Evento</span><span class="sys-val" style="color:#10b981;font-size:9px;" id="build-audit-last">—</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="page" id="page-team">
  <div class="team-page">
    <div class="team-header" style="padding:10px 20px 8px;">
      <div class="team-header-top" style="margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div class="page-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="flex-shrink:0"><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="3.5"/><path d="M2 21v-1.5A5.5 5.5 0 0 1 7.5 14h3A5.5 5.5 0 0 1 16 19.5V21"/><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="2.5" opacity=".6"/><path d="M20 13.5h1.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 25 17v1" opacity=".6"/></svg> Directorio de Equipo <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;" id="team-count">150 técnicos</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <button onclick="toggleTeamDashboard()" style="background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.3);color:var(--blue);border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">
            <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;"><path d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2"/></svg>Dashboard
          </button>
          <button class="btn-add-new" onclick="openTeamForm()" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;">
            <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:2px;"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>
            Técnico
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- ═══ DASHBOARD PANEL (COLLAPSIBLE) ═══ -->
      <div id="team-dashboard" style="display:none;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;" id="team-estado-badges"></div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 2fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <!-- Gauge: Ocupación Global -->
          <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
            <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Ocupación Global</div>
            <div style="position:relative;width:80px;height:50px;margin:0 auto;">
              <canvas id="team-gauge" width="80" height="50"></canvas>
              <div style="position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;text-align:center;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:800;" id="team-gauge-pct">0%</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-around;margin-top:6px;font-size:9px;">
              <span style="color:var(--orange);">Ocup: <strong id="td-ocupados">0</strong></span>
              <span style="color:var(--green);">Disp: <strong id="td-disponibles">0</strong></span>
              <span style="color:var(--text3);">Otros: <strong id="td-otros">0</strong></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Gauge: % RUN vs BUILD -->
          <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
            <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Carga RUN vs BUILD</div>
            <div style="position:relative;width:80px;height:50px;margin:0 auto;">
              <canvas id="team-runbuild-gauge" width="80" height="50"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-around;margin-top:6px;font-size:9px;">
              <span style="color:var(--blue);"><strong id="td-pct-run">0%</strong> RUN</span>
              <span style="color:var(--green);"><strong id="td-pct-build">0%</strong> BUILD</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Silo bars + Level badges -->
          <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px;">
              <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">Ocupación por Silo</div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;">
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N1 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n1">0</span></div>
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N2 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n2">0</span></div>
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N3 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n3">0</span></div>
                <div class="lvl-badge" style="padding:1px 6px;font-size:9px;">N4 <span class="lvl-num" id="cnt-n4">0</span></div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div id="team-silo-bars"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;" onclick="toggleTeamDashboard()">▲ Minimizar dashboard</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;">
        <input class="search-bar" placeholder="Buscar por nombre, FTE, proyecto..." oninput="filterTeam(this.value)" style="margin-bottom:0;flex:1;">
        <div class="filter-row" style="flex-wrap:nowrap;">
          <div class="filter-chip active" onclick="filterSilo('Todos',this)">Todos</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Frontend',this)">Front</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Soporte',this)">Sop</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Redes',this)">Redes</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Windows',this)">Win</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Backend',this)">Back</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('QA',this)">QA</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('DevOps',this)">DevOps</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('Seguridad',this)">Sec</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="filterSilo('BBDD',this)">BBDD</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
      <table class="data-table" id="team-table" style="table-layout:fixed;">
        <thead><tr id="team-thead-row">
          <th style="width:160px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="nombre">Nombre</th>
          <th style="width:60px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="fte">FTE</th>
          <th style="width:65px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="silo">Silo</th>
          <th style="width:38px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="nivel">Nivel</th>
          <th style="width:55px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="skills">Skills</th>
          <th style="width:38px;text-align:center;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="tareas">Tareas</th>
          <th style="width:100px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="vinculacion">Vinculación</th>
          <th style="width:75px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="carga">Carga</th>
          <th style="width:70px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="estado">Estado</th>
          <th style="width:140px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="email">Email</th>
          <th style="width:90px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true" data-col="telefono">Teléfono</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody id="team-tbody"><tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--text2);"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Cargando equipo...</td></tr></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
    <!-- DISPONIBLES POR SILO (collapsible) -->
    <div id="team-disponibles-panel" style="display:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);padding:10px 20px;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--green)" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>
          Técnicos Disponibles por Silo
        </div>
        <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;" onclick="document.getElementById('team-disponibles-panel').style.display='none'">✕ Cerrar</span>
      </div>
      <div id="team-disponibles-grid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);padding:4px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-shrink:0;">
      <button onclick="toggleDisponibles()" style="background:var(--green-bg);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.3);color:var(--green);border-radius:5px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">● Disponibles por Silo</button>
      <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);" id="team-footer-info"></span>
    </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- ══════════════════ PAGE: PMO GOVERNANCE ══════════════════ -->
<div class="page" id="page-governance">
  <div class="gov-page">
    <div class="team-header" style="padding:10px 20px 8px;">
      <div class="team-header-top" style="margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div class="page-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
          <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/><path d="M9 12l2 2 4-4"/></svg>
          PMO Governance <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;" id="gov-pm-count">0 PMs</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
          <button onclick="toggleGovDashboard()" style="background:rgba(245,158,11,.15);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.3);color:#f59e0b;border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">
            <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;"><path d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2"/></svg>4 Pilares
          </button>
          <button class="btn-add-new" onclick="openPMForm()" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d97706,#f59e0b);border-color:#f59e0b;">+ PM</button>
          <div class="filter-chip active" onclick="govView('pms',this)" style="font-size:10px;">PMs</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="govView('scoring',this)" style="font-size:10px;">Scoring</div>
          <div class="filter-chip" onclick="govView('gates',this)" style="font-size:10px;">Gates</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- ═══ 4 PILLARS DASHBOARD (collapsible) ═══ -->
      <div id="gov-dashboard" style="display:none;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;" id="gov-pillar-kpis"></div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <!-- Pilar 1: Demanda y Priorización -->
          <div class="gov-pillar" style="border-left:3px solid #f59e0b;">
            <div class="gov-pillar-hdr"><div class="gov-pillar-icon" style="background:rgba(245,158,11,.15);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2"/></svg></div><div><div class="gov-pillar-title">Demanda y Priorización</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">Scoring ROI vs Riesgo vs Capacidad vs Valor</div></div><div class="gov-pillar-badge" style="background:rgba(245,158,11,.15);color:#f59e0b;" id="gov-p1-score">0</div></div>
            <div id="gov-p1-content" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Cargando...</div>
          </div>
          <!-- Pilar 2: Capacidad de Recursos -->
          <div class="gov-pillar" style="border-left:3px solid var(--blue);">
            <div class="gov-pillar-hdr"><div class="gov-pillar-icon" style="background:var(--blue-bg);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--blue)" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/></svg></div><div><div class="gov-pillar-title">Capacidad de Recursos</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">Carga PM vs BAU vs Proyectos</div></div><div class="gov-pillar-badge" style="background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);" id="gov-p2-score">0%</div></div>
            <div id="gov-p2-content">Cargando...</div>
          </div>
          <!-- Pilar 3: Estándares y Cumplimiento -->
          <div class="gov-pillar" style="border-left:3px solid var(--green);">
            <div class="gov-pillar-hdr"><div class="gov-pillar-icon" style="background:var(--green-bg);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--green)" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg></div><div><div class="gov-pillar-title">Estándares y Cumplimiento</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">Gating Reviews · Plantillas · Compliance</div></div><div class="gov-pillar-badge" style="background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);" id="gov-p3-score">0%</div></div>
            <div id="gov-p3-content">Cargando...</div>
          </div>
          <!-- Pilar 4: Gestión del Cambio -->
          <div class="gov-pillar" style="border-left:3px solid #a855f7;">
            <div class="gov-pillar-hdr"><div class="gov-pillar-icon" style="background:rgba(168,85,247,.15);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-6.219-8.56"/><polyline points="21 3 21 9 15 9"/></svg></div><div><div class="gov-pillar-title">Gestión del Cambio</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">Change Requests · Adopción · Comunicación</div></div><div class="gov-pillar-badge" style="background:rgba(168,85,247,.15);color:#a855f7;" id="gov-p4-score">0%</div></div>
            <div id="gov-p4-content">Cargando...</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;" onclick="toggleGovDashboard()">▲ Minimizar</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;">
        <input class="search-bar" placeholder="Buscar PM, proyecto, certificación..." oninput="filterGov(this.value)" style="margin-bottom:0;flex:1;">
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- PM Table View -->
    <div class="table-wrap" id="gov-view-pms">
      <table class="data-table" id="gov-table" style="table-layout:fixed;">
        <thead><tr id="gov-thead-row">
          <th style="width:160px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Nombre</th>
          <th style="width:55px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">ID</th>
          <th style="width:55px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Nivel</th>
          <th style="width:75px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Especialidad</th>
          <th style="width:50px;text-align:center;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Proyectos</th>
          <th style="width:70px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Carga</th>
          <th style="width:90px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Certificaciones</th>
          <th style="width:55px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Éxito</th>
          <th style="width:75px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Estado</th>
          <th style="width:130px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Email</th>
          <th style="width:85px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Teléfono</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody id="gov-tbody"><tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--text2);"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Cargando PMs...</td></tr></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
    <!-- Scoring View -->
    <div class="table-wrap" id="gov-view-scoring" style="display:none;">
      <div style="padding:16px;" id="gov-scoring-content"><div class="no-data">Cargando scoring...</div></div>
    </div>
    <!-- Gates View -->
    <div class="table-wrap" id="gov-view-gates" style="display:none;">
      <div style="padding:16px;" id="gov-gates-content"><div class="no-data">Cargando gates...</div></div>
    </div>
    <!-- Métricas footer -->
    <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);padding:4px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-shrink:0;">
      <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);" id="gov-footer-info"></span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- MODAL: PM FORM (Multi-step like Team) -->
<div class="fm-overlay" id="fm-pm" onclick="if(event.target===this)fmClose('fm-pm')">
  <div class="fm-box">
    <div class="fm-header" style="border-bottom-color:rgba(245,158,11,.3);">
      <div class="fm-title">
        <span id="pm-icon" style="font-size:22px;">👔</span>
        <div>
          <div id="pm-form-title">Nuevo Project Manager</div>
          <div id="pm-form-sub" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;margin-top:1px;">Registrar PM en la PMO Governance</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button class="fm-close" onclick="fmClose('fm-pm')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-steps">
      <div class="fm-step-dot active" id="pm-dot-1"><div class="fsd-circle">1</div><div class="fsd-label">Identidad</div></div>
      <div class="fm-step-dot" id="pm-dot-2"><div class="fsd-circle">2</div><div class="fsd-label">Skills & Certs</div></div>
