      <div class="fm-step-dot" id="pm-dot-3"><div class="fsd-circle">3</div><div class="fsd-label">Confirmar</div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:18px;overflow-y:auto;max-height:60vh;">
      <input type="hidden" id="pm-edit-id">
      <!-- Step 1: Identidad -->
      <div class="fm-step active" id="pm-s1">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:12px;">
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0"><div class="fm-label">🪪 ID Project Manager</div>
            <input class="fm-input" id="pm-id" placeholder="PM-016" style="font-family:var(--mono);letter-spacing:.5px;"></div>
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0"><div class="fm-label">📊 Estado</div>
            <select class="fm-select" id="pm-estado">
              <option value="DISPONIBLE">🟢 DISPONIBLE</option>
              <option value="ASIGNADO">🟡 ASIGNADO</option>
              <option value="SOBRECARGADO">🔴 SOBRECARGADO</option>
              <option value="BAJA">❌ BAJA</option>
              <option value="VACACIONES">⚪ VACACIONES</option>
            </select></div>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-section-sep"></div>
        <div class="fm-field"><div class="fm-label">👤 Nombre Completo</div>
          <input class="fm-input" id="pm-nombre" placeholder="Ej: Elena Rodríguez Vega"></div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:4px;">
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0"><div class="fm-label">📧 Email Corporativo</div>
            <input class="fm-input" id="pm-email" placeholder="elena.rodriguez@bcc-bank.es"></div>
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0"><div class="fm-label">📱 Teléfono</div>
            <input class="fm-input" id="pm-telefono" placeholder="+34 6XXXXXXXX" style="font-family:var(--mono);"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-section-sep"></div>
        <!-- Nivel PM -->
        <div class="fm-field"><div class="fm-label">🎯 Nivel Profesional</div>
          <div class="nivel-grid">
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="pmSelNivel('PM-Jr',this)"><div class="nc-badge" style="color:#8b949e;">Jr</div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">PM Junior</div><div class="nc-desc">0–2 años PM<br>Proyectos pequeños</div></div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="pmSelNivel('PM-Sr',this)"><div class="nc-badge" style="color:var(--blue);">Sr</div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">PM Senior</div><div class="nc-desc">2–5 años PM<br>Proyectos medios</div></div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="pmSelNivel('PM-Lead',this)"><div class="nc-badge" style="color:#f59e0b;">Lead</div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">PM Lead</div><div class="nc-desc">5–10 años PM<br>Programas y portfolio</div></div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="pmSelNivel('PM-Dir',this)"><div class="nc-badge" style="color:#a855f7;">Dir</div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">PM Director</div><div class="nc-desc">10+ años PM<br>Estrategia PMO</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Especialidad -->
        <div class="fm-field" style="margin-bottom:0"><div class="fm-label">🏢 Especialidad de Proyectos</div>
          <div class="silo-grid">
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="pmSelEsp('Infraestructura',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🏗️</div><div class="sc-name">Infraestructura</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="pmSelEsp('Seguridad',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🔒</div><div class="sc-name">Seguridad</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="pmSelEsp('Aplicaciones',this)"><div class="sc-icon">⚙️</div><div class="sc-name">Aplicaciones</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="pmSelEsp('Data & Analytics',this)"><div class="sc-icon">📊</div><div class="sc-name">Data & Analytics</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="pmSelEsp('Gobernanza',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🏛️</div><div class="sc-name">Gobernanza</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="pmSelEsp('Transformación Digital',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🚀</div><div class="sc-name">Transformación</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-top:12px;">
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0"><div class="fm-label">📂 Máx. Proyectos Simultáneos</div>
            <input class="fm-input" id="pm-max" type="number" min="1" max="10" value="3" style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;text-align:center;"></div>
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0"><div class="fm-label">✅ Tasa de Éxito (%)</div>
            <input class="fm-input" id="pm-exito" type="number" min="0" max="100" step="0.1" value="100" style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;text-align:center;"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Step 2: Skills & Certificaciones -->
      <div class="fm-step" id="pm-s2">
        <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:10px;">Selecciona las skills del PM y sus certificaciones profesionales.</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;">🎓 Certificaciones</div>
        <div id="pm-certs-grid" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:16px;"></div>
        <div class="fm-section-sep"></div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;">🧠 Skills de Project Management</div>
        <div id="pm-skills-grid"></div>
      </div>
      <!-- Step 3: Confirmar -->
      <div class="fm-step" id="pm-s3">
        <div id="pm-preview"></div>
        <div id="pm-projects-panel" style="display:none;margin-top:14px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#f59e0b;margin-bottom:6px;">📋 Proyectos Asignados</div>
          <div id="pm-projects-list" style="max-height:160px;overflow-y:auto;"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-footer">
      <button class="btn-fm-back" id="pm-back-btn" onclick="pmStepBack()" style="display:none">← Atrás</button>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
        <span class="fm-skill-counter" id="pm-skill-count" style="display:none">0 skills</span>
        <button class="btn-fm-next" id="pm-next-btn" onclick="pmStepNext()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d97706,#f59e0b);border-color:#f59e0b;">Siguiente →</button>
        <button class="btn-fm-submit" id="pm-submit-btn" onclick="savePM()" style="display:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d97706,#f59e0b);border-color:#f59e0b;">
          <span id="pm-btn-text">✅ Añadir PM</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="page" id="page-projects">
  <div class="projects-page">
    <div class="proj-header">
      <div class="proj-header-top">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">
          <div class="page-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;"><svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="flex-shrink:0"><ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="9" ry="3"/><path d="M3 5v14c0 1.66 4 3 9 3s9-1.34 9-3V5"/><path d="M3 12c0 1.66 4 3 9 3s9-1.34 9-3"/><ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="9" ry="3" fill="#94a3b8" fill-opacity=".1"/></svg> Base de Datos de Proyectos <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;" id="proj-count">46 proyectos</span></div>
          <button class="btn-add-new" onclick="openProjForm()">
            <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>
            Nuevo Proyecto
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-chips">
          <div class="stat-chip"><span class="stat-chip-val" id="cnt-backlog">12</span><span class="stat-chip-label">Backlog</span></div>
          <div class="stat-chip"><span class="stat-chip-val" id="cnt-plan">16</span><span class="stat-chip-label">Planificado</span></div>
          <div class="stat-chip"><span class="stat-chip-val" id="cnt-prog">16</span><span class="stat-chip-label">En Progreso</span></div>
          <div class="stat-chip"><span class="stat-chip-val" id="cnt-done">2</span><span class="stat-chip-label">Completado</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <input class="search-bar" placeholder="Buscar proyecto, ID o skill..." oninput="filterProjects(this.value)" style="margin-bottom:10px;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
        <div class="prio-chip critica" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="filterProjPrio('Critica',this)">Crítica</div>
        <div class="prio-chip alta" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="filterProjPrio('Alta',this)">Alta</div>
        <div class="prio-chip media" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="filterProjPrio('Media',this)">Media</div>
        <div class="prio-chip baja" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="filterProjPrio('Baja',this)">Baja</div>
        <div class="prio-chip" style="cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border)" onclick="filterProjPrio('Todos',this)">Todos</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
      <table class="data-table" style="table-layout:fixed;">
        <thead><tr id="proj-thead-row">
          <th style="width:65px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">ID</th>
          <th style="width:220px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Proyecto</th>
          <th style="width:65px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Prioridad</th>
          <th style="width:80px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Estado</th>
          <th style="width:50px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Horas</th>
          <th style="width:130px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">PM Asignado</th>
          <th style="width:100px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Skill</th>
          <th style="width:120px;" class="tm-th-resizable" draggable="true">Fechas</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody id="proj-tbody"><tr><td colspan="8" style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--text2);"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Cargando proyectos...</td></tr></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="page" id="page-kanban">
<!-- ═══ P95 FASE 8 — Kanban Global kg-* (scope #kg-root) ═══ -->
<div id="kg-root">
<div class="kg-flow-panel" id="kg-flow-panel">
  <div class="kg-flow-head" onclick="kg_toggleFlow()">
    <h3>
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2"/></svg>
      M&eacute;tricas de Flujo &amp; Analytics
      <span class="kg-hint">&middot; CFD &middot; Control Chart &middot; Distribuci&oacute;n del WIP &middot; 30 d&iacute;as</span>
    </h3>
    <button class="kg-flow-toggle-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();kg_toggleFlow()" title="Minimizar / Expandir panel">
      <span class="kg-txt-close">Minimizar</span>
      <span class="kg-txt-open">Expandir</span>
      <span class="kg-chev">&#9650;</span>
    </button>
  </div>
  <div class="kg-flow-body">
    <!-- 6 KPIs -->
    <div class="kg-fkpi-row" id="kg-fkpi-row">
      <div class="kg-fkpi kg-bl"><div class="kg-fkpi-value" id="kg-kpi-total">0</div><div class="kg-fkpi-label">Total tareas</div></div>
      <div class="kg-fkpi kg-gn"><div class="kg-fkpi-value" id="kg-kpi-done">0</div><div class="kg-fkpi-label">Completadas (30d)</div></div>
      <div class="kg-fkpi kg-pu"><div class="kg-fkpi-value" id="kg-kpi-thr">0</div><div class="kg-fkpi-label">Throughput / sem</div></div>
      <div class="kg-fkpi kg-or"><div class="kg-fkpi-value" id="kg-kpi-lt">0<span class="kg-u">h</span></div><div class="kg-fkpi-label">Avg Lead Time</div></div>
      <div class="kg-fkpi kg-cy"><div class="kg-fkpi-value" id="kg-kpi-ct">0<span class="kg-u">h</span></div><div class="kg-fkpi-label">Avg Cycle Time</div></div>
      <div class="kg-fkpi kg-gn"><div class="kg-fkpi-value" id="kg-kpi-fe">0<span class="kg-u">%</span></div><div class="kg-fkpi-label">Flow Efficiency</div></div>
      <div class="kg-fkpi kg-gn"><div class="kg-fkpi-value" id="kg-kpi-wip-over">0<span class="kg-u">/5</span></div><div class="kg-fkpi-label">Columnas sobre WIP</div></div>
    </div>
    <!-- Charts -->
    <div class="kg-charts-row">
      <div class="kg-chart-box">
        <div class="kg-chart-title">Diagrama de flujo acumulado (CFD)</div>
        <div class="kg-chart-body" id="kg-chart-cfd"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="kg-chart-box">
        <div class="kg-chart-title">Control Chart (Lead Time)<span class="note" id="kg-cc-note">UCL 0h &middot; AVG 0h</span></div>
        <div class="kg-chart-body" id="kg-chart-cc"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="kg-chart-box">
        <div class="kg-chart-title">Distribuci&oacute;n del WIP<span class="note" id="kg-wip-note">0 tareas</span></div>
        <div class="kg-chart-body" id="kg-chart-wip" style="min-height:130px;padding-top:2px"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="kg-flow-footer">
    <div class="kg-ff-sp"></div>
    <div class="kg-ff-item kg-wip">WIP: <b id="kg-ff-wip">0</b></div>
    <div class="kg-ff-item kg-blk">Bloqueadas: <b id="kg-ff-blk">0</b></div>
    <div class="kg-ff-item kg-done">Completadas: <b id="kg-ff-done">0</b></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="kg-kb-toolbar">
  <div class="kg-kb-title">
    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M9 3v18M15 3v18"/></svg>
    Tableros de tareas en vuelo
  </div>
  <span class="kg-kb-total" id="kg-kb-total">0 tareas</span>
  <div class="kg-kb-seg">
    <button class="kg-on" onclick="kg_filterType('all',this)">Todas</button>
    <button onclick="kg_filterType('RUN',this)">RUN</button>
    <button onclick="kg_filterType('BUILD',this)">BUILD</button>
  </div>
  <select class="kg-kb-filter" id="kg-filter-prio" onchange="kg_applyFilters()">
    <option value="">Todas prioridades</option>
    <option value="p1">Solo P1</option>
    <option value="p2">Solo P2</option>
    <option value="p3">P3</option>
    <option value="p4">P4</option>
  </select>
  <select class="kg-kb-filter" id="kg-filter-tech" onchange="kg_applyFilters()">
    <option value="">Todos t&eacute;cnicos</option>
  </select>
  <select class="kg-kb-filter" id="kg-filter-dept" onchange="kg_applyFilters()">
    <option value="">Todos departamentos</option>
  </select>
  <input class="kg-kb-search" id="kg-filter-search" placeholder="Buscar tarea, CI, proyecto..." oninput="kg_applyFilters()">
  <button id="kg-kb-export-pdf" onclick="kg_exportKanbanPDF()" title="Descargar snapshot PDF" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(57,210,192,.18),rgba(88,166,255,.18));border:1px solid var(--acc-cy);color:var(--acc-cy);padding:5px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;transition:.15s;">
    <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
    PDF
  </button>
</div>
<div class="kg-kanban" id="kg-kanban">
  <div class="kg-kb-col" data-st="unassigned" ondragover="kg_kbOver(event)" ondragleave="kg_kbLeave(event)" ondrop="kg_kbDrop(event)">
    <div class="kg-kb-col-h"><h4><span class="kg-dot" style="background:var(--kg-tx3)"></span>Sin asignar</h4><span class="kg-kcnt" id="kg-cnt-unassigned">0</span></div>
    <div class="kg-kb-body" id="kg-body-unassigned"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="kg-kb-col" data-st="asignada" ondragover="kg_kbOver(event)" ondragleave="kg_kbLeave(event)" ondrop="kg_kbDrop(event)">
    <div class="kg-kb-col-h"><h4><span class="kg-dot" style="background:var(--kg-acc-bl)"></span>Asignada</h4><span class="kg-kcnt" id="kg-cnt-asignada">0</span></div>
    <div class="kg-kb-body" id="kg-body-asignada"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="kg-kb-col" data-st="en_curso" ondragover="kg_kbOver(event)" ondragleave="kg_kbLeave(event)" ondrop="kg_kbDrop(event)">
    <div class="kg-kb-col-h"><h4><span class="kg-dot" style="background:var(--kg-acc-or)"></span>En curso</h4><span class="kg-kcnt" id="kg-cnt-en_curso">0</span></div>
    <div class="kg-kb-body" id="kg-body-en_curso"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="kg-kb-col" data-st="pte_tercero" ondragover="kg_kbOver(event)" ondragleave="kg_kbLeave(event)" ondrop="kg_kbDrop(event)">
    <div class="kg-kb-col-h"><h4><span class="kg-dot" style="background:var(--kg-tx3)"></span>Pte. tercero</h4><span class="kg-kcnt" id="kg-cnt-pte_tercero">0</span></div>
    <div class="kg-kb-body" id="kg-body-pte_tercero"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="kg-kb-col" data-st="resuelta" ondragover="kg_kbOver(event)" ondragleave="kg_kbLeave(event)" ondrop="kg_kbDrop(event)">
    <div class="kg-kb-col-h"><h4><span class="kg-dot" style="background:var(--kg-acc-gn)"></span>Resuelta</h4><span class="kg-kcnt" id="kg-cnt-resuelta">0</span></div>
    <div class="kg-kb-body" id="kg-body-resuelta"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="kg-modal-overlay" id="kg-modal" onclick="if(event.target===this)kg_closeFicha()">
  <div class="kg-detail-modal">
    <div class="kg-dm-hdr">
      <div class="kg-dm-hdr-left">
        <h2 id="kg-dm-title">&mdash;</h2>
        <div class="kg-dm-id">
          <span class="kg-dm-type" id="kg-dm-type">&mdash;</span>
          <span id="kg-dm-id">&mdash;</span>
          <span>&middot;</span>
          <span id="kg-dm-creada">&mdash;</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="kg-dm-actions">
        <button class="kg-dm-action-btn kg-escalar" onclick="kg_modalEscalar()" title="Escalar prioridad">&uarr; Escalar</button>
        <button class="kg-dm-action-btn kg-cerrar" onclick="kg_modalCerrar()" title="Marcar como resuelta">&#10003; Cerrar</button>
      </div>
      <button class="kg-dm-close" onclick="kg_closeFicha()">&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="kg-dm-body" id="kg-dm-body">
      <div style="text-align:center;color:var(--tx3);padding:30px 0;">Cargando&hellip;</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="kg-toast" id="kg-toast"></div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- MODAL: KANBAN TAREA -->
<div class="fm-overlay" id="fm-kanban" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeKanbanForm()">
  <div class="fm-box" style="width:680px;">
    <div style="padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
      <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M9 3v18"/><path d="M15 3v18"/></svg>
      <span style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;" id="kb-form-title">Nueva Tarea Kanban</span>
      <button onclick="closeKanbanForm()" style="margin-left:auto;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:18px;overflow-y:auto;max-height:70vh;">
      <input type="hidden" id="kb-edit-id">
      <div class="sap-grid" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div class="sap-field sap-full">
          <label class="sap-label">Título</label>
          <input class="sap-input" id="kb-titulo" placeholder="Descripción breve de la tarea...">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sap-grid" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div class="sap-field">
          <label class="sap-label">Tipo</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="kb-tipo">
            <option value="RUN">RUN (Operación)</option>
            <option value="BUILD">BUILD (Proyecto)</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="sap-field">
          <label class="sap-label">Prioridad</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="kb-prioridad">
            <option value="Crítica">Crítica (P1)</option>
            <option value="Alta">Alta (P2)</option>
            <option value="Media" selected>Media (P3)</option>
            <option value="Baja">Baja (P4)</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sap-grid" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div class="sap-field">
          <label class="sap-label">Columna</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="kb-columna">
            <option value="Backlog">Backlog</option>
            <option value="Análisis">Análisis</option>
            <option value="En Progreso">En Progreso</option>
            <option value="Code Review">Code Review</option>
            <option value="Testing">Testing</option>
            <option value="Despliegue">Despliegue</option>
            <option value="Bloqueado">Bloqueado</option>
            <option value="Completado">Completado</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="sap-field">
          <label class="sap-label">Técnico Asignado</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="kb-tecnico">
            <option value="">Sin asignar</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sap-grid" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div class="sap-field">
          <label class="sap-label">Vincular a Proyecto</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="kb-proyecto">
            <option value="">Ninguno</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="sap-field">
          <label class="sap-label">Vincular a Incidencia</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="kb-incidencia">
            <option value="">Ninguna</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sap-grid" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div class="sap-field">
          <label class="sap-label">Horas Estimadas</label>
          <input class="sap-input mono" id="kb-horas-est" type="number" min="0" step="0.5" value="0">
        </div>
        <div class="sap-field">
          <label class="sap-label">Horas Reales</label>
          <input class="sap-input mono" id="kb-horas-real" type="number" min="0" step="0.5" value="0">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sap-field" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
        <label class="sap-label">Descripción / Notas</label>
        <textarea class="sap-textarea" id="kb-descripcion" placeholder="Detalles de la tarea..."></textarea>
      </div>
      <div class="sap-field" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
        <label class="sap-label">Bloqueador (si aplica)</label>
        <input class="sap-input" id="kb-bloqueador" placeholder="Ej: Esperando respuesta de proveedor...">
      </div>
      <!-- Fechas (read-only info) -->
      <div id="kb-fechas-info" style="display:none;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Fechas Automáticas</div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;font-size:11px;">
          <div><span style="color:var(--text3);">Creación:</span> <span id="kb-f-creacion" style="font-family:var(--mono);">--</span></div>
          <div><span style="color:var(--text3);">Inicio Ejecución:</span> <span id="kb-f-ejecucion" style="font-family:var(--mono);">--</span></div>
          <div><span style="color:var(--text3);">Cierre:</span> <span id="kb-f-cierre" style="font-family:var(--mono);">--</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:12px 18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;">
      <button class="btn-fm-back" onclick="closeKanbanForm()">Cancelar</button>
      <button class="btn-fm-submit" onclick="saveKanbanTarea()">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
        <span id="kb-btn-save-text">Crear Tarea</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- ══════════════════ PAGE: BUDGET ══════════════════ -->
<div class="page" id="page-budget">
  <div class="budget-page">
    <div class="budget-header">
      <div class="budget-kpi-row">
        <div class="bgt-kpi">
          <div class="bgt-kpi-icon" style="background:rgba(16,185,129,.15);"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M12 2v20M17 5H9.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 0 0 7h5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 0 7H6"/></svg></div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-val" style="color:#10b981;" id="bgt-kpi-bac">€ 0</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-label">BAC Total Portfolio</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-sub">Budget at Completion</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bgt-kpi">
          <div class="bgt-kpi-icon" style="background:rgba(56,189,248,.15);"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/></svg></div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-val" style="color:#38bdf8;" id="bgt-kpi-labor">€ 0</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-label">Labor Interno</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-sub">Personal FTE</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bgt-kpi">
          <div class="bgt-kpi-icon" style="background:rgba(251,191,36,.15);"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fbbf24" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M8 21h8M12 17v4"/></svg></div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-val" style="color:#fbbf24;" id="bgt-kpi-opex">€ 0</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-label">OPEX Total</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-sub">Gastos Operacionales</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bgt-kpi">
          <div class="bgt-kpi-icon" style="background:rgba(249,115,22,.15);"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16z"/></svg></div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-val" style="color:#f97316;" id="bgt-kpi-capex">€ 0</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-label">CAPEX Total</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-sub">Inversiones Capital</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bgt-kpi">
          <div class="bgt-kpi-icon" style="background:rgba(139,92,246,.15);"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#8b5cf6" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M21 2l-2 2m-7.61 7.61a5.5 5.5 0 1 1-7.778 7.778 5.5 5.5 0 0 1 7.777-7.777zm0 0L15.5 7.5m0 0l3 3L22 7l-3-3m-3.5 3.5L19 4"/></svg></div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-val" style="color:#8b5cf6;" id="bgt-kpi-prov">€ 0</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-label">Proveedores Ext.</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-sub">Terceros y Vendors</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bgt-kpi">
          <div class="bgt-kpi-icon" style="background:rgba(244,114,182,.15);"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f472b6" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="22 12 18 12 15 21 9 3 6 12 2 12"/></svg></div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-val" style="color:#f472b6;" id="bgt-kpi-count">0</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-label">Presupuestos</div>
          <div class="bgt-kpi-sub" id="bgt-kpi-count-sub">0 aprobados</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
        <input class="search-bar" placeholder="Buscar por ID, proyecto, responsable…" oninput="filterBudgets(this.value)" style="margin:0;flex:1;max-width:380px;">
        <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;">
          <button class="filter-chip active" id="bgt-f-all"   onclick="filterBgtEstado('',this)">Todos</button>
          <button class="filter-chip" id="bgt-f-bor"          onclick="filterBgtEstado('BORRADOR',this)">Borrador</button>
          <button class="filter-chip" id="bgt-f-rev"          onclick="filterBgtEstado('EN_REVISION',this)">En Revisión</button>
          <button class="filter-chip" id="bgt-f-apr"          onclick="filterBgtEstado('APROBADO',this)">Aprobado</button>
        </div>
        <button class="btn-add-new" onclick="openBudgetForm()">
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>
          Nuevo Presupuesto
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="budget-table-wrap">
      <table class="data-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>ID Presupuesto</th>
            <th>Proyecto</th>
            <th>Responsable</th>
            <th>Estado</th>
            <th style="text-align:right;">Labor</th>
            <th style="text-align:right;">Proveedores</th>
            <th style="text-align:right;">OPEX</th>
            <th style="text-align:right;">CAPEX</th>
            <th style="text-align:right;">RRHH</th>
            <th style="text-align:right;">Reservas</th>
            <th style="text-align:right;color:#10b981;">BAC Total</th>
            <th>Ver.</th>
            <th>Acciones</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody id="budget-tbody">
          <tr><td colspan="13" style="text-align:center;padding:48px;color:var(--text3);">
            <div style="font-size:28px;opacity:.25;margin-bottom:8px;">💰</div>
            Cargando presupuestos…
          </td></tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════ WAR ROOM COGNITIVO ══════════════════ -->
<div class="page" id="page-warroom">
  <div class="wr-page">
    <!-- Sidebar Nav -->
    <div class="wr-sidebar">
      <div style="padding:6px 8px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2a3 3 0 0 0-3 3v4a3 3 0 0 0 6 0V5a3 3 0 0 0-3-3z"/><path d="M19 10v1a7 7 0 0 1-14 0v-1"/><path d="M12 18v4"/><path d="M8 22h8"/></svg>
        <span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:#a855f7;">WAR ROOM</span>
      </div>
      <div class="wr-sidebar-title">Centro de Control</div>
      <div class="wr-nav-item active" onclick="wrShowSection('dashboard',this)">
        <div class="wr-nav-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="9" rx="1"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="5" rx="1"/><rect x="14" y="12" width="7" height="9" rx="1"/><rect x="3" y="16" width="7" height="5" rx="1"/></svg></div>
        Command Center
      </div>
      <div class="wr-nav-item" onclick="wrShowSection('chat',this)">
        <div class="wr-nav-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/></svg></div>
        Chat Multi-Agente
      </div>
      <div class="wr-sidebar-title">Inteligencia</div>
      <div class="wr-nav-item" onclick="wrShowSection('alerts',this)">
        <div class="wr-nav-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg></div>
        Alertas
        <span class="wr-nav-badge" id="wr-nav-alerts-badge" style="display:none;">0</span>
      </div>
      <div class="wr-nav-item" onclick="wrShowSection('compliance',this)">
        <div class="wr-nav-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg></div>
        Compliance
      </div>
      <div class="wr-nav-item" onclick="wrShowSection('postmortem',this)">
        <div class="wr-nav-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.35-4.35"/></svg></div>
        Post-Mortem
      </div>
      <div class="wr-nav-item" onclick="wrShowSection('simulator',this)">
        <div class="wr-nav-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M10 2v7.527a2 2 0 0 1-.211.896L4.72 20.55a1 1 0 0 0 .9 1.45h12.76a1 1 0 0 0 .9-1.45l-5.069-10.127A2 2 0 0 1 14 9.527V2"/><path d="M8.5 2h7"/></svg></div>
        Simulador What-If
      </div>
      <div class="wr-sidebar-title">Operaciones</div>
      <div class="wr-nav-item" onclick="wrShowSection('sessions',this)">
        <div class="wr-nav-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2"/></svg></div>
        Sesiones Crisis
      </div>
      <div class="wr-nav-item" onclick="wrShowSection('metrics',this)">
        <div class="wr-nav-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 2a10 10 0 1 0 10 10H12V2z"/><path d="M20 12a8 8 0 0 0-8-8v8h8z" fill="rgba(168,85,247,.2)"/></svg></div>
        Métricas IA
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Content Area -->
    <div class="wr-content">

      <!-- ═══ DASHBOARD (COMMAND CENTER) ═══ -->
      <div class="wr-section active" id="wr-sec-dashboard">
        <div class="wr-section-title">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="9" rx="1"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="5" rx="1"/><rect x="14" y="12" width="7" height="9" rx="1"/><rect x="3" y="16" width="7" height="5" rx="1"/></svg>
          Command Center
        </div>
        <div class="wr-kpi-row" id="wr-dashboard-kpis">
          <div class="wr-kpi"><div class="wr-kpi-icon" style="background:var(--red-bg);"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--red)" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg></div><div class="wr-kpi-val" id="wr-kpi-alertas" style="color:var(--red);">--</div><div class="wr-kpi-label">Alertas Activas</div></div>
          <div class="wr-kpi"><div class="wr-kpi-icon" style="background:var(--purple-bg);"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg></div><div class="wr-kpi-val" id="wr-kpi-compliance" style="color:#a855f7;">--</div><div class="wr-kpi-label">Compliance Pendiente</div></div>
          <div class="wr-kpi"><div class="wr-kpi-icon" style="background:var(--yellow-bg);"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--yellow)" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.35-4.35"/></svg></div><div class="wr-kpi-val" id="wr-kpi-postmortem" style="color:var(--yellow);">--</div><div class="wr-kpi-label">Post-Mortems Draft</div></div>
          <div class="wr-kpi"><div class="wr-kpi-icon" style="background:var(--green-bg);"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--green)" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 2a10 10 0 1 0 10 10H12V2z"/></svg></div><div class="wr-kpi-val" id="wr-kpi-sims" style="color:var(--green);">--</div><div class="wr-kpi-label">Simulaciones 7d</div></div>
        </div>
        <!-- Semáforo RUN / BUILD -->
        <div class="wr-semaforo">
          <div class="wr-sem-item">
            <div class="wr-sem-dot" id="wr-sem-run"></div>
            <div><div class="wr-sem-label">RUN</div><div class="wr-sem-sub" id="wr-sem-run-text">Cargando...</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="wr-sem-item">
            <div class="wr-sem-dot" id="wr-sem-build"></div>
            <div><div class="wr-sem-label">BUILD</div><div class="wr-sem-sub" id="wr-sem-build-text">Cargando...</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Timeline 24h -->
        <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--text2)" stroke-width="1.8"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/></svg>
          Timeline de Actividad (últimas acciones)
        </div>
        <div class="wr-timeline" id="wr-timeline-feed">
          <div class="no-data">Cargando timeline...</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ CHAT MULTI-AGENTE ═══ -->
      <div class="wr-section" id="wr-sec-chat">
        <div class="wr-chat-layout">
          <!-- Agent selector -->
          <div class="wr-chat-agents">
            <div class="wr-agent-group">
              <div class="wr-agent-group-title"><div class="wr-agent-dot" style="background:var(--blue);"></div> AGENTES RUN</div>
              <div class="wr-agent-item" onclick="wrSelectAgent('AG-001',this)"><div class="wr-agent-avatar" style="background:var(--blue);">01</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">AG-001</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Dispatcher</div></div></div>
              <div class="wr-agent-item" onclick="wrSelectAgent('AG-002',this)"><div class="wr-agent-avatar" style="background:#2563eb;">02</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">AG-002</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Resource Mgr RUN</div></div></div>
              <div class="wr-agent-item" onclick="wrSelectAgent('AG-003',this)"><div class="wr-agent-avatar" style="background:#0891b2;">03</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">AG-003</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Forecaster</div></div></div>
              <div class="wr-agent-item" onclick="wrSelectAgent('AG-004',this)"><div class="wr-agent-avatar" style="background:#0e7490;">04</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">AG-004</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Buffer Gatekeeper</div></div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="wr-agent-group">
              <div class="wr-agent-group-title"><div class="wr-agent-dot" style="background:var(--green);"></div> AGENTES BUILD</div>
              <div class="wr-agent-item" onclick="wrSelectAgent('AG-005',this)"><div class="wr-agent-avatar" style="background:var(--green);">05</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">AG-005</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Estratega PMO</div></div></div>
              <div class="wr-agent-item" onclick="wrSelectAgent('AG-006',this)"><div class="wr-agent-avatar" style="background:#059669;">06</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">AG-006</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Resource Mgr BUILD</div></div></div>
              <div class="wr-agent-item" onclick="wrSelectAgent('AG-007',this)"><div class="wr-agent-avatar" style="background:#047857;">07</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">AG-007</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Planificador</div></div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="wr-agent-group">
              <div class="wr-agent-group-title"><div class="wr-agent-dot" style="background:#a855f7;"></div> AGENTES WAR ROOM</div>
              <div class="wr-agent-item active" onclick="wrSelectAgent('AG-008',this)"><div class="wr-agent-avatar" style="background:#7c3aed;">08</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">AG-008</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Compliance</div></div></div>
              <div class="wr-agent-item" onclick="wrSelectAgent('AG-009',this)"><div class="wr-agent-avatar" style="background:#9333ea;">09</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">AG-009</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Post-Mortem</div></div></div>
              <div class="wr-agent-item" onclick="wrSelectAgent('AG-010',this)"><div class="wr-agent-avatar" style="background:#a855f7;">10</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">AG-010</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Simulador</div></div></div>
              <div class="wr-agent-item" onclick="wrSelectAgent('AG-012',this)"><div class="wr-agent-avatar" style="background:#c084fc;">12</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">AG-012</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Alert Correlator</div></div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Chat main -->
          <div class="wr-chat-main">
            <div class="wr-chat-header">
              <div class="wr-agent-avatar" id="wr-chat-av" style="background:#7c3aed;">08</div>
              <div>
                <div class="wr-chat-header-name" id="wr-chat-agent-name">AG-008 Compliance Auditor</div>
                <div class="wr-chat-header-sub" id="wr-chat-agent-sub">Temp: 0.2 · Precisión normativa</div>
              </div>
              <div class="wr-chat-online" style="margin-left:auto;"></div>
              <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--green);font-weight:600;">Online</span>
            </div>
            <div class="wr-chat-messages" id="wr-chat-messages">
              <div style="text-align:center;padding:40px;color:var(--text3);font-size:12px;">
                <svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--text3)" stroke-width="1" style="margin:0 auto 8px;display:block;"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/></svg>
                Selecciona un agente y escribe tu mensaje<br>para iniciar una conversación con el War Room.
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="wr-chat-input-bar">
              <input class="wr-chat-input" id="wr-chat-input" placeholder="Escribe tu mensaje al agente..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')wrSendChat()">
              <button class="wr-chat-send" onclick="wrSendChat()">
                <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="22" y1="2" x2="11" y2="13"/><polygon points="22 2 15 22 11 13 2 9 22 2"/></svg>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ ALERTAS INTELIGENTES ═══ -->
      <div class="wr-section" id="wr-sec-alerts">
        <div class="wr-section-title">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f85149" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg>
          Alertas Inteligentes
        </div>
        <div class="wr-filter-bar" id="wr-alert-filters">
          <div class="wr-filter-chip active" onclick="wrFilterAlerts('ALL',this)">Todas</div>
          <div class="wr-filter-chip" onclick="wrFilterAlerts('CRITICAL',this)">Critical</div>
          <div class="wr-filter-chip" onclick="wrFilterAlerts('HIGH',this)">High</div>
          <div class="wr-filter-chip" onclick="wrFilterAlerts('MEDIUM',this)">Medium</div>
          <div class="wr-filter-chip" onclick="wrFilterAlerts('LOW',this)">Low</div>
        </div>
        <div id="wr-alerts-feed">
          <div class="no-data">Cargando alertas...</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ COMPLIANCE ═══ -->
      <div class="wr-section" id="wr-sec-compliance">
        <div class="wr-section-title">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
          Compliance & Auditoría
        </div>
        <div class="wr-kpi-row" id="wr-compliance-kpis" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);"></div>
        <div class="wr-filter-bar">
          <div class="wr-filter-chip active" onclick="wrFilterAudits('ALL',this)">Todos</div>
          <div class="wr-filter-chip" onclick="wrFilterAudits('ITIL4_SLA',this)">ITIL4</div>
          <div class="wr-filter-chip" onclick="wrFilterAudits('PMBOK7_DELIVERABLE',this)">PMBOK7</div>
          <div class="wr-filter-chip" onclick="wrFilterAudits('GDPR_DATA',this)">GDPR</div>
          <div class="wr-filter-chip" onclick="wrFilterAudits('DORA_RESILIENCE',this)">DORA</div>
          <div class="wr-filter-chip" onclick="wrFilterAudits('ISO27001_SECURITY',this)">ISO27001</div>
        </div>
        <div id="wr-compliance-feed">
          <div class="no-data">Cargando auditorías...</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ POST-MORTEM ═══ -->
      <div class="wr-section" id="wr-sec-postmortem">
        <div class="wr-section-title">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--yellow)" stroke-width="1.8"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.35-4.35"/></svg>
          Informes Post-Mortem
        </div>
        <div id="wr-postmortem-feed">
          <div class="no-data">Cargando post-mortems...</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ SIMULADOR WHAT-IF ═══ -->
      <div class="wr-section" id="wr-sec-simulator">
        <div class="wr-section-title">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M10 2v7.527a2 2 0 0 1-.211.896L4.72 20.55a1 1 0 0 0 .9 1.45h12.76a1 1 0 0 0 .9-1.45l-5.069-10.127A2 2 0 0 1 14 9.527V2"/><path d="M8.5 2h7"/></svg>
          Simulador What-If
        </div>
        <div class="wr-sim-form">
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px;">
            <div class="sap-field">
              <label class="sap-label">Tipo de Escenario</label>
              <select class="sap-input" id="wr-sim-type">
                <option value="RESOURCE_REALLOCATION">Reasignación de Recursos</option>
                <option value="PROJECT_DELAY">Retraso de Proyecto</option>
                <option value="P1_CASCADE">Cascada P1 (3 incidencias simultáneas)</option>
                <option value="BUDGET_CUT">Recorte Presupuestario</option>
                <option value="TEAM_SCALING">Escalado de Equipo</option>
                <option value="FREEZE_PERIOD">Periodo de Freeze</option>
                <option value="SKILL_GAP">Brecha de Skills</option>
                <option value="VENDOR_FAILURE">Fallo de Proveedor</option>
                <option value="REGULATORY_CHANGE">Cambio Regulatorio</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="sap-field">
              <label class="sap-label">Nombre de la Simulación</label>
              <input class="sap-input" id="wr-sim-name" placeholder="Describe el escenario...">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="sap-field" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <label class="sap-label">Descripción del Escenario</label>
            <textarea class="sap-textarea" id="wr-sim-desc" placeholder="Detalla el escenario what-if que quieres simular..."></textarea>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-add-new" onclick="wrRunSimulation()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#a855f7);border-color:#a855f7;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(124,58,237,.25);">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;"><path d="M10 2v7.527a2 2 0 0 1-.211.896L4.72 20.55a1 1 0 0 0 .9 1.45h12.76a1 1 0 0 0 .9-1.45l-5.069-10.127A2 2 0 0 1 14 9.527V2"/></svg>
            Ejecutar Simulación
          </button>
        </div>
        <div id="wr-sim-results" style="display:none;">
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;">Resultados de la Simulación</div>
          <div class="wr-sim-results" id="wr-sim-cases"></div>
          <div id="wr-sim-recommendations" style="margin-top:12px;"></div>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin:16px 0 10px;">Simulaciones Anteriores</div>
        <div id="wr-sim-history">
          <div class="no-data">Cargando simulaciones...</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ SESIONES WAR ROOM ═══ -->
      <div class="wr-section" id="wr-sec-sessions">
        <div class="wr-section-title">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--red)" stroke-width="1.8"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2"/></svg>
          Sesiones de Crisis
        </div>
        <button class="btn-add-new" onclick="wrCreateSession()" style="margin-bottom:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#a855f7);border-color:#a855f7;">
          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>
          Nueva Sesión
        </button>
        <div id="wr-sessions-feed">
          <div class="no-data">Cargando sesiones...</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ MÉTRICAS IA ═══ -->
      <div class="wr-section" id="wr-sec-metrics">
        <div class="wr-section-title">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 2a10 10 0 1 0 10 10H12V2z"/><path d="M20 12a8 8 0 0 0-8-8v8h8z" fill="rgba(168,85,247,.15)"/></svg>
          Métricas de Agentes IA
        </div>
        <div class="wr-metric-grid" id="wr-metrics-grid">
          <div class="no-data" style="grid-column:1/-1;">Cargando métricas...</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════ PAGE: DOCUMENTACIÓN ══════════════════ -->
<div class="page" id="page-docs">
  <div class="gov-page">
    <div class="team-header" style="padding:10px 20px 8px;">
      <div class="team-header-top" style="margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div class="page-title" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
          <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M4 19.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 17H20"/><path d="M6.5 2H20v20H6.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 4 19.5v-15A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 2z"/></svg>
          Repositorio de Documentación <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;" id="docs-count">0 documentos</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
          <button onclick="openDocForm()" class="btn-add-new" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0284c7,#0ea5e9);border-color:#0ea5e9;">+ Documento</button>
          <button onclick="toggleDocStats()" style="background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.3);color:#0ea5e9;border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Dashboard</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Stats panel -->
      <div id="docs-stats" style="display:none;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;" id="docs-kpis"></div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;" id="docs-breakdown"></div>
        <div style="text-align:right;margin-top:4px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;" onclick="toggleDocStats()">▲ Minimizar</span></div>
      </div>
      <!-- Filters -->
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <input class="search-bar" placeholder="Buscar documentos..." oninput="filterDocs(this.value)" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:200px;">
        <select class="sap-input" id="doc-filter-silo" onchange="filterDocsApply()" style="width:auto;padding:4px 10px;font-size:11px;">
          <option value="">Todos los Silos</option><option value="BUILD">BUILD</option><option value="RUN">RUN</option><option value="TRANSVERSAL">TRANSVERSAL</option>
        </select>
        <select class="sap-input" id="doc-filter-tipo" onchange="filterDocsApply()" style="width:auto;padding:4px 10px;font-size:11px;">
          <option value="">Todos los Tipos</option><option value="proyecto">Proyecto</option><option value="incidencia">Incidencia</option><option value="gobernanza">Gobernanza</option><option value="formacion">Formación</option><option value="herramienta">Herramienta</option><option value="plantilla">Plantilla</option>
        </select>
        <select class="sap-input" id="doc-filter-depto" onchange="filterDocsApply()" style="width:auto;padding:4px 10px;font-size:11px;">
          <option value="">Todos los Departamentos</option>
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Folder breadcrumb -->
    <div style="padding:4px 20px;background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);" id="docs-breadcrumb">
      <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/></svg>
      <span style="cursor:pointer;color:#0ea5e9;" onclick="filterDocsApply()">CognitivePMO_Documentación</span>
    </div>
    <!-- Documents grid -->
    <div style="flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:14px 20px;">
      <div id="docs-grid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:10px;">
        <div class="no-data">Cargando documentos...</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- Modal: Nuevo Documento -->
<div class="fm-overlay" id="fm-doc" onclick="if(event.target===this)fmClose('fm-doc')">
  <div class="fm-box" style="width:620px;">
    <div style="padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
      <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M4 19.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 17H20"/><path d="M6.5 2H20v20H6.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 4 19.5v-15A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 2z"/></svg>
      <span style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;" id="doc-form-title">Nuevo Documento</span>
      <button onclick="fmClose('fm-doc')" style="margin-left:auto;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:18px;overflow-y:auto;max-height:70vh;">
      <input type="hidden" id="doc-edit-id">
      <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0 0 10px;"><label class="sap-label">Título del Documento</label>
        <input class="sap-input" id="doc-titulo" placeholder="Ej: Plan de Proyecto — Migración OpenShift"></div>
      <div class="sap-grid" style="margin-bottom:10px;">
        <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">Tipo</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="doc-tipo">
            <option value="proyecto">Proyecto</option><option value="incidencia">Incidencia</option><option value="gobernanza">Gobernanza</option>
            <option value="formacion">Formación</option><option value="herramienta">Herramienta</option><option value="plantilla">Plantilla</option>
          </select></div>
        <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">Silo</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="doc-silo" onchange="docSiloChanged()">
            <option value="BUILD">BUILD</option><option value="RUN">RUN</option><option value="TRANSVERSAL">TRANSVERSAL</option>
          </select></div>
      </div>
      <div class="sap-grid" style="margin-bottom:10px;">
        <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">Departamento</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="doc-depto"><option value="">— Seleccionar —</option></select></div>
        <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">Proyecto Vinculado (opcional)</label>
          <select class="sap-input" id="doc-proyecto"><option value="">— Ninguno —</option></select></div>
      </div>
      <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0 0 10px;"><label class="sap-label">Descripción</label>
        <textarea class="sap-textarea" id="doc-desc" placeholder="Descripción del documento..." style="min-height:50px;"></textarea></div>
      <div class="sap-grid" style="margin-bottom:10px;">
        <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">Tags (separados por coma)</label>
          <input class="sap-input" id="doc-tags" placeholder="PMBOK, seguridad, infra..."></div>
        <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0;"><label class="sap-label">Creado por</label>
          <input class="sap-input" id="doc-creador" placeholder="Jose Antonio Martinez" value="Jose Antonio Martinez"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="sap-field" style="margin:0 0 10px;"><label class="sap-label">URL de Google Drive (enlace compartido)</label>
        <input class="sap-input" id="doc-drive-url" placeholder="https://drive.google.com/file/d/..."></div>
      <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:20px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;" id="doc-dropzone" onclick="document.getElementById('doc-file-input').click()" ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='#0ea5e9'" ondragleave="this.style.borderColor=''" ondrop="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='';docHandleDrop(event)">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--text3)" stroke-width="1.5" style="margin:0 auto 6px;display:block;"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="17 8 12 3 7 8"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);">Arrastra un archivo aquí o <strong style="color:#0ea5e9;">haz clic para seleccionar</strong></div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px;">PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, MD, TXT (máx 50MB)</div>
        <div id="doc-file-info" style="display:none;margin-top:8px;font-size:11px;color:var(--green);font-weight:600;"></div>
        <input type="file" id="doc-file-input" style="display:none;" accept=".pdf,.docx,.xlsx,.pptx,.md,.txt,.csv,.json" onchange="docFileSelected(this)">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:12px 18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;">
      <button class="btn-fm-back" onclick="fmClose('fm-doc')">Cancelar</button>
      <button class="btn-fm-submit" onclick="saveDoc()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0284c7,#0ea5e9);border-color:#0ea5e9;" id="doc-btn-save">Registrar Documento</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- ══════════════════ PAGE: DEV TOOLS ══════════════════ -->
<!-- ══════════════════ CMDB PAGE ══════════════════ -->
<div class="page" id="page-cmdb">
  <div class="dev-page">
    <div class="dev-sidebar">
      <div style="padding:6px 8px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="9" ry="3"/><path d="M3 5v14c0 1.66 4 3 9 3s9-1.34 9-3V5"/></svg>
        <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:#f59e0b;">CMDB</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item active" onclick="cmdbShowSection('dashboard',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
        <span data-i18n="cmdb.dashboard">Dashboard</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="cmdbShowSection('inventario',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="8" rx="2"/><rect x="2" y="14" width="20" height="8" rx="2"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="6.01" y2="6"/><line x1="6" y1="18" x2="6.01" y2="18"/></svg>
        <span data-i18n="cmdb.inventory">Inventario CIs</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="cmdbShowSection('dependencias',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><circle cx="18" cy="5" r="3"/><circle cx="6" cy="12" r="3"/><circle cx="18" cy="19" r="3"/><line x1="8.59" y1="13.51" x2="15.42" y2="17.49"/><line x1="15.41" y1="6.51" x2="8.59" y2="10.49"/></svg>
        <span data-i18n="cmdb.dependencies">Mapa Dependencias</span>
      </div>
      <div style="height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:6px 8px;"></div>
      <div style="padding:2px 8px;font-size:9px;color:#39c5cf;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:1px;">RED</div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="cmdbShowSection('vlans',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#39c5cf" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2"/></svg>
        <span style="color:#39c5cf;" data-i18n="cmdb.vlans">VLANs</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="cmdbShowSection('ips',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#39c5cf" stroke-width="1.8"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
        <span style="color:#39c5cf;" data-i18n="cmdb.ips">Registro IPs</span>
      </div>
      <div style="height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:6px 8px;"></div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="cmdbShowSection('software',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/></svg>
        <span data-i18n="cmdb.software">Software & Licencias</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="cmdbShowSection('costes',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M12 12m-3 0a3 3 0 1 0 6 0a3 3 0 1 0-6 0"/></svg>
        <span style="color:#f59e0b;" data-i18n="cmdb.costs">Costes & Budget</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="cmdbShowSection('compliance',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
        <span style="color:#ef4444;" data-i18n="cmdb.compliance">Compliance</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="dev-content">
      <!-- CMDB Dashboard -->
      <div class="dev-section active" id="cmdb-sec-dashboard"><div id="cmdb-dash"></div></div>
      <!-- Inventario -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="cmdb-sec-inventario"><div id="cmdb-inv"></div></div>
      <!-- Dependencias -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="cmdb-sec-dependencias"><div id="cmdb-deps"></div></div>
      <!-- VLANs -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="cmdb-sec-vlans"><div id="cmdb-vlans"></div></div>
      <!-- IPs -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="cmdb-sec-ips"><div id="cmdb-ips"></div></div>
      <!-- Software -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="cmdb-sec-software"><div id="cmdb-soft"></div></div>
      <!-- Costes -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="cmdb-sec-costes"><div id="cmdb-costes"></div></div>
      <!-- Compliance -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="cmdb-sec-compliance"><div id="cmdb-comp"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page" id="page-devtools">
  <div class="dev-page">
    <div class="dev-sidebar">
      <div style="padding:6px 8px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 20h9"/><path d="M16.5 3.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4L16.5 3.5z"/></svg>
        <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:#ef4444;">DEV TOOLS</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item active" onclick="devShowSection('db',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="9" ry="3"/><path d="M21 12c0 1.66-4 3-9 3s-9-1.34-9-3"/><path d="M3 5v14c0 1.66 4 3 9 3s9-1.34 9-3V5"/></svg>
        <span data-i18n="dev.db">Base de Datos</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="devShowSection('sql',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/></svg>
        <span data-i18n="dev.sql">SQL Console</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="devShowSection('files',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M13 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V9z"/><polyline points="13 2 13 9 20 9"/></svg>
        <span data-i18n="dev.files">Código Fuente</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="devShowSection('api',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2"/></svg>
        <span data-i18n="dev.api">API Endpoints</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="devShowSection('context',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M9 5H7a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h10a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-2"/><rect x="9" y="3" width="6" height="4" rx="2"/></svg>
        <span data-i18n="dev.context">Contexto Técnico</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="devShowSection('chat',this)">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="14" height="14" style="flex-shrink:0;"><path d="M35 85 L35 30 Q35 15 50 15 Q65 15 65 30 L65 70 Q65 80 55 80 Q45 80 45 70 L45 35" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/><ellipse cx="43" cy="38" rx="3" ry="4" fill="white"/><ellipse cx="57" cy="38" rx="3" ry="4" fill="white"/></svg>
        <span data-i18n="dev.clipy">Clipy (Asistente)</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="devShowSection('dbloader',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#3fb950" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="17 8 12 3 7 8"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>
        <span style="color:#3fb950;">Database Loader</span>
      </div>
      <div style="height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:8px 8px;"></div>
      <div style="padding:2px 8px;font-size:9px;color:var(--orange);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;">RBAC</div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="devShowSection('rbac-users',this)" id="dev-nav-rbac">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/><path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/></svg>
        <span style="color:#f59e0b;" data-i18n="rbac.users_roles">Usuarios & Roles</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="devShowSection('rbac-roles',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
        <span style="color:#f59e0b;" data-i18n="rbac.roles_perms">Roles & Permisos</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="devShowSection('rbac-audit',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
        <span style="color:#f59e0b;" data-i18n="rbac.audit">Auditoría</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dev-nav-item" onclick="devShowSection('rbac-org',this)">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>
        <span style="color:#f59e0b;" data-i18n="rbac.orgchart">Organigrama</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="dev-content">
      <!-- DB Explorer -->
      <div class="dev-section active" id="dev-sec-db">
        <div class="dev-warn">⚠ ZONA DE ADMINISTRACIÓN — Los cambios en la base de datos son irreversibles. Procede con precaución.</div>
        <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.8"><ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="9" ry="3"/><path d="M3 5v14c0 1.66 4 3 9 3s9-1.34 9-3V5"/></svg>
          Explorador de Base de Datos
        </div>
        <div id="dev-tables-list" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;">
          <div class="no-data" style="grid-column:1/-1;">Cargando tablas...</div>
        </div>
        <div id="dev-table-detail" style="margin-top:14px;display:none;"></div>
      </div>
      <!-- SQL Console -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="dev-sec-sql">
        <div class="dev-warn">⚠ CONSOLA SQL DIRECTA — Las sentencias se ejecutan contra la base de datos de producción. SELECT es seguro. INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE modifican datos reales.</div>
        <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;">SQL Console</div>
        <textarea class="dev-sql-editor" id="dev-sql-input" placeholder="SELECT * FROM cartera_build LIMIT 10;"></textarea>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;">
          <button onclick="devRunSQL()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#dc2626,#ef4444);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">▶ Ejecutar SQL</button>
          <button onclick="document.getElementById('dev-sql-input').value=''" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 12px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Limpiar</button>
          <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);display:flex;align-items:center;" id="dev-sql-status"></span>
        </div>
        <div id="dev-sql-result" style="margin-top:10px;overflow-x:auto;"></div>
      </div>
      <!-- Files -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="dev-sec-files">
        <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;">Código Fuente (Backend Python)</div>
        <div id="dev-files-list" style="margin-bottom:10px;"></div>
        <div id="dev-file-viewer" style="display:none;"></div>
      </div>
      <!-- API Endpoints -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="dev-sec-api">
        <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;">API Endpoints</div>
        <div id="dev-api-list"></div>
      </div>
      <!-- Technical Context -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="dev-sec-context">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;">Contexto Técnico Completo</div>
          <button onclick="devDownloadContext()" style="background:rgba(245,158,11,.15);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.3);color:#f59e0b;border-radius:6px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">↓ Descargar PDF</button>
          <button onclick="devCopyContext()" style="background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.3);color:var(--blue);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">📋 Copiar Markdown</button>
        </div>
        <div id="dev-context-content" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:14px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;max-height:70vh;overflow-y:auto;"></div>
      </div>
      <!-- Clipy Chat -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="dev-sec-chat">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <!-- Clipy Avatar SVG -->
          <div id="clipy-avatar" style="width:48px;height:48px;flex-shrink:0;position:relative;">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="48" height="48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
              <!-- Body - metallic clip shape -->
              <defs>
                <linearGradient id="clipy-body" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
                  <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#60a5fa"/>
                  <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#3b82f6"/>
                  <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2563eb"/>
                </linearGradient>
                <linearGradient id="clipy-shine" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                  <stop offset="0%" stop-color="rgba(255,255,255,.4)"/>
                  <stop offset="100%" stop-color="rgba(255,255,255,0)"/>
                </linearGradient>
              </defs>
              <!-- Clip body -->
              <path d="M35 85 L35 30 Q35 15 50 15 Q65 15 65 30 L65 70 Q65 80 55 80 Q45 80 45 70 L45 35" fill="none" stroke="url(#clipy-body)" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round">
                <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="rotate" values="0 50 50;-3 50 50;3 50 50;0 50 50" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
              </path>
              <!-- Shine -->
              <path d="M38 85 L38 32 Q38 19 50 19" fill="none" stroke="url(#clipy-shine)" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
              <!-- Eyes -->
              <ellipse cx="43" cy="38" rx="4" ry="5" fill="white">
                <animate attributeName="ry" values="5;1;5" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="2s"/>
              </ellipse>
              <ellipse cx="57" cy="38" rx="4" ry="5" fill="white">
                <animate attributeName="ry" values="5;1;5" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="2s"/>
              </ellipse>
              <!-- Pupils -->
              <circle cx="44" cy="38" r="2.5" fill="#1e293b">
                <animate attributeName="cx" values="44;46;42;44" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
              </circle>
              <circle cx="58" cy="38" r="2.5" fill="#1e293b">
                <animate attributeName="cx" values="58;60;56;58" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
              </circle>
              <!-- Eye shine -->
              <circle cx="42" cy="36" r="1" fill="white" opacity=".8"/>
              <circle cx="56" cy="36" r="1" fill="white" opacity=".8"/>
              <!-- Smile -->
              <path d="M44 48 Q50 55 56 48" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
              <!-- Eyebrows -->
              <path d="M39 30 Q43 27 47 30" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".6"/>
              <path d="M53 30 Q57 27 61 30" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".6"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:#3b82f6;">Clipy</div>
            <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Tu colega de desarrollo · Siempre aquí para ayudarte</div>
          </div>
          <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);font-family:var(--mono);">claude-sonnet-4 · Online</span>
        </div>
        <div id="dev-chat-messages" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;min-height:350px;max-height:55vh;overflow-y:auto;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-start;">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="28" height="28" style="flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><path d="M35 85 L35 30 Q35 15 50 15 Q65 15 65 30 L65 70 Q65 80 55 80 Q45 80 45 70 L45 35" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/><ellipse cx="43" cy="38" rx="3.5" ry="4" fill="white"/><ellipse cx="57" cy="38" rx="3.5" ry="4" fill="white"/><circle cx="44" cy="38" r="2" fill="#1e293b"/><circle cx="58" cy="38" r="2" fill="#1e293b"/><path d="M44 48 Q50 54 56 48" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
            <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;border-top-left-radius:4px;max-width:85%;">
              <strong style="color:#3b82f6;">¡Ey, qué pasa!</strong> Soy <strong>Clipy</strong>, tu colega de desarrollo. Estoy aquí para echarte una mano con lo que necesites de la app. Pregúntame sobre la arquitectura, la base de datos, los agentes, o pídeme que te ayude a pensar cómo implementar algo nuevo. Tengo acceso a todo el contexto técnico de Cognitive PMO. <strong>¿En qué te puedo ayudar?</strong> 😊
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
          <input id="dev-chat-input" class="search-bar" placeholder="Pregunta sobre la arquitectura, pide cambios, consulta la BD..." style="margin:0;flex:1;" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')devSendChat()">
          <button onclick="devSendChat()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#dc2626,#ef4444);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Enviar</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ DATABASE LOADER ═══ -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="dev-sec-dbloader">
        <div class="dev-warn" style="background:rgba(63,185,80,.08);border-color:rgba(63,185,80,.2);color:#3fb950;">
          DATABASE LOADER -- Carga archivos SQL para poblar la base de datos. Solo accesible para administradores.
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
          <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#3fb950" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="17 8 12 3 7 8"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>
          <span data-i18n="dev.dbloader">Database Loader</span>
        </div>
        <!-- Upload zone -->
        <div id="dbloader-upload" style="border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:30px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s;" onclick="document.getElementById('dbloader-file-input').click()" ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='#3fb950'" ondragleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--border)'" ondrop="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='var(--border)';dbloaderHandleDrop(event)">
          <input type="file" id="dbloader-file-input" accept=".sql" style="display:none;" onchange="dbloaderUpload(this.files[0])">
          <svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--text3)" stroke-width="1.5" style="margin-bottom:10px;"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="17 8 12 3 7 8"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>
          <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px;">Arrastra un archivo .sql aqui o haz click para seleccionar</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);">Maximo 500MB - Formato: SQL estandar PostgreSQL</div>
        </div>
