        <!-- File info (hidden until upload) -->
        <div id="dbloader-info" style="display:none;"></div>
        <!-- Preview -->
        <div id="dbloader-preview" style="display:none;"></div>
        <!-- Progress -->
        <div id="dbloader-progress" style="display:none;"></div>
        <!-- Results -->
        <div id="dbloader-results" style="display:none;"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ RBAC: Usuarios & Roles ═══ -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="dev-sec-rbac-users">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;">
          <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/><path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/></svg>
            <span data-i18n="rbac.users_roles">Gestión de Usuarios & Roles</span>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">
            <input class="search-bar" id="rbac-search" data-i18n="rbac.search_user" placeholder="Buscar usuario..." style="margin:0;width:200px;font-size:12px;padding:6px 10px;" oninput="filterRbacUsers(this.value)">
            <select id="rbac-role-filter" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 8px;font-size:11px;" onchange="filterRbacByRole(this.value)">
              <option value="" data-i18n="rbac.all_roles">Todos los roles</option>
            </select>
            <button onclick="showCreateUserForm()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#d97706);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;" data-i18n="rbac.new_user">+ Nuevo Usuario</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="rbac-stats" style="margin-bottom:14px;"></div>
        <div style="overflow-x:auto;max-height:calc(100vh - 280px);overflow-y:auto;">
          <table class="data-table" style="width:100%;font-size:12px;" id="rbac-users-table">
            <thead><tr>
              <th style="width:30px;">#</th>
              <th data-i18n="common.name">Usuario</th>
              <th>Email</th>
              <th>Rol</th>
              <th data-i18n="user.dept">Departamento</th>
              <th data-i18n="rbac.last_login">Último Login</th>
              <th style="width:60px;" data-i18n="common.status">Estado</th>
              <th style="width:120px;" data-i18n="common.actions">Acciones</th>
            </tr></thead>
            <tbody id="rbac-users-tbody"></tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ RBAC: Roles & Permisos ═══ -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="dev-sec-rbac-roles">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;">
          <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
            Gestión de Roles & Permisos
          </div>
          <button onclick="showCreateRoleForm()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#d97706);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">+ Nuevo Rol</button>
        </div>
        <div id="rbac-roles-list" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(340px,1fr));gap:10px;max-height:calc(100vh - 180px);overflow-y:auto;"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ RBAC: Auditoría ═══ -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="dev-sec-rbac-audit">
        <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
          <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
          Log de Auditoría de Accesos
          <button onclick="loadRbacAudit()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;margin-left:auto;">Refrescar</button>
        </div>
        <div style="overflow-x:auto;max-height:calc(100vh - 200px);overflow-y:auto;">
          <table class="data-table" style="width:100%;font-size:12px;">
            <thead><tr>
              <th>Timestamp</th>
              <th>Usuario</th>
              <th>Acción</th>
              <th>Módulo</th>
              <th>Resultado</th>
              <th>IP</th>
              <th>Detalle</th>
            </tr></thead>
            <tbody id="rbac-audit-tbody"></tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ═══ RBAC: Organigrama ═══ -->
      <div class="dev-section" id="dev-sec-rbac-org">
        <!-- Toolbar -->
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>
            Organigrama Corporativo
          </div>
          <div id="org-stats" style="display:flex;gap:8px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-left:8px;"></div>
          <div style="margin-left:auto;display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">
            <input type="text" id="org-search" placeholder="Buscar persona..." oninput="orgSearchTree(this.value)" style="width:160px;padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;">
            <button onclick="orgExpandAll()" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:10px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">Expandir</button>
            <button onclick="orgCollapseAll()" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:10px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">Colapsar</button>
            <div style="display:flex;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;">
              <button id="org-view-tree" onclick="orgToggleView('tree')" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:var(--blue);color:#fff;">&#x1f332; &Aacute;rbol</button>
              <button id="org-view-list" onclick="orgToggleView('list')" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text3);">&#x2630; Lista</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="rbac-org-content" style="overflow-x:auto;overflow-y:auto;max-height:calc(100vh - 200px);"></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- PÁGINA: CALENDARIO CAB (AG-011) — Vista Dirección              -->
<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page" id="page-cab">
<div style="flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px;width:100%;min-width:0;">
  <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:14px;">
    <button class="cab-main-btn" data-cabmainview="calendar" onclick="showCABMainView('calendar')" style="padding:5px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;background:var(--blue,#3b82f6);color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;">Periodos de Exclusion</button>
    <button class="cab-main-btn" data-cabmainview="proposals" onclick="showCABMainView('proposals')" style="padding:5px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);color:var(--text2,#aaa);border:1px solid var(--border,#333);cursor:pointer;">Propuestas CAB</button>
    <button class="cab-main-btn" data-cabmainview="windows" onclick="showCABMainView('windows')" style="padding:5px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);color:var(--text2,#aaa);border:1px solid var(--border,#333);cursor:pointer;">Ventanas Activas</button>
    <button class="cab-main-btn" data-cabmainview="alerts" onclick="showCABMainView('alerts')" style="padding:5px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);color:var(--text2,#aaa);border:1px solid var(--border,#333);cursor:pointer;">Alertas CAB</button>
  </div>
  <div id="cab-main-calendar">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;">
      <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;">
        <button class="cab-main-yr" onclick="cabMainSetYear(2024)" style="padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--blue,#3b82f6);color:#fff;border:none;">2024</button>
        <button class="cab-main-yr" onclick="cabMainSetYear(2025)" style="padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);color:var(--text2,#aaa);border:1px solid var(--border,#333);">2025</button>
        <button class="cab-main-yr" onclick="cabMainSetYear(2026)" style="padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);color:var(--text2,#aaa);border:1px solid var(--border,#333);">2026</button>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2,#888);">
        <span><span style="display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;background:#ef4444;border-radius:2px;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;opacity:0.6;"></span>Exclusion</span>
        <span><span style="display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;background:#f59e0b;border-radius:2px;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;opacity:0.6;"></span>Precaucion</span>
        <span><span style="display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;background:#10b981;border-radius:2px;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;opacity:0.6;"></span>Ventana CAB</span>
        <span><span style="display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;border:1px solid var(--text2,#666);border-radius:2px;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px;"></span>Libre</span>
      </div>
      <button onclick="cabMainOpenPeriodModal('create')" style="padding:4px 12px;background:var(--blue,#3b82f6);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">+ Nuevo Freeze</button>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 220px;gap:12px;">
      <div id="cab-main-annual" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;"></div>
      <div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1,#fff);margin-bottom:8px;">Periodos <span id="cab-main-yr-label">2024</span></div>
          <div id="cab-main-period-sidebar"></div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2,#aaa);margin-bottom:6px;">Resumen anual</div>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3px;font-size:11px;">
            <span style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);">Dias exclusion:</span><span id="cab-main-excl" style="font-weight:600;color:#ef4444;">0</span>
            <span style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);">Dias precaucion:</span><span id="cab-main-warn" style="font-weight:600;color:#f59e0b;">0</span>
            <span style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);">Dias ventana CAB:</span><span id="cab-main-cab" style="font-weight:600;color:#10b981;">0</span>
            <span style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);">Dias libres:</span><span id="cab-main-free" style="font-weight:600;color:var(--text1,#fff);">0</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);border:1px solid rgba(6,182,212,0.3);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.6;">
          <div style="font-weight:600;color:#06b6d4;margin-bottom:4px;">Como funciona</div>
          <span style="color:#ef4444;">Rojo</span><span style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);"> = alta carga, NO tocar.</span><br>
          <span style="color:#f59e0b;">Ambar</span><span style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);"> = carga media, precaucion.</span><br>
          <span style="color:#10b981;">Verde</span><span style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);"> = ventana CAB (fines de semana madrugada).</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="cab-main-day-detail" style="display:none;margin-top:10px;background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;"></div>
  </div>
  <div id="cab-main-proposals" style="display:none;">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px;">
      <p style="font-size:15px;font-weight:600;margin:0;color:var(--text1,#fff);">Propuestas CAB generadas por AG-011</p>
    </div>
    <div id="cab-main-propuestas-list" style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);font-size:13px;">Cargando...</div>
  </div>
  <div id="cab-main-windows" style="display:none;">
    <div id="cab-main-ventanas-list" style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);font-size:13px;">Cargando...</div>
  </div>
  <div id="cab-main-alerts" style="display:none;">
    <div id="cab-main-alertas-list" style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);font-size:13px;">Cargando...</div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Modal Crear/Editar Periodo (index.html) -->
<div id="cab-main-period-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:1000;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;">
<div style="max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">
    <div><p id="cab-main-pm-title" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;margin:0;color:var(--text1,#fff);">Nuevo periodo de exclusion (Change Freeze)</p><p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2,#888);margin:2px 0 0;">ITIL 4 Change Enablement</p></div>
    <button onclick="cabMainClosePeriodModal()" style="padding:4px 10px;background:var(--bg3,#2a2a3e);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">&#10005;</button>
  </div>
  <input type="hidden" id="cab-main-pm-id" value=""><input type="hidden" id="cab-main-pm-mode" value="create">
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
    <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Nombre del periodo</label><input type="text" id="cab-main-pm-nombre" placeholder="CIERRE_FISCAL_2025" style="width:100%;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;"></div>
    <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Nivel de impacto</label><select id="cab-main-pm-impacto" style="width:100%;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;"><option value="ALTO">ALTO</option><option value="MEDIO">MEDIO</option><option value="BAJO">BAJO</option></select></div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
    <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Fecha inicio</label><input type="date" id="cab-main-pm-inicio" style="width:100%;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;"></div>
    <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Fecha fin</label><input type="date" id="cab-main-pm-fin" style="width:100%;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;"></div>
    <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Carga pico (%)</label><input type="number" id="cab-main-pm-pico" min="0" max="100" value="80" style="width:100%;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;"></div>
  </div>
  <div style="margin-bottom:12px;"><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Justificacion</label><textarea id="cab-main-pm-notas" placeholder="Cierre contable anual..." style="width:100%;height:50px;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;resize:vertical;"></textarea></div>
  <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:12px;margin-bottom:12px;">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;"><p style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);margin:0;">Activos afectados</p><span id="cab-main-pm-sel-count" style="background:rgba(59,130,246,0.15);color:#3b82f6;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;">0 seleccionados</span></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:8px;">
      <button onclick="cabMainPmQuick('all')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);">Todos</button>
      <button onclick="cabMainPmQuick('pro')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);">PRODUCCION</button>
      <button onclick="cabMainPmQuick('criticos')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);">Solo CRITICOS</button>
      <button onclick="cabMainPmQuick('crit+alta')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);">CRITICOS+ALTOS</button>
      <button onclick="cabMainPmQuick('clear')" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg3);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid var(--border);">Limpiar</button>
    </div>
    <input type="text" id="cab-main-pm-search" placeholder="Buscar activo..." oninput="cabMainPmFilter(this.value)" style="width:100%;padding:6px 10px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;margin-bottom:6px;">
    <div id="cab-main-pm-assets" style="max-height:250px;overflow-y:auto;"></div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;">
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div id="cab-main-pm-i-crit" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:#ef4444;">0</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Criticos</div></div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div id="cab-main-pm-i-alta" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:#f59e0b;">0</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Altos</div></div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div id="cab-main-pm-i-media" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:#06b6d4;">0</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Medios</div></div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div id="cab-main-pm-i-total" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);">0</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Total</div></div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:12px;">
    <button id="cab-main-pm-delete-btn" onclick="cabMainDeletePeriod()" style="display:none;padding:6px 14px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Eliminar</button>
    <div style="margin-left:auto;display:flex;gap:8px;">
      <button onclick="cabMainClosePeriodModal()" style="padding:6px 14px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>
      <button onclick="cabMainSavePeriod()" style="padding:6px 18px;background:var(--blue,#3b82f6);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;" id="cab-main-pm-save-btn">Crear Change Freeze</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Modal Detalle Ventana CAB (index.html) -->
<div id="cab-main-window-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:1002;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;">
<div style="max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:14px;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;"><div id="cab-main-wm-icon" style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:600;font-size:11px;"></div><div><p id="cab-main-wm-title" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;margin:0;color:var(--text1);"></p><p id="cab-main-wm-subtitle" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin:2px 0 0;"></p></div></div>
    <button onclick="cabMainCloseWinModal()" style="padding:4px 10px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">&#10005;</button>
  </div>
  <div id="cab-main-wm-content"></div>
  <div id="cab-main-wm-actions" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);"></div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Modal Detalle Alerta CAB (index.html) -->
<div id="cab-main-alert-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:1003;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;">
<div style="max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;">
  <div id="cab-main-am-header"></div><div id="cab-main-am-context"></div><div id="cab-main-am-timeline"></div><div id="cab-main-am-status"></div>
  <div id="cab-main-am-footer" style="margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);"></div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Modal Detalle Propuesta CAB (index.html) -->
<div id="cab-main-proposal-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:1001;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;">
<div style="max-width:740px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:14px;">
    <div><p id="cab-main-prop-title" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;margin:0;color:var(--text1,#fff);"></p><p id="cab-main-prop-subtitle" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin:2px 0 0;"></p></div>
    <button onclick="cabMainClosePropModal()" style="padding:4px 10px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">&#10005;</button>
  </div>
  <div id="cab-main-prop-kpis" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;"></div>
  <div id="cab-main-prop-tabs" style="display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:10px;"></div>
  <div id="cab-main-prop-content" style="max-height:50vh;overflow-y:auto;"></div>
  <div id="cab-main-prop-actions" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);"></div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════ MODAL: PRESUPUESTO (SAP-Style) ══════════════════ -->
<div class="fm-bgt-overlay" id="fm-budget">
  <div class="fm-bgt-box">
    <!-- Header -->
    <div class="fm-bgt-header">
      <div class="fm-bgt-icon-box">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M12 2v20M17 5H9.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 0 0 7h5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 0 7H6"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
        <div class="fm-bgt-id" id="bgt-hdr-id">PRES-NUEVO</div>
        <div class="fm-bgt-title" id="bgt-hdr-title">Nuevo Presupuesto</div>
      </div>
      <span class="fm-bgt-estado-badge bgt-borrador" id="bgt-hdr-estado">BORRADOR</span>
      <div style="margin-left:8px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);">PMBOK 7 · Cost Management</div>
      <button class="fm-close" onclick="fmClose('fm-budget')" style="margin-left:12px;">✕</button>
    </div>
    <!-- Live BAC bar -->
    <div class="fm-bgt-bac-bar" id="bgt-bac-bar">
      <div class="bac-seg"><div class="bac-seg-label">Labor</div><div class="bac-seg-val" id="bseg-labor" style="color:#38bdf8;">€ 0</div><div class="bac-seg-strip" style="background:#38bdf8;"></div></div>
      <div class="bac-seg"><div class="bac-seg-label">Proveedores</div><div class="bac-seg-val" id="bseg-prov" style="color:#8b5cf6;">€ 0</div><div class="bac-seg-strip" style="background:#8b5cf6;"></div></div>
      <div class="bac-seg"><div class="bac-seg-label">OPEX</div><div class="bac-seg-val" id="bseg-opex" style="color:#fbbf24;">€ 0</div><div class="bac-seg-strip" style="background:#fbbf24;"></div></div>
      <div class="bac-seg"><div class="bac-seg-label">CAPEX</div><div class="bac-seg-val" id="bseg-capex" style="color:#f97316;">€ 0</div><div class="bac-seg-strip" style="background:#f97316;"></div></div>
      <div class="bac-seg"><div class="bac-seg-label">RRHH</div><div class="bac-seg-val" id="bseg-rrhh" style="color:#f472b6;">€ 0</div><div class="bac-seg-strip" style="background:#f472b6;"></div></div>
      <div class="bac-seg"><div class="bac-seg-label">Reservas</div><div class="bac-seg-val" id="bseg-res" style="color:#a3e635;">€ 0</div><div class="bac-seg-strip" style="background:#a3e635;"></div></div>
      <div class="bac-seg"><div class="bac-seg-label" style="color:#10b981;font-weight:800;">▶ BAC TOTAL</div><div class="bac-seg-val" id="bseg-bac" style="color:#10b981;font-size:15px;">€ 0</div><div class="bac-seg-strip" style="background:#10b981;"></div></div>
    </div>
    <!-- Layout: Nav + Content -->
    <div class="fm-bgt-layout">
      <!-- Left nav -->
      <div class="fm-bgt-nav">
        <div class="fm-bgt-nav-grp">Datos Generales</div>
        <div class="fm-bgt-nav-item active" onclick="bgtShowSection(1,this)">
          <div class="fm-bgt-nav-dot" style="background:#38bdf8;"></div>Información General
        </div>
        <div class="fm-bgt-nav-grp">Estructura de Costes</div>
        <div class="fm-bgt-nav-item" onclick="bgtShowSection(2,this)">
          <div class="fm-bgt-nav-dot" style="background:#38bdf8;"></div>Personal Interno
          <span class="fm-bgt-nav-amt" id="bnav-labor">€0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-bgt-nav-item" onclick="bgtShowSection(3,this)">
          <div class="fm-bgt-nav-dot" style="background:#8b5cf6;"></div>Proveedores Ext.
          <span class="fm-bgt-nav-amt" id="bnav-prov">€0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-bgt-nav-item" onclick="bgtShowSection(4,this)">
          <div class="fm-bgt-nav-dot" style="background:#f472b6;"></div>RRHH &amp; Personal
          <span class="fm-bgt-nav-amt" id="bnav-rrhh">€0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-bgt-nav-item" onclick="bgtShowSection(5,this)">
          <div class="fm-bgt-nav-dot" style="background:#fbbf24;"></div>OPEX
          <span class="fm-bgt-nav-amt" id="bnav-opex">€0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-bgt-nav-item" onclick="bgtShowSection(6,this)">
          <div class="fm-bgt-nav-dot" style="background:#f97316;"></div>CAPEX
          <span class="fm-bgt-nav-amt" id="bnav-capex">€0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-bgt-nav-grp">Control PMBOK 7</div>
        <div class="fm-bgt-nav-item" onclick="bgtShowSection(7,this)">
          <div class="fm-bgt-nav-dot" style="background:#a3e635;"></div>Reservas
          <span class="fm-bgt-nav-amt" id="bnav-res">€0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-bgt-nav-item" onclick="bgtShowSection(8,this)">
          <div class="fm-bgt-nav-dot" style="background:#10b981;"></div>Resumen Ejecutivo
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Content area -->
      <div class="fm-bgt-content">

        <!-- SECTION 1: Información General -->
        <div class="fm-bgt-section active" id="bgt-sec-1">
          <div class="sap-card">
            <div class="sap-card-hdr"><div class="sap-card-icon" style="background:rgba(56,189,248,.15);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/></svg></div><span class="sap-card-title">Identificación del Presupuesto</span><span class="sap-card-sub">Datos de control y seguimiento</span></div>
            <div class="sap-card-body">
              <div class="sap-grid">
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">ID Presupuesto <span class="req">*</span></label><input class="sap-input mono" id="b-id" placeholder="PRES-2026-001" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Proyecto Vinculado <span class="req">*</span></label><select class="sap-select" id="b-proyecto" onchange="bgtAutoFillProject()"><option value="">— Seleccionar proyecto —</option></select></div>
                <div class="sap-field sap-full"><label class="sap-label">Nombre del Presupuesto <span class="req">*</span></label><input class="sap-input" id="b-nombre" placeholder="Presupuesto Detallado — Proyecto XYZ v1.0"></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Responsable PMO <span class="req">*</span></label><input class="sap-input" id="b-responsable" placeholder="Nombre del Responsable"></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Aprobado Por</label><input class="sap-input" id="b-aprobado-por" placeholder="Director / PMO Lead"></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Fecha Inicio</label><input class="sap-input" type="date" id="b-fecha-inicio"></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Fecha Fin</label><input class="sap-input" type="date" id="b-fecha-fin"></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Moneda</label><select class="sap-select" id="b-moneda"><option value="EUR">€ EUR — Euro</option><option value="USD">$ USD — Dólar</option><option value="GBP">£ GBP — Libra</option></select></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Estado</label><select class="sap-select" id="b-estado" onchange="bgtUpdateEstadoBadge()"><option value="BORRADOR">Borrador</option><option value="EN_REVISION">En Revisión</option><option value="APROBADO">Aprobado</option><option value="CERRADO">Cerrado</option><option value="RECHAZADO">Rechazado</option></select></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Versión</label><input class="sap-input mono" type="number" id="b-version" value="1" min="1" max="99"></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="sap-card">
            <div class="sap-card-hdr"><div class="sap-card-icon" style="background:rgba(139,148,158,.15);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#8b949e" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/><line x1="16" y1="13" x2="8" y2="13"/><line x1="16" y1="17" x2="8" y2="17"/></svg></div><span class="sap-card-title">Notas y Justificación</span></div>
            <div class="sap-card-body"><textarea class="sap-textarea sap-full" id="b-notas" placeholder="Contexto del presupuesto, supuestos, exclusiones, restricciones y justificación de costes según PMBOK 7…" rows="4"></textarea></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- SECTION 2: Personal Interno -->
        <div class="fm-bgt-section" id="bgt-sec-2">
          <div class="sap-card">
            <div class="sap-card-hdr"><div class="sap-card-icon" style="background:rgba(56,189,248,.15);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/></svg></div><span class="sap-card-title">Coste de Personal Interno (FTE)</span><span class="sap-card-sub">Staff PMO propio</span></div>
            <div class="sap-card-body">
              <div class="sap-grid">
                <div class="sap-field">
                  <label class="sap-label">Horas Estimadas (del proyecto) <span class="req">*</span></label>
                  <input class="sap-input mono" type="number" id="b-horas" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()" placeholder="Auto-cargado desde proyecto">
                </div>
                <div class="sap-field">
                  <label class="sap-label">Tarifa Hora Interna (€/h)</label>
                  <div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-tarifa" value="85" min="0" step="5" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="labor-hero" style="margin-top:16px;">
                <div class="labor-hero-val" id="b-labor-display">€ 0</div>
                <div class="labor-hero-label">Coste Total Labor Interno</div>
                <div class="labor-formula">
                  <b id="b-labor-h">0</b> h &nbsp;×&nbsp; <b id="b-labor-t">85</b> €/h &nbsp;= &nbsp;<b id="b-labor-r" style="color:#10b981;">€ 0</b>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="sap-card">
            <div class="sap-card-hdr"><div class="sap-card-icon" style="background:rgba(56,189,248,.1);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/></svg></div><span class="sap-card-title">Referencia de Tarifas Estándar PMO</span></div>
            <div class="sap-card-body">
              <div class="sap-grid-4" style="font-size:11px;">
                <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;" onclick="document.getElementById('b-tarifa').value=65;bgtCalc()"><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:#8b949e;">65€</div><div style="color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;">N1 · Junior</div></div>
                <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;" onclick="document.getElementById('b-tarifa').value=85;bgtCalc()"><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue);">85€</div><div style="color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;">N2 · Mid</div></div>
                <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;" onclick="document.getElementById('b-tarifa').value=110;bgtCalc()"><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--purple);">110€</div><div style="color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;">N3 · Senior</div></div>
                <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;" onclick="document.getElementById('b-tarifa').value=145;bgtCalc()"><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--orange);">145€</div><div style="color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;">N4 · Lead</div></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- SECTION 3: Proveedores Externos -->
        <div class="fm-bgt-section" id="bgt-sec-3">
          <div class="sap-card">
            <div class="sap-card-hdr"><div class="sap-card-icon" style="background:rgba(139,92,246,.15);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#8b5cf6" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg></div><span class="sap-card-title">Proveedores y Terceros Externos</span><span class="sap-card-sub">Contratos, consultoría, vendors</span></div>
            <div class="sap-card-body">
              <table class="prov-tbl">
                <thead><tr><th style="min-width:160px;">Proveedor</th><th style="min-width:110px;">Tipo Servicio</th><th style="min-width:140px;">Concepto / Alcance</th><th style="min-width:55px;">Días</th><th style="min-width:75px;">€/Día</th><th style="min-width:90px;">Total</th><th style="width:36px;"></th></tr></thead>
                <tbody id="prov-tbody"></tbody>
              </table>
              <button class="add-prov-btn" onclick="addProveedor()">
                <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>
                Añadir Proveedor / Vendor
              </button>
              <div style="text-align:right;margin-top:10px;padding:8px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border2);">
                <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);">Total Proveedores: </span>
                <span class="bgt-amount" style="color:#8b5cf6;font-size:14px;" id="b-prov-total-display">€ 0</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="pmbok-info" style="border-color:rgba(139,92,246,.25);">
            <div class="pmbok-info-title" style="color:#8b5cf6;"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/></svg>PMBOK 7 — Procurement Management</div>
            <div class="pmbok-info-text">Los costes de proveedores externos deben incluir: honorarios profesionales, licencias de terceros, servicios cloud, contratos de mantenimiento y soporte. Cada contrato debe tener un Statement of Work (SOW) documentado.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- SECTION 4: RRHH -->
        <div class="fm-bgt-section" id="bgt-sec-4">
          <div class="sap-card">
            <div class="sap-card-hdr"><div class="sap-card-icon" style="background:rgba(244,114,182,.15);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f472b6" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4"/></svg></div><span class="sap-card-title">Gestión de Personal y RRHH</span><span class="sap-card-sub">Coste organizacional de personas</span></div>
            <div class="sap-card-body">
              <div class="sap-grid">
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Reclutamiento &amp; Selección</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-rrhh-rec" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Formación &amp; Certificaciones</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-rrhh-form" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Administración RRHH</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-rrhh-admin" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Viajes, Dietas &amp; Desplazamientos</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-rrhh-viajes" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Otros Costes RRHH</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-rrhh-otros" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="pmbok-info" style="border-color:rgba(244,114,182,.25);">
            <div class="pmbok-info-title" style="color:#f472b6;"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/></svg>PMBOK 7 — Resource Management</div>
            <div class="pmbok-info-text">Incluye todos los costes asociados a la adquisición, desarrollo y gestión del equipo. Según el estándar PMBOK 7, los recursos humanos representan típicamente el 60-80% del coste total en proyectos IT.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- SECTION 5: OPEX -->
        <div class="fm-bgt-section" id="bgt-sec-5">
          <div class="sap-card">
            <div class="sap-card-hdr"><div class="sap-card-icon" style="background:rgba(251,191,36,.15);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fbbf24" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M8 21h8M12 17v4"/></svg></div><span class="sap-card-title">OPEX — Gastos Operacionales</span><span class="sap-card-sub">Costes recurrentes de operación</span></div>
            <div class="sap-card-body">
              <div class="sap-grid">
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Licencias de Software</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-opex-lic" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Cloud &amp; Infraestructura (SaaS/IaaS/PaaS)</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-opex-cloud" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Mantenimiento &amp; Soporte</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-opex-mant" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Consumibles &amp; Material Oficina</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-opex-cons" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Formación Continua (OPEX)</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-opex-form" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Otros Gastos Operacionales</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-opex-otros" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="pmbok-info" style="border-color:rgba(251,191,36,.25);">
            <div class="pmbok-info-title" style="color:#fbbf24;"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/></svg>PMBOK 7 — Cost Baseline (OPEX)</div>
            <div class="pmbok-info-text">Los gastos operacionales (OPEX) son costes que se consumen completamente en el período contable. Se imputan directamente a la cuenta de resultados y NO activan activos en el balance. Incluyen licencias de suscripción, servicios cloud pay-per-use y mantenimiento.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- SECTION 6: CAPEX -->
        <div class="fm-bgt-section" id="bgt-sec-6">
          <div class="sap-card">
            <div class="sap-card-hdr"><div class="sap-card-icon" style="background:rgba(249,115,22,.15);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16z"/></svg></div><span class="sap-card-title">CAPEX — Inversiones de Capital</span><span class="sap-card-sub">Activos tangibles e intangibles</span></div>
            <div class="sap-card-body">
              <div class="sap-grid">
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Hardware (Servidores, Equipos)</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-capex-hw" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Equipamiento Especializado</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-capex-eq" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Infraestructura Física (CPD, Redes)</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-capex-infra" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Adquisición de Software (perpetuo)</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-capex-sw" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
                <div class="sap-field"><label class="sap-label">Otros Activos de Capital</label><div class="sap-curr"><span class="sap-curr-sym">€</span><input class="sap-input with-curr mono" type="number" id="b-capex-otros" value="0" min="0" oninput="bgtCalc()"></div></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="pmbok-info" style="border-color:rgba(249,115,22,.25);">
            <div class="pmbok-info-title" style="color:#f97316;"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/></svg>PMBOK 7 — Cost Baseline (CAPEX)</div>
            <div class="pmbok-info-text">Los gastos de capital (CAPEX) generan activos que se deprecian a lo largo de su vida útil. Activan en el balance de situación y se amortizan según el plan contable. Requieren aprobación de inversión por Comité Financiero y justificación de ROI.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- SECTION 7: Reservas PMBOK -->
        <div class="fm-bgt-section" id="bgt-sec-7">
          <div class="pmbok-info" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <div class="pmbok-info-title"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>PMBOK 7 — Risk-Based Reserve Analysis</div>
            <div class="pmbok-info-text"><strong style="color:var(--text);">Reserva para Contingencias:</strong> Cubre riesgos identificados y cuantificados (Known-Unknowns). Gestionada por el Director de Proyecto. Típicamente 10-15% del coste base.<br><strong style="color:var(--text);">Reserva de Gestión:</strong> Cubre riesgos no identificados (Unknown-Unknowns). Gestionada por el Sponsor. Típicamente 5-10% del coste base. No forma parte de la Cost Baseline, sí del BAC.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="sap-card">
            <div class="sap-card-hdr"><div class="sap-card-icon" style="background:rgba(163,230,53,.15);"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a3e635" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg></div><span class="sap-card-title">Configuración de Reservas</span></div>
            <div class="sap-card-body">
              <div class="sap-grid">
                <div class="sap-field">
                  <label class="sap-label">Reserva para Contingencias (%)</label>
                  <input class="sap-input mono" type="number" id="b-res-cont" value="10" min="0" max="50" step="0.5" oninput="bgtCalc()">
                </div>
                <div class="sap-field">
                  <label class="sap-label">Reserva de Gestión (%)</label>
                  <input class="sap-input mono" type="number" id="b-res-gest" value="5" min="0" max="30" step="0.5" oninput="bgtCalc()">
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="reserva-card">
            <div style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:#a3e635;flex-shrink:0;"></div>
            <div class="reserva-card-name">Reserva para Contingencias<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text2);margin-top:1px;">Known-Unknowns · Director de Proyecto</div></div>
            <div class="reserva-card-pct" id="b-res-cont-pct" style="color:#a3e635;">10%</div>
            <div class="reserva-card-amt" id="b-res-cont-amt">€ 0</div>
          </div>
          <div class="reserva-card">
            <div style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:#22d3ee;flex-shrink:0;"></div>
            <div class="reserva-card-name">Reserva de Gestión<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text2);margin-top:1px;">Unknown-Unknowns · Sponsor / PMO</div></div>
            <div class="reserva-card-pct" id="b-res-gest-pct" style="color:#22d3ee;">5%</div>
            <div class="reserva-card-amt" id="b-res-gest-amt">€ 0</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- SECTION 8: Resumen Ejecutivo -->
        <div class="fm-bgt-section" id="bgt-sec-8">
          <div class="bac-hero">
            <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Budget at Completion (BAC)</div>
            <div class="bac-hero-val" id="b-bac-hero">€ 0</div>
            <div class="bac-hero-label" id="b-bac-proyecto-name">—</div>
            <div class="bac-hero-sub" id="b-bac-fecha">Período: — · v<span id="b-bac-ver">1</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="resumen-breakdown" id="b-resumen-breakdown"></div>
          <div class="pmbok-kpis">
            <div class="pmbok-kpi-c"><div class="pmbok-kpi-v" id="bkpi-labor-pct" style="color:#38bdf8;">0%</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-l">% Labor</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-d">Personal Interno / BAC</div></div>
            <div class="pmbok-kpi-c"><div class="pmbok-kpi-v" id="bkpi-opex-ratio" style="color:#fbbf24;">0%</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-l">OPEX / BAC</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-d">Gastos operacionales</div></div>
            <div class="pmbok-kpi-c"><div class="pmbok-kpi-v" id="bkpi-capex-ratio" style="color:#f97316;">0%</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-l">CAPEX / BAC</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-d">Inversiones activo fijo</div></div>
            <div class="pmbok-kpi-c"><div class="pmbok-kpi-v" id="bkpi-res-ratio" style="color:#a3e635;">0%</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-l">% Reservas</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-d">Contingencia + Gestión</div></div>
            <div class="pmbok-kpi-c"><div class="pmbok-kpi-v" id="bkpi-ext-ratio" style="color:#8b5cf6;">0%</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-l">Externalización</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-d">Proveedores / BAC</div></div>
            <div class="pmbok-kpi-c"><div class="pmbok-kpi-v" id="bkpi-hph" style="color:#10b981;">0€</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-l">€ / Hora</div><div class="pmbok-kpi-d">Coste total por hora</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div><!-- /content -->
    </div><!-- /layout -->
    <div class="fm-bgt-footer">
      <div class="fm-bgt-footer-info">
        <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
        PMBOK 7 · Cost Management Knowledge Area · <span id="bgt-footer-bac" style="color:#10b981;font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;">BAC: € 0</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
        <button class="fm-bgt-footer-info" style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:7px 14px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);" onclick="fmClose('fm-budget')">Cancelar</button>
        <button class="btn-fm-submit" id="bgt-submit-btn" onclick="bgtSave()">
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M19 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h11l5 5v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"/><polyline points="17 21 17 13 7 13 7 21"/><polyline points="7 3 7 8 15 8"/></svg>
          Guardar Presupuesto
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════ MODAL: NUEVO TÉCNICO ══════════════════ -->
<div class="fm-overlay" id="fm-team">
  <div class="fm-box">
    <div class="fm-header">
      <div class="fm-title">
        <span id="tm-icon" style="font-size:22px;">🧑‍💻</span>
        <div>
          <div id="tm-title">Nuevo Técnico</div>
          <div id="tm-sub" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;margin-top:1px;">Registrar miembro en el equipo PMO</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button class="fm-close" onclick="fmClose('fm-team')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-steps">
      <div class="fm-step-dot active" id="ts-dot-1"><div class="fsd-circle">1</div><div class="fsd-label">Identidad</div></div>
      <div class="fm-step-dot" id="ts-dot-2"><div class="fsd-circle">2</div><div class="fsd-label">Skills</div></div>
      <div class="fm-step-dot" id="ts-dot-3"><div class="fsd-circle">3</div><div class="fsd-label">Confirmar</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-body">
      <div class="fm-step active" id="ts-1">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:4px;">
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0">
            <div class="fm-label">🪪 ID Técnico</div>
            <input class="fm-input" id="t-id" placeholder="FTE-151" style="font-family:var(--mono);letter-spacing:.5px;" autocomplete="off">
          </div>
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0">
            <div class="fm-label">📊 Estado Inicial</div>
            <select class="fm-select" id="t-estado">
              <option value="DISPONIBLE">🟢 DISPONIBLE</option>
              <option value="OCUPADO">🟡 OCUPADO</option>
              <option value="GUARDIA">🔵 GUARDIA</option>
              <option value="BAJA">🔴 BAJA</option>
              <option value="VACACIONES">⚪ VACACIONES</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-section-sep"></div>
        <div class="fm-field">
          <div class="fm-label">👤 Nombre Completo</div>
          <input class="fm-input" id="t-nombre" placeholder="Ej: Carmen García Martínez">
        </div>
        <div class="fm-field">
          <div class="fm-label">🎯 Nivel Profesional</div>
          <div class="nivel-grid">
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N1',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:#f85149;">N1</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">Júnior</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">0–1 año<br>formación básica</div>
            </div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N2',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:var(--blue);">N2</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">Técnico</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">1–3 años<br>autonomía operativa</div>
            </div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N3',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:#a5b4fc;">N3</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">Senior</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">3–7 años<br>resuelve sin escalar</div>
            </div>
            <div class="nivel-card" onclick="selNivel('N4',this)">
              <div class="nc-badge" style="color:#f59e0b;">N4</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);">Experto</div>
              <div class="nc-desc">7+ años<br>referente técnico</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-field" style="margin-bottom:0">
          <div class="fm-label">🏢 Silo de Especialidad</div>
          <div class="silo-grid">
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Frontend',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🎨</div><div class="sc-name">Frontend</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Backend',this)"><div class="sc-icon">⚙️</div><div class="sc-name">Backend</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Redes',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🌐</div><div class="sc-name">Redes</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Windows',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🪟</div><div class="sc-name">Windows</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('BBDD',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🗄️</div><div class="sc-name">BBDD</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Seguridad',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🔒</div><div class="sc-name">Seguridad</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('DevOps',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🚀</div><div class="sc-name">DevOps</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('QA',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🧪</div><div class="sc-name">QA</div></div>
            <div class="silo-card" onclick="selSilo('Soporte',this)"><div class="sc-icon">🎫</div><div class="sc-name">Soporte</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fm-step" id="ts-2">
        <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px;">Selecciona las skills del técnico. Cuantas más, mejor puntuación de matching con incidencias.</div>
        <div id="ts-2-content"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="fm-step" id="ts-3">
        <div id="ts-3-preview"></div>
        <!-- Tasks Panel (visible in edit mode) -->
        <div id="ts-tasks-panel" style="display:none;margin-top:14px;">
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M9 3v18"/><path d="M15 3v18"/></svg>
            Tareas Kanban Asignadas
            <span id="ts-tasks-count" style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;"></span>
          </div>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <div style="background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.2);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;text-align:center;">
              <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue);" id="ts-pct-run">0%</div>
              <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">% RUN</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background:var(--green-bg);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.2);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;text-align:center;">
              <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--green);" id="ts-pct-build">0%</div>
              <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">% BUILD</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="ts-tasks-list" style="max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-footer">
      <button class="btn-fm-back" id="ts-back-btn" onclick="tsBack()" style="display:none">← Atrás</button>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
        <span class="fm-skill-counter" id="ts-skill-count" style="display:none">0 skills</span>
        <button class="btn-fm-next" id="ts-next-btn" onclick="tsNext()">Siguiente →</button>
        <button class="btn-fm-submit" id="ts-submit-btn" onclick="tsSubmit()" style="display:none">✅ Añadir al Equipo</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════ MODAL: NUEVO PROYECTO ══════════════════ -->
<div class="fm-overlay" id="fm-proj">
  <div class="fm-box">
    <div class="fm-header">
      <div class="fm-title">
        <span id="pm-icon" style="font-size:22px;">📋</span>
        <div>
          <div id="pm-title">Nuevo Proyecto</div>
          <div id="pm-sub" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:400;margin-top:1px;">Registrar proyecto en la cartera BUILD</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button class="fm-close" onclick="fmClose('fm-proj')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-steps">
      <div class="fm-step-dot active" id="ps-dot-1"><div class="fsd-circle">1</div><div class="fsd-label">Información</div></div>
      <div class="fm-step-dot" id="ps-dot-2"><div class="fsd-circle">2</div><div class="fsd-label">Skills & Confirmar</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-body">
      <div class="fm-step active" id="ps-1">
        <div class="fm-field">
          <div class="fm-label">📝 Nombre del Proyecto</div>
          <input class="fm-input" id="p-nombre" placeholder="Ej: Migración plataforma SWIFT a cloud híbrido">
        </div>
        <div class="fm-field">
          <div class="fm-label">🎯 Prioridad Estratégica</div>
          <div class="prio-grid">
            <div class="prio-card" onclick="selPrio('Crítica',this)">
              <div class="prio-icon">🔴</div>
              <div class="prio-name" style="color:#f85149;">Crítica</div>
              <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px;">Bloquea negocio</div>
            </div>
            <div class="prio-card" onclick="selPrio('Alta',this)">
              <div class="prio-icon">🟠</div>
              <div class="prio-name" style="color:var(--orange);">Alta</div>
              <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px;">Impacto urgente</div>
            </div>
            <div class="prio-card" onclick="selPrio('Media',this)">
              <div class="prio-icon">🟡</div>
              <div class="prio-name" style="color:var(--yellow);">Media</div>
              <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px;">Planificable</div>
            </div>
            <div class="prio-card" onclick="selPrio('Baja',this)">
              <div class="prio-icon">🟢</div>
              <div class="prio-name" style="color:var(--green);">Baja</div>
              <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px;">Cuando sea posible</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fm-field">
          <div class="fm-label">⏱ Horas Estimadas</div>
          <div class="hours-val" id="p-horas-val" style="color:var(--blue);">80</div>
          <div class="hours-label">horas de trabajo estimadas</div>
          <input type="range" class="hours-slider" id="p-horas" min="5" max="500" step="5" value="80" oninput="updateHoursSlider()">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono);padding:0 2px;">
            <span>5h</span><span>125h</span><span>250h</span><span>375h</span><span>500h</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;">
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0">
            <div class="fm-label">📊 Estado Inicial</div>
            <select class="fm-select" id="p-estado">
              <option value="Standby">Standby</option>
              <option value="En analisis">En análisis</option>
              <option value="pendiente">Pendiente</option>
              <option value="Aprobado">Aprobado</option>
              <option value="en ejecucion">En ejecución</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="fm-field" style="margin:0">
            <div class="fm-label">👤 Perfil Requerido</div>
            <input class="fm-input" id="p-perfil" placeholder="Ej: Senior Backend N3+">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fm-step" id="ps-2">
        <div class="fm-field">
          <div class="fm-label" style="margin-bottom:10px;">🛠 Skills Técnicas Requeridas <span class="fm-skill-counter" id="ps-skill-count">0 skills</span></div>
          <div id="ps-2-content"></div>
        </div>
        <div id="ps-3-preview"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fm-footer">
      <button class="btn-fm-back" id="ps-back-btn" onclick="psBack()" style="display:none">← Atrás</button>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
        <button class="btn-fm-next" id="ps-next-btn" onclick="psNext()">Siguiente →</button>
        <button class="btn-fm-submit" id="ps-submit-btn" onclick="psSubmit()" style="display:none">✅ Crear Proyecto</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="toast"></div>
<div class="modal-overlay" id="config-modal" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeConfigModal()">
  <div class="modal-box">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <div class="modal-title">⚙ Configurar Chatflows de Flowise</div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeConfigModal()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px;">Asigna el UUID de cada chatflow al agente correspondiente. Usa <strong style="color:var(--text)">Obtener Chatflows</strong> para ver los disponibles en Flowise.</div>
      <div class="cf-section-label" style="color:var(--blue);"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--blue);display:inline-block;"></span> RAMA RUN</div>
      <div class="cf-row">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;flex-shrink:0;color:#3b82f6;"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M30 35 L45 50 V70 L55 70 V50 L70 35 Z" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="50" cy="30" r="5" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
        <div style="flex:1;"><div class="cf-agent-label" style="color:#3b82f6;">AG1 — Dispatcher (Triaje NLP)</div><input class="cf-input" id="cf-input-AG1" placeholder="UUID del chatflow..."></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cf-row">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;flex-shrink:0;color:#8b5cf6;"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="35" cy="50" r="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="65" cy="50" r="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M45 50 H55" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
        <div style="flex:1;"><div class="cf-agent-label" style="color:#8b5cf6;">AG2 — Resource Manager (Matching Técnico)</div><input class="cf-input" id="cf-input-AG2" placeholder="UUID del chatflow..."></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cf-row">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;flex-shrink:0;color:#f97316;"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="55" width="8" height="20" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="42" y="45" width="8" height="30" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="54" y="35" width="8" height="40" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M70 20 L65 40 H75 L70 60 L85 35 H75 Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
        <div style="flex:1;"><div class="cf-agent-label" style="color:#f97316;">AG3 — Demand Forecaster (Evaluación Riesgo)</div><input class="cf-input" id="cf-input-AG3" placeholder="UUID del chatflow..."></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cf-row">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;flex-shrink:0;color:#06b6d4;"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="35" y="45" width="30" height="25" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M40 45 V35 A10 10 0 0 1 60 35 V45" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="50" cy="57" r="3" fill="#0d1117"/></svg>
        <div style="flex:1;"><div class="cf-agent-label" style="color:#06b6d4;">AG4 — Buffer Gatekeeper (Gobernanza)</div><input class="cf-input" id="cf-input-AG4" placeholder="UUID del chatflow..."></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cf-section-label" style="color:var(--green);margin-top:16px;"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);display:inline-block;"></span> RAMA BUILD</div>
      <div class="cf-row">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;flex-shrink:0;color:#10b981;"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M30 75 H70 L50 30 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="50" cy="20" r="5" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
        <div style="flex:1;"><div class="cf-agent-label" style="color:#10b981;">AG5 — Estratega PMO (PMBOK 7)</div><input class="cf-input" id="cf-input-AG5" placeholder="UUID del chatflow..."></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cf-row">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;flex-shrink:0;color:#eab308;"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="30" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="50" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="55" y="30" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="55" y="50" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="75" cy="75" r="5" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
        <div style="flex:1;"><div class="cf-agent-label" style="color:#eab308;">AG6 — Resource Manager PMO (Asignación)</div><input class="cf-input" id="cf-input-AG6" placeholder="UUID del chatflow..."></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cf-row">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;flex-shrink:0;color:#ec4899;"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="35" width="40" height="8" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="50" width="25" height="8" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="65" width="55" height="8" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
        <div style="flex:1;"><div class="cf-agent-label" style="color:#ec4899;">AG7 — Planificador (Gantt PMBOK)</div><input class="cf-input" id="cf-input-AG7" placeholder="UUID del chatflow..."></div>
      </div>
      <div id="fetched-flows" class="fetched-list" style="display:none;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn-fetch" id="fetch-btn" onclick="fetchFlowiseFlows()">🔄 Obtener Chatflows</button>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
        <button class="btn-reset" onclick="closeConfigModal()" style="padding:7px 14px;">Cancelar</button>
        <button class="btn-save" onclick="saveConfig()">💾 Guardar</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<footer>
  <span>COGNITIVE PMO v5.3.1 — <span data-i18n="footer.tfm">Trabajo de Fin de Máster</span> © 2025</span>
  <span>Jose Antonio Martinez Victoria | ID: 23046450J</span>
</footer>
<script>
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// I18N - INTERNATIONALIZATION

var LANG = localStorage.getItem('pmo_lang') || 'es';

var I18N = {
  es: {
    // Nav tabs
    'nav.run': 'RUN', 'nav.build': 'BUILD', 'nav.team': 'TEAM GOV', 'nav.projects': 'PROJECTS',
    'nav.kanban': 'KANBAN', 'nav.budget': 'BUDGET', 'nav.governance': 'PMO GOV',
    'nav.warroom': 'WAR ROOM', 'nav.docs': 'DOCS', 'nav.cmdb': 'CMDB', 'nav.dev': 'DEV',

    'login.title': 'Iniciar Sesión', 'login.user': 'Usuario / Email', 'login.pass': 'Contraseña',
    'login.btn': 'Iniciar Sesión', 'login.error.empty': 'Introduce usuario y contraseña',
    'login.error.connection': 'Error de conexión', 'login.help': '¿Problemas para acceder? Contacta con el administrador:',
    'login.footer': 'Role-Based Access Control',
    'login.authenticating': 'Autenticando...',
    // Change password
    'chpass.title': 'Cambio de Contraseña', 'chpass.subtitle': 'Es tu primer inicio de sesión. Por seguridad, debes cambiar tu contraseña antes de continuar.',
    'chpass.user': 'Usuario', 'chpass.new': 'Nueva Contraseña', 'chpass.confirm': 'Repetir Contraseña',
    'chpass.btn': 'Cambiar Contraseña y Entrar', 'chpass.min': 'La contraseña debe tener al menos 4 caracteres',
    'chpass.mismatch': 'Las contraseñas no coinciden', 'chpass.same': 'Elige una contraseña diferente a la temporal',
    'chpass.changing': 'Cambiando...', 'chpass.success': 'Contraseña actualizada correctamente',
    // User menu
    'user.permisos': 'Mis Permisos', 'user.dept': 'Departamento', 'user.logout': 'Cerrar Sesión',
    // Common
    'common.save': 'Guardar', 'common.cancel': 'Cancelar', 'common.edit': 'Editar',
    'common.delete': 'Eliminar', 'common.create': 'Crear', 'common.close': 'Cerrar',
    'common.search': 'Buscar...', 'common.loading': 'Cargando...', 'common.nodata': 'Sin datos',
    'common.actions': 'Acciones', 'common.status': 'Estado', 'common.name': 'Nombre',
    'common.description': 'Descripción', 'common.type': 'Tipo', 'common.priority': 'Prioridad',
    'common.date': 'Fecha', 'common.active': 'Activo', 'common.inactive': 'Inactivo',
    'common.yes': 'SI', 'common.no': 'No', 'common.all': 'Todos', 'common.total': 'Total',

    'status.online': 'Online', 'status.gateway': 'Gateway',

    'cmdb.inventory': 'Inventario CIs', 'cmdb.dependencies': 'Mapa Dependencias',
    'cmdb.vlans': 'VLANs', 'cmdb.ips': 'Registro IPs', 'cmdb.software': 'Software & Licencias',
    'cmdb.compliance': 'Compliance', 'cmdb.costs': 'Costes & Budget',
    'cmdb.new_asset': '+ Nuevo Activo', 'cmdb.total_assets': 'Activos Totales',
    'cmdb.critical': 'Críticos', 'cmdb.infra_cost': 'Coste Infra/mes',
    'cmdb.sw_cost': 'Coste SW/año', 'cmdb.relations': 'Relaciones',
    'cmdb.obsolete_sw': 'SW Obsoleto', 'cmdb.by_layer': 'Por Capa',
    'cmdb.by_criticality': 'Por Criticidad', 'cmdb.full_inventory': 'Inventario Completo',
    'cmdb.impact_sim': 'Simulación de Impacto', 'cmdb.edit_asset': 'Editar Activo',
    'cmdb.retire': 'Retirar', 'cmdb.new_vlan': '+ Nueva VLAN', 'cmdb.new_ip': '+ Nueva IP',
    'cmdb.new_cost': '+ Nuevo Coste', 'cmdb.no_project': 'Sin proyecto',
    'cmdb.select_asset': '-- Seleccionar activo CMDB --',
    'cmdb.code': 'Código', 'cmdb.layer': 'Capa', 'cmdb.criticality': 'Criticidad',
    'cmdb.environment': 'Entorno', 'cmdb.location': 'Ubicación', 'cmdb.owner': 'Propietario',
    'cmdb.responsible': 'Responsable Técnico', 'cmdb.provider': 'Proveedor',
    'cmdb.monthly_cost': 'Coste Mensual (€)', 'cmdb.project': 'Proyecto Vinculado',

    'cmdb.degraded': 'Activos Degradados / En Mantenimiento',
    'cmdb.certificates': 'Certificados SSL/TLS',
    'cmdb.expires': 'Expira',

    'costs.total_capex': 'Total CAPEX', 'costs.total_opex': 'Total OPEX',

    'costs.by_category': 'Por Categoría', 'costs.capex_vs_opex': 'CAPEX vs OPEX',
    'costs.top_assets': 'Top 10 Activos más caros', 'costs.concept': 'Concepto',

    'rbac.search_user': 'Buscar usuario...', 'rbac.all_roles': 'Todos los roles',
    'rbac.reset_pass': 'Pass', 'rbac.permissions': 'Permisos',
    'rbac.select_all': 'Marcar todos', 'rbac.deselect_all': 'Desmarcar todos',
    'rbac.save_all': 'Guardar Todo', 'rbac.delete_role': 'Eliminar Rol',

    'dev.title': 'DEV TOOLS', 'dev.db': 'Base de Datos', 'dev.sql': 'SQL Console',
    'dev.files': 'Código Fuente', 'dev.api': 'API Endpoints', 'dev.context': 'Contexto Técnico',
    'dev.clipy': 'Clipy (Asistente)',
    // Footer
    'footer.tfm': 'Trabajo de Fin de Máster',
    // Misc
    'misc.permisos_selected': 'permisos seleccionados', 'misc.of': 'de',
    'misc.assets': 'activos', 'misc.users': 'usuarios',
    'misc.confirm_retire': '¿Eliminar el activo',
    'misc.confirm_reset': '¿Resetear la contraseña de',
    'misc.to_default': 'a "12345"?',
    'misc.password_reset': 'Contraseña reseteada a "12345"',
    'misc.updated': 'actualizado', 'misc.created': 'creado', 'misc.deleted': 'eliminado',
  },

function t(key) {
  return (I18N[LANG] && I18N[LANG][key]) || (I18N['es'] && I18N['es'][key]) || key;
}

function toggleLang() {
  setLang(LANG === 'es' ? 'en' : 'es');
}

function setLang(lang) {
  LANG = lang;
  localStorage.setItem('pmo_lang', lang);
  // Update all elements with data-i18n attribute
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(function(el) {
    var key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
    if (el.tagName === 'INPUT' && el.type !== 'submit') {
      el.placeholder = t(key);
    } else {
      el.textContent = t(key);
    }
  });
  // Update lang buttons (topbar + login)
  var btn = document.getElementById('lang-toggle');
  if (btn) btn.textContent = LANG === 'es' ? 'EN' : 'ES';
  var esBtn = document.getElementById('login-lang-es');
  var enBtn = document.getElementById('login-lang-en');
  if (esBtn) esBtn.style.background = LANG === 'es' ? 'var(--blue)' : 'var(--bg3)';
  if (esBtn) esBtn.style.color = LANG === 'es' ? '#fff' : 'var(--text)';
  if (enBtn) enBtn.style.background = LANG === 'en' ? 'var(--blue)' : 'var(--bg3)';
  if (enBtn) enBtn.style.color = LANG === 'en' ? '#fff' : 'var(--text)';
  // Reload dynamic content on current visible page
  var activePage = document.querySelector('.page.active');
  if (activePage) {
    var id = activePage.id.replace('page-','');
    var activeTab = document.querySelector('.nav-tab.active');
    if (activeTab) showPage(id, activeTab);
  }
}

  'AG-015': 'Stakeholder', 'AG-006': 'Resource', 'AG-016': 'Cost',
  'AG-007': 'Planificador', 'AG-017': 'Quality', 'AG-018': 'Advisor',
