var buildPipelineOrder = ['AG-005', 'AG-013', 'AG-014', 'AG-015', 'AG-006', 'AG-016', 'AG-007', 'AG-017'];
var SPAWNABLE_AGENT_IDS = ['AG-005', 'AG-013', 'AG-007'];
var buildPipelineState = {};
var buildPipelineStartTime = null;
var currentPipelineSessionId = null;
var currentPauseNumber = 0;
var maxPauseReached = 0;
var pauseContainerBackup = null;
var navigatedFromPause = 0;
var currentPauseResolve = null;
var pipelineDataRef = null; // Reference to pipelineData for navigation
var AGENT_TO_PAUSE = {'AG-005':1,'AG-013':2,'AG-014':3,'AG-015':3,'AG-006':4,'AG-016':0,'AG-007':0,'AG-017':0};
var buildPipelineCost = 0;
var buildAdvisorSessionId = null;

let AUTH_TOKEN = localStorage.getItem('pmo_token') || null;
let AUTH_USER = null;
let AUTH_PERMISOS = [];
let AUTH_ROLE = null;

// ── Auth Fetch wrapper ──
function authFetch(url, options = {}) {
  if (!options.headers) options.headers = {};
  if (AUTH_TOKEN) {
    options.headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + AUTH_TOKEN;
  }
  if (!options.headers['Content-Type'] && options.body && typeof options.body === 'string') {
    options.headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
  }
  return fetch(url, options).then(function(r) { r.safeJson = function() { return r.text().then(function(t) { return JSON.parse(t); }); }; return r; });
}

// ── P97 F6 — routing post-login (compartido entre doLogin y demoLogin) ──
// Devuelve true si redirigió (la llamada debe hacer return inmediato).
function p97RouteAfterLogin() {
  const P96_ROLES = new Set(['SUPERADMIN','CEO','CFO','CIO','CTO','CISO',
    'VP_ENGINEERING','VP_OPERATIONS','VP_PMO',
    'DIRECTOR_INFRA','DIRECTOR_SEC','DIRECTOR_DATA','DIRECTOR_IT',
    'PMO_SENIOR','AUDITOR']);
  if(AUTH_ROLE && P96_ROLES.has(AUTH_ROLE.code)){
    sessionStorage.setItem('p96_token', AUTH_TOKEN);
    sessionStorage.setItem('p96_me', JSON.stringify({
      role_code: AUTH_ROLE.code,
      nombre: AUTH_USER.nombre_completo,
      email: AUTH_USER.email,
      p96_allowed: true
    }));
    window.location.href = '/p96/';
    return true;
  }
  if(AUTH_ROLE && (AUTH_ROLE.code === 'TECH_SENIOR' || AUTH_ROLE.code === 'TECH_JUNIOR')){
    window.location.href = '/tech-dashboard.html';
    return true;
  }
  return false;
}

// ── Login ──
async function doLogin() {
  const email = document.getElementById('login-email').value.trim();
  const password = document.getElementById('login-password').value;
  const errEl = document.getElementById('login-error');
  const btn = document.getElementById('login-btn');

  if (!email || !password) {
    errEl.textContent = t('login.error.empty');
    errEl.classList.add('show');
    return;
  }
  errEl.classList.remove('show');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.textContent = t('login.authenticating');

  try {
    const res = await fetch(API_BASE + '/auth/login', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({email, password}),
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (!res.ok) {
      errEl.textContent = data.detail || 'Credenciales inválidas';
      errEl.classList.add('show');
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.textContent = t('login.btn');
      return;
    }
    // Store session
    AUTH_TOKEN = data.token;
    AUTH_USER = data.usuario;
    AUTH_PERMISOS = data.permisos || [];
    AUTH_ROLE = data.role;
    localStorage.setItem('pmo_token', AUTH_TOKEN);
    localStorage.setItem('pmo_user', JSON.stringify(AUTH_USER));
    localStorage.setItem('pmo_permisos', JSON.stringify(AUTH_PERMISOS));
    localStorage.setItem('pmo_role', JSON.stringify(AUTH_ROLE));

    // P97 F6 — routing post-login (allowlist /p96/ + TECH_*)
    if(p97RouteAfterLogin()) return;
    showApp();
  } catch (e) {
    errEl.textContent = t('login.error.connection') + ': ' + (e.message || e);
    errEl.classList.add('show');
    console.error('Login error:', e);
  }
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.textContent = t('login.btn');
}

// ── Demo Login (quick access for tribunal) ──
async function demoLogin(email, target) {
  const card = event.currentTarget;
  card.classList.add('loading');
  try {
    const res = await fetch(API_BASE + '/auth/login', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({email: email, password: '12345'}),
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (!res.ok) {
      alert('Error: ' + (data.detail || 'Login fallido'));
      card.classList.remove('loading');
      return;
    }
    if (target === 'gov-run' || target === 'gov-build') {
      localStorage.setItem('cpm_token', data.token);
      window.location.href = '/' + target + '.html';
    } else if (target === 'tech') {
      localStorage.setItem('pmo_token', data.token);
      localStorage.setItem('pmo_user', JSON.stringify(data.usuario));
      localStorage.setItem('pmo_permisos', JSON.stringify(data.permisos || []));
      localStorage.setItem('pmo_role', JSON.stringify(data.role));
      window.location.href = '/tech-dashboard.html';
    } else {
      AUTH_TOKEN = data.token;
      AUTH_USER = data.usuario;
      AUTH_PERMISOS = data.permisos || [];
      AUTH_ROLE = data.role;
      localStorage.setItem('pmo_token', AUTH_TOKEN);
      localStorage.setItem('pmo_user', JSON.stringify(AUTH_USER));
      localStorage.setItem('pmo_permisos', JSON.stringify(AUTH_PERMISOS));
      localStorage.setItem('pmo_role', JSON.stringify(AUTH_ROLE));
      // P97 F6 — routing post-login (allowlist /p96/ + TECH_*)
      if(p97RouteAfterLogin()) return;
      showApp();
    }
  } catch (e) {
    alert('Error de conexión: ' + (e.message || e));
    card.classList.remove('loading');
  }
}

// ── Notificaciones (bell) ──
var _notifData = [];
function toggleNotifPanel(e) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  var p = document.getElementById('notif-panel');
  p.classList.toggle('open');
  if (p.classList.contains('open')) loadNotificaciones();
}
function loadNotificaciones() {
  if (!AUTH_TOKEN) return;
  authFetch(API_BASE + '/api/notificaciones').then(function(data) {
    if (!Array.isArray(data)) return;
    _notifData = data;
    var unread = data.filter(function(n){ return !n.leida; }).length;
    var badge = document.getElementById('notif-badge');
    if (badge) { badge.textContent = unread; badge.className = 'notif-badge' + (unread > 0 ? ' show' : ''); }
    renderNotifList(data);
  }).catch(function(){});
}
function renderNotifList(data) {
  var el = document.getElementById('notif-list');
  if (!el) return;
  if (!data.length) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="notif-empty">Sin notificaciones</div>'; return; }
  var icons = {asignacion:'\u2705',estado:'\u{1F504}',alerta:'\u26A0\uFE0F',urgente:'\u{1F6A8}',info:'\u{1F4AC}'};
  el.innerHTML = data.map(function(n){
    var ago = timeAgo(n.created_at);
    var cls = n.leida ? '' : ' unread';
    var tipo = n.tipo || 'info';
    return '<div class="notif-item'+cls+'" onclick="notifClick(event,'+n.id+')">'+
      '<div class="notif-ico '+tipo+'">'+(icons[tipo]||'\u{1F4AC}')+'</div>'+
      '<div class="notif-body"><div class="notif-title">'+esc(n.titulo)+'</div>'+
      '<div class="notif-msg">'+esc(n.mensaje||'')+'</div>'+
      '<div class="notif-time">'+ago+'</div></div></div>';
  }).join('');
}
function esc(s){var d=document.createElement('div');d.textContent=s;return d.innerHTML;}
function timeAgo(dt) {
  if (!dt) return '';
  var d = new Date(dt + (dt.indexOf('Z') < 0 && dt.indexOf('+') < 0 ? 'Z' : ''));
  var s = Math.floor((Date.now() - d.getTime()) / 1000);
  if (s < 60) return 'ahora';
  if (s < 3600) return Math.floor(s/60) + 'm';
  if (s < 86400) return Math.floor(s/3600) + 'h';
  return Math.floor(s/86400) + 'd';
}
function notifClick(e, id) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  authFetch(API_BASE + '/api/notificaciones/' + id + '/leer', {method:'PUT'}).then(function(){ loadNotificaciones(); }).catch(function(){});
}
function notifMarkAll(e) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  authFetch(API_BASE + '/api/notificaciones/leer-todas', {method:'PUT'}).then(function(){ loadNotificaciones(); }).catch(function(){});
}
// Polling cada 30s
setInterval(function(){ if (AUTH_TOKEN) loadNotificaciones(); }, 30000);
// Close panel on outside click
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  var p = document.getElementById('notif-panel');
  if (p && p.classList.contains('open') && !e.target.closest('.notif-bell')) p.classList.remove('open');
});

// ── Logout ──
function doLogout() {
  authFetch(API_BASE + '/auth/logout', {method: 'POST'}).catch(()=>{});
  AUTH_TOKEN = null;
  AUTH_USER = null;
  AUTH_PERMISOS = [];
  AUTH_ROLE = null;
  localStorage.removeItem('pmo_token');
  localStorage.removeItem('pmo_user');
  localStorage.removeItem('pmo_permisos');
  localStorage.removeItem('pmo_role');
  document.getElementById('login-screen').style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('login-password').value = '';
  document.getElementById('login-email').value = '';
  document.getElementById('login-email').focus();
  const dd = document.getElementById('user-dropdown');
  if (dd) dd.classList.remove('open');
}

// ── Show App after login ──
function showApp() {
  document.getElementById('login-screen').style.display = 'none';
  // Check if first login — force password change
  if (AUTH_USER && AUTH_USER.requiere_cambio_password) {
    document.getElementById('change-pass-screen').style.display = 'flex';
    document.getElementById('chpass-user').textContent = AUTH_USER.nombre_completo || '-';
    document.getElementById('chpass-email').textContent = AUTH_USER.email || '-';
    document.getElementById('chpass-new').focus();
    return;
  }
  document.getElementById('change-pass-screen').style.display = 'none';
  updateTopbarUser();
  loadTeam();
  loadProjects();
  loadKanban();
  loadBudgets();
  loadNotificaciones();
}

// ── Update topbar with user info ──
function updateTopbarUser() {
  if (!AUTH_USER) return;
  const name = AUTH_USER.nombre_completo || 'Usuario';
  const initials = name.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').substring(0, 2).toUpperCase();
  const roleColor = AUTH_ROLE ? AUTH_ROLE.color : '#2d7ef7';
  const roleName = AUTH_ROLE ? AUTH_ROLE.nombre : '-';

  document.getElementById('topbar-avatar').textContent = initials;
  document.getElementById('topbar-avatar').style.background = roleColor;
  document.getElementById('topbar-username').textContent = name;
  document.getElementById('topbar-role').textContent = roleName;
  document.getElementById('topbar-role').style.color = roleColor;

  // Dropdown
  document.getElementById('udd-name').textContent = name;
  document.getElementById('udd-email').textContent = AUTH_USER.email || '-';
  const roleBadge = document.getElementById('udd-role-badge');
  roleBadge.textContent = (AUTH_ROLE ? AUTH_ROLE.code : '-');
  roleBadge.style.background = roleColor + '22';
  roleBadge.style.color = roleColor;
  document.getElementById('udd-permisos-count').textContent = AUTH_PERMISOS.length;
  document.getElementById('udd-dept-text').textContent = AUTH_USER.departamento || 'Sin departamento';
}

function toggleUserMenu() {
  const dd = document.getElementById('user-dropdown');
  dd.classList.toggle('open');
}

// Close dropdown on outside click
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const btn = document.getElementById('user-menu-btn');
  const dd = document.getElementById('user-dropdown');
  if (btn && dd && !btn.contains(e.target)) {
    dd.classList.remove('open');
  }
});

// ── Show permissions modal ──
function showPermisos() {
  const dd = document.getElementById('user-dropdown');
  dd.classList.remove('open');
  const grouped = {};
  AUTH_PERMISOS.forEach(p => {
    const [mod, accion] = p.split('.');
    if (!grouped[mod]) grouped[mod] = [];
    grouped[mod].push(accion);
  });
  let html = '<div style="max-height:60vh;overflow-y:auto;padding:4px 0;">';
  Object.entries(grouped).sort((a,b) => a[0].localeCompare(b[0])).forEach(([mod, acciones]) => {
    html += '<div style="margin-bottom:12px;">';
    html += '<div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px;">' + escHtml(mod) + '</div>';
    html += '<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;">';
    acciones.forEach(a => {
      const colors = {ver:'var(--green)',crear:'var(--blue)',editar:'var(--orange)',eliminar:'var(--red)',aprobar:'var(--purple)',exportar:'var(--cyan)',ejecutar:'var(--pink)',admin:'var(--red)'};
      const c = colors[a] || 'var(--text2)';
      html += '<span style="padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;background:' + c + '18;color:' + c + ';">' + escHtml(a) + '</span>';
    });
    html += '</div></div>';
  });
  html += '</div>';
  // Reuse existing modal system or create simple one
  showSimpleModal(t('user.permisos') + ' (' + AUTH_PERMISOS.length + ')', html);
}

function showSimpleModal(title, bodyHtml) {
  let overlay = document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay');
  if (!overlay) {
    overlay = document.createElement('div');
    overlay.id = 'simple-modal-overlay';
    overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:8000;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
    overlay.onclick = function(e){ if(e.target===overlay) overlay.remove(); };
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  }
  overlay.innerHTML = '<div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;width:480px;max-width:90vw;max-height:80vh;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.3);">' +
    '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">' +
    '<span style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;">' + title + '</span>' +
    '<span style="cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;color:var(--text2);padding:4px;" onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()">&times;</span>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div style="padding:16px 20px;">' + bodyHtml + '</div>' +
    '</div>';
}

// ── Has permission check ──
function hasPerm(permCode) {
  if (!AUTH_ROLE) return false;
  if (AUTH_ROLE.code === 'SUPERADMIN') return true;
  return AUTH_PERMISOS.includes(permCode);
}

// ── Login floating icons animation ──
(function initLoginParticles() {
  var container = document.getElementById('login-particles');
  if (!container) return;
  var icons = [
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><rect x="30" y="30" width="40" height="9" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="46" width="25" height="9" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="62" width="55" height="9" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/></svg>',
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2"/></svg>',
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/><path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/></svg>',
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M9 3v18"/><path d="M15 3v18"/></svg>',
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>',
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="9" ry="3"/><path d="M21 12c0 1.66-4 3-9 3s-9-1.34-9-3"/><path d="M3 5v14c0 1.66 4 3 9 3s9-1.34 9-3V5"/></svg>',
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M14.7 6.3a1 1 0 0 0 0 1.4l1.6 1.6a1 1 0 0 0 1.4 0l3.77-3.77a6 6 0 0 1-7.94 7.94l-6.91 6.91a2.12 2.12 0 0 1-3-3l6.91-6.91a6 6 0 0 1 7.94-7.94l-3.76 3.76z"/></svg>',
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2"/></svg>',
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M8 21h8M12 17v4"/></svg>',
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/></svg>',
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M9 5H7a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h10a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-2"/><rect x="9" y="3" width="6" height="4" rx="2"/></svg>',
    '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/></svg>',
  ];
  var colors = ['#2d7ef7','#3fb950','#f0883e','#a5b4fc','#f778ba','#39c5cf','#ef4444','#d29922','#8b5cf6','#06b6d4','#10b981','#ec4899'];
  for (var i = 0; i < 18; i++) {
    var p = document.createElement('div');
    p.className = 'login-particle';
    var size = 24 + Math.random() * 36;
    var color = colors[i % colors.length];
    p.style.cssText = 'width:'+size+'px;height:'+size+'px;color:'+color+';opacity:'+(0.15+Math.random()*0.25)+
      ';left:'+(Math.random()*100)+'%;top:'+(Math.random()*100)+'%;animation-delay:'+(Math.random()*10)+
      's;animation-duration:'+(15+Math.random()*20)+'s;border-radius:0;background:none;';
    p.innerHTML = icons[i % icons.length];
    container.appendChild(p);
  }
})();

// ── Enter key on login fields ──
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Enter' && document.getElementById('login-screen') && document.getElementById('login-screen').style.display !== 'none') {
    doLogin();
  }
});

// ── Auto-login if token exists (deferred to end of script) ──
function checkExistingSession() {
  const token = localStorage.getItem('pmo_token');
  if (token) {
    AUTH_TOKEN = token;
    try { AUTH_USER = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('pmo_user')); } catch(e) {}
    try { AUTH_PERMISOS = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('pmo_permisos')) || []; } catch(e) {}
    try { AUTH_ROLE = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('pmo_role')); } catch(e) {}
    // Verify token is still valid
    fetch(API_BASE + '/auth/me', {headers: {'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token}})
      .then(r => {
        if (r.ok) {
          showApp();
        } else {
          doLogout();
        }
      })
      .catch(() => doLogout());
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ORIGINAL APP CODE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ── CONFIG ── (API_BASE already declared above in auth section)

// ── COLORS ──
const SILO_COLORS = {
  Frontend:'#2d7ef7',Soporte:'#f0883e',Redes:'#39c5cf',Windows:'#3fb950',
  Backend:'#a5b4fc',QA:'#d29922',DevOps:'#f778ba',Seguridad:'#ef4444',BBDD:'#f0883e'
};
const AV_COLORS = ['#2d7ef7','#3fb950','#f0883e','#ef4444','#a5b4fc','#d29922','#f778ba','#39c5cf'];

let ALL_TEAM = [];
let ALL_PROJECTS = [];
let currentTeamFilter = '';
let currentTeamSilo = 'Todos';
let currentProjPrio = 'Todos';
let currentProjFilter = '';

// ── HELPERS ──
function escHtml(t){ if(!t) return ''; return String(t).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;'); }

function hashCode(str) {
  let h = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) { h = (Math.imul(31, h) + str.charCodeAt(i)) | 0; }
  return h;
}

// ── NAV ──
function showPage(id, el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('page-'+id).classList.add('active');
  el.classList.add('active');
  if (id === 'team' && ALL_TEAM.length === 0) loadTeam();
  if (id === 'projects' && ALL_PROJECTS.length === 0) loadProjects();
  if (id === 'kanban') { if (typeof kg_init === 'function') kg_init(); /* LEGACY P95-F8: loadKanban() reemplazado por kg_init() */ }
  if (id === 'governance' && !_govLoaded) loadGovernance();
  if (id === 'warroom' && !_wrLoaded) loadWarRoom();
  if (id === 'docs' && !_docsLoaded) loadDocs();
  if (id === 'cmdb') loadCmdbDashboard();
  if (id === 'devtools' && !_devLoaded) loadDevTables();
  if (id === 'cab') loadCABMainData();
}

// ── TEAM ──
let _teamTaskMap = {};
let _teamDashVisible = false;

function toggleTeamDashboard() {
  _teamDashVisible = !_teamDashVisible;
  document.getElementById('team-dashboard').style.display = _teamDashVisible ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (_teamDashVisible && ALL_TEAM.length) renderTeamDashboard();
}

function _drawGauge(canvasId, pct, colorHi, colorMid, colorLo) {
  const c = document.getElementById(canvasId);
  if (!c) return;
  const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
  const w = c.width, h = c.height;
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
  const cx=w/2, cy=h-2, r=Math.min(w/2,h)-4, lw=8;
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,0); ctx.strokeStyle='#30363d'; ctx.lineWidth=lw; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.stroke();
  if (pct > 0) {
    const angle = -Math.PI + (Math.PI * Math.min(100,pct) / 100);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,angle);
    ctx.strokeStyle = pct>70 ? (colorHi||'#f85149') : pct>40 ? (colorMid||'#f0883e') : (colorLo||'#3fb950');
    ctx.lineWidth=lw; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.stroke();
  }
}

function renderTeamDashboard() {
  const t = ALL_TEAM;
  const estados = {};
  t.forEach(x => { estados[x.estado] = (estados[x.estado]||0)+1; });
  const ocupados = estados['OCUPADO']||0;
  const disponibles = estados['DISPONIBLE']||0;
  const guardia = estados['GUARDIA']||0;
  const baja = estados['BAJA']||0;
  const vacaciones = estados['VACACIONES']||0;
  const otros = guardia + baja + vacaciones;
  const pctOcup = t.length > 0 ? Math.round(ocupados / t.length * 100) : 0;
  // Estado badges as KPI cards
  const eColors = {DISPONIBLE:'var(--green)',OCUPADO:'var(--orange)',GUARDIA:'var(--blue)',BAJA:'var(--red)',VACACIONES:'#8b949e'};
  const eIcons = {DISPONIBLE:'●',OCUPADO:'●',GUARDIA:'◐',BAJA:'✕',VACACIONES:'◌'};
  document.getElementById('team-estado-badges').innerHTML = ['DISPONIBLE','OCUPADO','GUARDIA','BAJA','VACACIONES'].map(k => {
    const v = estados[k]||0;
    return `<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:${eColors[k]};">${v}</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:3px;"><span style="color:${eColors[k]};">${eIcons[k]}</span> ${k}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  // Gauge: Ocupación Global
  document.getElementById('td-ocupados').textContent = ocupados;
  document.getElementById('td-disponibles').textContent = disponibles;
  document.getElementById('td-otros').textContent = otros;
  document.getElementById('team-gauge-pct').textContent = pctOcup + '%';
  document.getElementById('team-gauge-pct').style.color = pctOcup>70?'#f85149':pctOcup>40?'#f0883e':'#3fb950';
  _drawGauge('team-gauge', pctOcup);
  // Gauge: RUN vs BUILD
  const allActive = t.reduce((s,x) => s + (x.activeTasks||[]).length, 0);
  const allRun = t.reduce((s,x) => s + (x.activeTasks||[]).filter(tk=>tk.tipo==='RUN').length, 0);
  const allBuild = allActive - allRun;
  const pctRun = allActive > 0 ? Math.round(allRun/allActive*100) : 0;
  const pctBuild = allActive > 0 ? Math.round(allBuild/allActive*100) : 0;
  document.getElementById('td-pct-run').textContent = pctRun + '%';
  document.getElementById('td-pct-build').textContent = pctBuild + '%';
  // Draw split gauge
  const c = document.getElementById('team-runbuild-gauge');
  if (c) {
    const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
    const w=c.width, h=c.height;
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
    const cx=w/2, cy=h-2, r=Math.min(w/2,h)-4, lw=8;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,0); ctx.strokeStyle='#30363d'; ctx.lineWidth=lw; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.stroke();
    if (allActive > 0) {
      const runAngle = -Math.PI + (Math.PI * pctRun / 100);
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,-Math.PI,runAngle); ctx.strokeStyle='#2d7ef7'; ctx.lineWidth=lw; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.stroke();
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,runAngle,0); ctx.strokeStyle='#3fb950'; ctx.lineWidth=lw; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.stroke();
    }
  }
  // Silo bars
  const silos = {};
  t.forEach(x => {
    if (!silos[x.silo]) silos[x.silo] = {total:0,ocupados:0,tareas:0};
    silos[x.silo].total++;
    if (x.estado==='OCUPADO') silos[x.silo].ocupados++;
    silos[x.silo].tareas += x.totalActiveTasks || 0;
  });
  const SC = SILO_COLORS || {};
  document.getElementById('team-silo-bars').innerHTML = Object.entries(silos).sort((a,b)=>b[1].total-a[1].total).map(([silo,d]) => {
    const pct = d.total > 0 ? Math.round(d.ocupados / d.total * 100) : 0;
    const col = SC[silo]||'#8b949e';
    return `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:2px;">
      <span style="width:50px;font-size:9px;color:${col};text-align:right;font-weight:600;">${silo}</span>
      <div style="flex:1;height:7px;background:var(--bg);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="width:${pct}%;height:100%;background:${col};border-radius:4px;transition:width .3s;"></div>
      </div>
      <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:8px;width:35px;color:${pct>70?'var(--red)':pct>40?'var(--orange)':'var(--green)'};">${d.ocupados}/${d.total}</span>
      <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);">${d.tareas}t</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  // Level badges
  const n1=t.filter(x=>x.nivel==='N1').length, n2=t.filter(x=>x.nivel==='N2').length;
  const n3=t.filter(x=>x.nivel==='N3').length, n4=t.filter(x=>x.nivel==='N4').length;
  document.getElementById('cnt-n1').textContent=n1;
  document.getElementById('cnt-n2').textContent=n2;
  document.getElementById('cnt-n3').textContent=n3;
  document.getElementById('cnt-n4').textContent=n4;
}

function toggleDisponibles() {
  const panel = document.getElementById('team-disponibles-panel');
  panel.style.display = panel.style.display==='none' ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (panel.style.display !== 'none') renderDisponibles();
}

function renderDisponibles() {
  const silos = {};
  ALL_TEAM.forEach(t => {
    if (!silos[t.silo]) silos[t.silo] = [];
    if (t.estado === 'DISPONIBLE') silos[t.silo].push(t);
  });
  const SC = SILO_COLORS || {};
  document.getElementById('team-disponibles-grid').innerHTML = Object.entries(silos).sort((a,b)=>b[1].length-a[1].length).map(([silo, arr]) => {
    const col = SC[silo]||'#8b949e';
    return `<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;border-left:3px solid ${col};">
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:${col};margin-bottom:4px;">${silo} <span style="font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--green);">(${arr.length})</span></div>
      ${arr.length === 0 ? '<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Sin disponibles</div>' :
        arr.slice(0,5).map(t => `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);padding:1px 0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--text3);margin-right:3px;">${t.fte}</span>${t.name.split(' ').slice(0,2).join(' ')}
          <span class="nivel-badge ${t.nivel.toLowerCase()}" style="font-size:8px;padding:0 4px;margin-left:2px;">${t.nivel}</span>
        </div>`).join('') + (arr.length>5?`<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">+${arr.length-5} más</div>`:'')}
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

// Column resize + drag reorder for ALL th
(function initTeamColInteraction(){
  let resizing=null, startX=0, startW=0;
  let dragTh=null;
  document.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e){
    const th = e.target.closest('th.tm-th-resizable');
    if (!th) return;
    const rect = th.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (e.clientX > rect.right - 6) {
      resizing = th; startX = e.clientX; startW = th.offsetWidth;
      e.preventDefault();
    }
  });
  document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e){
    if (!resizing) return;
    const w = Math.max(30, startW + e.clientX - startX);
    resizing.style.width = w + 'px';
  });
  document.addEventListener('mouseup', function(){ resizing = null; });
  // Drag reorder
  const row = document.getElementById('team-thead-row');
  if (row) {
    row.addEventListener('dragstart', function(e){
      dragTh = e.target.closest('th');
      if (dragTh) { e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move'; dragTh.style.opacity='.4'; }
    });
    row.addEventListener('dragover', function(e){ e.preventDefault(); e.dataTransfer.dropEffect='move'; });
    row.addEventListener('drop', function(e){
      e.preventDefault();
      const target = e.target.closest('th');
      if (dragTh && target && dragTh !== target) {
        const ths = [...row.children];
        const fromIdx = ths.indexOf(dragTh);
        const toIdx = ths.indexOf(target);
        // Reorder headers
        if (fromIdx < toIdx) target.after(dragTh);
        else target.before(dragTh);
        // Reorder all body rows
        document.querySelectorAll('#team-tbody tr').forEach(tr => {
          const cells = [...tr.children];
          if (cells[fromIdx] && cells[toIdx]) {
            if (fromIdx < toIdx) cells[toIdx].after(cells[fromIdx]);
            else cells[toIdx].before(cells[fromIdx]);
          }
        });
      }
    });
    row.addEventListener('dragend', function(){ if(dragTh) dragTh.style.opacity=''; dragTh=null; });
  }
})();

async function loadTeam() {
  const tbody = document.getElementById('team-tbody');
  tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--text2);"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Cargando equipo...</td></tr>';
  try {
    const [teamRes, tasksRes] = await Promise.all([
      authFetch(API_BASE + '/team/tecnicos'),
      authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas'),
    ]);
    if (!teamRes.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + teamRes.status);
    const data = await teamRes.json();
    const tasks = tasksRes.ok ? await tasksRes.json() : [];
    _teamTaskMap = {};
    tasks.forEach(tk => {
      if (!tk.id_tecnico) return;
      if (!_teamTaskMap[tk.id_tecnico]) _teamTaskMap[tk.id_tecnico] = [];
      _teamTaskMap[tk.id_tecnico].push(tk);
    });
    const parseJ = v => { if(Array.isArray(v)) return v; try{ return JSON.parse(v)||[]; }catch(e){ return []; } };
    ALL_TEAM = data.map(t => {
      const fte = t.id_recurso || t.id_tecnico;
      const myTasks = _teamTaskMap[fte] || [];
      const activeTasks = myTasks.filter(tk => tk.columna !== 'Completado');
      const runTasks = activeTasks.filter(tk => tk.tipo === 'RUN');
      const buildTasks = activeTasks.filter(tk => tk.tipo === 'BUILD');
      const totalActive = activeTasks.length;
      const pctRun = totalActive > 0 ? Math.round(runTasks.length / totalActive * 100) : 0;
      const pctBuild = totalActive > 0 ? 100 - pctRun : 0;
      return {
        name: t.nombre, fte, silo: t.silo_especialidad || 'Frontend',
        nivel: t.nivel || 'N2', skills: t.total_skills || 0,
        tags: parseJ(t.skills_json || t.tags),
        estado: t.estado_run || 'DISPONIBLE', skillPrincipal: t.skill_principal || '',
        color: AV_COLORS[Math.abs(hashCode(t.nombre)) % AV_COLORS.length],
        email: t.email || '', telefono: t.telefono || '',
        activeTasks, totalActiveTasks: totalActive, pctRun, pctBuild,
      };
    });
    document.getElementById('team-count').textContent = ALL_TEAM.length + ' técnicos';
    renderTeam(ALL_TEAM);
    if (_teamDashVisible) renderTeamDashboard();
    // Footer info
    const ocu = ALL_TEAM.filter(t=>t.estado==='OCUPADO').length;
    const dis = ALL_TEAM.filter(t=>t.estado==='DISPONIBLE').length;
    document.getElementById('team-footer-info').textContent = `${ocu} ocupados · ${dis} disponibles · ${ALL_TEAM.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.totalActiveTasks,0)} tareas activas`;
  } catch(e) {
    console.warn('Team fetch failed:', e.message);
    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:var(--text2);">Sin conexión al servidor</td></tr>';
    ALL_TEAM = []; renderTeam([]);
  }
}

function renderTeam(data) {
  const tbody = document.getElementById('team-tbody');
  if (!data.length) { tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:var(--text2);">Sin resultados</td></tr>'; return; }
  tbody.innerHTML = data.map(t => {
    const initials = t.name.split(' ').slice(0,2).map(n=>n[0]).join('');
    const barW = Math.min(100, Math.round(t.skills));
    const barColor = barW > 60 ? 'var(--green)' : barW > 40 ? 'var(--yellow)' : 'var(--text3)';
    const siloColor = SILO_COLORS[t.silo] || '#8b949e';
    const nClass = (t.nivel||'n2').toLowerCase();
    const eColors = {DISPONIBLE:'var(--green)',OCUPADO:'var(--orange)',GUARDIA:'var(--blue)',BAJA:'var(--red)',VACACIONES:'#8b949e'};
    const eIcons = {DISPONIBLE:'●',OCUPADO:'●',GUARDIA:'◐',BAJA:'✕',VACACIONES:'◌'};
    const estadoColor = eColors[t.estado]||'var(--text2)';
    // Tasks count
    const tc = t.totalActiveTasks || 0;
    const tcColor = tc===0?'var(--text3)':tc>3?'var(--red)':tc>1?'var(--orange)':'var(--green)';
    // Vinculación
    const links = [];
    (t.activeTasks||[]).forEach(tk => {
      if (tk.id_proyecto && !links.find(l=>l.id===tk.id_proyecto)) links.push({id:tk.id_proyecto,t:'B'});
      if (tk.id_incidencia && !links.find(l=>l.id===tk.id_incidencia)) links.push({id:tk.id_incidencia,t:'R'});
    });
    const linksHtml = links.length ? links.slice(0,2).map(l=>`<span style="font-size:8px;padding:0 3px;border-radius:2px;background:${l.t==='R'?'var(--blue-bg)':'var(--green-bg)'};color:${l.t==='R'?'var(--blue)':'var(--green)'};">${l.id}</span>`).join(' ')+(links.length>2?`<span style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);">+${links.length-2}</span>`:'') : '<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">—</span>';
    // Carga: mini gauge with RUN/BUILD split
    let cargaHtml;
    if (tc > 0) {
      const r = t.pctRun, b = t.pctBuild;
      cargaHtml = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;">
        <div style="width:28px;height:14px;border-radius:7px;background:var(--bg);display:flex;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);">
          <div style="width:${r}%;background:var(--blue);"></div>
          <div style="width:${b}%;background:var(--green);"></div>
        </div>
        <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);">${r}/${b}</span>
      </div>`;
    } else {
      cargaHtml = '<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">—</span>';
    }
    return `<tr style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="openTeamEdit('${escHtml(t.fte)}')" title="Click para editar">
      <td><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;"><div class="avatar" style="background:${t.color};width:24px;height:24px;font-size:10px;">${escHtml(initials)}</div><span style="font-weight:500;font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${escHtml(t.name)}</span></div></td>
      <td><span class="fte-code" style="font-size:10px;">${escHtml(t.fte)}</span></td>
      <td><span class="silo-badge" style="background:${siloColor}22;color:${siloColor};font-size:10px;padding:1px 5px;">${escHtml(t.silo)}</span></td>
      <td><span class="nivel-badge ${nClass}" style="font-size:10px;padding:1px 5px;">${escHtml(t.nivel)}</span></td>
      <td><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;"><div class="skills-bar-wrap" style="width:40px;"><div class="skills-bar" style="width:${barW}%;background:${barColor};"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">${barW}</span></div></td>
      <td style="text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:${tcColor};">${tc||'—'}</span></td>
      <td>${linksHtml}</td>
      <td>${cargaHtml}</td>
      <td><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:${estadoColor};">${eIcons[t.estado]||'●'} ${escHtml(t.estado)}</span></td>
      <td style="white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;"><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">${escHtml(t.email||'')}</span></td>
      <td><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);">${escHtml(t.telefono||'')}</span></td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

function filterTeam(val) {
  currentTeamFilter = val;
  applyTeamFilters();
}
function filterSilo(silo, el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));
  el.classList.add('active');
  currentTeamSilo = silo;
  applyTeamFilters();
}
function applyTeamFilters() {
  let data = ALL_TEAM;
  if (currentTeamSilo !== 'Todos') data = data.filter(t=>t.silo===currentTeamSilo);
  if (currentTeamFilter) data = data.filter(t=>
    t.name.toLowerCase().includes(currentTeamFilter.toLowerCase()) ||
    t.fte.toLowerCase().includes(currentTeamFilter.toLowerCase())
  );
  document.getElementById('team-count').textContent = data.length + ' de ' + ALL_TEAM.length + ' técnicos';
  renderTeam(data);
}

// ── PROJECTS ──
let _projPmMap = {}; // id_proyecto -> pm info

async function loadProjects() {
  const tbody = document.getElementById('proj-tbody');
  tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--text2);"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Cargando proyectos...</td></tr>';
  try {
    const [projRes, govRes] = await Promise.all([
      authFetch(API_BASE + '/cartera/proyectos'),
      authFetch(API_BASE + '/pmo/governance').catch(()=>({ok:false})),
    ]);
    if (!projRes.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + projRes.status);
    const data = await projRes.json();
    const govData = govRes.ok ? await govRes.json() : [];
    // Build PM map from governance data
    _projPmMap = {};
    govData.forEach(g => { if(g.id_proyecto) _projPmMap[g.id_proyecto] = {id:g.id_pm, name:g.pm_nombre||g.id_pm}; });
    ALL_PROJECTS = data.map(p => ({
      id: p.id_proyecto,
      name: p.nombre_proyecto || p.nombre,
      prio: p.prioridad_estrategica || p.prioridad,
      estado: p.estado,
      horas: p.horas_estimadas,
      skill: p.skills_requeridas || p.skill_requerida,
      start: p.fecha_creacion ? String(p.fecha_creacion).slice(0,10) : '',
      end: p.fecha_ultima_modificacion ? String(p.fecha_ultima_modificacion).slice(0,10) : '',
      pm: _projPmMap[p.id_proyecto] || null,
    }));
    renderProjects(ALL_PROJECTS);
    document.getElementById('proj-count').textContent = ALL_PROJECTS.length + ' proyectos';
    document.getElementById('cnt-backlog').textContent = ALL_PROJECTS.filter(p=>['Standby','pendiente','En analisis'].includes(p.estado)).length;
    document.getElementById('cnt-plan').textContent = ALL_PROJECTS.filter(p=>p.estado==='Aprobado').length;
    document.getElementById('cnt-prog').textContent = ALL_PROJECTS.filter(p=>p.estado==='en ejecucion').length;
    document.getElementById('cnt-done').textContent = ALL_PROJECTS.filter(p=>['cerrado','en cierre'].includes(p.estado)).length;
  } catch(e) {
    console.warn('Projects fetch failed:', e.message);
    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:var(--text2);">Sin conexión al servidor</td></tr>';
    ALL_PROJECTS = [];
    renderProjects([]);
  }
}

function renderProjects(data) {
  const tbody = document.getElementById('proj-tbody');
  if (!data.length) {
    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:var(--text2);">Sin resultados</td></tr>';
    return;
  }
  tbody.innerHTML = data.map(p => {
    const prioLow = (p.prio||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'');
    const prioClass = prioLow === 'critica' ? 'critica' : prioLow === 'alta' ? 'alta' : prioLow === 'media' ? 'media' : 'baja';
    const estadoClass = p.estado === 'en ejecucion' ? 'en-progreso' : (p.estado === 'Aprobado' || p.estado === 'en revision') ? 'planificado' : (p.estado === 'Standby' || p.estado === 'pendiente' || p.estado === 'En analisis') ? 'backlog' : (p.estado === 'cerrado' || p.estado === 'en cierre') ? 'completado-b' : p.estado === 'PAUSADO_POR_RIESGO_P1' ? 'critica' : 'backlog';
    const horasClass = p.horas >= 100 ? 'horas-high' : p.horas >= 60 ? 'horas-mid' : 'horas-low';
    const pm = p.pm;
    const pmHtml = pm
      ? `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;">
          <div class="avatar" style="background:${AV_COLORS[Math.abs(hashCode(pm.name||''))%AV_COLORS.length]};width:18px;height:18px;font-size:8px;">${(pm.name||'?')[0]}</div>
          <div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:500;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${escHtml((pm.name||'').split(' ').slice(0,2).join(' '))}</div>
          <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono);">${escHtml(pm.id||'')}</div></div>
        </div>`
      : '<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Sin PM</span>';
    return `<tr style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="openProjEdit('${escHtml(p.id)}')" title="Click para editar">
      <td><span class="proj-id">${escHtml(p.id)}</span></td>
      <td style="font-weight:500;font-size:11px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">${escHtml(p.name)}</td>
      <td><span class="prio-chip ${prioClass}" style="font-size:10px;">${escHtml(p.prio)}</span></td>
      <td><span class="estado-badge ${estadoClass}" style="font-size:10px;">${escHtml(p.estado)}</span></td>
      <td><span class="horas-text ${horasClass}">${p.horas}h</span></td>
      <td>${pmHtml}</td>
      <td style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${escHtml(p.skill||'')}</td>
      <td style="font-size:10px;font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--text3);">${p.start||''}</td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

function filterProjects(val) {
  currentProjFilter = val;
  applyProjFilters();
}
function filterProjPrio(prio, el) {
  currentProjPrio = prio;
  applyProjFilters();
}
function applyProjFilters() {
  let data = ALL_PROJECTS;
  if (currentProjPrio !== 'Todos') data = data.filter(p=>p.prio===currentProjPrio);
  if (currentProjFilter) data = data.filter(p=>
    p.name.toLowerCase().includes(currentProjFilter.toLowerCase()) ||
    p.id.toLowerCase().includes(currentProjFilter.toLowerCase()) ||
    (p.skill||'').toLowerCase().includes(currentProjFilter.toLowerCase())
  );
  renderProjects(data);
}

// ── KANBAN ──
const KANBAN_COLS = ['Backlog','Análisis','En Progreso','Code Review','Testing','Despliegue','Bloqueado','Completado'];
const COL_META = {
  'Backlog':     {icon:'📋',color:'#8b949e',wip:0},
  'Análisis':    {icon:'🔍',color:'#2d7ef7',wip:5},
  'En Progreso': {icon:'⚡',color:'#f0883e',wip:6},
  'Code Review': {icon:'👁',color:'#3fb950',wip:4},
  'Testing':     {icon:'🧪',color:'#a5b4fc',wip:5},
  'Despliegue':  {icon:'🚀',color:'#f778ba',wip:3},
  'Bloqueado':   {icon:'🚫',color:'#f85149',wip:0},
  'Completado':  {icon:'✅',color:'#3fb950',wip:0},
};
let ALL_KANBAN_TASKS = [];
let _kbEditMode = false;

// LEGACY P95-F8 — loadKanban() convertida en stub no-op tras integrar kg_init().
// Eliminar tras 2 semanas (2026-04-21). Reemplazado por kg_loadKanbanGlobal.
async function loadKanban() {
  ALL_KANBAN_TASKS = [];
  return;
}

// LEGACY P95-F8 — renderKanban() stub no-op (DOM #kanban-body retirado).
// Eliminar tras 2 semanas (2026-04-21). Reemplazado por kg_renderKanban.
function renderKanban(tasks) { return; }

async function moveKanbanTask(id, newCol) {
  try {
    const res = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas/' + id + '/mover?columna=' + encodeURIComponent(newCol), {method:'PUT'});
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Error moviendo tarea');
    showToast('Tarea movida a ' + newCol);
    loadKanban();
  } catch(e) { showToast('❌ ' + e.message); }
}

async function deleteKanbanTarea(id, titulo) {
  if (!confirm('¿Eliminar tarea "' + titulo + '"?')) return;
  try {
    const res = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas/' + id, {method:'DELETE'});
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Error eliminando');
    showToast('Tarea eliminada');
    loadKanban();
  } catch(e) { showToast('❌ ' + e.message); }
}

// ── Kanban Form ──
function openKanbanForm(defaultCol) {
  _kbEditMode = false;
  document.getElementById('kb-form-title').textContent = 'Nueva Tarea Kanban';
  document.getElementById('kb-btn-save-text').textContent = 'Crear Tarea';
  document.getElementById('kb-edit-id').value = '';
  document.getElementById('kb-titulo').value = '';
  document.getElementById('kb-descripcion').value = '';
  document.getElementById('kb-tipo').value = 'RUN';
  document.getElementById('kb-prioridad').value = 'Media';
  document.getElementById('kb-columna').value = defaultCol || 'Backlog';
  document.getElementById('kb-tecnico').value = '';
  document.getElementById('kb-proyecto').value = '';
  document.getElementById('kb-incidencia').value = '';
  document.getElementById('kb-horas-est').value = '0';
  document.getElementById('kb-horas-real').value = '0';
  document.getElementById('kb-bloqueador').value = '';
  document.getElementById('kb-fechas-info').style.display = 'none';
  populateKanbanSelects();
  document.getElementById('fm-kanban').classList.add('open');
}

function openKanbanEdit(id) {
  const t = ALL_KANBAN_TASKS.find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!t) return;
  _kbEditMode = true;
  document.getElementById('kb-form-title').textContent = 'Editar Tarea: ' + t.id;
  document.getElementById('kb-btn-save-text').textContent = 'Guardar Cambios';
  document.getElementById('kb-edit-id').value = t.id;
  document.getElementById('kb-titulo').value = t.titulo || '';
  document.getElementById('kb-descripcion').value = t.descripcion || '';
  document.getElementById('kb-tipo').value = t.tipo || 'RUN';
  document.getElementById('kb-prioridad').value = t.prioridad || 'Media';
  document.getElementById('kb-columna').value = t.columna || 'Backlog';
  document.getElementById('kb-horas-est').value = t.horas_estimadas || 0;
  document.getElementById('kb-horas-real').value = t.horas_reales || 0;
  document.getElementById('kb-bloqueador').value = t.bloqueador || '';
  populateKanbanSelects();
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.getElementById('kb-tecnico').value = t.id_tecnico || '';
    document.getElementById('kb-proyecto').value = t.id_proyecto || '';
    document.getElementById('kb-incidencia').value = t.id_incidencia || '';
  }, 50);
  // Show dates
  const fi = document.getElementById('kb-fechas-info');
  fi.style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('kb-f-creacion').textContent = t.fecha_creacion ? new Date(t.fecha_creacion).toLocaleString('es-ES') : '--';
  document.getElementById('kb-f-ejecucion').textContent = t.fecha_inicio_ejecucion ? new Date(t.fecha_inicio_ejecucion).toLocaleString('es-ES') : 'Pendiente';
  document.getElementById('kb-f-cierre').textContent = t.fecha_cierre ? new Date(t.fecha_cierre).toLocaleString('es-ES') : 'Pendiente';
  document.getElementById('fm-kanban').classList.add('open');
}

function closeKanbanForm() {
  document.getElementById('fm-kanban').classList.remove('open');
}

async function populateKanbanSelects() {
  // Technicians
  const tecSelect = document.getElementById('kb-tecnico');
  if (tecSelect.options.length <= 1) {
    try {
      const r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/team/tecnicos');
      const data = await r.json();
      data.forEach(t => {
        const opt = document.createElement('option');
        opt.value = t.id_recurso;
        opt.textContent = t.id_recurso + ' — ' + t.nombre + ' (' + t.nivel + ' ' + t.silo_especialidad + ')';
        tecSelect.appendChild(opt);
      });
    } catch(e) {}
  }
  // Projects
  const projSelect = document.getElementById('kb-proyecto');
  if (projSelect.options.length <= 1) {
    try {
      const r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/cartera/proyectos');
      const data = await r.json();
      data.forEach(p => {
        const opt = document.createElement('option');
        opt.value = p.id_proyecto;
        opt.textContent = p.id_proyecto + ' — ' + (p.nombre_proyecto||'').substring(0,50);
        projSelect.appendChild(opt);
      });
    } catch(e) {}
  }
  // Incidents
  const incSelect = document.getElementById('kb-incidencia');
  if (incSelect.options.length <= 1) {
    try {
      const r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas');
      // Try fetching incidents from the incidents endpoint if available
    } catch(e) {}
  }
}

async function saveKanbanTarea() {
  const titulo = document.getElementById('kb-titulo').value.trim();
  if (!titulo) { showToast('El título es obligatorio'); return; }
  const payload = {
    titulo,
    descripcion: document.getElementById('kb-descripcion').value.trim() || null,
    tipo: document.getElementById('kb-tipo').value,
    prioridad: document.getElementById('kb-prioridad').value,
    columna: document.getElementById('kb-columna').value,
    id_tecnico: document.getElementById('kb-tecnico').value || null,
    id_proyecto: document.getElementById('kb-proyecto').value || null,
    id_incidencia: document.getElementById('kb-incidencia').value || null,
    horas_estimadas: parseFloat(document.getElementById('kb-horas-est').value) || 0,
    horas_reales: parseFloat(document.getElementById('kb-horas-real').value) || 0,
    bloqueador: document.getElementById('kb-bloqueador').value.trim() || null,
  };
  const editId = document.getElementById('kb-edit-id').value;
  try {
    const url = _kbEditMode ? API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas/' + editId : API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas';
    const method = _kbEditMode ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
    const res = await authFetch(url, {method, headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    if (!res.ok) { const err = await res.json().catch(()=>{}); throw new Error(err?.detail || 'Error'); }
    showToast(_kbEditMode ? 'Tarea actualizada' : 'Tarea creada');
    closeKanbanForm();
    loadKanban();
  } catch(e) { showToast('❌ ' + e.message); }
}

// LEGACY P95-F8 — toggleKanbanMetrics() stub no-op (DOM #kanban-metrics-area retirado).
function toggleKanbanMetrics() { return; }

// LEGACY P95-F8 — loadKanbanMetrics() stub no-op (DOM #kb-kpis/#cfd-chart retirado).
// Eliminar tras 2 semanas (2026-04-21). Reemplazado por kg_loadFlowMetrics.
async function loadKanbanMetrics() { return; }

function renderKanbanKPIs(m) {
  const kpis = document.getElementById('kb-kpis');
  if (!kpis) return; // LEGACY P95-F8: DOM retirado
  const throughput = m.throughput && m.throughput.length ? m.throughput[0].completadas : 0;
  kpis.innerHTML = `
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue);">${m.total||0}</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">Total Tareas</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--green);">${m.completadas||0}</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">Completadas</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--orange);">${throughput}</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">Throughput/Sem</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--yellow);">${m.avg_lead_time_h||0}h</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">Avg Lead Time</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--purple);">${m.avg_cycle_time_h||0}h</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">Avg Cycle Time</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:${(m.flow_efficiency||0)>50?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'};">${m.flow_efficiency||0}%</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">Flow Efficiency</div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function renderCFDChart(cfd) {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('kb-cfd-chart');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const w = canvas.parentElement.clientWidth - 24;
  const h = 160;
  canvas.width = w; canvas.height = h;
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
  if (!cfd.length) { ctx.fillStyle='#484f58'; ctx.font='12px Inter'; ctx.fillText('Sin datos CFD',w/2-40,h/2); return; }
  const cols = ['completado','despliegue','testing','code_review','en_progreso','analisis','backlog','bloqueado'];
  const colors = ['#3fb950','#f778ba','#a5b4fc','#3fb950','#f0883e','#2d7ef7','#8b949e','#f85149'];
  const maxVal = Math.max(1,...cfd.map(d => cols.reduce((s,c)=>s+(d[c]||0),0)));
  const padding = {left:30,right:10,top:10,bottom:20};
  const chartW = w - padding.left - padding.right;
  const chartH = h - padding.top - padding.bottom;
  const stepX = chartW / Math.max(1, cfd.length-1);
  // Draw grid
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#30363d'; ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
  for (let i=0; i<=4; i++) {
    const y = padding.top + (chartH/4)*i;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(padding.left,y); ctx.lineTo(w-padding.right,y); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle='#484f58'; ctx.font='9px JetBrains Mono'; ctx.fillText(Math.round(maxVal*(1-i/4)),2,y+3);
  }
  // Draw stacked areas
  cols.forEach((col, ci) => {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(padding.left, padding.top + chartH);
    cfd.forEach((d, i) => {
      let cumul = 0;
      for (let j=0; j<=ci; j++) cumul += (d[cols[j]]||0);
      const x = padding.left + i*stepX;
      const y = padding.top + chartH - (cumul/maxVal)*chartH;
      if (i===0) ctx.moveTo(x, y); else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    });
    // Close path
    for (let i=cfd.length-1; i>=0; i--) {
      let cumul = 0;
      for (let j=0; j<ci; j++) cumul += (cfd[i][cols[j]]||0);
      const x = padding.left + i*stepX;
      const y = padding.top + chartH - (cumul/maxVal)*chartH;
      ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    }
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fillStyle = colors[ci] + '55';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = colors[ci];
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    ctx.stroke();
  });
  // X-axis labels
  ctx.fillStyle='#484f58'; ctx.font='8px JetBrains Mono';
  cfd.forEach((d,i) => {
    if (i % Math.max(1,Math.floor(cfd.length/6))===0) {
      const x = padding.left + i*stepX;
      const date = new Date(d.fecha);
      ctx.fillText(date.getDate()+'/'+(date.getMonth()+1), x-8, h-4);
    }
  });
}

function renderControlChart(leadTimes) {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('kb-control-chart');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const w = canvas.parentElement.clientWidth - 24;
  const h = 160;
  canvas.width = w; canvas.height = h;
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
  if (!leadTimes.length) { ctx.fillStyle='#484f58'; ctx.font='12px Inter'; ctx.fillText('Sin datos de Lead Time',w/2-60,h/2); return; }
  const data = leadTimes.map(d => d.lead_time_h || 0).reverse();
  const maxVal = Math.max(1,...data) * 1.2;
  const avg = data.reduce((s,v)=>s+v,0) / data.length;
  const stdDev = Math.sqrt(data.reduce((s,v)=>s+Math.pow(v-avg,2),0)/data.length);
  const ucl = avg + 2*stdDev;
  const lcl = Math.max(0, avg - 2*stdDev);
  const padding = {left:35,right:10,top:10,bottom:20};
  const chartW = w - padding.left - padding.right;
  const chartH = h - padding.top - padding.bottom;
  const stepX = chartW / Math.max(1, data.length-1);
  // Grid
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#30363d'; ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
  for (let i=0; i<=4; i++) {
    const y = padding.top + (chartH/4)*i;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(padding.left,y); ctx.lineTo(w-padding.right,y); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle='#484f58'; ctx.font='9px JetBrains Mono'; ctx.fillText(Math.round(maxVal*(1-i/4))+'h',2,y+3);
  }
  // UCL line
  const uclY = padding.top + chartH - (ucl/maxVal)*chartH;
  ctx.strokeStyle='#f8514966'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.setLineDash([4,4]);
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(padding.left,uclY); ctx.lineTo(w-padding.right,uclY); ctx.stroke();
  ctx.fillStyle='#f85149'; ctx.font='8px JetBrains Mono'; ctx.fillText('UCL '+Math.round(ucl)+'h',w-padding.right-40,uclY-3);
  // Average line
  const avgY = padding.top + chartH - (avg/maxVal)*chartH;
  ctx.strokeStyle='#2d7ef766'; ctx.setLineDash([4,4]);
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(padding.left,avgY); ctx.lineTo(w-padding.right,avgY); ctx.stroke();
  ctx.fillStyle='#2d7ef7'; ctx.fillText('AVG '+Math.round(avg)+'h',w-padding.right-40,avgY-3);
  ctx.setLineDash([]);
  // LCL line
  if (lcl > 0) {
    const lclY = padding.top + chartH - (lcl/maxVal)*chartH;
    ctx.strokeStyle='#3fb95066'; ctx.setLineDash([4,4]);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(padding.left,lclY); ctx.lineTo(w-padding.right,lclY); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.setLineDash([]);
  }
  // Data points
  data.forEach((v,i) => {
    const x = padding.left + i*stepX;
    const y = padding.top + chartH - (v/maxVal)*chartH;
    // Line
    if (i > 0) {
      const px = padding.left + (i-1)*stepX;
      const py = padding.top + chartH - (data[i-1]/maxVal)*chartH;
      ctx.strokeStyle = v > ucl ? '#f85149' : '#a5b4fc';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(px,py); ctx.lineTo(x,y); ctx.stroke();
    }
    // Dot
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle = v > ucl ? '#f85149' : v > avg ? '#f0883e' : '#3fb950';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#0d1117'; ctx.lineWidth = 1; ctx.stroke();
  });
}

// ── AGENT CALL (Claude native agents via /agents/ endpoints) ──
var AGENT_ID_MAP = {'AG1':'AG-001','AG2':'AG-002','AG3':'AG-003','AG4':'AG-004','AG5':'AG-005','AG6':'AG-006','AG7':'AG-007'};
async function callFlowise(agentId, question) {
  var nativeId = AGENT_ID_MAP[agentId] || agentId;
  var msg = typeof question === 'string' ? question : JSON.stringify(question, null, 2);
  var resp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/' + nativeId + '/invoke', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    body: JSON.stringify({message: msg, session_id: 'pipeline-' + Date.now()})
  });
  if (!resp.ok) {
    var err = await resp.json().catch(function(){return {detail:'Error desconocido'};});
    throw new Error(err.detail || 'HTTP ' + resp.status);
  }
  var data = await resp.json();
  return {text: data.response, agent_id: data.agent_id};
}

  AG3:`<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:40px;height:40px;color:#f97316;"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="55" width="8" height="20" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="42" y="45" width="8" height="30" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="54" y="35" width="8" height="40" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M70 20 L65 40 H75 L70 60 L85 35 H75 Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>`,

  AG5:`<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:40px;height:40px;color:#10b981;"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M30 75 H70 L50 30 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="50" cy="20" r="5" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M40 55 H60 M45 45 H55" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/></svg>`,
  AG6:`<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:40px;height:40px;color:#eab308;"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="30" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="50" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="55" y="30" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="55" y="50" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="75" cy="75" r="5" fill="currentColor"/></svg>`,

  {id:'AG1',name:'Dispatcher',sub:'Triaje NLP · Entrada RUN',color:'#3b82f6'},

];

// ── MARKDOWN RENDERER ──
let _mermaidReady = false;
function loadMermaid() {
  if (_mermaidReady || document.getElementById('mermaid-script')) return;
  const s = document.createElement('script');
  s.id = 'mermaid-script';
  s.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@10/dist/mermaid.min.js';
  s.onload = () => {
    mermaid.initialize({startOnLoad:false, theme:'dark', themeVariables:{primaryColor:'#10b981',primaryTextColor:'#e6edf3',primaryBorderColor:'#30363d',lineColor:'#484f58',secondaryColor:'#1c2333',tertiaryColor:'#21262d',fontFamily:'Inter,sans-serif'}});
    _mermaidReady = true;
    // Render any pending
    document.querySelectorAll('.mermaid-pending').forEach(renderMermaidEl);
  };
  document.head.appendChild(s);
}
loadMermaid();

async function renderMermaidEl(el) {
  if (!_mermaidReady) { el.classList.add('mermaid-pending'); return; }
  el.classList.remove('mermaid-pending');
  const code = el.getAttribute('data-mermaid');
  if (!code) return;
  const id = 'mmd-' + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8);
  try {
    const {svg} = await mermaid.render(id, code);
    el.innerHTML = svg;
    el.style.background = 'var(--bg3)';
    el.style.borderRadius = '8px';
    el.style.padding = '12px';
    el.style.overflow = 'auto';
    // Make SVG responsive
    const svgEl = el.querySelector('svg');
    if (svgEl) { svgEl.style.maxWidth = '100%'; svgEl.style.height = 'auto'; }
  } catch(e) {
    el.innerHTML = '<pre style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;">Mermaid render error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</pre><pre style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(code)+'</pre>';
  }
}

function fmtMd(t) {
  if(!t) return '';
  // Extract mermaid blocks BEFORE escaping
  const mermaidBlocks = [];
  let raw = t.replace(/```mermaid\n?([\s\S]*?)```/gi, (match, code) => {
    const idx = mermaidBlocks.length;
    mermaidBlocks.push(code.trim());
    return '%%MERMAID_' + idx + '%%';
  });
  let h = escHtml(raw);
  h = h.replace(/```[\w]*\n?([\s\S]*?)```/g,'<pre>$1</pre>');
  h = h.replace(/`([^`\n]+)`/g,'<code>$1</code>');
  h = h.replace(/^#{1,3} (.+)$/gm,'<h3>$1</h3>');
  h = h.replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g,'<strong>$1</strong>');
  h = h.replace(/^---+$/gm,'<hr>');
  h = h.replace(/^[•\-\*] (.+)$/gm,'<li>$1</li>');
  h = h.replace(/(<li>[\s\S]*?<\/li>\n?)+/g,'<ul>$&</ul>');
  h = h.replace(/^\d+\. (.+)$/gm,'<li>$1</li>');
  h = h.replace(/\n\n+/g,'</p><p>').replace(/\n/g,'<br>');
  // Replace mermaid placeholders with render containers
  mermaidBlocks.forEach((code, i) => {
    const safeCode = code.replace(/"/g,'&quot;');
    h = h.replace('%%MERMAID_' + i + '%%',
      `<div class="mermaid-container mermaid-pending" data-mermaid="${safeCode}" style="margin:10px 0;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;background:var(--bg3);min-height:60px;">
        <div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;padding:8px;">
          <span class="loading-spinner"></span> Renderizando diagrama Gantt...
        </div>
      </div>`);
  });
  // Trigger mermaid rendering after DOM update
  if (mermaidBlocks.length > 0) {
    setTimeout(() => {
      document.querySelectorAll('.mermaid-pending').forEach(renderMermaidEl);
    }, 100);
  }
  return '<p>'+h+'</p>';
}

// ── JSON SYNTAX ──
function syntaxJson(json) {
  if(typeof json!=='string') json=JSON.stringify(json,null,2);
  return escHtml(json).replace(/("(\\u[a-zA-Z0-9]{4}|\\[^u]|[^\\"])*"(\s*:)?|\b(true|false|null)\b|-?\d+(?:\.\d*)?(?:[eE][+\-]?\d+)?)/g,m=>{
    let c='color:#f0883e';
    if(/^"/.test(m)){if(/:$/.test(m))c='color:#79c0ff';else c='color:#a5d6ff';}
    else if(/true|false/.test(m))c='color:#3fb950';
    else if(/null/.test(m))c='color:#8b949e';
    return `<span style="${c}">${m}</span>`;
  });
}

function toggleJson(id) {
  const pre=document.getElementById(id);
  const btn=pre.previousElementSibling;
  pre.classList.toggle('open');
  btn.classList.toggle('open');
}

// ── PIPELINE EXECUTION ──
let pipelineHistory = {run:[], build:[]};

// ── ITSM INCIDENT FORM ──
let _itsmCatalog = [];

async function loadItsmCatalog() {
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/catalogo/incidencias');
    _itsmCatalog = await r.json();
    const sel = document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo');
    if (!sel || sel.options.length > 1) return;
    // Group by area
    const byArea = {};
    _itsmCatalog.forEach(c => {
      const area = c.area_afectada || 'Otros';
      if (!byArea[area]) byArea[area] = [];
      byArea[area].push(c);
    });
    Object.entries(byArea).sort().forEach(([area, items]) => {
      const grp = document.createElement('optgroup');
      grp.label = '── ' + area + ' ──';
      items.forEach(c => {
        const opt = document.createElement('option');
        opt.value = c.id_catalogo;
        opt.textContent = c.incidencia;
        opt.dataset.prio = c.prioridad_sugerida;
        opt.dataset.comp = c.complejidad;
        opt.dataset.sla = c.sla_objetivo_horas;
        opt.dataset.nivel = c.nivel_minimo;
        opt.dataset.area = c.area_afectada;
        opt.dataset.skills = c.total_skills_requeridas;
        grp.appendChild(opt);
      });
      sel.appendChild(grp);
    });
  } catch(e) { console.warn('ITSM catalog error:', e); }
}

function itsmCatalogoChanged() {
  const sel = document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo');
  const opt = sel.selectedOptions[0];
  const bar = document.getElementById('itsm-info-bar');
  if (!opt || !opt.value) { bar.style.display = 'none'; return; }
  bar.style.display = 'block';
  const prio = opt.dataset.prio || 'P3';
  const prioColors = {P1:'var(--red)',P2:'var(--orange)',P3:'var(--yellow)',P4:'var(--green)'};
  document.getElementById('itsm-complejidad').textContent = opt.dataset.comp || '—';
  document.getElementById('itsm-complejidad').style.color = opt.dataset.comp==='Compleja'?'var(--red)':opt.dataset.comp==='Media'?'var(--yellow)':'var(--green)';
  document.getElementById('itsm-area-auto').textContent = opt.dataset.area || '—';
  document.getElementById('itsm-sla-obj').textContent = (opt.dataset.sla||'—') + 'h';
  document.getElementById('itsm-sla-obj').style.color = parseFloat(opt.dataset.sla)<=4?'var(--red)':'var(--text)';
  document.getElementById('itsm-nivel-min').textContent = opt.dataset.nivel || '—';
  document.getElementById('itsm-skills-count').textContent = opt.dataset.skills || '—';
  document.getElementById('itsm-prio-sugerida').textContent = prio;
  document.getElementById('itsm-prio-sugerida').style.color = prioColors[prio] || 'var(--text)';
  // Auto-set SLA and priority
  document.getElementById('itsm-sla').value = opt.dataset.sla || 24;
  // Map catalog priority to impact/urgency
  const pmap = {P1:['Crítico','Crítica'],P2:['Alto','Alta'],P3:['Medio','Media'],P4:['Bajo','Baja']};
  const [imp, urg] = pmap[prio] || ['Medio','Media'];
  document.getElementById('itsm-impacto').value = imp;
  document.getElementById('itsm-urgencia').value = urg;
  itsmCalcPriority();
  // Auto-fill description with incident name
  const desc = document.getElementById('run-input');
  if (!desc.value.trim()) desc.value = opt.textContent;
}

function itsmCalcPriority() {
  const impMap = {Crítico:1,Alto:2,Medio:3,Bajo:4};
  const urgMap = {Crítica:1,Alta:2,Media:3,Baja:4};
  const imp = impMap[document.getElementById('itsm-impacto').value] || 3;
  const urg = urgMap[document.getElementById('itsm-urgencia').value] || 3;
  // ITIL 4 Priority Matrix: Impact × Urgency
  const matrix = {
    '1,1':'P1','1,2':'P1','1,3':'P2','1,4':'P3',
    '2,1':'P1','2,2':'P2','2,3':'P3','2,4':'P3',
    '3,1':'P2','3,2':'P3','3,3':'P3','3,4':'P4',
    '4,1':'P3','4,2':'P3','4,3':'P4','4,4':'P4',
  };
  const prio = matrix[imp+','+urg] || 'P3';
  const el = document.getElementById('itsm-prio-calc');
  el.textContent = prio;
  const colors = {P1:'var(--red)',P2:'var(--orange)',P3:'var(--yellow)',P4:'var(--green)'};
  el.style.color = colors[prio];
  el.style.borderColor = colors[prio];
  // Update SLA based on priority
  const slaMap = {P1:4,P2:8,P3:24,P4:72};
  const slaEl = document.getElementById('itsm-sla');
  if (slaEl && !document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo').value) slaEl.value = slaMap[prio];
}

async function itsmSubmitAndPipeline() {
  const desc = document.getElementById('run-input').value.trim();
  if (!desc) { document.getElementById('run-input').focus(); showToast('Describe la incidencia'); return; }
  const prio = document.getElementById('itsm-prio-calc').textContent || 'P3';
  const catVal = document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo').value;
  const catOpt = document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo').selectedOptions[0];
  // Register incident in DB
  const payload = {
    id_catalogo: catVal ? parseInt(catVal) : null,
    descripcion: desc,
    prioridad: prio,
    categoria: catOpt && catOpt.value ? catOpt.textContent : null,
    area_afectada: document.getElementById('itsm-area-auto')?.textContent || null,
    urgencia: document.getElementById('itsm-urgencia').value,
    impacto: document.getElementById('itsm-impacto').value,
    sla_limite: parseFloat(document.getElementById('itsm-sla').value) || null,
    impacto_negocio: document.getElementById('itsm-impacto-neg').value || null,
    canal_entrada: document.getElementById('itsm-canal').value,
    reportado_por: document.getElementById('itsm-reporter').value.trim() || null,
    servicio_afectado: document.getElementById('itsm-servicio').value || null,
    ci_afectado: document.getElementById('itsm-ci').value.trim() || null,
  };
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/incidencias', {
      method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(payload)
    });
    const result = await r.json();
    const ticketId = result.ticket_id || 'INC-????';
    document.getElementById('itsm-ticket-id').textContent = ticketId;
    showToast('Incidencia ' + ticketId + ' registrada (' + prio + ')');
    // Save to buffer
    runSaveToBuffer({
      'itsm-desc': desc, 'itsm-prio': prio, 'itsm-catalogo': payload.id_catalogo||'',
      'itsm-canal': payload.canal_entrada, 'itsm-impacto': payload.impacto,
      'itsm-urgencia': payload.urgencia, 'itsm-sla': String(payload.sla_limite||24),
      'itsm-servicio': payload.servicio_afectado||'', 'itsm-reporter': payload.reportado_por||'',
      'itsm-ci': payload.ci_afectado||'', 'itsm-impacto-neg': payload.impacto_negocio||'',
      'itsm-area': payload.area_afectada||'', 'run-input': desc, 'ticket-id': ticketId,
    });
    // Now build enriched text for pipeline
    const enrichedText = `[${ticketId}] ${prio} | ${desc}
Impacto: ${payload.impacto} | Urgencia: ${payload.urgencia} | SLA: ${payload.sla_limite}h
Servicio: ${payload.servicio_afectado||'N/A'} | CI: ${payload.ci_afectado||'N/A'} | Canal: ${payload.canal_entrada}
${payload.impacto_negocio ? 'Impacto Negocio: '+payload.impacto_negocio : ''}
${payload.categoria ? 'Catálogo: '+payload.categoria : ''}`;
    document.getElementById('run-input').value = enrichedText;
    executePipeline('run');
  } catch(e) {
    showToast('Error registrando: '+e.message);
  }
}

// ── BUILD FORM (PMBOK 7) ──
let _buildBuffer = [];

async function buildSaveToBuffer(data) {
  const nombre = data['bf-nombre'] || 'Sin nombre';
  const payload = {
    id_proyecto: null,
    nombre: nombre,
    presupuesto: parseFloat(data['bf-presupuesto']) || 0,
    duracion_semanas: parseInt(data['bf-duracion']) || 20,
    prioridad: data['bf-prioridad'] || 'Media',
    plan_data: {...data},
  };
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/build/plans', {
      method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify(payload)
    });
    if (r.ok) {
      await loadBuildPlansFromDB();
      return;
    }
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Error saving plan:', e); }
  // Fallback to memory
  const entry = {
    id: 'BLD-' + Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase(),
    nombre, presupuesto: data['bf-presupuesto'] || '0',
    prioridad: data['bf-prioridad'] || 'Media',
    timestamp: new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES'), fields: {...data},
  };
  _buildBuffer.unshift(entry);
  renderBuildBuffer();
}

function renderBuildBuffer() {
  const list = document.getElementById('build-buffer-list');
  document.getElementById('build-buffer-count').textContent = '(' + _buildBuffer.length + ')';
  if (!_buildBuffer.length) {
    list.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;padding:8px;">Sin proyectos registrados</div>';
    return;
  }
  const prioColors = {Crítica:'var(--red)',Alta:'var(--orange)',Media:'var(--yellow)',Baja:'var(--green)'};
  list.innerHTML = _buildBuffer.map((b, i) => `
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:6px;border-left:3px solid ${prioColors[b.prioridad]||'var(--text3)'};">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${escHtml(b.nombre)}</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:2px;">
            <span>${b.timestamp}</span>
            <span style="color:${prioColors[b.prioridad]||'var(--text3)'};">${b.prioridad}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0;">
          <button onclick="buildRestoreFromBuffer(${i})" style="background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.3);color:var(--blue);border-radius:4px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Restaurar</button>
          <button onclick="buildRerunFromBuffer(${i})" style="background:var(--green-bg);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.3);color:var(--green);border-radius:4px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Re-ejecutar</button>
          <button onclick="buildDeletePlan(${i})" style="background:none;border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--red);border-radius:4px;padding:3px 6px;font-size:9px;cursor:pointer;opacity:0.5;">✕</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
}

function buildRestoreFromBuffer(idx) {
  var entry = _buildBuffer[idx];
  if (!entry) return;
  var fields = entry.fields || {};
  // Try to extract data from plan_data structure (DB plans) or direct fields
  var nombre = fields['bf-nombre'] || entry.nombre || '';
  var resumen = fields['bf-resumen'] || '';
  var presupuesto = fields['bf-presupuesto'] || entry.presupuesto || '';
  var prioridad = fields['bf-prioridad'] || entry.prioridad || 'Media';
  var justificacion = fields['bf-justificacion'] || '';
  var fechaFin = fields['bf-fecha-fin'] || '';

  // If plan_data has structured data (from pipeline result), extract from it
  if (fields.acta_constitucion) {
    if (!resumen && fields.acta_constitucion.descripcion_alto_nivel) resumen = fields.acta_constitucion.descripcion_alto_nivel;
  }
  if (fields.alcance && !justificacion) justificacion = fields.alcance.alcance_producto || '';
  if (fields.meta_negocio) {
    if (!presupuesto && fields.meta_negocio.presupuesto_propuesto) presupuesto = fields.meta_negocio.presupuesto_propuesto;
    if (!prioridad && fields.meta_negocio.prioridad) prioridad = fields.meta_negocio.prioridad;
  }

  var el;
  el = document.getElementById('bf-nombre'); if (el) el.value = nombre;
  el = document.getElementById('bf-resumen'); if (el) el.value = resumen;
  el = document.getElementById('bf-presupuesto'); if (el) el.value = presupuesto;
  el = document.getElementById('bf-fecha-fin'); if (el) el.value = fechaFin;
  el = document.getElementById('bf-prioridad'); if (el) el.value = prioridad;
  el = document.getElementById('bf-justificacion'); if (el) el.value = justificacion;

  // Scroll to form
  var nombreEl = document.getElementById('bf-nombre');
  if (nombreEl) nombreEl.scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center'});

  // Flash green
  if (nombreEl) {
    var container = nombreEl.closest('div[style]');
    if (container) { container.style.boxShadow = '0 0 20px rgba(34,197,94,0.3)'; setTimeout(function() { container.style.boxShadow = ''; }, 2000); }
  }
  showToast('Proyecto "' + (nombre || entry.nombre || '').substring(0, 40) + '" restaurado en el formulario');
}

function buildRerunFromBuffer(idx) {
  // Restore fields first
  buildRestoreFromBuffer(idx);
  // Then launch pipeline after a short delay
  setTimeout(function() {
    buildSubmitAndPipeline();
  }, 300);
}

function buildDownloadPDF(idx) {
  const entry = _buildBuffer[idx];
  if (!entry || !entry.fields) return;
  const f = entry.fields;
  // Build HTML document for PDF
  const html = `<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><title>Plan de Proyecto — ${f['bf-nombre']||'Proyecto'}</title>
<style>body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;padding:40px;color:#222;font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;}
h1{color:#059669;border-bottom:3px solid #059669;padding-bottom:10px;font-size:22px;}
h2{color:#0369a1;margin-top:30px;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;padding-bottom:5px;font-size:16px;}
h3{color:#92400e;font-size:14px;}
.meta{background:#f0fdf4;border:1px solid #bbf7d0;border-radius:8px;padding:15px;margin:15px 0;display:flex;gap:30px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.meta-item{text-align:center;}.meta-val{font-size:20px;font-weight:bold;color:#059669;}.meta-label{font-size:10px;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;}
pre{background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;padding:12px;font-size:12px;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.5;}
.footer{margin-top:40px;border-top:2px solid #059669;padding-top:10px;font-size:10px;color:#888;text-align:center;}
table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:10px 0;}th{background:#f1f5f9;text-align:left;padding:6px 10px;font-size:11px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;}
td{padding:6px 10px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:12px;}</style></head><body>
<h1>Plan de Proyecto PMBOK 7</h1>
<h2 style="color:#059669;font-size:20px;">${f['bf-nombre']||''}</h2>
<div class="meta">
<div class="meta-item"><div class="meta-val">${Number(f['bf-presupuesto']||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')}€</div><div class="meta-label">Presupuesto</div></div>
<div class="meta-item"><div class="meta-val">${f['bf-duracion']||'—'} sem</div><div class="meta-label">Duración</div></div>
<div class="meta-item"><div class="meta-val">${f['bf-prioridad']||'—'}</div><div class="meta-label">Prioridad</div></div>
<div class="meta-item"><div class="meta-val">${f['bf-horas']||'—'}h</div><div class="meta-label">Horas Est.</div></div>
<div class="meta-item"><div class="meta-val">${f['bf-contingencia']||'15'}%</div><div class="meta-label">Contingencia</div></div>
</div>
<p><strong>ID Registro:</strong> ${entry.id} | <strong>Fecha:</strong> ${entry.timestamp}</p>
<h2>PASO 1: Caso de Negocio (Business Case)</h2>
<h3>Resumen Ejecutivo</h3><pre>${f['bf-resumen']||'No definido'}</pre>
<h3>Justificación</h3><pre>${f['bf-justificacion']||'No definida'}</pre>
<h3>Beneficios Esperados</h3><pre>${f['bf-beneficios']||'No definidos'}</pre>
<h3>Contrabeneficios</h3><pre>${f['bf-contrabeneficios']||'No definidos'}</pre>
<h3>Evaluación Financiera</h3><p>${f['bf-financiero']||'No definida'}</p>
<h2>PASO 2: Acta de Constitución</h2>
