<h3>Descripción de Alto Nivel</h3><pre>${f['bf-descripcion']||'No definida'}</pre>
<h3>Objetivos SMART</h3><pre>${f['bf-objetivos']||'No definidos'}</pre>
<h3>Entregables Principales</h3><pre>${f['bf-entregables']||'No definidos'}</pre>
<h3>Hitos del Proyecto</h3><pre>${f['bf-hitos']||'No definidos'}</pre>
<p><strong>Patrocinador:</strong> ${f['bf-sponsor']||'No definido'}</p>
<p><strong>Criterios de Éxito:</strong> ${f['bf-criterios']||'No definidos'}</p>
<h2>PASO 3: Alcance y EDT</h2>
<h3>Alcance del Producto</h3><pre>${f['bf-alcance']||'No definido'}</pre>
<h3>Exclusiones</h3><pre>${f['bf-exclusiones']||'No definidas'}</pre>
<h3>Restricciones</h3><pre>${f['bf-restricciones']||'No definidas'}</pre>
<h3>EDT / WBS</h3><pre>${f['bf-edt']||'No definida'}</pre>
<h3>Asunciones</h3><pre>${f['bf-asunciones']||'No definidas'}</pre>
<h2>PASO 4: Riesgos y Costes</h2>
<h3>Registro de Riesgos</h3><pre>${f['bf-riesgos']||'No definidos'}</pre>
<h3>Desglose de Costes</h3>
<table><tr><th>Concepto</th><th>Importe</th></tr>
<tr><td>CAPEX (Hardware, Infra)</td><td>${Number(f['bf-capex']||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')}€</td></tr>
<tr><td>OPEX (Licencias, SW)</td><td>${Number(f['bf-opex']||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')}€</td></tr>
<tr><td>Personal Interno (${f['bf-horas']||0}h @ ${f['bf-tarifa']||65}€/h)</td><td>${Number(f['bf-personal']||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')}€</td></tr>
<tr><td>Servicios Externos</td><td>${Number(f['bf-servicios']||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')}€</td></tr>
<tr style="font-weight:bold;background:#f0fdf4;"><td>Subtotal</td><td>${(Number(f['bf-capex']||0)+Number(f['bf-opex']||0)+Number(f['bf-personal']||0)+Number(f['bf-servicios']||0)).toLocaleString('es-ES')}€</td></tr>
<tr style="font-weight:bold;"><td>Contingencia (${f['bf-contingencia']||15}%)</td><td>${Math.round((Number(f['bf-capex']||0)+Number(f['bf-opex']||0)+Number(f['bf-personal']||0)+Number(f['bf-servicios']||0))*Number(f['bf-contingencia']||15)/100).toLocaleString('es-ES')}€</td></tr>
<tr style="font-weight:bold;background:#059669;color:white;"><td>PRESUPUESTO TOTAL</td><td>${Number(f['bf-presupuesto']||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')}€</td></tr>
</table>
<h2>PASO 5: Interesados y Calidad</h2>
<h3>Matriz de Interesados</h3><pre>${f['bf-interesados']||'No definidos'}</pre>
<p><strong>Estándares de Calidad:</strong> ${f['bf-calidad']||'No definidos'}</p>
<h3>Plan de Comunicaciones</h3><pre>${f['bf-comunicaciones']||'No definido'}</pre>
<div class="footer">
<p>Cognitive PMO — Plan de Proyecto PMBOK 7 · Generado el ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('es-ES')} · Jose Antonio Martinez Victoria</p>
<p>Master Universitario en Dirección Estratégica de Proyectos</p>
</div></body></html>`;
  // Open in new window for printing/PDF
  const w = window.open('', '_blank');
  w.document.write(html);
  w.document.close();
  w.onload = () => { setTimeout(() => w.print(), 500); };
}

async function buildDeletePlan(idx) {
  const entry = _buildBuffer[idx];
  if (!entry) return;
  const nombre = entry.nombre || 'Sin nombre';
  if (!confirm(`¿Eliminar el plan de proyecto?\n\n"${nombre}"\nID: ${entry.id}\n\nEsta acción no se puede deshacer.`)) return;
  if (entry.fromDB && entry.id) {
    try {
      const r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/build/plans/' + encodeURIComponent(entry.id), {method:'DELETE'});
      if (!r.ok) { showToast('Error eliminando plan'); return; }
    } catch(e) { showToast('Error: '+e.message); return; }
  }
  _buildBuffer.splice(idx, 1);
  renderBuildBuffer();
  showToast('Plan "' + nombre.substring(0,40) + '" eliminado');
}

function buildFormStep(n, el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.build-form-step').forEach(s => { s.classList.remove('active'); s.style.display = 'none'; });
  document.querySelectorAll('#build-form-nav .filter-chip').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
  const step = document.getElementById('bf-step-'+n);
  if (step) { step.style.display = 'block'; step.classList.add('active'); }
  if (el) el.classList.add('active');
}
function loadBuildPMSelect() {
  const sel = document.getElementById('bf-pm');
  if (!sel || sel.options.length > 1) return;
  authFetch(API_BASE + '/pmo/managers').then(r=>r.json()).then(pms => {
    pms.forEach(p => {
      const opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = p.id_pm;
      opt.textContent = p.id_pm + ' — ' + p.nombre + ' (' + p.nivel + ')';
      sel.appendChild(opt);
    });
  }).catch(()=>{});
}
setTimeout(() => {
  loadBuildPMSelect();
  loadBuildPlansFromDB();
  if (typeof loadBuildLive === 'function') loadBuildLive();
  if (typeof renderBuildCascadeIdle === 'function') renderBuildCascadeIdle();
}, 600);

async function loadBuildPlansFromDB() {
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/build/plans');
    const plans = await r.json();
    _buildBuffer = plans.map(p => {
      const d = typeof p.plan_data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(p.plan_data) : p.plan_data;
      return {
        id: p.id,
        nombre: p.nombre,
        presupuesto: p.presupuesto || d['bf-presupuesto'] || '0',
        prioridad: p.prioridad || d['bf-prioridad'] || 'Media',
        timestamp: p.created_at ? new Date(p.created_at).toLocaleString('es-ES') : '',
        fields: d,
        fromDB: true,
      };
    });
    renderBuildBuffer();
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Error loading build plans:', e); }
}

function buildCalcSemanas() {
  var fechaEl = document.getElementById('bf-fecha-fin');
  var infoEl = document.getElementById('bf-semanas-calc');
  if (!fechaEl || !fechaEl.value || !infoEl) return;
  var hoy = new Date();
  var fin = new Date(fechaEl.value);
  var diffMs = fin.getTime() - hoy.getTime();
  var semanas = Math.ceil(diffMs / (7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
  if (semanas <= 0) { infoEl.textContent = 'Fecha en el pasado'; infoEl.style.color = 'var(--red)'; }
  else { infoEl.textContent = '\u2248 ' + semanas + ' semanas desde hoy'; infoEl.style.color = 'var(--green)'; }
}

function buildUpdatePrioInfo() {
  var prioEl = document.getElementById('bf-prioridad');
  var infoEl = document.getElementById('bf-prio-info');
  if (!prioEl || !infoEl) return;
  var val = prioEl.value;
  if (val === 'Alta') { infoEl.innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--red);">Agentes intentan cumplir plazo y presupuesto propuestos</span>'; }
  else if (val === 'Media') { infoEl.innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--yellow);">Planificacion realista, desviacion es informativa</span>'; }
  else if (val === 'Baja') { infoEl.innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--green);">Planificacion optima, propuesta es solo referencia</span>'; }
  else { infoEl.textContent = 'Los agentes decidiran segun el contexto'; }
}

async function buildSubmitAndPipeline() {
  var nombreEl = document.getElementById('bf-nombre');
  var nombre = nombreEl ? nombreEl.value.trim() : '';
  if (!nombre) { if (nombreEl) nombreEl.focus(); showToast('El nombre del proyecto es obligatorio'); return; }
  var resumenEl = document.getElementById('bf-resumen');
  var resumen = resumenEl ? resumenEl.value.trim() : '';
  if (!resumen) { if (resumenEl) resumenEl.focus(); showToast('Describe que necesita negocio'); return; }
  var f = function(id) { var el = document.getElementById(id); return el ? (el.value || '').trim() : ''; };
  var duracionSemanas = null;
  var fechaFin = f('bf-fecha-fin');
  if (fechaFin) {
    var hoy = new Date(); var fin = new Date(fechaFin);
    var diffMs = fin.getTime() - hoy.getTime();
    duracionSemanas = Math.ceil(diffMs / (7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
    if (duracionSemanas <= 0) duracionSemanas = null;
  }
  var solicitud = {
    nombre: nombre, resumen: resumen,
    presupuesto_propuesto: f('bf-presupuesto') ? parseFloat(f('bf-presupuesto')) : null,
    fecha_fin_deseada: fechaFin || null,
    duracion_semanas_calculada: duracionSemanas,
    prioridad: f('bf-prioridad') || null,
    justificacion: f('bf-justificacion') || null,
    fecha_solicitud: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
    origen: 'negocio'
  };
  var buildInputEl = document.getElementById('build-input');
  if (buildInputEl) {
    buildInputEl.value = JSON.stringify(solicitud);
    buildInputEl.dataset.businessCaseJson = JSON.stringify(solicitud);
  }
  var projIdEl = document.getElementById('build-proj-id');
  if (projIdEl) projIdEl.textContent = nombre.substring(0, 30);
  showToast('Solicitud registrada \u2014 ejecutando pipeline IA con 9 agentes...');
  executePipeline('build');
}

// ── RUN BUFFER (persistent) ──
let _runBuffer = [];

async function loadRunPlansFromDB() {
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/run/plans');
    const plans = await r.json();
    _runBuffer = plans.map(p => {
      const d = typeof p.plan_data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(p.plan_data) : p.plan_data;
      return { id: p.id, nombre: p.nombre, prioridad: p.prioridad || 'P3', area: p.area || '', sla: p.sla_horas || 0, timestamp: p.created_at ? new Date(p.created_at).toLocaleString('es-ES') : '', fields: d, fromDB: true };
    });
    renderRunBuffer();
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Error loading run plans:', e); }
}

async function runSaveToBuffer(data) {
  const nombre = data['itsm-desc'] || data['run-input'] || 'Incidencia sin descripción';
  const payload = { nombre, prioridad: data['itsm-prio'] || 'P3', area: data['itsm-area'] || '', sla_horas: parseFloat(data['itsm-sla']) || null, plan_data: {...data} };
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/run/plans', { method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(payload) });
    if (r.ok) { await loadRunPlansFromDB(); return; }
  } catch(e) {}
  _runBuffer.unshift({ id:'RUN-'+Date.now().toString(36), nombre, prioridad:data['itsm-prio']||'P3', area:data['itsm-area']||'', sla:data['itsm-sla']||0, timestamp:new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES'), fields:{...data} });
  renderRunBuffer();
}

function renderRunBuffer() {
  const list = document.getElementById('run-buffer-list');
  document.getElementById('run-buffer-count').textContent = '(' + _runBuffer.length + ')';
  if (!_runBuffer.length) { list.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;padding:8px;">Sin incidencias registradas</div>'; return; }
  const prioColors = {P1:'var(--red)',P2:'var(--orange)',P3:'var(--yellow)',P4:'var(--green)'};
  list.innerHTML = _runBuffer.map((b, i) => `
    <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:6px;border-left:3px solid ${prioColors[b.prioridad]||'var(--text3)'};">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
        <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:${prioColors[b.prioridad]||'var(--text3)'};">${b.prioridad}</span>
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${escHtml(b.nombre)}</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:1px;">
            <span style="font-family:var(--mono);">${b.id}</span>
            <span>${b.area||''}</span>
            ${b.sla?`<span>SLA: ${b.sla}h</span>`:''}
            <span>${b.timestamp}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <button onclick="runRestoreFromBuffer(${i})" style="background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.3);color:var(--blue);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">↩ Restaurar</button>
        <button onclick="runRerunFromBuffer(${i})" style="background:var(--green-bg);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.3);color:var(--green);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">▶ Re-ejecutar</button>
        <button onclick="runDeletePlan(${i})" style="background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.3);color:var(--red);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;margin-left:auto;">✕ Eliminar</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
}

function runRestoreFromBuffer(idx) {
  const e = _runBuffer[idx];
  if (!e || !e.fields) return;
  const f = e.fields;
  if (f['itsm-catalogo']) document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo').value = f['itsm-catalogo'];
  if (f['itsm-canal']) document.getElementById('itsm-canal').value = f['itsm-canal'];
  if (f['itsm-impacto']) document.getElementById('itsm-impacto').value = f['itsm-impacto'];
  if (f['itsm-urgencia']) document.getElementById('itsm-urgencia').value = f['itsm-urgencia'];
  if (f['itsm-sla']) document.getElementById('itsm-sla').value = f['itsm-sla'];
  if (f['itsm-servicio']) document.getElementById('itsm-servicio').value = f['itsm-servicio'];
  if (f['itsm-reporter']) document.getElementById('itsm-reporter').value = f['itsm-reporter'];
  if (f['itsm-ci']) document.getElementById('itsm-ci').value = f['itsm-ci'];
  if (f['itsm-impacto-neg']) document.getElementById('itsm-impacto-neg').value = f['itsm-impacto-neg'];
  if (f['run-input']) document.getElementById('run-input').value = f['run-input'];
  itsmCalcPriority();
  if (f['itsm-catalogo']) itsmCatalogoChanged();
  showToast('Incidencia restaurada en el formulario');
}

function runRerunFromBuffer(idx) {
  runRestoreFromBuffer(idx);
  const desc = document.getElementById('run-input').value.trim();
  if (!desc) { showToast('Sin descripción para ejecutar'); return; }
  const prio = document.getElementById('itsm-prio-calc').textContent || 'P3';
  const enriched = `[RE-RUN ${_runBuffer[idx].id}] ${prio} | ${desc}`;
  document.getElementById('run-input').value = enriched;
  showToast('Re-ejecutando pipeline (sin duplicar registro)');
  executePipeline('run');
}

async function runDeletePlan(idx) {
  const e = _runBuffer[idx];
  if (!e) return;
  if (!confirm(`¿Eliminar la incidencia registrada?\n\n"${e.nombre.substring(0,60)}"\nID: ${e.id}\n\nEsta acción no se puede deshacer.`)) return;
  if (e.fromDB && e.id) {
    try { await authFetch(API_BASE + '/run/plans/' + encodeURIComponent(e.id), {method:'DELETE'}); } catch(ex) {}
  }
  _runBuffer.splice(idx, 1);
  renderRunBuffer();
  showToast('Incidencia eliminada');
}

// Load catalog + inject agent icons + run buffer + CMDB dropdown
setTimeout(() => {
  loadItsmCatalog();
  loadRunPlansFromDB();
  loadCmdbSelect('itsm-ci');
  loadCmdbSelect('bf-cmdb-activos', true);
  loadActiveIncidents();
  // Inject agent SVG icons into idle flow diagrams
  const runIconMap = {1:'AG1',2:'AG2',3:'AG3',4:'AG4'};
  const buildIconMap = {1:'AG5',2:'AG6',3:'AG7'};
  Object.entries(runIconMap).forEach(([n,agId]) => {
    const el = document.getElementById('run-flow-icon-'+n);
    if (el && AGENT_ICONS[agId]) el.innerHTML = AGENT_ICONS[agId].replace(/width:40px;height:40px/g,'width:30px;height:30px');
  });
  Object.entries(buildIconMap).forEach(([n,agId]) => {
    const el = document.getElementById('build-flow-icon-'+n);
    if (el && AGENT_ICONS[agId]) el.innerHTML = AGENT_ICONS[agId].replace(/width:40px;height:40px/g,'width:30px;height:30px');
  });
}, 300);

// ══════════════════ RUN DASHBOARD VISUAL ══════════════════
var _runSlaTimer = null;

async function executeRunPipeline(text) {
  window._currentLiveTicketId = null;
  var execBtn = document.getElementById('run-exec-btn');
  var statusEl = document.getElementById('run-status-val');
  if (execBtn) execBtn.disabled = true;
  if (statusEl) { statusEl.textContent = 'Running'; statusEl.style.color = 'var(--blue)'; }

  var area = document.getElementById('run-pipeline-area');
  var idleEl = document.getElementById('run-pipeline-idle');
  if (idleEl) idleEl.style.display = 'none';
  var oldSteps = document.getElementById('run-steps');
  if (oldSteps) oldSteps.remove();

  var dashboard = document.createElement('div');
  dashboard.className = 'run-dashboard';
  dashboard.id = 'run-steps';
  area.appendChild(dashboard);

  var pipeline = createAnimatedPipeline(['AG-001', 'AG-002', 'AG-004', 'AG-012']);
  dashboard.appendChild(pipeline);

  var slaArea = document.createElement('div');
  slaArea.id = 'run-sla-area';
  dashboard.appendChild(slaArea);

  var progressArea = document.createElement('div');
  progressArea.id = 'run-progress';
  dashboard.appendChild(progressArea);

  var logContainer = document.createElement('div');
  var logTitle = document.createElement('div');
  logTitle.className = 'build-section-title';
  logTitle.textContent = 'Panel de actividad';
  var logBox = document.createElement('div');
  logBox.className = 'build-log';
  logBox.id = 'run-live-log';
  logContainer.appendChild(logTitle);
  logContainer.appendChild(logBox);
  dashboard.appendChild(logContainer);

  var sessionId = 'run-' + Date.now();
  var startTime = Date.now();
  function elapsed() {
    var s = Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000);
    var m = Math.floor(s / 60); s = s % 60;
    return (m < 10 ? '0' + m : m) + ':' + (s < 10 ? '0' + s : s);
  }
  function addLog(agent, cls, msg, isTool) {
    var log = document.getElementById('run-live-log');
    if (!log) return;
    var entry = document.createElement('div');
    entry.className = 'build-log-entry';
    var ts = document.createElement('span'); ts.className = 'build-log-time'; ts.textContent = elapsed();
    var ag = document.createElement('span'); ag.className = 'build-log-agent ' + cls; ag.textContent = agent;
    var mg = document.createElement('span'); if (isTool) mg.className = 'build-log-tool'; mg.textContent = msg;
    entry.appendChild(ts); entry.appendChild(ag); entry.appendChild(mg);
    log.appendChild(entry); log.scrollTop = log.scrollHeight;
  }
  function addPreview(title, color, content) {
    var w = document.createElement('div');
    var t = document.createElement('div'); t.className = 'build-section-title'; t.style.color = color; t.textContent = title;
    var b = document.createElement('div');
    b.style.cssText = 'background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-left:3px solid ' + color + ';border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:12px;max-height:180px;overflow-y:auto;font-size:12px;color:#b0b4bc;white-space:pre-wrap;';
    b.textContent = content.substring(0, 2000);
    w.appendChild(t); w.appendChild(b); progressArea.appendChild(w);
  }

  var slaTimerId = null;
  var globalPrio = 'P3';
  var globalSlaHours = 24;

  try {
    addLog('AG-001', 'dispatcher', 'Incidencia recibida. Clasificando...', false);
    addLog('AG-001', 'dispatcher', 'tool: query_catalogo()', true);

    var resp1 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-001/invoke', {
      method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({message: text, session_id: sessionId})
    });
    var r1 = await resp1.json();
    if (!resp1.ok) throw new Error(r1.detail || 'AG-001 error');
    var result1 = r1.response || r1.result || '';

    setAgentState('AG-001', 'done', '\u2713');
    setAgentState('AG-002', 'active');
    addLog('AG-001', 'dispatcher', 'Clasificada. Tareas creadas.', false);

    var prioMatch = result1.match(/\b(P[1-4])\b/);
    globalPrio = prioMatch ? prioMatch[1] : 'P3';
    var slaMap = {P1: 4, P2: 8, P3: 24, P4: 72};
    globalSlaHours = slaMap[globalPrio] || 24;

    var now = new Date();
    var slaLimite = new Date(now.getTime() + globalSlaHours * 3600000);
    var prioColor = globalPrio === 'P1' ? '#ef4444' : globalPrio === 'P2' ? '#eab308' : '#3b82f6';
    var inicioStr = now.toLocaleString('es-ES', {day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
    var limiteStr = slaLimite.toLocaleString('es-ES', {day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});

    var slaBox = document.createElement('div');
    slaBox.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;padding:16px 20px;border:1px solid ' + prioColor + '40;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:12px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,' + prioColor + '10,transparent);';
    slaBox.innerHTML = '<div><div id="sla-countdown" style="font-size:36px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;letter-spacing:2px;color:' + prioColor + ';">--:--:--</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;">Tiempo restante SLA</div></div>' +
      '<div><div id="global-incident-pct" style="font-size:36px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;letter-spacing:2px;color:#ef4444;">0%</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;">Progreso incidencia</div></div>' +
      '<div style="flex:1"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="color:#8b8f98">Inicio: ' + inicioStr + '</span><span style="font-weight:600">L\u00edmite: ' + limiteStr + '</span></div>' +
      '<div style="height:6px;background:#181b20;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:4px;"><div id="sla-progress" style="height:100%;border-radius:3px;background:' + prioColor + ';width:0%;transition:width 1s;"></div></div>' +
      '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;"><span id="sla-pct" style="color:#8b8f98">0% consumido</span><span style="color:' + prioColor + ';font-weight:600;">' + globalPrio + ' \u2014 SLA: ' + globalSlaHours + 'h</span></div></div>';
    slaArea.appendChild(slaBox);

    var totalMs = slaLimite.getTime() - now.getTime();
    slaTimerId = setInterval(function() {
      var rem = slaLimite.getTime() - Date.now();
      var el = Date.now() - now.getTime();
      var pct = Math.min(100, Math.round((el / totalMs) * 100));
      var cd = document.getElementById('sla-countdown');
      if (!cd) { clearInterval(slaTimerId); return; }
      if (rem <= 0) { cd.textContent='00:00:00'; clearInterval(slaTimerId); return; }
      var h=Math.floor(rem/3600000),m2=Math.floor((rem%3600000)/60000),s2=Math.floor((rem%60000)/1000);
      cd.textContent=(h<10?'0'+h:h)+':'+(m2<10?'0'+m2:m2)+':'+(s2<10?'0'+s2:s2);
      var pg=document.getElementById('sla-progress'); if(pg) pg.style.width=pct+'%';
      var pc=document.getElementById('sla-pct'); if(pc) pc.textContent=pct+'% consumido';
    }, 1000);

    // AG-001 formatted fields
    var dispDiv = document.createElement('div');
    var dispTitle = document.createElement('div');
    dispTitle.className = 'build-section-title'; dispTitle.style.color = '#3b82f6';
    dispTitle.textContent = 'AG-001 Dispatcher \u2014 Clasificaci\u00f3n';
    dispDiv.appendChild(dispTitle);
    var ticketMatch = result1.match(/INC-[\w-]+/);
    var ticketId = ticketMatch ? ticketMatch[0] : '';
    var areaMatch = result1.match(/[Áá]rea[:\s]*([^\n*]+)/i);
    var areaVal = areaMatch ? areaMatch[1].replace(/\*/g,'').trim() : '';
    var tareasMatch = result1.match(/(\d+)\s*tareas/i);
    var numTareas = tareasMatch ? tareasMatch[1] : '';
    var matchCat = result1.match(/[Mm]atch[:\s]*(\d+)%/);
    var matchPct = matchCat ? matchCat[1] + '%' : '';
    var fieldsGrid = document.createElement('div'); fieldsGrid.className = 'build-summary';
    var fieldsInner = document.createElement('div'); fieldsInner.className = 'build-summary-grid';
    function addField(label, value, color) {
      var item = document.createElement('div'); item.className = 'build-summary-item';
      var lbl = document.createElement('div'); lbl.className = 'bsi-label'; lbl.textContent = label;
      var val = document.createElement('div'); val.className = 'bsi-value'; if (color) val.style.color = color; val.textContent = value || '\u2014';
      item.appendChild(lbl); item.appendChild(val); fieldsInner.appendChild(item);
    }
    addField('Ticket', ticketId, '#3b82f6');
    addField('Prioridad', globalPrio, globalPrio === 'P1' ? '#ef4444' : globalPrio === 'P2' ? '#eab308' : '#3b82f6');
    addField('SLA', globalSlaHours + ' horas', '#ef4444');
    addField('Match cat\u00e1logo', matchPct, '#22c55e');
    addField('\u00c1rea', areaVal, null);
    addField('Tareas', numTareas + ' multi-silo', null);
    fieldsGrid.appendChild(fieldsInner);
    var impactoMatch = result1.match(/[Ii]mpacto[:\s]*([^\n]+)/);
    if (impactoMatch) {
      var impDiv = document.createElement('div'); impDiv.style.cssText = 'margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid #333840;font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;';
      impDiv.textContent = impactoMatch[1].replace(/\*/g,'').trim(); fieldsGrid.appendChild(impDiv);
    }
    dispDiv.appendChild(fieldsGrid); progressArea.appendChild(dispDiv);

    // Read tasks from DB for AG-002 context
    var tasksContext = '';
    try {
      var tasksForAG002 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas');
      var allTForAG002 = await tasksForAG002.json();
      var recentT = allTForAG002.filter(function(t) { return t.fecha_creacion && new Date(t.fecha_creacion) > new Date(Date.now() - 120000); });
      if (recentT.length > 0) {
        tasksContext = '\n\nTareas creadas por AG-001:\n';
        recentT.forEach(function(t) {
          var d2 = {}; try { d2 = JSON.parse(t.descripcion || '{}'); } catch(e) {}
          tasksContext += 'task_id:' + t.id + ' | ' + t.titulo + ' | silo:' + (d2.silo || 'Soporte') + ' | skill:' + (d2.skill_requerida || '') + ' | sla_min:' + (d2.sla_tarea_minutos || 60) + ' | ticket:' + (ticketId || '') + '\n';
        });
      }
    } catch(ex) {}

    addLog('AG-002', 'resource', 'Buscando t\u00e9cnicos (' + recentT.length + ' tareas)...', false);
    addLog('AG-002', 'resource', 'tool: query_staff_by_skill()', true);

    var resp2 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-002/invoke', {
      method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({message: 'Resultado del Dispatcher:\n' + result1.substring(0, 800) + tasksContext, session_id: sessionId})
    });
    var r2 = await resp2.json();
    if (!resp2.ok) throw new Error(r2.detail || 'AG-002 error');
    var result2 = r2.response || r2.result || '';

    var needsBuffer = result2.toLowerCase().indexOf('needs_buffer') >= 0 || result2.indexOf('IMPOSIBLE') >= 0;

    if (needsBuffer) {
      setAgentState('AG-002', 'done', '\u2713');
      setAgentState('AG-004', 'active');
      addLog('AG-002', 'resource', 'Escalando al Buffer...', false);
    } else {
      setAgentState('AG-002', 'done', '\u2713');
      var st004 = document.getElementById('step-AG-004');
      if (st004) { st004.className = 'agent-step waiting'; st004.style.opacity = '0.3'; }
      var s004 = document.getElementById('status-AG-004');
      if (s004) { s004.textContent = 'No requerido'; s004.style.display = 'block'; s004.style.color = '#8b8f98'; }
      addLog('AG-002', 'resource', 'Candidatos propuestos.', false);
    }
    // Parse and render AG-002 candidates
    var candidatesDiv = document.createElement('div');
    var candTitle = document.createElement('div');
    candTitle.className = 'build-section-title';
    candTitle.style.color = '#a855f7';
    candTitle.textContent = 'AG-002 Resource Manager \u2014 Selecciona t\u00e9cnicos';
    candidatesDiv.appendChild(candTitle);

    var candidatesTasks = [];
    // Strategy 1: Find JSON array between ```json and ```
    var codeBlockMatch = result2.match(/```json\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
    if (codeBlockMatch) {
      try { candidatesTasks = JSON.parse(codeBlockMatch[1].trim()); } catch(e) {}
    }
    // Strategy 2: Find standalone JSON array by tracking bracket depth
    if (!candidatesTasks.length) {
      try {
        var lines = result2.split('\n');
        var jsonLines = [];
        var depth = 0;
        var capturing = false;
        for (var li = 0; li < lines.length; li++) {
          var line = lines[li];
          if (!capturing && line.trim().charAt(0) === '[') { capturing = true; }
          if (capturing) {
            jsonLines.push(line);
            for (var ci = 0; ci < line.length; ci++) {
              if (line[ci] === '[' || line[ci] === '{') depth++;
              if (line[ci] === ']' || line[ci] === '}') depth--;
            }
            if (depth <= 0 && jsonLines.length > 1) {
              try { candidatesTasks = JSON.parse(jsonLines.join('\n')); } catch(e2) {}
              if (candidatesTasks.length) break;
              jsonLines = []; depth = 0; capturing = false;
            }
          }
        }
      } catch(ex) {}
    }
    // Strategy 3: Extract individual task objects with candidatos
    if (!candidatesTasks.length) {
      try {
        var objMatches = result2.match(/\{[^{}]*"tarea"[^{}]*"candidatos"\s*:\s*\[[^\]]*\][^{}]*\}/g);
        if (objMatches) {
          candidatesTasks = objMatches.map(function(m) { try { return JSON.parse(m); } catch(e) { return null; } }).filter(Boolean);
        }
      } catch(ex3) {}
    }

    if (candidatesTasks.length > 0) {
      // Match AG-002 task names with real kanban task IDs
      candidatesTasks.forEach(function(ct) {
        if (!ct.task_id && recentT && recentT.length > 0) {
          var tareaName = (ct.tarea || '').replace(/^T\d+:\s*/, '').toLowerCase().substring(0, 20);
          for (var ri = 0; ri < recentT.length; ri++) {
            var rtTitle = (recentT[ri].titulo || '').toLowerCase();
            if (tareaName && rtTitle.indexOf(tareaName) >= 0) {
              ct.task_id = recentT[ri].id;
              ct.ticket_id = recentT[ri].id_incidencia || ticketId || '';
              break;
            }
          }
          if (!ct.task_id) {
            var idx = candidatesTasks.indexOf(ct);
            if (idx < recentT.length) {
              ct.task_id = recentT[idx].id;
              ct.ticket_id = recentT[idx].id_incidencia || ticketId || '';
            }
          }
        }
      });
      candidatesTasks.forEach(function(task) {
        var taskCard = document.createElement('div');
        taskCard.className = 'run-cand-task';
        var taskHead = document.createElement('div');
        taskHead.className = 'run-cand-task-head';
        var taskTitle = document.createElement('span');
        taskTitle.className = 'run-cand-task-title';
        taskTitle.textContent = task.tarea || '';
        var siloTag = document.createElement('span');
        var siloName = (task.silo || 'Soporte').toLowerCase();
        var siloClass = 'run-cand-silo silo-' + (siloName === 'base de datos' || siloName === 'bbdd' ? 'bbdd' : siloName === 'redes' ? 'redes' : siloName === 'unix' || siloName === 'linux' ? 'unix' : siloName === 'windows' ? 'win' : siloName === 'seguridad' ? 'seg' : siloName === 'backend' ? 'backend' : 'soporte');
        siloTag.className = siloClass;
        siloTag.textContent = task.silo || 'Soporte';
        var miniSla = document.createElement('span');
        miniSla.className = 'run-cand-mini-sla';
        var slaMins = task.sla_tarea_minutos || 60;
        miniSla.textContent = 'SLA: ' + Math.floor(slaMins/60) + 'h ' + (slaMins%60) + 'min';
        taskHead.appendChild(taskTitle);
        taskHead.appendChild(siloTag);
        taskHead.appendChild(miniSla);
        taskCard.appendChild(taskHead);
        // Business contact card if requiere_negocio
        if (task.requiere_negocio && task.contacto_negocio) {
          var bizCard = document.createElement('div');
          bizCard.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(234,179,8,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.3);border-left:3px solid #eab308;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;';
          var bizHeader = document.createElement('div');
          bizHeader.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;';
          var bizIcon = document.createElement('span'); bizIcon.style.fontSize = '18px'; bizIcon.textContent = '\uD83C\uDFE2';
          var bizLabel = document.createElement('span'); bizLabel.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#eab308;text-transform:uppercase;'; bizLabel.textContent = 'Contacto de negocio requerido';
          bizHeader.appendChild(bizIcon); bizHeader.appendChild(bizLabel); bizCard.appendChild(bizHeader);
          var cn = task.contacto_negocio;
          var bizName = document.createElement('div'); bizName.style.cssText = 'font-weight:600;font-size:14px;color:#e8e9ed;'; bizName.textContent = cn.nombre || '';
          bizCard.appendChild(bizName);
          var bizRole = document.createElement('div'); bizRole.style.cssText = 'font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;margin:2px 0;'; bizRole.textContent = (cn.cargo || '') + ' \u2014 ' + (cn.area || '');
          bizCard.appendChild(bizRole);
          var bizContact = document.createElement('div'); bizContact.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:6px;';
          var bizEmail = document.createElement('a'); bizEmail.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;color:#3b82f6;text-decoration:none;'; bizEmail.textContent = '\u2709 ' + (cn.email || ''); bizEmail.href = 'mailto:' + (cn.email || '');
          var bizPhone = document.createElement('span'); bizPhone.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;color:#22c55e;'; bizPhone.textContent = '\u260E ' + (cn.telefono || '');
          bizContact.appendChild(bizEmail); bizContact.appendChild(bizPhone); bizCard.appendChild(bizContact);
          if (cn.nota) { var bizNota = document.createElement('div'); bizNota.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;font-style:italic;margin-top:4px;'; bizNota.textContent = cn.nota; bizCard.appendChild(bizNota); }
          var bizSep = document.createElement('div'); bizSep.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:8px;padding-top:6px;border-top:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.2);'; bizSep.textContent = 'Apoyo t\u00e9cnico IT (selecciona uno):';
          bizCard.appendChild(bizSep);
          taskCard.appendChild(bizCard);
        }
        var candList = document.createElement('div');
        candList.style.cssText = 'display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;';
        (task.candidatos || []).forEach(function(cand) {
          var item = document.createElement('div');
          item.className = 'run-cand-item' + (cand.recomendado ? ' recommended' : '');
          var avatar = document.createElement('div');
          avatar.className = 'run-cand-avatar';
          avatar.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(34,197,94,.2);color:#22c55e;';
          avatar.textContent = (cand.nombre || '??').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]||'';}).join('').substring(0,2);
          var info = document.createElement('div'); info.style.flex = '1';
          var name = document.createElement('div'); name.className = 'run-cand-name'; name.textContent = cand.nombre || cand.id || '';
          var detail = document.createElement('div'); detail.className = 'run-cand-detail';
          detail.textContent = (cand.nivel || '') + ' | ' + (cand.silo || '') + ' | Carga: ' + (cand.carga || 0) + 'h';
          info.appendChild(name); info.appendChild(detail);
          var score = document.createElement('div'); score.className = 'run-cand-score';
          score.style.color = (cand.score || 0) >= 80 ? '#22c55e' : (cand.score || 0) >= 60 ? '#eab308' : '#8b8f98';
          score.textContent = (cand.score || 0);
          var btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.className = 'run-cand-btn'; btn.textContent = 'Elegir';
          btn.dataset.candId = cand.id || '';
          btn.onclick = function() {
            var isAssigned = btn.classList.contains('assigned');
            if (isAssigned) {
              btn.textContent = 'Elegir'; btn.className = 'run-cand-btn';
              item.className = 'run-cand-item' + (cand.recomendado ? ' recommended' : '');
              candList.querySelectorAll('.run-cand-item').forEach(function(other) { other.style.opacity = '1'; });
              var allKC = document.querySelectorAll('.build-kanban-card');
              allKC.forEach(function(kc) { var tarea = (task.tarea || '').replace(/^T\d+:\s*/, '').substring(0, 15); var tt = kc.querySelector('.bkc-title'); if (tarea && tt && tt.textContent.indexOf(tarea) >= 0) { var ex = kc.querySelector('.bkc-tech-assigned'); if (ex) ex.remove(); } });
            } else {
              candList.querySelectorAll('.run-cand-btn.assigned').forEach(function(ob) { ob.textContent = 'Elegir'; ob.className = 'run-cand-btn'; ob.parentElement.className = 'run-cand-item'; });
              candList.querySelectorAll('.run-cand-item').forEach(function(other) { other.style.opacity = other === item ? '1' : '0.4'; });
              btn.textContent = '\u2713 Asignado'; btn.className = 'run-cand-btn assigned'; item.className = 'run-cand-item selected';
              if (cand.id && task.task_id) { authFetch(API_BASE + '/asignar/tecnico/tarea', {method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({task_id:task.task_id,id_recurso:cand.id,ticket_id:task.ticket_id||''})}).catch(function(){}); }
              var allKC2 = document.querySelectorAll('.build-kanban-card');
              allKC2.forEach(function(kc) { var tarea = (task.tarea || '').replace(/^T\d+:\s*/, '').substring(0, 15); var tt = kc.querySelector('.bkc-title'); if (tarea && tt && tt.textContent.indexOf(tarea) >= 0) { var ex = kc.querySelector('.bkc-tech-assigned'); if (ex) ex.remove(); var tg = document.createElement('div'); tg.className = 'bkc-tech-assigned'; tg.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;color:#22c55e;margin-top:2px;'; tg.textContent = '\u2713 ' + (cand.nombre || cand.id); kc.appendChild(tg); } });
            }
            setTimeout(function() {
              var assigned = document.querySelectorAll('.run-cand-btn.assigned').length;
              var totalTasks = document.querySelectorAll('.run-cand-task').length;
              var counter = document.getElementById('pause-selected-count');
              if (counter) counter.textContent = '(' + assigned + '/' + totalTasks + ' tareas asignadas)';
              var cb2 = document.getElementById('pause-continue-btn');
              if (cb2) { if (assigned >= totalTasks) { cb2.style.background = '#22c55e'; cb2.style.opacity = '1'; cb2.textContent = 'Confirmar y continuar \u25b8'; } else { cb2.style.background = '#333840'; cb2.style.opacity = '0.6'; cb2.textContent = 'Faltan ' + (totalTasks - assigned) + ' tareas por asignar'; } }
            }, 100);
          };
          item.appendChild(avatar); item.appendChild(info); item.appendChild(score); item.appendChild(btn);
          candList.appendChild(item);
        });
        taskCard.appendChild(candList);
        candidatesDiv.appendChild(taskCard);
      });
    } else {
      addPreview('AG-002 Resource Manager \u2014 Candidatos', '#a855f7', result2);
    }
    progressArea.appendChild(candidatesDiv);

    // Save business contacts to ALL tasks with requiere_negocio
    var bizContact = null;
    candidatesTasks.forEach(function(ct) {
      if (ct.contacto_negocio) bizContact = ct.contacto_negocio;
    });
    var bizSavePromises = [];
    if (bizContact) {
      candidatesTasks.forEach(function(ct) {
        if (ct.requiere_negocio && ct.task_id) {
          var p = authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas/meta', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
            body: JSON.stringify({
              task_id: ct.task_id,
              meta: { requiere_negocio: true, contacto_negocio: bizContact }
            })
          }).catch(function(e) { console.error('Biz save error:', e); });
          bizSavePromises.push(p);
        }
      });
      if (recentT) {
        recentT.forEach(function(rt) {
          var rtDesc = {}; try { rtDesc = JSON.parse(rt.descripcion || '{}'); } catch(e) {}
          if (rtDesc.requiere_negocio && !rtDesc.contacto_negocio) {
            var p2 = authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas/meta', {
              method: 'POST',
              headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
              body: JSON.stringify({
                task_id: rt.id,
                meta: { requiere_negocio: true, contacto_negocio: bizContact }
              })
            }).catch(function(e) {});
            bizSavePromises.push(p2);
          }
        });
      }
    }
    if (bizSavePromises.length > 0) {
      await Promise.all(bizSavePromises);
      await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 500); });
    }

    // PAUSE: Wait for governance to select technicians
    var totalCandTasks = document.querySelectorAll('.run-cand-task').length;
    if (totalCandTasks > 0) {
      var continuePromise = new Promise(function(resolve) {
        var pauseDiv = document.createElement('div'); pauseDiv.id = 'pause-governance-bar';
        pauseDiv.style.cssText = 'padding:14px 16px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.3);border-radius:10px;margin:12px 0;';
        var pauseTop = document.createElement('div'); pauseTop.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px;';
        var pauseIcon = document.createElement('div'); pauseIcon.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;';
        var iconSpan = document.createElement('span'); iconSpan.style.fontSize = '20px'; iconSpan.textContent = '\u23f8';
        var pauseTitle = document.createElement('span'); pauseTitle.style.cssText = 'font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#eab308;'; pauseTitle.textContent = 'Pipeline en pausa \u2014 Decisi\u00f3n de gobernanza';
        pauseIcon.appendChild(iconSpan); pauseIcon.appendChild(pauseTitle);
        var pauseCounter = document.createElement('span'); pauseCounter.id = 'pause-selected-count';
        pauseCounter.style.cssText = 'font-size:13px;color:#8b8f98;font-weight:500;'; pauseCounter.textContent = '(0/' + totalCandTasks + ' tareas asignadas)';
        pauseTop.appendChild(pauseIcon); pauseTop.appendChild(pauseCounter);
        var pauseDesc = document.createElement('div'); pauseDesc.style.cssText = 'font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:12px;';
        pauseDesc.textContent = 'Selecciona un t\u00e9cnico para cada tarea. Puedes cambiar la selecci\u00f3n pulsando de nuevo en "Asignado". Cuando todas las tareas tengan t\u00e9cnico, pulsa continuar.';
        var continueBtn = document.createElement('button'); continueBtn.id = 'pause-continue-btn';
        continueBtn.style.cssText = 'width:100%;padding:12px;background:#333840;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;opacity:0.6;';
        continueBtn.textContent = 'Faltan ' + totalCandTasks + ' tareas por asignar';
        continueBtn.onclick = function() {
          var assigned = document.querySelectorAll('.run-cand-btn.assigned').length;
          if (assigned < totalCandTasks) {
            var errorMsg = document.getElementById('pause-error');
            if (!errorMsg) { errorMsg = document.createElement('div'); errorMsg.id = 'pause-error'; errorMsg.style.cssText = 'color:#ef4444;font-size:12px;text-align:center;margin-top:8px;animation:slideDown 0.3s;'; pauseDiv.appendChild(errorMsg); }
            errorMsg.textContent = '\u26a0 Debes asignar un t\u00e9cnico a cada tarea (' + (totalCandTasks - assigned) + ' pendientes)';
            return;
          }
          pauseDiv.remove();
          addLog('GOB', 'dispatcher', 'Gobernanza confirm\u00f3 ' + assigned + ' asignaciones. Continuando pipeline...', false);
          resolve();
        };
        pauseDiv.appendChild(pauseTop); pauseDiv.appendChild(pauseDesc); pauseDiv.appendChild(continueBtn);
        progressArea.appendChild(pauseDiv);
        pauseDiv.scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center'});
      });
      await continuePromise;
      // Auto-assign unassigned tasks to least-loaded selected technician
      var assignedTechs = [];
      document.querySelectorAll('.run-cand-btn.assigned').forEach(function(b) {
        var candItem = b.parentElement;
        var nameEl = candItem.querySelector('.run-cand-name');
        var detailEl = candItem.querySelector('.run-cand-detail');
        var idMatch = (detailEl && detailEl.textContent) ? detailEl.textContent : '';
        assignedTechs.push({
          nombre: nameEl ? nameEl.textContent.replace(' \u2605','') : '',
          id: b.dataset.candId || '',
          carga: parseInt((idMatch.match(/Carga:\s*(\d+)/) || [0,'0'])[1])
        });
      });
      if (recentT && recentT.length > 0 && assignedTechs.length > 0) {
        var bestTech = assignedTechs.sort(function(a,b) { return a.carga - b.carga; })[0];
        recentT.forEach(function(rt) {
          if (!rt.id_tecnico) {
            var hasCandidates = false;
            candidatesTasks.forEach(function(ct) { if (ct.task_id === rt.id) hasCandidates = true; });
            if (!hasCandidates && bestTech.id) {
              authFetch(API_BASE + '/asignar/tecnico/tarea', {method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({task_id:rt.id,id_recurso:bestTech.id,ticket_id:ticketId||''})}).catch(function(){});
              addLog('GOB', 'dispatcher', 'Auto-asignado ' + bestTech.nombre + ' a "' + (rt.titulo||'').substring(0,30) + '"', false);
            }
          }
        });
      }
      // Wait for assignments to be saved in DB
      await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1500); });
      addLog('GOB', 'dispatcher', 'Asignaciones grabadas en BD.', false);
    }

    var finalResult = result2;
    if (needsBuffer) {
      addLog('AG-004', 'buffer', 'Evaluando RUN vs BUILD...', false);
      var resp4 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-004/invoke', {
        method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: JSON.stringify({message: 'Escalado:\n' + result2.substring(0, 1500), session_id: sessionId})
      });
      var r4 = await resp4.json();
      if (!resp4.ok) throw new Error(r4.detail || 'AG-004 error');
      finalResult = r4.response || r4.result || '';
      setAgentState('AG-004', 'done', '\u2713');
      addLog('AG-004', 'buffer', 'Reasignaci\u00f3n completada.', false);
      addPreview('AG-004 Buffer \u2014 Decisi\u00f3n', '#06b6d4', finalResult);
    }

    // Register live incident in sidebar (after AG-004, before AG-012)
    try {
      var totalTareasLive = 0;
      try {
        var ltResp2 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas');
        var ltAll2 = await ltResp2.json();
        totalTareasLive = ltAll2.filter(function(t) { return t.fecha_creacion && new Date(t.fecha_creacion) > new Date(Date.now() - 600000); }).length;
      } catch(e2) {}
      var liveResp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/incidencias/live', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: JSON.stringify({
          ticket_id: ticketId || '',
          incidencia_detectada: text.substring(0, 200),
          prioridad: globalPrio,
          sla_horas: globalSlaHours,
          canal_entrada: document.getElementById('run-canal') ? document.getElementById('run-canal').value : '',
          reportado_por: document.getElementById('run-reportado') ? document.getElementById('run-reportado').value : '',
          servicio_afectado: document.getElementById('run-servicio') ? document.getElementById('run-servicio').value : '',
          impacto_negocio: document.getElementById('run-impacto') ? document.getElementById('run-impacto').value : ''
        })
      });
      if (liveResp.ok) {
        addLog('LIVE', 'dispatcher', 'Incidencia registrada en panel de control.', false);
        window._currentLiveTicketId = ticketId;
      }
      await authFetch(API_BASE + '/incidencias/live/' + ticketId + '/progreso?progreso=0&tareas_completadas=0&total_tareas=' + totalTareasLive, {method: 'PUT'}).catch(function(){});
    } catch(ex) { console.error('Live register error:', ex); }
    if (typeof loadActiveIncidents === 'function') loadActiveIncidents();

    // ═══ AG-012 TASK ADVISOR ═══
    setAgentState('AG-012', 'active');
    addLog('AG-012', 'advisor', 'Enriqueciendo tarjetas con instrucciones t\u00e9cnicas...', false);
    addLog('AG-012', 'advisor', 'tool: query_cmdb_activo()', true);
    try {
      var tkResp012 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas');
      var allTk012 = await tkResp012.json();
      var recentTasks012 = allTk012.filter(function(t) {
        return t.fecha_creacion && new Date(t.fecha_creacion) > new Date(Date.now() - 300000);
      });
      if (recentTasks012.length > 0) {
        var taskSummary = recentTasks012.map(function(t) { return t.id + ': ' + t.titulo; }).join('\n');
        var resp12 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-012/invoke', {
          method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
          body: JSON.stringify({message: 'Enriquece estas tarjetas:\n' + taskSummary.substring(0, 1500), session_id: sessionId})
        });
        if (resp12.ok) addLog('AG-012', 'advisor', 'Instrucciones generadas para ' + recentTasks012.length + ' tarjetas.', false);
      }
    } catch(ex12) {
      addLog('AG-012', 'advisor', 'Completado con warnings.', false);
    }
    setAgentState('AG-012', 'done', '\u2713');

    setPipelineComplete(true);
    addLog('CHAIN', 'dispatcher', 'Pipeline RUN completado en ' + elapsed(), false);
    loadActiveIncidents();

    try {
      // Re-read tasks fresh to get assigned technicians
      var tkResp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas');
      var allTasks = await tkResp.json();
      var recent = allTasks.filter(function(t) { return t.fecha_creacion && new Date(t.fecha_creacion) > new Date(Date.now() - 600000); });
      if (recent.length > 0) {
        var kanbanTitle = document.createElement('div'); kanbanTitle.className = 'build-section-title';
        kanbanTitle.textContent = 'Tarjetas Kanban - Clic para expandir instrucciones';
        progressArea.appendChild(kanbanTitle);
        var kanbanGrid = document.createElement('div'); kanbanGrid.className = 'build-kanban';
        var colNames = ['Backlog', 'En Progreso', 'En Revisi\u00f3n', 'Done'];
        var cols = {}; colNames.forEach(function(cn) { cols[cn] = []; });
        recent.forEach(function(t) { var c = cols[t.columna] ? t.columna : 'Backlog'; cols[c].push(t); });
        colNames.forEach(function(cn) {
          var col = document.createElement('div'); col.className = 'build-kanban-col';
          var header = document.createElement('div'); header.className = 'build-kanban-header'; header.textContent = cn;
          var body = document.createElement('div'); body.className = 'build-kanban-body';
          (cols[cn] || []).forEach(function(t) {
            var card = document.createElement('div'); card.className = 'build-kanban-card';
            card.dataset.taskId = t.id;
            var tDesc = {}; try { tDesc = JSON.parse(t.descripcion || '{}'); } catch(e) {}
            var tSilo = (tDesc.silo || 'Soporte').toLowerCase();
            var siloColor = tSilo === 'redes' ? '#06b6d4' : tSilo === 'bbdd' ? '#a855f7' : (tSilo === 'unix' || tSilo === 'linux') ? '#22c55e' : tSilo === 'windows' ? '#3b82f6' : tSilo === 'seguridad' ? '#ef4444' : tSilo === 'backend' ? '#f97316' : '#8b8f98';
            card.style.borderLeftColor = siloColor;
            var tDiv = document.createElement('div'); tDiv.className = 'bkc-title'; tDiv.textContent = (t.titulo || '').substring(0, 45);
            card.appendChild(tDiv);
            var mDiv = document.createElement('div'); mDiv.className = 'bkc-meta';
            var pb = document.createElement('span'); pb.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(239,68,68,.2);color:#ef4444;'; pb.textContent = globalPrio;
            mDiv.appendChild(pb);
            var siloSpan = document.createElement('span'); siloSpan.className = 'bkc-silo';
            siloSpan.style.cssText = 'background:' + siloColor + '20;color:' + siloColor + ';'; siloSpan.textContent = tDesc.silo || 'Soporte';
            mDiv.appendChild(siloSpan);
            if (tDesc.requiere_negocio) {
              var bizBadge = document.createElement('span');
              bizBadge.style.cssText = 'font-size:8px;font-weight:600;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.2);color:#eab308;';
              bizBadge.textContent = '\uD83C\uDFE2 Negocio';
              mDiv.appendChild(bizBadge);
            }
            if (t.id_tecnico) { var ts2 = document.createElement('span'); ts2.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;color:#22c55e;'; ts2.textContent = '\u2713 ' + t.id_tecnico + (t.nombre_tecnico ? ' ' + t.nombre_tecnico : ''); mDiv.appendChild(ts2); }
            card.appendChild(mDiv);
            var taskSlaMins2 = tDesc.sla_tarea_minutos || 0;
            if (taskSlaMins2 > 0) { var slaDiv = document.createElement('div'); slaDiv.className = 'bkc-sla'; slaDiv.textContent = '\u23f1 ' + Math.floor(taskSlaMins2/60) + 'h ' + (taskSlaMins2%60) + 'min'; card.appendChild(slaDiv); }
            // Progress percentage from checklist
            var tChecklist = tDesc.checklist || [];
            var tPct = 0;
            var pctColor = tPct <= 25 ? '#ef4444' : tPct <= 50 ? '#f97316' : tPct <= 75 ? '#eab308' : '#22c55e';
            var pctDiv = document.createElement('div');
            pctDiv.className = 'bkc-pct';
            pctDiv.id = 'kanban-pct-' + t.id;
            pctDiv.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:6px;right:8px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:' + pctColor + ';';
            pctDiv.textContent = tPct + '%';
            card.style.position = 'relative';
            card.style.paddingBottom = '24px';
            card.appendChild(pctDiv);
            card.onclick = function() { toggleRunTaskDetail(t.id, progressArea); };
            body.appendChild(card);
          });
          col.appendChild(header); col.appendChild(body); kanbanGrid.appendChild(col);
        });
        progressArea.appendChild(kanbanGrid);
        var detailPanel = document.createElement('div'); detailPanel.id = 'run-task-detail-panel';
        progressArea.appendChild(detailPanel);
      }
    } catch(ex) {}

  } catch(e) {
    addLog('ERROR', 'dispatcher', e.message, false);
    setPipelineComplete(false);
  }
  if (execBtn) execBtn.disabled = false;
  if (statusEl) { statusEl.textContent = 'Idle'; statusEl.style.color = 'var(--yellow)'; }
}

function ensureLiveTicketId() {
  return new Promise(function(resolve) {
    if (window._currentLiveTicketId) {
      resolve(window._currentLiveTicketId);
      return;
    }
    fetch(API_BASE + '/incidencias/live')
      .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
      .then(function(lives) {
        if (lives.length > 0) {
          window._currentLiveTicketId = lives[lives.length - 1].ticket_id;
        }
        resolve(window._currentLiveTicketId);
      }).catch(function() { resolve(null); });
  });
}

function updateGlobalIncidentProgress() {
  var kanbanCards = document.querySelectorAll('.build-kanban-card');
  if (kanbanCards.length === 0) return;
  var totalHoras = 0;
  var completedHoras = 0;
  kanbanCards.forEach(function(card) {
    var taskId = card.dataset.taskId;
    if (!taskId) return;
    var slaEl = card.querySelector('.bkc-sla');
    var taskHoras = 1;
    if (slaEl) { var match = slaEl.textContent.match(/(\d+)h\s*(\d+)/); if (match) taskHoras = parseInt(match[1]) + parseInt(match[2]) / 60; }
    totalHoras += taskHoras;
    var pctEl = document.getElementById('kanban-pct-' + taskId);
    var taskPct = 0;
    if (pctEl) taskPct = parseInt(pctEl.textContent) || 0;
    completedHoras += taskHoras * (taskPct / 100);
  });
  var globalPct = totalHoras > 0 ? Math.round((completedHoras / totalHoras) * 100) : 0;
  var globalEl = document.getElementById('global-incident-pct');
  if (globalEl) {
    globalEl.textContent = globalPct + '%';
    globalEl.style.color = globalPct <= 25 ? '#ef4444' : globalPct <= 50 ? '#f97316' : globalPct <= 75 ? '#eab308' : '#22c55e';
  }
  // Sync to live sidebar
  ensureLiveTicketId().then(function(tid) {
    if (tid) {
      fetch(API_BASE + '/incidencias/live/' + tid + '/progreso?progreso=' + globalPct + '&tareas_completadas=0&total_tareas=' + kanbanCards.length, {method:'PUT'})
        .then(function() { if (typeof loadActiveIncidents === 'function') loadActiveIncidents(); });
    }
  });
}

async function loadBuildLive() {
  try {
    var resp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/build/live');
    var projects = await resp.json();
    var container = document.getElementById('build-live-list');
    if (!container) return;
    container.innerHTML = '';

    if (projects.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;padding:16px;">No hay proyectos BUILD activos</div>';
      return;
    }

    projects.forEach(function(p) {
      var card = document.createElement('div');
      card.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.2s;';
      card.onmouseover = function() { card.style.borderColor = '#10b981'; };
      card.onmouseout = function() { card.style.borderColor = '#333840'; };

      var inicio = new Date(p.fecha_inicio);
      var dias = Math.floor((Date.now() - inicio.getTime()) / 86400000);
      var tiempoStr = dias + 'd';
      var prioColor = (p.prioridad === 'Alta' || p.prioridad === 'Critica') ? '#ef4444' : p.prioridad === 'Media' ? '#eab308' : '#22c55e';
      var progreso = p.progreso_pct || 0;

      card.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:6px;">' +
        '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;flex:1;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">' + (p.nombre || 'Proyecto') + '</div>' +
        '<span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:' + prioColor + '20;color:' + prioColor + ';font-weight:600;flex-shrink:0;">' + (p.prioridad || 'Media') + '</span></div>' +
        '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:6px;">PM: ' + (p.pm_asignado || 'Pendiente') + '</div>' +
        '<div style="height:4px;background:#22262e;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:6px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="height:100%;width:' + progreso + '%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#10b981,#22c55e);border-radius:2px;"></div></div>' +
        '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">' +
        '<span>' + progreso + '% \u2014 Sprint ' + (p.sprint_actual || 1) + '/' + (p.total_sprints || 16) + '</span>' +
        '<span style="color:#10b981;">' + (p.gate_actual || 'G2') + '</span></div>' +
        '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:4px;">' +
        '<span>\u23f1 ' + tiempoStr + '</span>' +
        '<span>' + (p.estado || '') + '</span></div>';
      container.appendChild(card);
    });

    var counter = document.getElementById('build-live-count');
    if (counter) counter.textContent = projects.length;
  } catch(e) {
    console.error('loadBuildLive error:', e);
  }
  loadBuildLiveSessions();
}

async function loadActiveIncidents() {
  var sidebar = document.getElementById('run-incidents-sidebar');
  if (!sidebar) return;

  try {
    var resp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/incidencias/live');
    var active = await resp.json();

    // Update header counter
    var counter = document.getElementById('run-inc-count');
    if (counter) counter.textContent = active.length;

    // === SEMAFORO DE CARGA OPERATIVA ===
    var totalInc = active.length;
    var criticas = active.filter(function(i) { return i.prioridad === 'P1' || i.prioridad === 'P2'; }).length;
    var slaUrgentes = 0;
    active.forEach(function(i) {
      var dl = i.fecha_limite ? new Date(i.fecha_limite) : null;
      if (dl && (dl - Date.now()) < 3600000 && (dl - Date.now()) > 0) slaUrgentes++;
    });

    // Get tech occupancy
    var techPct = 0;
    try {
      var techResp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/team/tecnicos');
      var techs = await techResp.json();
      var totalTechs = techs.length || 1;
      var ocupados = techs.filter(function(t) { return t.estado_run === 'OCUPADO' || (t.carga_actual && t.carga_actual > 0); }).length;
      techPct = Math.round((ocupados / totalTechs) * 100);
    } catch(e) {}

    // Calculate risk score (0-100)
    var score = 0;
    score += Math.min(30, totalInc * 5);
    score += Math.min(30, criticas * 15);
    score += Math.min(20, slaUrgentes * 10);
    score += Math.min(20, techPct * 0.25);
    score = Math.min(100, Math.round(score));

    var semaforoColor, semaforoLabel;
    if (score <= 25) {
      semaforoColor = '#22c55e';
      semaforoLabel = 'OPERATIVA NORMAL';
    } else if (score <= 50) {
      semaforoColor = '#eab308';
      semaforoLabel = 'CARGA ELEVADA';
    } else if (score <= 75) {
      semaforoColor = '#f97316';
      semaforoLabel = 'EN RIESGO';
    } else {
      semaforoColor = '#ef4444';
      semaforoLabel = 'SITUACION CRITICA';
    }

    var semBar = document.getElementById('run-semaforo-bar');
    var semDot = document.getElementById('run-semaforo-dot');
    var semLabel = document.getElementById('run-semaforo-label');
    var semScore = document.getElementById('run-semaforo-score');
    var semTotal = document.getElementById('run-sem-total');
    var semCriticas = document.getElementById('run-sem-criticas');
    var semSla = document.getElementById('run-sem-sla');
    var semTechs = document.getElementById('run-sem-techs');

    if (semBar) semBar.style.borderLeftColor = semaforoColor;
    if (semDot) semDot.style.background = semaforoColor;
    if (semLabel) { semLabel.textContent = semaforoLabel; semLabel.style.color = semaforoColor; }
    if (semScore) { semScore.textContent = score; semScore.style.color = semaforoColor; }
    if (semTotal) semTotal.textContent = totalInc;
    if (semCriticas) semCriticas.textContent = criticas;
    if (semSla) semSla.textContent = slaUrgentes;
    if (semTechs) semTechs.textContent = techPct + '%';

    // === LISTA DE INCIDENCIAS ===
    var list = document.getElementById('run-inc-list');
    if (!list) return;
    list.innerHTML = '';

    if (active.length === 0) {
      list.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:#8b8f98;font-size:11px;font-style:italic;">No hay incidencias activas</div>';
      return;
    }

    active.forEach(function(inc) {
      var card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'run-inc-card';
      card.dataset.ticketId = inc.ticket_id || '';

      var prio = inc.prioridad || 'P4';
      var prioColor = prio === 'P1' ? '#ef4444' : prio === 'P2' ? '#eab308' : prio === 'P3' ? '#3b82f6' : '#8b8f98';
      card.style.borderLeftColor = prioColor;

      var header = document.createElement('div');
      header.style.cssText = 'display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:2px;';
      var title = document.createElement('div');
      title.className = 'run-inc-title';
      title.textContent = (inc.incidencia_detectada || '').substring(0, 30);
      var prioBadge = document.createElement('span');
      prioBadge.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:' + prioColor + '20;color:' + prioColor + ';';
      prioBadge.textContent = prio;
      header.appendChild(title);
      header.appendChild(prioBadge);
      card.appendChild(header);

      var ticket = document.createElement('div');
      ticket.className = 'run-inc-ticket';
      ticket.textContent = inc.ticket_id || '';
      card.appendChild(ticket);

      var slaRow = document.createElement('div');
      slaRow.style.cssText = 'display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:4px;';
      var slaHours = parseFloat(inc.sla_horas) || 48;
      var created = new Date(inc.fecha_creacion);
      var deadline = inc.fecha_limite ? new Date(inc.fecha_limite) : new Date(created.getTime() + slaHours * 3600000);
      var remaining = deadline - Date.now();
      var slaSpan = document.createElement('div');
      slaSpan.className = 'run-inc-sla';
      slaSpan.dataset.deadline = deadline.getTime();
      if (remaining <= 0) {
        slaSpan.textContent = 'VENCIDO';
        slaSpan.style.color = '#ef4444';
      } else {
        var h = Math.floor(remaining / 3600000);
        var m = Math.floor((remaining % 3600000) / 60000);
        var s = Math.floor((remaining % 60000) / 1000);
        slaSpan.textContent = (h<10?'0'+h:h) + ':' + (m<10?'0'+m:m) + ':' + (s<10?'0'+s:s);
        slaSpan.style.color = remaining < 3600000 ? '#ef4444' : remaining < 7200000 ? '#eab308' : '#22c55e';
      }
      var pctVal = inc.progreso_pct || 0;
      var pctSpan = document.createElement('div');
      pctSpan.className = 'run-inc-pct';
      pctSpan.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;';
      pctSpan.style.color = pctVal <= 25 ? '#ef4444' : pctVal <= 50 ? '#f97316' : pctVal <= 75 ? '#eab308' : '#22c55e';
      pctSpan.textContent = pctVal + '%';
      slaRow.appendChild(slaSpan);
      slaRow.appendChild(pctSpan);
      card.appendChild(slaRow);

      var bar = document.createElement('div');
      bar.className = 'run-inc-bar';
      var barColor = pctVal <= 25 ? '#ef4444' : pctVal <= 50 ? '#f97316' : pctVal <= 75 ? '#eab308' : '#22c55e';
      bar.innerHTML = '<div class="run-inc-bar-fill" style="width:' + pctVal + '%;background:' + barColor + ';"></div>';
      card.appendChild(bar);

      // Tasks info
      if (inc.total_tareas > 0) {
        var tasksInfo = document.createElement('div');
        tasksInfo.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:3px;';
        tasksInfo.textContent = (inc.tareas_completadas || 0) + '/' + inc.total_tareas + ' tareas';
        card.appendChild(tasksInfo);
      }

      card.onclick = function() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.run-inc-card').forEach(function(c) { c.classList.remove('active'); });
        card.classList.add('active');
        openIncidentModal(inc.ticket_id);
      };

      list.appendChild(card);
    });

  } catch(ex) {
    console.error('Error loading incidents:', ex);
  }
}
setInterval(function() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.run-inc-sla[data-deadline]').forEach(function(el) {
    var deadline = parseInt(el.dataset.deadline); var remaining = deadline - Date.now();
    if (remaining <= 0) { el.textContent = 'VENCIDO'; el.style.color = '#ef4444'; return; }
    var h=Math.floor(remaining/3600000),m2=Math.floor((remaining%3600000)/60000),s2=Math.floor((remaining%60000)/1000);
    el.textContent=(h<10?'0'+h:h)+':'+(m2<10?'0'+m2:m2)+':'+(s2<10?'0'+s2:s2);
    el.style.color=remaining<3600000?'#ef4444':remaining<7200000?'#eab308':'#22c55e';
  });
}, 1000);


async function openIncidentModal(ticketId) {
  var existing = document.getElementById('inc-modal-overlay');
  if (existing) existing.remove();
  try {
    var incResp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/incidencias/live');
    var incidents = await incResp.json();
    var inc = incidents.find(function(i) { return i.ticket_id === ticketId; });
    if (!inc) return;
    var tasksResp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas');
    var allTasks = await tasksResp.json();
    var tasks = allTasks.filter(function(t) { return t.id_incidencia === ticketId; });
    var prio = inc.prioridad || 'P4';
    var prioColor = prio === 'P1' ? '#ef4444' : prio === 'P2' ? '#eab308' : prio === 'P3' ? '#3b82f6' : '#8b8f98';
    var slaHours = parseFloat(inc.sla_horas) || 48;
    var created = new Date(inc.fecha_creacion);
    var deadline = new Date(created.getTime() + slaHours * 3600000);
    var overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.className = 'inc-modal-overlay'; overlay.id = 'inc-modal-overlay';
    overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
    var modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.className = 'inc-modal';
    // Header
    var header = document.createElement('div'); header.className = 'inc-modal-header';
    var headerLeft = document.createElement('div'); headerLeft.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;';
    var prioBadge = document.createElement('span'); prioBadge.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:' + prioColor + '20;color:' + prioColor + ';'; prioBadge.textContent = prio;
    var titleSpan = document.createElement('span'); titleSpan.style.cssText = 'font-weight:600;font-size:15px;color:#e8e9ed;'; titleSpan.textContent = (inc.incidencia_detectada || '').substring(0, 50);
    headerLeft.appendChild(prioBadge); headerLeft.appendChild(titleSpan);
    var headerRight = document.createElement('div'); headerRight.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;';
    var ticketSpan = document.createElement('span'); ticketSpan.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;font-family:monospace;'; ticketSpan.textContent = ticketId;
    var closeBtn = document.createElement('button'); closeBtn.className = 'inc-modal-btn'; closeBtn.textContent = 'Cerrar'; closeBtn.onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
    headerRight.appendChild(ticketSpan); headerRight.appendChild(closeBtn);
    header.appendChild(headerLeft); header.appendChild(headerRight); modal.appendChild(header);
    // SLA bar
    var slaBar = document.createElement('div'); slaBar.className = 'inc-modal-sla';
    var slaTime = document.createElement('div');
    var slaCd = document.createElement('div'); slaCd.className = 'inc-modal-sla-time'; slaCd.id = 'inc-modal-sla-cd'; slaCd.dataset.deadline = deadline.getTime(); slaCd.style.color = prioColor; slaCd.textContent = '--:--:--';
    var slaLbl = document.createElement('div'); slaLbl.className = 'inc-modal-sla-label'; slaLbl.textContent = 'Tiempo restante SLA';
    slaTime.appendChild(slaCd); slaTime.appendChild(slaLbl);
    var slaPctDiv = document.createElement('div');
    var slaPctVal = document.createElement('div'); slaPctVal.className = 'inc-modal-sla-time'; slaPctVal.id = 'inc-modal-global-pct'; slaPctVal.style.color = '#ef4444'; slaPctVal.textContent = '0%';
    var slaPctLbl = document.createElement('div'); slaPctLbl.className = 'inc-modal-sla-label'; slaPctLbl.textContent = 'Progreso incidencia';
    slaPctDiv.appendChild(slaPctVal); slaPctDiv.appendChild(slaPctLbl);
    var slaInfo = document.createElement('div'); slaInfo.style.flex = '1';
    var elapsed2 = Date.now() - created.getTime(); var total2 = slaHours * 3600000; var pctC = Math.min(100, Math.round((elapsed2/total2)*100));
    slaInfo.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;"><span>Inicio: ' + created.toLocaleString('es-ES') + '</span><span>L\u00edmite: ' + deadline.toLocaleString('es-ES') + '</span></div><div style="height:6px;background:#181b20;border-radius:3px;margin-top:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="height:100%;width:' + pctC + '%;background:' + prioColor + ';border-radius:3px;"></div></div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:2px;">' + pctC + '% consumido \u2014 SLA: ' + slaHours + 'h</div>';
    slaBar.appendChild(slaTime); slaBar.appendChild(slaPctDiv); slaBar.appendChild(slaInfo); modal.appendChild(slaBar);
    // Fields
    var fields = document.createElement('div'); fields.className = 'inc-modal-fields';
    [{l:'Ticket',v:ticketId.substring(0,15),c:'#3b82f6'},{l:'Prioridad',v:prio,c:prioColor},{l:'SLA',v:slaHours+'h',c:'#ef4444'},{l:'Estado',v:inc.estado||'QUEUED',c:'#8b8f98'},{l:'\u00c1rea',v:(inc.area_afectada||'').substring(0,12)},{l:'Tareas',v:tasks.length+' tareas'}].forEach(function(f) {
      var fd = document.createElement('div'); fd.className = 'inc-modal-field';
      fd.innerHTML = '<div class="inc-modal-field-label">' + f.l + '</div><div class="inc-modal-field-value"' + (f.c ? ' style="color:' + f.c + '"' : '') + '>' + escHtml(f.v || '\u2014') + '</div>';
      fields.appendChild(fd);
    });
    modal.appendChild(fields);
    // Tasks
    var tasksSection = document.createElement('div'); tasksSection.className = 'inc-modal-tasks';
    var tasksTitle = document.createElement('div'); tasksTitle.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;'; tasksTitle.textContent = 'Tareas de resoluci\u00f3n (' + tasks.length + ')';
    tasksSection.appendChild(tasksTitle);
    tasks.forEach(function(t) {
      var desc = {}; try { desc = JSON.parse(t.descripcion || '{}'); } catch(e) {}
      var silo2 = (desc.silo || 'Soporte').toLowerCase();
      var siloColor = silo2==='redes'?'#06b6d4':silo2==='bbdd'?'#a855f7':(silo2==='unix'||silo2==='linux')?'#22c55e':silo2==='windows'?'#3b82f6':silo2==='seguridad'?'#ef4444':silo2==='backend'?'#f97316':silo2==='devops'?'#10b981':'#8b8f98';
      var taskSlaMins = desc.sla_tarea_minutos || 0;
      var taskCard = document.createElement('div'); taskCard.className = 'inc-modal-task'; taskCard.style.borderLeftColor = siloColor; taskCard.style.cursor = 'pointer';
      var col = t.columna || 'Backlog'; var colColor = col==='Done'?'#22c55e':col==='En Progreso'?'#3b82f6':col==='En Revisi\u00f3n'?'#eab308':'#8b8f98';
      var html2 = '<div class="inc-modal-task-header"><div style="flex:1"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;">';
      html2 += '<span class="inc-modal-task-title">' + escHtml((t.titulo||'').substring(0,45)) + '</span>';
      html2 += '<span style="font-size:8px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:' + siloColor + '20;color:' + siloColor + ';font-weight:600;">' + escHtml(desc.silo||'Soporte') + '</span>';
      html2 += '<span style="font-size:8px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:' + colColor + '20;color:' + colColor + ';font-weight:600;">' + escHtml(col) + '</span>';
      if (desc.requiere_negocio) html2 += '<span style="font-size:8px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,.2);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Negocio</span>';
      html2 += '</div>';
      if (t.id_tecnico) html2 += '<div class="inc-modal-task-tech"><div style="width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:' + siloColor + '30;color:' + siloColor + ';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;">' + (t.id_tecnico||'').substring(0,3) + '</div><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#22c55e;">' + escHtml(t.id_tecnico) + '</span></div>';
      html2 += '</div><div style="text-align:right"><div class="inc-modal-task-pct" style="color:#ef4444;">0%</div>';
      if (taskSlaMins > 0) html2 += '<div class="inc-modal-task-sla">SLA: ' + Math.floor(taskSlaMins/60) + 'h ' + (taskSlaMins%60) + 'min</div>';
      html2 += '</div></div>';
      taskCard.innerHTML = html2;
      taskCard.onclick = function() { toggleRunTaskDetail(t.id, tasksSection); };
      tasksSection.appendChild(taskCard);
    });
    modal.appendChild(tasksSection);
    // Footer
    var footer = document.createElement('div'); footer.className = 'inc-modal-footer';
    var btnFinish = document.createElement('button'); btnFinish.className = 'inc-modal-btn inc-modal-btn-primary'; btnFinish.textContent = 'Finalizar incidencia';
    btnFinish.onclick = function() {
      if (confirm('Finalizar incidencia ' + ticketId + '?')) {
        authFetch(API_BASE + '/incidencias/live/' + ticketId, {method:'DELETE'}).then(function() { overlay.remove(); loadActiveIncidents(); }).catch(function(){});
      }
    };
    var btnClose = document.createElement('button'); btnClose.className = 'inc-modal-btn'; btnClose.textContent = 'Cerrar'; btnClose.onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
    footer.appendChild(btnClose); footer.appendChild(btnFinish);
    modal.appendChild(footer);
    // SLA timer
    var modalTimer = setInterval(function() {
      var cdEl = document.getElementById('inc-modal-sla-cd'); if (!cdEl) { clearInterval(modalTimer); return; }
      var dl = parseInt(cdEl.dataset.deadline); var rem = dl - Date.now();
      if (rem <= 0) { cdEl.textContent = 'VENCIDO'; cdEl.style.color = '#ef4444'; clearInterval(modalTimer); return; }
      var hh=Math.floor(rem/3600000),mm=Math.floor((rem%3600000)/60000),ss=Math.floor((rem%60000)/1000);
      cdEl.textContent=(hh<10?'0'+hh:hh)+':'+(mm<10?'0'+mm:mm)+':'+(ss<10?'0'+ss:ss);
      cdEl.style.color=rem<3600000?'#ef4444':rem<7200000?'#eab308':'#22c55e';
    }, 1000);
    overlay.appendChild(modal); document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  } catch(ex) { console.error('Error opening incident modal:', ex); }
}
function toggleRunTaskDetail(taskId, container) {
  var existing = document.getElementById('run-task-modal-overlay');
  if (existing) { if (existing.dataset.taskId === taskId) { existing.remove(); return; } existing.remove(); }
  authFetch(API_BASE + '/kanban/tareas').then(function(r) { return r.json(); }).then(function(tasks) {
    var task = tasks.find(function(t) { return t.id === taskId; });
    if (!task) return;
    var desc = {}; try { desc = JSON.parse(task.descripcion || '{}'); } catch(e) {}
    var cmdbItems = (desc.contexto_cmdb && desc.contexto_cmdb.items) || [];
    var instrucciones = desc.instrucciones || [];
    var checklist = desc.checklist || [];
    var silo = desc.silo || 'Soporte';
    var slaTarea = desc.sla_tarea_minutos || 60;
    var overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.className = 'run-modal-overlay';
    overlay.id = 'run-task-modal-overlay'; overlay.dataset.taskId = taskId;
    overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
    var modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.className = 'run-modal-content';
    // Header
    var head = document.createElement('div'); head.style.cssText = 'padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;';
    var headLeft = document.createElement('div'); headLeft.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;';
    var titleSpan = document.createElement('span'); titleSpan.style.cssText = 'font-weight:600;font-size:15px;'; titleSpan.textContent = task.titulo || '';
    var sk = (silo || 'soporte').toLowerCase().replace('base de datos','bbdd');
    sk = sk === 'bbdd' ? 'bbdd' : sk === 'redes' ? 'redes' : (sk === 'unix' || sk === 'linux') ? 'unix' : sk === 'windows' ? 'win' : sk === 'seguridad' ? 'seg' : 'soporte';
    var siloTag = document.createElement('span'); siloTag.className = 'run-cand-silo silo-' + sk; siloTag.textContent = silo;
    headLeft.appendChild(titleSpan); headLeft.appendChild(siloTag);
    var headRight = document.createElement('div'); headRight.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;';
    var pctSpan = document.createElement('span'); pctSpan.id = 'modal-pct-' + taskId;
    pctSpan.style.cssText = 'font-size:22px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;'; pctSpan.textContent = '0%';
    var closeBtn = document.createElement('button'); closeBtn.style.cssText = 'background:none;border:1px solid #333840;color:#8b8f98;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;';
    closeBtn.textContent = 'Cerrar'; closeBtn.onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
    headRight.appendChild(pctSpan); headRight.appendChild(closeBtn);
    head.appendChild(headLeft); head.appendChild(headRight); modal.appendChild(head);
    // SLA countdown
    var slaBox = document.createElement('div'); slaBox.className = 'run-modal-sla-box';
    var slaLeft = document.createElement('div');
    var slaCd = document.createElement('div'); slaCd.className = 'run-modal-sla-countdown'; slaCd.id = 'modal-sla-cd-' + taskId; slaCd.textContent = '--:--:--';
    var slaLbl = document.createElement('div'); slaLbl.className = 'run-modal-sla-meta'; slaLbl.textContent = 'SLA tarea restante';
    slaLeft.appendChild(slaCd); slaLeft.appendChild(slaLbl);
    var slaRight = document.createElement('div'); slaRight.style.flex = '1';
    var slaEndTime = new Date(Date.now() + slaTarea * 60000);
    var endStr = slaEndTime.toLocaleString('es-ES', {day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
    var slaEnd = document.createElement('div'); slaEnd.className = 'run-modal-sla-end'; slaEnd.textContent = 'L\u00edmite: ' + endStr;
