    var slaDur = document.createElement('div'); slaDur.className = 'run-modal-sla-meta';
    slaDur.textContent = 'Duraci\u00f3n: ' + Math.floor(slaTarea/60) + 'h ' + (slaTarea%60) + 'min';
    var slaBar = document.createElement('div'); slaBar.style.cssText = 'height:4px;background:#181b20;border-radius:2px;margin-top:6px;overflow:hidden;';
    var slaFill = document.createElement('div'); slaFill.id = 'modal-sla-bar-' + taskId;
    slaFill.style.cssText = 'height:100%;border-radius:2px;background:#ef4444;width:0%;transition:width 1s;';
    slaBar.appendChild(slaFill); slaRight.appendChild(slaEnd); slaRight.appendChild(slaDur); slaRight.appendChild(slaBar);
    slaBox.appendChild(slaLeft); slaBox.appendChild(slaRight); modal.appendChild(slaBox);
    var slaStart = Date.now(); var slaTotalMs = slaTarea * 60000;
    var miniTimer = setInterval(function() {
      var rem = slaTotalMs - (Date.now() - slaStart); var pct = Math.min(100, Math.round(((Date.now()-slaStart)/slaTotalMs)*100));
      var cd = document.getElementById('modal-sla-cd-' + taskId); var bar = document.getElementById('modal-sla-bar-' + taskId);
      if (!cd) { clearInterval(miniTimer); return; }
      if (rem <= 0) { cd.textContent = '00:00:00'; if(bar) bar.style.width='100%'; clearInterval(miniTimer); return; }
      var h=Math.floor(rem/3600000),m2=Math.floor((rem%3600000)/60000),s2=Math.floor((rem%60000)/1000);
      cd.textContent = (h<10?'0'+h:h)+':'+(m2<10?'0'+m2:m2)+':'+(s2<10?'0'+s2:s2);
      if(bar) bar.style.width = pct+'%';
    }, 1000);
    // Body
    var body = document.createElement('div'); body.style.padding = '14px 16px';
    if (task.id_tecnico) {
      var td = document.createElement('div'); td.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 12px;background:rgba(34,197,94,.06);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.2);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:12px;';
      var av = document.createElement('div'); av.style.cssText = 'width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(34,197,94,.2);color:#22c55e;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;';
      av.textContent = (task.id_tecnico||'').substring(0,3);
      var ti2 = document.createElement('span'); ti2.style.fontSize = '12px';
      ti2.textContent = task.id_tecnico + (task.nombre_tecnico ? ' \u2014 ' + task.nombre_tecnico : '') + ' \u2014 Silo: ' + silo;
      td.appendChild(av); td.appendChild(ti2); body.appendChild(td);
    }
    // Business contact if task requires coordination
    if (desc.requiere_negocio) {
      var bizSection = document.createElement('div');
      bizSection.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(234,179,8,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.25);border-left:3px solid #eab308;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:12px;';
      var bizWarn = document.createElement('div'); bizWarn.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;';
      var bizWarnIcon = document.createElement('span'); bizWarnIcon.textContent = '\u26a0'; bizWarnIcon.style.fontSize = '14px';
      var bizWarnText = document.createElement('span'); bizWarnText.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#eab308;text-transform:uppercase;'; bizWarnText.textContent = 'Coordinaci\u00f3n con \u00e1rea de negocio en curso';
      bizWarn.appendChild(bizWarnIcon); bizWarn.appendChild(bizWarnText); bizSection.appendChild(bizWarn);
      var bizNotice = document.createElement('div'); bizNotice.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:8px;line-height:1.4;';
      bizNotice.textContent = 'Gobernanza ya ha contactado con el \u00e1rea de negocio responsable. Este contacto es solo de referencia.';
      bizSection.appendChild(bizNotice);
      var renderContact = function(cn2) {
        var bizInfo = document.createElement('div'); bizInfo.style.cssText = 'background:#181b20;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;';
        var bizName2 = document.createElement('div'); bizName2.style.cssText = 'font-weight:600;font-size:13px;color:#e8e9ed;'; bizName2.textContent = cn2.nombre_completo || cn2.nombre || '';
        var bizRole2 = document.createElement('div'); bizRole2.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;margin:2px 0;'; bizRole2.textContent = (cn2.cargo || '') + ' \u2014 ' + (cn2.area || '');
        var bizContactRow = document.createElement('div'); bizContactRow.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:4px;';
        var bizEmail2 = document.createElement('span'); bizEmail2.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;color:#3b82f6;'; bizEmail2.textContent = '\u2709 ' + (cn2.email || '');
        var bizPhone2 = document.createElement('span'); bizPhone2.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;color:#22c55e;'; bizPhone2.textContent = '\u260e ' + (cn2.telefono || '');
        bizContactRow.appendChild(bizEmail2); bizContactRow.appendChild(bizPhone2);
        bizInfo.appendChild(bizName2); bizInfo.appendChild(bizRole2); bizInfo.appendChild(bizContactRow);
        bizSection.appendChild(bizInfo);
      };
      if (desc.contacto_negocio) {
        renderContact(desc.contacto_negocio);
      } else {
        var areaBuscar = desc.area_negocio || silo || 'Soporte';
        authFetch(API_BASE + '/directorio/buscar?area=' + encodeURIComponent(areaBuscar))
          .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
          .then(function(contacts) {
            if (contacts && contacts.length > 0) { renderContact(contacts[0]); }
            else { var nc = document.createElement('div'); nc.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;font-style:italic;'; nc.textContent = 'Contacto pendiente. \u00c1rea: ' + areaBuscar; bizSection.appendChild(nc); }
          }).catch(function() {});
      }
      body.appendChild(bizSection);
    }
    if (cmdbItems.length > 0) {
      var ct = document.createElement('div'); ct.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 6px;'; ct.textContent = 'Contexto infraestructura (CMDB + IA)';
      body.appendChild(ct);
      var grid = document.createElement('div'); grid.className = 'run-infra-grid';
      cmdbItems.forEach(function(item) {
        var cell = document.createElement('div'); cell.className = 'run-infra-item';
        var lbl = document.createElement('div'); lbl.className = 'run-infra-label'; lbl.textContent = item.campo || '';
        var val = document.createElement('div'); val.className = 'run-infra-val';
        if ((item.campo||'').toLowerCase().indexOf('ip') >= 0) val.classList.add('ip');
        else if ((item.campo||'').toLowerCase().indexOf('serv') >= 0) val.classList.add('host');
        if (item.source === 'IA') val.classList.add('suggest');
        val.textContent = item.valor || '';
        var src = document.createElement('span'); src.className = item.source==='CMDB'?'run-src-tag run-src-cmdb':'run-src-tag run-src-ia'; src.textContent = item.source||'IA';
        val.appendChild(src); cell.appendChild(lbl); cell.appendChild(val); grid.appendChild(cell);
      });
      body.appendChild(grid);
    }
    if (instrucciones.length > 0) {
      var st = document.createElement('div'); st.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 6px;'; st.textContent = 'Instrucciones paso a paso';
      body.appendChild(st);
      instrucciones.forEach(function(inst, idx) {
        var step = document.createElement('div'); step.className = 'run-step';
        var num = document.createElement('div'); num.className = 'run-step-n'; num.textContent = String(idx+1);
        var cnt = document.createElement('div'); cnt.style.flex = '1';
        var stT = document.createElement('div'); stT.className = 'run-step-t'; stT.textContent = inst.titulo || ''; cnt.appendChild(stT);
        if (inst.detalle) { var det = document.createElement('div'); det.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;margin:2px 0;'; det.textContent = inst.detalle; cnt.appendChild(det); }
        (inst.comandos||[]).forEach(function(cmd) { var c = document.createElement('code'); c.className = 'run-cmd'; c.textContent = cmd; cnt.appendChild(c); });
        step.appendChild(num); step.appendChild(cnt); body.appendChild(step);
      });
    }
    if (checklist.length > 0) {
      var total = checklist.length;
      var chH = document.createElement('div'); chH.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 6px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;';
      var chL = document.createElement('span'); chL.textContent = 'Checklist';
      var chC = document.createElement('span'); chC.id = 'modal-chk-' + taskId; chC.style.color = '#22c55e'; chC.textContent = '(0/' + total + ')';
      chH.appendChild(chL); chH.appendChild(chC); body.appendChild(chH);
      checklist.forEach(function(chkText) {
        var chkDiv = document.createElement('div'); chkDiv.className = 'run-chk';
        var box = document.createElement('div'); box.className = 'run-chk-box';
        box.onclick = function() {
          box.classList.toggle('done'); box.textContent = box.classList.contains('done') ? '\u2713' : '';
          var tx = box.nextElementSibling; if(tx) tx.classList.toggle('done');
          var checked = modal.querySelectorAll('.run-chk-box.done').length;
          var p = Math.round((checked/total)*100);
          var pE = document.getElementById('modal-pct-' + taskId); if(pE) pE.textContent = p+'%';
          var cE = document.getElementById('modal-chk-' + taskId); if(cE) cE.textContent = '('+checked+'/'+total+')';
              // Update kanban card percentage
              var kanbanPct = document.getElementById('kanban-pct-' + taskId);
              if (kanbanPct) {
                kanbanPct.textContent = p + '%';
                kanbanPct.style.color = p <= 25 ? '#ef4444' : p <= 50 ? '#f97316' : p <= 75 ? '#eab308' : '#22c55e';
              }
              updateGlobalIncidentProgress();
              // Update live incident progress
              ensureLiveTicketId().then(function(tid) {
                if (!tid) return;
                var allC4 = document.querySelectorAll('.build-kanban-card');
                var tT4 = allC4.length; var dT4 = 0; var tP4 = 0;
                allC4.forEach(function(c4) {
                  var p4 = document.getElementById('kanban-pct-' + c4.dataset.taskId);
                  var v4 = p4 ? parseInt(p4.textContent) || 0 : 0;
                  tP4 += v4; if (v4 >= 100) dT4++;
                });
                var g4 = tT4 > 0 ? Math.round(tP4 / tT4) : 0;
                fetch(API_BASE + '/incidencias/live/' + tid + '/progreso?progreso=' + g4 + '&tareas_completadas=' + dT4 + '&total_tareas=' + tT4, {method:'PUT'})
                  .then(function() { if (typeof loadActiveIncidents === 'function') loadActiveIncidents(); });
              });
        };
        var txt = document.createElement('span'); txt.className = 'run-chk-text'; txt.textContent = chkText;
        chkDiv.appendChild(box); chkDiv.appendChild(txt); body.appendChild(chkDiv);
      });
    }
    modal.appendChild(body);
    var statusBar = document.createElement('div'); statusBar.className = 'run-status-bar';
    ['Backlog','En Progreso','En Revisi\u00f3n','Done'].forEach(function(st2) {
      var btn = document.createElement('div'); btn.className = 'run-status-btn';
      if (st2 === (task.columna||'Backlog')) btn.classList.add('current');
      btn.textContent = st2;
      btn.onclick = function() {
        statusBar.querySelectorAll('.run-status-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('current');}); btn.classList.add('current');
        authFetch(API_BASE+'/kanban/tareas/'+taskId+'/mover',{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({columna:st2})}).catch(function(){});
        setTimeout(function() {
          var targetCard = document.querySelector('.build-kanban-card[data-task-id="' + taskId + '"]');
          if (!targetCard) {
            var allC = document.querySelectorAll('.build-kanban-card');
            allC.forEach(function(c) { if (c.dataset.taskId === taskId) targetCard = c; });
          }
          if (targetCard) {
            var colHeaders = document.querySelectorAll('.build-kanban-header');
            var colBodies = document.querySelectorAll('.build-kanban-body');
            colHeaders.forEach(function(h, idx) {
              if (h.textContent === st2 && colBodies[idx]) { targetCard.remove(); colBodies[idx].appendChild(targetCard); }
            });
          }
          if (st2 === 'Done') {
            var pctEl2 = document.getElementById('kanban-pct-' + taskId);
            if (pctEl2) { pctEl2.textContent = '100%'; pctEl2.style.color = '#22c55e'; }
            updateGlobalIncidentProgress();
          }
          // Update live progress when task status changes
          ensureLiveTicketId().then(function(tid) {
            if (!tid) return;
            var allC5 = document.querySelectorAll('.build-kanban-card');
            var tT5 = allC5.length; var dT5 = 0; var tP5 = 0;
            allC5.forEach(function(c5) {
              var p5 = document.getElementById('kanban-pct-' + c5.dataset.taskId);
              var v5 = p5 ? parseInt(p5.textContent) || 0 : 0;
              tP5 += v5; if (v5 >= 100) dT5++;
            });
            var g5 = tT5 > 0 ? Math.round(tP5 / tT5) : 0;
            fetch(API_BASE + '/incidencias/live/' + tid + '/progreso?progreso=' + g5 + '&tareas_completadas=' + dT5 + '&total_tareas=' + tT5, {method:'PUT'})
              .then(function() { if (typeof loadActiveIncidents === 'function') loadActiveIncidents(); });
          });
        }, 100);
      };
      statusBar.appendChild(btn);
    });
    modal.appendChild(statusBar);
    if (cmdbItems.length===0 && instrucciones.length===0 && checklist.length===0) {
      var w = document.createElement('div'); w.style.cssText = 'text-align:center;padding:30px;color:#8b8f98;font-style:italic;font-size:13px;';
      w.textContent = 'AG-012 a\u00fan no ha procesado esta tarjeta. Reintenta en unos segundos.';
      body.insertBefore(w, body.firstChild);
    }
    overlay.appendChild(modal); document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  });
}

// =============================================
// BUILD PIPELINE v2.0 — Pipeline bar + progress
// =============================================

function renderBuildCascadeIdle() {
  var c = document.getElementById('build-cascade-idle');
  if (!c) return;

  function agentPill(id, sub) {
    var color = buildAgentColors[id] || '#8b8f98';
    var name = buildAgentNames[id] || id;
    var icon = buildAgentIcons[id] || '';
    return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 8px;border:2px solid ' + color + '40;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg2);flex-shrink:0;border-left:3px solid ' + color + ';">' +
      '<div style="width:26px;height:26px;flex-shrink:0;color:' + color + ';">' + icon + '</div>' +
      '<div style="min-width:0;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#e4e5e9;">' + id + ' ' + name + '</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">' + (sub || '') + '</div></div>' +
      '</div>';
  }

  function arrowRight() {
    return '<svg width="20" height="10" style="flex-shrink:0;"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="14" y2="5" stroke="#30363d" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="5" to="0" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line><polygon points="14,2 20,5 14,8" fill="#30363d"/></svg>';
  }

  function pauseMark(num) {
    return '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;padding:0 2px;"><div style="width:0;height:14px;border-left:2px dashed rgba(234,179,8,0.5);"></div><span style="font-size:6px;font-weight:700;color:#eab308;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.1);padding:1px 4px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;">\u23f8' + num + '</span><div style="width:0;height:14px;border-left:2px dashed rgba(234,179,8,0.5);"></div></div>';
  }

  function parallelPair(id1, sub1, id2, sub2, id3, sub3) {
    function pill(id, sub) {
      var c = buildAgentColors[id] || '#8b8f98', n = buildAgentNames[id] || id, ic = buildAgentIcons[id] || '';
      return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:4px 6px;border:2px solid ' + c + '40;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg2);border-left:3px solid ' + c + ';"><div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;color:' + c + ';">' + ic + '</div><div><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#e4e5e9;">' + id + ' ' + n + '</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;">' + sub + '</div></div></div>';
    }
    var h = '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;">';
    h += pill(id1, sub1) + pill(id2, sub2);
    if (id3) h += pill(id3, sub3);
    return h + '</div>';
  }

  var html = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0;overflow-x:auto;padding:4px 0;">';
  // Entry
  html += '<span style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;padding:4px 8px;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;">PMBOK Input</span>';
  html += arrowRight();
  // AG-005
  html += agentPill('AG-005', 'EDT/WBS \u00b7 PMBOK 7');
  html += pauseMark(1);
  // AG-013
  html += agentPill('AG-013', 'Subtareas \u00b7 CMDB');
  html += pauseMark(2);
  // AG-014 + AG-015 parallel
  html += parallelPair('AG-014', 'Riesgos', 'AG-015', 'Stakeholders', 'AG-011', 'Cambios \u00b7 CMDB');
  html += pauseMark(3);
  // AG-006
  html += agentPill('AG-006', 'PM \u00b7 Equipo');
  html += pauseMark(4);
  // AG-016 + AG-007 parallel
  html += parallelPair('AG-016', 'BAC \u00b7 ROI', 'AG-007', 'Gantt \u00b7 CPM');
  html += arrowRight();
  // AG-017
  html += agentPill('AG-017', 'Gates \u00b7 DoD');
  html += arrowRight();
  // Output
  html += '<span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#22c55e;padding:4px 10px;border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3);border-radius:6px;background:rgba(34,197,94,0.06);white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;">\u2713 Output</span>';
  html += '</div>';

  c.innerHTML = html;
  var a018 = document.getElementById('build-cascade-018');
  if (a018 && buildAgentIcons['AG-018']) a018.innerHTML = buildAgentIcons['AG-018'];
}

function renderBuildPipelineBar(containerId) {
  var container = document.getElementById(containerId);
  if (!container) return;

  var bar = document.createElement('div');
  bar.id = 'build-pipeline-bar-v2';
  bar.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#1a1d24;border-radius:12px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:12px;overflow:hidden;width:100%;flex-wrap:nowrap;';

  var label = document.createElement('span');
  label.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;margin-right:6px;flex-shrink:0;';
  label.textContent = 'PMBOK 7 \u25b8';
  bar.appendChild(label);

  buildPipelineOrder.forEach(function(agentId, idx) {
    var state = buildPipelineState[agentId] || 'pending';
    var color = buildAgentColors[agentId];
    var name = buildAgentNames[agentId];

    var agentDiv = document.createElement('div');
    agentDiv.id = 'build-pipe-' + agentId;
    agentDiv.setAttribute('data-agent-id', agentId);
    agentDiv.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:3px 4px;border-radius:6px;flex-shrink:1;min-width:0;position:relative;overflow:visible;opacity:' + (state === 'pending' ? '0.35' : state === 'done' ? '0.7' : '1') + ';' + (state === 'active' ? 'background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);' : '');

    var iconDiv = document.createElement('div');
    iconDiv.style.cssText = 'width:36px;height:36px;flex-shrink:0;color:' + color + ';';
    iconDiv.innerHTML = buildAgentIcons[agentId];
    agentDiv.appendChild(iconDiv);

    var textDiv = document.createElement('div');
    var nameSpan = document.createElement('div');
    nameSpan.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.2;color:' + color + ';' + (state === 'done' ? 'text-decoration:line-through;' : '');
    nameSpan.textContent = agentId;
    var subSpan = document.createElement('div');
    subSpan.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;';
    subSpan.textContent = name + (state === 'done' ? ' \u2713' : '');
    textDiv.appendChild(nameSpan);
    textDiv.appendChild(subSpan);
    agentDiv.appendChild(textDiv);

    bar.appendChild(agentDiv);

    if (idx < buildPipelineOrder.length - 1) {
      var arrow = document.createElement('span');
      arrow.style.cssText = 'color:#333840;font-size:10px;flex-shrink:1;';
      arrow.textContent = '\u25b8';
      bar.appendChild(arrow);
    }
  });

  var progLabel = document.createElement('span');
  progLabel.id = 'build-pipe-progress-label';
  progLabel.style.cssText = 'margin-left:auto;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;flex-shrink:0;';
  progLabel.textContent = 'READY';
  bar.appendChild(progLabel);

  container.innerHTML = '';
  container.appendChild(bar);
}

function activateBuildAgent(agentId) {
  buildPipelineState[agentId] = 'active';
  var el = document.getElementById('build-pipe-' + agentId);
  if (el) {
    el.style.opacity = '1';
    el.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';
    el.style.animation = 'pulse 2s infinite';
  }
}

function completeBuildAgent(agentId, latencyMs, costUsd) {
  buildPipelineState[agentId] = 'done';
  buildPipelineCost += (costUsd || 0.04);
  var el = document.getElementById('build-pipe-' + agentId);
  if (el) {
    el.style.opacity = '0.7';
    el.style.background = 'none';
    el.style.animation = 'none';
    var nameEl = el.querySelector('div > div:first-child');
    if (nameEl) nameEl.style.textDecoration = 'line-through';
    var subEl = el.querySelector('div > div:last-child');
    if (subEl) subEl.textContent = buildAgentNames[agentId] + ' \u2713';
  }
  makeAgentClickableForNavigation(agentId);
}

function setAgentSpawningState(agentId, state, numWorkers) {
  var agentEl = document.getElementById('build-pipe-' + agentId);
  if (!agentEl || SPAWNABLE_AGENT_IDS.indexOf(agentId) === -1) return;
  agentEl.querySelectorAll('.spawn-orbiter,.spawn-badge,.spawn-glow').forEach(function(el) { el.remove(); });

  if (state === 'idle') {
    var b = document.createElement('div'); b.className = 'spawn-badge';
    b.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:-2px;right:-2px;width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;background:#0f1117;border:2px solid #d946ef;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;color:#d946ef;font-family:monospace;z-index:2;';
    b.textContent = '\u00d7N'; agentEl.appendChild(b);
  }

  if (state === 'spawning') {
    var g = document.createElement('div'); g.className = 'spawn-glow';
    g.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:50%;left:16px;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(217,70,239,0.08);pointer-events:none;animation:spawn-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;z-index:0;';
    agentEl.appendChild(g);
    var n = Math.min(numWorkers || 4, 6);
    for (var i = 0; i < n; i++) {
      var o = document.createElement('div'); o.className = 'spawn-orbiter';
      o.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:50%;left:16px;margin-top:-6px;margin-left:-6px;pointer-events:none;width:12px;height:12px;animation:spawn-orbit 3s linear infinite;animation-delay:-'+(i*(3/n)).toFixed(2)+'s;z-index:1;';
      o.innerHTML = '<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 Z" fill="rgba(217,70,239,0.3)" stroke="#d946ef" stroke-width="8"/></svg>';
      agentEl.appendChild(o);
    }
    var b = document.createElement('div'); b.className = 'spawn-badge';
    b.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:-2px;right:-2px;width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;background:#0f1117;border:2px solid #d946ef;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:#d946ef;font-family:monospace;z-index:2;';
    b.textContent = ''+(numWorkers||'?'); agentEl.appendChild(b);
  }

  if (state === 'done') {
    var b = document.createElement('div'); b.className = 'spawn-badge';
    b.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:-2px;right:-2px;width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;background:#0f1117;border:2px solid #22c55e;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;color:#22c55e;font-family:monospace;z-index:2;';
    b.textContent = '\u2713'+(numWorkers||''); agentEl.appendChild(b);
  }
}

function makeAgentClickableForNavigation(agentId) {
  var pauseNum = AGENT_TO_PAUSE[agentId];
  if (!pauseNum || pauseNum === 0) return;
  var agentEl = document.getElementById('build-pipe-' + agentId);
  if (!agentEl) return;
  agentEl.style.cursor = 'pointer';
  agentEl.title = 'Click para revisar Pausa ' + pauseNum;
  agentEl.onclick = function(e) {
    e.stopPropagation();
    if (currentPauseNumber === 0) return;
    if (pauseNum > maxPauseReached) return;
    if (pauseNum === currentPauseNumber && !navigatedFromPause) return;
    if (navigatedFromPause) { navigateBackToCurrentPause(); return; }
    navigateToPause(pauseNum);
  };
}

function navigateToPause(targetPause) {
  navigatedFromPause = currentPauseNumber;
  var pauseArea = document.getElementById('build-pause-area');
  if (!pauseArea || !pipelineDataRef) return;
  pauseContainerBackup = { pause: currentPauseNumber, resolve: currentPauseResolve };
  currentPauseNumber = targetPause;

  pauseArea.innerHTML = '';
  var navBanner = document.createElement('div');
  navBanner.id = 'pause-nav-banner';
  navBanner.style.cssText = 'background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(59,130,246,0.15),rgba(139,92,246,0.15));border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 16px;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;';
  navBanner.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><span style="font-size:16px;">\u23ea</span><span style="font-size:13px;color:#93c5fd;">Revisando Pausa '+targetPause+'/4 — Los cambios se guardan automaticamente</span></div><button id="nav-back-btn" style="padding:8px 16px;border-radius:6px;border:none;background:#3b82f6;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">Volver a Pausa '+navigatedFromPause+' \u2192</button>';
  pauseArea.appendChild(navBanner);

  document.getElementById('nav-back-btn').onclick = function() { navigateBackToCurrentPause(); };

  // Render pause content using showBuildPause but intercept the resolve
  var pauseDiv = document.createElement('div');
  pauseArea.appendChild(pauseDiv);

  // Create a temporary pause area, call showBuildPause, it writes to build-pause-area
  // We need to re-use the rendering logic. Simplest: call showBuildPause and ignore the Promise
  var tempPromise = showBuildPause(targetPause, pipelineDataRef);
  // The pause renders into build-pause-area. The Promise won't resolve until user clicks approve.
  // That's fine — the user will click "Volver" instead which restores.

  // Hide the approve button and show only "Volver"
  setTimeout(function() {
    var approveBtn = document.getElementById('build-pause-approve-' + targetPause);
    if (approveBtn) approveBtn.style.display = 'none';
    // Move nav banner to top (showBuildPause cleared the area)
    var area = document.getElementById('build-pause-area');
    if (area && !document.getElementById('pause-nav-banner')) {
      area.insertBefore(navBanner, area.firstChild);
    }
  }, 100);

  highlightPauseInPipelineBar(targetPause);
}

function navigateBackToCurrentPause() {
  var pauseArea = document.getElementById('build-pause-area');
  if (!pauseArea || !pauseContainerBackup) return;
  var savedPause = pauseContainerBackup.pause;
  var savedResolve = pauseContainerBackup.resolve;
  pauseContainerBackup = null;
  navigatedFromPause = 0;
  currentPauseNumber = savedPause;

  // Re-renderizar la pausa completa (re-crea todos los onclick)
  // Pasamos el resolve original para que "Aprobar" siga resolviendo la Promise del pipeline
  pauseArea.innerHTML = '';
  var banner = document.getElementById('pause-nav-banner');
  if (banner) banner.remove();
  showBuildPause(savedPause, pipelineDataRef, savedResolve);
  highlightPauseInPipelineBar(savedPause);
}

function highlightPauseInPipelineBar(pauseNum) {
  Object.keys(AGENT_TO_PAUSE).forEach(function(agId) {
    var el = document.getElementById('build-pipe-' + agId);
    if (!el) return;
    el.style.outline = '';
    el.style.outlineOffset = '';
    if (AGENT_TO_PAUSE[agId] === pauseNum && buildPipelineState[agId] === 'done') {
      el.style.outline = '2px solid #3b82f6';
      el.style.outlineOffset = '3px';
    }
  });
}

function updateBuildProgress(pct) {
  var label = document.getElementById('build-pipe-progress-label');
  if (label) label.textContent = pct + '%';
  var bar = document.getElementById('build-progress-fill');
  if (bar) bar.style.width = pct + '%';
  var pctEl = document.getElementById('build-progress-pct');
  if (pctEl) pctEl.textContent = pct + '%';
}

function renderBuildProgressBar(containerId) {
  var container = document.getElementById(containerId);
  if (!container) return;

  var bar = document.createElement('div');
  bar.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;background:#1a1d24;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 16px;margin-bottom:12px;';

  var timeDiv = document.createElement('div');
  timeDiv.innerHTML = '<div id="build-progress-time" style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;letter-spacing:1px;">--:--</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98">Tiempo</div>';
  bar.appendChild(timeDiv);

  var pctDiv = document.createElement('div');
  pctDiv.innerHTML = '<div id="build-progress-pct" style="font-size:24px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#3b82f6;">0%</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98">Progreso</div>';
  bar.appendChild(pctDiv);

  var trackDiv = document.createElement('div');
  trackDiv.style.cssText = 'flex:1;';
  trackDiv.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;"><span id="build-progress-info">Esperando...</span><span id="build-progress-cost">~0.00 USD</span></div><div style="height:6px;background:#181b20;border-radius:3px;margin-top:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div id="build-progress-fill" style="height:100%;width:0%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#10b981,#d946ef,#eab308,#ec4899);border-radius:3px;transition:width 0.5s;"></div></div>';
  bar.appendChild(trackDiv);

  container.appendChild(bar);
}

// =============================================
// BUILD PIPELINE v1 — Legacy functions (below)
// =============================================

function _buildPipelineBar(agentsUsed, activeAgent) {
  var allAgents = [
    {id:'AG-001', name:'AG-001 Dispatcher'},
    {id:'AG-002', name:'AG-002 Res. Manager'},
    {id:'AG-004', name:'AG-004 Buffer'}
  ];
  var html = '<div class="run-pipeline-bar">';
  allAgents.forEach(function(a, i) {
    if (i > 0) html += '<span class="arrow-sep">\u25b8</span>';
    var cls = 'agent-pill';
    if (activeAgent === a.id) cls += ' active';
    else if (agentsUsed.indexOf(a.id) >= 0) cls += ' done';
    else if (a.id === 'AG-004' && agentsUsed.indexOf('AG-004') < 0 && agentsUsed.length > 0) cls += ' skipped';
    else cls += ' waiting';
    var label = a.name;
    if (agentsUsed.indexOf(a.id) >= 0) label = '\u2713 ' + a.name;
    else if (a.id === 'AG-004' && agentsUsed.indexOf('AG-004') < 0 && agentsUsed.length > 0) label = a.name + ' (no requerido)';
    html += '<span class="' + cls + '">' + label + '</span>';
  });
  if (agentsUsed.length > 0) {
    html += '<span class="arrow-sep">\u25b8</span><span style="color:#22c55e;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">\u2713 Completado</span>';
  }
  html += '</div>';
  return html;
}

// ═══ AGENT PIPELINE ICONS & HELPERS ═══
var AGENT_PIPELINE_ICONS = {};
AGENT_PIPELINE_ICONS['AG-001'] = '<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="36" height="36" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M30 35 L45 50 V70 L55 70 V50 L70 35 Z" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="50" cy="30" r="5" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M25 45 H35" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/><path d="M65 45 H75" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/></svg>';
AGENT_PIPELINE_ICONS['AG-002'] = '<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="36" height="36" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="35" cy="50" r="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="65" cy="50" r="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M45 50 H55" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="3" fill="currentColor"/></svg>';
AGENT_PIPELINE_ICONS['AG-004'] = '<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="36" height="36" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="35" y="45" width="30" height="25" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M40 45 V35 A10 10 0 0 1 60 35 V45" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="50" cy="57" r="3" fill="#1a1d23"/></svg>';
AGENT_PIPELINE_ICONS['AG-005'] = '<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="36" height="36" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M30 75 H70 L50 30 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="50" cy="20" r="5" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M40 55 H60 M45 45 H55" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/></svg>';
AGENT_PIPELINE_ICONS['AG-006'] = '<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="36" height="36" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="30" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="50" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="55" y="30" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="55" y="50" width="15" height="15" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="75" cy="75" r="5" fill="currentColor"/></svg>';
AGENT_PIPELINE_ICONS['AG-007'] = '<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="36" height="36" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><rect x="30" y="35" width="40" height="8" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="50" width="25" height="8" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="65" width="55" height="8" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/></svg>';
AGENT_PIPELINE_ICONS['AG-012'] = '<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="36" height="36" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M50 5 L92 28 V72 L50 95 L8 72 V28 L50 5 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="50" cy="45" r="15" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M50 30 V25" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/><path d="M50 60 V65" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/><path d="M35 45 H30" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/><path d="M65 45 H70" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"/><circle cx="50" cy="45" r="3" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M50 45 L58 38" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"/></svg>';

var AGENT_COLORS_MAP = {
  'AG-001':'#3b82f6','AG-002':'#a855f7','AG-003':'#f97316',
  'AG-004':'#06b6d4','AG-005':'#10b981','AG-006':'#eab308','AG-007':'#ec4899','AG-012':'#22c55e'
};
var AGENT_NAMES_MAP = {
  'AG-001':'Dispatcher','AG-002':'Resource Manager','AG-003':'Demand Forecaster',
  'AG-004':'Buffer Gatekeeper','AG-005':'Estratega','AG-006':'Resource Manager PMO','AG-007':'Planificador','AG-012':'Task Advisor'
};
var AGENT_SUBS_MAP = {
  'AG-001':'Triaje NLP \u00b7 ITIL 4','AG-002':'Matching T\u00e9cnico',
  'AG-003':'Prophet \u00b7 Predicci\u00f3n','AG-004':'Gobernanza RUN/BUILD',
  'AG-005':'PMBOK 7 \u00b7 Priorizaci\u00f3n','AG-006':'Asignaci\u00f3n \u00b7 Matching','AG-007':'WBS \u00b7 Gantt \u00b7 PMBOK','AG-012':'CMDB \u00b7 Instrucciones'
};

function createAnimatedPipeline(agentIds) {
  var bar = document.createElement('div');
  bar.className = 'pipeline-animated';
  var inp = document.createElement('span');
  inp.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;padding:4px 8px;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;white-space:nowrap;';
  inp.textContent = agentIds[0] === 'AG-001' ? 'ITIL 4 Input' : 'PMBOK Input';
  bar.appendChild(inp);
  agentIds.forEach(function(agId, i) {
    var arr = document.createElement('span');
    arr.className = 'pipeline-arrow';
    arr.id = 'arrow-' + agId;
    arr.textContent = '\u25b8';
    bar.appendChild(arr);
    var step = document.createElement('div');
    step.className = 'agent-step ' + (i === 0 ? 'active' : 'waiting');
    step.id = 'step-' + agId;
    step.style.setProperty('--agent-color', AGENT_COLORS_MAP[agId] || '#8b8f98');
    var iconDiv = document.createElement('div');
    iconDiv.className = 'agent-icon';
    iconDiv.style.color = AGENT_COLORS_MAP[agId] || '#8b8f98';
    iconDiv.innerHTML = AGENT_PIPELINE_ICONS[agId] || '';
    var infoDiv = document.createElement('div');
    infoDiv.className = 'agent-info';
    infoDiv.innerHTML = '<div class="agent-name">' + agId + ' \u2014 ' + (AGENT_NAMES_MAP[agId] || agId) + '</div><div class="agent-sub" id="sub-' + agId + '">' + (AGENT_SUBS_MAP[agId] || '') + '</div>';
    var statusDiv = document.createElement('div');
    statusDiv.className = 'agent-status';
    statusDiv.id = 'status-' + agId;
    step.appendChild(iconDiv);
    step.appendChild(infoDiv);
    step.appendChild(statusDiv);
    bar.appendChild(step);
  });
  var arrOut = document.createElement('span');
  arrOut.className = 'pipeline-arrow';
  arrOut.id = 'arrow-output';
  arrOut.textContent = '\u25b8';
  bar.appendChild(arrOut);
  var out = document.createElement('span');
  out.id = 'pipeline-output-label';
  out.style.cssText = 'font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;white-space:nowrap;';
  out.textContent = 'READY';
  bar.appendChild(out);
  return bar;
}

function setAgentState(agId, state, statusText) {
  var step = document.getElementById('step-' + agId);
  if (!step) return;
  step.className = 'agent-step ' + state;
  var st = document.getElementById('status-' + agId);
  if (st && statusText) { st.textContent = statusText; st.style.display = 'block'; }
  var sub = document.getElementById('sub-' + agId);
  if (sub) {
    if (state === 'active') {
      sub.innerHTML = (AGENT_SUBS_MAP[agId] || '') + '<span class="typing-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></span>';
    } else {
      sub.textContent = AGENT_SUBS_MAP[agId] || '';
    }
  }
  var arr = document.getElementById('arrow-' + agId);
  if (arr && (state === 'done' || state === 'active')) arr.className = 'pipeline-arrow active';
}

function setPipelineComplete(success) {
  var lbl = document.getElementById('pipeline-output-label');
  var arr = document.getElementById('arrow-output');
  if (lbl) { lbl.textContent = success ? '\u2713 Completado' : '\u2715 Error'; lbl.style.color = success ? '#22c55e' : '#ef4444'; }
  if (arr) arr.className = 'pipeline-arrow active';
}
// ═══ END AGENT PIPELINE HELPERS ═══

// ══════════════════ PIPELINE SESSIONS ══════════════════

async function savePipelineState(nombre, pausaActual, pipelineData, businessCase) {
  try {
    var ser = function(v) { if (!v) return null; if (typeof v === 'object') return v; try { return JSON.parse(v); } catch(e) { return v; } };
    if (!currentPipelineSessionId) currentPipelineSessionId = 'PS-' + Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase();
    var body = {
      id: currentPipelineSessionId,
      nombre: nombre || '',
      estado: pausaActual >= 5 ? 'COMPLETADO' : 'PAUSA_' + pausaActual,
      pausa_actual: pausaActual,
      pipeline_data: {
        edtResult: ser(pipelineData.edtResult),
        subtasksResult: ser(pipelineData.subtasksResult),
        risksResult: ser(pipelineData.risksResult),
        stakeholdersResult: ser(pipelineData.stakeholdersResult),
        resourceResult: ser(pipelineData.resourceResult),
        selectedPM: pipelineData.selectedPM || null,
        costResult: ser(pipelineData.costResult),
        planResult: ser(pipelineData.planResult),
        qualityResult: ser(pipelineData.qualityResult)
      },
      business_case: businessCase || {},
      session_id: typeof buildAdvisorSessionId !== 'undefined' ? buildAdvisorSessionId : '',
      tiempo_ms: buildPipelineStartTime ? Date.now() - buildPipelineStartTime : 0,
      coste: typeof buildPipelineCost !== 'undefined' ? buildPipelineCost : 0,
      agentes_completados: Object.keys(buildPipelineState || {}).filter(function(k) { return buildPipelineState[k] === 'done'; })
    };
    console.log('savePipelineState: pausa=' + pausaActual + ' id=' + currentPipelineSessionId + ' nombre=' + nombre);
    var resp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/pipeline/sessions', {
      method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });
    if (!resp.ok) { console.error('savePipelineState HTTP error:', resp.status, await resp.text()); return; }
    var result = await resp.json();
    currentPipelineSessionId = result.id;
    console.log('savePipelineState OK: id=' + result.id);
    loadBuildLiveSessions();
  } catch(e) { console.error('savePipelineState EXCEPTION:', e.message, e); }
}

async function loadBuildLiveSessions() {
  try {
    var resp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/pipeline/sessions');
    var sessions = JSON.parse(await resp.text()) || [];
    var container = document.getElementById('build-live-sessions');
    if (!container) return;
    container.innerHTML = '';
    if (!sessions || sessions.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;padding:12px;">No hay pipelines activos</div>';
      return;
    }
    sessions.forEach(function(s) {
      var estadoColor = '#8b8f98', estadoText = s.estado || '';
      if (s.estado === 'COMPLETADO') { estadoColor = '#22c55e'; estadoText = 'Completado'; }
      else if ((s.estado||'').indexOf('PAUSA') >= 0) { estadoColor = '#eab308'; estadoText = 'Pausa ' + (s.pausa_actual||0) + '/4'; }
      else if (s.estado === 'EN_PROGRESO') { estadoColor = '#3b82f6'; estadoText = 'Ejecutando...'; }
      // Step dots (P1-P5)
      var pausa = s.pausa_actual || 0;
      var dots = '';
      for (var di = 1; di <= 5; di++) {
        var dc = di <= pausa ? '#10b981' : '#2d3748';
        dots += '<span style="display:inline-block;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:'+dc+';margin-right:3px;"></span>';
      }
      var card = document.createElement('div');
      card.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.2s;';
      card.onmouseenter = function() { card.style.borderColor = '#3b82f6'; };
      card.onmouseleave = function() { card.style.borderColor = '#333840'; };
      card.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:180px;">'+(s.nombre_proyecto||'Sin nombre')+'</div><span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:'+estadoColor+';font-weight:600;">'+estadoText+'</span></div><div style="display:flex;gap:3px;margin-bottom:4px;">'+dots+'</div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;"><span>'+Math.round((s.tiempo_acumulado_ms||0)/1000)+'s</span><span>~$'+(s.coste_acumulado||0).toFixed(2)+'</span></div>';
      card.onclick = function() { resumePipelineSession(s.id); };
      container.appendChild(card);
    });
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Error cargando sesiones:', e); }
}

async function resumePipelineSession(sessionId) {
  try {
    var resp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/pipeline/sessions/' + sessionId);
    var session = JSON.parse(await resp.text());
    if (!session || !session.pipeline_data) { showToast('No se pudo cargar la sesion del pipeline'); return; }

    var savedData = typeof session.pipeline_data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(session.pipeline_data) : session.pipeline_data;
    if (session.business_case) {
      var bc = typeof session.business_case === 'string' ? JSON.parse(session.business_case) : session.business_case;
      savedData.solicitud = bc;
      savedData.businessCase = bc;
    }
    savedData.formText = session.nombre_proyecto || '';
    var maxPausa = session.pausa_actual || 1;
    currentPipelineSessionId = session.id;

    var idleEl = document.getElementById('build-pipeline-idle');
    if (idleEl) idleEl.style.display = 'none';

    var pauseArea = document.getElementById('build-pause-area');
    if (!pauseArea) {
      var pipeArea = document.getElementById('build-pipeline-area');
      if (pipeArea) { pauseArea = document.createElement('div'); pauseArea.id = 'build-pause-area'; pipeArea.appendChild(pauseArea); }
    }
    if (pauseArea) pauseArea.innerHTML = '';

    var onClose = function() {
      var nav = document.getElementById('pipeline-steps-nav');
      if (nav) nav.remove();
      if (pauseArea) pauseArea.innerHTML = '';
      if (idleEl) idleEl.style.display = '';
      if (typeof loadBuildLiveSessions === 'function') loadBuildLiveSessions();
    };

    var activeStep = maxPausa >= 5 ? 5 : maxPausa;
    renderPipelineStepsHeader(null, savedData, maxPausa, activeStep, onClose);

    if (maxPausa >= 5) {
      showBuildFinalScreen(savedData);
    } else {
      showBuildPauseReadOnly(savedData, maxPausa);
    }
  } catch(e) { console.error('Error reanudando sesion:', e); showToast('Error al cargar la sesion: ' + e.message); }
}

// ── HEADER DE NAVEGACIÓN POR STEPS DEL PIPELINE ──
function renderPipelineStepsHeader(containerParent, pipelineData, maxPausa, activePausa, onClose) {
  var oldHeader = document.getElementById('pipeline-steps-nav');
  if (oldHeader) oldHeader.remove();

  var header = document.createElement('div');
  header.id = 'pipeline-steps-nav';
  header.className = 'pipeline-steps-header';

  var title = document.createElement('span');
  title.className = 'step-title';
  var nombre = 'Proyecto';
  try {
    if (pipelineData.solicitud && pipelineData.solicitud.nombre) nombre = pipelineData.solicitud.nombre;
    else if (pipelineData.businessCase && pipelineData.businessCase.nombre) nombre = pipelineData.businessCase.nombre;
    else if (pipelineData.formText) nombre = pipelineData.formText;
  } catch(e) {}
  title.textContent = nombre;
  header.appendChild(title);

  var steps = [
    { num: 1, label: 'EDT+Acta', icon: '\ud83d\udcc4' },
    { num: 2, label: 'Subtareas', icon: '\ud83d\udd27' },
    { num: 3, label: 'Riesgos+STK', icon: '\u26a0\ufe0f' },
    { num: 4, label: 'PM+Equipo', icon: '\ud83d\udc65' },
    { num: 5, label: 'Final', icon: '\ud83c\udfc1' }
  ];

  steps.forEach(function(step, idx) {
    if (idx > 0) {
      var arrow = document.createElement('span');
      arrow.className = 'pipeline-step-arrow';
      arrow.textContent = '\u2192';
      header.appendChild(arrow);
    }
    var btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className = 'pipeline-step-btn';
    if (step.num < activePausa || (step.num <= maxPausa && step.num < activePausa)) btn.classList.add('completed');
    if (step.num === activePausa) btn.classList.add('active');
    if (step.num > maxPausa && !(step.num === 5 && maxPausa >= 5)) btn.classList.add('disabled');
    btn.textContent = step.icon + ' ' + step.label;

    if (step.num <= maxPausa || (step.num === 5 && maxPausa >= 5)) {
      btn.onclick = function() {
        navigateToPipelineStep(pipelineData, step.num, maxPausa, containerParent, onClose);
      };
    }
    header.appendChild(btn);
  });

  if (onClose) {
    var closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
    closeBtn.className = 'step-close';
    closeBtn.textContent = '\u2715 Cerrar';
    closeBtn.onclick = function() {
      onClose();
    };
    header.appendChild(closeBtn);
  }

  // Insertar ANTES de build-pause-area (como hermano, no dentro)
  var pauseArea = document.getElementById('build-pause-area');
  if (pauseArea && pauseArea.parentNode) {
    pauseArea.parentNode.insertBefore(header, pauseArea);
  } else if (containerParent) {
    containerParent.insertBefore(header, containerParent.firstChild);
  }
  return header;
}

// ── NAVEGAR A UN STEP ESPECÍFICO ──
function navigateToPipelineStep(pipelineData, stepNum, maxPausa, containerParent, onClose) {
  var pauseArea = document.getElementById('build-pause-area');
  if (pauseArea) pauseArea.innerHTML = '';

  renderPipelineStepsHeader(containerParent, pipelineData, maxPausa, stepNum, onClose);

  if (stepNum >= 5) {
    showBuildFinalScreen(pipelineData);
  } else {
    showBuildPauseReadOnly(pipelineData, stepNum);
  }
}

// ── MOSTRAR PAUSA EN MODO LECTURA (sin Promise, sin botón Aprobar) ──
function showBuildPauseReadOnly(pipelineData, pauseNumber) {
  var area = document.getElementById('build-pause-area');
  if (!area) return;
  area.innerHTML = '';
  pipelineDataRef = pipelineData;
  try {
    showBuildPause(pauseNumber, pipelineData, function() {
      console.log('Modo lectura: pausa', pauseNumber);
    });
    // Ocultar botón Aprobar en modo lectura (aparece después del render)
    setTimeout(function() {
      var approveBtn = document.getElementById('build-pause-approve-' + pauseNumber);
      if (approveBtn) {
        approveBtn.textContent = '\ud83d\udd12 Modo lectura';
        approveBtn.disabled = true;
        approveBtn.style.cssText = 'padding:8px 18px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:not-allowed;border:none;background:#333840;color:#8b8f98;';
      }
    }, 200);
  } catch(e) {
    area.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:20px;color:#8b8f98;"><h3 style="color:#e8e9ed;">Pausa ' + pauseNumber + '</h3><p>Datos del pipeline guardados.</p><pre style="font-size:10px;max-height:400px;overflow:auto;background:#0f1724;padding:12px;border-radius:8px;">' + JSON.stringify(pipelineData, null, 2).substring(0, 5000) + '</pre></div>';
  }
}

// ══════════════════ BUILD DASHBOARD VISUAL ══════════════════

async function executeBuildPipeline(text) {
  var execBtn = document.getElementById('build-exec-btn');
  var statusEl = document.getElementById('build-status-val');
  if (execBtn) execBtn.disabled = true;
  if (statusEl) { statusEl.textContent = 'Running'; statusEl.style.color = 'var(--blue)'; }

  // Inicializar estado
  buildPipelineState = {};
  buildPipelineOrder.forEach(function(id) { buildPipelineState[id] = 'pending'; });
  buildPipelineStartTime = Date.now();
  buildPipelineCost = 0;
  buildAdvisorSessionId = 'BUILD-' + Date.now();

  // Preparar área de pipeline
  var area = document.getElementById('build-pipeline-area');
  var idleEl = document.getElementById('build-pipeline-idle');
  if (idleEl) idleEl.style.display = 'none';
  var oldSteps = document.getElementById('build-steps');
  if (oldSteps) oldSteps.remove();

  var dashboard = document.createElement('div');
  dashboard.className = 'build-dashboard';
  dashboard.id = 'build-steps';
  area.appendChild(dashboard);

  // Renderizar pipeline bar v2 + progress bar
  var pipeBarContainer = document.createElement('div');
  pipeBarContainer.id = 'build-pipe-container';
  dashboard.appendChild(pipeBarContainer);
  renderBuildPipelineBar('build-pipe-container');

  var progBarContainer = document.createElement('div');
  progBarContainer.id = 'build-prog-container';
  dashboard.appendChild(progBarContainer);
  renderBuildProgressBar('build-prog-container');

  // Log panel
  var logContainer = document.createElement('div');
  var logTitle = document.createElement('div');
  logTitle.className = 'build-section-title';
  logTitle.textContent = 'Panel de actividad';
  var logBox = document.createElement('div');
  logBox.className = 'build-log';
  logBox.id = 'build-live-log';
  logContainer.appendChild(logTitle);
  logContainer.appendChild(logBox);
  dashboard.appendChild(logContainer);

  // Área para pausas y resultados
  var pauseArea = document.createElement('div');
  pauseArea.id = 'build-pause-area';
  dashboard.appendChild(pauseArea);

  var sessionId = buildAdvisorSessionId;
  function elapsed() {
    var s = Math.floor((Date.now() - buildPipelineStartTime) / 1000);
    var m = Math.floor(s / 60); s = s % 60;
    return (m < 10 ? '0' + m : m) + ':' + (s < 10 ? '0' + s : s);
  }
  function addLog(agent, cls, msg, isTool) {
    var log = document.getElementById('build-live-log');
    if (!log) return;
    var entry = document.createElement('div');
    entry.className = 'build-log-entry';
    var timeSpan = document.createElement('span');
    timeSpan.className = 'build-log-time';
    timeSpan.textContent = elapsed();
    var agentSpan = document.createElement('span');
    agentSpan.className = 'build-log-agent ' + cls;
    agentSpan.textContent = agent;
    var msgSpan = document.createElement('span');
    if (isTool) msgSpan.className = 'build-log-tool';
    msgSpan.textContent = msg;
    entry.appendChild(timeSpan);
    entry.appendChild(agentSpan);
    entry.appendChild(msgSpan);
    log.appendChild(entry);
    log.scrollTop = log.scrollHeight;
    // Update timer
    var timeEl = document.getElementById('build-progress-time');
    if (timeEl) timeEl.textContent = elapsed();
  }

  // Acumular datos entre agentes
  var pipelineData = {
    formText: text,
    edtResult: null,
    subtasksResult: null,
    risksResult: null,
    stakeholdersResult: null,
    resourceResult: null,
    selectedPM: null,
    costResult: null,
    planResult: null,
    qualityResult: null
  };
  pipelineDataRef = pipelineData;
  currentPauseNumber = 0;
  maxPauseReached = 0;

  // Timer para actualizar reloj cada segundo
  var buildTimer = setInterval(function() {
    var timeEl = document.getElementById('build-progress-time');
    if (timeEl) timeEl.textContent = elapsed();
    var costEl = document.getElementById('build-progress-cost');
    if (costEl) costEl.textContent = '~' + buildPipelineCost.toFixed(2) + ' USD';
  }, 1000);

  try {
    // ═══ PASO 1: AG-005 Estratega EDT/WBS ═══
    activateBuildAgent('AG-005');
    setAgentSpawningState('AG-005', 'spawning', 5);
    updateBuildProgress(5);
    addLog('AG-005', 'estratega', 'Spawning Director + 5 Workers...', false);
    addLog('AG-005', 'estratega', 'tool: decompose_pmbok()', true);

    // Función helper para serializar datos de agente sin truncar JSON
    function compressEdtForAgent(edtData, level) {
      try {
        var p = typeof edtData === 'string' ? JSON.parse(edtData.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/)[0]) : edtData;
        if (!p || !p.edt || !p.edt.fases) return typeof edtData === 'string' ? edtData.substring(0, 3000) : JSON.stringify(edtData).substring(0, 3000);
        if (level === 'minimal') {
          return JSON.stringify({
            proyecto: p.acta_constitucion ? p.acta_constitucion.descripcion_alto_nivel.substring(0, 150) : '',
            fases: p.edt.fases.map(function(f) {
              return { nombre: f.nombre, s: f.semana_inicio + '-' + f.semana_fin, h: f.horas,
                tareas: (f.paquetes || []).flatMap(function(pq) {
                  return (pq.tareas || []).map(function(t) { return { id: t.id_tarea, skill: t.skill, h: t.horas }; });
                })
              };
            }),
            total_horas: p.edt.fases.reduce(function(s, f) { return s + (f.horas || 0); }, 0),
            total_tareas: p.edt.fases.reduce(function(s, f) { return s + (f.paquetes || []).reduce(function(s2, pq) { return s2 + (pq.tareas || []).length; }, 0); }, 0)
          });
        }
        if (level === 'medium') {
          return JSON.stringify({
            acta: { descripcion: p.acta_constitucion ? p.acta_constitucion.descripcion_alto_nivel.substring(0, 200) : '', hitos: p.acta_constitucion ? p.acta_constitucion.hitos : [] },
            fases: p.edt.fases.map(function(f) {
              return { nombre: f.nombre, semana_inicio: f.semana_inicio, semana_fin: f.semana_fin, horas: f.horas,
                paquetes: (f.paquetes || []).map(function(pq) {
                  return { nombre: pq.nombre, tareas: (pq.tareas || []).map(function(t) { return { id_tarea: t.id_tarea, nombre: t.nombre, skill: t.skill, horas: t.horas, dependencias: t.dependencias }; }) };
                })
              };
            }),
            meta_negocio: p.meta_negocio || {}
          });
        }
        return typeof edtData === 'string' ? edtData : JSON.stringify(edtData);
      } catch(e) { return typeof edtData === 'string' ? edtData.substring(0, 5000) : JSON.stringify(edtData).substring(0, 5000); }
    }

    function compressSubtasksForAgent(subtData) {
      try {
        var p = typeof subtData === 'string' ? JSON.parse(subtData.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/)[0]) : subtData;
        if (!p) return '{}';
        var sbt = p.subtasks_by_task || p.subtasks || {};
        var mini = { resumen_subtareas: {} };
        Object.keys(sbt).forEach(function(tid) {
          var arr = Array.isArray(sbt[tid]) ? sbt[tid] : [];
          mini.resumen_subtareas[tid] = { count: arr.length, skills: arr.map(function(s) { return s.skill_requerido || s.skill || ''; }).filter(Boolean), pts: arr.reduce(function(s, st) { return s + (st.story_points || 0); }, 0) };
        });
        mini.total = Object.keys(mini.resumen_subtareas).length;
        return JSON.stringify(mini);
      } catch(e) { return typeof subtData === 'string' ? subtData.substring(0, 2000) : '{}'; }
    }

    function serializeAgentData(data, maxLen) {
      if (!data) return '{}';
      var str = typeof data === 'string' ? data : JSON.stringify(data);
      if (str.length <= (maxLen || 6000)) return str;
      try {
        var parsed = typeof data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(data) : data;
        if (parsed.edt && parsed.edt.fases) {
          var resumen = {
            acta_constitucion: parsed.acta_constitucion,
            alcance: parsed.alcance,
            edt: { fases: parsed.edt.fases.map(function(f) {
              return { nombre: f.nombre, semana_inicio: f.semana_inicio, semana_fin: f.semana_fin, horas: f.horas,
                paquetes: (f.paquetes||[]).map(function(p) {
                  return { nombre: p.nombre, tareas: (p.tareas||[]).map(function(t) {
                    return { id_tarea: t.id_tarea, nombre: t.nombre, skill: t.skill, horas: t.horas, dependencias: t.dependencias };
                  })};
                })
              };
            })}
          };
          return JSON.stringify(resumen);
        }
        return str;
      } catch(e) { return str; }
    }

    // Leer solicitud JSON del data attribute
    var solicitud = {};
    try {
      var buildInputEl = document.getElementById('build-input');
      if (buildInputEl && buildInputEl.dataset.businessCaseJson) {
        solicitud = JSON.parse(buildInputEl.dataset.businessCaseJson);
      } else if (typeof text === 'string') {
        try { solicitud = JSON.parse(text); } catch(e) { solicitud = { nombre: 'Proyecto', resumen: text }; }
      }
    } catch(e) {
      solicitud = { nombre: 'Proyecto', resumen: typeof text === 'string' ? text : JSON.stringify(text) };
    }

    var bcJson = JSON.stringify(solicitud, null, 2);
    var ag005Message = 'SOLICITUD DE PROYECTO DESDE NEGOCIO:\n' + bcJson +
      '\n\nNOTAS SOBRE LA SOLICITUD:' +
      '\n- presupuesto_propuesto y fecha_fin_deseada son PROPUESTAS de negocio, no restricciones absolutas.' +
      '\n- Si la prioridad es Alta, intenta ajustarte al plazo y presupuesto propuestos.' +
      '\n- Si la prioridad es Media o Baja, planifica de forma realista independientemente de la propuesta.' +
      '\n- Si un campo es null, estimalo tu basandote en el tipo de proyecto.' +
      '\n\nINSTRUCCION OBLIGATORIA: Genera el EDT/WBS completo con Acta y Alcance. Usa decompose_pmbok(). Devuelve UNICAMENTE JSON valido sin backticks.';

    var t0 = Date.now();
    var resp5 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-005/invoke', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({message: ag005Message, session_id: sessionId})
    });
    var r5 = await resp5.json();
    if (!resp5.ok) throw new Error(r5.detail || 'AG-005 error');
    pipelineData.edtResult = r5.response || r5.result || '';
    completeBuildAgent('AG-005', Date.now() - t0, 0.04);
    var ag005workers = (r5 && r5.spawning_info) ? r5.spawning_info.num_workers : 5;
    setAgentSpawningState('AG-005', 'done', ag005workers);
    updateBuildProgress(12);
    addLog('AG-005', 'estratega', 'EDT generada en ' + ((Date.now() - t0)/1000).toFixed(1) + 's' + (r5.spawning_info ? ' ('+ag005workers+' workers)' : ''), false);
    pipelineData.solicitud = solicitud; await savePipelineState(solicitud.nombre || '', 0, pipelineData, solicitud);

    // PAUSA 1: Gobernador revisa EDT
    currentPauseNumber = 1; maxPauseReached = Math.max(maxPauseReached, 1);
    pipelineData.edtResult = await showBuildPause(1, pipelineData);
    await savePipelineState(pipelineData.solicitud ? pipelineData.solicitud.nombre : '', 1, pipelineData, pipelineData.solicitud);
    renderPipelineStepsHeader(null, pipelineData, 2, 2, null);

    // ═══ PASO 2: AG-013 Task Decomposer ═══
    activateBuildAgent('AG-013');
    setAgentSpawningState('AG-013', 'spawning', 5);
    updateBuildProgress(18);
    addLog('AG-013', 'estratega', 'Descomponiendo subtareas técnicas...', false);
    addLog('AG-013', 'estratega', 'tool: decompose_subtasks()', true);

    var t1 = Date.now();
    var edtText = serializeAgentData(pipelineData.edtResult, 8000);
    var resp13 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-013/invoke', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({
        message: 'EDT APROBADO POR GOBERNANZA (JSON completo):\n' + edtText + '\n\nINSTRUCCION: Descompon CADA tarea en 3-5 subtareas tecnicas. Usa tools para consultar CMDB. Devuelve SOLO JSON.',
        session_id: sessionId
      })
    });
    var r13 = await resp13.json();
    if (!resp13.ok) throw new Error(r13.detail || 'AG-013 error');
    pipelineData.subtasksResult = r13.response || r13.result || '';
    completeBuildAgent('AG-013', Date.now() - t1, 0.05);
    var ag013workers = (r13 && r13.spawning_info) ? r13.spawning_info.num_workers : 5;
    setAgentSpawningState('AG-013', 'done', ag013workers);
    updateBuildProgress(25);
    addLog('AG-013', 'estratega', 'Subtareas generadas en ' + ((Date.now() - t1)/1000).toFixed(1) + 's', false);

    // Fallback: si AG-013 no devolvió JSON de subtareas, intentar leer de BD
    var subtCheck = pipelineData.subtasksResult;
    var hasSubtasks = false;
    try {
      var stStr = typeof subtCheck === 'string' ? subtCheck : JSON.stringify(subtCheck);
      var stClean = stStr.replace(/```json\s*/g,'').replace(/```\s*/g,'').trim();
      var stMatch = stClean.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
      if (stMatch) {
        var stParsed = JSON.parse(stMatch[0]);
        hasSubtasks = stParsed && (stParsed.subtasks_by_task || stParsed.subtasks || stParsed.items);
      }
    } catch(e) {}

    if (!hasSubtasks) {
      console.warn('AG-013 no devolvió subtareas en JSON. Intentando leer de BD...');
      try {
        var subtResp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/dev/sql', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
          body: JSON.stringify({sql: "SELECT * FROM build_subtasks ORDER BY id_tarea, orden LIMIT 200"})
        });
        var subtRows = await subtResp.json();
        if (subtRows && Array.isArray(subtRows) && subtRows.length > 0) {
          pipelineData.subtasksResult = JSON.stringify({subtasks: subtRows});
          addLog('SYSTEM', 'estratega', 'Subtareas recuperadas de BD (' + subtRows.length + ' items)', false);
        }
      } catch(e) { console.warn('Fallback BD subtareas falló:', e); }
    }
    await savePipelineState(solicitud.nombre || '', 1, pipelineData, solicitud);

    // PAUSA 2: Gobernador revisa subtareas
    currentPauseNumber = 2; maxPauseReached = Math.max(maxPauseReached, 2);
    pipelineData.subtasksResult = await showBuildPause(2, pipelineData);
    await savePipelineState(pipelineData.solicitud ? pipelineData.solicitud.nombre : '', 2, pipelineData, pipelineData.solicitud);
    renderPipelineStepsHeader(null, pipelineData, 3, 3, null);

    // ═══ PASO 3: AG-014 + AG-015 en paralelo ═══
    activateBuildAgent('AG-014');
    activateBuildAgent('AG-015');
    updateBuildProgress(32);
    addLog('AG-014', 'resource', 'Analizando riesgos...', false);
    addLog('AG-015', 'resource', 'Mapeando stakeholders...', false);

    var t2 = Date.now();
    var subtText = serializeAgentData(pipelineData.subtasksResult, 6000);
    var edtForRisk = compressEdtForAgent(pipelineData.edtResult, 'medium');
    var edtMinimal = compressEdtForAgent(pipelineData.edtResult, 'minimal');
    var contextForRisk = 'BUSINESS CASE:\n' + bcJson + '\n\nEDT DEL PROYECTO:\n' + edtForRisk + '\n\nINSTRUCCION OBLIGATORIA: Debes analizar EXACTAMENTE 10-12 riesgos del proyecto. Usa el tool analyze_risks. Genera una matriz probabilidad (1-5) x impacto (1-5). Categorías obligatorias: Técnico (mínimo 4), Recursos (mínimo 2), Regulatorio (mínimo 1), Externo (mínimo 1). Cada riesgo DEBE tener: id (R1-R12), descripcion, probabilidad, impacto, categoria, plan_mitigacion, plan_contingencia, responsable. Devuelve SOLO JSON con key "risks" conteniendo el array. NO devuelvas texto libre. NO preguntes nada.';
    var contextForStk = 'BUSINESS CASE:\n' + bcJson + '\n\nEDT (resumen):\n' + edtMinimal + '\n\nINSTRUCCION: Mapea stakeholders. Usa query_directorio. Devuelve SOLO JSON.';

    var parallelResults = await Promise.all([
      authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-014/invoke', {
        method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: JSON.stringify({message: contextForRisk, session_id: sessionId})
      }).then(function(r) { return r.json(); }),
      authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-015/invoke', {
        method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: JSON.stringify({message: contextForStk, session_id: sessionId})
      }).then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
    ]);
    pipelineData.risksResult = parallelResults[0].response || parallelResults[0].result || '';
    pipelineData.stakeholdersResult = parallelResults[1].response || parallelResults[1].result || '';
    completeBuildAgent('AG-014', Date.now() - t2, 0.04);
    completeBuildAgent('AG-015', Date.now() - t2, 0.04);
    updateBuildProgress(50);
    addLog('AG-014', 'resource', 'Riesgos analizados', false);
    addLog('AG-015', 'resource', 'Stakeholders mapeados', false);
    await savePipelineState(solicitud.nombre || '', 2, pipelineData, solicitud);

    // PAUSA 3: Gobernador revisa riesgos + stakeholders
    currentPauseNumber = 3; maxPauseReached = Math.max(maxPauseReached, 3);
    var pause3Data = await showBuildPause(3, pipelineData);
    if (pause3Data && pause3Data.risks) pipelineData.risksResult = pause3Data.risks;
    if (pause3Data && pause3Data.stakeholders) pipelineData.stakeholdersResult = pause3Data.stakeholders;
    await savePipelineState(pipelineData.solicitud ? pipelineData.solicitud.nombre : '', 3, pipelineData, pipelineData.solicitud);
    renderPipelineStepsHeader(null, pipelineData, 4, 4, null);

    // ═══ PASO 4: AG-006 Resource Manager PMO ═══
    activateBuildAgent('AG-006');
    updateBuildProgress(56);
    addLog('AG-006', 'resource', 'Buscando PM candidatos y formando equipo...', false);
    addLog('AG-006', 'resource', 'tool: query_pm_candidates()', true);

    var t3 = Date.now();
    var risksText = serializeAgentData(pipelineData.risksResult, 4000);
    var stkText = serializeAgentData(pipelineData.stakeholdersResult, 4000);
    var resp6 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-006/invoke', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({
        message: 'BUSINESS CASE:\n' + bcJson +
          '\n\nEDT (resumen):\n' + compressEdtForAgent(pipelineData.edtResult, 'medium') +
          '\n\nINSTRUCCION: Propon 3 PMs candidatos con scoring y forma equipo tecnico por silo. Usa tools query_pm_candidates y query_staff_by_skill. Devuelve SOLO JSON.',
        session_id: sessionId
      })
    });
    var r6 = await resp6.json();
    if (!resp6.ok) throw new Error(r6.detail || 'AG-006 error');
    pipelineData.resourceResult = r6.response || r6.result || '';
    completeBuildAgent('AG-006', Date.now() - t3, 0.04);
    updateBuildProgress(62);
    addLog('AG-006', 'resource', 'Equipo propuesto en ' + ((Date.now() - t3)/1000).toFixed(1) + 's', false);
    await savePipelineState(solicitud.nombre || '', 3, pipelineData, solicitud);

    // PAUSA 4: Gobernador selecciona PM + revisa equipo
    currentPauseNumber = 4; maxPauseReached = Math.max(maxPauseReached, 4);
    pipelineData.selectedPM = await showBuildPause(4, pipelineData);
    await savePipelineState(pipelineData.solicitud ? pipelineData.solicitud.nombre : '', 4, pipelineData, pipelineData.solicitud);
    renderPipelineStepsHeader(null, pipelineData, 5, 5, null);

    // ═══ PASO 5a: AG-016 Cost Analyzer (PRIMERO) ═══
    activateBuildAgent('AG-016');
    updateBuildProgress(70);
    addLog('AG-016', 'planificador', 'Calculando presupuesto + ROI + EVM...', false);

    var t4 = Date.now();
    var resText = serializeAgentData(pipelineData.resourceResult, 4000);
    var pmText = pipelineData.selectedPM ? JSON.stringify(pipelineData.selectedPM) : '{}';
    var contextForCost = 'BUSINESS CASE:\n' + bcJson +
      '\n\nEDT (resumen):\n' + compressEdtForAgent(pipelineData.edtResult, 'medium') +
      '\n\nEQUIPO:\n' + serializeAgentData(pipelineData.resourceResult, 2000) +
      '\n\nINSTRUCCION: Calcula presupuesto, ROI, payback y EVM. Usa tools calc_roi y calc_evm_baseline. Devuelve SOLO JSON.';

    try {
      var resp16 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-016/invoke', {
        method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: JSON.stringify({message: contextForCost, session_id: sessionId})
      });
      var r16 = await resp16.json();
      if (!resp16.ok) throw new Error(r16.detail || 'AG-016 error');
      pipelineData.costResult = r16.response || r16.result || '';
    } catch(e16) {
      console.error('AG-016 falló:', e16);
      addLog('AG-016', 'planificador', 'Error: ' + (e16.message || e16) + ' — usando estimación por defecto', false);
      var totalHorasEst = 0;
      try {
        var edtEst = typeof pipelineData.edtResult === 'string' ? JSON.parse(pipelineData.edtResult.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/)[0]) : pipelineData.edtResult;
        if (edtEst && edtEst.edt && edtEst.edt.fases) edtEst.edt.fases.forEach(function(f) { totalHorasEst += (f.horas || 0); });
      } catch(e) {}
      var costoRRHH = totalHorasEst * 85;
      pipelineData.costResult = JSON.stringify({
        presupuesto: {rrhh: [{silo:'General',horas:totalHorasEst,tarifa:85,total:costoRRHH}], opex:{}, capex:{}, reservas:{contingencia_pct:15,gestion_pct:5}},
        bac_total: Math.round(costoRRHH * 1.25), roi: 0, payback_meses: 0, tir: 0,
        nota: 'Estimación automática por fallo de AG-016. Revisar manualmente.'
      });
    }
    completeBuildAgent('AG-016', Date.now() - t4, 0.04);
    updateBuildProgress(78);
    addLog('AG-016', 'planificador', 'Presupuesto calculado en ' + ((Date.now() - t4)/1000).toFixed(1) + 's', false);

    // ═══ PASO 5b: AG-007 Planificador (DESPUÉS, usa costes de AG-016) ═══
    activateBuildAgent('AG-007');
    setAgentSpawningState('AG-007', 'spawning', 5);
    addLog('AG-007', 'planificador', 'Spawning Director + Workers para sprints...', false);

    var t4b = Date.now();
    var costText = serializeAgentData(pipelineData.costResult, 4000);
    var contextForPlan = 'BUSINESS CASE:\n' + bcJson +
      '\n\nEDT (resumen):\n' + compressEdtForAgent(pipelineData.edtResult, 'minimal') +
      '\n\nSUBTAREAS (resumen):\n' + compressSubtasksForAgent(pipelineData.subtasksResult) +
      '\n\nPRESUPUESTO:\n' + serializeAgentData(pipelineData.costResult, 2000) +
      '\n\nINSTRUCCION: Genera sprints Scrum, Gantt y ruta critica. Devuelve SOLO JSON.';

    try {
      var resp7 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-007/invoke', {
        method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: JSON.stringify({message: contextForPlan, session_id: sessionId})
      });
      var r7 = await resp7.json();
      if (!resp7.ok) throw new Error(r7.detail || 'AG-007 error');
      pipelineData.planResult = r7.response || r7.result || '';
    } catch(e7) {
      console.error('AG-007 falló:', e7);
      addLog('AG-007', 'planificador', 'Error: ' + (e7.message || e7) + ' — usando planificación básica', false);
      pipelineData.planResult = JSON.stringify({
        sprints: [], gantt_mermaid: '', ruta_critica: {semanas: 0, holgura: 0},
        total_story_points: 0, velocidad_media: 0,
        nota: 'Planificación no generada por fallo de AG-007. Revisar manualmente.'
      });
    }
    completeBuildAgent('AG-007', Date.now() - t4b, 0.04);
    var ag007workers = 5;
    try { var r7data = typeof pipelineData.planResult === 'string' ? JSON.parse(pipelineData.planResult.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/)[0]) : pipelineData.planResult; if(r7data && r7data.spawning_info) ag007workers = r7data.spawning_info.num_workers; } catch(e){}
    setAgentSpawningState('AG-007', 'done', ag007workers);
    updateBuildProgress(87);
    addLog('AG-007', 'planificador', 'Planificación completada en ' + ((Date.now() - t4b)/1000).toFixed(1) + 's', false);

    // ═══ PASO 6: AG-017 Quality Gate ═══
    activateBuildAgent('AG-017');
    updateBuildProgress(93);
    addLog('AG-017', 'estratega', 'Definiendo quality gates + DoD...', false);
    addLog('AG-017', 'estratega', 'tool: define_quality_gates()', true);

    var t5 = Date.now();
    var costTextFull = serializeAgentData(pipelineData.costResult, 4000);
    var planTextFull = serializeAgentData(pipelineData.planResult, 4000);
    try {
      var resp17 = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/agents/AG-017/invoke', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: JSON.stringify({
          message: 'BUSINESS CASE:\n' + bcJson +
            '\n\nEDT (resumen):\n' + compressEdtForAgent(pipelineData.edtResult, 'minimal') +
            '\n\nINSTRUCCION: Define quality gates G0-G5 y DoD. Devuelve SOLO JSON.',
          session_id: sessionId
        })
      });
      var r17 = await resp17.json();
      if (!resp17.ok) throw new Error(r17.detail || 'AG-017 error');
      pipelineData.qualityResult = r17.response || r17.result || '';
    } catch(e17) {
      console.error('AG-017 falló:', e17);
      addLog('AG-017', 'estratega', 'Error: ' + (e17.message || e17) + ' — usando gates básicos', false);
      pipelineData.qualityResult = JSON.stringify({
        gates: [
          {gate:'G0',nombre:'Idea',estado:'PASSED',semana:0},
          {gate:'G1',nombre:'Inicio',estado:'PASSED',semana:1},
          {gate:'G2',nombre:'Planificacion',estado:'NEXT',semana:8,checklist:['EDT aprobado','Presupuesto aprobado','Kickoff pendiente']}
        ],
        nota: 'Quality gates básicos por fallo de AG-017.'
      });
    }
    completeBuildAgent('AG-017', Date.now() - t5, 0.04);
    updateBuildProgress(100);
    addLog('AG-017', 'estratega', 'Quality gates definidos', false);
    await savePipelineState(solicitud.nombre || '', 4, pipelineData, solicitud);

    clearInterval(buildTimer);
    var totalTime = ((Date.now() - buildPipelineStartTime) / 1000).toFixed(1);
    addLog('CHAIN', 'estratega', 'Pipeline BUILD completado en ' + totalTime + 's — ~' + buildPipelineCost.toFixed(2) + ' USD', false);
    var progLabel = document.getElementById('build-pipe-progress-label');
    if (progLabel) { progLabel.textContent = '100%'; progLabel.style.color = '#22c55e'; }
    var progInfo = document.getElementById('build-progress-info');
    if (progInfo) progInfo.textContent = 'Pipeline completado en ' + totalTime + 's';

    // Pantalla final
    currentPauseNumber = 5; maxPauseReached = 5;
    await savePipelineState(pipelineData.solicitud ? pipelineData.solicitud.nombre : '', 5, pipelineData, pipelineData.solicitud);
    showBuildFinalScreen(pipelineData);

  } catch(e) {
    clearInterval(buildTimer);
    addLog('ERROR', 'resource', e.message || String(e), false);
    var progInfo2 = document.getElementById('build-progress-info');
    if (progInfo2) progInfo2.textContent = 'Error: ' + (e.message || e);
  }

  if (execBtn) execBtn.disabled = false;
  if (statusEl) { statusEl.textContent = 'Idle'; statusEl.style.color = 'var(--yellow)'; }
}

// Placeholder de showBuildPause — se implementa en FASES 7-10
function renderAdvisorChat(containerId, pauseNumber) {
  var container = document.getElementById(containerId);
  if (!container) return;

  var panel = document.createElement('div');
  panel.style.cssText = 'background:#0f1724;border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.25);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:12px;';

  var header = document.createElement('div');
  header.style.cssText = 'padding:8px 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.15);';
  header.innerHTML = '<div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.2);color:#10b981;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">' + (buildAgentIcons['AG-018'] ? '<div style="width:20px;height:20px;color:#10b981;">' + buildAgentIcons['AG-018'] + '</div>' : '?') + '</div><div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#10b981;">AG-018 Governance Advisor</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">Contexto acumulativo \u2014 Pausa ' + pauseNumber + '/4</div></div>';
  panel.appendChild(header);

  var badgesDiv = document.createElement('div');
  badgesDiv.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:6px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.1);';
  var allBadges = ['Business Case', 'EDT', 'Subtareas', 'Riesgos', 'Stakeholders', 'PMs', 'Equipo'];
  var activeBadges = allBadges.slice(0, pauseNumber + 1);
  activeBadges.forEach(function(b) {
    var badge = document.createElement('span');
    badge.style.cssText = 'font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.15);color:#10b981;font-weight:600;';
    badge.textContent = b;
    badgesDiv.appendChild(badge);
  });
  panel.appendChild(badgesDiv);

  var messagesDiv = document.createElement('div');
  messagesDiv.id = 'advisor-messages-' + pauseNumber;
  messagesDiv.style.cssText = 'padding:8px 12px;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;';
  var welcomeMsg = document.createElement('div');
  welcomeMsg.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;color:#10b981;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.06);padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:6px;';
  welcomeMsg.textContent = 'Hola. Soy tu asistente de gobernanza. Puedo ayudarte a validar los datos generados y resolver dudas antes de aprobar esta fase.';
  messagesDiv.appendChild(welcomeMsg);
  panel.appendChild(messagesDiv);

  var suggestions = {
    1: ['El EDT cubre todo el alcance?', 'Faltan skills en el catalogo?', 'Los hitos son realistas?'],
    2: ['Las subtareas son suficientes?', 'Hay tecnologias no instaladas?', 'Los story points son correctos?'],
    3: ['El 15% de contingencia es suficiente?', 'Falta algun stakeholder clave?', 'Hay riesgos regulatorios?'],
