    4: ['Por que recomiendas a este PM?', 'El equipo tiene experiencia similar?', 'Hay conflictos de carga?']
  };
  var sugsDiv = document.createElement('div');
  sugsDiv.style.cssText = 'padding:4px 12px 8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;';
  (suggestions[pauseNumber] || []).forEach(function(s) {
    var sugBtn = document.createElement('div');
    sugBtn.style.cssText = 'font-size:8px;color:#10b981;cursor:pointer;padding:3px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.06);';
    sugBtn.textContent = '\ud83d\udca1 ' + s;
    sugBtn.onclick = function() { sendAdvisorMessage(pauseNumber, s); };
    sugsDiv.appendChild(sugBtn);
  });
  panel.appendChild(sugsDiv);

  var inputRow = document.createElement('div');
  inputRow.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:6px;padding:8px 12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.15);';
  var inputField = document.createElement('input');
  inputField.id = 'advisor-input-' + pauseNumber;
  inputField.style.cssText = 'flex:1;background:#1a2332;border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.2);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:10px;font-family:inherit;';
  inputField.placeholder = 'Pregunta al advisor...';
  inputField.onkeypress = function(e) { if (e.key === 'Enter') sendAdvisorMessage(pauseNumber); };
  var sendBtn = document.createElement('button');
  sendBtn.style.cssText = 'background:#10b981;border:none;color:#fff;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;';
  sendBtn.textContent = 'Enviar';
  sendBtn.onclick = function() { sendAdvisorMessage(pauseNumber); };
  inputRow.appendChild(inputField);
  inputRow.appendChild(sendBtn);
  panel.appendChild(inputRow);

  container.appendChild(panel);
}

async function sendAdvisorMessage(pauseNumber, suggestedText) {
  var input = document.getElementById('advisor-input-' + pauseNumber);
  var message = suggestedText || (input ? input.value : '');
  if (!message || !message.trim()) return;
  if (input) input.value = '';

  var messagesDiv = document.getElementById('advisor-messages-' + pauseNumber);
  if (!messagesDiv) return;

  var userDiv = document.createElement('div');
  userDiv.style.cssText = 'margin-bottom:8px;font-size:10px;text-align:right;';
  var userBubble = document.createElement('span');
  userBubble.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(59,130,246,0.1);color:#93c5fd;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px;display:inline-block;max-width:85%;text-align:left;';
  userBubble.textContent = message;
  userDiv.appendChild(userBubble);
  messagesDiv.appendChild(userDiv);
  messagesDiv.scrollTop = messagesDiv.scrollHeight;

  var loadingDiv = document.createElement('div');
  loadingDiv.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:8px;';
  loadingDiv.textContent = 'AG-018 pensando...';
  messagesDiv.appendChild(loadingDiv);
  messagesDiv.scrollTop = messagesDiv.scrollHeight;

  try {
    var resp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/build/advisor/chat', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({
        session_id: buildAdvisorSessionId || 'BUILD-' + Date.now(),
        message: message,
        context: { pause: pauseNumber }
      })
    });
    var result = await resp.json();
    var reply = result.reply || result.response || 'Sin respuesta del advisor';

    loadingDiv.remove();
    var botDiv = document.createElement('div');
    botDiv.style.cssText = 'margin-bottom:8px;font-size:10px;';
    var botBubble = document.createElement('span');
    botBubble.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(16,185,129,0.06);color:#10b981;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;display:inline-block;max-width:90%;line-height:1.4;';
    botBubble.textContent = reply;
    botDiv.appendChild(botBubble);
    messagesDiv.appendChild(botDiv);
  } catch(e) {
    loadingDiv.remove();
    var errDiv = document.createElement('div');
    errDiv.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;color:#ef4444;margin-bottom:8px;';
    errDiv.textContent = 'Error: ' + (e.message || 'No se pudo contactar AG-018');
    messagesDiv.appendChild(errDiv);
  }
  messagesDiv.scrollTop = messagesDiv.scrollHeight;
}

// ── Modales para Pausa 1 ──
function showTaskDetailModal(tarea, faseNombre, paqueteNombre, onSave, onDelete) {
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;max-width:650px;width:92%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;position:relative;';
  var closeBtn = document.createElement('div'); closeBtn.textContent = '\u2715';
  closeBtn.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:12px;right:16px;cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:18px;z-index:1;';
  closeBtn.onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  modal.appendChild(closeBtn);
  var iS = 'width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;';
  var lS = 'font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;display:block;margin-top:12px;';
  var h = '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:4px;">'+faseNombre+' \u2192 '+paqueteNombre+'</div>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:4px;"><span style="font-family:monospace;font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;background:#22262e;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;">'+(tarea.id_tarea||'')+'</span><span style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Tipo: '+(tarea.tipo_dependencia||'FS')+'</span></div>';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Nombre de la tarea</label><input id="task-m-nombre" value="'+(tarea.nombre||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="'+iS+'font-size:16px;font-weight:600;">';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;"><div><label style="'+lS+'">Skill requerido</label><input id="task-m-skill" value="'+(tarea.skill||'')+'" style="'+iS+'"></div><div><label style="'+lS+'">Horas estimadas</label><input id="task-m-horas" type="number" value="'+(tarea.horas||0)+'" style="'+iS+'"></div></div>';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Dependencias (separadas por coma)</label><input id="task-m-deps" value="'+(tarea.dependencias||[]).join(', ')+'" style="'+iS+'">';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Notas del gobernador</label><textarea id="task-m-notas" style="'+iS+'resize:vertical;min-height:60px;" placeholder="Notas, observaciones, decisiones...">'+(tarea.notas_gobernador||'')+'</textarea>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:20px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid #333840;"><button class="task-m-del" style="padding:10px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">Eliminar</button><div style="flex:1;"></div><button class="task-m-cancel" style="padding:10px 20px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">Cancelar</button><button class="task-m-save" style="padding:10px 20px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:#22c55e;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">Guardar</button></div>';
  var cd = document.createElement('div'); cd.innerHTML = h; modal.appendChild(cd);
  overlay.appendChild(modal); document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  modal.querySelector('.task-m-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  modal.querySelector('.task-m-del').onclick = function() { if(confirm('Eliminar tarea '+(tarea.id_tarea||'')+'?')){ if(onDelete) onDelete(tarea.id_tarea); overlay.remove(); } };
  modal.querySelector('.task-m-save').onclick = function() {
    tarea.nombre = document.getElementById('task-m-nombre').value;
    tarea.skill = document.getElementById('task-m-skill').value;
    tarea.horas = parseInt(document.getElementById('task-m-horas').value)||0;
    tarea.dependencias = document.getElementById('task-m-deps').value.split(',').map(function(d){return d.trim();}).filter(Boolean);
    tarea.notas_gobernador = document.getElementById('task-m-notas').value;
    if(onSave) onSave(tarea);
    overlay.remove();
  };
}

function getSkillColor(skill) {
  if (!skill) return '#8b8f98';
  var s = skill.toLowerCase();
  if (s.includes('seguridad')) return '#ef4444';
  if (s.includes('linux') || s.includes('docker')) return '#22c55e';
  if (s.includes('redes') || s.includes('ip') || s.includes('vlan')) return '#3b82f6';
  if (s.includes('sql') || s.includes('backup')) return '#eab308';
  if (s.includes('doc')) return '#8b5cf6';
  if (s.includes('api') || s.includes('testing')) return '#06b6d4';
  if (s.includes('hardware')) return '#f97316';
  return '#8b8f98';
}

function showSubtaskDetailModal(subtask, parentTask, onSave, onDelete) {
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;padding:0;max-width:750px;width:95%;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;position:relative;';
  var iS = 'width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;box-sizing:border-box;';
  var lS = 'font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;margin-bottom:5px;display:block;margin-top:14px;';
  var pts = subtask.story_points||0;
  var ptsColor = pts<=3?'#22c55e':pts<=5?'#eab308':pts<=8?'#f97316':'#ef4444';
  var h = '';
  // Header
  h += '<div style="padding:20px 24px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(59,130,246,0.05),rgba(139,92,246,0.05));">';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start;"><div style="flex:1;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:4px;">'+(parentTask.id_tarea||parentTask.id||'')+' \u2192 Subtarea tecnica</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:#a78bfa;margin-bottom:8px;">'+(parentTask.nombre||'').substring(0,80)+'</div></div><div onclick="this.closest(\'[style*=fixed]\').remove()" style="cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:20px;padding:4px 8px;">\u2715</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;"><span style="font-size:11px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(139,92,246,0.12);color:#a78bfa;">'+(subtask.skill_requerido||'Sin skill')+'</span><span style="font-size:11px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.12);color:#eab308;font-weight:700;">'+(subtask.horas_estimadas||0)+'h</span><span style="font-size:11px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:50%;background:'+ptsColor+'20;color:'+ptsColor+';font-weight:700;min-width:24px;text-align:center;">'+pts+' pts</span></div></div>';
  // Body
  h += '<div style="padding:16px 24px 20px;">';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Titulo de la subtarea</label><input id="st-titulo" value="'+(subtask.titulo||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="'+iS+'font-size:15px;font-weight:600;">';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Descripcion tecnica</label><textarea id="st-desc" style="'+iS+'resize:vertical;min-height:70px;">'+(subtask.descripcion_tecnica||subtask.descripcion||'')+'</textarea>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;"><div><label style="'+lS+'">Skill requerido</label><input id="st-skill" value="'+(subtask.skill_requerido||'')+'" style="'+iS+'"></div><div><label style="'+lS+'">Horas estimadas</label><input id="st-horas" type="number" value="'+(subtask.horas_estimadas||0)+'" style="'+iS+'"></div></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;"><div><label style="'+lS+'">Story Points</label><input id="st-pts" type="number" value="'+(subtask.story_points||0)+'" style="'+iS+'"></div><div><label style="'+lS+'">Criterio de exito</label><input id="st-criterio" value="'+(subtask.criterio_exito||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="'+iS+'"></div></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;"><div><label style="'+lS+'">Tecnologia</label><input id="st-tech" value="'+(subtask.tecnologia||'')+'" style="'+iS+'"></div><div><label style="'+lS+'">Componente</label><input id="st-comp" value="'+(subtask.componente||'')+'" style="'+iS+'"></div></div>';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Integracion con</label><input id="st-integ" value="'+(subtask.integracion_con||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="'+iS+'">';
  // Sugerencias IA
  h += '<div style="border-top:1px solid #333840;margin-top:18px;padding-top:14px;"><div style="background:rgba(59,130,246,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.15);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#3b82f6;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Sugerencias del Motor Cognitivo</div>';
  var sugs = [];
  if (!subtask.criterio_exito || (subtask.criterio_exito||'').length < 10) sugs.push({c:'rgba(234,179,8,0.08)',t:'Criterio de exito vacio o muy corto. Defina un criterio medible.'});
  if ((subtask.horas_estimadas||0) > 20) sugs.push({c:'rgba(239,68,68,0.08)',t:'Subtarea de '+subtask.horas_estimadas+'h. Considere descomponerla (<16h).'});
  if ((subtask.story_points||0) > 8) sugs.push({c:'rgba(239,68,68,0.08)',t:'Story points > 8. En Scrum deberian dividirse.'});
  if (sugs.length===0) sugs.push({c:'rgba(34,197,94,0.08)',t:'Subtarea bien definida. Sin observaciones.'});
  sugs.forEach(function(s){h+='<div style="font-size:11px;color:#c8c9cd;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:'+s.c+';margin-bottom:4px;">'+s.t+'</div>';});
  h += '</div>';
  // Notas gobernador
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Notas del Gobernador / PM</label><textarea id="st-notas" style="'+iS+'resize:vertical;min-height:60px;border-color:rgba(34,197,94,0.3);" placeholder="Decisiones, observaciones del PM...">'+(subtask.notas_gobernador||'')+'</textarea>';
  h += '</div>';
  // Botones
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:16px;padding:16px 24px;border-top:1px solid #333840;"><button class="st-del" style="padding:10px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">Eliminar</button><div style="flex:1;"></div><button class="st-cancel" style="padding:10px 20px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">Cancelar</button><button class="st-save" style="padding:10px 24px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22c55e,#16a34a);color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">Guardar cambios</button></div>';
  h += '</div>';
  var cd = document.createElement('div'); cd.innerHTML = h; modal.appendChild(cd);
  overlay.appendChild(modal); document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  modal.querySelector('.st-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  modal.querySelector('.st-del').onclick = function() { if(confirm('Eliminar esta subtarea?')){ if(onDelete) onDelete(subtask); overlay.remove(); } };
  modal.querySelector('.st-save').onclick = function() {
    subtask.titulo = document.getElementById('st-titulo').value;
    subtask.descripcion_tecnica = document.getElementById('st-desc').value;
    subtask.skill_requerido = document.getElementById('st-skill').value;
    subtask.horas_estimadas = parseInt(document.getElementById('st-horas').value)||0;
    subtask.story_points = parseInt(document.getElementById('st-pts').value)||0;
    subtask.criterio_exito = document.getElementById('st-criterio').value;
    subtask.tecnologia = document.getElementById('st-tech').value;
    subtask.componente = document.getElementById('st-comp').value;
    subtask.integracion_con = document.getElementById('st-integ').value;
    subtask.notas_gobernador = document.getElementById('st-notas').value;
    if(onSave) onSave(subtask);
    overlay.remove();
  };
}

function showRiskDetailModal(risk, risksList, onSave, onDelete) {
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;padding:0;max-width:700px;width:95%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;position:relative;';
  var iS = 'width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;box-sizing:border-box;';
  var lS = 'font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;margin-bottom:5px;display:block;margin-top:14px;';
  var score = (risk.probabilidad||3)*(risk.impacto||3);
  var sc = score>=15?'#ef4444':score>=10?'#f97316':score>=6?'#eab308':'#22c55e';
  var h = '<div style="padding:20px 24px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;border-left:4px solid '+sc+';"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start;"><div><div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:'+sc+';">'+(risk.id||'Rx')+'</span><span style="font-size:12px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:'+sc+'20;color:'+sc+';font-weight:600;">Score: '+score+'</span><span style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(139,92,246,0.12);color:#a78bfa;">'+(risk.categoria||'')+'</span></div></div><div onclick="this.closest(\'[style*=fixed]\').remove()" style="cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:20px;padding:4px 8px;">\u2715</div></div></div>';
  h += '<div style="padding:16px 24px 20px;">';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Descripcion del riesgo</label><textarea id="risk-desc" style="'+iS+'resize:vertical;min-height:60px;font-size:14px;">'+(risk.descripcion||'')+'</textarea>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;"><div><label style="'+lS+'">Probabilidad (1-5)</label><input id="risk-prob" type="number" min="1" max="5" value="'+(risk.probabilidad||3)+'" style="'+iS+'"></div><div><label style="'+lS+'">Impacto (1-5)</label><input id="risk-imp" type="number" min="1" max="5" value="'+(risk.impacto||3)+'" style="'+iS+'"></div><div><label style="'+lS+'">Categoria</label><input id="risk-cat" value="'+(risk.categoria||'')+'" style="'+iS+'"></div></div>';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Plan de mitigacion</label><textarea id="risk-mit" style="'+iS+'resize:vertical;min-height:60px;">'+(risk.plan_mitigacion||'')+'</textarea>';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Plan de contingencia</label><textarea id="risk-cont" style="'+iS+'resize:vertical;min-height:60px;">'+(risk.plan_contingencia||'')+'</textarea>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;"><div><label style="'+lS+'">Responsable</label><input id="risk-resp" value="'+(risk.responsable||'')+'" style="'+iS+'"></div><div><label style="'+lS+'">Trigger</label><input id="risk-trigger" value="'+(risk.trigger||'')+'" style="'+iS+'"></div></div>';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Notas del gobernador</label><textarea id="risk-notas" style="'+iS+'resize:vertical;min-height:50px;border-color:rgba(34,197,94,0.3);" placeholder="Decisiones del PM...">'+(risk.notas_gobernador||'')+'</textarea>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:20px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid #333840;"><button class="risk-del" style="padding:10px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">Eliminar</button><div style="flex:1;"></div><button class="risk-cancel" style="padding:10px 20px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">Cancelar</button><button class="risk-save" style="padding:10px 24px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22c55e,#16a34a);color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">Guardar</button></div></div>';
  var cd = document.createElement('div'); cd.innerHTML = h; modal.appendChild(cd);
  overlay.appendChild(modal); document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  modal.querySelector('.risk-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  modal.querySelector('.risk-del').onclick = function() { if(confirm('Eliminar '+(risk.id||'')+'?')){ if(onDelete) onDelete(risk); overlay.remove(); } };
  modal.querySelector('.risk-save').onclick = function() {
    risk.descripcion = document.getElementById('risk-desc').value;
    risk.probabilidad = parseInt(document.getElementById('risk-prob').value)||3;
    risk.impacto = parseInt(document.getElementById('risk-imp').value)||3;
    risk.categoria = document.getElementById('risk-cat').value;
    risk.plan_mitigacion = document.getElementById('risk-mit').value;
    risk.plan_contingencia = document.getElementById('risk-cont').value;
    risk.responsable = document.getElementById('risk-resp').value;
    risk.trigger = document.getElementById('risk-trigger').value;
    risk.notas_gobernador = document.getElementById('risk-notas').value;
    if(onSave) onSave(risk); overlay.remove();
  };
}

function showStakeholderModal(stk) {
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;max-width:650px;width:95%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;';
  var initials = (stk.nombre||'XX').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0];}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
  var hp = (stk.nivel_poder||0)>=4, hi = (stk.nivel_interes||0)>=4;
  var qc = hp&&hi?'#ef4444':hp?'#3b82f6':hi?'#eab308':'#8b8f98';
  var ql = hp&&hi?'GESTIONAR DE CERCA':hp?'MANTENER SATISFECHO':hi?'MANTENER INFORMADO':'MONITORIZAR';
  var h = '<div style="padding:24px;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center;"><div style="width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:'+qc+'30;border:2px solid '+qc+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:'+qc+';">'+initials+'</div><div style="flex:1;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(stk.nombre||'')+'</div><div style="font-size:13px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(stk.cargo||'')+' \u2014 '+(stk.area||'')+'</div><span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:'+qc+'20;color:'+qc+';font-weight:600;">'+ql+'</span></div><div onclick="this.closest(\'[style*=fixed]\').remove()" style="cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:20px;padding:4px 8px;">\u2715</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="padding:16px 24px;">';
  h += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:14px;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Nivel poder/interes</div><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;"><div style="font-size:13px;color:#e8e9ed;">Poder: <span style="color:'+qc+';font-weight:700;">'+(stk.nivel_poder||'?')+'/5</span></div><div style="font-size:13px;color:#e8e9ed;">Interes: <span style="color:'+qc+';font-weight:700;">'+(stk.nivel_interes||'?')+'/5</span></div><div style="font-size:13px;color:#e8e9ed;">Estrategia: <span style="color:#a78bfa;">'+(stk.estrategia||'')+'</span></div><div style="font-size:13px;color:#e8e9ed;">RACI: <span style="font-weight:700;color:'+(stk.raci==='R'?'#ef4444':stk.raci==='A'?'#3b82f6':stk.raci==='C'?'#eab308':'#8b8f98')+';">'+(stk.raci||'I')+'</span></div></div></div>';
  h += '<div style="background:rgba(59,130,246,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.15);border-radius:8px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:14px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#3b82f6;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Protocolo de contacto</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:#c8c9cd;line-height:1.8;">'+(hp?'Contactar via secretaria ejecutiva. Reuniones de 30 min con briefing previo 48h antes. Email resumen post-reunion en 24h.':'Contacto directo por email. Informes '+(hi?'semanales':'mensuales')+' de progreso del proyecto.')+'</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px;">Notas del PM</div><textarea id="stk-notas" style="width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;min-height:50px;box-sizing:border-box;" placeholder="Observaciones, acuerdos...">'+(stk.notas_gobernador||'')+'</textarea></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid #333840;"><div style="flex:1;"></div><button class="stk-save" style="padding:10px 24px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:#22c55e;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">Cerrar y guardar</button></div></div>';
  var cd = document.createElement('div'); cd.innerHTML = h; modal.appendChild(cd);
  overlay.appendChild(modal); document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  modal.querySelector('.stk-save').onclick = function() { stk.notas_gobernador = document.getElementById('stk-notas').value; overlay.remove(); };
}

function showCommunicationModal(comm, onSave, onDelete) {
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;max-width:650px;width:95%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;position:relative;';
  var iS = 'width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;box-sizing:border-box;';
  var lS = 'font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;margin-bottom:5px;display:block;margin-top:14px;';
  var h = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">Comunicacion</div><div onclick="this.closest(\'[style*=fixed]\').remove()" style="cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:20px;">\u2715</div></div>';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Evento / Nombre</label><input id="comm-evento" value="'+(comm.evento||comm.nombre||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="'+iS+'">';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;"><div><label style="'+lS+'">Frecuencia</label><input id="comm-freq" value="'+(comm.frecuencia||'')+'" style="'+iS+'" placeholder="Semanal, Quincenal..."></div><div><label style="'+lS+'">Canal</label><input id="comm-canal" value="'+(comm.canal||'')+'" style="'+iS+'" placeholder="Reunion, Email..."></div></div>';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Audiencia</label><input id="comm-aud" value="'+(comm.audiencia||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="'+iS+'">';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Notas del gobernador</label><textarea id="comm-notas" style="'+iS+'resize:vertical;min-height:50px;border-color:rgba(34,197,94,0.3);" placeholder="Observaciones del PM...">'+(comm.notas_gobernador||'')+'</textarea>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:20px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid #333840;"><button class="comm-del" style="padding:10px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">Eliminar</button><div style="flex:1;"></div><button class="comm-cancel" style="padding:10px 20px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">Cancelar</button><button class="comm-save" style="padding:10px 24px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22c55e,#16a34a);color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">Guardar</button></div>';
  var cd = document.createElement('div'); cd.innerHTML = h; modal.appendChild(cd);
  overlay.appendChild(modal); document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  modal.querySelector('.comm-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  modal.querySelector('.comm-del').onclick = function() { if(confirm('Eliminar esta comunicacion?')){ if(onDelete) onDelete(comm); overlay.remove(); } };
  modal.querySelector('.comm-save').onclick = function() {
    comm.evento = document.getElementById('comm-evento').value; comm.nombre = comm.evento;
    comm.frecuencia = document.getElementById('comm-freq').value;
    comm.canal = document.getElementById('comm-canal').value;
    comm.audiencia = document.getElementById('comm-aud').value;
    comm.notas_gobernador = document.getElementById('comm-notas').value;
    if(onSave) onSave(comm); overlay.remove();
  };
}

function generateRACIFromData(fases, stakeholders, pm) {
  var pmName = pm ? (pm.nombre||'PM Pendiente') : 'PM Pendiente';
  var sponsor = 'CTO BCC Bank';
  var consultados = stakeholders ? stakeholders.filter(function(s){return (s.nivel_poder||0)>=4 && (s.nivel_interes||0)>=4;}).map(function(s){return s.nombre;}) : [];
  var informados = stakeholders ? stakeholders.filter(function(s){return !((s.nivel_poder||0)>=4 && (s.nivel_interes||0)>=4);}).map(function(s){return s.nombre;}).slice(0,3) : [];
  var eIS = 'background:#22262e;border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 6px;font-size:11px;text-align:center;width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;font-family:inherit;';
  var h = '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:12px;">Matriz RACI por entregable <span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.12);color:#eab308;">Editable</span></div>';
  h += '<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;"><thead><tr style="border-bottom:2px solid #333840;"><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;color:#8b8f98;font-size:10px;">Entregable</th><th style="text-align:center;padding:8px;color:#ef4444;font-size:10px;">R (Responsable)</th><th style="text-align:center;padding:8px;color:#f97316;font-size:10px;">A (Aprobador)</th><th style="text-align:center;padding:8px;color:#3b82f6;font-size:10px;">C (Consultado)</th><th style="text-align:center;padding:8px;color:#22c55e;font-size:10px;">I (Informado)</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
  if (fases && Array.isArray(fases)) {
    fases.forEach(function(f,i) {
      var bg = i%2===0?'transparent':'rgba(255,255,255,0.02)';
      h += '<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #22262e;background:'+bg+';"><td style="padding:8px;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(f.nombre||'Fase '+(i+1))+'</td>';
      h += '<td style="padding:4px;"><input value="'+pmName+'" style="'+eIS+'color:#ef4444;" onfocus="this.style.borderColor=\'#333840\'" onblur="this.style.borderColor=\'transparent\'"></td>';
      h += '<td style="padding:4px;"><input value="'+sponsor+'" style="'+eIS+'color:#f97316;" onfocus="this.style.borderColor=\'#333840\'" onblur="this.style.borderColor=\'transparent\'"></td>';
      h += '<td style="padding:4px;"><input value="'+(consultados.join(', ')||'Pendiente')+'" style="'+eIS+'color:#3b82f6;" onfocus="this.style.borderColor=\'#333840\'" onblur="this.style.borderColor=\'transparent\'"></td>';
      h += '<td style="padding:4px;"><input value="'+(informados.join(', ')||'Pendiente')+'" style="'+eIS+'color:#22c55e;" onfocus="this.style.borderColor=\'#333840\'" onblur="this.style.borderColor=\'transparent\'"></td>';
      h += '</tr>';
    });
  }
  h += '</tbody></table><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:8px;font-style:italic;">RACI editable. Click en cualquier celda para modificar.</div>';
  return h;
}

function showFaseModal(fase, faseIndex, parsed, onUpdate) {
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;max-width:800px;width:95%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;position:relative;';
  var closeBtn = document.createElement('div'); closeBtn.textContent = '\u2715';
  closeBtn.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:12px;right:16px;cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:18px;z-index:1;';
  closeBtn.onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  modal.appendChild(closeBtn);
  var iS = 'width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;';
  var lS = 'font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;display:block;margin-top:12px;';
  var fC = ['#3b82f6','#a855f7','#22c55e','#eab308','#ec4899','#06b6d4'];
  var color = fC[faseIndex % fC.length];
  var h = '<div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:'+color+';margin-bottom:16px;">Fase '+(faseIndex+1)+'</div>';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Nombre de la fase</label><input id="fase-m-nombre" value="'+(fase.nombre||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="'+iS+'font-size:15px;">';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;"><div><label style="'+lS+'">Semana inicio</label><input id="fase-m-si" type="number" value="'+(fase.semana_inicio||1)+'" style="'+iS+'"></div><div><label style="'+lS+'">Semana fin</label><input id="fase-m-sf" type="number" value="'+(fase.semana_fin||8)+'" style="'+iS+'"></div><div><label style="'+lS+'">Horas totales</label><div style="padding:10px 14px;color:'+color+';font-size:18px;font-weight:700;">'+(fase.horas||0)+'h</div></div></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-top:16px;"><label style="'+lS+'">Paquetes de trabajo ('+(fase.paquetes||[]).length+')</label>';
  (fase.paquetes||[]).forEach(function(paq) {
    h += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:8px;"><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:8px;">'+paq.nombre+'</div>';
    (paq.tareas||[]).forEach(function(t) {
      h += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;"><span style="font-family:monospace;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(t.id_tarea||'')+'</span><span style="font-size:12px;color:#e8e9ed;flex:1;">'+(t.nombre||'')+'</span><span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(139,92,246,0.12);color:#a78bfa;">'+(t.skill||'')+'</span><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#eab308;">'+(t.horas||0)+'h</span></div>';
    });
    h += '</div>';
  });
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<label style="'+lS+'">Notas del gobernador</label><textarea id="fase-m-notas" style="'+iS+'resize:vertical;min-height:60px;" placeholder="Notas, observaciones, decisiones...">'+(fase.notas_gobernador||'')+'</textarea>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:20px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid #333840;"><button class="fase-m-del" style="padding:10px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">Eliminar fase</button><div style="flex:1;"></div><button class="fase-m-cancel" style="padding:10px 20px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">Cancelar</button><button class="fase-m-save" style="padding:10px 20px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:#22c55e;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">Guardar</button></div>';
  var cd = document.createElement('div'); cd.innerHTML = h; modal.appendChild(cd);
  overlay.appendChild(modal); document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  modal.querySelector('.fase-m-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  modal.querySelector('.fase-m-del').onclick = function() { if(confirm('Eliminar '+fase.nombre+'? Se eliminaran todos sus paquetes y tareas.')){ parsed.edt.fases.splice(faseIndex,1); if(onUpdate) onUpdate(); overlay.remove(); } };
  modal.querySelector('.fase-m-save').onclick = function() {
    fase.nombre = document.getElementById('fase-m-nombre').value;
    fase.semana_inicio = parseInt(document.getElementById('fase-m-si').value)||1;
    fase.semana_fin = parseInt(document.getElementById('fase-m-sf').value)||8;
    fase.notas_gobernador = document.getElementById('fase-m-notas').value;
    if(onUpdate) onUpdate();
    overlay.remove();
  };
}

function showActaModal(acta, onSave) {
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;padding:28px;max-width:750px;width:95%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;position:relative;';
  var closeBtn = document.createElement('div'); closeBtn.textContent = '\u2715';
  closeBtn.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:12px;right:16px;cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:18px;z-index:1;';
  closeBtn.onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  modal.appendChild(closeBtn);
  var iS = 'width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;';
  var lS = 'font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;display:block;';
  var h = '<div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:20px;">Acta de Constitucion</div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;"><label style="'+lS+'">Descripcion alto nivel</label><textarea id="acta-m-desc" style="'+iS+'min-height:80px;">'+(acta.descripcion_alto_nivel||'').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;"><label style="'+lS+'">Objetivos SMART (uno por linea)</label><textarea id="acta-m-obj" style="'+iS+'min-height:120px;">'+(acta.objetivos_smart||[]).join('\n').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;"><label style="'+lS+'">Entregables (uno por linea)</label><textarea id="acta-m-ent" style="'+iS+'min-height:80px;">'+(acta.entregables||[]).join('\n').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px;"><div><label style="'+lS+'">Sponsor sugerido</label><input id="acta-m-sponsor" value="'+(acta.sponsor||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="'+iS+'"></div><div><label style="'+lS+'">Criterios de exito</label><input id="acta-m-criterios" value="'+(acta.criterios_exito||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="'+iS+'"></div></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;"><label style="'+lS+'">Hitos del proyecto</label><div id="acta-m-hitos">';
  (acta.hitos||[]).forEach(function(hi) {
    h += '<div class="hito-row" style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px;"><input class="hito-nombre" value="'+(hi.nombre||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" placeholder="Nombre" style="'+iS+'flex:3;"><input class="hito-semana" type="number" value="'+(hi.semana||0)+'" placeholder="Sem" style="'+iS+'flex:1;min-width:60px;"><button onclick="this.parentElement.remove()" style="padding:6px 10px;border-radius:6px;border:none;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;">\u2715</button></div>';
  });
  h += '</div><button id="acta-m-add-hito" style="padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;border:1px dashed #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;width:100%;margin-top:4px;">+ Añadir hito</button></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:20px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid #333840;"><button class="acta-m-cancel" style="flex:1;padding:12px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;">Cerrar sin cambios</button><button class="acta-m-save" style="flex:1;padding:12px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:#22c55e;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;">Guardar cambios</button></div>';
  var cd = document.createElement('div'); cd.innerHTML = h; modal.appendChild(cd);
  overlay.appendChild(modal); document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  modal.querySelector('.acta-m-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  document.getElementById('acta-m-add-hito').onclick = function() {
    var c = document.getElementById('acta-m-hitos'); var r = document.createElement('div'); r.className='hito-row'; r.style.cssText='display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px;';
    r.innerHTML = '<input class="hito-nombre" value="" placeholder="Nombre del hito" style="'+iS+'flex:3;"><input class="hito-semana" type="number" value="" placeholder="Sem" style="'+iS+'flex:1;min-width:60px;"><button onclick="this.parentElement.remove()" style="padding:6px 10px;border-radius:6px;border:none;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;">\u2715</button>';
    c.appendChild(r);
  };
  modal.querySelector('.acta-m-save').onclick = function() {
    var u = { descripcion_alto_nivel: document.getElementById('acta-m-desc').value, objetivos_smart: document.getElementById('acta-m-obj').value.split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();}), entregables: document.getElementById('acta-m-ent').value.split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();}), sponsor: document.getElementById('acta-m-sponsor').value, criterios_exito: document.getElementById('acta-m-criterios').value, hitos: [] };
    modal.querySelectorAll('.hito-row').forEach(function(row) { var n=row.querySelector('.hito-nombre').value, s=parseInt(row.querySelector('.hito-semana').value)||0; if(n.trim()) u.hitos.push({nombre:n,semana:s}); });
    if (onSave) onSave(u); overlay.remove();
  };
}

function showAlcanceModal(alcance, onSave) {
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;padding:28px;max-width:750px;width:95%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;position:relative;';
  var closeBtn = document.createElement('div'); closeBtn.textContent = '\u2715';
  closeBtn.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:12px;right:16px;cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:18px;z-index:1;';
  closeBtn.onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  modal.appendChild(closeBtn);
  var iS = 'width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;';
  var lS = 'font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;display:block;';
  var h = '<div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:20px;">Alcance del Proyecto</div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;"><label style="'+lS+'">Alcance del producto</label><textarea id="alc-m-desc" style="'+iS+'min-height:80px;">'+(alcance.alcance_producto||'').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;"><label style="'+lS+'">Exclusiones (una por linea)</label><textarea id="alc-m-excl" style="'+iS+'min-height:60px;">'+(alcance.exclusiones||[]).join('\n').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;"><label style="'+lS+'">Restricciones (una por linea)</label><textarea id="alc-m-rest" style="'+iS+'min-height:60px;">'+(alcance.restricciones||[]).join('\n').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;"><label style="'+lS+'">Asunciones (una por linea)</label><textarea id="alc-m-asun" style="'+iS+'min-height:60px;">'+(alcance.asunciones||[]).join('\n').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:20px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid #333840;"><button class="alc-m-cancel" style="flex:1;padding:12px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;">Cerrar sin cambios</button><button class="alc-m-save" style="flex:1;padding:12px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:#22c55e;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;">Guardar cambios</button></div>';
  var cd = document.createElement('div'); cd.innerHTML = h; modal.appendChild(cd);
  overlay.appendChild(modal); document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  modal.querySelector('.alc-m-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  modal.querySelector('.alc-m-save').onclick = function() {
    var u = { alcance_producto: document.getElementById('alc-m-desc').value, exclusiones: document.getElementById('alc-m-excl').value.split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();}), restricciones: document.getElementById('alc-m-rest').value.split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();}), asunciones: document.getElementById('alc-m-asun').value.split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();}) };
    if (onSave) onSave(u); overlay.remove();
  };
}

function showTecnicoDetailModal(tecnico) {
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;max-width:550px;width:95%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;';
  var initials = (tecnico.nombre || 'XX').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]||'';}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
  var siloColors = {'Linux':'#f97316','Windows':'#3b82f6','BBDD':'#eab308','Redes':'#22c55e','Seguridad':'#ef4444','Backend':'#a855f7','DevOps':'#06b6d4','Frontend':'#ec4899','QA':'#ec4899','Soporte':'#8b8f98'};
  var siloColor = siloColors[tecnico.silo_especialidad||tecnico.silo||''] || '#8b8f98';
  var html = '';
  html += '<div style="padding:20px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center;">';
  html += '<div style="width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:'+siloColor+'30;border:2px solid '+siloColor+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:'+siloColor+';">'+initials+'</div>';
  html += '<div style="flex:1;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(tecnico.nombre||'')+'</div>';
  html += '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(tecnico.id_recurso||'')+' \u00b7 '+(tecnico.nivel||'N2')+' \u00b7 '+(tecnico.silo_especialidad||tecnico.silo||'')+'</div></div>';
  html += '<div class="modal-close" style="cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:20px;padding:4px 8px;">\u2715</div></div>';
  html += '<div style="padding:16px 24px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;">';
  var cargaColor = (tecnico.carga_actual||0)>30?'#ef4444':(tecnico.carga_actual||0)>15?'#eab308':'#22c55e';
  html += '<div style="text-align:center;background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:'+cargaColor+';">'+(tecnico.carga_actual||0)+'h</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Carga actual</div></div>';
  html += '<div style="text-align:center;background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#22c55e;">'+(tecnico.scoring||0)+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Scoring</div></div>';
  html += '<div style="text-align:center;background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#3b82f6;">'+(tecnico.horas_asignadas||0)+'h</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Asignadas</div></div>';
  html += '</div>';
  var estado = tecnico.estado_run || 'DISPONIBLE';
  var estColor = estado==='DISPONIBLE'?'#22c55e':estado==='OCUPADO'?'#eab308':'#ef4444';
  html += '<div style="padding:0 24px 12px;"><div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;">Estado: <span style="color:'+estColor+';font-weight:600;">'+estado+'</span></div>';
  if(tecnico.email) html += '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:4px;">\ud83d\udce7 '+tecnico.email+'</div>';
  if(tecnico.conflicto) html += '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#ef4444;margin-top:4px;">\u26a0 Conflicto: '+tecnico.conflicto+'</div>';
  html += '</div>';
  var skills = tecnico.skills_json || [];
  if(typeof skills==='string') try{skills=JSON.parse(skills);}catch(e){skills=[];}
  if(skills.length>0) {
    html += '<div style="padding:0 24px 16px;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Skills t\u00e9cnicas</div><div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
    skills.forEach(function(s){var name=typeof s==='string'?s:(s.nombre_skill||s.skill||s.nombre||'');if(name)html+='<span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:'+siloColor+'15;color:'+siloColor+';border:1px solid '+siloColor+'30;">'+name+'</span>';});
    html += '</div></div>';
  }
  html += '<div style="padding:0 24px 20px;text-align:right;"><button class="modal-close" style="padding:10px 24px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:#3b82f6;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">Cerrar</button></div>';
  modal.innerHTML = html;
  modal.querySelectorAll('.modal-close').forEach(function(el){el.onclick=function(){overlay.remove();};});
  overlay.appendChild(modal);
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
}

function showPMDetailModal(pm) {
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:12px;max-width:650px;width:95%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;';
  var initials = (pm.nombre || 'XX').split(' ').map(function(w) { return w[0]||''; }).join('').substring(0, 2).toUpperCase();
  var html = '';
  html += '<div style="padding:24px;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center;">';
  html += '<div style="width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#8b5cf6);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;">' + initials + '</div>';
  html += '<div style="flex:1;">';
  html += '<div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">' + (pm.nombre || '') + '</div>';
  html += '<div style="font-size:13px;color:#8b8f98;">' + (pm.id_pm || '') + ' · ' + (pm.especialidad || 'Gobernanza') + '</div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
  (pm.certificaciones || []).forEach(function(cert) { html += '<span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(59,130,246,0.12);color:#60a5fa;">' + cert + '</span>'; });
  html += '</div></div>';
  html += '<div style="cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:20px;padding:4px 8px;" class="pm-modal-close">\u2715</div></div>';
  html += '<div style="padding:16px 24px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;">';
  var metrics = [{label:'Tasa exito',value:(pm.tasa_exito||0)+'%',color:'#22c55e'},{label:'Proyectos activos',value:pm.proyectos_activos||0,color:'#3b82f6'},{label:'Completados',value:pm.proyectos_completados||0,color:'#8b5cf6'},{label:'Carga actual',value:(pm.carga_actual||0)+'h',color:(pm.carga_actual||0)>30?'#ef4444':'#22c55e'}];
  metrics.forEach(function(m) { html += '<div style="text-align:center;background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:'+m.color+';">'+m.value+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">'+m.label+'</div></div>'; });
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="padding:0 24px 16px;"><div style="font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Scoring del agente</div>';
  html += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;">';
  html += '<div style="font-size:13px;color:#e8e9ed;">Scoring: <span style="font-weight:700;color:#eab308;">'+(pm.scoring||pm.scoring_promedio||0)+'</span></div>';
  html += '<div style="font-size:13px;color:#e8e9ed;margin-top:4px;">Nivel: <span style="font-weight:700;color:#a78bfa;">'+(pm.nivel||'Senior')+'</span></div>';
  html += '<div style="font-size:13px;color:#e8e9ed;margin-top:4px;">Experiencia: <span style="font-weight:700;">'+(pm.anios_experiencia||0)+' años</span></div>';
  html += '</div></div>';
  var skills = pm.skills_match || pm.skills_json || [];
  var partial = pm.skills_partial || [];
  var missing = pm.skills_missing || [];
  if (skills.length > 0 || partial.length > 0 || missing.length > 0) {
    html += '<div style="padding:0 24px 16px;"><div style="font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Skills y competencias</div><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
    skills.forEach(function(s) { html += '<span style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(34,197,94,0.12);color:#22c55e;border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.25);">'+(typeof s==='string'?s:(s.nombre||s.skill||''))+' \u2713</span>'; });
    partial.forEach(function(s) { html += '<span style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.12);color:#eab308;">'+s+' ~</span>'; });
    missing.forEach(function(s) { html += '<span style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.08);color:#ef4444;">'+s+' \u2717</span>'; });
    html += '</div></div>';
  }
  if (pm.razon) { html += '<div style="padding:0 24px 16px;"><div style="font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Razon de seleccion</div><div style="background:rgba(6,182,212,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(6,182,212,0.15);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;font-size:12px;color:#06b6d4;line-height:1.5;">'+pm.razon+'</div></div>'; }
  html += '<div style="padding:0 24px 20px;text-align:right;"><button class="pm-modal-close-btn" style="padding:10px 24px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:#3b82f6;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">Cerrar</button></div>';
  modal.innerHTML = html;
  modal.querySelector('.pm-modal-close').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  modal.querySelector('.pm-modal-close-btn').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  overlay.appendChild(modal);
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
}

async function showBuildPause(pauseNumber, data, externalResolve) {
  return new Promise(function(innerResolve) {
    var resolve = externalResolve || innerResolve;
    currentPauseResolve = resolve;
    var pauseArea = document.getElementById('build-pause-area');
    if (!pauseArea) { resolve(data); return; }
    pauseArea.innerHTML = '';

    var pauseDiv = document.createElement('div');
    pauseDiv.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(234,179,8,0.04);border:2px dashed rgba(234,179,8,0.3);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px;';

    var pauseHeader = document.createElement('div');
    pauseHeader.style.cssText = 'display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px;';
    var pauseTitles = {1:'Revisar EDT/WBS + Acta + Alcance',2:'Revisar subtareas tecnicas + CMDB',3:'Revisar Riesgos + Stakeholders',4:'Seleccionar PM + Revisar equipo'};
    pauseHeader.innerHTML = '<div><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#eab308;">⏸ Pipeline en pausa — Gobernanza (' + pauseNumber + '/4)</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:2px;">' + (pauseTitles[pauseNumber]||'') + '</div></div>';
    var btnGroup = document.createElement('div');
    btnGroup.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:8px;';
    if (pauseNumber === 1) {
      var rejectBtn = document.createElement('button');
      rejectBtn.style.cssText = 'padding:8px 18px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);background:none;color:#ef4444;';
      rejectBtn.textContent = 'Rechazar EDT';
      rejectBtn.onclick = function() { pauseDiv.remove(); resolve(null); };
      btnGroup.appendChild(rejectBtn);
      var editBtn = document.createElement('button');
      editBtn.style.cssText = 'padding:8px 18px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;';
      editBtn.textContent = 'Editar campos';
      editBtn.onclick = function() { var firstTA = pauseDiv.querySelector('textarea'); if (firstTA) { firstTA.focus(); firstTA.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'}); } };
      btnGroup.appendChild(editBtn);
    }
    var approveBtn = document.createElement('button');
    approveBtn.id = 'build-pause-approve-' + pauseNumber;
    approveBtn.style.cssText = 'padding:8px 18px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:#22c55e;color:#fff;';
    approveBtn.textContent = 'Aprobar y continuar ▸';
    btnGroup.appendChild(approveBtn);
    pauseHeader.appendChild(btnGroup);
    pauseDiv.appendChild(pauseHeader);

    var layout = document.createElement('div');
    layout.style.cssText = 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 340px;gap:16px;';
    var mainContent = document.createElement('div');
    mainContent.id = 'build-pause-main-' + pauseNumber;
    var sideContent = document.createElement('div');
    sideContent.id = 'build-pause-side-' + pauseNumber;

    // ── PAUSA 1: EDT + Acta + Alcance ── (Visual design v2)
    if (pauseNumber === 1) {
      var edtData = data.edtResult || data;
      var parsed = null;

      // Parseo robusto: múltiples estrategias
      if (typeof edtData === 'object' && edtData !== null && !Array.isArray(edtData)) {
        parsed = edtData;
      } else if (typeof edtData === 'string') {
        var cleanStr = edtData.trim();
        // Estrategia 0: Si empieza con { intentar parse directo
        if (cleanStr.charAt(0) === '{') {
          try { parsed = JSON.parse(cleanStr); } catch(e0) { console.warn('Pausa 1: parse directo falló', e0.message); }
        }
        // Estrategia 1: limpiar backticks y buscar JSON
        if (!parsed) {
          try {
            var clean = cleanStr.replace(/```json\s*/gi, '').replace(/```\s*/gi, '').trim();
            var firstBrace = clean.indexOf('{');
            var lastBrace = clean.lastIndexOf('}');
            if (firstBrace !== -1 && lastBrace > firstBrace) {
              parsed = JSON.parse(clean.substring(firstBrace, lastBrace + 1));
            }
          } catch(e1) { console.warn('Pausa 1: estrategia 1 falló', e1.message); }
        }
        // Estrategia 2: BOM y caracteres invisibles
        if (!parsed) {
          try {
            var stripped = cleanStr.replace(/^\uFEFF/, '').replace(/^[\s\r\n]+/, '');
            if (stripped.charAt(0) === '{') {
              parsed = JSON.parse(stripped);
            }
          } catch(e2) { console.warn('Pausa 1: estrategia 2 falló', e2.message); }
        }
      }

      var hasEdt = parsed && parsed.edt && parsed.edt.fases && Array.isArray(parsed.edt.fases);
      console.log('Pausa 1 debug:', {
        typeOfEdtData: typeof edtData,
        edtDataLength: typeof edtData === 'string' ? edtData.length : 'N/A',
        firstChars: typeof edtData === 'string' ? edtData.substring(0, 50) : 'object',
        parsedOk: !!parsed,
        hasEdt: hasEdt,
        keys: parsed ? Object.keys(parsed) : 'null'
      });

      var faseColors = ['#3b82f6','#a855f7','#22c55e','#eab308','#ec4899','#06b6d4','#f97316','#8b5cf6'];
      var skillColors = {
        'Linux': {bg:'rgba(6,182,212,0.12)', color:'#06b6d4'},
        'DevOps': {bg:'rgba(34,197,94,0.12)', color:'#22c55e'},
        'QA': {bg:'rgba(236,72,153,0.12)', color:'#ec4899'},
        'Seguridad': {bg:'rgba(239,68,68,0.12)', color:'#ef4444'},
        'Redes': {bg:'rgba(6,182,212,0.12)', color:'#06b6d4'},
        'Backend': {bg:'rgba(249,115,22,0.12)', color:'#f97316'},
        'BBDD': {bg:'rgba(249,115,22,0.12)', color:'#f97316'},
        'Frontend': {bg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.12)', color:'#3b82f6'},
        'Soporte': {bg:'rgba(139,143,152,0.12)', color:'#8b8f98'},
        'Windows': {bg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.12)', color:'#3b82f6'}
      };
      var defaultSkillColor = {bg:'rgba(139,92,246,0.12)', color:'#a78bfa'};

      if (hasEdt) {
        // ── EDT Visual ──
        var edtSection = document.createElement('div');
        edtSection.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;';
        edtSection.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;"><span style="font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">EDT / WBS</span><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#3b82f6;">AG-005</span></div>';

        var totalFases=parsed.edt.fases.length, totalPaquetes=0, totalTareas=0, totalHoras=0;
        var skillHoursMap = {};

        parsed.edt.fases.forEach(function(fase, fi) {
          var fc = faseColors[fi % faseColors.length];
          (fase.paquetes||[]).forEach(function(paq) {
            totalPaquetes++;
            (paq.tareas||[]).forEach(function(t) {
              totalTareas++;
              totalHoras += (t.horas||0);
              var sk = t.skill || 'Otro';
              skillHoursMap[sk] = (skillHoursMap[sk]||0) + (t.horas||0);
            });
          });

          var faseDiv = document.createElement('div');
          faseDiv.style.cssText = 'background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:8px;overflow:hidden;';

          var faseHeader = document.createElement('div');
          faseHeader.style.cssText = 'padding:8px 12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;cursor:pointer;';
          var faseNameSpan = document.createElement('div');
          faseNameSpan.style.cssText = 'font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:'+fc+';cursor:pointer;';
          faseNameSpan.textContent = fase.nombre||'Fase '+(fi+1);
          faseNameSpan.title = 'Click para editar fase';
          faseNameSpan.onclick = function(ev) {
            ev.stopPropagation();
            showFaseModal(fase, fi, parsed, function() {
              faseNameSpan.textContent = fase.nombre;
              faseMetaSpan.textContent = 'S'+(fase.semana_inicio||'?')+'\u2013S'+(fase.semana_fin||'?')+' \u00b7 '+(fase.horas||0)+'h \u00b7 '+(fase.paquetes||[]).length+' paquetes';
            });
          };
          var faseMetaSpan = document.createElement('div');
          faseMetaSpan.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;';
          faseMetaSpan.textContent = 'S'+(fase.semana_inicio||'?')+'\u2013S'+(fase.semana_fin||'?')+' \u00b7 '+(fase.horas||0)+'h \u00b7 '+(fase.paquetes||[]).length+' paquetes';
          faseHeader.appendChild(faseNameSpan);
          faseHeader.appendChild(faseMetaSpan);
          var faseBody = document.createElement('div');
          faseBody.style.cssText = 'padding:0 12px 10px;';

          faseHeader.onclick = function() {
            faseBody.style.display = faseBody.style.display === 'none' ? 'block' : 'none';
          };

          (fase.paquetes||[]).forEach(function(paq) {
            var paqDiv = document.createElement('div');
            paqDiv.style.cssText = 'background:#181b20;border:1px solid #2a2e38;border-left:3px solid '+fc+';border-radius:6px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:5px;';
            paqDiv.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:6px;">'+(paq.nombre||'')+'</div>';

            (paq.tareas||[]).forEach(function(t) {
              var sc = skillColors[t.skill] || defaultSkillColor;
              var tareaDiv = document.createElement('div');
              tareaDiv.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:5px 4px;font-size:13px;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;border-radius:4px;transition:background 0.15s;';
              tareaDiv.onmouseover = function() { tareaDiv.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)'; };
              tareaDiv.onmouseout = function() { tareaDiv.style.background = ''; };
              tareaDiv.innerHTML = '<span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:'+fc+';flex-shrink:0;"></span>' +
                '<span class="tarea-nombre" style="flex:1;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(t.nombre||'')+'</span>' +
                '<span class="tarea-skill" style="font-size:11px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:600;background:'+sc.bg+';color:'+sc.color+';">'+(t.skill||'')+'</span>' +
                '<span class="tarea-horas" style="font-size:13px;font-family:monospace;color:#8b8f98;min-width:40px;text-align:right;">'+(t.horas||0)+'h</span>';
              tareaDiv.onclick = function(ev) {
                ev.stopPropagation();
                showTaskDetailModal(t, fase.nombre||'', paq.nombre||'',
                  function(updated) {
                    var n=tareaDiv.querySelector('.tarea-nombre'); if(n) n.textContent=updated.nombre;
                    var h=tareaDiv.querySelector('.tarea-horas'); if(h) h.textContent=updated.horas+'h';
                    var s=tareaDiv.querySelector('.tarea-skill'); if(s) s.textContent=updated.skill;
                  },
                  function(tareaId) { tareaDiv.remove(); }
                );
              };
              paqDiv.appendChild(tareaDiv);
              if (t.dependencias && t.dependencias.length > 0) {
                var depDiv = document.createElement('div');
                depDiv.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;padding-left:16px;margin-bottom:2px;';
                depDiv.textContent = 'dep: ' + t.dependencias.join(', ');
                paqDiv.appendChild(depDiv);
              }
            });

            faseBody.appendChild(paqDiv);
          });

          // Hitos within this fase's week range
          if (parsed.acta_constitucion && parsed.acta_constitucion.hitos) {
            parsed.acta_constitucion.hitos.forEach(function(h) {
              if (h.semana >= (fase.semana_inicio||0) && h.semana <= (fase.semana_fin||999)) {
                var hitoCard = document.createElement('div');
                hitoCard.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#22262e;border:1px dashed '+fc+';border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:12px;';
                hitoCard.innerHTML = '<div style="width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;background:'+fc+';color:#fff;">H</div><div style="flex:1;"><span style="color:#e8e9ed;font-weight:600;">'+h.nombre+'</span> <span style="color:#8b8f98;">– S'+h.semana+'</span></div>';
                faseBody.appendChild(hitoCard);
              }
            });
          }

          faseDiv.appendChild(faseHeader);
          faseDiv.appendChild(faseBody);
          edtSection.appendChild(faseDiv);
        });
        // Botón añadir fase
        var addFaseBtn = document.createElement('div');
        addFaseBtn.style.cssText = 'padding:12px;border:2px dashed #333840;border-radius:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:14px;margin-top:8px;transition:border-color 0.2s;';
        addFaseBtn.textContent = '+ Añadir nueva fase';
        addFaseBtn.onmouseover = function() { addFaseBtn.style.borderColor = '#3b82f6'; addFaseBtn.style.color = '#3b82f6'; };
        addFaseBtn.onmouseout = function() { addFaseBtn.style.borderColor = '#333840'; addFaseBtn.style.color = '#8b8f98'; };
        addFaseBtn.onclick = function() {
          var lastFase = parsed.edt.fases[parsed.edt.fases.length - 1];
          var newFase = { nombre:'Fase '+(parsed.edt.fases.length+1)+': Nueva fase', semana_inicio:lastFase?(lastFase.semana_fin+1):1, semana_fin:lastFase?(lastFase.semana_fin+8):8, horas:0, paquetes:[], notas_gobernador:'' };
          parsed.edt.fases.push(newFase);
          showFaseModal(newFase, parsed.edt.fases.length-1, parsed, function() { showToast('Fase añadida: '+newFase.nombre); });
        };
        edtSection.appendChild(addFaseBtn);
        mainContent.appendChild(edtSection);

        // ── Acta de Constitucion ──
        var actaData = parsed.acta_constitucion || {};
        var actaSection = document.createElement('div');
        actaSection.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;';
        var actaHtml = '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">Acta de constitucion <span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Pre-rellenado por IA</span></div>';
        actaHtml += '<div style="margin-bottom:8px;"><label style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Descripcion de alto nivel</label><textarea id="pause1-acta-desc" style="width:100%;min-height:50px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;">'+(actaData.descripcion_alto_nivel||'').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
        actaHtml += '<div style="margin-bottom:8px;"><label style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Objetivos SMART</label><textarea id="pause1-acta-obj" style="width:100%;min-height:50px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;">'+(actaData.objetivos_smart||[]).join('\n').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
        actaHtml += '<div style="margin-bottom:8px;"><label style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Entregables</label><textarea id="pause1-acta-ent" style="width:100%;min-height:40px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;">'+(actaData.entregables||[]).join('\n').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
        actaHtml += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;"><div><label style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Sponsor sugerido</label><input id="pause1-acta-sponsor" type="text" value="'+(actaData.sponsor||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:inherit;"></div><div><label style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Criterios de exito</label><input id="pause1-acta-criterios" type="text" value="'+(actaData.criterios_exito||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:inherit;"></div></div>';

        // Hitos cards
        if (actaData.hitos && actaData.hitos.length > 0) {
          actaHtml += '<div style="margin-top:6px;"><label style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Hitos</label>';
          actaData.hitos.forEach(function(h, hi) {
            var hc = faseColors[hi % faseColors.length];
            actaHtml += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#22262e;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 8px;margin-bottom:3px;font-size:9px;"><div style="width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;background:'+hc+';color:#fff;">'+(hi+1)+'</div><div style="flex:1;"><span style="color:#e8e9ed;font-weight:600;">'+h.nombre+'</span> <span style="color:#8b8f98;">– Semana '+h.semana+'</span></div></div>';
          });
          actaHtml += '</div>';
        }

        actaSection.innerHTML = actaHtml;
        // Make Acta header clickable for modal
        var actaTitle = actaSection.querySelector('div');
        if (actaTitle) { actaTitle.style.cursor = 'pointer'; actaTitle.title = 'Click para editar en modal'; }
        actaTitle.onclick = function(ev) {
          if (ev.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || ev.target.tagName === 'INPUT') return;
          showActaModal(parsed.acta_constitucion || {}, function(updated) {
            parsed.acta_constitucion = updated;
            // Update inline fields
            var d = document.getElementById('pause1-acta-desc'); if(d) d.value = updated.descripcion_alto_nivel||'';
            var o = document.getElementById('pause1-acta-obj'); if(o) o.value = (updated.objetivos_smart||[]).join('\n');
            var e = document.getElementById('pause1-acta-ent'); if(e) e.value = (updated.entregables||[]).join('\n');
            var s = document.getElementById('pause1-acta-sponsor'); if(s) s.value = updated.sponsor||'';
            var c = document.getElementById('pause1-acta-criterios'); if(c) c.value = updated.criterios_exito||'';
            showToast('Acta actualizada');
          });
        };
        mainContent.appendChild(actaSection);

        // ── Alcance ──
        var alcData = parsed.alcance || {};
        var alcSection = document.createElement('div');
        alcSection.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;';
        var alcHtml = '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">Alcance <span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Pre-rellenado por IA</span></div>';
        alcHtml += '<div style="margin-bottom:8px;"><label style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Alcance del producto</label><textarea id="pause1-alc-desc" style="width:100%;min-height:50px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;">'+(alcData.alcance_producto||'').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
        alcHtml += '<div style="margin-bottom:8px;"><label style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Exclusiones</label><textarea id="pause1-alc-excl" style="width:100%;min-height:40px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;">'+(alcData.exclusiones||[]).join('\n').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
        alcHtml += '<div style="margin-bottom:8px;"><label style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Restricciones</label><textarea id="pause1-alc-rest" style="width:100%;min-height:40px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;">'+(alcData.restricciones||[]).join('\n').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
        alcHtml += '<div><label style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;">Asunciones</label><textarea id="pause1-alc-asun" style="width:100%;min-height:40px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;">'+(alcData.asunciones||[]).join('\n').replace(/</g,'&lt;')+'</textarea></div>';
        alcSection.innerHTML = alcHtml;
        // Make Alcance header clickable for modal
        var alcTitle = alcSection.querySelector('div');
        if (alcTitle) { alcTitle.style.cursor = 'pointer'; alcTitle.title = 'Click para editar en modal'; }
        alcTitle.onclick = function(ev) {
          if (ev.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || ev.target.tagName === 'INPUT') return;
          showAlcanceModal(parsed.alcance || {}, function(updated) {
            parsed.alcance = updated;
            var d = document.getElementById('pause1-alc-desc'); if(d) d.value = updated.alcance_producto||'';
            var e = document.getElementById('pause1-alc-excl'); if(e) e.value = (updated.exclusiones||[]).join('\n');
            var r = document.getElementById('pause1-alc-rest'); if(r) r.value = (updated.restricciones||[]).join('\n');
            var a = document.getElementById('pause1-alc-asun'); if(a) a.value = (updated.asunciones||[]).join('\n');
            showToast('Alcance actualizado');
          });
        };
        mainContent.appendChild(alcSection);

        // ── SIDEBAR ──
        // Stats grid
        var statsHtml = '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;">Resumen EDT</div><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;"><div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#3b82f6;">'+totalFases+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:3px;">Fases</div></div><div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#a855f7;">'+totalPaquetes+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:3px;">Paquetes</div></div><div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;">'+totalTareas+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:3px;">Tareas</div></div><div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#eab308;">'+totalHoras+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:3px;">Horas</div></div></div></div>';

        // Skills requeridos
