        statsHtml += '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;">Skills requeridos</div><div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;">';
        Object.keys(skillHoursMap).forEach(function(sk) {
          var sc = skillColors[sk] || defaultSkillColor;
          statsHtml += '<span style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-weight:600;background:'+sc.bg+';color:'+sc.color+';">'+sk+' '+skillHoursMap[sk]+'h</span>';
        });
        statsHtml += '</div></div>';

        // Meta negocio
        var meta = parsed.meta_negocio;
        if (meta) {
          statsHtml += '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Meta negocio</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;line-height:1.8;">';
          if (meta.presupuesto_propuesto) statsHtml += '<div>Presupuesto propuesto: <span style="color:#e8e9ed;font-weight:600;">'+Number(meta.presupuesto_propuesto).toLocaleString()+'€</span></div>';
          if (meta.presupuesto_estimado_pmo) statsHtml += '<div>Estimado PMO: <span style="color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">'+Number(meta.presupuesto_estimado_pmo).toLocaleString()+'€</span></div>';
          if (meta.duracion_propuesta_semanas) statsHtml += '<div>Duracion propuesta: <span style="color:#e8e9ed;">'+meta.duracion_propuesta_semanas+' sem</span></div>';
          if (meta.duracion_estimada_pmo) statsHtml += '<div>Estimada PMO: <span style="color:#eab308;">'+meta.duracion_estimada_pmo+' sem</span></div>';
          if (meta.prioridad_aplicada) statsHtml += '<div>Prioridad: <span style="color:#3b82f6;font-weight:600;">'+meta.prioridad_aplicada+'</span></div>';
          if (meta.notas_viabilidad) statsHtml += '<div style="margin-top:4px;font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;font-style:italic;">'+meta.notas_viabilidad+'</div>';
          statsHtml += '</div></div>';
        }

        // Timeline bars
        statsHtml += '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Timeline</div>';
        var maxWeek = 1;
        parsed.edt.fases.forEach(function(f) { if ((f.semana_fin||0) > maxWeek) maxWeek = f.semana_fin; });
        parsed.edt.fases.forEach(function(fase, fi) {
          var fc = faseColors[fi % faseColors.length];
          var startPct = ((fase.semana_inicio||1)-1)/maxWeek*100;
          var widthPct = ((fase.semana_fin||1)-(fase.semana_inicio||1)+1)/maxWeek*100;
          statsHtml += '<div style="margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:2px;">'+(fase.nombre||'Fase '+(fi+1))+'</div><div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:3px;height:8px;position:relative;"><div style="position:absolute;left:'+startPct+'%;width:'+widthPct+'%;height:100%;background:'+fc+';border-radius:3px;opacity:0.7;"></div></div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:1px;">S'+(fase.semana_inicio||'?')+'–S'+(fase.semana_fin||'?')+'</div></div>';
        });
        statsHtml += '</div>';

        sideContent.innerHTML = statsHtml;

      } else {
        // Fallback: raw textarea
        var rawText = document.createElement('textarea'); rawText.id='pause1-edt-raw';
        rawText.style.cssText = 'width:100%;min-height:300px;background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;resize:vertical;';
        rawText.value = typeof edtData === 'string' ? edtData : JSON.stringify(edtData,null,2);
        mainContent.appendChild(rawText);
        sideContent.innerHTML = '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">AG-005 genero texto libre. Puedes editarlo antes de aprobar.</div>';
      }
    }

    // ── PAUSA 2: Subtareas tecnicas ──
    // ── PAUSA 2: Subtareas técnicas (Visual design v2) ──
    if (pauseNumber === 2) {
      var subtData = data.subtasksResult || '';
      var subtParsed = null;
      if (typeof subtData === 'string') {
        try {
          var clean2 = subtData.replace(/```json\s*/g, '').replace(/```\s*/g, '').trim();
          var jm2 = clean2.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
          if (jm2) subtParsed = JSON.parse(jm2[0]);
        } catch(e) { console.warn('Pausa 2: parse error', e); }
      } else if (typeof subtData === 'object') subtParsed = subtData;

      // Normalizar a formato { taskId: [subtasks] }
      var subtasksByTask = {};
      if (subtParsed) {
        if (subtParsed.subtasks_by_task) {
          subtasksByTask = subtParsed.subtasks_by_task;
        } else if (subtParsed.subtasks && Array.isArray(subtParsed.subtasks)) {
          subtParsed.subtasks.forEach(function(st) {
            var parent = st._parentTask || st.id_tarea || 'SIN_TAREA';
            if (!subtasksByTask[parent]) subtasksByTask[parent] = [];
            subtasksByTask[parent].push(st);
          });
        } else if (Array.isArray(subtParsed)) {
          subtParsed.forEach(function(st) {
            var parent = st._parentTask || st.id_tarea || 'SIN_TAREA';
            if (!subtasksByTask[parent]) subtasksByTask[parent] = [];
            subtasksByTask[parent].push(st);
          });
        } else {
          // Try treating keys as task IDs if they contain arrays
          Object.keys(subtParsed).forEach(function(k) {
            if (Array.isArray(subtParsed[k])) { subtasksByTask[k] = subtParsed[k]; }
          });
        }
      }

      // Get parent tasks from EDT (approved in pause 1)
      var edtParsed2 = null;
      var edtData2 = data.edtResult || '';
      if (typeof edtData2 === 'string') {
        try { var jmE = edtData2.replace(/```json\s*/g,'').replace(/```\s*/g,'').trim().match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (jmE) edtParsed2 = JSON.parse(jmE[0]); } catch(e) {}
      } else if (typeof edtData2 === 'object') edtParsed2 = edtData2;

      var allTasks = [];
      var faseColors2 = ['#3b82f6','#a855f7','#22c55e','#eab308','#ec4899','#06b6d4','#f97316','#8b5cf6'];
      var skillColors2 = {
        'Linux':{bg:'rgba(6,182,212,0.12)',color:'#06b6d4'},'DevOps':{bg:'rgba(34,197,94,0.12)',color:'#22c55e'},
        'QA':{bg:'rgba(236,72,153,0.12)',color:'#ec4899'},'Seguridad':{bg:'rgba(239,68,68,0.12)',color:'#ef4444'},
        'Redes':{bg:'rgba(6,182,212,0.12)',color:'#06b6d4'},'Backend':{bg:'rgba(249,115,22,0.12)',color:'#f97316'},
        'BBDD':{bg:'rgba(249,115,22,0.12)',color:'#f97316'},'Frontend':{bg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.12)',color:'#3b82f6'},
        'Soporte':{bg:'rgba(139,143,152,0.12)',color:'#8b8f98'},'Windows':{bg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.12)',color:'#3b82f6'}
      };
      if (edtParsed2 && edtParsed2.edt && edtParsed2.edt.fases) {
        edtParsed2.edt.fases.forEach(function(fase, fi) {
          (fase.paquetes || []).forEach(function(paq) {
            (paq.tareas || []).forEach(function(t) {
              allTasks.push({
                id_tarea: t.id_tarea, nombre: t.nombre, skill: t.skill, horas: t.horas,
                fase: fase.nombre, faseColor: faseColors2[fi % faseColors2.length],
                paquete: paq.nombre, dependencias: t.dependencias || []
              });
            });
          });
        });
      }

      var taskKeys = Object.keys(subtasksByTask);
      var hasSubtasks = taskKeys.length > 0;

      if (hasSubtasks) {
        // Header
        var resultSection = document.createElement('div');
        resultSection.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;';
        resultSection.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;"><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">Subtareas tecnicas</span><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#d946ef;">AG-013</span><span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Generado por IA + CMDB</span></div>';

        // Stats counters
        var totalSubtasks = 0, totalCmdbRefs = 0, techSetMap = {}, compSetMap = {};
        taskKeys.forEach(function(tk) {
          (subtasksByTask[tk]||[]).forEach(function(st) {
            totalSubtasks++;
            if (st.tecnologia) techSetMap[st.tecnologia] = (techSetMap[st.tecnologia]||0)+1;
            if (st.componente) {
              compSetMap[st.componente] = (compSetMap[st.componente]||0)+1;
              if (st.componente.toLowerCase().indexOf('cmdb') >= 0) totalCmdbRefs++;
            }
          });
        });
        var totalParentTasks = taskKeys.length;
        var avgSubPerTask = totalParentTasks > 0 ? (totalSubtasks / totalParentTasks).toFixed(1) : '0';

        // Build task map for lookup
        var taskMap = {};
        allTasks.forEach(function(t) { taskMap[t.id_tarea] = t; });

        // Render task cards
        var taskIndex = 0;
        taskKeys.forEach(function(taskId) {
          var subs = subtasksByTask[taskId] || [];
          var parentTask = taskMap[taskId] || null;
          var fc = parentTask ? parentTask.faseColor : '#8b8f98';
          var startExpanded = taskIndex < 3;
          taskIndex++;

          var taskCard = document.createElement('div');
          taskCard.style.cssText = 'background:#22262e;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-left:3px solid '+fc+';border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:8px;overflow:hidden;';

          // Task header
          var taskHeader = document.createElement('div');
          taskHeader.style.cssText = 'padding:10px 12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;cursor:pointer;';
          var headerLeft = '';
          headerLeft += '<div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">'+taskId+': '+(parentTask ? parentTask.nombre : 'Tarea');
          if (!startExpanded) headerLeft += ' <span style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">▸ '+subs.length+' subtareas</span>';
          headerLeft += '</div><div style="display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:3px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
          if (parentTask) {
            headerLeft += '<span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600;background:'+fc.replace(')',',0.12)').replace('rgb','rgba')+';color:'+fc+';">'+(parentTask.fase||'')+'</span>';
            var skc = skillColors2[parentTask.skill] || {bg:'rgba(139,92,246,0.12)',color:'#a78bfa'};
            headerLeft += '<span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600;background:'+skc.bg+';color:'+skc.color+';">'+(parentTask.skill||'')+'</span>';
            if (parentTask.paquete) headerLeft += '<span style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(parentTask.paquete||'')+'</span>';
            if (parentTask.dependencias && parentTask.dependencias.length > 0) headerLeft += '<span style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">dep: '+parentTask.dependencias.join(', ')+'</span>';
          }
          headerLeft += '</div></div>';
          var taskHours = parentTask ? (parentTask.horas||0) : 0;
          taskHeader.innerHTML = headerLeft + '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;min-width:40px;text-align:right;color:'+fc+';">'+taskHours+'h</div>';

          // Subtasks body
          var subtasksBody = document.createElement('div');
          subtasksBody.style.cssText = 'padding:0 12px 10px;border-top:1px solid #2a2e38;'+(startExpanded?'':'display:none;');

          var subtaskLabel = document.createElement('div');
          subtaskLabel.style.cssText = 'font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:#d946ef;margin:8px 0 6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;';
          subtaskLabel.innerHTML = '<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect x="10" y="10" width="80" height="80" rx="10" fill="none" stroke="#d946ef" stroke-width="10"/></svg> '+subs.length+' subtareas tecnicas generadas por AG-013';
          subtasksBody.appendChild(subtaskLabel);

          subs.forEach(function(st, si) {
            // Quality indicator
            var quality = 'green';
            if (!st.criterio_exito || (st.criterio_exito||'').length < 10) quality = 'yellow';
            if (!st.descripcion_tecnica || (st.descripcion_tecnica||'').length < 20) quality = 'yellow';
            if ((st.horas_estimadas||0) > 20 || (st.story_points||0) > 8) quality = 'red';
            var qColor = quality==='green'?'#22c55e':quality==='yellow'?'#eab308':'#ef4444';

            var stDiv = document.createElement('div');
            stDiv.style.cssText = 'background:#181b20;border:1px solid #2a2e38;border-left:3px solid #d946ef;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:5px;position:relative;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.15s;';
            stDiv.onmouseenter = function(){stDiv.style.borderColor='#d946ef';};
            stDiv.onmouseleave = function(){stDiv.style.borderColor='#2a2e38';};

            var stHtml = '';
            // Quality dot + Edit hint
            stHtml += '<div style="position:absolute;top:8px;right:8px;display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">';
            stHtml += '<div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:'+qColor+';" title="'+(quality==='green'?'Bien definida':quality==='yellow'?'Revisar':'Requiere atencion')+'"></div>';
            stHtml += '<span style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;opacity:0.5;">click para editar</span>';
            stHtml += '</div>';

            // Title
            stHtml += '<div class="st-card-title" style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:3px;margin-left:8px;padding-right:120px;">'+(si+1)+'. '+(st.titulo||'Subtarea '+(si+1))+'</div>';
            if (st.descripcion_tecnica || st.descripcion) {
              stHtml += '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;line-height:1.4;margin-left:8px;">'+(st.descripcion_tecnica||st.descripcion||'').substring(0,120)+'</div>';
            }
            stHtml += '<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:5px;margin-left:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
            if (st.tecnologia) stHtml += '<span style="font-size:7px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(217,70,239,0.1);color:#d946ef;font-weight:600;border:1px solid rgba(217,70,239,0.2);">'+st.tecnologia+'</span>';
            if (st.componente) stHtml += '<span style="font-size:7px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(6,182,212,0.1);color:#06b6d4;font-weight:600;">'+st.componente+'</span>';
            if (st.integracion_con) stHtml += '<span style="font-size:7px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(249,115,22,0.1);color:#f97316;font-weight:600;">\u2192 '+st.integracion_con+'</span>';
            if (st.skill_requerido) {
              var skc2 = skillColors2[st.skill_requerido] || {bg:'rgba(139,92,246,0.12)',color:'#a78bfa'};
              stHtml += '<span style="font-size:7px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600;background:'+skc2.bg+';color:'+skc2.color+';">'+st.skill_requerido+'</span>';
            }
            stHtml += '<span class="st-card-horas" style="font-size:9px;font-family:monospace;color:#8b8f98;margin-left:auto;">'+(st.horas_estimadas||0)+'h</span>';
            if (st.story_points) stHtml += '<span class="st-card-pts" style="font-size:8px;color:#eab308;">'+st.story_points+' pts</span>';
            stHtml += '</div>';
            if (st.criterio_exito) {
              stHtml += '<div style="font-size:8px;color:#22c55e;margin-top:3px;margin-left:8px;">\u2713 '+st.criterio_exito+'</div>';
            }
            if (st.notas_gobernador) {
              stHtml += '<div style="font-size:8px;color:#3b82f6;margin-top:3px;margin-left:8px;font-style:italic;">PM: '+st.notas_gobernador.substring(0,60)+'</div>';
            }

            stDiv.innerHTML = stHtml;

            // Click to open modal
            stDiv.onclick = function(ev) {
              ev.stopPropagation();
              var pTask = parentTask || {id_tarea: taskId, nombre: taskId};
              showSubtaskDetailModal(st, pTask,
                function(updated) {
                  var tEl = stDiv.querySelector('.st-card-title');
                  if(tEl) tEl.textContent = (si+1)+'. '+updated.titulo;
                  var hEl = stDiv.querySelector('.st-card-horas');
                  if(hEl) hEl.textContent = updated.horas_estimadas+'h';
                  var pEl = stDiv.querySelector('.st-card-pts');
                  if(pEl) pEl.textContent = updated.story_points+' pts';
                },
                function() {
                  stDiv.style.opacity='0.3'; stDiv.style.pointerEvents='none';
                  subs.splice(si, 1);
                  subtaskLabel.innerHTML = '<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect x="10" y="10" width="80" height="80" rx="10" fill="none" stroke="#d946ef" stroke-width="10"/></svg> '+subs.length+' subtareas tecnicas';
                }
              );
            };

            subtasksBody.appendChild(stDiv);
          });

          // Add subtask button
          var addBtn = document.createElement('div');
          addBtn.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;padding:6px;border:1px dashed #333840;border-radius:6px;font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;margin-top:4px;';
          addBtn.textContent = '+ Añadir subtarea tecnica a esta tarea';
          addBtn.onmouseover = function() { addBtn.style.borderColor='#d946ef'; addBtn.style.color='#d946ef'; };
          addBtn.onmouseout = function() { addBtn.style.borderColor='#333840'; addBtn.style.color='#8b8f98'; };
          addBtn.onclick = function(ev) {
            ev.stopPropagation();
            var newSt = {titulo:'Nueva subtarea',descripcion_tecnica:'Descripcion...',tecnologia:'',componente:'',integracion_con:'',horas_estimadas:4,skill_requerido:'',criterio_exito:'',story_points:2};
            subs.push(newSt);
            var newDiv = document.createElement('div');
            newDiv.style.cssText = 'background:#181b20;border:1px solid #d946ef;border-left:3px solid #d946ef;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:5px;';
            newDiv.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#d946ef;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px;">Nueva subtarea añadida</div><input type="text" placeholder="Titulo de la subtarea" value="Nueva subtarea" style="width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 8px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:10px;margin-bottom:3px;"><textarea placeholder="Descripcion tecnica" style="width:100%;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 8px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:9px;min-height:30px;resize:vertical;">Descripcion...</textarea>';
            subtasksBody.insertBefore(newDiv, addBtn);
            var inp = newDiv.querySelector('input');
            if (inp) { inp.focus(); inp.onchange = function() { newSt.titulo = inp.value; }; }
            var ta = newDiv.querySelector('textarea');
            if (ta) { ta.onchange = function() { newSt.descripcion_tecnica = ta.value; }; }
          };
          subtasksBody.appendChild(addBtn);

          // Toggle expand/collapse
          taskHeader.onclick = function() {
            var vis = subtasksBody.style.display !== 'none';
            subtasksBody.style.display = vis ? 'none' : 'block';
          };

          taskCard.appendChild(taskHeader);
          taskCard.appendChild(subtasksBody);
          resultSection.appendChild(taskCard);
        });

        mainContent.appendChild(resultSection);

        // ── SIDEBAR ──
        var sideHtml = '';

        // Stats grid
        sideHtml += '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Resumen subtareas generadas</div>';
        sideHtml += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;">';
        sideHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#d946ef;">'+totalSubtasks+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Subtareas total</div></div>';
        sideHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#e8e9ed;">'+totalParentTasks+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Tareas padre</div></div>';
        sideHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;">'+avgSubPerTask+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Media sub/tarea</div></div>';
        sideHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#06b6d4;">'+totalCmdbRefs+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Refs CMDB</div></div>';
        sideHtml += '</div>';

        // Tecnologias detectadas
        var techKeys = Object.keys(techSetMap);
        if (techKeys.length > 0) {
          sideHtml += '<div style="margin-top:8px;"><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:4px;">Tecnologias detectadas:</div><div style="display:flex;gap:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
          techKeys.forEach(function(tk) {
            sideHtml += '<span style="font-size:7px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(217,70,239,0.1);color:#d946ef;font-weight:600;border:1px solid rgba(217,70,239,0.2);">'+tk+'</span>';
          });
          sideHtml += '</div></div>';
        }

        // Componentes CMDB
        var cmdbComps = Object.keys(compSetMap).filter(function(c) { return c.toLowerCase().indexOf('cmdb') >= 0; });
        if (cmdbComps.length > 0) {
          sideHtml += '<div style="margin-top:8px;"><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:4px;">Componentes CMDB referenciados:</div><div style="display:flex;gap:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
          cmdbComps.forEach(function(c) {
            sideHtml += '<span style="background:rgba(34,197,94,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.15);border-radius:4px;padding:3px 6px;font-size:7px;color:#22c55e;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;">'+c+' ('+compSetMap[c]+')</span>';
          });
          sideHtml += '</div></div>';
        }

        sideHtml += '</div>';
        sideContent.innerHTML = sideHtml;

      } else {
        // Fallback: raw textarea
        var rawSub = document.createElement('textarea');
        rawSub.id = 'pause2-raw';
        rawSub.style.cssText = 'width:100%;min-height:300px;background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;resize:vertical;';
        rawSub.value = typeof subtData === 'string' ? subtData : JSON.stringify(subtData,null,2);
        mainContent.appendChild(rawSub);
        sideContent.innerHTML = '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">AG-013 genero texto libre. Puedes editarlo antes de aprobar.</div>';
      }
    }

    // ── PAUSA 3: Riesgos + Stakeholders ──
    // ── PAUSA 3: Riesgos + Stakeholders + RACI + Comunicaciones (Visual v2) ──
    if (pauseNumber === 3) {
      // Parse riesgos
      var risksData = data.risksResult || '';
      var risksParsed = null;
      if (typeof risksData === 'string') {
        try { var cleanR = risksData.replace(/```json\s*/g,'').replace(/```\s*/g,'').trim(); var mR = cleanR.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if(mR) risksParsed = JSON.parse(mR[0]); } catch(e) {}
      } else if (typeof risksData === 'object') risksParsed = risksData;
      var risksList = (risksParsed && risksParsed.risks) || [];

      // Parse stakeholders
      var stkData = data.stakeholdersResult || '';
      var stkParsed = null;
      if (typeof stkData === 'string') {
        try { var cleanS = stkData.replace(/```json\s*/g,'').replace(/```\s*/g,'').trim(); var mS = cleanS.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if(mS) stkParsed = JSON.parse(mS[0]); } catch(e) {}
      } else if (typeof stkData === 'object') stkParsed = stkData;
      var stkList = (stkParsed && stkParsed.stakeholders) || [];
      var raciMatrix = (stkParsed && stkParsed.raci_matrix) || [];
      var commsPlan = (stkParsed && stkParsed.plan_comunicaciones) || [];

      var hasData3 = risksList.length > 0 || stkList.length > 0;

      if (hasData3) {
        // Score helper
        function riskScoreColor(s) {
          if (s>=16) return {bg:'rgba(185,28,28,0.25)',border:'rgba(185,28,28,0.4)',color:'#ef4444',dot:'#b91c1c'};
          if (s>=13) return {bg:'rgba(239,68,68,0.15)',border:'rgba(239,68,68,0.3)',color:'#ef4444',dot:'#ef4444'};
          if (s>=10) return {bg:'rgba(249,115,22,0.15)',border:'rgba(249,115,22,0.3)',color:'#f97316',dot:'#f97316'};
          if (s>=5) return {bg:'rgba(234,179,8,0.15)',border:'rgba(234,179,8,0.3)',color:'#eab308',dot:'#eab308'};
          return {bg:'rgba(34,197,94,0.15)',border:'rgba(34,197,94,0.3)',color:'#22c55e',dot:'#22c55e'};
        }
        function matrixCellColor(s) {
          if (s>=20) return 'background:rgba(185,28,28,0.25);border:1px solid rgba(185,28,28,0.4)';
          if (s>=15) return 'background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3)';
          if (s>=10) return 'background:rgba(249,115,22,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.3)';
          if (s>=5) return 'background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.3)';
          return 'background:rgba(34,197,94,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3)';
        }

        // ── TAB SYSTEM ──
        var tabLabels3 = ['Riesgos (AG-014)','Stakeholders (AG-015)','Plan comunicaciones','Matriz RACI','Calendario CAB'];
        var tabColors3 = ['#eab308','#ec4899','#ec4899','#ec4899','#2dd4bf'];
        var tabBar3 = document.createElement('div');
        tabBar3.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:2px;margin-bottom:10px;';
        var tabContents3 = [];
        tabLabels3.forEach(function(label,idx) {
          var tb = document.createElement('div');
          tb.style.cssText = 'padding:8px 16px;border-radius:8px 8px 0 0;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid '+(idx===0?'#3a3f4a':'#333840')+';border-bottom:none;background:'+(idx===0?'#22262e':'#1a1d24')+';color:'+(idx===0?'#e8e9ed':'#8b8f98')+';';
          tb.textContent = label;
          tb.onclick = function() {
            tabBar3.querySelectorAll('div').forEach(function(b){b.style.background='#1a1d24';b.style.borderColor='#333840';b.style.color='#8b8f98';});
            tb.style.background='#22262e';tb.style.borderColor='#3a3f4a';tb.style.color='#e8e9ed';
            tabContents3.forEach(function(tc,ti){tc.style.display=ti===idx?'block':'none';});
          };
          tabBar3.appendChild(tb);
        });
        mainContent.appendChild(tabBar3);

        // Create 5 tab content containers
        for(var ti=0;ti<5;ti++){
          var tc = document.createElement('div');
          tc.style.display = ti===0?'block':'none';
          tabContents3.push(tc);
        }

        // ═══ TAB 0: RIESGOS ═══
        var risksSection = document.createElement('div');
        risksSection.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:0 10px 10px 10px;padding:14px;';
        risksSection.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#eab308;">AG-014 Risk Analyzer — Matriz de riesgos PMBOK</span><span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Generado por IA</span></div>';

        // 5x5 RISK MATRIX
        var matrixDiv = document.createElement('div');
        matrixDiv.style.cssText = 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:40px repeat(5,1fr);gap:2px;margin-bottom:12px;';
        var impLabels = ['Muy bajo','Bajo','Medio','Alto','Muy alto'];
        var probLabels = ['Muy alta','Alta','Media','Baja','Muy baja'];
        var probValues = [5,4,3,2,1];

        // Build risk lookup: key = "P_I" -> array of risk IDs
        var riskCellMap = {};
        risksList.forEach(function(rk,ri) {
          var p = rk.probabilidad||3, imp = rk.impacto||3;
          var key = p+'_'+imp;
          if(!riskCellMap[key]) riskCellMap[key]=[];
          riskCellMap[key].push({id:rk.id||('R'+(ri+1)),score:p*imp});
        });

        // Header row
        matrixDiv.innerHTML = '<div></div>';
        impLabels.forEach(function(l){matrixDiv.innerHTML+='<div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;padding:4px;font-weight:600;">'+l+'</div>';});

        // Matrix rows (prob 5 down to 1)
        probLabels.forEach(function(pLabel,pi) {
          var pVal = probValues[pi];
          var yLabel = document.createElement('div');
          yLabel.style.cssText = 'font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:right;padding:4px 6px 4px 0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;';
          yLabel.textContent = pLabel;
          matrixDiv.appendChild(yLabel);

          for(var iVal=1;iVal<=5;iVal++) {
            var score = pVal*iVal;
            var cell = document.createElement('div');
            cell.style.cssText = 'border-radius:4px;padding:3px;min-height:28px;font-size:7px;text-align:center;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;gap:1px;'+matrixCellColor(score)+';';
            var cellHtml = '<span style="color:#8b8f98;font-size:6px;">'+score+'</span>';
            var dotsKey = pVal+'_'+iVal;
            if(riskCellMap[dotsKey]) {
              riskCellMap[dotsKey].forEach(function(rd) {
                var dc = riskScoreColor(rd.score);
                cellHtml += '<div class="matrix-dot" data-risk-id="'+rd.id+'" style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;background:'+dc.dot+';cursor:pointer;">'+rd.id+'</div>';
              });
            }
            cell.innerHTML = cellHtml;
            // Wire dot clicks
            cell.querySelectorAll('.matrix-dot').forEach(function(dot) {
              dot.onclick = function(ev) {
                console.log('MATRIX DOT CLICK:', dot.getAttribute('data-risk-id'));
                ev.stopPropagation();
                var rId = dot.getAttribute('data-risk-id');
                var rk = risksList.find(function(r){return (r.id||('R'+(risksList.indexOf(r)+1)))===rId;});
                if(rk) showRiskDetailModal(rk, risksList, function(){}, function(){});
              };
            });
            matrixDiv.appendChild(cell);
          }
        });
        risksSection.appendChild(matrixDiv);

        // RISK CARDS
        risksList.forEach(function(rk,ri) {
          var score = (rk.probabilidad||3)*(rk.impacto||3);
          var sc = riskScoreColor(score);
          var rId = rk.id||('R'+(ri+1));
          var card = document.createElement('div');
          card.style.cssText = 'background:#22262e;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-left:4px solid '+sc.color+';border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:6px;';

          var catColors = {'Técnico':'rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:#ef4444','Tecnico':'rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:#ef4444','Recursos':'rgba(168,85,247,0.12);color:#a855f7','Alcance':'rgba(59,130,246,0.12);color:#3b82f6','Regulatorio':'rgba(236,72,153,0.12);color:#ec4899','Externo':'rgba(139,143,152,0.12);color:#8b8f98'};
          var catStyle = catColors[rk.categoria]||catColors['Tecnico'];

          var html = '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">';
          html += '<span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:'+sc.bg+';color:'+sc.color+';">'+rId+' · '+score+'</span>';
          html += (rk.descripcion||'');
          html += '<span style="font-size:8px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600;background:'+catStyle+';">'+(rk.categoria||'Tecnico')+'</span>';
          html += '</div>';

          if(rk.plan_mitigacion||rk.plan_contingencia) {
            html += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;">';
            if(rk.plan_mitigacion) html += '<div style="background:#181b20;border-radius:4px;padding:6px 8px;"><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px;">Plan mitigacion</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#e8e9ed;line-height:1.3;">'+rk.plan_mitigacion+'</div></div>';
            if(rk.plan_contingencia) html += '<div style="background:#181b20;border-radius:4px;padding:6px 8px;"><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px;">Plan contingencia</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#e8e9ed;line-height:1.3;">'+rk.plan_contingencia+'</div></div>';
            html += '</div>';
          }
          if(rk.responsable) html += '<div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:3px;">👤 Responsable: '+rk.responsable+'</div>';
          if(rk.trigger) html += '<div style="font-size:8px;color:#eab308;margin-top:2px;font-style:italic;">⚡ Trigger: '+rk.trigger+'</div>';

          card.innerHTML = html;
          card.style.cursor = 'pointer';
          card.style.transition = 'border-color 0.15s';
          card.onmouseenter = function(){card.style.borderColor='#eab308';};
          card.onmouseleave = function(){card.style.borderColor='#3a3f4a';};
          card.onclick = function(e){console.log('RISK CARD CLICK:', rk.id||('R'+ri), rk);e.stopPropagation();showRiskDetailModal(rk, risksList, function(){}, function(deleted){card.remove();});};
          risksSection.appendChild(card);
        });

        // Add risk button (usar appendChild para NO destruir onclick de las cards)
        var addRiskBtn = document.createElement('div');
        addRiskBtn.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;padding:8px;border:1px dashed #333840;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;margin-top:6px;';
        addRiskBtn.textContent = '+ Añadir riesgo manualmente';
        risksSection.appendChild(addRiskBtn);

        // Contingencia summary (usar appendChild para NO destruir onclick)
        var rsg = (risksParsed&&risksParsed.risk_score_global)||0;
        var contPct = (risksParsed&&risksParsed.contingencia_recomendada_pct)||0;
        var resPct = (risksParsed&&risksParsed.reserva_gestion_pct)||0;
        if(rsg||contPct) {
          var rsgLabel = rsg>=70?'ALTO':rsg>=50?'MEDIO-ALTO':rsg>=30?'MEDIO':'BAJO';
          var contDiv = document.createElement('div');
          contDiv.style.cssText = 'margin-top:10px;background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;';
          contDiv.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:6px;">Resumen de contingencia</div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:4px;"><span>Risk score global</span><span style="color:#f97316;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;">'+rsg+'/100 — '+rsgLabel+'</span></div>'+(contPct?'<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:4px;"><span>Contingencia recomendada</span><span style="color:#eab308;font-weight:700;">'+contPct+'% del BAC</span></div>':'')+(resPct?'<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;"><span>Reserva de gestion</span><span style="color:#8b8f98;font-weight:700;">'+resPct+'% del BAC</span></div>':'');
          risksSection.appendChild(contDiv);
        }
        tabContents3[0].appendChild(risksSection);

        // ═══ TAB 1: STAKEHOLDERS — Power/Interest Grid ═══
        var stkSection = document.createElement('div');
        stkSection.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:0 10px 10px 10px;padding:14px;';
        stkSection.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#ec4899;">AG-015 Stakeholder Map — Mapa poder/interes</span><span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Generado por IA + Directorio</span></div>';

        // Classify stakeholders into quadrants
        var q1=[],q2=[],q3=[],q4=[];
        stkList.forEach(function(sh) {
          var hp = (sh.nivel_poder||3)>=4, hi = (sh.nivel_interes||3)>=4;
          if(hp&&hi) q1.push(sh); else if(hp&&!hi) q2.push(sh); else if(!hp&&hi) q3.push(sh); else q4.push(sh);
        });

        var raciColors = {R:{bg:'rgba(239,68,68,0.1)',color:'#ef4444'},A:{bg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.1)',color:'#3b82f6'},C:{bg:'rgba(234,179,8,0.1)',color:'#eab308'},I:{bg:'rgba(139,143,152,0.1)',color:'#8b8f98'}};

        function renderQuadrantCards(arr, avatarBg, avatarColor) {
          var h = '';
          arr.forEach(function(sh, idx) {
            var initials = (sh.nombre||'XX').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]||'';}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
            var rc = raciColors[sh.raci]||raciColors['I'];
            h += '<div class="stk-card" data-stk-name="'+(sh.nombre||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')+'" style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.15s;">';
            h += '<div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;background:'+avatarBg+';color:'+avatarColor+';">'+initials+'</div>';
            h += '<div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(sh.nombre||'')+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(sh.cargo||'')+' \u2014 '+(sh.area||'')+'</div></div>';
            if(sh.raci) h += '<div style="font-size:8px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:700;margin-left:auto;background:'+rc.bg+';color:'+rc.color+';">'+sh.raci+'</div>';
            h += '</div>';
          });
          return h;
        }

        var gridHtml = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin-bottom:12px;height:300px;">';
        // Q1: Alto poder + Alto interes (red)
        gridHtml += '<div style="background:rgba(239,68,68,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.2);border-radius:8px 0 0 0;padding:8px;overflow-y:auto;"><div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:#ef4444;">Alto poder + Alto interes — Gestionar de cerca</div>'+renderQuadrantCards(q1,'rgba(239,68,68,0.2)','#ef4444')+'</div>';
        // Q2: Alto poder + Bajo interes (blue)
        gridHtml += '<div style="background:rgba(59,130,246,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.2);border-radius:0 8px 0 0;padding:8px;overflow-y:auto;"><div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:#3b82f6;">Alto poder + Bajo interes — Mantener satisfecho</div>'+renderQuadrantCards(q2,'rgba(59,130,246,0.2)','#3b82f6')+'</div>';
        // Q3: Bajo poder + Alto interes (yellow)
        gridHtml += '<div style="background:rgba(234,179,8,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.2);border-radius:0 0 0 8px;padding:8px;overflow-y:auto;"><div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:#eab308;">Bajo poder + Alto interes — Mantener informado</div>'+renderQuadrantCards(q3,'rgba(234,179,8,0.2)','#eab308')+'</div>';
        // Q4: Bajo poder + Bajo interes (gray)
        gridHtml += '<div style="background:rgba(139,143,152,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(139,143,152,0.2);border-radius:0 0 8px 0;padding:8px;overflow-y:auto;"><div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:#8b8f98;">Bajo poder + Bajo interes — Monitorizar</div>'+renderQuadrantCards(q4,'rgba(139,143,152,0.2)','#8b8f98')+'</div>';
        gridHtml += '</div>';
        gridHtml += '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;">'+stkList.length+' stakeholders mapeados del directorio corporativo.</div>';
        stkSection.innerHTML += gridHtml;
        tabContents3[1].appendChild(stkSection);
        // Wire stakeholder clicks via event delegation
        stkSection.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
          var card = ev.target.closest('.stk-card');
          if (!card) return;
          var name = card.getAttribute('data-stk-name');
          var stk = stkList.find(function(s){return s.nombre === name;});
          if (stk) showStakeholderModal(stk);
        });

        // ═══ TAB 2: COMUNICACIONES ═══
        var commsSection = document.createElement('div');
        commsSection.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:0 10px 10px 10px;padding:14px;';
        commsSection.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#ec4899;">Plan de comunicaciones</span><span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Generado por IA</span></div>';

        var freqColors = {'Semanal':'rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:#ef4444','Quincenal':'rgba(234,179,8,0.12);color:#eab308','Por oleada':'rgba(59,130,246,0.12);color:#3b82f6','Al hito':'rgba(34,197,94,0.12);color:#22c55e','Inmediato':'rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:#ef4444'};
        if(commsPlan.length===0) {
          commsSection.innerHTML += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;padding:20px;">No se genero plan de comunicaciones.</div>';
        } else {
          commsPlan.forEach(function(c) {
            var fStyle = freqColors[c.frecuencia]||'rgba(139,143,152,0.12);color:#8b8f98';
            var row = document.createElement('div');
            row.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 12px;margin-bottom:4px;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.15s;border:1px solid transparent;';
            row.onmouseenter = function(){row.style.borderColor='#ec4899';};
            row.onmouseleave = function(){row.style.borderColor='transparent';};
            row.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:9px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:600;min-width:60px;text-align:center;background:'+fStyle+';">'+(c.frecuencia||'')+'</div><div style="flex:1;"><div style="font-size:11px;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(c.evento||'')+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(c.audiencia||'')+'</div></div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(c.canal||'')+'</div>';
            row.onclick = function(){showCommunicationModal(c, function(updated){row.querySelector('div:nth-child(2) div:first-child').textContent=updated.evento||'';}, function(){row.remove();});};
            commsSection.appendChild(row);
          });
        }
        // Add comm button
        var addCommBtn = document.createElement('div');
        addCommBtn.style.cssText = 'padding:10px;border:2px dashed #333840;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;color:#8b8f98;font-size:13px;margin-top:8px;';
        addCommBtn.textContent = '+ Añadir comunicacion';
        addCommBtn.onmouseover = function(){addCommBtn.style.borderColor='#ec4899';addCommBtn.style.color='#ec4899';};
        addCommBtn.onmouseout = function(){addCommBtn.style.borderColor='#333840';addCommBtn.style.color='#8b8f98';};
        addCommBtn.onclick = function(){
          var nc = {evento:'Nueva comunicacion',frecuencia:'Semanal',canal:'Reunion',audiencia:'',notas_gobernador:''};
          commsPlan.push(nc);
          showCommunicationModal(nc, function(){}, function(){});
        };
        commsSection.appendChild(addCommBtn);
        tabContents3[2].appendChild(commsSection);

        // ═══ TAB 3: RACI ═══
        var raciSection = document.createElement('div');
        raciSection.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:0 10px 10px 10px;padding:14px;';
        raciSection.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#ec4899;">Matriz RACI por entregable</span><span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Generado por IA</span></div>';

        if(raciMatrix.length > 0) {
          // Collect all stakeholder names from raci
          var raciNames = {};
          raciMatrix.forEach(function(row) {
            if(row.asignaciones) Object.keys(row.asignaciones).forEach(function(n){raciNames[n]=true;});
          });
          var nameList = Object.keys(raciNames);

          // Build name→cargo map from stkList
          var nameCargo = {};
          stkList.forEach(function(sh) { if(sh.nombre) nameCargo[sh.nombre] = (sh.cargo||'').substring(0,12); });

          var tHtml = '<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:8px;margin-top:8px;">';
          tHtml += '<tr><th style="background:#22262e;padding:4px 6px;text-align:left;color:#8b8f98;font-weight:600;border:1px solid #333840;">Entregable</th>';
          nameList.forEach(function(n) {
            var short = n.split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]+'.';}).join('');
            tHtml += '<th style="background:#22262e;padding:4px 6px;text-align:center;color:#8b8f98;font-weight:600;border:1px solid #333840;">'+short+'<br><span style="font-weight:400;font-size:7px;">'+(nameCargo[n]||'')+'</span></th>';
          });
          tHtml += '</tr>';

          raciMatrix.forEach(function(row) {
            tHtml += '<tr><td style="padding:4px 6px;border:1px solid #333840;text-align:left;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(row.entregable||'')+'</td>';
            nameList.forEach(function(n) {
              var val = (row.asignaciones&&row.asignaciones[n])||'';
              var rcStyle = '';
              if(val==='R') rcStyle='color:#ef4444;font-weight:700;';
              else if(val==='A') rcStyle='color:#3b82f6;font-weight:700;';
              else if(val==='C') rcStyle='color:#eab308;font-weight:700;';
              else if(val==='I') rcStyle='color:#8b8f98;font-weight:700;';
              tHtml += '<td style="padding:4px 6px;border:1px solid #333840;text-align:center;'+rcStyle+'">'+val+'</td>';
            });
            tHtml += '</tr>';
          });
          tHtml += '</table>';
          tHtml += '<div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;"><span style="color:#ef4444;font-weight:700;">R</span>=Responsable · <span style="color:#3b82f6;font-weight:700;">A</span>=Aprobador · <span style="color:#eab308;font-weight:700;">C</span>=Consultado · <span style="color:#8b8f98;font-weight:700;">I</span>=Informado</div>';
          raciSection.innerHTML += tHtml;
        } else {
          // Auto-generate RACI from EDT + stakeholders
          var edtFases = [];
          try {
            var edtP3 = typeof data.edtResult === 'string' ? JSON.parse(data.edtResult.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/)[0]) : data.edtResult;
            if (edtP3 && edtP3.edt && edtP3.edt.fases) edtFases = edtP3.edt.fases;
          } catch(e){}
          raciSection.innerHTML += generateRACIFromData(edtFases, stkList, data.selectedPM || null);
        }
        tabContents3[3].appendChild(raciSection);

        // ═══ TAB 4: CALENDARIO CAB (AG-011) ═══
        var cabSection = document.createElement('div');
        cabSection.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:0 10px 10px 10px;padding:14px;';
        cabSection.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#2dd4bf;">AG-011 CAB \u2014 Calendario de Ventanas de Cambio</span><span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(45,212,191,0.15);color:#2dd4bf;font-weight:600;">CMDB \u00d7 Demand</span></div>' +
          '<div id="cab-p3-alert-banner" style="display:none;background:#1e293b;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;border-left:3px solid #f59e0b;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:12px;color:#e2e8f0;"></div>' +
          '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 220px;gap:16px;">' +
            '<div><div id="cab-p3-calendar" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;"><div style="text-align:center;color:#64748b;padding:40px;grid-column:1/-1">Cargando calendario CAB...</div></div>' +
              '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;">' +
                '<span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;color:#64748b;"><span style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:2px;background:#064e3b;"></span>Ventana CAB</span>' +
                '<span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;color:#64748b;"><span style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:2px;background:#7f1d1d;"></span>Change Freeze</span>' +
                '<span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;color:#64748b;"><span style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:2px;background:#78350f;"></span>Precauci\u00f3n</span>' +
                '<span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;color:#64748b;"><span style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:2px;background:#1a2332;border:1px solid #334155;"></span>Libre</span>' +
              '</div>' +
            '</div>' +
            '<div>' +
              '<div id="cab-p3-periods" style="margin-bottom:10px;"></div>' +
              '<div style="background:#1e293b;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:11px;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:500;">Resumen CAB</div><div id="cab-p3-stats-content"><span style="color:#64748b;font-size:11px;">Cargando...</span></div></div>' +
            '</div>' +
          '</div>';
        tabContents3[4].appendChild(cabSection);

        // Load CAB data when tab 4 is shown
        var origTabClick = tabBar3.children[4];
        if (origTabClick) {
          var origOnclick = origTabClick.onclick;
          origTabClick.onclick = function() { origOnclick.call(this); loadCabPause3Data(); };
        }

        // Append all tab contents
        tabContents3.forEach(function(tc){mainContent.appendChild(tc);});

        // ═══ SIDEBAR ═══
        var sideHtml3 = '';

        // Risk stats
        var critCount=0, highCount=0, medCount=0;
        risksList.forEach(function(rk){var s=(rk.probabilidad||3)*(rk.impacto||3);if(s>15)critCount++;else if(s>=10)highCount++;else medCount++;});

        sideHtml3 += '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Resumen de riesgos</div>';
        sideHtml3 += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;">';
        sideHtml3 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#ef4444;">'+risksList.length+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Riesgos total</div></div>';
        sideHtml3 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#ef4444;">'+critCount+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Criticos (>15)</div></div>';
        sideHtml3 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#f97316;">'+highCount+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Altos (10-15)</div></div>';
        sideHtml3 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#eab308;">'+medCount+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Medios (<10)</div></div>';
        sideHtml3 += '</div>';

        // Risk score bar
        if(rsg) {
          var rsgColor = rsg>=70?'#ef4444':rsg>=50?'#f97316':rsg>=30?'#eab308':'#22c55e';
          sideHtml3 += '<div style="margin-top:8px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;"><span style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;">Risk score global</span><span style="font-size:16px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:'+rsgColor+';">'+rsg+'/100</span></div>';
          sideHtml3 += '<div style="height:6px;background:#181b20;border-radius:3px;margin-top:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="height:100%;width:'+rsg+'%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#22c55e,#eab308,#f97316);border-radius:3px;"></div></div>';
        }
        if(contPct) {
          sideHtml3 += '<div style="margin-top:6px;background:#181b20;border-radius:4px;padding:6px 8px;font-size:9px;"><span style="color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Contingencia: '+contPct+'%</span>'+(resPct?' · <span style="color:#8b8f98;">Reserva: '+resPct+'%</span>':'')+'</div>';
        }

        // Risk categories
        var catMap = {};
        risksList.forEach(function(rk){var c=rk.categoria||'Tecnico';catMap[c]=(catMap[c]||0)+1;});
        var catColorMap = {'Técnico':'#ef4444','Tecnico':'#ef4444','Recursos':'#a855f7','Alcance':'#3b82f6','Regulatorio':'#ec4899','Externo':'#8b8f98'};
        var catHtml = '<div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">Por categoria: ';
        Object.keys(catMap).forEach(function(c,ci){catHtml+=(ci>0?' · ':'')+'<span style="color:'+(catColorMap[c]||'#8b8f98')+';">'+c+' ('+catMap[c]+')</span>';});
        catHtml += '</div>';
        sideHtml3 += catHtml + '</div>';

        // Stakeholder stats
        sideHtml3 += '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Stakeholders mapeados</div>';
        sideHtml3 += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;">';
        sideHtml3 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#ec4899;">'+stkList.length+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Total</div></div>';
        sideHtml3 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#ef4444;">'+q1.length+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Gestionar cerca</div></div>';
        sideHtml3 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#3b82f6;">'+q2.length+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Satisfechos</div></div>';
        sideHtml3 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#eab308;">'+q3.length+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Informados</div></div>';
        sideHtml3 += '</div></div>';

        sideContent.innerHTML = sideHtml3;

      } else {
        // Fallback: raw textarea
        var rawP3 = document.createElement('textarea');
        rawP3.id = 'pause3-raw';
        rawP3.style.cssText = 'width:100%;min-height:300px;background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;resize:vertical;';
        var rawVal3 = '';
        if (risksData) rawVal3 += '--- RIESGOS ---\n' + (typeof risksData==='string'?risksData:JSON.stringify(risksData,null,2)) + '\n\n';
        if (stkData) rawVal3 += '--- STAKEHOLDERS ---\n' + (typeof stkData==='string'?stkData:JSON.stringify(stkData,null,2));
        rawP3.value = rawVal3;
        mainContent.appendChild(rawP3);
        sideContent.innerHTML = '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">AG-014/AG-015 generaron texto libre. Puedes editarlo antes de aprobar.</div>';
      }
    }

    // ── PAUSA 4: PM candidatos + Equipo ──
    // ── PAUSA 4: PM Candidatos + Equipo Técnico con Cambiar (Visual v2) ──
    if (pauseNumber === 4) {
      var resData = data.resourceResult || '';
      var resParsed = null;
      if (typeof resData === 'string') {
        try { var cleanP4 = resData.replace(/```json\s*/g,'').replace(/```\s*/g,'').trim(); var mP4 = cleanP4.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if(mP4) resParsed = JSON.parse(mP4[0]); } catch(e) {}
      } else if (typeof resData === 'object') resParsed = resData;

      var pmCandidates = (resParsed && (resParsed.pm_candidates || resParsed.candidatos || resParsed.pms || resParsed.pm_list)) || [];
      var equipo = (resParsed && (resParsed.equipo || resParsed.equipo_tecnico || resParsed.team || resParsed.staff || resParsed.recursos)) || [];
      var gaps = (resParsed && (resParsed.gaps || resParsed.brechas)) || [];
      var selectedPMData = null;

      var siloColors = {
        'Linux':{bg:'rgba(6,182,212,0.08)',color:'#06b6d4',avatarBg:'rgba(6,182,212,0.2)'},
        'Seguridad':{bg:'rgba(239,68,68,0.08)',color:'#ef4444',avatarBg:'rgba(239,68,68,0.2)'},
        'DevOps':{bg:'rgba(34,197,94,0.08)',color:'#22c55e',avatarBg:'rgba(34,197,94,0.2)'},
        'QA':{bg:'rgba(236,72,153,0.08)',color:'#ec4899',avatarBg:'rgba(236,72,153,0.2)'},
        'Redes':{bg:'rgba(6,182,212,0.08)',color:'#06b6d4',avatarBg:'rgba(6,182,212,0.2)'},
        'BBDD':{bg:'rgba(249,115,22,0.08)',color:'#f97316',avatarBg:'rgba(249,115,22,0.2)'},
        'Backend':{bg:'rgba(249,115,22,0.08)',color:'#f97316',avatarBg:'rgba(249,115,22,0.2)'},
        'Frontend':{bg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.08)',color:'#3b82f6',avatarBg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.2)'},
        'Soporte':{bg:'rgba(139,143,152,0.08)',color:'#8b8f98',avatarBg:'rgba(139,143,152,0.2)'},
        'Windows':{bg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.08)',color:'#3b82f6',avatarBg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.2)'}
      };
      var defaultSilo = {bg:'rgba(139,143,152,0.08)',color:'#8b8f98',avatarBg:'rgba(139,143,152,0.2)'};

      // Disable approve until PM selected
      approveBtn.textContent = 'Confirmar y continuar ▸';
      approveBtn.disabled = true;
      approveBtn.style.cssText = 'padding:8px 18px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:not-allowed;border:none;background:#333840;color:#8b8f98;';

      // Status text in header
      var statusSpan = document.createElement('span');
      statusSpan.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#ef4444;margin-right:8px;';
      statusSpan.textContent = 'PM no seleccionado';
      statusSpan.id = 'pause4-status';
      approveBtn.parentNode.insertBefore(statusSpan, approveBtn);

      function selectPM4(pmData, allCards) {
        selectedPMData = pmData;
        allCards.forEach(function(c){c.el.style.borderColor='#3a3f4a';c.el.style.borderWidth='1px';c.el.style.background='#22262e';c.btn.textContent='Elegir PM';c.btn.style.cssText='padding:6px 16px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #06b6d4;background:none;color:#06b6d4;';});
        var sel = allCards.find(function(c){return c.pm===pmData;});
        if(sel){sel.el.style.borderColor='#22c55e';sel.el.style.borderWidth='2px';sel.el.style.background='rgba(34,197,94,0.04)';sel.btn.textContent='✓ PM Seleccionado';sel.btn.style.cssText='padding:6px 16px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:#22c55e;color:#fff;';}
        statusSpan.textContent = '✓ PM seleccionado';
        statusSpan.style.color = '#22c55e';
        approveBtn.disabled = false;
        approveBtn.style.cssText = 'padding:8px 18px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:#22c55e;color:#fff;';
      }

      // ═══ PM CANDIDATES SECTION ═══
      var pmSection = document.createElement('div');
      pmSection.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;';
      var pmBadgeSpan = document.createElement('span');
      pmBadgeSpan.id = 'pm-count-badge';
      pmBadgeSpan.style.cssText = 'font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;';
      pmBadgeSpan.textContent = pmCandidates.length + ' candidatos · Scoring automatico';
      pmSection.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#06b6d4;text-transform:uppercase;">Selecciona PM del proyecto</span></div>';
      pmSection.querySelector('div').appendChild(pmBadgeSpan);

      var allPmCards = [];

      function renderPMCards(pms) {
        pms.forEach(function(pm, idx) {
          var initials = (pm.nombre||'XX').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]||'';}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
          var isRec = pm.recomendado === true;
          var scoreColor = (pm.scoring||0)>=85?'#22c55e':(pm.scoring||0)>=70?'#eab308':'#f97316';
          var cargaColor = (pm.carga_actual||0)<=15?'#22c55e':(pm.carga_actual||0)<=30?'#eab308':'#ef4444';
          var activosColor = (pm.proyectos_activos||0)<=1?'#22c55e':(pm.proyectos_activos||0)<=2?'#eab308':'#ef4444';

          var card = document.createElement('div');
          card.style.cssText = 'background:#22262e;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:8px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:all 0.2s;'+(isRec?'border-left:4px solid #22c55e;':'');

          var html = '';
          if(isRec) html += '<div style="position:absolute;top:-6px;right:12px;font-size:8px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:#22c55e;color:#fff;font-weight:600;">★ Recomendado</div>';

          // Header
          html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;">';
          html += '<div style="width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;background:rgba(6,182,212,0.2);color:#06b6d4;">'+initials+'</div>';
          html += '<div><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(pm.nombre||'')+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(pm.id_pm||'')+' · '+(pm.especialidad||'')+' · '+(pm.certificaciones||[]).join(' + ')+' · '+(pm.anios_experiencia||0)+' años</div></div>';
          html += '<div style="text-align:right;margin-left:auto;"><div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:'+scoreColor+';">'+(pm.scoring||0)+'</div></div>';
          html += '</div>';

          // 4 metrics
          html += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">';
          html += '<div style="background:#181b20;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:'+activosColor+';">'+(pm.proyectos_activos||0)+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;">Activos</div></div>';
          html += '<div style="background:#181b20;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;">'+(pm.tasa_exito||0)+'%</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;">Exito</div></div>';
          html += '<div style="background:#181b20;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(pm.proyectos_completados||0)+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;">Completados</div></div>';
          html += '<div style="background:#181b20;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:'+cargaColor+';">'+(pm.carga_actual||0)+'h</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;">Carga</div></div>';
          html += '</div>';

          // Skills
          var skillsHtml = '<div style="display:flex;gap:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:8px;">';
          (pm.skills_match||[]).forEach(function(s){skillsHtml+='<span style="font-size:7px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600;background:rgba(34,197,94,0.12);color:#22c55e;border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.25);">'+s+' ✓</span>';});
          (pm.skills_partial||[]).forEach(function(s){skillsHtml+='<span style="font-size:7px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.12);color:#eab308;border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.25);">'+s+' ~</span>';});
          (pm.skills_missing||[]).forEach(function(s){skillsHtml+='<span style="font-size:7px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.08);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.15);">'+s+' ✗</span>';});
          skillsHtml += '</div>';
          html += skillsHtml;

          // Reason
          if(pm.razon) html += '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#06b6d4;background:rgba(6,182,212,0.06);border-radius:4px;padding:4px 8px;line-height:1.4;">'+pm.razon+'</div>';

          // Select button
          html += '<div style="margin-top:8px;text-align:right;"><button class="pm-select-btn4" style="padding:6px 16px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #06b6d4;background:none;color:#06b6d4;">Elegir PM</button></div>';

          card.innerHTML = html;
          var btn = card.querySelector('.pm-select-btn4');
          var cardObj = {el:card, pm:pm, btn:btn};
          allPmCards.push(cardObj);

          card.onclick = function(e) {
            // Si click en boton "Elegir PM", seleccionar; si click en tarjeta, mostrar detalle
            if (e.target.closest('.pm-select-btn4')) { selectPM4(pm, allPmCards); }
            else { showPMDetailModal(pm); }
          };

          pmSection.appendChild(card);
        });
      }

      if (pmCandidates.length > 0) {
        renderPMCards(pmCandidates);
      } else {
        // Fallback: load from API
        (async function() {
          try {
            var pmResp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/pmo/managers/candidates');
            var pms = await pmResp.json();
            var top3 = pms.slice(0,3);
            if(top3.length>0) {
              pmCandidates = top3.map(function(p){return {nombre:p.nombre,id_pm:p.id_pm||'',nivel:p.nivel||'',especialidad:p.especialidad||'',certificaciones:p.certificaciones||[],tasa_exito:p.tasa_exito||0,proyectos_activos:p.proyectos_activos||0,proyectos_completados:p.proyectos_completados||0,carga_actual:p.carga_actual||0,scoring:p.scoring||0,skills_match:[],skills_partial:[],skills_missing:[],razon:'',recomendado:false};});
              if(pmCandidates.length>0) pmCandidates[0].recomendado=true;
              renderPMCards(pmCandidates);
              var badge = document.getElementById('pm-count-badge');
              if(badge) badge.textContent = pmCandidates.length + ' candidatos · Scoring automatico';
            } else {
              pmSection.innerHTML += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;padding:12px;">No hay PM candidatos disponibles.</div>';
            }
          } catch(e) { pmSection.innerHTML += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#ef4444;padding:8px;">Error cargando PMs</div>'; }
        })();
      }
      mainContent.appendChild(pmSection);

      // ═══ EQUIPO TÉCNICO POR SILOS ═══
      var teamSection = document.createElement('div');
      teamSection.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;';

      function renderTeamSection(equipoArr) {
        equipo = equipoArr;
        teamSection.innerHTML = '';
        var totalH = 0;
        equipoArr.forEach(function(m){totalH+=(m.horas_asignadas||0);});
        totalHorasEquipo = totalH;
        teamSection.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#06b6d4;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">Equipo tecnico — '+equipoArr.length+' recursos · '+totalH+'h <span style="color:#eab308;font-size:9px;font-weight:400;">Puede cambiar cualquiera</span></div>';
        renderTeamSilos(equipoArr);
      }

      var totalHorasEquipo = 0;

      if (equipo.length > 0) {
        equipo.forEach(function(m){totalHorasEquipo+=(m.horas_asignadas||0);});
        teamSection.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#06b6d4;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">Equipo tecnico — '+equipo.length+' recursos · '+totalHorasEquipo+'h <span style="color:#eab308;font-size:9px;font-weight:400;">Puede cambiar cualquiera</span></div>';
      } else {
        teamSection.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;padding:12px;"><span class="loading-spinner"></span> Cargando equipo desde directorio...</div>';
        // Fallback: load team from API based on EDT skills
        (async function() {
          try {
            var resp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/team/tecnicos');
            var allTecnicos = await resp.json();
            // Pick top scorers grouped by silo, max 2 per silo, up to 10 total
            var siloCount = {};
            var picked = [];
            var sorted = allTecnicos.filter(function(t){return (t.estado_run||'DISPONIBLE')!=='BAJA' && (t.carga_actual||0)<35;}).sort(function(a,b){return (b.scoring||0)-(a.scoring||0);});
            sorted.forEach(function(t) {
              if(picked.length >= 10) return;
              var s = t.silo_especialidad || t.silo || 'Otro';
              if(!siloCount[s]) siloCount[s] = 0;
              if(siloCount[s] < 2) {
                siloCount[s]++;
                picked.push({nombre:t.nombre, id_recurso:t.id_recurso, silo:s, nivel:t.nivel||'', scoring:t.scoring||0, carga_actual:t.carga_actual||0, horas_asignadas:0, conflicto:null});
              }
            });
            equipo = picked;
            renderTeamSection(picked);
          } catch(e) { teamSection.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#ef4444;padding:8px;">Error cargando equipo: '+e.message+'</div>'; }
        })();
      }

      function renderTeamSilos(equipoArr) {
      // Group by silo
      var siloMap = {};
      equipo.forEach(function(m,mi) {
        var s = m.silo || 'Otro';
        if(!siloMap[s]) siloMap[s] = [];
        m._idx = mi;
        siloMap[s].push(m);
      });

      Object.keys(siloMap).forEach(function(silo) {
        var members = siloMap[silo];
        var sc = siloColors[silo] || defaultSilo;
        var siloHoras = 0;
        members.forEach(function(m){siloHoras+=(m.horas_asignadas||0);});

        var siloDiv = document.createElement('div');
        siloDiv.style.cssText = 'margin-bottom:8px;';
        siloDiv.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:'+sc.bg+';"><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:'+sc.color+';">'+silo+'</span><span style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">'+members.length+' tecnicos</span><span style="font-size:9px;font-family:monospace;color:#8b8f98;margin-left:auto;">'+siloHoras+'h</span></div>';

        members.forEach(function(m) {
          var initials = (m.nombre||'XX').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]||'';}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
          var scoreColor = (m.scoring||0)>=85?'#22c55e':(m.scoring||0)>=70?'#eab308':'#f97316';
          var hasConflict = m.conflicto && m.conflicto !== null;
          var memberId = 'p4-member-' + m._idx;

          var memberDiv = document.createElement('div');
          memberDiv.id = memberId;

          var memberCard = document.createElement('div');
          memberCard.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid '+(hasConflict?'rgba(239,68,68,0.3)':'#3a3f4a')+';border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:3px;margin-left:16px;';

          var mHtml = '<div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;background:'+(hasConflict?'rgba(239,68,68,0.2)':sc.avatarBg)+';color:'+(hasConflict?'#ef4444':sc.color)+';">'+initials+'</div>';
          mHtml += '<div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;" class="member-name-'+m._idx+'">'+(m.nombre||'')+'</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;" class="member-info-'+m._idx+'">'+(m.nivel||'')+' · '+silo+' · Carga: '+(m.carga_actual||0)+'h</div></div>';
          if(hasConflict) mHtml += '<span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:#ef4444;font-weight:600;">⚠ '+m.conflicto+'</span>';
          mHtml += '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;margin-left:auto;color:'+scoreColor+';" class="member-score-'+m._idx+'">'+(m.scoring||0)+'</div>';
          mHtml += '<div style="font-size:9px;font-family:monospace;color:#8b8f98;min-width:40px;text-align:right;">'+(m.horas_asignadas||0)+'h</div>';

          var changeBtnStyle = hasConflict ? 'font-size:8px;padding:3px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);background:none;color:#ef4444;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;margin-left:6px;font-weight:600;' : 'font-size:8px;padding:3px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.3);background:none;color:#eab308;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;margin-left:6px;font-weight:600;';
          mHtml += '<button class="change-btn-'+m._idx+'" style="'+changeBtnStyle+'">'+(hasConflict?'Cambiar ⚠':'Cambiar')+'</button>';

          memberCard.innerHTML = mHtml;
          memberCard.style.cursor = 'pointer';
          memberCard.style.transition = 'border-color 0.15s';
          memberCard.onmouseenter = function(){if(!hasConflict)memberCard.style.borderColor='#06b6d4';};
          memberCard.onmouseleave = function(){memberCard.style.borderColor=hasConflict?'rgba(239,68,68,0.3)':'#3a3f4a';};
          memberCard.onclick = function(e) {
            if (e.target.closest('button') || e.target.tagName === 'BUTTON') return;
            showTecnicoDetailModal(m);
          };
          memberDiv.appendChild(memberCard);

          // Change panel (hidden)
          var changePanel = document.createElement('div');
          changePanel.id = 'change-p4-' + m._idx;
          changePanel.style.cssText = 'display:none;margin-left:16px;margin-bottom:4px;background:#181b20;border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.3);border-radius:0 0 8px 8px;padding:8px 10px;margin-top:-4px;';

          memberDiv.appendChild(changePanel);

          // Toggle change panel
          var changeBtn = memberCard.querySelector('.change-btn-'+m._idx);
          changeBtn.onclick = function() {
            var isOpen = changePanel.style.display !== 'none';
            if(isOpen) { changePanel.style.display='none'; return; }
            changePanel.style.display = 'block';
            changePanel.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;padding:4px;">Cargando candidatos...</div>';

            // Load candidates from API
            (async function() {
              try {
                var resp = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/team/tecnicos');
                var tecnicos = await resp.json();
                var equipoIds = {};
                equipo.forEach(function(e){equipoIds[e.id_recurso]=true;});
                var candidates = tecnicos
                  .filter(function(t){return (t.silo_especialidad||t.silo)===silo && !equipoIds[t.id_recurso];})
                  .sort(function(a,b){return (b.scoring||0)-(a.scoring||0);})
                  .slice(0,5);

                var cpHtml = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="font-size:9px;color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Reasignar — <span style="font-size:8px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600;background:'+sc.bg+';color:'+sc.color+';">Solo silo '+silo+'</span></span><span style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">'+candidates.length+' disponibles</span></div>';

                if(candidates.length===0) {
                  cpHtml += '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;padding:8px;">Sin candidatos disponibles en silo '+silo+'</div>';
                } else {
                  candidates.forEach(function(cand, ci) {
                    var cInitials = (cand.nombre||'XX').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]||'';}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
                    var cScoreColor = (cand.scoring||0)>=85?'#22c55e':(cand.scoring||0)>=70?'#eab308':'#f97316';
                    var isTopRec = ci===0;
                    cpHtml += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:5px 8px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:3px;'+(isTopRec?'border-left:3px solid #22c55e;':'')+'">';
                    cpHtml += '<div style="width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;background:'+sc.avatarBg+';color:'+sc.color+';">'+cInitials+'</div>';
                    cpHtml += '<div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(cand.nombre||'')+''+(isTopRec?' <span style="color:#22c55e;font-size:8px;">★</span>':'')+'</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">'+(cand.nivel||'')+' · '+silo+' · Carga: '+(cand.carga_actual||0)+'h</div></div>';
                    cpHtml += '<div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;min-width:28px;text-align:center;color:'+cScoreColor+';">'+(cand.scoring||0)+'</div>';
                    cpHtml += '<button class="assign-btn-'+m._idx+'-'+ci+'" style="font-size:8px;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;border:none;'+(isTopRec?'background:#22c55e;color:#fff;':'background:none;border:1px solid #333840;color:#8b8f98;')+'">Asignar</button>';
                    cpHtml += '</div>';
                  });
                }

                cpHtml += '<div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;font-style:italic;padding:4px 8px;border:1px dashed rgba(34,197,94,0.2);border-radius:4px;opacity:0.5;margin-top:4px;text-decoration:line-through;">'+(m.nombre||'')+' — actual (se reasignara)</div>';
