                cpHtml += '<div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><span style="color:#eab308;">⚠</span> La reasignacion libera al tecnico actual y asigna al nuevo las '+(m.horas_asignadas||0)+'h de este silo.</div>';

                changePanel.innerHTML = cpHtml;

                // Bind assign buttons
                candidates.forEach(function(cand, ci) {
                  var assignBtn = changePanel.querySelector('.assign-btn-'+m._idx+'-'+ci);
                  if(assignBtn) {
                    assignBtn.onclick = function() {
                      // Update the member data
                      var newInitials = (cand.nombre||'XX').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]||'';}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
                      m.nombre = cand.nombre;
                      m.id_recurso = cand.id_recurso;
                      m.nivel = cand.nivel;
                      m.scoring = cand.scoring||0;
                      m.carga_actual = cand.carga_actual||0;
                      m.conflicto = null;

                      // Update visual
                      var nameEl = memberCard.querySelector('.member-name-'+m._idx);
                      var infoEl = memberCard.querySelector('.member-info-'+m._idx);
                      var scoreEl = memberCard.querySelector('.member-score-'+m._idx);
                      if(nameEl) nameEl.textContent = cand.nombre;
                      if(infoEl) infoEl.textContent = (cand.nivel||'')+' · '+silo+' · Carga: '+(cand.carga_actual||0)+'h';
                      var newScoreColor = (cand.scoring||0)>=85?'#22c55e':(cand.scoring||0)>=70?'#eab308':'#f97316';
                      if(scoreEl) { scoreEl.textContent = (cand.scoring||0); scoreEl.style.color = newScoreColor; }

                      // Update avatar
                      var avatar = memberCard.querySelector('div');
                      if(avatar) { avatar.textContent = newInitials; avatar.style.background = sc.avatarBg; avatar.style.color = sc.color; }

                      // Flash green border
                      memberCard.style.borderColor = '#22c55e';
                      memberCard.style.boxShadow = '0 0 8px rgba(34,197,94,0.2)';
                      setTimeout(function(){memberCard.style.borderColor='#3a3f4a';memberCard.style.boxShadow='none';},2000);

                      // Close panel
                      changePanel.style.display = 'none';
                    };
                  }
                });
              } catch(e) {
                changePanel.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#ef4444;padding:8px;">Error cargando candidatos: '+e.message+'</div>';
              }
            })();
          };

          siloDiv.appendChild(memberDiv);
        });

        teamSection.appendChild(siloDiv);
      });

      // Gaps
      if(gaps.length>0) {
        var gapDiv = document.createElement('div');
        gapDiv.style.cssText = 'margin-top:8px;';
        var gapHtml = '';
        gaps.forEach(function(g){
          gapHtml += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.15);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:3px;font-size:9px;color:#eab308;"><span>⚠</span><span>Gap: '+(g.skill||'')+' '+(g.nivel_requerido||'')+' — '+(g.motivo||'')+'</span></div>';
        });
        gapDiv.innerHTML = gapHtml;
        teamSection.appendChild(gapDiv);
      }
      } // end renderTeamSilos

      // Render team if we have data inline (not from API fallback)
      if (equipo.length > 0) { renderTeamSilos(equipo); }

      mainContent.appendChild(teamSection);

      // ═══ SIDEBAR ═══
      var conflictCount = equipo.filter(function(m){return m.conflicto && m.conflicto!==null;}).length;
      var sideHtml4 = '';

      // Stats
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Resumen equipo</div>';
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;">';
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#06b6d4;">'+pmCandidates.length+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">PM candidatos</div></div>';
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#e8e9ed;">'+equipo.length+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Tecnicos</div></div>';
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#f97316;">'+totalHorasEquipo+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Horas total</div></div>';
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:'+(conflictCount>0?'#ef4444':'#22c55e')+';">'+conflictCount+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Conflictos</div></div>';
      sideHtml4 += '</div>';

      // Conflict alert
      if(conflictCount>0) {
        sideHtml4 += '<div style="margin-top:6px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.15);border-radius:4px;padding:4px 8px;font-size:8px;color:#ef4444;line-height:1.3;">⚠ ';
        equipo.filter(function(m){return m.conflicto;}).forEach(function(m,ci){
          sideHtml4 += (ci>0?', ':'')+(m.nombre||'')+' ('+m.silo+') conflicto con '+m.conflicto;
        });
        sideHtml4 += '. Recomendacion: usar boton "Cambiar ⚠" para reasignar.</div>';
      }

      // Gaps
      if(gaps.length>0) {
        sideHtml4 += '<div style="margin-top:6px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.15);border-radius:4px;padding:4px 8px;font-size:8px;color:#eab308;line-height:1.3;">⚠ Gaps detectados: ';
        gaps.forEach(function(g,gi){sideHtml4+=(gi>0?', ':'')+(g.skill||'')+' '+(g.nivel_requerido||'');});
        sideHtml4 += '</div>';
      }
      sideHtml4 += '</div>';

      // Next steps
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Siguientes pasos</div>';
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;line-height:1.8;">';
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="color:#10b981;">→ AG-016 Cost Analyzer</div>';
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="color:#ec4899;">→ AG-007 Planificador</div>';
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="color:#8b5cf6;">→ AG-017 Quality Gate</div>';
      sideHtml4 += '<div style="color:#22c55e;font-weight:600;">→ Proyecto LIVE</div>';
      sideHtml4 += '</div></div>';

      sideContent.innerHTML = sideHtml4;

      // Approve handler
      approveBtn.onclick = function() {
        if(!selectedPMData) { if(typeof showToast==='function') showToast('Selecciona un PM primero'); return; }
        var finalData = {
          pm_seleccionado: selectedPMData,
          equipo_final: equipo,
          gaps: gaps
        };
        pauseDiv.remove();
        resolve(finalData);
      };
    }

    // Ensamblar
    layout.appendChild(mainContent);
    var advisorContainer = document.createElement('div');
    advisorContainer.id = 'advisor-container-' + pauseNumber;
    sideContent.appendChild(advisorContainer);
    layout.appendChild(sideContent);
    pauseDiv.appendChild(layout);
    pauseArea.appendChild(pauseDiv);
    renderAdvisorChat('advisor-container-' + pauseNumber, pauseNumber);

    if (pauseNumber !== 4) {
      approveBtn.onclick = function() {
        if (pauseNumber === 1) {
          // Check raw textarea fallback first
          var rawEl = document.getElementById('pause1-edt-raw');
          if (rawEl) {
            try { var parsedRaw = JSON.parse(rawEl.value); resolve(parsedRaw); } catch(e) { resolve(rawEl.value); }
            pauseDiv.remove(); return;
          }

          // Visual form was shown — re-parse the original data to collect edits
          var edtDataLocal = data.edtResult || '';
          var parsedLocal = null;
          if (typeof edtDataLocal === 'object' && edtDataLocal !== null) {
            parsedLocal = edtDataLocal;
          } else if (typeof edtDataLocal === 'string') {
            try {
              var c2 = edtDataLocal.trim();
              if (c2.charAt(0) === '{') { parsedLocal = JSON.parse(c2); }
              else {
                c2 = c2.replace(/```json\s*/gi,'').replace(/```\s*/gi,'').trim();
                var fb2 = c2.indexOf('{'), lb2 = c2.lastIndexOf('}');
                if (fb2 !== -1 && lb2 > fb2) parsedLocal = JSON.parse(c2.substring(fb2, lb2+1));
              }
            } catch(e2) { console.warn('Pausa 1 approve: re-parse falló', e2.message); }
          }

          var editedData = parsedLocal ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(parsedLocal)) : {};

          var descEl = document.getElementById('pause1-acta-desc');
          var objEl = document.getElementById('pause1-acta-obj');
          var entEl = document.getElementById('pause1-acta-ent');
          var sponEl = document.getElementById('pause1-acta-sponsor');
          var critEl = document.getElementById('pause1-acta-criterios');

          if (editedData.acta_constitucion) {
            if (descEl) editedData.acta_constitucion.descripcion_alto_nivel = descEl.value;
            if (objEl) editedData.acta_constitucion.objetivos_smart = objEl.value.split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();});
            if (entEl) editedData.acta_constitucion.entregables = entEl.value.split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();});
            if (sponEl) editedData.acta_constitucion.sponsor = sponEl.value;
            if (critEl) editedData.acta_constitucion.criterios_exito = critEl.value;
          }

          var alcEl = document.getElementById('pause1-alc-desc');
          var exclEl = document.getElementById('pause1-alc-excl');
          var restEl = document.getElementById('pause1-alc-rest');
          var asunEl = document.getElementById('pause1-alc-asun');

          if (editedData.alcance) {
            if (alcEl) editedData.alcance.alcance_producto = alcEl.value;
            if (exclEl) editedData.alcance.exclusiones = exclEl.value.split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();});
            if (restEl) editedData.alcance.restricciones = restEl.value.split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();});
            if (asunEl) editedData.alcance.asunciones = asunEl.value.split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();});
          }

          pauseDiv.remove();
          resolve(editedData);
        } else if (pauseNumber === 2) {
          // Collect edited subtasks state
          var rawEl2 = document.getElementById('pause2-raw');
          if (rawEl2) { try { resolve(JSON.parse(rawEl2.value)); } catch(e3) { resolve(rawEl2.value); } pauseDiv.remove(); return; }
          var editedSub = subtParsed ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(subtParsed)) : (data.subtasksResult || data);
          pauseDiv.remove();
          resolve(editedSub);
        } else if (pauseNumber === 3) {
          // Collect risks + stakeholders data
          var rawEl3 = document.getElementById('pause3-raw');
          if (rawEl3) { resolve(rawEl3.value); pauseDiv.remove(); return; }
          var editedP3 = {
            risks: risksParsed ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(risksParsed)) : {},
            stakeholders: stkParsed ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(stkParsed)) : {}
          };
          pauseDiv.remove();
          resolve(editedP3);
        } else { resolve(data); pauseDiv.remove(); }
      };
    }
  });
}

// ── showBuildFinalScreen ──
// ═══ MODAL: Sprint Detail (P54) ═══
function showSprintDetailModal(sprint, allSprints, pipelineData, onSave) {
  var old = document.getElementById('modal-sprint-detail');
  if (old) old.remove();
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.id = 'modal-sprint-detail';
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var items = sprint.items || [];
  var totalPts = items.reduce(function(s,i){ return s + (i.story_points||0); }, 0);
  var tipoCount = {};
  items.forEach(function(i){ var t = (i.tipo||'TASK').toUpperCase(); tipoCount[t] = (tipoCount[t]||0) + 1; });
  var tipoSummary = Object.keys(tipoCount).map(function(k){ return tipoCount[k] + ' ' + k; }).join(' \u00b7 ');
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;width:90%;max-width:700px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;color:#e8e9ed;';
  var h = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  h += '<div><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#3b82f6;">Sprint ' + (sprint.numero||'?') + '</div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:2px;">' + tipoSummary + ' \u00b7 ' + totalPts + ' pts</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="cursor:pointer;font-size:20px;color:#8b8f98;padding:4px 8px;" id="modal-sprint-close">\u2715</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:16px;"><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Sprint Goal</label>';
  h += '<input type="text" id="modal-sprint-goal" value="' + (sprint.goal||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px 12px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Sem inicio</label><input type="number" id="modal-sprint-sem-ini" value="' + (sprint.semana_inicio||'') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Sem fin</label><input type="number" id="modal-sprint-sem-fin" value="' + (sprint.semana_fin||'') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Velocidad (pts)</label><input type="number" id="modal-sprint-pts" value="' + (sprint.story_points||0) + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Items (' + items.length + ')</div>';
  items.forEach(function(it, ii) {
    var tipo = (it.tipo||'TASK').toUpperCase();
    var tc = tipo==='STORY'?'#22c55e':tipo==='BUG'?'#ef4444':tipo==='SPIKE'?'#a855f7':'#3b82f6';
    h += '<div data-item-idx="' + ii + '" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid #22262e;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.15s;" onmouseenter="this.style.background=\'#22262e\'" onmouseleave="this.style.background=\'none\'">';
    h += '<span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:700;background:' + tc + '20;color:' + tc + ';">' + tipo + '</span>';
    h += '<span style="font-size:10px;font-family:monospace;color:#3b82f6;">' + (it.id||'') + '</span>';
    h += '<span style="font-size:12px;color:#e8e9ed;flex:1;">' + (it.titulo||'') + '</span>';
    h += '<span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#3b82f6;">' + (it.story_points||0) + '</span>';
    h += '</div>';
  });
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:20px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  h += '<button id="modal-sprint-save" style="padding:8px 20px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">\ud83d\udcbe Guardar cambios</button>';
  h += '<button id="modal-sprint-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;background:#333840;color:#8b8f98;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button>';
  h += '</div>';
  modal.innerHTML = h;
  overlay.appendChild(modal);
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  modal.querySelectorAll('[data-item-idx]').forEach(function(row) {
    var idx = parseInt(row.getAttribute('data-item-idx'));
    row.onclick = function() { showSprintItemModal(items[idx], sprint, function(){}); };
  });
  document.getElementById('modal-sprint-close').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  document.getElementById('modal-sprint-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  document.getElementById('modal-sprint-save').onclick = function() {
    sprint.goal = document.getElementById('modal-sprint-goal').value;
    sprint.semana_inicio = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-sprint-sem-ini').value) || sprint.semana_inicio;
    sprint.semana_fin = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-sprint-sem-fin').value) || sprint.semana_fin;
    sprint.story_points = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-sprint-pts').value) || sprint.story_points;
    if (typeof onSave === 'function') onSave();
    overlay.remove();
    if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('Sprint ' + (sprint.numero||'') + ' actualizado');
  };
}

// ═══ MODAL: Sprint Item Detail (P54) ═══
function showSprintItemModal(item, sprint, onSave) {
  var old = document.getElementById('modal-sprint-item');
  if (old) old.remove();
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.id = 'modal-sprint-item';
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;width:90%;max-width:550px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;color:#e8e9ed;';
  var tipo = (item.tipo||'TASK').toUpperCase();
  var tc = tipo==='STORY'?'#22c55e':tipo==='BUG'?'#ef4444':tipo==='SPIKE'?'#a855f7':'#3b82f6';
  var h = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><span style="font-size:10px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;background:' + tc + '20;color:' + tc + ';">' + tipo + '</span>';
  h += '<span style="font-size:12px;font-family:monospace;color:#3b82f6;">' + (item.id||'') + '</span></div>';
  h += '<div style="cursor:pointer;font-size:20px;color:#8b8f98;padding:4px 8px;" id="modal-item-close">\u2715</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:12px;"><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">T\u00edtulo</label>';
  h += '<input type="text" id="modal-item-titulo" value="' + (item.titulo||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px 12px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:12px;"><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Descripci\u00f3n</label>';
  h += '<textarea id="modal-item-desc" rows="3" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px 12px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:12px;outline:none;resize:vertical;">' + (item.descripcion||'') + '</textarea></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Tipo</label><select id="modal-item-tipo" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 8px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:12px;"><option value="TASK"' + (tipo==='TASK'?' selected':'') + '>Task</option><option value="STORY"' + (tipo==='STORY'?' selected':'') + '>Story</option><option value="BUG"' + (tipo==='BUG'?' selected':'') + '>Bug</option><option value="SPIKE"' + (tipo==='SPIKE'?' selected':'') + '>Spike</option></select></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Silo</label><input type="text" id="modal-item-silo" value="' + (item.silo||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 8px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:12px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Prioridad</label><select id="modal-item-prio" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 8px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:12px;"><option value="Alta"' + ((item.prioridad||'')==='Alta'?' selected':'') + '>Alta</option><option value="Media"' + ((item.prioridad||'')==='Media'?' selected':'') + '>Media</option><option value="Baja"' + ((item.prioridad||'')==='Baja'?' selected':'') + '>Baja</option></select></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Pts</label><input type="number" id="modal-item-pts" value="' + (item.story_points||0) + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 8px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:12px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Asignado</label><input type="text" id="modal-item-asig" value="' + (item.asignado||item.asignado_nombre||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 8px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:12px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Skill</label><input type="text" id="modal-item-skill" value="' + (item.skill||item.skill_requerido||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 8px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:12px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  h += '<button id="modal-item-save" style="padding:8px 20px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">\ud83d\udcbe Guardar</button>';
  h += '<button id="modal-item-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;background:#333840;color:#8b8f98;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button>';
  h += '</div>';
  modal.innerHTML = h;
  overlay.appendChild(modal);
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  document.getElementById('modal-item-close').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  document.getElementById('modal-item-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  document.getElementById('modal-item-save').onclick = function() {
    item.titulo = document.getElementById('modal-item-titulo').value;
    item.descripcion = document.getElementById('modal-item-desc').value;
    item.tipo = document.getElementById('modal-item-tipo').value;
    item.silo = document.getElementById('modal-item-silo').value;
    item.prioridad = document.getElementById('modal-item-prio').value;
    item.story_points = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-item-pts').value) || 0;
    item.asignado = document.getElementById('modal-item-asig').value;
    item.skill = document.getElementById('modal-item-skill').value;
    if (typeof onSave === 'function') onSave();
    overlay.remove();
    if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('Item ' + (item.id||'') + ' actualizado');
  };
}

// ═══ MODAL: Gantt Sprint Detail (P55) ═══
function showGanttDetailModal(sprint, planParsed, pipelineData) {
  var old = document.getElementById('modal-gantt-detail');
  if (old) old.remove();
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.id = 'modal-gantt-detail';
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;width:90%;max-width:600px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;color:#e8e9ed;';
  var rc = (planParsed && planParsed.ruta_critica) || {};
  var deps = sprint.dependencias || [];
  var h = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  h += '<div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#ec4899;">Sprint ' + (sprint.numero||'?') + ' \u2014 Gantt</div>';
  h += '<div style="cursor:pointer;font-size:20px;color:#8b8f98;padding:4px 8px;" id="modal-gantt-close">\u2715</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Sem inicio</label><input type="number" id="modal-gantt-ini" value="' + (sprint.semana_inicio||'') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Sem fin</label><input type="number" id="modal-gantt-fin" value="' + (sprint.semana_fin||'') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Story Points</label><input type="number" id="modal-gantt-pts" value="' + (sprint.story_points||0) + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:12px;"><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Goal</label>';
  h += '<input type="text" id="modal-gantt-goal" value="' + (sprint.goal||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px 12px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  if (rc.semanas || rc.holgura_total != null) {
    h += '<div style="background:rgba(239,68,68,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.2);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:12px;">';
    h += '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#ef4444;margin-bottom:6px;">Ruta Cr\u00edtica del Proyecto</div>';
    h += '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#e8e9ed;">Duraci\u00f3n total: <span style="font-weight:700;color:#ef4444;">' + (rc.semanas||'?') + ' semanas</span></div>';
    if (rc.holgura_total != null) h += '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#e8e9ed;">Holgura total: <span style="font-weight:700;color:#eab308;">' + rc.holgura_total + ' sem</span></div>';
    if (rc.tareas_criticas && rc.tareas_criticas.length) h += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:4px;">Tareas cr\u00edticas: ' + rc.tareas_criticas.join(', ') + '</div>';
    h += '</div>';
  }
  if (deps.length > 0) {
    h += '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:4px;">Dependencias</div>';
    deps.forEach(function(d) { h += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:#e8e9ed;padding:2px 0;">\u2192 ' + d + '</div>'; });
  }
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:20px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  h += '<button id="modal-gantt-save" style="padding:8px 20px;background:#ec4899;color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">\ud83d\udcbe Guardar</button>';
  h += '<button id="modal-gantt-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;background:#333840;color:#8b8f98;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button>';
  h += '</div>';
  modal.innerHTML = h;
  overlay.appendChild(modal);
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  document.getElementById('modal-gantt-close').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  document.getElementById('modal-gantt-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  document.getElementById('modal-gantt-save').onclick = function() {
    sprint.semana_inicio = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-gantt-ini').value) || sprint.semana_inicio;
    sprint.semana_fin = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-gantt-fin').value) || sprint.semana_fin;
    sprint.story_points = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-gantt-pts').value) || sprint.story_points;
    sprint.goal = document.getElementById('modal-gantt-goal').value;
    overlay.remove();
    if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('Sprint ' + (sprint.numero||'') + ' Gantt actualizado');
  };
}

// ═══ MODAL: Budget Detail (P56) ═══
function showBudgetDetailModal(costParsed, pipelineData) {
  var old = document.getElementById('modal-budget-detail');
  if (old) old.remove();
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.id = 'modal-budget-detail';
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;width:90%;max-width:650px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;color:#e8e9ed;';
  var presup = (costParsed && costParsed.presupuesto) || costParsed || {};
  var bac = presup.bac_total || presup.bac || (costParsed && costParsed.bac_total) || 0;
  var financiero = (costParsed && costParsed.financiero) || {};
  var reservas = presup.reservas || {};
  var h = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  h += '<div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#10b981;">AG-016 \u2014 Editar Presupuesto</div>';
  h += '<div style="cursor:pointer;font-size:20px;color:#8b8f98;padding:4px 8px;" id="modal-budget-close">\u2715</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:16px;"><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">BAC (Budget at Completion) \u20ac</label>';
  h += '<input type="number" id="modal-budget-bac" value="' + bac + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:10px 14px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#22c55e;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">ROI (%)</label><input type="text" id="modal-budget-roi" value="' + (financiero.roi_pct||financiero.roi||'') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Payback (meses)</label><input type="number" id="modal-budget-payback" value="' + (financiero.payback_meses||'') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">TIR (%)</label><input type="text" id="modal-budget-tir" value="' + (financiero.tir_pct||financiero.tir||'') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">VAN (\u20ac)</label><input type="number" id="modal-budget-van" value="' + (financiero.van_eur||financiero.van||'') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Contingencia (%)</label><input type="number" id="modal-budget-conting" value="' + (reservas.contingencia_pct||10) + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div style="background:rgba(234,179,8,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.15);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:16px;font-size:11px;color:#eab308;">\u26a0 Los cambios se guardan en memoria del pipeline. Al pulsar "Lanzar proyecto" se persistir\u00e1n en BD.</div>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  h += '<button id="modal-budget-save" style="padding:8px 20px;background:#10b981;color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">\ud83d\udcbe Guardar</button>';
  h += '<button id="modal-budget-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;background:#333840;color:#8b8f98;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button>';
  h += '</div>';
  modal.innerHTML = h;
  overlay.appendChild(modal);
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  document.getElementById('modal-budget-close').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  document.getElementById('modal-budget-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  document.getElementById('modal-budget-save').onclick = function() {
    var newBac = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-budget-bac').value) || bac;
    if (presup) { presup.bac_total = newBac; }
    if (costParsed) { costParsed.bac_total = newBac; }
    financiero.roi_pct = document.getElementById('modal-budget-roi').value;
    financiero.payback_meses = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-budget-payback').value) || financiero.payback_meses;
    financiero.tir_pct = document.getElementById('modal-budget-tir').value;
    financiero.van_eur = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-budget-van').value) || financiero.van_eur;
    if (costParsed) costParsed.financiero = financiero;
    reservas.contingencia_pct = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-budget-conting').value) || reservas.contingencia_pct;
    if (presup) presup.reservas = reservas;
    overlay.remove();
    if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('Presupuesto actualizado \u2014 BAC: ' + Number(newBac).toLocaleString() + '\u20ac');
  };
}

// ═══ MODAL: Quality Gate Detail (P57) ═══
function showQualityGateModal(gate, allGates, qualParsed, pipelineData) {
  var old = document.getElementById('modal-quality-gate');
  if (old) old.remove();
  var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.id = 'modal-quality-gate';
  overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); };
  var modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;width:90%;max-width:550px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;color:#e8e9ed;';
  var estado = (gate.estado||'PENDING').toUpperCase();
  var gc = estado==='PASSED'?'#22c55e':estado==='NEXT'?'#3b82f6':'#8b8f98';
  var checklist = gate.checklist || gate.criterios || [];
  var h = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  h += '<div><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:' + gc + ';">' + (gate.fase||gate.gate||'') + ' \u2014 ' + (gate.gate_name||gate.nombre||'') + '</div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:2px;">Estado: <span style="color:' + gc + ';font-weight:600;">' + estado + '</span></div></div>';
  h += '<div style="cursor:pointer;font-size:20px;color:#8b8f98;padding:4px 8px;" id="modal-quality-close">\u2715</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:16px;"><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Estado del Gate</label>';
  h += '<select id="modal-quality-estado" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px 12px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;">';
  h += '<option value="PASSED"' + (estado==='PASSED'?' selected':'') + '>\u2713 PASSED</option>';
  h += '<option value="NEXT"' + (estado==='NEXT'?' selected':'') + '>\u25b6 NEXT</option>';
  h += '<option value="PENDING"' + (estado==='PENDING'?' selected':'') + '>\u23f3 PENDING</option>';
  h += '<option value="FAILED"' + (estado==='FAILED'?' selected':'') + '>\u2717 FAILED</option>';
  h += '</select></div>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Semana</label><input type="number" id="modal-quality-semana" value="' + (gate.semana||'') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '<div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Responsable QA</label><input type="text" id="modal-quality-qa" value="' + (gate.responsable_qa||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;') + '" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:13px;outline:none;" /></div>';
  h += '</div>';
  if (checklist.length > 0) {
    h += '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Checklist (' + checklist.length + ' criterios)</div>';
    checklist.forEach(function(c, ci) {
      var clean = c.replace('\u2713','').replace('\u25cb','').trim();
      var isDone = c.indexOf('\u2713') >= 0;
      h += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;">';
      h += '<input type="checkbox" id="modal-quality-chk-' + ci + '"' + (isDone?' checked':'') + ' style="width:16px;height:16px;accent-color:#22c55e;" />';
      h += '<input type="text" id="modal-quality-txt-' + ci + '" value="' + clean.replace(/"/g,'&quot;') + '" style="flex:1;padding:6px 10px;background:#22262e;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:6px;color:#e8e9ed;font-size:12px;outline:none;" />';
      h += '</div>';
    });
  }
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:20px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  h += '<button id="modal-quality-save" style="padding:8px 20px;background:#8b5cf6;color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">\ud83d\udcbe Guardar</button>';
  h += '<button id="modal-quality-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;background:#333840;color:#8b8f98;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button>';
  h += '</div>';
  modal.innerHTML = h;
  overlay.appendChild(modal);
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  document.getElementById('modal-quality-close').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  document.getElementById('modal-quality-cancel').onclick = function() { overlay.remove(); };
  document.getElementById('modal-quality-save').onclick = function() {
    gate.estado = document.getElementById('modal-quality-estado').value;
    gate.semana = parseInt(document.getElementById('modal-quality-semana').value) || gate.semana;
    gate.responsable_qa = document.getElementById('modal-quality-qa').value;
    var newChecklist = [];
    for (var ci = 0; ci < checklist.length; ci++) {
      var chk = document.getElementById('modal-quality-chk-' + ci);
      var txt = document.getElementById('modal-quality-txt-' + ci);
      if (chk && txt) { newChecklist.push((chk.checked ? '\u2713 ' : '\u25cb ') + txt.value); }
    }
    gate.checklist = newChecklist;
    gate.criterios = newChecklist;
    overlay.remove();
    if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('Gate ' + (gate.fase||gate.gate||'') + ' actualizado \u2014 ' + gate.estado);
  };
}

function showBuildFinalScreen(pipelineData) {
  var pauseArea = document.getElementById('build-pause-area');
  if (!pauseArea) return;
  pauseArea.innerHTML = '';

  function safeParsePipelineData(raw) {
    if (!raw) return null;
    if (typeof raw === 'object' && !Array.isArray(raw)) return raw;
    try {
      var str = typeof raw === 'string' ? raw : JSON.stringify(raw);
      str = str.replace(/```json\s*/g, '').replace(/```\s*/g, '').trim();
      var first = str.indexOf('{');
      var last = str.lastIndexOf('}');
      if (first >= 0 && last > first) return JSON.parse(str.substring(first, last + 1));
      return JSON.parse(str);
    } catch(e) { try { var fixed = str.replace(/,\s*$/, '').replace(/,\s*\]/, ']').replace(/,\s*\}/, '}'); var open = (fixed.match(/\[/g)||[]).length - (fixed.match(/\]/g)||[]).length; var openB = (fixed.match(/\{/g)||[]).length - (fixed.match(/\}/g)||[]).length; for(var fi=0;fi<open;fi++) fixed+=']'; for(var fj=0;fj<openB;fj++) fixed+='}'; return JSON.parse(fixed); } catch(e2) { console.warn('safeParsePipelineData failed:', e.message); return null; } }
  }

  var costP = safeParsePipelineData(pipelineData.costResult);
  var planP = safeParsePipelineData(pipelineData.planResult);
  var qualP = safeParsePipelineData(pipelineData.qualityResult);
  if (!qualP && pipelineData.qualityResult) {
    try {
      var qRaw = typeof pipelineData.qualityResult === 'string' ? pipelineData.qualityResult : JSON.stringify(pipelineData.qualityResult);
      qRaw = qRaw.replace(/```json\s*/gi, '').replace(/```\s*/gi, '').trim();
      var qFirst = qRaw.indexOf('{'); var qLast = qRaw.lastIndexOf('}');
      if (qFirst >= 0 && qLast > qFirst) {
        var qStr = qRaw.substring(qFirst, qLast + 1);
        qStr = qStr.replace(/,\s*\]/g, ']').replace(/,\s*\}/g, '}');
        var qOpen = (qStr.match(/\[/g)||[]).length - (qStr.match(/\]/g)||[]).length;
        var qOpenB = (qStr.match(/\{/g)||[]).length - (qStr.match(/\}/g)||[]).length;
        for (var qi=0;qi<qOpen;qi++) qStr+=']';
        for (var qj=0;qj<qOpenB;qj++) qStr+='}';
        qualP = JSON.parse(qStr);
      }
    } catch(eQ) { console.warn('qualP manual parse failed:', eQ.message); }
  }
  var edtP = safeParsePipelineData(pipelineData.edtResult);
  var risksP = safeParsePipelineData(pipelineData.risksResult);
  var pmData = pipelineData.selectedPM || {};

  console.log('FINAL SCREEN PARSED — costP:', costP, 'planP:', planP, 'qualP:', qualP);
  if (!costP) console.error('Tab Presupuesto: costP null. Raw:', typeof pipelineData.costResult, pipelineData.costResult ? String(pipelineData.costResult).substring(0, 200) : 'EMPTY');
  if (!planP) console.error('Tab Gantt: planP null. Raw:', typeof pipelineData.planResult, pipelineData.planResult ? String(pipelineData.planResult).substring(0, 200) : 'EMPTY');
  if (!qualP) console.error('Tab Quality: qualP null. Raw:', typeof pipelineData.qualityResult, pipelineData.qualityResult ? String(pipelineData.qualityResult).substring(0, 200) : 'EMPTY');

  var sprints = (planP && planP.sprints) || [];
  var totalSP = (planP && planP.total_story_points) || 0;
  var velMedia = (planP && planP.velocidad_media) || 0;
  var costPres = (costP && costP.presupuesto) || costP || {};
  var costFin = (costP && costP.financiero) || costP || {};
  var bacTotal = (costPres && costPres.bac_total) || (costP && (costP.bac_total || costP.bac)) || 0;
  var roi = costFin.roi_pct || costFin.roi || (costP && costP.roi) || 0;
  var riskCount = (risksP && risksP.risks) ? risksP.risks.length : 0;
  var totalSprints = sprints.length || 0;

  // Count all sprint items
  var allItems = [];
  sprints.forEach(function(sp){(sp.items||[]).forEach(function(it){it._sprint=sp.numero;allItems.push(it);});});

  var siloC = {'Linux':{bg:'rgba(6,182,212,0.12)',color:'#06b6d4'},'Seguridad':{bg:'rgba(239,68,68,0.12)',color:'#ef4444'},'DevOps':{bg:'rgba(34,197,94,0.12)',color:'#22c55e'},'QA':{bg:'rgba(236,72,153,0.12)',color:'#ec4899'},'Redes':{bg:'rgba(6,182,212,0.12)',color:'#06b6d4'},'BBDD':{bg:'rgba(249,115,22,0.12)',color:'#f97316'},'Backend':{bg:'rgba(249,115,22,0.12)',color:'#f97316'},'Frontend':{bg:'rgba(59,130,246,0.12)',color:'#3b82f6'},'Soporte':{bg:'rgba(139,143,152,0.12)',color:'#8b8f98'}};
  var defSilo = {bg:'rgba(139,143,152,0.12)',color:'#8b8f98'};

  var finalDiv = document.createElement('div');

  // ── Progress bar 100% ──
  var elapsed = typeof buildPipelineStartTime!=='undefined' ? ((Date.now()-buildPipelineStartTime)/1000).toFixed(1) : '0';
  var cost = typeof buildPipelineCost!=='undefined' ? buildPipelineCost.toFixed(2) : '0.00';
  finalDiv.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;background:rgba(34,197,94,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.2);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 16px;margin-bottom:12px;"><div><div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;letter-spacing:1px;color:#22c55e;">✓</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;">Completado</div></div><div><div style="font-size:24px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;">100%</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;">9 agentes</div></div><div style="flex:1;"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;"><span>'+elapsed+'s · 4 pausas</span><span style="color:#22c55e;font-weight:600;">~'+cost+' USD</span></div><div style="height:6px;background:#181b20;border-radius:3px;margin-top:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="height:100%;width:100%;background:#22c55e;border-radius:3px;"></div></div></div></div>';

  // ── TABS ──
  var tabLabels = ['Scrum / Sprints','Presupuesto','Gantt + CPM','Quality Gates'];
  var tabBar = document.createElement('div');
  tabBar.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:2px;margin-bottom:0;';
  var tabContents = [];
  tabLabels.forEach(function(label,idx) {
    var tb = document.createElement('div');
    tb.style.cssText = 'padding:8px 14px;border-radius:8px 8px 0 0;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid '+(idx===0?'#3a3f4a':'#333840')+';border-bottom:none;background:'+(idx===0?'#22262e':'#1a1d24')+';color:'+(idx===0?'#e8e9ed':'#8b8f98')+';';
    tb.textContent = label;
    tb.setAttribute('data-tab-idx', idx);
    tabBar.appendChild(tb);
  });
  // tabs onclick se asigna después de insertar en DOM (ver setTimeout al final)
  finalDiv.appendChild(tabBar);

  var layout = document.createElement('div');
  layout.style.cssText = 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 280px;gap:16px;max-width:100%;overflow:hidden;';
  var mainLeft = document.createElement('div');
  mainLeft.style.cssText = 'min-width:0;overflow:hidden;';
  var mainRight = document.createElement('div');
  mainRight.style.cssText = 'min-width:0;overflow:hidden;';

  for(var ti=0;ti<4;ti++){var tc=document.createElement('div');tc.style.cssText='display:'+(ti===0?'block':'none')+';overflow:hidden;word-break:break-word;max-width:100%;';tabContents.push(tc);}

  // ═══ TAB 0: SCRUM / SPRINTS ═══
  var scrumSec = document.createElement('div');
  scrumSec.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:0 10px 10px 10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;';
  scrumSec.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#ec4899;">AG-007 — Scrum Framework · '+totalSprints+' sprints</span><span style="font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Planificado por IA</span></div>';

  // Sprint timeline
  var timeHtml = '<div style="display:flex;gap:3px;margin-bottom:14px;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:4px;">';
  sprints.forEach(function(sp,si) {
    var isFirst = si===0;
    var isFuture = si>4;
    var spColor = si<4?'#3b82f6':si<8?'#a855f7':si<13?'#ef4444':'#22c55e';
    timeHtml += '<div class="sprint-block" data-sprint-idx="'+si+'" style="border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;min-width:80px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid '+(isFirst?spColor:'transparent')+';background:rgba('+(isFirst?'59,130,246,0.08':'59,130,246,0.03')+');text-align:center;transition:border-color 0.15s,background 0.15s;'+(isFuture?'opacity:0.4;':'')+'">';
    timeHtml += '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:'+spColor+';">S'+(sp.numero||si+1)+'</div>';
    timeHtml += '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:1px;">Sem '+(sp.semana_inicio||'?')+'-'+(sp.semana_fin||'?')+'</div>';
    timeHtml += '<div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-top:2px;color:'+spColor+';">'+(sp.story_points||0)+' pts</div>';
    if(sp.goal) timeHtml += '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:1px;font-style:italic;line-height:1.2;">'+sp.goal.substring(0,25)+'</div>';
    timeHtml += '</div>';
  });
  timeHtml += '</div>';
  scrumSec.innerHTML += timeHtml;

  // Filters
  scrumSec.innerHTML += '<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;"><span style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-right:4px;">Filtrar:</span><button style="font-size:8px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid #3b82f6;background:rgba(59,130,246,0.1);color:#3b82f6;cursor:pointer;">Todos</button><button style="font-size:8px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;">Task</button><button style="font-size:8px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;">Story</button><button style="font-size:8px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;">Bug</button><button style="font-size:8px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid #333840;background:none;color:#8b8f98;cursor:pointer;">Spike</button></div>';

  // List header
  scrumSec.innerHTML += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:30px 45px 1fr 75px 65px 55px 45px 65px 55px;gap:0;padding:4px 8px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid #333840;"><div></div><div>Tipo</div><div>Titulo</div><div>Silo</div><div>Estado</div><div>Asignado</div><div>Pts</div><div>Subtareas</div><div>Prioridad</div></div>';

  // Render sprints with items
  var showSprints = sprints.slice(0, Math.min(3, sprints.length));
  var backlogItems = [];
  sprints.forEach(function(sp,si){if(si>=3)(sp.items||[]).forEach(function(it){it._sprintNum=sp.numero;backlogItems.push(it);});});

  showSprints.forEach(function(sp, si) {
    var spColor = si<4?'#3b82f6':'#a855f7';
    var items = sp.items || [];
    var secHtml = '<div style="margin-bottom:12px;">';
    secHtml += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px;background:rgba(59,130,246,'+(si===0?'0.06':'0.03')+');cursor:pointer;">';
    secHtml += '<div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:'+spColor+';flex-shrink:0;'+(si>0?'opacity:0.5;':'')+'"></div>';
    secHtml += '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:'+spColor+';'+(si>0?'opacity:0.7;':'')+'">Sprint '+(sp.numero||si+1)+' — '+(sp.goal||'')+'</div>';
    secHtml += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;margin-left:auto;display:flex;gap:12px;"><span>'+items.length+' items</span><span>'+(sp.story_points||0)+' pts</span></div>';
    secHtml += '</div>';

    items.forEach(function(it) {
      var tipo = (it.tipo||'TASK').toUpperCase();
      var tipoColors = {'TASK':'rgba(59,130,246,0.12);color:#3b82f6','STORY':'rgba(34,197,94,0.12);color:#22c55e','BUG':'rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:#ef4444','SPIKE':'rgba(168,85,247,0.12);color:#a855f7'};
      var tipoStyle = tipoColors[tipo]||tipoColors['TASK'];
      var sc = siloC[it.silo]||defSilo;
      var prioColor = (it.prioridad||'').toLowerCase()==='alta'||it.prioridad==='Crítica'?'#ef4444':(it.prioridad||'').toLowerCase()==='media'?'#eab308':'#8b8f98';
      var initials = (it.asignado||it.asignado_nombre||'??').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();

      secHtml += '<div class="final-item-row" data-sprint-idx="'+si+'" data-item-idx="'+items.indexOf(it)+'" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:30px 45px 1fr 75px 65px 55px 45px 65px 55px;gap:0;padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #22262e;font-size:11px;align-items:center;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.15s;">';
      secHtml += '<div><div style="width:14px;height:14px;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:3px;"></div></div>';
      secHtml += '<div><span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:700;text-align:center;background:'+tipoStyle+';">'+tipo+'</span></div>';
      secHtml += '<div><div style="font-size:10px;font-family:monospace;font-weight:600;color:#3b82f6;">'+(it.id||'')+'</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:#e8e9ed;line-height:1.3;">'+(it.titulo||'')+'</div>'+(it.descripcion?'<div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:1px;">'+it.descripcion.substring(0,60)+'</div>':'')+'</div>';
      secHtml += '<div><span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600;background:'+sc.bg+';color:'+sc.color+';">'+(it.silo||'')+'</span></div>';
      secHtml += '<div><span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600;background:rgba(139,143,152,0.12);color:#8b8f98;">Por hacer</span></div>';
      secHtml += '<div><div style="width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;margin:0 auto;background:'+sc.bg+';color:'+sc.color+';">'+initials+'</div></div>';
      secHtml += '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;text-align:center;color:#3b82f6;">'+(it.story_points||0)+'</div>';
      secHtml += '<div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;">0/'+(it.subtareas_total||0)+' <div style="width:30px;height:3px;background:#333840;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="height:100%;width:0%;border-radius:2px;"></div></div></div></div>';
      secHtml += '<div><div style="width:4px;height:20px;border-radius:2px;margin:0 auto;background:'+prioColor+';"></div></div>';
      secHtml += '</div>';
    });
    secHtml += '</div>';
    scrumSec.innerHTML += secHtml;
  });

  // Backlog divider
  if(backlogItems.length>0) {
    scrumSec.innerHTML += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:14px 0 8px;padding:0 8px;"><div style="flex:1;height:1px;background:#333840;"></div><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Product Backlog — '+backlogItems.length+' items restantes</div><div style="flex:1;height:1px;background:#333840;"></div></div>';
    backlogItems.slice(0,3).forEach(function(it){
      var tipo = (it.tipo||'TASK').toUpperCase();
      var tipoColors = {'TASK':'rgba(59,130,246,0.12);color:#3b82f6','STORY':'rgba(34,197,94,0.12);color:#22c55e','BUG':'rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:#ef4444','SPIKE':'rgba(168,85,247,0.12);color:#a855f7'};
      var tipoStyle = tipoColors[tipo]||tipoColors['TASK'];
      scrumSec.innerHTML += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:30px 40px 1fr 70px 60px 55px 45px 60px 55px;gap:0;padding:5px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #22262e;font-size:9px;align-items:center;opacity:0.6;"><div><div style="width:14px;height:14px;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:3px;"></div></div><div><span style="font-size:7px;padding:2px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:700;background:'+tipoStyle+';">'+tipo+'</span></div><div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(it.titulo||'')+'</div></div><div></div><div><span style="font-size:7px;color:#3b82f6;">Sprint '+(it._sprintNum||'?')+'</span></div><div></div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;text-align:center;">'+(it.story_points||0)+'</div><div></div><div></div></div>';
    });
    if(backlogItems.length>3) scrumSec.innerHTML += '<div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;padding:6px;border:1px dashed #333840;border-radius:4px;margin-top:4px;">... '+(backlogItems.length-3)+' items mas en el backlog</div>';
  }

  // Ceremonies
  scrumSec.innerHTML += '<div style="margin-top:14px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Ceremonias Scrum</div><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(59,130,246,0.15);color:#3b82f6;">SP</div><div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">Sprint Planning</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">Seleccion stories + compromiso equipo</div></div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-left:auto;text-align:right;">Lunes S1<br><span style="color:#3b82f6;">2h</span></div></div><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(168,85,247,0.15);color:#a855f7;">DS</div><div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">Daily Standup</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">Que hice · Que hare · Bloqueos</div></div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-left:auto;text-align:right;">Diario 9:15<br><span style="color:#a855f7;">15min</span></div></div><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(34,197,94,0.15);color:#22c55e;">SR</div><div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">Sprint Review</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">Demo stakeholders + feedback</div></div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-left:auto;text-align:right;">Viernes S2<br><span style="color:#22c55e;">1h</span></div></div><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;">RT</div><div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">Retrospectiva</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">Que mejorar + action items</div></div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-left:auto;text-align:right;">Viernes S2<br><span style="color:#eab308;">1h</span></div></div><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(236,72,153,0.15);color:#ec4899;">BG</div><div><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">Backlog Grooming</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;">Refinar stories + estimar puntos</div></div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-left:auto;text-align:right;">Miercoles<br><span style="color:#ec4899;">1h</span></div></div></div>';

  tabContents[0].appendChild(scrumSec);

  // Wire sprint timeline clicks
  scrumSec.querySelectorAll('.sprint-block').forEach(function(block) {
    block.onmouseenter = function() { block.style.borderColor = '#3b82f6'; block.style.background = 'rgba(59,130,246,0.1)'; };
    block.onmouseleave = function() { block.style.borderColor = 'transparent'; block.style.background = 'rgba(59,130,246,0.03)'; };
    block.onclick = function() {
      var idx = parseInt(block.getAttribute('data-sprint-idx'));
      if (sprints[idx]) showSprintDetailModal(sprints[idx], sprints, pipelineData, function() {});
    };
  });
  // Wire item row clicks
  scrumSec.querySelectorAll('.final-item-row').forEach(function(row) {
    row.onmouseenter = function() { row.style.background = '#22262e'; };
    row.onmouseleave = function() { row.style.background = 'none'; };
    row.onclick = function() {
      var si = parseInt(row.getAttribute('data-sprint-idx'));
      var ii = parseInt(row.getAttribute('data-item-idx'));
      var sp = showSprints[si];
      if (sp && sp.items && sp.items[ii]) showSprintItemModal(sp.items[ii], sp, function() {});
    };
  });

  // ═══ TAB 1: PRESUPUESTO ═══
  var budgetSec = document.createElement('div');
  budgetSec.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:0 10px 10px 10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;';
  var budgetHtml = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#10b981;">AG-016 Cost Analyzer — Presupuesto</span><span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Generado por IA</span><button onclick="showBudgetDetailModal(costP, pipelineData)" style="margin-left:auto;padding:4px 12px;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.3);border-radius:4px;color:#10b981;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;">\u270f Editar</button></div>';
  // BAC prominent box
  budgetHtml += '<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(34,197,94,0.08),rgba(59,130,246,0.08));border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px;"><div style="font-size:12px;color:#8b8f98;">BAC (Budget at Completion)</div><div style="font-size:36px;font-weight:700;color:#22c55e;">'+(bacTotal>0?Number(bacTotal).toLocaleString()+'\u20ac':'Pendiente')+'</div></div>';

  // RRHH table — handle both rrhh[] (array) and rrhh.desglose_por_silo[] (object with array)
  var presup = (costP && costP.presupuesto) || {};
  var rrhhRaw = presup.rrhh || [];
  var rrhh = Array.isArray(rrhhRaw) ? rrhhRaw : (rrhhRaw.desglose_por_silo || []);
  // Also add PM row if exists
  if(rrhhRaw.pm && rrhhRaw.pm.nombre) rrhh = rrhh.concat([{silo:'PM: '+rrhhRaw.pm.nombre, horas:rrhhRaw.pm.horas||0, tarifa:rrhhRaw.pm.tarifa||85, total:rrhhRaw.pm.total||0}]);
  if(rrhh.length>0) {
    budgetHtml += '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:6px;">RRHH por silo</div>';
    budgetHtml += '<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:12px;"><tr style="background:#22262e;"><th style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:left;color:#8b8f98;border:1px solid #333840;">Silo</th><th style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:right;color:#8b8f98;border:1px solid #333840;">Horas</th><th style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:right;color:#8b8f98;border:1px solid #333840;">Tarifa/h</th><th style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:right;color:#8b8f98;border:1px solid #333840;">Total</th></tr>';
    rrhh.forEach(function(r){budgetHtml+='<tr style="cursor:pointer;" onmouseenter="this.style.background=\'#22262e\'" onmouseleave="this.style.background=\'none\'"><td style="padding:6px 10px;border:1px solid #333840;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(r.silo||'')+'</td><td style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:right;border:1px solid #333840;font-family:monospace;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(r.horas||0)+'</td><td style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:right;border:1px solid #333840;font-family:monospace;color:#e8e9ed;">'+(r.tarifa||0)+'\u20ac</td><td style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:right;border:1px solid #333840;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;font-weight:600;">'+Number(r.total||0).toLocaleString()+'\u20ac</td></tr>';});
    var totalRrhh = rrhhRaw.total_rrhh || rrhh.reduce(function(s,r){return s+(r.total||0);},0);
    if(totalRrhh) budgetHtml += '<tr style="background:#22262e;font-weight:700;"><td style="padding:6px 10px;border:1px solid #333840;color:#e8e9ed;" colspan="3">Total RRHH</td><td style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:right;border:1px solid #333840;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;">'+Number(totalRrhh).toLocaleString()+'\u20ac</td></tr>';
    budgetHtml += '</table>';
  }

  // OPEX / CAPEX
  var opex = presup.opex || {};
  var capex = presup.capex || {};
  if(Object.keys(opex).length>0 || Object.keys(capex).length>0) {
    budgetHtml += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;">';
    var opexKeys = Object.keys(opex).filter(function(k){return k.indexOf('total')!==0 && typeof opex[k]==='number';});
    if(opexKeys.length>0) {
      budgetHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#eab308;margin-bottom:6px;">OPEX'+(opex.total_opex?' \u2014 '+Number(opex.total_opex).toLocaleString()+'\u20ac':'')+'</div>';
      opexKeys.forEach(function(k){budgetHtml+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:3px;"><span>'+k+'</span><span style="color:#e8e9ed;font-family:monospace;">'+Number(opex[k]||0).toLocaleString()+'\u20ac</span></div>';});
      budgetHtml += '</div>';
    }
    var capexKeys = Object.keys(capex).filter(function(k){return k.indexOf('total')!==0 && typeof capex[k]==='number';});
    if(capexKeys.length>0) {
      budgetHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#3b82f6;margin-bottom:6px;">CAPEX'+(capex.total_capex?' \u2014 '+Number(capex.total_capex).toLocaleString()+'\u20ac':'')+'</div>';
      capexKeys.forEach(function(k){budgetHtml+='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:3px;"><span>'+k+'</span><span style="color:#e8e9ed;font-family:monospace;">'+Number(capex[k]||0).toLocaleString()+'\u20ac</span></div>';});
      budgetHtml += '</div>';
    }
    budgetHtml += '</div>';
  }

  // Financial metrics (4 cards) — handle both costP.roi and costP.financiero.roi_pct
  var fPayback = costFin.payback_meses || (costP&&costP.payback_meses) || null;
  var fTir = costFin.tir_pct || costFin.tir || (costP&&costP.tir) || null;
  var fVan = costFin.van_eur || costFin.van || (costP&&costP.van) || null;
  if(roi || fPayback || fTir || fVan) {
    budgetHtml += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin-top:12px;">';
    budgetHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.15s;border:1px solid transparent;" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor=\'#22c55e\'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor=\'transparent\'"><div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;">'+roi+'%</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px;">ROI</div></div>';
    budgetHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.15s;border:1px solid transparent;" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor=\'#eab308\'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor=\'transparent\'"><div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#eab308;">'+(fPayback||'?')+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px;">Payback (meses)</div></div>';
    budgetHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.15s;border:1px solid transparent;" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor=\'#3b82f6\'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor=\'transparent\'"><div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#3b82f6;">'+(fTir||'?')+'%</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px;">TIR</div></div>';
    budgetHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.15s;border:1px solid transparent;" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor=\'#a855f7\'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor=\'transparent\'"><div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#a855f7;">'+(fVan!=null?Number(fVan).toLocaleString()+'\u20ac':'-')+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px;">VAN</div></div>';
    budgetHtml += '</div>';
  }

  // Reservas
  var reservas = presup.reservas || {};
  if(reservas.total_reservas || reservas.contingencia_eur) {
    budgetHtml += '<div style="background:rgba(234,179,8,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.15);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-top:12px;">';
    budgetHtml += '<div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#eab308;margin-bottom:6px;">Reservas de contingencia</div>';
    if(reservas.contingencia_pct) budgetHtml += '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:3px;"><span>Contingencia ('+reservas.contingencia_pct+'%)</span><span style="color:#e8e9ed;font-family:monospace;">'+Number(reservas.contingencia_eur||0).toLocaleString()+'\u20ac</span></div>';
    if(reservas.gestion_pct) budgetHtml += '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:3px;"><span>Gesti\u00f3n ('+reservas.gestion_pct+'%)</span><span style="color:#e8e9ed;font-family:monospace;">'+Number(reservas.gestion_eur||0).toLocaleString()+'\u20ac</span></div>';
    if(reservas.total_reservas) budgetHtml += '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:#eab308;font-weight:600;border-top:1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.2);padding-top:4px;margin-top:4px;"><span>Total reservas</span><span style="font-family:monospace;">'+Number(reservas.total_reservas).toLocaleString()+'\u20ac</span></div>';
    budgetHtml += '</div>';
  }

  // Fallback: if no data at all, show raw
  if(!rrhh.length && !opexKeys.length && !capexKeys.length && !roi && !fPayback) {
    budgetHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;">'+(typeof pipelineData.costResult==='string'?pipelineData.costResult:JSON.stringify(pipelineData.costResult,null,2)||'Sin datos presupuesto')+'</div>';
  }

  budgetSec.innerHTML = budgetHtml;
  tabContents[1].appendChild(budgetSec);

  // ═══ TAB 2: GANTT + CPM ═══
  var ganttSec = document.createElement('div');
  ganttSec.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:0 10px 10px 10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;overflow-x:auto;';
  var ganttHtml = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#ec4899;">AG-007 — Gantt + Ruta cr\u00edtica</span><span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(234,179,8,0.15);color:#eab308;font-weight:600;">Planificado por IA</span></div>';

  var rutaCritica = (planP && planP.ruta_critica) || {};
  ganttHtml += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">';
  ganttHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#ef4444;">'+(rutaCritica.semanas||totalSprints*2||'?')+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Semanas ruta cr\u00edtica</div></div>';
  ganttHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;">'+(rutaCritica.holgura||4)+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Semanas holgura</div></div>';
  ganttHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#3b82f6;">'+totalSP+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Story points total</div></div>';
  ganttHtml += '</div>';

  // Visual timeline bars per sprint/fase
  if(sprints.length>0) {
    var maxWeek = 1;
    sprints.forEach(function(s){if((s.semana_fin||0)>maxWeek)maxWeek=s.semana_fin;});
    ganttHtml += '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:8px;">Timeline de Sprints</div><div style="margin-bottom:12px;">';
    var spGanttColors = ['#3b82f6','#22c55e','#eab308','#a855f7','#ec4899','#06b6d4'];
    sprints.forEach(function(sp,si) {
      var startPct = ((sp.semana_inicio||1)-1)/maxWeek*100;
      var widthPct = ((sp.semana_fin||1)-(sp.semana_inicio||1)+1)/maxWeek*100;
      var c = spGanttColors[si%spGanttColors.length];
      ganttHtml += '<div style="margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;"><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;min-width:30px;">S'+(sp.numero||si+1)+'</span><div style="flex:1;background:#22262e;border-radius:4px;height:22px;position:relative;cursor:pointer;" title="Sprint '+(sp.numero||si+1)+': '+(sp.goal||'')+'"><div style="position:absolute;left:'+startPct+'%;width:'+widthPct+'%;height:100%;background:'+c+'30;border:1px solid '+c+';border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 8px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:'+c+';font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;">'+((sp.goal||'').substring(0,25))+' \u00b7 '+(sp.story_points||0)+'pts</span></div></div><span style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;min-width:55px;text-align:right;">'+(sp.story_points||0)+' pts</span></div></div>';
    });
    ganttHtml += '</div>';
  }

  // Mermaid fallback
  if(planP && planP.gantt_mermaid) {
    ganttHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;font-family:monospace;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;">'+planP.gantt_mermaid.substring(0,2000)+'</div>';
  }

  ganttSec.innerHTML = ganttHtml;
  // Wire Gantt bar clicks (P55)
  ganttSec.querySelectorAll('[title^="Sprint "]').forEach(function(bar) {
    bar.onclick = function() {
      var txt = bar.getAttribute('title') || '';
      var num = parseInt(txt.replace('Sprint ',''));
      var sp = (sprints||[]).find(function(s){ return s.numero === num; });
      if (sp) showGanttDetailModal(sp, planP, pipelineData);
    };
  });
  tabContents[2].appendChild(ganttSec);

  // ═══ TAB 3: QUALITY GATES ═══
  var qualSec = document.createElement('div');
  qualSec.style.cssText = 'background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:0 10px 10px 10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;';
  var qualHtml = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px;"><span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#8b5cf6;">AG-017 — Quality Gates + Definition of Done</span><span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(139,92,246,0.15);color:#8b5cf6;font-weight:600;">Validado por IA</span></div>';

  var gates = (qualP && (qualP.gates || qualP.quality_gates)) || [];
  var dodList = (qualP && (qualP.dod_por_tarea || qualP.dod)) || [];
  var gateColors = {'G0':'#22c55e','G1':'#22c55e','G2':'#eab308','G3':'#3b82f6','G4':'#8b5cf6','G5':'#ec4899'};
  var gateStatusColors = {'PASSED':'#22c55e','NEXT':'#eab308','PENDING':'#8b8f98','FAILED':'#ef4444'};

  if (gates.length > 0) {
    // Normalize + auto-assign states
    gates.forEach(function(g, gi) {
      if (!g.fase && g.gate) g.fase = g.gate;
      if (!g.gate_name && g.nombre) g.gate_name = g.nombre;
      if (!g.estado) {
        var gNum = parseInt((g.fase||g.gate||'').replace(/\D/g,''));
        if (gNum <= 1) g.estado = 'PASSED';
        else if (gNum === 2) g.estado = 'NEXT';
        else g.estado = 'PENDING';
      }
    });

    // Gate timeline visual
    qualHtml += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0;margin-bottom:20px;overflow-x:auto;padding:8px 0;">';
    gates.forEach(function(g, gi) {
      var fase = g.fase || g.gate || ('G' + gi);
      var nombre = g.gate_name || g.nombre || fase;
      var estado = (g.estado||'PENDING').toUpperCase();
      var color = gateColors[fase] || '#8b8f98';
      var stColor = gateStatusColors[estado] || '#8b8f98';
      var iconBg = estado === 'PASSED' ? 'rgba(34,197,94,0.15)' : (estado === 'NEXT' ? 'rgba(234,179,8,0.15)' : 'rgba(139,143,152,0.1)');
      var icon = estado === 'PASSED' ? '\u2713' : (estado === 'NEXT' ? '\u25c9' : '\u25cb');

      if (gi > 0) qualHtml += '<div style="flex:1;height:2px;background:' + (estado==='PASSED'||gi<=1 ? '#22c55e' : (gi === 2 ? 'linear-gradient(90deg,#22c55e,#eab308)' : '#333840')) + ';min-width:20px;"></div>';
      qualHtml += '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer;" onclick="var d=document.getElementById(\'gate-detail-'+gi+'\');if(d)d.style.display=d.style.display===\'none\'?\'block\':\'none\'">';
      qualHtml += '<div style="width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid '+color+';background:'+iconBg+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:'+color+';">'+icon+'</div>';
      qualHtml += '<div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:'+color+';">'+fase+'</div>';
      qualHtml += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;max-width:110px;text-align:center;line-height:1.2;">'+nombre+'</div>';
      qualHtml += '<div style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:'+iconBg+';color:'+stColor+';font-weight:600;">'+estado+'</div>';
      qualHtml += '</div>';
    });
    qualHtml += '</div>';

    // Gate details (expandible al click)
    gates.forEach(function(g, gi) {
      var fase = g.fase || g.gate || ('G' + gi);
      var nombre = g.gate_name || g.nombre || fase;
      var color = gateColors[fase] || '#8b8f98';
      var criterios = g.criterios || [];
      var checklist = g.checklist || [];
      var responsable = g.responsable_qa || g.responsable || '';
      var hidden = gi > 2 ? 'none' : 'block';

      qualHtml += '<div id="gate-detail-'+gi+'" style="display:'+hidden+';background:#22262e;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-radius:8px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:8px;border-left:3px solid '+color+';">';
      qualHtml += '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;">'+fase+' \u2014 '+nombre+'</span>';
      if (responsable) qualHtml += '<span style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">QA: '+responsable+'</span>';
      qualHtml += '</div>';

      if (criterios.length > 0) {
        qualHtml += '<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:3px;">CRITERIOS DE PASO:</div>';
        criterios.forEach(function(c) {
