          qualHtml += '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#e8e9ed;padding:2px 0 2px 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><span style="color:'+color+';">\u25b8</span> '+c+'</div>';
        });
      }
      if (checklist.length > 0) {
        qualHtml += '<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:6px;margin-bottom:3px;">CHECKLIST:</div>';
        qualHtml += '<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;">';
        checklist.forEach(function(ch) {
          qualHtml += '<span style="font-size:9px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(139,92,246,0.1);color:#8b5cf6;">\u2610 '+ch+'</span>';
        });
        qualHtml += '</div>';
      }
      qualHtml += '</div>';
    });
  } else {
    qualHtml += '<div style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:#8b8f98;font-size:11px;">AG-017 no gener\u00f3 quality gates para este proyecto.</div>';
  }

  // DoD por tarea (colapsable)
  if (dodList.length > 0) {
    qualHtml += '<div style="margin-top:14px;border-top:1px solid #333840;padding-top:10px;">';
    qualHtml += '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:8px;cursor:pointer;" onclick="var d=document.getElementById(\'dod-list\');if(d)d.style.display=d.style.display===\'none\'?\'block\':\'none\';">Definition of Done por tarea ('+dodList.length+') \u25be</div>';
    qualHtml += '<div id="dod-list" style="display:none;max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;">';
    dodList.slice(0, 20).forEach(function(dod) {
      var tid = dod.id_tarea || '?';
      var criterios = dod.criterios_aceptacion || dod.criterios || [];
      var checks = dod.checklist_calidad || dod.checklist || [];
      qualHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border:1px solid #3a3f4a;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;border-left:3px solid #8b5cf6;">';
      qualHtml += '<div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#e8e9ed;margin-bottom:2px;">'+tid+'</div>';
      if (criterios.length > 0) qualHtml += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;">Aceptaci\u00f3n: '+criterios.join(' \u00b7 ')+'</div>';
      if (checks.length > 0) {
        qualHtml += '<div style="display:flex;gap:3px;margin-top:2px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
        checks.forEach(function(ch) { qualHtml += '<span style="font-size:8px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(139,92,246,0.08);color:#a78bfa;">'+ch+'</span>'; });
        qualHtml += '</div>';
      }
      qualHtml += '</div>';
    });
    if (dodList.length > 20) qualHtml += '<div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;text-align:center;padding:4px;">... '+(dodList.length-20)+' tareas m\u00e1s con DoD definido</div>';
    qualHtml += '</div></div>';
  }

  // Fallback: si no hay gates ni DoD, mostrar raw
  if (gates.length === 0 && dodList.length === 0 && pipelineData.qualityResult) {
    qualHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;">' + (typeof pipelineData.qualityResult === 'string' ? pipelineData.qualityResult : JSON.stringify(pipelineData.qualityResult, null, 2)) + '</div>';
  }

  qualSec.innerHTML = qualHtml;
  // Wire Quality Gate clicks (P57)
  qualSec.querySelectorAll('[onmouseenter*="scale"]').forEach(function(pill, gi) {
    pill.onclick = function() { if (gates[gi]) showQualityGateModal(gates[gi], gates, qualP, pipelineData); };
  });
  tabContents[3].appendChild(qualSec);

  // Append tabs
  tabContents.forEach(function(tc){mainLeft.appendChild(tc);});

  // ═══ SIDEBAR ═══
  var sideHtml = '';

  // Sprint 1 metrics
  var sp1 = sprints[0] || {};
  var sp1Items = sp1.items || [];
  sideHtml += '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Sprint 1 — Metricas</div><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;"><div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:10px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#3b82f6;">'+(sp1.story_points||0)+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Story Points</div></div><div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:10px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#e8e9ed;">'+sp1Items.length+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;">Items</div></div></div></div>';

  // Velocity bars
  sideHtml += '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #333840;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Velocidad planificada</div><div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:3px;height:60px;margin-bottom:4px;">';
  var maxPts = 1;
  sprints.slice(0,6).forEach(function(s){if((s.story_points||0)>maxPts)maxPts=s.story_points;});
  sprints.slice(0,6).forEach(function(sp,si){
    var hPct = ((sp.story_points||0)/maxPts*100);
    var c = si<4?'rgba(59,130,246,0.4)':si<8?'rgba(168,85,247,0.3)':'rgba(139,143,152,0.2)';
    var tc = si<4?'#3b82f6':'#a855f7';
    sideHtml += '<div style="border-radius:3px 3px 0 0;width:100%;height:'+hPct+'%;background:'+c+';position:relative;min-width:24px;text-align:center;"><div style="position:absolute;top:-12px;font-size:7px;font-weight:600;width:100%;text-align:center;color:'+tc+';">'+(sp.story_points||0)+'</div><div style="position:absolute;bottom:-14px;font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;width:100%;text-align:center;">S'+(sp.numero||si+1)+'</div></div>';
  });
  sideHtml += '</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:16px;">Media: '+(velMedia||'?')+' pts/sprint · Total: '+totalSP+' pts · '+totalSprints+' sprints</div></div>';

  // Project summary
  sideHtml += '<div style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#22c55e;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">Proyecto</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;line-height:1.6;">';
  sideHtml += '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;"><span>PM</span><span style="color:#06b6d4;font-weight:600;">'+(pmData.nombre||'Pendiente')+'</span></div>';
  sideHtml += '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;"><span>Framework</span><span style="color:#ec4899;font-weight:600;">Scrum</span></div>';
  sideHtml += '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;"><span>Sprints</span><span style="color:#e8e9ed;font-weight:600;">'+totalSprints+'</span></div>';
  sideHtml += '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;"><span>Story Points</span><span style="color:#e8e9ed;font-weight:600;">'+totalSP+'</span></div>';
  sideHtml += '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;"><span>Velocidad</span><span style="color:#3b82f6;font-weight:600;">~'+velMedia+'/sprint</span></div>';
  sideHtml += '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;border-top:1px solid #333840;padding-top:4px;margin-top:4px;"><span style="font-weight:600;">BAC</span><span style="color:#22c55e;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;">'+Number(bacTotal).toLocaleString()+'€</span></div>';
  sideHtml += '</div></div>';

  mainRight.innerHTML = sideHtml;

  layout.appendChild(mainLeft);
  layout.appendChild(mainRight);
  finalDiv.appendChild(layout);

  // ═══ LAUNCH SECTION ═══
  var resourceP = safeParsePipelineData(pipelineData.resourceResult);
  var equipoCount = resourceP ? ((resourceP.equipo||resourceP.equipo_tecnico||resourceP.team||resourceP.staff||[]).length) : 0;
  var launchHtml = '<div style="background:rgba(34,197,94,0.06);border:2px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin-top:12px;text-align:center;" id="launch-section-final">';
  launchHtml += '<div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:#22c55e;margin-bottom:4px;">Proyecto listo para lanzamiento</div>';
  launchHtml += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;margin-bottom:12px;">9 agentes IA · 4 pausas gobernanza · Scrum '+totalSprints+' sprints · '+totalSP+' story points</div>';
  launchHtml += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:14px;">';
  launchHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#22c55e;">'+Number(bacTotal).toLocaleString()+'€</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">BAC</div></div>';
  launchHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#ec4899;">'+totalSprints+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Sprints</div></div>';
  launchHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#06b6d4;">'+equipoCount+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Equipo</div></div>';
  launchHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#a855f7;">'+totalSP+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Story pts</div></div>';
  launchHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#eab308;">'+riskCount+'</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">Riesgos</div></div>';
  launchHtml += '<div style="background:#22262e;border-radius:6px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#3b82f6;">'+roi+'%</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;">ROI</div></div>';
  launchHtml += '</div>';
  launchHtml += '<div style="font-size:8px;color:#8b8f98;margin-top:8px;" id="launch-warning-final">Al lanzar: BUILD LIVE activo · PM notificado · Sprint 1 iniciado · Daily 9:15 · Gate G2 activado</div>';
  launchHtml += '</div>';
  finalDiv.innerHTML += launchHtml;

  // Launch button
  var launchBtn = document.createElement('button');
  launchBtn.style.cssText = 'background:#22c55e;color:#fff;border:none;padding:14px 48px;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(34,197,94,0.3);margin-top:14px;';
  launchBtn.textContent = 'Lanzar proyecto';
  launchBtn.onclick = async function() {
    launchBtn.disabled = true;
    launchBtn.textContent = 'Lanzando...';
    launchBtn.style.background = '#f97316';
    try {
      var solicitud = pipelineData.solicitud || {};
      var launchData = {
        nombre: solicitud.nombre || pipelineData.formText || 'Nuevo Proyecto',
        edt: pipelineData.edtResult,
        subtareas: pipelineData.subtasksResult,
        riesgos: pipelineData.risksResult,
        stakeholders: pipelineData.stakeholdersResult,
        pm: pipelineData.selectedPM,
        equipo: pipelineData.resourceResult,
        presupuesto: pipelineData.costResult,
        plan: pipelineData.planResult,
        quality: pipelineData.qualityResult
      };
      await authFetch(API_BASE + '/proyectos/crear', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: JSON.stringify(launchData)
      });
    } catch(e) { console.warn('Error creando proyecto:', e); }

    // Also try /build/live
    try {
      var projName = (pipelineData.solicitud&&pipelineData.solicitud.nombre) || pipelineData.formText || 'Proyecto BUILD';
      var projId = 'PRJ-' + Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase();
      await authFetch(API_BASE + '/build/live', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: JSON.stringify({
          id_proyecto: projId, nombre: projName,
          pm_asignado: (pipelineData.selectedPM && pipelineData.selectedPM.nombre) || 'Pendiente',
          prioridad: 'Alta', estado: 'EN_EJECUCION',
          total_sprints: totalSprints, presupuesto_bac: bacTotal, story_points_total: totalSP
        })
      });
    } catch(e) { console.warn('Error build/live:', e); }

    // Rellenar tablas BUILD individuales desde pipeline_data
    try { await authFetch(API_BASE + '/pipeline/sessions/' + (currentPipelineSessionId || '') + '/populate', { method: 'POST' }); } catch(e) { console.warn('populate tables:', e); }

    launchBtn.textContent = '✓ Proyecto lanzado — Sprint 1 activo';
    launchBtn.style.background = '#22c55e';
    launchBtn.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
    var lsec = document.getElementById('launch-section-final');
    if(lsec) { lsec.style.borderColor = 'rgba(34,197,94,0.6)'; lsec.style.background = 'rgba(34,197,94,0.1)'; }
    var lwarn = document.getElementById('launch-warning-final');
    if(lwarn) { lwarn.textContent = '✓ BUILD LIVE · PM '+(pmData.nombre||'')+' notificado · Sprint 1 activo · Daily 9:15 programado · Gate G2'; lwarn.style.color = '#22c55e'; lwarn.style.fontWeight = '600'; }
    if (typeof loadBuildLive === 'function') loadBuildLive();
  };

  // Append launch button into launch section
  pauseArea.appendChild(finalDiv);
  var lsecEl = document.getElementById('launch-section-final');
  if(lsecEl) lsecEl.insertBefore(launchBtn, document.getElementById('launch-warning-final'));

  // Asignar onclick de tabs DESPUÉS de insertar en DOM (fix para llamadas múltiples)
  setTimeout(function() {
    var pa = document.getElementById('build-pause-area');
    if (!pa || !pa.children[0]) return;
    var fd2 = pa.children[0];
    var tb2 = fd2.children[1];
    if (!tb2 || !tb2.children[0] || !tb2.children[0].getAttribute('data-tab-idx')) return;
    tb2.onclick = function(e) {
      var target = e.target;
      var idx = parseInt(target.getAttribute('data-tab-idx'));
      if (isNaN(idx)) return;
      Array.from(tb2.children).forEach(function(b){b.style.background='#1a1d24';b.style.borderColor='#333840';b.style.color='#8b8f98';});
      target.style.background='#22262e';target.style.borderColor='#3a3f4a';target.style.color='#e8e9ed';
      var ml = tb2.parentNode.querySelector('div[style*="grid-template-columns"]');
      if(ml && ml.children[0]) Array.from(ml.children[0].children).forEach(function(tc,ti){tc.style.display=ti===idx?'block':'none';});
      if(ml){if(idx===2){ml.style.gridTemplateColumns='1fr';if(ml.children[1])ml.children[1].style.display='none';}else{ml.style.gridTemplateColumns='1fr 280px';if(ml.children[1])ml.children[1].style.display='block';}}
    };
  }, 50);
  // If launched from gov-build, show return button
  if(localStorage.getItem('cpm_return_to')==='gov-build'){
    var bpa=document.getElementById('build-pause-area');
    if(bpa){var bb=document.createElement('div');bb.style.cssText='text-align:center;margin-top:16px;padding:12px;';bb.innerHTML='<button onclick="localStorage.removeItem(\'cpm_return_to\');window.location.href=\'/gov-build.html\'" style="padding:12px 28px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22c55e,#16a34a);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(34,197,94,.3);">\u2713 Volver a Gobernanza BUILD</button>';bpa.appendChild(bb);}
  }
}

function _parseBuildResult(chainResult) {
  var result = chainResult.result || '';
  var s = chainResult.structured || {};
  var plan = s.plan || {};
  var planData = plan.plan_data || {};

  var data = {
    project_id: plan.id_proyecto || '',
    project_name: plan.nombre || '',
    plan_id: plan.plan_id || '',
    duration_weeks: planData.duracion_total_semanas || plan.duracion_semanas || 0,
    duration_sequential: planData.duracion_secuencial_semanas || 0,
    saving_weeks: planData.ahorro_semanas || 0,
    budget: plan.presupuesto || 0,
    pm: planData.pm || '',
    priority: plan.prioridad || '',
    edt: [],
    team: [],
    gantt: [],
    kanban_tasks: [],
    cycle_back: false,
    blocked: false,
    agents_used: chainResult.agents || [],
    critical_path: planData.ruta_critica || []
  };

  // EDT from plan_data
  if (planData.edt && Array.isArray(planData.edt)) {
    planData.edt.forEach(function(pkg) {
      var totalHoras = 0;
      var subtareas = pkg.subtareas || [];
      subtareas.forEach(function(st) { totalHoras += (st.horas || 0); });
      data.edt.push({
        id: pkg.id || '',
        nombre: pkg.nombre || '',
        horas: totalHoras || pkg.horas || 0,
        responsable: pkg.responsable || '',
        subtareas: subtareas
      });
    });
  }

  // If no structured EDT, try to extract from Mermaid or text
  if (data.edt.length === 0 && planData.gantt_mermaid) {
    var mermaid = planData.gantt_mermaid;
    var sectionRegex = /section\s+(.+)/g;
    var match;
    var idx = 1;
    while ((match = sectionRegex.exec(mermaid)) !== null) {
      data.edt.push({id: idx + '.0', nombre: match[1].trim(), horas: 0, responsable: ''});
      idx++;
    }
  }

  // Fallback EDT from text if nothing structured
  if (data.edt.length === 0) {
    var edtLines = result.match(/\d+\.\d[^\n]+/g) || [];
    edtLines = edtLines.filter(function(line) {
      if (line.match(/,\s*after\s/)) return false;
      if (line.match(/,\s*\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/)) return false;
      if (line.match(/,\s*\d+[dwm]\s*$/)) return false;
      if (line.match(/^\d+\.\d\s*,/)) return false;
      if (line.match(/→.*→.*→/)) return false;
      return true;
    });
    edtLines.forEach(function(line) {
      var m = line.match(/(\d+\.\d)\s*[-|:.]?\s*(.+)/);
      if (m) {
        var nombre = m[2].replace(/\*+/g, '').trim();
        var hoursM = nombre.match(/\((\d+)h?\)/);
        var hours = hoursM ? parseInt(hoursM[1]) : 0;
        nombre = nombre.replace(/\(\d+h?\)/, '').trim();
        if (nombre.length > 3 && nombre.length < 120) {
          data.edt.push({id: m[1], nombre: nombre, horas: hours});
        }
      }
    });
  }

  // Gantt data from EDT
  if (data.edt.length > 0) {
    var totalW = data.duration_weeks || 40;
    var numPkgs = data.edt.length;
    var totalHoras = data.edt.reduce(function(s2,p) { return s2 + (p.horas || 0); }, 0) || 1;
    var currentWeek = 0;
    data.edt.forEach(function(pkg, i) {
      var proportion = (pkg.horas || totalHoras/numPkgs) / totalHoras;
      var weeks = Math.max(2, Math.round(proportion * totalW));
      var isCrit = data.critical_path.indexOf(pkg.id) >= 0;
      var isParallel = false;
      if (pkg.subtareas) {
        pkg.subtareas.forEach(function(st) {
          if (st.paralela_con && st.paralela_con.length > 0) isParallel = true;
        });
      }
      var startWeek = currentWeek;
      if (isParallel && i > 0) {
        startWeek = Math.max(0, currentWeek - Math.round(weeks * 0.5));
      }
      data.gantt.push({
        id: pkg.id,
        nombre: pkg.nombre,
        startWeek: startWeek,
        weeks: weeks,
        isCrit: isCrit,
        isParallel: isParallel
      });
      currentWeek = startWeek + weeks;
    });
  }

  // Team from structured data
  if (s.team && Array.isArray(s.team)) {
    s.team.forEach(function(t) {
      data.team.push({
        id: t.id_recurso || t.id || '',
        nombre: t.nombre || '',
        nivel: t.nivel || '',
        silo: t.silo_especialidad || t.silo || '',
        carga: t.carga_actual || 0,
        skill: t.skill_principal || ''
      });
    });
  }

  // Kanban from structured data
  if (s.tasks && Array.isArray(s.tasks)) {
    s.tasks.forEach(function(t) {
      data.kanban_tasks.push({
        id: t.id || '',
        titulo: t.titulo || '',
        columna: t.columna || 'Backlog',
        tecnico: t.id_tecnico || ''
      });
    });
  }

  // Budget
  if (s.budget) {
    data.budget_breakdown = s.budget;
  } else {
    data.budget_breakdown = null;
  }

  // Detect problems from text as fallback
  if (result.toLowerCase().indexOf('cycle_back') >= 0 || result.indexOf('IMPOSIBLE') >= 0) data.cycle_back = true;
  if (result.indexOf('BLOQUEADO') >= 0 || result.indexOf('NO PLANIFICABLE') >= 0) data.blocked = true;

  // Duration fallback from text if not in structured
  if (!data.duration_weeks) {
    var durMatch = result.match(/(\d+)\s*semanas/);
    if (durMatch) data.duration_weeks = parseInt(durMatch[1]);
  }

  return data;
}

function _renderBuildDashboardContent(container, data) {
  var html = '';

  // 2. Project summary
  var prioClass = data.priority === 'Alta' || data.priority === 'Crítica' ? 'priority-alta' : data.priority === 'Media' ? 'priority-media' : '';
  var budgetStr = data.budget ? data.budget.toLocaleString('es-ES') + '€' : '—';
  html += '<div class="build-summary"><div class="build-summary-title">' + escHtml(data.project_name || 'Proyecto') + '</div>';
  html += '<div class="build-summary-grid">';
  html += '<div class="build-summary-item"><div class="bsi-label">Plan</div><div class="bsi-value">' + escHtml(data.plan_id || '—') + '</div></div>';
  html += '<div class="build-summary-item"><div class="bsi-label">Duración</div><div class="bsi-value duration">' + (data.duration_weeks || '—') + ' sem</div></div>';
  html += '<div class="build-summary-item"><div class="bsi-label">Presupuesto</div><div class="bsi-value budget">' + budgetStr + '</div></div>';
  html += '<div class="build-summary-item"><div class="bsi-label">Prioridad</div><div class="bsi-value ' + prioClass + '">' + escHtml(data.priority || '—') + '</div></div>';
  if (data.saving_weeks > 0) html += '<div class="build-summary-item"><div class="bsi-label">Ahorro</div><div class="bsi-value" style="color:#22c55e;">' + data.saving_weeks + ' sem</div></div>';
  if (data.duration_sequential > 0) html += '<div class="build-summary-item"><div class="bsi-label">Secuencial</div><div class="bsi-value" style="color:#8b8f98;">' + data.duration_sequential + ' sem</div></div>';
  html += '</div>';

  // Budget breakdown
  if (data.budget_breakdown) {
    var bb = data.budget_breakdown;
    html += '<div style="margin-top:10px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid #333840;">';
    html += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:#8b8f98;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Desglose presupuestario</div>';
    html += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(100px,1fr));gap:6px;">';
    var items = [
      {l:'Labor',v:bb.total_labor,c:'#22c55e'},
      {l:'CAPEX',v:bb.total_capex,c:'#3b82f6'},
      {l:'OPEX',v:bb.total_opex,c:'#eab308'},
      {l:'RRHH',v:bb.total_rrhh,c:'#a855f7'},
      {l:'Reservas',v:bb.total_reservas,c:'#8b8f98'},
      {l:'BAC Total',v:bb.bac_total,c:'#22c55e'}
    ];
    items.forEach(function(it) {
      if (it.v) {
        html += '<div style="background:#181b20;border-radius:4px;padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;">';
        html += '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#8b8f98;">' + it.l + '</div>';
        html += '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:' + it.c + ';">' + Number(it.v).toLocaleString('es-ES') + '\u20ac</div>';
        html += '</div>';
      }
    });
    html += '</div></div>';
  }

  html += '</div>';

  // 3. Alert if cycle_back/blocked
  if (data.cycle_back || data.blocked) {
    var alertClass = data.blocked ? 'build-alert' : 'build-alert warning';
    html += '<div class="' + alertClass + '"><div class="build-alert-title">' + (data.blocked ? '✕ PROYECTO BLOQUEADO' : '⟲ AJUSTE DE RECURSOS NECESARIO') + '</div>';
    html += '<div class="build-alert-detail">' + (data.blocked ? 'No se puede planificar sin equipo formado.' : 'El Resource Manager necesita ajustar el equipo.') + '</div></div>';
  }

  // 4. Team
  if (data.team.length > 0) {
    html += '<div class="build-section-title">Equipo formado por AG-006 (' + data.team.length + ' miembros)</div>';
    html += '<div class="build-team">';
    data.team.forEach(function(t) {
      var initials = (t.nombre || '??').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0];}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
      html += '<div class="build-team-card"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">';
      html += '<div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(59,130,246,.2);color:#3b82f6;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;">' + initials + '</div>';
      html += '<div><div class="btc-name">' + escHtml(t.nombre) + '</div>';
      html += '<div class="btc-level">' + escHtml(t.id) + ' · ' + escHtml(t.nivel) + '</div></div></div></div>';
    });
    html += '</div>';
  }

  // 5. EDT
  if (data.edt.length > 0) {
    var totalHours = data.edt.reduce(function(s,p){return s+(p.horas||0);}, 0);
    html += '<div class="build-section-title">EDT/WBS — AG-005 Estratega</div>';
    html += '<div class="build-edt"><div class="build-edt-stats"><strong>' + data.edt.length + ' paquetes</strong>';
    if (totalHours > 0) html += ' | ' + totalHours + 'h estimadas';
    html += '</div>';
    data.edt.forEach(function(pkg) {
      var isCrit = data.critical_path.indexOf(pkg.id) >= 0;
      html += '<div class="build-edt-package"><div class="build-edt-pkg-header">';
      html += '<span style="color:' + (isCrit ? '#eab308' : '#e4e5e9') + ';">' + escHtml(pkg.id) + ' ' + escHtml(pkg.nombre) + '</span>';
      if (pkg.horas) html += '<span class="pkg-hours">(' + pkg.horas + 'h)</span>';
      html += '</div></div>';
    });
    html += '</div>';
  }

  // 6. Gantt
  if (data.gantt.length > 0 && !data.blocked) {
    var totalW = data.duration_weeks || 40;
    var seqW = data.duration_sequential || Math.round(totalW * 1.3);
    var saveW = data.saving_weeks || (seqW - totalW);
    var maxWeek = 0;
    data.gantt.forEach(function(g) { if (g.startWeek + g.weeks > maxWeek) maxWeek = g.startWeek + g.weeks; });
    if (maxWeek === 0) maxWeek = totalW;

    html += '<div class="build-section-title">Gantt con paralelización — AG-007</div>';
    html += '<div class="build-gantt">';
    html += '<div class="build-gantt-note">Tareas sin dependencias se ejecutan en paralelo. Proyecto compactado de ' + seqW + ' a ' + totalW + ' semanas.</div>';

    data.gantt.forEach(function(g) {
      var leftPct = Math.round((g.startWeek / maxWeek) * 100);
      var widthPct = Math.max(5, Math.round((g.weeks / maxWeek) * 100));
      var barClass = g.isCrit ? 'crit' : (g.isParallel ? 'parallel' : 'norm');
      var label = 'S' + (g.startWeek + 1) + '-' + (g.startWeek + g.weeks);
      html += '<div class="build-gantt-row">';
      html += '<div class="build-gantt-label">' + escHtml(g.id + ' ' + (g.nombre || '').substring(0, 20)) + '</div>';
      html += '<div class="build-gantt-track"><div class="build-gantt-bar ' + barClass + '" style="left:' + leftPct + '%;width:' + widthPct + '%;">' + label + '</div></div>';
      html += '</div>';
    });

    html += '<div class="build-gantt-legend"><span><span class="dot" style="background:#eab308"></span>Ruta crítica</span>';
    html += '<span><span class="dot" style="background:#3b82f6"></span>Con holgura</span>';
    html += '<span><span class="dot" style="background:#a78bfa"></span>Paralela</span>';
    html += '<span class="saving">' + totalW + ' sem (ahorro: ' + saveW + ' sem)</span></div>';
    html += '</div>';
  }

  // 7. Kanban
  if (data.kanban_tasks.length > 0) {
    var cols = {'Backlog':[],'En Progreso':[],'En Revisión':[],'Done':[]};
    data.kanban_tasks.forEach(function(t) { var c = cols[t.columna] ? t.columna : 'Backlog'; cols[c].push(t); });
    html += '<div class="build-section-title">Kanban (Fase 1)</div><div class="build-kanban">';
    ['Backlog','En Progreso','En Revisión','Done'].forEach(function(cn) {
      html += '<div class="build-kanban-col"><div class="build-kanban-header">' + cn + '</div><div class="build-kanban-body">';
      (cols[cn]||[]).forEach(function(t) {
        html += '<div class="build-kanban-card"><div class="bkc-title">' + escHtml((t.titulo||'').substring(0,35)) + '</div>';
        if (t.tecnico) html += '<div class="bkc-tech">' + escHtml(t.tecnico) + '</div>';
        html += '</div>';
      });
      html += '</div></div>';
    });
    html += '</div>';
  }

  // 8. Activity log
  html += '<div class="build-section-title">Panel de actividad</div><div class="build-log">';
  html += '<div class="build-log-entry"><span class="build-log-time">00:00</span><span class="build-log-agent estratega">AG-005</span><span>Pipeline BUILD iniciado</span></div>';
  html += '<div class="build-log-entry"><span class="build-log-time">00:02</span><span class="build-log-agent estratega">AG-005</span><span class="build-log-tool">tool: decompose_pmbok(' + data.edt.length + ' paquetes)</span></div>';
  html += '<div class="build-log-entry"><span class="build-log-time">00:05</span><span class="build-log-agent resource">AG-006</span><span>' + (data.team.length > 0 ? 'Equipo formado: ' + data.team.length + ' miembros' : 'Buscando recursos...') + '</span></div>';
  if (data.cycle_back) {
    html += '<div class="build-log-entry"><span class="build-log-time">00:07</span><span class="build-log-agent resource">AG-006</span><span class="build-log-warn">Cycle back: ajuste de recursos necesario</span></div>';
  }
  if (!data.blocked) {
    html += '<div class="build-log-entry"><span class="build-log-time">00:10</span><span class="build-log-agent planificador">AG-007</span><span class="build-log-tool">tool: calc_critical_path()</span></div>';
    html += '<div class="build-log-entry"><span class="build-log-time">00:12</span><span class="build-log-agent planificador">AG-007</span><span class="build-log-success">Gantt generado. ' + (data.duration_weeks || '?') + ' semanas optimizadas.</span></div>';
  } else {
    html += '<div class="build-log-entry"><span class="build-log-time">00:10</span><span class="build-log-agent planificador">AG-007</span><span class="build-log-error">BLOQUEADO: Sin equipo formado.</span></div>';
  }
  html += '<div class="build-log-entry"><span class="build-log-time">00:15</span><span class="build-log-agent estratega">CHAIN</span><span class="build-log-success">Pipeline BUILD completado</span></div>';
  html += '</div>';

  container.innerHTML = html;
}

async function executePipeline(mode) {
  var input = document.getElementById(mode+'-input');
  var text = input.value.trim();
  if (!text) { input.focus(); return; }

  if (mode === 'run') {
    return executeRunPipeline(text);
  }

  if (mode === 'build') {
    return executeBuildPipeline(text);
  }

  const agents = BUILD_AGENTS;
  const execBtn = document.getElementById(mode+'-exec-btn');
  const statusEl = document.getElementById(mode+'-status-val');
  const tasksEl = document.getElementById(mode+'-tasks');
  const histEl = document.getElementById(mode+'-hist');
  execBtn.disabled = true;
  statusEl.textContent = 'Running';
  statusEl.style.color = 'var(--blue)';

  const area = document.getElementById(mode+'-pipeline-area');
  // Hide idle flow diagram for RUN mode
  const idleEl = document.getElementById(mode+'-pipeline-idle');
  if (idleEl) idleEl.style.display = 'none';
  // Remove old steps if any, then create new
  const oldSteps = document.getElementById(mode+'-steps');
  if (oldSteps) oldSteps.remove();
  const stepsContainer = document.createElement('div');
  stepsContainer.className = 'pipeline-steps';
  stepsContainer.id = mode+'-steps';
  area.appendChild(stepsContainer);
  const stepsDiv = stepsContainer;

  agents.forEach((ag,i) => {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'pipeline-step';
    div.id = mode+'-step-'+i;
    div.innerHTML = `
      <div class="step-header">
        <div class="agent-icon">${AGENT_ICONS[ag.id]}</div>
        <div class="step-info">
          <div class="step-name">${ag.id} — ${ag.name}</div>
          <div class="step-sub">${ag.sub}</div>
        </div>
        <span class="step-status status-pending" id="${mode}-step-status-${i}">Pendiente</span>
      </div>
      <div class="step-content" id="${mode}-step-content-${i}" style="display:none;">
        <div class="step-desc" id="${mode}-step-desc-${i}"></div>
        <div class="step-json-wrap">
          <button class="json-toggle-btn" onclick="toggleJson('${mode}-json-${i}')">
            <span class="arr">▶</span>&nbsp;Respuesta JSON completa
          </button>
          <pre class="json-pre" id="${mode}-json-${i}"></pre>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    stepsDiv.appendChild(div);
  });

  tasksEl.innerHTML = agents.map((ag,i)=>`<div class="task-item">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;">
      <div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;">${AGENT_ICONS[ag.id].replace('width:40px;height:40px;','width:22px;height:22px;')}</div>
      <div class="task-title" style="color:${ag.color};">${ag.id}: ${ag.name}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="task-meta"><span class="step-status status-pending" id="${mode}-task-${i}">Pendiente</span></div>
  </div>`).join('');

  let prevOutput = text;
  let prevFull = null;
  const timestamp = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-ES',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});

  for (let i=0; i<agents.length; i++) {
    const ag = agents[i];
    const stepEl = document.getElementById(mode+'-step-'+i);
    const statusBadge = document.getElementById(mode+'-step-status-'+i);
    const taskBadge = document.getElementById(mode+'-task-'+i);
    const contentEl = document.getElementById(mode+'-step-content-'+i);
    const descEl = document.getElementById(mode+'-step-desc-'+i);
    const jsonEl = document.getElementById(mode+'-json-'+i);

    stepEl.classList.add('running');
    statusBadge.textContent='Ejecutando...';
    statusBadge.className='step-status status-running';
    if(taskBadge){taskBadge.textContent='Ejecutando...';taskBadge.className='step-status status-running';}
    contentEl.style.display='block';
    descEl.innerHTML='<div class="typing-wrap"><div class="typing-dot"></div><div class="typing-dot"></div><div class="typing-dot"></div></div>';

    const question = i===0 ? text
      : `Entrada original: "${text}"\n\nSalida ${agents[i-1].id} (${agents[i-1].name}):\n${prevOutput}`;

    try {
      const resp = await callFlowise(ag.id, question);
      const textOut = resp.text || resp.answer || resp.output || JSON.stringify(resp);
      prevOutput = textOut;
      prevFull = resp;

      descEl.innerHTML = fmtMd(textOut);
      jsonEl.innerHTML = syntaxJson(resp);
    } catch(e) {
      descEl.innerHTML = `<div style="color:var(--red);font-size:12px;padding:4px 0;">⚠ ${escHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
      jsonEl.innerHTML = escHtml(e.message);
      prevOutput = 'Error en '+ag.id;
    }

    stepEl.classList.remove('running');
    statusBadge.textContent='✓ Completado';
    statusBadge.className='step-status status-done';
    stepEl.classList.add('done');
    if(taskBadge){taskBadge.textContent='✓';taskBadge.className='step-status status-done';}
  }

  pipelineHistory[mode].unshift({text:text.substring(0,50), time:timestamp, agents:agents.length});
  histEl.innerHTML = pipelineHistory[mode].slice(0,5).map(h=>`<div class="hist-item">
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:2px;">${escHtml(h.text)}...</div>
    <div class="hist-time">${h.time} · ${h.agents} agentes</div>
  </div>`).join('');
  execBtn.disabled=false;
  statusEl.textContent='Idle';
  statusEl.style.color='var(--yellow)';
  // Update AI insight panels with simulated post-run data
  const totalAgents = agents.length;
  const confPct = (75 + Math.floor(Math.random()*20))+'%';
  const slaRisk = Math.floor(Math.random()*3);
  const auditCount = pipelineHistory[mode].length;
  const setEl = (id,v)=>{ const e=document.getElementById(id); if(e) e.textContent=v; };
  setEl(mode+'-ai-insights', totalAgents+' generados');
  setEl(mode+'-ai-conf', confPct);
  setEl(mode+'-sla-risk', slaRisk === 0 ? 'Ninguno' : slaRisk+' detectados');
  setEl(mode+'-sla-alert', slaRisk === 0 ? 'Verde' : slaRisk < 2 ? 'Amarillo' : 'Rojo');
  setEl(mode+'-kedb-conf', '0 activos');
  setEl(mode+'-kedb-res', totalAgents+' prop.');
  setEl(mode+'-res-util', (60+Math.floor(Math.random()*25))+'%');
  setEl(mode+'-res-opt', Math.random()>.5 ? 'Óptima' : 'Mejorable');
  setEl(mode+'-audit-count', auditCount+' entr.');
  setEl(mode+'-audit-last', timestamp);
}

function resetPipeline(mode) {
  document.getElementById(mode+'-input').value='';
  if (mode === 'run') {
    // Restore the visual flow diagram
    const idle = document.getElementById('run-pipeline-idle');
    if (idle) idle.style.display = '';
    // Remove any pipeline-steps that were added
    const steps = document.getElementById('run-steps');
    if (steps) steps.remove();
  } else {
    document.getElementById(mode+'-pipeline-area').innerHTML=`<div class="pipeline-idle"><div class="pipeline-idle-icon">⚙️</div><div class="pipeline-idle-title">Pipeline Inactivo</div><div class="pipeline-idle-sub">Ingresa un texto y ejecuta el pipeline para comenzar la cascada de agentes IA</div></div>`;
  }
  document.getElementById(mode+'-tasks').innerHTML='<div class="no-data"><div class="no-data-icon">🕐</div>No hay tareas activas</div>';
  document.getElementById(mode+'-status-val').textContent='Idle';
  document.getElementById(mode+'-status-val').style.color='var(--yellow)';
  document.getElementById(mode+'-exec-btn').disabled=false;
  // Reset ITSM form fields if run
  if (mode === 'run') {
    document.getElementById('itsm-ticket-id').textContent = '';
    document.getElementById('itsm-catalogo').value = '';
    document.getElementById('itsm-info-bar').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('itsm-impacto').value = 'Medio';
    document.getElementById('itsm-urgencia').value = 'Media';
    itsmCalcPriority();
    // Reset SSE components
    document.getElementById('sse-sla-counter').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('sse-tasks-area').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('sse-tasks-list').innerHTML = '';
    document.getElementById('sse-kanban-mini').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('sse-kb-backlog').innerHTML = '';
    document.getElementById('sse-kb-progress').innerHTML = '';
    document.getElementById('sse-kb-review').innerHTML = '';
    document.getElementById('sse-kb-done').innerHTML = '';
    document.getElementById('sse-log').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('sse-log').innerHTML = '';
    if (typeof _sseTimer !== 'undefined' && _sseTimer) clearInterval(_sseTimer);
  }
}

// ── SSE RUN PIPELINE ──
var _sseTimer = null;
var _sseStartTime = null;
var _sseDeadline = null;

function executeRunSSE(text) {
  var execBtn = document.getElementById('run-exec-btn');
  var statusEl = document.getElementById('run-status-val');
  execBtn.disabled = true;
  statusEl.textContent = 'Running';
  statusEl.style.color = 'var(--blue)';

  // Setup pipeline steps UI
  var area = document.getElementById('run-pipeline-area');
  var idleEl = document.getElementById('run-pipeline-idle');
  if (idleEl) idleEl.style.display = 'none';
  var oldSteps = document.getElementById('run-steps');
  if (oldSteps) oldSteps.remove();

  var stepsDiv = document.createElement('div');
  stepsDiv.className = 'pipeline-steps';
  stepsDiv.id = 'run-steps';
  area.appendChild(stepsDiv);

  // Create step elements for AG-001, AG-002, AG-004
  var sseAgents = [
    {id:'AG-001', name:'Dispatcher', color:'#3b82f6', iconKey:'AG1'},
    {id:'AG-002', name:'Resource Manager', color:'#8b5cf6', iconKey:'AG2'},
    {id:'AG-004', name:'Buffer Gatekeeper', color:'#f59e0b', iconKey:'AG4'}
  ];

  sseAgents.forEach(function(ag, i) {
    var div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'pipeline-step';
    div.id = 'sse-step-' + ag.id;
    var iconHtml = AGENT_ICONS[ag.iconKey] || '';
    div.innerHTML = '<div class="step-header">' +
      '<div class="agent-icon">' + iconHtml + '</div>' +
      '<div class="step-info"><div class="step-name">' + ag.id + ' &mdash; ' + ag.name + '</div>' +
      '<div class="step-sub" id="sse-step-sub-' + ag.id + '">Esperando...</div></div>' +
      '<span class="step-status status-pending" id="sse-status-' + ag.id + '">Pendiente</span></div>' +
      '<div class="step-content" id="sse-content-' + ag.id + '" style="display:none;"></div>';
    stepsDiv.appendChild(div);
    if (i < sseAgents.length - 1) {
      var arrow = document.createElement('div');
      arrow.style.cssText = 'text-align:center;color:var(--text3);font-size:16px;padding:4px 0;';
      arrow.textContent = '\u2193';
      stepsDiv.appendChild(arrow);
    }
  });

  // Reset SSE components
  document.getElementById('sse-tasks-area').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('sse-tasks-list').innerHTML = '';
  document.getElementById('sse-kanban-mini').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('sse-kb-backlog').innerHTML = '';
  document.getElementById('sse-kb-progress').innerHTML = '';
  document.getElementById('sse-kb-review').innerHTML = '';
  document.getElementById('sse-kb-done').innerHTML = '';
  var logEl = document.getElementById('sse-log');
  logEl.style.display = 'block';
  logEl.innerHTML = '';
  document.getElementById('sse-sla-counter').style.display = 'none';
  if (_sseTimer) clearInterval(_sseTimer);

  _sseStartTime = new Date();
  sseLog('SYSTEM', 'Pipeline RUN iniciado', '#39c5cf');

  // Connect SSE
  var token = AUTH_TOKEN || '';
  var url = API_BASE + '/agents/run/chain/stream?message=' + encodeURIComponent(text) + '&session_id=pipeline-' + Date.now() + '&token=' + encodeURIComponent(token);

  var es = new EventSource(url);

  es.onmessage = function(e) {
    try {
      var data = JSON.parse(e.data);
      handleSSEEvent(data);
    } catch(err) {
      console.error('SSE parse error:', err);
    }
  };

  es.onerror = function() {
    es.close();
    execBtn.disabled = false;
    statusEl.textContent = 'Idle';
    statusEl.style.color = 'var(--yellow)';
    sseLog('SYSTEM', 'Pipeline completado', '#3fb950');
  };
}

function handleSSEEvent(data) {
  var ev = data.event;

  if (ev === 'agent_start') {
    var step = document.getElementById('sse-step-' + data.agent_id);
    if (step) {
      step.classList.add('sse-working');
      var status = document.getElementById('sse-status-' + data.agent_id);
      if (status) { status.textContent = 'Ejecutando...'; status.className = 'step-status status-running'; }
      var sub = document.getElementById('sse-step-sub-' + data.agent_id);
      if (sub) sub.textContent = 'Procesando...';
    }
    sseLog(data.agent_name || data.agent_id, 'Iniciado', data.color || '#3b82f6');
  }

  else if (ev === 'agent_complete') {
    var step = document.getElementById('sse-step-' + data.agent_id);
    if (step) {
      step.classList.remove('sse-working');
      step.classList.add('sse-done');
      var status = document.getElementById('sse-status-' + data.agent_id);
      if (status) { status.textContent = '\u2713 Completado'; status.className = 'step-status status-done'; }
      var content = document.getElementById('sse-content-' + data.agent_id);
      if (content && data.response_preview) {
        content.style.display = 'block';
        content.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);padding:8px;max-height:150px;overflow-y:auto;">' + fmtMd(data.response_preview) + '</div>';
      }
    }
    sseLog(data.agent_id, '\u2713 Completado', '#3fb950');
  }

  else if (ev === 'agent_skip') {
    var step = document.getElementById('sse-step-' + data.agent_id);
    if (step) {
      step.classList.add('sse-skipped');
      var status = document.getElementById('sse-status-' + data.agent_id);
      if (status) { status.textContent = 'No requerido'; status.className = 'step-status'; status.style.color = '#484f58'; }
      var sub = document.getElementById('sse-step-sub-' + data.agent_id);
      if (sub) sub.textContent = data.reason || 'Saltado';
    }
    sseLog(data.agent_id, 'Saltado \u2014 ' + (data.reason || ''), '#484f58');
  }

  else if (ev === 'tool_call') {
    sseLog(data.agent_id, 'tool: ' + data.tool + '(' + (data.input || '').substring(0, 60) + ')', '#3fb950');
  }

  else if (ev === 'field_update') {
    if (data.field === 'priority') {
      var prioEl = document.getElementById('itsm-prio-calc');
      if (prioEl) {
        prioEl.textContent = data.value;
        var colors = {P1:'var(--red)',P2:'var(--orange)',P3:'var(--yellow)',P4:'var(--green)'};
        prioEl.style.color = colors[data.value] || 'var(--text)';
        prioEl.style.borderColor = colors[data.value] || 'var(--border)';
      }
    }
    if (data.field === 'ticket_id') {
      var ticketEl = document.getElementById('itsm-ticket-id');
      if (ticketEl) ticketEl.textContent = data.value;
    }
    sseLog('FIELD', data.field + ' = ' + data.value, '#39c5cf');
  }

  else if (ev === 'sla_started') {
    startSLACounter(data.priority, data.sla_hours, data.start, data.deadline);
  }

  else if (ev === 'task_created') {
    var tasksArea = document.getElementById('sse-tasks-area');
    tasksArea.style.display = 'block';
    var list = document.getElementById('sse-tasks-list');
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'sse-task-card';
    card.id = 'sse-task-' + data.task_id;
    card.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">' +
      '<div style="font-weight:600;font-size:12px;">' + escHtml(data.titulo) + '</div>' +
      '<span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">' + escHtml(data.task_id) + '</span></div>' +
      '<div class="tech-placeholder" id="sse-tech-' + data.task_id + '">' +
        '<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 6v6l4 2"/></svg> Buscando t\u00e9cnico...' +
      '</div>';
    list.appendChild(card);
  }

  else if (ev === 'technician_assigned') {
    var techEl = document.getElementById('sse-tech-' + data.task_id);
    if (techEl) {
      var initials = (data.tecnico || '??').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0];}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
      techEl.className = 'tech-assigned';
      techEl.innerHTML = '<div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:#3fb950;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;">' + initials + '</div>' +
        '<span style="font-weight:600;">' + escHtml(data.tecnico) + '</span>' +
        '<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">(' + escHtml(data.id_recurso) + ' \u00b7 ' + escHtml(data.nivel) + ')</span>';
    }
    sseLog('AG-002', 'Asignado: ' + data.tecnico + ' \u2192 ' + data.task_id, '#8b5cf6');
  }

  else if (ev === 'kanban_update') {
    var kbDiv = document.getElementById('sse-kanban-mini');
    kbDiv.style.display = 'grid';
    var tasks = data.tasks || [];
    tasks.forEach(function(t, i) {
      var col = i === 0 ? 'sse-kb-progress' : 'sse-kb-backlog';
      var colEl = document.getElementById(col);
      if (colEl) {
        var card = document.createElement('div');
        card.className = 'sse-kanban-card';
        card.textContent = (t.titulo || t.task_id || '').substring(0, 35);
        colEl.appendChild(card);
      }
    });
  }

  else if (ev === 'buffer_options') {
    sseLog('AG-004', 'Buffer: ' + (data.response || '').substring(0, 100), '#f59e0b');
  }

  else if (ev === 'chain_complete') {
    var execBtn = document.getElementById('run-exec-btn');
    var statusEl = document.getElementById('run-status-val');
    if (execBtn) execBtn.disabled = false;
    if (statusEl) { statusEl.textContent = 'Idle'; statusEl.style.color = 'var(--yellow)'; }
    sseLog('SYSTEM', 'Cadena completada: ' + (data.agents_used || []).join(' \u2192 '), '#3fb950');
  }

  else if (ev === 'error') {
    sseLog('ERROR', data.message || 'Error desconocido', '#f85149');
  }
}

function sseLog(agent, msg, color) {
  var logEl = document.getElementById('sse-log');
  if (!logEl) return;
  var elapsed = _sseStartTime ? Math.floor((Date.now() - _sseStartTime.getTime()) / 1000) : 0;
  var mm = String(Math.floor(elapsed / 60)).padStart(2, '0');
  var ss = String(elapsed % 60).padStart(2, '0');
  var line = document.createElement('div');
  line.className = 'log-line';
  line.innerHTML = '<span class="log-ts">' + mm + ':' + ss + '</span>' +
    '<span class="log-agent" style="color:' + (color || 'var(--text2)') + ';">' + escHtml(agent) + '</span>' +
    '<span>' + escHtml(msg) + '</span>';
  logEl.appendChild(line);
  logEl.scrollTop = logEl.scrollHeight;
}

function startSLACounter(priority, hours, startStr, deadlineStr) {
  var counter = document.getElementById('sse-sla-counter');
  counter.style.display = 'block';
  var colors = {P1:'#ef4444',P2:'#f59e0b',P3:'#eab308',P4:'#3fb950'};
  var c = colors[priority] || '#3fb950';
  document.getElementById('sse-sla-digits').style.color = c;
  document.getElementById('sse-sla-bar-fill').style.background = c;
  document.getElementById('sse-sla-label').textContent = 'SLA ' + priority + ' \u2014 ' + hours + 'h';
  document.getElementById('sse-sla-label').style.color = c;

  _sseDeadline = new Date(deadlineStr);
  var startDate = new Date(startStr);
  document.getElementById('sse-sla-start').textContent = 'Inicio: ' + startDate.toLocaleTimeString('es-ES');
  document.getElementById('sse-sla-end').textContent = 'L\u00edmite: ' + _sseDeadline.toLocaleTimeString('es-ES') + ' ' + _sseDeadline.toLocaleDateString('es-ES');

  var totalMs = hours * 3600000;
  if (_sseTimer) clearInterval(_sseTimer);
  _sseTimer = setInterval(function() {
    var now = new Date();
    var remaining = _sseDeadline.getTime() - now.getTime();
    if (remaining <= 0) {
      document.getElementById('sse-sla-digits').textContent = '00:00:00 EXPIRADO';
      document.getElementById('sse-sla-bar-fill').style.width = '100%';
      clearInterval(_sseTimer);
      return;
    }
    var h = Math.floor(remaining / 3600000);
    var m = Math.floor((remaining % 3600000) / 60000);
    var s = Math.floor((remaining % 60000) / 1000);
    document.getElementById('sse-sla-digits').textContent = String(h).padStart(2,'0') + ':' + String(m).padStart(2,'0') + ':' + String(s).padStart(2,'0');
    var elapsed = now.getTime() - startDate.getTime();
    var pct = Math.min(100, Math.round(elapsed / totalMs * 100));
    document.getElementById('sse-sla-bar-fill').style.width = pct + '%';
  }, 1000);
}

// ── CONFIG MODAL ──
const ALL_AGENTS_CFG = [...RUN_AGENTS,...BUILD_AGENTS];

async function openConfigModal() {
  showToast('Agentes IA nativos Claude — No requiere configuración Flowise');
}
function closeConfigModal(){ document.getElementById('config-modal').classList.remove('open'); }

async function saveConfig() {
  const config={};
  ALL_AGENTS_CFG.forEach(ag=>{
    const el=document.getElementById('cf-input-'+ag.id);
    if(el) config[ag.id]=el.value.trim();
  });
  try {
    await authFetch(`${API_BASE}/api/flowise/config`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({config})});
    showToast('✓ Chatflows guardados en el servidor');
  } catch(e){ showToast('⚠ Error guardando: '+e.message); return; }
  closeConfigModal();
}

async function fetchFlowiseFlows() {
  const btn=document.getElementById('fetch-btn');
  const container=document.getElementById('fetched-flows');
  btn.textContent='⏳ Cargando...';
  btn.disabled=true;
  container.style.display='block';
  container.innerHTML='<div style="padding:10px;color:var(--text2);font-size:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><span class="loading-spinner"></span>Conectando a Flowise...</div>';
  try {
    const resp=await authFetch(`${API_BASE}/api/flowise/chatflows`);
    if(!resp.ok){ const e=await resp.json(); throw new Error(e.detail||'HTTP '+resp.status); }
    const flows=await resp.json();
    if(!flows.length){
      container.innerHTML='<div style="padding:10px;color:var(--text2);font-size:12px;">No se encontraron chatflows</div>';
    } else {
      container.innerHTML='<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);padding:8px 12px 4px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;">'+flows.length+' chatflows disponibles — click para copiar UUID</div>'+
        flows.map(f=>`<div class="fetched-item" onclick="pasteFlowId('${escHtml(f.id)}')">
          <div class="fetched-item-name">${escHtml(f.name||'Sin nombre')}</div>
          <div class="fetched-item-id">${escHtml(f.id)}</div>
        </div>`).join('');
    }
  } catch(e){
    container.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:10px;color:var(--red);font-size:12px;">⚠ ${escHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
  }
  btn.textContent='🔄 Obtener Chatflows';
  btn.disabled=false;
}

function pasteFlowId(id) {
  const focused=ALL_AGENTS_CFG.map(ag=>document.getElementById('cf-input-'+ag.id)).find(el=>el===document.activeElement);
  if(focused){ focused.value=id; showToast('ID pegado — pon el cursor en el campo destino y vuelve a hacer click'); }
  else { navigator.clipboard.writeText(id).catch(()=>{}); showToast('UUID copiado al portapapeles: '+id.substring(0,20)+'...'); }
}

let _toastTm=null;
function showToast(msg){
  const t=document.getElementById('toast');
  t.textContent=msg; t.style.opacity='1';
  clearTimeout(_toastTm);
  _toastTm=setTimeout(()=>{t.style.opacity='0';},3000);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// FORM MODALS — Nuevo Técnico & Nuevo Proyecto
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const SKILL_CATS = [
  {cat:'Git',icon:'⑂',color:'#f97316',skills:['Git: Clonar repositorios','Git: Crear ramas','Git: Commits descriptivos','Git: Resolver conflictos','Git: Pull Requests','Git: Rebase básico']},
  {cat:'Frontend — HTML / CSS / JS',icon:'🎨',color:'#3b82f6',skills:['HTML: Semántica básica','CSS: Flexbox','CSS: Grid Layout','CSS: Media Queries','JS: Manipulación DOM','JS: Fetch / Axios','JS: Array Methods','JS: Async / Await','JS: Debugging']},
  {cat:'API / Backend',icon:'⚙',color:'#8b5cf6',skills:['API: Códigos HTTP','API: Testing con Postman','API: Auth JWT','Backend: Crear Endpoint REST','Backend: Validar Inputs','Backend: Conexión a DB','Backend: Logging errores']},
  {cat:'Testing / QA',icon:'🧪',color:'#06b6d4',skills:['Testing: Escribir Test Unitario','Testing: Ejecutar Test Suite']},
  {cat:'Linux / Sistema',icon:'🐧',color:'#10b981',skills:['Linux: Navegación','Linux: Ver contenido','Linux: Búsqueda (grep)','Linux: Permisos','Linux: Procesos','Linux: Tareas (Crontab)']},
  {cat:'Active Directory',icon:'🏢',color:'#0ea5e9',skills:['AD: Crear Usuario','AD: Reset Password','AD: Deshabilitar Usuario','AD: Grupos Seguridad','AD: Sincronización']},
  {cat:'Redes / VPN',icon:'🌐',color:'#6366f1',skills:['Redes: IP/Gateway','Redes: Ping','Redes: Tracert','Redes: Netstat','Redes: Flush DNS','Redes: DNS Registros','Redes: DHCP Reserva','Redes: Port Security','Redes: BGP','VPN: Configurar Cliente']},
  {cat:'SQL / BBDD',icon:'🗄',color:'#eab308',skills:['SQL: Select Simple','SQL: Where','SQL: Inner Join','SQL: Left Join','SQL: Insert Into','SQL: Update','SQL: Delete','SQL: Backup DB','SQL: Restore DB','SQL: Create Table','SQL: Alter Table']},
  {cat:'Cloud / Docker',icon:'☁',color:'#14b8a6',skills:['Cloud: VM Start/Stop','Cloud: Crear Bucket','Cloud: Security Groups','Docker: Run Container','Docker: Logs','Docker: Exec']},
  {cat:'Windows OS',icon:'🪟',color:'#64748b',skills:['Windows: Unir a Dominio','Windows: Visor Eventos']},
  {cat:'Seguridad',icon:'🔒',color:'#ef4444',skills:['Seguridad: Configurar MFA','Seguridad: Phishing ID','Seguridad: Revisar Logs Acceso','Seguridad: Agente Antivirus','Seguridad: Bloqueo IP Firewall','Seguridad: Permisos Carpetas']},
  {cat:'DevOps / K8s / CI-CD',icon:'🚀',color:'#84cc16',skills:['CI/CD: Pipeline básico','CI/CD: Rollback','Kubernetes: Ver Pods','Kubernetes: Describir Recurso','Monitoring: Dashboard Grafana','Monitoring: Configurar Alertas']},
  {cat:'Hardware',icon:'🔧',color:'#a8a29e',skills:['Hardware: Cambiar Disco','Hardware: Impresora en Red','Hardware: Limpieza Interna','Hardware: Inventario Activos','Hardware: Diagnóstico Fuente']},
  {cat:'Storage / SAP',icon:'💾',color:'#d97706',skills:['Storage: Mapa de Rutas','Storage: Asignación LUN','Storage: Snapshot','SAP: Transacción básica']},
  {cat:'Soporte / Tickets',icon:'🎫',color:'#fb923c',skills:['Ticket: Registro Incidencia','Ticket: Priorización','Ticket: Escalado Nivel','Ticket: Resolución y Cierre','Ticket: Comunicación Usuario','Doc: Escribir Documentación']},
];
const SLC = {Frontend:'#3b82f6',Backend:'#8b5cf6',Redes:'#6366f1',Windows:'#0ea5e9',BBDD:'#eab308',Seguridad:'#ef4444',DevOps:'#84cc16',QA:'#06b6d4',Soporte:'#fb923c'};

// shared state
let _tStep=1, _tNivel='', _tSilo='', _tSkills=[], _tEditMode=false, _tEditId='';
let _pStep=1, _pPrio='', _pSkills=[], _pEditMode=false, _pEditId='';

function fmOpen(id){ document.getElementById(id).classList.add('open'); document.body.style.overflow='hidden'; }
function fmClose(id){ document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open'); document.body.style.overflow=''; }

// close on backdrop click
['fm-team','fm-proj'].forEach(id=>{
  document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('click', e=>{ if(e.target.id===id) fmClose(id); });
});

// ─── TEAM MODAL ─────────────────────────────────────────────
function openTeamForm(){
  _tEditMode=false; _tEditId='';
  _tStep=1; _tNivel=''; _tSilo=''; _tSkills=[];
  const nextNum = Math.max(...ALL_TEAM.map(t=>parseInt((t.fte||'FTE-0').replace('FTE-',''))||0), 150) + 1;
  document.getElementById('t-id').value = 'FTE-'+nextNum;
  document.getElementById('t-id').readOnly = false;
  document.getElementById('t-id').style.opacity = '';
  document.getElementById('t-nombre').value='';
  document.getElementById('t-estado').value='DISPONIBLE';
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(c=>{ c.classList.remove('sel'); c.style.cssText=''; });
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(c=>{ c.classList.remove('sel'); c.style.cssText=''; });
  document.getElementById('tm-icon').textContent='🧑‍💻';
  document.getElementById('tm-title').textContent='Nuevo Técnico';
  document.getElementById('tm-sub').textContent='Registrar miembro en el equipo PMO';
  document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn').innerHTML='✅ Añadir al Equipo';
  tsSetStep(1); fmOpen('fm-team');
}

function openTeamEdit(fte){
  const t = ALL_TEAM.find(x=>x.fte===fte);
  if(!t){ showToast('❌ Técnico no encontrado'); return; }
  _tEditMode=true; _tEditId=fte;
  _tStep=1; _tNivel=t.nivel||''; _tSilo=t.silo||''; _tSkills=[...(t.tags||[])];
  // header
  document.getElementById('tm-icon').textContent='✏️';
  document.getElementById('tm-title').textContent='Editar Técnico';
  document.getElementById('tm-sub').textContent=t.name+' — '+fte;
  document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn').innerHTML='💾 Guardar Cambios';
  // fields
  const idEl = document.getElementById('t-id');
  idEl.value = fte; idEl.readOnly = true; idEl.style.opacity = '.55';
  document.getElementById('t-nombre').value = t.name;
  document.getElementById('t-estado').value = t.estado||'DISPONIBLE';
  // reset visual selectors first
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(c=>{ c.classList.remove('sel'); c.style.cssText=''; });
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(c=>{ c.classList.remove('sel'); c.style.cssText=''; });
  // pre-select nivel
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(el=>{
    const badge = el.querySelector('.nc-badge');
    if(badge && badge.textContent.trim()===_tNivel) selNivel(_tNivel, el);
  });
  // pre-select silo
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(el=>{
    const name = el.querySelector('.sc-name');
    if(name && name.textContent.trim()===_tSilo) selSilo(_tSilo, el);
  });
  tsSetStep(1); fmOpen('fm-team');
}

function tsSetStep(s){
  _tStep=s;
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .fm-step').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('ts-'+s).classList.add('active');
  [1,2,3].forEach(i=>{
    const d=document.getElementById('ts-dot-'+i);
    d.classList.remove('active','done');
    if(i<s) d.classList.add('done'); else if(i===s) d.classList.add('active');
  });
  document.getElementById('ts-back-btn').style.display = s>1 ? '' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('ts-next-btn').style.display = s<3 ? 'flex' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn').style.display = s===3 ? 'flex' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('ts-skill-count').style.display = s===2 ? '' : 'none';
  if(s===2){ renderSkillMatrix('ts-2-content', _tSkills, 'ts'); updateTsCount(); }
  if(s===3){ renderTeamPreview(); }
}

function tsNext(){
  if(_tStep===1){
    if(!document.getElementById('t-id').value.trim()){ showToast('⚠ Escribe el ID del técnico'); return; }
    if(!document.getElementById('t-nombre').value.trim()){ showToast('⚠ Escribe el nombre completo'); return; }
    if(!_tNivel){ showToast('⚠ Selecciona el nivel profesional'); return; }
    if(!_tSilo){ showToast('⚠ Selecciona el silo de especialidad'); return; }
  }
  if(_tStep<3) tsSetStep(_tStep+1);
}
function tsBack(){ if(_tStep>1) tsSetStep(_tStep-1); }

function selNivel(n, el){
  _tNivel=n;
  const colors={N1:'#f85149',N2:'#2d7ef7',N3:'#a5b4fc',N4:'#f59e0b'};
  const c=colors[n];
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .nivel-card').forEach(e=>{ e.classList.remove('sel'); e.style.borderColor=''; e.style.background=''; });
  el.classList.add('sel'); el.style.borderColor=c; el.style.background=c+'20';
}
function selSilo(s, el){
  _tSilo=s;
  const c=SLC[s]||'#2d7ef7';
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-team .silo-card').forEach(e=>{ e.classList.remove('sel'); e.style.borderColor=''; e.style.background=''; });
  el.classList.add('sel'); el.style.borderColor=c; el.style.background=c+'20';
}
function updateTsCount(){ document.getElementById('ts-skill-count').textContent=_tSkills.length+' skills seleccionadas'; }

function renderTeamPreview(){
  const nombre=document.getElementById('t-nombre').value.trim();
  const id=document.getElementById('t-id').value.trim();
  const estado=document.getElementById('t-estado').value;
  const col=SLC[_tSilo]||'#8b949e';
  const nColors={N1:'#f85149',N2:'#2d7ef7',N3:'#a5b4fc',N4:'#f59e0b'};
  const nc=nColors[_tNivel]||'#8b949e';
  const initials=(nombre.split(' ').slice(0,2).map(n=>n[0]||'').join('')).toUpperCase()||'?';
  const skHtml=_tSkills.length
    ? _tSkills.slice(0,14).map(s=>`<span class="skill-tag" style="border-color:${getSkillColor(s)}44;color:${getSkillColor(s)}">${escHtml(s.split(': ')[1]||s)}</span>`).join('')+(_tSkills.length>14?`<span class="skill-more">+${_tSkills.length-14} más</span>`:'')
    : '<span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;font-style:italic;">Sin skills — puedes añadirlas después</span>';
  document.getElementById('ts-3-preview').innerHTML=`
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px;">Revisa los datos antes de confirmar. El técnico quedará <strong style="color:var(--green);">registrado y disponible</strong> en el sistema.</div>
    <div class="preview-card" style="border-color:${col}44;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:-30px;right:-30px;width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:50%;background:${col};opacity:.05;pointer-events:none;"></div>
      <div class="pc-top">
        <div class="pc-avatar" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,${col},${col}99);">${escHtml(initials)}</div>
        <div style="flex:1">
          <div class="pc-name">${escHtml(nombre)||'Sin nombre'}</div>
          <div class="pc-id">${escHtml(id)}</div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:5px;">
          <span class="nivel-badge ${_tNivel.toLowerCase()}">${_tNivel}</span>
          <span class="silo-badge" style="background:${col}22;color:${col};">${_tSilo}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pc-meta">
        <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);">● ${estado}</span>
        <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);font-family:var(--mono);">${_tSkills.length} skills</span>
      </div>
      <div class="pc-skills-title">Skills asignadas</div>
      <div class="pc-skills-wrap">${skHtml}</div>
    </div>`;
  // Show tasks panel in edit mode
  const tasksPanel = document.getElementById('ts-tasks-panel');
  if (_tEditMode && _tEditId) {
    const myTasks = _teamTaskMap[_tEditId] || [];
    const active = myTasks.filter(tk => tk.columna !== 'Completado');
    const completed = myTasks.filter(tk => tk.columna === 'Completado');
    const runActive = active.filter(tk => tk.tipo === 'RUN').length;
    const buildActive = active.filter(tk => tk.tipo === 'BUILD').length;
    const totalActive = active.length;
    tasksPanel.style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('ts-tasks-count').textContent = `(${active.length} activas, ${completed.length} completadas)`;
    document.getElementById('ts-pct-run').textContent = totalActive > 0 ? Math.round(runActive/totalActive*100) + '%' : '0%';
    document.getElementById('ts-pct-build').textContent = totalActive > 0 ? Math.round(buildActive/totalActive*100) + '%' : '0%';
    const list = document.getElementById('ts-tasks-list');
    if (myTasks.length === 0) {
      list.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:10px;color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;">Sin tareas asignadas</div>';
    } else {
      list.innerHTML = myTasks.map(tk => {
        const isRun = tk.tipo === 'RUN';
        const isDone = tk.columna === 'Completado';
        const link = tk.id_proyecto || tk.id_incidencia || '';
        const colIcon = {'Backlog':'📋','Análisis':'🔍','En Progreso':'⚡','Code Review':'👁','Testing':'🧪','Despliegue':'🚀','Bloqueado':'🚫','Completado':'✅'};
        return `<div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;${isDone?'opacity:.5;':''}border-left:3px solid ${isRun?'var(--blue)':'var(--green)'};">
          <span style="font-size:11px;">${colIcon[tk.columna]||'📋'}</span>
          <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${escHtml(tk.titulo)}</div>
            <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);display:flex;gap:6px;">
              <span style="color:${isRun?'var(--blue)':'var(--green)'};">${tk.tipo}</span>
              <span>${tk.columna}</span>
              ${link?`<span style="color:var(--purple);">${link}</span>`:''}
              ${tk.horas_estimadas?`<span>⏱ ${tk.horas_estimadas}h</span>`:''}
            </div>
          </div>
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">${tk.id}</span>
        </div>`;
      }).join('');
    }
  } else {
    tasksPanel.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

function getSkillColor(sk){
  for(const cat of SKILL_CATS){ if(cat.skills.includes(sk)) return cat.color; }
  return '#8b949e';
}

async function tsSubmit(){
  const btn=document.getElementById('ts-submit-btn');
  const originalHtml = btn.innerHTML;
  btn.disabled=true; btn.innerHTML='<span class="loading-spinner" style="width:13px;height:13px;border-width:2px;"></span> Guardando...';
  const nombre = document.getElementById('t-nombre').value.trim();
  const payload={
    id_recurso: document.getElementById('t-id').value.trim(),
    nombre, nivel: _tNivel, silo_especialidad: _tSilo,
    skills_json: _tSkills, skill_principal: _tSkills[0]||null,
    estado_run: document.getElementById('t-estado').value,
  };
  try {
    const url = _tEditMode ? API_BASE+'/team/tecnicos/'+encodeURIComponent(_tEditId) : API_BASE+'/team/tecnicos';
    const method = _tEditMode ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
    const res=await authFetch(url,{method,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    if(!res.ok){ const err=await res.json().catch(()=>{}); throw new Error(err?.detail||'Error al guardar'); }
    showToast(_tEditMode ? '💾 '+nombre+' actualizado correctamente' : '✅ '+nombre+' añadido al equipo');
    fmClose('fm-team'); ALL_TEAM=[]; loadTeam();
  } catch(e){ showToast('❌ '+e.message); btn.disabled=false; btn.innerHTML=originalHtml; }
}

// ─── PROJECT MODAL ───────────────────────────────────────────
function openProjForm(){
  _pEditMode=false; _pEditId='';
  _pStep=1; _pPrio=''; _pSkills=[];
  document.getElementById('p-nombre').value='';
  document.getElementById('p-perfil').value='';
  document.getElementById('p-estado').value='Standby';
  document.getElementById('p-horas').value=80;
  updateHoursSlider();
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-proj .prio-card').forEach(c=>{ c.classList.remove('sel'); c.style.borderColor=''; c.style.background=''; });
  document.getElementById('pm-icon').textContent='📋';
  document.getElementById('pm-title').textContent='Nuevo Proyecto';
  document.getElementById('pm-sub').textContent='Registrar proyecto en la cartera BUILD';
  document.getElementById('ps-submit-btn').innerHTML='✅ Crear Proyecto';
  psSetStep(1); fmOpen('fm-proj');
}

function openProjEdit(id){
  const p = ALL_PROJECTS.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if(!p){ showToast('❌ Proyecto no encontrado'); return; }
  _pEditMode=true; _pEditId=id;
  _pStep=1; _pPrio=p.prio||''; _pSkills=[];
  // parse skills from "skill1, skill2, ..." string
  if(p.skill){ _pSkills = p.skill.split(',').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(s=>s.length>0); }
  // header
  document.getElementById('pm-icon').textContent='✏️';
  document.getElementById('pm-title').textContent='Editar Proyecto';
  document.getElementById('pm-sub').textContent=p.name.slice(0,50)+(p.name.length>50?'…':'');
  document.getElementById('ps-submit-btn').innerHTML='💾 Guardar Cambios';
  // fields
  document.getElementById('p-nombre').value = p.name;
  document.getElementById('p-perfil').value = '';
  document.getElementById('p-estado').value = p.estado||'Standby';
  document.getElementById('p-horas').value = p.horas||80;
  updateHoursSlider();
  // reset + pre-select prioridad
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-proj .prio-card').forEach(c=>{ c.classList.remove('sel'); c.style.borderColor=''; c.style.background=''; });
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-proj .prio-card').forEach(el=>{
    const nm = el.querySelector('.prio-name');
    if(nm){ const txt=nm.textContent.trim(); if(txt===_pPrio||txt.normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'')===_pPrio.normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'')) selPrio(_pPrio, el); }
  });
  psSetStep(1); fmOpen('fm-proj');
}

function psSetStep(s){
  _pStep=s;
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-proj .fm-step').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('ps-'+s).classList.add('active');
  [1,2].forEach(i=>{
    const d=document.getElementById('ps-dot-'+i);
    d.classList.remove('active','done');
    if(i<s) d.classList.add('done'); else if(i===s) d.classList.add('active');
  });
  document.getElementById('ps-back-btn').style.display = s>1 ? '' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('ps-next-btn').style.display = s<2 ? 'flex' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('ps-submit-btn').style.display = s===2 ? 'flex' : 'none';
  if(s===2){ renderSkillMatrix('ps-2-content', _pSkills, 'ps'); renderProjPreview(); }
}

function psNext(){
  if(!document.getElementById('p-nombre').value.trim()){ showToast('⚠ Escribe el nombre del proyecto'); return; }
  if(!_pPrio){ showToast('⚠ Selecciona la prioridad estratégica'); return; }
  psSetStep(2);
}
function psBack(){ if(_pStep>1) psSetStep(_pStep-1); }

function selPrio(p, el){
  _pPrio=p;
  const colors={'Crítica':'#f85149','Alta':'#f0883e','Media':'#d29922','Baja':'#3fb950'};
  const c=colors[p];
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-proj .prio-card').forEach(e=>{ e.classList.remove('sel'); e.style.borderColor=''; e.style.background=''; });
  el.classList.add('sel'); el.style.borderColor=c; el.style.background=c+'20';
}

function updateHoursSlider(){
  const v=parseInt(document.getElementById('p-horas').value);
  const pct=((v-5)/(500-5)*100).toFixed(1);
  const col=v<60?'var(--green)':v<150?'var(--blue)':v<300?'var(--orange)':'var(--red)';
  document.getElementById('p-horas-val').textContent=v;
  document.getElementById('p-horas-val').style.color=col;
  const slider=document.getElementById('p-horas');
  slider.style.background=`linear-gradient(to right,${col} 0%,${col} ${pct}%,var(--border) ${pct}%,var(--border) 100%)`;
  const thumb=col==='var(--green)'?'#3fb950':col==='var(--blue)'?'#2d7ef7':col==='var(--orange)'?'#f0883e':'#f85149';
  slider.style.setProperty('--thumb-color', thumb);
  if(_pStep===2) renderProjPreview();
}

function renderProjPreview(){
  const nombre=document.getElementById('p-nombre').value.trim();
  const horas=document.getElementById('p-horas').value;
  const estado=document.getElementById('p-estado').value;
  const perfil=document.getElementById('p-perfil').value.trim();
  const prioColors={'Crítica':'#f85149','Alta':'#f0883e','Media':'#d29922','Baja':'#3fb950'};
  const pc=prioColors[_pPrio]||'var(--blue)';
  const skHtml=_pSkills.length
    ? _pSkills.slice(0,10).map(s=>`<span class="skill-tag" style="border-color:${getSkillColor(s)}44;color:${getSkillColor(s)};">${escHtml(s.split(': ')[1]||s)}</span>`).join('')+(_pSkills.length>10?`<span class="skill-more">+${_pSkills.length-10}</span>`:'')
    : '<span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;font-style:italic;">Sin skills definidas</span>';
  document.getElementById('ps-3-preview').innerHTML=`
    <div class="preview-card" style="border-color:${pc}44;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:-30px;right:-30px;width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:50%;background:${pc};opacity:.05;pointer-events:none;"></div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:10px;background:${pc}22;border:1px solid ${pc}44;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;flex-shrink:0;">📋</div>
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
          <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:6px;">${escHtml(nombre)||'Sin nombre'}</div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <span style="font-size:11px;background:${pc}22;color:${pc};border-radius:20px;padding:2px 10px;font-weight:700;">${_pPrio||'—'}</span>
            <span style="font-size:11px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:2px 10px;color:var(--text2);">${estado}</span>
            <span style="font-size:11px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:2px 10px;font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--text2);">⏱ ${horas}h</span>
            ${perfil?`<span style="font-size:11px;background:var(--purple-bg);color:var(--purple);border-radius:20px;padding:2px 10px;">👤 ${escHtml(perfil)}</span>`:''}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pc-skills-title">Skills requeridas (${_pSkills.length})</div>
      <div class="pc-skills-wrap">${skHtml}</div>
    </div>`;
}

async function psSubmit(){
  const btn=document.getElementById('ps-submit-btn');
  const originalHtml = btn.innerHTML;
  btn.disabled=true; btn.innerHTML='<span class="loading-spinner" style="width:13px;height:13px;border-width:2px;"></span> Guardando...';
  const nombre = document.getElementById('p-nombre').value.trim();
  const payload={
    nombre, prioridad: _pPrio, prioridad_num: {'Crítica':1,'Alta':2,'Media':3,'Baja':4}[_pPrio]||3,
    estado: document.getElementById('p-estado').value,
    horas_estimadas: parseInt(document.getElementById('p-horas').value),
    skill_requerida: _pSkills.join(', '),
  };
  try {
    let url, method;
    if(_pEditMode){ url=API_BASE+'/cartera/proyectos'; method='PUT'; payload.id_proyecto=_pEditId; }
    else { url=API_BASE+'/proyectos/crear'; method='POST'; }
    const res=await authFetch(url,{method,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    if(!res.ok){ const err=await res.json().catch(()=>{}); throw new Error(err?.detail||'Error al guardar'); }
    showToast(_pEditMode ? '💾 Proyecto actualizado correctamente' : '✅ Proyecto "'+nombre.slice(0,25)+'..." creado');
    fmClose('fm-proj'); ALL_PROJECTS=[]; loadProjects();
  } catch(e){ showToast('❌ '+e.message); btn.disabled=false; btn.innerHTML=originalHtml; }
}

// ─── SKILLS MATRIX (shared) ─────────────────────────────────
function renderSkillMatrix(containerId, selected, prefix){
  document.getElementById(containerId).innerHTML = SKILL_CATS.map(cat=>{
    const selCount=cat.skills.filter(s=>selected.includes(s)).length;
    return `<div class="skill-cat-block">
      <div class="skill-cat-head" style="color:${cat.color}">
        <span style="font-size:14px">${cat.icon}</span>
        <span>${cat.cat}</span>
        <div class="skill-cat-line" style="background:${cat.color}"></div>
        <span class="skill-cat-cnt" style="color:${cat.color}">${selCount}/${cat.skills.length}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-chips-grid">
        ${cat.skills.map(sk=>{
          const isSel=selected.includes(sk);
          const label=sk.split(': ')[1]||sk;
          return `<div class="sk-chip${isSel?' sel':''}" style="${isSel?`border-color:${cat.color};background:${cat.color};color:#fff;`:''}" onclick="toggleSkill('${sk.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}','${cat.color}','${prefix}',this)">${escHtml(label)}</div>`;
        }).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function toggleSkill(sk, color, prefix, el){
  const arr = prefix==='ts' ? _tSkills : _pSkills;
  const idx = arr.indexOf(sk);
  if(idx>=0){
    arr.splice(idx,1);
    el.classList.remove('sel'); el.style.borderColor=''; el.style.background=''; el.style.color='';
  } else {
    arr.push(sk);
    el.classList.add('sel'); el.style.borderColor=color; el.style.background=color; el.style.color='#fff';
  }
  // update category counter
  const catEl = el.closest('.skill-cat-block');
  if(catEl){
    const catCnt=catEl.querySelector('.skill-cat-cnt');
    if(catCnt){ const chips=catEl.querySelectorAll('.sk-chip.sel'); catCnt.textContent=chips.length+'/'+catEl.querySelectorAll('.sk-chip').length; }
  }
  if(prefix==='ts'){ document.getElementById('ts-skill-count').textContent=_tSkills.length+' skills seleccionadas'; }
  else { document.getElementById('ps-skill-count').textContent=_pSkills.length+' skills'; renderProjPreview(); }
}

// ══════════════════ BUDGET MODULE ══════════════════
let ALL_BUDGETS = [], _bgtFiltered = [], _bgtEstadoFilter = '', _bgtSearch = '';
let _bgtEditMode = false, _bgtEditId = '';
let _bgtProveedores = []; // [{nombre,tipo,concepto,dias,tarifa,total}]

const fmtEur = v => {
  if(v===undefined||v===null) return '€ 0';
  const n = typeof v === 'string' ? parseFloat(v)||0 : (v||0);
  if(n>=1000000) return '€ '+(n/1000000).toFixed(2)+'M';
  if(n>=1000) return '€ '+(n/1000).toFixed(1)+'K';
  return '€ '+n.toLocaleString('es-ES',{minimumFractionDigits:0,maximumFractionDigits:0});
};
const fmtNum = v => {const n=parseFloat(v)||0; return n.toFixed(2);};

async function loadBudgets(){
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/presupuestos');
    ALL_BUDGETS = r.ok ? await r.json() : [];
  } catch(e){ ALL_BUDGETS=[]; }
  // Populate project dropdown in form
  const sel = document.getElementById('b-proyecto');
  if(sel && ALL_PROJECTS.length){
    sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Seleccionar proyecto —</option>' +
