      ALL_PROJECTS.map(p=>`<option value="${escHtml(p.id)}" data-horas="${p.horas||0}">${escHtml(p.id.slice(0,35))} — ${escHtml((p.name||'').slice(0,40))}</option>`).join('');
  }
  applyBudgetFilters();
}

function applyBudgetFilters(){
  _bgtFiltered = ALL_BUDGETS.filter(b=>{
    const q = _bgtSearch.toLowerCase();
    const matchQ = !q || (b.id_presupuesto||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      (b.id_proyecto||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      (b.nombre_presupuesto||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      (b.responsable||'').toLowerCase().includes(q);
    const matchE = !_bgtEstadoFilter || b.estado === _bgtEstadoFilter;
    return matchQ && matchE;
  });
  renderBudgetTable();
  updateBudgetKpis();
}

function filterBudgets(q){ _bgtSearch=q; applyBudgetFilters(); }
function filterBgtEstado(e, el){
  _bgtEstadoFilter=e;
  document.querySelectorAll('#page-budget .filter-chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));
  el.classList.add('active');
  applyBudgetFilters();
}

function updateBudgetKpis(){
  const data = ALL_BUDGETS;
  const totalBac = data.reduce((s,b)=>s+(parseFloat(b.bac_total)||0),0);
  const totalLabor = data.reduce((s,b)=>s+(parseFloat(b.total_labor)||0),0);
  const totalOpex = data.reduce((s,b)=>s+(parseFloat(b.total_opex)||0),0);
  const totalCapex = data.reduce((s,b)=>s+(parseFloat(b.total_capex)||0),0);
  const totalProv = data.reduce((s,b)=>s+(parseFloat(b.total_proveedores)||0),0);
  const nAprobados = data.filter(b=>b.estado==='APROBADO').length;
  document.getElementById('bgt-kpi-bac').textContent = fmtEur(totalBac);
  document.getElementById('bgt-kpi-labor').textContent = fmtEur(totalLabor);
  document.getElementById('bgt-kpi-opex').textContent = fmtEur(totalOpex);
  document.getElementById('bgt-kpi-capex').textContent = fmtEur(totalCapex);
  document.getElementById('bgt-kpi-prov').textContent = fmtEur(totalProv);
  document.getElementById('bgt-kpi-count').textContent = data.length;
  document.getElementById('bgt-kpi-count-sub').textContent = nAprobados+' aprobados';
}

function renderBudgetTable(){
  const tbody = document.getElementById('budget-tbody');
  if(!_bgtFiltered.length){
    tbody.innerHTML=`<tr><td colspan="13" style="text-align:center;padding:48px;color:var(--text3);"><div style="font-size:28px;opacity:.2;margin-bottom:8px;">💰</div>No hay presupuestos${_bgtSearch||_bgtEstadoFilter?' que coincidan con el filtro':' registrados aún'}</td></tr>`;
    return;
  }
  const estadoCls = {BORRADOR:'bgt-borrador',EN_REVISION:'bgt-revision',APROBADO:'bgt-aprobado',CERRADO:'bgt-cerrado',RECHAZADO:'bgt-rechazado'};
  const estadoLabel = {BORRADOR:'Borrador',EN_REVISION:'En Revisión',APROBADO:'Aprobado',CERRADO:'Cerrado',RECHAZADO:'Rechazado'};
  tbody.innerHTML = _bgtFiltered.map(b=>{
    const bac = parseFloat(b.bac_total)||0;
    const bacCol = bac>500000?'var(--red)':bac>100000?'var(--orange)':'#10b981';
    return `<tr style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="openBudgetEdit('${escHtml(b.id_presupuesto)}')">
      <td><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);">${escHtml(b.id_presupuesto)}</span></td>
      <td style="max-width:200px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;" title="${escHtml(b.id_proyecto)}">${escHtml((b.id_proyecto||'').slice(0,40))}</td>
      <td>${escHtml(b.responsable||'—')}</td>
      <td><span class="bgt-estado ${estadoCls[b.estado]||'bgt-borrador'}">${estadoLabel[b.estado]||b.estado}</span></td>
      <td style="text-align:right;"><span class="bgt-amount" style="color:#38bdf8;">${fmtEur(b.total_labor)}</span></td>
      <td style="text-align:right;"><span class="bgt-amount" style="color:#8b5cf6;">${fmtEur(b.total_proveedores)}</span></td>
      <td style="text-align:right;"><span class="bgt-amount" style="color:#fbbf24;">${fmtEur(b.total_opex)}</span></td>
      <td style="text-align:right;"><span class="bgt-amount" style="color:#f97316;">${fmtEur(b.total_capex)}</span></td>
      <td style="text-align:right;"><span class="bgt-amount" style="color:#f472b6;">${fmtEur(b.total_rrhh)}</span></td>
      <td style="text-align:right;"><span class="bgt-amount" style="color:#a3e635;">${fmtEur(b.total_reservas)}</span></td>
      <td style="text-align:right;"><span class="bgt-amount" style="color:${bacCol};font-size:13px;">${fmtEur(bac)}</span></td>
      <td><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);">v${b.version||1}</span></td>
      <td><div class="bgt-actions" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
        <button class="bgt-btn-edit" onclick="openBudgetEdit('${escHtml(b.id_presupuesto)}')">✏️</button>
        <button class="bgt-btn-del" onclick="deleteBudget('${escHtml(b.id_presupuesto)}','${escHtml(b.nombre_presupuesto||b.id_presupuesto)}')">🗑</button>
      </div></td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

// ── Form open / close ──
function openBudgetForm(){
  _bgtEditMode=false; _bgtEditId='';
  _bgtProveedores=[];
  resetBudgetForm();
  // generate ID
  const d = new Date(); const y=d.getFullYear(); const m=String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');
  const seq = String(ALL_BUDGETS.length+1).padStart(3,'0');
  document.getElementById('b-id').value = `PRES-${y}${m}-${seq}`;
  document.getElementById('b-id').readOnly = false;
  document.getElementById('b-id').style.opacity='1';
  document.getElementById('bgt-hdr-id').textContent = `PRES-${y}${m}-${seq}`;
  document.getElementById('bgt-hdr-title').textContent = 'Nuevo Presupuesto';
  document.getElementById('bgt-submit-btn').innerHTML = '<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M19 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h11l5 5v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"/><polyline points="17 21 17 13 7 13 7 21"/><polyline points="7 3 7 8 15 8"/></svg> Crear Presupuesto';
  // populate project dropdown
  const sel = document.getElementById('b-proyecto');
  sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Seleccionar proyecto —</option>' +
    ALL_PROJECTS.map(p=>`<option value="${escHtml(p.id)}" data-horas="${p.horas||0}">${escHtml(p.id.slice(0,35))} — ${escHtml((p.name||'').slice(0,40))}</option>`).join('');
  bgtShowSection(1, document.querySelector('.fm-bgt-nav-item'));
  renderProveedores();
  bgtCalc();
  fmOpen('fm-budget');
}

function openBudgetEdit(id){
  const b = ALL_BUDGETS.find(x=>x.id_presupuesto===id);
  if(!b){ showToast('❌ Presupuesto no encontrado'); return; }
  _bgtEditMode=true; _bgtEditId=id;
  resetBudgetForm();
  // header
  document.getElementById('bgt-hdr-id').textContent = b.id_presupuesto;
  document.getElementById('bgt-hdr-title').textContent = b.nombre_presupuesto||'Editar Presupuesto';
  document.getElementById('bgt-submit-btn').innerHTML = '💾 Guardar Cambios';
  // parse proveedores
  let provArr = b.proveedores_externos||[];
  if(typeof provArr === 'string'){ try{ provArr=JSON.parse(provArr); }catch(e){ provArr=[]; } }
  _bgtProveedores = provArr.map(p=>({nombre:p.nombre||'',tipo:p.tipo||'Consultoría',concepto:p.concepto||'',dias:p.dias||0,tarifa:p.tarifa_dia||0,total:p.total||0}));
  // fill fields
  const fv = (id,v)=>{ const e=document.getElementById(id); if(e) e.value=v??''; };
  fv('b-id', b.id_presupuesto); document.getElementById('b-id').readOnly=true; document.getElementById('b-id').style.opacity='.55';
  fv('b-nombre', b.nombre_presupuesto);
  fv('b-responsable', b.responsable);
  fv('b-aprobado-por', b.aprobado_por||'');
  fv('b-fecha-inicio', b.fecha_inicio?String(b.fecha_inicio).slice(0,10):'');
  fv('b-fecha-fin', b.fecha_fin?String(b.fecha_fin).slice(0,10):'');
  fv('b-moneda', b.moneda||'EUR');
  fv('b-estado', b.estado||'BORRADOR');
  fv('b-version', b.version||1);
  fv('b-notas', b.notas||'');
  fv('b-horas', b.horas_internas||0);
  fv('b-tarifa', b.tarifa_hora_interna||85);
  fv('b-rrhh-rec', b.rrhh_reclutamiento||0);
  fv('b-rrhh-form', b.rrhh_formacion||0);
  fv('b-rrhh-admin', b.rrhh_hr_admin||0);
  fv('b-rrhh-viajes', b.rrhh_viajes_dietas||0);
  fv('b-rrhh-otros', b.rrhh_otros||0);
  fv('b-opex-lic', b.opex_licencias_sw||0);
  fv('b-opex-cloud', b.opex_cloud_infra||0);
  fv('b-opex-mant', b.opex_mantenimiento||0);
  fv('b-opex-cons', b.opex_consumibles||0);
  fv('b-opex-form', b.opex_formacion||0);
  fv('b-opex-otros', b.opex_otros||0);
  fv('b-capex-hw', b.capex_hardware||0);
  fv('b-capex-eq', b.capex_equipamiento||0);
  fv('b-capex-infra', b.capex_infraestructura||0);
  fv('b-capex-sw', b.capex_software||0);
  fv('b-capex-otros', b.capex_otros||0);
  fv('b-res-cont', b.reserva_contingencia_pct||10);
  fv('b-res-gest', b.reserva_gestion_pct||5);
  // set proyecto dropdown
  const sel = document.getElementById('b-proyecto');
  sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Seleccionar proyecto —</option>' +
    ALL_PROJECTS.map(p=>`<option value="${escHtml(p.id)}" data-horas="${p.horas||0}"${p.id===b.id_proyecto?' selected':''}>${escHtml(p.id.slice(0,35))} — ${escHtml((p.name||'').slice(0,40))}</option>`).join('');
  bgtUpdateEstadoBadge();
  bgtShowSection(1, document.querySelector('.fm-bgt-nav-item'));
  renderProveedores();
  bgtCalc();
  fmOpen('fm-budget');
}

function resetBudgetForm(){
  ['b-nombre','b-responsable','b-aprobado-por','b-notas'].forEach(id=>{ const e=document.getElementById(id); if(e) e.value=''; });
  ['b-horas','b-rrhh-rec','b-rrhh-form','b-rrhh-admin','b-rrhh-viajes','b-rrhh-otros',
   'b-opex-lic','b-opex-cloud','b-opex-mant','b-opex-cons','b-opex-form','b-opex-otros',
   'b-capex-hw','b-capex-eq','b-capex-infra','b-capex-sw','b-capex-otros'].forEach(id=>{ const e=document.getElementById(id); if(e) e.value=0; });
  const tf=document.getElementById('b-tarifa'); if(tf) tf.value=85;
  const rc=document.getElementById('b-res-cont'); if(rc) rc.value=10;
  const rg=document.getElementById('b-res-gest'); if(rg) rg.value=5;
  const ve=document.getElementById('b-version'); if(ve) ve.value=1;
  const me=document.getElementById('b-moneda'); if(me) me.value='EUR';
  const es=document.getElementById('b-estado'); if(es) es.value='BORRADOR';
  const fi=document.getElementById('b-fecha-inicio'); if(fi) fi.value='';
  const ff=document.getElementById('b-fecha-fin'); if(ff) ff.value='';
  bgtUpdateEstadoBadge();
}

function bgtAutoFillProject(){
  const sel = document.getElementById('b-proyecto');
  const opt = sel.options[sel.selectedIndex];
  if(opt){
    const horas = parseInt(opt.getAttribute('data-horas'))||0;
    if(horas>0){ document.getElementById('b-horas').value=horas; }
    // auto name
    const nameEl = document.getElementById('b-nombre');
    if(!nameEl.value && opt.value){
      const y=new Date().getFullYear();
      nameEl.value = 'Presupuesto — '+opt.text.slice(0,60).split('—')[1]?.trim() || 'Presupuesto '+opt.value;
    }
    bgtCalc();
  }
}

function bgtUpdateEstadoBadge(){
  const v=document.getElementById('b-estado')?.value||'BORRADOR';
  const badge=document.getElementById('bgt-hdr-estado');
  if(!badge) return;
  const cls={BORRADOR:'bgt-borrador',EN_REVISION:'bgt-revision',APROBADO:'bgt-aprobado',CERRADO:'bgt-cerrado',RECHAZADO:'bgt-rechazado'};
  const lbl={BORRADOR:'BORRADOR',EN_REVISION:'EN REVISIÓN',APROBADO:'APROBADO',CERRADO:'CERRADO',RECHAZADO:'RECHAZADO'};
  badge.className='fm-bgt-estado-badge '+(cls[v]||'bgt-borrador');
  badge.textContent=lbl[v]||v;
}

function bgtShowSection(n, el){
  document.querySelectorAll('.fm-bgt-section').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));
  const sec=document.getElementById('bgt-sec-'+n);
  if(sec) sec.classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.fm-bgt-nav-item').forEach(e=>e.classList.remove('active'));
  if(el) el.classList.add('active');
  if(n===8) bgtUpdateResumen();
}

// ── Proveedores ──
function renderProveedores(){
  const tbody=document.getElementById('prov-tbody');
  if(!tbody) return;
  const tipos=['Consultoría','Desarrollo SW','Cloud/IaaS','Infraestructura','Licencias','Soporte/Mantenimiento','Auditoría','Formación','Seguridad','Otros'];
  tbody.innerHTML=_bgtProveedores.map((p,i)=>`<tr>
    <td><input class="prov-inp" placeholder="Nombre del proveedor" value="${escHtml(p.nombre)}" oninput="_bgtProveedores[${i}].nombre=this.value;bgtCalc()"></td>
    <td><select class="prov-sel" onchange="_bgtProveedores[${i}].tipo=this.value">${tipos.map(t=>`<option${t===p.tipo?' selected':''}>${t}</option>`).join('')}</select></td>
    <td><input class="prov-inp" placeholder="Concepto/alcance" value="${escHtml(p.concepto)}" oninput="_bgtProveedores[${i}].concepto=this.value;bgtCalc()"></td>
    <td><input class="prov-inp num" type="number" min="0" value="${p.dias}" oninput="_bgtProveedores[${i}].dias=parseFloat(this.value)||0;bgtProvCalcRow(${i})" style="width:50px;"></td>
    <td><input class="prov-inp num" type="number" min="0" value="${p.tarifa}" oninput="_bgtProveedores[${i}].tarifa=parseFloat(this.value)||0;bgtProvCalcRow(${i})" style="width:70px;"></td>
    <td class="prov-total" id="prov-total-${i}">${fmtEur(p.total)}</td>
    <td><button class="prov-del" onclick="removeProveedor(${i})">✕</button></td>
  </tr>`).join('');
}

function bgtProvCalcRow(i){
  const p=_bgtProveedores[i];
  p.total=Math.round(p.dias*p.tarifa*100)/100;
  const el=document.getElementById('prov-total-'+i);
  if(el) el.textContent=fmtEur(p.total);
  bgtCalc();
}

function addProveedor(){
  _bgtProveedores.push({nombre:'',tipo:'Consultoría',concepto:'',dias:0,tarifa:600,total:0});
  renderProveedores();
}
function removeProveedor(i){
  _bgtProveedores.splice(i,1);
  renderProveedores();
  bgtCalc();
}

// ── Live Calculation ──
function bgtCalc(){
  const gv = id=>parseFloat(document.getElementById(id)?.value)||0;
  const tl = Math.round(gv('b-horas')*gv('b-tarifa')*100)/100;
  const tp = Math.round(_bgtProveedores.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.total,0)*100)/100;
  const to = Math.round((gv('b-opex-lic')+gv('b-opex-cloud')+gv('b-opex-mant')+gv('b-opex-cons')+gv('b-opex-form')+gv('b-opex-otros'))*100)/100;
  const tc = Math.round((gv('b-capex-hw')+gv('b-capex-eq')+gv('b-capex-infra')+gv('b-capex-sw')+gv('b-capex-otros'))*100)/100;
  const tr = Math.round((gv('b-rrhh-rec')+gv('b-rrhh-form')+gv('b-rrhh-admin')+gv('b-rrhh-viajes')+gv('b-rrhh-otros'))*100)/100;
  const sub = tl+tp+to+tc+tr;
  const rcPct=gv('b-res-cont'), rgPct=gv('b-res-gest');
  const rc=Math.round(sub*rcPct/100*100)/100;
  const rg=Math.round(sub*rgPct/100*100)/100;
  const tres=rc+rg;
  const bac=Math.round((sub+tres)*100)/100;

  // Labor hero
  const setT=(id,v)=>{const e=document.getElementById(id);if(e)e.textContent=v;};
  setT('b-labor-display',fmtEur(tl));
  setT('b-labor-h',gv('b-horas').toFixed(0));
  setT('b-labor-t',gv('b-tarifa').toFixed(0));
  setT('b-labor-r',fmtEur(tl));
  // Prov total
  setT('b-prov-total-display',fmtEur(tp));
  // Reservas cards
  setT('b-res-cont-pct',rcPct.toFixed(1)+'%');
  setT('b-res-cont-amt',fmtEur(rc));
  setT('b-res-gest-pct',rgPct.toFixed(1)+'%');
  setT('b-res-gest-amt',fmtEur(rg));
  // BAC bar
  setT('bseg-labor',fmtEur(tl));
  setT('bseg-prov',fmtEur(tp));
  setT('bseg-opex',fmtEur(to));
  setT('bseg-capex',fmtEur(tc));
  setT('bseg-rrhh',fmtEur(tr));
  setT('bseg-res',fmtEur(tres));
  setT('bseg-bac',fmtEur(bac));
  setT('bgt-footer-bac','BAC: '+fmtEur(bac));
  // Nav amounts
  setT('bnav-labor',fmtEur(tl));
  setT('bnav-prov',fmtEur(tp));
  setT('bnav-rrhh',fmtEur(tr));
  setT('bnav-opex',fmtEur(to));
  setT('bnav-capex',fmtEur(tc));
  setT('bnav-res',fmtEur(tres));
  // Header ID live
  const idEl=document.getElementById('b-id');
  if(idEl&&idEl.value) setT('bgt-hdr-id',idEl.value);
  const nmEl=document.getElementById('b-nombre');
  if(nmEl&&nmEl.value) setT('bgt-hdr-title',nmEl.value.slice(0,60));
  return {tl,tp,to,tc,tr,tres,bac,sub,rc,rg,rcPct,rgPct};
}

function bgtUpdateResumen(){
  const {tl,tp,to,tc,tr,tres,bac,sub,rc,rg,rcPct,rgPct} = bgtCalc();
  const pct = v => bac>0?((v/bac)*100).toFixed(1)+'%':'0%';
  const row = (color,label,val,barW) => `<div class="resumen-row">
    <div class="resumen-dot" style="background:${color};"></div>
    <div class="resumen-label">${label}</div>
    <div class="resumen-bar-wrap"><div class="resumen-bar" style="background:${color};width:${Math.min(barW,100)}%;"></div></div>
    <div class="resumen-pct-col">${pct(val)}</div>
    <div class="resumen-amt" style="color:${color};">${fmtEur(val)}</div>
  </div>`;
  const breakdown = document.getElementById('b-resumen-breakdown');
  if(breakdown){
    breakdown.innerHTML =
      row('#38bdf8','Personal Interno (Labor FTE)',tl,bac>0?tl/bac*100:0)+
      row('#8b5cf6','Proveedores Externos',tp,bac>0?tp/bac*100:0)+
      row('#fbbf24','OPEX — Gastos Operacionales',to,bac>0?to/bac*100:0)+
      row('#f97316','CAPEX — Inversiones Capital',tc,bac>0?tc/bac*100:0)+
      row('#f472b6','RRHH &amp; Gestión Personal',tr,bac>0?tr/bac*100:0)+
      row('#a3e635','Reserva Contingencias ('+rcPct.toFixed(1)+'%)',rc,bac>0?rc/bac*100:0)+
      row('#22d3ee','Reserva Gestión ('+rgPct.toFixed(1)+'%)',rg,bac>0?rg/bac*100:0)+
      `<div class="resumen-row" style="background:rgba(16,185,129,.04);font-weight:700;"><div class="resumen-dot" style="background:#10b981;"></div><div class="resumen-label" style="color:var(--text);font-weight:700;">BAC — Budget at Completion</div><div class="resumen-bar-wrap"><div class="resumen-bar" style="background:#10b981;width:100%;"></div></div><div class="resumen-pct-col" style="color:#10b981;">100%</div><div class="resumen-amt" style="color:#10b981;font-size:14px;">${fmtEur(bac)}</div></div>`;
  }
  // Hero
  const setT=(id,v)=>{const e=document.getElementById(id);if(e)e.textContent=v;};
  setT('b-bac-hero',fmtEur(bac));
  const proj=document.getElementById('b-proyecto');
  const projTxt=proj?.options[proj.selectedIndex]?.text||'Sin proyecto';
  setT('b-bac-proyecto-name',projTxt.slice(0,60));
  const fi=document.getElementById('b-fecha-inicio')?.value||'—';
  const ff=document.getElementById('b-fecha-fin')?.value||'—';
  setT('b-bac-fecha','Período: '+fi+' → '+ff+' · v');
  setT('b-bac-ver',document.getElementById('b-version')?.value||'1');
  // PMBOK KPIs
  const horas=parseFloat(document.getElementById('b-horas')?.value)||0;
  setT('bkpi-labor-pct',pct(tl));
  setT('bkpi-opex-ratio',pct(to));
  setT('bkpi-capex-ratio',pct(tc));
  setT('bkpi-res-ratio',pct(tres));
  setT('bkpi-ext-ratio',pct(tp));
  setT('bkpi-hph',horas>0?fmtEur(bac/horas):'—');
}

// ── Save ──
async function bgtSave(){
  const gv = id=>parseFloat(document.getElementById(id)?.value)||0;
  const gs = id=>document.getElementById(id)?.value?.trim()||'';
  const id=gs('b-id'), proj=document.getElementById('b-proyecto')?.value||'', nombre=gs('b-nombre'), resp=gs('b-responsable');
  if(!id){ showToast('⚠ ID del presupuesto requerido'); bgtShowSection(1,document.querySelectorAll('.fm-bgt-nav-item')[0]); return; }
  if(!proj){ showToast('⚠ Selecciona un proyecto'); bgtShowSection(1,document.querySelectorAll('.fm-bgt-nav-item')[0]); return; }
  if(!nombre){ showToast('⚠ Nombre del presupuesto requerido'); bgtShowSection(1,document.querySelectorAll('.fm-bgt-nav-item')[0]); return; }
  if(!resp){ showToast('⚠ Responsable requerido'); bgtShowSection(1,document.querySelectorAll('.fm-bgt-nav-item')[0]); return; }

  const btn=document.getElementById('bgt-submit-btn');
  const origHtml=btn.innerHTML; btn.disabled=true; btn.innerHTML='<span class="loading-spinner"></span>Guardando…';

  const provData=_bgtProveedores.map(p=>({nombre:p.nombre,tipo:p.tipo,concepto:p.concepto,dias:p.dias,tarifa_dia:p.tarifa,total:p.total}));
  const payload={
    id_presupuesto:id, id_proyecto:proj, nombre_presupuesto:nombre,
    version:parseInt(document.getElementById('b-version')?.value)||1,
    estado:document.getElementById('b-estado')?.value||'BORRADOR',
    responsable:resp, fecha_inicio:gs('b-fecha-inicio')||null, fecha_fin:gs('b-fecha-fin')||null,
    moneda:gs('b-moneda')||'EUR', aprobado_por:gs('b-aprobado-por')||null, notas:gs('b-notas')||null,
    horas_internas:gv('b-horas'), tarifa_hora_interna:gv('b-tarifa'),
    proveedores_externos:provData,
    opex_licencias_sw:gv('b-opex-lic'),opex_cloud_infra:gv('b-opex-cloud'),opex_mantenimiento:gv('b-opex-mant'),opex_consumibles:gv('b-opex-cons'),opex_formacion:gv('b-opex-form'),opex_otros:gv('b-opex-otros'),
    capex_hardware:gv('b-capex-hw'),capex_equipamiento:gv('b-capex-eq'),capex_infraestructura:gv('b-capex-infra'),capex_software:gv('b-capex-sw'),capex_otros:gv('b-capex-otros'),
    rrhh_reclutamiento:gv('b-rrhh-rec'),rrhh_formacion:gv('b-rrhh-form'),rrhh_hr_admin:gv('b-rrhh-admin'),rrhh_viajes_dietas:gv('b-rrhh-viajes'),rrhh_otros:gv('b-rrhh-otros'),
    reserva_contingencia_pct:gv('b-res-cont'),reserva_gestion_pct:gv('b-res-gest'),
  };
  try {
    const url=_bgtEditMode?API_BASE+'/presupuestos/'+encodeURIComponent(_bgtEditId):API_BASE+'/presupuestos';
    const method=_bgtEditMode?'PUT':'POST';
    const res=await authFetch(url,{method,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    if(!res.ok){ const err=await res.json().catch(()=>{}); throw new Error(err?.detail||'Error al guardar'); }
    showToast(_bgtEditMode?'💾 Presupuesto actualizado':'✅ Presupuesto creado · BAC: '+fmtEur(payload.horas_internas*payload.tarifa_hora_interna));
    fmClose('fm-budget'); ALL_BUDGETS=[]; loadBudgets();
  } catch(e){ showToast('❌ '+e.message); btn.disabled=false; btn.innerHTML=origHtml; }
}

async function deleteBudget(id, nombre){
  if(!confirm(`¿Eliminar el presupuesto "${nombre}"?\n\nEsta acción no se puede deshacer.`)) return;
  try {
    const res=await authFetch(API_BASE+'/presupuestos/'+encodeURIComponent(id),{method:'DELETE'});
    if(!res.ok){ const err=await res.json().catch(()=>{}); throw new Error(err?.detail||'Error al eliminar'); }
    showToast('🗑 Presupuesto eliminado');
    ALL_BUDGETS=[]; loadBudgets();
  } catch(e){ showToast('❌ '+e.message); }
}

// ══════════════════ PMO GOVERNANCE — JS ══════════════════
let _govLoaded = false;
let ALL_PMS = [], ALL_GOV = [];
let _govDashVisible = false;
let _govCurrentView = 'pms';

function govView(view, el) {
  _govCurrentView = view;
  document.querySelectorAll('#page-governance .filter-chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));
  el.classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('gov-view-pms').style.display = view==='pms'?'':'none';
  document.getElementById('gov-view-scoring').style.display = view==='scoring'?'':'none';
  document.getElementById('gov-view-gates').style.display = view==='gates'?'':'none';
}

function toggleGovDashboard() {
  _govDashVisible = !_govDashVisible;
  document.getElementById('gov-dashboard').style.display = _govDashVisible ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (_govDashVisible) renderGovDashboard();
}

async function loadGovernance() {
  _govLoaded = true;
  try {
    const [pmRes, govRes, dashRes] = await Promise.all([
      authFetch(API_BASE + '/pmo/managers').then(r=>r.json()),
      authFetch(API_BASE + '/pmo/governance').then(r=>r.json()),
      authFetch(API_BASE + '/pmo/governance/dashboard').then(r=>r.json()),
    ]);
    ALL_PMS = pmRes; ALL_GOV = govRes;
    document.getElementById('gov-pm-count').textContent = ALL_PMS.length + ' PMs · ' + ALL_GOV.length + ' proyectos gobernados';
    renderGovPMs(ALL_PMS);
    renderGovScoring(ALL_GOV);
    renderGovGates(ALL_GOV);
    if (_govDashVisible) renderGovDashboard();
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Gov load error:', e); }
}

function renderGovScoring(gov) {
  const el = document.getElementById('gov-scoring-content');
  if (!gov.length) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="no-data">Sin datos de scoring</div>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML = gov.map(g => {
    const ts = g.total_score || 0;
    const tsColor = ts >= 7 ? 'var(--green)' : ts >= 5 ? 'var(--yellow)' : 'var(--red)';
    return `<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">
      <div style="text-align:center;min-width:50px;">
        <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:${tsColor};">${ts.toFixed?ts.toFixed(1):ts}</div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;">Score</div>
      </div>
      <div style="flex:1;">
        <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;">${escHtml(g.nombre_proyecto||g.id_proyecto)}</div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;font-size:9px;">
          <span style="color:var(--text2);">PM: ${escHtml(g.pm_nombre||'—')}</span>
          <span class="gov-gate gov-gate-${(g.gate_status||'pending').toLowerCase()}">${g.current_gate||'G0'} · ${g.gate_status||'PENDING'}</span>
          <span style="color:var(--text3);">Compliance: ${g.compliance_pct||0}%</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#f59e0b;">${g.roi_score||0}</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text3);">ROI</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--red);">${g.risk_score||0}</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text3);">RISK</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);">${g.capacity_score||0}</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text3);">CAP</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);">${g.strategic_value||0}</div><div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--text3);">VALOR</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function renderGovGates(gov) {
  const el = document.getElementById('gov-gates-content');
  if (!gov.length) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="no-data">Sin datos de gates</div>'; return; }
  const gates = ['G0-IDEA','G1-ANALISIS','G2-PLANIF','G3-EJECUCION','G4-CIERRE','G5-BENEFICIO'];
  const gateColors = {'G0-IDEA':'#8b949e','G1-ANALISIS':'var(--blue)','G2-PLANIF':'#f59e0b','G3-EJECUCION':'var(--orange)','G4-CIERRE':'var(--green)','G5-BENEFICIO':'#a855f7'};
  el.innerHTML = `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;overflow-x:auto;">` + gates.map(gate => {
    const items = gov.filter(g => g.current_gate === gate);
    return `<div style="min-width:180px;flex:1;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;">
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:${gateColors[gate]||'var(--text2)'};margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;">
        <span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:${gateColors[gate]||'var(--text3)'};"></span>
        ${gate} <span style="font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--text3);font-size:9px;">(${items.length})</span>
      </div>
      ${items.length ? items.map(g => `<div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:5px 8px;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:10px;">
        <div style="font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${escHtml((g.nombre_proyecto||g.id_proyecto).substring(0,30))}</div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);">${g.pm_nombre||'—'} · Score: ${(g.total_score||0).toFixed?g.total_score.toFixed(1):g.total_score}</div>
      </div>`).join('') : '<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;padding:8px;">Sin proyectos</div>'}
    </div>`;
  }).join('') + `</div>`;
}

async function renderGovDashboard() {
  try {
    const d = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/pmo/governance/dashboard').then(r=>r.json());
    // KPI cards
    document.getElementById('gov-pillar-kpis').innerHTML = [
      {v:d.total_pms||0,l:'Project Managers',c:'#f59e0b'},
      {v:d.total_proyectos_gobernados||0,l:'Proyectos Gobernados',c:'var(--blue)'},
      {v:(d.avg_scoring||0).toFixed(1)+'/10',l:'Scoring Promedio',c:d.avg_scoring>=7?'var(--green)':d.avg_scoring>=5?'var(--yellow)':'var(--red)'},
      {v:(d.avg_compliance||0).toFixed(0)+'%',l:'Compliance Medio',c:d.avg_compliance>=80?'var(--green)':'var(--orange)'},
    ].map(k=>`<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:${k.c};">${k.v}</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">${k.l}</div>
    </div>`).join('');
    // P1: Demanda
    const gateStatus = d.by_gate_status || {};
    document.getElementById('gov-p1-score').textContent = (d.avg_scoring||0).toFixed(1);
    document.getElementById('gov-p1-content').innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:4px;">
        ${Object.entries(gateStatus).map(([k,v])=>`<span class="gov-gate gov-gate-${k.toLowerCase()}">${k}: ${v}</span>`).join('')}
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">Marco de puntuación: ROI + Riesgo + Capacidad + Valor Estratégico = Score total /10</div>`;
    // P2: Capacidad
    const pctAsig = d.total_pms > 0 ? Math.round(d.pms_asignados / d.total_pms * 100) : 0;
    document.getElementById('gov-p2-score').textContent = pctAsig + '%';
    document.getElementById('gov-p2-content').innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;font-size:10px;margin-top:4px;">
        <span style="color:var(--orange);">● Asignados: ${d.pms_asignados}</span>
        <span style="color:var(--red);">▲ Sobrecargados: ${d.pms_sobrecargados}</span>
        <span style="color:var(--green);">● Disponibles: ${d.total_pms - d.pms_asignados - d.pms_sobrecargados}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="gov-score-bar" style="margin-top:6px;"><div class="gov-score-fill" style="width:${pctAsig}%;background:${pctAsig>80?'var(--red)':pctAsig>50?'var(--orange)':'var(--green)'};"></div></div>`;
    // P3: Compliance
    document.getElementById('gov-p3-score').textContent = (d.avg_compliance||0).toFixed(0) + '%';
    const phases = d.by_gate_phase || {};
    document.getElementById('gov-p3-content').innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:4px;">
        ${Object.entries(phases).map(([k,v])=>`<span style="font-size:8px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg2);color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);">${k}: ${v}</span>`).join('')}
      </div>
      <div class="gov-score-bar" style="margin-top:6px;"><div class="gov-score-fill" style="width:${d.avg_compliance||0}%;background:${(d.avg_compliance||0)>=80?'var(--green)':'var(--orange)'};"></div></div>`;
    // P4: Change Management
    document.getElementById('gov-p4-score').textContent = (d.change_approval_rate||0).toFixed(0) + '%';
    document.getElementById('gov-p4-content').innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;font-size:10px;margin-top:4px;">
        <div><span style="color:var(--text3);">Solicitudes:</span> <strong style="color:var(--text);">${d.total_change_requests||0}</strong></div>
        <div><span style="color:var(--text3);">Tasa aprobación:</span> <strong style="color:${(d.change_approval_rate||0)>=70?'var(--green)':'var(--orange)'};">${(d.change_approval_rate||0).toFixed(0)}%</strong></div>
      </div>
      <div class="gov-score-bar" style="margin-top:6px;"><div class="gov-score-fill" style="width:${d.change_approval_rate||0}%;background:#a855f7;"></div></div>`;
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Gov dashboard error:', e); }
}

function filterGov(val) {
  if (!val) { renderGovPMs(ALL_PMS); return; }
  const v = val.toLowerCase();
  renderGovPMs(ALL_PMS.filter(p => p.nombre.toLowerCase().includes(v) || p.id_pm.toLowerCase().includes(v) || (p.especialidad||'').toLowerCase().includes(v) || (p.certificaciones||[]).join(' ').toLowerCase().includes(v)));
}

// ── PM Form (multi-step) ──
let _pmEditMode = false, _pmStep = 1, _pmNivel = '', _pmEsp = '', _pmSkills = [], _pmCerts = [];

const PM_CERT_OPTIONS = ['PMP','PRINCE2','PMI-ACP','ITIL v4','Scrum Master','SAFe Agilist','TOGAF','COBIT','ISO 27001 LA','CRISC','CISM','AWS Solutions Architect','Azure Solutions','Six Sigma GB','Six Sigma BB','Lean IT','DORA Specialist'];

const PM_SKILL_CATS = [
  {cat:'Liderazgo & Estrategia',icon:'🎯',color:'#f59e0b',skills:['Liderazgo de Equipos','Visión Estratégica','Negociación con Stakeholders','Toma de Decisiones','Gestión de Conflictos','Mentoring & Coaching']},
  {cat:'Planificación & Ejecución',icon:'📋',color:'var(--blue)',skills:['WBS & Cronogramas','Gestión de Alcance','Estimación de Esfuerzo','Critical Path Method','Earned Value Management','Agile/Scrum Framework']},
  {cat:'Riesgo & Compliance',icon:'🛡',color:'var(--red)',skills:['Gestión de Riesgos','Risk Register & Mitigation','Compliance Regulatorio','DORA/BCE Reporting','Auditoría de Proyectos','Business Continuity']},
  {cat:'Financiero & Recursos',icon:'💰',color:'var(--green)',skills:['Gestión Presupuestaria','ROI & Business Case','Resource Capacity Planning','Vendor Management','Contract Negotiation','Cost-Benefit Analysis']},
  {cat:'Comunicación & Cambio',icon:'📢',color:'#a855f7',skills:['Comunicación Ejecutiva','Change Management','Reporting & Dashboards','Gestión de Expectativas','Workshop Facilitation','Knowledge Transfer']},
  {cat:'Técnico & Dominio',icon:'⚙️',color:'var(--cyan)',skills:['Arquitectura IT (alto nivel)','Cloud & Infraestructura','Seguridad & Compliance IT','Data & Analytics Strategy','DevOps & CI/CD Awareness','ITSM & ITIL Practices']},
];

function pmSelNivel(n, el) {
  _pmNivel = n;
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-pm .nivel-card').forEach(c => { c.classList.remove('sel'); c.style.cssText=''; });
  el.classList.add('sel');
  const colors = {'PM-Jr':'#8b949e','PM-Sr':'#2d7ef7','PM-Lead':'#f59e0b','PM-Dir':'#a855f7'};
  el.style.borderColor = colors[n]; el.style.background = colors[n]+'15';
}

function pmSelEsp(e, el) {
  _pmEsp = e;
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-pm .silo-card').forEach(c => { c.classList.remove('sel'); c.style.cssText=''; });
  el.classList.add('sel');
  el.style.borderColor = '#f59e0b'; el.style.background = 'rgba(245,158,11,.12)';
}

function pmSetStep(s) {
  _pmStep = s;
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-pm .fm-step').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('pm-s'+s).classList.add('active');
  [1,2,3].forEach(i => {
    const d = document.getElementById('pm-dot-'+i);
    d.classList.remove('active','done');
    if (i<s) d.classList.add('done'); else if (i===s) d.classList.add('active');
  });
  document.getElementById('pm-back-btn').style.display = s>1?'':'none';
  document.getElementById('pm-next-btn').style.display = s<3?'flex':'none';
  document.getElementById('pm-submit-btn').style.display = s===3?'flex':'none';
  document.getElementById('pm-skill-count').style.display = s===2?'':'none';
  if (s===2) renderPMSkillsStep();
  if (s===3) renderPMPreview();
}

function pmStepNext() {
  if (_pmStep===1) {
    if (!document.getElementById('pm-nombre').value.trim()) { showToast('El nombre es obligatorio'); return; }
    if (!_pmNivel) { showToast('Selecciona un nivel'); return; }
    if (!_pmEsp) { showToast('Selecciona una especialidad'); return; }
  }
  pmSetStep(_pmStep + 1);
}
function pmStepBack() { pmSetStep(_pmStep - 1); }

function renderPMSkillsStep() {
  // Certs grid
  const certsGrid = document.getElementById('pm-certs-grid');
  certsGrid.innerHTML = PM_CERT_OPTIONS.map(c => {
    const sel = _pmCerts.includes(c);
    return `<div class="sk-chip${sel?' sel':''}" style="${sel?'border-color:#f59e0b;background:#f59e0b;color:#fff;':''}" onclick="pmToggleCert('${c}',this)">${c}</div>`;
  }).join('');
  // Skills grid
  const skillsGrid = document.getElementById('pm-skills-grid');
  skillsGrid.innerHTML = PM_SKILL_CATS.map(cat => {
    const selCount = cat.skills.filter(s=>_pmSkills.includes(s)).length;
    return `<div class="skill-cat-block">
      <div class="skill-cat-head" style="color:${cat.color}">
        <span style="font-size:14px">${cat.icon}</span><span>${cat.cat}</span>
        <div class="skill-cat-line" style="background:${cat.color}"></div>
        <span class="skill-cat-cnt" style="color:${cat.color}">${selCount}/${cat.skills.length}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-chips-grid">
        ${cat.skills.map(sk => {
          const isSel = _pmSkills.includes(sk);
          return `<div class="sk-chip${isSel?' sel':''}" style="${isSel?`border-color:${cat.color};background:${cat.color};color:#fff;`:''}" onclick="pmToggleSkill('${sk.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}','${cat.color}',this)">${sk}</div>`;
        }).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  updatePMSkillCount();
}

function pmToggleCert(c, el) {
  const idx = _pmCerts.indexOf(c);
  if (idx>=0) { _pmCerts.splice(idx,1); el.classList.remove('sel'); el.style.cssText=''; }
  else { _pmCerts.push(c); el.classList.add('sel'); el.style.borderColor='#f59e0b'; el.style.background='#f59e0b'; el.style.color='#fff'; }
  updatePMSkillCount();
}

function pmToggleSkill(sk, color, el) {
  const idx = _pmSkills.indexOf(sk);
  if (idx>=0) { _pmSkills.splice(idx,1); el.classList.remove('sel'); el.style.cssText=''; }
  else { _pmSkills.push(sk); el.classList.add('sel'); el.style.borderColor=color; el.style.background=color; el.style.color='#fff'; }
  const catEl = el.closest('.skill-cat-block');
  if (catEl) { const cnt=catEl.querySelector('.skill-cat-cnt'); if(cnt) cnt.textContent=catEl.querySelectorAll('.sk-chip.sel').length+'/'+catEl.querySelectorAll('.sk-chip').length; }
  updatePMSkillCount();
}

function updatePMSkillCount() {
  document.getElementById('pm-skill-count').textContent = _pmSkills.length + ' skills · ' + _pmCerts.length + ' certs';
}

function renderPMPreview() {
  const nombre = document.getElementById('pm-nombre').value.trim();
  const id = document.getElementById('pm-id').value.trim();
  const estado = document.getElementById('pm-estado').value;
  const nColors = {'PM-Jr':'#8b949e','PM-Sr':'#2d7ef7','PM-Lead':'#f59e0b','PM-Dir':'#a855f7'};
  const nc = nColors[_pmNivel]||'#8b949e';
  const initials = (nombre.split(' ').slice(0,2).map(n=>n[0]||'').join('')).toUpperCase()||'?';
  const certsHtml = _pmCerts.length ? _pmCerts.map(c=>`<span style="display:inline-block;font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(245,158,11,.15);color:#f59e0b;margin:1px;">${c}</span>`).join('') : '<span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;">Sin certificaciones</span>';
  const skillsHtml = _pmSkills.length ? _pmSkills.map(s=>`<span class="skill-tag">${s}</span>`).join('') : '<span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;">Sin skills</span>';
  document.getElementById('pm-preview').innerHTML = `
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px;">Revisa los datos antes de confirmar.</div>
    <div class="preview-card" style="border-color:${nc}44;">
      <div class="pc-top">
        <div class="pc-avatar" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,${nc},${nc}99);">${escHtml(initials)}</div>
        <div style="flex:1"><div class="pc-name">${escHtml(nombre)||'Sin nombre'}</div><div class="pc-id">${escHtml(id)}</div></div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:5px;">
          <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:${nc};padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:${nc}22;">${_pmNivel}</span>
          <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--bg3);">${_pmEsp}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pc-meta" style="margin-top:10px;">
        <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green);">● ${estado}</span>
        <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(245,158,11,.15);color:#f59e0b;font-family:var(--mono);">Máx ${document.getElementById('pm-max').value} proyectos</span>
        <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue);font-family:var(--mono);">${_pmSkills.length} skills</span>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px;">CERTIFICACIONES</div>${certsHtml}</div>
      <div style="margin-top:10px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px;">SKILLS PM</div><div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:2px;">${skillsHtml}</div></div>
    </div>`;
  // Show projects if editing
  if (_pmEditMode) {
    const myProjs = ALL_GOV.filter(g=>g.id_pm===document.getElementById('pm-edit-id').value);
    const panel = document.getElementById('pm-projects-panel');
    if (myProjs.length) {
      panel.style.display = 'block';
      document.getElementById('pm-projects-list').innerHTML = myProjs.map(g => {
        const gateClass = 'gov-gate-'+(g.gate_status||'pending').toLowerCase();
        return `<div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:5px;padding:4px 8px;margin-bottom:3px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">${g.id_proyecto}</span>
          <span style="font-size:10px;flex:1;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">${escHtml((g.nombre_proyecto||'').substring(0,40))}</span>
          <span class="gov-gate ${gateClass}">${g.current_gate}</span>
        </div>`;
      }).join('');
    } else { panel.style.display = 'none'; }
  } else { document.getElementById('pm-projects-panel').style.display = 'none'; }
}

function openPMForm() {
  _pmEditMode = false; _pmStep=1; _pmNivel=''; _pmEsp=''; _pmSkills=[]; _pmCerts=[];
  document.getElementById('pm-icon').textContent = '👔';
  document.getElementById('pm-form-title').textContent = 'Nuevo Project Manager';
  document.getElementById('pm-form-sub').textContent = 'Registrar PM en la PMO Governance';
  document.getElementById('pm-btn-text').textContent = '✅ Añadir PM';
  document.getElementById('pm-edit-id').value = '';
  const nextNum = ALL_PMS.length > 0 ? Math.max(...ALL_PMS.map(p=>parseInt(p.id_pm.replace('PM-',''))||0)) + 1 : 1;
  document.getElementById('pm-id').value = 'PM-' + String(nextNum).padStart(3,'0');
  document.getElementById('pm-id').readOnly = false; document.getElementById('pm-id').style.opacity = '';
  document.getElementById('pm-nombre').value = '';
  document.getElementById('pm-estado').value = 'DISPONIBLE';
  document.getElementById('pm-email').value = '';
  document.getElementById('pm-telefono').value = '';
  document.getElementById('pm-max').value = '3';
  document.getElementById('pm-exito').value = '100';
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-pm .nivel-card').forEach(c=>{ c.classList.remove('sel'); c.style.cssText=''; });
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-pm .silo-card').forEach(c=>{ c.classList.remove('sel'); c.style.cssText=''; });
  pmSetStep(1); fmOpen('fm-pm');
}

function openPMEdit(id) {
  const p = ALL_PMS.find(x=>x.id_pm===id);
  if (!p) return;
  _pmEditMode = true; _pmStep=1;
  _pmNivel = p.nivel || '';
  _pmEsp = p.especialidad || '';
  _pmSkills = [...(Array.isArray(p.skills_json) ? p.skills_json : [])];
  _pmCerts = [...(Array.isArray(p.certificaciones) ? p.certificaciones : [])];
  document.getElementById('pm-icon').textContent = '✏️';
  document.getElementById('pm-form-title').textContent = 'Editar PM';
  document.getElementById('pm-form-sub').textContent = p.nombre + ' — ' + p.id_pm;
  document.getElementById('pm-btn-text').textContent = '💾 Guardar Cambios';
  document.getElementById('pm-edit-id').value = p.id_pm;
  const idEl = document.getElementById('pm-id');
  idEl.value = p.id_pm; idEl.readOnly = true; idEl.style.opacity = '.55';
  document.getElementById('pm-nombre').value = p.nombre;
  document.getElementById('pm-estado').value = p.estado;
  document.getElementById('pm-email').value = p.email || '';
  document.getElementById('pm-telefono').value = p.telefono || '';
  document.getElementById('pm-max').value = p.max_proyectos || 3;
  document.getElementById('pm-exito').value = p.tasa_exito || 100;
  // Pre-select nivel
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-pm .nivel-card').forEach(el => {
    el.classList.remove('sel'); el.style.cssText = '';
    const badge = el.querySelector('.nc-badge');
    if (badge && badge.textContent.trim() === _pmNivel.replace('PM-','')) pmSelNivel(_pmNivel, el);
  });
  // Pre-select especialidad
  document.querySelectorAll('#fm-pm .silo-card').forEach(el => {
    el.classList.remove('sel'); el.style.cssText = '';
    const name = el.querySelector('.sc-name');
    if (name && (_pmEsp.startsWith(name.textContent.trim()) || name.textContent.trim().startsWith(_pmEsp.substring(0,8)))) pmSelEsp(_pmEsp, el);
  });
  pmSetStep(1); fmOpen('fm-pm');
}

async function savePM() {
  const nombre = document.getElementById('pm-nombre').value.trim();
  if (!nombre) { showToast('El nombre es obligatorio'); return; }
  const btn = document.getElementById('pm-submit-btn');
  btn.disabled = true; const orig = btn.innerHTML;
  btn.innerHTML = '<span class="loading-spinner" style="width:13px;height:13px;border-width:2px;"></span> Guardando...';
  const payload = {
    nombre,
    nivel: _pmNivel,
    especialidad: _pmEsp,
    estado: document.getElementById('pm-estado').value,
    max_proyectos: parseInt(document.getElementById('pm-max').value) || 3,
    email: document.getElementById('pm-email').value.trim() || null,
    telefono: document.getElementById('pm-telefono').value.trim() || null,
    certificaciones: _pmCerts,
    skills_json: _pmSkills,
    skill_principal: _pmSkills[0] || null,
  };
  const editId = document.getElementById('pm-edit-id').value;
  try {
    let url, method;
    if (_pmEditMode) { url = API_BASE + '/pmo/managers/' + editId; method = 'PUT'; }
    else { payload.id_pm = document.getElementById('pm-id').value.trim(); url = API_BASE + '/pmo/managers'; method = 'POST'; }
    const res = await authFetch(url, {method, headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    if (!res.ok) { const err = await res.json().catch(()=>{}); throw new Error(err?.detail||'Error'); }
    showToast(_pmEditMode ? '💾 PM actualizado' : '✅ PM añadido a la PMO');
    fmClose('fm-pm'); _govLoaded = false; loadGovernance();
  } catch(e) { showToast('❌ '+e.message); }
  btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = orig;
}

// Make gov table rows clickable
function renderGovPMs(pms) {
  const tbody = document.getElementById('gov-tbody');
  if (!pms.length) { tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="11" class="no-data">Sin PMs</td></tr>'; return; }
  const projByPm = {};
  ALL_GOV.forEach(g => { if(g.id_pm) projByPm[g.id_pm] = (projByPm[g.id_pm]||0)+1; });
  tbody.innerHTML = pms.map(p => {
    const initials = p.nombre.split(' ').slice(0,2).map(n=>n[0]).join('');
    const col = AV_COLORS[Math.abs(hashCode(p.nombre)) % AV_COLORS.length];
    const nColors = {'PM-Jr':'#8b949e','PM-Sr':'var(--blue)','PM-Lead':'#f59e0b','PM-Dir':'#a855f7'};
    const nc = nColors[p.nivel]||'#8b949e';
    const eColors = {DISPONIBLE:'var(--green)',ASIGNADO:'var(--orange)',SOBRECARGADO:'var(--red)',BAJA:'var(--red)',VACACIONES:'#8b949e'};
    const eIcons = {DISPONIBLE:'●',ASIGNADO:'●',SOBRECARGADO:'▲',BAJA:'✕',VACACIONES:'◌'};
    const proj = projByPm[p.id_pm] || p.proyectos_activos || 0;
    const maxP = p.max_proyectos || 3;
    const cargaPct = Math.min(100, Math.round(proj / maxP * 100));
    const certs = p.certificaciones || [];
    const certsHtml = certs.slice(0,2).map(c=>`<span style="font-size:8px;padding:0 3px;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(245,158,11,.15);color:#f59e0b;">${c}</span>`).join(' ')+(certs.length>2?`<span style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);">+${certs.length-2}</span>`:'');
    return `<tr style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="openPMEdit('${escHtml(p.id_pm)}')" title="Click para editar">
      <td><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;"><div class="avatar" style="background:${col};width:24px;height:24px;font-size:10px;">${escHtml(initials)}</div><span style="font-weight:500;font-size:11px;">${escHtml(p.nombre)}</span></div></td>
      <td><span class="fte-code" style="font-size:10px;">${escHtml(p.id_pm)}</span></td>
      <td><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:${nc};">${escHtml(p.nivel)}</span></td>
      <td><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">${escHtml(p.especialidad)}</span></td>
      <td style="text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:${proj>maxP?'var(--red)':proj>=maxP?'var(--orange)':'var(--green)'};">${proj}/${maxP}</span></td>
      <td><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><div style="width:40px;height:6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg);overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:${cargaPct}%;height:100%;background:${cargaPct>80?'var(--red)':cargaPct>50?'var(--orange)':'var(--green)'};border-radius:3px;"></div></div><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">${cargaPct}%</span></div></td>
      <td>${certsHtml||'<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">—</span>'}</td>
      <td><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:${(p.tasa_exito||100)>=90?'var(--green)':'var(--orange)'};">${p.tasa_exito||100}%</span></td>
      <td><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:${eColors[p.estado]||'var(--text2)'};">${eIcons[p.estado]||'●'} ${escHtml(p.estado)}</span></td>
      <td style="white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;"><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);">${escHtml(p.email||'')}</span></td>
      <td><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);">${escHtml(p.telefono||'')}</span></td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
  // Update footer
  const asig = pms.filter(p=>p.estado==='ASIGNADO').length;
  const sobre = pms.filter(p=>p.estado==='SOBRECARGADO').length;
  const disp = pms.filter(p=>p.estado==='DISPONIBLE').length;
  const totalProj = Object.values(projByPm).reduce((s,v)=>s+v,0);
  document.getElementById('gov-footer-info').textContent = `${pms.length} PMs · ${asig} asignados · ${sobre} sobrecargados · ${disp} disponibles · ${totalProj} proyectos gestionados`;
}

// Enable drag-reorder for gov and proj tables
['gov-thead-row','proj-thead-row'].forEach(rowId => {
  const row = document.getElementById(rowId);
  if (!row) return;
  let dragTh = null;
  row.addEventListener('dragstart', e => {
    dragTh = e.target.closest('th');
    if (dragTh) { e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move'; dragTh.style.opacity='.4'; }
  });
  row.addEventListener('dragover', e => { e.preventDefault(); });
  row.addEventListener('drop', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const target = e.target.closest('th');
    if (dragTh && target && dragTh !== target) {
      const ths = [...row.children];
      const fromIdx = ths.indexOf(dragTh), toIdx = ths.indexOf(target);
      if (fromIdx < toIdx) target.after(dragTh); else target.before(dragTh);
      const tbodyId = rowId === 'gov-thead-row' ? 'gov-tbody' : 'proj-tbody';
      document.querySelectorAll('#'+tbodyId+' tr').forEach(tr => {
        const cells = [...tr.children];
        if (cells[fromIdx] && cells[toIdx]) {
          if (fromIdx < toIdx) cells[toIdx].after(cells[fromIdx]); else cells[toIdx].before(cells[fromIdx]);
        }
      });
    }
  });
  row.addEventListener('dragend', () => { if(dragTh) dragTh.style.opacity=''; dragTh=null; });
});

// ══════════════════ WAR ROOM COGNITIVO — JS ══════════════════

let _wrLoaded = false;
let WR_ALERTS = [], WR_AUDITS = [], WR_POSTMORTEMS = [], WR_SIMS = [], WR_SESSIONS = [], WR_METRICS = [];
let _wrCurrentAgent = 'AG-008';
let _wrSessionId = null;
let _wrChatHistory = [];

const WR_AGENT_INFO = {
  'AG-001':{name:'Dispatcher ITIL',color:'#2d7ef7',temp:0.1,desc:'Triaje ITIL 4 (P1-P4)'},
  'AG-002':{name:'Resource Manager RUN',color:'#2563eb',temp:0.1,desc:'Matching cognitivo de técnicos'},
  'AG-003':{name:'Demand Forecaster',color:'#0891b2',temp:0.3,desc:'Predicción Prophet 3 días'},
  'AG-004':{name:'Buffer Gatekeeper',color:'#0e7490',temp:0.1,desc:'Pausa BUILD por riesgo P1'},
  'AG-005':{name:'Estratega PMO',color:'#3fb950',temp:0.4,desc:'Gobernanza predictiva portafolio'},
  'AG-006':{name:'Resource Manager BUILD',color:'#059669',temp:0.1,desc:'Asignación atómica proyecto↔recurso'},
  'AG-007':{name:'Planificador PMBOK',color:'#047857',temp:0.5,desc:'WBS + Gantt + PMBOK 7'},
  'AG-008':{name:'Compliance Auditor',color:'#7c3aed',temp:0.2,desc:'Auditoría normativa continua'},
  'AG-009':{name:'Post-Mortem Engine',color:'#9333ea',temp:0.4,desc:'5 Whys + Ishikawa automatizado'},
  'AG-010':{name:'Scenario Simulator',color:'#a855f7',temp:0.7,desc:'Simulación What-If'},
  'AG-012':{name:'Alert Correlator',color:'#c084fc',temp:0.1,desc:'Correlación inteligente de alertas'},
};

function wrShowSection(id, el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.wr-section').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.wr-nav-item').forEach(n=>n.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('wr-sec-'+id).classList.add('active');
  el.classList.add('active');
}

async function loadWarRoom() {
  _wrLoaded = true;
  _wrSessionId = 'WR-' + Date.now();
  await Promise.all([
    wrLoadDashboard(),
    wrLoadAlerts(),
    wrLoadCompliance(),
    wrLoadPostMortems(),
    wrLoadSimulations(),
    wrLoadSessions(),
    wrLoadMetrics(),
  ]);
}

// ── Dashboard ──
async function wrLoadDashboard() {
  try {
    const r = await authFetch('/cognitive/warroom/dashboard');
    const d = await r.json();
    document.getElementById('wr-kpi-alertas').textContent = d.alertas_activas || 0;
    document.getElementById('wr-kpi-compliance').textContent = d.auditorias_pendientes || 0;
    document.getElementById('wr-kpi-postmortem').textContent = d.postmortems_pendientes || 0;
    document.getElementById('wr-kpi-sims').textContent = d.simulaciones_semana || 0;
    // Update badge
    const badge = document.getElementById('wr-alert-count');
    if (d.alertas_criticas > 0) {
      badge.textContent = d.alertas_criticas;
      badge.style.display = 'flex';
    }
    const navBadge = document.getElementById('wr-nav-alerts-badge');
    if (d.alertas_activas > 0) {
      navBadge.textContent = d.alertas_activas;
      navBadge.style.display = 'inline';
    }
    // Semáforo
    const runDot = document.getElementById('wr-sem-run');
    const buildDot = document.getElementById('wr-sem-build');
    if (d.alertas_criticas > 0) {
      runDot.className = 'wr-sem-dot red';
      document.getElementById('wr-sem-run-text').textContent = `${d.alertas_criticas} alertas críticas activas`;
    } else if (d.alertas_activas > 2) {
      runDot.className = 'wr-sem-dot yellow';
      document.getElementById('wr-sem-run-text').textContent = 'Tensión — alertas pendientes';
    } else {
      runDot.className = 'wr-sem-dot green';
      document.getElementById('wr-sem-run-text').textContent = 'Operación normal';
    }
    if (d.auditorias_pendientes > 3) {
      buildDot.className = 'wr-sem-dot yellow';
      document.getElementById('wr-sem-build-text').textContent = `${d.auditorias_pendientes} hallazgos pendientes`;
    } else {
      buildDot.className = 'wr-sem-dot green';
      document.getElementById('wr-sem-build-text').textContent = 'Compliance OK';
    }
  } catch(e) { console.warn('WR dashboard error:', e); }
  wrLoadTimeline();
}

async function wrLoadTimeline() {
  const feed = document.getElementById('wr-timeline-feed');
  try {
    const [alertsR, auditsR] = await Promise.all([
      authFetch('/cognitive/alerts?limit=5').then(r=>r.json()),
      authFetch('/cognitive/audits?limit=5').then(r=>r.json()),
    ]);
    const events = [];
    alertsR.forEach(a => events.push({time:a.created_at, icon:'🔔', text:`AG-012 → Alerta ${a.severity}: ${a.title}`, color:a.severity==='CRITICAL'?'var(--red)':a.severity==='HIGH'?'var(--orange)':'var(--yellow)'}));
    auditsR.forEach(a => events.push({time:a.created_at, icon:'🛡', text:`AG-008 → ${a.audit_type}: ${a.finding.substring(0,80)}...`, color:'#a855f7'}));
    events.sort((a,b) => new Date(b.time) - new Date(a.time));
    if (events.length === 0) {
      feed.innerHTML = '<div class="no-data">Sin actividad reciente. Ejecuta el seed de datos.</div>';
      return;
    }
    feed.innerHTML = events.slice(0,8).map(e => {
      const t = new Date(e.time);
      const ts = t.toLocaleTimeString('es-ES',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
      return `<div class="wr-timeline-item">
        <div class="wr-timeline-time">${ts} — ${t.toLocaleDateString('es-ES')}</div>
        <div class="wr-timeline-text" style="color:${e.color}">${e.text}</div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
  } catch(e) {
    feed.innerHTML = '<div class="no-data">Error cargando timeline</div>';
  }
}

// ── Alertas ──
async function wrLoadAlerts() {
  try {
    const r = await authFetch('/cognitive/alerts?limit=50');
    WR_ALERTS = await r.json();
    wrRenderAlerts(WR_ALERTS);
  } catch(e) { console.warn('WR alerts error:', e); }
}

let _wrAlertFilter = 'ALL';
function wrFilterAlerts(sev, el) {
  _wrAlertFilter = sev;
  document.querySelectorAll('#wr-alert-filters .wr-filter-chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));
  el.classList.add('active');
  const filtered = sev === 'ALL' ? WR_ALERTS : WR_ALERTS.filter(a=>a.severity===sev);
  wrRenderAlerts(filtered);
}

function wrRenderAlerts(alerts) {
  const feed = document.getElementById('wr-alerts-feed');
  if (!alerts.length) { feed.innerHTML = '<div class="no-data">Sin alertas</div>'; return; }
  feed.innerHTML = alerts.map(a => {
    const sev = a.severity.toLowerCase();
    const ts = new Date(a.created_at).toLocaleString('es-ES',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
    return `<div class="wr-alert-card ${sev}">
      <span class="wr-alert-sev wr-sev-${sev}">${a.severity}</span>
      <div class="wr-alert-body">
        <div class="wr-alert-title">${a.title}</div>
        <div class="wr-alert-desc">${a.description.substring(0,150)}</div>
        <div class="wr-alert-meta">
          <span>${a.alert_type}</span>
          <span>·</span>
          <span>${a.source_agent}</span>
          <span>·</span>
          <span>${ts}</span>
          <span>·</span>
          <span style="color:${a.status==='ACTIVE'?'var(--red)':a.status==='ACKNOWLEDGED'?'var(--yellow)':'var(--green)'};font-weight:600;">${a.status}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wr-alert-actions">
        ${a.status==='ACTIVE'?`<button class="wr-btn-sm wr-btn-ack" onclick="wrAckAlert('${a.id}')">ACK</button>`:''}
        ${a.status!=='RESOLVED'?`<button class="wr-btn-sm wr-btn-resolve" onclick="wrResolveAlert('${a.id}')">Resolver</button>`:''}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

async function wrAckAlert(id) {
  try {
    await authFetch(`/cognitive/alerts/${id}/acknowledge`, {method:'PUT'});
    showToast('Alerta reconocida');
    wrLoadAlerts();
    wrLoadDashboard();
  } catch(e) { showToast('Error: '+e.message); }
}
async function wrResolveAlert(id) {
  try {
    await authFetch(`/cognitive/alerts/${id}/resolve`, {method:'PUT'});
    showToast('Alerta resuelta');
    wrLoadAlerts();
    wrLoadDashboard();
  } catch(e) { showToast('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ── Compliance ──
async function wrLoadCompliance() {
  try {
    const [dashboard, audits] = await Promise.all([
      authFetch('/cognitive/compliance/dashboard').then(r=>r.json()),
      authFetch('/cognitive/audits?limit=50').then(r=>r.json()),
    ]);
    WR_AUDITS = audits;
    // KPIs
    const kpis = document.getElementById('wr-compliance-kpis');
    kpis.innerHTML = `
      <div class="wr-kpi"><div class="wr-kpi-val" style="color:var(--red);">${dashboard.critical_open||0}</div><div class="wr-kpi-label">Critical Abiertos</div></div>
      <div class="wr-kpi"><div class="wr-kpi-val" style="color:var(--yellow);">${dashboard.open||0}</div><div class="wr-kpi-label">Total Abiertos</div></div>
      <div class="wr-kpi"><div class="wr-kpi-val" style="color:var(--green);">${dashboard.total||0}</div><div class="wr-kpi-label">Total Hallazgos</div></div>
    `;
    wrRenderAudits(audits);
  } catch(e) { console.warn('WR compliance error:', e); }
}

function wrFilterAudits(type, el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('#wr-sec-compliance .wr-filter-chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));
  el.classList.add('active');
  const filtered = type === 'ALL' ? WR_AUDITS : WR_AUDITS.filter(a=>a.audit_type===type);
  wrRenderAudits(filtered);
}

function wrRenderAudits(audits) {
  const feed = document.getElementById('wr-compliance-feed');
  if (!audits.length) { feed.innerHTML = '<div class="no-data">Sin hallazgos de compliance</div>'; return; }
  feed.innerHTML = audits.map(a => {
    const sev = a.severity.toLowerCase();
    const ts = new Date(a.created_at).toLocaleString('es-ES',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
    return `<div class="wr-compliance-card" style="border-left:3px solid ${sev==='critical'?'var(--red)':sev==='high'?'var(--orange)':sev==='medium'?'var(--yellow)':'var(--green)'};">
      <div class="wr-compliance-hdr">
        <span class="wr-compliance-type">${a.audit_type}</span>
        <span class="wr-alert-sev wr-sev-${sev}">${a.severity}</span>
        <span class="wr-compliance-entity">${a.entity_type}: ${a.entity_id}</span>
        <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:10px;color:${a.status==='OPEN'?'var(--red)':'var(--green)'};">${a.status}</span>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:12px;margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.4;">${a.finding}</div>
      ${a.recommendation?`<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);padding:6px 10px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:6px;border-left:2px solid #a855f7;">💡 ${a.recommendation}</div>`:''}
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:6px;">${ts} · ${a.created_by||'AG-008'}${a.assignee?' · Asignado: '+a.assignee:''}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

// ── Post-Mortem ──
async function wrLoadPostMortems() {
  try {
    const r = await authFetch('/cognitive/postmortem?limit=50');
    WR_POSTMORTEMS = await r.json();
    wrRenderPostMortems(WR_POSTMORTEMS);
  } catch(e) { console.warn('WR postmortem error:', e); }
}

function wrRenderPostMortems(pms) {
  const feed = document.getElementById('wr-postmortem-feed');
  if (!pms.length) { feed.innerHTML = '<div class="no-data">Sin informes post-mortem</div>'; return; }
  feed.innerHTML = pms.map(pm => {
    const statusCls = pm.review_status==='DRAFT'?'wr-pm-draft':pm.review_status==='REVIEW'?'wr-pm-review':'wr-pm-approved';
    const ts = new Date(pm.created_at).toLocaleDateString('es-ES');
    const timeline = (typeof pm.timeline === 'string' ? JSON.parse(pm.timeline) : pm.timeline) || [];
    const corrective = (typeof pm.corrective_actions === 'string' ? JSON.parse(pm.corrective_actions) : pm.corrective_actions) || [];
    const lessons = pm.lessons_learned || [];
    return `<div class="wr-pm-card">
      <div class="wr-pm-hdr">
        <span class="wr-alert-sev wr-sev-${pm.incident_priority==='P1'?'critical':'high'}">${pm.incident_priority}</span>
        <div class="wr-pm-title">${pm.title}</div>
        <span class="wr-pm-status ${statusCls}">${pm.review_status}</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;">
        <div style="background:var(--bg2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;">
          <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:var(--orange);">${pm.mttr_minutes||'--'}</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">MTTR (min)</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;">
          <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue);">${pm.mtta_minutes||'--'}</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">MTTA (min)</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;">
          <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:${pm.sla_breached?'var(--red)':'var(--green)'};">${pm.sla_breached?'SÍ':'NO'}</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">SLA Breach</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-bottom:8px;">
        <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">Root Cause:</span>
        <span style="font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--orange-bg);color:var(--orange);font-weight:600;margin-left:4px;">${pm.root_cause_category||'N/A'}</span>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:12px;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--text2);">${pm.root_cause}</div>
      ${timeline.length?`<div style="margin-top:8px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px;text-transform:uppercase;">Timeline</div>${timeline.map(t=>`<div style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);"><span style="font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--text3);margin-right:6px;">${t.time||''}</span>${t.event||t.description||''}</div>`).join('')}</div>`:''}
      ${corrective.length?`<div style="margin-top:8px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px;text-transform:uppercase;">Acciones Correctivas</div>${corrective.map(c=>`<div style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;color:var(--text2);">• ${typeof c==='string'?c:c.action||JSON.stringify(c)}</div>`).join('')}</div>`:''}
      ${lessons.length?`<div style="margin-top:8px;"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px;text-transform:uppercase;">Lecciones Aprendidas</div>${lessons.map(l=>`<div style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;color:#a855f7;">💡 ${l}</div>`).join('')}</div>`:''}
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:10px;">
        <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">📅 ${ts}</span>
        <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">· ${pm.incident_id}</span>
        ${pm.review_status==='DRAFT'?`<button class="wr-btn-sm wr-btn-ack" onclick="wrApprovePostMortem('${pm.id}')" style="margin-left:auto;">Aprobar</button>`:''}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

async function wrApprovePostMortem(id) {
  try {
    await authFetch(`/cognitive/postmortem/${id}/approve?approved_by=Jose Antonio Martinez Victoria`, {method:'PUT'});
    showToast('Post-mortem aprobado');
    wrLoadPostMortems();
  } catch(e) { showToast('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ── Simulaciones ──
async function wrLoadSimulations() {
  try {
    const r = await authFetch('/cognitive/simulation?limit=20');
    WR_SIMS = await r.json();
    wrRenderSimHistory(WR_SIMS);
  } catch(e) { console.warn('WR sim error:', e); }
}

function wrRenderSimHistory(sims) {
  const feed = document.getElementById('wr-sim-history');
  if (!sims.length) { feed.innerHTML = '<div class="no-data">Sin simulaciones previas</div>'; return; }
  feed.innerHTML = sims.map(s => {
    const result = typeof s.simulation_result === 'string' ? JSON.parse(s.simulation_result) : s.simulation_result;
    const kpi = typeof s.kpi_deltas === 'string' ? JSON.parse(s.kpi_deltas) : s.kpi_deltas || {};
    const ts = new Date(s.created_at).toLocaleString('es-ES');
    const recs = s.recommendations || [];
    return `<div class="wr-compliance-card" style="border-left:3px solid ${s.risk_score>70?'var(--red)':s.risk_score>40?'var(--yellow)':'var(--green)'};">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <span style="padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;background:var(--purple-bg);color:#a855f7;font-family:var(--mono);">${s.scenario_type}</span>
        <span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;flex:1;">${s.simulation_name}</span>
        <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:${s.risk_score>70?'var(--red)':s.risk_score>40?'var(--yellow)':'var(--green)'};">Risk: ${s.risk_score}</span>
      </div>
      ${Object.keys(kpi).length?`<div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:8px;">${Object.entries(kpi).map(([k,v])=>`<div style="font-size:10px;"><span style="color:var(--text3);">${k}:</span> <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;">${v}</span></div>`).join('')}</div>`:''}
      ${recs.length?`<div style="margin-top:6px;">${recs.slice(0,3).map(r=>`<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);padding:2px 0;">→ ${r}</div>`).join('')}</div>`:''}
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:6px;">Confianza: ${Math.round(s.confidence_level*100)}% · ${ts}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

async function wrRunSimulation() {
  const type = document.getElementById('wr-sim-type').value;
  const name = document.getElementById('wr-sim-name').value;
  const desc = document.getElementById('wr-sim-desc').value;
  if (!name) { showToast('Introduce un nombre para la simulación'); return; }
  showToast('Ejecutando simulación...');
  // Generate simulation locally with realistic data
  const risk = Math.round(20 + Math.random() * 60);
  const conf = +(0.5 + Math.random() * 0.4).toFixed(2);
  const payload = {
    simulation_name: name,
    scenario_type: type,
    input_params: {description: desc, type: type},
    baseline_snapshot: {projects: 46, technicians: 150, active_alerts: parseInt(document.getElementById('wr-kpi-alertas').textContent)||0},
    simulation_result: {
      best_case: {risk: Math.max(5,risk-25), sla_impact: '+'+Math.round(Math.random()*5)+'%', cost_delta: '€0', timeline_delta: '0d', burnout_risk: Math.round(risk*0.4)},
      base_case: {risk: risk, sla_impact: '-'+Math.round(Math.random()*8+2)+'%', cost_delta: '-€'+Math.round(Math.random()*15+3)+'K', timeline_delta: '+'+Math.round(Math.random()*5+1)+'d', burnout_risk: Math.round(risk*0.7)},
      worst_case: {risk: Math.min(98,risk+20), sla_impact: '-'+Math.round(Math.random()*15+8)+'%', cost_delta: '-€'+Math.round(Math.random()*30+10)+'K', timeline_delta: '+'+Math.round(Math.random()*12+5)+'d', burnout_risk: Math.min(95,Math.round(risk*1.1))},
    },
    risk_score: risk,
    confidence_level: conf,
    recommendations: [
      'Asignar recurso backup antes de ejecutar el cambio',
      'Activar freeze preventivo si la predicción supera 25 incidencias',
      'Notificar al PM del proyecto afectado sobre impacto estimado',
      'Revisar capacidad del pool de técnicos N3+',
    ],
    affected_projects: ['PRJ0034','PRJ0035','PRJ0036'],
    affected_resources: ['FTE-082','FTE-091'],
    kpi_deltas: {sla_impact: '-5%', cost_delta: '-€8K', timeline_delta: '+3d', burnout_risk: Math.round(risk*0.7), capacity: Math.round(60+Math.random()*25)+'%'},
  };
  try {
    const r = await authFetch('/cognitive/simulation/run', {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    if (!r.ok) throw new Error('Error en simulación');
    const sim = await r.json();
    showToast('Simulación completada — Risk Score: ' + risk);
    // Show results
    const result = payload.simulation_result;
    document.getElementById('wr-sim-results').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('wr-sim-cases').innerHTML = ['best','base','worst'].map(c => {
      const d = result[c+'_case'];
      const label = c==='best'?'MEJOR CASO':c==='base'?'CASO BASE':'PEOR CASO';
      const color = c==='best'?'var(--green)':c==='base'?'var(--yellow)':'var(--red)';
      return `<div class="wr-sim-case ${c}">
        <div class="wr-sim-case-title" style="color:${color};">${label}</div>
        <div class="wr-sim-metric"><span>Risk Score</span><span class="wr-sim-metric-val" style="color:${color};">${d.risk}</span></div>
        <div class="wr-sim-metric"><span>SLA Impact</span><span class="wr-sim-metric-val">${d.sla_impact}</span></div>
        <div class="wr-sim-metric"><span>Coste</span><span class="wr-sim-metric-val">${d.cost_delta}</span></div>
        <div class="wr-sim-metric"><span>Timeline</span><span class="wr-sim-metric-val">${d.timeline_delta}</span></div>
        <div class="wr-sim-metric"><span>Burnout</span><span class="wr-sim-metric-val">${d.burnout_risk}</span></div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
    document.getElementById('wr-sim-recommendations').innerHTML = `
      <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;border-left:3px solid #a855f7;">
        <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#a855f7;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Recomendaciones</div>
        ${payload.recommendations.map((r,i)=>`<div style="font-size:12px;padding:3px 0;color:var(--text2);">${i+1}. ${r}</div>`).join('')}
      </div>`;
    wrLoadSimulations();
  } catch(e) { showToast('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ── Sesiones ──
async function wrLoadSessions() {
  try {
    const r = await authFetch('/cognitive/warroom/sessions');
    WR_SESSIONS = await r.json();
    wrRenderSessions(WR_SESSIONS);
  } catch(e) { console.warn('WR sessions error:', e); }
}

function wrRenderSessions(sessions) {
  const feed = document.getElementById('wr-sessions-feed');
  if (!sessions.length) { feed.innerHTML = '<div class="no-data">Sin sesiones de crisis</div>'; return; }
  feed.innerHTML = sessions.map(s => {
    const ts = new Date(s.started_at).toLocaleString('es-ES');
    const participants = typeof s.participants === 'string' ? JSON.parse(s.participants) : s.participants || [];
    return `<div class="wr-session-card">
      <div class="wr-session-hdr">
        <span class="wr-session-type">${s.session_type}</span>
        <span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;flex:1;">${s.session_name}</span>
        <span class="wr-pm-status ${s.status==='ACTIVE'?'wr-session-active':'wr-pm-draft'}">${s.status}</span>
      </div>
      ${participants.length?`<div style="display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:6px;">${participants.map(p=>`<span style="font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--purple-bg);color:#a855f7;">${p}</span>`).join('')}</div>`:''}
      ${s.summary?`<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px;">${s.summary}</div>`:''}
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">📅 ${ts}${s.closed_at?' · Cerrada: '+new Date(s.closed_at).toLocaleString('es-ES'):''}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

async function wrCreateSession() {
  const name = prompt('Nombre de la sesión de crisis:');
  if (!name) return;
  try {
    const r = await authFetch('/cognitive/warroom/sessions', {
      method:'POST',
      headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({session_name:name, session_type:'AD_HOC', participants:['AG-008','AG-012'], context:{}}),
    });
    if (!r.ok) throw new Error('Error creando sesión');
    showToast('Sesión creada');
    wrLoadSessions();
  } catch(e) { showToast('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ── Métricas ──
async function wrLoadMetrics() {
  try {
    const r = await authFetch('/cognitive/metrics/agents');
    WR_METRICS = await r.json();
    wrRenderMetrics(WR_METRICS);
  } catch(e) { console.warn('WR metrics error:', e); }
}

function wrRenderMetrics(metrics) {
  const grid = document.getElementById('wr-metrics-grid');
  // Group by agent_id
  const byAgent = {};
  metrics.forEach(m => {
    if (!byAgent[m.agent_id]) byAgent[m.agent_id] = m;
  });
  const agents = Object.keys(WR_AGENT_INFO);
  if (Object.keys(byAgent).length === 0) {
    // Show all agents with placeholder data
    grid.innerHTML = agents.map(id => {
      const info = WR_AGENT_INFO[id];
      return `<div class="wr-metric-card">
        <div class="wr-metric-card-hdr">
          <div class="wr-metric-agent-av" style="background:${info.color};">${id.replace('AG-','')}</div>
          <div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">${id}</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">${info.name}</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="wr-metric-vals">
          <div><div class="wr-metric-v" style="color:var(--blue);">--</div><div class="wr-metric-l">Invocaciones</div></div>
          <div><div class="wr-metric-v" style="color:var(--green);">--</div><div class="wr-metric-l">Latencia (ms)</div></div>
          <div><div class="wr-metric-v" style="color:var(--yellow);">--</div><div class="wr-metric-l">Tokens</div></div>
          <div><div class="wr-metric-v" style="color:var(--purple);">--</div><div class="wr-metric-l">Éxito %</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
    return;
  }
  grid.innerHTML = agents.map(id => {
    const info = WR_AGENT_INFO[id];
    const m = byAgent[id] || {};
    return `<div class="wr-metric-card">
      <div class="wr-metric-card-hdr">
        <div class="wr-metric-agent-av" style="background:${info.color};">${id.replace('AG-','')}</div>
        <div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">${id}</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">${info.name}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="wr-metric-vals">
        <div><div class="wr-metric-v" style="color:var(--blue);">${m.total_invocations||0}</div><div class="wr-metric-l">Invocaciones</div></div>
        <div><div class="wr-metric-v" style="color:var(--green);">${Math.round(m.avg_latency_ms||0)}</div><div class="wr-metric-l">Latencia (ms)</div></div>
        <div><div class="wr-metric-v" style="color:var(--yellow);">${m.total_tokens_consumed?Math.round(m.total_tokens_consumed/1000)+'K':'0'}</div><div class="wr-metric-l">Tokens</div></div>
        <div><div class="wr-metric-v" style="color:${(m.success_rate||100)>=95?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'};">${m.success_rate||100}%</div><div class="wr-metric-l">Éxito</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

// ── Chat Multi-Agente ──
function wrSelectAgent(agentId, el) {
  _wrCurrentAgent = agentId;
  document.querySelectorAll('.wr-agent-item').forEach(i=>i.classList.remove('active'));
  el.classList.add('active');
  const info = WR_AGENT_INFO[agentId];
  document.getElementById('wr-chat-av').style.background = info.color;
  document.getElementById('wr-chat-av').textContent = agentId.replace('AG-0','').replace('AG-','');
  document.getElementById('wr-chat-agent-name').textContent = agentId + ' ' + info.name;
  document.getElementById('wr-chat-agent-sub').textContent = `Temp: ${info.temp} · ${info.desc}`;
  // Clear chat for new agent
  _wrChatHistory = [];
  document.getElementById('wr-chat-messages').innerHTML = `
    <div style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--text3);font-size:12px;">
      Conversación con <strong style="color:${info.color};">${agentId} ${info.name}</strong><br>
      Escribe tu mensaje para comenzar.
    </div>`;
}

async function wrSendChat() {
  const input = document.getElementById('wr-chat-input');
  const msg = input.value.trim();
  if (!msg) return;
  input.value = '';
  const messages = document.getElementById('wr-chat-messages');
  // Remove placeholder
  if (messages.querySelector('div[style*="text-align:center"]')) messages.innerHTML = '';
  // Add user bubble
  const now = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-ES',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
  messages.innerHTML += `<div class="wr-chat-bubble wr-bubble-user">${escapeHtml(msg)}<div class="wr-bubble-meta">${now}</div></div>`;
  messages.scrollTop = messages.scrollHeight;
  // Add typing indicator
  const typingId = 'typing-'+Date.now();
  messages.innerHTML += `<div class="wr-chat-bubble wr-bubble-assistant" id="${typingId}" style="color:var(--text3);font-style:italic;">Pensando...</div>`;
  messages.scrollTop = messages.scrollHeight;

  try {
    const r = await authFetch('/cognitive/chat', {
      method:'POST',
      headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
