      body: JSON.stringify({session_id: _wrSessionId, agent_id: _wrCurrentAgent, message: msg}),
    });
    const data = await r.json();
    const typing = document.getElementById(typingId);
    if (typing) {
      const info = WR_AGENT_INFO[_wrCurrentAgent];
      typing.id = '';
      typing.style.color = '';
      typing.style.fontStyle = '';
      typing.innerHTML = `${formatChatResponse(data.response)}<div class="wr-bubble-meta">${_wrCurrentAgent} · ${data.model} · ${data.latency_ms}ms · ${data.tokens_used} tokens</div>`;
    }
    messages.scrollTop = messages.scrollHeight;
  } catch(e) {
    const typing = document.getElementById(typingId);
    if (typing) { typing.textContent = 'Error: '+e.message; typing.style.color='var(--red)'; }
  }
}

function escapeHtml(t) {
  return t.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');
}
function formatChatResponse(text) {
  // Basic markdown-like formatting
  return text.replace(/\n/g,'<br>').replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g,'<strong>$1</strong>').replace(/`(.*?)`/g,'<code style="background:var(--bg);padding:1px 4px;border-radius:3px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;">$1</code>');
}

// ══════════════════ DOCUMENTACIÓN — JS ══════════════════
let _docsLoaded = false, ALL_DOCS = [], _docSearch = '', _docEditMode = false;

async function loadDocs() {
  _docsLoaded = true;
  const silo = document.getElementById('doc-filter-silo').value;
  const tipo = document.getElementById('doc-filter-tipo').value;
  const depto = document.getElementById('doc-filter-depto').value;
  let url = API_BASE + '/documentacion?limit=200';
  if (silo) url += '&silo=' + silo;
  if (tipo) url += '&tipo=' + tipo;
  if (depto) url += '&departamento=' + depto;
  if (_docSearch) url += '&search=' + encodeURIComponent(_docSearch);
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(url).then(r=>r.json());
    ALL_DOCS = r.docs || [];
    document.getElementById('docs-count').textContent = r.total + ' documentos';
    renderDocs(ALL_DOCS);
    loadDocDeptos();
  } catch(e) { console.warn(e); }
}

function filterDocs(val) { _docSearch = val; loadDocs(); }
function filterDocsApply() { loadDocs(); }
function toggleDocStats() {
  const el = document.getElementById('docs-stats');
  el.style.display = el.style.display === 'none' ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (el.style.display !== 'none') loadDocStats();
}

async function loadDocStats() {
  try {
    const s = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/documentacion/stats').then(r=>r.json());
    document.getElementById('docs-kpis').innerHTML = [
      {v:s.total||0,l:'Total Docs',c:'#0ea5e9'},
      {v:s.by_silo?.BUILD||0,l:'BUILD',c:'var(--green)'},
      {v:s.by_silo?.RUN||0,l:'RUN',c:'var(--blue)'},
      {v:s.by_silo?.TRANSVERSAL||0,l:'TRANSVERSAL',c:'var(--purple)'},
    ].map(k=>`<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:${k.c};">${k.v}</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;">${k.l}</div></div>`).join('');
    const tipoColors = {proyecto:'var(--green)',incidencia:'var(--blue)',gobernanza:'var(--purple)',formacion:'var(--yellow)',herramienta:'var(--orange)',plantilla:'#0ea5e9'};
    document.getElementById('docs-breakdown').innerHTML = Object.entries(s.by_tipo||{}).map(([t,c])=>`<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:${tipoColors[t]||'var(--text3)'};"></span><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);flex:1;">${t}</span><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">${c}</span></div>`).join('');
  } catch(e) {}
}

function renderDocs(docs) {
  const grid = document.getElementById('docs-grid');
  if (!docs.length) { grid.innerHTML = '<div class="no-data" style="grid-column:1/-1;">Sin documentos. Registra el primero con el botón "+ Documento".</div>'; return; }
  const fileIcons = {pdf:'📕',docx:'📘',xlsx:'📗',pptx:'📙',md:'📝',txt:'📄',csv:'📊',json:'⚙️'};
  grid.innerHTML = docs.map(d => {
    const ext = (d.archivo_tipo || d.archivo_nombre?.split('.').pop() || '').toLowerCase();
    const icon = fileIcons[ext] || '📎';
    const tags = (d.tags || []).slice(0,3).map(t=>`<span class="doc-tag">${escHtml(t)}</span>`).join('');
    const ts = d.fecha_creacion ? new Date(d.fecha_creacion).toLocaleDateString('es-ES') : '';
    const size = d.archivo_size ? (d.archivo_size > 1048576 ? (d.archivo_size/1048576).toFixed(1)+'MB' : (d.archivo_size/1024).toFixed(0)+'KB') : '';
    return `<div class="doc-card doc-silo-${(d.silo||'build').toLowerCase()}" onclick="openDocDetail(${d.id})">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;">
        <span style="font-size:24px;line-height:1;">${icon}</span>
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${escHtml(d.titulo)}</div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:4px;">
            <span class="doc-type-badge doc-type-${d.tipo}">${d.tipo}</span>
            <span style="font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg2);color:var(--text3);">${d.silo}</span>
            ${d.departamento?`<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">${d.departamento}</span>`:''}
          </div>
          ${d.descripcion?`<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:4px;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden;">${escHtml(d.descripcion)}</div>`:''}
          <div style="display:flex;gap:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;">${tags}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;padding-top:6px;border-top:1px solid var(--border2);font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">
        <span>${ts}</span>
        ${size?`<span>· ${size}</span>`:''}
        ${d.creado_por?`<span>· ${d.creado_por.split(' ')[0]}</span>`:''}
        ${d.proyecto_id?`<span style="color:var(--green);">· ${d.proyecto_id}</span>`:''}
        ${d.drive_share_url?`<a href="${d.drive_share_url}" target="_blank" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" style="margin-left:auto;color:#0ea5e9;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;">↗ Drive</a>`:''}
        <button onclick="event.stopPropagation();deleteDoc(${d.id},'${escHtml(d.titulo).replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')" style="margin-left:${d.drive_share_url?'4px':'auto'};background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.3);color:var(--red);border-radius:3px;padding:1px 6px;font-size:8px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">✕</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function openDocDetail(id) {
  const d = ALL_DOCS.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if (!d) return;
  _docEditMode = true;
  document.getElementById('doc-form-title').textContent = 'Editar: ' + d.titulo;
  document.getElementById('doc-edit-id').value = d.id;
  document.getElementById('doc-titulo').value = d.titulo;
  document.getElementById('doc-desc').value = d.descripcion || '';
  document.getElementById('doc-tipo').value = d.tipo;
  document.getElementById('doc-silo').value = d.silo;
  docSiloChanged();
  setTimeout(()=>{ document.getElementById('doc-depto').value = d.departamento || ''; }, 50);
  document.getElementById('doc-tags').value = (d.tags||[]).join(', ');
  document.getElementById('doc-creador').value = d.creado_por || '';
  document.getElementById('doc-drive-url').value = d.drive_share_url || '';
  document.getElementById('doc-btn-save').textContent = 'Guardar Cambios';
  fmOpen('fm-doc');
}

function openDocForm() {
  _docEditMode = false;
  document.getElementById('doc-form-title').textContent = 'Nuevo Documento';
  document.getElementById('doc-edit-id').value = '';
  document.getElementById('doc-titulo').value = '';
  document.getElementById('doc-desc').value = '';
  document.getElementById('doc-tipo').value = 'proyecto';
  document.getElementById('doc-silo').value = 'BUILD';
  document.getElementById('doc-tags').value = '';
  document.getElementById('doc-creador').value = 'Jose Antonio Martinez';
  document.getElementById('doc-drive-url').value = '';
  document.getElementById('doc-file-info').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('doc-btn-save').textContent = 'Registrar Documento';
  docSiloChanged();
  loadDocProjects();
  fmOpen('fm-doc');
}

function docSiloChanged() {
  const silo = document.getElementById('doc-silo').value;
  const deptos = {BUILD:['IT_Development','IT_Architecture','PMO_BUILD','QA','DevOps'],RUN:['IT_Operations','IT_Support','IT_Security','PMO_RUN','NOC'],TRANSVERSAL:['Gobernanza_General','RRHH','Formacion','Legal','Compliance']};
  const sel = document.getElementById('doc-depto');
  sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Seleccionar —</option>' + (deptos[silo]||[]).map(d=>`<option value="${d}">${d}</option>`).join('');
}

async function loadDocDeptos() {
  const sel = document.getElementById('doc-filter-depto');
  if (sel.options.length > 1) return;
  try {
    const data = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/documentacion/departamentos').then(r=>r.json());
    data.forEach(g => g.departamentos.forEach(d => {
      const opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = d; opt.textContent = g.silo + ' / ' + d;
      sel.appendChild(opt);
    }));
  } catch(e) {}
}

async function loadDocProjects() {
  const sel = document.getElementById('doc-proyecto');
  if (sel.options.length > 1) return;
  try {
    const data = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cartera/proyectos').then(r=>r.json());
    data.forEach(p => { const o = document.createElement('option'); o.value=p.id_proyecto; o.textContent=p.id_proyecto+' — '+(p.nombre_proyecto||'').substring(0,40); sel.appendChild(o); });
  } catch(e) {}
}

function docFileSelected(input) {
  const file = input.files[0];
  if (!file) return;
  const info = document.getElementById('doc-file-info');
  info.style.display = 'block';
  info.textContent = file.name + ' (' + (file.size/1024).toFixed(0) + 'KB)';
  if (!document.getElementById('doc-titulo').value) document.getElementById('doc-titulo').value = file.name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/,'');
}
function docHandleDrop(e) {
  const file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
  if (file) { document.getElementById('doc-file-input').files = e.dataTransfer.files; docFileSelected(document.getElementById('doc-file-input')); }
}

async function saveDoc() {
  const titulo = document.getElementById('doc-titulo').value.trim();
  if (!titulo) { showToast('El título es obligatorio'); return; }
  const tagsRaw = document.getElementById('doc-tags').value;
  const file = document.getElementById('doc-file-input').files[0];
  const payload = {
    titulo, descripcion: document.getElementById('doc-desc').value.trim() || null,
    tipo: document.getElementById('doc-tipo').value, silo: document.getElementById('doc-silo').value,
    departamento: document.getElementById('doc-depto').value || null,
    proyecto_id: document.getElementById('doc-proyecto').value || null,
    tags: tagsRaw ? tagsRaw.split(',').map(t=>t.trim()).filter(Boolean) : [],
    creado_por: document.getElementById('doc-creador').value.trim() || null,
    drive_share_url: document.getElementById('doc-drive-url').value.trim() || null,
    archivo_nombre: file ? file.name : null,
    archivo_size: file ? file.size : 0,
    archivo_tipo: file ? file.name.split('.').pop() : null,
    mime_type: file ? file.type : null,
  };
  const editId = document.getElementById('doc-edit-id').value;
  try {
    const url = _docEditMode ? API_BASE+'/documentacion/'+editId : API_BASE+'/documentacion';
    const method = _docEditMode ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
    const r = await authFetch(url, {method, headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    if (!r.ok) throw new Error((await r.json().catch(()=>{}))?.detail||'Error');
    showToast(_docEditMode ? 'Documento actualizado' : 'Documento registrado');
    fmClose('fm-doc'); loadDocs();
  } catch(e) { showToast('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function deleteDoc(id, titulo) {
  if (!confirm('¿Eliminar el documento?\n\n"'+titulo+'"\n\nEl archivo en Google Drive NO se eliminará.')) return;
  try {
    await authFetch(API_BASE+'/documentacion/'+id, {method:'DELETE'});
    showToast('Documento eliminado');
    loadDocs();
  } catch(e) { showToast('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ══════════════════ CMDB — JS ══════════════════
var _cmdbActivos = [];
var CRIT_COLORS = {CRITICA:'#ef4444',ALTA:'#f59e0b',MEDIA:'#3b82f6',BAJA:'#6b7280'};
var CAPA_COLORS = {INFRAESTRUCTURA:'#3b82f6',APLICACION:'#8b5cf6',RED:'#10b981',SEGURIDAD:'#ef4444',NEGOCIO:'#f59e0b',SOPORTE:'#6b7280'};
var ESTADO_COLORS = {OPERATIVO:'#3fb950',DEGRADADO:'#f59e0b',MANTENIMIENTO:'#f0883e',RETIRADO:'#6b7280',PLANIFICADO:'#3b82f6',DISCOVERY:'#39c5cf',DESPLEGANDO:'#a855f7'};

function cmdbShowSection(id, el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('#page-cmdb .dev-section').forEach(function(s){s.classList.remove('active');});
  document.querySelectorAll('#page-cmdb .dev-nav-item').forEach(function(n){n.classList.remove('active');});
  document.getElementById('cmdb-sec-'+id).classList.add('active');
  el.classList.add('active');
  if (id==='dashboard') loadCmdbDashboard();
  if (id==='inventario') loadCmdbInventario();
  if (id==='dependencias') loadCmdbDependencias();
  if (id==='vlans') loadCmdbVlans();
  if (id==='ips') loadCmdbIps();
  if (id==='software') loadCmdbSoftware();
  if (id==='costes') loadCmdbCostes();
  if (id==='compliance') loadCmdbCompliance();
}

// ── CMDB CRUD: Create/Edit/Delete Activo ──
function showCreateActivo() {
  var html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;font-size:13px;">';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.code')+' *</label><input type="text" id="ca-codigo" placeholder="SRV-PRO-XXX" style="text-transform:uppercase;"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('common.name')+' *</label><input type="text" id="ca-nombre" placeholder="Nombre del activo"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.layer')+' *</label><select id="ca-capa" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"><option>INFRAESTRUCTURA</option><option>APLICACION</option><option>RED</option><option>SEGURIDAD</option><option>NEGOCIO</option><option>SOPORTE</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('common.type')+' *</label><input type="text" id="ca-tipo" placeholder="Servidor Físico, Base de Datos..."></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.criticality')+'</label><select id="ca-crit" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"><option>MEDIA</option><option>CRITICA</option><option>ALTA</option><option>BAJA</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.environment')+'</label><select id="ca-entorno" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"><option>PRODUCCION</option><option>PREPRODUCCION</option><option>DESARROLLO</option><option>STAGING</option><option>DR</option><option>LAB</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Estado</label><select id="ca-estado" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"><option>OPERATIVO</option><option>PLANIFICADO</option><option>DESPLEGANDO</option><option>DEGRADADO</option><option>MANTENIMIENTO</option><option>RETIRADO</option><option>DISCOVERY</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.location')+'</label><input type="text" id="ca-ubic" placeholder="CPD Madrid..."></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.owner')+'</label><input type="text" id="ca-owner" placeholder="Departamento/Área"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.responsible')+'</label><input type="text" id="ca-resp" placeholder="Nombre del responsable"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.provider')+'</label><input type="text" id="ca-prov" placeholder="Dell, Microsoft..."></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.monthly_cost')+'</label><input type="number" id="ca-coste" value="0"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.project')+'</label><select id="ca-proy" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;" onfocus="loadProjectSelect(\'ca-proy\')"><option value="">-- Sin proyecto --</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.notes')+'</label><input type="text" id="ca-notas" placeholder="Notas adicionales..."></div>';
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">'+t('common.cancel')+'</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="doCreateActivo()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#d97706);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">'+t('common.create')+'</button>';
  html += '</div>';
  showSimpleModal(t('cmdb.new_asset'), html);
}

async function doCreateActivo() {
  var body = {
    codigo: (document.getElementById('ca-codigo').value||'').trim().toUpperCase(),
    nombre: document.getElementById('ca-nombre').value.trim(),
    capa: document.getElementById('ca-capa').value,
    tipo: document.getElementById('ca-tipo').value.trim(),
    criticidad: document.getElementById('ca-crit').value,
    entorno: document.getElementById('ca-entorno').value,
    estado_ciclo: document.getElementById('ca-estado').value,
    ubicacion: document.getElementById('ca-ubic').value.trim()||null,
    propietario: document.getElementById('ca-owner').value.trim()||null,
    responsable_tecnico: document.getElementById('ca-resp').value.trim()||null,
    proveedor: document.getElementById('ca-prov').value.trim()||null,
    coste_mensual: parseFloat(document.getElementById('ca-coste').value)||0,
    id_proyecto: document.getElementById('ca-proy').value.trim()||null,
    notas: document.getElementById('ca-notas').value.trim()||null,
  };
  if (!body.codigo||!body.nombre||!body.tipo) { alert('Código, Nombre y Tipo son obligatorios'); return; }
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/activos',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    var d = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('Activo '+body.codigo+' '+t('misc.created'));
    loadCmdbDashboard();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function showEditActivo(id) {
  try {
    var data = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/activos/'+id).then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var a = data.activo;
    var mkSel = function(id,opts,val) {
      return '<select id="'+id+'" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;">'+opts.map(function(o){return '<option'+(o===val?' selected':'')+'>'+o+'</option>';}).join('')+'</select>';
    };
    var html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;font-size:13px;">';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.code')+'</label><input type="text" disabled value="'+escHtml(a.codigo)+'" style="opacity:.6;"></div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('common.name')+'</label><input type="text" id="ea-nombre" value="'+escHtml(a.nombre||'')+'"></div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.layer')+'</label>'+mkSel('ea-capa',['INFRAESTRUCTURA','APLICACION','RED','SEGURIDAD','NEGOCIO','SOPORTE'],a.capa)+'</div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('common.type')+'</label><input type="text" id="ea-tipo" value="'+escHtml(a.tipo||'')+'"></div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.criticality')+'</label>'+mkSel('ea-crit',['CRITICA','ALTA','MEDIA','BAJA'],a.criticidad)+'</div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.environment')+'</label>'+mkSel('ea-entorno',['PRODUCCION','PREPRODUCCION','DESARROLLO','STAGING','DR','LAB'],a.entorno)+'</div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.lifecycle')+'</label>'+mkSel('ea-estado',['OPERATIVO','PLANIFICADO','DESPLEGANDO','DEGRADADO','MANTENIMIENTO','RETIRADO','DISCOVERY'],a.estado_ciclo)+'</div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.location')+'</label><input type="text" id="ea-ubic" value="'+escHtml(a.ubicacion||'')+'"></div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.owner')+'</label><input type="text" id="ea-owner" value="'+escHtml(a.propietario||'')+'"></div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.responsible')+'</label><input type="text" id="ea-resp" value="'+escHtml(a.responsable_tecnico||'')+'"></div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.provider')+'</label><input type="text" id="ea-prov" value="'+escHtml(a.proveedor||'')+'"></div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.monthly_cost')+'</label><input type="number" id="ea-coste" value="'+(a.coste_mensual||0)+'"></div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.project')+'</label><select id="ea-proy" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;" onfocus="loadProjectSelect(\'ea-proy\',\''+escHtml(a.id_proyecto||'')+'\')"><option value="">-- Sin proyecto --</option>'+(a.id_proyecto?'<option value="'+escHtml(a.id_proyecto)+'" selected>'+escHtml(a.id_proyecto)+'</option>':'')+'</select></div>';
    html += '<div class="login-field"><label>'+t('cmdb.notes')+'</label><input type="text" id="ea-notas" value="'+escHtml(a.notas||'')+'"></div>';
    html += '</div>';
    html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:space-between;">';
    html += '<button onclick="doDeleteActivo('+id+',\''+escHtml(a.codigo)+'\')" style="background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--red);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">'+t('common.delete')+'</button>';
    html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">';
    html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">'+t('common.cancel')+'</button>';
    html += '<button onclick="doEditActivo('+id+')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#3b82f6);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">'+t('common.save')+'</button>';
    html += '</div></div>';
    showSimpleModal(t('cmdb.edit_asset')+': '+a.codigo+' — '+a.nombre, html);
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function doEditActivo(id) {
  var body = {
    nombre: document.getElementById('ea-nombre').value.trim(),
    capa: document.getElementById('ea-capa').value,
    tipo: document.getElementById('ea-tipo').value.trim(),
    criticidad: document.getElementById('ea-crit').value,
    entorno: document.getElementById('ea-entorno').value,
    estado_ciclo: document.getElementById('ea-estado').value,
    ubicacion: document.getElementById('ea-ubic').value.trim()||null,
    propietario: document.getElementById('ea-owner').value.trim()||null,
    responsable_tecnico: document.getElementById('ea-resp').value.trim()||null,
    proveedor: document.getElementById('ea-prov').value.trim()||null,
    coste_mensual: parseFloat(document.getElementById('ea-coste').value)||0,
    id_proyecto: document.getElementById('ea-proy').value.trim()||null,
    notas: document.getElementById('ea-notas').value.trim()||null,
  };
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/activos/'+id,{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    if (!r.ok) { var d = await r.json(); alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('Activo '+t('misc.updated'));
    loadCmdbDashboard();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function doDeleteActivo(id, codigo) {
  if (!confirm(t('misc.confirm_retire')+' "'+codigo+'"?')) return;
  try {
    await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/activos/'+id,{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({estado_ciclo:'RETIRADO'})});
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('Activo '+codigo+' marcado como RETIRADO');
    loadCmdbDashboard();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ── Load projects into a select dropdown ──
async function loadProjectSelect(selectId, currentVal) {
  var sel = document.getElementById(selectId);
  if (!sel || sel.options.length > 2) return;
  try {
    var projs = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cartera/proyectos').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Sin proyecto --</option>';
    projs.forEach(function(p) {
      var opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = p.id_proyecto;
      opt.textContent = p.id_proyecto + ' — ' + (p.nombre_proyecto||'').substring(0,50);
      if (currentVal && p.id_proyecto === currentVal) opt.selected = true;
      sel.appendChild(opt);
    });
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Error loading projects:', e); }
}

// ── Load CMDB assets into a select dropdown ──
async function loadCmdbSelect(selectId, isMultiple) {
  var sel = document.getElementById(selectId);
  if (!sel || sel.options.length > 2) return;
  try {
    var data = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/activos?limit=500').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var activos = data.activos||[];
    sel.innerHTML = isMultiple ? '' : '<option value="">-- Seleccionar activo CMDB --</option>';
    activos.forEach(function(a) {
      var opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = a.codigo;
      opt.textContent = a.codigo + ' — ' + a.nombre + ' [' + a.capa + ']';
      sel.appendChild(opt);
    });
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Error loading CMDB select:', e); }
}

async function loadCmdbDashboard() {
  var el = document.getElementById('cmdb-dash');
  try {
    var d = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/dashboard').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var html = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px;"><div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="9" ry="3"/><path d="M3 5v14c0 1.66 4 3 9 3s9-1.34 9-3V5"/></svg>'+t('cmdb.title')+'</div><button onclick="showCreateActivo()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#d97706);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">'+t('cmdb.new_asset')+'</button></div>';
    // KPIs
    html += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">';
    html += _cmdbKpi(t('cmdb.total_assets'), d.total_activos, '#3b82f6');
    html += _cmdbKpi(t('cmdb.critical'), d.activos_criticos, '#ef4444');
    html += _cmdbKpi(t('cmdb.infra_cost'), '€'+Math.round(d.coste_mensual_infra).toLocaleString(), '#f59e0b');
    html += _cmdbKpi(t('cmdb.sw_cost'), '€'+Math.round(d.coste_anual_software).toLocaleString(), '#8b5cf6');
    html += _cmdbKpi('VLANs', d.total_vlans, '#10b981');
    html += _cmdbKpi(t('cmdb.relations'), d.total_relaciones, '#39c5cf');
    html += _cmdbKpi('Software', d.total_software, '#f778ba');
    html += _cmdbKpi(t('cmdb.obsolete_sw'), d.software_obsoleto, d.software_obsoleto>0?'#ef4444':'#3fb950');
    html += '</div>';
    // By capa
    html += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;">';
    html += '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;">'+t('cmdb.by_layer')+'</div>';
    Object.entries(d.by_capa).forEach(function(e){
      var pct = Math.round(e[1]/d.total_activos*100);
      var c = CAPA_COLORS[e[0]]||'#6b7280';
      html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="font-size:11px;width:120px;color:'+c+';font-weight:600;">'+e[0]+'</span><div style="flex:1;height:8px;background:var(--bg4);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+pct+'%;height:100%;background:'+c+';border-radius:4px;"></div></div><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;width:30px;text-align:right;">'+e[1]+'</span></div>';
    });
    html += '</div>';
    html += '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;">'+t('cmdb.by_criticality')+'</div>';
    ['CRITICA','ALTA','MEDIA','BAJA'].forEach(function(k){
      var v = d.by_criticidad[k]||0; var pct = Math.round(v/d.total_activos*100); var c = CRIT_COLORS[k];
      html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="font-size:11px;width:80px;color:'+c+';font-weight:600;">'+k+'</span><div style="flex:1;height:8px;background:var(--bg4);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+pct+'%;height:100%;background:'+c+';border-radius:4px;"></div></div><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;width:30px;text-align:right;">'+v+'</span></div>';
    });
    html += '</div></div>';
    // Inventario below dashboard
    html += '<div style="margin-top:16px;" id="cmdb-dash-inv">'+t('common.loading')+'</div>';
    el.innerHTML = html;
    // Load inventory table below
    var invData = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/activos?limit=300').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    _cmdbActivos = invData.activos||[];
    var invEl = document.getElementById('cmdb-dash-inv');
    if (invEl) {
      var ih = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;">';
      ih += '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;">'+t('cmdb.full_inventory')+' ('+invData.total+' '+t('misc.assets')+')</div>';
      ih += '<div style="display:flex;gap:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
      ['TODOS','INFRAESTRUCTURA','APLICACION','RED','SEGURIDAD','NEGOCIO','SOPORTE'].forEach(function(c){
        ih += '<button onclick="cmdbFilterCapa(\''+c+'\')" style="padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;background:'+(CAPA_COLORS[c]||'var(--bg3)')+'18;border:1px solid '+(CAPA_COLORS[c]||'var(--border)')+'33;color:'+(CAPA_COLORS[c]||'var(--text2)')+';">'+c+'</button>';
      });
      ih += '</div></div>';
      ih += '<div id="cmdb-inv-table">' + _renderCmdbTable(_cmdbActivos) + '</div>';
      invEl.innerHTML = ih;
    }
  } catch(e) { el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</div>'; }
}

function _cmdbKpi(label, val, color) {
  return '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;">'+label+'</div><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:'+color+';">'+val+'</div></div>';
}

async function loadCmdbInventario() {
  var el = document.getElementById('cmdb-inv');
  try {
    var data = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/activos?limit=300').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var activos = data.activos||[];
    var html = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;">';
    html += '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;">Inventario de Configuration Items ('+data.total+')</div>';
    html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
    ['TODOS','INFRAESTRUCTURA','APLICACION','RED','SEGURIDAD','NEGOCIO','SOPORTE'].forEach(function(c){
      html += '<button onclick="cmdbFilterCapa(\''+c+'\')" class="filter-chip" data-capa="'+c+'" style="font-size:10px;padding:3px 10px;">'+c+'</button>';
    });
    html += '</div></div>';
    html += '<div style="overflow-x:auto;max-height:calc(100vh - 200px);overflow-y:auto;" id="cmdb-inv-table">';
    html += _renderCmdbTable(activos);
    html += '</div>';
    el.innerHTML = html;
    // Store for filtering
    window._cmdbActivos = activos;
  } catch(e) { el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</div>'; }
}

function _renderCmdbTable(activos) {
  var html = '<table class="data-table" style="width:100%;font-size:11px;"><thead><tr>';
  html += '<th>'+t('cmdb.code')+'</th><th>'+t('common.name')+'</th><th>'+t('cmdb.layer')+'</th><th>'+t('common.type')+'</th><th>'+t('common.status')+'</th><th>'+t('cmdb.criticality')+'</th><th>'+t('cmdb.environment')+'</th><th>'+t('cmdb.location')+'</th><th>'+t('cmdb.project')+'</th><th>€/'+t('misc.of')+'</th>';
  html += '</tr></thead><tbody>';
  activos.forEach(function(a){
    var cc = CRIT_COLORS[a.criticidad]||'#6b7280';
    var ec = ESTADO_COLORS[a.estado_ciclo]||'#6b7280';
    var lc = CAPA_COLORS[a.capa]||'#6b7280';
    html += '<tr onclick="cmdbShowDetalle('+a.id_activo+')" style="cursor:pointer;" onmouseenter="this.style.background=\'rgba(45,126,247,.06)\'" onmouseleave="this.style.background=\'\'">';
    html += '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600;color:var(--cyan);white-space:nowrap;">'+escHtml(a.codigo)+'</td>';
    html += '<td style="font-weight:600;max-width:220px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">'+escHtml(a.nombre)+'</td>';
    html += '<td><span style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:'+lc+'18;color:'+lc+';">'+escHtml(a.capa)+'</span></td>';
    html += '<td style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(a.tipo)+'</td>';
    html += '<td><span style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:'+ec+'18;color:'+ec+';">'+escHtml(a.estado_ciclo)+'</span></td>';
    html += '<td><span style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:'+cc+'18;color:'+cc+';">'+escHtml(a.criticidad)+'</span></td>';
    html += '<td style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(a.entorno)+'</td>';
    html += '<td style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(a.ubicacion||'-')+'</td>';
    html += '<td style="font-size:9px;font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--text3);max-width:80px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">'+escHtml(a.id_proyecto||'-')+'</td>';
    html += '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;">€'+Math.round(a.coste_mensual||0)+'</td>';
    html += '</tr>';
  });
  html += '</tbody></table>';
  return html;
}

function cmdbFilterCapa(capa) {
  if (!window._cmdbActivos) return;
  var filtered = capa==='TODOS' ? window._cmdbActivos : window._cmdbActivos.filter(function(a){return a.capa===capa;});
  document.getElementById('cmdb-inv-table').innerHTML = _renderCmdbTable(filtered);
}

async function cmdbShowDetalle(id) {
  try {
    var d = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/activos/'+id).then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var a = d.activo;
    var html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;font-size:12px;">';
    html += '<div><strong>Código:</strong> <span style="font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--cyan);">'+escHtml(a.codigo)+'</span></div>';
    html += '<div><strong>Capa:</strong> <span style="color:'+(CAPA_COLORS[a.capa]||'')+';">'+escHtml(a.capa)+'</span></div>';
    html += '<div><strong>Tipo:</strong> '+escHtml(a.tipo)+'</div>';
    html += '<div><strong>Criticidad:</strong> <span style="color:'+(CRIT_COLORS[a.criticidad]||'')+';font-weight:700;">'+escHtml(a.criticidad)+'</span></div>';
    html += '<div><strong>Estado:</strong> <span style="color:'+(ESTADO_COLORS[a.estado_ciclo]||'')+';font-weight:700;">'+escHtml(a.estado_ciclo)+'</span></div>';
    html += '<div><strong>Entorno:</strong> '+escHtml(a.entorno)+'</div>';
    html += '<div><strong>Ubicación:</strong> '+escHtml(a.ubicacion||'-')+'</div>';
    html += '<div><strong>Propietario:</strong> '+escHtml(a.propietario||'-')+'</div>';
    html += '<div><strong>Responsable:</strong> '+escHtml(a.responsable_tecnico||'-')+'</div>';
    html += '<div><strong>Proveedor:</strong> '+escHtml(a.proveedor||'-')+'</div>';
    html += '<div><strong>Coste/mes:</strong> €'+Math.round(a.coste_mensual||0)+'</div>';
    html += '<div><strong>Proyecto:</strong> '+escHtml(a.id_proyecto||'Sin asignar')+'</div>';
    html += '</div>';
    if (a.especificaciones && Object.keys(a.especificaciones).length) {
      html += '<div style="margin-top:12px;"><strong>Especificaciones:</strong><div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;margin-top:4px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;max-height:120px;overflow-y:auto;">';
      Object.entries(a.especificaciones).forEach(function(e){
        html += '<div><span style="color:var(--cyan);">'+escHtml(e[0])+'</span>: '+escHtml(String(e[1]))+'</div>';
      });
      html += '</div></div>';
    }
    // Dependencias
    if (d.dependencias.length) {
      html += '<div style="margin-top:12px;"><strong>Dependencias ('+d.dependencias.length+'):</strong><div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-top:4px;">';
      d.dependencias.forEach(function(dep){
        var isOrigen = dep.origen_codigo===a.codigo;
        var other = isOrigen ? dep.destino_nombre+' ('+dep.destino_codigo+')' : dep.origen_nombre+' ('+dep.origen_codigo+')';
        var arrow = isOrigen ? '→' : '←';
        var c = CRIT_COLORS[dep.criticidad]||'#6b7280';
        html += '<span style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;background:'+c+'15;border:1px solid '+c+'25;color:'+c+';">'+escHtml(dep.tipo_relacion)+' '+arrow+' '+escHtml(other)+'</span>';
      });
      html += '</div></div>';
    }
    // IPs
    if (d.ips.length) {
      html += '<div style="margin-top:12px;"><strong>IPs Asignadas:</strong><div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-top:4px;">';
      d.ips.forEach(function(ip){
        html += '<span style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;background:var(--cyan)15;border:1px solid var(--cyan)25;color:var(--cyan);font-family:var(--mono);">'+escHtml(ip.direccion_ip)+(ip.vlan_nombre?' (VLAN: '+escHtml(ip.vlan_nombre)+')':'')+'</span>';
      });
      html += '</div></div>';
    }
    // Software
    if (d.software.length) {
      html += '<div style="margin-top:12px;"><strong>Software Instalado:</strong><div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-top:4px;">';
      d.software.forEach(function(sw){
        html += '<span style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;background:var(--purple-bg);border:1px solid rgba(168,85,247,.2);color:#a855f7;">'+escHtml(sw.nombre)+' '+escHtml(sw.version_instalada||sw.version||'')+'</span>';
      });
      html += '</div></div>';
    }
    // Action buttons
    html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
    html += '<button onclick="cmdbShowImpacto('+id+')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ef4444,#dc2626);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Simulación de Impacto</button>';
    html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove();showEditActivo('+id+')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#3b82f6);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Editar Activo</button>';
    html += '<button onclick="doDeleteActivo('+id+',\''+escHtml(a.codigo)+'\')" style="background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--red);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Retirar</button>';
    html += '</div>';
    showSimpleModal(a.nombre, html);
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function cmdbShowImpacto(id) {
  try {
    var d = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/impacto/'+id).then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var html = '<div style="margin-bottom:12px;padding:10px;background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:8px;">';
    html += '<div style="font-weight:700;color:var(--red);">Si "'+escHtml(d.origen.nombre)+'" falla → '+d.total_afectados+' activos afectados</div></div>';
    if (d.impacto.length) {
      html += '<div style="max-height:40vh;overflow-y:auto;">';
      d.impacto.forEach(function(a){
        var c = CRIT_COLORS[a.criticidad]||'#6b7280';
        html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:6px;border-left:3px solid '+c+';">';
        html += '<span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--cyan);width:100px;">'+escHtml(a.codigo)+'</span>';
        html += '<span style="flex:1;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">'+escHtml(a.nombre)+'</span>';
        html += '<span style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:'+c+'18;color:'+c+';">'+escHtml(a.criticidad)+'</span>';
        html += '<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">Nivel '+a.depth+'</span>';
        html += '</div>';
      });
      html += '</div>';
    } else {
      html += '<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text3);padding:20px;">Ningún activo depende directamente de este CI</div>';
    }
    showSimpleModal('Impacto en Cascada', html);
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function loadCmdbDependencias() {
  var el = document.getElementById('cmdb-deps');
  try {
    var rels = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/relaciones').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var html = '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;">Mapa de Dependencias — Diagrama ('+rels.length+' relaciones)</div>';
    var relColors = {DEPENDE_DE:'#ef4444',EJECUTA_EN:'#3b82f6',CONECTA_A:'#10b981',PROTEGE_A:'#8b5cf6',RESPALDA_A:'#f59e0b',MONITORIZA:'#39c5cf',PARTE_DE:'#6366f1',SIRVE_A:'#f778ba'};
    // Leyenda
    html += '<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px;">';
    Object.entries(relColors).forEach(function(e){
      html += '<span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;"><span style="width:14px;height:3px;background:'+e[1]+';border-radius:2px;display:inline-block;"></span><span style="color:'+e[1]+';font-weight:600;">'+e[0].replace(/_/g,' ')+'</span></span>';
    });
    html += '</div>';
    // Diagram: group by destination (what things depend on)
    var byDest = {};
    rels.forEach(function(r) {
      var key = r.destino_codigo;
      if (!byDest[key]) byDest[key] = {nombre:r.destino_nombre,capa:r.destino_capa,deps:[]};
      byDest[key].deps.push(r);
    });
    // Sort by number of dependents (most depended-on first)
    var sorted = Object.entries(byDest).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].deps.length - a[1].deps.length;});
    html += '<div style="max-height:calc(100vh - 240px);overflow-y:auto;">';
    sorted.forEach(function(entry) {
      var code = entry[0], info = entry[1];
      var lc = CAPA_COLORS[info.capa]||'#6b7280';
      html += '<div style="margin-bottom:16px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;">';
      // Center node
      html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:12px;">';
      html += '<div style="padding:8px 20px;background:'+lc+'18;border:2px solid '+lc+';border-radius:10px;text-align:center;">';
      html += '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:'+lc+';">'+escHtml(code)+'</div>';
      html += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);max-width:200px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">'+escHtml(info.nombre)+'</div>';
      html += '</div></div>';
      // Dependents radiating out
      html += '<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;justify-content:center;">';
      info.deps.forEach(function(r) {
        var rc = relColors[r.tipo_relacion]||'#6b7280';
        var olc = CAPA_COLORS[r.origen_capa]||'#6b7280';
        html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;">';
        html += '<div style="padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;background:'+olc+'12;border:1px solid '+olc+'30;text-align:center;">';
        html += '<div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:'+olc+';">'+escHtml(r.origen_codigo)+'</div>';
        html += '</div>';
        html += '<div style="width:30px;height:2px;background:'+rc+';position:relative;"><div style="position:absolute;right:-2px;top:-3px;width:0;height:0;border-left:6px solid '+rc+';border-top:4px solid transparent;border-bottom:4px solid transparent;"></div></div>';
        html += '</div>';
      });
      html += '</div></div>';
    });
    html += '</div>';
    el.innerHTML = html;
  } catch(e) { el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</div>'; }
}

async function loadCmdbVlans() {
  var el = document.getElementById('cmdb-vlans');
  try {
    var vlans = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/vlans').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var html = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;">';
    html += '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;">VLANs ('+vlans.length+')</div>';
    html += '<button onclick="showCreateVlan()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981,#059669);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">+ Nueva VLAN</button>';
    html += '</div>';
    html += '<table class="data-table" style="width:100%;font-size:11px;"><thead><tr>';
    html += '<th>VLAN ID</th><th>Nombre</th><th>Subred</th><th>Gateway</th><th>Entorno</th><th>Ubicación</th><th>Propósito</th><th>IPs Total</th><th>IPs Usadas</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
    vlans.forEach(function(v){
      var pct = v.total_ips>0 ? Math.round((v.ips_asignadas||0)/v.total_ips*100) : 0;
      var uc = pct>80?'#ef4444':pct>50?'#f59e0b':'#3fb950';
      html += '<tr onclick="showVlanDetail('+v.id_vlan+')" style="cursor:pointer;" onmouseenter="this.style.background=\'rgba(45,126,247,.06)\'" onmouseleave="this.style.background=\'\'">';
      html += '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;color:#39c5cf;">'+v.vlan_id+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-weight:600;">'+escHtml(v.nombre)+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(v.subred)+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(v.gateway||'-')+'</td>';
      html += '<td>'+escHtml(v.entorno)+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(v.ubicacion||'-')+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(v.proposito||'-')+'</td>';
      html += '<td>'+v.total_ips+'</td>';
      html += '<td><span style="color:'+uc+';font-weight:700;">'+(v.ips_asignadas||0)+'</span> <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">('+pct+'%)</span></td>';
      html += '</tr>';
    });
    html += '</tbody></table>';
    el.innerHTML = html;
    window._cmdbVlans = vlans;
  } catch(e) { el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</div>'; }
}

function showCreateVlan() {
  var html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;font-size:13px;">';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>VLAN ID *</label><input type="number" id="cv-vlan-id" placeholder="100"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Nombre *</label><input type="text" id="cv-nombre" placeholder="VLAN nombre"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Subred *</label><input type="text" id="cv-subred" placeholder="10.0.100.0/24"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Gateway</label><input type="text" id="cv-gateway" placeholder="10.0.100.1"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Entorno</label><select id="cv-entorno" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"><option>PRODUCCION</option><option>PREPRODUCCION</option><option>DESARROLLO</option><option>STAGING</option><option>DR</option><option>LAB</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Ubicación</label><input type="text" id="cv-ubic" placeholder="CPD Madrid"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Propósito</label><input type="text" id="cv-proposito" placeholder="Servidores producción"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Total IPs</label><input type="number" id="cv-total-ips" value="254"></div>';
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="doCreateVlan()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981,#059669);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Crear VLAN</button>';
  html += '</div>';
  showSimpleModal('Nueva VLAN', html);
}

async function doCreateVlan() {
  var body = {
    vlan_id: parseInt(document.getElementById('cv-vlan-id').value)||0,
    nombre: document.getElementById('cv-nombre').value.trim(),
    subred: document.getElementById('cv-subred').value.trim(),
    gateway: document.getElementById('cv-gateway').value.trim()||null,
    entorno: document.getElementById('cv-entorno').value,
    ubicacion: document.getElementById('cv-ubic').value.trim()||null,
    proposito: document.getElementById('cv-proposito').value.trim()||null,
    total_ips: parseInt(document.getElementById('cv-total-ips').value)||254,
  };
  if (!body.vlan_id||!body.nombre||!body.subred) { alert('VLAN ID, Nombre y Subred son obligatorios'); return; }
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/vlans',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    var d = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('VLAN '+body.vlan_id+' creada');
    loadCmdbVlans();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

function showVlanDetail(idVlan) {
  var v = (window._cmdbVlans||[]).find(function(x){return x.id_vlan===idVlan;});
  if (!v) return;
  var pct = v.total_ips>0 ? Math.round((v.ips_asignadas||0)/v.total_ips*100) : 0;
  var html = '<div style="font-size:13px;line-height:2;">';
  html += '<div><strong>VLAN ID:</strong> <span style="color:#39c5cf;font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;">'+v.vlan_id+'</span></div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Nombre:</strong> '+escHtml(v.nombre)+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Subred:</strong> <span style="font-family:var(--mono);">'+escHtml(v.subred)+'</span></div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Gateway:</strong> <span style="font-family:var(--mono);">'+escHtml(v.gateway||'-')+'</span></div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Entorno:</strong> '+escHtml(v.entorno)+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Ubicación:</strong> '+escHtml(v.ubicacion||'-')+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Propósito:</strong> '+escHtml(v.proposito||'-')+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>IPs:</strong> '+(v.ips_asignadas||0)+' / '+v.total_ips+' ('+pct+'%)</div>';
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:space-between;">';
  html += '<button onclick="doDeleteVlan('+v.id_vlan+',\''+escHtml(v.nombre)+'\')" style="background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--red);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Eliminar</button>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">';
  html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="showEditVlan('+v.id_vlan+')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#3b82f6);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Editar</button>';
  html += '</div></div>';
  showSimpleModal('VLAN '+v.vlan_id+' — '+escHtml(v.nombre), html);
}

function showEditVlan(idVlan) {
  var v = (window._cmdbVlans||[]).find(function(x){return x.id_vlan===idVlan;});
  if (!v) return;
  var mkSel = function(id,opts,val) {
    return '<select id="'+id+'" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;">'+opts.map(function(o){return '<option'+(o===val?' selected':'')+'>'+o+'</option>';}).join('')+'</select>';
  };
  var html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;font-size:13px;">';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>VLAN ID</label><input type="number" id="ev-vlan-id" value="'+v.vlan_id+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Nombre</label><input type="text" id="ev-nombre" value="'+escHtml(v.nombre||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Subred</label><input type="text" id="ev-subred" value="'+escHtml(v.subred||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Gateway</label><input type="text" id="ev-gateway" value="'+escHtml(v.gateway||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Entorno</label>'+mkSel('ev-entorno',['PRODUCCION','PREPRODUCCION','DESARROLLO','STAGING','DR','LAB'],v.entorno)+'</div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Ubicación</label><input type="text" id="ev-ubic" value="'+escHtml(v.ubicacion||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Propósito</label><input type="text" id="ev-proposito" value="'+escHtml(v.proposito||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Total IPs</label><input type="number" id="ev-total-ips" value="'+(v.total_ips||254)+'"></div>';
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="doEditVlan('+v.id_vlan+')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#3b82f6);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Guardar</button>';
  html += '</div>';
  showSimpleModal('Editar VLAN '+v.vlan_id, html);
}

async function doEditVlan(idVlan) {
  var body = {
    vlan_id: parseInt(document.getElementById('ev-vlan-id').value)||0,
    nombre: document.getElementById('ev-nombre').value.trim(),
    subred: document.getElementById('ev-subred').value.trim(),
    gateway: document.getElementById('ev-gateway').value.trim()||null,
    entorno: document.getElementById('ev-entorno').value,
    ubicacion: document.getElementById('ev-ubic').value.trim()||null,
    proposito: document.getElementById('ev-proposito').value.trim()||null,
    total_ips: parseInt(document.getElementById('ev-total-ips').value)||254,
  };
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/vlans/'+idVlan,{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    if (!r.ok) { var d = await r.json(); alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('VLAN actualizada');
    loadCmdbVlans();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function doDeleteVlan(idVlan, nombre) {
  if (!confirm('¿Eliminar la VLAN "'+nombre+'"? Se eliminarán también las IPs asociadas.')) return;
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/vlans/'+idVlan,{method:'DELETE'});
    if (!r.ok) { var d = await r.json(); alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('VLAN '+nombre+' eliminada');
    loadCmdbVlans();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function loadCmdbIps() {
  var el = document.getElementById('cmdb-ips');
  try {
    var data = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/ips?limit=300').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var ips = data.ips||[];
    var html = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;">';
    html += '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;">Registro de IPs ('+data.total+')</div>';
    html += '<button onclick="showCreateIp()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#39c5cf,#0891b2);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">+ Nueva IP</button>';
    html += '</div>';
    if (ips.length===0) {
      html += '<div style="text-align:center;padding:40px;color:var(--text3);">No hay IPs registradas.</div>';
    } else {
      html += '<table class="data-table" style="width:100%;font-size:11px;"><thead><tr>';
      html += '<th>IP</th><th>Hostname</th><th>VLAN</th><th>Activo</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Estado</th><th>MAC</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
      ips.forEach(function(ip){
        html += '<tr onclick="showIpDetail('+ip.id_ip+')" style="cursor:pointer;" onmouseenter="this.style.background=\'rgba(45,126,247,.06)\'" onmouseleave="this.style.background=\'\'">';
        html += '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600;color:var(--cyan);">'+escHtml(ip.direccion_ip)+'</td>';
        html += '<td>'+escHtml(ip.hostname||'-')+'</td>';
        html += '<td>'+(ip.vlan_nombre?escHtml(ip.vlan_nombre)+' ('+ip.vlan_num+')':'-')+'</td>';
        html += '<td>'+(ip.activo_nombre?escHtml(ip.activo_codigo)+' - '+escHtml(ip.activo_nombre):'-')+'</td>';
        html += '<td>'+escHtml(ip.tipo)+'</td><td>'+escHtml(ip.estado)+'</td>';
        html += '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(ip.mac_address||'-')+'</td></tr>';
      });
      html += '</tbody></table>';
    }
    el.innerHTML = html;
    window._cmdbIps = ips;
  } catch(e) { el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</div>'; }
}

async function loadCmdbSelectById(selectId, currentVal) {
  var sel = document.getElementById(selectId);
  if (!sel || sel.options.length > 2) return;
  try {
    var data = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/activos?limit=500').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var activos = data.activos||[];
    sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Sin activo --</option>';
    activos.forEach(function(a) {
      var opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = a.id_activo;
      opt.textContent = a.codigo + ' — ' + a.nombre;
      if (currentVal && a.id_activo == currentVal) opt.selected = true;
      sel.appendChild(opt);
    });
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Error loading CMDB select by ID:', e); }
}

async function loadVlanSelect(selectId, currentVal) {
  var sel = document.getElementById(selectId);
  if (!sel || sel.options.length > 2) return;
  try {
    var vlans = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/vlans').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Sin VLAN --</option>';
    vlans.forEach(function(v) {
      var opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = v.id_vlan;
      opt.textContent = 'VLAN ' + v.vlan_id + ' — ' + v.nombre + ' (' + v.subred + ')';
      if (currentVal && v.id_vlan == currentVal) opt.selected = true;
      sel.appendChild(opt);
    });
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Error loading VLAN select:', e); }
}

function showCreateIp() {
  var html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;font-size:13px;">';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Dirección IP *</label><input type="text" id="ci-ip" placeholder="10.0.100.10"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Hostname</label><input type="text" id="ci-hostname" placeholder="srv-prod-01"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>VLAN</label><select id="ci-vlan" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;" onfocus="loadVlanSelect(\'ci-vlan\')"><option value="">-- Sin VLAN --</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Activo CMDB</label><select id="ci-activo" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;" onfocus="loadCmdbSelectById(\'ci-activo\')"><option value="">-- Sin activo --</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Tipo</label><select id="ci-tipo" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"><option>ESTATICA</option><option>DHCP</option><option>RESERVADA</option><option>VIRTUAL</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Estado</label><select id="ci-estado" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"><option>ASIGNADA</option><option>DISPONIBLE</option><option>RESERVADA</option><option>CONFLICTO</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>MAC Address</label><input type="text" id="ci-mac" placeholder="AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Notas</label><input type="text" id="ci-notas" placeholder="Notas..."></div>';
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="doCreateIp()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#39c5cf,#0891b2);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Crear IP</button>';
  html += '</div>';
  showSimpleModal('Nueva IP', html);
}

async function doCreateIp() {
  var body = {
    direccion_ip: document.getElementById('ci-ip').value.trim(),
    hostname: document.getElementById('ci-hostname').value.trim()||null,
    id_vlan: parseInt(document.getElementById('ci-vlan').value)||null,
    id_activo: parseInt(document.getElementById('ci-activo').value)||null,
    tipo: document.getElementById('ci-tipo').value,
    estado: document.getElementById('ci-estado').value,
    mac_address: document.getElementById('ci-mac').value.trim()||null,
    notas: document.getElementById('ci-notas').value.trim()||null,
  };
  if (!body.direccion_ip) { alert('Dirección IP es obligatoria'); return; }
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/ips',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    var d = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('IP '+body.direccion_ip+' creada');
    loadCmdbIps();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

function showIpDetail(idIp) {
  var ip = (window._cmdbIps||[]).find(function(x){return x.id_ip===idIp;});
  if (!ip) return;
  var html = '<div style="font-size:13px;line-height:2;">';
  html += '<div><strong>IP:</strong> <span style="color:var(--cyan);font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;">'+escHtml(ip.direccion_ip)+'</span></div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Hostname:</strong> '+escHtml(ip.hostname||'-')+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>VLAN:</strong> '+(ip.vlan_nombre?escHtml(ip.vlan_nombre)+' ('+ip.vlan_num+')':'-')+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Activo:</strong> '+(ip.activo_nombre?escHtml(ip.activo_codigo)+' - '+escHtml(ip.activo_nombre):'-')+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Tipo:</strong> '+escHtml(ip.tipo)+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Estado:</strong> '+escHtml(ip.estado)+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>MAC:</strong> <span style="font-family:var(--mono);">'+escHtml(ip.mac_address||'-')+'</span></div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Notas:</strong> '+escHtml(ip.notas||'-')+'</div>';
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:space-between;">';
  html += '<button onclick="doDeleteIp('+ip.id_ip+',\''+escHtml(ip.direccion_ip)+'\')" style="background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--red);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Eliminar</button>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">';
  html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="showEditIp('+ip.id_ip+')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#3b82f6);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Editar</button>';
  html += '</div></div>';
  showSimpleModal('IP '+escHtml(ip.direccion_ip), html);
}

function showEditIp(idIp) {
  var ip = (window._cmdbIps||[]).find(function(x){return x.id_ip===idIp;});
  if (!ip) return;
  var mkSel = function(id,opts,val) {
    return '<select id="'+id+'" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;">'+opts.map(function(o){return '<option'+(o===val?' selected':'')+'>'+o+'</option>';}).join('')+'</select>';
  };
  var html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;font-size:13px;">';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Dirección IP</label><input type="text" id="ei-ip" value="'+escHtml(ip.direccion_ip||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Hostname</label><input type="text" id="ei-hostname" value="'+escHtml(ip.hostname||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>VLAN</label><select id="ei-vlan" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;" onfocus="loadVlanSelect(\'ei-vlan\','+JSON.stringify(ip.id_vlan)+')"><option value="">-- Sin VLAN --</option>'+(ip.id_vlan?'<option value="'+ip.id_vlan+'" selected>'+(ip.vlan_nombre?escHtml(ip.vlan_nombre):'VLAN '+ip.id_vlan)+'</option>':'')+'</select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Activo CMDB</label><select id="ei-activo" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;" onfocus="loadCmdbSelectById(\'ei-activo\','+JSON.stringify(ip.id_activo)+')"><option value="">-- Sin activo --</option>'+(ip.id_activo?'<option value="'+ip.id_activo+'" selected>'+escHtml(ip.activo_codigo||'')+' — '+escHtml(ip.activo_nombre||'')+'</option>':'')+'</select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Tipo</label>'+mkSel('ei-tipo',['ESTATICA','DHCP','RESERVADA','VIRTUAL'],ip.tipo)+'</div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Estado</label>'+mkSel('ei-estado',['ASIGNADA','DISPONIBLE','RESERVADA','CONFLICTO'],ip.estado)+'</div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>MAC Address</label><input type="text" id="ei-mac" value="'+escHtml(ip.mac_address||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Notas</label><input type="text" id="ei-notas" value="'+escHtml(ip.notas||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="doEditIp('+ip.id_ip+')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#3b82f6);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Guardar</button>';
  html += '</div>';
  showSimpleModal('Editar IP '+escHtml(ip.direccion_ip), html);
}

async function doEditIp(idIp) {
  var body = {
    direccion_ip: document.getElementById('ei-ip').value.trim(),
    hostname: document.getElementById('ei-hostname').value.trim()||null,
    id_vlan: parseInt(document.getElementById('ei-vlan').value)||null,
    id_activo: parseInt(document.getElementById('ei-activo').value)||null,
    tipo: document.getElementById('ei-tipo').value,
    estado: document.getElementById('ei-estado').value,
    mac_address: document.getElementById('ei-mac').value.trim()||null,
    notas: document.getElementById('ei-notas').value.trim()||null,
  };
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/ips/'+idIp,{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    if (!r.ok) { var d = await r.json(); alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('IP actualizada');
    loadCmdbIps();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function doDeleteIp(idIp, ipAddr) {
  if (!confirm('¿Eliminar la IP "'+ipAddr+'"?')) return;
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/ips/'+idIp,{method:'DELETE'});
    if (!r.ok) { var d = await r.json(); alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('IP '+ipAddr+' eliminada');
    loadCmdbIps();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function loadCmdbSoftware() {
  var el = document.getElementById('cmdb-soft');
  try {
    var soft = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/software').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var html = '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;">Software & Licencias ('+soft.length+')</div>';
    var totalCoste = soft.reduce(function(s,sw){return s+(sw.coste_anual||0);},0);
    html += '<div style="margin-bottom:12px;padding:10px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;">Coste anual total: <strong style="color:var(--orange);">€'+Math.round(totalCoste).toLocaleString()+'</strong></div>';
    html += '<table class="data-table" style="width:100%;font-size:11px;"><thead><tr>';
    html += '<th>Software</th><th>Versión</th><th>Editor</th><th>Licencia</th><th>Usadas/Total</th><th>Coste/año</th><th>Estado</th><th>Crítico</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
    soft.forEach(function(s){
      var ec = s.estado==='ACTIVO'?'#3fb950':s.estado==='OBSOLETO'?'#ef4444':'#f59e0b';
      var usage = s.num_licencias>0?Math.round(s.licencias_usadas/s.num_licencias*100):0;
      var uc = usage>90?'#ef4444':usage>70?'#f59e0b':'#3fb950';
      html += '<tr><td style="font-weight:600;">'+escHtml(s.nombre)+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(s.version||'-')+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(s.editor||'-')+'</td>';
      html += '<td><span style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;background:var(--bg4);">'+escHtml(s.tipo_licencia||'-')+'</span></td>';
      html += '<td>'+(s.num_licencias>0?'<span style="color:'+uc+';font-weight:600;">'+s.licencias_usadas+'/'+s.num_licencias+'</span>':'<span style="color:var(--text3);">∞</span>')+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);">€'+Math.round(s.coste_anual||0).toLocaleString()+'</td>';
      html += '<td><span style="color:'+ec+';font-weight:700;font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(s.estado)+'</span></td>';
      html += '<td>'+(s.critico_negocio?'<span style="color:var(--red);font-weight:700;">SI</span>':'<span style="color:var(--text3);">No</span>')+'</td></tr>';
    });
    html += '</tbody></table>';
    el.innerHTML = html;
  } catch(e) { el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</div>'; }
}

async function loadCmdbCostes() {
  var el = document.getElementById('cmdb-costes');
  try {
    var costes = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/costes').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var dash = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/costes/dashboard').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var totalAnual = dash.total_capex + dash.total_opex;
    var topProv = '';
    var topProvKeys = Object.keys(dash.top_proveedores||{});
    if (topProvKeys.length>0) topProv = topProvKeys[0];

    var html = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px;">';
    html += '<div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M12 12m-3 0a3 3 0 1 0 6 0a3 3 0 1 0-6 0"/></svg>Costes & Budget</div>';
    html += '<button onclick="showCreateCoste()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#d97706);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">+ Nuevo Coste</button>';
    html += '</div>';

    // KPIs
    html += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">';
    html += _cmdbKpi('Total CAPEX', '\u20AC'+Math.round(dash.total_capex).toLocaleString(), '#3b82f6');
    html += _cmdbKpi('Total OPEX', '\u20AC'+Math.round(dash.total_opex).toLocaleString(), '#8b5cf6');
    html += _cmdbKpi('Burn Rate/mes', '\u20AC'+Math.round(dash.burn_rate_mensual).toLocaleString(), '#ef4444');
    html += _cmdbKpi('Total Anual', '\u20AC'+Math.round(totalAnual).toLocaleString(), '#f59e0b');
    html += _cmdbKpi('Top Proveedor', escHtml(topProv)||'-', '#10b981');
    html += '</div>';

    // Charts: By Category + CAPEX vs OPEX
    html += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px;">';
    // By category chart
    html += '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;">Por Categor\u00EDa</div>';
    var catColors = {'HARDWARE':'#3b82f6','SOFTWARE':'#8b5cf6','CLOUD':'#06b6d4','LICENCIAS':'#f59e0b','MANTENIMIENTO':'#10b981','SOPORTE':'#f778ba','RRHH':'#ef4444','CONSULTORIA':'#d97706','FORMACION':'#a5b4fc','OTROS':'#6b7280'};
    var maxCat = 1;
    Object.values(dash.by_categoria||{}).forEach(function(v){if(v>maxCat)maxCat=v;});
    Object.entries(dash.by_categoria||{}).forEach(function(e){
      var pct = Math.round(e[1]/maxCat*100);
      var c = catColors[e[0]]||'#6b7280';
      html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="font-size:10px;width:110px;color:'+c+';font-weight:600;">'+e[0]+'</span><div style="flex:1;height:8px;background:var(--bg4);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+pct+'%;height:100%;background:'+c+';border-radius:4px;"></div></div><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;width:70px;text-align:right;">\u20AC'+Math.round(e[1]).toLocaleString()+'</span></div>';
    });
    html += '</div>';
    // CAPEX vs OPEX chart
    html += '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;">CAPEX vs OPEX</div>';
    var maxCO = Math.max(dash.total_capex, dash.total_opex, 1);
    html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;"><span style="font-size:11px;width:60px;color:#3b82f6;font-weight:600;">CAPEX</span><div style="flex:1;height:14px;background:var(--bg4);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+Math.round(dash.total_capex/maxCO*100)+'%;height:100%;background:#3b82f6;border-radius:4px;"></div></div><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;width:90px;text-align:right;">\u20AC'+Math.round(dash.total_capex).toLocaleString()+'</span></div>';
    html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px;"><span style="font-size:11px;width:60px;color:#8b5cf6;font-weight:600;">OPEX</span><div style="flex:1;height:14px;background:var(--bg4);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+Math.round(dash.total_opex/maxCO*100)+'%;height:100%;background:#8b5cf6;border-radius:4px;"></div></div><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;width:90px;text-align:right;">\u20AC'+Math.round(dash.total_opex).toLocaleString()+'</span></div>';
    // Top assets
    if (dash.top_assets && dash.top_assets.length) {
      html += '<div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;margin-top:8px;">Top 10 Activos m\u00E1s Costosos</div>';
      var maxAsset = dash.top_assets[0].total||1;
      dash.top_assets.forEach(function(a){
        var pctA = Math.round(a.total/maxAsset*100);
        html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;"><span style="font-size:9px;width:100px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;color:var(--cyan);" title="'+escHtml(a.nombre)+'">'+escHtml(a.codigo)+'</span><div style="flex:1;height:6px;background:var(--bg4);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="width:'+pctA+'%;height:100%;background:#f59e0b;border-radius:3px;"></div></div><span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;width:65px;text-align:right;">\u20AC'+Math.round(a.total).toLocaleString()+'</span></div>';
      });
    }
    html += '</div></div>';

    // Full table
    html += '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;">Detalle de Costes ('+costes.length+')</div>';
    html += '<div style="overflow-x:auto;max-height:calc(100vh - 460px);overflow-y:auto;">';
    html += '<table class="data-table" style="width:100%;font-size:11px;"><thead><tr>';
    html += '<th>Concepto</th><th>Activo</th><th>Categor\u00EDa</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Importe</th><th>Periodicidad</th><th>Proveedor</th><th>Proyecto</th><th>Centro Coste</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
    costes.forEach(function(co){
      var tc = co.tipo==='CAPEX'?'#3b82f6':'#8b5cf6';
      var cc = catColors[co.categoria]||'#6b7280';
      html += '<tr onclick="showCosteDetail('+co.id_coste+')" style="cursor:pointer;" onmouseenter="this.style.background=\'rgba(45,126,247,.06)\'" onmouseleave="this.style.background=\'\'">';
      html += '<td style="font-weight:600;max-width:200px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">'+escHtml(co.concepto)+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-size:10px;">'+(co.activo_nombre?escHtml(co.activo_codigo)+' - '+escHtml(co.activo_nombre):'-')+'</td>';
      html += '<td><span style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:'+cc+'18;color:'+cc+';">'+escHtml(co.categoria)+'</span></td>';
      html += '<td><span style="padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:'+tc+'18;color:'+tc+';">'+escHtml(co.tipo)+'</span></td>';
