      html += '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600;">\u20AC'+parseFloat(co.importe||0).toLocaleString()+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(co.periodicidad)+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(co.proveedor||'-')+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-size:9px;font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--text3);">'+escHtml(co.id_proyecto||'-')+'</td>';
      html += '<td style="font-size:10px;">'+escHtml(co.centro_coste||'-')+'</td>';
      html += '</tr>';
    });
    html += '</tbody></table></div>';
    el.innerHTML = html;
    window._cmdbCostes = costes;
  } catch(e) { el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</div>'; }
}

function showCreateCoste() {
  var html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;font-size:13px;">';
  html += '<div class="login-field" style="grid-column:span 2;"><label>Concepto *</label><input type="text" id="cc-concepto" placeholder="Descripci\u00F3n del coste"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Activo CMDB</label><select id="cc-activo" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;" onfocus="loadCmdbSelectById(\'cc-activo\')"><option value="">-- Sin activo --</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Categor\u00EDa *</label><select id="cc-cat" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"><option>HARDWARE</option><option>SOFTWARE</option><option>CLOUD</option><option>LICENCIAS</option><option>MANTENIMIENTO</option><option>SOPORTE</option><option>RRHH</option><option>CONSULTORIA</option><option>FORMACION</option><option>OTROS</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Tipo *</label><select id="cc-tipo" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"><option>CAPEX</option><option>OPEX</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Importe (\u20AC) *</label><input type="number" id="cc-importe" step="0.01" placeholder="0.00"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Periodicidad</label><select id="cc-period" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"><option>MENSUAL</option><option>UNICO</option><option>TRIMESTRAL</option><option>ANUAL</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Proveedor</label><input type="text" id="cc-prov" placeholder="Nombre proveedor"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Centro de Coste</label><input type="text" id="cc-centro" placeholder="IT-INFRA"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Proyecto</label><select id="cc-proy" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;" onfocus="loadProjectSelect(\'cc-proy\')"><option value="">-- Sin proyecto --</option></select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Fecha Inicio</label><input type="date" id="cc-finicio" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Fecha Fin</label><input type="date" id="cc-ffin" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field" style="grid-column:span 2;"><label>Notas</label><input type="text" id="cc-notas" placeholder="Notas adicionales..."></div>';
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="doCreateCoste()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#d97706);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Crear Coste</button>';
  html += '</div>';
  showSimpleModal('Nuevo Coste', html);
}

async function doCreateCoste() {
  var body = {
    concepto: document.getElementById('cc-concepto').value.trim(),
    id_activo: parseInt(document.getElementById('cc-activo').value)||null,
    categoria: document.getElementById('cc-cat').value,
    tipo: document.getElementById('cc-tipo').value,
    importe: parseFloat(document.getElementById('cc-importe').value)||0,
    periodicidad: document.getElementById('cc-period').value,
    proveedor: document.getElementById('cc-prov').value.trim()||null,
    centro_coste: document.getElementById('cc-centro').value.trim()||null,
    id_proyecto: document.getElementById('cc-proy').value.trim()||null,
    fecha_inicio: document.getElementById('cc-finicio').value||null,
    fecha_fin: document.getElementById('cc-ffin').value||null,
    notas: document.getElementById('cc-notas').value.trim()||null,
  };
  if (!body.concepto||!body.importe) { alert('Concepto e Importe son obligatorios'); return; }
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/costes',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    var d = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('Coste creado');
    loadCmdbCostes();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

function showCosteDetail(idCoste) {
  var co = (window._cmdbCostes||[]).find(function(x){return x.id_coste===idCoste;});
  if (!co) return;
  var html = '<div style="font-size:13px;line-height:2;">';
  html += '<div><strong>Concepto:</strong> '+escHtml(co.concepto)+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Activo:</strong> '+(co.activo_nombre?escHtml(co.activo_codigo)+' - '+escHtml(co.activo_nombre):'-')+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Categor\u00EDa:</strong> '+escHtml(co.categoria)+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Tipo:</strong> <span style="font-weight:700;color:'+(co.tipo==='CAPEX'?'#3b82f6':'#8b5cf6')+';">'+escHtml(co.tipo)+'</span></div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Importe:</strong> <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;color:#f59e0b;">\u20AC'+parseFloat(co.importe||0).toLocaleString()+'</span></div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Periodicidad:</strong> '+escHtml(co.periodicidad)+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Proveedor:</strong> '+escHtml(co.proveedor||'-')+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Centro Coste:</strong> '+escHtml(co.centro_coste||'-')+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Proyecto:</strong> '+escHtml(co.id_proyecto||'-')+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Fecha Inicio:</strong> '+escHtml(co.fecha_inicio||'-')+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Fecha Fin:</strong> '+escHtml(co.fecha_fin||'-')+'</div>';
  html += '<div><strong>Notas:</strong> '+escHtml(co.notas||'-')+'</div>';
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:space-between;">';
  html += '<button onclick="doDeleteCoste('+co.id_coste+',\''+escHtml(co.concepto).replace(/'/g,"\\'")+'\')" style="background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--red);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Eliminar</button>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">';
  html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="showEditCoste('+co.id_coste+')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#3b82f6);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Editar</button>';
  html += '</div></div>';
  showSimpleModal('Coste: '+escHtml(co.concepto), html);
}

function showEditCoste(idCoste) {
  var co = (window._cmdbCostes||[]).find(function(x){return x.id_coste===idCoste;});
  if (!co) return;
  var mkSel = function(id,opts,val) {
    return '<select id="'+id+'" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;">'+opts.map(function(o){return '<option'+(o===val?' selected':'')+'>'+o+'</option>';}).join('')+'</select>';
  };
  var html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;font-size:13px;">';
  html += '<div class="login-field" style="grid-column:span 2;"><label>Concepto</label><input type="text" id="ec-concepto" value="'+escHtml(co.concepto||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Activo CMDB</label><select id="ec-activo" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;" onfocus="loadCmdbSelectById(\'ec-activo\','+JSON.stringify(co.id_activo)+')"><option value="">-- Sin activo --</option>'+(co.id_activo?'<option value="'+co.id_activo+'" selected>'+escHtml(co.activo_codigo||'')+' \u2014 '+escHtml(co.activo_nombre||'')+'</option>':'')+'</select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Categor\u00EDa</label>'+mkSel('ec-cat',['HARDWARE','SOFTWARE','CLOUD','LICENCIAS','MANTENIMIENTO','SOPORTE','RRHH','CONSULTORIA','FORMACION','OTROS'],co.categoria)+'</div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Tipo</label>'+mkSel('ec-tipo',['CAPEX','OPEX'],co.tipo)+'</div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Importe (\u20AC)</label><input type="number" id="ec-importe" step="0.01" value="'+(co.importe||0)+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Periodicidad</label>'+mkSel('ec-period',['UNICO','MENSUAL','TRIMESTRAL','ANUAL'],co.periodicidad)+'</div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Proveedor</label><input type="text" id="ec-prov" value="'+escHtml(co.proveedor||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Centro de Coste</label><input type="text" id="ec-centro" value="'+escHtml(co.centro_coste||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Proyecto</label><select id="ec-proy" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;" onfocus="loadProjectSelect(\'ec-proy\',\''+escHtml(co.id_proyecto||'')+'\')"><option value="">-- Sin proyecto --</option>'+(co.id_proyecto?'<option value="'+escHtml(co.id_proyecto)+'" selected>'+escHtml(co.id_proyecto)+'</option>':'')+'</select></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Fecha Inicio</label><input type="date" id="ec-finicio" value="'+(co.fecha_inicio||'')+'" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field"><label>Fecha Fin</label><input type="date" id="ec-ffin" value="'+(co.fecha_fin||'')+'" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;"></div>';
  html += '<div class="login-field" style="grid-column:span 2;"><label>Notas</label><input type="text" id="ec-notas" value="'+escHtml(co.notas||'')+'"></div>';
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:flex-end;">';
  html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="doEditCoste('+co.id_coste+')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#3b82f6);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Guardar</button>';
  html += '</div>';
  showSimpleModal('Editar Coste', html);
}

async function doEditCoste(idCoste) {
  var body = {
    concepto: document.getElementById('ec-concepto').value.trim(),
    id_activo: parseInt(document.getElementById('ec-activo').value)||null,
    categoria: document.getElementById('ec-cat').value,
    tipo: document.getElementById('ec-tipo').value,
    importe: parseFloat(document.getElementById('ec-importe').value)||0,
    periodicidad: document.getElementById('ec-period').value,
    proveedor: document.getElementById('ec-prov').value.trim()||null,
    centro_coste: document.getElementById('ec-centro').value.trim()||null,
    id_proyecto: document.getElementById('ec-proy').value.trim()||null,
    fecha_inicio: document.getElementById('ec-finicio').value||null,
    fecha_fin: document.getElementById('ec-ffin').value||null,
    notas: document.getElementById('ec-notas').value.trim()||null,
  };
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/costes/'+idCoste,{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    if (!r.ok) { var d = await r.json(); alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('Coste actualizado');
    loadCmdbCostes();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function doDeleteCoste(idCoste, concepto) {
  if (!confirm('\u00BFEliminar el coste "'+concepto+'"?')) return;
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/costes/'+idCoste,{method:'DELETE'});
    if (!r.ok) { var d = await r.json(); alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('Coste eliminado');
    loadCmdbCostes();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

async function loadCmdbCompliance() {
  var el = document.getElementById('cmdb-comp');
  try {
    var d = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cmdb/compliance').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    var html = '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>Panel de Salud & Cumplimiento</div>';
    // KPIs
    html += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;">';
    html += _cmdbKpi('SW Obsoleto', d.software_obsoleto.length, d.software_obsoleto.length>0?'#ef4444':'#3fb950');
    html += _cmdbKpi('Sin Responsable', d.activos_sin_responsable, d.activos_sin_responsable>0?'#f59e0b':'#3fb950');
    html += _cmdbKpi('Sin Proyecto', d.activos_sin_proyecto, d.activos_sin_proyecto>0?'#f59e0b':'#3fb950');
    html += '</div>';
    // Degradados
    if (d.activos_degradados.length) {
      html += '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;padding:12px;background:var(--orange-bg);border:1px solid rgba(240,136,62,.2);border-radius:8px;"><div style="font-weight:700;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:6px;">Activos Degradados / En Mantenimiento</div>';
      d.activos_degradados.forEach(function(a){
        html += '<div style="font-size:12px;">'+escHtml(a.codigo)+' — '+escHtml(a.nombre)+' <span style="color:var(--orange);font-weight:600;">['+escHtml(a.estado_ciclo)+']</span></div>';
      });
      html += '</div>';
    }
    // Certificados
    if (d.certificados.length) {
      html += '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;padding:12px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;"><div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;">Certificados SSL/TLS</div>';
      d.certificados.forEach(function(c){
        var exp = c.expira||'N/A';
        var isExpiring = exp!=='N/A' && new Date(exp) < new Date(Date.now()+90*86400000);
        html += '<div style="font-size:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">'+escHtml(c.codigo)+' — '+escHtml(c.nombre)+' → Expira: <span style="font-weight:700;color:'+(isExpiring?'var(--red)':'var(--green)')+';">'+exp+'</span></div>';
      });
      html += '</div>';
    }
    el.innerHTML = html;
  } catch(e) { el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</div>'; }
}

// ══════════════════ DEV TOOLS — JS ══════════════════
let _devLoaded = false;

function devShowSection(id, el) {
  // RBAC sections restricted to SUPERADMIN, CTO, CIO
  if (id.startsWith('rbac-')) {
    var rc = AUTH_ROLE ? AUTH_ROLE.code : '';
    if (rc !== 'SUPERADMIN' && rc !== 'CTO' && rc !== 'CIO') {
      alert('Acceso restringido: solo SUPERADMIN, CTO o CIO pueden gestionar RBAC.');
      return;
    }
  }
  document.querySelectorAll('.dev-section').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.dev-nav-item').forEach(n=>n.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('dev-sec-'+id).classList.add('active');
  el.classList.add('active');
  if (id==='db' && !_devLoaded) loadDevTables();
  if (id==='files') loadDevFiles();
  if (id==='api') loadDevAPI();
  if (id==='context') loadDevContext();
  if (id==='dbloader') { /* nothing to auto-load */ }
  if (id==='rbac-users') loadRbacUsers();
  if (id==='rbac-roles') loadRbacRolesPanel();
  if (id==='rbac-audit') loadRbacAudit();
  if (id==='rbac-org') { if (_orgView==='list') loadRbacOrg(); else loadRbacOrgTree(); }
}

async function loadDevTables() {
  _devLoaded = true;
  try {
    const tables = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/dev/tables').then(r=>r.json());
    const el = document.getElementById('dev-tables-list');
    el.innerHTML = tables.map(t => `
      <div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;" onclick="devOpenTable('${t.table_name}')" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#ef4444'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor=''">
        <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#ef4444;margin-bottom:4px;">${t.table_name}</div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">
          <span>${t.row_count||0} rows</span>
          <span>${t.col_count} cols</span>
          <span>${t.size}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    `).join('');
  } catch(e) { console.warn(e); }
}

async function devOpenTable(name) {
  const detail = document.getElementById('dev-table-detail');
  detail.style.display = 'block';
  detail.innerHTML = '<div class="no-data"><span class="loading-spinner"></span> Cargando...</div>';
  try {
    const [schema, data] = await Promise.all([
      authFetch(API_BASE+'/dev/tables/'+name+'/schema').then(r=>r.json()),
      authFetch(API_BASE+'/dev/tables/'+name+'/data?limit=20').then(r=>r.json()),
    ]);
    let html = `<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;color:#ef4444;">${name} <span style="color:var(--text3);font-weight:400;">(${data.total} rows)</span></div>`;
    // Schema
    html += `<div style="margin-bottom:10px;"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px;">Columnas</div><table class="dev-result-table"><tr><th>Columna</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Nullable</th><th>Default</th></tr>`;
    schema.columns.forEach(c => {
      html += `<tr><td style="font-weight:600;color:var(--text);">${c.column_name}</td><td>${c.data_type}${c.character_maximum_length?'('+c.character_maximum_length+')':''}</td><td>${c.is_nullable}</td><td style="font-size:9px;">${c.column_default||'—'}</td></tr>`;
    });
    html += '</table></div>';
    // Data preview
    if (data.rows.length) {
      const cols = Object.keys(data.rows[0]);
      html += `<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px;">Datos (primeras ${data.rows.length} filas)</div><div style="overflow-x:auto;"><table class="dev-result-table"><tr>${cols.map(c=>'<th>'+c+'</th>').join('')}</tr>`;
      data.rows.forEach(r => { html += '<tr>'+cols.map(c=>'<td>'+escHtml(String(r[c]??'')).substring(0,50)+'</td>').join('')+'</tr>'; });
      html += '</table></div>';
    }
    detail.innerHTML = html;
  } catch(e) { detail.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+e.message+'</div>'; }
}

async function devRunSQL() {
  const sql = document.getElementById('dev-sql-input').value.trim();
  if (!sql) return;
  const isWrite = !sql.toUpperCase().startsWith('SELECT') && !sql.toUpperCase().startsWith('WITH');
  if (isWrite && !confirm('⚠ ATENCIÓN: Esta sentencia MODIFICARÁ datos en producción.\n\n'+sql.substring(0,200)+'\n\n¿Estás seguro?')) return;
  document.getElementById('dev-sql-status').textContent = 'Ejecutando...';
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/dev/sql', {method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({sql})});
    const data = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) throw new Error(data.detail||'Error SQL');
    const el = document.getElementById('dev-sql-result');
    if (data.type==='query' && data.rows.length) {
      const cols = Object.keys(data.rows[0]);
      el.innerHTML = `<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:4px;">✓ ${data.count} filas devueltas</div><div style="overflow-x:auto;"><table class="dev-result-table"><tr>${cols.map(c=>'<th>'+c+'</th>').join('')}</tr>${data.rows.map(r=>'<tr>'+cols.map(c=>'<td>'+escHtml(String(r[c]??'')).substring(0,80)+'</td>').join('')+'</tr>').join('')}</table></div>`;
    } else if (data.type==='execute') {
      el.innerHTML = `<div style="color:var(--green);font-size:12px;">✓ ${data.result}</div>`;
    } else {
      el.innerHTML = `<div style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;">Sin resultados</div>`;
    }
    document.getElementById('dev-sql-status').textContent = '✓ OK';
  } catch(e) {
    document.getElementById('dev-sql-result').innerHTML = `<div style="color:var(--red);font-size:12px;">✕ ${escHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
    document.getElementById('dev-sql-status').textContent = '✕ Error';
  }
}

async function loadDevFiles() {
  try {
    const files = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/dev/files').then(r=>r.json());
    document.getElementById('dev-files-list').innerHTML = files.map(f => `
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;transition:all .15s;" onclick="devViewFile('${f.path}')" onmouseover="this.style.background='var(--bg3)'" onmouseout="this.style.background=''">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="${f.path.endsWith('.py')?'#3b82f6':f.path.endsWith('.sql')?'#f59e0b':'var(--text3)'}" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M13 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V9z"/><polyline points="13 2 13 9 20 9"/></svg>
        <span style="flex:1;font-family:var(--mono);">${f.path}</span>
        <span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:9px;">${f.lines} lines · ${(f.size/1024).toFixed(1)}KB</span>
      </div>
    `).join('');
  } catch(e) {}
}

async function devViewFile(path) {
  const viewer = document.getElementById('dev-file-viewer');
  viewer.style.display = 'block';
  try {
    const data = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/dev/files/'+path).then(r=>r.json());
    viewer.innerHTML = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);color:#ef4444;">${data.path}</span><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">${(data.size/1024).toFixed(1)}KB</span></div><pre style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;font-size:11px;overflow:auto;max-height:60vh;line-height:1.5;white-space:pre-wrap;"><code>${escHtml(data.content)}</code></pre>`;
  } catch(e) { viewer.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+e.message+'</div>'; }
}

async function loadDevAPI() {
  try {
    const ctx = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/dev/context').then(r=>r.json());
    const methods = {GET:'var(--green)',POST:'var(--blue)',PUT:'var(--orange)',DELETE:'var(--red)'};
    document.getElementById('dev-api-list').innerHTML = `<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:8px;">${ctx.endpoints.length} endpoints en ${ctx.total_tables} tablas</div>` +
      ctx.endpoints.map(e => `
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);">
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:${methods[e.method]||'var(--text)'};width:45px;">${e.method}</span>
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);flex:1;">${e.path}</span>
          <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);">${e.file}</span>
        </div>
      `).join('');
  } catch(e) {}
}

let _devContextMd = '';
async function loadDevContext() {
  const el = document.getElementById('dev-context-content');
  el.innerHTML = '<span class="loading-spinner"></span> Generando contexto técnico...';
  try {
    const ctx = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/dev/context').then(r=>r.json());
    let md = `# Cognitive PMO — Contexto Técnico Completo\n`;
    md += `**Generado:** ${new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES')} | **Versión:** ${ctx.version} | **Autor:** ${ctx.author}\n\n`;
    md += `## ESTADO ACTUAL\n- **Frontend:** SPA vanilla JS (${ctx.total_endpoints} endpoints)\n- **Backend:** FastAPI + asyncpg\n- **Base de datos:** PostgreSQL con ${ctx.total_tables} tablas\n- **Agentes IA:** 7 en Flowise + 4 War Room (Claude Sonnet 4)\n- **Infraestructura:** Docker Compose en NasJose 192.168.1.49\n\n`;
    md += `## ARQUITECTURA\n### Servicios\n`;
    ctx.services.forEach(s => { md += `- **${s.name}**: Puerto ${s.port} (${s.tech})\n`; });
    md += `\n## ESQUEMA DE BASE DE DATOS\n`;
    ctx.tables.forEach(t => {
      md += `\n### ${t.name} (${t.rows} filas)\n\`\`\`sql\nCREATE TABLE ${t.name} (\n`;
      t.columns.forEach((c,i) => { md += `  ${c.column_name} ${c.data_type}${c.is_nullable==='NO'?' NOT NULL':''}${c.column_default?' DEFAULT '+c.column_default:''}${i<t.columns.length-1?',':''}\n`; });
      md += `);\n\`\`\`\n`;
    });
    md += `\n## API ENDPOINTS (${ctx.endpoints.length})\n`;
    ctx.endpoints.forEach(e => { md += `- \`${e.method} ${e.path}\` — ${e.file}\n`; });
    md += `\n## DECISIONES DE DISEÑO\n- SPA monolítica en vanilla JS para máximo rendimiento y zero-build\n- asyncpg pool para alta concurrencia\n- JSONB para datos flexibles (skills, proveedores, plan_data)\n- Sub-app FastAPI para War Room (mount /cognitive)\n- Auto-sync estado técnico via kanban_tareas\n- Buffer persistente en PostgreSQL para planes RUN/BUILD\n- Mermaid para rendering visual de Gantt\n- Theme claro/oscuro con CSS variables\n- Drag-and-drop para reorden de pestañas y columnas\n`;
    _devContextMd = md;
    el.innerHTML = fmtMd(md);
  } catch(e) { el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+e.message+'</div>'; }
}

function devCopyContext() {
  if (!_devContextMd) { showToast('Genera el contexto primero'); return; }
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(_devContextMd).then(()=>showToast('Contexto copiado al portapapeles'));
}

function devDownloadContext() {
  if (!_devContextMd) { showToast('Genera el contexto primero'); return; }
  const html = `<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><title>Cognitive PMO — Contexto Técnico</title><style>body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;padding:40px;color:#222;font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;}h1{color:#dc2626;border-bottom:3px solid #dc2626;padding-bottom:10px;}h2{color:#0369a1;margin-top:30px;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;padding-bottom:5px;}h3{color:#92400e;font-size:14px;}pre{background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;padding:12px;font-size:11px;overflow-x:auto;}code{font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;}.footer{margin-top:40px;border-top:2px solid #dc2626;padding-top:10px;font-size:10px;color:#888;text-align:center;}</style></head><body>${fmtMd(_devContextMd)}<div class="footer">Cognitive PMO · Contexto Técnico · ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('es-ES')}</div></body></html>`;
  const w = window.open('','_blank');
  w.document.write(html); w.document.close();
  w.onload = () => setTimeout(()=>w.print(), 500);
}

let _clipySessionId = 'clipy-' + Date.now();
const CLIPY_AVATAR_SMALL = `<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="24" height="24" style="flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><path d="M35 85 L35 30 Q35 15 50 15 Q65 15 65 30 L65 70 Q65 80 55 80 Q45 80 45 70 L45 35" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/><ellipse cx="43" cy="38" rx="3.5" ry="4" fill="white"/><ellipse cx="57" cy="38" rx="3.5" ry="4" fill="white"/><circle cx="44" cy="38" r="2" fill="#1e293b"/><circle cx="58" cy="38" r="2" fill="#1e293b"/><path d="M44 48 Q50 54 56 48" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>`;

async function devSendChat() {
  const input = document.getElementById('dev-chat-input');
  const msg = input.value.trim();
  if (!msg) return;
  input.value = '';
  const messages = document.getElementById('dev-chat-messages');
  const now = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-ES',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
  // User bubble
  messages.innerHTML += `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-bottom:8px;">
    <div style="background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.2);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:12px;max-width:75%;border-bottom-right-radius:4px;line-height:1.5;">${escHtml(msg)}<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px;">${now}</div></div>
  </div>`;
  messages.scrollTop = messages.scrollHeight;
  // Clipy typing
  const typingId = 'clipy-t-'+Date.now();
  messages.innerHTML += `<div id="${typingId}" style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:8px;">
    ${CLIPY_AVATAR_SMALL}
    <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:12px;max-width:80%;border-top-left-radius:4px;line-height:1.5;">
      <div class="typing-wrap"><div class="typing-dot"></div><div class="typing-dot"></div><div class="typing-dot"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  messages.scrollTop = messages.scrollHeight;
  // Build TECHNICAL-ONLY context (no business data)
  let contextStr = '[CONTEXTO TÉCNICO - Solo estructura, NO datos de negocio]\n';
  contextStr += 'Stack: FastAPI+asyncpg, SPA vanilla JS, PostgreSQL 15, Docker Compose\n';
  contextStr += 'Servidor: NasJose 192.168.1.49 | API:8088 | Frontend:3030 | Flowise:3000 | PG:5432\n';
  contextStr += 'Frontend: index.html ~6500 líneas | Backend: main.py ~1300 líneas + war_room_api.py ~800 líneas\n';
  try {
    const ctx = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/dev/context').then(r=>r.json());
    contextStr += `Tablas (solo nombres): ${ctx.tables.map(t=>t.name).join(', ')}\n`;
    contextStr += `Endpoints: ${ctx.total_endpoints} totales\n`;
  } catch(e) {}
  try {
    const payload = {
      session_id: _clipySessionId,
      agent_id: 'CLIPY',
      message: contextStr + '\n[PREGUNTA DEL DESARROLLADOR]\n' + msg,
    };
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/cognitive/chat', {method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
    const data = await r.json();
    const typing = document.getElementById(typingId);
    if (typing) {
      const inner = typing.querySelector('div:last-child');
      if (inner) {
        inner.innerHTML = `${fmtMd(data.response)}<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
          <span style="color:#3b82f6;font-weight:600;">Clipy</span>
          <span>${data.model||'claude'}</span>
          <span>${data.latency_ms||0}ms</span>
          <span>${data.tokens_used||0} tokens</span>
        </div>`;
      }
    }
  } catch(e) {
    const typing = document.getElementById(typingId);
    if (typing) {
      const inner = typing.querySelector('div:last-child');
      if (inner) { inner.innerHTML = `<span style="color:var(--red);">Ups, algo ha fallado: ${escHtml(e.message)}. ¿Tienes la ANTHROPIC_API_KEY configurada?</span>`; }
    }
  }
  messages.scrollTop = messages.scrollHeight;
}

// ── THEME TOGGLE ──
function toggleTheme() {
  const root = document.documentElement;
  const isLight = root.classList.toggle('light');
  const btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
  btn.textContent = isLight ? '☀️' : '🌙';
  btn.title = isLight ? 'Cambiar a modo oscuro' : 'Cambiar a modo claro';
  localStorage.setItem('pmo-theme', isLight ? 'light' : 'dark');
}
if (localStorage.getItem('pmo-theme') === 'light') {
  document.documentElement.classList.add('light');
  const tb = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
  if (tb) tb.textContent = '☀️';
}

// ── NAV TAB DRAG REORDER ──
(function initTabDrag() {
  const container = document.querySelector('.nav-tabs');
  if (!container) return;
  let dragTab = null;
  container.addEventListener('dragstart', e => {
    dragTab = e.target.closest('.nav-tab');
    if (dragTab) { e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move'; dragTab.classList.add('dragging'); }
  });
  container.addEventListener('dragover', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const target = e.target.closest('.nav-tab');
    if (!target || target === dragTab) return;
    const rect = target.getBoundingClientRect();
    const mid = rect.left + rect.width / 2;
    if (e.clientX < mid) target.before(dragTab);
    else target.after(dragTab);
  });
  container.addEventListener('dragend', () => {
    if (dragTab) dragTab.classList.remove('dragging');
    dragTab = null;
    const order = [...container.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab')].map(t => {
      const cls = [...t.classList].filter(c => c !== 'nav-tab' && c !== 'active' && c !== 'dragging');
      return cls[0] || '';
    }).filter(Boolean);
    localStorage.setItem('pmo-tab-order', JSON.stringify(order));
  });
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('pmo-tab-order');
  if (saved) {
    try {
      JSON.parse(saved).forEach(cls => {
        const tab = container.querySelector('.nav-tab.' + cls);
        if (tab) container.appendChild(tab);
      });
    } catch(e) {}
  }
})();

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// RBAC MANAGEMENT - USERS, ROLES, AUDIT, ORG
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════ DATABASE LOADER ══════════════════

function dbloaderHandleDrop(e) {
  var files = e.dataTransfer.files;
  if (files.length > 0) dbloaderUpload(files[0]);
}

async function dbloaderUpload(file) {
  if (!file) return;
  if (!file.name.endsWith('.sql')) {
    showToast('Solo se permiten archivos .sql');
    return;
  }

  var infoEl = document.getElementById('dbloader-info');
  infoEl.style.display = 'block';
  infoEl.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:14px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--blue)" stroke-width="1.8" class="spin"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 6v6l4 2"/></svg> Subiendo ' + escHtml(file.name) + '...</div></div>';

  var formData = new FormData();
  formData.append('file', file);

  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/dev/upload-database-file', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: formData
    });
    var data = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { showToast('Error: ' + (data.detail || 'Upload failed')); return; }

    infoEl.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:14px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;">' +
      '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px;">' +
        '<div style="font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--green);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#3fb950" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14"/><polyline points="22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01"/></svg> Archivo subido correctamente</div>' +
        '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);">' + escHtml(data.uploaded_at) + '</span>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;">' +
        '<div style="background:var(--bg4);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">Archivo</div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">' + escHtml(data.filename) + '</div></div>' +
        '<div style="background:var(--bg4);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">Tamano</div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">' + data.size_mb + ' MB</div></div>' +
        '<div style="background:var(--bg4);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">Lineas</div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">' + data.lines.toLocaleString() + '</div></div>' +
        '<div style="background:var(--bg4);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">INSERT</div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);">' + data.insert_statements + '</div></div>' +
        '<div style="background:var(--bg4);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">CREATE</div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);">' + data.create_statements + '</div></div>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px;">' +
        '<button onclick="dbloaderPreview()" style="background:var(--blue-bg);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.2);color:var(--blue);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Preview</button>' +
        '<button onclick="dbloaderConfirmLoad()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3fb950,#2da44e);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Cargar en Base de Datos</button>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>';

  } catch(e) {
    infoEl.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:14px;background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:8px;color:var(--red);">Error: ' + escHtml(e.message) + '</div>';
  }
}

async function dbloaderPreview() {
  var el = document.getElementById('dbloader-preview');
  el.style.display = 'block';
  el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--text3);">Loading preview...</div>';
  try {
    var data = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/dev/preview-database-file').then(function(r){return r.json();});
    el.innerHTML = '<div style="margin-top:10px;"><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;">Preview (primeras 100 lineas):</div>' +
      '<pre style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;font-size:10px;font-family:var(--mono);max-height:300px;overflow:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;">' +
      escHtml(data.preview.join('\n')) + '</pre></div>';
  } catch(e) {
    el.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error loading preview</div>';
  }
}

function dbloaderConfirmLoad() {
  if (!confirm('ATENCION: Esto cargara el archivo SQL en la base de datos.\n\nLos datos existentes pueden ser sobrescritos.\nEl usuario admin/admin se preservara.\n\nContinuar?')) return;
  if (!confirm('Estas SEGURO? Esta operacion no se puede deshacer.')) return;
  dbloaderExecute();
}

async function dbloaderExecute() {
  var progEl = document.getElementById('dbloader-progress');
  var resultsEl = document.getElementById('dbloader-results');
  progEl.style.display = 'block';
  resultsEl.style.display = 'none';

  progEl.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:14px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;">' +
    '<div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--blue)" stroke-width="2" class="spin"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 6v6l4 2"/></svg> Ejecutando SQL...</div>' +
    '<div style="height:8px;background:var(--bg4);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;"><div id="dbloader-bar" style="height:100%;background:var(--blue);border-radius:4px;width:0%;transition:width .3s;"></div></div>' +
    '<div id="dbloader-status" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px;">Iniciando...</div></div>';

  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE + '/dev/load-database-content', {method: 'POST'});
    var data = await r.json();

    progEl.style.display = 'none';
    resultsEl.style.display = 'block';

    var isOk = data.status === 'completed';
    resultsEl.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:14px;background:' + (isOk ? 'rgba(63,185,80,.08)' : 'var(--red-bg)') + ';border:1px solid ' + (isOk ? 'rgba(63,185,80,.2)' : 'rgba(248,81,73,.2)') + ';border-radius:8px;">' +
      '<div style="font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:' + (isOk ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--red)') + ';margin-bottom:10px;">' + (isOk ? 'Carga completada' : 'Error en la carga') + '</div>' +
      '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;">' +
        '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">Exitosos</div><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:var(--green);">' + data.statements_ok + '</div></div>' +
        '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">Errores</div><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:' + (data.statements_error > 0 ? 'var(--red)' : 'var(--green)') + ';">' + data.statements_error + '</div></div>' +
        '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">Duracion</div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">' + (data.started && data.finished ? Math.round((new Date(data.finished) - new Date(data.started))/1000) + 's' : '-') + '</div></div>' +
      '</div>' +
      (data.errors && data.errors.length > 0 ? '<div style="margin-top:8px;"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:4px;">Errores (primeros 20):</div><pre style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;font-size:10px;max-height:200px;overflow:auto;">' + escHtml(data.errors.map(function(e){return e.error;}).join('\n')) + '</pre></div>' : '') +
      '<div style="margin-top:10px;padding:8px;background:var(--green-bg);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;color:var(--green);font-weight:600;">Usuario admin/admin preservado y verificado</div>' +
    '</div>';

    showToast(isOk ? 'Base de datos cargada correctamente' : 'Carga con errores');
  } catch(e) {
    progEl.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);padding:14px;">Error: ' + escHtml(e.message) + '</div>';
  }
}

// ══════════════════ RBAC ══════════════════

let _rbacUsers = [];
let _rbacRoles = [];

async function loadRbacUsers() {
  try {
    const [usersRes, rolesRes] = await Promise.all([
      authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/usuarios?limit=500').then(r=>r.json()),
      authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/roles').then(r=>r.json()),
    ]);
    _rbacUsers = usersRes.usuarios || [];
    _rbacRoles = rolesRes || [];
    renderRbacStats();
    renderRbacUsers(_rbacUsers);
    populateRoleFilter();
  } catch(e) {
    document.getElementById('rbac-users-tbody').innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" style="text-align:center;color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</td></tr>';
  }
}

function renderRbacStats() {
  var total = _rbacUsers.length;
  var activos = _rbacUsers.filter(function(u){return u.activo}).length;
  var conLogin = _rbacUsers.filter(function(u){return u.ultimo_login}).length;
  var roles = {};
  _rbacUsers.forEach(function(u){ if(!roles[u.role_code]) roles[u.role_code]={code:u.role_code,color:u.role_color||'#6B7280',cnt:0}; roles[u.role_code].cnt++; });
  var roleArr = Object.values(roles).sort(function(a,b){return b.cnt-a.cnt});
  var maxRoleCnt = roleArr.length ? roleArr[0].cnt : 1;

  // Count N-levels from cargo
  var niveles = {N1:0,N2:0,N3:0,N4:0};
  _rbacUsers.forEach(function(u){ var c=u.cargo||''; var m=c.match(/N([1-4])/); if(m) niveles['N'+m[1]]++; });
  var maxNivel = Math.max(niveles.N1,niveles.N2,niveles.N3,niveles.N4,1);

  var cardS = 'background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;';
  var labelS = 'font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:6px;';
  var numS = 'font-size:26px;font-weight:800;line-height:1;';

  // Row 1: 4 stat cards
  var h = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;">';
  h += '<div style="'+cardS+'"><div style="'+labelS+'">'+t('rbac.total_users')+'</div><div style="'+numS+'color:var(--blue);">'+total+'</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="'+cardS+'"><div style="'+labelS+'">'+t('rbac.active')+'</div><div style="'+numS+'color:var(--green);">'+activos+'</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="'+cardS+'"><div style="'+labelS+'">'+t('rbac.logged_in')+'</div><div style="'+numS+'color:var(--orange);">'+conLogin+'</div></div>';
  h += '<div style="'+cardS+'"><div style="'+labelS+'">'+t('rbac.roles_used')+'</div><div style="'+numS+'color:var(--purple);">'+Object.keys(roles).length+'</div></div>';
  h += '</div>';

  // Row 2: Role distribution + N-level bars + Availability donut
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;">';

  // Role distribution bars
  h += '<div style="'+cardS+'"><div style="'+labelS+'">Distribución por Rol</div>';
  roleArr.slice(0,8).forEach(function(r){
    var pct = Math.round(r.cnt/total*100);
    h += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:3px;">'+
      '<div style="width:80px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:'+r.color+';overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;" title="'+r.code+'">'+r.code+'</div>'+
      '<div style="flex:1;height:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border-radius:5px;overflow:hidden;">'+
      '<div style="width:'+Math.round(r.cnt/maxRoleCnt*100)+'%;height:100%;background:'+r.color+';border-radius:5px;transition:width .3s;"></div></div>'+
      '<div style="width:24px;text-align:right;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);">'+r.cnt+'</div></div>';
  });
  h += '</div>';

  // N-level bars
  h += '<div style="'+cardS+'"><div style="'+labelS+'">Niveles N1-N4</div>';
  ['N1','N2','N3','N4'].forEach(function(n){
    var clr = n==='N1'?'#ef4444':n==='N2'?'#f59e0b':n==='N3'?'#22c55e':'#8b5cf6';
    h += '<div style="margin-bottom:6px;"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:2px;"><span style="color:'+clr+';">'+n+'</span><span style="color:var(--text2);">'+niveles[n]+'</span></div>'+
      '<div style="height:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;">'+
      '<div style="width:'+Math.round(niveles[n]/maxNivel*100)+'%;height:100%;background:'+clr+';border-radius:4px;"></div></div></div>';
  });
  h += '</div>';

  // Availability donut (CSS-only)
  h += '<div style="'+cardS+'"><div style="'+labelS+'">Disponibilidad</div>';
  h += '<div id="rbac-avail-chart" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;"><div style="color:var(--text3);font-size:10px;">Cargando...</div></div></div>';

  h += '</div>';
  document.getElementById('rbac-stats').innerHTML = h;

  // Load availability data async
  authFetch(API_BASE+'/team/tecnicos').then(function(r){return r.json()}).then(function(data){
    var team = data.recursos || data || [];
    if (!Array.isArray(team)) return;
    var st = {};
    team.forEach(function(t){ var e=t.estado_run||'DESCONOCIDO'; st[e]=(st[e]||0)+1; });
    var tot = team.length || 1;
    var colors = {DISPONIBLE:'#22c55e',OCUPADO:'#f59e0b',GUARDIA:'#3b82f6',VACACIONES:'#8b5cf6',BAJA:'#ef4444'};
    var el = document.getElementById('rbac-avail-chart');
    if (!el) return;
    // CSS conic donut
    var segments = [], offset = 0;
    Object.keys(st).forEach(function(k){ var pct=st[k]/tot*100; segments.push((colors[k]||'#6b7280')+' '+offset+'% '+(offset+pct)+'%'); offset+=pct; });
    var ah = '<div style="width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;background:conic-gradient('+segments.join(',')+');position:relative;margin:0 auto;">'+
      '<div style="position:absolute;inset:16px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:var(--text);">'+tot+'</div></div>';
    ah += '<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px 8px;justify-content:center;">';
    Object.keys(st).forEach(function(k){
      ah += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;font-size:8px;font-weight:600;"><div style="width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:2px;background:'+(colors[k]||'#6b7280')+';"></div>'+k+' <span style="color:var(--text2);">'+st[k]+'</span></div>';
    });
    ah += '</div>';
    el.innerHTML = ah;
  }).catch(function(){});
}

function renderRbacUsers(users) {
  var tbody = document.getElementById('rbac-users-tbody');
  if (!users.length) {
    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="no-data">No se encontraron usuarios</td></tr>';
    return;
  }
  // Detect silo from cargo/department
  function getSiloColor(u){
    var c = ((u.cargo||'')+(u.departamento||'')).toLowerCase();
    if(c.includes('backend')||c.includes('bbdd')||c.includes('datos'))return'#f97316';
    if(c.includes('frontend')||c.includes('qa'))return'#06b6d4';
    if(c.includes('devops')||c.includes('cloud'))return'#8b5cf6';
    if(c.includes('redes')||c.includes('infraestr'))return'#3b82f6';
    if(c.includes('seguridad')||c.includes('soc')||c.includes('noc'))return'#ef4444';
    if(c.includes('soporte')||c.includes('service'))return'#22c55e';
    if(c.includes('windows')||c.includes('sistemas'))return'#06b6d4';
    return u.role_color||'#6B7280';
  }
  tbody.innerHTML = users.map(function(u,i) {
    var initials = (u.nombre_completo||'?').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
    var rc = u.role_color || '#6B7280';
    var sc = getSiloColor(u);
    var loginDate = u.ultimo_login ? new Date(u.ultimo_login).toLocaleDateString(LANG==='en'?'en-US':'es-ES',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}) : '<span style="color:var(--text3);">'+t('rbac.never')+'</span>';
    // Status badge with more detail
    var statusBadge;
    if (!u.activo) {
      statusBadge = '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.2);"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:#ef4444;"></span>'+t('common.inactive')+'</span>';
    } else if (u.ultimo_login && (Date.now()-new Date(u.ultimo_login).getTime())<86400000) {
      statusBadge = '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:rgba(34,197,94,.1);color:#22c55e;border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.2);"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:#22c55e;"></span>Online</span>';
    } else {
      statusBadge = '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:rgba(107,114,128,.1);color:#9ca3af;border:1px solid rgba(107,114,128,.2);"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:#9ca3af;"></span>'+t('common.active')+'</span>';
    }
    // N-level badge
    var nLevel = '';
    var cm = (u.cargo||'').match(/N([1-4])/);
    if(cm){
      var nc = {1:'#ef4444',2:'#f59e0b',3:'#22c55e',4:'#8b5cf6'}[cm[1]];
      nLevel = '<span style="font-size:8px;font-weight:800;padding:1px 4px;border-radius:3px;background:'+nc+'18;color:'+nc+';margin-left:4px;">N'+cm[1]+'</span>';
    }
    return '<tr style="transition:background .15s;" onmouseenter="this.style.background=\'rgba(255,255,255,.02)\'" onmouseleave="this.style.background=\'\'">'+
      '<td style="color:var(--text3);font-size:10px;">'+(i+1)+'</td>'+
      '<td><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">'+
        '<div style="width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,'+sc+'22,'+sc+'44);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;color:'+sc+';flex-shrink:0;border:2px solid '+sc+'33;">'+initials+'</div>'+
        '<div><div style="font-weight:600;font-size:12px;">'+escHtml(u.nombre_completo)+nLevel+'</div>'+
        '<div style="display:flex;gap:4px;align-items:center;">'+
        (u.id_recurso ? '<span style="font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(6,182,212,.1);color:var(--cyan);font-family:var(--mono);border:1px solid rgba(6,182,212,.15);">'+escHtml(u.id_recurso)+'</span>' : '')+
        (u.id_directivo ? '<span style="font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(240,136,62,.1);color:var(--orange);font-family:var(--mono);border:1px solid rgba(240,136,62,.15);">'+escHtml(u.id_directivo)+'</span>' : '')+
        '</div></div></div></td>'+
      '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">'+escHtml(u.email)+'</td>'+
      '<td><span style="padding:2px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:'+rc+'18;color:'+rc+';border:1px solid '+rc+'25;">'+escHtml(u.role_code)+'</span></td>'+
      '<td style="font-size:11px;">'+escHtml(u.departamento||'-')+'</td>'+
      '<td style="font-size:11px;">'+loginDate+'</td>'+
      '<td>'+statusBadge+'</td>'+
      '<td><div style="display:flex;gap:4px;">'+
        '<button onclick="showEditUserForm('+u.id_usuario+')" style="background:rgba(45,126,247,.08);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.2);color:var(--blue);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;" onmouseenter="this.style.background=\'rgba(45,126,247,.15)\'" onmouseleave="this.style.background=\'rgba(45,126,247,.08)\'" title="'+t('common.edit')+'">'+t('common.edit')+'</button>'+
        '<button onclick="resetUserPass('+u.id_usuario+',\''+escHtml(u.nombre_completo)+'\')" style="background:rgba(240,136,62,.08);border:1px solid rgba(240,136,62,.2);color:var(--orange);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;" onmouseenter="this.style.background=\'rgba(240,136,62,.15)\'" onmouseleave="this.style.background=\'rgba(240,136,62,.08)\'" title="Reset">'+t('rbac.reset_pass')+'</button>'+
      '</div></td>'+
    '</tr>';
  }).join('');
}

function populateRoleFilter() {
  const sel = document.getElementById('rbac-role-filter');
  sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">'+t('rbac.all_roles')+'</option>';
  _rbacRoles.forEach(r => {
    sel.innerHTML += '<option value="'+escHtml(r.code)+'">'+escHtml(r.code)+' ('+r.total_usuarios+')</option>';
  });
}

function filterRbacUsers(val) {
  const q = val.toLowerCase();
  const roleFilter = document.getElementById('rbac-role-filter').value;
  const filtered = _rbacUsers.filter(u => {
    const matchText = !q || (u.nombre_completo||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) || (u.email||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) || (u.departamento||'').toLowerCase().includes(q);
    const matchRole = !roleFilter || u.role_code === roleFilter;
    return matchText && matchRole;
  });
  renderRbacUsers(filtered);
}

function filterRbacByRole(val) {
  filterRbacUsers(document.getElementById('rbac-search').value);
}

// ── Create User Form ──
function showCreateUserForm() {
  const roleOpts = _rbacRoles.map(r => '<option value="'+escHtml(r.code)+'">'+escHtml(r.code)+' - '+escHtml(r.nombre)+'</option>').join('');
  const html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;">'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Nombre Completo *</label><input type="text" id="nu-nombre" placeholder="Nombre Apellido1 Apellido2"></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Email *</label><input type="text" id="nu-email" placeholder="nombre@cognitivepmo.com"></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Rol *</label><select id="nu-role" style="width:100%;padding:10px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;">'+roleOpts+'</select></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Contraseña</label><input type="text" id="nu-pass" value="12345" placeholder="12345"></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Departamento</label><input type="text" id="nu-dept" placeholder="Ej: Backend, Soporte..."></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Cargo</label><input type="text" id="nu-cargo" placeholder="Ej: Técnico N2 - Backend"></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>ID Recurso (FTE)</label><input type="text" id="nu-recurso" placeholder="FTE-XXX (opcional)"></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>ID Directivo</label><input type="text" id="nu-directivo" placeholder="DIR-XXX (opcional)"></div>'+
  '</div>'+
  '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:16px;justify-content:flex-end;">'+
    '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>'+
    '<button onclick="doCreateUser()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#d97706);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Crear Usuario</button>'+
  '</div>';
  showSimpleModal('Crear Nuevo Usuario', html);
}

async function doCreateUser() {
  const body = {
    nombre_completo: document.getElementById('nu-nombre').value.trim(),
    email: document.getElementById('nu-email').value.trim(),
    role_code: document.getElementById('nu-role').value,
    password: document.getElementById('nu-pass').value || '12345',
    departamento: document.getElementById('nu-dept').value.trim() || null,
    cargo: document.getElementById('nu-cargo').value.trim() || null,
    id_recurso: document.getElementById('nu-recurso').value.trim() || null,
    id_directivo: document.getElementById('nu-directivo').value.trim() || null,
  };
  if (!body.nombre_completo || !body.email) { alert('Nombre y Email son obligatorios'); return; }
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/usuarios', {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    const data = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { alert('Error: '+(data.detail||'Error desconocido')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('Usuario creado: '+body.email);
    loadRbacUsers();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ── Edit User Form ──
function showEditUserForm(userId) {
  const user = _rbacUsers.find(u => u.id_usuario === userId);
  if (!user) return;
  const roleOpts = _rbacRoles.map(r => '<option value="'+escHtml(r.code)+'"'+(r.code===user.role_code?' selected':'')+'>'+escHtml(r.code)+' - '+escHtml(r.nombre)+'</option>').join('');
  const html = '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;padding:10px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">'+
    '<div style="width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:'+(user.role_color||'var(--blue)')+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;">'+(user.nombre_completo||'?').split(' ').map(w=>w[0]).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase()+'</div>'+
    '<div><div style="font-weight:700;">'+escHtml(user.nombre_completo)+'</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--mono);">'+escHtml(user.email)+'</div></div>'+
  '</div>'+
  '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;">'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Nombre Completo</label><input type="text" id="eu-nombre" value="'+escHtml(user.nombre_completo||'')+'"></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Rol</label><select id="eu-role" style="width:100%;padding:10px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;">'+roleOpts+'</select></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Departamento</label><input type="text" id="eu-dept" value="'+escHtml(user.departamento||'')+'"></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Cargo</label><input type="text" id="eu-cargo" value="'+escHtml(user.cargo||'')+'"></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field" style="grid-column:1/-1;"><label>Estado</label><select id="eu-activo" style="width:100%;padding:10px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;">'+
      '<option value="true"'+(user.activo?' selected':'')+'>Activo</option>'+
      '<option value="false"'+(!user.activo?' selected':'')+'>Inactivo</option>'+
    '</select></div>'+
  '</div>'+
  '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:16px;justify-content:flex-end;">'+
    '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>'+
    '<button onclick="doEditUser('+userId+')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#3b82f6);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Guardar Cambios</button>'+
  '</div>';
  showSimpleModal('Editar Usuario #'+userId, html);
}

async function doEditUser(userId) {
  const body = {
    nombre_completo: document.getElementById('eu-nombre').value.trim() || null,
    role_code: document.getElementById('eu-role').value || null,
    departamento: document.getElementById('eu-dept').value.trim() || null,
    cargo: document.getElementById('eu-cargo').value.trim() || null,
    activo: document.getElementById('eu-activo').value === 'true',
  };
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/usuarios/'+userId, {method:'PUT', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    const data = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { alert('Error: '+(data.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('Usuario actualizado');
    loadRbacUsers();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ── Reset Password ──
async function resetUserPass(userId, nombre) {
  if (!confirm(t('misc.confirm_reset')+' "'+nombre+'" '+t('misc.to_default'))) return;
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/usuarios/'+userId+'/reset-password', {method:'POST'});
    if (!r.ok) { const d = await r.json(); alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    showToast(t('misc.password_reset')+' ('+nombre+')');
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// RBAC ROLES & PERMISOS MANAGEMENT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var _allPermisos = [];
var _accionColors = {ver:'var(--green)',crear:'var(--blue)',editar:'var(--orange)',eliminar:'var(--red)',aprobar:'var(--purple)',exportar:'var(--cyan)',ejecutar:'var(--pink)',admin:'var(--red)'};

async function loadRbacRolesPanel() {
  try {
    var res = await Promise.all([
      authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/roles').then(function(r){return r.json();}),
      authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/permisos').then(function(r){return r.json();}),
    ]);
    _rbacRoles = res[0] || [];
    _allPermisos = res[1] || [];
    renderRolesCards();
  } catch(e) {
    document.getElementById('rbac-roles-list').innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</div>';
  }
}

function renderRolesCards() {
  var container = document.getElementById('rbac-roles-list');
  container.innerHTML = _rbacRoles.map(function(r) {
    var color = r.color || '#6B7280';
    return '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;border-left:4px solid '+color+';cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .15s;" onclick="openRoleEditor('+r.id_role+')" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor=\''+color+'\'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor=\'var(--border)\'">'+
      '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:6px;">'+
        '<div style="width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:8px;background:'+color+'22;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;">'+
          '<svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="'+color+'" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>'+
        '</div>'+
        '<div style="flex:1;min-width:0;"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:13px;">'+escHtml(r.nombre)+'</div>'+
          '<div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:'+color+';font-weight:600;">'+escHtml(r.code)+'</div></div>'+
        '<div style="text-align:right;">'+
          '<div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue);">'+r.total_permisos+'</div>'+
          '<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;">permisos</div>'+
        '</div>'+
      '</div>'+
      '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:8px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">'+escHtml(r.descripcion||'Sin descripción')+'</div>'+
      '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">'+
        '<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--green);font-weight:600;">'+r.total_usuarios+' usuarios</span>'+
        (r.activo?'':'<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--red);font-weight:600;">INACTIVO</span>')+
      '</div>'+
    '</div>';
  }).join('');
}

// ── Unified Role Editor (datos + permisos visual) ──
async function openRoleEditor(roleId) {
  var role = _rbacRoles.find(function(r){ return r.id_role === roleId; });
  if (!role) return;
  var color = role.color || '#6B7280';

  // Fetch assigned permisos
  var assigned;
  try {
    assigned = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/roles/'+roleId+'/permisos').then(function(r){return r.json();});
  } catch(e) { alert('Error cargando permisos'); return; }
  var assignedIds = new Set(assigned.map(function(p){ return p.id_permiso; }));

  // Group permisos by module
  var grouped = {};
  _allPermisos.forEach(function(p) {
    if (!grouped[p.modulo]) grouped[p.modulo] = [];
    grouped[p.modulo].push(p);
  });

  // Build HTML
  var html = '';

  // ── Role header info ──
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
  html += '<div style="flex:1;min-width:200px;"><label style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Nombre</label><input type="text" id="er-nombre" value="'+escHtml(role.nombre||'')+'" style="width:100%;padding:8px 10px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;font-size:13px;"></div>';
  html += '<div style="flex:1;min-width:200px;"><label style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Descripción</label><input type="text" id="er-desc" value="'+escHtml(role.descripcion||'')+'" style="width:100%;padding:8px 10px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;font-size:13px;"></div>';
  html += '<div style="width:60px;"><label style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;">Color</label><input type="color" id="er-color" value="'+(role.color||'#6B7280')+'" style="width:44px;height:34px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;"></div>';
  html += '</div>';

  // ── Quick actions ──
  html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;">';
  html += '<span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);">Permisos</span>';
  html += '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);" id="rp-count">'+assignedIds.size+' de '+_allPermisos.length+'</span>';
  html += '<div style="margin-left:auto;display:flex;gap:4px;">';
  html += '<button onclick="rpSelectAll(true)" style="background:var(--green-bg);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.2);color:var(--green);border-radius:4px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Marcar todos</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="rpSelectAll(false)" style="background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--red);border-radius:4px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Desmarcar todos</button>';
  html += '</div></div>';

  // ── Permisos grid (same visual as "Mis Permisos") ──
  html += '<div style="max-height:50vh;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:4px;">';
  var modulos = Object.keys(grouped).sort();
  modulos.forEach(function(mod) {
    var perms = grouped[mod];
    var checkedCount = perms.filter(function(p){ return assignedIds.has(p.id_permiso); }).length;
    html += '<div style="margin-bottom:12px;">';
    html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;cursor:pointer;" onclick="rpToggleModule(\''+mod+'\')">';
    html += '<input type="checkbox" id="rp-mod-'+mod+'"'+(checkedCount===perms.length?' checked':'')+' style="accent-color:var(--blue);cursor:pointer;width:14px;height:14px;" onclick="event.stopPropagation();rpToggleModule(\''+mod+'\')">';
    html += '<span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;">'+escHtml(mod)+'</span>';
    html += '<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);">'+checkedCount+'/'+perms.length+'</span>';
    html += '</div>';
    html += '<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;padding-left:22px;">';
    perms.forEach(function(p) {
      var checked = assignedIds.has(p.id_permiso);
      var c = _accionColors[p.accion] || 'var(--text2)';
      html += '<label style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;background:'+c+'18;color:'+c+';opacity:'+(checked?'1':'.35')+';transition:opacity .15s;" title="'+escHtml(p.descripcion||p.code)+'">';
      html += '<input type="checkbox" class="rp-check" data-id="'+p.id_permiso+'" data-modulo="'+mod+'"'+(checked?' checked':'')+' style="accent-color:'+c+';cursor:pointer;width:12px;height:12px;" onchange="rpUpdateBadge(this)">';
      html += escHtml(p.accion);
      html += '</label>';
    });
    html += '</div></div>';
  });
  html += '</div>';

  // ── Footer buttons ──
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">';
  if (role.total_usuarios === 0) {
    html += '<button onclick="deleteRole('+roleId+',\''+escHtml(role.code)+'\')" style="background:var(--red-bg);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);color:var(--red);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Eliminar Rol</button>';
  } else {
    html += '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);">'+role.total_usuarios+' usuarios asignados</span>';
  }
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">';
  html += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>';
  html += '<button onclick="doSaveRole('+roleId+')" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#a855f7);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Guardar Todo</button>';
  html += '</div></div>';

  showSimpleModal(role.code+' — '+role.nombre, html);

  // Live counter update
  document.querySelectorAll('.rp-check').forEach(function(cb) {
    cb.addEventListener('change', rpUpdateCount);
  });
}

function rpUpdateBadge(cb) {
  var label = cb.parentElement;
  label.style.opacity = cb.checked ? '1' : '.35';
  rpUpdateCount();
}

function rpUpdateCount() {
  var total = document.querySelectorAll('.rp-check').length;
  var checked = document.querySelectorAll('.rp-check:checked').length;
  var el = document.getElementById('rp-count');
  if (el) el.textContent = checked + ' de ' + total;
}

function rpToggleModule(mod) {
  var modCb = document.getElementById('rp-mod-'+mod);
  var newState = modCb ? modCb.checked : true;
  document.querySelectorAll('.rp-check[data-modulo="'+mod+'"]').forEach(function(cb) {
    cb.checked = newState;
    cb.parentElement.style.opacity = newState ? '1' : '.35';
  });
  rpUpdateCount();
}

function rpSelectAll(state) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.rp-check').forEach(function(cb) {
    cb.checked = state;
    cb.parentElement.style.opacity = state ? '1' : '.35';
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('[id^="rp-mod-"]').forEach(function(cb) { cb.checked = state; });
  rpUpdateCount();
}

async function doSaveRole(roleId) {
  // Save role data + permisos in one go
  var roleBody = {
    nombre: document.getElementById('er-nombre').value.trim() || null,
    descripcion: document.getElementById('er-desc').value.trim() || null,
    color: document.getElementById('er-color').value,
  };
  var ids = [];
  document.querySelectorAll('.rp-check:checked').forEach(function(cb) {
    ids.push(parseInt(cb.getAttribute('data-id')));
  });
  try {
    // Update role info
    await authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/roles/'+roleId, {method:'PUT', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(roleBody)});
    // Update permisos
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/roles/'+roleId+'/permisos', {
      method:'PUT', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body:JSON.stringify({permisos:ids}),
    });
    var data = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { alert('Error: '+(data.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('Rol guardado con '+data.permisos_count+' permisos');
    loadRbacRolesPanel();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ── Create Role ──
function showCreateRoleForm() {
  var html = '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;">'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Código (único) *</label><input type="text" id="nr-code" placeholder="Ej: PM_EXTERNO" style="text-transform:uppercase;"></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Nombre *</label><input type="text" id="nr-nombre" placeholder="Ej: Project Manager Externo"></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field" style="grid-column:1/-1;"><label>Descripción</label><input type="text" id="nr-desc" placeholder="Descripción del rol..."></div>'+
    '<div class="login-field"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="nr-color" value="#6B7280" style="width:50px;height:34px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;"></div>'+
  '</div>'+
  '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:16px;justify-content:flex-end;">'+
    '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'simple-modal-overlay\').remove()" style="background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>'+
    '<button onclick="doCreateRole()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#d97706);border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Crear Rol</button>'+
  '</div>';
  showSimpleModal('Crear Nuevo Rol', html);
}

async function doCreateRole() {
  var body = {
    code: (document.getElementById('nr-code').value || '').trim().toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_'),
    nombre: document.getElementById('nr-nombre').value.trim(),
    descripcion: document.getElementById('nr-desc').value.trim() || null,
    color: document.getElementById('nr-color').value || '#6B7280',
  };
  if (!body.code || !body.nombre) { alert('Código y Nombre son obligatorios'); return; }
  try {
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/roles', {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    var data = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { alert('Error: '+(data.detail||'Error')); return; }
    document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay').remove();
    showToast('Rol "'+body.code+'" creado — haz click para configurar permisos');
    loadRbacRolesPanel();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ── Delete Role ──
async function deleteRole(roleId, code) {
  if (!confirm('¿Eliminar el rol "'+code+'"? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.')) return;
  try {
    var ov = document.getElementById('simple-modal-overlay');
    if (ov) ov.remove();
    var r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/roles/'+roleId, {method:'DELETE'});
    if (!r.ok) { var d = await r.json(); alert('Error: '+(d.detail||'Error')); return; }
    showToast('Rol "'+code+'" eliminado');
    loadRbacRolesPanel();
  } catch(e) { alert('Error: '+e.message); }
}

// ── Audit Log ──
async function loadRbacAudit() {
  try {
    const data = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/rbac/audit?limit=200').then(r=>r.json());
    const logs = data.logs || [];
    const tbody = document.getElementById('rbac-audit-tbody');
    if (!logs.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="no-data">Sin registros de auditoría</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = logs.map(l => {
      const ts = l.timestamp ? new Date(l.timestamp).toLocaleString('es-ES') : '-';
      const resColor = l.resultado==='OK' ? 'var(--green)' : l.resultado==='DENEGADO' ? 'var(--red)' : 'var(--orange)';
      return '<tr>'+
        '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;">'+ts+'</td>'+
        '<td>'+escHtml(l.nombre_completo||l.email||'-')+'</td>'+
        '<td><span style="font-weight:600;">'+escHtml(l.accion||'-')+'</span></td>'+
        '<td>'+escHtml(l.modulo||'-')+'</td>'+
        '<td><span style="color:'+resColor+';font-weight:700;font-size:11px;">'+escHtml(l.resultado)+'</span></td>'+
        '<td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;">'+escHtml(l.ip_address||'-')+'</td>'+
        '<td style="font-size:10px;max-width:200px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">'+escHtml(JSON.stringify(l.detalle||{}))+'</td>'+
      '</tr>';
    }).join('');
  } catch(e) {
    document.getElementById('rbac-audit-tbody').innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</td></tr>';
  }
}

// ── Organigrama ──
async function loadRbacOrg() {
  try {
    const data = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/directorio/organigrama').then(r=>r.json());
    const roots = data.organigrama || [];
    const container = document.getElementById('rbac-org-content');
    const levelColors = {'C-LEVEL':'#EF4444','VP':'#8B5CF6','DIRECTOR':'#2563EB','SUBDIRECTOR':'#0891B2','GERENTE':'#10B981','COORDINADOR':'#06B6D4','JEFE_EQUIPO':'#F59E0B'};

    function renderNode(node, depth) {
      const color = levelColors[node.nivel_organizativo] || '#6B7280';
      const indent = depth * 28;
      let html = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 12px;margin-left:'+indent+'px;border-left:2px solid '+color+'44;margin-bottom:2px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;cursor:default;" title="'+escHtml(node.email)+'">';
      html += '<div style="width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:'+color+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;">'+(node.nombre_completo||'?').split(' ').map(w=>w[0]).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase()+'</div>';
