      html += '<div style="flex:1;min-width:0;"><div style="font-weight:600;font-size:13px;">'+escHtml(node.nombre_completo)+'</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);">'+escHtml(node.cargo)+'</div></div>';
      html += '<span style="padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:'+color+'22;color:'+color+';white-space:nowrap;">'+escHtml(node.nivel_organizativo)+'</span>';
      html += '<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono);">'+escHtml(node.email||'')+'</span>';
      html += '</div>';
      if (node.subordinados && node.subordinados.length) {
        node.subordinados.forEach(sub => { html += renderNode(sub, depth+1); });
      }
      return html;
    }

    container.innerHTML = '<div style="margin-bottom:10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);">Total directivos: <strong style="color:var(--text);">'+data.total_directivos+'</strong></div>' +
      roots.map(r => renderNode(r, 0)).join('');
  } catch(e) {
    document.getElementById('rbac-org-content').innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</div>';
  }
}

// ── Org Tree (hybrid interactive) ──
var _orgTreeData = null;
var _orgView = 'tree';
var _orgAllNodes = [];

function orgToggleView(view) {
  _orgView = view;
  document.getElementById('org-view-tree').style.background = view==='tree' ? 'var(--blue)' : 'var(--bg3)';
  document.getElementById('org-view-tree').style.color = view==='tree' ? '#fff' : 'var(--text3)';
  document.getElementById('org-view-list').style.background = view==='list' ? 'var(--blue)' : 'var(--bg3)';
  document.getElementById('org-view-list').style.color = view==='list' ? '#fff' : 'var(--text3)';
  if (view==='list') loadRbacOrg();
  else if (_orgTreeData) renderOrgTree(_orgTreeData);
  else loadRbacOrgTree();
}

async function loadRbacOrgTree() {
  var container = document.getElementById('rbac-org-content');
  container.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:40px;color:var(--text3);">Cargando organigrama...</div>';
  try {
    var data = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/directorio/organigrama').then(function(r){return r.json()});
    _orgTreeData = data;
    renderOrgTree(data);
  } catch(e) {
    container.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--red);">Error: '+escHtml(e.message)+'</div>';
  }
}

function renderOrgTree(data) {
  var all = data.organigrama || [];
  _orgAllNodes = [];
  flattenNodes(all);
  var totalPersonas = data.total_directivos || all.length;
  var areas = {};
  _orgAllNodes.forEach(function(n){ areas[n.area]=true; });
  var niveles = {};
  _orgAllNodes.forEach(function(n){ niveles[n.nivel_organizativo]=true; });

  var statsEl = document.getElementById('org-stats');
  if (statsEl) {
    statsEl.innerHTML =
      '<span style="padding:2px 8px;background:rgba(45,126,247,.1);border:1px solid rgba(45,126,247,.15);border-radius:4px;"><strong style="color:var(--blue);">'+totalPersonas+'</strong> personas</span>'+
      '<span style="padding:2px 8px;background:rgba(139,92,246,.1);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,.15);border-radius:4px;"><strong style="color:var(--purple);">'+Object.keys(areas).length+'</strong> &aacute;reas</span>'+
      '<span style="padding:2px 8px;background:rgba(34,197,94,.1);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.15);border-radius:4px;"><strong style="color:var(--green);">'+Object.keys(niveles).length+'</strong> niveles</span>';
  }

  // Separate connected tree (root = CEO) from orphans
  var ceoNode = null;
  var orphans = [];
  all.forEach(function(n){
    if (n.nivel_organizativo==='C-LEVEL' && !n.reporta_a && n.subordinados && n.subordinados.length) {
      ceoNode = n;
    } else if (n.nivel_organizativo!=='C-LEVEL' || (!n.subordinados || !n.subordinados.length)) {
      if (n !== ceoNode) orphans.push(n);
    }
  });

  var container = document.getElementById('rbac-org-content');
  var html = '<div class="otree" id="otree-root">';

  // CEO card at top
  if (ceoNode) {
    html += renderTreeNode(ceoNode, 0, true);
  }
  html += '</div>';

  // Orphan areas
  if (orphans.length) {
    html += '<div style="margin-top:20px;padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);">';
    html += '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;">Otras &aacute;reas ('+orphans.length+' directivos)</div>';
    var byArea = {};
    orphans.forEach(function(o){ var a=o.area||'Sin \u00e1rea'; if(!byArea[a])byArea[a]=[]; byArea[a].push(o); });
    var areaKeys = Object.keys(byArea).sort();
    areaKeys.forEach(function(a,ai){
      var people = byArea[a];
      html += '<div class="otree-area-group">';
      html += '<div class="otree-area-header" onclick="this.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle(\'open\');this.querySelector(\'.oa-arrow\').textContent=this.nextElementSibling.classList.contains(\'open\')?\'\u25BC\':\'\u25B6\';">';
      html += '<span class="oa-arrow" style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);width:12px;">\u25B6</span>';
      html += '<span class="otree-area-title">'+escHtml(a)+'</span>';
      html += '<span class="otree-area-count">'+people.length+' personas</span>';
      html += '</div>';
      html += '<div class="otree-area-body">';
      html += '<div class="otree-leaf-row">';
      people.forEach(function(p){
        html += renderLeafCard(p);
      });
      html += '</div></div></div>';
    });
    html += '</div>';
  }

  container.innerHTML = html;

  // Auto-expand CEO level
  if (ceoNode) {
    var ceoId = 'otn-'+(ceoNode.id_directivo||'').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g,'');
    var ceoChildren = document.getElementById(ceoId+'-children');
    var ceoCard = document.getElementById(ceoId);
    if (ceoChildren) { ceoChildren.classList.add('open'); }
    if (ceoCard) { ceoCard.classList.add('expanded'); }
  }
}

function renderTreeNode(node, depth, isRoot) {
  var lc = getLevelColor(node.nivel_organizativo);
  var ac = getAreaColor(node.area);
  var initials = (node.nombre_completo||'?').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
  var childCount = countDescendants(node);
  var hasChildren = node.subordinados && node.subordinados.length > 0;
  var nodeId = 'otn-'+(node.id_directivo||'').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g,'');

  var html = '<div class="otree-branch">';

  // Vertical connector from parent (not for root)
  if (!isRoot) {
    html += '<div class="otree-vline"></div>';
  }

  // The card
  html += '<div class="otree-card'+(hasChildren?' expandable':'')+'" id="'+nodeId+'" onclick="orgToggleNode(\''+nodeId+'\')" data-name="'+escHtml(node.nombre_completo)+'" data-id="'+escHtml(node.id_directivo||'')+'">';
  if (childCount > 0) {
    html += '<div class="otree-count">'+childCount+'</div>';
  }
  html += '<div class="otree-avatar" style="background:'+ac+';">'+initials+'</div>';
  html += '<div class="otree-name" title="'+escHtml(node.nombre_completo)+'">'+escHtml(shortName(node.nombre_completo))+'</div>';
  html += '<div class="otree-cargo">'+escHtml(node.cargo)+'</div>';
  html += '<div class="otree-badge" style="background:'+lc+'22;color:'+lc+';">'+escHtml(node.nivel_organizativo)+'</div>';
  html += '</div>';

  // Children
  if (hasChildren) {
    html += '<div class="otree-children" id="'+nodeId+'-children">';
    html += '<div class="otree-vline"></div>';

    // Separate manager-level children from leaf-level
    var managers = [];
    var leaves = [];
    node.subordinados.forEach(function(s){
      if (s.subordinados && s.subordinados.length > 0) {
        managers.push(s);
      } else if (s.nivel_organizativo==='JEFE_EQUIPO' || s.nivel_organizativo==='COORDINADOR') {
        leaves.push(s);
      } else {
        managers.push(s);
      }
    });

    // Manager children in horizontal row
    if (managers.length) {
      html += '<div class="otree-level">';
      managers.forEach(function(child){
        html += renderTreeNode(child, depth+1, false);
      });
      html += '</div>';
    }

    // Leaf children as mini cards
    if (leaves.length) {
      html += '<div class="otree-vline" style="height:10px;"></div>';
      html += '<div class="otree-leaf-row">';
      var showCount = Math.min(leaves.length, 20);
      for (var li=0; li<showCount; li++) {
        html += renderLeafCard(leaves[li]);
      }
      if (leaves.length > 20) {
        html += '<div class="otree-more" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">+' + (leaves.length-20) + ' m&aacute;s</div>';
      }
      html += '</div>';
    }

    html += '</div>';
  }

  html += '</div>';
  return html;
}

function renderLeafCard(p) {
  var ac = getAreaColor(p.area);
  var initials = (p.nombre_completo||'?').split(' ').map(function(w){return w[0]}).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
  var nivelMatch = (p.cargo||'').match(/N([1-4])/);
  var nivelTxt = nivelMatch ? 'N'+nivelMatch[1] : '';
  var nivelClr = nivelMatch ? ({1:'#ef4444',2:'#f59e0b',3:'#22c55e',4:'#8b5cf6'}[nivelMatch[1]] || '#6b7280') : '#6b7280';
  return '<div class="otree-leaf" data-name="'+escHtml(p.nombre_completo)+'" data-id="'+escHtml(p.id_directivo||'')+'">'+
    '<div class="ol-avatar" style="background:'+ac+';">'+initials+'</div>'+
    '<div class="ol-name" title="'+escHtml(p.nombre_completo)+'">'+escHtml(shortName(p.nombre_completo))+'</div>'+
    (nivelTxt ? '<span class="ol-nivel" style="background:'+nivelClr+'22;color:'+nivelClr+';">'+nivelTxt+'</span>' : '')+
    '<div class="ol-dot" style="background:#22c55e;" title="Activo"></div>'+
  '</div>';
}

function shortName(full) {
  if (!full) return '?';
  var parts = full.split(' ');
  if (parts.length <= 2) return full;
  return parts[0] + ' ' + parts[parts.length-2];
}

function countDescendants(node) {
  if (!node.subordinados || !node.subordinados.length) return 0;
  var c = node.subordinados.length;
  node.subordinados.forEach(function(s){ c += countDescendants(s); });
  return c;
}

function flattenNodes(arr) {
  arr.forEach(function(n){
    _orgAllNodes.push(n);
    if (n.subordinados) flattenNodes(n.subordinados);
  });
}

function getLevelColor(nivel) {
  return {'C-LEVEL':'#EF4444','VP':'#8B5CF6','DIRECTOR':'#2563EB','SUBDIRECTOR':'#0891B2','GERENTE':'#10B981','COORDINADOR':'#06B6D4','JEFE_EQUIPO':'#F59E0B'}[nivel] || '#6B7280';
}

function getAreaColor(area) {
  if (!area) return '#6B7280';
  var a = area.toLowerCase();
  if (a.includes('direcci')) return '#EAB308';
  if (a.includes('tecnolog') || a.includes('ingenier') || a.includes('software')) return '#8B5CF6';
  if (a.includes('backend') || a.includes('frontend') || a.includes('qa') || a.includes('quality')) return '#8B5CF6';
  if (a.includes('infraestr') || a.includes('redes') || a.includes('seguridad') || a.includes('ciber') || a.includes('soc') || a.includes('noc')) return '#EF4444';
  if (a.includes('devops') || a.includes('sre')) return '#3B82F6';
  if (a.includes('soporte') || a.includes('service') || a.includes('contact') || a.includes('atencion')) return '#22C55E';
  if (a.includes('data') || a.includes('datos') || a.includes('bbdd')) return '#F97316';
  if (a.includes('pmo') || a.includes('operaciones')) return '#06B6D4';
  if (a.includes('finanza') || a.includes('tesor') || a.includes('contab') || a.includes('fiscal')) return '#EAB308';
  if (a.includes('windows') || a.includes('sistema')) return '#06B6D4';
  if (a.includes('red de oficina')) return '#10B981';
  if (a.includes('compliance') || a.includes('riesgo') || a.includes('audit')) return '#F59E0B';
  if (a.includes('banca') || a.includes('negocio') || a.includes('comercio') || a.includes('trading')) return '#0EA5E9';
  return '#6B7280';
}

function orgToggleNode(nodeId) {
  var children = document.getElementById(nodeId + '-children');
  var card = document.getElementById(nodeId);
  if (!children) return;
  children.classList.toggle('open');
  if (card) card.classList.toggle('expanded');
}

function orgExpandAll() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.otree-children').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.add('open'); });
  document.querySelectorAll('.otree-card.expandable').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.add('expanded'); });
  document.querySelectorAll('.otree-area-body').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.add('open'); });
}

function orgCollapseAll() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.otree-children').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.remove('open'); });
  document.querySelectorAll('.otree-card.expandable').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.remove('expanded'); });
  document.querySelectorAll('.otree-area-body').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.remove('open'); });
}

function orgSearchTree(q) {
  // Remove previous highlights
  document.querySelectorAll('.otree-card.highlight, .otree-leaf.highlight').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.remove('highlight'); });
  if (!q || q.length < 2) return;
  var ql = q.toLowerCase();
  // Search cards
  document.querySelectorAll('.otree-card[data-name]').forEach(function(el){
    if (el.getAttribute('data-name').toLowerCase().includes(ql)) {
      el.classList.add('highlight');
      // Expand parents
      var p = el.parentElement;
      while (p) {
        if (p.classList && p.classList.contains('otree-children')) p.classList.add('open');
        if (p.classList && p.classList.contains('otree-area-body')) p.classList.add('open');
        p = p.parentElement;
      }
      el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'center'});
    }
  });
  // Search leaves
  document.querySelectorAll('.otree-leaf[data-name]').forEach(function(el){
    if (el.getAttribute('data-name').toLowerCase().includes(ql)) {
      el.style.border = '1px solid rgba(234,179,8,.6)';
      el.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 2px rgba(234,179,8,.25)';
      var p = el.parentElement;
      while (p) {
        if (p.classList && p.classList.contains('otree-children')) p.classList.add('open');
        if (p.classList && p.classList.contains('otree-area-body')) p.classList.add('open');
        p = p.parentElement;
      }
      el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'center'});
      setTimeout(function(){ el.style.border=''; el.style.boxShadow=''; }, 3000);
    }
  });
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// FIRST LOGIN PASSWORD CHANGE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

async function doChangeFirstPassword() {
  const newPass = document.getElementById('chpass-new').value;
  const confirm = document.getElementById('chpass-confirm').value;
  const errEl = document.getElementById('chpass-error');
  const btn = document.getElementById('chpass-btn');

  if (!newPass || newPass.length < 4) {
    errEl.textContent = t('chpass.min');
    errEl.classList.add('show');
    return;
  }
  if (newPass !== confirm) {
    errEl.textContent = t('chpass.mismatch');
    errEl.classList.add('show');
    return;
  }
  if (newPass === '12345') {
    errEl.textContent = t('chpass.same');
    errEl.classList.add('show');
    return;
  }
  errEl.classList.remove('show');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.textContent = t('chpass.changing');
  try {
    const r = await authFetch(API_BASE+'/auth/cambiar-password', {
      method:'POST',
      headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({password_actual:'12345', password_nueva:newPass}),
    });
    const data = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) {
      errEl.textContent = data.detail || 'Error al cambiar contraseña';
      errEl.classList.add('show');
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.textContent = t('chpass.btn');
      return;
    }
    // Update local data
    AUTH_USER.requiere_cambio_password = false;
    localStorage.setItem('pmo_user', JSON.stringify(AUTH_USER));
    // Hide change-pass screen, show app
    document.getElementById('change-pass-screen').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('login-screen').style.display = 'none';
    updateTopbarUser();
    loadTeam(); loadProjects(); loadKanban(); loadBudgets();
    showToast(t('chpass.success'));
  } catch(e) {
    errEl.textContent = t('login.error.connection');
    errEl.classList.add('show');
  }
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.textContent = t('chpass.btn');
}

// ── INIT ── apply saved language + check existing session
setLang(LANG);
checkExistingSession();

// LEGACY P95-F8: redirect del alias gov-kanban-global.html → tab KANBAN del shell
(function() {
  if (window.location.hash !== '#kanban') return;
  // Diferimos hasta que showApp termine
  var attempts = 0;
  var trySwitch = function() {
    attempts++;
    var tab = document.querySelector('.nav-tab.kanban');
    var page = document.getElementById('page-kanban');
    if (tab && page && document.getElementById('login-screen').style.display === 'none') {
      showPage('kanban', tab);
      return;
    }
    if (attempts < 30) setTimeout(trySwitch, 200);
  };
  setTimeout(trySwitch, 500);
})();

// ═══ AUTO-LAUNCH DESDE GOV-RUN / GOV-BUILD ═══
(function() {
  var hash = window.location.hash;
  if (!hash) return;
  var mode = null;
  if (hash === '#auto-run') mode = 'run';
  else if (hash === '#auto-build') mode = 'build';
  if (!mode) return;

  // ── MODO GOBERNADOR: ocultar todo, pipeline a pantalla completa ──
  var style = document.createElement('style');
  style.textContent = 'body.gov-mode .topbar { display:none!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode .pipeline-sidebar { display:none!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode .side-panel { display:none!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode .run-status-bar { display:none!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode #login-overlay { display:none!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode footer, body.gov-mode [class*="footer"] { display:none!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode .pipeline-main > .panel:first-child { display:none!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode .pipeline-main > .panel:nth-child(4) { display:none!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode .pipeline-main > .panel:nth-child(5) { display:none!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode { background:#0d1117!important; margin:0!important; padding:0!important; overflow:auto!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode .pipeline-layout { display:block!important; width:100%!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode .pipeline-main { width:100%!important; max-width:100%!important; margin:0!important; padding:8px!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode .pipeline-main > .panel:nth-child(2) { width:100%!important; }' +
    'body.gov-mode .pipeline-main > .panel:nth-child(3) { width:100%!important; }';
  document.head.appendChild(style);
  // Leer token del padre si viene en la URL
  var urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  var parentToken = urlParams.get('token');
  if (parentToken) {
    AUTH_TOKEN = parentToken;
    localStorage.setItem('cpm_token', parentToken);
    var loginOv = document.getElementById('login-overlay');
    if (loginOv) loginOv.style.display = 'none';
    var appEl = document.getElementById('app');
    if (appEl) appEl.style.display = 'block';
  }

  document.body.classList.add('gov-mode');
  function hideGovPanels() {
    document.body.classList.add('gov-mode');
    // Ocultar panel del formulario ITSM (contiene #run-exec-btn)
    var runBtn = document.getElementById('run-exec-btn');
    if (runBtn) { var p = runBtn.closest('.panel'); if (p) p.style.display = 'none'; }
    // Ocultar panel de Incidencias Registradas (contiene #run-buffer-list)
    var bufList = document.getElementById('run-buffer-list');
    if (bufList) { var p = bufList.closest('.panel'); if (p) p.style.display = 'none'; }
    // Ocultar barra de estado RUN
    var statusBar = document.querySelector('.run-status-bar');
    if (statusBar) statusBar.style.display = 'none';
    // BUILD: ocultar formulario (contiene #build-exec-btn o #bf-nombre)
    var buildBtn = document.getElementById('build-exec-btn') || document.getElementById('bf-nombre');
    if (buildBtn) { var p = buildBtn.closest('.panel'); if (p) p.style.display = 'none'; }
    // BUILD: ocultar buffer/registradas si existe
    var buildBuf = document.getElementById('build-buffer-list');
    if (buildBuf) { var p = buildBuf.closest('.panel'); if (p) p.style.display = 'none'; }
  }
  hideGovPanels();
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', hideGovPanels);
  setTimeout(hideGovPanels, 100);
  setTimeout(hideGovPanels, 500);
  setTimeout(hideGovPanels, 1500);
  setTimeout(hideGovPanels, 3000);

  // ── LANZAR PIPELINE ──
  var data = localStorage.getItem('cpm_pipeline_data') || '';
  setTimeout(function() {
    if (mode === 'run') {
      var runTab = document.querySelector('.nav-tab.run') || document.querySelector('[onclick*="showPage"][onclick*="run"]');
      if (runTab) runTab.click(); else if(typeof showPage==='function') showPage('run',document.querySelector('.nav-tab.run'));
      setTimeout(function() {
        var input = document.getElementById('run-input');
        if (input) input.value = data;
        if (typeof executePipeline === 'function') executePipeline('run');
      }, 500);
    } else if (mode === 'build') {
      var buildTab = document.querySelector('.nav-tab.build') || document.querySelector('[onclick*="showPage"][onclick*="build"]');
      if (buildTab) buildTab.click(); else if(typeof showPage==='function') showPage('build',document.querySelector('.nav-tab.build'));
      setTimeout(function() {
        var parts = data.split(' | ');
        var nombreEl = document.getElementById('bf-nombre');
        var resumenEl = document.getElementById('bf-resumen');
        if (nombreEl && parts[0]) nombreEl.value = parts[0];
        if (resumenEl && parts[1]) resumenEl.value = parts[1];
        else if (resumenEl) resumenEl.value = data;
        if (typeof buildSubmitAndPipeline === 'function') buildSubmitAndPipeline();
      }, 500);
    }
    history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname);
  }, 2000);

  // ── OBSERVADOR: detectar cuando el pipeline termina y avisar al padre ──
  var checkInterval = setInterval(function() {
    var done = false;
    if (mode === 'run') {
      var statusEl = document.getElementById('run-status-val');
      if (statusEl && statusEl.textContent === 'Idle') done = true;
      var completedEl = document.querySelector('[class*="pipeline-complete"], [class*="chain-complete"]');
      if (completedEl) done = true;
    } else if (mode === 'build') {
      var statusEl = document.getElementById('build-status-val');
      if (statusEl && statusEl.textContent === 'Idle') done = true;
      var launchBtn = document.querySelector('[class*="launch"], button[onclick*="launch"]');
      if (launchBtn && launchBtn.textContent.indexOf('lanzado') >= 0) done = true;
    }
    if (done) {
      clearInterval(checkInterval);
      setTimeout(function() {
        if (window.parent && window.parent !== window) {
          window.parent.postMessage({type: 'pipeline-complete', mode: mode}, '*');
        }
      }, 3000);
    }
  }, 2000);
})();

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CALENDARIO CAB — Vista Dirección (index.html)
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
var cabMainYear = 2024;
var cabMainPeriodos = [];
var cabMainMN = ['Ene','Feb','Mar','Abr','May','Jun','Jul','Ago','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dic'];
var cabMainMNF = ['Enero','Febrero','Marzo','Abril','Mayo','Junio','Julio','Agosto','Septiembre','Octubre','Noviembre','Diciembre'];
var cabMainDN = ['Domingo','Lunes','Martes','Miercoles','Jueves','Viernes','Sabado'];

function showCABMainView(view) {
  ['calendar','proposals','windows','alerts'].forEach(function(v) {
    var el = document.getElementById('cab-main-' + v);
    if (el) el.style.display = v === view ? 'block' : 'none';
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.cab-main-btn').forEach(function(b) {
    var bv = b.getAttribute('data-cabmainview');
    if (bv === view) { b.style.background='var(--blue,#3b82f6)'; b.style.color='#fff'; b.style.border='none'; }
    else { b.style.background='var(--bg2,#1e1e2e)'; b.style.color='var(--text2,#aaa)'; b.style.border='1px solid var(--border,#333)'; }
  });
  if (view === 'proposals') cabMainLoadPropuestas();
  if (view === 'windows') cabMainLoadVentanas();
  if (view === 'alerts') cabMainLoadAlertas();
}

async function loadCABMainData() {
  try {
    var res = await authFetch('/cab/periodos');
    var r = await res.json();
    if (Array.isArray(r)) cabMainPeriodos = r;
    cabMainRenderCalendar();
  } catch(e) { console.error('CAB main load error:', e); }
}

function cabMainSetYear(y) {
  cabMainYear = y;
  document.querySelectorAll('.cab-main-yr').forEach(function(b) {
    if (parseInt(b.textContent) === y) { b.style.background='var(--blue,#3b82f6)'; b.style.color='#fff'; b.style.border='none'; }
    else { b.style.background='var(--bg2,#1e1e2e)'; b.style.color='var(--text2,#aaa)'; b.style.border='1px solid var(--border,#333)'; }
  });
  var lbl = document.getElementById('cab-main-yr-label');
  if (lbl) lbl.textContent = y;
  cabMainRenderCalendar();
}

function cabMainGetDayClass(dt) {
  var isExcl = false, isWarn = false;
  for (var i = 0; i < cabMainPeriodos.length; i++) {
    var ps = new Date(cabMainPeriodos[i].fecha_inicio);
    var pe = new Date(cabMainPeriodos[i].fecha_fin);
    if (dt >= ps && dt <= pe) {
      if (cabMainPeriodos[i].impacto_estimado === 'ALTO') isExcl = true;
      else isWarn = true;
    }
  }
  if (isExcl) { return dt.getDay() === 0 || dt.getDay() === 6 ? 'cab-ok' : 'excl'; }
  if (isWarn) return 'warn';
  return '';
}

function cabMainRenderCalendar() {
  var container = document.getElementById('cab-main-annual');
  if (!container) return;
  container.innerHTML = '';
  var stats = {excl:0, warn:0, cab:0, free:0};
  var today = new Date();
  for (var m = 0; m < 12; m++) {
    var box = document.createElement('div');
    box.style.cssText = 'background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;';
    var title = document.createElement('div');
    title.style.cssText = 'font-size:12px;font-weight:600;text-align:center;color:var(--text1,#fff);margin-bottom:4px;';
    title.textContent = cabMainMN[m] + ' ' + cabMainYear;
    box.appendChild(title);
    var dowRow = document.createElement('div');
    dowRow.style.cssText = 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);font-size:9px;color:var(--text2,#666);text-align:center;margin-bottom:2px;';
    ['L','M','X','J','V','S','D'].forEach(function(d) { var s=document.createElement('span'); s.textContent=d; dowRow.appendChild(s); });
    box.appendChild(dowRow);
    var daysGrid = document.createElement('div');
    daysGrid.style.cssText = 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:1px;';
    var first = new Date(cabMainYear, m, 1);
    var startDow = (first.getDay() + 6) % 7;
    var dim = new Date(cabMainYear, m + 1, 0).getDate();
    for (var e = 0; e < startDow; e++) { var emp=document.createElement('div'); emp.style.cssText='padding:3px;'; daysGrid.appendChild(emp); }
    for (var d = 1; d <= dim; d++) {
      var el = document.createElement('div');
      el.style.cssText = 'text-align:center;padding:3px 0;border-radius:3px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2,#aaa);cursor:pointer;transition:transform .1s;';
      el.textContent = d;
      var dt = new Date(cabMainYear, m, d);
      var cls = cabMainGetDayClass(dt);
      if (cls === 'excl') { el.style.background='rgba(239,68,68,0.25)'; el.style.color='#ef4444'; el.style.fontWeight='600'; stats.excl++; }
      else if (cls === 'warn') { el.style.background='rgba(245,158,11,0.2)'; el.style.color='#f59e0b'; el.style.fontWeight='600'; stats.warn++; }
      else if (cls === 'cab-ok') { el.style.background='rgba(16,185,129,0.2)'; el.style.color='#10b981'; el.style.fontWeight='600'; stats.cab++; }
      else { stats.free++; if(dt.getDay()===0||dt.getDay()===6) el.style.color='var(--text2,#666)'; }
      if (d===today.getDate()&&m===today.getMonth()&&cabMainYear===today.getFullYear()) { el.style.outline='2px solid #3b82f6'; el.style.outlineOffset='-1px'; }
      el.onmouseover=function(){this.style.transform='scale(1.3)';};
      el.onmouseout=function(){this.style.transform='none';};
      (function(mm,dd,cc){ el.onclick=function(){ cabMainShowDay(mm,dd,cc); }; })(m,d,cls);
      daysGrid.appendChild(el);
    }
    box.appendChild(daysGrid);
    container.appendChild(box);
  }
  var se=document.getElementById('cab-main-excl');if(se)se.textContent=stats.excl;
  var sw2=document.getElementById('cab-main-warn');if(sw2)sw2.textContent=stats.warn;
  var sc=document.getElementById('cab-main-cab');if(sc)sc.textContent=stats.cab;
  var sf=document.getElementById('cab-main-free');if(sf)sf.textContent=stats.free;
  var sidebar=document.getElementById('cab-main-period-sidebar');
  if(sidebar){
    var yStr=String(cabMainYear);
    var yp=cabMainPeriodos.filter(function(p){return(p.fecha_inicio||'').indexOf(yStr)===0||(p.fecha_fin||'').indexOf(yStr)===0;});
    if(!yp.length){sidebar.innerHTML='<span style="color:var(--text2,#888);font-size:11px;">Sin periodos.</span>';}
    else{
      sidebar.innerHTML=yp.map(function(p){
        var c=p.impacto_estimado==='ALTO'?'#ef4444':'#f59e0b';
        var bg=p.impacto_estimado==='ALTO'?'rgba(239,68,68,0.15)':'rgba(245,158,11,0.15)';
        return '<div onclick="cabMainOpenPeriodModal(\'edit\',\''+p.id+'\')" style="padding:5px 8px;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px;background:'+bg+';font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .1s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform=\'scale(1.02)\'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=\'none\'"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;"><span style="color:'+c+';font-weight:600;">'+(p.nombre_periodo||'').replace(/_/g,' ').substring(0,22)+'</span><span style="color:'+c+';font-size:10px;">'+p.impacto_estimado+' '+p.carga_pico_esperada_pct+'%</span></div><div style="color:var(--text2,#888);font-size:10px;">'+(p.fecha_inicio||'').substring(0,10)+' \u2192 '+(p.fecha_fin||'').substring(0,10)+'</div></div>';
      }).join('');
    }
  }
}

function cabMainShowDay(month, day, cls) {
  var panel = document.getElementById('cab-main-day-detail');
  if (!panel) return;
  var dt = new Date(cabMainYear, month, day);
  var dateStr = day + ' ' + cabMainMNF[month] + ' ' + cabMainYear + ' (' + cabMainDN[dt.getDay()] + ')';
  var html = '';
  if (cls === 'excl') {
    html = '<span style="background:rgba(239,68,68,0.2);color:#ef4444;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">EXCLUSION</span>';
    html += '<p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2,#aaa);margin:8px 0 0;">Dia laborable en periodo de alta carga. NO tocar activos CRITICOS ni ALTOS.</p>';
  } else if (cls === 'warn') {
    html = '<span style="background:rgba(245,158,11,0.2);color:#f59e0b;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">PRECAUCION</span>';
    html += '<p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2,#aaa);margin:8px 0 0;">Carga media. Cambios permitidos en activos MEDIA/BAJA. CRITICOS requieren aprobacion CAB.</p>';
  } else if (cls === 'cab-ok') {
    html = '<span style="background:rgba(16,185,129,0.2);color:#10b981;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">VENTANA CAB</span>';
    html += '<p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2,#aaa);margin:8px 0 0;">Fin de semana en periodo critico. AG-011 asigna ventanas aqui (01:00-07:00).</p>';
    html += '<div style="margin-top:8px;background:var(--bg3,#2a2a3e);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;font-size:11px;">';
    html += '<div style="color:var(--text1,#fff);">CRITICOS: sab/dom 01:00-06:00</div>';
    html += '<div style="color:var(--text1,#fff);">ALTOS: vie/sab/dom 23:00-07:00</div>';
    html += '<div style="color:var(--text1,#fff);">MEDIOS: mie-dom 02:00-06:00</div></div>';
  } else {
    html = '<span style="background:var(--bg3,#2a2a3e);color:var(--text1,#fff);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">LIBRE</span>';
    html += '<p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2,#aaa);margin:8px 0 0;">Sin restricciones. Cualquier cambio permitido.</p>';
  }
  panel.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;"><span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1,#fff);">'+dateStr+'</span><button onclick="document.getElementById(\'cab-main-day-detail\').style.display=\'none\'" style="padding:3px 10px;background:var(--bg3,#2a2a3e);color:var(--text2,#aaa);border:1px solid var(--border,#333);border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button></div>'+html;
  panel.style.display = 'block';
}

async function cabMainLoadPropuestas() {
  try {
    var res = await authFetch('/cab/propuestas');
    var props = await res.json();
    var list = document.getElementById('cab-main-propuestas-list');
    if (!list) return;
    if (!Array.isArray(props) || props.length === 0) { list.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);">Sin propuestas.</p>'; return; }
    list.innerHTML = props.map(function(p) {
      var sc = p.estado==='APLICADO'?'#10b981':p.estado==='RECHAZADO'?'#ef4444':'#f59e0b';
      var bg = p.estado==='APLICADO'?'rgba(16,185,129,0.1)':p.estado==='RECHAZADO'?'rgba(239,68,68,0.1)':'rgba(245,158,11,0.1)';
      return '<div onclick="cabMainOpenPropModal(\''+p.id+'\')" style="cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg2,#1e1e2e);border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:8px;border:1px solid var(--border,#333);transition:transform .1s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform=\'translateY(-2px)\'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=\'none\'"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;"><div><p style="margin:0;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1,#fff);">'+(p.periodo||'').replace(/_/g,' ')+' #'+(p.numero_propuesta||1)+'</p><p style="margin:2px 0 0;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2,#aaa);">'+(p.cambios_aplicados||0)+' cambios</p></div><span style="background:'+bg+';color:'+sc+';padding:3px 10px;border-radius:10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">'+p.estado+'</span></div><div style="display:flex;gap:16px;margin-top:6px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2,#888);"><span>'+(p.fecha_generacion||'').substring(0,16).replace('T',' ')+'</span><span>'+(p.generado_por||'AG-011')+'</span></div></div>';
    }).join('');
  } catch(e) { console.error('Error propuestas:', e); }
}

async function cabMainLoadVentanas() {
  try {
    var res = await authFetch('/cab/ventanas');
    var ventanas = await res.json();
    var list = document.getElementById('cab-main-ventanas-list');
    if (!list) return;
    if (!Array.isArray(ventanas) || ventanas.length === 0) { list.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);">Sin ventanas activas.</p>'; return; }
    list.innerHTML = '<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;"><thead><tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border,#333);color:var(--text2,#aaa);"><th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;">Activo</th><th style="padding:6px;">Criticidad</th><th style="padding:6px;">Dias</th><th style="padding:6px;">Horario</th><th style="padding:6px;">Riesgo</th><th style="padding:6px;">Score</th></tr></thead><tbody>'+
      ventanas.map(function(v) {
        var cc=(v.criticidad||'')==='CRITICA'?'#ef4444':(v.criticidad||'')==='ALTA'?'#f59e0b':'#06b6d4';
        var rc=(v.riesgo_estimado||'')==='BAJO'?'#10b981':(v.riesgo_estimado||'')==='MEDIO'?'#f59e0b':'#ef4444';
        return '<tr onclick="cabMainOpenWinModal(\''+v.id+'\')" style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border,#333);cursor:pointer;"><td style="padding:6px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1,#fff);">'+(v.activo_nombre||v.nombre_ventana||'')+'</td><td style="padding:6px;text-align:center;color:'+cc+';font-weight:600;">'+(v.criticidad||'')+'</td><td style="padding:6px;text-align:center;font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2,#aaa);">'+(v.dias_semana||[]).join(', ')+'</td><td style="padding:6px;text-align:center;font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2,#aaa);">'+(v.hora_inicio||'')+'-'+(v.hora_fin||'')+'</td><td style="padding:6px;text-align:center;color:'+rc+';font-weight:600;">'+(v.riesgo_estimado||'')+'</td><td style="padding:6px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;color:#10b981;">'+(v.score_confianza||0)+'</td></tr>';
      }).join('')+'</tbody></table>';
  } catch(e) { console.error('Error ventanas:', e); }
}

async function cabMainLoadAlertas() {
  try {
    var res = await authFetch('/cab/alertas');
    var alerts = await res.json();
    var list = document.getElementById('cab-main-alertas-list');
    if (!list) return;
    if (!Array.isArray(alerts) || alerts.length === 0) { list.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);">Sin alertas CAB activas.</p>'; return; }
    list.innerHTML = alerts.map(function(a) {
      var sc=a.severity==='CRITICAL'||a.severity==='HIGH'?'#ef4444':'#f59e0b';
      var bg=a.severity==='CRITICAL'||a.severity==='HIGH'?'rgba(239,68,68,0.1)':'rgba(245,158,11,0.1)';
      return '<div onclick="cabMainOpenAlertModal(\''+a.id+'\')" style="background:'+bg+';border-radius:8px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .1s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform=\'translateY(-1px)\'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=\'none\'"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;"><strong style="color:'+sc+';">'+(a.alert_type||'').replace(/_/g,' ')+'</strong><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2,#aaa);">'+(a.created_at||'').substring(0,16).replace('T',' ')+'</span></div><div style="color:var(--text1,#fff);margin-bottom:2px;">'+(a.title||'')+'</div><div style="color:var(--text2,#aaa);font-size:11px;">'+(a.description||'')+'</div></div>';
    }).join('');
  } catch(e) { console.error('Error alertas:', e); }
}

// ═══ Modal Crear/Editar Periodo (index.html) ═══
var cabMainPmAssets={};
var cabMainPmSelected=new Set();

async function cabMainOpenPeriodModal(mode,periodoId){
  document.getElementById('cab-main-period-modal').style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-mode').value=mode;
  document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-id').value=periodoId||'';
  document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-delete-btn').style.display=mode==='edit'?'block':'none';
  document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-save-btn').textContent=mode==='edit'?'Guardar cambios':'Crear Change Freeze';
  document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-title').textContent=mode==='edit'?'Editar periodo de exclusion':'Nuevo periodo de exclusion (Change Freeze)';
  cabMainPmSelected=new Set();
  try{var r=await authFetch('/cab/activos-selector');cabMainPmAssets=await r.json();cabMainPmRenderAssets();}catch(e){console.error(e);}
  if(mode==='edit'&&periodoId){
    try{
      var r2=await authFetch('/cab/periodos/'+periodoId);var p=await r2.json();
      document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-nombre').value=p.nombre_periodo||'';
      document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-impacto').value=p.impacto_estimado||'ALTO';
      document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-inicio').value=(p.fecha_inicio||'').substring(0,10);
      document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-fin').value=(p.fecha_fin||'').substring(0,10);
      document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-pico').value=p.carga_pico_esperada_pct||80;
      document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-notas').value=p.notas||'';
      (p.activos_afectados||[]).forEach(function(a){cabMainPmSelected.add(a);});
      cabMainPmRenderAssets();cabMainPmUpdateCounts();
    }catch(e){console.error(e);}
  }else{
    document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-nombre').value='';document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-impacto').value='ALTO';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-inicio').value='';document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-fin').value='';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-pico').value=80;document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-notas').value='';
  }
}
function cabMainClosePeriodModal(){document.getElementById('cab-main-period-modal').style.display='none';}

function cabMainPmRenderAssets(){
  var c=document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-assets');if(!c)return;var h='';
  ['PRODUCCION','PREPRODUCCION','DESARROLLO','STAGING','DR','LAB'].forEach(function(env){
    var ed=cabMainPmAssets[env];if(!ed||!ed.capas)return;
    h+='<div style="background:var(--bg3,#2a2a3e);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px;overflow:hidden;">';
    h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 10px;cursor:pointer;" onclick="this.nextElementSibling.style.display=this.nextElementSibling.style.display===\'none\'?\'block\':\'none\'">';
    h+='<span style="font-size:10px;">&#9654;</span><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);">'+env+'</span>';
    h+='<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">('+ed.total+')</span></div>';
    h+='<div style="padding:0 10px 6px;display:none;">';
    Object.keys(ed.capas).forEach(function(capa){
      h+='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin:4px 0 2px;">'+capa+'</div><div>';
      ed.capas[capa].forEach(function(a){
        var isSel=cabMainPmSelected.has(a.codigo);
        var cc=a.criticidad==='CRITICA'?'#ef4444':a.criticidad==='ALTA'?'#f59e0b':a.criticidad==='MEDIA'?'#3b82f6':'#10b981';
        h+='<span class="cab-main-pm-chip" data-codigo="'+a.codigo+'" data-crit="'+a.criticidad+'" data-env="'+env+'" data-capa="'+capa+'" onclick="cabMainPmToggle(this)" style="display:inline-flex;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:5px;font-size:10px;margin:1px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid '+cc+';'+(isSel?'background:rgba(59,130,246,0.15);color:#3b82f6;':'color:var(--text2);')+'">'+a.nombre.substring(0,25)+'</span>';
      });h+='</div>';
    });h+='</div></div>';
  });c.innerHTML=h;
}

function cabMainPmToggle(el){
  var id=el.getAttribute('data-codigo');
  if(cabMainPmSelected.has(id)){cabMainPmSelected.delete(id);el.style.background='';el.style.color='var(--text2)';}
  else{cabMainPmSelected.add(id);el.style.background='rgba(59,130,246,0.15)';el.style.color='#3b82f6';}
  cabMainPmUpdateCounts();
}

function cabMainPmQuick(type){
  if(type==='clear'){cabMainPmSelected=new Set();}
  else if(type==='all'){document.querySelectorAll('.cab-main-pm-chip').forEach(function(c){cabMainPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  else if(type==='pro'){document.querySelectorAll('.cab-main-pm-chip[data-env="PRODUCCION"]').forEach(function(c){cabMainPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  else if(type==='criticos'){cabMainPmSelected=new Set();document.querySelectorAll('.cab-main-pm-chip[data-crit="CRITICA"]').forEach(function(c){cabMainPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  else if(type==='crit+alta'){cabMainPmSelected=new Set();document.querySelectorAll('.cab-main-pm-chip[data-crit="CRITICA"],.cab-main-pm-chip[data-crit="ALTA"]').forEach(function(c){cabMainPmSelected.add(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'));});}
  cabMainPmRenderAssets();cabMainPmUpdateCounts();
}

function cabMainPmFilter(q){q=q.toLowerCase();document.querySelectorAll('.cab-main-pm-chip').forEach(function(c){var n=(c.textContent||'').toLowerCase();var co=(c.getAttribute('data-codigo')||'').toLowerCase();c.style.display=(!q||n.indexOf(q)>=0||co.indexOf(q)>=0)?'inline-flex':'none';});}

function cabMainPmUpdateCounts(){
  var total=cabMainPmSelected.size,crit=0,alta=0,media=0;
  document.querySelectorAll('.cab-main-pm-chip').forEach(function(c){
    if(cabMainPmSelected.has(c.getAttribute('data-codigo'))){var cr=c.getAttribute('data-crit');if(cr==='CRITICA')crit++;else if(cr==='ALTA')alta++;else media++;}
  });
  var el=document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-sel-count');if(el)el.textContent=total+' seleccionados';
  var ic=document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-i-crit');if(ic)ic.textContent=crit;
  var ia=document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-i-alta');if(ia)ia.textContent=alta;
  var im=document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-i-media');if(im)im.textContent=media;
  var it=document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-i-total');if(it)it.textContent=total;
}

async function cabMainSavePeriod(){
  var mode=document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-mode').value;
  var id=document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-id').value;
  var body={nombre_periodo:document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-nombre').value,impacto_estimado:document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-impacto').value,fecha_inicio:document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-inicio').value,fecha_fin:document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-fin').value,carga_pico_esperada_pct:parseInt(document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-pico').value)||80,notas:document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-notas').value,activos_afectados:Array.from(cabMainPmSelected)};
  if(!body.nombre_periodo||!body.fecha_inicio||!body.fecha_fin){alert('Nombre, fecha inicio y fin obligatorios');return;}
  try{
    var url=mode==='edit'?'/cab/periodos/'+id:'/cab/periodos';
    var res=await authFetch(url,{method:mode==='edit'?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(body)});
    var d=await res.json();
    if(d.error){alert(d.error);return;}
    alert(mode==='edit'?'Periodo actualizado':'Change Freeze creado');
    cabMainClosePeriodModal();loadCABMainData();
  }catch(e){alert('Error: '+e);}
}

async function cabMainDeletePeriod(){
  var id=document.getElementById('cab-main-pm-id').value;if(!id)return;
  if(!confirm('Eliminar este periodo?'))return;
  try{await authFetch('/cab/periodos/'+id,{method:'DELETE'});alert('Eliminado');cabMainClosePeriodModal();loadCABMainData();}catch(e){alert('Error: '+e);}
}

// ═══ Modal Detalle Propuesta CAB (index.html) ═══
var cabMainPropData=null;var cabMainPropId=null;

async function cabMainOpenPropModal(propuestaId){
  cabMainPropId=propuestaId;
  try{
    var r=await authFetch('/cab/propuestas/'+propuestaId);var data=await r.json();
    if(data.error){alert(data.error);return;}
    document.getElementById('cab-main-proposal-modal').style.display='block';
    cabMainPropData=data;
    var prop=typeof data.propuesta_json==='string'?JSON.parse(data.propuesta_json):data.propuesta_json;
    cabMainPropData._parsed=prop;
    document.getElementById('cab-main-prop-title').textContent='Propuesta CAB \u2014 '+(data.periodo||'').replace(/_/g,' ')+' #'+(data.numero_propuesta||1);
    document.getElementById('cab-main-prop-subtitle').textContent='Generada '+(data.fecha_generacion||'').substring(0,16).replace('T',' ')+' \u2014 Estado: '+data.estado;
    var res=prop.resumen_ejecutivo||{};
    var kpis=[{v:res.total_cambios_propuestos||'?',l:'Cambios',c:'#3b82f6'},{v:Number(res.score_confianza_promedio||0).toFixed(2),l:'Score',c:'#10b981'},{v:res.conflictos_resueltos||0,l:'Conflictos',c:'#f59e0b'},{v:res.activos_bloqueados_por_incidencia||0,l:'Bloq. RUN',c:'#ef4444'},{v:res.activos_ajustados_por_sprint||0,l:'Ajust. BUILD',c:'#06b6d4'},{v:data.cambios_aplicados||0,l:'Aplicados',c:'var(--text1)'}];
    document.getElementById('cab-main-prop-kpis').innerHTML=kpis.map(function(k){return '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:8px;padding:6px;text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:'+k.c+';">'+k.v+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">'+k.l+'</div></div>';}).join('');
    var cambios=prop.cambios_propuestos||[];var conflictos=prop.conflictos_y_resoluciones||[];
    var tabs=[{id:'changes',label:'Cambios ('+cambios.length+')'},{id:'conflicts',label:'Conflictos ('+conflictos.length+')'},{id:'workflow',label:'Flujo ITIL'},{id:'audit',label:'Auditoria'}];
    document.getElementById('cab-main-prop-tabs').innerHTML=tabs.map(function(t,i){var a=i===0;return '<button onclick="cabMainShowPropTab(\''+t.id+'\',this)" style="padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;'+(a?'background:var(--blue,#3b82f6);color:#fff;border:none;':'background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);')+'">'+t.label+'</button>';}).join('');
    var isEd=data.estado==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-prop-actions').innerHTML='<div>'+(isEd?'<button onclick="cabMainRejectProp()" style="padding:5px 14px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Rechazar</button>':'')+'</div><div>'+(isEd?'<button onclick="cabMainApproveProp()" style="padding:5px 16px;background:#10b981;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Aprobar y aplicar</button>':'<span style="color:'+(data.estado==='APLICADO'?'#10b981':'#ef4444')+';font-weight:600;">'+data.estado+'</span>')+'</div>';
    cabMainShowPropTab('changes');
  }catch(e){console.error('Error propuesta:',e);}
}
function cabMainClosePropModal(){document.getElementById('cab-main-proposal-modal').style.display='none';}

function cabMainShowPropTab(tabId,btn){
  if(btn){btn.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(function(b){b.style.background='var(--bg3)';b.style.color='var(--text2)';b.style.border='1px solid var(--border)';});btn.style.background='var(--blue,#3b82f6)';btn.style.color='#fff';btn.style.border='none';}
  var content=document.getElementById('cab-main-prop-content');if(!content||!cabMainPropData)return;
  var prop=cabMainPropData._parsed||{};
  if(tabId==='changes'){
    var cambios=prop.cambios_propuestos||[];
    content.innerHTML='<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:6px;">Click en fila para editar</div>'+cambios.map(function(c,idx){
      var v=c.ventana_final||c.ventana_recomendada||{};
      var cC=c.criticidad==='CRITICA'?'#ef4444':c.criticidad==='ALTA'?'#f59e0b':'#06b6d4';
      var rC=c.riesgo==='BAJO'?'#10b981':c.riesgo==='MEDIO'?'#f59e0b':'#ef4444';
      var sC=(c.score_confianza||0)>=0.85?'#10b981':'#f59e0b';
      var ctx=c.contexto_operativo||{};var tags='';
      if((ctx.incidencias_activas||[]).length)tags+='<span style="background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;">P1/P2</span> ';
      if((ctx.sprints_solapantes||[]).length)tags+='<span style="background:rgba(6,182,212,0.15);color:#06b6d4;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;">Sprint</span> ';
      if(c.editado_por_humano)tags+='<span style="background:rgba(59,130,246,0.15);color:#3b82f6;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;">Editado</span>';
      return '<div style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:6px 0;cursor:pointer;" onclick="cabMainToggleEdit('+idx+')"><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 65px 140px 50px 42px 70px;gap:4px;align-items:center;font-size:12px;"><span style="color:var(--text1);font-weight:600;">'+(c.activo_nombre||c.id_activo)+'</span><span style="text-align:center;color:'+cC+';font-weight:600;font-size:11px;">'+(c.criticidad||'')+'</span><span style="text-align:center;font-family:monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">'+(v.dias||[]).join(',')+' '+(v.hora_inicio||'')+'-'+(v.hora_fin||'')+'</span><span style="text-align:center;color:'+rC+';font-weight:600;font-size:11px;">'+(c.riesgo||'')+'</span><span style="text-align:center;font-weight:600;color:'+sC+';font-size:11px;">'+Number(c.score_confianza||0).toFixed(2)+'</span><span style="text-align:center;">'+(tags||'\u2014')+'</span></div></div><div id="cab-main-edit-'+idx+'" style="display:none;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin:4px 0 8px;">'+(c.razon_detallada?'<div style="background:rgba(245,158,11,0.1);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 8px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:10px;color:#f59e0b;">AG-011: '+(c.razon_detallada||'').substring(0,200)+'</div>':'')+'<div style="margin-bottom:8px;"><input type="text" placeholder="Notas edicion..." style="width:100%;font-size:11px;padding:5px 8px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text1);" id="cab-main-ed-notas-'+idx+'"></div><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;justify-content:flex-end;"><button onclick="cabMainToggleEdit('+idx+')" style="padding:3px 10px;background:var(--bg2);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button><button onclick="cabMainSaveEdit('+idx+')" style="padding:3px 10px;background:var(--blue);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Guardar</button></div></div>';
    }).join('');
  }else if(tabId==='conflicts'){
    var conf=prop.conflictos_y_resoluciones||[];
    content.innerHTML=conf.length===0?'<p style="color:var(--text2);">Sin conflictos.</p>':conf.map(function(c){var tc=(c.tipo||'').indexOf('INCIDENCIA')>=0?'#ef4444':(c.tipo||'').indexOf('PROYECTO')>=0?'#06b6d4':'#f59e0b';return '<div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:6px;"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;"><span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:'+tc+';">'+(c.tipo||'')+'</span><span style="background:rgba(16,185,129,0.15);color:#10b981;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;">'+(c.estado||'RESUELTO')+'</span></div><p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text1);margin:0 0 4px;">'+(c.problema||'')+'</p><p style="font-size:12px;color:#10b981;margin:0;">Resolucion: '+(c.resolucion||'')+'</p></div>';}).join('');
  }else if(tabId==='workflow'){
    var est=cabMainPropData.estado||'PENDING';
    var steps=[{n:1,l:'AG-011 genera',d:(cabMainPropData.fecha_generacion||'').substring(0,16).replace('T',' '),ok:true},{n:2,l:'Merger conflictos',d:(prop.resumen_ejecutivo||{}).conflictos_resueltos+' resueltos',ok:true},{n:3,l:'Revision humana',d:est==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW'?'Pendiente':'Revisado',ok:est!=='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW'},{n:4,l:'Aprobacion CAB',d:est==='APLICADO'?'Aprobado':'Pendiente',ok:est==='APLICADO'},{n:5,l:'Aplicar ventanas',d:est==='APLICADO'?(cabMainPropData.cambios_aplicados||0)+' ventanas':'Pendiente',ok:est==='APLICADO'}];
    content.innerHTML='<p style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);margin:0 0 10px;">Flujo ITIL Change Enablement</p>'+steps.map(function(s){var dc=s.ok?'#10b981':(s.n===3&&est==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW')?'#f59e0b':'var(--border)';return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);"><div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:'+dc+'20;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:'+dc+';">'+s.n+'</div><div style="flex:1;"><p style="font-size:12px;margin:0;color:'+(s.ok?'var(--text1)':'var(--text2)')+';">'+s.l+'</p><p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin:1px 0 0;">'+s.d+'</p></div><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:'+dc+';">'+(s.ok?'OK':(s.n===3&&est==='PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW')?'Pendiente':'\u2014')+'</span></div>';}).join('');
  }else if(tabId==='audit'){
    var ai=[{l:'RFC',v:'RFC-2026-'+String(cabMainPropData.numero_propuesta||1).padStart(4,'0')},{l:'Tipo',v:'Normal Change'},{l:'CIs evaluados',v:(prop.resumen_ejecutivo||{}).total_cambios_propuestos||'?'},{l:'Generado por',v:cabMainPropData.generado_por||'AG-011'},{l:'Revisado por',v:cabMainPropData.revisado_por||'Pendiente'},{l:'Estado',v:cabMainPropData.estado||'?'}];
    content.innerHTML='<p style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);margin:0 0 8px;">Auditoria ITIL</p>'+ai.map(function(a){return '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:12px;"><span style="color:var(--text1);">'+a.l+'</span><span style="color:var(--text2);">'+a.v+'</span></div>';}).join('');
  }
}

function cabMainToggleEdit(idx){var el=document.getElementById('cab-main-edit-'+idx);if(el)el.style.display=el.style.display==='none'?'block':'none';}

async function cabMainSaveEdit(idx){
  if(!cabMainPropId||!cabMainPropData)return;
  var cambios=(cabMainPropData._parsed||{}).cambios_propuestos||[];var c=cambios[idx];if(!c)return;
  var body={id_activo:c.id_activo,notas:document.getElementById('cab-main-ed-notas-'+idx).value};
  try{var r=await authFetch('/cab/propuestas/'+cabMainPropId+'/editar-cambio',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(body)});var d=await r.json();if(d.error){alert(d.error);return;}alert('Guardado');cabMainToggleEdit(idx);cabMainOpenPropModal(cabMainPropId);}catch(e){alert('Error: '+e);}
}

async function cabMainApproveProp(){
  if(!cabMainPropId||!confirm('Aprobar y crear ventanas CAB?'))return;
  try{var r=await authFetch('/cab/propuestas/'+cabMainPropId+'/aprobar',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({revisado_por:'director',notas:'Aprobado'})});var d=await r.json();alert('Aprobada. '+(d.ventanas_insertadas||0)+' ventanas.');cabMainClosePropModal();loadCABMainData();}catch(e){alert('Error: '+e);}
}

async function cabMainRejectProp(){
  if(!cabMainPropId)return;var motivo=prompt('Motivo del rechazo:');if(!motivo)return;
  try{await authFetch('/cab/propuestas/'+cabMainPropId+'/rechazar',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({revisado_por:'director',motivo_rechazo:motivo})});alert('Rechazada');cabMainClosePropModal();loadCABMainData();}catch(e){alert('Error: '+e);}
}

// ═══ Modal Ventana CAB (index.html) ═══
var cabMainWmData=null;var cabMainWmId=null;
async function cabMainOpenWinModal(ventanaId){
  cabMainWmId=ventanaId;
  try{var r=await authFetch('/cab/ventanas/'+ventanaId);var data=await r.json();
    if(data.error){alert(data.error);return;}
    document.getElementById('cab-main-window-modal').style.display='block';cabMainWmData=data;
    var cC=data.criticidad==='CRITICA'?'#ef4444':data.criticidad==='ALTA'?'#f59e0b':'#06b6d4';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-wm-icon').style.cssText='width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:600;font-size:11px;background:'+cC+'20;color:'+cC+';';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-wm-icon').textContent='CI';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-wm-title').textContent=(data.codigo||'')+' \u2014 '+(data.activo_nombre||'');
    document.getElementById('cab-main-wm-subtitle').textContent=(data.capa||'')+' | '+(data.entorno||'')+' | '+data.criticidad;
    var h='';var dias=data.dias_semana||[];var rC=(data.riesgo_estimado||'')==='BAJO'?'#10b981':(data.riesgo_estimado||'')==='MEDIO'?'#f59e0b':'#ef4444';
    var allD=['lunes','martes','miercoles','jueves','viernes','sabado','domingo'];var dM={lunes:'L',martes:'M',miercoles:'X',jueves:'J',viernes:'V',sabado:'S',domingo:'D'};
    h+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">';
    h+='<div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);margin:0 0 8px;">Ventana CAB</p>';
    h+='<div style="margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">D\u00edas</span><div style="display:flex;gap:3px;margin-top:3px;">';
    allD.forEach(function(d){var ok=dias.some(function(dd){return dd.indexOf(d.substring(0,3))>=0||dd===d;});h+='<span style="padding:2px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;background:'+(ok?'rgba(16,185,129,0.15)':'var(--bg2)')+';color:'+(ok?'#10b981':'var(--text2)')+';font-weight:'+(ok?'600':'400')+';">'+(dM[d]||d[0])+'</span>';});
    h+='</div></div><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;">';
    h+='<div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Horario</span><p style="margin:2px 0 0;font-weight:600;font-family:monospace;color:var(--text1);font-size:13px;">'+(data.hora_inicio||'')+' \u2014 '+(data.hora_fin||'')+'</p></div>';
    h+='<div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Score</span><p style="margin:2px 0 0;font-weight:600;color:#10b981;font-size:16px;">'+Number(data.score_confianza||0).toFixed(2)+'</p></div>';
    h+='<div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Riesgo</span><p style="margin:2px 0 0;"><span style="padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:11px;background:'+rC+'20;color:'+rC+';font-weight:600;">'+(data.riesgo_estimado||'')+'</span></p></div>';
    h+='<div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Estado</span><p style="margin:2px 0 0;font-weight:600;color:'+(data.estado==='ACTIVA'?'#10b981':'#f59e0b')+';">'+(data.estado||'')+'</p></div>';
    h+='</div>';var tipos=data.tipos_cambio_permitidos||[];
    h+='<div style="margin-top:8px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Tipos</span><div style="display:flex;gap:3px;margin-top:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
    tipos.forEach(function(t){h+='<span style="padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;background:rgba(6,182,212,0.15);color:#06b6d4;">'+t+'</span>';});
    h+='</div></div></div>';
    // Carga semanal
    h+='<div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);margin:0 0 6px;">Carga semanal</p>';
    var hist=data.historico_reciente||[];var pd=hist.length>0?(hist[0].patron_diario||{}):{};
    [{d:'Lun',k:'lunes'},{d:'Mar',k:'martes'},{d:'Mie',k:'miercoles'},{d:'Jue',k:'jueves'},{d:'Vie',k:'viernes'},{d:'Sab',k:'sabado'},{d:'Dom',k:'domingo'}].forEach(function(x){var val=pd[x.k]||Math.round(30+Math.random()*50);var bc=val>80?'#ef4444':val>60?'#f59e0b':'#10b981';var isW=dias.some(function(dd){return dd.indexOf(x.k.substring(0,3))>=0||dd===x.k;});h+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;padding:2px 0;"><span style="width:22px;color:'+(isW?'#10b981':'var(--text2)')+';">'+x.d+'</span><div style="flex:1;height:6px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="height:100%;width:'+Math.min(val,99)+'%;background:'+bc+';border-radius:3px;"></div></div><span style="color:var(--text2);width:30px;text-align:right;">'+val+'%</span></div>';});
    h+='</div></div>';
    // Deps
    var deps=data.dependencias||[];
    if(deps.length){h+='<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:10px;margin-top:10px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);margin:0 0 6px;">Dependencias ('+deps.length+')</p>';deps.forEach(function(dep){var dc=dep.criticidad==='CRITICA'?'#ef4444':dep.criticidad==='ALTA'?'#f59e0b':'#06b6d4';h+='<span style="display:inline-flex;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;margin:2px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid '+dc+';">'+dep.codigo+'</span>';});h+='</div>';}
    // CMDB
    h+='<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:10px;margin-top:10px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);margin:0 0 6px;">CMDB</p><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:4px;font-size:12px;">';
    [{l:'Propietario',v:data.propietario||'\u2014'},{l:'Responsable',v:data.responsable_tecnico||'\u2014'},{l:'V\u00e1lido hasta',v:(data.valido_hasta||'').substring(0,10)}].forEach(function(f){h+='<div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">'+f.l+'</span><p style="margin:2px 0 0;color:var(--text1);">'+f.v+'</p></div>';});
    h+='</div></div>';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-wm-content').innerHTML=h;
    var isAct=data.estado==='ACTIVA';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-wm-actions').innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">'+(isAct?'<button onclick="cabMainPauseWin()" style="padding:5px 12px;background:rgba(245,158,11,0.15);color:#f59e0b;border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.3);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Pausar</button>':'')+'<button onclick="cabMainCancelWin()" style="padding:5px 12px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button></div><button onclick="cabMainCloseWinModal()" style="padding:5px 12px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button>';
  }catch(e){console.error('Error ventana:',e);document.getElementById('cab-main-window-modal').style.display='none';}
}
function cabMainCloseWinModal(){document.getElementById('cab-main-window-modal').style.display='none';}
async function cabMainPauseWin(){if(!cabMainWmId)return;try{await authFetch('/cab/ventanas/'+cabMainWmId,{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify({estado:'PAUSADA'})});alert('Pausada');cabMainCloseWinModal();showCABMainView('windows');}catch(e){alert('Error: '+e);}}
async function cabMainCancelWin(){if(!cabMainWmId||!confirm('Cancelar ventana?'))return;try{await authFetch('/cab/ventanas/'+cabMainWmId,{method:'DELETE'});alert('Cancelada');cabMainCloseWinModal();showCABMainView('windows');}catch(e){alert('Error: '+e);}}

// ═══ Modal Alerta CAB (index.html) ═══
var cabMainAmData=null;var cabMainAmId=null;
async function cabMainOpenAlertModal(alertaId){
  cabMainAmId=alertaId;
  try{var r=await authFetch('/cab/alertas/'+alertaId);var data=await r.json();
    if(data.error){alert(data.error);return;}
    document.getElementById('cab-main-alert-modal').style.display='block';cabMainAmData=data;
    var sC=data.severity==='CRITICAL'?'#ef4444':data.severity==='HIGH'?'#f59e0b':'#06b6d4';
    var ent=typeof data.affected_entities==='string'?JSON.parse(data.affected_entities):(data.affected_entities||{});
    document.getElementById('cab-main-am-header').innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:14px;"><div><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;background:'+sC+'20;color:'+sC+';">'+data.severity+'</span><span style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;background:rgba(245,158,11,0.1);color:#f59e0b;">'+(data.alert_type||'').replace(/_/g,' ')+'</span></div><p style="font-size:15px;font-weight:600;margin:0;color:var(--text1);">'+(data.title||'')+'</p><p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin:4px 0 0;">'+(data.description||'')+'</p></div><button onclick="cabMainCloseAlertModal()" style="padding:4px 10px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">&#10005;</button></div>';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-am-context').innerHTML='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;"><div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Activo</span><p style="margin:3px 0 0;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);">'+(ent.activo||ent.ci||'\u2014')+'</p></div><div style="background:var(--bg3);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Referencia</span><p style="margin:3px 0 0;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:'+sC+';">'+(ent.incidencia||ent.proyecto||ent.periodo||'\u2014')+'</p></div></div>';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-am-timeline').innerHTML='<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:10px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);margin:0 0 8px;">Timeline</p><div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;font-size:12px;"><div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#ef4444;margin-top:5px;flex-shrink:0;"></div><div style="flex:1;color:var(--text1);">Creada</div><span style="color:var(--text2);font-size:10px;">'+(data.created_at||'').substring(0,16).replace('T',' ')+'</span></div>'+(data.status==='ACTIVE'?'<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;font-size:12px;"><div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border);margin-top:5px;flex-shrink:0;"></div><div style="flex:1;color:var(--text2);">Pendiente</div></div>':'')+'</div>';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-am-status').innerHTML='<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:10px;margin-top:10px;"><p style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text1);margin:0 0 8px;">Actualizar estado</p><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;"><select id="cab-main-am-sel" style="font-size:12px;width:180px;padding:6px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;"><option value="ACTIVE">ACTIVE</option><option value="ACKNOWLEDGED"'+(data.status==='ACKNOWLEDGED'?' selected':'')+'>ACKNOWLEDGED</option><option value="RESOLVED"'+(data.status==='RESOLVED'?' selected':'')+'>RESOLVED</option><option value="ESCALATED">ESCALATED</option><option value="SUPPRESSED">SUPPRESSED</option></select><button onclick="cabMainUpdateAlert()" style="padding:5px 14px;background:var(--blue);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Actualizar</button></div></div>';
    document.getElementById('cab-main-am-footer').innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;"><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);">Estado: '+data.status+'</span><button onclick="cabMainCloseAlertModal()" style="padding:5px 12px;background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cerrar</button></div>';
  }catch(e){console.error('Error alerta:',e);document.getElementById('cab-main-alert-modal').style.display='none';}
}
function cabMainCloseAlertModal(){document.getElementById('cab-main-alert-modal').style.display='none';}
async function cabMainUpdateAlert(){
  if(!cabMainAmId)return;var status=document.getElementById('cab-main-am-sel').value;
  try{var r=await authFetch('/cab/alertas/'+cabMainAmId,{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify({status:status,acknowledged_by:'admin'})});var d=await r.json();if(d&&d.error){alert(d.error);return;}alert('Actualizada a '+status);cabMainCloseAlertModal();showCABMainView('alerts');}catch(e){alert('Error: '+e);}
}

// ═══ CAB Pausa 3 — Calendario en pipeline BUILD ═══
async function loadCabPause3Data(){
  try{
    var rp=await authFetch('/cab/periodos');var periodos=await rp.json();
    var rv=await authFetch('/cab/ventanas');var ventanas=await rv.json();
    var ra=await authFetch('/cab/alertas');var alertas=(await ra.json()||[]).filter(function(a){return a.status==='ACTIVE'&&(a.alert_type||'').indexOf('CAB')>=0;});
    // Banner
    var ban=document.getElementById('cab-p3-alert-banner');
    if(ban&&alertas.length>0){ban.style.display='block';ban.innerHTML='<strong>'+alertas.length+' alerta(s) CAB activa(s)</strong> \u2014 '+alertas.slice(0,2).map(function(a){return a.title||a.alert_type;}).join(' \u00b7 ');}
    // Calendario 12 meses
    var cal=document.getElementById('cab-p3-calendar');
    if(cal){
      var year=new Date().getFullYear();var months=['Ene','Feb','Mar','Abr','May','Jun','Jul','Ago','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dic'];
      var dayNames=['domingo','lunes','martes','miercoles','jueves','viernes','sabado'];
      var h='';var today=new Date();
      for(var m=0;m<12;m++){
        h+='<div style="background:#1e293b;border-radius:8px;padding:8px;"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#94a3b8;margin-bottom:4px;text-align:center;">'+months[m]+'</div>';
        h+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:1px;font-size:9px;color:#475569;text-align:center;margin-bottom:2px;">'; ['L','M','X','J','V','S','D'].forEach(function(d){h+='<span>'+d+'</span>';}); h+='</div>';
        h+='<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:2px;">';
        var first=new Date(year,m,1);var startDow=(first.getDay()+6)%7;var dim=new Date(year,m+1,0).getDate();
        for(var e=0;e<startDow;e++)h+='<div style="aspect-ratio:1;"></div>';
        for(var d=1;d<=dim;d++){
          var ds=year+'-'+String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(d).padStart(2,'0');
          var dt=new Date(year,m,d);var dow=dt.getDay();
          var cls='background:#1a2332;color:#475569';
          for(var pi=0;pi<(periodos||[]).length;pi++){
            var p=periodos[pi];var fi=(p.fecha_inicio||'').substring(0,10);var ff=(p.fecha_fin||'').substring(0,10);
            if(ds>=fi&&ds<=ff){
              if(p.impacto_estimado==='ALTO'){if(dow===0||dow===6){cls='background:#064e3b;color:#6ee7b7';}else{cls='background:#7f1d1d;color:#fca5a5';}}
              else{cls='background:#78350f;color:#fcd34d';}
              break;
            }
          }
          var isToday=d===today.getDate()&&m===today.getMonth()&&year===today.getFullYear();
          h+='<div style="aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:3px;font-size:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;'+cls+';'+(isToday?'outline:1.5px solid #3b82f6;':'')+'">'+d+'</div>';
        }
        h+='</div></div>';
      }
      cal.innerHTML=h;
    }
    // Sidebar periodos
    var perEl=document.getElementById('cab-p3-periods');
    if(perEl&&periodos&&periodos.length){
      perEl.innerHTML=periodos.map(function(p){
        var bc=p.impacto_estimado==='ALTO'?'#ef4444':p.impacto_estimado==='MEDIO'?'#f59e0b':'#22c55e';
        return '<div style="background:#1e293b;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;border-left:3px solid '+bc+';margin-bottom:6px;"><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#e2e8f0;">'+(p.nombre_periodo||'').replace(/_/g,' ')+'</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#64748b;font-family:monospace;margin-top:2px;">'+(p.fecha_inicio||'').substring(0,10)+' \u2014 '+(p.fecha_fin||'').substring(0,10)+'</div></div>';
      }).join('');
    }
    // Stats
    var statsEl=document.getElementById('cab-p3-stats-content');
    if(statsEl){
      var nv=(ventanas||[]).length;var np=(periodos||[]).length;
      var hoy=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
      var nf=(periodos||[]).filter(function(p){return p.impacto_estimado==='ALTO'&&hoy>=p.fecha_inicio&&hoy<=p.fecha_fin;}).length;
      statsEl.innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #334155;"><span style="color:#94a3b8;">Ventanas activas</span><span style="font-weight:600;color:#2dd4bf;font-family:monospace;">'+nv+'</span></div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #334155;"><span style="color:#94a3b8;">Periodos</span><span style="font-weight:600;color:#2dd4bf;font-family:monospace;">'+np+'</span></div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #334155;"><span style="color:#94a3b8;">Freeze activos</span><span style="font-weight:600;color:#ef4444;font-family:monospace;">'+nf+'</span></div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;"><span style="color:#94a3b8;">Alertas CAB</span><span style="font-weight:600;color:#f59e0b;font-family:monospace;">'+alertas.length+'</span></div>';
    }
  }catch(e){console.error('Error CAB Pausa 3:',e);}
}

// ═══ FULLSCREEN PIPELINE RUN — Didáctico con tools clickeables ═══
var FS_RUN_AGENTS=[
{id:'AG-001',nm:'Dispatcher',sub:'Clasificador inteligente de incidencias ITSM',idc:'background:#172554;color:#93c5fd',cl:'#3b82f6',
desc:'AG-001 recibe la descripci\u00f3n de la incidencia del formulario ITSM y la clasifica: asigna prioridad (P1-P4), determina el silo t\u00e9cnico, activa el SLA y crea las tareas Kanban. Consulta el cat\u00e1logo de 61 tipos de incidencias.',
tables:[{n:'catalogo_incidencias',d:'61 tipos predefinidos con SLA, silo y prioridad sugerida.'},{n:'incidencias_run',d:'Hist\u00f3rico de incidencias. Detecta patrones recurrentes.'},{n:'kanban_tareas',d:'Crea 1-3 tareas operativas por incidencia.'}],
tools:[{nm:'query_catalogo',brief:'Busca en cat\u00e1logo ITSM',desc:'Busca en catalogo_incidencias por palabra clave. Devuelve tipo, SLA, silo y prioridad.',tbls:['catalogo_incidencias'],input:'keyword (texto libre)',output:'Tipos coincidentes con sla_horas, silo, prioridad'},
{nm:'create_incident',brief:'Crea incidencia en BD',desc:'Inserta en incidencias_run con prioridad, silo, SLA activado. Genera ID \u00fanico INC-YYYYMMDD-XXXX.',tbls:['incidencias_run'],input:'titulo, descripcion, prioridad, silo',output:'Incidencia con ID, SLA timestamp'},
{nm:'create_tasks',brief:'Genera tareas Kanban',desc:'Crea 1-3 tareas en kanban_tareas vinculadas a la incidencia con instrucciones paso a paso.',tbls:['kanban_tareas'],input:'id_incidencia, array de tareas',output:'Tareas creadas con IDs'}],
outs:['Incidencia INC-YYYYMMDD-XXXX creada','Prioridad P1-P4 con justificaci\u00f3n','Silo t\u00e9cnico determinado','SLA con cuenta atr\u00e1s','1-3 tareas Kanban'],
stats:[{v:'61',l:'Tipos ITSM',c:'#3b82f6'},{v:'1.2s',l:'Tiempo',c:'#3b82f6'},{v:'$0.004',l:'Coste',c:'#3b82f6'}]},
{id:'AG-002',nm:'Resource Manager RUN',sub:'Motor de matching de t\u00e9cnicos por skills y disponibilidad',idc:'background:#2e1065;color:#c4b5fd',cl:'#a855f7',
desc:'AG-002 busca al t\u00e9cnico \u00f3ptimo entre 150 disponibles. Cruza skills requeridos con la matriz de competencias, filtra por nivel (N1-N4), verifica disponibilidad y carga. Para P1/P2 busca directamente N3/N4.',
tables:[{n:'users_skills',d:'150 t\u00e9cnicos \u00d7 skills con nivel 1-5.'},{n:'directorio_corporativo',d:'Organigrama: cargo, \u00e1rea, ubicaci\u00f3n.'},{n:'kanban_tareas',d:'Tareas EN_PROGRESO para calcular carga.'},{n:'incidencias_run',d:'Incidencia con prioridad y silo.'}],
tools:[{nm:'query_staff_by_skill',brief:'Busca t\u00e9cnicos por skill',desc:'Filtra users_skills por skill y nivel m\u00ednimo. Devuelve lista rankeada con carga actual y disponibilidad.',tbls:['users_skills','kanban_tareas'],input:'skill_name, nivel_minimo, silo',output:'T\u00e9cnicos rankeados por match score'},
{nm:'assign_technician',brief:'Asigna t\u00e9cnico',desc:'Actualiza incidencias_run y kanban_tareas con el t\u00e9cnico asignado. Cambia estado a ASIGNADA.',tbls:['incidencias_run','kanban_tareas'],input:'id_incidencia, id_tecnico',output:'Incidencia + tareas asignadas'},
{nm:'query_directorio',brief:'Consulta organigrama',desc:'Busca en directorio_corporativo por nombre, cargo o \u00e1rea. Para escalaci\u00f3n P1.',tbls:['directorio_corporativo'],input:'keyword',output:'Directivos con cargo, \u00e1rea, reporta_a'}],
outs:['T\u00e9cnico FTE-XXX asignado (N1-N4)','Score matching skill (0-100%)','Carga verificada','Se\u00f1al conflicto BUILD si aplica'],
stats:[{v:'150',l:'T\u00e9cnicos',c:'#a855f7'},{v:'1.5s',l:'Tiempo',c:'#a855f7'},{v:'$0.005',l:'Coste',c:'#a855f7'}]},
{id:'AG-003',nm:'Demand Forecaster',sub:'Prediccion Prophet + SLA Risk + Ventanas Buffer',idc:'background:#431407;color:#fdba74',cl:'#f97316',
desc:'AG-003 analiza 3000+ filas de historico para predecir carga futura. Calcula riesgo SLA con Prophet a 3 dias y determina si se necesita activar buffer de contencion. Si la carga predicha supera 80% en las proximas 72h, propone ventanas de freeze preventivo.',
tables:[{n:'cmdb_demand_history',d:'3000+ filas historico carga mensual por activo.'},{n:'calendario_periodos_demanda',d:'6 periodos de alta demanda definidos.'},{n:'incidencias_run',d:'Incidencias para correlacionar carga con fallos.'}],
tools:[{nm:'forecast_demand',brief:'Prediccion Prophet 3d',desc:'Ejecuta modelo Prophet sobre historico de carga del activo afectado. Genera prediccion a 72 horas con intervalo de confianza. Si prediccion > 80% carga, activa flag de riesgo alto.',tbls:['cmdb_demand_history'],input:'id_activo',output:'Prediccion 72h con confianza'},
{nm:'calc_sla_risk',brief:'Riesgo SLA',desc:'Calcula probabilidad de incumplimiento SLA cruzando prediccion de carga con tipo de incidencia y prioridad. P1 con carga >90% = riesgo critico.',tbls:['incidencias_run','cmdb_demand_history'],input:'id_incidencia, prediccion',output:'Score riesgo 0-100'},
{nm:'check_freeze_windows',brief:'Ventanas freeze',desc:'Consulta periodos de exclusion y ventanas de cambio para determinar si el activo esta en periodo de freeze. Si lo esta, escala prioridad automaticamente.',tbls:['calendario_periodos_demanda'],input:'id_activo, fecha',output:'Estado freeze y excepciones'}],
outs:['Prediccion carga 72h','Score riesgo SLA','Estado freeze activo','Recomendacion buffer'],
stats:[{v:'3',l:'Tools',c:'#f97316'},{v:'1.0s',l:'Tiempo',c:'#f97316'},{v:'$0.003',l:'Coste',c:'#f97316'}]},
{id:'AG-004',nm:'Buffer Gatekeeper',sub:'\u00c1rbitro RUN vs BUILD — solo se activa con conflicto',idc:'background:#083344;color:#67e8f9',cl:'#06b6d4',
