```html
  if (d.subtareas && d.subtareas.length) {
    html += '<div class="kg-dm-subtasks"><h4>Subtareas ('+d.subtareas.length+')</h4>';
    d.subtareas.forEach(function(s){
      html += '<div class="kg-dm-st">';
      html += '<div class="kg-dm-st-title">'+kg_escAt(s.titulo)+'</div>';
      html += '<div class="kg-dm-st-meta"><span class="kg-dm-st-tag kg-'+s.tag+'">'+kg_escAt(s.tag_lbl)+'</span>';
      if (s.nota) html += '<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--kg-tx3)">'+kg_escAt(s.nota)+'</span>';
      html += '</div><div class="kg-dm-st-h">'+s.horas+'h</div></div>';
    });
    html += '</div>';
  }
  // Notas
  html += '<div class="kg-dm-notes">';
  html += '<div class="kg-dm-notes-h">&#128203; Hist&oacute;rico completo de la tarjeta</div>';
  html += '<div class="kg-dm-notes-body">';
  if (!d.notas || !d.notas.length) {
    html += '<div style="color:var(--kg-tx3);text-align:center;padding:20px 0;font-size:11px;">Sin notas registradas</div>';
  } else {
    d.notas.forEach(function(n){
      html += '<div class="kg-dm-note kg-'+(n.cls||'')+'">';
      html += '<span class="kg-note-author">'+kg_escAt(n.autor)+'</span>';
      html += '<span class="kg-note-time">'+kg_escAt(n.time)+'</span>';
      html += '<div>'+kg_escAt(n.mensaje)+'</div></div>';
    });
  }
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div class="kg-dm-input-row"><input placeholder="A&ntilde;adir nota al hist&oacute;rico..." disabled><button disabled>Enviar</button></div>';
  html += '</div>';
  document.getElementById('kg-dm-body').innerHTML = html;
  // Cargar dropdowns de departamentos/técnicos tras render
  kg_loadModalAssignOptions(d);
}

function kg_renderModalSLA(d){
  // Para RUN: data-sla con timestamp absoluto, kg_tickSLA lo actualiza
  if (d.tipo === 'RUN' && d.sla_seg !== null && d.sla_seg !== undefined) {
    var endAt = Date.now() + (d.sla_seg * 1000);
    var s = d.sla_seg;
    var cls = s < 0 ? 'kg-danger' : (s < 3600 ? 'kg-danger' : (s < 14400 ? 'kg-warn' : 'kg-ok'));
    if (d.estado_logico === 'pte_tercero') cls = 'kg-paused';
    if (d.estado_logico === 'resuelta') cls = 'kg-done';
    var lbl = s < 0 ? ('VENCIDO ' + kg_formatTime(-s)) : kg_formatTime(s);
    if (d.estado_logico === 'pte_tercero') lbl = '⏸ Pausado · ' + kg_formatTime(Math.max(0,s)) + ' rest.';
    if (d.estado_logico === 'resuelta') lbl = '✓ Cerrado en SLA';
    var attr = (d.estado_logico === 'pte_tercero' || d.estado_logico === 'resuelta') ? '' : ' data-sla="'+endAt+'"';
    return '<div class="kg-dm-sla">'+
      '<div class="kg-dm-sla-icon">&#9201;</div>'+
      '<div class="kg-dm-sla-info">'+
        '<div class="kg-dm-sla-label">SLA restante (live)</div>'+
        '<div class="kg-dm-sla-value '+cls+'" id="kg-dm-sla-cd"'+attr+'>'+lbl+'</div>'+
      '</div></div>';
  }
  // BUILD: no countdown live, mostrar deadline si existe (solo informativo)
  return '';
}

function kg_renderModalAssign(d){
  var html = '<div class="kg-dm-assign">';
  html += '<div class="kg-dm-assign-h">&#128100; Asignaci&oacute;n cascada</div>';
  html += '<div class="kg-dm-assign-grid">';
  html += '<div><label>Departamento</label><select id="kg-dm-dpto" onchange="kg_loadTecnicosPorDpto(this.value)"></select></div>';
  html += '<div><label>T&eacute;cnico</label><select id="kg-dm-tec" disabled><option value="">— elige primero un departamento —</option></select></div>';
  html += '<button class="kg-btn-save" id="kg-dm-save-asig" onclick="kg_saveAsignacion()" disabled>&#9889; Guardar asignaci&oacute;n</button>';
  html += '<div class="kg-dm-tec-info" id="kg-dm-tec-info">';
  if (d.tecnico) {
    html += 'Actual: <b>'+kg_escAt(d.tecnico.nombre)+'</b> ('+kg_escAt(d.tecnico.departamento||d.depto)+') &middot; carga '+(d.tecnico.carga||0)+'%';
  } else {
    html += 'Sin asignar';
  }
  html += '</div></div></div>';
  return html;
}

async function kg_loadModalAssignOptions(d){
  // Cargar departamentos
  try {
    var r = await fetch('/api/kanban/departamentos');
    var deptos = await r.json();
    var sD = document.getElementById('kg-dm-dpto');
    if (!sD) return;
    sD.innerHTML = '<option value="">— elige departamento —</option>';
    deptos.forEach(function(dp){
      var sel = (d.tecnico && d.tecnico.departamento === dp) || d.depto === dp ? ' selected' : '';
      sD.innerHTML += '<option value="'+kg_escAt(dp)+'"'+sel+'>'+kg_escAt(dp)+'</option>';
    });
    // Si ya hay departamento seleccionado, cargar técnicos automáticamente
    if (sD.value) {
      await kg_loadTecnicosPorDpto(sD.value);
    }
  } catch(e) { console.warn('[kg] load deptos error', e); }
}

async function kg_loadTecnicosPorDpto(departamento){
  var sT = document.getElementById('kg-dm-tec');
  var btn = document.getElementById('kg-dm-save-asig');
  if (!sT) return;
  if (!departamento) {
    sT.innerHTML = '<option value="">— elige primero un departamento —</option>';
    sT.disabled = true;
    if (btn) btn.disabled = true;
    return;
  }
  sT.innerHTML = '<option>Cargando...</option>';
  sT.disabled = true;
  try {
    var r = await fetch('/api/kanban/tecnicos?departamento='+encodeURIComponent(departamento));
    var tecs = await r.json();
    kg_modalTecCache[departamento] = tecs;
    sT.innerHTML = '<option value="">— elige técnico —</option>';
    var currentTec = kg_modalCurrentTask && kg_modalCurrentTask.tecnico ? kg_modalCurrentTask.tecnico.id : null;
    tecs.forEach(function(t){
      var sel = t.id_recurso === currentTec ? ' selected' : '';
      var loadIcon = t.carga_actual > 100 ? '⚠ ' : (t.carga_actual > 80 ? '◔ ' : '◯ ');
      sT.innerHTML += '<option value="'+kg_escAt(t.id_recurso)+'"'+sel+'>'+loadIcon+kg_escAt(t.nombre)+' ('+t.nivel+', '+t.carga_actual+'%)</option>';
    });
    sT.disabled = false;
    if (btn) btn.disabled = false;
  } catch(e) {
    sT.innerHTML = '<option>Error cargando</option>';
    console.warn('[kg] load tecnicos error', e);
  }
}

async function kg_saveAsignacion(){
  if (!kg_modalCurrentTask) return;
  var dpto = document.getElementById('kg-dm-dpto').value;
  var tecId = document.getElementById('kg-dm-tec').value;
  if (!dpto || !tecId) { kg_showToast('✗ Selecciona departamento y técnico', true); return; }
  var btn = document.getElementById('kg-dm-save-asig');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.textContent = 'Guardando...';
  try {
    var r = await fetch('/api/kanban/tareas/'+encodeURIComponent(kg_modalCurrentTask.id)+'/asignacion', {
      method: 'PATCH',
      headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({departamento: dpto, id_tecnico: tecId}),
    });
    var d = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { kg_showToast('✗ ' + (d.detail || 'Error'), true); btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '⚡ Guardar asignación'; return; }
    kg_showToast('✓ Asignado a ' + d.tecnico.nombre);
    // Refrescar el modal con el detalle actualizado
    var r2 = await fetch('/api/kanban/tareas/'+encodeURIComponent(kg_modalCurrentTask.id)+'/detalle');
    if (r2.ok) {
      var newDetail = await r2.json();
      kg_renderFicha(newDetail);
    }
    // Refrescar el array global y re-renderizar el board
    var idx = kg_kbAll.findIndex(function(x){ return x.id === kg_modalCurrentTask.id; });
    if (idx >= 0 && d.tecnico) {
      kg_kbAll[idx].tecnico = {id: d.tecnico.id, nombre: d.tecnico.nombre, carga: d.tecnico.carga};
      kg_kbAll[idx].depto = d.tecnico.departamento;
      // Si estaba sin asignar, ahora pasa a "asignada" (si no estaba ya en otro estado)
      if (kg_kbAll[idx].estado === 'unassigned') kg_kbAll[idx].estado = 'asignada';
      kg_renderKanban();
    }
  } catch(e) {
    kg_showToast('✗ Error de red', true);
    btn.disabled = false;
    btn.textContent = '⚡ Guardar asignación';
  }
}

async function kg_modalEscalar(){
  if (!kg_modalCurrentTask) return;
  if (!confirm('¿Escalar tarea ' + kg_modalCurrentTask.id + ' a prioridad superior?')) return;
  kg_showToast('⚠ Escalación enviada (no implementada en backend aún)');
}

async function kg_modalCerrar(){
  if (!kg_modalCurrentTask) return;
  if (!confirm('¿Marcar tarea ' + kg_modalCurrentTask.id + ' como RESUELTA?')) return;
  try {
    var r = await fetch('/api/kanban/tareas/'+encodeURIComponent(kg_modalCurrentTask.id), {
      method: 'PATCH',
      headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({estado: 'resuelta'}),
    });
    var d = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { kg_showToast('✗ ' + (d.detail || 'Transición no permitida'), true); return; }
    kg_showToast('✓ Tarea cerrada');
    // Actualizar array global y refrescar
    var idx = kg_kbAll.findIndex(function(x){ return x.id === kg_modalCurrentTask.id; });
    if (idx >= 0) {
      kg_kbAll[idx].estado = 'resuelta';
      kg_kbAll[idx].pct = 100;
    }
    kg_renderKanban();
    kg_loadFlowMetrics();
    kg_closeFicha();
  } catch(e) { kg_showToast('✗ Error de red', true); }
}

// Initial + refresh
var kg_inited = false;
function kg_init(){
  // Guard: requiere DOM #kg-root presente
  if (!document.getElementById('kg-root')) return;
  if (kg_inited) { kg_loadFlowMetrics(); kg_loadWipLimits().then(kg_loadKanbanGlobal); return; }
  kg_inited = true;
  kg_loadFlowMetrics();
  // Cargar WIP limits PRIMERO, luego las tareas (para que el primer render tenga los límites)
  kg_loadWipLimits().then(kg_loadKanbanGlobal);
  setInterval(function(){ if(document.getElementById('kg-root') && document.getElementById('page-kanban').classList.contains('active')) { kg_loadFlowMetrics(); kg_loadWipLimits().then(kg_loadKanbanGlobal); } }, 60000);
}
// ═══ END P95 FASE 8 ═══

</script>
<!-- OVERLAY FULLSCREEN PIPELINE RUN -->
<div id="fs-run-overlay" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100vw;height:100vh;background:#080b12;z-index:9999;overflow-y:auto">
  <div style="position:sticky;top:0;background:#0a0e17ee;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);padding:14px 32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;z-index:10;border-bottom:1px solid #1e293b">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px"><h1 style="font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:#ef4444;margin:0">Pipeline RUN — Contención de Incidencias</h1><span style="background:#450a0a;color:#fca5a5;padding:3px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace">4 Agentes · 14 Tools · ~$0.02/ejecución · ~4s</span></div>
    <button onclick="document.getElementById('fs-run-overlay').style.display='none'" style="background:none;border:1px solid #334155;color:#94a3b8;font-size:14px;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer">&#10005; Cerrar</button>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:20px 32px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto">
    <p style="color:#94a3b8;font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:20px;max-width:900px">El Pipeline RUN gestiona incidencias ITSM en tiempo real. Tres agentes IA se instancian secuencialmente bajo demanda (Agent Spawning). Haz click en cada agente y despliega cada tool para ver exactamente qué función ejecuta contra la base de datos.</p>
    <div id="fs-run-pipeline-bar" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;justify-content:center;padding:16px 0;margin-bottom:24px"></div>
    <div id="fs-run-detail" style="background:#111827;border:1px solid #1e293b;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;min-height:300px"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:300px;color:#334155;font-size:14px">\u2190 Haz click en cualquier agente para ver su ficha completa</div></div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- OVERLAY FULLSCREEN PIPELINE BUILD -->
<div id="fs-build-overlay" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100vw;height:100vh;background:#080b12;z-index:9999;overflow-y:auto">
  <div style="position:sticky;top:0;background:#0a0e17ee;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);padding:12px 32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;z-index:10;border-bottom:1px solid #1e293b">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px"><h1 style="font-size:18px;font-weight:600;color:#4ade80;margin:0">Cascada BUILD v2.0</h1><span style="background:#052e16;color:#86efac;padding:3px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace">10 Agentes · 4 Pausas · 30+ Tools · ~$0.33</span></div>
    <button onclick="document.getElementById('fs-build-overlay').style.display='none'" style="background:none;border:1px solid #334155;color:#94a3b8;font-size:14px;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer">&#10005; Cerrar</button>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:16px 32px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto">
    <p style="color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:16px;max-width:900px">Pipeline completo de creaci&oacute;n de proyectos IT bancarios. 10 agentes IA con 4 pausas Human-in-the-Loop. Click en cada agente y despliega cada tool.</p>
    <div id="fs-build-pipeline-bar" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;justify-content:center;padding:10px 0;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:nowrap"></div>
    <div id="fs-build-detail" style="background:#111827;border:1px solid #1e293b;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;min-height:260px"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:260px;color:#334155;font-size:13px">&larr; Click en cualquier agente</div></div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px dashed #1e293b"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 40 40" style="opacity:.6"><polygon points="20,4 36,12 36,28 20,36 4,28 4,12" fill="none" stroke="#4ade80" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg><span style="font-size:11px"><span style="color:#4ade80;font-weight:500">AG-018 Governance Advisor</span> <span style="color:#475569">&middot; Disponible en las 4 pausas &middot; Proyectos similares, postmortems, directorio</span></span></div>
  </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
```

### FILE: frontend/p96/index.html
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Cognitive PMO · CEO Dashboard — Budget Total</title>
<style>
/* ═══════════════ TOKENS (heredados de tech-dashboard v4) ═══════════════ */
:root{
  --bg:#0d1117;--bg2:#161b22;--bg-card:#1c2128;--bg-el:#22272e;--bg-l3:#2d333b;
  --border:#30363d;--border-hi:#484f58;
  --tx:#e6edf3;--tx2:#8b949e;--tx3:#6e7681;
  --acc-bl:#58a6ff;--acc-gn:#3fb950;--acc-rd:#f85149;--acc-or:#d29922;
  --acc-cy:#39d2c0;--acc-pu:#bc8cff;--acc-pk:#f778ba;--acc-ye:#eab308;
  --shd:rgba(0,0,0,.3);--shd-lg:rgba(0,0,0,.5);
  --font:'DM Sans',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Segoe UI,sans-serif;
  --mono:'JetBrains Mono',Consolas,monospace;
}
html[data-theme="light"]{
  --bg:#f6f8fa;--bg2:#ffffff;--bg-card:#ffffff;--bg-el:#f0f3f6;--bg-l3:#e6ebf1;
  --border:#d0d7de;--border-hi:#afb8c1;
  --tx:#1f2328;--tx2:#57606a;--tx3:#8c959f;
  --acc-bl:#0969da;--acc-gn:#1a7f37;--acc-rd:#cf222e;--acc-or:#9a6700;
  --acc-cy:#1b7c83;--acc-pu:#8250df;--acc-pk:#bf3989;--acc-ye:#9a6700;
  --shd:rgba(31,35,40,.06);--shd-lg:rgba(31,35,40,.12);
}
html[data-theme="light"] .tb-logo,
html[data-theme="light"] .bg-login-logo{background:radial-gradient(circle at 30% 25%,#fff7d6,#f0d27a 75%);border-color:#b88a14}
.tb-theme{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-el);color:var(--tx2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s}
.tb-theme:hover{color:var(--tx);border-color:var(--border-hi);background:var(--bg-l3)}
.tb-theme svg{width:16px;height:16px}
.tb-theme .icn-sun{display:none}
html[data-theme="light"] .tb-theme .icn-moon{display:none}
html[data-theme="light"] .tb-theme .icn-sun{display:block}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--tx);font-family:var(--font);font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column}

/* ═══════════════ TOPBAR ═══════════════ */
.topbar{background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:10px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;flex-shrink:0}
.tb-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.tb-logo{width:34px;height:34px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 30% 25%,#1f1505,#0a0600 75%);border:1px solid #6b4a00;border-radius:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(245,196,67,.15),0 4px 14px rgba(245,196,67,.22),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,239,168,.18)}
.tb-logo svg{width:24px;height:24px;filter:drop-shadow(0 1px 2px rgba(255,224,138,.4))}
.tb-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700}
.tb-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:-2px}
.tb-divider{width:1px;height:22px;background:var(--border)}
.tb-breadcrumb{font-size:11px;color:var(--tx2)}
.tb-breadcrumb strong{color:var(--tx)}
.tb-spacer{flex:1}
/* Session pill (sesión activa, no selector) */
.bg-session-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:5px 8px 5px 5px;border-radius:8px;cursor:default}
.bg-session-pill:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi)}
.bg-session-avatar{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-bl),var(--acc-cy));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;color:#0d1117;flex-shrink:0}
.bg-session-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;line-height:1.15}
.bg-session-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx)}
.bg-session-role{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px;font-weight:600}
.bg-session-logout{width:24px;height:24px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:var(--font);transition:.15s;margin-left:4px}
.bg-session-logout:hover{background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);border-color:var(--acc-rd);color:var(--acc-rd)}

/* ═══════════════ LOGIN OVERLAY ═══════════════ */
.bg-login-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,#161b22 0%,#0d1117 80%);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:30px;overflow-y:auto}
.bg-login-overlay.hidden{display:none}
.bg-login-box{width:100%;max-width:1100px}
.bg-login-head{text-align:center;margin-bottom:24px}
.bg-login-logo{width:64px;height:64px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 30% 25%,#1f1505,#0a0600 75%);border:1.5px solid #6b4a00;border-radius:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 14px;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(245,196,67,.18),0 10px 32px rgba(245,196,67,.3),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,239,168,.22)}
.bg-login-logo svg{width:46px;height:46px;filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(255,224,138,.45))}
.bg-login-title{font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);margin-bottom:6px}
.bg-login-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--tx2)}
.bg-login-sub strong{color:var(--acc-cy);font-family:var(--mono)}
.bg-login-section{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.6px;color:var(--tx3);margin:18px 0 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.bg-login-section::before,.bg-login-section::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--border)}
.bg-login-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px}
.bg-login-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;text-align:left}
.bg-login-card:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 18px var(--shd)}
.bg-login-card.l-super{border-left-color:var(--acc-pk)}
.bg-login-card.l-c{border-left-color:var(--acc-pu)}
.bg-login-card.l-vp{border-left-color:var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-login-card.l-dir{border-left-color:var(--acc-cy)}
.bg-login-card.l-pmo{border-left-color:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-login-card.l-tl{border-left-color:var(--acc-ye)}
.bg-login-card.l-ts{border-left-color:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-login-card.l-tj{border-left-color:var(--tx3)}
.bg-login-card.l-aud{border-left-color:var(--acc-cy)}
.bg-login-avatar{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:#0d1117;flex-shrink:0}
.bg-login-card.l-super .bg-login-avatar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f778ba,#bc8cff)}
.bg-login-card.l-c .bg-login-avatar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#bc8cff,#58a6ff)}
.bg-login-card.l-vp .bg-login-avatar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#58a6ff,#39d2c0)}
.bg-login-card.l-dir .bg-login-avatar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#39d2c0,#3fb950)}
.bg-login-card.l-pmo .bg-login-avatar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d29922,#f85149)}
.bg-login-card.l-tl .bg-login-avatar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eab308,#d29922)}
.bg-login-card.l-ts .bg-login-avatar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3fb950,#39d2c0)}
.bg-login-card.l-tj .bg-login-avatar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6e7681,#8b949e)}
.bg-login-card.l-aud .bg-login-avatar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#39d2c0,#58a6ff)}
.bg-login-meta{flex:1;min-width:0}
.bg-login-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.bg-login-role{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--tx2);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px;margin-top:2px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.bg-login-scope{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:8px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;color:var(--tx3);margin-top:3px;display:inline-block}
.bg-login-foot{margin-top:22px;text-align:center;font-size:10px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:var(--mono)}
.bg-login-foot strong{color:var(--acc-cy)}

/* ═══════════════ MODAL FICHA (reusable) ═══════════════ */
.bg-modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.65);z-index:200;display:none;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding:40px 20px;backdrop-filter:blur(3px);overflow-y:auto}
.bg-modal-overlay.on{display:flex}
.bg-modal{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;width:100%;max-width:780px;box-shadow:0 24px 48px var(--shd-lg);animation:bgmIn .2s ease-out}
@keyframes bgmIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.bg-mh{padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:14px 14px 0 0}
.bg-mh-l{flex:1;min-width:0}
.bg-mh-eyebrow{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--tx3);margin-bottom:3px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.bg-mh-eyebrow .pill{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;color:var(--acc-cy)}
.bg-mh-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);line-height:1.3}
.bg-mh-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:2px;font-family:var(--mono)}
.bg-mh-close{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:7px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;font-family:var(--font);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:.15s}
.bg-mh-close:hover{background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);border-color:var(--acc-rd);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-mb{padding:14px 18px}
.bg-mb-section{margin-bottom:14px}
.bg-mb-section:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.bg-mb-h{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--tx3);margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.bg-mb-h .badge{margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;background:var(--bg-el);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;color:var(--tx3);border:1px solid var(--border)}
.bg-mb-h svg{color:var(--acc-pu);width:11px;height:11px}

.bg-grid-3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px}
.bg-grid-2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:10px}
.bg-sec-h{font-size:9px;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--tx2);margin:14px 0 6px;padding-bottom:4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.bg-sec-h:first-child{margin-top:0}
.bg-stat{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid var(--acc-bl);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px}
.bg-stat.gn{border-left-color:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-stat.or{border-left-color:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-stat.rd{border-left-color:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-stat.cy{border-left-color:var(--acc-cy)}
.bg-stat.pu{border-left-color:var(--acc-pu)}
.bg-stat .l{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;color:var(--tx3)}
.bg-stat .v{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);margin-top:3px;line-height:1.1}
.bg-stat .s{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:2px}

/* EVM bars dentro del modal proyecto */
.bg-evm{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
.bg-evm-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:60px 1fr 70px;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:10px}
.bg-evm-row .l{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx2);text-transform:uppercase}
.bg-evm-row .b{height:8px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
.bg-evm-row .b > div{height:100%}
.bg-evm-row .v{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;color:var(--tx);text-align:right}

/* Gates G0-G5 */
.bg-gates{display:flex;gap:4px;align-items:center}
.bg-gate{flex:1;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:5px;background:var(--bg-el);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx3);position:relative}
.bg-gate.done{background:rgba(63,185,80,.12);border-color:var(--acc-gn);color:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-gate.now{background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);border-color:var(--acc-or);color:var(--acc-or);animation:pulse 2s infinite}
.bg-gate .gn{font-size:11px;font-weight:800;line-height:1}
.bg-gate .gd{font-size:7px;line-height:1;margin-top:1px;text-transform:uppercase}

/* Team list dentro del modal proyecto / equipo */
.bg-team{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:6px}
.bg-team-card{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 9px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.bg-team-card:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);background:var(--bg-l3)}
.bg-team-av{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;color:#0d1117;flex-shrink:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-bl),var(--acc-cy))}
.bg-team-av.a2{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-pu),var(--acc-pk))}
.bg-team-av.a3{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-gn),var(--acc-cy))}
.bg-team-av.a4{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-or),var(--acc-rd))}
.bg-team-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.bg-team-name{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.bg-team-role{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:var(--mono);text-transform:uppercase}
.bg-team-load{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx2)}

/* Riesgos dentro del modal */
.bg-risk-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
.bg-risk-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 9px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid var(--acc-or);border-radius:5px;font-size:10px}
.bg-risk-item.hi{border-left-color:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-risk-item.lo{border-left-color:var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-risk-item .id{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);flex-shrink:0}
.bg-risk-item .tx{flex:1;color:var(--tx2)}
.bg-risk-item .sc{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;color:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-risk-item.hi .sc{color:var(--acc-rd)}

/* Audit RBAC chip dentro del modal */
.bg-audit{padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(57,210,192,.06);border:1px dashed rgba(57,210,192,.4);border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-family:var(--mono)}
.bg-audit svg{color:var(--acc-cy);flex-shrink:0;width:13px;height:13px}
.bg-audit strong{color:var(--acc-cy)}

/* Salario bloqueado por RGPD (blur) */
.bg-rgpd-blur{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.bg-rgpd-blur > .v{filter:blur(8px);user-select:none;pointer-events:none}
.bg-rgpd-blur::after{content:'🔒 RGPD · CFO only';position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--acc-rd);background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);border-radius:5px}

/* Click affordance en alert-items */
.alert-item{cursor:pointer}

/* Tokens/coste mini bars (modal agente) */
.bg-tk-stack{display:flex;height:14px;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.bg-tk-stack > div{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:#0d1117}
.tb-date{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--tx2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.tb-date .pulse{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--acc-gn);border-radius:50%;animation:pulse 2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}
.btn-pdf{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(188,140,255,.15),rgba(88,166,255,.15));border:1px solid rgba(188,140,255,.4);color:var(--acc-pu);padding:7px 14px;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-family:var(--font);transition:.2s}
.btn-pdf:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(188,140,255,.25),rgba(88,166,255,.25));border-color:var(--acc-pu)}

/* ═══════════════ TABS NAV ═══════════════ */
.tabs-nav{background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:0 18px;display:flex;gap:2px;flex-shrink:0}
.tab-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--tx2);padding:11px 16px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);border-bottom:2px solid transparent;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;transition:.15s}
.tab-btn:hover{color:var(--tx)}
.tab-btn.active{color:var(--tx);border-bottom-color:var(--acc-pu)}
.tab-btn svg{width:13px;height:13px}

/* ═══════════════ SCOPE BANNER (RBAC) ═══════════════ */
.bg-scope-banner{background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:8px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-shrink:0;font-size:11px}
.bg-scope-icon{width:24px;height:24px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-bl),var(--acc-cy));border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}
.bg-scope-icon svg{width:13px;height:13px;color:#0d1117}
.bg-scope-text{flex:1;color:var(--tx2)}
.bg-scope-text strong{color:var(--tx);font-weight:700}
.bg-scope-tag{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:5px;color:var(--acc-cy);font-weight:700}
.bg-scope-rgpd{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.35);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:5px;color:var(--acc-rd);font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}

/* ═══════════════ EXEC DASH (Budget content) ═══════════════ */
.exec-dash{background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:12px 18px;flex-shrink:0;transition:.3s}
.exec-dash.collapsed{padding:0 18px;max-height:32px;overflow:hidden}
.exec-dash-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;cursor:pointer;user-select:none}
.exec-dash.collapsed .exec-dash-head{margin:0;height:32px}
.exec-dash-head h3{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--tx2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.exec-dash-head h3 svg{color:var(--acc-pu)}
.exec-dash-toggle{margin-left:auto;font-size:10px;color:var(--tx3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.exec-dash-toggle .chev{transition:.3s}
.exec-dash.collapsed .chev{transform:rotate(-90deg)}

/* Fila 1: KPIs Hero */
.kpi-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px}
.kpi{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.kpi:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.kpi::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;border-radius:3px 0 0 3px}
.kpi.rag-g::before{background:var(--acc-gn)}
.kpi.rag-a::before{background:var(--acc-or)}
.kpi.rag-r::before{background:var(--acc-rd)}
.kpi.neutral::before{background:var(--acc-bl)}
.kpi.cyan::before{background:var(--acc-cy)}
.kpi.purple::before{background:var(--acc-pu)}
.kpi-label{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;margin-bottom:6px}
.kpi-value{font-size:24px;font-weight:800;font-family:var(--mono);line-height:1.1;display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:6px}
.kpi-value .unit{font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--tx2)}
.kpi-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.kpi-delta{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px}
.kpi-delta.up{background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.kpi-delta.down{background:rgba(63,185,80,.15);color:var(--acc-gn)}
.kpi-delta.flat{background:var(--bg-el);color:var(--tx2)}
.kpi-delta.warn{background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);color:var(--acc-or)}
.kpi-spark{position:absolute;right:10px;bottom:10px;width:80px;height:24px;opacity:.6}

/* Fila 2: Alert blocks (3 columnas) */
.alert-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px}
.alert-block{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px}
.alert-block h4{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--tx2);margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.alert-block h4 .badge{margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;background:var(--bg-el);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;color:var(--tx3)}
.alert-block h4 svg{color:var(--acc-or)}
.alert-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.alert-item:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);background:var(--bg-l3)}
.alert-item:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.alert-item .dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
.alert-item .dot.red{background:var(--acc-rd);box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--acc-rd)}
.alert-item .dot.org{background:var(--acc-or)}
.alert-item .dot.blu{background:var(--acc-bl)}
.alert-item .dot.gn{background:var(--acc-gn)}
.alert-item .dot.pu{background:var(--acc-pu)}
.alert-item .id{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);flex-shrink:0}
.alert-item .txt{flex:1;color:var(--tx);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.alert-item .amount{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--tx);background:var(--bg-card);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0}
.alert-item .amount.warn{color:var(--acc-or);border-color:rgba(210,153,34,.35)}
.alert-item .amount.bad{color:var(--acc-rd);border-color:rgba(248,81,73,.35)}
.alert-item .owner{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);background:var(--bg-card);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0}
.alert-item .owner .avatar{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-bl),var(--acc-cy));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:#0d1117}

/* Fila 3: bottom (Capacidad + Composición + IA) */
.bottom-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1.3fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px}
.bx{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px}
.bx h4{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--tx2);margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.bx h4 svg{color:var(--acc-cy)}
.bx h4 .badge{margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;background:var(--bg-el);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;color:var(--tx3)}

/* Capacidad 3 capas */
.cap-stack{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
.cap-layer{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 8px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left-width:3px;border-radius:6px}
.cap-layer.l-h{border-left-color:var(--acc-gn)}
.cap-layer.l-c{border-left-color:var(--acc-bl)}
.cap-layer.l-b{border-left-color:var(--acc-rd)}
.cap-layer .ico{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:5px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px}
.cap-layer .nm{flex:1}
.cap-layer .nm .t{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx)}
.cap-layer .nm .d{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3)}
.cap-layer .vl{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:14px;font-weight:800}
.cap-layer.l-h .vl{color:var(--acc-gn)}
.cap-layer.l-c .vl{color:var(--acc-bl)}
.cap-layer.l-b .vl{color:var(--acc-rd)}
.cap-min{margin-top:8px;padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(248,81,73,.08);border:1px dashed var(--acc-rd);border-radius:6px;text-align:center}
.cap-min .l{font-size:8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--acc-rd);font-weight:700}
.cap-min .v{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);margin-top:2px}
.cap-min .why{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);margin-top:2px}

/* Composición presupuestos (mini stacked) */
.comp-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:7px;font-size:10px}
.comp-row:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.comp-row .l{width:90px;color:var(--tx2);font-weight:600}
.comp-row .b{flex:1;height:14px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.comp-row .b > div{height:100%;border-radius:3px}
.comp-row .v{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx);min-width:60px;text-align:right}

/* Story IA vs Humano */
.story{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(57,210,192,.08),rgba(63,185,80,.05));border:1px solid rgba(57,210,192,.3);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px}
.story h4{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--acc-cy);margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.story-cmp{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr;gap:8px;align-items:center}
.story-side{padding:6px;text-align:center}
.story-side .num{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:800;line-height:1.1}
.story-side .lbl{font-size:8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--tx3);margin-top:3px;letter-spacing:.3px}
.story-side.ia .num{color:var(--acc-gn)}
.story-side.hum .num{color:var(--acc-or)}
.story-vs{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx3)}
.story-foot{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px dashed var(--border);font-style:italic;line-height:1.4}

/* ═══════════════ SECTION TITLES ═══════════════ */
.sec-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--tx2);padding:14px 18px 8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.sec-title svg{color:var(--acc-pu)}
.sec-title .badge{margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;color:var(--tx3)}

/* ═══════════════ FILA 4: TOP PROYECTOS · OPEX SILO · CATEGORIAS ═══════════════ */
.row-3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;padding:0 18px 14px}

/* Tabla compacta */
.tbl-compact{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px}
.tbl-compact th{text-align:left;padding:6px 8px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--tx3);letter-spacing:.4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.tbl-compact td{padding:7px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx)}
.tbl-compact tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
.tbl-compact tr:hover td{background:var(--bg-el)}
.tbl-compact .nm{font-weight:600}
.tbl-compact .am{font-family:var(--mono);text-align:right;font-weight:700}
.tag-st{display:inline-block;font-size:8px;font-weight:800;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;letter-spacing:.3px;font-family:var(--mono)}
.tag-st.apr{background:rgba(63,185,80,.15);color:var(--acc-gn)}
.tag-st.bor{background:rgba(139,148,158,.15);color:var(--tx2)}
.tag-st.rev{background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);color:var(--acc-or)}
.tag-st.cer{background:rgba(88,166,255,.15);color:var(--acc-bl)}

/* Bar list horizontal */
.bar-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px}
.bar-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:90px 1fr 60px;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:10px}
.bar-row .l{color:var(--tx2);font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.bar-row .b{height:10px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
.bar-row .b > div{height:100%}
.bar-row .v{font-family:var(--mono);text-align:right;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx)}

/* Donut SVG */
.donut-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.donut-legend{flex:1;font-size:10px}
.donut-legend .li{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:2px 0}
.donut-legend .dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:2px;flex-shrink:0}
.donut-legend .v{margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;color:var(--tx)}

/* ═══════════════ FILA 5: GAPS + RBAC TABLES ═══════════════ */
.row-rbac{padding:0 18px 14px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
.gap-block,.rbac-block{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px}
.gap-block h4,.rbac-block h4{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--tx2);margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.gap-block h4 svg{color:var(--acc-or)}
.rbac-block h4 svg{color:var(--acc-cy)}
.gap-block h4 .badge{margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;background:rgba(210,153,34,.12);color:var(--acc-or);border:1px solid rgba(210,153,34,.35);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px}
.rbac-block h4 .badge{margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;background:rgba(57,210,192,.12);color:var(--acc-cy);border:1px solid rgba(57,210,192,.35);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px}

.gap-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;padding:7px 9px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid var(--acc-or);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:5px;font-size:10px}
.gap-item:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.gap-item .ic{font-size:13px}
.gap-item .tx{flex:1;color:var(--tx2);line-height:1.4}
.gap-item .tx strong{color:var(--tx);display:block;margin-bottom:2px;font-size:10.5px}
.gap-item .ac{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:8px;background:var(--acc-or);color:#0d1117;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px}

/* RBAC table mini */
.rbac-card{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:6px}
.rbac-card:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.rbac-card .rb-h{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:5px}
.rbac-card .rb-h .nm{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--acc-cy)}
.rbac-card .rb-h .pill{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:8px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;color:var(--tx3)}
.rbac-card .rb-d{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx2);line-height:1.4}
.rbac-card .rb-d code{background:var(--bg-card);padding:1px 4px;border-radius:3px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--acc-pu);border:1px solid var(--border)}

.bg-blocked{display:none !important}
.bg-empty{padding:60px 18px;text-align:center;color:var(--tx3);background:var(--bg2);margin:14px 18px;border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:10px}
.bg-empty .ic{font-size:32px;margin-bottom:10px}
.bg-empty h3{font-size:14px;color:var(--tx2);margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:700}
.bg-empty p{font-size:11px;color:var(--tx3)}
.bg-empty code{font-family:var(--mono);background:var(--bg-el);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;color:var(--acc-rd);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:10px}

/* Tab placeholders */
.placeholder{padding:80px 18px;text-align:center;color:var(--tx3);background:var(--bg2);margin:14px 18px;border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:10px}
.placeholder .ic{font-size:36px;margin-bottom:10px;opacity:.5}
.placeholder h3{font-size:14px;color:var(--tx2);margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:700}
.placeholder p{font-size:11px;color:var(--tx3);max-width:480px;margin:0 auto}

.tab-panel{display:none}
.tab-panel.active{display:block}

/* ═══════════ GOBERNADORES 360 ═══════════ */
#gob{padding:0 18px 24px}
.bg-gob-strip{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:10px;margin:14px 0 12px}
.bg-gob-kpi{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.bg-gob-kpi::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-gob-kpi.gn::before{background:var(--acc-gn)} .bg-gob-kpi.or::before{background:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-gob-kpi.rd::before{background:var(--acc-rd)} .bg-gob-kpi.cy::before{background:var(--acc-cy)}
.bg-gob-kpi.pu::before{background:var(--acc-pu)}
.bg-gob-kpi .lbl{font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}
.bg-gob-kpi .val{font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);font-family:var(--mono);line-height:1.1}
.bg-gob-kpi .sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:3px}

.bg-gob-filters{display:flex;gap:6px;margin:14px 0 10px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}
.bg-gob-filters .lbl{font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:700;margin-right:4px}
.bg-gob-fchip{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);padding:5px 10px;border-radius:14px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;font-family:inherit}
.bg-gob-fchip:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);color:var(--tx)}
.bg-gob-fchip.on{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);border-color:var(--acc-bl);color:var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-gob-fchip.gn.on{background:rgba(63,185,80,.12);border-color:var(--acc-gn);color:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-gob-fchip.or.on{background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);border-color:var(--acc-or);color:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-gob-fchip.rd.on{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);border-color:var(--acc-rd);color:var(--acc-rd)}

.bg-gob-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-top:6px}
@media(max-width:1300px){.bg-gob-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
.bg-gob-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:.18s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.bg-gob-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-gob-card.gn::before{background:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-gob-card.or::before{background:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-gob-card.rd::before{background:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-gob-card:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px var(--shd-md)}
.bg-gob-card.dim{opacity:.25;filter:saturate(.4)}

.bg-gc-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px}
.bg-gc-av{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;color:#0d1117;flex-shrink:0;font-family:var(--mono);box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.bg-gc-av.bl{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-bl),var(--acc-cy))}
.bg-gc-av.gn{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-gn),var(--acc-cy))}
.bg-gc-av.or{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-or),var(--acc-pk))}
.bg-gc-av.pu{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-pu),var(--acc-bl))}
.bg-gc-av.rd{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-rd),var(--acc-or))}
.bg-gc-id{flex:1;min-width:0}
.bg-gc-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);line-height:1.2;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.bg-gc-role{font-size:9px;font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;margin-top:2px}
.bg-gc-silo{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx2);background:var(--bg-el);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;font-family:var(--mono)}

.bg-gc-mtrx{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px}
.bg-gc-m{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 4px;text-align:center}
.bg-gc-m .k{font-size:8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--tx3);letter-spacing:.04em;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:2px}
.bg-gc-m .v{font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);font-family:var(--mono);line-height:1}
.bg-gc-m.gn .v{color:var(--acc-gn)} .bg-gc-m.or .v{color:var(--acc-or)} .bg-gc-m.rd .v{color:var(--acc-rd)}

.bg-gc-bars{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;margin-bottom:10px}
.bg-gc-bar{display:grid;grid-template-columns:60px 1fr 32px;gap:6px;align-items:center;font-size:9px}
.bg-gc-bar .l{color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;font-weight:700}
.bg-gc-bar .t{height:5px;background:var(--bg-el);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.bg-gc-bar .t > span{display:block;height:100%;border-radius:3px}
.bg-gc-bar .v{color:var(--tx);font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;text-align:right}

.bg-gc-spark{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:24px;padding:0 2px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:10px}
.bg-gc-spark span{flex:1;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--acc-bl),rgba(88,166,255,.3));border-radius:1px;min-height:2px}

.bg-gc-foot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:8px}
.bg-gc-foot .pj{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;color:var(--tx2)}
.bg-gc-foot .bac{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:800;color:var(--acc-cy);font-size:11px}

.bg-gob-tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:6px;font-size:11px}
.bg-gob-tbl thead th{background:var(--bg2);color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;padding:9px 10px;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.bg-gob-tbl tbody td{padding:9px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx);font-family:var(--mono)}
.bg-gob-tbl tbody tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
.bg-gob-tbl tbody tr{cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.bg-gob-tbl tbody tr:hover{background:var(--bg-el)}
.bg-gob-tbl td.name{font-family:var(--font);font-weight:700}
.bg-gob-tbl td .px{padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;display:inline-block}
.bg-gob-tbl td .px.gn{background:rgba(63,185,80,.12);color:var(--acc-gn);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.35)}
.bg-gob-tbl td .px.or{background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);color:var(--acc-or);border:1px solid rgba(210,153,34,.4)}
.bg-gob-tbl td .px.rd{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:var(--acc-rd);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.35)}

/* ═══════════ MAPA DE CALOR RUN ═══════════ */
#run{padding:0 18px 24px}
.bg-run-strip{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:10px;margin:14px 0 12px}
.bg-run-kpi{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.bg-run-kpi::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-run-kpi.gn::before{background:var(--acc-gn)} .bg-run-kpi.or::before{background:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-run-kpi.rd::before{background:var(--acc-rd)} .bg-run-kpi.cy::before{background:var(--acc-cy)}
.bg-run-kpi.pu::before{background:var(--acc-pu)}
.bg-run-kpi .lbl{font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}
.bg-run-kpi .val{font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);font-family:var(--mono);line-height:1.1}
.bg-run-kpi .sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:3px}

.bg-run-filters{display:flex;gap:6px;margin:14px 0 10px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}
.bg-run-filters .lbl{font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:700;margin-right:4px}
.bg-run-fchip{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);padding:5px 10px;border-radius:14px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;font-family:inherit}
.bg-run-fchip:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);color:var(--tx)}
.bg-run-fchip.on{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);border-color:var(--acc-bl);color:var(--acc-bl)}

.bg-run-main{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 320px;gap:12px;margin-top:6px}
@media(max-width:1400px){.bg-run-main{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

.bg-hm-wrap{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px}
.bg-hm-hdr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.bg-hm-hdr h4{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em}
.bg-hm-legend{display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:var(--mono);text-transform:uppercase}
.bg-hm-legend .bar{display:flex;height:10px;width:140px;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.bg-hm-legend .bar>span{flex:1}
.bg-hm-legend .bar .l0{background:#1f3a5f} .bg-hm-legend .bar .l1{background:#1e5f7a}
.bg-hm-legend .bar .l2{background:#2a7a6c} .bg-hm-legend .bar .l3{background:#8a7a1e}
.bg-hm-legend .bar .l4{background:#b85c1e} .bg-hm-legend .bar .l5{background:#c73d3d}

.bg-hm-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px repeat(4,1fr);gap:4px}
.bg-hm-col-hdr{font-size:9px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:5px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px}
.bg-hm-col-hdr .sub{font-size:8px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600;text-transform:none;opacity:.8}
.bg-hm-row-hdr{font-size:10px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);padding:8px 10px;background:var(--bg-el);border-left:3px solid var(--acc-bl);border-radius:5px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.bg-hm-row-hdr .sub{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600;margin-top:2px}
.bg-hm-row-hdr.c-infra{border-color:var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-hm-row-hdr.c-red{border-color:var(--acc-cy)}
.bg-hm-row-hdr.c-cloud{border-color:var(--acc-pu)}
.bg-hm-row-hdr.c-virt{border-color:var(--acc-pk)}
.bg-hm-row-hdr.c-sto{border-color:var(--acc-ye)}
.bg-hm-row-hdr.c-sec{border-color:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-hm-row-hdr.c-data{border-color:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-hm-row-hdr.c-apps{border-color:var(--acc-or)}

.bg-hm-cell{padding:10px 8px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;transition:.18s;border:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;min-height:66px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between}
.bg-hm-cell:hover{transform:scale(1.04);border-color:var(--tx2);z-index:5;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
.bg-hm-cell.empty{background:var(--bg2);cursor:default;opacity:.4}
.bg-hm-cell.empty:hover{transform:none;border-color:var(--border);box-shadow:none}
.bg-hm-cell .n{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;line-height:1}
.bg-hm-cell .cost{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);margin-top:2px}
.bg-hm-cell .inc{position:absolute;top:4px;right:4px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);border-radius:8px;padding:1px 5px;font-size:8px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;font-family:var(--mono)}
.bg-hm-cell .inc.hot{background:var(--acc-rd);box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(248,81,73,.7);animation:pulse 2s infinite}
.bg-hm-cell.l0{background:#1f3a5f} .bg-hm-cell.l1{background:#1e5f7a}
.bg-hm-cell.l2{background:#2a7a6c} .bg-hm-cell.l3{background:#8a7a1e}
.bg-hm-cell.l4{background:#b85c1e} .bg-hm-cell.l5{background:#c73d3d}

.bg-hm-side{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
.bg-hm-panel{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px}
.bg-hm-panel h4{font-size:11px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.bg-hm-panel h4 .badge{margin-left:auto;font-size:9px;font-family:var(--mono);background:var(--bg-el);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);font-weight:700}

.bg-hot-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:5px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;font-size:10px}
.bg-hot-item:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);background:var(--bg-l3)}
.bg-hot-item:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.bg-hot-item .rk{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx3);width:18px}
.bg-hot-item .nm{flex:1;min-width:0;color:var(--tx);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;font-weight:600}
.bg-hot-item .nm .t{color:var(--tx3);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;display:block;margin-top:1px;font-weight:500}
.bg-hot-item .hv{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:800;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;flex-shrink:0}
.bg-hot-item .hv.rd{color:var(--acc-rd);background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.35)}
.bg-hot-item .hv.or{color:var(--acc-or);background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);border:1px solid rgba(210,153,34,.4)}

.bg-inc-item{padding:8px 10px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid var(--acc-or);margin-bottom:5px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.bg-inc-item.p1{border-left-color:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-inc-item.p2{border-left-color:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-inc-item.p3{border-left-color:var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-inc-item:hover{background:var(--bg-l3);border-color:var(--border-hi)}
.bg-inc-item:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.bg-inc-hdr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:9px;margin-bottom:3px}
.bg-inc-hdr .id{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:800;color:var(--tx2)}
.bg-inc-hdr .st{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-size:8px}
.bg-inc-hdr .st.open{color:var(--acc-rd);background:rgba(248,81,73,.12)}
.bg-inc-hdr .st.wip{color:var(--acc-or);background:rgba(210,153,34,.15)}
.bg-inc-hdr .st.mon{color:var(--acc-bl);background:rgba(88,166,255,.12)}
.bg-inc-ti{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx);font-weight:600;line-height:1.3}

.bg-ci-tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:6px;font-size:11px}
.bg-ci-tbl thead th{background:var(--bg2);color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;padding:9px 10px;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.bg-ci-tbl tbody td{padding:9px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx);font-family:var(--mono)}
.bg-ci-tbl tbody tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
.bg-ci-tbl tbody tr{cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.bg-ci-tbl tbody tr:hover{background:var(--bg-el)}
.bg-ci-tbl td.name{font-family:var(--font);font-weight:700}
.bg-ci-tbl td .px{padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;display:inline-block;font-family:var(--mono)}
.bg-ci-tbl td .px.gn{background:rgba(63,185,80,.12);color:var(--acc-gn);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.35)}
.bg-ci-tbl td .px.or{background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);color:var(--acc-or);border:1px solid rgba(210,153,34,.4)}
.bg-ci-tbl td .px.rd{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:var(--acc-rd);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.35)}
.bg-ci-tbl td .px.bl{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);color:var(--acc-bl);border:1px solid rgba(88,166,255,.35)}

.bg-tl{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;padding-left:14px;position:relative;margin-top:4px}
.bg-tl::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:3px;top:6px;bottom:6px;width:2px;background:var(--border)}
.bg-tl-item{position:relative;padding:6px 10px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:10px}
.bg-tl-item::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:-14px;top:10px;width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--acc-bl);border:2px solid var(--bg-card)}
.bg-tl-item.done::before{background:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-tl-item.now::before{background:var(--acc-or);box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--acc-or)}
.bg-tl-item .tm{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:2px}
.bg-tl-item .tx{color:var(--tx);line-height:1.3}

/* ═══════════ CARTERA BUILD ═══════════ */
#cartera{padding:0 18px 24px}
.bg-cart-strip{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:10px;margin:14px 0 12px}
.bg-cart-kpi{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.bg-cart-kpi::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-cart-kpi.gn::before{background:var(--acc-gn)} .bg-cart-kpi.or::before{background:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-cart-kpi.rd::before{background:var(--acc-rd)} .bg-cart-kpi.cy::before{background:var(--acc-cy)}
.bg-cart-kpi.pu::before{background:var(--acc-pu)}
.bg-cart-kpi .lbl{font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}
.bg-cart-kpi .val{font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);font-family:var(--mono);line-height:1.1}
.bg-cart-kpi .sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:3px}

.bg-cart-filters{display:flex;gap:6px;margin:14px 0 10px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}
.bg-cart-filters .lbl{font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:700;margin-right:4px}
.bg-cart-fchip{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);padding:5px 10px;border-radius:14px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;font-family:inherit}
.bg-cart-fchip:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);color:var(--tx)}
.bg-cart-fchip.on{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);border-color:var(--acc-bl);color:var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-cart-fchip.gn.on{background:rgba(63,185,80,.12);border-color:var(--acc-gn);color:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-cart-fchip.or.on{background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);border-color:var(--acc-or);color:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-cart-fchip.rd.on{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);border-color:var(--acc-rd);color:var(--acc-rd)}

.bg-cart-main{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:6px}
@media(max-width:1350px){.bg-cart-main{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

.bg-cart-panel{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px}
.bg-cart-panel h4{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.bg-cart-panel h4 .badge{margin-left:auto;font-size:9px;font-family:var(--mono);background:var(--bg-el);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);font-weight:700}

.bg-funnel{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.bg-funnel-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:50px 1fr 60px 70px;gap:10px;align-items:center;font-size:10px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.bg-funnel-row:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);background:var(--bg-l3)}
.bg-funnel-row .gl{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:800;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:5px;text-align:center;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border)}
.bg-funnel-row .gl.G0{background:rgba(110,118,129,.15);color:var(--tx3)}
.bg-funnel-row .gl.G1{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);color:var(--acc-bl);border-color:rgba(88,166,255,.35)}
.bg-funnel-row .gl.G2{background:rgba(57,210,192,.12);color:var(--acc-cy);border-color:rgba(57,210,192,.35)}
.bg-funnel-row .gl.G3{background:rgba(188,140,255,.12);color:var(--acc-pu);border-color:rgba(188,140,255,.35)}
.bg-funnel-row .gl.G4{background:rgba(247,120,186,.12);color:var(--acc-pk);border-color:rgba(247,120,186,.35)}
.bg-funnel-row .gl.G5{background:rgba(63,185,80,.12);color:var(--acc-gn);border-color:rgba(63,185,80,.35)}
.bg-funnel-row .bar{height:16px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);position:relative}
.bg-funnel-row .bar > span{display:block;height:100%;border-radius:4px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--acc-bl),var(--acc-cy));transition:.3s}
.bg-funnel-row .bar .lb{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 8px;font-size:9px;font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;color:var(--tx);text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6)}
.bg-funnel-row .cnt{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);text-align:right}
.bg-funnel-row .bc{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;color:var(--acc-cy);text-align:right;font-size:9px}

.bg-matrix{display:grid;grid-template-columns:50px repeat(4,1fr);grid-template-rows:auto repeat(4,1fr);gap:4px;min-height:380px}
.bg-matrix .mx-ax{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.06em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:4px}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:.18s;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between;position:relative;overflow:hidden;min-height:0}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell:hover{border-color:var(--tx2);transform:scale(1.03);z-index:5;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell.empty{opacity:.3;cursor:default}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell.empty:hover{transform:none;border-color:var(--border);box-shadow:none}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell .count{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);line-height:1}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell .sum{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:2px;font-weight:700}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell .dots{display:flex;gap:2px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-content:flex-start;flex:1;margin-top:6px}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell .dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--tx2)}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell.q-hi{background:rgba(248,81,73,.08);border-color:rgba(248,81,73,.4)}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell.q-md{background:rgba(210,153,34,.08);border-color:rgba(210,153,34,.4)}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell.q-lo{background:rgba(63,185,80,.08);border-color:rgba(63,185,80,.4)}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell.q-hi .dot{background:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell.q-md .dot{background:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-matrix .mx-cell.q-lo .dot{background:var(--acc-gn)}

.bg-cart-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin-top:6px}
@media(max-width:1500px){.bg-cart-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
@media(max-width:1100px){.bg-cart-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
.bg-pc-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;cursor:pointer;transition:.18s;position:relative}
.bg-pc-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--acc-bl);border-radius:8px 0 0 8px}
.bg-pc-card.gn::before{background:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-pc-card.or::before{background:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-pc-card.rd::before{background:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-pc-card:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 16px var(--shd-md)}
.bg-pc-card.dim{opacity:.25;filter:saturate(.4);pointer-events:none}

/* ═══════════ PULSO ESTRATÉGICO ═══════════ */
#pulso{padding:0 18px 24px}
.bg-pul-strip{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:10px;margin:14px 0}
.bg-pul-kpi{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px 14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;transition:.18s}
.bg-pul-kpi::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:4px}
.bg-pul-kpi.gn::before{background:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-pul-kpi.am::before{background:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-pul-kpi.rd::before{background:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-pul-kpi:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 16px var(--shd-md)}
.bg-pul-kpi .lb{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.6px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}
.bg-pul-kpi .vl{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);line-height:1}
.bg-pul-kpi .sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:4px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.bg-pul-kpi .rag{font-size:8px;font-weight:800;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px}
.bg-pul-kpi .rag.gn{background:rgba(63,185,80,.15);color:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-pul-kpi .rag.am{background:rgba(255,166,87,.15);color:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-pul-kpi .rag.rd{background:rgba(255,123,114,.15);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-pul-main{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.15fr 1fr;gap:14px}
@media(max-width:1300px){.bg-pul-main{grid-template-columns:1fr}.bg-pul-strip{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
.bg-pul-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}
.bg-pul-panel{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:14px 16px}
.bg-pul-panel h4{margin:0 0 10px;font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.6px;color:var(--tx2);font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.bg-pul-panel h4 .ct{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);font-family:var(--mono);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;color:var(--tx2);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0}
.bg-pul-panel h4 .ct.rd{color:var(--acc-rd);border-color:rgba(255,123,114,.4)}
.bg-pul-panel h4 .ct.or{color:var(--acc-or);border-color:rgba(255,166,87,.4)}
/* Alertas estratégicas */
.bg-alert{display:grid;grid-template-columns:36px 1fr auto;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.bg-alert:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);background:var(--bg-l3)}
.bg-alert:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.bg-alert.rd{border-left:3px solid var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-alert.am{border-left:3px solid var(--acc-or)}
.bg-alert.gn{border-left:3px solid var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-alert .ic{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px}
.bg-alert.rd .ic{background:rgba(255,123,114,.15);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-alert.am .ic{background:rgba(255,166,87,.15);color:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-alert.gn .ic{background:rgba(63,185,80,.15);color:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-alert .bd{min-width:0}
.bg-alert .tt{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx);margin-bottom:3px}
.bg-alert .ds{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);line-height:1.35}
.bg-alert .mt{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);margin-top:4px;font-family:var(--mono);display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.bg-alert .mt span{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px}
.bg-alert .sev{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:800;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;white-space:nowrap}
.bg-alert.rd .sev{background:rgba(255,123,114,.15);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-alert.am .sev{background:rgba(255,166,87,.15);color:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-alert.gn .sev{background:rgba(63,185,80,.15);color:var(--acc-gn)}
/* Bloqueos list */
.bg-block{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:8px;align-items:center;padding:9px 11px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:7px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.bg-block:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi)}
.bg-block:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.bg-block .tt{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx);margin-bottom:2px}
.bg-block .ds{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx2);line-height:1.3}
.bg-block .mt{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);margin-top:3px;font-family:var(--mono)}
.bg-block .mt .pj{color:var(--acc-bl);font-weight:700}
.bg-block .dy{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--acc-or);text-align:right;line-height:1}
.bg-block .dy.rd{color:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-block .dy .un{display:block;font-size:8px;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.3px;margin-top:2px}
/* Decisiones pendientes */
.bg-dec{padding:11px 13px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.bg-dec:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi)}
.bg-dec:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.bg-dec .tp{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:5px}
.bg-dec .id{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:700}
.bg-dec .du{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:800;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2)}
.bg-dec .du.near{color:var(--acc-or);border-color:rgba(255,166,87,.4)}
.bg-dec .du.over{color:var(--acc-rd);border-color:rgba(255,123,114,.4)}
.bg-dec .tt{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx);margin-bottom:5px;line-height:1.3}
.bg-dec .ds{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);line-height:1.35;margin-bottom:6px}
.bg-dec .mt{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:var(--mono)}
.bg-dec .mt .own{color:var(--acc-cy);font-weight:700}
.bg-dec .mt .amt{color:var(--acc-pu);font-weight:700}
/* Responsables departamento */
.bg-resp{display:grid;grid-template-columns:40px 1fr auto auto;gap:10px;align-items:center;padding:9px 11px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:7px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.bg-resp:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi)}
.bg-resp:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.bg-resp .av{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg-l3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);border:2px solid var(--border)}
.bg-resp .nm{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx)}
.bg-resp .rl{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx2);font-family:var(--mono);margin-top:2px}
.bg-resp .rl .ct{color:var(--tx3);margin-left:6px}
.bg-resp .kp{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);text-align:right}
.bg-resp .kp .vl{font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);display:block;line-height:1.1}
.bg-resp .lg{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 0 8px currentColor}
.bg-resp .lg.gn{background:var(--acc-gn);color:var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-resp .lg.am{background:var(--acc-or);color:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-resp .lg.rd{background:var(--acc-rd);color:var(--acc-rd)}
/* Hitos timeline */
.bg-hito{display:grid;grid-template-columns:70px 1fr auto;gap:12px;align-items:center;padding:9px 11px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:7px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.bg-hito:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi)}
.bg-hito:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.bg-hito .dt{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--acc-cy);font-weight:800;text-align:center}
.bg-hito .dt .wk{display:block;font-size:8px;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:600;margin-top:2px;letter-spacing:.3px}
.bg-hito .tt{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx);margin-bottom:2px}
.bg-hito .ds{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx2);line-height:1.3}
.bg-hito .tg{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:800;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);white-space:nowrap}
.bg-hito .tg.g5{color:var(--acc-gn);border-color:rgba(63,185,80,.4)}
.bg-hito .tg.cmt{color:var(--acc-pu);border-color:rgba(188,140,255,.4)}
.bg-hito .tg.aud{color:var(--acc-or);border-color:rgba(255,166,87,.4)}
.bg-hito .tg.bgt{color:var(--acc-pk);border-color:rgba(247,120,186,.4)}
/* Marco estratégico (DAFO · PESTLE · Porter · OKR) */
.bg-strat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px}
@media(max-width:1100px){.bg-strat-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
.bg-strat-card{position:relative;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px 14px;cursor:pointer;transition:.18s;overflow:hidden}
.bg-strat-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:4px}
.bg-strat-card.dafo::before{background:var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-strat-card.pest::before{background:var(--acc-cy)}
.bg-strat-card.porter::before{background:var(--acc-pu)}
.bg-strat-card.okr::before{background:var(--acc-pk)}
.bg-strat-card:hover{border-color:var(--border-hi);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 16px var(--shd-md);background:var(--bg-l3)}
.bg-strat-card .tag{display:inline-block;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:8px;font-weight:800;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;margin-bottom:8px}
.bg-strat-card.dafo .tag{color:var(--acc-bl);border-color:rgba(88,166,255,.4)}
.bg-strat-card.pest .tag{color:var(--acc-cy);border-color:rgba(57,210,192,.4)}
.bg-strat-card.porter .tag{color:var(--acc-pu);border-color:rgba(188,140,255,.4)}
.bg-strat-card.okr .tag{color:var(--acc-pk);border-color:rgba(247,120,186,.4)}
.bg-strat-card .ttl{font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:5px}
.bg-strat-card .ds{font-size:10.5px;color:var(--tx2);line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:8px}
.bg-strat-card .ft{font-size:9px;font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--tx3);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.bg-strat-card .ft .ar{color:var(--tx2)}
/* Bloques DAFO 2x2 dentro del modal */
.bg-dafo-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
.bg-dafo-q{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:11px 13px}
.bg-dafo-q.f{border-left:3px solid var(--acc-gn)}
.bg-dafo-q.d{border-left:3px solid var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-dafo-q.o{border-left:3px solid var(--acc-bl)}
.bg-dafo-q.a{border-left:3px solid var(--acc-or)}
.bg-dafo-q h6{margin:0 0 6px;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--tx3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.bg-dafo-q.f h6{color:var(--acc-gn)} .bg-dafo-q.d h6{color:var(--acc-rd)}
.bg-dafo-q.o h6{color:var(--acc-bl)} .bg-dafo-q.a h6{color:var(--acc-or)}
.bg-dafo-q ul{margin:0;padding-left:14px;font-size:10.5px;color:var(--tx2);line-height:1.55}
.bg-dafo-q li{margin-bottom:3px}
/* PESTLE & Porter & OKR list rows */
.bg-strat-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:42px 1fr auto;gap:10px;align-items:center;padding:9px 11px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:7px}
.bg-strat-row:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.bg-strat-row .ic{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:800}
.bg-strat-row .ic.cy{color:var(--acc-cy);border-color:rgba(57,210,192,.4)}
.bg-strat-row .ic.pu{color:var(--acc-pu);border-color:rgba(188,140,255,.4)}
.bg-strat-row .ic.pk{color:var(--acc-pk);border-color:rgba(247,120,186,.4)}
.bg-strat-row .nm{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx);margin-bottom:2px}
```
