.bg-strat-row .ds{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);line-height:1.4}
.bg-strat-row .lv{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:800;padding:3px 7px;border-radius:4px;white-space:nowrap}
.bg-strat-row .lv.alta{background:rgba(255,123,114,.15);color:var(--acc-rd);border:1px solid rgba(255,123,114,.4)}
.bg-strat-row .lv.med{background:rgba(255,166,87,.15);color:var(--acc-or);border:1px solid rgba(255,166,87,.4)}
.bg-strat-row .lv.baja{background:rgba(63,185,80,.15);color:var(--acc-gn);border:1px solid rgba(63,185,80,.4)}
.bg-strat-row .lv.kr{background:rgba(247,120,186,.15);color:var(--acc-pk);border:1px solid rgba(247,120,186,.4)}
/* OKR progress bar */
.bg-okr-bar{height:6px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:6px}
.bg-okr-bar > div{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--acc-pk),var(--acc-pu))}
.bg-pc-hdr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px}
.bg-pc-id{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:700}
.bg-pc-gate{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;font-weight:800;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2)}
.bg-pc-gate.G0{color:var(--tx3)} .bg-pc-gate.G1{color:var(--acc-bl);border-color:rgba(88,166,255,.35)}
.bg-pc-gate.G2{color:var(--acc-cy);border-color:rgba(57,210,192,.35)}
.bg-pc-gate.G3{color:var(--acc-pu);border-color:rgba(188,140,255,.35)}
.bg-pc-gate.G4{color:var(--acc-pk);border-color:rgba(247,120,186,.35)}
.bg-pc-gate.G5{color:var(--acc-gn);border-color:rgba(63,185,80,.35)}
.bg-pc-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx);line-height:1.25;margin-bottom:6px;min-height:28px;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden}
.bg-pc-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:var(--mono);margin-bottom:6px}
.bg-pc-meta .silo{background:var(--bg-el);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.bg-pc-bar{height:4px;background:var(--bg-el);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:6px}
.bg-pc-bar > span{display:block;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--acc-bl),var(--acc-cy));border-radius:2px}
.bg-pc-foot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:9px;font-family:var(--mono)}
.bg-pc-foot .bac{font-weight:800;color:var(--acc-cy);font-size:11px}
.bg-pc-foot .cpi{padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:700}
.bg-pc-foot .cpi.gn{color:var(--acc-gn);background:rgba(63,185,80,.1)}
.bg-pc-foot .cpi.or{color:var(--acc-or);background:rgba(210,153,34,.12)}
.bg-pc-foot .cpi.rd{color:var(--acc-rd);background:rgba(248,81,73,.1)}
.bg-pc-ai{position:absolute;top:6px;right:30px;color:var(--acc-pu);font-size:10px}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ═══════════════ LOGIN OVERLAY (visible al cargar) ═══════════════ -->
<div class="bg-login-overlay" id="bg-login-overlay">
  <div class="bg-login-box">
    <div class="bg-login-head">
      <div class="bg-login-logo">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><defs><linearGradient id="goldGradL" x1="2" y1="2" x2="22" y2="22" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#FFEFA8"/><stop offset="0.45" stop-color="#F5C443"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#A87600"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="goldGradLD" x1="0" y1="0" x2="24" y2="24" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#7a4d00"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#3a2300"/></linearGradient></defs><path d="M12 1.2L21.8 6.4V17.6L12 22.8L2.2 17.6V6.4Z" fill="url(#goldGradL)" stroke="#5a3a00" stroke-width="0.7" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M12 3L20 7.3V16.7L12 21L4 16.7V7.3Z" fill="none" stroke="#5a3a00" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.45"/><circle cx="12" cy="12.3" r="5.2" fill="none" stroke="url(#goldGradLD)" stroke-width="0.9" stroke-dasharray="1.6 1"/><rect x="8.5" y="13.2" width="1.7" height="3.2" rx="0.35" fill="url(#goldGradLD)"/><rect x="11.15" y="11.2" width="1.7" height="5.2" rx="0.35" fill="url(#goldGradLD)"/><rect x="13.8" y="9.2" width="1.7" height="7.2" rx="0.35" fill="url(#goldGradLD)"/><circle cx="12" cy="6" r="1.1" fill="url(#goldGradLD)"/><circle cx="12" cy="6" r="0.45" fill="#FFEFA8"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-login-title">Cognitive PMO · Login</div>
      <div class="bg-login-sub">El sistema aplica el scope económico automáticamente al iniciar sesión · <strong>23 roles · 175 usuarios · RGPD compliant</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="bg-login-section">Dirección ejecutiva</div>
    <div class="bg-login-grid">
      <div class="bg-login-card l-super" data-role="SUPERADMIN">
        <div class="bg-login-avatar">AN</div>
        <div class="bg-login-meta"><div class="bg-login-name">Alex Núñez</div><div class="bg-login-role">SUPERADMIN</div><span class="bg-login-scope">scope: TODOS+</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-login-card l-c" data-role="CEO">
        <div class="bg-login-avatar">AV</div>

      El sistema lee el rol desde <strong>rbac_roles</strong>, busca su scope en <strong>rbac_econ_scopes</strong>

<!-- ═══════════════ EXEC DASH ═══════════════ -->
<div class="exec-dash" id="exec-dash">
  <div class="exec-dash-head" onclick="toggleDash()">
    <h3>
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="12" y1="1" x2="12" y2="23"/><path d="M17 5H9.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 0 0 7h5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 0 7H6"/></svg>
      Vista económica global · Datos reales BBDD
    </h3>
    <div class="exec-dash-toggle">
      Colapsar <span class="chev">▼</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Fila 1: KPIs grandes -->
  <div class="kpi-row">
    <div class="kpi rag-a" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,AUDITOR">
      <div class="kpi-label">TCO Anual estimado</div>
      <div class="kpi-value">€ 33.57<span class="unit">M</span></div>
      <div class="kpi-sub">
        <span>61% labor humana sin trackear</span>
        <span class="kpi-delta warn">⚠ gap</span>
      </div>
      <svg class="kpi-spark" viewBox="0 0 80 24" preserveAspectRatio="none">
        <polyline points="0,16 13,15 26,14 39,12 52,13 65,10 80,8" stroke="var(--acc-or)" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
      </svg>
    </div>

    <div class="kpi neutral" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,VP_OPERATIONS,VP_ENGINEERING,DIRECTOR_INFRA,DIRECTOR_SEC,PMO_SENIOR,AUDITOR">
      <div class="kpi-label">BAC Cartera BUILD</div>
      <div class="kpi-value">€ 15.77<span class="unit">M</span></div>
      <div class="kpi-sub">
        <span>60 proyectos · 18 responsables</span>
        <span class="kpi-delta down">↑ 3% vs Q1</span>
      </div>
      <svg class="kpi-spark" viewBox="0 0 80 24" preserveAspectRatio="none">
        <polyline points="0,18 13,16 26,15 39,12 52,11 65,8 80,5" stroke="var(--acc-bl)" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
      </svg>
    </div>

    <div class="kpi rag-r" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,VP_OPERATIONS,DIRECTOR_INFRA,DIRECTOR_SEC,AUDITOR">
      <div class="kpi-label">OPEX RUN anualizado</div>
      <div class="kpi-value">€ 7.43<span class="unit">M</span></div>
      <div class="kpi-sub">
        <span>226 CIs · 618.840 €/mes</span>
        <span class="kpi-delta up">+8% YoY</span>
      </div>
      <div style="height:4px;background:var(--bg-el);border-radius:2px;margin-top:6px;overflow:hidden">
        <div style="width:71%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--acc-or),var(--acc-rd))"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="kpi cyan" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,VP_OPERATIONS,VP_ENGINEERING,DIRECTOR_INFRA,DIRECTOR_SEC,PMO_SENIOR,TEAM_LEAD,TECH_SENIOR,AUDITOR">
      <div class="kpi-label">Coste IA Agentes (real)</div>
      <div class="kpi-value">€ 1.25 <span class="unit">/ 18 días</span></div>
      <div class="kpi-sub">
        <span>43 agentes · 47M tokens</span>
        <span class="kpi-delta down">vs 150K€ humano</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Fila 2: Alert blocks (3 columnas) -->
  <div class="alert-row">

    <!-- TOP PROYECTOS POR BAC -->
    <div class="alert-block" data-bg-modal-type="project" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,VP_OPERATIONS,VP_ENGINEERING,DIRECTOR_INFRA,DIRECTOR_SEC,PMO_SENIOR,AUDITOR">
      <h4>
        <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9H4.5a2.5 2.5 0 0 1 0-5H6M18 9h1.5a2.5 2.5 0 0 0 0-5H18M4 22h16M10 14.66V17c0 .55-.47.98-.97 1.21C7.85 18.75 7 20.24 7 22M14 14.66V17c0 .55.47.98.97 1.21C16.15 18.75 17 20.24 17 22"/></svg>
        Top proyectos por BAC
        <span class="badge">10 mayores · 15.77 M€</span>
      </h4>
      <div class="alert-item">
        <span class="dot gn"></span>
        <span class="id">PRJ-MSF</span>
        <span class="txt">Microsoft Fabric — nuevo entorno analítico</span>
        <span class="amount">1.178.880 €</span>
      </div>
      <div class="alert-item">
        <span class="dot blu"></span>
        <span class="id">PRJ-BBN</span>
        <span class="txt">Renovación Backbone Core de red</span>
        <span class="amount">765.240 €</span>
      </div>
      <div class="alert-item">
        <span class="dot org"></span>
        <span class="id">PRJ-OSP</span>
        <span class="txt">OpenShift on-premise · plataforma</span>
        <span class="amount warn">650.000 €</span>
      </div>
      <div class="alert-item">
        <span class="dot blu"></span>
        <span class="id">PRJ-NAC</span>
        <span class="txt">Clearpass NAC · oficinas</span>
        <span class="amount">640.080 €</span>
      </div>
      <div class="alert-item">
        <span class="dot gn"></span>
        <span class="id">PRJ-SOC</span>
        <span class="txt">SOC unificado SIEM/SOAR</span>
        <span class="amount">512.300 €</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- LICENCIAS EXPIRANDO -->
    <div class="alert-block" data-bg-modal-type="license" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,VP_OPERATIONS,VP_ENGINEERING,DIRECTOR_INFRA,DIRECTOR_SEC,AUDITOR">
      <h4>
        <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/></svg>
        Licencias críticas
        <span class="badge">2.39 M€/año</span>
      </h4>
      <div class="alert-item">
        <span class="dot red"></span>
        <span class="id">ORA</span>
        <span class="txt">Oracle Database Enterprise</span>
        <span class="amount bad">280.000 €</span>
      </div>
      <div class="alert-item">

        <span class="txt">Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9</span>
        <span class="amount warn">96.000 €</span>
      </div>
      <div class="alert-item">

      <div class="alert-item">

      </div>
      <div class="alert-item">

        <span class="txt">Splunk Enterprise</span>
        <span class="amount">48.700 €</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- AGENTES IA TOP CONSUMO -->
    <div class="alert-block" data-bg-modal-type="agent" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,VP_OPERATIONS,VP_ENGINEERING,DIRECTOR_INFRA,DIRECTOR_SEC,PMO_SENIOR,TEAM_LEAD,TECH_SENIOR,AUDITOR">
      <h4>
        <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="11" width="18" height="10" rx="2"/><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="2"/><path d="M12 7v4M8 16h.01M16 16h.01"/></svg>
        Agentes IA · top tokens
        <span class="badge">47M / 18d</span>
      </h4>
      <div class="alert-item">
        <span class="dot red"></span>
        <span class="id">AG-006</span>
        <span class="txt">Burnout Risk Predictor</span>
        <span class="amount">6.58 M</span>
      </div>
      <div class="alert-item">
        <span class="dot org"></span>
        <span class="id">AG-002</span>
        <span class="txt">Triaje RUN automático</span>
        <span class="amount">5.58 M</span>
      </div>
      <div class="alert-item">
        <span class="dot blu"></span>
        <span class="id">AG-007</span>
        <span class="txt">Knowledge Retrieval</span>
        <span class="amount">3.13 M</span>
      </div>
      <div class="alert-item">
        <span class="dot blu"></span>
        <span class="id">AG-012</span>
        <span class="txt">Capacity Forecaster</span>
        <span class="amount">3.05 M</span>
      </div>
      <div class="alert-item">
        <span class="dot pu"></span>
        <span class="id">AG-013</span>
        <span class="txt">Build Worker · W1</span>
        <span class="amount">2.32 M</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Fila 3: Capacity + Composición + Story IA -->
  <div class="bottom-row">

    <!-- CAPACIDAD 3 CAPAS -->
    <div class="bx" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,VP_OPERATIONS,VP_ENGINEERING,DIRECTOR_INFRA,DIRECTOR_SEC,PMO_SENIOR,TEAM_LEAD,AUDITOR">
      <h4>
        <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 2v6M12 22v-6M4.93 4.93l4.24 4.24M14.83 14.83l4.24 4.24M2 12h6M22 12h-6M4.93 19.07l4.24-4.24M14.83 9.17l4.24-4.24"/></svg>
        Capacidad efectiva · 3 capas
        <span class="badge">MIN(H,CMDB,CAB)</span>
      </h4>
      <div class="cap-stack">
        <div class="cap-layer l-h">
          <div class="ico">👥</div>
          <div class="nm"><div class="t">Capa HUMANA</div><div class="d">138 técnicos · 9 silos · 14 PMs activos</div></div>
          <div class="vl">~378</div>
        </div>
        <div class="cap-layer l-c">
          <div class="ico">🖥️</div>
          <div class="nm"><div class="t">Capa CMDB</div><div class="d">226 CIs · 76 críticos · 6 capas</div></div>
          <div class="vl">~35</div>
        </div>
        <div class="cap-layer l-b">
          <div class="ico">🚪</div>
          <div class="nm"><div class="t">Capa CAB</div><div class="d">40 ventanas · 200h/sem · MAJOR</div></div>
          <div class="vl">~13</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cap-min">
        <div class="l">⚠ Capacidad efectiva real</div>
        <div class="v">13 cambios estructurales/sem</div>
        <div class="why">El cuello de botella NO son los técnicos — son las ventanas CAB</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- COMPOSICIÓN PRESUPUESTOS -->
    <div class="bx" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,AUDITOR">
      <h4>
        <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 20V10M12 20V4M6 20v-6"/></svg>
        Composición presupuestos BUILD
        <span class="badge">% sobre 15.77 M€</span>
      </h4>
      <div class="comp-row">
        <div class="l">💼 Labor</div>
        <div class="b"><div style="width:23%;background:var(--acc-bl)"></div></div>
        <div class="v">3.64 M · 23%</div>
      </div>
      <div class="comp-row">
        <div class="l">⚙️ OPEX</div>
        <div class="b"><div style="width:22%;background:var(--acc-cy)"></div></div>
        <div class="v">3.40 M · 22%</div>
      </div>
      <div class="comp-row">
        <div class="l">🔧 CAPEX</div>
        <div class="b"><div style="width:27%;background:var(--acc-or)"></div></div>
        <div class="v">4.27 M · 27%</div>
      </div>
      <div class="comp-row">
        <div class="l">👥 RRHH</div>
        <div class="b"><div style="width:3%;background:var(--acc-pu)"></div></div>
        <div class="v">0.49 M · 3%</div>
      </div>
      <div class="comp-row">
        <div class="l">🛡️ Reservas</div>
        <div class="b"><div style="width:25%;background:var(--acc-rd)"></div></div>
        <div class="v">3.98 M · 25%</div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:10px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px dashed var(--border);font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:var(--mono)">
        Fuente: <code>presupuestos.total_*</code> × 60 filas
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STORY IA vs HUMANO -->
    <div class="story" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,AUDITOR">
      <h4>
        <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2"/></svg>
        Insight estratégico CEO
      </h4>
      <div class="story-cmp">
        <div class="story-side ia">
          <div class="num">€ 1.25</div>
          <div class="lbl">43 agentes · 18 días</div>
        </div>
        <div class="story-vs">VS</div>
        <div class="story-side hum">
          <div class="num">€ 150K</div>
          <div class="lbl">1 técnico · 1 año</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="story-foot">
        Un agente IA cuesta lo mismo que un técnico humano trabaja en <strong>~3 segundos</strong>. La pregunta ya no es si automatizar — es <strong>dónde está el cuello de botella humano que la IA puede aliviar</strong>.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- end exec-dash -->

<!-- ═══════════════ FILA 5: GAPS + RBAC TABLES ═══════════════ -->
<div class="sec-title">
  <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 2L1 21h22z"/><path d="M12 9v5M12 17h.01"/></svg>
  Datos pendientes · FASE B BBDD + Modelo RBAC económico
  <span class="badge">primo · BBDD</span>
</div>

<div class="row-rbac">

  <!-- GAPS ECONÓMICOS -->
  <div class="gap-block" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,AUDITOR">
    <h4>
      <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 8v4M12 16h.01"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/></svg>
      Gaps económicos detectados
      <span class="badge">5 bloques FASE B</span>
    </h4>
    <div class="gap-item">
      <div class="ic">👥</div>
      <div class="tx"><strong>Tabla rrhh_costes_empleado (175 filas + bandas N1-N4)</strong>Tarifa única hardcoded 85€/h. Sin esto, los 20.6 M€ de labor humana son estimación. Habilita coste real por dpto, burn rate humano y EVM real. <strong style="color:var(--acc-rd);display:inline">RGPD: salario_individual solo CFO+SUPERADMIN</strong>.</div>
      <div class="ac">CREAR</div>
    </div>
    <div class="gap-item">
      <div class="ic">📊</div>
      <div class="tx"><strong>Poblar build_live.presupuesto_consumido</strong>Hoy todos los proyectos en ejecución muestran 0 € consumido. Sin esto no hay EVM (CPI/SPI/EAC) ni alarmas de desviación.</div>
      <div class="ac">FLUJO</div>
    </div>
    <div class="gap-item">
      <div class="ic">🖥️</div>
      <div class="tx"><strong>Poblar cmdb_activos.coste_adquisicion (226 CIs)</strong>Solo 8 líneas de hardware tienen CAPEX (317.5K€). Los otros 218 CIs aparecen con CAPEX = 0. Imposible TCO real.</div>
      <div class="ac">SEED</div>
    </div>
    <div class="gap-item">
      <div class="ic">🤖</div>
      <div class="tx"><strong>Tabla agent_model_pricing + vista v_coste_ia_eur</strong>Hoy solo tenemos tokens. Necesitamos tarifa por modelo (Claude Sonnet $3/$15 per MTok) para mostrar IA en € real.</div>
      <div class="ac">CREAR</div>
    </div>
    <div class="gap-item">
      <div class="ic">📈</div>
      <div class="tx"><strong>Tabla gastos_mensuales (snapshot mensual + cron)</strong>Sin histórico mensual no hay burn rate, ni line chart 12M, ni forecast vs actual.</div>
      <div class="ac">CREAR</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RBAC TABLES (3) -->
  <div class="rbac-block" data-bg-roles="SUPERADMIN,CEO,CFO,CTO,AUDITOR">
    <h4>
      <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="11" width="18" height="11" rx="2"/><path d="M7 11V7a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v4"/></svg>
      Modelo RBAC económico (discovery primo)
      <span class="badge">23 roles · 175 usuarios</span>
    </h4>

    <div class="rbac-card">
      <div class="rb-h">
        <span class="nm">rbac_econ_scopes</span>
        <span class="pill">23 filas · 1 por rol</span>
      </div>
      <div class="rb-d">
        Matriz scope económico: <strong>WHAT</strong> ve (<code>ver_run_opex</code>, <code>ver_build_capex</code>, <code>ver_software</code>, <code>ver_labor</code>, <code>ver_ia</code>), <strong>WHO</strong> alcance (<code>scope_who</code> ∈ TODOS / MI_RAMA / MI_SILO / MI_EQUIPO / MIS_PROYECTOS / YO / NADIE), <strong>HOW</strong> (<code>ver_nombres</code>, <code>ver_facturas</code>, <code>ver_salario_ind</code>). <strong style="color:var(--acc-rd)">Solo CFO + SUPERADMIN tienen ver_salario_ind=true</strong>.
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="rbac-card">
      <div class="rb-h">
        <span class="nm">rbac_econ_silo_map</span>
        <span class="pill">~25 filas · M:N rol→silo</span>
      </div>
      <div class="rb-d">
        Mapeo entre roles departamentales y silos CMDB. Ej: <code>DIRECTOR_INFRA</code> → IT-INFRA + IT-RED + IT-CLOUD + IT-VIRTUAL · <code>DIRECTOR_SEC</code> → IT-SEGURIDAD · <code>VP_OPERATIONS</code> → 5 silos. Sin esto, scope <code>MI_RAMA</code> no sabría qué silos filtrar.
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="rbac-card">
      <div class="rb-h">
        <span class="nm">rbac_econ_audit_log</span>
        <span class="pill">append-only · LOPD</span>
      </div>
      <div class="rb-d">
        Audit log obligatorio para LOPD/RGPD y defensa TFM. Cada llamada a <code>/api/econ/*</code> escribe (<code>id_usuario, endpoint, scope_aplicado, filtros JSONB, filas_devueltas, ts, ip</code>). Indexado por usuario+ts y endpoint+ts.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
<!-- end Budget tab -->

    <h4>

    <div class="bg-strat-grid">

      </div>

<div class="tab-panel" id="cartera">

  <!-- Banner -->
  <div class="bg-scope-banner" style="margin:14px 18px 0">
    <div class="bg-scope-ic">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 19a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h5l2 3h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/></svg>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-scope-txt">
      <strong>Cartera BUILD</strong> — Los <strong>60 proyectos</strong> de inversión IT del banco cruzados por gate PMI (G0→G5), silo CMDB, gobernador, CPI/SPI, prioridad estratégica y riesgo. La matriz prioridad×riesgo y el funnel de gates revelan los cuellos de botella de la cartera.
    </div>
    <span class="bg-scope-tag" id="bg-cart-scope-tag">SCOPE: TODOS</span>
  </div>

  <!-- KPI strip -->
  <div class="bg-cart-strip">
    <div class="bg-cart-kpi">
      <div class="lbl">Proyectos BUILD</div>
      <div class="val">60</div>
      <div class="sub">8 silos CMDB</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-cart-kpi cy">
      <div class="lbl">BAC cartera</div>
      <div class="val">15.77 M€</div>
      <div class="sub">EAC est. 16.53 M€</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-cart-kpi gn">
      <div class="lbl">CPI medio ponderado</div>
      <div class="val" id="bg-cart-cpi">0.94</div>
      <div class="sub">rango 0.65 → 1.08</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-cart-kpi or">
      <div class="lbl">SPI medio ponderado</div>
      <div class="val" id="bg-cart-spi">0.96</div>
      <div class="sub">4 proyectos en retraso</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-cart-kpi rd">
      <div class="lbl">Proys críticos</div>
      <div class="val" id="bg-cart-rd">6</div>
      <div class="sub">CPI&lt;0.85 o riesgo 4</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-cart-kpi pu">
      <div class="lbl">IA champion</div>
      <div class="val" id="bg-cart-ai">23</div>
      <div class="sub">38% cartera con copiloto</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Filtros -->
  <div class="bg-cart-filters">
    <span class="lbl">Estado:</span>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip on" data-cart-st="all">Todos</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip gn" data-cart-st="gn">Sano</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip or" data-cart-st="or">Atención</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip rd" data-cart-st="rd">Crítico</button>
    <span class="lbl" style="margin-left:14px">Gate:</span>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip on" data-cart-gt="all">Todos</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-gt="G0">G0</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-gt="G1">G1</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-gt="G2">G2</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-gt="G3">G3</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-gt="G4">G4</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-gt="G5">G5</button>
    <span class="lbl" style="margin-left:14px">Silo:</span>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip on" data-cart-si="all">Todos</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-si="IT-INFRA">INFRA</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-si="IT-RED">RED</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-si="IT-CLOUD">CLOUD</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-si="IT-VIRTUAL">VIRT</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-si="IT-STORAGE">STO</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-si="IT-SEGURIDAD">SEG</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-si="IT-DATA">DATA</button>
    <button class="bg-cart-fchip" data-cart-si="IT-APPS">APPS</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Row: funnel + matriz -->
  <div class="bg-cart-main">
    <div class="bg-cart-panel">
      <h4>
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 3H2l8 9.46V19l4 2v-8.54z"/></svg>
        Funnel de gates G0 → G5 <span class="badge" id="bg-funnel-badge">60 proys</span>
      </h4>
      <div class="bg-funnel" id="bg-funnel"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="bg-cart-panel">
      <h4>
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><line x1="3" y1="9" x2="21" y2="9"/><line x1="3" y1="15" x2="21" y2="15"/><line x1="9" y1="3" x2="9" y2="21"/><line x1="15" y1="3" x2="15" y2="21"/></svg>
        Matriz prioridad × riesgo <span class="badge">click cuadrante</span>
      </h4>
      <div class="bg-matrix" id="bg-matrix">
        <div class="mx-ax"></div>
        <div class="mx-ax">R1 bajo</div>
        <div class="mx-ax">R2</div>
        <div class="mx-ax">R3</div>
        <div class="mx-ax">R4 alto</div>
        <div class="mx-ax" style="writing-mode:vertical-rl;transform:rotate(180deg)">P4 alta</div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-md" data-p="4" data-r="1" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(4,1)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-md" data-p="4" data-r="2" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(4,2)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-hi" data-p="4" data-r="3" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(4,3)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-hi" data-p="4" data-r="4" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(4,4)"></div>
        <div class="mx-ax" style="writing-mode:vertical-rl;transform:rotate(180deg)">P3</div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-lo" data-p="3" data-r="1" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(3,1)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-md" data-p="3" data-r="2" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(3,2)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-md" data-p="3" data-r="3" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(3,3)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-hi" data-p="3" data-r="4" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(3,4)"></div>
        <div class="mx-ax" style="writing-mode:vertical-rl;transform:rotate(180deg)">P2</div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-lo" data-p="2" data-r="1" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(2,1)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-lo" data-p="2" data-r="2" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(2,2)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-md" data-p="2" data-r="3" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(2,3)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-md" data-p="2" data-r="4" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(2,4)"></div>
        <div class="mx-ax" style="writing-mode:vertical-rl;transform:rotate(180deg)">P1 baja</div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-lo" data-p="1" data-r="1" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(1,1)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-lo" data-p="1" data-r="2" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(1,2)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-md" data-p="1" data-r="3" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(1,3)"></div>
        <div class="mx-cell q-md" data-p="1" data-r="4" onclick="bgRenderMatrixCell(1,4)"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Grid de todos los proyectos -->
  <div class="sec-title" style="margin-top:18px">
    <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
    Cartera completa <span id="bg-cart-count" style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--tx3);margin-left:8px;font-weight:700">· 60 proyectos visibles</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bg-cart-grid" id="bg-cart-grid"></div>
</div>
<div class="tab-panel" id="run">

  <!-- Banner contextual -->
  <div class="bg-scope-banner" style="margin:14px 18px 0">
    <div class="bg-scope-ic">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M8.5 14.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 0 11 12c0-1.38-.5-2-1-3-1.072-2.143-.224-4.054 2-6 .5 2.5 2 4.9 4 6.5 2 1.6 3 3.5 3 5.5a7 7 0 1 1-14 0c0-1.153.433-2.294 1-3a2.5 2.5 0 0 0 2.5 2.5z"/></svg>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-scope-txt">
      <strong>Mapa de calor RUN</strong> — Estado operacional de los <strong>226 CIs</strong> del banco cruzados por capa CMDB y criticidad. Cada celda suma CIs, OPEX mensual e incidencias abiertas. Las zonas calientes concentran los problemas y el coste.
    </div>
    <span class="bg-scope-tag" id="bg-run-scope-tag">SCOPE: TODOS</span>
  </div>

  <!-- KPI strip -->
  <div class="bg-run-strip">
    <div class="bg-run-kpi">
      <div class="lbl">CIs totales CMDB</div>
      <div class="val">226</div>
      <div class="sub">8 capas · 4 niveles criticidad</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-run-kpi cy">
      <div class="lbl">OPEX RUN mensual</div>
      <div class="val">619 k€</div>
      <div class="sub">7.43 M€/año</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-run-kpi rd">
      <div class="lbl">Incidencias abiertas</div>
      <div class="val">47</div>
      <div class="sub">8 P1 · 14 P2 · 25 P3</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-run-kpi or">
      <div class="lbl">MTTR medio</div>
      <div class="val">4h 12m</div>
      <div class="sub">SLO objetivo: 3h 00m</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-run-kpi gn">
      <div class="lbl">Uptime SLA banco</div>
      <div class="val">99.82%</div>
      <div class="sub">compromiso 99.9% · -0.08</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-run-kpi pu">
      <div class="lbl">Zonas calientes</div>
      <div class="val">5</div>
      <div class="sub">celdas con heat ≥ 70</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Filtros -->
  <div class="bg-run-filters">
    <span class="lbl">Vista:</span>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip on" data-run-view="heat">Heat</button>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip" data-run-view="opex">OPEX</button>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip" data-run-view="inc">Incidencias</button>
    <span class="lbl" style="margin-left:14px">Silo:</span>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip on" data-run-silo="all">Todos</button>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip" data-run-silo="IT-INFRA">INFRA</button>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip" data-run-silo="IT-RED">RED</button>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip" data-run-silo="IT-CLOUD">CLOUD</button>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip" data-run-silo="IT-VIRTUAL">VIRT</button>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip" data-run-silo="IT-STORAGE">STO</button>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip" data-run-silo="IT-SEGURIDAD">SEG</button>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip" data-run-silo="IT-DATA">DATA</button>
    <button class="bg-run-fchip" data-run-silo="IT-APPS">APPS</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Layout principal -->
  <div class="bg-run-main">

    <!-- Heatmap izquierdo -->
    <div class="bg-hm-wrap">
      <div class="bg-hm-hdr">
        <h4>Heatmap · capa CMDB × criticidad</h4>
        <div class="bg-hm-legend">
          <span>frío</span>
          <div class="bar"><span class="l0"></span><span class="l1"></span><span class="l2"></span><span class="l3"></span><span class="l4"></span><span class="l5"></span></div>
          <span>caliente</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-hm-grid" id="bg-hm-grid"><!-- Inyectado por JS --></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Columna derecha: top zonas + top CIs + incidencias -->
    <div class="bg-hm-side">
      <div class="bg-hm-panel">
        <h4>🔥 Top zonas calientes <span class="badge">5</span></h4>
        <div id="bg-hot-zones"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-hm-panel">
        <h4>📌 Top CIs por OPEX <span class="badge">10</span></h4>
        <div id="bg-hot-cis"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-hm-panel">
        <h4>🚨 Incidencias RUN abiertas <span class="badge">8 P1</span></h4>
        <div id="bg-open-incs"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Tabla CIs -->
  <div class="sec-title" style="margin-top:18px">
    <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="8" rx="2"/><rect x="2" y="14" width="20" height="8" rx="2"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="6.01" y2="6"/><line x1="6" y1="18" x2="6.01" y2="18"/></svg>
    Inventario CMDB · CIs detalle
  </div>
  <table class="bg-ci-tbl">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>CI</th><th>Nombre</th><th>Capa</th><th>Silo</th><th>Criticidad</th><th>OPEX/mes</th><th>Incid.</th><th>SLA</th><th>Owner</th><th>Estado</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody id="bg-ci-tbody"></tbody>
  </table>
</div>
<div class="tab-panel" id="gob">

  <!-- Banner contextual -->
  <div class="bg-scope-banner" style="margin:14px 18px 0">
    <div class="bg-scope-ic">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/></svg>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-scope-txt">
      <strong>Gobernadores 360</strong> — Vista transversal de los <strong>15 PMs activos</strong> que gobiernan proyectos BUILD, OPEX RUN y agentes IA del banco. Cada ficha cruza CPI/SPI EVM, capacidad asignada, riesgo agregado y adopción IA del equipo.
    </div>
    <span class="bg-scope-tag" id="bg-gob-scope-tag">SCOPE: TODOS</span>
  </div>

  <!-- KPI strip -->
  <div class="bg-gob-strip">
    <div class="bg-gob-kpi">
      <div class="lbl">Gobernadores activos</div>
      <div class="val" id="bg-gob-k1">15</div>
      <div class="sub">de 18 con plaza · 3 baja</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-gob-kpi cy">
      <div class="lbl">BAC gobernado</div>
      <div class="val">15.77 M€</div>
      <div class="sub">60 proyectos BUILD activos</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-gob-kpi gn">
      <div class="lbl">CPI medio ponderado</div>
      <div class="val">0.94</div>
      <div class="sub">▲ +0.03 vs mes anterior</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-gob-kpi or">
      <div class="lbl">Risk score medio</div>
      <div class="val">38<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--tx3)">/100</span></div>
      <div class="sub">3 PMs en zona crítica</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-gob-kpi pu">
      <div class="lbl">Adopción IA equipo</div>
      <div class="val">68%</div>
      <div class="sub">media téc. con copiloto activo</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Filtros -->
  <div class="bg-gob-filters">
    <span class="lbl">Filtrar:</span>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip on" data-gob-filter="all">Todos · 15</button>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip gn" data-gob-filter="gn">Sano · 7</button>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip or" data-gob-filter="or">Atención · 5</button>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip rd" data-gob-filter="rd">Crítico · 3</button>
    <span class="lbl" style="margin-left:14px">Silo:</span>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip" data-gob-silo="all">Todos</button>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip" data-gob-silo="IT-INFRA">IT-INFRA</button>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip" data-gob-silo="IT-RED">IT-RED</button>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip" data-gob-silo="IT-CLOUD">IT-CLOUD</button>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip" data-gob-silo="IT-DATA">IT-DATA</button>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip" data-gob-silo="IT-SEGURIDAD">IT-SEG</button>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip" data-gob-silo="IT-VIRTUAL">IT-VIRT</button>
    <button class="bg-gob-fchip" data-gob-silo="IT-STORAGE">IT-STO</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Grid de gobernadores -->
  <div class="bg-gob-grid" id="bg-gob-grid"><!-- Inyectado por JS --></div>

  <!-- Tabla comparativa -->
  <div class="sec-title" style="margin-top:18px">
    <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="3" y1="6" x2="21" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/><line x1="3" y1="18" x2="21" y2="18"/></svg>
    Tabla comparativa · scorecard global
  </div>
  <table class="bg-gob-tbl">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>Gobernador</th><th>Rol</th><th>Silo</th><th>Proys</th><th>BAC</th><th>CPI</th><th>SPI</th><th>Cap</th><th>Risk</th><th>IA%</th><th>Estado</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody id="bg-gob-tbl-body"><!-- Inyectado por JS --></tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<script>
// ═══════════════ THEME TOGGLE (default: dark) ═══════════════
(function(){
  try{
    var saved=localStorage.getItem('bg-theme');
    if(saved==='light') document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme','light');
  }catch(e){}
})();
function bgToggleTheme(){
  var h=document.documentElement;
  var nxt=h.getAttribute('data-theme')==='light'?'dark':'light';
  if(nxt==='light') h.setAttribute('data-theme','light'); else h.removeAttribute('data-theme');
  try{localStorage.setItem('bg-theme',nxt);}catch(e){}
}

// ═══════════════ TAB SWITCHER ═══════════════
document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(t=>{
  t.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
    t.classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById(t.dataset.tab).classList.add('active');
  });
});

// ═══════════════ EXEC DASH TOGGLE ═══════════════
function toggleDash(){
  document.getElementById('exec-dash').classList.toggle('collapsed');
}

// ═══════════════ RBAC ENGINE (bg- prefix) ═══════════════
// Perfiles de usuario — en producción vendrán de la tabla `usuarios` JOIN `rbac_roles`
const bgRoleProfiles = {
  SUPERADMIN:    {name:'Alex Núñez',         avatar:'AN', roleLabel:'SUPERADMIN · bypass',     desc:'Bypass total RBAC. Ve absolutamente todo, incluidos salarios individuales. Solo 1 usuario en el sistema.',                                       scope:'TODOS+',     rgpd:'✓ Salarios ind.', rgpdOk:true},
  CEO:           {name:'Alejandro Vidal',    avatar:'AV', roleLabel:'CEO · Banco',             desc:'Acceso a TODOS los datos económicos agregados (RUN+BUILD+IA). Salarios individuales bloqueados por RGPD.',                                       scope:'TODOS',      rgpd:'🔒 Sin salarios ind.', rgpdOk:false},
  CFO:           {name:'Francisco Herrera',  avatar:'FH', roleLabel:'CFO · Financiero',        desc:'Único rol con visibilidad de salarios individuales (ver_salario_ind=true). Acceso completo a facturas, OPEX, CAPEX y labor.',                    scope:'TODOS+SAL',  rgpd:'✓ Salarios ind.', rgpdOk:true},
  CTO:           {name:'Carmen Delgado',     avatar:'CD', roleLabel:'CTO · Tecnología',        desc:'Acceso económico completo a todos los silos IT. Sin salarios individuales. Ve facturas y nombres en facturas.',                                  scope:'TODOS',      rgpd:'🔒 Sin salarios ind.', rgpdOk:false},
  VP_OPERATIONS: {name:'Raúl Santos',        avatar:'RS', roleLabel:'VP_OPERATIONS',           desc:'Ve OPEX/CAPEX de los silos IT-INFRA, IT-RED, IT-CLOUD, IT-VIRTUAL, IT-STORAGE. Sin salarios. Top proyectos solo de su rama.',                     scope:'MI_RAMA',    rgpd:'🔒 Sin salarios ind.', rgpdOk:false},
  DIRECTOR_INFRA:{name:'Javier Iglesias',    avatar:'JI', roleLabel:'DIRECTOR_INFRA',          desc:'Ve OPEX/CAPEX de IT-INFRA + IT-RED + IT-CLOUD + IT-VIRTUAL. Sin salarios. Sin TCO global ni narrativa CEO.',                                      scope:'MI_RAMA',    rgpd:'🔒 Sin salarios ind.', rgpdOk:false},
  DIRECTOR_SEC:  {name:'Elena Marín',        avatar:'EM', roleLabel:'DIRECTOR_SEC',            desc:'Ve OPEX/CAPEX SOLO del silo IT-SEGURIDAD. Sin salarios. Sin BAC global del banco.',                                                              scope:'MI_SILO',    rgpd:'🔒 Sin salarios ind.', rgpdOk:false},
  PMO_SENIOR:    {name:'Pablo Rivas',        avatar:'PR', roleLabel:'PMO_SENIOR',              desc:'Ve BAC + composición + capacidad SOLO de los proyectos donde es responsable. Sin OPEX RUN. Sin TCO global. Sin salarios.',                       scope:'MIS_PROY',   rgpd:'🔒 Sin salarios ind.', rgpdOk:false},
  TEAM_LEAD:     {name:'Marta Núñez',        avatar:'MN', roleLabel:'TEAM_LEAD · Infra',       desc:'Ve capacidad + IA tokens SOLO de su equipo (~6-8 técnicos). Sin OPEX, sin BAC, sin TCO. Sin salarios.',                                          scope:'MI_EQUIPO',  rgpd:'🔒 Sin salarios ind.', rgpdOk:false},
  TECH_SENIOR:   {name:'Sandra Ortega',      avatar:'SO', roleLabel:'TECH_SENIOR',             desc:'Ve solo su consumo IA personal. Sin datos económicos del banco. Sin OPEX, sin BAC, sin capacidad agregada.',                                     scope:'YO',         rgpd:'🔒 Sin salarios ind.', rgpdOk:false},
  TECH_JUNIOR:   {name:'Adriana Suárez',     avatar:'AS', roleLabel:'TECH_JUNIOR',             desc:'Sin acceso a información económica. Esta pantalla NO debería mostrarse a su rol — solo se ve vacía como demostración del bloqueo RBAC.',         scope:'NADIE',      rgpd:'⛔ Bloqueado',          rgpdOk:false},
  AUDITOR:       {name:'Auditor LOPD',       avatar:'AL', roleLabel:'AUDITOR · read-only',     desc:'Lectura de TODOS los datos económicos + nombres + facturas, pero NO puede modificar nada. Acceso al audit log completo.',                        scope:'TODOS·RO',   rgpd:'🔒 Sin salarios ind.', rgpdOk:false}
};

function bgApplyRole(roleKey){
  const profile = bgRoleProfiles[roleKey];
  if(!profile) return;

  // Topbar session pill
  document.getElementById('bg-session-name').textContent = profile.name;
  document.getElementById('bg-session-role').textContent = profile.roleLabel;
  document.getElementById('bg-session-avatar').textContent = profile.avatar;

  // Scope banner
  document.getElementById('bg-scope-role-name').textContent = roleKey + ' — ' + profile.name;
  document.getElementById('bg-scope-desc').textContent = profile.desc;
  document.getElementById('bg-scope-tag').textContent = 'SCOPE: ' + profile.scope;
  const rgpd = document.getElementById('bg-scope-rgpd');
  rgpd.textContent = profile.rgpd;
  rgpd.style.background = profile.rgpdOk ? 'rgba(63,185,80,.12)' : 'rgba(248,81,73,.12)';
  rgpd.style.borderColor = profile.rgpdOk ? 'rgba(63,185,80,.35)' : 'rgba(248,81,73,.35)';
  rgpd.style.color = profile.rgpdOk ? 'var(--acc-gn)' : 'var(--acc-rd)';

  // Filter widgets by scope
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-bg-roles]').forEach(el=>{
    const allowed = el.dataset.bgRoles.split(',').map(s=>s.trim());
    if(allowed.includes(roleKey)) el.classList.remove('bg-blocked');
    else el.classList.add('bg-blocked');
  });

  // Empty state for scope=NADIE
  const noEcon = (profile.scope === 'NADIE');
  const budgetTab = document.getElementById('budget');
  let emptyMsg = document.getElementById('bg-empty-state');
  if(noEcon){
    if(!emptyMsg){
      emptyMsg = document.createElement('div');
      emptyMsg.id = 'bg-empty-state';
      emptyMsg.className = 'bg-empty';
      emptyMsg.innerHTML = '<div class="ic">🔒</div><h3>Sin permisos económicos</h3><p>Tu rol no tiene acceso a información económica del banco.<br>Habla con tu manager si necesitas elevación de scope.</p><p style="margin-top:10px"><code>RBAC scope: NADIE</code> · Bloqueado por <code>rbac_econ_scopes</code></p>';
      budgetTab.appendChild(emptyMsg);
    }
    emptyMsg.style.display='block';
  } else if(emptyMsg){
    emptyMsg.style.display='none';
  }
}

// ═══════════════ LOGIN / LOGOUT ═══════════════
document.querySelectorAll('.bg-login-card').forEach(c=>{
  c.addEventListener('click', async ()=>{
    const role = c.dataset.role;
    bgApplyRole(role);
    document.getElementById('bg-login-overlay').classList.add('hidden');
    // P97 FASE 5.1: login REAL contra /auth/login antes de cargar datos
    if(typeof p96AuthLogin==='function'){ await p96AuthLogin(role); }
    if(typeof p96BootstrapData==='function'){ await p96BootstrapData(); }
  });
});

// P97 F6 — al cargar la página, intentar hidratar desde el shell antes de pedir login
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async ()=>{
  if(typeof p96HydrateFromShell==='function'){
    const ok = await p96HydrateFromShell();
    if(ok && typeof p96BootstrapData==='function'){ await p96BootstrapData(); }
  }
});

document.getElementById('bg-session-logout').addEventListener('click',()=>{
  if(typeof p96Logout==='function'){ p96Logout(); }
  else { document.getElementById('bg-login-overlay').classList.remove('hidden'); }
});

// ═══════════════ MODALS ═══════════════

function bgFmtEur(n){return n.toLocaleString('es-ES')+' €';}
function bgCanSeeSalary(){return bgCurrentRole==='CFO'||bgCurrentRole==='SUPERADMIN';}

function bgOpenModal(html){
  document.getElementById('bg-modal-content').innerHTML = html;
  document.getElementById('bg-modal-overlay').classList.add('on');
}
function bgCloseModal(){
  document.getElementById('bg-modal-overlay').classList.remove('on');
}

function bgRenderProject(id){
  const p = bgProjectsData[id]; if(!p) return;
  const cpi = (p.ev/p.ac).toFixed(2);
  const spi = (p.ev/p.pv).toFixed(2);
  const eac = Math.round(p.bac/cpi);
  const cpiCls = cpi>=1?'gn':(cpi>=0.9?'or':'rd');
  const spiCls = spi>=1?'gn':(spi>=0.9?'or':'rd');
  const gatesHtml = ['G0','G1','G2','G3','G4','G5'].map(g=>`<span class="bg-gate ${p.gates[g]}">${g}</span>`).join('');
  const teamHtml = p.team.map(t=>`<div class="bg-team-card" onclick="bgRenderEmployee('${t.n}')"><div class="n">${t.n}</div><div class="r">${t.r} · ${t.cap}</div></div>`).join('');
  const risksHtml = p.risks.map(r=>`<div class="bg-risk-item ${r.lv}">${r.t}</div>`).join('');
  bgOpenModal(`
    <div class="bg-mh">
      <div>
        <div class="bg-mh-eyebrow">PROYECTO BUILD · ${id}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-title">${p.name}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-sub">Silo: ${p.silo} · PM: ${p.pm} · Gate actual: ${p.gate}</div>
      </div>
      <button class="bg-mh-close" onclick="bgCloseModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Earned Value Management</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat"><div class="k">BAC</div><div class="v">${bgFmtEur(p.bac)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${cpiCls}"><div class="k">CPI</div><div class="v">${cpi}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${spiCls}"><div class="k">SPI</div><div class="v">${spi}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="k">EV</div><div class="v">${bgFmtEur(p.ev)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="k">AC</div><div class="v">${bgFmtEur(p.ac)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="k">EAC</div><div class="v">${bgFmtEur(eac)}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Gates G0 → G5</div>
      <div class="bg-gates">${gatesHtml}</div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Equipo asignado (${p.team.length})</div>
      <div class="bg-team">${teamHtml}</div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Riesgos económicos</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-list">${risksHtml}</div>
      <div class="bg-audit">RBAC audit · ${bgCurrentRole} accedió a fichero proyecto ${id} · scope=${bgRoleProfiles[bgCurrentRole].scope} · ${new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES')} · log=rbac_econ_audit_log</div>
    </div>
  `);
}

function bgRenderLicense(id){
  const l = bgLicensesData[id]; if(!l) return;
  const stCls = l.status==='critical'?'rd':(l.status==='warn'?'or':'gn');
  const stTxt = l.status==='critical'?'Crítico':(l.status==='warn'?'Atención':'Vigente');
  const altsHtml = l.alts.map(a=>`<div class="bg-risk-item lo"><strong>${a.n}</strong> <span style="color:var(--acc-gn);font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;float:right">${a.save}</span></div>`).join('');
  bgOpenModal(`
    <div class="bg-mh">
      <div>
        <div class="bg-mh-eyebrow">LICENCIA / VENDOR · ${id}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-title">${l.name}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-sub">Vendor: ${l.vendor} · Silo: ${l.silo} · Owners: ${l.owners}</div>
      </div>
      <button class="bg-mh-close" onclick="bgCloseModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Datos económicos</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat"><div class="k">Coste anual</div><div class="v">${bgFmtEur(l.annual)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${stCls}"><div class="k">Estado</div><div class="v">${stTxt}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="k">Vencimiento</div><div class="v">${l.expires}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="k">CIs afectados</div><div class="v">${l.cis}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="k">Coste / CI</div><div class="v">${bgFmtEur(Math.round(l.annual/l.cis))}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat gn"><div class="k">Negociable</div><div class="v">${l.alts.length>0?'Sí':'No'}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Contrato</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-item lo">${l.contract}</div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Alternativas evaluadas</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-list">${altsHtml}</div>
      <div class="bg-audit">RBAC audit · ${bgCurrentRole} consultó licencia ${id} · scope=${bgRoleProfiles[bgCurrentRole].scope} · ${new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES')} · log=rbac_econ_audit_log</div>
    </div>
  `);
}

function bgRenderAgent(id){
  const a = bgAgentsData[id]; if(!a) return;
  const tkM = (a.tokens/1e6).toFixed(2);
  bgOpenModal(`
    <div class="bg-mh">
      <div>
        <div class="bg-mh-eyebrow">AGENTE IA · ${id}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-title">${a.name}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-sub">${a.type} · Modelo: ${a.model} · Owner: ${a.owner}</div>
      </div>
      <button class="bg-mh-close" onclick="bgCloseModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Descripción</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-item lo">${a.desc}</div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Consumo (últimos 18 días)</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat"><div class="k">Tokens totales</div><div class="v">${tkM} M</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="k">Conversaciones</div><div class="v">${a.convs.toLocaleString('es-ES')}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="k">Handoffs humano</div><div class="v">${a.handoffs}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${a.humanRate>'10'?'or':'gn'}"><div class="k">% intervención</div><div class="v">${a.humanRate}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="k">Coste estimado</div><div class="v">${bgFmtEur(a.cost)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat gn"><div class="k">Latencia P95</div><div class="v">${a.latencyP95}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Story IA vs Humano</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-item lo">El agente <strong>${a.name}</strong> ahorra aproximadamente <strong>${Math.round(a.convs*0.18)} h/semana</strong> de trabajo humano frente a un coste de <strong>${bgFmtEur(a.cost)}</strong> en el período. ROI estimado: <strong style="color:var(--acc-gn)">${Math.round((a.convs*0.18*45)/a.cost*100)}%</strong>.</div>
      <div class="bg-audit">RBAC audit · ${bgCurrentRole} consultó agente ${id} · scope=${bgRoleProfiles[bgCurrentRole].scope} · ${new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES')} · log=rbac_econ_audit_log</div>
    </div>
  `);
}

function bgRenderEmployee(name){
  const e = bgEmployeesData[name]; if(!e) return;
  const canSal = bgCanSeeSalary();
  const salHtml = canSal
    ? `<div class="bg-stat gn"><div class="k">Salario bruto/año</div><div class="v">${bgFmtEur(e.salary)}</div></div>`
    : `<div class="bg-stat bg-rgpd-blur"><div class="k">Salario bruto/año</div><div class="v">${bgFmtEur(e.salary)}</div></div>`;
  const projsHtml = e.projs.map(p=>`<span class="bg-gate done" onclick="bgRenderProject('${p}')" style="cursor:pointer">${p}</span>`).join('');
  bgOpenModal(`
    <div class="bg-mh">
      <div>
        <div class="bg-mh-eyebrow">EMPLEADO · ${e.role}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-title">${e.name}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-sub">Silo: ${e.silo} · Equipo: ${e.team} · Lead: ${e.lead}</div>
      </div>
      <button class="bg-mh-close" onclick="bgCloseModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Perfil</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat"><div class="k">Rol</div><div class="v">${e.role}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="k">Antigüedad</div><div class="v">${e.seniority}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="k">Capacidad asignada</div><div class="v">${e.cap}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Consumo IA personal</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="k">Tokens (mes)</div><div class="v">${e.iaTokens}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="k">Coste IA (mes)</div><div class="v">${bgFmtEur(e.iaCost)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat gn"><div class="k">Productividad</div><div class="v">+${Math.round(e.iaCost*0.8)}%</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Coste laboral ${canSal?'':'<span style="color:var(--acc-rd);font-size:9px;font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700">· RGPD: solo CFO + SUPERADMIN</span>'}</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        ${salHtml}
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Proyectos asignados</div>
      <div class="bg-gates">${projsHtml}</div>
      <div class="bg-audit">RBAC audit · ${bgCurrentRole} consultó empleado ${e.name} · ver_salario_ind=${canSal} · scope=${bgRoleProfiles[bgCurrentRole].scope} · ${new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES')} · log=rbac_econ_audit_log</div>
    </div>
  `);
}

// Wire alert-items click → modal por tipo
document.querySelectorAll('.alert-block[data-bg-modal-type]').forEach(block=>{
  const type = block.dataset.bgModalType;
  block.querySelectorAll('.alert-item').forEach(item=>{
    const idEl = item.querySelector('.id');
    if(!idEl) return;
    const id = idEl.textContent.trim();
    item.addEventListener('click',()=>{
      if(type==='project') bgRenderProject(id);
      else if(type==='license') bgRenderLicense(id);
      else if(type==='agent') bgRenderAgent(id);
    });
  });
});

// ═══════════════ GOBERNADORES 360 ═══════════════

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ═══ P97 FASE 5 — Loaders + adapters /api/p96/*               ═══
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// IMPORTANTE: el JSON del API usa snake_case (id_gov, av_cls, descripcion)
// y los renders del mockup esperan camelCase corto (id, avCls, desc).
// Por eso cada loader incluye un adapter que normaliza la forma del payload
// SIN tocar las funciones render. Es la única forma de respetar las dos
// zonas congeladas (backend p96_router.py + funciones render del mockup).

// ─── Auth real contra /auth/login (P97 F5.1) ───
const P96_ROLE_TO_EMAIL = {
  'SUPERADMIN':     'admin',
  'CEO':            'alejandro.vidal@cognitivepmo.com',
  'CFO':            'francisco.herrera@cognitivepmo.com',
  'CTO':            'carmen.delgado@cognitivepmo.com',
  'CIO':            'roberto.navarro@cognitivepmo.com',
  'CISO':           'elena.marquez@cognitivepmo.com',
  'VP_PMO':         'gonzalo.fernandez@cognitivepmo.com',
  'VP_ENGINEERING': 'miguelangel.ruiz@cognitivepmo.com',
  'VP_OPERATIONS':  'patricia.lopez@cognitivepmo.com',
  'DIRECTOR_INFRA': 'javier.iglesias@cognitivepmo.com',
  'DIRECTOR_SEC':   'marta.fuentes@cognitivepmo.com',
  'DIRECTOR_DATA':  'oscar.blanco@cognitivepmo.com',
  'DIRECTOR_IT':    'laura.sanz@cognitivepmo.com',
  'PMO_SENIOR':     'pablo.rivas@cognitivepmo.com',
  'PMO_JUNIOR':     'pablo.rivas@cognitivepmo.com',
  'AUDITOR':        'auditor.externo@cognitivepmo.com',
  'TEAM_LEAD':      'diana.sanchez@cognitivepmo.com',
  'QA_LEAD':        'diana.sanchez@cognitivepmo.com',
  'DEVOPS_LEAD':    'diana.sanchez@cognitivepmo.com',
  'TECH_SENIOR':    'sandra.ortega@cognitivepmo.com',
  'TECH_JUNIOR':    'adriana.suarez@cognitivepmo.com',
  'OBSERVADOR':     'auditor.externo@cognitivepmo.com',
  'READONLY':       'auditor.externo@cognitivepmo.com',
};

async function p96AuthLogin(roleCode){
  const email = P96_ROLE_TO_EMAIL[roleCode];
  if(!email){ console.warn('[p96] no email mapping for role', roleCode); return false; }
  try{
    const r = await fetch('/auth/login', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({email, password: '12345'})
    });
    if(!r.ok){ console.warn('[p96] auth/login failed', r.status, 'for', email); return false; }
    const data = await r.json();
    if(data && data.token){
      sessionStorage.setItem('p96_token', data.token);
      console.log('[p96] login OK as', roleCode, '·', email);
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }catch(e){ console.warn('[p96] auth/login err', e); return false; }
}

function p96Fetch(url, opts){
  const tok = sessionStorage.getItem('p96_token');
  const headers = Object.assign({}, (opts && opts.headers) || {});
  if(tok){ headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + tok; }
  return fetch(url, Object.assign({}, opts || {}, {headers}));
}

// P97 F6 — hidratación desde el shell (skip re-login si ya hay token válido)
async function p96HydrateFromShell(){
  const tok = sessionStorage.getItem('p96_token');
  if(!tok) return false;
  try{
    const r = await fetch('/api/me', { headers: {'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok} });
    if(!r.ok){ console.warn('[p96] /api/me failed', r.status); return false; }
    const me = await r.json();
    if(!me.p96_allowed){ console.warn('[p96] role not allowed', me.role_code); return false; }
    sessionStorage.setItem('p96_me', JSON.stringify(me));
    if(typeof bgApplyRole==='function'){ bgApplyRole(me.role_code); }
    const ov = document.getElementById('bg-login-overlay');
    if(ov) ov.classList.add('hidden');
    console.log('[p96] hydrated from shell as', me.role_code, '·', me.email);
    return true;
  }catch(e){ console.warn('[p96] hydrate err', e); return false; }
}

// P97 F6 — logout: limpia token y vuelve al shell
function p96Logout(){
  sessionStorage.removeItem('p96_token');
  sessionStorage.removeItem('p96_me');
  window.location.href = '/';
}

let bgGovernorsData = [];
async function p96LoadGovernors(){
  try{
    const r = await p96Fetch('/api/p96/governors');
    if(!r.ok){ console.warn('[p96] governors', r.status); return; }
    const data = await r.json();
    bgGovernorsData = data.map(g => ({
      id: g.id_gov, name: g.nombre, role: g.role_code, silo: g.silo,
      avCls: g.av_cls, projs: g.projs, bac: parseFloat(g.bac),
      cpi: parseFloat(g.cpi), spi: parseFloat(g.spi),
      cap: g.cap, risk: g.risk, ia: g.ia, status: g.status,
      spark: g.spark || [], team: g.team, ai_lead: g.ai_lead,
      desc: g.descripcion
    }));
  }catch(e){ console.warn('[p96] governors fetch err', e); }
}

// FIX BUG 1 (P97 F5.2): bgRunMatrix necesita shape válida ANTES del auto-render
// del heatmap (línea ~2691: bgRenderHeatmap() corre al cargar el script y hace
// bgRunMatrix[lay.k][cr.k]). Sin pre-inicialización lanza TypeError → el script
// aborta desde la línea 2691 → todas las declaraciones posteriores (incluido
// `let bgCartFS=...` en línea 2905) NUNCA se ejecutan → BUGS 2 y 3 en cascada
// (TDZ de bgCartFS al hacer bgRenderCartera, y bgRenderPulso nunca se autoejecuta).
// Pre-inicializamos con 8 layers × 4 crits vacías para que el auto-render NO
// crashee. Tras el bootstrap, los datos reales del API sobrescriben.
let bgRunMatrix = (function(){
  const empty = {cis:0, opex:0, inc:0, heat:0};
  const m = {};
  ['INFRA','RED','CLOUD','VIRT','STO','SEC','DATA','APPS'].forEach(l => {
    m[l] = {};
    ['C1','C2','C3','C4'].forEach(c => { m[l][c] = Object.assign({}, empty); });
  });
  return m;
})();

async function p96LoadRunMatrix(){
  try{
    const r = await p96Fetch('/api/p96/run/matrix');
    if(!r.ok){ console.warn('[p96] run/matrix', r.status); return; }
    const rows = await r.json();
    // API devuelve array de filas; el mockup espera bgRunMatrix[layer][crit] = {cis,opex,inc,heat}
    const m = {};
    rows.forEach(row => {
      if(!m[row.layer]) m[row.layer] = {};
      m[row.layer][row.crit] = {
        cis: row.cis, opex: parseFloat(row.opex), inc: row.inc, heat: row.heat
      };
    });
    bgRunMatrix = m;
  }catch(e){ console.warn('[p96] run/matrix fetch err', e); }
}

let bgPortfolio = [];
async function p96LoadBuildPortfolio(){
  try{
    const r = await p96Fetch('/api/p96/build/portfolio');
    if(!r.ok){ console.warn('[p96] build/portfolio', r.status); return; }
    const data = await r.json();
    // API devuelve array de objetos con prio en texto. Mockup espera tuplas con prio numérica.
    const prioMap = {'Crítica':4, 'Critica':4, 'Alta':3, 'Media':2, 'Baja':1};
    bgPortfolio = data.map(p => [
      p.id_proyecto,
      p.nombre,
      p.silo,
      p.pm,
      parseInt(p.bac_k) || 0,
      p.gate,
      parseFloat(p.cpi),
      parseFloat(p.spi),
      prioMap[p.prio] || 2,
      parseInt(p.risk) || 0,
      parseInt(p.prog) || 0,
      !!p.ai_lead
    ]);
  }catch(e){ console.warn('[p96] build/portfolio fetch err', e); }
}

let bgPulseKPIs = [];

  try{
    const r = await p96Fetch('/api/p96/pulse/kpis');
    if(!r.ok){ console.warn('[p96] pulse/kpis', r.status); return; }
    bgPulseKPIs = await r.json();   // schema MATCH directo (k,lb,vl,un,rag,sub,tt)
  }catch(e){ console.warn('[p96] pulse/kpis fetch err', e); }
}

let bgStratData = { dafo:null, pestle:null, porter:null, okr:null };
async function p96LoadStrategy(){
  const ks = ['dafo','pestle','porter','okr'];
  try{
    const results = await Promise.all(ks.map(k =>
      p96Fetch(`/api/p96/strategy/${k}`)
        .then(r => r.ok ? r.json() : null)
        .catch(() => null)
    ));
    ks.forEach((k,i) => { bgStratData[k] = results[i]; });
  }catch(e){ console.warn('[p96] strategy fetch err', e); }
}

// Lazy loaders (no se ejecutan en bootstrap, sólo on-demand desde clicks)
async function p96LoadRunCisByLayer(layer){
  try{
    const r = await p96Fetch(`/api/p96/run/cis/${encodeURIComponent(layer)}`);
    return r.ok ? await r.json() : [];
  }catch(e){ console.warn('[p96] run/cis fetch err', e); return []; }
}
async function p96LoadRunIncidents(){
  try{
    const r = await p96Fetch('/api/p96/run/incidents');
    return r.ok ? await r.json() : [];
  }catch(e){ console.warn('[p96] run/incidents fetch err', e); return []; }
}
async function p96LoadProjectDetail(id){
  try{
    const r = await p96Fetch(`/api/p96/build/project/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`);
    return r.ok ? await r.json() : null;
  }catch(e){ console.warn('[p96] project detail fetch err', e); return null; }
}

// Bootstrap unificado: se llama tras login en bgApplyRole
async function p96BootstrapData(){
  await Promise.all([
    p96LoadGovernors(),
    p96LoadRunMatrix(),
    p96LoadBuildPortfolio(),
    p96LoadPulseKPIs(),
    p96LoadPulseAlerts(),
    p96LoadPulseBlocks(),
    p96LoadPulseDecisions(),
    p96LoadPulseResponsables(),
    p96LoadPulseHitos(),
    p96LoadStrategy(),
  ]);
  // Re-render de las pestañas que se auto-pintan al cargar el script
  if(typeof bgRenderGobGrid==='function')  bgRenderGobGrid();
  if(typeof bgRenderHeatmap==='function')  bgRenderHeatmap();
  if(typeof bgRenderCartera==='function')  bgRenderCartera();
  if(typeof bgRenderPulso==='function')    bgRenderPulso();
  console.log('[p96] bootstrap complete: governors=', bgGovernorsData.length,
              'portfolio=', bgPortfolio.length, 'kpis=', bgPulseKPIs.length);
}
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ═══ END P97 FASE 5                                            ═══
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


function bgGobBarColor(v,inv){
  if(inv){if(v>=70)return 'var(--acc-rd)';if(v>=40)return 'var(--acc-or)';return 'var(--acc-gn)';}
  if(v>=90)return 'var(--acc-gn)';if(v>=75)return 'var(--acc-bl)';if(v>=60)return 'var(--acc-or)';return 'var(--acc-rd)';
}

function bgRenderGobGrid(){
  const grid = document.getElementById('bg-gob-grid');
  const tbody = document.getElementById('bg-gob-tbl-body');
  if(!grid||!tbody) return;
  grid.innerHTML = bgGovernorsData.map(g=>{
    const sparkMax = Math.max(...g.spark);
    const sparkHtml = g.spark.map(v=>`<span style="height:${(v/sparkMax)*100}%"></span>`).join('');
    const cpiCls = g.cpi>=1?'gn':(g.cpi>=0.9?'or':'rd');
    const spiCls = g.spi>=1?'gn':(g.spi>=0.9?'or':'rd');
    const capCls = g.cap>100?'rd':(g.cap>=85?'or':'gn');
    const riskCls = g.risk>=60?'rd':(g.risk>=35?'or':'gn');
    return `
      <div class="bg-gob-card ${g.status}" data-status="${g.status}" data-silo="${g.silo}" onclick="bgRenderGovernor('${g.id}')">
        <div class="bg-gc-hdr">
          <div class="bg-gc-av ${g.avCls}">${g.name.split(' ').map(s=>s[0]).join('').slice(0,2)}</div>
          <div class="bg-gc-id">
            <div class="bg-gc-name">${g.name}${g.ai_lead?' <span style="color:var(--acc-pu);font-size:9px">★</span>':''}</div>
            <div class="bg-gc-role">${g.role} · ${g.id}</div>
          </div>
          <span class="bg-gc-silo">${g.silo}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-gc-mtrx">
          <div class="bg-gc-m ${cpiCls}"><div class="k">CPI</div><div class="v">${g.cpi.toFixed(2)}</div></div>
          <div class="bg-gc-m ${spiCls}"><div class="k">SPI</div><div class="v">${g.spi.toFixed(2)}</div></div>
          <div class="bg-gc-m ${capCls}"><div class="k">CAP</div><div class="v">${g.cap}%</div></div>
          <div class="bg-gc-m ${riskCls}"><div class="k">RISK</div><div class="v">${g.risk}</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-gc-bars">
          <div class="bg-gc-bar"><span class="l">Capacidad</span><span class="t"><span style="width:${Math.min(g.cap,100)}%;background:${bgGobBarColor(g.cap,true)}"></span></span><span class="v">${g.cap}%</span></div>
          <div class="bg-gc-bar"><span class="l">Risk</span><span class="t"><span style="width:${g.risk}%;background:${bgGobBarColor(g.risk,true)}"></span></span><span class="v">${g.risk}/100</span></div>
          <div class="bg-gc-bar"><span class="l">Adop. IA</span><span class="t"><span style="width:${g.ia}%;background:var(--acc-pu)"></span></span><span class="v">${g.ia}%</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-gc-spark">${sparkHtml}</div>
        <div class="bg-gc-foot">
          <span class="pj">${g.projs} proys · ${g.team} téc.</span>
          <span class="bac">${g.bac.toFixed(2)} M€</span>
        </div>
      </div>`;
  }).join('');

  tbody.innerHTML = bgGovernorsData.map(g=>{
    const cpiCls = g.cpi>=1?'gn':(g.cpi>=0.9?'or':'rd');
    const spiCls = g.spi>=1?'gn':(g.spi>=0.9?'or':'rd');
    const stTxt = g.status==='gn'?'Sano':(g.status==='or'?'Atención':'Crítico');
    return `<tr data-status="${g.status}" data-silo="${g.silo}" onclick="bgRenderGovernor('${g.id}')">
      <td class="name">${g.name}</td>
      <td>${g.role}</td>
      <td>${g.silo}</td>
      <td>${g.projs}</td>
      <td>${g.bac.toFixed(2)} M€</td>
      <td><span class="px ${cpiCls}">${g.cpi.toFixed(2)}</span></td>
      <td><span class="px ${spiCls}">${g.spi.toFixed(2)}</span></td>
      <td>${g.cap}%</td>
      <td>${g.risk}</td>
      <td>${g.ia}%</td>
      <td><span class="px ${g.status}">${stTxt}</span></td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
}
bgRenderGobGrid();

let bgGobFilterStatus = 'all', bgGobFilterSilo = 'all';
function bgGobApplyFilters(){
  document.querySelectorAll('#bg-gob-grid .bg-gob-card').forEach(c=>{
    const okS = bgGobFilterStatus==='all' || c.dataset.status===bgGobFilterStatus;
    const okSi= bgGobFilterSilo==='all'   || c.dataset.silo  ===bgGobFilterSilo;
    c.classList.toggle('dim', !(okS && okSi));
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('#bg-gob-tbl-body tr').forEach(r=>{
    const okS = bgGobFilterStatus==='all' || r.dataset.status===bgGobFilterStatus;
    const okSi= bgGobFilterSilo==='all'   || r.dataset.silo  ===bgGobFilterSilo;
    r.style.display = (okS && okSi) ? '' : 'none';
  });
}
document.querySelectorAll('[data-gob-filter]').forEach(b=>{
  b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-gob-filter]').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));
    b.classList.add('on');
    bgGobFilterStatus = b.dataset.gobFilter;
    bgGobApplyFilters();
  });
});
document.querySelectorAll('[data-gob-silo]').forEach(b=>{
  b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-gob-silo]').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));
    b.classList.add('on');
    bgGobFilterSilo = b.dataset.gobSilo;
    bgGobApplyFilters();
  });
});

function bgRenderGovernor(id){
  const g = bgGovernorsData.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!g) return;
  const eac = Math.round(g.bac*1e6/g.cpi);
  const cpiCls = g.cpi>=1?'gn':(g.cpi>=0.9?'or':'rd');
  const spiCls = g.spi>=1?'gn':(g.spi>=0.9?'or':'rd');
  const riskCls = g.risk>=60?'rd':(g.risk>=35?'or':'gn');
  const stTxt = g.status==='gn'?'Sano':(g.status==='or'?'Atención requerida':'Crítico');
  bgOpenModal(`
    <div class="bg-mh">
      <div>
        <div class="bg-mh-eyebrow">GOBERNADOR · ${g.id}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-title">${g.name} ${g.ai_lead?'<span style="color:var(--acc-pu);font-size:11px">★ IA Champion</span>':''}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-sub">${g.role} · Silo: ${g.silo} · Equipo: ${g.team} técnicos · Estado: <strong style="color:var(--acc-${g.status==='gn'?'gn':(g.status==='or'?'or':'rd')})">${stTxt}</strong></div>
      </div>
      <button class="bg-mh-close" onclick="bgCloseModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Perfil</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-item lo">${g.desc}</div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Cartera gobernada</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat"><div class="k">Proyectos BUILD</div><div class="v">${g.projs}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="k">BAC gobernado</div><div class="v">${g.bac.toFixed(2)} M€</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="k">EAC estimado</div><div class="v">${(eac/1e6).toFixed(2)} M€</div></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Performance EVM</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat ${cpiCls}"><div class="k">CPI medio</div><div class="v">${g.cpi.toFixed(2)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${spiCls}"><div class="k">SPI medio</div><div class="v">${g.spi.toFixed(2)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${riskCls}"><div class="k">Risk score</div><div class="v">${g.risk}/100</div></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Capacidad y adopción IA</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat ${g.cap>100?'rd':(g.cap>=85?'or':'gn')}"><div class="k">Capacidad asignada</div><div class="v">${g.cap}%</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="k">Adopción IA equipo</div><div class="v">${g.ia}%</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${g.ai_lead?'gn':'cy'}"><div class="k">IA Champion</div><div class="v">${g.ai_lead?'Sí':'No'}</div></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Riesgos y alertas del gobernador</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-list">
        ${g.cpi<0.9?'<div class="bg-risk-item hi">CPI por debajo de 0.90 — sobrecoste estructural en su cartera.</div>':''}
        ${g.spi<0.9?'<div class="bg-risk-item hi">SPI por debajo de 0.90 — retraso significativo en planificación.</div>':''}
        ${g.cap>100?'<div class="bg-risk-item hi">Capacidad asignada > 100% — riesgo de saturación y burnout del equipo.</div>':''}
        ${g.risk>=60?'<div class="bg-risk-item hi">Risk score crítico (≥60). Recomendación: revisión semanal con CTO.</div>':''}
        ${g.ia<65?'<div class="bg-risk-item lo">Adopción IA por debajo de la media del banco (68%). Plan de formación recomendado.</div>':''}
        ${g.cpi>=1&&g.spi>=1&&g.risk<35?'<div class="bg-risk-item lo">✓ Gobernador en zona verde en todas las dimensiones.</div>':''}
      </div>

      <div class="bg-audit">RBAC audit · ${bgCurrentRole} consultó gobernador ${g.id} · ${g.name} · scope=${bgRoleProfiles[bgCurrentRole].scope} · ${new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES')} · log=rbac_econ_audit_log</div>
    </div>
  `);
}

// ═══════════════ MAPA DE CALOR RUN ═══════════════
const bgRunLayers = [
  {k:'INFRA', label:'IT-INFRA',      sub:'servidores físicos',  cls:'c-infra', silo:'IT-INFRA'},
  {k:'RED',   label:'IT-RED',        sub:'networking L2/L3',    cls:'c-red',   silo:'IT-RED'},
  {k:'CLOUD', label:'IT-CLOUD',      sub:'SaaS/IaaS/PaaS',      cls:'c-cloud', silo:'IT-CLOUD'},
  {k:'VIRT',  label:'IT-VIRTUAL',    sub:'hypervisors VMs',     cls:'c-virt',  silo:'IT-VIRTUAL'},
  {k:'STO',   label:'IT-STORAGE',    sub:'cabinas backup',      cls:'c-sto',   silo:'IT-STORAGE'},
  {k:'SEC',   label:'IT-SEGURIDAD',  sub:'FW · SOC · IAM',      cls:'c-sec',   silo:'IT-SEGURIDAD'},
  {k:'DATA',  label:'IT-DATA',       sub:'BBDD · DW · lake',    cls:'c-data',  silo:'IT-DATA'},
  {k:'APPS',  label:'IT-APPS',       sub:'aplicaciones banca',  cls:'c-apps',  silo:'IT-APPS'}
];
const bgRunCrits = [
  {k:'C1', label:'C1', sub:'crítico máx.'},
  {k:'C2', label:'C2', sub:'alto'},
  {k:'C3', label:'C3', sub:'medio'},
  {k:'C4', label:'C4', sub:'bajo'}
];
// Matriz [capa][criticidad] = {cis, opex_m(€/mes), inc(abiertas), heat(0-100)}

// CIs representativos (una muestra por celda)
const bgCIsData = {
  'CI-001':{id:'CI-001',name:'prod-db-core-01',     layer:'DATA', crit:'C1',silo:'IT-DATA',      type:'PostgreSQL 15 primary',    vendor:'PostgreSQL',opex:18400,inc:2,sla:99.95,slo:99.99,owner:'Daniel Pérez',room:'CPD Principal · rack B07',runbook:'RB-DB-001'},
  'CI-002':{id:'CI-002',name:'prod-oracle-rac-01',  layer:'DATA', crit:'C1',silo:'IT-DATA',      type:'Oracle RAC 2-node',        vendor:'Oracle',    opex:26800,inc:1,sla:99.92,slo:99.99,owner:'Daniel Pérez',room:'CPD Principal · rack B09',runbook:'RB-DB-002'},
  'CI-003':{id:'CI-003',name:'core-banking-app',    layer:'APPS', crit:'C1',silo:'IT-APPS',      type:'Cluster T24 Temenos',      vendor:'Temenos',   opex:24500,inc:3,sla:99.88,slo:99.99,owner:'Raúl Santos',  room:'CPD Principal · blade 12',runbook:'RB-APP-001'},
  'CI-004':{id:'CI-004',name:'prod-fw-cluster-01',  layer:'SEC',  crit:'C1',silo:'IT-SEGURIDAD', type:'Palo Alto PA-5450 HA',     vendor:'Palo Alto', opex:22400,inc:1,sla:99.98,slo:99.99,owner:'Elena Marín',  room:'CPD Principal · perimeter',runbook:'RB-SEC-001'},
  'CI-005':{id:'CI-005',name:'prod-k8s-cluster-01', layer:'CLOUD',crit:'C1',silo:'IT-CLOUD',     type:'OpenShift 4.14 · 12 nodos',vendor:'Red Hat',   opex:31200,inc:2,sla:99.87,slo:99.95,owner:'Hugo Ramos',   room:'CPD Principal · rack C05',runbook:'RB-CLD-001'},
  'CI-006':{id:'CI-006',name:'core-switch-bbn-01',  layer:'RED',  crit:'C1',silo:'IT-RED',       type:'Cisco Nexus 9500',         vendor:'Cisco',     opex:18200,inc:1,sla:99.96,slo:99.99,owner:'Carlos Vega',  room:'CPD Principal · rack A01',runbook:'RB-RED-001'},
  'CI-007':{id:'CI-007',name:'vnx-cabina-prod-01',  layer:'STO',  crit:'C1',silo:'IT-STORAGE',   type:'NetApp AFF A800 · 240TB',  vendor:'NetApp',    opex:19800,inc:1,sla:99.94,slo:99.99,owner:'Inés Carmona', room:'CPD Principal · rack D02',runbook:'RB-STO-001'},
  'CI-008':{id:'CI-008',name:'esxi-host-pool-01',   layer:'VIRT', crit:'C1',silo:'IT-VIRTUAL',   type:'VMware ESXi 8 · 8 hosts',  vendor:'VMware',    opex:17400,inc:0,sla:99.97,slo:99.99,owner:'Marta Núñez',  room:'CPD Principal · rack B11',runbook:'RB-VRT-001'},
  'CI-009':{id:'CI-009',name:'prod-win-ad-01',      layer:'INFRA',crit:'C1',silo:'IT-INFRA',     type:'Windows Server AD DC',     vendor:'Microsoft', opex:14600,inc:1,sla:99.99,slo:99.99,owner:'Javier Iglesias',room:'CPD Principal · blade 04',runbook:'RB-INF-001'},
  'CI-010':{id:'CI-010',name:'prod-webfront-lb-01', layer:'APPS', crit:'C2',silo:'IT-APPS',      type:'F5 BIG-IP LB',             vendor:'F5',        opex:12800,inc:2,sla:99.82,slo:99.9, owner:'Raúl Santos',  room:'CPD Principal · rack A05',runbook:'RB-APP-002'},
  'CI-011':{id:'CI-011',name:'prod-siem-splunk-01', layer:'SEC',  crit:'C1',silo:'IT-SEGURIDAD', type:'Splunk Enterprise ingest', vendor:'Splunk',    opex:16900,inc:1,sla:99.91,slo:99.95,owner:'Diego Soler',  room:'CPD Principal · rack F02',runbook:'RB-SEC-002'},
  'CI-012':{id:'CI-012',name:'prod-dw-fabric-01',   layer:'DATA', crit:'C1',silo:'IT-DATA',      type:'Microsoft Fabric F64',     vendor:'Microsoft', opex:28400,inc:0,sla:99.93,slo:99.95,owner:'Sandra Ortega',room:'Azure West Europe',      runbook:'RB-DB-003'}
};

// Incidencias RUN abiertas
const bgIncidentsData = {
  'INC-4521':{id:'INC-4521',title:'Latencia alta en cluster OpenShift — pods API core', prio:'P1', status:'open', ci:'CI-005', opened:'2026-04-07 07:42', sla:'2h', impact:'Degradación API app móvil · 12k usuarios', owner:'Hugo Ramos', team:'SRE Cloud', steps:[{tm:'07:42',tx:'Alerta Prometheus: api-core latency p99 >2s',cls:'done'},{tm:'07:58',tx:'Triaje AG-002 · handoff a SRE Cloud',cls:'done'},{tm:'08:15',tx:'Investigación en curso · sospecha de ETCD quorum',cls:'now'}]},
  'INC-4522':{id:'INC-4522',title:'Caída intermitente core-banking · timeouts T24',   prio:'P1', status:'wip',  ci:'CI-003', opened:'2026-04-07 06:18', sla:'1h', impact:'Transferencias SEPA con retraso · 340 ops afectadas', owner:'Raúl Santos', team:'Core Banking', steps:[{tm:'06:18',tx:'Alerta por timeouts de DB connection pool',cls:'done'},{tm:'06:25',tx:'Escalado a nivel 2 · Core Banking',cls:'done'},{tm:'06:40',tx:'Restart pool + hotfix conexiones Oracle',cls:'done'},{tm:'07:05',tx:'Monitorización estabilidad · sin nuevas incidencias',cls:'now'}]},
  'INC-4523':{id:'INC-4523',title:'Firewall PA-5450 B rama pasiva no sincroniza HA',   prio:'P2', status:'wip',  ci:'CI-004', opened:'2026-04-07 05:55', sla:'4h', impact:'Sin impacto usuario · perdida de redundancia perimetral', owner:'Elena Marín', team:'SecOps', steps:[{tm:'05:55',tx:'Alerta HA-sync fail entre nodos activo/pasivo',cls:'done'},{tm:'06:12',tx:'Apertura TAC Palo Alto',cls:'done'},{tm:'07:30',tx:'Intercambio de diagnósticos con TAC',cls:'now'}]},
  'INC-4524':{id:'INC-4524',title:'Degradación SQL queries en Oracle RAC · espera IO', prio:'P2', status:'open', ci:'CI-002', opened:'2026-04-07 04:02', sla:'4h', impact:'Reporting tarda 3x más · BI afectado', owner:'Daniel Pérez', team:'DBA', steps:[{tm:'04:02',tx:'Alerta por waits en IO · AWR reporting',cls:'done'},{tm:'04:30',tx:'Análisis en curso · sospecha de cabina saturada',cls:'now'}]},
  'INC-4525':{id:'INC-4525',title:'NetApp AFF A800 · aggregate 85% lleno',             prio:'P3', status:'mon',  ci:'CI-007', opened:'2026-04-06 22:15', sla:'24h',impact:'Sin impacto actual · riesgo de saturación', owner:'Inés Carmona', team:'Storage', steps:[{tm:'22:15',tx:'Alerta threshold 85% disparada',cls:'done'},{tm:'2026-04-07 08:00',tx:'Planificación de expansión aggregate',cls:'now'}]}
};

function bgFmtK(n){return n>=1000?(n/1000).toFixed(1)+'k':n.toString();}
function bgFmtOpex(n){return (n/1000).toFixed(1)+'k€';}

function bgHeatLevel(h){
  if(h>=80)return 'l5';
  if(h>=65)return 'l4';
  if(h>=45)return 'l3';
  if(h>=25)return 'l2';
