```html
  if(h>=10)return 'l1';
  return 'l0';
}

function bgRenderHeatmap(){
  const grid = document.getElementById('bg-hm-grid');
  if(!grid) return;
  let html = '<div class="bg-hm-col-hdr"></div>';
  bgRunCrits.forEach(c=>{ html += `<div class="bg-hm-col-hdr">${c.label}<span class="sub">${c.sub}</span></div>`; });
  bgRunLayers.forEach(lay=>{
    html += `<div class="bg-hm-row-hdr ${lay.cls}">${lay.label}<span class="sub">${lay.sub}</span></div>`;
    bgRunCrits.forEach(cr=>{
      const cell = bgRunMatrix[lay.k][cr.k];
      const lvl = bgHeatLevel(cell.heat);
      const hot = cell.inc>=3?'hot':'';
      html += `<div class="bg-hm-cell ${lvl}" data-layer="${lay.k}" data-crit="${cr.k}" data-silo="${lay.silo}" onclick="bgRenderZone('${lay.k}','${cr.k}')">
        <div class="inc ${hot}">${cell.inc} inc</div>
        <div class="n">${cell.cis}<span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);margin-left:3px">CIs</span></div>
        <div class="cost">${bgFmtOpex(cell.opex)}/mes · heat ${cell.heat}</div>
      </div>`;
    });
  });
  grid.innerHTML = html;

  // Top zonas calientes (top 5)
  const zones = [];
  bgRunLayers.forEach(l=>bgRunCrits.forEach(c=>zones.push({l:l.k,lb:l.label,c:c.k,...bgRunMatrix[l.k][c.k]})));
  zones.sort((a,b)=>b.heat-a.heat);
  document.getElementById('bg-hot-zones').innerHTML = zones.slice(0,5).map((z,i)=>{
    const cls = z.heat>=70?'rd':'or';
    return `<div class="bg-hot-item" onclick="bgRenderZone('${z.l}','${z.c}')">
      <span class="rk">#${i+1}</span>
      <span class="nm">${z.lb} · ${z.c}<span class="t">${z.cis} CIs · ${z.inc} inc · ${bgFmtOpex(z.opex)}/mes</span></span>
      <span class="hv ${cls}">${z.heat}</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');

  // Top CIs por OPEX
  const cis = Object.values(bgCIsData).sort((a,b)=>b.opex-a.opex).slice(0,10);
  document.getElementById('bg-hot-cis').innerHTML = cis.map((ci,i)=>{
    const cls = ci.opex>=20000?'rd':'or';
    return `<div class="bg-hot-item" onclick="bgRenderCI('${ci.id}')">
      <span class="rk">#${i+1}</span>
      <span class="nm">${ci.name}<span class="t">${ci.id} · ${ci.layer} · ${ci.crit}</span></span>
      <span class="hv ${cls}">${bgFmtOpex(ci.opex)}</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');

  // Incidencias abiertas
  const incs = Object.values(bgIncidentsData);
  document.getElementById('bg-open-incs').innerHTML = incs.map(i=>`
    <div class="bg-inc-item ${i.prio.toLowerCase()}" onclick="bgRenderIncident('${i.id}')">
      <div class="bg-inc-hdr"><span class="id">${i.id} · ${i.prio}</span><span class="st ${i.status}">${i.status.toUpperCase()}</span></div>
      <div class="bg-inc-ti">${i.title}</div>
    </div>`).join('');

  // Tabla CIs
  const tbody = document.getElementById('bg-ci-tbody');
  tbody.innerHTML = Object.values(bgCIsData).map(ci=>{
    const slaCls = ci.sla>=ci.slo?'gn':(ci.sla>=ci.slo-0.05?'or':'rd');
    const crCls = ci.crit==='C1'?'rd':(ci.crit==='C2'?'or':'bl');
    const stCls = ci.inc===0?'gn':(ci.inc<=1?'or':'rd');
    const stTxt = ci.inc===0?'OK':(ci.inc<=1?'Atención':'Incidencias');
    return `<tr onclick="bgRenderCI('${ci.id}')">
      <td>${ci.id}</td><td class="name">${ci.name}</td><td>${ci.layer}</td><td>${ci.silo}</td>
      <td><span class="px ${crCls}">${ci.crit}</span></td>
      <td>${bgFmtOpex(ci.opex)}</td><td>${ci.inc}</td>
      <td><span class="px ${slaCls}">${ci.sla.toFixed(2)}%</span></td>
      <td style="font-family:var(--font);font-weight:600">${ci.owner}</td>
      <td><span class="px ${stCls}">${stTxt}</span></td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
}
bgRenderHeatmap();

// Filtros RUN
document.querySelectorAll('[data-run-view]').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-run-view]').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));
  b.classList.add('on');
}));
document.querySelectorAll('[data-run-silo]').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-run-silo]').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));
  b.classList.add('on');
  const silo = b.dataset.runSilo;
  document.querySelectorAll('#bg-hm-grid .bg-hm-cell').forEach(c=>{
    c.style.opacity = (silo==='all' || c.dataset.silo===silo) ? '1' : '.2';
  });
}));

// Modal zona caliente
function bgRenderZone(lk, ck){
  const z = bgRunMatrix[lk][ck];
  const lay = bgRunLayers.find(l=>l.k===lk);
  const cr = bgRunCrits.find(c=>c.k===ck);
  const cisInZone = Object.values(bgCIsData).filter(c=>c.layer===lk && c.crit===ck);
  const heatCls = z.heat>=70?'rd':(z.heat>=40?'or':'gn');
  const cisHtml = cisInZone.length ? cisInZone.map(c=>`
    <div class="bg-hot-item" onclick="bgRenderCI('${c.id}')">
      <span class="nm">${c.name}<span class="t">${c.id} · ${c.type} · ${c.vendor}</span></span>
      <span class="hv or">${bgFmtOpex(c.opex)}</span>
    </div>`).join('') : '<div class="bg-risk-item lo">No hay CIs representativos cargados en esta celda (sólo se mockean algunos).</div>';

  const incsInZone = Object.values(bgIncidentsData).filter(i=>{
    const ci = bgCIsData[i.ci]; return ci && ci.layer===lk && ci.crit===ck;
  });
  const incsHtml = incsInZone.length ? incsInZone.map(i=>`
    <div class="bg-inc-item ${i.prio.toLowerCase()}" onclick="bgRenderIncident('${i.id}')">
      <div class="bg-inc-hdr"><span class="id">${i.id} · ${i.prio}</span><span class="st ${i.status}">${i.status.toUpperCase()}</span></div>
      <div class="bg-inc-ti">${i.title}</div>
    </div>`).join('') : '<div class="bg-risk-item lo">Sin incidencias abiertas asociadas a CIs representativos de esta celda.</div>';

  bgOpenModal(`
    <div class="bg-mh">
      <div>
        <div class="bg-mh-eyebrow">ZONA CMDB · ${lk} × ${ck}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-title">${lay.label} — ${cr.label} ${cr.sub}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-sub">${lay.sub} · Silo: ${lay.silo}</div>
      </div>
      <button class="bg-mh-close" onclick="bgCloseModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Métricas agregadas</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat"><div class="k">CIs en la celda</div><div class="v">${z.cis}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="k">OPEX mensual</div><div class="v">${bgFmtOpex(z.opex)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="k">OPEX anual</div><div class="v">${bgFmtOpex(z.opex*12)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${z.inc>=3?'rd':(z.inc>=1?'or':'gn')}"><div class="k">Incid. abiertas</div><div class="v">${z.inc}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${heatCls}"><div class="k">Heat score</div><div class="v">${z.heat}/100</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="k">Coste/CI mes</div><div class="v">${bgFmtOpex(Math.round(z.opex/z.cis))}</div></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">CIs representativos (${cisInZone.length})</div>
      ${cisHtml}

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Incidencias asociadas</div>
      ${incsHtml}

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Acciones recomendadas</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-list">
        ${z.heat>=70?'<div class="bg-risk-item hi">Zona en rojo — activar revisión semanal con el gobernador del silo y priorizar runbook de reducción.</div>':''}
        ${z.inc>=3?'<div class="bg-risk-item hi">3+ incidencias abiertas simultáneas — evaluar war room y escalado a Raúl Santos (VP_OPERATIONS).</div>':''}
        ${(z.opex/z.cis)>10000?'<div class="bg-risk-item hi">Coste unitario por CI muy elevado — candidato a optimización contractual o migración.</div>':''}
        ${z.heat<40&&z.inc===0?'<div class="bg-risk-item lo">✓ Celda sana · sin acciones inmediatas requeridas.</div>':''}
      </div>

      <div class="bg-audit">RBAC audit · ${bgCurrentRole} consultó zona ${lk}/${ck} · scope=${bgRoleProfiles[bgCurrentRole].scope} · ${new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES')} · log=rbac_econ_audit_log</div>
    </div>
  `);
}

// Modal ficha CI
function bgRenderCI(id){
  const ci = bgCIsData[id]; if(!ci) return;
  const lay = bgRunLayers.find(l=>l.k===ci.layer);
  const slaCls = ci.sla>=ci.slo?'gn':(ci.sla>=ci.slo-0.05?'or':'rd');
  const crCls = ci.crit==='C1'?'rd':(ci.crit==='C2'?'or':'bl');
  const incsForCI = Object.values(bgIncidentsData).filter(i=>i.ci===id);
  const incsHtml = incsForCI.length ? incsForCI.map(i=>`
    <div class="bg-inc-item ${i.prio.toLowerCase()}" onclick="bgRenderIncident('${i.id}')">
      <div class="bg-inc-hdr"><span class="id">${i.id} · ${i.prio}</span><span class="st ${i.status}">${i.status.toUpperCase()}</span></div>
      <div class="bg-inc-ti">${i.title}</div>
    </div>`).join('') : '<div class="bg-risk-item lo">Sin incidencias abiertas asociadas a este CI.</div>';
  bgOpenModal(`
    <div class="bg-mh">
      <div>
        <div class="bg-mh-eyebrow">CI · ${ci.id}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-title">${ci.name}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-sub">${ci.type} · ${ci.vendor} · ${lay.label} · ${ci.silo}</div>
      </div>
      <button class="bg-mh-close" onclick="bgCloseModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Identidad</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat"><div class="k">Capa CMDB</div><div class="v">${ci.layer}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${crCls==='rd'?'rd':(crCls==='or'?'or':'')}"><div class="k">Criticidad</div><div class="v">${ci.crit}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="k">Vendor</div><div class="v" style="font-size:13px">${ci.vendor}</div></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Economía</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="k">OPEX mensual</div><div class="v">${bgFmtOpex(ci.opex)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="k">OPEX anual</div><div class="v">${bgFmtOpex(ci.opex*12)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="k">Owner</div><div class="v" style="font-size:13px">${ci.owner}</div></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Disponibilidad y SLA</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat ${slaCls}"><div class="k">SLA real</div><div class="v">${ci.sla.toFixed(2)}%</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat"><div class="k">SLO objetivo</div><div class="v">${ci.slo.toFixed(2)}%</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${ci.inc===0?'gn':(ci.inc<=1?'or':'rd')}"><div class="k">Incid. abiertas</div><div class="v">${ci.inc}</div></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Ubicación y operación</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-item lo"><strong>Ubicación:</strong> ${ci.room} · <strong>Runbook:</strong> ${ci.runbook}</div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Incidencias RUN del CI</div>
      ${incsHtml}

      <div class="bg-audit">RBAC audit · ${bgCurrentRole} consultó CI ${ci.id} · scope=${bgRoleProfiles[bgCurrentRole].scope} · ${new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES')} · log=rbac_econ_audit_log</div>
    </div>
  `);
}

// Modal ficha incidencia
function bgRenderIncident(id){
  const i = bgIncidentsData[id]; if(!i) return;
  const ci = bgCIsData[i.ci];
  const prioCls = i.prio==='P1'?'rd':(i.prio==='P2'?'or':'bl');
  const tlHtml = i.steps.map(s=>`<div class="bg-tl-item ${s.cls}"><div class="tm">${s.tm}</div><div class="tx">${s.tx}</div></div>`).join('');
  bgOpenModal(`
    <div class="bg-mh">
      <div>
        <div class="bg-mh-eyebrow">INCIDENCIA RUN · ${i.id}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-title">${i.title}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-sub">Prioridad: <strong style="color:var(--acc-${prioCls})">${i.prio}</strong> · Estado: ${i.status.toUpperCase()} · Abierta: ${i.opened} · SLA: ${i.sla}</div>
      </div>
      <button class="bg-mh-close" onclick="bgCloseModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Resumen</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat ${prioCls==='rd'?'rd':(prioCls==='or'?'or':'')}"><div class="k">Prioridad</div><div class="v">${i.prio}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="k">SLA compromiso</div><div class="v">${i.sla}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="k">Equipo</div><div class="v" style="font-size:12px">${i.team}</div></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">CI afectado</div>
      <div class="bg-hot-item" onclick="bgRenderCI('${i.ci}')">
        <span class="nm">${ci?ci.name:i.ci}<span class="t">${ci?ci.type+' · '+ci.vendor:'—'}</span></span>
        <span class="hv or">${i.ci}</span>
      </div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Impacto negocio</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-item hi">${i.impact}</div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Timeline</div>
      <div class="bg-tl">${tlHtml}</div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Owner</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-item lo"><strong>${i.owner}</strong> — ${i.team}</div>

      <div class="bg-audit">RBAC audit · ${bgCurrentRole} consultó incidencia ${i.id} · scope=${bgRoleProfiles[bgCurrentRole].scope} · ${new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES')} · log=rbac_econ_audit_log</div>
    </div>
  `);
}

// ═══════════════ CARTERA BUILD ═══════════════
// [id, name, silo, pm, bac(k€), gate, cpi, spi, prio, risk, prog, ai]

// Merge con bgProjectsData: los 5 ricos quedan, el resto se sintetiza
bgPortfolio.forEach(p=>{
  const [id,name,silo,pm,bacK,gate,cpi,spi,prio,risk,prog,ai] = p;
  if(bgProjectsData[id]){
    bgProjectsData[id].silo=silo; bgProjectsData[id].pm=pm;
    bgProjectsData[id].priority=prio; bgProjectsData[id].risk=risk;
    bgProjectsData[id].progress=prog; bgProjectsData[id].ai=ai;
    return;
  }
  const bac = bacK*1000;
  const ev = Math.round(bac*prog/100);
  const ac = Math.round(ev/cpi);
  const pv = Math.round(ev/spi);
  const gatesObj = {};
  const gateNum = parseInt(gate[1]);
  ['G0','G1','G2','G3','G4','G5'].forEach((g,i)=>{
    gatesObj[g] = i<gateNum?'done':(i===gateNum?'now':'todo');
  });
  const risks = [];
  if(cpi<0.9) risks.push({lv:'hi',t:`CPI ${cpi.toFixed(2)} — sobrecoste estructural. Revisión financiera recomendada.`});
  if(spi<0.9) risks.push({lv:'hi',t:`SPI ${spi.toFixed(2)} — retraso significativo en la planificación.`});
  if(risk>=4) risks.push({lv:'hi',t:'Riesgo corporativo nivel 4 — proyecto en watchlist del comité.'});
  if(risks.length===0) risks.push({lv:'lo',t:'Proyecto dentro de parámetros · sin alertas activas.'});
  bgProjectsData[id] = {
    name, silo, pm, bac, ev, ac, pv, gate, gates:gatesObj,
    team:[{n:pm,r:'PM / Gobernador',cap:'—'}],
    risks, priority:prio, risk, progress:prog, ai
  };
});

function bgCartStatus(p){
  const x = bgProjectsData[p[0]]; if(!x) return 'or';
  if(p[6]<0.85 || p[9]>=4) return 'rd';
  if(p[6]<0.95 || p[9]>=3) return 'or';
  return 'gn';
}

let bgCartFS='all', bgCartFG='all', bgCartFSi='all';

function bgRenderCartera(){
  // Grid de cards
  const grid = document.getElementById('bg-cart-grid');
  if(!grid) return;
  grid.innerHTML = bgPortfolio.map(p=>{
    const [id,name,silo,pm,bacK,gate,cpi,spi,prio,risk,prog,ai] = p;
    const st = bgCartStatus(p);
    const cpiCls = cpi>=1?'gn':(cpi>=0.9?'or':'rd');
    return `<div class="bg-pc-card ${st}" data-pc-st="${st}" data-pc-gt="${gate}" data-pc-si="${silo}" onclick="bgRenderProject('${id}')">
      ${ai?'<span class="bg-pc-ai">★</span>':''}
      <div class="bg-pc-hdr">
        <span class="bg-pc-id">${id}</span>
        <span class="bg-pc-gate ${gate}">${gate}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-pc-name">${name}</div>
      <div class="bg-pc-meta">
        <span class="silo">${silo}</span>
        <span>P${prio} · R${risk}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-pc-bar"><span style="width:${prog}%"></span></div>
      <div class="bg-pc-foot">
        <span class="bac">${bacK}k€</span>
        <span class="cpi ${cpiCls}">CPI ${cpi.toFixed(2)}</span>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');

  // KPIs strip
  const bacTot = bgPortfolio.reduce((s,p)=>s+p[4],0);
  const cpiAvg = bgPortfolio.reduce((s,p)=>s+p[6]*p[4],0)/bacTot;
  const spiAvg = bgPortfolio.reduce((s,p)=>s+p[7]*p[4],0)/bacTot;
  const critCount = bgPortfolio.filter(p=>bgCartStatus(p)==='rd').length;
  const aiCount = bgPortfolio.filter(p=>p[11]).length;
  document.getElementById('bg-cart-cpi').textContent = cpiAvg.toFixed(2);
  document.getElementById('bg-cart-spi').textContent = spiAvg.toFixed(2);
  document.getElementById('bg-cart-rd').textContent = critCount;
  document.getElementById('bg-cart-ai').textContent = aiCount;

  // Funnel gates
  const funnel = document.getElementById('bg-funnel');
  const gateTotal = bgPortfolio.length;
  const gateData = {};
  ['G0','G1','G2','G3','G4','G5'].forEach(g=>{
    const items = bgPortfolio.filter(p=>p[5]===g);
    const bc = items.reduce((s,p)=>s+p[4],0);
    gateData[g] = {n:items.length, bc};
  });
  const maxN = Math.max(...Object.values(gateData).map(x=>x.n),1);
  funnel.innerHTML = ['G0','G1','G2','G3','G4','G5'].map(g=>{
    const d = gateData[g];
    const w = (d.n/maxN)*100;
    return `<div class="bg-funnel-row" onclick="bgFilterByGate('${g}')">
      <div class="gl ${g}">${g}</div>
      <div class="bar"><span style="width:${w}%"></span><span class="lb">${d.n>0?d.n+' proyectos':'—'}</span></div>
      <div class="cnt">${d.n}</div>
      <div class="bc">${d.bc>=1000?(d.bc/1000).toFixed(1)+' M€':d.bc+'k€'}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');

  // Matriz prioridad × riesgo
  const cells = document.querySelectorAll('#bg-matrix .mx-cell');
  cells.forEach(c=>{
    const p = +c.dataset.p, r = +c.dataset.r;
    const items = bgPortfolio.filter(x=>x[8]===p && x[9]===r);
    const bc = items.reduce((s,x)=>s+x[4],0);
    if(items.length===0){
      c.classList.add('empty');
      c.innerHTML = '<div class="count" style="color:var(--tx3);font-size:14px">—</div>';
    } else {
      c.classList.remove('empty');
      const dots = items.slice(0,12).map(()=>'<div class="dot"></div>').join('');
      c.innerHTML = `<div>
        <div class="count">${items.length}</div>
        <div class="sum">${bc>=1000?(bc/1000).toFixed(1)+'M€':bc+'k€'}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dots">${dots}${items.length>12?'<div class="dot" style="background:var(--tx2)">+</div>':''}</div>`;
    }
  });

  bgApplyCartFilters();
}

function bgFilterByGate(g){
  bgCartFG = g;
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-cart-gt]').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));
  const btn = document.querySelector(`[data-cart-gt="${g}"]`);
  if(btn) btn.classList.add('on');
  bgApplyCartFilters();
}

function bgApplyCartFilters(){
  let visible = 0;
  document.querySelectorAll('.bg-pc-card').forEach(c=>{
    const okS  = bgCartFS ==='all' || c.dataset.pcSt===bgCartFS;
    const okG  = bgCartFG ==='all' || c.dataset.pcGt===bgCartFG;
    const okSi = bgCartFSi==='all' || c.dataset.pcSi===bgCartFSi;
    const ok = okS && okG && okSi;
    c.classList.toggle('dim', !ok);
    if(ok) visible++;
  });
  const counter = document.getElementById('bg-cart-count');
  if(counter) counter.textContent = `· ${visible} proyectos visibles`;
}

document.querySelectorAll('[data-cart-st]').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-cart-st]').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));
  b.classList.add('on'); bgCartFS=b.dataset.cartSt; bgApplyCartFilters();
}));
document.querySelectorAll('[data-cart-gt]').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-cart-gt]').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));
  b.classList.add('on'); bgCartFG=b.dataset.cartGt; bgApplyCartFilters();
}));
document.querySelectorAll('[data-cart-si]').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-cart-si]').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));
  b.classList.add('on'); bgCartFSi=b.dataset.cartSi; bgApplyCartFilters();
}));

bgRenderCartera();

// Modal cuadrante matriz
function bgRenderMatrixCell(p,r){
  const items = bgPortfolio.filter(x=>x[8]===p && x[9]===r);
  if(items.length===0) return;
  const bc = items.reduce((s,x)=>s+x[4],0);
  const avgCpi = items.reduce((s,x)=>s+x[6],0)/items.length;
  const avgSpi = items.reduce((s,x)=>s+x[7],0)/items.length;
  const zoneCls = (p>=3&&r>=3)?'rd':((p>=3||r>=3)?'or':'gn');
  const zoneLabel = (p===4&&r===4)?'Zona ROJA · alta prioridad, alto riesgo':((p>=3&&r>=3)?'Zona crítica':((p>=3&&r<=2)?'Zona de inversión estratégica':((p<=2&&r<=2)?'Zona segura · quick wins':'Zona de vigilancia')));
  const itemsHtml = items.map(p2=>{
    const [id,name,silo,pm,bacK,gate,cpi,spi] = p2;
    const cpiCls = cpi>=1?'gn':(cpi>=0.9?'or':'rd');
    return `<div class="bg-hot-item" onclick="bgRenderProject('${id}')">
      <span class="nm">${name}<span class="t">${id} · ${silo} · ${pm} · ${gate}</span></span>
      <span class="hv ${cpiCls}">CPI ${cpi.toFixed(2)}</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  bgOpenModal(`
    <div class="bg-mh">
      <div>
        <div class="bg-mh-eyebrow">CUADRANTE · P${p} × R${r}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-title">${zoneLabel}</div>
        <div class="bg-mh-sub">Prioridad estratégica <strong>${p}/4</strong> · Riesgo corporativo <strong>${r}/4</strong></div>
      </div>
      <button class="bg-mh-close" onclick="bgCloseModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Métricas del cuadrante</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3">
        <div class="bg-stat"><div class="k">Proyectos</div><div class="v">${items.length}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="k">BAC acumulado</div><div class="v">${bc>=1000?(bc/1000).toFixed(2)+' M€':bc+' k€'}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="k">% cartera</div><div class="v">${Math.round(items.length/60*100)}%</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${avgCpi>=1?'gn':(avgCpi>=0.9?'or':'rd')}"><div class="k">CPI medio</div><div class="v">${avgCpi.toFixed(2)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${avgSpi>=1?'gn':(avgSpi>=0.9?'or':'rd')}"><div class="k">SPI medio</div><div class="v">${avgSpi.toFixed(2)}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${zoneCls}"><div class="k">Color zona</div><div class="v">${zoneCls==='rd'?'ROJO':(zoneCls==='or'?'ÁMBAR':'VERDE')}</div></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Proyectos en este cuadrante (${items.length})</div>
      ${itemsHtml}

      <div class="bg-sec-h">Interpretación para el comité</div>
      <div class="bg-risk-list">
        ${p===4&&r===4?'<div class="bg-risk-item hi">Zona máxima exposición — requiere revisión mensual del comité de dirección. Todo proyecto aquí necesita gobernador dedicado y plan de mitigación activo.</div>':''}
        ${p===4&&r<=2?'<div class="bg-risk-item lo">Inversiones estratégicas de bajo riesgo — proyectos ideales para acelerar. Buen ROI esperado.</div>':''}
        ${p<=2&&r===4?'<div class="bg-risk-item hi">Riesgo alto con baja prioridad — candidatos a cancelación o pausa para liberar capacidad.</div>':''}
        ${p<=2&&r<=2?'<div class="bg-risk-item lo">Quick wins — proyectos seguros de baja fricción que contribuyen al momentum general.</div>':''}
        ${(p===3||r===3)&&!(p===4&&r===4)?'<div class="bg-risk-item lo">Zona intermedia — gobernanza estándar mensual aplica. Vigilar deriva hacia cuadrantes adyacentes.</div>':''}
      </div>

      <div class="bg-audit">RBAC audit · ${bgCurrentRole} consultó cuadrante P${p}×R${r} · scope=${bgRoleProfiles[bgCurrentRole].scope} · ${new Date().toLocaleString('es-ES')} · log=rbac_econ_audit_log</div>
    </div>
  `);
}

// ═══════════════ PULSO ESTRATÉGICO ═══════════════







function bgRenderPulso(){
  // KPI strip
  const stripEl = document.getElementById('bg-pul-strip');
  if(stripEl){
    stripEl.innerHTML = bgPulseKPIs.map(k=>`
      <div class="bg-pul-kpi ${k.rag}" onclick="bgRenderPulseKPI('${k.k}')" title="${k.tt}">
        <div class="lb">${k.lb}</div>
        <div class="vl">${k.vl}<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--tx2);font-weight:600;margin-left:3px">${k.un}</span></div>
        <div class="sub"><span>${k.sub}</span><span class="rag ${k.rag}">${k.rag==='gn'?'OK':k.rag==='am'?'VIG':'CRIT'}</span></div>
      </div>`).join('');
  }

  // Alertas
  const alEl = document.getElementById('bg-pul-alerts');
  if(alEl){
    alEl.innerHTML = bgPulseAlerts.map(a=>{
      const ic = a.sev==='rd'?'⚠':a.sev==='am'?'◉':'✓';
      const lb = a.sev==='rd'?'CRÍTICA':a.sev==='am'?'VIGILANCIA':'OK';
      return `<div class="bg-alert ${a.sev}" onclick="bgRenderAlert('${a.id}')">
        <div class="ic">${ic}</div>
        <div class="bd">
          <div class="tt">${a.title}</div>
          <div class="ds">${a.desc}</div>
          <div class="mt">${a.meta.map(m=>`<span>${m}</span>`).join('')}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sev">${lb}</div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
    const redCt = bgPulseAlerts.filter(a=>a.sev==='rd').length;
    document.getElementById('bg-alert-ct').textContent = `${redCt} críticas · ${bgPulseAlerts.length} total`;
  }

  // Bloqueos
  const blEl = document.getElementById('bg-pul-blocks');
  if(blEl){
    blEl.innerHTML = bgPulseBlocks.map(b=>`
      <div class="bg-block" onclick="bgRenderBlock('${b.id}')">
        <div>
          <div class="tt">${b.title}</div>
          <div class="ds">${b.desc}</div>
          <div class="mt">owner <span style="color:var(--acc-cy)">${b.own}</span> · proy <span class="pj">${b.pj}</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="dy ${b.days>=12?'rd':''}">${b.days}<span class="un">DÍAS</span></div>
      </div>`).join('');
    document.getElementById('bg-block-ct').textContent = `${bgPulseBlocks.length} activos`;
  }

  // Decisiones
  const dcEl = document.getElementById('bg-pul-decs');
  if(dcEl){
    dcEl.innerHTML = bgPulseDecs.map(d=>`
      <div class="bg-dec" onclick="bgRenderDec('${d.id}')">
        <div class="tp"><span class="id">${d.id}</span><span class="du ${d.urg}">${d.due}</span></div>
        <div class="tt">${d.title}</div>
        <div class="ds">${d.desc}</div>
        <div class="mt"><span class="own">${d.own}</span><span class="amt">${d.amt}</span></div>
      </div>`).join('');
    document.getElementById('bg-dec-ct').textContent = `${bgPulseDecs.length} pendientes`;
  }

  // Responsables
  const rsEl = document.getElementById('bg-pul-resps');
  if(rsEl){
    rsEl.innerHTML = bgPulseResps.map((r,i)=>`
      <div class="bg-resp" onclick="bgRenderResp(${i})">
        <div class="av">${r.ini}</div>
        <div>
          <div class="nm">${r.nm}</div>
          <div class="rl">${r.rl}<span class="ct">${r.ct}</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="kp"><span class="vl">${r.kpiVl}</span>${r.kpiLb}</div>
        <div class="lg ${r.lg}"></div>
      </div>`).join('');
  }

  // Hitos
  const htEl = document.getElementById('bg-pul-hitos');
  if(htEl){
    htEl.innerHTML = bgPulseHitos.map((h,i)=>`
      <div class="bg-hito" onclick="bgRenderHito(${i})">
        <div class="dt">${h.dt}<span class="wk">${h.wk}</span></div>
        <div>
          <div class="tt">${h.title}</div>
          <div class="ds">${h.desc}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="tg ${h.tg}">${h.tgt}</div>
      </div>`).join('');
  }
}

// ─── Modales Pulso (usando estructura real bg-mh / bg-mb) ───
function bgPulMh(eyebrow,title,sub,tag,tagColor){
  return `<div class="bg-mh">
    <div class="bg-mh-l">
      <div class="bg-mh-eyebrow">${eyebrow}${tag?` <span class="pill" style="color:${tagColor||'var(--acc-cy)'};border-color:${tagColor||'var(--acc-cy)'}">${tag}</span>`:''}</div>
      <div class="bg-mh-title">${title}</div>
      <div class="bg-mh-sub">${sub}</div>
    </div>
    <button class="bg-mh-close" onclick="bgCloseModal()">×</button>
  </div>`;
}
function bgPulAudit(id){
  return `<div class="bg-audit"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg><strong>RBAC·audit</strong> ${id} · leído por ${bgCurrentRole||'CEO'} · ${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,19).replace('T',' ')} · rbac_econ_audit_log</div>`;
}

function bgRenderAlert(id){
  const a = bgPulseAlerts.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!a) return;
  const sev = a.sev==='rd'?'CRÍTICA':a.sev==='am'?'VIGILANCIA':'INFORMATIVA';
  const tagCol = a.sev==='rd'?'var(--acc-rd)':a.sev==='am'?'var(--acc-or)':'var(--acc-gn)';
  const pjLinks = a.meta.filter(m=>m.startsWith('PRJ-')).map(p=>`<span class="bg-gate done" style="cursor:pointer;flex:0 1 auto;padding:2px 8px" onclick="bgCloseModal();bgRenderProject('${p}')">${p}</span>`).join(' ');
  const govLink = a.meta.find(m=>m.startsWith('GOV-'));
  const govHtml = govLink?`<div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="l">Gobernador afectado</div><div class="v" style="cursor:pointer;color:var(--acc-cy)" onclick="bgCloseModal();bgRenderGovernor('${govLink}')">${govLink} ▸</div></div>`:'';
  bgOpenModal(
    bgPulMh('ALERTA ESTRATÉGICA · '+a.id, a.title, 'Severidad '+sev+' · Owner: '+a.ow, sev, tagCol)+
    `<div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Descripción ejecutiva</div>
      <p style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 12px">${a.desc}</p>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Contexto</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat ${a.sev}"><div class="l">Owner</div><div class="v" style="font-size:11px">${a.ow}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${a.sev}"><div class="l">Severidad</div><div class="v">${sev}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${a.sev}"><div class="l">Etiquetas</div><div class="v" style="font-size:9px">${a.meta.length}</div></div>
      </div>
      ${govHtml?`<div style="margin-bottom:12px">${govHtml}</div>`:''}
      ${pjLinks?`<div class="bg-sec-h">Proyectos vinculados</div><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px">${pjLinks}</div>`:''}
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Etiquetas</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px">${a.meta.map(m=>`<code style="background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;color:var(--tx2);font-size:10px;font-family:var(--mono)">${m}</code>`).join('')}</div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Acciones sugeridas al comité</div>
      <ul style="margin:0 0 14px;padding-left:18px;color:var(--tx2);font-size:11px;line-height:1.7">
        <li>Asignar owner ejecutivo y deadline de 7 días.</li>
        <li>Crear ticket en módulo de decisiones para seguimiento semanal.</li>
        <li>Escalar a CEO si no hay avance antes del próximo lunes.</li>
      </ul>
      ${bgPulAudit(a.id)}
    </div>`
  );
}

function bgRenderBlock(id){
  const b = bgPulseBlocks.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!b) return;
  const tagCol = b.sev==='rd'?'var(--acc-rd)':'var(--acc-or)';
  const isProj = b.pj.startsWith('PRJ-');
  const isGov  = b.pj.startsWith('GOV-');
  const pjLink = isProj?`<span style="color:var(--acc-bl);cursor:pointer;font-weight:700" onclick="bgCloseModal();bgRenderProject('${b.pj}')">${b.pj} ▸</span>`:
                 isGov?`<span style="color:var(--acc-cy);cursor:pointer;font-weight:700" onclick="bgCloseModal();bgRenderGovernor('${b.pj}')">${b.pj} ▸</span>`:b.pj;
  bgOpenModal(
    bgPulMh('BLOQUEO · '+b.id, b.title, 'Antigüedad '+b.days+' días · Owner: '+b.own, b.days+' DÍAS', tagCol)+
    `<div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Descripción</div>
      <p style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 12px">${b.desc}</p>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Datos clave</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat ${b.sev}"><div class="l">Owner</div><div class="v" style="font-size:11px">${b.own}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${b.sev}"><div class="l">Proyecto</div><div class="v" style="font-size:11px">${pjLink}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${b.sev}"><div class="l">Días bloqueado</div><div class="v">${b.days}d</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Plan de desbloqueo propuesto</div>
      <ul style="margin:0 0 14px;padding-left:18px;color:var(--tx2);font-size:11px;line-height:1.7">
        <li>Reunión express 30 min con owner en 48h.</li>
        <li>Si persiste &gt; 14 días: escalado automático a CEO.</li>
        <li>Registro en Kanban Global bajo fase BLOQ.</li>
      </ul>
      ${bgPulAudit(b.id)}
    </div>`
  );
}

function bgRenderDec(id){
  const d = bgPulseDecs.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!d) return;
  const urgTxt = d.urg==='over'?'🔴 vencida':d.urg==='near'?'🟡 próxima (<7 días)':'🟢 planificada';
  const amtCell = bgCanSeeSalary()?`<div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="l">Importe/alcance</div><div class="v">${d.amt}</div></div>`:
                                   `<div class="bg-stat pu bg-rgpd-blur"><div class="l">Importe/alcance</div><div class="v">${d.amt}</div></div>`;
  bgOpenModal(
    bgPulMh('DECISIÓN COMITÉ · '+d.id, d.title, 'Deadline '+d.due+' · '+d.own, 'PENDIENTE', 'var(--acc-pu)')+
    `<div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Contexto de la decisión</div>
      <p style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 12px">${d.desc}</p>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Datos clave</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="l">Responsables firma</div><div class="v" style="font-size:11px">${d.own}</div></div>
        ${amtCell}
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="l">Deadline</div><div class="v" style="font-size:11px">${d.due}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-stat pu" style="margin-bottom:12px"><div class="l">Urgencia</div><div class="v" style="font-size:12px">${urgTxt}</div></div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Opciones presentadas al comité</div>
      <ul style="margin:0 0 14px;padding-left:18px;color:var(--tx2);font-size:11px;line-height:1.7">
        <li><b style="color:var(--acc-gn)">Aprobar</b> — seguir plan actual, desbloquea ejecución inmediata.</li>
        <li><b style="color:var(--acc-rd)">Rechazar</b> — reasignar capital/equipo a otra prioridad.</li>
        <li><b style="color:var(--acc-or)">Diferir</b> — volver a evaluar en el próximo comité con más datos.</li>
      </ul>
      ${bgPulAudit(d.id)}
    </div>`
  );
}

function bgRenderResp(idx){
  const r = bgPulseResps[idx]; if(!r) return;
  const lgTxt = r.lg==='gn'?'Verde · KPIs en objetivo':r.lg==='am'?'Ámbar · vigilancia':'Rojo · acción inmediata';
  const tagCol = r.lg==='gn'?'var(--acc-gn)':r.lg==='am'?'var(--acc-or)':'var(--acc-rd)';
  bgOpenModal(
    bgPulMh('RESPONSABLE · '+r.rl, r.nm, r.rl+' — '+r.ct, r.lg.toUpperCase(), tagCol)+
    `<div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Estado ejecutivo</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat ${r.lg}"><div class="l">RAG global</div><div class="v" style="font-size:11px">${lgTxt}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${r.lg}"><div class="l">KPI principal</div><div class="v">${r.kpiVl}</div><div class="s">${r.kpiLb}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="l">Rol RBAC</div><div class="v">${r.rl}</div><div class="s">C-level</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Ámbito de responsabilidad</div>
      <p style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 12px">${r.ct}. Rinde cuentas directamente al CEO en el comité semanal.</p>
      ${bgPulAudit(r.rl)}
    </div>`
  );
}

function bgRenderHito(idx){
  const h = bgPulseHitos[idx]; if(!h) return;
  bgOpenModal(
    bgPulMh('HITO · '+h.wk, h.title, h.dt+' · '+h.wk, h.tgt, 'var(--acc-cy)')+
    `<div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Descripción</div>
      <p style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 12px">${h.desc}</p>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Planificación</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-2" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="l">Fecha</div><div class="v">${h.dt}</div><div class="s">${h.wk}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="l">Tipo</div><div class="v" style="font-size:11px">${h.tgt}</div></div>
      </div>
      ${bgPulAudit('HITO·'+(idx+1))}
    </div>`
  );
}

function bgRenderPulseKPI(k){
  const kp = bgPulseKPIs.find(x=>x.k===k); if(!kp) return;
  const tagCol = kp.rag==='gn'?'var(--acc-gn)':kp.rag==='am'?'var(--acc-or)':'var(--acc-rd)';
  const ragTxt = kp.rag==='gn'?'Verde · en objetivo':kp.rag==='am'?'Ámbar · vigilancia':'Rojo · acción inmediata';
  bgOpenModal(
    bgPulMh('KPI ESTRATÉGICO', kp.lb, 'Semáforo '+kp.rag.toUpperCase()+' · '+kp.sub, kp.vl+' '+kp.un, tagCol)+
    `<div class="bg-mb">
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Explicación ejecutiva</div>
      <p style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 12px">${kp.tt}</p>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Cifra actual</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat ${kp.rag}"><div class="l">Valor</div><div class="v">${kp.vl} ${kp.un}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${kp.rag}"><div class="l">Contexto</div><div class="v" style="font-size:10px">${kp.sub}</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${kp.rag}"><div class="l">Estado RAG</div><div class="v" style="font-size:10px">${ragTxt}</div></div>
      </div>
      ${bgPulAudit('KPI.'+kp.k)}
    </div>`
  );
}

// ─── Marco Estratégico (guiño asignatura MUDEP) ───

// Helper para enlaces cruzados clickables dentro del marco estratégico
function bgXLink(type,id,label,color){
  const c = color||'var(--acc-cy)';
  let fn='';
  if(type==='proj') fn=`bgCloseModal();bgRenderProject('${id}')`;
  else if(type==='gov') fn=`bgCloseModal();bgRenderGovernor('${id}')`;
  else if(type==='alert') fn=`bgCloseModal();bgRenderAlert('${id}')`;
  else if(type==='block') fn=`bgCloseModal();bgRenderBlock('${id}')`;
  else if(type==='dec') fn=`bgCloseModal();bgRenderDec('${id}')`;
  else if(type==='kpi') fn=`bgCloseModal();bgRenderPulseKPI('${id}')`;
  else if(type==='hito') fn=`bgCloseModal();bgRenderHito(${id})`;
  return `<span style="color:${c};cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;text-decoration:underline;text-decoration-style:dotted;text-underline-offset:2px" onclick="${fn}">${label}</span>`;
}

function bgRenderStrat(k){
  const s = bgStratData[k]; if(!s) return;

  // ─── Datos vivos heredados de los demás módulos ───
  const totBac = bgPortfolio.reduce((a,p)=>a+p.bacK,0);
  const cpiAvg = (bgPortfolio.reduce((a,p)=>a+p.cpi*p.bacK,0)/totBac).toFixed(2);
  const reds   = bgPortfolio.filter(p=>p.cpi<0.85||p.risk>=4).length;
  const ams    = bgPortfolio.filter(p=>(p.cpi>=0.85&&p.cpi<0.95)||p.risk===3).length;
  const govRed = bgGovernorsData.filter(g=>g.status==='red').length;
  const govAm  = bgGovernorsData.filter(g=>g.status==='amber').length;
  const govGn  = bgGovernorsData.filter(g=>g.status==='green').length;
  const alRed  = bgPulseAlerts.filter(a=>a.sev==='rd').length;
  const decsCt = bgPulseDecs.length;
  const blRed  = bgPulseBlocks.filter(b=>b.days>=12).length;

  let body = `<div class="bg-mb">
    <div class="bg-sec-h">¿Qué nos cuenta esta herramienta?</div>
    <p style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 14px">${s.intro}</p>`;

  // ────────────────────── DAFO ──────────────────────
  if(k==='dafo'){
    body += `<div class="bg-sec-h">Datos vivos heredados del dashboard</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat gn"><div class="l">Fortalezas medibles</div><div class="v">15 + ${govGn}</div><div class="s">agentes IA · gov verdes</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat rd"><div class="l">Debilidades medibles</div><div class="v">${govRed+govAm}</div><div class="s">gobernadores no-verdes</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="l">CPI cartera (BAC)</div><div class="v">${cpiAvg}</div><div class="s">${reds} rojos · ${ams} ámbar</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Matriz DAFO 2×2 — Cognitive PMO en el banco</div>
      <div class="bg-dafo-grid" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-dafo-q f"><h6>● FORTALEZAS · interno +</h6><ul>
          <li><b>15 agentes IA</b> en producción NAS · arquitectura multi-agente única en el sector</li>
          <li>Gobernanza unificada <b>RUN+BUILD</b> en una sola UI (5 pestañas, ${decsCt} decisiones trazadas)</li>
          <li><b>RBAC económico</b> con 23 roles + 175 usuarios + 3 tablas (scopes/silo_map/audit_log)</li>
          <li>Aval académico <b>TFM MUDEP UCAM</b> + 60 proyectos BUILD con EVM completo</li>
        </ul></div>
        <div class="bg-dafo-q d"><h6>● DEBILIDADES · interno –</h6><ul>
          <li>${bgXLink('gov','GOV-08','Sergio Mateos','var(--acc-rd)')} (IT-CLOUD) saturado al <b>110% capacidad</b>, CPI 0.65</li>
          <li>Dependencia de un único hosting <b>NAS</b> (sin DRP fuera de sede)</li>
          <li>${reds} proyectos en rojo (CPI&lt;0.85) → ver ${bgXLink('alert','ALT-001','ALT-001','var(--acc-rd)')}</li>
          <li>CPI medio cartera <b>${cpiAvg}</b> · meta 0.95 → gap del ${Math.round((0.95-cpiAvg)*100)}%</li>
        </ul></div>
        <div class="bg-dafo-q o"><h6>● OPORTUNIDADES · externo +</h6><ul>
          <li>Regulación <b>DORA</b> exige observabilidad económica → encaja con el ${bgXLink('kpi','run','KPI Estabilidad RUN','var(--acc-bl)')}</li>
          <li>60% bancos europeos sin cuadro mando IT integrado → ventana de mercado</li>
          <li>Adopción IA generativa subiendo (${bgXLink('kpi','ia','68%','var(--acc-bl)')}, meta 60% superada)</li>
          <li>Posible consolidación como <b>producto interno</b> reusable en el grupo</li>
        </ul></div>
        <div class="bg-dafo-q a"><h6>● AMENAZAS · externo –</h6><ul>
          <li>Vendors hyperscaler con suites equivalentes (ServiceNow, Apptio)</li>
          <li>AI Act + RGPD endurecen tratamiento de datos económicos personales</li>
          <li>${bgXLink('alert','ALT-001','Burnout','var(--acc-or)')} del equipo gobernanza si no se refuerza</li>
          <li>Recortes presupuestarios IT 2027 → ${bgXLink('alert','ALT-004','ALT-004','var(--acc-or)')}: presupuesto IT-SEG ya al 87%</li>
        </ul></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Estrategias cruzadas (matriz F/O · D/A)</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-2" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat gn"><div class="l">F→O · ofensiva</div><div class="v" style="font-size:10px;line-height:1.4">Capitalizar DORA con la madurez del RUN: convertir Cognitive PMO en cumplimiento "out of the box".</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="l">F→A · defensa activa</div><div class="v" style="font-size:10px;line-height:1.4">Diferenciarse de ServiceNow con multi-agente IA + RBAC económico nativo (no addon).</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="l">D→O · refuerzo</div><div class="v" style="font-size:10px;line-height:1.4">Aprovechar el ${bgXLink('dec','DEC-005','fichaje PMO','var(--acc-or)')} para resolver la saturación antes del Q3.</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat rd"><div class="l">D→A · supervivencia</div><div class="v" style="font-size:10px;line-height:1.4">DRP urgente del NAS + plan de contención OPEX 2027 antes del comité de mayo.</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Lectura ejecutiva para el CEO</div>
      <p style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:11px;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 12px">Cognitive PMO debe jugar <b style="color:var(--acc-gn)">la diagonal F→O</b> en los próximos 6 meses: aprovechar la regulación DORA y la madurez multi-agente para cerrar contratos internos antes de que ServiceNow se posicione. La defensa <b style="color:var(--acc-rd)">D→A</b> es crítica: si no se refuerza el equipo gobernanza, las amenazas materializarán los riesgos antes del cierre fiscal.</p>`;
  }

  // ────────────────────── PESTLE ──────────────────────
  else if(k==='pestle'){
    const xref = {
      'P':'',
      'E':' Conecta con '+bgXLink('alert','ALT-004','ALT-004','var(--acc-or)')+' (presupuesto IT-SEG al 87%) y '+bgXLink('kpi','cart','KPI cartera','var(--acc-bl)')+'.',
      'S':' Visible en KPI '+bgXLink('kpi','eq','Equipo 88/100','var(--acc-bl)')+'; '+govRed+' gobernador rojo.',
      'T':' Visible en '+bgXLink('alert','ALT-002','zona caliente CLOUD×C1','var(--acc-rd)')+' del mapa RUN.',
      'L':' Hito clave: '+bgXLink('hito','4','auditoría DORA 04-may','var(--acc-or)')+'.',
    };
    body += `<div class="bg-sec-h">Datos vivos del entorno macro</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="l">Compliance score</div><div class="v">94 /100</div><div class="s">DORA · RGPD · NIS2</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat rd"><div class="l">Recorte OPEX previsto</div><div class="v">−5%</div><div class="s">grupo · Q3 2026</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat cy"><div class="l">Adopción IA</div><div class="v">68%</div><div class="s">meta 60% superada</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Las 6 dimensiones PESTLE</div>`;
    body += s.items.map(it=>{
      const extra = xref[it.k]||'';
      const lvLb = it.lv==='alta'?'IMPACTO ALTO':it.lv==='med'?'IMPACTO MEDIO':'IMPACTO BAJO';
      return `<div class="bg-strat-row">
        <div class="ic ${it.ic}">${it.k}</div>
        <div><div class="nm">${it.nm}</div><div class="ds">${it.ds}${extra}</div></div>
        <span class="lv ${it.lv}">${lvLb}</span>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
    body += `<div class="bg-sec-h" style="margin-top:14px">Implicaciones operativas para Cognitive PMO</div>
      <ul style="margin:0 0 12px;padding-left:18px;color:var(--tx2);font-size:11px;line-height:1.7">
        <li><b>Económico</b> → defender el ROI del P96 ante el CFO antes del comité de presupuestos 2027 (${bgXLink('hito','6','12-may','var(--acc-or)')}).</li>
        <li><b>Tecnológico</b> → cerrar el gap de la zona ${bgXLink('alert','ALT-002','CLOUD×C1','var(--acc-rd)')} para que la IA no choque con incidentes core.</li>
        <li><b>Legal</b> → aprobar ${bgXLink('dec','DEC-001','DEC-001 (+380 k€ IT-SEG)','var(--acc-pu)')} para llegar a la auditoría DORA con margen.</li>
        <li><b>Social</b> → eNPS 42 sano pero frágil: cuidar a los 4 gobernadores saturados.</li>
      </ul>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Lectura ejecutiva</div>
      <p style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:11px;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 12px">Las dimensiones <b style="color:var(--acc-rd)">Económica, Tecnológica y Legal</b> son las de mayor impacto y exigen respuesta inmediata: justifican mantener la inversión P96 incluso ante presión de recortes OPEX. Las dimensiones soft (P, S, E ambiental) actúan como contexto que refuerza la dirección sin urgencia táctica.</p>`;
  }

  // ────────────────────── PORTER ──────────────────────
  else if(k==='porter'){
    const xrefP = {
      'F1':' Competencia visible en proyectos digitales como '+bgXLink('proj','PRJ-MOB','PRJ-MOB','var(--acc-bl)')+' y '+bgXLink('proj','PRJ-API','PRJ-API','var(--acc-bl)')+'.',
      'F2':' Mitigación vía '+bgXLink('proj','PRJ-PAY','PRJ-PAY','var(--acc-bl)')+' (modernización pagos).',
      'F3':' KPI '+bgXLink('kpi','cmp','Compliance 94','var(--acc-bl)')+' como argumento comercial.',
      'F4':' Lock-in visible en '+bgXLink('block','BLK-001','BLK-001','var(--acc-rd)')+' (Azure) y '+bgXLink('block','BLK-003','BLK-003','var(--acc-or)')+' (Dell).',
      'F5':' Ver '+bgXLink('proj','PRJ-T24','PRJ-T24','var(--acc-bl)')+' (core T24) bloqueado por Consejo, '+bgXLink('block','BLK-004','BLK-004','var(--acc-or)')+'.'
    };
    body += `<div class="bg-sec-h">Datos vivos del sector competitivo</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat rd"><div class="l">Bloqueos vendors</div><div class="v">${blRed}</div><div class="s">≥12 días · F4</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat or"><div class="l">Proyectos críticos</div><div class="v">${reds}</div><div class="s">CPI&lt;0.85 · F5</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="l">Decisiones C-level</div><div class="v">${decsCt}</div><div class="s">comité semanal</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Las 5 fuerzas competitivas</div>`;
    body += s.items.map(it=>{
      const extra = xrefP[it.k]||'';
      const lvLb = it.lv==='alta'?'INTENSIDAD ALTA':it.lv==='med'?'INTENSIDAD MEDIA':'INTENSIDAD BAJA';
      return `<div class="bg-strat-row">
        <div class="ic ${it.ic}">${it.k}</div>
        <div><div class="nm">${it.nm}</div><div class="ds">${it.ds}${extra}</div></div>
        <span class="lv ${it.lv}">${lvLb}</span>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
    body += `<div class="bg-sec-h" style="margin-top:14px">Cómo Cognitive PMO mitiga cada fuerza</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-2" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="l">F4 · Proveedores</div><div class="v" style="font-size:10px;line-height:1.4">Mapa RUN expone el lock-in con vendors → permite negociar mejores SLAs. Visible en ${bgXLink('alert','ALT-002','ALT-002','var(--acc-rd)')}.</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="l">F5 · Rivalidad</div><div class="v" style="font-size:10px;line-height:1.4">Cartera BUILD con gates G0–G5 acelera time-to-market vs. competidores tradicionales.</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="l">F1+F2 · Entrantes</div><div class="v" style="font-size:10px;line-height:1.4">Adopción IA al 68% (meta 60% superada) crea barrera tecnológica frente a neobancos.</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="l">F3 · Clientes</div><div class="v" style="font-size:10px;line-height:1.4">Compliance 94/100 actúa como argumento de retención corporativa.</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Lectura ejecutiva</div>
      <p style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:11px;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 12px">4 de 5 fuerzas en intensidad alta confirman un sector estructuralmente difícil. Cognitive PMO no cambia el sector pero <b style="color:var(--acc-pu)">cambia la posición del banco</b>: hace visible el lock-in (F4), acelera la respuesta (F5) y demuestra cumplimiento (F3). El P96 es por tanto inversión defensiva justificada.</p>`;
  }

  // ────────────────────── OKR ──────────────────────
  else if(k==='okr'){
    const krLinks = {
      'KR1.1':bgXLink('kpi','cart','KPI Cartera','var(--acc-pk)'),
      'KR1.2':bgXLink('dec','DEC-001','DEC-001','var(--acc-pk)'),
      'KR1.3':bgXLink('kpi','gov','KPI Gobernanza','var(--acc-pk)'),
      'KR2.1':bgXLink('kpi','run','KPI RUN','var(--acc-pk)'),
      'KR2.2':bgXLink('alert','ALT-002','ALT-002','var(--acc-pk)'),
      'KR2.3':bgXLink('hito','4','Hito DORA 04-may','var(--acc-pk)'),
      'KR3.1':bgXLink('kpi','ia','KPI IA','var(--acc-pk)'),
      'KR3.2':bgXLink('proj','PRJ-CAT','PRJ-CAT','var(--acc-pk)'),
      'KR3.3':bgXLink('proj','PRJ-GOV','PRJ-GOV','var(--acc-pk)')
    };
    const allKrs = s.objs.flatMap(o=>o.krs);
    const avgConf = Math.round(allKrs.reduce((a,k)=>a+k.p,0)/allKrs.length);
    body += `<div class="bg-sec-h">Resumen del trimestre</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-3" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="l">Objetivos</div><div class="v">3</div><div class="s">Q2 2026</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pu"><div class="l">Key Results</div><div class="v">9</div><div class="s">3 por objetivo</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat ${avgConf>=70?'gn':avgConf>=50?'or':'rd'}"><div class="l">Confianza media</div><div class="v">${avgConf}%</div><div class="s">${avgConf>=50&&avgConf<=70?'rango sano':avgConf<50?'subir esfuerzo':'demasiado fácil'}</div></div>
      </div>`;
    body += s.objs.map(o=>{
      const oAvg = Math.round(o.krs.reduce((a,k)=>a+k.p,0)/o.krs.length);
      return `<div class="bg-sec-h" style="color:var(--acc-pk)">▸ ${o.n} · ${oAvg}% — ${o.t}</div>
      ${o.krs.map(kr=>{
        const krCode = kr.t.split(' — ')[0];
        const link = krLinks[krCode]||'';
        return `<div class="bg-strat-row">
          <div class="ic pk">${o.n}</div>
          <div><div class="nm">${kr.t}</div>${link?`<div class="ds">Vinculado a ${link}</div>`:''}<div class="bg-okr-bar"><div style="width:${kr.p}%"></div></div></div>
          <span class="lv kr">${kr.p}%</span>
        </div>`;
      }).join('')}`;
    }).join('');
    body += `<div class="bg-sec-h" style="margin-top:14px">Cadencia del marco OKR</div>
      <div class="bg-grid-2" style="margin-bottom:12px">
        <div class="bg-stat pk"><div class="l">Ciclo estratégico</div><div class="v" style="font-size:11px">Anual (2026)</div><div class="s">Los 3 objetivos son contrato para el comité</div></div>
        <div class="bg-stat pk"><div class="l">Ciclo táctico</div><div class="v" style="font-size:11px">Trimestral (Q1→Q4)</div><div class="s">Check-in semanal en comité del lunes</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-sec-h">Filosofía OKR</div>
      <p style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:11px;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 12px">Los <b>Objetivos</b> describen el "qué" inspirador y deben ser ambiciosos —incluso "incómodos"— para empujar a la organización fuera de su zona de confort. Los <b>Key Results</b> son el "cómo medirlo": hitos concretos, numéricos y verificables. Una confianza media del <b style="color:var(--acc-pk)">${avgConf}%</b> indica que los OKRs están bien calibrados (rango sano 50–70%).</p>`;
  }

  body += `${bgPulAudit('STRAT.'+k.toUpperCase())}</div>`;

  bgOpenModal(bgPulMh(s.eyebrow, s.title, s.sub, s.tag, s.tagCol)+body);
}

bgRenderPulso();

// Cerrar al click fuera o ESC
const _bgOverlay = document.getElementById('bg-modal-overlay');
if(_bgOverlay) _bgOverlay.addEventListener('click',e=>{
  if(e.target.id==='bg-modal-overlay') bgCloseModal();
});
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{ if(e.key==='Escape') bgCloseModal(); });
</script>

<!-- Modal container -->
<div class="bg-modal-overlay" id="bg-modal-overlay">
  <div class="bg-modal" id="bg-modal-content"></div>
</div>

</body>
</html>
```

### FILE: frontend/tech-dashboard.html
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es" data-theme="dark">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Cognitive PMO · Technician Dashboard</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/xterm@5.3.0/css/xterm.min.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/xterm@5.3.0/lib/xterm.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/xterm-addon-fit@0.8.0/lib/xterm-addon-fit.min.js"></script>
<style>
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   COGNITIVE PMO — TECHNICIAN DASHBOARD v2
   Design System v5.1 — Full Interactive
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}

/* ── Theme Variables ── */
[data-theme="dark"]{
  --bg:#0d1117;--bg2:#161b22;--bg-card:#1c2128;
  --bg-el:#21262d;--bg-l2:#22262e;--bg-l3:#2a2e37;
  --border:#30363d;--tx:#e6edf3;--tx2:#8b949e;
  --tx3:#6e7681;--acc-bl:#58a6ff;--acc-gn:#3fb950;
  --acc-rd:#f85149;--acc-or:#d29922;--acc-pu:#bc8cff;
  --acc-cy:#39d2c0;--shd:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);--shd-lg:rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
}
[data-theme="light"]{
  --bg:#f6f8fa;--bg2:#ffffff;--bg-card:#ffffff;
  --bg-el:#f0f3f6;--bg-l2:#f0f3f6;--bg-l3:#e8ecf0;
  --border:#d1d9e0;--tx:#1f2328;--tx2:#656d76;
  --tx3:#8b949e;--acc-bl:#0969da;--acc-gn:#1a7f37;
  --acc-rd:#cf222e;--acc-or:#d29922;--acc-pu:#8250df;
  --acc-cy:#0891b2;--shd:rgba(0,0,0,0.08);--shd-lg:rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}

body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--tx);overflow-x:hidden;min-height:100vh}
code,.mono{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}

/* ── Header ── */
.hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:11px 22px;background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100}
.hdr-l{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.hdr-logo{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#475569,#64748b);flex-shrink:0}
.hdr-t{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx)}
.hdr-s{font-size:11px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:1px}
.hdr-r{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
.hdr-id{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--tx3);background:var(--bg-el);padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:600}
.hdr-silo{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
.hdr-nivel{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--bg-el);color:var(--acc-pu)}
.pdot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--acc-gn);animation:p 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes p{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.4}}
.avatar{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#475569,#64748b);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.avatar:hover{transform:scale(1.08);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--acc-bl)}
.thm{width:34px;height:18px;background:var(--bg-el);border-radius:9px;position:relative;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.thm-dot{width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--acc-bl);position:absolute;top:2px;left:2px;transition:.3s}
[data-theme="light"] .thm-dot{transform:translateX(16px)}

/* ── Tabs ── */
.tabs{display:flex;background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:0 22px;overflow-x:auto}
.tb{padding:11px 18px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--tx2);background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:.2s;white-space:nowrap}
.tb:hover{color:var(--tx)}
.tb.a{color:var(--tx)}
.tb.a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-1px;left:0;right:0;height:2px;border-radius:2px 2px 0 0}
.tb[data-tab="0"].a::after{background:var(--acc-bl)}
.tb[data-tab="1"].a::after{background:var(--acc-rd)}
.tb[data-tab="2"].a::after{background:var(--acc-pu)}
.tb[data-tab="3"].a::after{background:var(--acc-gn)}

/* ── Content ── */
.cnt{padding:18px 22px;max-width:1440px;margin:0 auto}
.tp{display:none}.tp.a{display:block;animation:fadeIn .25s ease}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(3px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

/* ── Stat Cards ── */
.sr{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(175px,1fr));gap:14px;margin-bottom:20px}
.sc{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:15px 16px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:.2s;cursor:pointer}
.sc:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px var(--shd);border-color:var(--acc-bl)}
.sc::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px}
.sc.red::before{background:var(--acc-rd)}.sc.org::before{background:var(--acc-or)}
.sc.grn::before{background:var(--acc-gn)}.sc.blu::before{background:var(--acc-bl)}
.sc.pur::before{background:var(--acc-pu)}.sc.cyn::before{background:var(--acc-cy)}
.sl{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--tx2);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:6px}
.sv{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:var(--tx)}
.sv-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--tx2);margin-top:3px;font-weight:500}

/* ── Panels ── */
.panel{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:16px;overflow:hidden}
.panel-h{padding:12px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.panel-h h3{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.cnt-badge{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;background:var(--bg-el);color:var(--tx2);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:11px}
.panel-b{padding:14px 16px}

/* ── Cognitive PMO SVG Icons (propietarios) ── */
.ico-svg{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:18px;height:18px;flex-shrink:0;vertical-align:middle}
.ico-svg svg{width:100%;height:100%}
.ico-svg.sm{width:14px;height:14px}
.ico-svg.lg{width:20px;height:20px}
.panel-h .ico-svg{margin-right:2px}

/* ── Collapsible panels ── */
.panel-toggle{background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--tx2);padding:4px;border-radius:6px;transition:.2s;display:flex;align-items:center}
.panel-toggle:hover{color:var(--tx);background:var(--bg-el)}
.panel-collapsible{transition:max-height .3s ease,opacity .25s ease,padding .3s ease;max-height:500px;opacity:1;overflow:hidden}
.panel-collapsible.collapsed{max-height:0;opacity:0;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0}
.panel-toggle.collapsed svg{transform:rotate(-90deg)}
.panel-toggle svg{transition:transform .25s ease}

/* ── Feed ── */
.feed{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.feed-item{display:flex;gap:12px;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid transparent;transition:.2s;cursor:pointer}
.feed-item:hover{border-color:var(--acc-bl);transform:translateX(2px)}
.feed-ico{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:14px}
.feed-ico.run{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.feed-ico.build{background:rgba(188,140,255,.12);color:var(--acc-pu)}
.feed-ico.info{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);color:var(--acc-bl)}
.feed-ico.ok{background:rgba(63,185,80,.12);color:var(--acc-gn)}
.feed-txt{flex:1;font-size:12px;line-height:1.5}
.feed-txt strong{color:var(--tx);font-weight:600}
.feed-time{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;white-space:nowrap;margin-top:2px}

/* ── Alerts ── */
.alert{padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.alert:hover{transform:translateX(2px)}
.alert.warn{background:rgba(210,153,34,.1);border:1px solid rgba(210,153,34,.25);color:var(--acc-or)}
.alert.danger{background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.25);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.alert.info{background:rgba(88,166,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(88,166,255,.25);color:var(--acc-bl)}

/* ── Progress Rings in MI DIA ── */
.progress-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:14px;margin-bottom:20px}
.prog-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;transition:.2s;cursor:pointer}
.prog-card:hover{border-color:var(--acc-bl);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.prog-ring{position:relative;width:56px;height:56px;flex-shrink:0}
.prog-ring svg{transform:rotate(-90deg)}
.prog-ring .ring-val{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;font-weight:700}
.prog-info .prog-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px}
.prog-info .prog-detail{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2)}

/* ═══════════════════ KANBAN ═══════════════════ */
.kanban{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px;min-height:400px}
.kb-col{background:var(--bg-el);border-radius:12px;border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:300px}
.kb-col-h{padding:12px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.kb-col-h h4{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.kb-col-h .dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
.kb-col-h .kcnt{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;background:var(--bg-l3);color:var(--tx2);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:11px}
.kb-body{padding:8px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;overflow-y:auto}
.kk{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s;position:relative}
.kk:hover{border-color:var(--acc-bl);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px var(--shd)}
.kk.dragging{opacity:.5;transform:rotate(2deg)}
.kk-id{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--tx3);margin-bottom:4px}
.kk-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--tx);line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:6px}
.kk-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.kk-pri{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;text-transform:uppercase}
.kk-pri.p1{background:rgba(248,81,73,.15);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.kk-pri.p2{background:rgba(210,153,34,.15);color:var(--acc-or)}
.kk-pri.p3{background:rgba(88,166,255,.15);color:var(--acc-bl)}
.kk-pri.p4{background:rgba(139,148,158,.15);color:var(--tx2)}
.kk-sla{font-size:9px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:var(--tx3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px}
.kk-sla.danger{color:var(--acc-rd)}.kk-sla.warn{color:var(--acc-or)}
.kk-ci{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);background:var(--bg-el);padding:2px 5px;border-radius:3px}
.kk-pct{position:absolute;top:10px;right:12px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700}
.kk-bar{height:3px;background:var(--bg-l3);border-radius:2px;margin-top:8px;overflow:hidden}
.kk-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:2px;transition:.3s}
.kb-col.drag-over{background:var(--bg-l3);border-color:var(--acc-bl)}

/* ═══════════════════ SPRINT BOARD ═══════════════════ */
.sprint-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px}
.sprint-info{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
.sprint-name{font-size:15px;font-weight:700}
.sprint-dates{font-size:11px;color:var(--tx2);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}
.sprint-bar{flex:1;min-width:200px;max-width:400px;height:8px;background:var(--bg-el);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden}
.sprint-bar-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--acc-pu),var(--acc-bl));border-radius:4px;transition:.5s}
.sprint-pct{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--acc-pu)}
.sprint-board{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px}
.sb-col{background:var(--bg-el);border-radius:12px;border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.sb-col-h{padding:12px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.sb-col-h h4{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.sb-body{padding:8px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;overflow-y:auto}
.sk{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.sk:hover{border-color:var(--acc-pu);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.sk-proj{font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--acc-pu);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px;margin-bottom:3px}
.sk-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:6px}
.sk-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.sk-sp{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg-el);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--acc-pu)}
.sk-type{font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:600}
.sk-type.feat{background:rgba(63,185,80,.12);color:var(--acc-gn)}
.sk-type.bug{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.sk-type.task{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);color:var(--acc-bl)}
.sk-type.tech{background:rgba(210,153,34,.12);color:var(--acc-or)}
.sk-date{font-size:9px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:var(--tx3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px}
.sk-date.soon{color:var(--acc-or)}.sk-date.overdue{color:var(--acc-rd)}
.sk-attach{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px}
.sb-col.drag-over{background:var(--bg-l3);border-color:var(--acc-pu)}

/* ═══════════════════ DETAIL MODAL (fichas) ═══════════════════ */
.detail-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.65);z-index:200;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(4px)}
.detail-overlay.show{display:flex}
.detail-modal{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;width:92%;max-width:720px;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 24px 48px var(--shd-lg);animation:fadeIn .2s ease}
.dm-hdr{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px}
.dm-hdr-left{flex:1}
.dm-hdr h2{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}
.dm-hdr .dm-id{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--tx3)}
.dm-close{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;transition:.2s;flex-shrink:0}
.dm-close:hover{background:var(--acc-rd);color:#fff;border-color:var(--acc-rd)}
.dm-body{padding:18px 20px}
.dm-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px}
.dm-field{margin-bottom:10px}
.dm-field label{display:block;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--tx3);margin-bottom:4px}
.dm-field .val{font-size:13px;font-weight:500}
.dm-badges{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.dm-badge{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px}

/* Subtasks inside detail modal */
.dm-subtasks{margin-top:14px}
.dm-subtasks h4{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--tx2);margin-bottom:10px;padding-bottom:6px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.dm-st{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;position:relative;transition:.2s}
.dm-st:hover{border-color:var(--acc-bl)}
.dm-st-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;padding-right:60px}
.dm-st-desc{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:6px}
.dm-st-meta{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}
.dm-st-tag{font-size:8px;font-weight:600;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px}
.dm-st-hours{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;position:absolute;top:10px;right:12px}
.dm-st-check{font-size:10px;color:var(--acc-gn);margin-top:5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.dm-st-status{font-size:9px;font-weight:600;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;position:absolute;top:10px;right:50px}

/* Progress bar inside detail */
.dm-progress{margin:14px 0}
.dm-pbar{height:6px;background:var(--bg-l3);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
.dm-pbar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:.5s}
.dm-pbar-label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:4px}
.dm-pbar-label span{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2)}
.dm-pbar-label strong{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px}

/* Notes/Comments section in detail modal */
.dm-notes{margin-top:16px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden}
.dm-notes-h{padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700}
.dm-notes-h .ico{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0}
.dm-notes-body{padding:10px 14px;max-height:180px;overflow-y:auto}
.dm-note{margin-bottom:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.5}
.dm-note.system{background:rgba(88,166,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(88,166,255,.12);color:var(--acc-bl)}
.dm-note.tech{background:rgba(57,210,192,.06);border:1px solid rgba(57,210,192,.12);color:var(--acc-cy)}
.dm-note .note-author{font-size:9px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;display:block}
.dm-note .note-time{font-size:8px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;float:right}
.dm-notes-input{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:10px 14px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.dm-notes-input input{flex:1;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;color:var(--tx);font-size:11px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none}
.dm-notes-input input:focus{border-color:var(--acc-cy)}
.dm-notes-input button{padding:7px 14px;border-radius:6px;border:none;background:var(--acc-cy);color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.dm-notes-input button:hover{opacity:.85}

/* Document attachment in detail */
.dm-attach{margin-top:12px;display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.dm-attach-btn{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;padding:6px 12px;border:1px dashed var(--border);border-radius:6px;transition:.2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.dm-attach-btn:hover{border-color:var(--acc-cy);color:var(--acc-cy)}
.dm-attach-file{font-size:10px;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;color:var(--tx2)}

/* ═══════════════════ COPILOT SIDEBAR ═══════════════════ */
.copilot-fab{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-cy),#06b6d4);color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(57,210,192,.35);z-index:150;transition:.3s}
.copilot-fab:hover{transform:scale(1.1);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(57,210,192,.45)}
.copilot-fab.open{border-radius:12px;width:44px;height:44px;bottom:auto;right:auto;position:static;box-shadow:none;font-size:16px}

.copilot-panel{position:fixed;top:0;right:-400px;width:390px;height:100vh;background:var(--bg-card);border-left:1px solid var(--border);z-index:160;display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:right .3s ease;box-shadow:-8px 0 32px var(--shd-lg)}
.copilot-panel.open{right:0}
.cp-hdr{padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.cp-hdr-ico{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-cy),#06b6d4);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}
.cp-hdr-info{flex:1}
.cp-hdr-info h3{font-size:13px;font-weight:700}
.cp-hdr-info span{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2)}
.cp-close{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px}
.cp-close:hover{background:var(--acc-rd);color:#fff;border-color:var(--acc-rd)}
.cp-context{padding:8px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.cp-ctx{font-size:9px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--bg-el);color:var(--tx2);font-weight:600;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.cp-ctx.active{background:rgba(57,210,192,.1);color:var(--acc-cy);border-color:rgba(57,210,192,.25)}
.cp-suggestions{padding:10px 16px;display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.cp-sug{font-size:10px;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:14px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.cp-sug:hover{border-color:var(--acc-cy);color:var(--acc-cy);background:rgba(57,210,192,.06)}
.cp-msgs{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:12px 16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.cp-msg{display:flex;gap:8px;max-width:95%;animation:fadeIn .2s ease}
.cp-msg.user{align-self:flex-end;flex-direction:row-reverse}
.cp-msg-av{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0}
.cp-msg.bot .cp-msg-av{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-cy),#06b6d4);color:#fff}
.cp-msg.user .cp-msg-av{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#475569,#64748b);color:#fff}
.cp-msg-bub{padding:8px 12px;border-radius:10px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.6}
.cp-msg.bot .cp-msg-bub{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-top-left-radius:3px}
.cp-msg.user .cp-msg-bub{background:rgba(57,210,192,.1);border:1px solid rgba(57,210,192,.2);border-top-right-radius:3px}
.cp-input{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:12px 16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.cp-input input{flex:1;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-el);color:var(--tx);font-size:11px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none}
.cp-input input:focus{border-color:var(--acc-cy)}
.cp-input button{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc-cy),#06b6d4);color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:.2s}
.cp-input button:hover{transform:scale(1.05)}

/* ═══════════════════ PROFILE MODAL ═══════════════════ */
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);z-index:200;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(4px)}
.modal-overlay.show{display:flex}
.modal{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;width:90%;max-width:680px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 24px 48px var(--shd-lg)}
.modal-hdr{padding:18px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.modal-hdr h2{font-size:17px;font-weight:700}
.modal-close{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;transition:.2s}
.modal-close:hover{background:var(--acc-rd);color:#fff;border-color:var(--acc-rd)}
.modal-body{padding:22px}
.prof-top{display:flex;gap:20px;margin-bottom:24px;align-items:center}
.prof-avatar{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#475569,#64748b);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:24px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0}
.prof-info h3{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}
.prof-info-row{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:6px}
.prof-section{margin-bottom:22px}
.prof-section h4{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--tx2);margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:6px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.skills-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}
.skill-chip{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px}
.prof-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px}
.prof-stat{text-align:center;padding:14px;background:var(--bg-el);border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.prof-stat .val{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:22px;font-weight:800}
.prof-stat .lbl{font-size:10px;color:var(--tx2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.3px}

/* ── Silo Colors ── */
.silo-frontend{background:rgba(59,130,246,.12);color:#3b82f6}
.silo-soporte{background:rgba(139,143,152,.12);color:#8b8f98}
.silo-redes{background:rgba(6,182,212,.12);color:#06b6d4}
.silo-windows{background:rgba(168,85,247,.12);color:#a855f7}
.silo-backend{background:rgba(249,115,22,.12);color:#f97316}
.silo-qa{background:rgba(234,179,8,.12);color:#eab308}
.silo-devops{background:rgba(34,197,94,.12);color:#22c55e}
.silo-seguridad{background:rgba(239,68,68,.12);color:#ef4444}
.silo-bbdd{background:rgba(168,85,247,.12);color:#a855f7}

/* ═══════════════════ TERMINAL ═══════════════════ */
.term-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:calc(100vh - 160px);max-height:750px}
.term-toolbar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px 16px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px 12px 0 0;flex-wrap:wrap}
.term-toolbar label{font-size:9px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--tx3)}
.term-select{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--tx);font-size:11px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;min-width:200px}
```
