.term-select:focus{border-color:var(--acc-gn);outline:none}
.term-status{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:10px;color:var(--acc-gn);font-weight:600;margin-left:auto}
.term-status .dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--acc-gn);animation:p 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.term-rec{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:9px;color:var(--acc-rd);font-weight:600;padding:3px 8px;background:rgba(248,81,73,.08);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:4px}
.term-rec .rdot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--acc-rd);animation:p 1s ease-in-out infinite}
.term-body{flex:1;background:#0a0e14;border:1px solid var(--border);border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 12px 12px;padding:12px 16px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:#33ff33;overflow-y:auto;line-height:1.6;position:relative}
.term-line{display:flex;gap:0;margin-bottom:2px;word-break:break-all}
.term-prompt{color:#58a6ff;white-space:nowrap;margin-right:8px}
.term-cmd{color:#e6edf3}
.term-output{color:#8b949e;white-space:pre-wrap;margin-bottom:6px;padding-left:0}
.term-cursor{display:inline-block;width:8px;height:14px;background:#33ff33;animation:blink 1s step-end infinite;vertical-align:middle}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0}}
.term-input-line{display:flex;align-items:center}
.term-input{background:none;border:none;color:#e6edf3;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;flex:1;outline:none;caret-color:#33ff33}
.term-linked{font-size:9px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.term-linked.active{background:rgba(88,166,255,.08);border-color:rgba(88,166,255,.2);color:var(--acc-bl)}

/* ═══════════════════ CHAT IN MODAL ═══════════════════ */
.dm-chat{margin-top:16px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden}
.dm-chat-h{padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.dm-chat-h .ico{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0}
.dm-chat-h .title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;flex:1}
.dm-chat-h .participants{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3)}
.dm-chat-body{padding:10px 14px;max-height:220px;overflow-y:auto}
.dm-chat-msg{margin-bottom:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.5}
.dm-chat-msg.system{background:rgba(88,166,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(88,166,255,.12)}
.dm-chat-msg.gov{background:rgba(248,81,73,.06);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.12)}
.dm-chat-msg.pm{background:rgba(188,140,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(188,140,255,.12)}
.dm-chat-msg.tech{background:rgba(57,210,192,.06);border:1px solid rgba(57,210,192,.12)}
.dm-chat-msg .msg-author{font-size:9px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.dm-chat-msg .msg-time{font-size:8px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}
.dm-chat-msg .msg-role{font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase}
.dm-chat-msg.gov .msg-role{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.dm-chat-msg.pm .msg-role{background:rgba(188,140,255,.12);color:var(--acc-pu)}
.dm-chat-msg.tech .msg-role{background:rgba(57,210,192,.12);color:var(--acc-cy)}
.dm-chat-msg.system .msg-role{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);color:var(--acc-bl)}
.dm-chat-input{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:10px 14px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.dm-chat-input input{flex:1;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;color:var(--tx);font-size:11px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none}
.dm-chat-input input:focus{border-color:var(--acc-cy)}
.dm-chat-input button{padding:7px 14px;border-radius:6px;border:none;background:var(--acc-cy);color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.dm-chat-input .btn-meet{padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--tx2);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;transition:.2s}
.dm-chat-input .btn-meet:hover{border-color:var(--acc-bl);color:var(--acc-bl)}

/* ═══════════════════ MI DÍA — Teams-style Chat Panel ═══════════════════ */
.teams-panel{display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px 1fr;height:620px;border-radius:0 0 12px 12px;overflow:hidden}
.teams-sidebar{background:var(--bg2);border-right:1px solid var(--border);overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.teams-sidebar-h{padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx2);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0}
.teams-sidebar-h .cnt-badge{font-size:9px}
.conv-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;border-left:3px solid transparent;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.conv-item:hover{background:var(--bg-el)}
.conv-item.active{background:var(--bg-el);border-left-color:var(--acc-cy)}
.conv-ico{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;flex-shrink:0;font-weight:700}
.conv-ico.run{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.conv-ico.build{background:rgba(188,140,255,.12);color:var(--acc-pu)}
.conv-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.conv-info .conv-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.conv-info .conv-last{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;margin-top:2px}
.conv-right{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0}
.conv-badge{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;background:var(--acc-cy);color:#fff;min-width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0 4px}
.conv-time{font-size:8px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}

/* Teams chat area (right side) */
.teams-chat{display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:var(--bg-card)}
.teams-chat-header{padding:10px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0}
.teams-chat-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.teams-chat-title .type-tag{font-size:8px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase}
.teams-chat-title .type-tag.run{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.teams-chat-title .type-tag.build{background:rgba(188,140,255,.12);color:var(--acc-pu)}
.teams-chat-actions{display:flex;gap:6px}
.teams-chat-actions button{padding:5px 10px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-el);color:var(--tx2);font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:600}
.teams-chat-actions button:hover{border-color:var(--acc-bl);color:var(--acc-bl)}

/* Participants bar */
.teams-participants{padding:8px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg2)}
.participant-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:3px 10px 3px 3px;border-radius:14px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:10px;transition:.15s}
.participant-chip:hover{border-color:var(--acc-cy)}
.participant-avatar{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}
.participant-avatar.gov{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f85149,#da3633)}
.participant-avatar.pm{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#bc8cff,#8b5cf6)}
.participant-avatar.tech{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#475569,#64748b)}
.participant-avatar.agent{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#58a6ff,#388bfd)}
.participant-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--tx)}
.participant-role{color:var(--tx3);font-size:8px}
.participant-dept{color:var(--tx3);font-size:8px;font-style:italic}

/* Chat messages area */
.teams-chat-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:14px 16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.teams-msg{display:flex;gap:10px;max-width:85%}
.teams-msg.self{margin-left:auto;flex-direction:row-reverse}
.teams-msg-avatar{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}
.teams-msg-avatar.gov{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f85149,#da3633)}
.teams-msg-avatar.pm{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#bc8cff,#8b5cf6)}
.teams-msg-avatar.tech{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#475569,#64748b)}
.teams-msg-avatar.agent{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#58a6ff,#388bfd)}
.teams-msg-bubble{background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.6}
.teams-msg.self .teams-msg-bubble{background:rgba(57,210,192,.08);border-color:rgba(57,210,192,.2)}
.teams-msg-meta{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:3px}
.teams-msg-meta .msg-sender{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx)}
.teams-msg-meta .msg-role-tag{font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase}
.teams-msg-meta .msg-role-tag.gov{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.teams-msg-meta .msg-role-tag.pm{background:rgba(188,140,255,.12);color:var(--acc-pu)}
.teams-msg-meta .msg-role-tag.tech{background:rgba(57,210,192,.12);color:var(--acc-cy)}
.teams-msg-meta .msg-role-tag.agent{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);color:var(--acc-bl)}
.teams-msg-meta .msg-time{font-size:8px;color:var(--tx3);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}
.teams-msg-text{color:var(--tx);font-size:11px;line-height:1.6}

/* Chat input bar */
.teams-chat-input{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:10px 16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;align-items:center}
.teams-chat-input input{flex:1;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 14px;color:var(--tx);font-size:12px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none}
.teams-chat-input input:focus{border-color:var(--acc-cy);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(57,210,192,.15)}
.teams-chat-input .btn-send{padding:9px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:none;background:var(--acc-cy);color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.teams-chat-input .btn-send:hover{filter:brightness(1.15)}
.teams-chat-input .btn-attach{padding:9px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-el);color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;transition:.2s}
.teams-chat-input .btn-attach:hover{border-color:var(--acc-bl);color:var(--acc-bl)}
.teams-chat-input .btn-meet{padding:9px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-el);color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;transition:.2s}
.teams-chat-input .btn-meet:hover{border-color:var(--acc-bl);color:var(--acc-bl)}

/* Empty state */
.teams-empty{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--tx3);gap:8px}
.teams-empty-ico{font-size:40px;opacity:.4}
.teams-empty-txt{font-size:12px}

/* ═══════════════════ Teams Chat — Tabs (Chat / Files) ═══════════════════ */
.teams-chat-tabs{display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg2)}
.teams-chat-tab{padding:7px 16px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:.15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:none;border-top:none;border-left:none;border-right:none;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.teams-chat-tab:hover{color:var(--tx)}
.teams-chat-tab.active{color:var(--acc-cy);border-bottom-color:var(--acc-cy)}
.teams-chat-tab .tab-cnt{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;background:var(--bg-el);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:8px;color:var(--tx3)}

/* Files panel */
.teams-files{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:12px 16px;display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.teams-files.active{display:flex}
.teams-files-toolbar{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px}
.teams-files-toolbar button{padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-el);color:var(--tx2);font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.teams-files-toolbar button:hover{border-color:var(--acc-cy);color:var(--acc-cy)}
.file-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg-el);border:1px solid transparent;transition:.15s;cursor:pointer}
.file-item:hover{border-color:var(--acc-cy);background:var(--bg-l2)}
.file-ico{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:10px;font-weight:700}
.file-ico.doc{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);color:var(--acc-bl)}
.file-ico.sheet{background:rgba(63,185,80,.12);color:var(--acc-gn)}
.file-ico.pdf{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:var(--acc-rd)}
.file-ico.img{background:rgba(210,153,34,.12);color:var(--acc-or)}
.file-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.file-info .file-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.file-info .file-meta{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3);margin-top:2px;display:flex;gap:8px}
.file-actions{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0}
.file-actions button{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--tx3);cursor:pointer;font-size:10px;transition:.15s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.file-actions button:hover{border-color:var(--acc-cy);color:var(--acc-cy)}
.file-collab{display:flex;margin-left:auto;margin-right:8px}
.file-collab .collab-dot{width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-left:-4px;border:2px solid var(--bg-el)}
.file-collab .collab-dot:first-child{margin-left:0}

/* ── Responsive ── */
@media(max-width:900px){.kanban,.sprint-board{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.sr{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.prof-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.progress-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.teams-panel{grid-template-columns:220px 1fr;height:520px}}
@media(max-width:600px){.kanban,.sprint-board{grid-template-columns:1fr}.sr,.progress-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}.hdr{padding:11px 14px}.cnt{padding:14px}.tabs{padding:0 14px}.copilot-panel{width:100%}.teams-panel{grid-template-columns:1fr;height:auto}.teams-sidebar{max-height:200px}.teams-chat{min-height:300px}}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:3px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--tx3)}
.notif-bell{position:relative;cursor:pointer;padding:4px 6px;border-radius:6px;transition:background .2s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;}
.notif-bell:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);}
.notif-bell svg{width:18px;height:18px;stroke:var(--tx2,#8b8f98);fill:none;stroke-width:1.8;}
.notif-badge{position:absolute;top:0;right:0;min-width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:7px;background:#ef4444;color:#fff;font-size:8px;font-weight:800;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0 3px;line-height:1;}
.notif-badge.show{display:flex;}
.notif-panel{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 8px);right:0;width:320px;max-height:380px;background:var(--bg2,#1e2128);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5);z-index:9100;display:none;overflow:hidden;}
.notif-panel.open{display:block;}
.notif-panel-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:10px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3,#252830);}
.notif-panel-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--tx);}.notif-mark-all{font-size:9px;color:var(--acc,#58a6ff);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;}
.notif-list{max-height:320px;overflow-y:auto;}
.notif-item{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;}
.notif-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);}
.notif-item.unread{background:rgba(88,166,255,.05);border-left:3px solid var(--acc,#58a6ff);}
.notif-ico{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:13px;}
.notif-ico.asignacion{background:rgba(34,197,94,.12);}.notif-ico.estado{background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);}.notif-ico.alerta{background:rgba(234,179,8,.12);}.notif-ico.urgente{background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);}.notif-ico.info{background:rgba(139,92,246,.12);}
.notif-body{flex:1;min-width:0;}.notif-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--tx);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.notif-msg{font-size:9px;color:var(--tx3,#6b7280);margin-top:1px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;}
.notif-time{font-size:8px;color:var(--tx3,#6b7280);margin-top:2px;font-family:var(--mono,monospace);}
.notif-empty{padding:24px;text-align:center;color:var(--tx3,#6b7280);font-size:11px;}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ═══════════ HEADER ═══════════ -->
<div class="hdr">
  <div class="hdr-l">
    <div class="hdr-logo">
      <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
        <path d="M12 1.5L21.5 6.75V17.25L12 22.5L2.5 17.25V6.75L12 1.5Z" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/>
        <circle cx="12" cy="8.5" r="2.8" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <path d="M7 17.5C7 14.5 9 13 12 13C15 13 17 14.5 17 17.5" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
        <circle cx="17.5" cy="12" r="2.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1"/>
        <path d="M17.5 10.2V10M17.5 14V13.8M15.7 11L15.5 10.9M19.5 13.1L19.3 13M15.7 13L15.5 13.1M19.5 10.9L19.3 11" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="hdr-t">Technician Dashboard</div>
      <div class="hdr-s">Cognitive PMO · BCC Bank</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hdr-r">
    <span class="hdr-id">FTE-007</span>
    <span class="hdr-silo silo-backend" style="border:1px solid rgba(249,115,22,.3)">Backend</span>
    <span class="hdr-nivel">N2</span>
    <div class="pdot"></div>
    <div class="notif-bell" id="notif-bell" onclick="toggleNotifPanel(event)">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg>
      <span class="notif-badge" id="notif-badge">0</span>
      <div class="notif-panel" id="notif-panel">
        <div class="notif-panel-header"><span class="notif-panel-title">Notificaciones</span><span class="notif-mark-all" onclick="notifMarkAll(event)">Marcar todo le&iacute;do</span></div>
        <div class="notif-list" id="notif-list"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="thm" onclick="toggleTheme()"><div class="thm-dot"></div></div>
    <div class="avatar" onclick="toggleProfile()" title="Mi Perfil">AS</div>
    <button onclick="doLogout()" style="padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--tx2,#8b8f98);font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor='#ef4444';this.style.color='#ef4444'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor='';this.style.color=''"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4"/><polyline points="16 17 21 12 16 7"/><line x1="21" y1="12" x2="9" y2="12"/></svg>Salir</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════ TABS (3 tabs — copilot is sidebar) ═══════════ -->
<div class="tabs">
  <button class="tb a" data-tab="0" onclick="switchTab(0)"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:4px"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="6.5"/><path d="M8 4.5v3.5h3"/></svg>MI DÍA</button>
  <button class="tb" data-tab="1" onclick="switchTab(1)"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:4px"><path d="M9 2L4 9h4.5l-.5 5 5-7H8.5L9 2z"/></svg>RUN</button>
  <button class="tb" data-tab="2" onclick="switchTab(2)"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:4px"><path d="M10 1.5L6 5.5l4 4-4 4"/><path d="M2 5.5h4M2 9.5h3M2 13.5h4"/></svg>BUILD</button>
  <button class="tb" data-tab="3" onclick="switchTab(3)"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:4px"><rect x="1.5" y="2" width="13" height="12" rx="2"/><path d="M4.5 6l2.5 2-2.5 2"/><line x1="8.5" y1="10" x2="11.5" y2="10"/></svg>TERMINAL</button>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     TAB 0 — MI DÍA
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="cnt">
<div class="tp a" id="tab-0">

  <!-- KPI Cards (clickable) -->
  <div class="sr">
    <div class="sc blu" onclick="showKpiDetail('carga')">
      <div class="sl">Carga actual</div>
      <div class="sv">45<span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--tx2)">%</span></div>
      <div class="sv-sub">de 200% máximo</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sc red" onclick="switchTab(1)">
      <div class="sl">Incidencias abiertas</div>
      <div class="sv">4</div>
      <div class="sv-sub">1 P1 · 2 P2 · 1 P3</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sc pur" onclick="switchTab(2)">
      <div class="sl">Tareas sprint</div>
      <div class="sv">6</div>
      <div class="sv-sub">Sprint 14 · 3 en curso</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sc org" onclick="showKpiDetail('sla')">
      <div class="sl">SLAs en riesgo</div>
      <div class="sv">2</div>
      <div class="sv-sub">1 vence en 45 min</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sc grn" onclick="showKpiDetail('resueltas')">
      <div class="sl">Resueltas este mes</div>
      <div class="sv">23</div>
      <div class="sv-sub">+15% vs mes anterior</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sc cyn" onclick="showKpiDetail('tmr')">
      <div class="sl">Tiempo medio resolución</div>
      <div class="sv mono">2.4<span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--tx2)">h</span></div>
      <div class="sv-sub">Objetivo: 3h</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Progress Counters -->
  <div class="progress-row">
    <div class="prog-card" onclick="switchTab(1)">
      <div class="prog-ring">
        <svg width="56" height="56" viewBox="0 0 56 56"><circle cx="28" cy="28" r="24" fill="none" stroke="var(--bg-l3)" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="28" cy="28" r="24" fill="none" stroke="var(--acc-rd)" stroke-width="5" stroke-dasharray="150.8" stroke-dashoffset="75.4" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
        <div class="ring-val" style="color:var(--acc-rd)">2/4</div>
      </div>
      <div class="prog-info">
        <div class="prog-label">Incidencias RUN</div>
        <div class="prog-detail">2 resueltas hoy · 1 P1 activa · 1 pendiente tercero</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="prog-card" onclick="switchTab(2)">
      <div class="prog-ring">
        <svg width="56" height="56" viewBox="0 0 56 56"><circle cx="28" cy="28" r="24" fill="none" stroke="var(--bg-l3)" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="28" cy="28" r="24" fill="none" stroke="var(--acc-pu)" stroke-width="5" stroke-dasharray="150.8" stroke-dashoffset="88" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
        <div class="ring-val" style="color:var(--acc-pu)">2/6</div>
      </div>
      <div class="prog-info">
        <div class="prog-label">Tareas BUILD Sprint 14</div>
        <div class="prog-detail">1 done · 1 testing · 2 in progress · 2 to do</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="prog-card" onclick="showKpiDetail('sla')">
      <div class="prog-ring">
        <svg width="56" height="56" viewBox="0 0 56 56"><circle cx="28" cy="28" r="24" fill="none" stroke="var(--bg-l3)" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="28" cy="28" r="24" fill="none" stroke="var(--acc-gn)" stroke-width="5" stroke-dasharray="150.8" stroke-dashoffset="4.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
        <div class="ring-val" style="color:var(--acc-gn)">97%</div>
      </div>
      <div class="prog-info">
        <div class="prog-label">Cumplimiento SLA</div>
        <div class="prog-detail">143 de 147 dentro de SLA · Objetivo: 95%</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Alerts (clickable, collapsible) -->
  <div class="panel" id="alerts-panel">
    <div class="panel-h" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="togglePanel('alerts')">
      <h3><span class="ico-svg"><svg viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M10 2L3.5 10.5H9L8 16l6.5-8.5H9L10 2z" fill="rgba(210,153,34,.15)"/></svg></span> Alertas activas <span class="cnt-badge">3</span></h3>
      <button class="panel-toggle" id="alerts-toggle" title="Minimizar/Maximizar"><span class="ico-svg"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M4 6l4 4 4-4"/></svg></span></button>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-b panel-collapsible" id="alerts-body">
      <div class="alert danger" onclick="openRunDetail('INC-012')"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor"><circle cx="7" cy="7" r="5"/><path d="M7 4.5v3" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="7" cy="9.5" r=".8" fill="#fff"/></svg></span> INC-20260406-012 — SLA P1 vence en <strong style="margin:0 3px">45 min</strong> — Servidor CORE-DB-01 sin respuesta</div>
      <div class="alert warn" onclick="openRunDetail('INC-089')"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor"><path d="M7 1.5L1 12.5h12z"/><path d="M7 6v3" stroke="#0d1117" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="7" cy="11" r=".7" fill="#0d1117"/></svg></span> INC-20260405-089 — SLA P2 al 80% — Latencia API Gateway supera umbral</div>
      <div class="alert info" onclick="openBuildDetail('BLD-022')"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor"><circle cx="7" cy="7" r="5"/><path d="M7 5v4" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="7" cy="3.8" r=".8" fill="#fff"/></svg></span> Nueva asignación — Tarea <strong style="margin:0 3px">BLD-SPR14-022</strong> del proyecto Migración Core</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ═══════ CONVERSACIONES ESTILO TEAMS ═══════ -->
  <div class="panel">
    <div class="panel-h"><h3><span class="ico-svg"><svg viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M2 3.5h10v7H6.5L3.5 13V10.5H2z" fill="rgba(57,210,192,.1)"/><path d="M6 10.5h10v7H12.5L9.5 20V17.5H6z" fill="rgba(57,210,192,.06)" transform="translate(0,-3) scale(1)"/><path d="M6.5 8h8v5.5h-2.5l-2 1.8V13.5H6.5z"/></svg></span> Conversaciones activas <span class="cnt-badge">4</span></h3></div>
    <div class="teams-panel" id="teams-chat-panel">
      <!-- LEFT: Conversation list -->
      <div class="teams-sidebar">
        <div class="teams-sidebar-h">Chats <span class="cnt-badge">4</span></div>
        <div class="conv-item active" onclick="selectConv('INC-012')">
          <div class="conv-ico run">R</div>
          <div class="conv-info">
            <div class="conv-name">INC-012 · CORE-DB-01</div>
            <div class="conv-last">AG-002: Asignada por skill match PostgreSQL</div>
          </div>
          <div class="conv-right"><div class="conv-badge">2</div><div class="conv-time">14:23</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="conv-item" onclick="selectConv('INC-089')">
          <div class="conv-ico run">R</div>
          <div class="conv-info">
            <div class="conv-name">INC-089 · API Gateway</div>
            <div class="conv-last">Tú: He identificado 3 queries con seq scan...</div>
          </div>
          <div class="conv-right"><div class="conv-time">Ayer</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="conv-item" onclick="selectConv('BLD-022')">
          <div class="conv-ico build">B</div>
          <div class="conv-info">
            <div class="conv-name">BLD-022 · Endpoint transactions</div>
            <div class="conv-last">Tú: Modelo Pydantic completado</div>
          </div>
          <div class="conv-right"><div class="conv-time">Ayer</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="conv-item" onclick="selectConv('BLD-024')">
          <div class="conv-ico build">B</div>
          <div class="conv-info">
            <div class="conv-name">BLD-024 · Optimización batch</div>
            <div class="conv-last">Tú: ORM hacía INSERT uno a uno</div>
          </div>
          <div class="conv-right"><div class="conv-time">Hoy</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- RIGHT: Active chat -->
      <div class="teams-chat" id="teams-chat-area">
        <!-- Header -->
        <div class="teams-chat-header">
          <div class="teams-chat-title"><span class="type-tag run">RUN</span> INC-012 · Servidor CORE-DB-01 sin respuesta</div>
          <div class="teams-chat-actions">
            <button onclick="openRunDetail('INC-012')"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="12" height="12" rx="2"/><line x1="5" y1="5.5" x2="11" y2="5.5"/><line x1="5" y1="8" x2="11" y2="8"/><line x1="5" y1="10.5" x2="9" y2="10.5"/></svg></span> Ver ficha</button>
            <button onclick="toggleScreenShare()"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="1.5" y="2.5" width="13" height="9" rx="1.5"/><line x1="5" y1="14" x2="11" y2="14"/><line x1="8" y1="11.5" x2="8" y2="14"/><path d="M6 7l2-2 2 2" fill="none"/></svg></span> Compartir</button>
            <button><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="8" cy="5.5" r="3"/><path d="M8 9.5v4"/><path d="M5.5 11.5h5"/></svg></span> Videollamada</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Participants -->
        <div class="teams-participants" id="teams-participants">
          <div class="participant-chip">
            <div class="participant-avatar gov">MR</div>
            <div><span class="participant-name">M. Rodríguez</span> <span class="participant-role">· Gobernador RUN</span> <span class="participant-dept">· Infraestructura</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="participant-chip">
            <div class="participant-avatar tech">JA</div>
            <div><span class="participant-name">J. A. Martínez</span> <span class="participant-role">· Técnico Sr</span> <span class="participant-dept">· Sistemas & BBDD</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="participant-chip">
            <div class="participant-avatar agent">AG</div>
            <div><span class="participant-name">AG-002</span> <span class="participant-role">· Resource Manager</span> <span class="participant-dept">· Motor Cognitivo</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="participant-chip">
            <div class="participant-avatar tech">LP</div>
            <div><span class="participant-name">L. Pérez</span> <span class="participant-role">· Técnico Jr</span> <span class="participant-dept">· Redes & Seguridad</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Tabs: Chat / Archivos -->
        <div class="teams-chat-tabs">
          <button class="teams-chat-tab active" onclick="switchChatTab('chat')"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M2 3h12v8H6l-3 2.5V11H2z" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="5.5" cy="7" r=".7" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="8" cy="7" r=".7" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="10.5" cy="7" r=".7" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg></span> Chat</button>
          <button class="teams-chat-tab" onclick="switchChatTab('files')"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M2 4.5V13a1 1 0 001 1h10a1 1 0 001-1V6a1 1 0 00-1-1H8L6.5 3H3a1 1 0 00-1 1.5z" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span> Archivos <span class="tab-cnt" id="files-cnt">3</span></button>
        </div>
        <!-- Messages (Chat tab) -->
        <div class="teams-chat-body active" id="teams-chat-body">
          <div class="teams-msg">
            <div class="teams-msg-avatar agent">AG</div>
            <div class="teams-msg-bubble">
              <div class="teams-msg-meta"><span class="msg-sender">AG-002 Resource Manager</span><span class="msg-role-tag agent">AGENTE</span><span class="msg-time">14:05</span></div>
              <div class="teams-msg-text">Incidencia P1 detectada: Servidor CORE-DB-01 sin respuesta. Failover automático no activado. Asignando a FTE-007 por skill match PostgreSQL + experiencia failover.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="teams-msg">
            <div class="teams-msg-avatar gov">MR</div>
            <div class="teams-msg-bubble">
              <div class="teams-msg-meta"><span class="msg-sender">M. Rodríguez</span><span class="msg-role-tag gov">GOBERNADOR</span><span class="msg-time">14:08</span></div>
              <div class="teams-msg-text">FTE-007, prioridad máxima. El failover no saltó porque el watchdog está caído también. Revisa primero el health check del watchdog en /opt/pg/watchdog.conf antes de tocar el cluster.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="teams-msg self">
            <div class="teams-msg-avatar tech">JA</div>
            <div class="teams-msg-bubble">
              <div class="teams-msg-meta"><span class="msg-sender">J. A. Martínez (Tú)</span><span class="msg-role-tag tech">TÉCNICO</span><span class="msg-time">14:12</span></div>
              <div class="teams-msg-text">Recibido. Accediendo por SSH a CORE-DB-01. Confirmo: watchdog service está en estado failed. Voy a revisar los logs del systemd y reiniciar el servicio.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="teams-msg self">
            <div class="teams-msg-avatar tech">JA</div>
            <div class="teams-msg-bubble">
              <div class="teams-msg-meta"><span class="msg-sender">J. A. Martínez (Tú)</span><span class="msg-role-tag tech">TÉCNICO</span><span class="msg-time">14:18</span></div>
              <div class="teams-msg-text">Watchdog reiniciado OK. Causa raíz: OOM killer mató el proceso. Ajusto vm.overcommit_memory y subo watchdog_memory_limit a 512MB. Pendiente: verificar que el failover se active correctamente.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="teams-msg">
            <div class="teams-msg-avatar gov">MR</div>
            <div class="teams-msg-bubble">
              <div class="teams-msg-meta"><span class="msg-sender">M. Rodríguez</span><span class="msg-role-tag gov">GOBERNADOR</span><span class="msg-time">14:23</span></div>
              <div class="teams-msg-text">Perfecto. Cuando termines simula un failover controlado para confirmar. L. Pérez está de backup por si necesitas apoyo con la parte de red.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Files tab -->
        <div class="teams-files" id="teams-files-panel">
          <div class="teams-files-toolbar">
            <button onclick="alert('Mock: Subir archivo')"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M8 11V3m-3 3l3-3 3 3"/><path d="M2 11v2a1 1 0 001 1h10a1 1 0 001-1v-2"/></svg></span> Subir archivo</button>
            <button onclick="alert('Mock: Crear documento')"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M4 2h5l4 4v8a1 1 0 01-1 1H4a1 1 0 01-1-1V3a1 1 0 011-1z" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M9 2v4h4"/><line x1="5.5" y1="9" x2="10.5" y2="9"/><line x1="5.5" y1="11.5" x2="10.5" y2="11.5"/></svg></span> Nuevo documento</button>
            <button onclick="alert('Mock: Crear desde plantilla')"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="12" height="12" rx="1.5"/><line x1="2" y1="5.5" x2="14" y2="5.5"/><line x1="6" y1="5.5" x2="6" y2="14"/></svg></span> Plantilla</button>
          </div>
          <div id="teams-files-list">
            <div class="file-item">
              <div class="file-ico doc"><span class="ico-svg"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M4 2h5l4 4v8a1 1 0 01-1 1H4a1 1 0 01-1-1V3a1 1 0 011-1z" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M9 2v4h4"/></svg></span></div>
              <div class="file-info">
                <div class="file-name">watchdog_config_analysis.docx</div>
                <div class="file-meta"><span>M. Rodríguez · Hoy 14:10</span><span>24 KB</span></div>
              </div>
              <div class="file-collab">
                <div class="collab-dot" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f85149,#da3633)">MR</div>
                <div class="collab-dot" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#475569,#64748b)">JA</div>
              </div>
              <div class="file-actions">
                <button title="Editar"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M11 2.5l2.5 2.5L5.5 13H3v-2.5z"/></svg></span></button>
                <button title="Descargar"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M8 3v8m-3-3l3 3 3-3"/><path d="M2 11v2a1 1 0 001 1h10a1 1 0 001-1v-2"/></svg></span></button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="file-item">
              <div class="file-ico sheet"><span class="ico-svg"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="12" height="12" rx="1.5"/><line x1="2" y1="6" x2="14" y2="6"/><line x1="2" y1="10" x2="14" y2="10"/><line x1="6" y1="2" x2="6" y2="14"/><line x1="10" y1="2" x2="10" y2="14"/></svg></span></div>
              <div class="file-info">
                <div class="file-name">CORE-DB-01_health_metrics.xlsx</div>
                <div class="file-meta"><span>J. A. Martínez · Hoy 14:20</span><span>156 KB</span></div>
              </div>
              <div class="file-collab">

              </div>

                <button title="Descargar"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M8 3v8m-3-3l3 3 3-3"/><path d="M2 11v2a1 1 0 001 1h10a1 1 0 001-1v-2"/></svg></span></button>

          <input type="text" placeholder="Escribe un mensaje..." id="teams-msg-input" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')sendTeamsMsg()">
          <button class="btn-send" onclick="sendTeamsMsg()">Enviar</button>

  <!-- Activity Feed (collapsible) -->
  <div class="panel" id="activity-panel">
    <div class="panel-h" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="toggleActivity()">
      <h3><span class="ico-svg"><svg viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="3" y="2" width="12" height="14" rx="2" fill="rgba(88,166,255,.1)"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="12" y2="6"/><line x1="6" y1="9" x2="12" y2="9"/><line x1="6" y1="12" x2="10" y2="12"/></svg></span> Actividad reciente <span class="cnt-badge">5</span></h3>
      <button class="panel-toggle" id="activity-toggle" title="Minimizar/Maximizar"><span class="ico-svg"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" id="activity-chevron"><path d="M4 6l4 4 4-4"/></svg></span></button>
    </div>

        <div class="feed-item" onclick="openRunDetail('INC-012')">

          <div><div class="feed-txt"><strong>AG-002 Resource Manager</strong> te asignó <strong>INC-20260406-012</strong> — Servidor CORE-DB-01 sin respuesta (P1)</div><div class="feed-time">Hace 12 min</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="feed-item" onclick="openRunDetail('INC-008')">
          <div class="feed-ico ok"><svg viewBox="0 0 18 18" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 9.5l3.5 3.5 6.5-7"/></svg></div>
          <div><div class="feed-txt">Resolviste <strong>INC-20260406-008</strong> — Timeout conexión réplica PostgreSQL. Tiempo: 1.8h</div><div class="feed-time">Hace 2h</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="feed-item" onclick="openBuildDetail('BLD-022')">
          <div class="feed-ico build"><svg viewBox="0 0 18 18" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="3" y="6" width="12" height="9" rx="1.5"/><path d="M6 6V4.5a3 3 0 016 0V6"/><circle cx="9" cy="10.5" r="1.5"/></svg></div>
          <div><div class="feed-txt"><strong>AG-006 Resource Manager PMO</strong> te asignó <strong>BLD-SPR14-022</strong> — Implementar endpoint /api/v2/transactions</div><div class="feed-time">Hace 3h</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="feed-item" onclick="openBuildDetail('BLD-022')">
          <div class="feed-ico info"><svg viewBox="0 0 18 18" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="9" cy="9" r="6.5"/><path d="M9 6v4"/><circle cx="9" cy="12.5" r=".6" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg></div>
          <div><div class="feed-txt"><strong>AG-004 Buffer Gatekeeper</strong> pausó tu tarea BUILD por incidencia P1 prioritaria. Se reanudará automáticamente.</div><div class="feed-time">Hace 3.5h</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="feed-item" onclick="openRunDetail('INC-089')">
          <div class="feed-ico run"><svg viewBox="0 0 18 18" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="9" cy="9" r="6.5"/><path d="M9 5v4h3.5"/></svg></div>
          <div><div class="feed-txt">Cambiaste <strong>INC-20260405-089</strong> a estado "En curso" — Latencia API Gateway</div><div class="feed-time">Ayer 17:30</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     TAB 1 — RUN (KANBAN)
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="tp" id="tab-1">

  <div class="sr" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="sc red" onclick="showKpiDetail('p1')"><div class="sl">P1 Crítica</div><div class="sv">1</div></div>
    <div class="sc org"><div class="sl">P2 Alta</div><div class="sv">2</div></div>
    <div class="sc blu"><div class="sl">P3 Media</div><div class="sv">1</div></div>
    <div class="sc grn"><div class="sl">Resueltas hoy</div><div class="sv">2</div></div>
  </div>

  <div class="kanban" id="kanban-run">
    <!-- Asignada -->
    <div class="kb-col" data-status="asignada" ondragover="kbOver(event)" ondrop="kbDrop(event)" ondragleave="kbLeave(event)">
      <div class="kb-col-h"><h4><div class="dot" style="background:var(--acc-bl)"></div> Asignada</h4><span class="kcnt">2</span></div>
      <div class="kb-body">
        <div class="kk" draggable="true" ondragstart="kbStart(event)" data-id="INC-012" onclick="openRunDetail('INC-012')">
          <div class="kk-id">INC-20260406-012</div>
          <div class="kk-title">Servidor CORE-DB-01 sin respuesta — failover no activado</div>
          <div class="kk-pct" style="color:var(--acc-rd)">0%</div>
          <div class="kk-meta">
            <span class="kk-pri p1">P1</span>
            <span class="kk-sla danger">⏱ 45 min</span>
            <span class="kk-ci">CI: CORE-DB-01</span>
          </div>
          <div class="kk-bar"><div class="kk-bar-fill" style="width:0%;background:var(--acc-rd)"></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="kk" draggable="true" ondragstart="kbStart(event)" data-id="INC-095" onclick="openRunDetail('INC-095')">
          <div class="kk-id">INC-20260405-095</div>
          <div class="kk-title">Error certificado SSL en balanceador DMZ-LB-02</div>
          <div class="kk-pct" style="color:var(--acc-bl)">0%</div>
          <div class="kk-meta">
            <span class="kk-pri p3">P3</span>
            <span class="kk-sla">⏱ 8h</span>
            <span class="kk-ci">CI: DMZ-LB-02</span>
          </div>
          <div class="kk-bar"><div class="kk-bar-fill" style="width:0%;background:var(--acc-bl)"></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- En curso -->
    <div class="kb-col" data-status="en_curso" ondragover="kbOver(event)" ondrop="kbDrop(event)" ondragleave="kbLeave(event)">
      <div class="kb-col-h"><h4><div class="dot" style="background:var(--acc-or)"></div> En curso</h4><span class="kcnt">1</span></div>
      <div class="kb-body">
        <div class="kk" draggable="true" ondragstart="kbStart(event)" data-id="INC-089" onclick="openRunDetail('INC-089')">
          <div class="kk-id">INC-20260405-089</div>
          <div class="kk-title">Latencia API Gateway supera umbral 500ms en hora punta</div>
          <div class="kk-pct" style="color:var(--acc-or)">40%</div>
          <div class="kk-meta">
            <span class="kk-pri p2">P2</span>
            <span class="kk-sla warn">⏱ 2.5h</span>
            <span class="kk-ci">CI: API-GW-01</span>
          </div>
          <div class="kk-bar"><div class="kk-bar-fill" style="width:40%;background:var(--acc-or)"></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Pendiente tercero -->
    <div class="kb-col" data-status="pendiente" ondragover="kbOver(event)" ondrop="kbDrop(event)" ondragleave="kbLeave(event)">
      <div class="kb-col-h"><h4><div class="dot" style="background:var(--tx3)"></div> Pte. tercero</h4><span class="kcnt">1</span></div>
      <div class="kb-body">
        <div class="kk" draggable="true" ondragstart="kbStart(event)" data-id="INC-078" onclick="openRunDetail('INC-078')">
          <div class="kk-id">INC-20260404-078</div>
          <div class="kk-title">Migración esquema legacy — esperando aprobación DBA senior</div>
          <div class="kk-pct" style="color:var(--tx3)">60%</div>
          <div class="kk-meta">
            <span class="kk-pri p2">P2</span>
            <span class="kk-sla">⏱ 12h</span>
            <span class="kk-ci">CI: DB-LEGACY-01</span>
          </div>
          <div class="kk-bar"><div class="kk-bar-fill" style="width:60%;background:var(--tx3)"></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Resuelta -->
    <div class="kb-col" data-status="resuelta" ondragover="kbOver(event)" ondrop="kbDrop(event)" ondragleave="kbLeave(event)">
      <div class="kb-col-h"><h4><div class="dot" style="background:var(--acc-gn)"></div> Resuelta</h4><span class="kcnt">2</span></div>
      <div class="kb-body">
        <div class="kk" draggable="true" ondragstart="kbStart(event)" data-id="INC-008" onclick="openRunDetail('INC-008')" style="opacity:.7">
          <div class="kk-id">INC-20260406-008</div>
          <div class="kk-title">Timeout conexión réplica PostgreSQL — pool agotado</div>
          <div class="kk-pct" style="color:var(--acc-gn)">100%</div>
          <div class="kk-meta">
            <span class="kk-pri p2">P2</span>
            <span class="kk-sla" style="color:var(--acc-gn)">✓ 1.8h</span>
            <span class="kk-ci">CI: PG-REPL-03</span>
          </div>
          <div class="kk-bar"><div class="kk-bar-fill" style="width:100%;background:var(--acc-gn)"></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="kk" draggable="true" ondragstart="kbStart(event)" data-id="INC-003" onclick="openRunDetail('INC-003')" style="opacity:.7">
          <div class="kk-id">INC-20260406-003</div>
          <div class="kk-title">Alerta disco 90% en NAS backup — limpieza logs antiguos</div>
          <div class="kk-pct" style="color:var(--acc-gn)">100%</div>
          <div class="kk-meta">
            <span class="kk-pri p3">P3</span>
            <span class="kk-sla" style="color:var(--acc-gn)">✓ 0.5h</span>
            <span class="kk-ci">CI: NAS-BKP-02</span>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     TAB 2 — BUILD (SPRINT)
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="tp" id="tab-2">

  <div class="sprint-header">
    <div class="sprint-info">
      <span class="sprint-name">Sprint 14</span>
      <span class="sprint-dates">25 Mar — 08 Abr 2026</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex:1;justify-content:flex-end">
      <div class="sprint-bar"><div class="sprint-bar-fill" style="width:58%"></div></div>
      <span class="sprint-pct">58%</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="sr" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="sc pur"><div class="sl">Story Points totales</div><div class="sv">29</div></div>
    <div class="sc blu"><div class="sl">Completados</div><div class="sv">8</div></div>
    <div class="sc org"><div class="sl">En progreso</div><div class="sv">13</div></div>
    <div class="sc grn"><div class="sl">Velocidad media</div><div class="sv">19<span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--tx2)">/sprint</span></div></div>
  </div>

  <div class="sprint-board" id="sprint-board">
    <!-- To Do -->
    <div class="sb-col" data-status="todo" ondragover="kbOver(event)" ondrop="kbDrop(event)" ondragleave="kbLeave(event)">
      <div class="sb-col-h"><h4><div class="dot" style="background:var(--tx3)"></div> To Do</h4><span class="kcnt">2</span></div>
      <div class="sb-body">
        <div class="sk" draggable="true" ondragstart="kbStart(event)" data-id="BLD-025" onclick="openBuildDetail('BLD-025')">
          <div class="sk-proj">Migración Core Banking</div>
          <div class="sk-title">Diseñar schema v2 para tabla transacciones</div>
          <div class="sk-meta">
            <span class="sk-sp">5</span>
            <span class="sk-type task">TASK</span>
            <span class="sk-date soon"><svg viewBox="0 0 12 12" width="10" height="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round" style="vertical-align:-1px;margin-right:2px"><rect x="1" y="2" width="10" height="9" rx="1.5"/><line x1="1" y1="5" x2="11" y2="5"/><line x1="4" y1="0.5" x2="4" y2="3"/><line x1="8" y1="0.5" x2="8" y2="3"/></svg>07 Abr</span>
            <span class="sk-attach"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M11.5 6.5l-4.8 4.8a2.5 2.5 0 01-3.5-3.5L8 3a1.7 1.7 0 012.3 2.3l-5 5a.8.8 0 01-1.1-1.1l4.5-4.5"/></svg></span> 1</span>
          </div>

</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

<button class="copilot-fab" id="cp-fab" onclick="toggleCopilot()" title="Copiloto IA"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="22" height="22" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="4" y="8" width="16" height="10" rx="3"/><circle cx="9" cy="13" r="1.3" fill="#fff" stroke="none"/><circle cx="15" cy="13" r="1.3" fill="#fff" stroke="none"/><path d="M8 8V6a4 4 0 018 0v2"/><path d="M2 12h2M20 12h2"/></svg></button>

<div class="copilot-panel" id="cp-panel">
  <div class="cp-hdr">
    <div class="cp-hdr-ico"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="4" y="8" width="16" height="10" rx="3"/><circle cx="9" cy="13" r="1.3" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="15" cy="13" r="1.3" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><path d="M8 8V6a4 4 0 018 0v2"/><path d="M2 12h2M20 12h2"/></svg></div>
    <div class="cp-hdr-info"><h3>Copiloto IA</h3><span>CMDB · Incidencias · CAB · Skills</span></div>
    <button class="cp-close" onclick="toggleCopilot()">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="cp-context">
    <span class="cp-ctx active">P1 Activa</span>
    <span class="cp-ctx">CORE-DB-01</span>
    <span class="cp-ctx">Sprint 14</span>
    <span class="cp-ctx">4 INC abiertas</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cp-suggestions">
    <button class="cp-sug" onclick="cpSend('¿Incidencias similares a INC-012?')">Similares INC-012</button>
    <button class="cp-sug" onclick="cpSend('Dependencias CORE-DB-01 en CMDB')">Deps CORE-DB-01</button>
    <button class="cp-sug" onclick="cpSend('Cambios CAB que afecten BD core')">Cambios CAB</button>
    <button class="cp-sug" onclick="cpSend('¿Quién tiene experiencia en failover PG?')">Expertos failover</button>
  </div>
  <div class="cp-msgs" id="cp-msgs">
    <div class="cp-msg bot">
      <div class="cp-msg-av">CP</div>
      <div class="cp-msg-bub">Hola Adriana. Tengo acceso a CMDB, histórico de incidencias, CAB y skills del equipo. Veo una <strong>P1 activa</strong> en CORE-DB-01. ¿Te ayudo a investigar?</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cp-input">
    <input type="text" id="cp-in" placeholder="Pregunta sobre incidencias, CMDB, CAB..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')cpSendInput()">
    <button onclick="cpSendInput()">➤</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     JAVASCRIPT
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<script>
/* ═══════ AUTH ═══════ */
const API_BASE = '/api/tech';
function getToken(){ return localStorage.getItem('pmo_token') || '' }
function authHeaders(){ return { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + getToken(), 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
async function apiFetch(path, opts={}){
  const r = await fetch(API_BASE + path, { headers: authHeaders(), ...opts });
  if(r.status === 401){ window.location.href = '/index.html'; return null }
  if(!r.ok){ console.error('API error', r.status, path); return null }
  return r.json();
}
function doLogout(){localStorage.removeItem('pmo_token');localStorage.removeItem('pmo_user');localStorage.removeItem('pmo_permisos');localStorage.removeItem('pmo_role');localStorage.removeItem('cpm_token');window.location.href='/';}
// Redirect to login if no token
if(!getToken()) window.location.href = '/index.html';

/* ═══════ LIVE DATA LOADERS ═══════ */
let _dashboardData = null;
let _incidenciasData = [];
let _tareasData = [];
let _actividadData = [];

async function loadDashboard(){
  _dashboardData = await apiFetch('/dashboard');
  if(!_dashboardData) return;
  const d = _dashboardData;
  // Update stat cards if elements exist
  const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
  if(el('stat-carga')){ el('stat-carga').textContent = d.carga.pct_ocupacion + '%' }
  if(el('stat-sla')){ el('stat-sla').textContent = d.sla.pct_sla !== null ? d.sla.pct_sla + '%' : '—' }
  if(el('stat-inc-total')){ el('stat-inc-total').textContent = d.incidencias.total_abiertas }
  if(el('stat-tareas')){ el('stat-tareas').textContent = d.tareas_build_activas }
  // Update profile info
  if(el('profile-name')){ el('profile-name').textContent = d.nombre }
  if(el('profile-nivel')){ el('profile-nivel').textContent = d.nivel }
  if(el('profile-silo')){ el('profile-silo').textContent = d.silo }
}

async function loadIncidencias(){
  _incidenciasData = await apiFetch('/incidencias') || [];
  return _incidenciasData;
}

async function loadTareas(){
  _tareasData = await apiFetch('/tareas') || [];
  return _tareasData;
}

async function loadActividad(){
  _actividadData = await apiFetch('/actividad') || [];
  return _actividadData;
}

async function loadIncidenciaDetail(ticketId){
  return await apiFetch('/incidencias/' + ticketId);
}

async function loadTareaDetail(tareaId){
  return await apiFetch('/tareas/' + tareaId);
}

async function cambiarEstadoIncidencia(ticketId, estado, nota){
  return await apiFetch('/incidencias/' + ticketId + '/estado', {
    method: 'PUT',
    body: JSON.stringify({ estado, nota: nota || null })
  });
}

async function cambiarEstadoTarea(tareaId, columna, nota){
  return await apiFetch('/tareas/' + tareaId + '/estado', {
    method: 'PUT',
    body: JSON.stringify({ columna, nota: nota || null })
  });
}

// Load dashboard data on page load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  loadDashboard();
  loadActividad();
});

/* ═══════ THEME ═══════ */
const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('pmo-theme') || 'dark';
document.documentElement.dataset.theme = savedTheme;
function toggleTheme(){
  const next = document.documentElement.dataset.theme === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
  document.documentElement.dataset.theme = next;
  localStorage.setItem('pmo-theme', next);
}

/* ═══════ TABS ═══════ */
/* ═══════ SVG ICON LIBRARY (propietarios Cognitive PMO) ═══════ */
const SVG={
  ficha:'<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="12" height="12" rx="2"/><line x1="5" y1="5.5" x2="11" y2="5.5"/><line x1="5" y1="8" x2="11" y2="8"/><line x1="5" y1="10.5" x2="9" y2="10.5"/></svg>',
  video:'<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="1" y="4" width="10" height="8" rx="1.5"/><path d="M11 7l4-2v6l-4-2"/></svg>',
  screen:'<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="1.5" y="2.5" width="13" height="9" rx="1.5"/><line x1="5" y1="14" x2="11" y2="14"/><line x1="8" y1="11.5" x2="8" y2="14"/><path d="M6 7l2-2 2 2" fill="none"/></svg>',
  attach:'<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M13.5 7.5l-5.8 5.8a3 3 0 01-4.2-4.2L9.6 3a2 2 0 012.8 2.8l-6 6.1a1 1 0 01-1.4-1.4l5.5-5.5"/></svg>',
  chat:'<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M2 3h12v8H6l-3 2.5V11H2z" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="5.5" cy="7" r=".7" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="8" cy="7" r=".7" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="10.5" cy="7" r=".7" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg>',
  meet:'<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="8" cy="5.5" r="3"/><path d="M8 9.5v4"/><path d="M5.5 11.5h5"/></svg>'
};

    participants:[

      {from:'J. A. Martínez (Tú)',cls:'tech',time:'14:18',tag:'TÉCNICO',self:true,text:'Watchdog reiniciado OK. Causa raíz: OOM killer mató el proceso. Ajusto vm.overcommit_memory y subo watchdog_memory_limit a 512MB. Pendiente: verificar que el failover se active correctamente.'},
      {from:'M. Rodríguez',cls:'gov',time:'14:23',tag:'GOBERNADOR',text:'Perfecto. Cuando termines simula un failover controlado para confirmar. L. Pérez está de backup por si necesitas apoyo con la parte de red.'}

    type:'run',title:'INC-089 · Latencia API Gateway supera umbral 500ms',

      {from:'AG-001 Incident Classifier',cls:'agent',time:'Ayer 16:40',tag:'AGENTE',text:'Alerta: Latencia media API-GW-01 en 623ms (umbral 500ms). Categorizada P2. Posible causa: saturación pool conexiones backend.'},
      {from:'M. Rodríguez',cls:'gov',time:'Ayer 16:55',tag:'GOBERNADOR',text:'FTE-007, revisa las conexiones activas en el pool. Últimamente hemos tenido problemas con queries lentas del módulo de reporting.'},

    ]
  },
  'BLD-022':{
    type:'build',title:'BLD-022 · Implementar endpoint /api/v2/transactions',
    participants:[
      {ini:'CS',name:'C. Sánchez',role:'PM',dept:'Migración Core Banking',cls:'pm'},
      {ini:'JA',name:'J. A. Martínez',role:'Técnico Sr',dept:'Sistemas & BBDD',cls:'tech'},
      {ini:'AG',name:'AG-006',role:'Resource Manager PMO',dept:'Motor Cognitivo',cls:'agent'},

      {from:'AG-006 Resource Manager PMO',cls:'agent',time:'Ayer 10:00',tag:'AGENTE',text:'Tarea asignada a FTE-007. Skill requerido: Python/FastAPI (match 95%). Sprint 14, deadline: 2026-04-10. Story points: 5.'},

    participants:[

      {ini:'JA',name:'J. A. Martínez',role:'Técnico Sr',dept:'Sistemas & BBDD',cls:'tech'},

      {from:'C. Sánchez',cls:'pm',time:'Hoy 10:00',tag:'PM',text:'Excelente mejora. Asegúrate de mantener la validación de duplicados antes del COPY. El módulo de auditoría depende de eso.'}
