```html
let activeConv=null;
let _activeSalaId=null;
let _chatPollTimer=null;
let _lastMsgTimestamp=null;
let _salaMap={}; // id_referencia -> sala_id

// Load salas from API and render sidebar
async function loadChatSalas(){
  const salas = await apiFetch('/chat/salas');
  if(!salas || !salas.length) return;
  const sidebar = document.querySelector('.teams-sidebar');
  if(!sidebar) return;
  _salaMap = {};
  sidebar.innerHTML = salas.map((s,i) => {
    _salaMap[s.id_referencia] = s.id;
    const typeTag = s.tipo === 'run' ? '<span style="color:var(--acc-rd);font-size:10px;font-weight:700">RUN</span>' : '<span style="color:var(--acc-pu);font-size:10px;font-weight:700">BUILD</span>';
    const preview = s.ultimo_mensaje ? s.ultimo_mensaje.substring(0,40) + (s.ultimo_mensaje.length>40?'...':'') : 'Sin mensajes';
    return `<div class="conv-item${i===0?' active':''}" onclick="selectConvApi('${s.id_referencia}',${s.id})" data-ref="${s.id_referencia}">
      <div class="conv-avatar" style="background:${s.tipo==='run'?'rgba(248,81,73,.12)':'rgba(188,140,255,.12)'};color:${s.tipo==='run'?'var(--acc-rd)':'var(--acc-pu)'}">${s.id_referencia.substring(0,3)}</div>
      <div class="conv-info"><div class="conv-title">${typeTag} ${s.nombre.substring(0,35)}</div><div class="conv-preview">${preview}</div></div>
      ${s.total_mensajes>0?`<span class="conv-badge">${s.total_mensajes}</span>`:''}
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  // Auto-select first
  if(salas.length>0) selectConvApi(salas[0].id_referencia, salas[0].id);
}

async function selectConvApi(refId, salaId){
  activeConv = refId;
  _activeSalaId = salaId;
  // Highlight sidebar
  document.querySelectorAll('.conv-item').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active'));
  const active = document.querySelector(`.conv-item[data-ref="${refId}"]`);
  if(active) active.classList.add('active');
  // Load messages
  const msgs = await apiFetch(`/chat/salas/${salaId}/mensajes`);
  const body = document.getElementById('teams-chat-body');
  if(msgs && body){
    body.innerHTML = msgs.map(m => {
      const cls = m.rol_autor==='agente'?'agent':m.rol_autor==='pm'?'pm':m.rol_autor==='gobernador'?'gov':'tech';
      const tag = m.rol_autor.toUpperCase();
      const time = m.created_at ? new Date(m.created_at).toLocaleTimeString('es-ES',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}) : '';
      return `<div class="teams-msg${m.es_mio?' self':''}"><div class="teams-msg-avatar ${cls}">${(m.nombre_autor||'?').substring(0,2).toUpperCase()}</div><div class="teams-msg-bubble"><div class="teams-msg-meta"><span class="msg-sender">${m.nombre_autor||m.id_autor}</span><span class="msg-role-tag ${cls}">${tag}</span><span class="msg-time">${time}</span></div><div class="teams-msg-text">${m.mensaje}</div></div></div>`;
    }).join('');
    body.scrollTop = body.scrollHeight;
    if(msgs.length>0) _lastMsgTimestamp = msgs[msgs.length-1].created_at;
  }
  // Load participants
  const parts = await apiFetch(`/chat/salas/${salaId}/participantes`);
  const pp = document.getElementById('teams-participants');
  if(parts && pp){
    pp.innerHTML = parts.map(p => {
      const cls = p.rol==='agente'?'agent':p.rol==='pm'?'pm':p.rol==='gobernador'?'gov':'tech';
      return `<div class="participant-chip"><div class="participant-avatar ${cls}">${(p.nombre||'?').substring(0,2).toUpperCase()}</div><div><span class="participant-name">${p.nombre}</span> <span class="participant-role">· ${p.rol}</span>${p.departamento?` <span class="participant-dept">· ${p.departamento}</span>`:''}</div></div>`;
    }).join('');
  }
  // Update header
  const hdr = document.querySelector('.teams-chat-header');
  if(hdr){
    const tipo = refId.startsWith('INC')?'run':'build';
    hdr.innerHTML=`<div class="teams-chat-title"><span class="type-tag ${tipo}">${tipo.toUpperCase()}</span> ${refId}</div>
      <div class="teams-chat-actions"><button onclick="open${tipo==='run'?'Run':'Build'}Detail('${refId}')"><span class="ico-svg sm">${SVG.ficha}</span> Ver ficha</button><button><span class="ico-svg sm">${SVG.video}</span> Videollamada</button></div>`;
  }
  // Reset to chat tab
  document.querySelectorAll('.teams-chat-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelector('.teams-chat-tab')?.classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('teams-chat-body').style.display='flex';
  document.getElementById('teams-files-panel').style.display='none';
  document.querySelector('.teams-chat-input').style.display='flex';
  // Start polling
  startChatPolling();
}

function startChatPolling(){
  if(_chatPollTimer) clearInterval(_chatPollTimer);
  _chatPollTimer = setInterval(async()=>{
    if(!_activeSalaId || !_lastMsgTimestamp) return;
    const newMsgs = await apiFetch(`/chat/salas/${_activeSalaId}/mensajes?since=${_lastMsgTimestamp}`);
    if(!newMsgs || !newMsgs.length) return;
    const body = document.getElementById('teams-chat-body');
    newMsgs.forEach(m=>{
      if(m.es_mio) return; // Skip own messages (already appended optimistically)
      const cls = m.rol_autor==='agente'?'agent':m.rol_autor==='pm'?'pm':'tech';
      const time = m.created_at?new Date(m.created_at).toLocaleTimeString('es-ES',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}):'';
      body.innerHTML+=`<div class="teams-msg"><div class="teams-msg-avatar ${cls}">${(m.nombre_autor||'?').substring(0,2).toUpperCase()}</div><div class="teams-msg-bubble"><div class="teams-msg-meta"><span class="msg-sender">${m.nombre_autor}</span><span class="msg-role-tag ${cls}">${m.rol_autor.toUpperCase()}</span><span class="msg-time">${time}</span></div><div class="teams-msg-text">${m.mensaje}</div></div></div>`;
    });
    body.scrollTop=body.scrollHeight;
    _lastMsgTimestamp = newMsgs[newMsgs.length-1].created_at;
  }, 5000);
}

// Override sendTeamsMsg to use API
const _origSendTeamsMsg = typeof sendTeamsMsg === 'function' ? sendTeamsMsg : null;

// Init chat salas on load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { loadChatSalas(); });

function selectConv(key){
  // Try API first, fall back to mock
  if(_salaMap[key]){ selectConvApi(key, _salaMap[key]); return; }
  activeConv=key;
  const c=CONV_DATA[key];if(!c)return;
  // Update sidebar active
  document.querySelectorAll('.conv-item').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active'));
  event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');
  // Header
  const hdr=document.querySelector('.teams-chat-header');
  hdr.innerHTML=`<div class="teams-chat-title"><span class="type-tag ${c.type}">${c.type.toUpperCase()}</span> ${c.title}</div>
    <div class="teams-chat-actions"><button onclick="open${c.type==='run'?'Run':'Build'}Detail('${key}')"><span class="ico-svg sm">${SVG.ficha}</span> Ver ficha</button><button onclick="toggleScreenShare()"><span class="ico-svg sm">${SVG.screen}</span> Compartir</button><button><span class="ico-svg sm">${SVG.video}</span> Videollamada</button></div>`;
  // Participants
  const pp=document.getElementById('teams-participants');
  pp.innerHTML=c.participants.map(p=>`<div class="participant-chip"><div class="participant-avatar ${p.cls}">${p.ini}</div><div><span class="participant-name">${p.name}</span> <span class="participant-role">· ${p.role}</span> <span class="participant-dept">· ${p.dept}</span></div></div>`).join('');
  // Reset to Chat tab
  document.querySelectorAll('.teams-chat-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelector('.teams-chat-tab').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('teams-chat-body').style.display='flex';
  document.getElementById('teams-files-panel').style.display='none';
  document.querySelector('.teams-chat-input').style.display='flex';
  // Update files count
  const fc=CONV_FILES[key]||[];
  document.getElementById('files-cnt').textContent=fc.length;
  // Messages
  const body=document.getElementById('teams-chat-body');
  body.innerHTML=c.messages.map(m=>`<div class="teams-msg${m.self?' self':''}"><div class="teams-msg-avatar ${m.cls}">${m.from.slice(0,2).toUpperCase()}</div><div class="teams-msg-bubble"><div class="teams-msg-meta"><span class="msg-sender">${m.from}</span><span class="msg-role-tag ${m.cls}">${m.tag}</span><span class="msg-time">${m.time}</span></div><div class="teams-msg-text">${m.text}</div></div></div>`).join('');
  body.scrollTop=body.scrollHeight;
}

function sendTeamsMsg(){
  const inp=document.getElementById('teams-msg-input');
  const txt=inp.value.trim();if(!txt)return;
  const body=document.getElementById('teams-chat-body');
  const now=new Date();const t=String(now.getHours()).padStart(2,'0')+':'+String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');
  const nombre = _dashboardData?.nombre || 'Técnico';
  const initials = nombre.split(' ').map(w=>w[0]).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
  // Optimistic append
  body.innerHTML+=`<div class="teams-msg self"><div class="teams-msg-avatar tech">${initials}</div><div class="teams-msg-bubble"><div class="teams-msg-meta"><span class="msg-sender">${nombre} (Tú)</span><span class="msg-role-tag tech">TÉCNICO</span><span class="msg-time">${t}</span></div><div class="teams-msg-text">${txt}</div></div></div>`;
  inp.value='';body.scrollTop=body.scrollHeight;
  // Send to API
  if(_activeSalaId){
    apiFetch(`/chat/salas/${_activeSalaId}/mensajes`,{
      method:'POST', body:JSON.stringify({mensaje:txt})
    }).then(r=>{ if(r) _lastMsgTimestamp=r.created_at; });
  }
  // Also update mock data
  if(CONV_DATA[activeConv])CONV_DATA[activeConv].messages.push({from:nombre+' (Tú)',cls:'tech',time:t,tag:'TÉCNICO',self:true,text:txt});
}

/* ═══════ CHAT TABS: Chat / Files ═══════ */
const CONV_FILES={
  'INC-012':[
    {name:'watchdog_config_analysis.docx',type:'doc',size:'24 KB',by:'M. Rodríguez',date:'Hoy 14:10',collabs:[{ini:'MR',bg:'#f85149'},{ini:'JA',bg:'#475569'}]},
    {name:'CORE-DB-01_health_metrics.xlsx',type:'sheet',size:'156 KB',by:'J. A. Martínez',date:'Hoy 14:20',collabs:[{ini:'JA',bg:'#475569'}]},
    {name:'runbook_failover_postgresql.pdf',type:'pdf',size:'1.2 MB',by:'Repositorio',date:'15 Mar 2026',collabs:[]}
  ],
  'INC-089':[
    {name:'api_gateway_latency_report.xlsx',type:'sheet',size:'89 KB',by:'J. A. Martínez',date:'Ayer 17:15',collabs:[{ini:'JA',bg:'#475569'},{ini:'MR',bg:'#f85149'}]},
    {name:'index_creation_plan.docx',type:'doc',size:'18 KB',by:'J. A. Martínez',date:'Ayer 17:25',collabs:[{ini:'JA',bg:'#475569'}]}
  ],
  'BLD-022':[
    {name:'transactions_api_spec_v2.docx',type:'doc',size:'45 KB',by:'C. Sánchez',date:'Ayer 09:30',collabs:[{ini:'CS',bg:'#8b5cf6'},{ini:'JA',bg:'#475569'},{ini:'RG',bg:'#64748b'}]},
    {name:'test_transactions.py',type:'doc',size:'12 KB',by:'R. García',date:'Ayer 15:00',collabs:[{ini:'RG',bg:'#64748b'}]},
    {name:'pydantic_models_review.docx',type:'doc',size:'22 KB',by:'J. A. Martínez',date:'Ayer 14:45',collabs:[{ini:'JA',bg:'#475569'},{ini:'CS',bg:'#8b5cf6'}]}
  ],
  'BLD-024':[
    {name:'batch_insert_benchmark.xlsx',type:'sheet',size:'67 KB',by:'J. A. Martínez',date:'Hoy 09:45',collabs:[{ini:'JA',bg:'#475569'}]},
    {name:'conciliation_module_arch.pdf',type:'pdf',size:'340 KB',by:'Repositorio',date:'01 Mar 2026',collabs:[]}
  ]
};

function switchChatTab(tab){
  document.querySelectorAll('.teams-chat-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
  event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');
  const chatBody=document.getElementById('teams-chat-body');
  const filesPanel=document.getElementById('teams-files-panel');
  const chatInput=document.querySelector('.teams-chat-input');
  if(tab==='chat'){
    chatBody.style.display='flex';chatBody.classList.add('active');
    filesPanel.style.display='none';filesPanel.classList.remove('active');
    chatInput.style.display='flex';
  }else{
    chatBody.style.display='none';chatBody.classList.remove('active');
    filesPanel.style.display='flex';filesPanel.classList.add('active');
    chatInput.style.display='none';
    renderFiles();
  }
}

async function renderFiles(){
  // Try API first
  if(_activeSalaId){
    const apiFiles = await apiFetch(`/chat/salas/${_activeSalaId}/archivos`);
    if(apiFiles && apiFiles.length > 0){
      const list=document.getElementById('teams-files-list');
      const cnt=document.getElementById('files-cnt');
      cnt.textContent=apiFiles.length;
      list.innerHTML=apiFiles.map(f=>{
        const ext=(f.nombre||'').split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
        const icoType=ext==='pdf'?'pdf':['xls','xlsx','csv'].includes(ext)?'sheet':'doc';
        const size=f.size_bytes>1048576?(f.size_bytes/1048576).toFixed(1)+' MB':(f.size_bytes/1024).toFixed(0)+' KB';
        const date=f.created_at?new Date(f.created_at).toLocaleDateString('es-ES',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}):'';
        return `<div class="file-row" onclick="window.open('/api/tech/chat/salas/${_activeSalaId}/archivos/${f.id}/descargar')"><div class="file-icon ${icoType}"><span class="ico-svg">${icoMap[icoType]||icoMap.doc}</span></div><div class="file-info"><div class="file-name">${f.nombre||'archivo'}</div><div class="file-meta">${size} · ${f.subido_por} · ${date}</div></div></div>`;
      }).join('');
      // Add upload button
      list.innerHTML+=`<div class="file-upload-row" style="padding:12px;text-align:center"><label style="cursor:pointer;color:var(--acc-bl);font-size:12px;font-weight:600"><input type="file" style="display:none" onchange="uploadChatFile(this)"> + Subir archivo</label></div>`;
      return;
    }
  }
  const files=CONV_FILES[activeConv]||[];
  const list=document.getElementById('teams-files-list');
  const cnt=document.getElementById('files-cnt');
  cnt.textContent=files.length;
  const icoMap={doc:'<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M4 2h5l4 4v8a1 1 0 01-1 1H4a1 1 0 01-1-1V3a1 1 0 011-1z" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M9 2v4h4"/></svg>',
    sheet:'<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="12" height="12" rx="1.5"/><line x1="2" y1="6" x2="14" y2="6"/><line x1="2" y1="10" x2="14" y2="10"/><line x1="6" y1="2" x2="6" y2="14"/><line x1="10" y1="2" x2="10" y2="14"/></svg>',
    pdf:'<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M4 2h5l4 4v8a1 1 0 01-1 1H4a1 1 0 01-1-1V3a1 1 0 011-1z" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M9 2v4h4"/><text x="5" y="12.5" font-size="5" font-weight="700" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-family="sans-serif">PDF</text></svg>'};
  const editSvg='<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M11 2.5l2.5 2.5L5.5 13H3v-2.5z"/></svg>';
  const dlSvg='<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M8 3v8m-3-3l3 3 3-3"/><path d="M2 11v2a1 1 0 001 1h10a1 1 0 001-1v-2"/></svg>';
  list.innerHTML=files.map(f=>{
    const collabs=f.collabs.map(c=>`<div class="collab-dot" style="background:${c.bg}">${c.ini}</div>`).join('');
    return `<div class="file-item"><div class="file-ico ${f.type}"><span class="ico-svg">${icoMap[f.type]||icoMap.doc}</span></div><div class="file-info"><div class="file-name">${f.name}</div><div class="file-meta"><span>${f.by} · ${f.date}</span><span>${f.size}</span></div></div><div class="file-collab">${collabs}</div><div class="file-actions"><button title="Editar" onclick="event.stopPropagation();alert('Mock: Editando ${f.name}')"><span class="ico-svg sm">${editSvg}</span></button><button title="Descargar" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"><span class="ico-svg sm">${dlSvg}</span></button></div></div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function toggleScreenShare(){
  alert('Mock: Compartir pantalla activado. En producción se integrará con WebRTC o enlace a plataforma externa.');
}

/* ═══════ COLLAPSIBLE PANELS ═══════ */
function togglePanel(id){
  const body=document.getElementById(id+'-body');
  const btn=document.getElementById(id+'-toggle');
  body.classList.toggle('collapsed');
  btn.classList.toggle('collapsed');
}
function toggleActivity(){togglePanel('activity')}

function switchTab(n){
  document.querySelectorAll('.tb').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('a'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tp').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('a'));
  document.querySelector(`.tb[data-tab="${n}"]`).classList.add('a');
  document.getElementById(`tab-${n}`).classList.add('a');
}

/* ═══════ PROFILE ═══════ */
async function toggleProfile(){
  const modal = document.getElementById('profile-modal');
  modal.classList.toggle('show');
  if(modal.classList.contains('show')){
    // Load live data
    const actual = await apiFetch('/valoracion/actual');
    if(actual){
      const el = id => document.getElementById(id);
      el('prof-punt').textContent = actual.puntuacion;
      el('prof-punt').style.color = actual.puntuacion >= 80 ? 'var(--acc-gn)' : actual.puntuacion >= 60 ? 'var(--acc-or)' : 'var(--acc-rd)';
      el('prof-sla').textContent = actual.pct_sla + '%';
      el('prof-inc').textContent = actual.total_incidencias;
      el('prof-sp').textContent = actual.story_points_completados;
      el('prof-vel').textContent = actual.velocidad_media_sp;
      el('prof-tareas').textContent = actual.total_tareas;
    }
    // Load history
    const hist = await apiFetch('/valoracion?meses=6');
    const tbody = document.getElementById('prof-hist-body');
    if(hist && tbody){
      tbody.innerHTML = hist.map(v => {
        const mesLabel = v.mes ? new Date(v.mes+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('es-ES',{month:'short',year:'numeric'}) : '—';
        const pColor = v.puntuacion >= 80 ? 'var(--acc-gn)' : v.puntuacion >= 60 ? 'var(--acc-or)' : 'var(--acc-rd)';
        return `<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
          <td style="padding:6px 8px">${mesLabel}</td>
          <td style="padding:6px 8px;text-align:right">${v.pct_sla}%</td>
          <td style="padding:6px 8px;text-align:right">${v.story_points_completados}</td>
          <td style="padding:6px 8px;text-align:right">${v.velocidad_media_sp}</td>
          <td style="padding:6px 8px;text-align:right;font-weight:700;color:${pColor}">${v.puntuacion}</td>
        </tr>`;
      }).join('');
      if(!hist.length) tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="5" style="padding:12px;text-align:center;color:var(--tx3)">Sin datos históricos</td></tr>';
    }
    // Update profile header with live data
    if(_dashboardData){
      const profName = document.querySelector('.prof-info h3');
      if(profName) profName.textContent = _dashboardData.nombre || 'Técnico';
      const profId = document.querySelector('.prof-info .hdr-id');
      if(profId) profId.textContent = _dashboardData.id_recurso || '';
      const profSilo = document.querySelector('.prof-info .hdr-silo');
      if(profSilo) profSilo.textContent = _dashboardData.silo || '';
      const profNivel = document.querySelector('.prof-info .hdr-nivel');
      if(profNivel) profNivel.textContent = _dashboardData.nivel || '';
    }
  }
}

/* ═══════ DETAIL MODALS ═══════ */
function closeDetail(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('show')}

function openRunDetail(key){
  cpSetContexto('run', key);
  const d=RUN_DATA[key];if(!d)return;
  document.getElementById('rd-title').textContent=d.title;
  document.getElementById('rd-id').textContent=d.id;
  let h='';
  // Top fields
  h+='<div class="dm-row">';
  h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Prioridad</label><div class="dm-badges"><span class="dm-badge kk-pri '+d.pri.toLowerCase()+'">'+d.pri+'</span></div></div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Estado</label><div class="val">'+d.estado+'</div></div>';
  h+='</div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-row">';
  h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>CI afectado</label><div class="val" style="font-family:\'JetBrains Mono\',monospace;font-size:12px">'+d.ci+'</div></div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>SLA</label><div class="val" style="font-family:\'JetBrains Mono\',monospace;font-size:12px;color:'+(d.pct===100?'var(--acc-gn)':d.pri==='P1'?'var(--acc-rd)':'var(--acc-or)')+'">'+d.sla+'</div></div>';
  h+='</div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Categoría</label><div class="val" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--tx2)">'+d.cat+'</div></div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Descripción</label><div class="val" style="font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;color:var(--tx2)">'+d.desc+'</div></div>';
  // Progress
  const col=d.pct===100?'var(--acc-gn)':d.pct>0?'var(--acc-or)':'var(--acc-rd)';
  h+='<div class="dm-progress"><div class="dm-pbar"><div class="dm-pbar-fill" style="width:'+d.pct+'%;background:'+col+'"></div></div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-pbar-label"><span>Progreso</span><strong style="color:'+col+'">'+d.pct+'%</strong></div></div>';
  // Subtasks
  h+='<div class="dm-subtasks"><h4>Subtareas ('+d.subtasks.length+')</h4>';
  d.subtasks.forEach(s=>{
    const sc=s.status==='completada'?'var(--acc-gn)':s.status==='en_curso'?'var(--acc-or)':s.status==='bloqueada'?'var(--acc-rd)':'var(--acc-bl)';
    const sl=s.status==='completada'?'HECHO':s.status==='en_curso'?'EN CURSO':s.status==='bloqueada'?'BLOQUEADA':'PENDIENTE';
    h+='<div class="dm-st" style="border-left:3px solid '+sc+'">';
    h+='<div class="dm-st-hours" style="color:'+sc+'">'+s.hours+'</div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st-status" style="background:'+sc.replace(')',',0.12)').replace('var(','rgba(').replace('#','')+';;color:'+sc+'">'+sl+'</div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st-title">'+s.title+'</div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st-desc">'+s.desc+'</div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st-meta">';
    s.tags.forEach(t=>{h+='<span class="dm-st-tag" style="background:rgba(88,166,255,.1);color:var(--acc-bl)">'+t+'</span>'});
    h+='</div>';
    if(s.check)h+='<div class="dm-st-check">✓ '+s.check+'</div>';
    h+='</div>';
  });
  h+='</div>';
  // Attachments
  h+='<div class="dm-attach"><div class="dm-attach-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"><span class="ico-svg sm">'+SVG.attach+'</span> Adjuntar documento</div>';
  d.attachments.forEach(a=>{h+='<div class="dm-attach-file"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M3.5 1.5h4l3.5 3.5v7.5a1 1 0 01-1 1h-6.5a1 1 0 01-1-1v-10a1 1 0 011-1z" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M7.5 1.5v3.5h3.5"/></svg></span> '+a+'</div>'});
  h+='</div>';
  // Chat integrado con Gobernador RUN
  h+='<div class="dm-chat"><div class="dm-chat-h"><div class="ico" style="background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:var(--acc-rd)">'+SVG.chat+'</div><div class="title">Chat — Incidencia '+d.id+'</div><div class="participants">Tú · Gobernador RUN</div></div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-chat-body" id="chat-run-'+key+'">';
  d.notes.forEach(n=>{
    const cls=n.type==='system'?'system':'tech';
    const role=n.type==='system'?'SISTEMA':'TÉCNICO';
    h+='<div class="dm-chat-msg '+cls+'"><div class="msg-author"><span>'+n.author+' <span class="msg-role">'+role+'</span></span><span class="msg-time">'+n.time+'</span></div>'+n.text+'</div>';
  });
  h+='</div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-chat-input"><input placeholder="Mensaje al gobernador RUN..." onclick="event.stopPropagation()" onkeydown="if(event.key===\'Enter\'){event.stopPropagation();addChatMsg(\'run\',\''+key+'\')}"><button onclick="event.stopPropagation();addChatMsg(\'run\',\''+key+'\')">Enviar</button><button class="btn-meet" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" title="Iniciar reunión">'+SVG.video+'</button></div>';
  h+='</div>';
  document.getElementById('rd-body').innerHTML=h;
  document.getElementById('run-detail').classList.add('show');
}

      {title:'3. Crear endpoint POST /api/v2/transactions',desc:'Validar esquema, insertar en BD, devolver 201 con location header.',tags:['FastAPI','PostgreSQL'],hours:'3h',status:'pendiente',check:'POST funcional con validación'},

      {title:'5. Documentar en Swagger',desc:'Actualizar OpenAPI spec. Ejemplos de request/response. Códigos de error.',tags:['Swagger','Docs'],hours:'1h',status:'pendiente',check:'Swagger actualizado y revisado'}

    notes:[

    ],

      {title:'1. Analizar esquema actual',desc:'Documentar tablas, campos, índices, FK del esquema legacy. Identificar problemas de rendimiento.',tags:['PostgreSQL','Analysis'],hours:'2h',status:'pendiente',check:'Documento de análisis completo'},
      {title:'2. Diseñar nuevo esquema',desc:'Tabla particionada por mes. Nuevos campos: metadata JSONB, hash_verificacion. Índices GIN.',tags:['PostgreSQL','DDL'],hours:'3h',status:'pendiente',check:'DDL revisado por DBA'},
      {title:'3. Script de migración',desc:'Migración sin downtime usando pg_repack + triggers de sincronización.',tags:['PostgreSQL','Migration'],hours:'4h',status:'pendiente',check:'Migración testeada en PRE'}
    ],
    notes:[],
    attachments:['current_schema_analysis.pdf']
  },
  'BLD-028':{
    title:'Unit tests para rate-limiter middleware',
    id:'BLD-SPR14-028', proj:'API Gateway v2', type:'TASK', sp:3, status:'To Do', pct:0,
    date:'08 Abr 2026', desc:'Escribir tests unitarios completos para el middleware de rate-limiting. Cubrir: límites por IP, por token, por endpoint, ventanas deslizantes, y edge cases.',
    subtasks:[
      {title:'1. Setup test fixtures',desc:'Mock de Redis para rate counters. Fixtures de requests con diferentes IPs/tokens.',tags:['Pytest','Redis'],hours:'1h',status:'pendiente',check:'Fixtures funcionando'},
      {title:'2. Tests de límites',desc:'Test por IP (100/min), por token (1000/min), por endpoint custom. Verificar headers X-RateLimit-*.',tags:['Pytest'],hours:'2h',status:'pendiente',check:'Todos los límites verificados'},
      {title:'3. Tests de edge cases',desc:'Ventana deslizante, reset de counters, múltiples tokens simultáneos, token expirado.',tags:['Pytest'],hours:'1h',status:'pendiente',check:'Coverage >95%'}
    ],
    notes:[],
    attachments:[]
  },
  'BLD-024':{
    title:'Fix timeout en batch processing >10k registros',
    id:'BLD-SPR14-024', proj:'Migración Core Banking', type:'BUG', sp:5, status:'In Progress', pct:50,
    date:'04 Abr 2026', desc:'El procesamiento batch de transacciones falla con timeout cuando supera los 10.000 registros. Necesario implementar procesamiento por chunks con progress tracking.',
    subtasks:[
      {title:'1. Reproducir y perfilar',desc:'Ejecutar batch con 15k registros en PRE. Profiling con py-spy. Identificar cuello de botella.',tags:['Python','Profiling'],hours:'1.5h',status:'completada',check:'Bottleneck: commit por registro, no bulk'},
      {title:'2. Implementar chunked processing',desc:'Procesar en chunks de 1000. Bulk insert. Progress callback. Retry por chunk.',tags:['SQLAlchemy','Python'],hours:'3h',status:'en_curso',check:'Batch de 50k en <30s'},
      {title:'3. Añadir progress tracking',desc:'Campo progress_pct en tabla batch_jobs. Endpoint GET /batch/{id}/status.',tags:['FastAPI'],hours:'1.5h',status:'pendiente',check:'Progress visible en tiempo real'}
    ],
    notes:[
      {author:'Adriana Suárez (Técnico)',text:'Encontrado: el ORM hacía INSERT uno a uno. Implementando bulk_save_objects con flush cada 1000.',time:'10:00',type:'tech'}
    ],
    attachments:['profiling_results.html']
  },
  'BLD-019':{
    title:'Refactor autenticación JWT — migrar a RS256',
    id:'BLD-SPR14-019', proj:'API Gateway v2', type:'TECH DEBT', sp:5, status:'Testing', pct:80,
    date:'07 Abr 2026', desc:'Migrar la autenticación JWT de HS256 (shared secret) a RS256 (public/private key pair) para mejorar la seguridad. Incluir rotación de claves.',
    subtasks:[
      {title:'1. Generar keypair RSA',desc:'Generar par de claves RSA 4096. Almacenar en vault. Rotar cada 90 días.',tags:['Security','Vault'],hours:'0.5h',status:'completada',check:'Keypair generado y en vault'},
      {title:'2. Refactor token generation',desc:'Cambiar PyJWT de HS256 a RS256. Actualizar login endpoint. Incluir kid en header.',tags:['PyJWT','FastAPI'],hours:'2h',status:'completada',check:'Tokens RS256 generándose correctamente'},
      {title:'3. Refactor token validation',desc:'Validar con public key. JWKS endpoint /.well-known/jwks.json. Cache de claves.',tags:['PyJWT','FastAPI'],hours:'2h',status:'completada',check:'Validación con JWKS funcional'},
      {title:'4. Tests de regresión',desc:'Verificar todos los endpoints protegidos. Test de rotación de claves. Test de tokens expirados.',tags:['Pytest','Security'],hours:'2h',status:'en_curso',check:'0 regresiones, rotación OK'},
      {title:'5. Migración gradual en PRE',desc:'Aceptar ambos formatos (HS256 legacy + RS256 nuevo) durante 2 semanas de transición.',tags:['Deployment'],hours:'1h',status:'pendiente',check:'Dual auth funcionando en PRE'}
    ],
    notes:[
      {author:'Adriana Suárez (Técnico)',text:'Implementación completa. En testing ahora: ejecutando suite de regresión. 48/52 tests passing, revisando 4 failures.',time:'16:00 Ayer',type:'tech'}
    ],
    attachments:['jwks_spec.json']
  },
  'BLD-018':{
    title:'Documentar API endpoints v2 en Swagger',
    id:'BLD-SPR14-018', proj:'Migración Core Banking', type:'TASK', sp:3, status:'Done', pct:100,
    date:'02 Abr 2026', desc:'Documentación completa de todos los endpoints v2 en formato OpenAPI 3.0 con Swagger UI.',
    subtasks:[
      {title:'1. Documentar endpoints existentes',desc:'GET/POST/PUT/DELETE para transactions, accounts, users. Request/response schemas.',tags:['Swagger','OpenAPI'],hours:'2h',status:'completada',check:'12 endpoints documentados'},
      {title:'2. Añadir ejemplos',desc:'Ejemplos de request/response para cada endpoint. Códigos de error con descripciones.',tags:['Swagger'],hours:'1h',status:'completada',check:'Ejemplos para todos los endpoints'},
      {title:'3. Revisión con el equipo',desc:'PR review con PM y QA. Incorporar feedback.',tags:['Docs','Review'],hours:'0.5h',status:'completada',check:'PR aprobado y mergeado'}
    ],
    notes:[
      {author:'Adriana Suárez (Técnico)',text:'Completada y mergeada. PM ha validado la documentación.',time:'17:00 02-Abr',type:'tech'}
    ],
    attachments:['openapi_v2_final.yaml']
  }
};

function openBuildDetail(key){
  cpSetContexto('build', key);
  const d=BUILD_DATA[key];if(!d)return;
  document.getElementById('bd-title').textContent=d.title;
  document.getElementById('bd-id').textContent=d.id+' · '+d.proj;
  let h='';
  const tc=d.type==='FEATURE'?'var(--acc-gn)':d.type==='BUG'?'var(--acc-rd)':d.type==='TECH DEBT'?'var(--acc-or)':'var(--acc-bl)';
  h+='<div class="dm-row">';
  h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Tipo</label><div class="dm-badges"><span class="dm-badge" style="background:'+tc.replace(')',',0.12)').replace('var(','rgba(')+';;color:'+tc+'">'+d.type+'</span></div></div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Story Points</label><div class="val" style="font-family:\'JetBrains Mono\',monospace">'+d.sp+' SP</div></div>';
  h+='</div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-row">';
  h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Estado</label><div class="val">'+d.status+'</div></div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Fecha entrega</label><div class="val" style="font-family:\'JetBrains Mono\',monospace;font-size:12px;color:'+(d.date.includes('04 Abr')?'var(--acc-rd)':'var(--tx2)')+'"><svg viewBox="0 0 12 12" width="10" height="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round" style="vertical-align:-1px;margin-right:2px"><rect x="1" y="2" width="10" height="9" rx="1.5"/><line x1="1" y1="5" x2="11" y2="5"/><line x1="4" y1="0.5" x2="4" y2="3"/><line x1="8" y1="0.5" x2="8" y2="3"/></svg>'+d.date+'</div></div>';
  h+='</div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Descripción</label><div class="val" style="font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;color:var(--tx2)">'+d.desc+'</div></div>';
  // Progress
  const col=d.pct===100?'var(--acc-gn)':d.pct>=50?'var(--acc-pu)':d.pct>0?'var(--acc-or)':'var(--tx3)';
  h+='<div class="dm-progress"><div class="dm-pbar"><div class="dm-pbar-fill" style="width:'+d.pct+'%;background:'+col+'"></div></div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-pbar-label"><span>Progreso</span><strong style="color:'+col+'">'+d.pct+'%</strong></div></div>';
  // Subtasks
  h+='<div class="dm-subtasks"><h4>Subtareas ('+d.subtasks.length+')</h4>';
  d.subtasks.forEach(s=>{
    const sc=s.status==='completada'?'var(--acc-gn)':s.status==='en_curso'?'var(--acc-or)':'var(--tx3)';
    const sl=s.status==='completada'?'HECHO':s.status==='en_curso'?'EN CURSO':'PENDIENTE';
    h+='<div class="dm-st" style="border-left:3px solid '+sc+'">';
    h+='<div class="dm-st-hours" style="color:'+sc+'">'+s.hours+'</div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st-title">'+s.title+'</div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st-desc">'+s.desc+'</div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st-meta">';
    s.tags.forEach(t=>{h+='<span class="dm-st-tag" style="background:rgba(188,140,255,.1);color:var(--acc-pu)">'+t+'</span>'});
    h+='</div>';
    if(s.check)h+='<div class="dm-st-check">✓ '+s.check+'</div>';
    h+='</div>';
  });
  h+='</div>';
  // Attachments
  h+='<div class="dm-attach"><div class="dm-attach-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"><span class="ico-svg sm">'+SVG.attach+'</span> Adjuntar documento</div>';
  d.attachments.forEach(a=>{h+='<div class="dm-attach-file"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M3.5 1.5h4l3.5 3.5v7.5a1 1 0 01-1 1h-6.5a1 1 0 01-1-1v-10a1 1 0 011-1z" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M7.5 1.5v3.5h3.5"/></svg></span> '+a+'</div>'});
  h+='</div>';
  // Chat integrado con PM del proyecto
  h+='<div class="dm-chat"><div class="dm-chat-h"><div class="ico" style="background:rgba(188,140,255,.12);color:var(--acc-pu)">'+SVG.chat+'</div><div class="title">Chat — '+d.proj+'</div><div class="participants">Tú · PM Proyecto</div></div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-chat-body" id="chat-build-'+key+'">';
  d.notes.forEach(n=>{
    const cls=n.type==='system'?'system':'tech';
    const role=n.type==='system'?'SISTEMA':'TÉCNICO';
    h+='<div class="dm-chat-msg '+cls+'"><div class="msg-author"><span>'+n.author+' <span class="msg-role">'+role+'</span></span><span class="msg-time">'+n.time+'</span></div>'+n.text+'</div>';
  });
  h+='</div>';
  h+='<div class="dm-chat-input"><input placeholder="Mensaje al PM del proyecto..." onclick="event.stopPropagation()" onkeydown="if(event.key===\'Enter\'){event.stopPropagation();addChatMsg(\'build\',\''+key+'\')}"><button onclick="event.stopPropagation();addChatMsg(\'build\',\''+key+'\')">Enviar</button><button class="btn-meet" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" title="Iniciar reunión">'+SVG.video+'</button></div>';
  h+='</div>';
  document.getElementById('bd-body').innerHTML=h;
  document.getElementById('build-detail').classList.add('show');
}

/* ═══════ KPI Detail ═══════ */
function showKpiDetail(type){
  const titles={carga:'Desglose de carga actual',sla:'SLAs en riesgo',resueltas:'Incidencias resueltas este mes',tmr:'Tiempo medio de resolución',p1:'Detalle P1 Crítica'};
  document.getElementById('kd-title').textContent=titles[type]||'Detalle';
  let h='';
  if(type==='carga'){
    h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Carga total</label><div class="sv" style="font-size:32px">45%</div></div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-progress"><div class="dm-pbar" style="height:10px"><div class="dm-pbar-fill" style="width:45%;background:var(--acc-bl)"></div></div></div>';
    h+='<div style="margin-top:16px">';
    h+='<div class="dm-st" style="border-left:3px solid var(--acc-rd)"><div class="dm-st-title">RUN — Incidencias</div><div class="dm-st-desc">4 incidencias activas: 1×P1 + 2×P2 + 1×P3 = 25% carga</div><div class="dm-st-hours" style="color:var(--acc-rd)">25%</div></div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st" style="border-left:3px solid var(--acc-pu)"><div class="dm-st-title">BUILD — Sprint 14</div><div class="dm-st-desc">3 tareas activas (In Progress + Testing) = 20% carga</div><div class="dm-st-hours" style="color:var(--acc-pu)">20%</div></div>';
    h+='</div>';
  }else if(type==='sla'){
    h+='<div class="alert danger" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="closeDetail(\'kpi-detail\');openRunDetail(\'INC-012\')"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor"><circle cx="7" cy="7" r="5"/><path d="M7 4.5v3" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="7" cy="9.5" r=".8" fill="#fff"/></svg></span> <strong>INC-012</strong> — P1 — Vence en 45 min — CORE-DB-01</div>';
    h+='<div class="alert warn" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="closeDetail(\'kpi-detail\');openRunDetail(\'INC-089\')"><span class="ico-svg sm"><svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor"><path d="M7 1.5L1 12.5h12z"/><path d="M7 6v3" stroke="#0d1117" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="7" cy="11" r=".7" fill="#0d1117"/></svg></span> <strong>INC-089</strong> — P2 — Al 80% del SLA — API-GW-01</div>';
  }else if(type==='resueltas'){
    h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Abril 2026</label><div class="sv" style="font-size:32px">23</div><div class="sv-sub">+15% vs marzo (20 incidencias)</div></div>';
    h+='<div style="margin-top:12px">';
    h+='<div class="dm-st" style="border-left:3px solid var(--acc-rd)"><div class="dm-st-title">P1 Críticas</div><div class="dm-st-hours" style="color:var(--acc-rd)">2</div></div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st" style="border-left:3px solid var(--acc-or)"><div class="dm-st-title">P2 Altas</div><div class="dm-st-hours" style="color:var(--acc-or)">8</div></div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st" style="border-left:3px solid var(--acc-bl)"><div class="dm-st-title">P3 Medias</div><div class="dm-st-hours" style="color:var(--acc-bl)">10</div></div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st" style="border-left:3px solid var(--tx3)"><div class="dm-st-title">P4 Bajas</div><div class="dm-st-hours" style="color:var(--tx3)">3</div></div>';
    h+='</div>';
  }else if(type==='tmr'){
    h+='<div class="dm-field"><label>Tiempo medio resolución</label><div class="sv" style="font-size:32px;color:var(--acc-gn)">2.4h</div><div class="sv-sub">Objetivo: 3h — <strong style="color:var(--acc-gn)">20% por debajo</strong></div></div>';
    h+='<div style="margin-top:12px">';
    h+='<div class="dm-st" style="border-left:3px solid var(--acc-rd)"><div class="dm-st-title">TMR P1</div><div class="dm-st-desc">Objetivo: 2h</div><div class="dm-st-hours" style="color:var(--acc-gn)">1.5h</div></div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st" style="border-left:3px solid var(--acc-or)"><div class="dm-st-title">TMR P2</div><div class="dm-st-desc">Objetivo: 4h</div><div class="dm-st-hours" style="color:var(--acc-gn)">2.8h</div></div>';
    h+='<div class="dm-st" style="border-left:3px solid var(--acc-bl)"><div class="dm-st-title">TMR P3</div><div class="dm-st-desc">Objetivo: 8h</div><div class="dm-st-hours" style="color:var(--acc-gn)">3.2h</div></div>';
    h+='</div>';
  }else if(type==='p1'){
    closeDetail('kpi-detail');openRunDetail('INC-012');return;
  }
  document.getElementById('kd-body').innerHTML=h;
  document.getElementById('kpi-detail').classList.add('show');
}

/* ═══════ Chat in Modal ═══════ */
function addChatMsg(type,key){
  const modal=type==='run'?'run-detail':'build-detail';
  const input=document.querySelector('#'+modal+' .dm-chat-input input');
  const txt=input.value.trim();if(!txt)return;
  const body=document.getElementById('chat-'+type+'-'+key);
  const nombre = _dashboardData?.nombre || 'Técnico';
  body.innerHTML+='<div class="dm-chat-msg tech"><div class="msg-author"><span>'+nombre+' <span class="msg-role">TÉCNICO</span></span><span class="msg-time">Ahora</span></div>'+txt+'</div>';
  input.value='';
  body.scrollTop=body.scrollHeight;
  // Persist note via estado endpoint (adds to chat in DB)
  if(type==='run') cambiarEstadoIncidencia(key, null, txt).catch(()=>{});
  // For build, note is sent but estado is not changed
}

/* ═══════ Terminal (xterm.js + WebSocket) ═══════ */
let _xterm = null;
let _xtermFit = null;
let _termWs = null;
let _termConnected = false;

function initXterm(){
  if(_xterm) return;
  const container = document.getElementById('term-body');
  if(!container) return;
  // Clear mock content
  container.innerHTML = '';
  container.style.padding = '0';
  _xterm = new Terminal({
    cursorBlink: true,
    fontSize: 13,
    fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace",
    theme: {
      background: '#0d1117',
      foreground: '#e6edf3',
      cursor: '#58a6ff',
      selectionBackground: '#264f78',
      black: '#484f58', red: '#ff7b72', green: '#3fb950', yellow: '#d29922',
      blue: '#58a6ff', magenta: '#bc8cff', cyan: '#39d353', white: '#b1bac4',
    },
    scrollback: 5000,
    convertEol: true,
  });
  _xtermFit = new FitAddon.FitAddon();
  _xterm.loadAddon(_xtermFit);
  _xterm.open(container);
  _xtermFit.fit();
  _xterm.writeln('\x1b[90mTerminal SSH — Selecciona un servidor y haz click en Conectar\x1b[0m');
  // Resize on window resize
  window.addEventListener('resize', () => { if(_xtermFit) _xtermFit.fit(); });
}

async function loadServidores(){
  const servers = await apiFetch('/servidores');
  const sel = document.getElementById('term-server');
  if(!servers || !sel) return;
  sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Seleccionar servidor --</option>';
  servers.forEach(s => {
    sel.innerHTML += `<option value="${s.codigo}">${s.codigo} — ${s.nombre} (${s.ip})</option>`;
  });
}

function termConnect(){
  const sel = document.getElementById('term-server');
  const srv = sel.value;
  if(!srv){ alert('Selecciona un servidor'); return; }

  initXterm();
  if(_termWs){ _termWs.close(); _termWs = null; }

  const linkSel = document.getElementById('term-link');
  const linkVal = linkSel ? linkSel.value : '';
  let vinculado_tipo = null, vinculado_id = null;
  if(linkVal){
    vinculado_tipo = linkVal.startsWith('INC') ? 'run' : 'build';
    vinculado_id = linkVal;
  }

  _xterm.clear();
  _xterm.writeln(`\x1b[36mConectando a ${srv}...\x1b[0m`);

  const wsProto = location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss:' : 'ws:';
  _termWs = new WebSocket(`${wsProto}//${location.host}/ws/tech/terminal`);

  _termWs.onopen = () => {
    // Step 1: send JWT
    _termWs.send(getToken());
    // Step 2: send config
    setTimeout(() => {
      _termWs.send(JSON.stringify({
        servidor: srv,
        vinculado_tipo: vinculado_tipo,
        vinculado_id: vinculado_id,
      }));
    }, 100);
    _termConnected = true;
    document.getElementById('term-conn').style.display = 'flex';
  };

  _termWs.onmessage = (e) => {
    _xterm.write(e.data);
  };

  _termWs.onclose = () => {
    _termConnected = false;
    _xterm.writeln('\r\n\x1b[33mConexión cerrada\x1b[0m');
    document.getElementById('term-conn').style.display = 'none';
  };

  _termWs.onerror = (e) => {
    _xterm.writeln('\r\n\x1b[31mError de conexión WebSocket\x1b[0m');
    _termConnected = false;
  };

  // Forward keystrokes to WebSocket
  _xterm.onData((data) => {
    if(_termWs && _termWs.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN){
      _termWs.send(data);
    }
  });
}

function termDisconnect(){
  if(_termWs){ _termWs.close(); _termWs = null; }
  _termConnected = false;
  if(_xterm) _xterm.writeln('\r\n\x1b[33mDesconectado\x1b[0m');
}

// Load servers when tab-3 (Terminal) is shown
const _origSwitchTab = switchTab;
switchTab = function(n){
  _origSwitchTab(n);
  if(n === 3){
    initXterm();
    loadServidores();
    if(_xtermFit) setTimeout(()=>_xtermFit.fit(), 100);
  }
};

// Keep legacy mock for fallback
const TERM_RESPONSES={
  'ping':{out:'PING 10.0.1.50 (10.0.1.50) 56(84) bytes of data.\n64 bytes from 10.0.1.50: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=0.432 ms\n64 bytes from 10.0.1.50: icmp_seq=2 ttl=64 time=0.389 ms\n64 bytes from 10.0.1.50: icmp_seq=3 ttl=64 time=0.401 ms\n\n--- 10.0.1.50 ping statistics ---\n3 packets transmitted, 3 received, 0% packet loss, time 2003ms'},
  'systemctl status postgresql':{out:'● postgresql.service - PostgreSQL database server\n     Loaded: loaded (/lib/systemd/system/postgresql.service; enabled)\n     Active: active (running) since Mon 2026-04-06 08:15:22 CET; 6h ago\n   Main PID: 1234 (postgres)\n      Tasks: 12 (limit: 4915)\n     Memory: 256.4M\n        CPU: 45.231s'},
  'pg_stat_activity':{out:' pid  | state  | query                    | wait_event | client_addr\n------+--------+--------------------------+------------+-------------\n 1256 | active | SELECT * FROM transact.. | NULL       | 10.0.2.10\n 1257 | idle   | NULL                     | ClientRead | 10.0.2.10\n 1260 | active | INSERT INTO audit_log..  | NULL       | 10.0.1.55\n 1289 | idle   | NULL                     | ClientRead | 10.0.3.20\n(4 rows)'},
  'df -h':{out:'Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on\n/dev/sda1       100G   62G   38G  62% /\n/dev/sdb1       500G  312G  188G  63% /data\ntmpfs           8.0G  1.2G  6.8G  15% /dev/shm'},
  'uptime':{out:' 14:35:22 up 45 days, 12:20,  3 users,  load average: 0.42, 0.38, 0.35'},
  'whoami':{out:'adriana.suarez'},
  'cat /var/log/postgresql/postgresql-15-main.log | tail -5':{out:'2026-04-06 14:20:11 CET [1234-1] LOG:  checkpoint starting: time\n2026-04-06 14:20:15 CET [1234-2] LOG:  checkpoint complete\n2026-04-06 14:22:01 CET [1256-1] WARNING:  connection pool reaching 80%\n2026-04-06 14:23:45 CET [1260-1] ERROR:  heartbeat timeout after 5000ms\n2026-04-06 14:23:45 CET [1260-2] LOG:  attempting failover...'},
  'ls':{out:'backup/  config/  data/  logs/  scripts/  tmp/'},
  'ls -la':{out:'total 48\ndrwxr-xr-x  8 postgres postgres 4096 Apr  6 14:00 .\ndrwxr-xr-x  3 root     root     4096 Feb 20 10:00 ..\ndrwxr-xr-x  2 postgres postgres 4096 Apr  5 03:00 backup\ndrwxr-xr-x  2 postgres postgres 4096 Apr  1 12:00 config\ndrwxr-xr-x 14 postgres postgres 4096 Apr  6 14:23 data\ndrwxr-xr-x  2 postgres postgres 4096 Apr  6 14:23 logs\ndrwxr-xr-x  2 postgres postgres 4096 Mar 25 09:00 scripts\ndrwxrwxrwt  2 postgres postgres 4096 Apr  6 12:00 tmp'},
  'show server_version':{out:'server_version\n----------------\n 15.6\n(1 row)'}
};
let _termHistory=[];
let _termHistIdx=-1;

function termConnect(){
  const sel=document.getElementById('term-server');
  const srv=sel.value;
  if(!srv)return;
  const body=document.getElementById('term-body');
  const line=document.getElementById('term-input-line');
  const prompt=document.getElementById('term-prompt');
  const conn=document.getElementById('term-conn');
  // Clear and show connection
  const ip=sel.options[sel.selectedIndex].text.match(/\(([^)]+)\)/)?.[1]||'';
  body.querySelectorAll('.term-line,.term-output:not(:first-child)').forEach(e=>e.remove());
  const welcome=body.querySelector('.term-output');
  welcome.innerHTML='Conectando a <span style="color:var(--acc-bl)">'+srv+'</span> ('+ip+')...\n\n<span style="color:var(--acc-gn)">✓ Conexión SSH establecida</span>\n<span style="color:var(--acc-or)">⚠ Sesión vinculada a: '+document.getElementById('term-link').value+'</span>\n<span style="color:var(--tx3)">Todos los comandos serán registrados en tech_terminal_log</span>\n';
  prompt.textContent='adriana@'+srv+':~$ ';
  line.style.display='flex';
  conn.style.display='flex';
  document.getElementById('term-input').focus();
}

function termExec(){
  const input=document.getElementById('term-input');
  const cmd=input.value.trim();
  if(!cmd)return;
  _termHistory.push(cmd);_termHistIdx=_termHistory.length;
  const body=document.getElementById('term-body');
  const line=document.getElementById('term-input-line');
  const srv=document.getElementById('term-server').value;
  // Add command line
  const cmdDiv=document.createElement('div');
  cmdDiv.className='term-line';
  cmdDiv.innerHTML='<span class="term-prompt">adriana@'+srv+':~$ </span><span class="term-cmd">'+cmd+'</span>';
  body.insertBefore(cmdDiv,line);
  // Add output
  let output='bash: '+cmd+': command simulated';
  const lower=cmd.toLowerCase();
  for(const[k,v]of Object.entries(TERM_RESPONSES)){
    if(lower.includes(k.toLowerCase())){output=v.out;break}
  }
  if(lower==='clear'){body.querySelectorAll('.term-line,.term-output').forEach(e=>{if(!e.classList.contains('term-input-line'))e.remove()});input.value='';return}
  const outDiv=document.createElement('div');
  outDiv.className='term-output';
  outDiv.textContent=output;
  body.insertBefore(outDiv,line);
  input.value='';
  body.scrollTop=body.scrollHeight;
}

/* ═══════ Drag & Drop ═══════ */
let _dEl=null;
function kbStart(e){_dEl=e.target.closest('.kk,.sk');if(_dEl)_dEl.classList.add('dragging');e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move';e.stopPropagation()}
function kbOver(e){e.preventDefault();e.dataTransfer.dropEffect='move';e.currentTarget.classList.add('drag-over')}
function kbLeave(e){e.currentTarget.classList.remove('drag-over')}
function kbDrop(e){
  e.preventDefault();e.currentTarget.classList.remove('drag-over');
  if(!_dEl)return;_dEl.classList.remove('dragging');
  const body=e.currentTarget.querySelector('.kb-body,.sb-body');
  if(body){
    body.appendChild(_dEl);
    updateCounts(e.currentTarget.closest('.kanban,.sprint-board'));
    const col=e.currentTarget.dataset.status;
    const p=_dEl.querySelector('.kk-pct');const b=_dEl.querySelector('.kk-bar-fill');
    if(col==='en_curso'||col==='progress'){if(p){p.textContent='40%';p.style.color='var(--acc-or)'}if(b){b.style.width='40%';b.style.background='var(--acc-or)'}_dEl.style.opacity='1'}
    else if(col==='pendiente'||col==='testing'){if(p){p.textContent='60%';p.style.color='var(--tx3)'}if(b){b.style.width='60%';b.style.background='var(--acc-cy)'}_dEl.style.opacity='1'}
    else if(col==='resuelta'||col==='done'){if(p){p.textContent='100%';p.style.color='var(--acc-gn)'}if(b){b.style.width='100%';b.style.background='var(--acc-gn)'}_dEl.style.opacity='.7'}
    else if(col==='asignada'||col==='todo'){if(p){p.textContent='0%';p.style.color='var(--acc-bl)'}if(b){b.style.width='0%'}_dEl.style.opacity='1'}
    // API call for state change
    const cardId = _dEl.dataset?.id || _dEl.querySelector('[data-id]')?.dataset?.id;
    const board = e.currentTarget.closest('.kanban,.sprint-board');
    if(cardId && board){
      const ESTADO_MAP_RUN = {'asignada':'QUEUED','en_curso':'EN_CURSO','pendiente':'ESCALADO','resuelta':'RESUELTO'};
      const ESTADO_MAP_BUILD = {'todo':'Backlog','progress':'En Progreso','testing':'Testing','done':'Completado'};
      if(board.classList.contains('kanban') && ESTADO_MAP_RUN[col]){
        cambiarEstadoIncidencia(cardId, ESTADO_MAP_RUN[col]).catch(()=>{});
      } else if(ESTADO_MAP_BUILD[col]){
        cambiarEstadoTarea(cardId, ESTADO_MAP_BUILD[col]).catch(()=>{});
      }
    }
  }
  _dEl=null;
}
function updateCounts(board){if(!board)return;board.querySelectorAll('.kb-col,.sb-col').forEach(c=>{const n=c.querySelectorAll('.kk,.sk').length;const cnt=c.querySelector('.kcnt');if(cnt)cnt.textContent=n})}

/* ═══════ Copilot Sidebar ═══════ */
function toggleCopilot(){
  const p=document.getElementById('cp-panel');
  const f=document.getElementById('cp-fab');
  p.classList.toggle('open');
  f.style.display=p.classList.contains('open')?'none':'flex';
}
/* ═══════ COPILOTO IA (Claude API) ═══════ */
let _cpContexto = {tipo: null, id: null};
let _cpHistory = [];

function cpSetContexto(tipo, id){ _cpContexto = {tipo, id}; }

function cpSend(txt){
  const msgs=document.getElementById('cp-msgs');
  const initials = (_dashboardData?.nombre || 'TU').split(' ').map(w=>w[0]).join('').substring(0,2).toUpperCase();
  msgs.innerHTML+='<div class="cp-msg user"><div class="cp-msg-av">'+initials+'</div><div class="cp-msg-bub">'+txt+'</div></div>';
  msgs.scrollTop=msgs.scrollHeight;
  _cpHistory.push({role:'user', text:txt});

  // Show loading
  const loadingId = 'cp-loading-'+Date.now();
  msgs.innerHTML+='<div class="cp-msg bot" id="'+loadingId+'"><div class="cp-msg-av">CP</div><div class="cp-msg-bub" style="color:var(--tx3)">Consultando BD + Claude API...</div></div>';
  msgs.scrollTop=msgs.scrollHeight;

  apiFetch('/copiloto/chat', {
    method: 'POST',
    body: JSON.stringify({
      pregunta: txt,
      contexto_tipo: _cpContexto.tipo,
      contexto_id: _cpContexto.id,
    })
  }).then(r => {
    const el = document.getElementById(loadingId);
    if(!r || !r.respuesta){
      if(el) el.querySelector('.cp-msg-bub').innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--acc-rd)">Error al obtener respuesta</span>';
      return;
    }
    // Simple markdown → HTML
    let html = r.respuesta
      .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
      .replace(/\*(.+?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
      .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code style="background:var(--bg-el);padding:1px 4px;border-radius:3px;font-size:11px">$1</code>')
      .replace(/^- (.+)$/gm, '• $1')
      .replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
    // Add fuentes tag
    if(r.fuentes && r.fuentes.length){
      html += '<br><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--tx3)">Fuentes: '+r.fuentes.join(', ')+'</span>';
    }
    if(el) el.querySelector('.cp-msg-bub').innerHTML = html;
    msgs.scrollTop = msgs.scrollHeight;
    _cpHistory.push({role:'assistant', text:r.respuesta});
  }).catch(e => {
    const el = document.getElementById(loadingId);
    if(el) el.querySelector('.cp-msg-bub').innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--acc-rd)">Error: '+e.message+'</span>';
  });
}

function cpSendInput(){const i=document.getElementById('cp-in');const t=i.value.trim();if(!t)return;cpSend(t);i.value=''}

/* ═══════ FILE UPLOAD ═══════ */
async function uploadChatFile(input){
  if(!input.files||!input.files[0]||!_activeSalaId) return;
  const fd=new FormData();
  fd.append('file',input.files[0]);
  try{
    const r=await fetch(API_BASE+'/chat/salas/'+_activeSalaId+'/archivos',{
      method:'POST',
      headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+getToken()},
      body:fd
    });
    if(r.ok){ renderFiles(); }
    else{ console.error('Upload failed',r.status); }
  }catch(e){ console.error('Upload error',e); }
}

/* ═══════ MEET URL (configurable) ═══════ */
const MEET_URL = localStorage.getItem('pmo_meet_url') || 'https://meet.jit.si/cognitive-pmo';
function openMeet(roomId){ window.open(MEET_URL+'?room='+(roomId||_activeSalaId||'general'),'_blank') }
function openMeetScreen(roomId){ window.open(MEET_URL+'?room='+(roomId||_activeSalaId||'general')+'&screen=true','_blank') }

/* ═══════ NOTIFICACIONES (bell) ═══════ */
function toggleNotifPanel(e){e.stopPropagation();var p=document.getElementById('notif-panel');p.classList.toggle('open');if(p.classList.contains('open'))loadNotif();}
function loadNotif(){var tk=getToken();if(!tk)return;fetch('/api/notificaciones',{headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+tk}}).then(function(r){return r.json()}).then(function(d){if(!Array.isArray(d))return;var u=d.filter(function(n){return!n.leida}).length;var b=document.getElementById('notif-badge');if(b){b.textContent=u;b.className='notif-badge'+(u>0?' show':'');}var el=document.getElementById('notif-list');if(!el)return;if(!d.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="notif-empty">Sin notificaciones</div>';return;}var ic={asignacion:'\u2705',estado:'\u{1F504}',alerta:'\u26A0\uFE0F',urgente:'\u{1F6A8}',info:'\u{1F4AC}'};el.innerHTML=d.map(function(n){var ago=nAgo(n.created_at),cls=n.leida?'':' unread',t=n.tipo||'info';return'<div class="notif-item'+cls+'" onclick="nClick(event,'+n.id+')"><div class="notif-ico '+t+'">'+(ic[t]||'\u{1F4AC}')+'</div><div class="notif-body"><div class="notif-title">'+nEsc(n.titulo)+'</div><div class="notif-msg">'+nEsc(n.mensaje||'')+'</div><div class="notif-time">'+ago+'</div></div></div>';}).join('');}).catch(function(){});}
function nEsc(s){var d=document.createElement('div');d.textContent=s;return d.innerHTML;}
function nAgo(dt){if(!dt)return'';var d=new Date(dt+(dt.indexOf('Z')<0&&dt.indexOf('+')<0?'Z':''));var s=Math.floor((Date.now()-d.getTime())/1000);if(s<60)return'ahora';if(s<3600)return Math.floor(s/60)+'m';if(s<86400)return Math.floor(s/3600)+'h';return Math.floor(s/86400)+'d';}
function nClick(e,id){e.stopPropagation();fetch('/api/notificaciones/'+id+'/leer',{method:'PUT',headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+getToken()}}).then(function(){loadNotif()}).catch(function(){});}
function notifMarkAll(e){e.stopPropagation();fetch('/api/notificaciones/leer-todas',{method:'PUT',headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+getToken()}}).then(function(){loadNotif()}).catch(function(){});}
setInterval(function(){if(getToken())loadNotif()},30000);
document.addEventListener('click',function(e){var p=document.getElementById('notif-panel');if(p&&p.classList.contains('open')&&!e.target.closest('.notif-bell'))p.classList.remove('open');});
loadNotif();
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

## SECTION D · Configuración / infra


### FILE: docker-compose.yml
```yaml
version: '3.9'
services:
  api:
    build: ./backend
    ports:
      - "8088:8088"
    env_file: .env
    restart: unless-stopped
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
  frontend:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "3030:80"
    volumes:
      - ./frontend:/usr/share/nginx/html:ro
      - ./frontend/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro
    depends_on:
      - api
    restart: unless-stopped
```

### FILE: backend/Dockerfile
```dockerfile
FROM python:3.11-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
COPY . .
EXPOSE 8088
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8088"]
```

### FILE: frontend/nginx.conf
```nginx
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name localhost;
    root /usr/share/nginx/html;
    index index.html;

    # ─── ARCHIVOS ESTÁTICOS ───
    # Si el archivo existe en disco, sírvelo directamente.
    location ~* \.(html|css|js|ico|png|jpg|jpeg|gif|svg|woff|woff2|ttf|eot|map|json|txt|md)$ {
        try_files $uri =404;
        expires 1h;
        add_header Cache-Control "public, no-transform";
    }

    # ─── WEBSOCKET PROXY (terminal SSH) ───
    location /ws/ {
        proxy_pass http://api:8088/ws/;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_read_timeout 1800s;
        proxy_send_timeout 1800s;
    }

    # ─── API PROXY (prefijo /api/) ───
    location /api/ {
        proxy_pass http://api:8088/api/;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_read_timeout 600s;
        proxy_connect_timeout 10s;
        proxy_send_timeout 600s;
    }

    # ─── P97 FASE 4: CEO Dashboard P96 v6 (estático) ───
    # NOTA: usamos `root` (no `alias`) porque URL /p96/ y path filesystem
    # frontend/p96/ coinciden 1:1. Con alias había problemas de internal
    # redirect cayendo al location / catch-all (que sirve el index del shell).
    location ^~ /p96/ {
        root /usr/share/nginx/html;
        index index.html;
        try_files $uri $uri/ =404;
        add_header Cache-Control "no-cache, must-revalidate";
    }

    # ─── TODO LO DEMÁS → BACKEND ───
    location / {
        proxy_pass http://api:8088;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_read_timeout 600s;
        proxy_connect_timeout 10s;
        proxy_send_timeout 600s;
        client_max_body_size 500M;

        # Si el backend devuelve 404, sirve index.html (SPA fallback)
        proxy_intercept_errors on;
        error_page 404 = /index.html;
    }

}
```

### FILE: frontend/nginx.conf.backup
```
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name localhost;
    root /usr/share/nginx/html;
    index index.html;

    # Flowise proxy (already prefixed with /api/)
    location /api/ {
        proxy_pass http://api:8088/api/;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_read_timeout 600s;
        proxy_connect_timeout 10s;
        proxy_send_timeout 600s;
    }

    # Backend API routes (no /api/ prefix in the URL)
    location ~ ^/(health|team|cartera|disponibilidad|kanban|incidencias|asignar|buffer|proyectos|prediccion|presupuestos|cognitive|pmo|catalogo|build|run|dev|documentacion|auth|rbac|directorio|cmdb|agents|pipeline)(/|$) {
        proxy_pass http://api:8088;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_read_timeout 600s;
        proxy_connect_timeout 10s;
        proxy_send_timeout 600s;
        client_max_body_size 500M;
    }

    location / {
        try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;
    }
}
```

```
Constraints:
  rbac_usuarios_pkey: PRIMARY KEY (id_usuario)
  rbac_usuarios_email_key: UNIQUE (email)
  rbac_usuarios_id_role_fkey: FOREIGN KEY (id_role) REFERENCES rbac_roles(id_role)
```

### Vistas P96 — definiciones
```sql
-- v_p96_run_cis
 SELECT ca.id_activo AS id,
    ca.nombre AS name,
    ca.capa AS layer,
    ca.criticidad AS crit,
    NULL::character varying AS silo,
    ca.tipo AS type,
    COALESCE(ca.fabricante, ca.proveedor) AS vendor,
    ca.coste_mensual AS opex,
    COALESCE(( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM incidencias_run ir
          WHERE ir.ci_afectado::text = ca.codigo::text AND (ir.estado::text <> ALL (ARRAY['RESUELTO'::character varying, 'CERRADO'::character varying, 'CLOSED'::character varying]::text[]))), 0::bigint) AS inc,
    NULL::numeric AS sla,
    NULL::numeric AS slo,
    COALESCE(ca.responsable_tecnico, ca.propietario) AS owner,
    ca.ubicacion AS room,
    NULL::character varying AS runbook
   FROM cmdb_activos ca;

-- v_p96_run_incidents
 SELECT ir.ticket_id AS id,
    ir.incidencia_detectada AS title,
    ir.prioridad_ia AS prio,
    ir.estado AS status,
    ir.ci_afectado AS ci,
    ir.timestamp_creacion AS opened,
    ir.sla_limite AS sla,
    ir.impacto_negocio AS impact,
    ir.tecnico_asignado AS owner,
    NULL::jsonb AS team,
    NULL::jsonb AS steps
   FROM incidencias_run ir;

-- v_p96_build_portfolio
 SELECT bl.id_proyecto,
    bl.nombre,
    bl.silo,
    bl.pm_asignado AS pm,
    round(bl.presupuesto_bac / 1000::numeric) AS bac_k,
    bl.gate_actual AS gate,
        CASE
            WHEN bl.presupuesto_consumido > 0::numeric THEN round(bl.presupuesto_bac * bl.progreso_pct::numeric / 100.0 / bl.presupuesto_consumido, 2)
            ELSE 1.00
        END AS cpi,
        CASE
            WHEN bl.presupuesto_bac > 0::numeric AND bl.fecha_inicio IS NOT NULL AND bl.fecha_fin_prevista IS NOT NULL AND bl.fecha_fin_prevista > bl.fecha_inicio THEN round(bl.progreso_pct::numeric / 100.0 / NULLIF(EXTRACT(epoch FROM now() - bl.fecha_inicio::timestamp with time zone) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(epoch FROM bl.fecha_fin_prevista - bl.fecha_inicio), 0::numeric), 0::numeric), 2)
            ELSE 1.00
        END AS spi,
    bl.prioridad AS prio,
    bl.risk_score AS risk,
    bl.progreso_pct AS prog,
    bl.ai_lead
   FROM build_live bl;

```
